fact_box.one_line_summary: Napoleon, ɗan Corsica, wani hazikin soja ne na juyin juya hali wanda ya ci Turai, kuma ya kafa harsashin jihohin zamani tare da Code Civil, mutum ne mai rikitarwa.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar dabarun soja da cin nasarar Turai
Kafa Code Civil da kafa harsashin dokar farar hula ta zamani
Ci gaba da manufofin Haskakawa da kafa asalin ƙasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bayan nasarorin soja, ya kafa harsashin jihohin zamani tare da tsarin shari'a, gudanarwa, da ilimi, yana da tasiri mai girma a Turai.

napoleon-bonaparte.epic:
Napoleon Bonaparte, an haife shi a watan Agusta mai zafi na shekara ta 1769, a kan tsaunukan Corsica, wanda Faransa ta sabunta, a tsakanin raƙuman ruwa masu hadari na Bahar Rum, inda aka ƙirƙira rai a cikin wutar tsohuwar aminci da kuma farkon juyin juya hali. Ya gaji ba dukiya mai daɗi ba, sai dai wani tukunyar narke na asali daban-daban, a cikin wani zamani da har yanzu yake daure da ka'idodin sarauta amma yana sha'awar kiran 'yanci na Haskakawa. Titunan Ajaccio masu ƙura da iska ba su ba shi mafaka ba daga rashin gamsuwa da iyalinsa ke fuskanta ko kuma gulmar da ke fitowa daga babban yankin Faransa, wanda ya sanya masa alamar baƙo, ɗan ƙauye mai magana da yare. A cikin wannan tukunyar narke mai kaɗaici, yunƙurin neman ilimi da fushin da ke ci masa rai game da tsarin da ya ƙi ba da matsayi ga cancanta ta gaskiya sun girma, kuma buri mai zafi ya yi tushe. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance wani fili mara kyau ga wani babban wasan kwaikwayo mai cike da jini inda nahiyar ke kan gabar halaka.

Juyin Juya Halin Faransa ya fashe cikin hargitsi na manufofi da jini, yana ba wa wani jami'in sojan ruwa da ba a san shi ba wani fili da ba a zata ba don nuna basirarsa mai ban mamaki da kuma jajircewarsa marar tausayi. Hanyoyin yaƙi na gargajiya, waɗanda aka ɗaure da tsauraran layuka da goyon bayan sarauta, sun rushe a gaban hangen nesansa mai ƙarfin hali na kama dama a cikin hargitsi da ilhami na mai farauta. Daga Siege of Toulon, inda bindigoginsa suka buga farkon kaddara, zuwa ga gaggawar gaggawa a fadin filayen Lombardy, yaƙin neman zaɓensa ya kasance wani rawa mai ban mamaki na sauri, mamaki, da kuma ƙarfin da ba za a iya jurewa ba, yana sake rubuta nahawun yaƙi. Ya jefa rundunoninsa a kan tsoffin masarautun Turai, yana farfasa tsarin su na da, kuma ya haifar da tsoro wanda ya yi ta kai kawo daga Moscow zuwa Madrid. Kowane nasara caca ce mai tsanani a kan halaka, kuma farin cikin dare marar barci da umarni ya ɗaga shi sama.

Da ya kama ragamar mulki daga gwamnatin Directory mai hargitsi, ya fara sassaƙa sabuwar Faransa, yana gina wani babban tsari wanda zai yi ta kai kawo tsawon ƙarnuka. Code Civil, wani kyakkyawan zane na ka'idodin shari'a, ya tsara daidaito da cancanta, yana kafa harsashin dokar farar hula ta zamani a duk faɗin Turai, shaida ce ga basirarsa ta gudanarwa mai ban mamaki. Amma wannan babban halitta ta zo da tsada mai yawa, inda nauyin daular ya danne mutumin da ke ƙarƙashin kambi. Kaɗaicin da ke cikin zuciyarsa a matsayin kwamanda, barazanar kisan kai ko cin amana da ba ta ƙarewa ba, da kuma zafin rashin iya tabbatar da daular dindindin tare da ƙaunatacciyarsa Josephine sun cinye ransa, suna ware shi a kan kursiyin daular. Ya kasance wani abin ban mamaki na ɗan adam, yana amfani da cikakken iko a hannu ɗaya, yayin da a ɗayan hannun kuma yake fama da buƙatu masu tsauri na burinsa da inuwar faɗuwarsa ta ƙarshe da ke ci gaba da rataye a kansa.

Ko da yake daularsa ta rushe a ƙarshe a ƙarƙashin haɗin gwiwar ƙarfin nahiyar da ke cikin tsoro, kuma ya mutu a matsayin mai gudun hijira shi kaɗai a wani tsibiri mai nisa, Napoleon Bonaparte ya kasance wani babban mutum mai tsayin daka wanda ya tsaya a kan rami tsakanin zamanai biyu. Gadonsa ba kawai an rubuta shi a cikin tarihin nasarorin soja ba, amma an sassaƙa shi a cikin tsarin shari'a, gudanarwa, da ilimi masu ɗorewa waɗanda ke ci gaba da ayyana jihohin zamani. Ya farfasa tsohuwar tsarin feudalism ba tare da juyawa ba, kuma ya tilasta wa Turai fuskantar ra'ayoyin asalin ƙasa, cancanta, da mulkin duniya, ko da yake yana amfani da mulkin kama-karya. Dan Adam yana tsaye a kan kafadunsa, yana tunani a kan zurfin abin ban mamaki na wani babban mutum mai rikitarwa wanda, duk da kasancewarsa mai mulkin kama-karya, ya ci gaba da yawancin manufofin Haskakawa, kuma inuwarsa har yanzu tana rataye a kan gine-ginen da ke tsara duniyarmu a yau.
napoleon-bonaparte.trials: Rashin jin daɗin kasancewa daga gefe da shingen harshe, da kuma mummunan gazawar yakin Rasha da kuma zaman gudun hijira biyu masu ban takaici a tsibirai.
napoleon-bonaparte.overcoming: Ya karya shingen matsayi tare da hazaka ta dabaru da kuma kwarin gwiwa marar girgiza, ya zama Sarkin Turai mafi girma, kuma ya jagoranci ci gaban wayewar ɗan adam ta hanyar dokoki da tsarin.

wisdom_lessons.quote: A cikin kamus na, babu kalmar 'ba zai yiwu ba'. Nasara tana ga wanda ya fi juriya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Iyakoki ana yin su ne ta tunanin ku. Tare da juriya da kuma himma don kada ku daina har zuwa ƙarshe, za ku iya rushe kowace shinge.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Jagora shi ne dillalin bege. Dole ne ya gabatar da hangen nasara ko da a cikin mawuyacin hali.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Shugaba ba kawai wanda ke ba da umarni ba ne, amma wanda ke sa mutane su yi imani da makoma mai haske ko da a cikin bege.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babban haɗari yana zuwa a lokacin nasara. Lokacin da kuka yi nasara, ku shirya don kalubale na gaba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Lokacin da kuka yi nasara shine farkon faduwa. Lokacin da kuka kai saman, ku yi nazari kan kanku da tawali'u kuma ku tsara abin da zai biyo baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: King Sejong, wanda ya yi baƙin ciki game da jahilcin mutanensa, ya ƙirƙiri Hangeul duk da adawa da rashin lafiya, yana jagorantar asalin ƙasa da 'yancin kai na hankali.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar Hunminjeongeum (Hangeul) don mutane
Kafa 'yancin kai na hankali da asalin ƙasa
Bude zamanin zinariya na kimiyya, noma, da al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Hangeul babban gado ne wanda ya kafa asalin Koriya, ya fahimci haƙƙin ilimi na duniya, kuma ya kafa tushen Koriya ta zamani.

king-sejong.epic:
King Sejong (Yi Do, 李祹) an haife shi a wani zamani da aka lulluɓe shi cikin hazo mai zurfi na baƙaƙen haruffa na baƙi, ba a haife shi don sarauta ba, amma hannun kaddara mai zafi da kyau ya zaɓe shi don hawa gadon sarauta. Ya zo duniya inda yawancin mutanensa ke rayuwa cikin duhun jahilci, muryoyinsu ba a ji su, hikimarsu ba a rubuta ta, har ma tunaninsu an ɗaure su da buƙatun haruffan Sinanci masu rikitarwa. Duk da cewa an kewaye shi da al'adun fada na Joseon masu ban sha'awa, wani babban wofi ya yi ta maimaita a cikin zuciyarsa mai hangen nesa, wani damuwa mai girma da ke fitowa daga babban gibin da ke tsakanin 'yan kaɗan masu ilimi da kuma yawancin masu shan wahala. Ya shaida kai tsaye wahalar manoma da ba za su iya karanta dokoki ba, yanke kaunar 'yan kasuwa da ba za su iya rubuta kayansu ba, da kuma baƙin cikin talakawa da ba za su iya bayyana korafe-koransu a harshen babbar kasa ba. Wannan zurfin tausayi da ci gaba ga talaucin ilimi na mutanensa ya ƙarfafa azama marar girgiza a cikin kusurwoyin ɗakin karatunsa a lokacin da yake yarima.

Manyan ganuwar haruffan Sinanci na gargajiya, waɗanda aka girmama su tsawon dubban shekaru a matsayin hanya ɗaya tilo ta ilimi da wayewa, sun tsaya a matsayin shinge marar wucewa, waɗanda manyan malamai masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a cikin mulkinsa ke tsare su da tsanani. Ƙirƙirar sabon rubutun asali ya kasance ƙalubale mai ƙarfin hali, kusan bidi'a, a cikin mulkin da aka ɗaure da girman ikon al'adun Sinanci. Duk da haka, King Sejong, yana cin wuta marar girgiza a ƙarƙashin nutsuwarsa mai daraja, ya fara wani bincike na sirri da haɗari, yana tattara mafi hazaka a cikin Hall of Worthies a cikin sirri. Kwanaki sun zama darare na nazarin sauti marar tsayawa, nazarin lafazin yaruka marasa adadi, da kuma neman tsarin da ko yaro zai iya koya cikin sauƙi kuma zai iya ƙunsar dukkanin fannoni na maganar ɗan adam. Adawar da manyan ministoci suka yi, waɗanda suka ɗauki wannan ƙoƙarin a matsayin wauta mai ban tsoro da ke barazana ga tushen tsarin su mai daraja, kawai ya ƙara rura wutar mai da hankalinsa na musamman.

A cikin tukunyar narke ta hankali da kuma tsantsar nufi, a tsakanin azabar cututtuka masu tsanani da kuma nauyin adawa a fada, Hunminjeongeum – "Muryoyin Daidai don Koyarwar Jama'a" – fitilar wayewa da aka haifa daga babban sadaukarwa ta kai, a ƙarshe ta bayyana. Kowace kyakkyawar shafa, kowace haɗin kai mai ma'ana, shaida ce ga hazakarsa, wani babban aikin kimiyya da aka tsara a hankali don kwaikwayi gabobin murya na bakin ɗan adam, wanda za a iya koya a cikin rabin yini. Duk da haka, sanarwar farin ciki na wannan rubutun juyin juya hali bai haɗu da yabo na duniya ba, amma da sanyin kaɗaici na babban adawa; malamai sun yi kuka a fili kuma sun yi gargaɗi, suna ɗaukar shi a matsayin cin mutunci ga gadonsu. A cikin ɗakunan fada masu natsuwa, yana fama da ciwon sukari na yau da kullun da kuma raunin gani, Sejong ya ɗauki babban nauyin wannan hangen nesa na kaɗaici, jikinsa ya raunana amma ruhinsa bai lanƙwasa ba, yana san cewa manyan kyaututtuka sau da yawa suna buƙatar babban farashi na kai.

Karnuka bayan haka, raɗaɗin babban abin da King Sejong ya kirkira har yanzu yana yaɗuwa a faɗin Koriya da ma bayanta, yana ba da shaida har abada ga ikon tausayi da hangen nesa na sarki. Gadonsa ya wuce haruffa kawai; Hangeul ba kawai ya koya wa mutane karatu ba ne, amma ya kunna ran al'umma, ya haɓaka asali na musamman, kuma ya ba mutane ikon gina makomarsu. Shi ne kamar kafadun wani babban mutum wanda Koriya ta zamani ke tsaye a kai da girman kai, ba kawai saboda rubutun 'yanci ba amma kuma saboda zamanin zinariya na ci gaban kimiyya, noma, da al'adu da suka bunƙasa a ƙarƙashin mulkinsa mai kyau. Hasken da ba ya girgiza wanda ya fito daga ƙarfin halinsa na hankali da zurfin tausayi yana ci gaba da haskaka hanya ga duk waɗanda ke kare haƙƙin ilimi na duniya da kuma darajar kowane murya ta ɗan adam.
king-sejong.trials: Asarar gani saboda tsananin karatu da cututtuka na yau da kullun kamar ciwon sukari, da kuma ci gaba da adawa da kafa sabon rubutun Hangeul daga masu mulki da matsin lamba na siyasa.
king-sejong.overcoming: Ya kirkiro mafi kyawun rubutun duniya, Hangeul, duk da nakasar jiki da adawar siyasa, ya kuma bunkasa kimiyya da al'adu, wanda ya inganta rayuwar jama'a.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Jama'a su ne tushen kasa. Idan jama'a na jin yunwa, kasa ba za ta iya wanzuwa ba. Abinci shine sama ga jama'a.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Manufar siyasa shine kawai jin dadin jama'a. Hasken kai tsaye yana zuwa ne kawai lokacin da rayuwar mutanen da ke mafi karancin matsayi ta inganta.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mutum mai hikima yana kula da kansa kuma baya daina koyo. Ko da idona ya rufe, idona na zuciya zai kasance ga jama'a.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku yarda ku zauna lafiya saboda nasarori. Ci gaban ku ya kamata ya zama shirye-shiryen taimakon wasu, ba don kanku ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kalmominmu sun bambanta da na kasar Sin, don haka ba mu iya yin mu'amala da rubutunsu ba. Saboda haka, ko da 'yan kasa marasa ilimi na son bayyana ra'ayoyinsu, ba za su iya yin hakan ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Hana shinge na sadarwa shine babban alhakin jagora. Samar da kayan aiki ga kowa don bayyana ra'ayoyinsu shine farkon canza duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai cin nasara wanda ya haɗa kabilun Mongol da suka rabu, ya zama Genghis Khan, ya haɗa Gabas da Yamma, kuma ya kafa tushen duniya.
key_achievements: Ya haɗa kabilun tsaunukan Mongol don gina ƙasa mai haɗin kai
Ya kafa sabon tsarin cancanta maimakon dangantaka
Ya gina Daular Mongol kuma ya inganta musayar Gabas da Yamma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin babban mutum wanda ya inganta musayar wayewa tsakanin Gabas da Yamma, ya kafa tushen duniya, kuma ya canza tafarkin tarihin ɗan adam har abada.

genghis-khan.epic:
Genghis Khan (Temujin) ya taka ƙafa a cikin duniya mai cike da jini da kishiya mai zafi, a kan filayen da iska ke kadawa, inda sararin samaniya mara iyaka ke nuna ruhin mutanensa da ya rabu amma ba shi da iyaka. Yarintarsa ta girma cikin rikicin kabilanci mara yankewa da radadin iskar steppe mai ban tsoro, ba cikin zaman lafiya ba, wanda hakan shaida ce mai ban tsoro ga zamanin da haɗin kai mafarki ne da aka manta, kuma rayuwa caca ce mai zafi ta yau da kullun. An bar shi maraya kuma an ci amanarsa tun yana yaro, an jefa shi cikin rayuwa mai wahala ta farautar marmots don rayuwa da gujewa kabilun masu kai hari, ya fahimci gaskiyar daji mara kyau: masu wayo da masu ƙarfi ne kawai ke rayuwa. Babban fanko na tsaunukan Mongoliya da ke shimfiɗa har zuwa sararin sama ya zama kurkukunsa da tanderunsa, inda a cikinsa ya ƙirƙira buri mai zurfi, mai zafi wanda ya ƙi rikicin da aka haife shi a ciki. A wannan ƙasa inda aminci yake wucewa kamar ruɗin hamada, kuma iko na ɗan lokaci ne kamar numfashin doki mai mutuwa, a cikin zuciyarsa akwai guguwar da za ta mamaye duniya.

Babban katangar tsoffin kiyayya ta kabilanci da kawance masu canzawa shinge ne mara iya ketarawa ga duk wanda ya yi mafarkin masarauta mai haɗin kai, kuma Temujin ya fuskanci wannan katanga da tsananin zafin zaki mai yunwa. Gwagwarmayarsa mai tsanani rawa ce ta wayo da karfi mara tausayi, yakin da ba ya gajiya da rarrabuwar kawuna na dubban shekaru, inda kowace nasara an samu ta da wahala kuma kowace shan kashi darasi ne da aka rubuta da jini. Ya kafa sabon alkawari bisa ga aminci mara yankewa da cancanta, ba dangantaka ba, wanda ra'ayi ne mai juyin juya hali da ya girgiza tushen al'ummar steppe, yana tilasta wa jarumai su bar tsoffin kiyayya kuma su bi hangen nesa mai ƙarfi. Ta hanyar kewaye mara yankewa, hare-hare na dawakai masu ƙarfin hali, da basirar dabaru na mai cin nasara, ya rushe shugabannin kabilu masu hamayya a tsari, yana shanye ikonsu, mutanensu, da ruhinsu cikin ƙarfinsa mai faɗaɗawa. Yayin da yake kewayawa cin amana na ciki da hare-hare na waje, numfashin tashin hankali ya rataya a cikin iska a matsayin abokin tafiya na dindindin, kuma kowace yaƙi caca ce mai tsanani ga ruhin sabuwar al'umma.

Lokacin da aka ɗaukaka shi ya zo ne a cikin ihu da murna na Babban Kurultai, ƙarƙashin babban sararin samaniya mai shuɗi na har abada, an ayyana Temujin Genghis Khan, mai ginin al'ummar Mongol da aka haɗa kai kuma Sarkin Duniya, wanda ba a taɓa gani ba a baya. Wannan babban nasara da aka haifa daga tanderun yaƙi mara yankewa da nufi guda ya zo tare da kadaici mai kusan ba za a iya jurewa ba, nauyin sanyi na cikakken iko, da kuma nauyin rayuka marasa adadi da ke rataye a kan kafadunsa. Ya jure ba kawai tabo na jiki na yaƙi mara yankewa ba, har ma da raunuka marasa ganuwa na sadaukar da alaƙa ta sirri don umarnin daular, zafin zaɓuɓɓukan da suka zubar da jini a hannunsa amma suka share hanya don tsarin nahiyar. Kadaici na jagoranci runguma ce mai sanyi, tunatarwa ta dindindin cewa shi kaɗai ne ya ɗauki nauyin babban hangen nesansa, zafin shiru na mutumin da ya sake fasalin duniya da aka sani kawai ta hanyar nufin da ba za a iya karya ba.

Kamar koguna da ya taɓa ketarawa, ƙarnuka sun gudana, amma Genghis Khan har yanzu yana tsaye a matsayin babban mutum mara girgiza a kan matakin tarihin ɗan adam, inuwarsa ta faɗaɗa a kan nahiyoyi da dubban shekaru. Gadonsa mai rikitarwa kuma sau da yawa mai ban mamaki ya zama “kaɗaɗɗen babban mutum” wanda dauloli na gaba, hanyoyin kasuwanci, da musayar al'adu suka gina a kan tushensa ba tare da sani ba, yana karya keɓewa kuma ya ƙirƙira alaƙa ta duniya da ba a taɓa gani ba. Ba kawai mai cin nasara ba ne amma mai ginin duniya ba tare da niyya ba, nufinsa mai ƙarfi ya sauƙaƙa gudun ra'ayoyi, fasahohi, da kayayyaki tsakanin Gabas da Yamma, yana haɗa wayewa daban-daban. Hoton daular Mongol mai ɗorewa, mai mallakar ikon halaka da haɗin kai a lokaci guda, yana tilasta mana mu fuskanci zurfin duality na iko da ci gaba, yana tunatar da mu game da yuwuwar canji da sau da yawa mai zafi na hangen nesa guda ɗaya mara girgiza a cikin ɗan adam. Kasancewarsa ya tilasta duniya ta ragu ba tare da so ba kuma ta gane alaƙa, yana sake fasalin yanayin siyasar duniya da tsarin hulɗar ɗan adam har abada.
genghis-khan.trials: Talakawan kuruciya da bautar da ya yi saboda rasa mahaifinsa da kuma watsi da kabilar sa, da kuma cinzalai na rasa matarsa ga makiyi da kuma cin amanar da ba ta karewa da kuma yaki tsakanin kabilun Mongol.
genghis-khan.overcoming: Ya kafa rundunar dawakai mafi karfi a tarihin dan adam ta hanyar sake fasalin kungiya mai ban mamaki wacce ta fifita iyawa fiye da matsayi, kuma ya kafa daular da ta fi girma a duniya, wanda ya haifar da hadewar wayewar gari ta gabas da yamma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Lokacin da na ci nasara a kan makiyina a cikina, sai na zama Genghis Khan. Nasara ta gaskiya ita ce cin nasara a kan tsoron ka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Abin da ya fi tsoro fiye da shinge na waje shi ne raunin da ke cikinka. Sai dai idan ka iya sarrafa kanka da kuma sarrafa kanka, sai ka cancanci jagorantar duniya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Wanda ya gina katanga zai halaka, kuma wanda ya ci gaba da motsi zai yi nasara. Kada ku ji tsoron canji kuma koyaushe ku motsa zuwa sabbin damammaki.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku zauna lafiya a kan nasarorin da suka gabata kuma ku gina katanga. Lokacin da kuka tsaya, za ku fadi. Yana karbar canji koyaushe kuma yana bude sabbin yankuna shine hanyar rayuwa ta girman kai.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mafarkin mutum daya mafarki ne kawai, amma mafarkin da mutane da yawa suke yi zai zama gaskiya. Raba hangen nesa kuma hada zukatan mutane.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ba za ku iya yin abubuwa masu girma da kanku ba. Gabatar da manufa mai ban sha'awa ga mutane kuma ku sa su shiga cikin tafiyarku mai girma.

alexander-the-great.era: Babban mutum na ƙarni na 4 BC (356-323 BC)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban mai cin nasara wanda aka haifa a matsayin basarake na Makidoniya, ya ci Farisa da Indiya, kuma ya buɗe zamanin Hellenanci.
key_achievements: Ya ci Daular Farisa ta Achaemenid kuma ya gina babbar daula.
Ya yi amfani da dabaru na soja masu ban mamaki a Granicus, Gaugamela, da sauransu.
Ya buɗe zamanin Hellenanci ta hanyar haɗakar al'adun Gabas da Yamma.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Katon na har abada wanda ya sake fasalta hanyar wayewar Yamma da al'adun Hellenanci, ya bar alama mai dorewa a tarihin bil'adama.

alexander-the-great.epic:
A karkashin inuwar dutsen Olympus mai girma, a cikin zuciyar Makidoniya mai tsauri, an haifi Alakszandira a matsayin basarake wanda aka kaddara zai sake zana taswirar buri da imani na bil'adama. A matsayinsa na ɗan Sarki Filibus na II, jarumi, da kuma Olympias mai ban mamaki, ya girma ba kawai daga zuriyar sarauta ba, amma a cikin duniya mai cike da annabce-annabce na dā da kuma sautin jarumawan Homer. Ransa ya riga ya cika da kishin daukaka wanda ba zai taba gushewa ba, wanda ya mamaye kananan rigingimun biranen Girka da suka rabu. Ya bi hanyar da aka annabta, amma gaba daya tasa ce, yana fama da tunanin girman kansa na musamman, yana dauke da wani wofi na ciki wanda kawai cin nasara a kan sananniyar duniya zai iya cikawa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance kamar tukunyar narkewa, tana horar da rai wanda ko dai zai karya iyakokin duniya ko kuma ya lalace da su.

Babban katangar mashigin Hellespont, fiye da iyakar yanki kawai, ya kasance gefen duniyar Hellenanci, kuma bayan haka, girman da ba za a iya tunani ba da kuma darajar Daular Farisa ta Achaemenid sun yi barazana, wanda ya jefa doguwar inuwa a kan matakan farko na duniyar Yamma tsawon karnoni. Da zuciyarsa tana bugawa kamar gangar yaki da idanunsa suna kallon daular da ba a sani ba, Alakszandira ya haye mashigin kunkuntar, ya kunna wata babbar wuta wacce za ta cinye nahiyoyi kuma ta sake fasalta yanayin yaki. Yaƙin neman zaɓensa ya kasance rawa ce ta hazaka ta dabara wacce ba ta gajiya, mai ban mamaki, da kuma tsarkakakkiyar, nufin da ba za a iya karya ba, daga harin dawakai mai tsawa a Granicus da Issus wanda ya farfasa tunanin Farisa na rashin cin nasara, zuwa tsananin kewaye Tyre inda kirkire-kirkire ya fuskanci cikas da ba za a iya motsawa ba, da kuma yakin Gaugamela wanda ya nuna kwarewar dabara wacce ta zarce sojojin da suka ninka nasa sau goma. Kowane mataki ya kasance caca ce mai tsanani a kan matsaloli masu yawa, ba kawai yaki na nama da karfe ba, amma yaki da kayan aikin tafiya da ba a taba gani ba, rada-radin rashin jituwa, da kuma tsananin mulkin kasashe masu ban mamaki. Ya sassaka hanya ta cikin zuciyar sananniyar duniya, takobinsa ya sassaƙa sabbin iyakoki, kuma burinsa ya zama tukunyar narkewa ga sabon zamani, yana tura iyakokin juriya na ɗan adam da dabarun soja a kowane mil mai jini.

Fadaddun filayen Indiya masu cike da rana sun nuna kololuwar tafiyarsa mai ban tsoro, wani tsayi mai ban mamaki wanda ya kalli daular da ta taso daga Tekun Adriatic zuwa Kogin Indus, kuma ya buɗe sabon tsarin da ba za a iya mantawa da shi ba inda Gabas da Yamma suka fara rungumar juna mai tsanani da dawwama, amma a nan ne kaɗaicin sarkin-allah ya fara danne kafadunsa na mutum. Ya gina Alexandrias kamar yadda yake shuka iri a cikin ƙasa mai albarka, kowannensu ya zama fitilar al'adun Hellenanci da kasuwanci, amma tafiye-tafiye marasa iyaka, yaƙe-yaƙe marasa iyaka, da kuma barazanar cin amana da ke akwai koyaushe sun lalata ruhinsa wanda a da ba za a iya karya shi ba, kuma sun ware shi ko da a tsakiyar rundunonin da ke biye da shi. Ciwo mai raɗaɗi na tsoffin raunuka, zazzaɓi mai zafi wanda ke kama jikinsa lokaci-lokaci, da kuma hauhawar hauka wanda ya kai ga mutuwar abokan amana kamar Cleitus Baƙar fata, sun zana hoto mai tsabta da ɗan adam na babban farashi na irin wannan buri marar iyaka. Hangensa na haɗa kan duniya, haɗakar al'adu, sau da yawa ya yi karo da tsattsauran ra'ayin tsoffin sojojin Makidoniya, wanda ya kai ga tawaye da kuma babban takaici wanda ya duhun shekarunsa na ƙarshe. Ya tsaya shi kaɗai a kan tudun da ya gina, wani labari mai rai wanda nasarorinsa suka wuce fahimtar mutum, amma yana marmarin zaman lafiya wanda cin nasara ba zai taba bayarwa ba, kuma girman halittarsa ya zama babban nauyi mai warewa.

Daularsa mai girma ta rabu da mutuwarsa ta farko, ta watse zuwa masarautun Hellenanci masu yaki, amma tasirin Alakszandira mai kama da girgizar kasa ya ci gaba da yin tasiri tsawon dubban shekaru, yana sake fasalta hanyar wayewar Yamma da kuma bayan haka. Zamanin Hellenanci mai cike da kuzari wanda ya fara ba da gangan ba ya shimfida tushen falsafa wanda zai yi tasiri a kan dokokin Roma, fasahar Byzantine, har ma da Haskakawa, ta hanyar musayar al'adu da ci gaban ilimi da ba a taba gani ba. Neman sa na abin da ba a sani ba ya rushe shingayen yanki da na al'adu, yana zaburar da masu cin nasara da masu bincike marasa adadi waɗanda suka bi sawunsa, suna tabbatar da cewa nufin ɗan adam, tare da hazaka, zai iya wuce duk iyakokin da aka gane. Daga biranen duniya masu cike da kuzari da ya kafa, kamar Alexandria, wanda ya zama fitilar ilimi, zuwa tasirin harshe da gine-gine da ya rage a cikin manyan yankuna na Asiya, kasancewarsa ya bar alama mai dorewa a kan tarihin bil'adama. Alakszandira bai tsaya a matsayin 'kafaɗar katon' na har abada ba kawai saboda ƙwarewarsa ta soja ba, amma ta hanyar haifar da duniya mai haɗin kai da gaske da kuma canza yanayin damar ɗan adam har abada, yana barin shaidar dawwama ga babban ikon hangen nesa mai ƙarfin hali na mutum ɗaya.
alexander-the-great.trials: Rikicin da ya samo asali daga kashe mahaifin sa, Sarki Philip II, ba zatoba, da kuma ci gaba da tayar da kayar da mulkin mallaka na biranen Girka, da kuma rikicin cikin rundunar soji da ya fuskanta a lokacin da yake gudanar da yakin neman nasara a Indiya, da kuma mutuwarsa da wuri saboda cutar maleriya.
alexander-the-great.overcoming: Ya rusa daular Farisa mafi karfi a zamaninsa ta hanyar jagoranci da dabaru na musamman, kuma ya canza tsarin tarihin duniya ta hanyar kirkirar wayewar Hellenistic wacce ta hada al'adun Gabas da Yamma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu abin da ba zai yiwu ba ga wanda ya yi kokari. Tsoro yana da ban mamaki, kuma aiki ne kawai ke tabbatar da gaskiya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Rashin yin kokari shine babban gazawa. Idan nufinka ya fi karfin yanayinka, duk wani shinge a duniya zai zama mataki na tsalle.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Na fi jin tsoron garken tumaki da sarkin zaki ya jagoranta fiye da sarkin zaki daya da ya jagoranci garken tumaki. Nufin shugaba yana tantance makomar rukuni.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Gaskiyar karfi ba ta fito daga girman rukuni ba, amma daga hangen nesa da jarumtar shugaba. Kai ne farkon zaki da zai jagoranci mutane.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Nasara ba ta kare ba ce, amma farkon wata tafiya ce. Kada ka zauna lafiya, ka ci gaba zuwa sabuwar duniya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Cikakkiyar nasara ya kamata ta zama makamashi don kalubale na gaba, ba gadon bacci ba. Ci gaba da fadada iyakokinka koyaushe.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Walt Disney ya kasance mai shirya fina-finai masu motsi kuma ɗan kasuwa ɗan Amurka a karni na 20, wanda ya kawo sauyi a masana'antar fina-finai masu motsi kuma ya gina daular nishaɗi.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar Mickey Mouse da kuma buɗe hanyar fina-finai masu motsi masu sauti
Shirya fim ɗin motsi mai tsayi na farko, 'Snow White'
Buɗe Disneyland, yana kawo sauyi a wuraren shakatawa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadonsa ya ba da mafarki da tunani ga duniya baki ɗaya, kuma har yanzu yana kafa ma'auni ga masana'antar nishaɗi a yau.

walt-disney.epic:
Walter Elias Disney, wanda aka haifa a Chicago a shekarar 1901, ya kasance mai shirya fina-finai masu motsi (animator), mai shirya fina-finai, mai ba da murya, kuma ɗan kasuwa ɗan Amurka. A farkon karni na 20, a cikin lokacin masana'antu masu saurin canzawa da kuma farkon kafofin watsa labarai, ya hango damar da ke tattare da sabon nau'in fasaha na shirya fina-finai masu motsi. An haife shi a matsayin ɗa na huɗu ga Elias Disney da Flora Call Disney, Walt ya girma a yankin karkara na Marceline, Missouri, inda ya haɓaka ƙauna mai zurfi ga yanayi da dabbobi. Wannan ya yi tasiri sosai a kan duniyar ayyukansa daga baya. Tun yana yaro, ya nutsu cikin zane-zane, kuma bayan ya koma Kansas City, ya ci gaba da karatun fasaha a makarantar zane-zane yayin da yake rarraba jaridu, yana goge basirarsa ta fasaha. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fuskanta tun yana yaro sun sanya masa ƙarfin hali na riƙe mafarkinsa da tunaninsa duk da wahalhalun rayuwa.

Farkon rayuwar Walt Disney ta kasance jerin koma-baya da ƙalubale. Laugh-O-Gram Studio, ɗakin shirya fina-finai masu motsi na farko da ya kafa a Kansas City, ya faɗi saboda matsalolin kuɗi, kuma a shekarar 1923, ya tafi Hollywood tare da ɗan'uwansa, Roy O. Disney. A can, sun kafa Disney Brothers Studio (wanda daga baya ya zama Walt Disney Studios) kuma sun yi nasara da halin 'Oswald the Lucky Rabbit', amma sun fuskanci wani mummunan kwarewa na rasa haƙƙin mallaka na halin saboda matsalolin kwangila da mai rarrabawa. Wannan lokaci na yanke kauna ya zama wata dama ta sabuwar halitta a gare shi. A cikin jirgin ƙasa da ke dawowa daga New York zuwa Los Angeles a shekarar 1928, ya yi tunanin Mickey Mouse, kuma a cikin wannan shekarar, ta hanyar 'Steamboat Willie', ya gabatar da sauti mai daidaitawa gaba ɗaya a tarihin fina-finai masu motsi, yana buɗe zamanin fina-finai masu motsi masu sauti. Wannan ya kasance wani juyin juya hali wanda ya sanya damar fina-finai masu motsi a matsayin sabon nau'in nishaɗi, ba kawai zane mai ban dariya ba, a cikin zukatan duniya.

Bayan nasarar Mickey Mouse, Walt Disney ya ci gaba da neman sabbin abubuwa ba tare da tsayawa ba. Ya haɓaka fasahar shirya fina-finai masu motsi ta hanyar jerin 'Silly Symphonies', kuma a shekarar 1932, ya gabatar da Technicolor na farko a cikin fina-finai masu motsi tare da 'Flowers and Trees', yana kawo sihirin launi zuwa allon. Amma babban ƙalubalensa mafi girma shine 'Snow White and the Seven Dwarfs', wanda aka saki a shekarar 1937. Wannan aiki, fim ɗin motsi mai tsayi na farko a tarihin ɗan adam, an kira shi 'Disney's Folly' a Hollywood a lokacin, kuma an yi hasashen zai gaza, amma ya samu nasara mai girma a ofishin akwatin, yana ɗaga fina-finai masu motsi zuwa matsayin fasaha. Bayan haka, ya ci gaba da fitar da manyan ayyuka kamar 'Pinocchio', 'Fantasia', 'Dumbo', da 'Bambi', yana jagorantar zamanin zinariya na fina-finai masu motsi, kuma a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu, ya shirya fina-finai na farfaganda bisa buƙatar gwamnati. Bayan yaƙin, ya shiga masana'antar talabijin, yana faɗaɗa hulɗarsa da jama'a ta hanyar jerin shirye-shiryen 'Disneyland' da 'Mickey Mouse Club'.

Ɗaya daga cikin manyan gadon Walt Disney shine Disneyland, wanda aka buɗe a shekarar 1955. Ya buɗe sabon babi a masana'antar nishaɗi ta hanyar ƙirƙirar ra'ayin wurin shakatawa mai zurfi inda dukkanin iyali za su iya jin daɗi tare, fiye da wurin shakatawa na yau da kullun. Hangensa ya ci gaba har bayan mutuwarsa, yana haɓaka zuwa Walt Disney World Resort da aikin EPCOT (Experimental Prototype Community of Tomorrow). A lokacin rayuwarsa, ya lashe lambobin yabo na Academy Awards mafi yawa a matsayin mutum ɗaya (ya lashe sau 22, an zaɓe shi sau 59), yana samun yabo saboda gagarumar gudummawarsa ga fasahar fina-finai. Ko bayan mutuwarsa a shekarar 1966, Kamfanin Walt Disney ya ci gaba da girma zuwa daular nishaɗi ta duniya, bisa ga ruhinsa na kirkire-kirkire da hangen nesansa na sabbin abubuwa. Sunan Disney har yanzu yana wakiltar mafarki, tunani, da nishaɗin iyali a yau, kuma ruhinsa na kirkire-kirkire ya yi daidai da ƙalubalen sauran majagaba na kafofin watsa labarai na zamaninsa, kamar waɗanda suka haɓaka masana'antar talabijin, suna buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a fannoni daban-daban.
walt-disney.trials: Ayyuka masu tsanani tun yana yaro da kuma uba mai tsauri, sannan kuma fatar kamfani da cin amana daga abokan aiki a lokacin samartakarsa, da kuma rasa haƙƙin mallakar manyan haruffa.
walt-disney.overcoming: Ya shawo kan gazawa ta hanyar kirkirar sabon salo na Mickey Mouse da fina-finai masu tsawon lokaci, kuma ya nuna jagoranci mai kirkire-kirkire ta hanyar samar da Disneyland, inda ya mayar da tunani zuwa gaskiya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Idan kuna iya mafarkin sa, zaku iya cimma sa. Kada ku saurari masu dariya da mafarkinku.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Tunanin tunani shine farkon kowane babban nasara. Al'ajabi yana farawa ne kawai lokacin da kuke da cikakken kwarin gwiwa cewa ra'ayoyinku na iya zama gaskiya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Yin abin da ba zai yiwu ba wani nau'in nishadi ne. Ka nuna tsallewarka lokacin da mutane suka ce ba za ta yiwu ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Iyaka suna nan ne don a kalubalance su. Inda wasu ke cewa ba zai yiwu ba shine mafi kyawun damar ku don zama babban mutum.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Dariya tana dawwama, tunani babu tsufa, kuma mafarki suna dawwama. Kada ku rasa ruhun yaro.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku rasa sha'awar ganin duniya cikin ban mamaki, ko da kun girma. Hasken sha'awa na gaskiya zai zama ruwan ku na kirkire-kirkire wanda ba zai kare ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarkin ƙirƙira mai juriya wanda ya haskaka wayewar ɗan adam ta hanyar ƙirƙira fitilar lantarki, phonograph, da sauransu, bayan gazawa dubu da yawa.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar fitilar lantarki bayan dubban gwaje-gwaje
Kafa Menlo Park, dakin gwaje-gwaje na farko na ɗan adam
Haɓaka abubuwan ƙirƙira da yawa kamar phonograph da kinetoscope
fact_box.legacy_statement: Abubuwan da ya ƙirƙira sun zama tushen wayewar lantarki ta zamani, kuma juriya da ruhin ƙalubalensa suna ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa har zuwa yau.

thomas-edison.epic:
An haifi Thomas Edison a shekara ta 1847 a wani ƙaramin gari a Ohio. Yarintarsa ta fara ne da lakabin 'ɗan matsala'. An kore shi daga makaranta saboda rashin mai da hankali, kuma ya fuskanci ƙalubalen rasa ji. Amma a cikin zuciyar yaron Edison, wani babban buri na bincika dukkan ka'idojin duniya yana ruruwa. Da amincewar mahaifiyarsa, ya fara koyo da kansa, ya tattara kayan gwaji ta hanyar sayar da jaridu a cikin jirgin ƙasa, kuma ya fara doguwar tafiya don neman hasken da zai haskaka duhu.

Babban ci gabansa shine 'juriya da ke amfani da gazawa a matsayin taki'. Ya maimaita gwaje-gwaje dubu da yawa don ƙirƙirar fitilar lantarki. Mutane sun yi masa dariya suna kiransa mai gazawa, amma bai karaya ba, yana mai cewa, "Ban gaza ba; kawai na gano hanyoyi dubu da yawa waɗanda fitilar lantarki ba ta aiki ba." Ya wuce mai ƙirƙira fitilar lantarki kawai; ya kasance mai tsara zamanin da ya tsara ƙirƙira ta hanyar kafa Menlo Park, dakin gwaje-gwaje na farko na ɗan adam. Ya gabatar da dubban abubuwan ƙirƙira ga duniya waɗanda suka canza rayuwar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya, kamar phonograph da kinetoscope.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, an kira shi 'Sarkin Ƙirƙira' kuma ya sami shahara a duniya, amma bai taɓa daina bincike ba. Yana nutsewa cikin aiki har tsawon awanni 20 a rana, ya tabbatar da koyarwar da kansa cewa "hazaka kashi 1% ne na kwarin gwiwa da kashi 99% na aiki tuƙuru." Ya rayu tsawon rayuwarsa cikin rashin jin daɗi na rashin ji, amma a maimakon haka ya ɗauke shi a matsayin albarka da ta ba shi damar mai da hankali kan bincike ba tare da hayaniyar waje ba. Ya kasance wani babban mutum mai juriya wanda ya mai da iyakoki zuwa dama.

Gadon Thomas Edison yana raye kuma yana numfashi a kan tushen duk wayewar lantarki da muke morewa a yau. Ya bar mana koyarwar cewa "dama galibi tana bayyana sanye da kayan aiki, shi ya sa mutane ba sa gane ta." Rayuwar Edison ta kasance wani babban labari na basira da aka gina ta hanyar aiki tuƙuru, kuma ya koya mana cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda, ko da a gaban gazawa dubu da yawa, a ƙarshe ya sami amsar kuma ya haskaka duniya. Sunansa zai kasance a rubuce har abada a matsayin waliyyin ƙirƙira, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke mafarkin sabbin ƙalubale.
thomas-edison.trials: Rashin dacewa a lokacin ƙuruciya da korar shi daga makaranta, da kuma matsalolin ji da ya sha fama da su a rayuwarsa, da kuma dubun dubunnan gwaje-gwajen da ya yi don ƙirƙirar kwan fitila.
thomas-edison.overcoming: Ya mayar da nakasar ji ta zama tushen mayar da hankali, ya kafa tsarin bincike na farko a tarihin ɗan'adam, kuma da jajircewa ya yi abubuwan da suka canza wayewar ɗan'adam kamar kwan fitila da na'urar rikodin sauti.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Wani haziki yana samuwa ne ta hanyar kashi 1 cikin dari na wahayi da kashi 99 cikin dari na aiki. Gumin ka ba zai taba cutar da kai ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Mafi mahimmanci fiye da tunani mai ban sha'awa shine sadaukarwa don ganin sa ya zama gaskiya har ƙarshe. Lokacin da ka yi aiki da gumi zai ƙayyade girman ka.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ban kasa ba. Na gano hanyoyi dubu goma da kwan fitila ba ta aiki ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Duba gazawa a matsayin hanya, ba ƙarshe ba. Kowace lokacin da ka cire hanya mara kyau, kana kusantar amsar daidai. Babu gazawa idan ba ka daina ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Yawancin mutane ba sa ganin damar da ta zo ta siffar tufafin aiki da kuma aiki tuƙuru.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Damar ba ta zuwa da kyau. Kada ka manta cewa a cikin mafi wahala da kuma mafi tsanani aiki, akwai babban nasara da ke jiran canza makomar ka.

julius-caesar.era: Karni na 1 BC na wani katon (100 BC-44 BC)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani ɗan siyasa kuma hazikin janar na soja wanda ya mayar da Jamhuriyar Roma mai cike da rudani zuwa daula, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga wayewar Yammacin duniya.
key_achievements: Ya ci Gaul kuma ya faɗaɗa yankin Roma
Ya ci nasara a yaƙin basasa kuma ya haɗa kai da iko
Ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare kamar kalanda da haƙƙin ɗan ƙasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadon da ba ya mutuwa wanda ya kafa tushen siyasar Yammacin duniya, dabarun soja, da dokoki, kuma ya haifar da Daular Roma.

julius-caesar.epic:
A ƙarƙashin tauraron Roma, wadda ke fama da ciwon da sabanin jamhuriyar ke haifarwa, Julius Caesar ya zo duniya a matsayin memba na gidan sarauta, amma ba daga cikin manyan masu mulki ba. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, duniyar Roma ta kasance tukunyar narke ta haɗama da cin hanci da rashawa, inda tsarin 'yanci mai tsarki ke lalacewa ta hanyar haɗamar 'yan mulkin kama-karya da kuma kisan gilla na abokan gaba, har ma da girgiza tushen ƙasar. Wani babban rashin kwanciyar hankali ya mamaye iska, inda wata waƙar baƙin ciki ta tsohon zamanin zinariya ke tashi a cikin sautin takuba da makircin manyan mutane masu yanke kauna. Matashin Caesar, wanda ya shaida wannan mummunan faɗuwa, watakila ya ji cewa a cikinsa akwai wata ƙaddara ta gyara jirgin Roma da ya karye ko kuma ya riƙe sitiyarin a cikin guguwa. Kuruciyarsa ta kasance mai zurfi a cikin koyarwar magana da horon soja, da kuma darussan siyasa masu tsauri da rashin tausayi na rayuwa, da kuma buƙatar gaggawa ta hannu ɗaya mai haɗin kai da ƙarfi.

Hanyar da ya zaɓa ta kasance hawan dutse mai wahala, tare da babban adawa daga Majalisar Dattawa, wadda ke riƙe da gatan tsoffin zamanai, da kuma manyan abokan hamayya masu irin nasa buri, dukansu suna ƙoƙarin kare bangon jamhuriyar da ke faɗuwa daga hawan kowane mutum ɗaya. Ya shawo kan waɗannan shingaye da ƙuduri mai kusan na allahntaka, da farko ta hanyar wucewa ta cikin labyrinth mai zafi na siyasar Roma, sannan kuma ta hanyar filayen Gaul masu cike da jini, inda ya mai da matsayin proconsul mai sauƙi zuwa wani labari na cin nasara wanda ya faɗaɗa yankin daular da kuma babban sunansa zuwa matsanancin matsayi da ba a taɓa gani ba. Kowane yaƙi caca ce mai tsanani a kan halaka, kowane lokacin sanyi sulhu ne mai rauni, kuma kowane yaƙi shaida ce ga hazakarsa ta dabaru da kuma aminci marar yankewa da ya sanya a cikin sojojinsa. Wannan haɗin kai ne ya ba shi damar kalubalantar zuciyar Roma. Ketarewar kogin Rubicon mai cike da ƙaddara ba kawai dabarar soja ba ce, amma sanarwar yaƙi ce ga tsohon tsarin, wanda ya jefa dukkanin duniyar Bahar Rum cikin yaƙin basasa mai ban tsoro, gwagwarmaya mai tsanani don ruhin jamhuriyar kanta. Da kowace nasara, tsohuwar duniya ta yi nishi, tana rugujewa a ƙarƙashin ci gaba marar yankewa na nufinsa, tana buɗe hanya ga makomar da babu wanda ya taɓa tunani.

A cikin tukunyar yaƙin basasa, ba kawai mai nasara ba ne, amma ya tsaya a matsayin mai ginin sabon tsari, yana haɗa iko da inganci mai ban mamaki wanda ba za a iya yarda da shi ba cewa an haife shi a cikin rudani mai cike da jini, yana kafa tushe marar gogewa na abin da zai zama babban daula. Daga motsin kalanda mai rikitarwa zuwa haƙƙin ɗan ƙasa na al'ummar da aka ci nasara, gyare-gyarensa ba umarni ne na wucin gadi ba, amma manyan duwatsu ne a cikin tsarin da aka tsara don dawwama, suna nuna hankali mai hangen nesa wanda ke fama da matsalolin da suka daɗe na ƙasar Roma. Amma wannan hawan zuwa matsayi mafi girma na iko ya kawo keɓewa mai zurfi da ban tsoro, inda nauyin iko marar iyaka ya raba shi daga abokan tarayya na gaskiya kuma ya mai da abokai masu aminci zuwa masu makirci masu taka tsantsan. Nauyin jiki na yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa, da kuma ciwon da watakila ya zo lokaci-lokaci daga “cutar faɗuwa” mai ban mamaki, tare da nauyin tunani na sake fasalin dukkanin wayewa, ya sanya alamun gajiya a fuskar da ke nuna ƙuduri marar yankewa. Ya tsaya shi kaɗai kamar wani babban mutum-mutumi, abin bautawa mai zafi da kuma fushi mai zafi, yana tsaye har abada a bakin halittarsa ta juyin juya hali, wanda aka ƙaddara ya lalace ta hanyar ƙarfin da ya saki. A ƙarshe, wuƙaƙen da suka huda jikinsa na mutuwa ba kawai kayan aikin cin amana ba ne, amma rubutun kabari ne ga nauyin da ba zai yiwu ba na mulkinsa na keɓe.

Karnuka sun wuce shafuka masu shiru, amma babban inuwar Gaius Julius Caesar har yanzu tana rataye a kan tarihin ƙoƙarin ɗan adam, kuma sunansa yana ta daɗaɗawa a matsayin shaida ga buri, dabaru, da kuma juyin juya hali. Ya tsaya a matsayin babban katon da ke ɗauke da nauyin tunanin siyasar Yammacin duniya, dabarun soja, da kuma tsarin dokoki, wanda ya canza yanayin dukkanin wayewa. Ƙarfin halinsa na rusa tsohuwar jamhuriyar da ta lalace, ko da kuwa ta kasance mai tashin hankali, ya haifar da tukunyar da za a ƙirƙira Daular Roma, kuma tasirin wannan daular har yanzu yana gudana a cikin jijiyoyin mulkin zamani da dokoki. Lallai, taken sarakuna da sarakuna, 'Kaiser' da 'Tsar', suna ɗauke da sunansa marar mutuwa kai tsaye, suna jaddada matsayinsa na har abada a matsayin babban mai mulki, mai mallakar ƙaddararsa da kuma ƙaddarar daular. Gadon Caesar ba kawai na cin nasara ba ne, amma na ƙarfin hali na sanya tsari a kan rudani, kuma yana bayyana har abada hadaddiyar hulɗa tsakanin hazakar mutum da kuma ci gaba marar makawa na tarihi.
julius-caesar.trials: Rayuwar gudun hijira saboda danniya daga abokin hamayya Sulla a lokacin yana yaro, da tsananin kaɗaici da yunwa da ya fuskanta a lokacin yaƙin Gallic, da kuma caca a Kogin Rubicon inda dole ne ya yi kasada da komai don komawa siyasa.
julius-caesar.overcoming: Ya faɗaɗa yankin Roma ta hanyar hazaka ta soja da goyon bayan jama'a, ya rusa tsohuwar jamhuriyar, kuma ya kafa harsashin daular.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Zanbin an jefa shi. Babu jinkiri kuma. Yanzu abin da ya rage shi ne ci gaba har zuwa ƙarshe don samun nasara.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Idan ka yanke shawara mai mahimmanci, kada ka duba baya. Hanya ɗaya tilo da za ka iya tabbatar da cewa zaɓinka ya yi daidai ita ce aiwatarwa mai ban mamaki.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Na zo, na gani, na ci nasara. Gaskiyar nasara tana fitowa daga sauri da hangen nesa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Lokacin da dama ta taso, kada ka yi jinkiri amma ka yi sauri. Sauƙaƙe yanayi masu rikitarwa da buga maƙasudin shine hanyar katon.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mutane suna son ganin abin da suke so su gani. Ku kasance da hikima don fuskantar gaskiya da karanta zukatan jama'a.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Fahimci tunanin jama'a kuma juya sha'awarsu zuwa hangen nesa. Duk wanda ya sami zukatan mutane zai sami duniya a ƙarshe.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Henry Ford, wani ɗan kasuwa ne ɗan Amurka a farkon ƙarni na 20, ya kafa kamfanin Ford Motor Company kuma ya jagoranci yaɗuwar motoci ga kowa da kowa ta hanyar Model T da tsarin Moving Assembly Line.
key_achievements: Kafa kamfanin Ford Motor Company (1903)
Ƙaddamarwa da yaɗuwar motar Model T (1908)
Gabatar da tsarin Moving Assembly Line
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin samar da kayayyaki da yawa da falsafar gudanarwarsa sun yi tasiri mai girma ga masana'antar zamani da samuwar matsakaicin aji a cikin al'umma.

henry-ford.epic:
Henry Ford (1863-1947) wani ɗan kasuwa ne mai hazaka daga ƙasar Amurka, kuma shi ne ginshiƙin kafa kamfanin Ford Motor Company. Ya kasance jagora mai haske a cikin juyin juya halin masana'antu na farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya sake fasalin fuskar al'ummar zamani gaba ɗaya. An haife shi a shekara ta 1863 a cikin wani gida mai tawali'u a Dearborn, jihar Michigan, tun daga ƙuruciyarsa ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga duniyar injuna, fiye da aikin gona na yau da kullum. Ya kasance mai sha'awar yadda injunan tururi da agogo ke aiki, wanda hakan ya ja hankalinsa tun da wuri ya zaɓi hanyar zama injiniya. Yana ɗan shekara goma sha shida, ya bar gida ya tafi Detroit, inda ya yi aiki a matsayin mai koyon aiki, yana gogewa da fasaha mai zurfi. A kamfanin Edison Illuminating Company, ya yi aiki a matsayin babban injiniya, inda ya gina tushe mai ƙarfi na fahimtar lantarki da injuna. Ba dare ba rana, ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken injunan konewa na ciki, kamar wani mai neman ilimi a cikin duhu. Sakamakon waɗannan ƙoƙarin nasa marasa adadi, a shekara ta 1896, ya yi nasarar ƙirƙirar mota ta farko mai amfani da injin fetur, wadda aka fi sani da 'Quadricycle'. Wannan nasara ta buɗe sabon babi mai cike da juyin juya hali a cikin hanyoyin sufuri na ɗan adam, kamar yadda wani sabon alfijiri ya fara haskawa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ba ta kasance ta wani injiniya mai sauƙi ba, a'a, lokaci ne da ya nuna haihuwar wani mai kirkire-kirkire mai hangen nesa, wanda zai canza tafarkin tarihi.

Henry Ford ya riƙe wani hangen nesa mai ƙarfi a cikin zuciyarsa: cewa motoci kada su zama kayan alatu na masu hannu da shuni kaɗai, amma su zama hanyar sufuri mai sauƙi ga kowane mutum, ba tare da nuna bambanci ba. A shekara ta 1903, ya kafa kamfanin Ford Motor Company, kuma ya fara fuskantar ƙalubale mai girma don ganin wannan hangen nesa nasa ya zama gaskiya mai tabawa. 'Model T', wadda aka ƙaddamar a shekara ta 1908, ta kasance cikakkiyar wakilci ce ta wannan falsafar tasa mai zurfi. Ta sami karɓuwa cikin sauri a tsakanin jama'a a matsayin mota mai ƙarfi, mai araha, kuma mai sauƙin gyarawa, kamar yadda ruwa ke samun hanyarsa a cikin ƙasa. A bayan nasarar Model T mai ban mamaki, akwai wata sabuwar hanyar samarwa mai juyin juya hali: tsarin Moving Assembly Line. Wannan tsari ne mai ban mamaki wanda ke amfani da bel ɗin jigilar kaya don motsa sassa zuwa ga kowane ma'aikaci, inda kowane ma'aikaci ke yin takamaiman aiki akai-akai, kamar yadda agogo ke bugawa. Wannan ya haɓaka ingancin samarwa zuwa matsayi mafi girma, ya rage lokacin samar da motoci sosai, kuma ya rage farashi, wanda ya ba da damar rage farashin Model T akai-akai, har ta zama abin mallaka ga kowa. Bugu da ƙari, a shekara ta 1914, Henry Ford ya gabatar da wata manufa mai cike da tarihi, wato '5-dollar wage policy'. Ta hanyar biyan albashi mai yawa wanda ba a taɓa gani ba a lokacin, ya haɓaka ikon siyan ma'aikata zuwa matsayi mai girma, kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga samuwar matsakaicin aji, wanda ya zama ginshiƙin al'umma.

Amma duk da wannan tafiya tasa mai cike da kirkire-kirkire, Henry Ford ya fuskanci gwaji da ƙalubale masu yawa, kamar yadda kowane babban mutum ke fuskanta. Saboda tsananin imaninsa da nasarar Model T, wanda ya zama kamar dutse mai ƙarfi a cikin zuciyarsa, ya yi jinkirin haɓaka wasu samfura. Wannan ya haifar da asarar kasuwa a tsakiyar shekarun 1920, lokacin da masu fafatawa suka fara fitar da motoci masu zane-zane da fasali daban-daban, kamar yadda ruwa ke kwarara daga madatsa. Bugu da ƙari, salon gudanarwarsa na son kai da kuma tsaurin ra'ayinsa game da ƙungiyoyin ma'aikata sun haifar da rikice-rikice na ciki, wanda ya zama kamar guguwa a cikin gida. Musamman ma, ya fuskanci suka mai tsanani daga jama'a saboda yada ra'ayoyin adawa da Yahudawa ta hanyar jaridar da ya buga, 'The Dearborn Independent', wanda ya zama tabo a kan sunansa. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin masu girma, Henry Ford bai taɓa daina neman canji ba, kamar yadda ruwa ke neman hanyarsa ta kwarara. Daga ƙarshe, ya dakatar da samar da Model T, kuma a shekara ta 1927, ya sake daidaitawa da canje-canjen kasuwa ta hanyar fitar da 'Model A' mai nasara, wanda ya nuna jajircewarsa. Rayuwarsa ta nuna wani tsari mai rikitarwa na neman daidaito tsakanin alhakin zamantakewa da buƙatun zamani a matsayin ɗan kasuwa, wanda ya wuce kirkire-kirkire na fasaha kawai, kamar yadda wani mai hikima ke neman hanyar gaskiya. Bai taɓa jin tsoron gazawa ba, kuma ya ci gaba da neman sababbin hanyoyi marasa adadi, yana ƙoƙarin tabbatar da imaninsa da hangen nesansa, har zuwa ƙarshe.

Gadon da Henry Ford ya bari bai iyakance ga masana'antar motoci kawai ba, a'a, ya ratsa zuciyar kowane fanni na rayuwa. Tsarin samar da kayayyaki da yawa da ya kafa, da kuma ingantaccen tsarin gudanar da masana'antu, sun zama daidaitattun ka'idoji a masana'antun duniya a yau, kuma suna zama ginshiƙin al'ummar masana'antu ta zamani, kamar yadda tushe ke riƙe gini. Falsafarsa ta samar da kayayyaki masu inganci da yawa a farashi mai araha ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen inganta rayuwar jama'a masu amfani da kayayyaki, kuma ta zama ginshiƙi wajen samar da matsakaicin aji, wanda ya kawo daidaito a cikin al'umma. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar manufar albashi mai yawa, ya sa aka fahimci ma'aikata ba kawai a matsayin masu samarwa ba, amma a matsayin masu amfani da kayayyaki, ta haka ya gabatar da tsarin tattalin arziki mai kyau, wanda ya zama kamar jini a cikin jiki. Sunansa ya kasance alamar kirkire-kirkire da inganci har abada, kuma yana da tasiri mai zurfi a ayyukan hidimar al'umma ta hanyar Ford Foundation, wanda ya zama kamar fitila mai haskakawa. Rayuwar Henry Ford shaida ce mai ƙarfi da ba za a iya musantawa ba, ta yadda kirkire-kirkire na fasaha zai iya canza tsarin al'umma gaba ɗaya da kuma wadatar da rayuwar mutane, kamar yadda ruwan sama ke wadatar da ƙasa. Ana ɗaukar sawunsa a matsayin wanda ya kafa tushen jari-hujja na zamani tare da sauran manyan masana'antu na zamaninsa, kamar Andrew Carnegie da John D. Rockefeller, waɗanda suka zama ginshiƙan ci gaban duniya.
henry-ford.trials: Rikici da mahaifinsa wanda yake son ya zama manomi, kashe-kashen kamfanonin mota na farko, da kuma gasar da sauran kamfanoni ke yi, da kuma rikice-rikicen cikin kungiya saboda jagorancinsa na son kai.
henry-ford.overcoming: Ya kirkiri tsarin layin samarwa mai motsi, wanda ya jagoranci tattalin arzikin motoci, kuma ya samar da zamantakewar mabukaci ta zamani da kuma tsakiyar aji ta hanyar manufofin albashi mai girma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ko ka yarda cewa za ka iya ko ba za ka iya ba, koyaushe gaskiya ne abin da ka yarda. Rayuwarka tana yanke hukunci ta hanyar abin da kake tunani.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Halin tunani ya fi ƙarfin ikonmu. Amincewarka da kanka tana ƙayyade iyakokin ka, kuma imani da cewa za ka iya shine mabuɗin buɗe manyan nasarori.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Inganci shine yin abin da ya dace ko da babu wanda ke kallo. Gaskiya ita ce tushen girma mafi ƙarfi.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Nemo cikakkiyar cikakkiya wacce ba za ta kunyata ka ba, maimakon abin da za ka nuna wa wasu. Gaskiya da ƙwarewar da aka samu a ɓoye sune ke samar da girman gaske.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kuskure shine kawai damar sake farawa da hikima. Ci gaba yanzu, tare da darussan da ka koya daga kurakuran da suka gabata.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka karaya saboda kuskure. Wannan yana nufin ka san abin da ya yi kuskure, kuma ka sami mafi kyawun bayani don zama mafi cikakke a gwaji na gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Magdalena Carmen Frida Kahlo y Calderón wata mai zane ce 'yar Mexico ta ƙarni na 20, wadda ta yi tasiri sosai a tarihin fasaha na duniya tare da zane-zanen kanta da suka binciko ciwo da asali.
key_achievements: Buɗe sabon salo na zane-zanen kai masu nuna ciwo da asali
Karɓar salon fasahar ƙasar Mexico da na gargajiya
Kafa tarihin mafi tsada ga aikin wata mai zane mace a gwanjo
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta fasahar mata (feminism) kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a fasahar zamani, tana nuna nasarar ruhin ɗan adam a cikin ciwo.

frida-kahlo.epic:
Magdalena Carmen Frida Kahlo y Calderón wata mai zane ce 'yar ƙasar Mexico, an haife ta a shekara ta 1907, wadda ta bar babban tarihi a duniyar fasaha ta duniya tare da zane-zanen kanta masu ƙarfi da ayyukanta da suka binciko asalin al'adun Mexico. A farkon ƙarni na 20, Mexico tana cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani bayan juyin juya hali, inda take neman sabon asalin ƙasa, kuma wannan yanayin zamanin ya yi tasiri sosai a duniyar fasaharta. Tun tana ƙarama, Frida ta fuskanci gwaji mai tsanani lokacin da ta kamu da cutar shan inna tana da shekaru shida, wanda ya sa ƙafarta ta dama ta zama nakasasshiya, amma wannan ya ƙara ƙarfafa ruhinta. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 1925, tana da shekaru 18, ta fuskanci wani hatsarin mota mai tsanani wanda ya jawo mata raunuka masu yawa a jikinta, ciki har da kashin baya, ƙashin ƙugu, da ƙafafu. Sakamakon wannan hatsari, ta yi fama da ciwo a tsawon rayuwarta, kuma ta fara zane yayin da take kwance a gado tana murmurewa. Zane-zanen kanta, waɗanda ta fara ta hanyar rataye madubi a rufin gida don ganin fuskarta, sun zama farkon tafiyarta ta fasaha don bincika gaskiyarta mai cike da ciwo da duniyar ciki. Wannan lokaci ba kawai lokacin murmurewa bane, amma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya haifar da wata mai zane ta musamman mai suna Frida Kahlo.

Fasahar Frida Kahlo tana da alaƙa ta kut-da-kut da rayuwarta, kuma ta buɗe wani sabon salo na musamman mai taken 'binciken kai ta hanyar ciwo'. Ta yi matuƙar sha'awar 'ƙungiyar Mexicayotl' wadda ta yi ƙoƙarin bayyana asalin Mexico bayan juyin juya halin Mexico, kuma ta haɗa al'adun gargajiya na Mexico da salon fasahar gargajiya a cikin ayyukanta. Ayyukanta na zane-zane galibi ana rarraba su a matsayin surrealism ko sihiri na gaskiya, saboda yadda take bayyana ciki nata a fili, tana wucewa tsakanin gaskiya da mafarki. Frida ta nuna a fili a kan zanenta ciwon jiki na dindindin, zafin zubar da ciki, da kuma ciwon zuciya da ke fitowa daga dangantakarta mai cike da tashin hankali amma mai sha'awa da abokin zanenta, Diego Rivera. Ta binciko matsaloli masu sarkakiya na al'ummar Mexico kamar asali, bayan mulkin mallaka, jinsi, aji, da launin fata ta hanyar zane-zanen kanta, kuma ana ɗaukar ta a matsayin majagaba wajen bayyana jikin mace da ciwon ciki a hanya mafi gaskiya da ban mamaki. Ayyukanta sun wuce rubuce-rubuce na mutum ɗaya, suna isar da saƙon wahalar ɗan adam da murmurewa ga kowa.

Rayuwar Frida Kahlo ta kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje da gwagwarmaya marasa ƙarewa, kamar yadda nasarorinta na fasaha suka kasance. Bayan hatsarin mota, ta yi fiye da tiyata 30 a tsawon rayuwarta, kuma a shekara ta 1953, ta fuskanci mummunan yanayi na yanke ƙafarta ta dama saboda gangrene. Wannan ciwon jiki ya yi tasiri sosai a fasaharta, amma a lokaci guda, ta yi ƙoƙarin shawo kansa da ruhin da ba ya karyewa. A farkon nunin fasaharta na mutum ɗaya a Mexico a shekara ta 1953, duk da cewa tana kwance a gado saboda rashin lafiya, an ɗauke ta da gadonta zuwa wurin nuni, inda ta nuna wani abin mamaki na jin daɗin biki. Wannan ya kasance labari mai nuna ƙarfin rayuwarta da sha'awarta ga fasaha. Ba ta daina ayyukanta na fasaha ba har zuwa lokacin mutuwarta, kuma a ɗaya daga cikin ayyukanta na ƙarshe, wani zane na 'still life' na kankana, ta bar saƙo mai ƙarfi: "Viva la Vida" (Rayuwa ta daɗe). A ranar 13 ga Yuli, 1954, kafin ta mutu tana da shekaru 47, ta rubuta a cikin littafinta cewa, "Ina fatan wannan tafiya za ta kasance mai farin ciki, kuma kada in dawo," tana karɓar ƙarshen rayuwarta mai cike da ciwo a nutsu. Rayuwarta ta nuna nasarar ruhin ɗan adam wajen ƙirƙirar kyau ko da a cikin ciwo.

Gadonta da Frida Kahlo ta bari ya ƙara haskawa bayan mutuwarta, kuma har yau yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fasaha da jama'a a duk faɗin duniya. Ayyukanta sun zama wani muhimmin alama ta fasahar mata (feminism), kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a fasahar zamani wajen bincika abubuwan da mata ke fuskanta, jikinsu, da asalin su. Zane-zanen kanta sun faɗaɗa ciwon mutum ɗaya zuwa ga abubuwan da kowane ɗan adam ke fuskanta, suna isar da saƙon gano ƙarfi ko da a cikin rauni. Musamman, zanen kanta na 1940 mai suna 'Mafarki (The Dream)' an sayar da shi akan dala miliyan 54.7 a wani gwanjo a shekara ta 2021, wanda ya kafa tarihi a matsayin mafi tsada ga aikin wata mai zane mace. Frida Kahlo ba kawai wata ce da ke wakiltar fasahar ƙasar Mexico ba, amma ana tuna ta a matsayin wata mai zane ta musamman wadda ta ɗaukaka rayuwarta zuwa fasaha. Rayuwarta da fasaharta sun ba da gudummawa ga rawar da fasaha ke takawa a cikin al'umma da binciken asalin mutum a wata hanya ta daban daga manyan masu zane-zanen bango na Mexico waɗanda suka yi aiki a lokaci guda, ta hanyar gano muryarta da bayyana ta a fili ga duniya ko da a cikin ciwo da wahala.
frida-kahlo.trials: Ciwo na jiki na dindindin saboda cutar shan inna tun yana yaro da kuma mummunan hatsarin mota yana dan shekara 18, da kuma tiyata sama da ashirin, da kuma bakin cikin rashin iya haihuwa, da kuma jin kuncin rai saboda rashin amincin mijinta, Diego, wanda ya kasance yana yaudara akai-akai.
frida-kahlo.overcoming: Ta hanyar yin amfani da ciwo da nakasawarta a matsayin babban jigon fasaharta, maimakon guje mata, ta kirkiro wata sabuwar salon zane wacce ta sami damar hada kai da mutane a duk duniya, kuma ta nuna karfin rayuwa da ba ta daina ba, har ma a lokacin da take fuskantar mutuwa, tana rera wakar rayuwa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Me ya sa ake bukatan ƙafafu? Ina da fukafukai da zan iya tashi da su. Ku aminta da tunanin ku.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku karaya saboda nakasar jiki ko yanayin da kuke ciki. In dai ruhinku da tunaninku suna raye, za ku iya tashi zuwa kowane tsayi, kuma wannan ruhin 'yanci zai kai ku ga matsayin babban mutum.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ina zana kaina. Domin ita ce batun da na fi sani. Ku binciki kanku sosai.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kafin ku nemi ilimi daga waje, ku fara duba cikin kanku. Lokacin da kuka fuskanci ciwo, farin ciki, da burinku cikin gaskiya, za ku sami kirkire-kirkire da karfi da ba wani zai iya kwatanta ku ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Rayuwa, madalla! Kada ku daina rera kyawun rayuwa, har ma a cikin ciwo.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ku tabbatar da darajar rayuwa, komai wahalar yanayin. Lokacin da kuka sami farin ciki a cikin wahala kuma kuka yabi rayuwa, za ku zama babban mutum mai karfin rayuwa wanda zai iya cin nasara har ma da mutuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Helen Keller marubuciya ce kuma mai fafutukar zamantakewa ta Amurka daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa tsakiyar ƙarni na 20, wadda ta shawo kan nakasar gani da ji kuma ta ba da bege ga bil'adama.
key_achievements: Shawo kan nakasar gani da ji da kuma koyon harshe
Kammala Kwalejin Radcliffe da daraja
Kare haƙƙin nakasassu da adalci na zamantakewa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rayuwarta ta kasance alamar nasarar ruhin ɗan adam fiye da nakasa da kuma haɓaka haƙƙin ɗan adam na waɗanda ba su da ƙarfi a cikin al'umma.

helen-keller.epic:
Helen Keller, marubuciya ce, mai fafutukar siyasa, kuma malama, an haife ta a Tuscumbia, Alabama, Amurka, a shekara ta 1880. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, al'ummar Amurka ba su da fahimta ko tallafi ga nakasassu, kuma waɗanda ke da nakasa sau da yawa ana ware su daga al'umma ko kuma suna samun wahalar samun damar ilimi mai dacewa. An haife ta a cikin dangi masu arziki a Kudu, Helen ta kamu da wata cuta mai zazzaɓi (wanda ake zaton cutar sankarau ce ko zazzaɓin ja) a watan Fabrairu na 1882, lokacin tana da watanni 19. Wannan cuta ta kwace mata gani da ji har abada, kuma ƙaramar Helen ta faɗa cikin ramin duhu da shiru marar iyaka, inda haske da sauti suka zama tatsuniya. Yayin da take girma ba tare da hanyar sadarwa da duniya ba, ta fuskanci matsanancin takaici da fushi, wanda sau da yawa yakan bayyana a matsayin halaye marasa iko, yana wahalar da iyalinta. A cikin zuciyarta, akwai wata sha'awa mai ƙarfi ta haɗuwa da duniya, amma ta yi ta fama da azabar rashin iya bayyana kanta, kamar jirgin ruwa da ya ɓace a cikin teku marar iyaka.

Halayen Helen masu tsanani saboda rashin sadarwa sun zama babban damuwa ga iyalinta. Iyayenta sun nemi masana daban-daban don neman hanyar taimaka wa 'yarsu, kuma a ƙarshe, bisa shawarar Alexander Graham Bell, sun haɗu da Anne Sullivan, wadda ta kammala karatu daga Makarantar Makafi ta Perkins. Anne Sullivan ta zo gidan Helen a ranar 3 ga Maris, 1887, kamar mala'ika mai ceto, ta kawo wani juyi mai mahimmanci, wanda ya canza tafarkin rayuwarta har abada. Sullivan ta yi ƙoƙarin koya wa Helen sunayen abubuwa ta hanyar rubuta haruffa a tafin hannunta (finger spelling), amma da farko, Helen ta fuskanci wahala saboda ba ta fahimci alaƙar kalmomi da abubuwa ba. Amma a ranar 5 ga Afrilu na wannan shekarar, a lokacin da ruwan sanyi ke gudana daga famfo a hannu ɗaya na Helen, kuma Sullivan tana rubuta 'W-A-T-E-R' (ruwa) akai-akai a tafin hannunta ɗayan, Helen ta fahimci, kamar walƙiya ta haskaka duhu, cewa wannan kalmar tana nufin ruwan sanyi da take ji, wanda ya zama kamar wani sirri da aka buɗe mata. Wannan 'gano harshe' ya zama kamar buɗe wata ƙofa ta sihiri, ya nuna wa Helen cewa kowane abu a duniya yana da suna, kuma waɗannan sunaye ne mabuɗin buɗe ƙofar sadarwa, wanda ya haɗa ta da duniyar da ta daɗe tana neman ta.

Bayan an buɗe ƙofar harshe, Helen ta fara koyo da sauri mai ban mamaki, kamar kogin da ya fashe bayan dogon lokaci na fari. Ta fahimci duniya ta hanyar rubutun yatsa, ta koyi Braille don karanta littattafai, kuma daga baya ta yi nasarar koyon magana don fitar da murya. Sha'awarta ta ilimi da kuma ƙishirwarta ta koyo ba su taɓa raguwa ba, kamar wutar da ke ci gaba da ruruwa a cikin zuciyarta, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1900, ta shiga Kwalejin Radcliffe, wani ɓangare na Jami'ar Harvard, kuma ta kammala karatu da daraja a shekara ta 1904, wanda ya zama babban nasara. A cikin wannan tafiya, Anne Sullivan ta kasance tare da Helen kamar inuwa, tana fassara duk darussanta a tafin hannunta. Bayan kammala karatun jami'a, Helen Keller ta wuce zama alamar cin nasara akan nakasa kawai, ta zama fitila mai haskakawa ga dukkan bil'adama, marubuciya mai himma, malama, kuma mai fafutukar zamantakewa. Ta raba abubuwan da ta fuskanta ta hanyar littattafai da yawa, ciki har da littafinta mai suna "Labarin Rayuwata" (The Story of My Life), kuma ta yi magana game da batutuwan adalci na zamantakewa daban-daban, kamar haƙƙin nakasassu, haƙƙin mata na zaɓe, haƙƙin ma'aikata, gurguzu, da kuma fafutukar zaman lafiya. Ta ziyarci ƙasashe sama da 39 a duniya, tana yaɗa bege da ƙarfin hali ga mutane marasa adadi, kamar iska mai daɗi da ke ratsa zukatan mutane.

Helen Keller ta rasu a ranar 1 ga Yuni, 1968, tana da shekaru 87, amma gadonta yana ci gaba da haskaka hanyar bil'adama, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa mai ɗorewa har zuwa yau. Rayuwarta tana tunawa a matsayin babban labari mai ban mamaki, wanda ya tabbatar da iyakar damar ruhin ɗan adam, ya wuce iyakokin gani da ji masu wahalar shawo kai, kamar yadda tauraro ke haskaka duhun dare. Helen Keller ta canza fahimtar al'umma game da nakasassu, ta buɗe idanun duniya ga damar da ke cikin su, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai wajen ci gaban tsarin ilimi da jin daɗin nakasassu, ta gina gada tsakanin duniya biyu. Kamar yadda ta faɗa a cikin shahararren kalaminta, "Abubuwan da suka fi kyau a duniya ba za a iya gani ko taɓa su ba, sai dai a ji su da zuciya," ta jaddada mahimmancin hangen nesa na ciki da tausayi fiye da hankulan jiki. Labarinta yana ci gaba da rayuwa a cikin littattafai da yawa, fina-finai, da wasan kwaikwayo a duk faɗin duniya, kamar waƙar da ba ta taɓa ƙarewa ba, yana isar da saƙon ƙarfin hali da bege ga duk waɗanda ke fuskantar nakasa da gwaji, yana zama fitila a cikin duhun su. Rayuwarta tana tafiya tare da manyan gadon mutane kamar Martin Luther King Jr., wanda ya yi yaƙi da wariyar launin fata a lokaci guda, waɗanda suka haskaka zamaninsu da ruhin da ba ya karyewa, suna kare haƙƙin waɗanda ba su da ƙarfi a cikin al'umma, suna zama ginshiƙan adalci da daidaito.
helen-keller.trials: Rasa gani da ji a lokaci guda yana da shekaru 19, da kuma kadaici da ke tattare da yara, fushi da takaici sakamakon rashin iya sadarwa.
helen-keller.overcoming: Tare da taimakon Malama Sullivan da kuma jajircewa marar misaltuwa, ta koyi harshe, ta kammala karatun ta a Jami'ar Harvard, kuma ta sadaukar da rayuwarta wajen fafutukar kare hakkin bil'adama ga nakasassu da marasa galihu a duk duniya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Abubuwan da suka fi kyau da kuma daraja a duniya ba a ganinsu ko a tabasu. Ana iya jin su ne kawai da zuciya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku damu da abubuwan da ke haskakawa ko abubuwan da kuka samu. Abubuwan da ba a gani ba kamar soyayya, kulawa, da bege su ne ke sanya rayuwarku ta zama mai girma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu abin da ya fi talauci fiye da gani ba tare da hangen nesa ba. Kada ku rasa babbar mafarkin da ke kai ku ga manufarku.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kasancewar idanunka a bude ba yana nufin kana ganin gaba ba. Lokacin da kake da cikakken hangen nesa da mafarki game da inda kake zuwa da kuma dalilin da yasa kake rayuwa, to lallai kana tafiya a kan hanyar babban mutum.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ka sanya fuskarka ga rana. Sannan inuwa za ta fada a bayanka. Koyaushe ka kalli bangaren da ke da bege.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka fada cikin tunani mara kyau da kuma yanke kauna. Lokacin da ka juya kallonka zuwa ga kyakkyawan fata da bege, inuwar da ke damunka za ta shuɗe ta kanta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ludwig van Beethoven babban mawaki ne daga Jamus a zamanin gargajiya, wanda ya jagoranci sauyi zuwa kida na soyayya.
key_achievements: Faɗaɗa nau'ikan kida na kayan aiki kamar symphonies da piano sonatas
Jagorantar sauyi daga gargajiya zuwa kida na soyayya
Rubuta ayyukan da aka fi bugawa a duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kidansa har yau yana cikin waɗanda aka fi bugawa a duniya kuma yana da tasiri mai zurfi.

beethoven.epic:
Ludwig van Beethoven (an haife shi a shekara ta 1770) babban mawaki ne, jagoran kida, kuma mai buga piano daga Jamus, wanda ya yi aiki a zamanin gargajiya kuma ya jagoranci sauyi zuwa kida na soyayya. An haife shi a ranar 16 ga Disamba, 1770, a Bonn, a cikin Daular Roman Mai Tsarki, a matsayin ɗan gidan mawaka, ya nuna hazaka ta kida tun yana yaro. Mahaifinsa, Johann, wanda ya kasance mai rera waƙa a kotu kuma malamin kida, ya gano baiwar ɗansa da wuri kuma ya horar da shi da ƙarfi, kuma Beethoven ya yi wasansa na farko a bainar jama'a yana ɗan shekara bakwai. A shekara ta 1787, ya tafi Vienna, cibiyar kida, amma ya dawo Bonn saboda rashin lafiyar mahaifiyarsa. A shekara ta 1792, ya sake komawa Vienna kuma ya fara aikin kida na gaske, yana koyon rubuta kida daga Joseph Haydn. A wannan lokacin, ya fara samun suna a matsayin mai buga piano, kuma tare da tallafin sarakuna, ya yi nasarar kafa kansa a duniyar kida ta Vienna. Ayyukansa na farko sun gaji salon gargajiya amma a hankali ya fara gina nasa duniyar kida ta musamman.

Yayin da Beethoven ke gina suna a Vienna a matsayin mai buga piano da mawaki, wata mummunar jarabawa ta same shi daga ƙarshen shekarun 1790: rashin ji. Alamomin da suka fara da sauƙi sun ci gaba da taɓarɓarewa, inda suka kai matsayi mai tsanani a kusan shekara ta 1801, wanda ya zama yanayi mai ban tsoro wanda ya girgiza rayuwarsa a matsayin mawaki. Ya yi ƙoƙarin ɓoye wannan gaskiya mai raɗaɗi, amma a ƙarshe, ta hanyar wasiƙar da aka rubuta a Heiligenstadt a shekara ta 1802, wato **Heiligenstadt Testament**, ya bayyana yanke kauna da zurfin damuwarsa game da rayuwa. A cikin wannan wasiƙa, ya furta cewa har ma ya ji sha'awar kashe kansa, amma ya yanke shawarar ci gaba da rayuwa da ƙarfin niyyar bauta wa ɗan adam ta hanyar fasaha. Wannan jarabawa ta yi tasiri sosai a duniyar kidansa. Bai ƙara damu da kyawun waje ba, amma ya fara saka zurfin motsin rai da tunanin falsafa a cikin kidansa. Kidansa, wanda ya wuce iyakokin gargajiya, a hankali ya ci gaba zuwa ga zama mai girma da ban mamaki, yana bincika motsin zuciyar ɗan adam na duniya.

Duk da zafin rashin ji, Beethoven bai daina ƙirƙirar kida ba. Maimakon haka, zuciyarsa ta zurfafa, kuma ilhamarsa ta kida ta fashe da ƙarfi. Abin da ake kira 'zamanin tsakiya' daga 1803 zuwa 1812 shine lokacin da manyan ayyukansa suka fito. Symphony No. 3 'Eroica', wanda ya yi niyyar sadaukarwa ga Napoleon Bonaparte, ya faɗaɗa tsarin symphony na gargajiya ta hanyar rera waƙar jaruntaka da nasarar ruhin ɗan adam. Bugu da ƙari, Symphony No. 5 'Fate', wanda ke ɗauke da gwagwarmayar ɗan adam da kaddara, da Symphony No. 6 'Pastoral', wanda ke bayyana girmamawa ga yanayi, sun nuna zurfin tunaninsa na kida. A wannan lokacin, ya faɗaɗa damar nau'ikan kida na kayan aiki kamar **symphonies**, **piano sonatas**, da **string quartets**, kuma ya haɓaka faɗin motsin rai da ikon bayyanawa. A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, lokacin da jinsa ya kusan ɓacewa gaba ɗaya, ya ci gaba da rubuta kida, yana dogara ga muryoyin ciki kawai, duk da yanke kauna na rashin jin sauti na waje. Wannan ya haifar masa da matsanancin zafi, amma a lokaci guda, ya zama tushen ƙirƙirar wata duniyar kida ta musamman wacce babu wanda ya taɓa kaiwa.

Ayyukan Beethoven na ƙarshe sun ƙunshi zurfin falsafa da zurfi. Musamman, Symphony No. 9 'Choral', wanda aka fara yi a 1824, ya buɗe sabon salo na **symphony mai haɗa da waƙar baki** ta hanyar amfani da waƙar Friedrich Schiller 'Ode to Joy' a matsayin waƙoƙin, yana isar da saƙon jin kai da haɗin kai. Wannan aiki ya kasance kololuwar kidansa kuma ya zama babban gado ga ɗan adam. A ranar 26 ga Maris, 1827, Beethoven ya rasu a Vienna yana da shekaru 56, amma kidansa ya ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai ga mawaka da jama'a a duk faɗin duniya bayan mutuwarsa. A matsayinsa na mai kammala kida na gargajiya kuma majagaba na kida na soyayya, ya ba da ilhami ga mawaka na gaba kamar Schubert da Brahms. Ayyukansa har yau suna cikin waɗanda aka fi bugawa a duniya, kuma suna nuna ƙarfin hali na ruhin ɗan adam da ikon fasaha. Rayuwar Beethoven da kidansa misali ne na nasarar ɗan adam wanda ya shawo kan wahala kuma ya ƙirƙiri babban fasaha, kuma ana iya bincika keɓantarsa ta hanyar kwatanta shi da manyan mawaka na zamaninsa kamar Mozart da Haydn.
beethoven.trials: Zalunci da cin zarafin da mahaifinsa ya yi masa tun yana yaro, da kuma rasa jin sa wanda ya zama kamar hukuncin kisa ga mawaƙi, da kuma tsananin kaɗaici da rashin nasara a soyayya da suka bi shi har tsawon rayuwarsa.
beethoven.overcoming: Ya shawo kan gwaji mai tsanani na kurma ta hanyar ƙarfin zuciya, ya bar manyan ayyuka kamar 'Symphony na 9' ga ɗan adam, kuma ya ɗaukaka kiɗa daga nishaɗi zuwa bayanin gwagwarmaya da nasarar ruhin ɗan adam.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Zan kama makogwaron sa'a. Sa'a ba za ta rinjaye ni gaba ɗaya ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka yarda ka miƙa wuya lokacin da yanayi ya danne ka. Kada ka bar sa'a ta mallaki rayuwarka, ka yi yaƙi har ƙarshe ka zama babban mutum wanda ya buɗe nasa hanyar.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Daga wahala zuwa farin ciki! (Durch Leiden zum Freude). Gaskiyar farin ciki tana zuwa ne bayan shawo kan gwaji.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Wannan wahalar da kake ciki yanzu shirye-shirye ne don babban tsalle. Lokacin da ka gama wucewa ta cikin rami na wahala, za ka sami babban farin ciki da girma wanda ba za a iya kwatantawa ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kiɗa yana da girma fiye da dukkan hikima da falsafa. Nemi abin da ya cancanci sadaukar da sha'awarka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ka kula da motsin rai mai zafi da ruhin fasaha wanda ke motsa ka fiye da ilimi kawai. Lokacin da ka narke ranka cikin abin da kake so da gaske, za ka zama babban mutum.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaban Amurka sau hudu wanda ya jagoranci nasarar shawo kan Babban Bala'i da Yakin Duniya na Biyu bayan shawo kan cutar shan inna, kuma babban mai kafa Majalisar Dinkin Duniya.
key_achievements: Gudanar da manufar New Deal don shawo kan Babban Bala'i
Jagorancin nasarar sojojin kawance a Yakin Duniya na Biyu
Kafa harsashin zaman lafiya ga bil'adama, jagorancin kafa Majalisar Dinkin Duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: An tuna da shi har abada a matsayin alamar sarrafa rikici da jihar jin dadin jama'a, kuma mai kare 'yanci da dimokuradiyya.

franklin-d-roosevelt.epic:
An haifi Franklin Delano Roosevelt a shekara ta 1882 a wani gida mai arziki a New York. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta yi kama da tafarkin manyan mutane, amma a lokacin da yake da shekaru 39, wata babbar jarabawa ta same shi, cutar shan inna. Nakasar jiki da ta tilasta masa dogaro da keken guragu har abada ta yi kama da za ta karya shi, amma a maimakon haka, wannan jarabawar ta ba shi zurfin fahimtar wahalar masu rauni a cikin al'umma da kuma jajircewa marar yankewa. Ya dawo cikin siyasa da babban burin farfado da fatan Amurka maimakon kafafunsa.

Babban nasarar Roosevelt ita ce 'shawo kan Babban Bala'i da Yakin Duniya na Biyu'. A matsayinsa na shugaban Amurka na 32, ya samar da ayyukan yi ga jama'a masu fama da yunwa tare da sake gina tattalin arziki ta hanyar manufar 'New Deal'. Ya kunna wutar bege a cikin zukatan al'umma ta hanyar 'Tattaunawar Wuta' ta rediyo, kuma duk da cewa jikinsa ya shanye, ya jagoranci sojojin kawance don murkushe sojojin Nazi. Shi ne shugaban Amurka na farko kuma tilo da aka zaba sau hudu a tarihin bil'adama, kuma mai ceton zamaninsa wanda ya ceci al'umma a lokacin rikici.

Ya rasu a kololuwar rayuwarsa, a daidai lokacin da nasarar yaki ke gab da cika, amma ya kafa harsashin zaman lafiya ga bil'adama ta hanyar kafa 'Majalisar Dinkin Duniya' da ya tsara. Ya bayyana cewa, 'Abin da kawai ya kamata mu ji tsoro shi ne tsoro da kansa', kuma ya farfado da duniya da ke cike da tsoro. Ya kasance wani katon mutum mai kadaici wanda ya shawo kan iyakokin jikinsa da jagorancin tunani, kuma ya nuna da kansa yadda nufin mutum zai iya shawo kan manyan raƙuman tarihi.

Gadon Franklin Delano Roosevelt har yau yana haskawa a matsayin alamar sarrafa rikici da kuma jihar jin dadin jama'a. Ya bar koyarwar cewa, 'Darajar al'umma tana dogara ne kan yadda take kula da mafi rauninta'. Rayuwarsa ta kasance wani babban labari na bege da aka gina ta hanyar gwagwarmaya, kuma ya koya mana cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shi ne wanda yake taimakon wasu su tashi lokacin da ba za su iya tashi da kansu ba. An rubuta sunansa har abada a matsayin mai kare 'yanci da dimokuradiyya, yana ba da ƙarfin hali ga duk waɗanda ke cikin jarabawa.
franklin-d-roosevelt.trials: Rashin motsin ƙafafu sakamakon cutar Polio da ya kamu da shi yana da shekaru 39 da kuma gwagwarmayar rayuwa, da kuma barazanar fatarar kasa da ta addabi kasar a lokacin Babban Tashin Hankali da kuma yakin duniya na biyu.
franklin-d-roosevelt.overcoming: Ya shawo kan nakasar jikinsa, ya farfado da tattalin arzikin Amurka ta hanyar manufofin New Deal, kuma ya jagoranci yaki zuwa ga nasara a yakin duniya na biyu, wanda ya kafa tsarin duniya na zamani.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Abin da kawai ya kamata mu yi tsoro shi ne tsoro da kansa. Kada ku yarda tsoro ya rinjaye ku, ku ci gaba da mataki.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Abin da ke damun ku fiye da matsalar kanta shi ne damuwa mara tushe. Lokacin da kuka fuskanci tsoro kuma kuka dauki mataki, za ku iya tserewa daga rikicin.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ma'aunin ci gaba na gaskiya ba ya dogara ne akan kara wa wadanda suke da yawa ba, amma ko an samar wa wadanda suke da kadan isasshen abin da suke bukata.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Sanya ma'aunin nasara a kan mafi rauni a cikin al'umma. Jagoranci wanda ke kula da kuma rungumar wasu zai samar da duniyar da ta fi kowa girma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Jiya ta wuce, kuma gobe ba a san ta ba. Yau, yi kokarin ku mafi kyau don yin mafi kyawun yini.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku karaya ko da a karshen bege. Har sai an karya nufinku, sabuwar dama za ta zo. Jurewa da kanta nasara ce.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marcus Aurelius shi ne sarki na ƙarshe daga cikin Sarakuna Biyar Masu Kyau na Roma kuma masanin falsafar Stoic, wanda ya gabatar da manufar mulkin falsafa ta hanyar 'Meditations'.
key_achievements: Mulkin sarki na ƙarshe daga cikin Sarakuna Biyar Masu Kyau na Daular Roma
Rubuta 'Meditations' (Tafakkuri), ainihin falsafar Stoic
Kare iyakokin ƙasa daga mamayewar kabilun Jamusawa
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Meditations' (Tafakkuri) ya kasance littafi mai daraja don jagoranci da taimakon kai a yau, yana gabatar da misalin sarki-falsafa.

marcus-aurelius.epic:
Marcus Aurelius Antoninus (121 – 180), wanda ya kasance sarki na goma sha shida (16) na Daular Roma kuma masanin falsafar Stoic, ya tsaya a matsayin ginshiƙi mai girma a cikin tarihin ɗan adam. Shi ne sarki na ƙarshe na zamanin Pax Romana mai cike da alheri, kuma na ƙarshe daga cikin Sarakuna Biyar Masu Kyau waɗanda suka yi mulki da hikima. Pax Romana, wanda ke nufin zamanin kwanciyar hankali da wadata a Daular Roma, ya sami ƙarshensa a hannunsa. An haife shi a ranar 26 ga Afrilu, 121, a cikin wata fitacciyar iyali ta Roma, Marcus Aurelius ya nuna basira mai ban mamaki tun yana yaro. Ya sami tagomashi daga Sarkin sarakuna Hadrian, wanda ya ba shi damar shiga hidimar jama'a tun da wuri, kuma daga baya Sarkin sarakuna Antoninus Pius ya ɗauke shi a matsayin ɗa, inda aka naɗa shi magaji. Ya zurfafa cikin falsafa, musamman falsafar Stoic, yana gina halayen da suka dace da shugabanci. Ya yi aiki a matsayin kansila a shekarun 140, 145, da 161, yana faɗaɗa fahimtarsa game da gudanar da mulkin daular. Wannan lokaci ne da Daular Roma ke kan kololuwar wadata, amma a lokaci guda, alamun kalubale na ciki da barazanar waje sun fara bayyana a hankali, suna nuna wani lokaci na canji mai girma.

A shekara ta 161, Marcus Aurelius ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Sarkin Daular Roma, bayan Antoninus Pius. Mulkinsa nan da nan ya fuskanci kalubale marasa misaltuwa. Ya gabatar da sabuwar hanyar mulki tare da abokin mulkinsa, Lucius Verus, amma ba da daɗewa ba yaƙi ya barke da Daular Parthia a Gabas. Ko da yake Roma ta yi nasara a wannan yaƙin, sojojin da suka dawo sun yaɗa wata annoba mai kisa, wadda aka fi sani da Annobar Antonine, a duk faɗin daular. Wannan annoba ta yi sanadiyar mutuwar mutane da yawa a Roma, kuma ta yi mummunar tasiri ga tattalin arzikin daular da tsarin zamantakewarta. A lokaci guda kuma, kabilun Jamusawa da Sarmatiya sun fara mamayewa a kan iyakokin arewa. Musamman ma mamayewar kabilun Marcomanni da Quadi ya yi barazana ga ƙasar Italiya kanta, yana haifar da babbar matsalar tsaro ga Daular Roma. A cikin wannan yanayi mai cike da rikice-rikice, Marcus Aurelius ya fuskanci gwaji na gaskiya a matsayin sarki-falsafa, wanda dole ne ya jagoranci daular tare da natsuwar ciki marar girgiza, bisa ga ka'idodin falsafar Stoic, fiye da kasancewarsa shugaban soja ko mai gudanarwa kawai.

Duk da annobar da ta addabi daular da kuma barazanar yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa, Marcus Aurelius ya yi mulki da haƙuri da kuma jin nauyi, yana aiwatar da koyarwar falsafar Stoic. Ya jagoranci sojoji da kansa a kan iyakokin arewa tsawon shekaru, yana yaƙi da mamayewar kabilun Jamusawa da Sarmatiya. Waɗannan yaƙe-yaƙe sun kasance masu tsawo da kuma cinye ƙarfi, kuma sarki ya shafe lokaci mai yawa a fagen yaƙi. A cikin waɗannan yanayi masu tsanani, ya rubuta littafinsa mai suna 'Meditations' (Tafakkuri). 'Meditations' wani littafi ne na tunani na falsafa da ya rubuta wa kansa a cikin tsarin littafin diary, wanda ke ɗauke da ainihin falsafar Stoic: yana jaddada kiyaye natsuwar ciki a cikin rudani na waje, yin aiki da hankali, da kuma cika nauyi. A rayuwarsa ta sirri ma, ya rasa abokin mulkinsa Lucius Verus ga annoba a shekara ta 169, kuma daga baya ya fuskanci bala'o'i da yawa kamar mutuwar matarsa Faustina da matsaloli da ɗansa Commodus. Duk da haka, Marcus Aurelius ya sarrafa motsin zuciyarsa, ya karɓi ƙaddararsa, kuma ya nuna misali na shugaba-falsafa wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga amfanin jama'a. Ya yi ƙoƙari ta fuskoki daban-daban don tabbatar da zaman lafiyar daular, kamar gudanar da kuɗi, gyara dokoki, da kuma taimakon talakawa.

A ranar 17 ga Maris, 180, Marcus Aurelius ya rasu a fagen yaƙi, yana kawo ƙarshen zamanin Pax Romana. Bayan mutuwarsa, Daular Roma ta shiga wani lokaci na rudani a ƙarƙashin mulkin ɗansa Commodus. Amma, mafi mahimmancin gadon da ya bari shine littafin 'Meditations' (Tafakkuri). Wannan littafi ya kasance littafi mai daraja wanda ke ba da hikima da ta'aziyya ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya har zuwa yau, ta hanyar tsararraki da yawa. 'Meditations' yana jaddada rayuwa mai ɗa'a, haƙuri a cikin wahalhalu, da kuma mahimmancin yanke shawara mai hankali, yana mai da shi babban rubutu na falsafar Stoic wanda ake ci gaba da ambato da nazari a fannin jagoranci na zamani da kuma taimakon kai. Duk da cewa yana da cikakken iko, ana tuna shi a matsayin alamar 'sarki-falsafa' wanda ya ci gaba da nazarin kansa, ya sarrafa kansa, kuma ya cika nauyinsa. Rayuwar Marcus Aurelius da falsafarsa sun gabatar da misali mai kyau na shugaba wanda ke kiyaye natsuwar ciki kuma yake neman amfanin jama'a a cikin lokuta masu rudani, yana tasiri sosai ga gadon ruhaniya na ɗan adam tare da tunanin sauran masana falsafar Stoic kamar Seneca da Epictetus.
marcus-aurelius.trials: Yakin da ba a taba gani ba da ya dauki tsawon rayuwa, da annoba da ta yi wa Roma mummunan illa, da kuma tsananin bakin ciki na rasa yara takwas daga cikin goma sha uku, da kuma tsananin kadaici na cin amanar mata da kuma abokai.
marcus-aurelius.overcoming: Ta hanyar koyarwar falsafar Stoic, ya gina katangar da ba za ta girgiza ba a cikin ransa, kuma ya kare ci gaban daular Roma ta karshe ta hanyar hikimarsa ta rashin damuwa, inda ya karbi ko da azaba da gwaji a matsayin tsarin duniya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Rayuwarka tana daidai da tunaninka. Ka kula da lambun ranka da tsafta.
