wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ba yanayin waje bane ke damunka ba, sai dai tunaninka game da yanayin da ke damunka. Lokacin da ka sarrafa tunaninka zuwa mai kyau da kuma hankali, zaka zama babban mutum mai nutsuwa a gaban kowace irin gwaji.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ramuwar gayya mafi kyau ita ce ka yi abin da ya bambanta da wanda ya cutar da kai. Kada ka rasa darajarka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka mayar da mugunta da mugunta. Ko yaya mutum ya yi, idan ka ci gaba da bin ka'idodin ka masu daraja, zaka samu nasara mai girma da kuma fifiko na halin kirki wanda ya wuce ramuwar gayya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kada ka bata lokaci wajen jayayya game da irin mutumin da ya kamata ya zama mai kyau. Kawai ka zama irin wannan mutumin.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka yi jayayya game da adalci ta hanyar ka'ida da magana kawai, amma ka aiwatar da adalci a rayuwarka ta yau da kullun. Gaskiyarka da kwazonsa da kake nuna ta hanyar ayyuka masu ma'ana zasu zama mafi karfin harshen babban mutum wanda zai canza duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masanin falsafa na Roma, Seneca, ya kai kololuwar iko a matsayin malamin Sarki Nero, amma ta hanyar Stoicism na Aiki, ya koyar da iyakokin rayuwa da mutuncin mutuwa, yana mai mayar da rayuwarsa ta bala'i zuwa falsafa.
key_achievements: Ya zama fitaccen mai fasahar magana da masanin falsafa na Roma
Ya kafa kuma ya koyar da Stoicism na Aiki
Ya kiyaye mutuncinsa na falsafa ko da a gaban mutuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa har yau suna ba da jagora ga rayuwa, kuma suna ci gaba da zama jagora ga sarrafa lokaci da horon hankali, suna isar da hikima mai amfani.

seneca.epic:
Seneca an haife shi a shekara ta 4 kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa a Spain, wadda take mulkin mallaka na Daular Roma. Ya girma ya zama fitaccen mai fasahar magana da kuma masanin falsafa na Roma, amma rayuwarsa ta kasance cikin tashin hankali da rudani na iko. A matsayinsa na malami kuma mai ba da shawara ga Sarki Nero, ya kai kololuwar iko a daular, amma dole ne ya yi gwagwarmaya mai tsanani tsakanin tsoron mutuwa da kuma rikicin ɗabi'a yayin da yake kallon almajirinsa yana komawa azzalumi. Ko da yake yana cikin rayuwar fada mai kyau, ya kasance masanin falsafa wanda ya fahimci banza da wofi na dukiya da iko da za a iya kwace su a kowane lokaci.

Babban ci gaban Seneca shi ne kafa 'Stoicism na Aiki'. Ko da yake yana cikin gudun hijira da barazanar mutuwa, ta hanyar wasiƙun da ya rubuta wa abokansa, ya koyar da iyakokin rayuwa, darajar lokaci, da kuma yadda za a kiyaye kwanciyar hankali. Ya ce, "Rayuwa ba gajera ba ce, mutane ne ke ɓata ta," kuma ya gane cewa rayuwar da ke tuna mutuwa (Memento Mori) ita ce hanya ta gaskiya zuwa ga 'yanci. Nasararsa ta kasance a cikin cikar bala'i, inda ya fuskanci lokacin ƙarshe ba tare da girgiza ba a gaban takobin azzalumi, yana kiyaye mutuncinsa na falsafa.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, lokacin da ya sami umarnin kashe kansa daga Nero, bai firgita ba, ya ta'azantar da iyalinsa da abokansa, sannan ya sha guba cikin nutsuwa. Ya so rayuwarsa ta zama babban rubutun falsafa, kuma ya nuna da kansa yadda mutum zai iya shan kashi cikin ladabi da mutuwa cikin daraja. Rubuce-rubucensa, tun daga Tsakiyar Zamani, ta hanyar Renaissance, har zuwa zamani na yanzu, sun zama harshen ta'aziyya mafi gaskiya da ƙarfi ga waɗanda suka rasa hanyar rayuwa.

Gadon Seneca har yau yana haskawa a matsayin jagora ga sarrafa lokaci da horon hankali. Ya bar koyarwar cewa, "Kaddara tana jagorantar masu son rai, kuma tana jawo waɗanda ba su da son rai." Rayuwar Seneca ta kasance babban labari na hankali wanda ya fito daga cikin bala'i mai ban mamaki, kuma ya koyar da cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shi ne wanda ba ya bari canje-canjen duniya su ja shi, amma yana cika lokacinsa da daraja. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin babban malamin hikima mai amfani, yana isar da hankali mai haske ga duk waɗanda ke rayuwa a cikin duniya mai rikitarwa.
seneca.trials: Shekaru takwas na zaman kaso a Corsica da kuma mawuyacin yanayin tunani a matsayinsa na malamin zalunci Nero, da kuma karshen rayuwarsa mai cike da tashin hankali inda aka tilasta masa ya umarci almajirinsa ya kashe kansa.
seneca.overcoming: Kafin ya fuskanci gudun hijira da kuma barazanar mutuwa, bai daina rubuce-rubucensa da ke binciken hakikanin rayuwa ba, kuma ya mayar da falsafar Stoic zuwa ga hikima mai amfani da za a iya amfani da ita a rayuwar mutane na zamani.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mafi yawan azabarmu muna sha ne a cikin tunaninmu, ba a zahiri ba. Kada ka karya zaman lafiyar ranka ta hanyar damuwa game da abin da ba zai faru ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Fargaba mara tushe kamar fatalwa ce da ke cinye ranka. Ka mai da hankalinka ga gaskiyar da ke faruwa a yanzu don samun kwanciyar hankali.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Rayuwa ba ta da gajeruwar rayuwa, amma ita ce muke bata. Ka yi amfani da lokacin da aka ba ka don ciyar da ranka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Lokaci shi ne mafi darajar dukiyarka. Kada ka bata lokacinka a kan abin da wasu suke so ko kuma abin sha'awa marasa amfani, amma ka mai da hankalinka ga cika burinka.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Sa'a tana faruwa ne lokacin da shiri ya haɗu da dama. Maimakon jira dama ta zo, shirya kanka don saduwa da dama.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka nemi sa'a. Lokacin da ka ci gaba da inganta basirarka da halinka, dama a duniya za ta buga maka ƙofa.

confucius.era: Karni karni na 6 zuwa 5 BC (Lokacin bazara da kaka)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Confucius ya kasance masanin falsafa kuma mai koyarwa a kasar Sin a zamanin bazara da kaka, wanda ya kafa falsafar Confucianism kuma ya samar da ginshiƙin al'adun Gabashin Asiya.
key_achievements: Kafa da tsara falsafar Confucianism
Jaddada mulkin kirki da falsafar jin kai (仁)
Sadaukar da kai ga tsara tsoffin littattafai da ilimi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafarsa ta zama ginshiƙin ɗabi'a, siyasa, da ilimi na al'ummar Gabashin Asiya sama da shekaru dubu biyu kuma tana ci gaba da yin tasiri har zuwa yau.

confucius.epic:
Confucius (孔子, ainihin sunansa Kong Qiu, an haife shi kusan 551 K.Z.) ya kasance fitaccen masanin falsafa kuma mai koyarwa a zamanin bazara da kaka na kasar Sin, wanda ya rayu a cikin lokuta masu cike da hargitsi kuma ya kafa falsafar Confucianism, wadda ta zama jagorar ɗabi'a ga bil'adama. Zamanin bazara da kaka, lokacin da aka haife shi, ya kasance lokaci ne na rudani inda tsarin mulkin feudal na daular Zhou ya ruguje, kuma yaƙe-yaƙe da gwagwarmayar neman iko tsakanin masarautu ba su da iyaka. A lokacin da ladabi da ɗabi'a suka faɗi warwas a cikin al'umma, kuma hargitsi ya ƙaru, Confucius an haife shi a cikin gidan wani ƙaramin mai daraja a jihar Lu. Ko da yake ya rasa mahaifinsa tun yana ƙarami kuma ya girma a cikin mawuyacin hali, ya zurfafa cikin ilimi, yana binciken hikimar tsoffin waliyyai da kuma ladabi da kiɗa (禮樂). A cikin wannan yanayi na zamani, Confucius ya fara haɓaka falsafarsa, wato Confucianism (儒敎), wadda ta jaddada haɓaka ɗabi'ar mutum, dangantaka mai jituwa a cikin al'umma, da kuma mulkin kirki (德治) na shugabanni. Confucianism tsari ne na tunani wanda ke ɗaukar ɗabi'ar mutum da ta ƙasa, dangantaka mai jituwa, adalci, jin kai, gaskiya, da kuma alhakin shugaba mai mulki da kirki a matsayin muhimman dabi'u.

Confucius ya yi ƙoƙari sosai don ganin an aiwatar da manufofinsa a cikin siyasar gaskiya. Ya riƙe muƙamai daban-daban a jihar Lu, kamar mai kula da sito da kuma mai gudanar da shari'a, inda ya nuna ƙwarewa ta musamman a fannin gudanarwa. Har ma ya taɓa hawa babban muƙami na Babban Ministan Shari'a (大司寇) kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin kawo sauye-sauye a siyasa. Amma tsarin mulkin da ya lalace a lokacin da kuma son kai na sarakunan masarautu ba su karɓi manufar Confucius ta mulkin kirki ba. Ganin cewa bai sami damar aiwatar da manufofinsa na siyasa ba, Confucius ya bar jihar Lu a kusan 497 K.Z., yana da shekaru hamsin da wani abu, kuma ya fara tafiya mai tsawo na "yawon shakatawa a faɗin ƙasashe" (天下周遊) tsakanin masarautu daban-daban kamar Wei (衛), Chen (陳), da Cai (蔡) na tsawon shekaru 14. A cikin wannan lokaci, ya yi ta neman wani sarki mai hikima wanda zai fahimci kuma ya aiwatar da falsafarsa, amma yawancin sarakunan sun karɓi koyarwarsa a sama-sama kawai ko kuma sun yi la'akari da amfanin siyasa kawai. A cikin wannan gibin da ke tsakanin manufa da gaskiya, Confucius ya fuskanci baƙin ciki mai zurfi.

Tafiyar yawon shakatawa a faɗin ƙasashe ta kawo wa Confucius gwaje-gwaje da wahalhalu marasa adadi. Wani lokaci yakan ji yunwa saboda rashin abinci, wani lokaci kuma yakan fuskanci yanayi mai haɗari inda rayuwarsa ke cikin barazana. Amma duk da waɗannan matsaloli, Confucius bai taɓa yin watsi da imaninsa ba, a maimakon haka, ya ƙara himma wajen binciken ilimi da tsara falsafarsa tare da almajiransa. Ya aiwatar da koyarwarsa cewa "mai daraja ya kamata ya kasance mai ƙarfi musamman a lokacin wahala," kuma ya haɓaka zurfin fahimta game da cikakken mutum da tsarin zamantakewa bisa ga jin kai (仁) da ladabi (禮). A kusan 484 K.Z., yana da shekaru 68, Confucius ya dawo garinsu na Lu, kuma bai ƙara shiga siyasa ba, sai dai ya sadaukar da kansa ga koyar da ɗalibai da kuma tsara tsoffin littattafai. Ya tattara kuma ya yi sharhi a kan muhimman littattafai na zamaninsa kamar su *Littafin Waƙoƙi (詩經)*, *Littafin Tarihi (書經)*, *Littafin Canje-canje (易經)*, da *Tarihin Bazara da Kaka (春秋)*, ya kuma bar su ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Ya koyar da almajirai da yawa, yana kafa tushe don ci gaba da falsafarsa. Koyarwarsa an tattara ta a cikin *Littafin Maganganu (論語)* ta almajiransa kuma tana nan har zuwa yau.

Ko da yake manufofin Confucius na siyasa ba su cika aiwatuwa ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, bayan mutuwarsa falsafar Confucianism ta yi tasiri mai girma a faɗin Gabashin Asiya, har ma fiye da kasar Sin. Falsafarsa an karɓe ta a matsayin akidar gwamnati a zamanin daular Han, kuma tun daga nan, sama da shekaru dubu biyu, ta zama ginshiƙin tsarin zamantakewa, siyasa, ilimi, da ɗabi'a a cikin wayewar Gabashin Asiya, ciki har da Koriya, Japan, da Vietnam. Confucius ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da al'adun gargajiya na Gabashin Asiya (Sinosphere) ta hanyar jaddada haɓaka ɗabi'ar mutum, ɗabi'ar iyali, jituwa ta zamantakewa, da kuma halayen shugaba. Har wa yau, koyarwarsa tana tunatar da mu game da muhimmancin ɗabi'ar ɗan adam da kuma al'umma, kuma tana ba da mafita mai hikima ga matsaloli daban-daban na zamani. Falsafarsa ta ci gaba da haɓaka ta hanyar masana falsafar Confucianism na baya kamar Mencius da Xunzi, kuma tana da matsayi mai kama da na Socrates a falsafar Yamma, saboda tasirinta mai girma wajen samar da yanayin tunani na Gabashin Asiya.
confucius.trials: Talauci tun yana yaro da rasuwar mahaifinsa da wuri, da kuma wahalar tafiya ta duniya na tsawon shekaru 14 da kuma takaicin rashin iya aiwatar da siyasar kansa, da kuma masifar mutuwar almajirinsa Yan Hui.
confucius.overcoming: Maimakon samun mulkin duniya, ya mai da hankali kan tarbiyyar mabiyansa da kuma shirya iliminsa, ya kammala tsarin halaye mafi tasiri a tarihin dan adam, kuma ya kafa falsafar rayuwar mutanen Gabas ta hanyar dabi'ar 'mutunci (仁)'.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kada ka yi wa wasu abin da ba ka so a yi maka. Jin kai (恕) shi ne tushen dukkan nagarta.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kullum ka yi tunani daga mahangar wani. Lokacin da ka yi wa wasu yadda kake so a yi maka, halayenka za su sami girma mai girma kuma duniya za ta yi tasiri tare da kai a tsakiya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Shin ba dadi ba ne koyo da kuma sake nazari lokaci-lokaci? Koyon da ba ya karewa zai sa ka zama malami.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Dakatar da karatunka yana nufin dakatar da ciwonka. Lokacin da ka sami sabon ilimi kuma ka aiwatar da shi a rayuwarka, kuma ka gyara kanka a kowane lokaci, za ka zama gaske babban mutum na hikima.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babban daraja ba ta kasancewa ba faduwa ba, amma tashi a kowane lokaci da ka fado.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka ji tsoron gazawa. Duk da cewa ba ka faduwa a lokacin gwaji ba, amma wannan niyyar da ba ta daskarewa ta sake tashi da ci gaba ita ce mafi girman shaida na babban mutum wanda ke rarrabe ka da mutane na al'ada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Socrates wani masanin falsafa ne na tsohuwar Girka a Athens, wanda ya kafa tushen falsafar Yamma kuma ya bincika ainihin rayuwar ɗabi'a, ya mutu a matsayin shahidi.
key_achievements: Kafa tushen al'adar falsafar Yamma
Kafa Hanyar Tattaunawa ta Socrates
Matsayin jagoranci a falsafar ɗabi'a
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa da mutuwarsa sun zama tushen har abada ga falsafar Yamma, ɗabi'a, da tunani mai mahimmanci.

socrates.epic:
Socrates (kimanin 470-399 K.H.A.) wani masanin falsafa ne na tsohuwar Girka a Athens, wanda ya kasance jagora a falsafar ɗabi'a ta Yamma kuma ya ba da gagarumar kwarin gwiwa wajen kafa tushen al'adar falsafar Yamma ta hannun almajirinsa Plato. A ƙarni na 5 K.H.A., Athens ta kasance zamanin zinariya na dimokuraɗiyya da al'adu, amma kuma lokaci ne mai cike da rudani inda ra'ayoyi daban-daban game da ilimi da gaskiya suka yi karo. A cikin wannan yanayi, Socrates ya kasance wani mutum mai ban mamaki. Bai rubuta kowane rubutu kai tsaye ba, kuma an san shi ne ta hanyar rubuce-rubucen bayan mutuwarsa daga marubutan gargajiya kamar almajirinsa Plato da Xenophon. Waɗannan rubuce-rubucen an rubuta su ne a cikin tsarin tattaunawa, inda Socrates da abokan tattaunawarsa ke bincika takamaiman batutuwa ta hanyar tambaya da amsa. Wannan hanya ta haifar da nau'in adabi da ake kira 'Hanyar Tattaunawa ta Socrates', wanda ya kasance wata hanya ta falsafa ta musamman wacce ba kawai ke isar da ilimi ba, amma tana taimaka wa mutane su gano gaskiya da kansu. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa sun yi tasiri mai girma a kan tsararraki masu zuwa, amma rashin rubuce-rubucensa ya sa sake gina falsafarsa ya zama mai wahala, wanda ake kira 'matsalar Socrates'.

Hanyar binciken falsafa ta Socrates ta haifar da martani mai tsattsauran ra'ayi a cikin al'ummar Athens a lokacin. Ya yi tattaunawa cikin 'yanci da 'yan ƙasa a kasuwa (agora) ko a wuraren jama'a, yana ci gaba da jefa musu tambayoyi game da imaninsu da dabi'unsu. Waɗannan tambayoyin sau da yawa suna bayyana jahilcin abokan tattaunawarsa kuma suna girgiza ra'ayoyin da aka saba, wanda ya kawo haske ga wasu amma ya haifar da rashin jin daɗi da ƙiyayya ga wasu. Ya kira kansa 'kudajin Athens', yana ɗaukar nauyin farkar da hankalin 'yan ƙasar Athens da suka yi kasala. Tattaunawarsa ba don jayayya kawai ba ce, amma ta samo asali ne daga zurfin sha'awar bincika ainihin ruhin ɗan adam da rayuwar ɗabi'a, da kuma kai ga hikima ta gaskiya. Duk da haka, wannan halinsa mai mahimmanci da ƙalubale ya fara zama barazana ga masu mulki da masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a cikin yanayin siyasa da zamantakewa mara tabbas na Athens a lokacin. Tasirinsa a kan matasa ya kasance abin lura musamman, wanda a ƙarshe ya zama tushen makomarsa mai ban tausayi.

A shekara ta 399 K.H.A., Socrates ya fuskanci babban gwajinsa. An zarge shi da 'sabon addini' saboda ya lalata matasan Athens kuma bai yarda da allolin da jihar ta amince da su ba. An gudanar da shari'ar a cikin kwana ɗaya kacal, kuma an same shi da laifi kuma an yanke masa hukuncin kisa. Almajiransa da abokansa sun ba shi taimako sau da yawa don ya tsere daga kurkuku, amma Socrates ya ƙi yarda da hakan. Ya dage kan imaninsa cewa dole ne ya mutunta ka'idodin adalci da doka da ya koyar a duk rayuwarsa, ko da kuwa an yi amfani da dokar ba daidai ba. Ya riƙe matsayin falsafa cewa ko da doka mara kyau doka ce, yana zaɓar mutuwar da kansa don imaninsa. A cewar rubuce-rubucen Plato, Socrates ya sha kofin dafi kuma ya mutu cikin kwanciyar hankali. Mutuwarsa ba kawai ƙarshen wani masanin falsafa ba ce, amma an rubuta ta a matsayin wani taron tarihi wanda ya nuna wa ɗan adam girman darajar neman gaskiya da kiyaye lamiri.

Gadon da Socrates ya bari ya yi tasiri mai zurfi da dorewa a kan dukkan wayewar Yamma. Ko da yake babu rubuce-rubucensa kai tsaye, tunaninsa da hanyoyinsa, ta hannun almajirinsa Plato, sun kafa tushen falsafar Yamma, kuma sun ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban ɗabi'a da ilimin sanin gaskiya. Koyarwarsa ta 'Ka san kanka' da kuma hanyar tattaunawa ta Socrates wacce ke haifar da tunani mai mahimmanci ana amfani da ita a yau a fannoni daban-daban kamar ilimi, ilimin halayyar ɗan adam, da shari'a. Mutuwarsa ta zama alamar masanin falsafa wanda ya kare gaskiya da lamiri a kan ikon da ba daidai ba, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana tunani marasa adadi na baya. Saƙonsa cewa rayuwar da ba a bincika ba ba ta da darajar rayuwa ya wuce lokaci, yana ci gaba da motsa bincike game da ainihin wanzuwar ɗan adam da ma'anarsa. Rayuwa da mutuwar Socrates, kamar sauran manyan masana tunani na tsohuwar Girka, misali Aristotle ko Heraclitus, sun kasance shaidar haske na jajircewar ɗan adam mara yankewa don ilimi da gaskiya.
socrates.trials: Kishin da rashin fahimtar masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na Athens, da kuma tuhume-tuhume marasa adalci na tayar da hankali ga matasa da kuma hukuncin kisa, da kuma azabar da ya shafe shi don kare falsafarsa, ya bar iyalinsa da almajiransa ya karbi mutuwa.
socrates.overcoming: Ya tabbatar da rashin laifinsa da kuma adalcin falsafarsa ta hanyar tattaunawa mai ma'ana ba tare da tsoron mutuwa ba, kuma mutuwarsa ta zama babban abin da ya sa tunaninsa ya dawwama har abada, wanda ya kafa tushen ilimi na wayewar Yamma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: San kanka. Sanin cewa ba ka sani ba shine farkon dukkan hikima.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Lokacin da ka yarda da jahilcinka, sai ilimi ya fara. Lokacin da ka jefar da girman kai na yin kamar kana sani kuma ka ci gaba da tambaya da kuma bincika ranka, za ka zama babban mutum tare da zurfin fahimta fiye da kowa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Rayuwa ba tare da bita ba ba ta cancanci rayuwa ba. Ka yi tunani a kan ayyukanka da tunaninka a kowane lokaci.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka bar kanka a cikin lokaci mara ma'ana. Lokacin da ka ci gaba da tambaya da amsa wa kanka inda rayuwarka ke tafiya da kuma abin da dabi'unka suke, za ka rayu rayuwar babban mutum mai tsarki.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ba zan iya koya wa kowa komai ba. Ina iya sa su kawai su yi tunani.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka ba da amsoshi, amma ka koya musu yadda za su yi tunani. A cikin tsarin taimaka wa wasu su fahimci kansu, za ka zama mafi girman mai ba da taimako na ruhaniya kuma babban mutum wanda zai canza duniya.

lao-tzu.era: Karni karni 600 BC (Lokacin bazara da kaka)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Laozi masanin falsafa ne daga jihar Chu a zamanin bazara da kaka, wanda ya rubuta Daodejing kuma ya kafa tushen falsafar Taoism.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai kula da laburare na masarautar Zhou
Ya rubuta Daodejing kuma ya kafa falsafar Wu Wei Zi Ran
An gane hikimarsa ta hanyar haduwarsa da Confucius
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafarsa ta yi tasiri sosai ga falsafar Gabas gaba ɗaya, tana isar da darajar zaman lafiya da rashin komai.

lao-tzu.epic:
Laozi, wanda aka ce ya kasance masanin falsafa daga jihar Chu a zamanin bazara da kaka, kimanin karni na 6 kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa. Sunansa na asali Li Er ne, kuma an san shi da sunan Dan. A wancan lokacin, kasar Sin tana cikin wani zamani mai cike da rudani inda tsarin mulkin gargajiya na Daular Zhou ya ruguje, kuma rikice-rikicen neman iko tsakanin jihohin da ke karkashinta ba su gushe ba. A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali, Laozi ya yi aiki a matsayin mai kula da laburare na masarautar Zhou, inda ya zurfafa cikin rubuce-rubuce da ilimi masu yawa na zamanin da. Ya lura da zurfi game da ka'idodin duniya da hawa da saukar al'amuran ɗan adam, inda ya fahimci cewa dokoki da tsare-tsare na mutum-mutumi suna adawa da tsarin halitta kuma suna danne yanayin ɗan adam. Tunanin Laozi, a cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, shine farkon tafiya don neman hikima ta asali don magance matsalolin duniya masu rikitarwa. Ya fara zurfafa tunani game da yadda ɗan adam zai iya rayuwa cikin jituwa da yanayi, yana binciken ka'idar Dao ta duniya wacce ke wanzu fiye da abubuwan da ke bayyane. A cikin zuciyarsa, tuni shakku game da tsarin mutum-mutumi na duniya da kuma sha'awar rayuwa ta halitta sun fara fitowa.

Mafi mahimmancin juyawa a rayuwar Laozi shine tafiyarsa ta yamma, ya bar Daular Zhou da ke raguwa, da kuma rubuta littafin Daodejing wanda ya samo asali daga wannan tafiya. Daodejing wani littafi ne mai kimanin kalmomi 5,000 wanda ya tattara tunanin falsafar Laozi, kuma shine babban rubutun falsafar Taoism kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin falsafar Gabas. A cewar labari, lokacin da Laozi ke shirin wucewa ta Hanyar Hangu don tafiya yamma, bisa roƙon mai kula da hanyar, Yin Xi, ya rubuta tunaninsa, kuma wannan shine Daodejing. Ta hanyar wannan littafi, ya bayyana 'Dao,' ka'idar asali ta sararin samaniya, kuma ya yi kira ga falsafar 'Wu Wei Zi Ran' (rashin yin wani abu da karfi da bin yanayi). Wu Wei Zi Ran yana nufin barin ayyukan mutum-mutumi da rayuwa bisa ga tsarin halitta, yana jaddada hikimar cimma komai ta hanyar rashin yin wani abu da karfi. Laozi ya bayyana cewa "Dao ba abin da za a iya faɗa ba ne," yana jaddada zurfin Dao wanda ba za a iya cikakken bayyanawa da harshen ɗan adam da ra'ayoyinsa ba. Koyarwarsa ta ba wa mutanen da ke rayuwa a cikin lokuta masu rudani hanyar rayuwa don guje wa sha'awar mutum-mutumi da gasa, samun kwanciyar hankali na ciki, da kuma bin tsarin halitta.

Laozi ya yi amfani da falsafarsa a rayuwarsa, yana guje wa daukaka da iko, kuma ya zaɓi rayuwa ta keɓewa cikin nutsuwa. Ya jaddada halin tawali'u, yana gudana kamar ruwa zuwa wurare masu ƙasƙanci, yana amfanar dukkan abubuwa, nesa da hayaniya da rikice-rikicen duniya. Maganarsa, "Mafi kyawun abu kamar ruwa ne (上善若水)," tana nuna ainihin ƙarfi da hikima ta hanyar yanayin ruwa, wanda ke rungumar kuma yana amfanar komai ba tare da jayayya ba. Wannan halinsa na rayuwa ya bar babban tasiri ga mutane da yawa a zamaninsa, musamman ma sanannen haduwarsa da Confucius, wanda ya kafa falsafar Confucianism. An ce lokacin da Confucius ya nemi koyarwa daga Laozi, Laozi ya shawarci Confucius da ya yi hattara da al'adun banza na ladabi (Li) kuma ya bi ainihin Dao. Bayan haduwarsu, Confucius ya ce, "Kamar na ga dodon ne," yana nuna mamaki da girmamawa ga hikimarsa da zurfinsa. Laozi bai nemi yada sunansa a duniya ba; maimakon haka, ya rayu a keɓe, yana aiwatar da falsafarsa a hankali, don haka ya nuna cewa ainihin hikima ba ta cikin daukaka ta waje ba, amma a cikin kwanciyar hankali na ciki da jituwa da yanayi. Rayuwarsa ta kasance shaida cewa falsafar Wu Wei ba kawai ka'ida ba ce, amma hanyar rayuwa ce mai yiwuwa.

Gadon da Laozi ya bari ya wuce lokaci, yana yin tasiri sosai ga falsafar Gabas da al'adu gaba ɗaya har zuwa yau. Tunaninsa ba kawai ya kafa tushen Taoism ba ne, amma kuma ya zurfafa cikin sauran falsafofin Gabas kamar Confucianism da Buddhism, yana yin tasiri sosai ga duniyar ruhaniya ta mutanen Gabashin Asiya. Daodejing yana ɗaya daga cikin littattafan gargajiya da aka fi fassara a duniya, yana zaburar da masu tunani na zamani na Yamma kuma ya zama tushen ra'ayoyin kare muhalli, zaman lafiya, da adawa da mulkin kama-karya. Ta hanyar koyarwarsa, "Wanda ya san gamsuwa shine ainihin mai arziki," Laozi ya farkar da mutane ga gaskiyar cewa gamsuwa ta ciki da kwanciyar hankali, maimakon wadata ta zahiri, sune ainihin farin ciki. Rayuwarsa da falsafarsa sun kasance wani babban labari na cikawa da aka samu ta hanyar rashin komai, tawali'u, da jituwa da yanayi. Laozi ya koyar da cewa ainihin babban mutum shine wanda ke tafiya a hankali, yana bin Dao na sararin samaniya da ke cikin kansa, ba tare da hayaniyar duniya ta dame shi ba. Sunan Laozi, wanda ya bincika ainihin da manufofin al'ummar ɗan adam ta wata hanya daban da Confucius ko Mozi na zamaninsa, yana barin babban tasiri, an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin jiki na Dao, yana zama tushen hikima ga duk waɗanda ke neman ainihin kwanciyar hankali.
lao-tzu.trials: Ciwo na masanin falsafa a tsakiyar rikicin kasashe masu rugujewa, ba'a ga duniya da ba ta fahimci tunaninsa ba, da kuma tsananin kadaici na tafiya mai tsawon rai bayan barin duk wani jin dadi.
lao-tzu.overcoming: Ya kafa hikimar rashin aiki, yana bin hanyar yanayi ta hanyar barin duk wata dabi'a ta mutum, kuma ya samar da tushen tunani ta hanyar Tao Te Ching wanda ya ta'azantar da ruhin dan adam da kuma farkar da shi tsawon dubban shekaru.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Hanya mai nisan mil dubu tana farawa da mataki daya. Bar sauri kuma ka mai da hankali kan karamin aiki na yanzu.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Maimakon mafarkin babban nasara, yi iya kokarinka a kan karamin matakin da kake dauka a yau. Wadancan matakai masu dorewa za su taru don kammala nasarar wani mutum wanda babu wanda zai iya kwatanta shi.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mafi kyawun abu yana kama da ruwa. Yana gudana zuwa wurare masu karancin girma kuma yana samun karfin da ba a iya ci nasara ba lokacin da ba ya jayayya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka yi kokarin cin nasara da karfi. Lokacin da kake rungumi da taushi da kuma mu'amala da sassauci, za ka sami karfin hali na wani mutum mai karfi wanda zai narke duk wani cikas mai tauri.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Hanyar da za a iya magana ba ta gaskiya ba ce. Saurari gaskiyar da ke cikin shiru fiye da kalmomi masu kyau.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Dakatar da alfahari da iliminka kuma ka bi tsananin cikin ranka. Lokacin da ka karba kuma ka girmama asirin rayuwa da ba za a iya bayyanawa ba kamar yadda suke, ka zama wani mutum na gaskiya wanda ya zama daya da hikimar sararin samaniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Aristotle babban masanin falsafa ne kuma mai ilimi daban-daban na tsohuwar Girka, wanda ya shimfida ginshikin tunani da kimiyya na Yammacin Duniya.
key_achievements: Kafa Lyceum da kuma kafa Makarantar Peripatetic
Ya yi aiki a matsayin malamin Alexander Mai Girma
Kafa Syllogism da kuma tsara ilimin dabaru
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya zama ginshikin falsafar Yammacin Duniya da kimiyyar zamani, yana yin tasiri mai zurfi a kan hankalin bil'adama.

aristotle.epic:
Aristotle (384 K.Z. – 322 K.Z.) ya kasance babban masanin falsafa kuma mai ilimi daban-daban na tsohuwar Girka, wanda ya shimfida ginshikin tunani da kimiyya na Yammacin Duniya. An haife shi a shekara ta 384 K.Z. a Stagira, cikin Masarautar Makidoniya, kuma mahaifinsa Nicomachus ya kasance likitan fada ga Sarki Amyntas III na Makidoniya. Wannan yanayi ya ba Aristotle damar bunkasa sha'awa mai zurfi a fannin ilimin halittu (biology) da kimiyyar halitta tun yana yaro. Kusan shekara ta 367 K.Z., yana da shekaru 17, ya tafi Athens, wadda a lokacin ita ce cibiyar ilimi ta duniya ta Bahar Rum, kuma ya shiga Kwalejin (Academy) da Plato ya kafa. A nan, tsawon kimanin shekaru 20, ya yi karatu a matsayin almajirin Plato, yana zurfafa bincike a kan falsafar ubangidansa mai cike da tunani na gaba, a lokaci guda kuma ya fara bunkasa tsarin tunaninsa na musamman wanda ke ba da muhimmanci ga lura da gogewa ta duniya ta hakika. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta kasance farkon wani babban tsalle wanda ya fadada hangen nesa na ilimi ga bil'adama.

Kusan shekara ta 347 K.Z., bayan mutuwar Plato, Aristotle ya bar Athens kuma ya zurfafa hanyarsa ta bincike mai dogaro da gogewa ta hanyar nutsa kansa cikin binciken ilimin halittu a wurare kamar Assos da tsibirin Lesbos a Asiya Karama. Wannan lokaci ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a tafiyarsa ta ilimi, musamman ma abin da ya faru a kusan shekara ta 343 K.Z., lokacin da Sarki Philip II na Makidoniya ya gayyace shi ya zama malamin matashin Alexander Mai Girma, wanda hakan ya yi tasiri mai girma a rayuwarsa. Ya koyar da Alexander fannoni daban-daban ciki har da falsafa, siyasa, da'a, da kimiyya, yana shimfida ginshikin ilimi ga wani sarki wanda daga baya zai gina daular duniya. A shekara ta 335 K.Z., lokacin da Alexander ya hau gadon sarauta, Aristotle ya koma Athens kuma ya kafa makarantarsa, Lyceum. A nan, ya yi tafiya, ya tattauna, kuma ya koyar tare da almajiransa, kuma saboda wannan hanya, makarantarsa ta zama sananniya da 'Makarantar Peripatetic'. Makarantar Peripatetic wata makaranta ce ta tunani wadda ta samo asali daga hanyar Aristotle na tafiya, tattaunawa, da koyarwa tare da almajiransa a Lyceum da ke Athens. Lyceum, sabanin Kwalejin Plato, ta mai da hankali kan binciken ilimi ta hanyar lura da gogewa da kuma rarraba abubuwa a tsari.

Lokacin da yake aiki a Lyceum ya kasance kololuwar lokacin da Aristotle ya kammala tsarin falsafarsa da kimiyyarsa ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce masu yawa. Ya bayar da gudummawa mai sabbin abubuwa a kusan dukkan fannoni na ilimi, ciki har da ilimin dabaru (logic), ilimin sararin samaniya (metaphysics), ilimin da'a (ethics), ilimin siyasa (politics), ilimin halittu (biology), ilimin kimiyyar lissafi (physics), ilimin magana (rhetoric), da ilimin waka (poetics). Musamman ma, ilimin dabaru nasa ya tsara hanyar tunani mai cirewa da ake kira 'Syllogism', wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan tunanin bil'adama. Syllogism wani nau'i ne na tunani mai ma'ana wanda ke fitar da ƙarshe daga tushe guda biyu, kuma ya zama ginshikin ilimin dabaru na Yammacin Duniya. Bugu da kari, ya lura da kuma rarraba dabbobi da tsirrai masu yawa, yana shimfida ginshikin ilimin halittu, kuma ya yi nazarin kundin tsarin mulki na kasashe daban-daban, yana kafa tushen ilimin siyasa. Amma, lokacin da Alexander Mai Girma ya mutu a shekara ta 323 K.Z., kiyayya ga Makidoniya ta karu a Athens, kuma Aristotle, wanda ke da dangantaka ta kut-da-kut da gidan sarautar Makidoniya, ya fuskanci gwajin zargin rashin girmama addini. Yana tunawa da mutuwar Socrates mai ban tausayi, ya bar kalmomin "Ba zan bari Athens ta yi zunubi ga falsafa sau biyu ba" kuma ya gudu zuwa Chalcis a tsibirin Euboea a kusan shekara ta 322 K.Z.

Aristotle ya mutu a shekara ta 322 K.Z., ba da dadewa ba bayan ya gudu zuwa Chalcis. Ko da yake an rasa yawancin rubuce-rubucensa, sauran ayyukansa masu yawa sun yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan ci gaban tunani da kimiyya na Yammacin Duniya fiye da shekaru dubu biyu. Hanyarsa ta bincike mai dogaro da gogewa da tunani mai ma'ana sun shimfida ginshikin kimiyyar zamani, kuma tunaninsa, wanda masana Musulunci na tsakiyar zamanai suka adana kuma suka bunkasa, daga baya ya sake shiga Turai kuma ya zama muhimmin ginshiki ga falsafar Scholastic. Musamman ma, ra'ayin 'Matsakaicin Zinariya' (Golden Mean) da aka gabatar a cikin ilimin da'a nasa da kuma bincikensa game da 'Eudaimonia' (farin ciki) har yanzu suna ba da hikimar rayuwa ga mutane da yawa a yau. Ana kiransa 'Uban Ilimin Dabaru' kuma wanda ya kafa fannoni da yawa na ilimi, kuma hanyarsa ta tsara da rarraba ilimi ta zama ginshikin binciken ilimi na zamani. Tunaninsa ya bambanta da tunanin Plato na gaba, yana samar da daya daga cikin manyan ginshikai biyu na falsafar Yammacin Duniya, kuma ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan falsafofin baya kamar Stoicism da Epicureanism a lokacin Hellenistic.

plato.era: Karni na 4 zuwa na 5 kafin haihuwar Annabi (BC 427~347)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Plato wani masanin falsafa ne na tsohuwar Girka, wanda ya kafa Ka'idar Siffofi kuma ya kafa Academia, ya shimfiɗa ginshiƙin falsafar Yamma.
key_achievements: Ya gabatar da ra'ayi na ilimin sararin samaniya ta hanyar kafa Ka'idar Siffofi.
Ya kafa Academia, cibiyar ilimi mafi girma ta farko a tarihin ɗan adam.
Ya rubuta 『Jiha』 kuma ya tsara ra'ayin Mulkin Masanin Falsafa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya zama ginshiƙin falsafar Yamma, ilimin tauhidin Kiristanci, da tunanin siyasa, yana yin tasiri mai zurfi ga hankalin ɗan adam har zuwa yau.

plato.epic:
Plato (kimanin 427 K.Z. – kimanin 348/347 K.Z.) wani babban masanin falsafa ne kuma mai tunani wanda ya kafa ginshiƙin falsafar Yamma, an haife shi a cikin wani gidan sarauta mai daraja a tsohuwar Athens, Girka. Sunansa na asali Aristocles ne, amma ya sami laƙabin 'Plato' saboda faɗin kafadunsa. Lokacin kuruciyarsa ya kasance cikin zurfin tunani, yana shaida rikice-rikicen Yaƙin Peloponnesian da lalacewar dimokuraɗiyyar Athens. A lokacin samartakarsa, ya yi mafarkin zama ɗan siyasa, amma ya fuskanci wani abin ban mamaki: malamin nasa Socrates an yanke masa hukuncin kisa ba tare da adalci ba, wanda hakan ya sa ya ji takaici game da siyasar duniya. Wannan gogewa ta sa ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken duniyar gaskiya madawwami kuma marar canzawa maimakon ikon duniya mai wucewa, ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya fara ɗaya daga cikin tafiye-tafiyen falsafa mafi zurfi a tarihin ɗan adam. Ya ɗauki alkalami don tsara tunaninsa da kuma watsa su ga zuriyar gaba.

Ginshiƙin falsafar Plato shine 'Ka'idar Siffofi'. Wannan ra'ayi ne na ilimin sararin samaniya wanda ke cewa duniyar abubuwan da muke gani da hankalinmu ba komai bane illa inuwa mara cikakkiya, mai ci gaba da canzawa da ɓacewa, kuma a bayan ta akwai hakikanin gaskiya madawwami kuma cikakke, wato 'Siffofi'. Ya nemi ya bayyana ainihin dukkan abubuwa da ra'ayoyi ta hanyar waɗannan Siffofi. A cikin littafinsa mai suna 『Jiha』, Plato ya bayyana a alamance manufar falsafa ta jagorantar mutane, waɗanda ke cikin jahilci kuma suna ɗaukar inuwa a matsayin gaskiya, zuwa ga hasken gaskiya ta hanyar 'Misalin Kogo'. Bugu da ƙari, ya kafa 'Academia' a Athens, cibiyar ilimi mafi girma ta farko a tarihin ɗan adam, don horar da ɗalibai masu zuwa da kuma ƙarfafa bincike na ilimi mai tsari. Wannan Academia ta yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban ilimin Yamma. Ta hanyar 『Jiha』, ya gabatar da hangen nesa na jiha mai kyau wanda masana falsafa ke mulki, wato 'Mulkin Masanin Falsafa', yana binciken siffar al'umma mai adalci.

Plato bai taɓa daina ƙoƙarinsa na aiwatar da manufofinsa na falsafa a cikin siyasar duniya ba. Ya yi ƙoƙari sau uku don cimma 'Mulkin Masanin Falsafa' ta hanyar horar da Dionysius II, mai mulkin kama-karya na Syracuse a Sicily. Amma manufofinsa sun yi karo da gaskiya, kuma ya fuskanci haɗari na rayuwa da mutuwa, har ma an sayar da shi a matsayin bawa, ya shiga cikin cin amana da makirci na siyasa. Wannan gwagwarmaya ta kawo masa takaici mai zurfi, amma bai taɓa miƙa wuya ba. Da ya dawo Athens, Plato ya ƙara himmatu ga ilimi da bincike a Academia, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga rubuta tunaninsa a cikin nau'in tattaunawa. Har zuwa mutuwarsa, ya ci gaba da binciken jiha mai kyau da ainihin doka ta hanyar tattaunawa na baya kamar 『Dokoki』. Plato ya jaddada kyawawan halaye huɗu na asali: hikima, jaruntaka, daidaito, da adalci, yana koyar da yadda ruhin ɗan adam zai iya zama mai daraja ta hanyar hankali. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don manufofi a cikin matsalolin duniya.

Gadon da Plato ya bari ya yi tasiri mai zurfi ga dukkan tunanin Yamma, kuma har yau yana ci gaba da haskakawa. Ka'idar Siffofinsa ta yi tasiri sosai ga samuwar ilimin tauhidin Kiristanci, kuma falsafar siyasar sa ta kafa ginshiƙin ka'idodin jihohin Yamma da tunanin doka. Plato ya jaddada balaga ta ruhu fiye da samun ilimi kawai da koyarwarsa, "Manufar ilimi ita ce ta koya mana mu so abin da yake kyakkyawa." Tattaunawarsa ba kawai tattaunawa ce ta falsafa ba har ma an gane su saboda darajar adabi, suna zaburar da masana tunani marasa adadi na baya. Rayuwar Plato ta kasance ci gaba da neman manufofi marar yankewa, yana nuna shi a matsayin babban mutum na gaskiya wanda ya koyar da darajoji madawwami. Tunaninsa ya mamaye wani matsayi na musamman tsakanin hanyar tambaya da amsa ta malamin nasa Socrates da hanyar gwaji ta ɗalibin nasa Aristotle, yana zama wata mahimmiyar haɗi don fahimtar gudun falsafar Yamma. Sunan Plato an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin ma'anar 'masanin falsafa', yana zama kibiyar ruhaniya ga duk waɗanda ke neman hasken gaskiya.
plato.trials: Ganin kisan malamin sa Socrates da kuma rashin yarda da dimokuradiyya saboda haka, da kuma kasancewa bawan mutum a Sicily da kuma kasa cimma burin sa na siyasa.
plato.overcoming: Ya kafa Cibiyar Nazarin Academia, wanda ya samar da tsarin ilimi mafi girma na farko a duniya, kuma ta hanyar "Ra'ayin Ra'ayoyi" (Idea Theory), ya samar da tushen falsafa don neman gaskiya ta gaskiya fiye da abin da aka gani.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Wanda ya fi tsoro fiye da jahili shine wanda ke da ilimi mara kyau. Ci gaba da tafiya zuwa ga hasken gaskiya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kullum ka tambayi kanka abin da kake sani da gaske. Kada ka yarda ka rude da inuwa da wasu ke nuna maka, kuma ka haɓaka hikimarka don fahimtar ainihin abubuwa da ra'ayoyi.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Manufar ilimi ita ce koya mana mu so kyawawan abubuwa. Kada ka daina koyo wanda ke tsaftace rai.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Koyo ba wai kawai tattara ilimi ba ne, har ma da tsarkake dandano da halayenka. Lokacin da kake da idon da zai gane abubuwa masu daraja da girma, rayuwarka za ta zama mai wadata sosai.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Daya daga cikin hukuncin kin shiga siyasa shi ne a yi mulkin ka ta mutanen da ba su kai ka ba. Ka zama hankali mai aiki.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka tsaya kawai ga aikinka, ka kuma kula da yadda duniya ke tafiya. Lokacin da masu hikima ba sa magana, duniya tana fada cikin rudani, kuma hankali mai aiki kadai zai iya samar da adalci na gaskiya.

mahatma-gandhi.era: Babban mutum na karni na 19 zuwa 20 (1869-1948)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mohandas Karamchand Gandhi jagora ne na alama na gwagwarmayar lumana wanda ya jagoranci Indiya zuwa 'yancin kai a karni na 20.
key_achievements: Fara motsi na rashin biyayya na lumana a Afirka ta Kudu
Jagorantar Tafiyar Gishiri a Indiya don neman 'yancin kai
Samun 'yancin kai ga Indiya daga mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafarsa ta rashin tashin hankali da ruhinsa na gwagwarmaya sun yi tasiri sosai ga motsin hakkin dan Adam a duk duniya.

mahatma-gandhi.epic:
Mohandas Karamchand Gandhi (an haife shi a shekara ta 1869) ya kasance alama ce ta gwagwarmayar lumana da jagora na ruhaniya wanda ya jagoranci Indiya zuwa 'yancin kai a farkon karni na 20. An haife shi a Porbandar, Indiya, a karkashin mulkin mallaka na Daular Birtaniya a karshen karni na 19, ya girma a cikin iyalin manyan jami'an gwamnati a yankin Gujarat. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Gandhi ya kasance mai kunya da dalibi na yau da kullum, kuma ya bi al'adun rayuwar Indiya na lokacin, kamar aure tun yana dan shekara 13. Ya tafi Landan, Ingila, a shekara ta 1888 don nazarin shari'a, kuma duk da kokarinsa na daidaitawa da wayewar Yamma, ya fuskanci rikice-rikice na ciki, yana binciken ainihinsa da dabi'unsa. Wannan lokaci ya zama tushe ga zurfin fahimtarsa game da al'adun Indiya da ruhaniyarta, da kuma kallonsa na sukar abin duniya na Yamma. Bayan ya sami cancantar zama lauya, ya koma Indiya, amma aikinsa na shari'a a garinsu bai yi nasara ba, kuma ya nufi Afirka ta Kudu don neman sabbin damammaki. Don haka, farkon rayuwarsa bai nuna haihuwar wani babban jagora ba, sai dai tafiyar wani matashi ne da ke neman hanyarsa.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Gandhi ya zo ne a shekara ta 1893 lokacin da ya tafi Afirka ta Kudu. A lokacin, Afirka ta Kudu tana fama da tsananin wariyar launin fata, kuma ya fuskanci wulakanci na korar shi da karfi daga ajin farko na jirgin kasa saboda launin fatarsa. Wannan lamari ya dasa fushi mai zurfi game da rashin adalci da kuma ruhin gwagwarmaya a cikin zuciyar matashin Gandhi mai kunya. Ya fara aiki a matsayin lauya don kare hakkin Indiyawa mazauna Afirka ta Kudu, kuma ya fara yaki da manufofin wariyar launin fata. A cikin wannan tsari, ya kirkiro wani falsafar gwagwarmaya ta musamman da ake kira 'Satyagraha', wanda ke nufin "gwagwarmaya bisa gaskiya da rashin tashin hankali," kuma babban ginshikinsa shine fuskantar rashin adalci da karfin gaskiya da ruhin mutum maimakon tashin hankali. Gandhi ya shirya wani motsi na rashin biyayya na lumana ga dokokin wariyar launin fata na gwamnatin Afirka ta Kudu ta hanyar Satyagraha, kuma dubban Indiyawa sun shiga gwagwarmayar karkashin jagorancinsa. Kwarewar wannan lokaci ta zama wata muhimmiyar kadara da ta gina masa jagoranci da hangen nesa na dabaru da ake bukata don jagorantar gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai ta Indiya a nan gaba.

Bayan ya dawo Indiya a shekara ta 1915, Gandhi ya fito fili a gaba na gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai ta Indiya, bisa ga nasarar da ya samu a gwagwarmayar lumana a Afirka ta Kudu. Ya watsar da tufafin Yamma kuma ya sanya 'dhoti', tufafin gargajiya da talakawa manoma na Indiya ke sawa, kuma ya karfafa motsi na 'Swadeshi', alamar dogaro da kai da cin gashin kai, ta hanyar kadi da kansa da yin tufafi. Wannan ya haifar da kauracewa kayayyakin Birtaniya, wanda ya zama muhimmin ginshiki na gwagwarmayar tattalin arziki ga mulkin mallaka. Daya daga cikin gwagwarmayar Gandhi mafi alama ita ce 'Tafiyar Gishiri' a shekara ta 1930. Wannan ya kasance "wani aiki na alama na rashin biyayya inda Gandhi da mabiyansa suka yi gishiri da kansu don nuna adawa da manufar gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Birtaniya na mallakar gishiri," kuma dubban Indiyawa sun bi Gandhi zuwa teku don yin gishiri, wanda ya zama wata hanya ta sanar da duniya game da zaluncin mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya. An daure shi sau da yawa kuma ya yi yajin cin abinci, amma ya ci gaba da bin ka'idar rashin tashin hankali, kuma bai taba rasa halinsa na mu'amala da abokan gaba da soyayya da gafara ba, maimakon kiyayya. Wannan sadaukarwa da hadaya sun ba Indiyawa mamaki sosai kuma sun kara musu sha'awar samun 'yancin kai.

Gwagwarmayar Gandhi marar yankewa da sadaukarwarsa sun kai ga 'yancin kai na Indiya a shekara ta 1947. Amma farin ciki bai dade ba, yayin da rikicin addini tsakanin Hindu da Musulmi ya rikide zuwa tashin hankali a lokacin samun 'yancin kai, Indiya ta fuskanci bala'in rabuwa da Pakistan. Gandhi ya yi yajin cin abinci mai hadari don hana rarrabuwa da tashin hankali, yana kira ga hadin kai, amma duk da kokarinsa, haukan addini bai tsaya ba. A karshe, a ranar 30 ga Janairu, 1948, wani mai tsattsauran ra'ayin Hindu ya harbe shi har lahira. Bayan mutuwarsa, an sake kimanta falsafar Gandhi ta rashin tashin hankali da sadaukarwarsa ga gaskiya a duk duniya, kuma sun zama dabi'u na duniya ga bil'adama. Gadonsa ya wuce 'yancin kai na siyasa kawai, ya kasance sako mai karfi da ke tunatar da mu muhimmancin mutuncin dan Adam da zaman lafiya. Ruhinsa na gwagwarmayar lumana ya ba da kwarin gwiwa sosai ga gwagwarmayar adalci a wasu lokuta, kamar motsin hakkin jama'a na Martin Luther King Jr. a Amurka da kuma motsin kawar da wariyar launin fata na Nelson Mandela a Afirka ta Kudu, kuma an rubuta shi har abada a cikin lamirin bil'adama.
mahatma-gandhi.trials: Tsoro na yaro da rikicewar tunani, tsananin wariyar launin fata a Afirka ta Kudu, da kuma tsarewa da yajin cin abinci sau da yawa, da kuma rarrabuwar kawuna da rikice-rikicen addini a Indiya.
mahatma-gandhi.overcoming: Ya kirkiro sabuwar hanyar adawa da ake kira rashin tashin hankali wanda ya jagoranci samun 'yancin kai na Indiya, ya rushe mulkin mallaka da ikon halayensa, kuma ya inganta hakkokin bil'adama da zaman lafiya ga daukacin bil'adama.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ka zama canjin da kake son gani a duniya. Ka tabbatar da rayuwarka kafin ka yi kokarin canza wasu.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ka daina korafin duniya ka fara tafiya daidai. Kowace ayyukanka za ta zama farkon wani babban igiyar canji.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mutum mara karfi ba zai taba gafartawa ba. Gafara dabi'a ce da mutum mai karfi kawai zai iya mallaka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kowa na iya ramuwar gayya, amma gafara kawai babban mutum zai iya yi. Kashe tsana da zabar soyayya shine ainihin hanyar cin nasara.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Rashin tashin hankali shine mafi karfin karfin da bil'adama zai iya amfani da shi. Ya fi karfin duk wani makami mai lalata da mutum ya kirkira.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Karfin jiki na iya rinjaye jiki, amma rashin tashin hankali na gaskiya na iya motsa rai. Karfin mai laushi shine a karshe zai zama mafi girman makamashi da zai canza duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Leonardo da Vinci, wani haziki na zamanin Renaissance, ya kasance majagaba wanda ya haɗa fasaha da kimiyya don bincika asirin ɗan adam da yanayi.
key_achievements: Cikakken zane na tsarin jikin ɗan adam ta hanyar binciken ilimin halittar jiki (anatomy).
Ƙirƙirar injunan tashi da binciken ilimin motsi (mechanics) na jirgin sama.
Faɗaɗa iyakokin fasaha ta hanyar manyan ayyuka kamar Mona Lisa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya rushe iyakokin fasaha da kimiyya, ya kuma yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban hankalin ɗan adam, inda ya kafa tushen wayewar zamani.

leonardo-da-vinci.epic:
Leonardo da Vinci, a cikin tsakiyar karni na 15, lokacin da guguwar zamani ke tafe, ya fara kuka na farko a duniya a kan tsaunukan gefen kogin Arno, a garin Vinci, ba da nisa da zuciyar Jamhuriyar Florence ba. A lokacin da camfe-camfe na zamanin da da inuwar coci ke ci gaba da daure hankali, ya kunna wutar sha'awar bincike ta dabi'a don gano asirin da ke ɓoye a cikin kowane dutse, kwararar ruwa, da tashiwar tsuntsaye, duk da cewa an haife shi ba bisa ka'ida ba. Duhu da ke kewaye da shi ya kiyaye iyakokin ilimi da ƙarfi, amma a cikin zuciyarsa, tuni an fara haifar da wata ƙaƙƙarfar niyya ta bincika da haɗa dukkan abubuwan da ke faruwa a duniya. Idanunsa masu tsabta na yaro sun fahimci asirin sararin samaniya mara iyaka da ke ɓoye bayan labulen tsarin da aka saba, kuma ya yi ƙoƙari ya ji yaren da babu wanda ya taɓa fahimta a cikin kowane sauti na yanayi. Ruhu nasa ya yi marmarin ambaliyar ilimi, kamar wata bishiya ce ƙarama da ke ci gaba da miƙawa zuwa kololuwar gaskiya mai haske, tana wuce iyakokin zamani.

A gaban babban katangar zamani, bincikensa ya kasance kamar yaƙi mai ban tsoro. A ɓoye, a ƙarƙashin tsauraran dokokin coci, ya ci gaba da binciken ilimin halittar jiki kowane dare, yana buɗe labulen mutuwa mai sanyi, kuma ya zana tsarin jikin ɗan adam mai ban mamaki daidai fiye da kowa. Ga waɗanda ke mafarkin tashi, sama yanki ne na Allah, amma ya yi nazarin juriya na iska da ilimin motsi na fuka-fukai dare da rana, yana ƙoƙarin kwaikwayon tashiwar tsuntsaye masu kaɗaici, kuma a cikin littattafansa, an kammala zane-zanen injuna marasa adadi da ke neman yanke sarƙoƙin nauyi a cikin wani yanayi mai ban tsoro. Ya kasance mai zane, amma ya bincika ainihin haske da inuwa fiye da launuka; ya kasance mai sassaƙa, amma ya nemi daidaiton ilimin halittar jiki wanda ke ba da rai ga dutse; kuma ya kasance mai gine-gine, amma ya rushe iyakokin kowane fanni tare da sha'awar cikakken tsari fiye da girma kawai. Ayyukansa wani lokaci sun kasance ba a kammala su ba, kuma wani lokaci an fahimce su ba daidai ba, amma ruhunsa ya ci gaba da faɗaɗa iyakokin zamani, yana daga takobi mai kaifi na suka ga jahilci.

Murmushin 'Mona Lisa' da aka haifa daga yatsunsa ya wuce hoton mutum kawai; ya kasance wani lamari na sararin samaniya inda asirin ruhin ɗan adam da zurfin gaskiyar sararin samaniya suka haɗu. A cikin wannan labule mai ban mamaki da aka rufe da fasahar sfumato, Leonardo ya rushe iyakokin haske da inuwa, rayuwa da mutuwa, kuma ya ba da rai wanda ke sa mai kallo ya kalli cikin zuciyarsa. Amma a bayan waɗannan lokutan fahimta mai girma, nauyin kaɗaici mai zurfi da ci gaba da tunani kan kai ya bi shi kamar inuwa. Ya ci gaba da shan wahala a cikin ayyukan da ba a kammala ba, hangen nesa da ba a fahimta ba, da kuma canjin masu tallafawa marasa tabbas, kuma wani lokaci dole ne ya ɗauki nauyin zargin rashin girmamawa da tsauraran suka na zamani shi kaɗai. Fasaharsa da kimiyya galibi ana ɗaukar su a matsayin abubuwa daban-daban, amma a gare shi, hanyoyi biyu ne zuwa ga gaskiya ɗaya, kuma wannan tunani mai haɗaka ya kasance kamar kyauta mai raɗaɗi wanda ya sa ya yi tambayoyi na asali game da wanzuwar ɗan adam.

Ko da yake kogin lokaci ya haɗiye jikinsa, sunan Leonardo da Vinci bai taɓa ɓacewa ba, kuma ya kasance kamar tauraro mai haske har abada a cikin sararin samaniyar hankalin ɗan adam. Ba wai kawai mai zane ba ne ko mai sassaƙa ko mai ƙirƙira injuna ba. Ya kasance majagaba wanda ya sake fasalta yadda ɗan adam ke fahimtar duniya. Tambayoyinsa marasa yankewa, sha'awar bincika komai, da ƙoƙarinsa na haɗa fasaha da kimiyya sun ba da kwarin gwiwa na har abada ga masana kimiyya da masu fasaha marasa adadi na gaba, kuma ya zama manyan kafadu na wayewar zamani da ɗan adam ke tsaye a kai. Hankalinsa na musamman ya zama wani muhimmin alama da ba za a taɓa mantawa da shi ba a cikin tafiyar ɗan adam na neman gaskiya, yana ci gaba da raɗa wa masu bincike na gaba ƙarfin hali da hikima don buɗe ƙofofin da ba a sani ba. Ya tsaya a matsayin malami na har abada wanda ke ƙarfafa kowa, har ma a wannan lokacin, ya ga abubuwan al'ajabi da ke cikin kowane lamari na rayuwa, yana wuce iyakokin zamani.
leonardo-da-vinci.trials: Iyakokin zamantakewa a matsayin ɗan waje da rashin ilimin zamani, da kuma ayyuka da yawa da ba a kammala ba saboda cikakkiyar manufa da kuma rikici da masu fafatawa a zamaninsa.
leonardo-da-vinci.overcoming: Ya kafa kansa a matsayin mafi girman hankali na zamani ta hanyar karatun kai, kuma ya faɗaɗa fahimtar ɗan adam ta hanyar hangensu na musamman wanda ya haɗa fasaha da kimiyya, ya kuma kai ga kololuwar wayewar Renaissance.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kaɗan ne abin da ka sani, kaɗan ne abin da kake so. Lokacin da ka sani sosai, za ka iya so da gaske. Duk wani abu da kake so da gaske, za ka iya so da gaske.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Idan kana son wani abu da gaske kuma kana son yin sabbin abubuwa, kada ka yi sakaci wajen nazarin tushensa. Sanin yana ƙara zurfin soyayya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Karatun ba ya gajiya ga ruhu. Kasancewa da sha'awa shine sirrin kasancewa matashi. Duk wani abu da ka sani, za ka iya so da gaske.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: A lokacin da ka daina koyo, ruhinka yana fara tsufa. Lokacin da kake da sha'awar gano sabbin abubuwa kowace rana, ruhinka zai sami babban kuzari.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Sauƙi shine cikakkiyar fasaha. Ka fito da ainihin abin da ke rikitarwa kuma ka bayyana shi ta hanyar mafi sauƙi da kyan gani. Duk wani abu da ka sani, za ka iya so da gaske.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Cire abin da ba dole ba kuma ka mai da hankali kan abin da ke da mahimmanci. Gaskiya da fasaha mafi girma koyaushe suna da bayyananne kuma masu sauƙi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart ya kasance mawallafin kiɗa daga Ostiriya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, wanda ya kammala ainihin kiɗan gargajiya.
key_achievements: Ya samu suna a matsayin yaro mai hazaka ta hanyar yawon shakatawa a Turai.
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai fasaha mai zaman kansa a Vienna.
Ya kammala ainihin kiɗan gargajiya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kiɗansa yana samun soyayya a duk duniya har zuwa yau saboda kyawunsa wanda ya wuce lokaci.

mozart.epic:
Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart (1756-1791), wani tauraro mai haske a sararin samaniyar kiɗa na Turai a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, ya kasance mawallafin kiɗa kuma mai kaɗa piano daga Ostiriya, wanda ya zama ginshiƙin kammala ainihin kiɗan gargajiya. An haife shi a ranar 27 ga Janairu, 1756, a Salzburg, cikin Daular Roman Mai Tsarki, a matsayin ɗan Leopold Mozart, wani mashahurin mawallafin kiɗa na kotu, ya bayyana baiwar kiɗa mai ban mamaki tun daga farkon rayuwarsa, kamar wani haske da ya fito daga sama. Tun yana ɗan shekara uku, yatsunsa sun fara rawa a kan maɓallan kayan kiɗa, kuma kafin ya cika biyar, tunaninsa ya riga ya fara tsara waƙoƙi. Baiwarsa ta kasance mai girma, har kalmar 'yaro mai hazaka' ba ta isa ta bayyana wannan baiwar da Allah ya ba shi ba. A ƙarƙashin tsauraran horo da jagorancin mahaifinsa, wanda ya zama jagoransa na farko, Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart ya fara tafiye-tafiye masu nisa a faɗin Turai tun yana yaro, yana kaɗa waƙoƙi masu daɗi a gaban sarakuna da manyan mutane, inda ya gina suna mai ɗorewa kamar dutse. Ziyarar da ya yi zuwa manyan birane kamar Paris, London, da Amsterdam, ta buɗe masa idanu ga nau'ikan kiɗa da al'adu daban-daban, wanda ya zama wani ruwa mai albarka da ya shayar da tushen baiwarsa, yana faɗaɗa sararin samaniyar kiɗansa. Amma duk da haka, rayuwarsa a matsayin mawallafin kiɗa na kotun Archbishop na Salzburg ta fara zama kamar wani keji da ke danne fikafikan sha'awarsa ta ƙirƙira. Wannan ya haifar masa da wata sha'awa mai ƙarfi ta yaɗa kiɗansa a faɗin duniya, kamar wani tsuntsu da ke neman 'yanci.

Wani babban juyi mai girma a rayuwar Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart ya faru a shekara ta 1781, lokacin da, bayan wani rikici mai zafi da Archbishop Hieronymus von Colloredo na Salzburg, ya yanke igiyar da ta ɗaure shi ga kotu, ya bar matsayinsa na mawallafin kiɗa, ya kuma tashi zuwa Vienna don neman 'yancinsa. Wannan shawarar jajircewa ce wacce ba a taɓa gani ba a zamaninsa, kamar wani jarumi da ya yanke shawarar barin garkuwa mai ƙarfi, ya kuma fuskanci duniya da kansa, yana mai shelanta cewa zai gina rayuwarsa ta fasaha da ƙarfinsa, ba tare da dogaro ga kowa ba. A Vienna, ya zama kamar wani mai yawo mai 'yanci, yana samun abincinsa ta hanyar rubuta kiɗa, yin wasa, da kuma koyarwa, yana buɗe wata sabuwar hanya inda zai iya bin burinsa na kiɗa ba tare da wani shinge ba. A wannan lokacin ne ya fitar da manyan operas kamar 'Idomeneo' da 'The Abduction from the Seraglio', waɗanda suka zama kamar fitilu masu haskaka sunansa a matsayin mawallafin opera. Ya kuma zubar da ruwan gwal na manyan ayyuka a nau'ikan daban-daban, daga piano concertos zuwa chamber music, kamar wani maɓuɓɓugar ruwa mai albarka. Musamman, operas ɗinsa sun zama kamar madubi mai haske, yana nuna zurfin fahimta game da al'adun zamantakewa da motsin zuciyar ɗan adam, suna bayyana wani zurfin fasaha wanda ya wuce nishaɗi kawai, ya shiga cikin ruhin mutum. 'Yancinsa a Vienna ya ba shi fikafikan ƙirƙira, amma a lokaci guda ya jefa shi cikin wani sabon teku na ƙalubale, inda igiyoyin rashin kwanciyar hankali na kuɗi suka fara yi masa guguwa.

Rayuwa mai zaman kanta a Vienna ta ba Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart 'yancin fasaha mai girma, amma kuma ta jefa shi cikin wani kwanon gwaji mai tsanani, inda ya fuskanci gwagwarmaya mai zafi. Duk da talauci na kuɗi da ya zama kamar wani inuwa mai bin sa, da rashin lafiya da ke cinye jikinsa, har ma da kishi daga abokan aikinsa da ke neman jefa masa duwatsu, ya ci gaba da ƙirƙira ba tare da tsayawa ba, kamar wani maɓuɓɓugar ruwa da ba ta taɓa bushewa ba. A wannan lokacin ne ya haifar da manyan ayyuka marasa mutuwa, waɗanda suka zama kamar taurari masu haske a sararin samaniyar opera: 'The Marriage of Figaro', 'Don Giovanni', da 'Così fan tutte'. Waɗannan ayyuka sun zama kamar madubi mai nuna motsin zuciyar ɗan adam da kyau, suna buɗe sabon fage a duniyar opera. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar yawancin symphonies, piano concertos, da chamber music, ciki har da Symphony No. 40 in G minor da No. 41 in C major 'Jupiter', ya zama kamar wani mai ginin gadoji, yana haɗa cikakkiyar tsari da zurfin bayyanar motsin rai na kiɗan gargajiya, ya kuma gina wata gada mai ɗorewa. Musamman, 'Requiem' ya zama kamar wani waƙar bankwana, aikinsa na ƙarshe wanda bai kammala ba, wani babban aiki wanda ya nuna zurfin motsin zuciyar ɗan adam a gaban mutuwa a cikin wani yanayi mai girma da ban tausayi, kamar wani kuka daga zuciya. A cikin ɗan gajeren rayuwarsa, wanda ya zama kamar wani walƙiya mai haske, ya bar ayyuka sama da 600, wanda ke nuna yadda yake da sha'awa mai zafi da kuma sadaukar da kai ga kiɗa, kamar wani mai bautar fasaha. Kiɗansa ya zama kamar wani ruwa mai sanyaya rai, yana ba da motsin rai wanda ya wuce lokaci, yana ɗauke da ɗumi na ɗan adam da zurfin wahala a cikin cikakkiyar kyawun tsari, kamar wani saƙo daga sama.

A ranar 5 ga Disamba, 1791, lokacin da Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart ya rufe idanunsa har abada yana ɗan shekara 35, mutuwarsa ta bar abubuwa da yawa da ba a sani ba, kamar wani sirri da aka binne a cikin ƙasa. Amma gadonsa na kiɗa ya kasance kamar wani tauraro mai haske, ɗaya daga cikin mafi kyawun taskoki a tarihin ɗan adam. Bayan mutuwarsa, ayyukansa sun zama kamar wani ruwa mai gudana, ana ci gaba da sake kimanta su da yin wasa da su, kuma sun zama abin koyi na kiɗan gargajiya, kamar wani ginshiƙi mai ɗorewa. Kiɗan Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart yana samun soyayya a duk lokuta, kamar wani iska mai daɗi da ke ratsa zukata, saboda cikakkiyar daidaituwa, tsari mai tsabta, da zurfin da ke ɗauke da motsin zuciyar ɗan adam, kamar wani saƙo daga ruhu. Waƙoƙinsa suna da tsabta da kyau, kamar wani lu'u-lu'u mai haske, amma kuma suna ɗauke da matakan motsin rai masu rikitarwa waɗanda ke ba masu sauraro tausayi da ta'aziyya mai zurfi, kamar wani magani ga rai. A yau, ayyukansa sun zama kamar wani kogi mai gudana, ana yin wasa da su a cikin orchestras, gidajen opera, da wuraren kide-kide a duk duniya, kuma sunansa ya zama daidai da mawallafin kiɗa mai hazaka, kamar wani sarki a duniyar kiɗa. Rayuwarsa da fasaharsa ana kwatanta su da na sauran manyan mawallafin kiɗa kamar Beethoven da Haydn waɗanda suka rayu a lokaci guda, suna ba da muhimmiyar fahimta don fahimtar nau'ikan kiɗan gargajiya daban-daban, kamar wani littafi mai buɗe ido.
mozart.trials: Tafiye-tafiyen wasa masu wahala da ya fara tun yana yaro, da kuma rikicewar tunani ga mahaifinsa, da kuma fatarar kuɗi a Vienna da kuma baƙin cikin rasa ƴaƴa da suka rasu tun suna ƙanana.
mozart.overcoming: Duk da tsananin talauci da cututtuka, ya kirkiro mafi tsarki da cikakkiyar kiɗa a tarihin ɗan adam, kuma ya kammala aikinsa na kiɗa ta hanyar yin 'Requiem' har zuwa lokacin da ya kusa mutuwa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kiɗa ba ya cikin bayanan kiɗa, amma yana cikin tsayin da ke tsakanin bayanan kiɗa. Ka fahimci kyawun sarari.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ka yi ƙoƙarin cika komai. Lokacin da akwai dakatawa da fanko, sai abubuwa masu daraja su fi haskakawa. Ka yi la'akari da lokutan shiru da tunani a rayuwarka.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ni dai kawai ina rubuta waƙoƙin da ke zuwa. Ka amince da wahayi da ke cikinka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Fiye da ƙoƙarin tilastawa, yana da mahimmanci ka saurari muryarka ta ciki. Lokacin da ka mai da hankali da zuciya ɗaya, wahayi da zai kai ka ga babbar hanya zai fito a hankali.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mutane suna magana game da basirata, amma za su yi mamaki idan sun san irin ƙoƙarin da nake yi.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Basi na halitta shine farko kawai. Don samun damar yin amfani da wannan basirar, dole ne a sami ƙarin horo da ƙoƙari fiye da kowa. Matsayin babban mutum ana ginawa ne da zufa da ba a gani.

william-shakespeare.era: Babban mutum na karni na 16 zuwa 17 (1564~1616)

fact_box.one_line_summary: William Shakespeare marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ne kuma mawaki na Ingila a zamanin Elizabeth, wanda ya bar manyan ayyuka masu zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar wasannin kwaikwayo da yawa masu zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam
Faɗaɗa ƙamus na Ingilishi da ƙirƙirar sabbin kalmomi
Aiki a matsayin mai haɗin gwiwa na Globe Theatre
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa suna ci gaba da yin tasiri mai girma ga adabi da wasan kwaikwayo a duk faɗin duniya, suna wuce lokaci.

william-shakespeare.epic:
William Shakespeare (an haife shi a kusan 1564) marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ne kuma mawaki daga Ingila, wanda ya wakilci zamanin zinare na al'adu a lokacin Sarauniya Elizabeth. A tsakiyar karni na 16, lokacin da aka haife shi, Ingila ta kasance a cikin tashe-tashen hankula na siyasa da kuma tasirin gyare-gyare na addini, amma duk da haka adabi da fasaha sun fara bunƙasa kamar furanni. An haifi Shakespeare a Stratford-upon-Avon, kimanin kilomita 160 yamma da London, a matsayin ɗa na uku kuma babban ɗa namiji cikin yara takwas na John Shakespeare, wani attajiri ɗan kasuwa kuma mai yin safar hannu, da Mary Arden. An yi imanin cewa ya yi kuruciyarsa yana koyon Latin da adabin gargajiya a Makarantar Grammar ta Stratford, amma bai sami ilimin jami'a ba. A shekara ta 1582, yana da shekaru 18, ya auri Anne Hathaway, wadda ta girme shi da shekaru takwas, kuma suka haifi 'ya'ya uku. Daga baya a ƙarshen shekarun 1580, ya bar iyalinsa ya koma London, inda ya shiga cikin masana'antar wasan kwaikwayo mai bunƙasa a lokacin, ya fara sabuwar rayuwa a matsayin ɗan wasan kwaikwayo da marubucin wasan kwaikwayo. Wannan ya kasance wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwarsa, kuma farkon wata babbar tafiya da za ta ci gaba da rayuwa har abada a tarihin adabin ɗan adam.

Bayan ya zauna a London, William Shakespeare ya yi saurin zama wani muhimmin mutum a masana'antar wasan kwaikwayo. Yayin da yake aiki a matsayin ɗan wasan kwaikwayo da kuma samun gogewa a kan mataki, ya fara rubuta wasannin kwaikwayo da basirarsa mai ban mamaki. Tun daga farkon shekarun 1590, ayyukansa sun fara fitowa a kan matakan London, kuma ya tabbatar da sunansa musamman ta hanyar aiki a matsayin babban marubucin wasan kwaikwayo kuma mai hannun jari na 'Lord Chamberlain's Men'. Wannan ƙungiyar wasan kwaikwayo daga baya ta canza suna zuwa 'King's Men' bayan samun tallafi daga Sarki James I. Wasannin kwaikwayo na Shakespeare sun ƙunshi zurfin fahimtar yanayin ɗan adam, wanda ya kasance ƙarfinsa na musamman da ya bambanta shi da sauran marubuta na zamaninsa. Ta hanyar bala'o'i kamar 'Romeo da Juliet', ya nuna bala'in soyayya da kaddara, kuma ta hanyar wasannin barkwanci kamar 'A Midsummer Night's Dream', ya gabatar da haɗin kai mai daɗi na fantasy da gaskiya. Ayyukansa sun jawo hankalin kowane mataki na masu kallo, daga masu daraja zuwa talakawa, kuma sun mamaye masana'antar wasan kwaikwayo ta London. A wannan lokacin, ya fara samun karbuwa ba kawai a matsayin marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ba, har ma a matsayin babban mai ba da labari kuma mai sihiri na harshe a zamaninsa.

Rayuwar Shakespeare ta cika da nasara da shahara, amma kuma ta kasance jerin gwagwarmaya da matsaloli masu zurfi. A shekara ta 1596, ya fuskanci bala'in mutuwar ɗansa tilo, Hamnet, yana da shekaru 11, wanda ake kyautata zaton ya yi tasiri sosai a kan ayyukansa na baya, musamman bala'o'i kamar 'Hamlet'. Bugu da ƙari, London ta sha fama da annoba kamar Black Death lokaci-lokaci, wanda ya haifar da rufe gidajen wasan kwaikwayo na dogon lokaci. Wannan yanayi ya haifar da matsalolin tattalin arziki ga marubutan wasan kwaikwayo da 'yan wasan kwaikwayo, amma Shakespeare bai daina rubuce-rubucensa ba a wannan lokacin. A shekara ta 1599, ya zama mai haɗin gwiwa na 'Globe Theatre', wanda aka gina a kudancin Kogin Thames, yana samun kwanciyar hankali na kuɗi tare da 'yancin fasaha. Wannan gidan wasan kwaikwayo ya zama wuri mai tarihi inda aka fara nuna yawancin manyan ayyukansa. Duk da waɗannan matsaloli, ya ci gaba da zurfafa bincike kan rikitarwa na ciki na ɗan adam da rashin adalci na rayuwa, yana kammala bala'o'i marasa mutuwa na tarihin adabin ɗan adam kamar 'King Lear', 'Macbeth', da 'Othello'. Ayyukansa sun nuna halin babban mai fasaha wanda ya ɗaukaka wahalar mutum zuwa ga gogewar ɗan adam ta duniya.

William Shakespeare ya koma garinsu na Stratford-upon-Avon a kusan 1613 don yin ritaya, kuma ya mutu a ranar 23 ga Afrilu, 1616. Bayan mutuwarsa, 'First Folio', tarin wasannin kwaikwayo 36 da abokan aikinsa suka buga a 1623, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen isar da ayyukansa ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Gadonsa bai iyakance ga wasannin kwaikwayo da waƙoƙi masu yawa ba. Ya wadatar da ƙamus na Ingilishi ta hanyar ƙirƙirar sabbin kalmomi sama da 1,700, kuma ya bayyana motsin zuciyar ɗan adam da rikice-rikice na duniya a cikin harshe wanda ya wuce lokaci, yana yin tasiri mai girma ga adabi da wasan kwaikwayo a duk faɗin duniya. Ayyukansa, har ma a yau bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru, ana ci gaba da fassara su da kuma nuna su, kuma sun zama tushen wahayi ga nau'ikan fasaha daban-daban kamar fina-finai, wasan kwaikwayo, da kiɗa. Ta hanyar zurfin fahimtarsa game da yanayin ɗan adam da ikon harshe, Shakespeare ya kafa kansa a matsayin 'Marubucin Ɗan Adam' wanda ya wuce lokaci. Tasirinsa ba shi da misali idan aka kwatanta da nasarorin marubutan wasan kwaikwayo na zamaninsa kamar Christopher Marlowe da Ben Jonson, kuma har yau yana ci gaba da ba da wahayi ga marubuta marasa adadi.
william-shakespeare.trials: Wadanda suka fuskanci wahalhalu kamar yadda aka tilasta masa barin karatunsa saboda fatar mahaifinsa da kuma fara rayuwa a Landan a matsayin talaka, da kuma mutuwar dansa Hamnet da kuma rufe gidajen wasan kwaikwayo saboda annobar cutar bubba.
william-shakespeare.overcoming: Ya mamaye fagen wasan kwaikwayo na zamani tare da basirar harshe da kuma basirar lura, kuma ana girmama shi a matsayin mafi girman marubuci a tarihin dan adam ta hanyar ayyukansa da ke dauke da gaskiyar dan'adam.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Duniya duka fage ce, kuma dukkan maza da mata 'yan wasa ne kawai. Ku taka rawar ku da girman kai.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku zargi yanayin da kuke ciki, amma ku yi wasa mai kyau a fagen rayuwa da aka ba ku. Lokacin da kuka yi aiki da kanku, rayuwar ku za ta zama wasan kwaikwayo mai girma.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Tsoro yana mutuwa sau da yawa kafin mutuwarsa, amma jarumi yana dandana mutuwa sau ɗaya kawai. Ku fuskanci tsoro.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Guduwa saboda tsoron gazawa kamar mutuwa ce a kowane lokaci. Lokacin da kuka yi ƙarfin hali kuma ku yi ƙoƙari a rayuwar ku ɗaya tilo, za ku iya zama babban mutum.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mun san abin da muke, amma babu wanda ya san abin da za mu iya zama. Ku yi imani da iyawar ku.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku iyakance kanku da abin da kuke a yanzu. Akwai yuwuwar da ba za ku iya tunanin ta ba a cikin ku, kuma ku ne kawai za ku iya farkar da ita.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Albert Einstein masanin kimiyyar lissafi ne na Jamus a farkon karni na 20 wanda ya jagoranci juyin juya halin kimiyyar lissafi na zamani ta hanyar ka'idar dangantaka.
key_achievements: Gabatar da ka'idar dangantaka ta musamman (1905)
Kafa ka'idar dangantaka ta gaba ɗaya (1915)
Samun lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin kimiyyar lissafi don binciken tasirin photoelectric (1921)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idodinsa sun zama tushen kimiyya da fasaha na zamani, kuma a matsayinsa na mai son zaman lafiya, ya yi tasiri sosai ga ɗan adam.

albert-einstein.epic:
A ƙarshen karni na 19, a lokacin da sabbin hanyoyin kimiyya ke buɗewa a cikin tsarin kimiyyar gargajiya mai ƙarfi, Albert Einstein (1879-1955), wani masanin kimiyyar lissafi ne na Jamus wanda ya canza tushen fahimtar ɗan adam game da sararin samaniya har abada. An haife shi a ranar 14 ga Maris, 1879, a cikin dangin Yahudawa a Ulm, Jamus, iyayensa sun damu da shi tun yana yaro saboda jinkirin ci gaban harshe. Duk da cewa an ɗauke shi a matsayin ɗalibi mai matsala a makaranta saboda rashin daidaitawa da tsarin koyarwa na tilas, wani zurfin sha'awar tushen ka'idodin sararin samaniya ya ci gaba da girma a cikin zuciyarsa. Musamman, ta hanyar kamfas ɗin da mahaifinsa ya ba shi, ya fahimci wanzuwar ƙarfin da ba a gani, kuma ya kafa tushen tunani mai ma'ana ta hanyar sha'awar Euclidean geometry. Ya yi karatun kimiyyar lissafi a Makarantar Fasaha ta Tarayya ta Switzerland (ETH Zurich), inda ya yi tambaya game da ilimin da ake da shi kuma ya zurfafa cikin binciken yankunan da ba a sani ba ta hanyar gwaje-gwajen tunaninsa na asali. Abubuwan da ya samu a wannan lokacin sun zama muhimmin tushe ga haihuwar ka'idodinsa na juyin juya hali daga baya. 

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Albert Einstein ya zo a shekara ta 1905, wanda aka fi sani da 'Shekarar Al'ajabi (Annus Mirabilis)'. Yana aiki a matsayin mai binciken fasaha a Ofishin Patent na Bern a Switzerland, kuma yana mai da hankali kan bincike a lokacin hutunsa, ya girgiza duniyar kimiyya ta hanyar buga takardu huɗu masu ban mamaki a cikin wannan shekarar. Waɗannan takardu sun yi magana game da tasirin photoelectric, motsin Brownian, ka'idar dangantaka ta musamman, da kuma ka'idar daidaiton taro-makamashi (E=mc²). Musamman, ka'idar dangantaka ta musamman ta gabatar da wani sabon ra'ayi mai juyin juya hali cewa lokaci da sararin samaniya ba cikakku ba ne, amma suna canzawa dangane da yanayin motsi na mai kallo. Wannan ya hambarar da ra'ayin Newton na sararin samaniya da lokaci marasa canzawa wanda ya daɗe fiye da shekaru 2000. Bugu da ƙari, ka'idar daidaiton taro-makamashi, E=mc², ta tabbatar da lissafi cewa taro da makamashi za su iya canzawa zuwa juna, yana buɗe sabuwar fahimta game da tushen mu'amalar sararin samaniya. A wannan lokacin, ya yi nasarar faɗaɗa hangen nesa na hankali ga ɗan adam ta hanyar gwaje-gwajen tunani da tunani na lissafi kawai, ba tare da kayan aikin gwaji ba. 

Bayan 'Shekarar Al'ajabi', Albert Einstein ya zurfafa bincike cikin sirrin sararin samaniya mafi zurfi. A shekara ta 1915, ya faɗaɗa ka'idar dangantaka ta musamman don gabatar da ka'idar dangantaka ta gaba ɗaya, wanda ke bayyana nauyi a matsayin lanƙwasawar sararin samaniya da lokaci. Wannan ka'idar ta sami shahara a duniya a shekara ta 1919 lokacin da masanin taurari na Burtaniya Arthur Eddington ya tabbatar da cewa haske yana lanƙwasa ta hanyar nauyin rana ta hanyar lura da kusufin rana. Don gane gudunmawarsa, an ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin kimiyyar lissafi a shekara ta 1921 don bincikensa kan tasirin photoelectric. Amma rayuwarsa ba ta cika da ɗaukakar kimiyya kaɗai ba. A cikin shekarun 1930, lokacin da gwamnatin Nazi ta hau mulki a Jamus kuma kyamar Yahudawa ta yi tsanani, Albert Einstein, wanda Bayahude ne, ya gudu zuwa Amurka a shekara ta 1933 kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin farfesa a Cibiyar Nazarin Ci gaba ta Princeton. Ya kuma nuna zurfin sha'awa ga zaman lafiyar ɗan adam da alhakin ɗabi'a, ban da binciken kimiyya. Musamman, a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu, ya damu game da yiwuwar haɓaka bam ɗin nukiliya kuma ya aika wasiƙa ga Shugaban Amurka Franklin D. Roosevelt, yana mai gargaɗi game da haɗarin haɓaka makaman nukiliya, kuma bayan mutuwarsa, ya ci gaba da yin kira ga adawa da makaman nukiliya da zaman lafiya a duniya. 

Gadonsa yana rayuwa a kan kusan dukkanin tushen fasaha na wayewar zamani. Ka'idar dangantaka ta Albert Einstein tana tabbatar da daidaito na tsarin kewayawa na tauraron dan adam (GPS) a yau, tana bayyana ka'idodin makamashin nukiliya, kuma tana zama tushen bincike a fannin ilimin sararin samaniya da ilimin taurari. Ba wai kawai masanin kimiyya ne mai hazaka ba, amma kuma alama ce ta tunani mai mahimmanci wanda ke ci gaba da yin tambayoyi da kalubalantar ra'ayoyin da ake da su, kuma misali ne na masanin ilimi mai himma a cikin al'umma wanda ya yi tunani sosai game da tasirin binciken kimiyya ga ɗan adam. Kamar yadda ya ce, "Tunanin ya fi ilimi muhimmanci," Albert Einstein ya nuna da kansa cewa sha'awa da tunani mai kirkire-kirkire sune ginshiƙin ci gaban ɗan adam. Sunansa har yanzu ana kiransa da sunan da ke nuna hazaka a yau, kuma yana ba da ilhami na hankali na har abada ga duk waɗanda ke bincika duniyar da ba a sani ba kuma suna mafarkin kyakkyawar makoma ga ɗan adam. Rayuwarsa ta kasance muhimmin misali na yadda binciken kimiyya da alhakin zamantakewa za su iya daidaitawa, kamar yadda aka gani a rayuwar wata babbar masanin kimiyya ta zamani, Marie Curie.
albert-einstein.trials: Rashin nasara a makaranta da rashin dacewa a lokacin ƙuruciya, gudun hijira saboda zaluncin Nazi, da kuma rashin kammala ka'idar filin haɗin kai da ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa.
albert-einstein.overcoming: Ya sauya ra'ayin lokaci da sarari tare da tunaninsa wanda ya karya ka'idoji, kuma ya yi amfani da shahararsa don zaman lafiya da dabi'un ɗan adam.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Tunanin kirkira ya fi ilimi muhimmanci. Ilimi yana da iyaka, amma tunanin kirkira yana lulluɓe duniya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku tsaya ga abin da kuka sani. Ƙarfin mafarkin sabbin abubuwa da kuma kwatanta su a cikin tunanin ku shine mafi ƙarfin makami da zai kai ku ga matsayin babban mutum.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Wanda bai taba yin kuskure ba, bai taba gwada sabon abu ba. Kada ku ji tsoron kuskure.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kuskure ba abin kunya ba ne, amma shaida ce cewa kuna girma. Maimakon neman cikakkiya, ku sami damar yin gwaji akai-akai da kuma koyo daga tsari.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kada ku daina yin mamakin sirrin sararin samaniya, wannan shine mafi mahimmanci. Kada ku daina yin tambaya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku ɗauki abin da ya kamata a dauka. Tambayar 'me ya sa' tare da tsarkin yaro shine mabuɗin buɗe ƙofofin gaskiya masu girma.

marie-curie.era: Babban mutum na karni na 19 zuwa 20 (1867~1934)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marie Curie wata masaniyar kimiyyar lissafi ce kuma masaniyar kimiyyar sinadarai 'yar asalin Poland-Faransa ta ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, wacce ta lashe lambobin yabo na Nobel guda biyu saboda bincikenta game da radioactivity da gano radium da polonium.
key_achievements: Mace ta farko da ta lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Physics
Gano abubuwan radium da polonium
Lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannoni biyu (Physics da Chemistry)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikenta ya kafa harsashin kimiyyar lissafi ta nukiliya da maganin ciwon daji, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana kimiyya mata.

marie-curie.epic:
Marie Curie (an haife ta a 1867) wata masaniyar kimiyyar lissafi ce kuma masaniyar kimiyyar sinadarai 'yar asalin Poland wacce ta zama 'yar ƙasar Faransa, kuma majagaba ce wacce ta faɗaɗa iyakokin ilimin ɗan adam ta hanyar gano abubuwan da suka canza tarihi a kimiyya. An haife ta a ranar 7 ga Nuwamba, 1867, a Warsaw, Poland, wacce ke ƙarƙashin mulkin Daular Rasha a lokacin, da sunan Maria Salomea Skłodowska, ita ce ƙarama a cikin yara biyar na iyalin malamai. A wancan lokacin, Poland tana ƙarƙashin mulkin zalunci na Rasha, kuma damar samun ilimi mai zurfi ga mata tana da iyaka sosai. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Marie ta haɓaka sha'awar ilimi mai zurfi tun tana ƙarama, amma gaskiyar ƙasarta da matsalolin tattalin arzikin iyalinta sun zama babban cikas ga burinta. Ta yi aiki a matsayin malamar gida don tara kuɗin karatu, kuma ta shirya zuwa Paris don karatu tare da 'yar uwarta Bronisława. A ƙarshe, a cikin 1891, ta tafi Paris kuma ta nutsa cikin sabuwar duniya ta ilimi, tana nazarin kimiyyar lissafi da lissafi a Jami'ar Sorbonne. Rayuwa a cikin ƙasa baƙo tana da wahala kuma tana da talauci, amma ta shawo kan duk matsaloli da sha'awarta ta binciken ilimi kawai.

A Paris, Marie Skłodowska ta sadu da shahararren masanin kimiyyar lissafi na Faransa, Pierre Curie, kuma suka yi aure a 1895, inda ta zama Marie Curie. Haɗuwarsu ta kasance farkon haɗin gwiwa mafi girma a tarihin kimiyya. Marie ta kasance mai sha'awar al'amarin radioactivity na gishirin uranium wanda Farfesa Henri Becquerel ya gano, kuma ta fara bincike mai zurfi a kai. A nan, 'radioactivity' tana nufin al'amarin da kwayar zarra ta wani abu mai zaman kansa ke zama mara tsayayye kuma ta lalace, tana fitar da kuzari. Ma'auratan sun fara neman sabbin abubuwa masu radioactive ta hanyar aiki mai wahala na tsarkake tan-tan na ma'adinan pitchblende da kansu. A cikin 1898, sun gano sabbin abubuwa guda biyu masu radioactivity fiye da uranium: 'Polonium', wanda aka sanya wa sunan ƙasar Marie, Poland, da kuma 'Radium', wanda ke nufin 'mai haske'. Wannan bincike mai juyin juya hali ya girgiza ra'ayoyin kimiyya na gargajiya game da rashin canzawa na atom, kuma a cikin 1903, Marie Curie, tare da mijinta Pierre Curie da Henri Becquerel, sun sami lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Physics, inda ta zama mace ta farko da ta samu wannan karramawa, saboda gudummawarsu ga binciken radioactivity.

A cikin 1906, lokacin da mijinta Pierre Curie ya rasu a wani hatsari marar tsammani, Marie Curie ta shiga cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi, amma ta ci gaba da bincikenta, inda ta zama farfesa mace ta farko a Jami'ar Sorbonne, ta gaji matsayinsa. Ta ƙara himma wajen nazarin rabuwar radium da halayensa, kuma a cikin 1911, ta sami lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Chemistry ita kaɗai saboda gano radium da polonium, rabuwar radium, da kuma bincikenta game da halaye da mahaɗan waɗannan abubuwa masu ban mamaki. Ta haka, Marie Curie ta zama mutum ɗaya tilo da ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannoni biyu daban-daban, kuma ta cimma nasarori marasa misali a matsayinta na mace. Duk da cewa ta fahimci fa'idodin da bincikenta zai iya kawo wa ɗan adam, ba ta nemi haƙƙin mallaka ba don tsarin tsarkake radium, don haka ta bar al'ummar kimiyya su yi bincike da amfani da shi kyauta. A lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, ta haɓaka na'urorin X-ray masu motsi da ake kira 'Petites Curies' kuma ta yi tafiya kai tsaye a fagen yaƙi, tana taimakawa wajen gano cututtuka da kuma kula da sojojin da suka ji rauni. Wannan aiki mai sadaukarwa ya lalata lafiyarta sosai, kuma ta sha wahala daga cututtukan da ke da alaƙa da fallasa ga radioactivity a duk rayuwarta, har ta rasu a ranar 4 ga Yuli, 1934, daga anemia aplastic.

Rayuwa da nasarorin Marie Curie sun bar gado mai zurfi ga ɗan adam, fiye da binciken kimiyya kawai. Bincikenta game da radioactivity ya kafa harsashin kimiyyar lissafi ta nukiliya, kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban maganin radiation don maganin ciwon daji. Bugu da ƙari, ta ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana kimiyya mata, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen rushe shingen jinsi a fannin kimiyya. Kamar yadda Marie Curie ta ce, 'Babu abin da za a ji tsoro a rayuwa, sai dai abin da za a fahimta,' ta jaddada muhimmancin jajircewa wajen binciken abubuwan da ba a sani ba da kuma ilimi. Sunanta har yau an rubuta shi a cikin cibiyoyin bincike da ilimi da yawa, kuma yana nuna ruhun bincike marar gajiya don gaskiyar kimiyya da kuma soyayyar ɗan adam. Rayuwarta mai sadaukarwa ta cancanci a tuna da ita tare da labaran sauran mata majagaba waɗanda suka yi yaƙi da binciken kimiyya da kuma nuna bambancin zamantakewa a zamaninsu.
marie-curie.trials: Wariya a ilimi saboda kasancewarta mace da talauci mai tsanani, da kuma baƙin cikin mutuwar mijinta da kuma azabar jiki saboda kamuwa da cutar radiation.
marie-curie.overcoming: Tare da imani da juriya, ta bar wani aiki mara misaltuwa na lashe kyautar Nobel sau biyu a matsayinta na mace ta farko, kuma ta mayar da nasarorin kimiyya don amfanin jama'a, ba don ribar kanta ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu abin da za a tsorata a rayuwa. Akwai abubuwa da yawa da za a fahimta kawai. Lokacin da muka fahimta, tsoro ya shuɗe.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku ji tsoron duniyar da ba ku sani ba ko canji. Lokacin da kuka fahimci gaskiyarsu ta hanyar ilimi da hangen nesa, za ku iya fuskantar kowane gwaji da kwarin gwiwa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Dole ne mu yi haƙuri. Kuma fiye da duka, dole ne mu yi imani da kanmu. Kuna iya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kafin ku yarda da yadda wasu suke ganin ku, ku fara yarda da iyawarku. Imani cewa an haife ku don yin wani abu na musamman shine farkon babban nasara.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Nasarori suna ci gaba muddin ba ku daina sha'awar ilimi ba. Yana da kyau a yi bikin nasara, amma yana da mahimmanci a koyi daga gazawa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kada ku rasa mamakin duniya ko da kuna da ƙwarewa. Lokacin da kuka bincika gaskiya tare da sha'awar yara, hankalinku ba zai gaji ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nikola Tesla ya kasance mai kirkire-kirkire dan asalin Serbia-Amurka a ƙarshen karni na 19, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga tsarin wutar lantarki na AC na zamani.
key_achievements: Ci gaban tsarin wutar lantarki mai canzawa (AC)
Ƙirƙirar injin induction da tsarin multiphase
Majagaba a sadarwar mara waya da sarrafa nesa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙirƙire-kirkirensa sun zama ginshiƙin wayewar lantarki ta zamani kuma suna ci gaba da zaburar da ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha har zuwa yau.

nikola-tesla.epic:
A lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu ya mamaye duniya a ƙarshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20, wani lokaci mai cike da rudani, Nikola Tesla (1856-1943) ya kasance wani mai kirkire-kirkire dan asalin Serbia-Amurka, injiniyan lantarki, injiniyan inji, kuma mai hangen nesa wanda ya canza rayuwar bil'adama sosai. An haife shi a ranar 10 ga Yuli, 1856, a Smiljan, Daular Austriya (yanzu Croatia), ɗan wani limamin Orthodox, kuma tun yana yaro, ya kasance mai sha'awar walƙiya da abubuwan lantarki. Hazakarsa ta hankali ta haskaka yayin da yake nazarin injiniyanci da kimiyyar lissafi a Jami'ar Fasaha ta Graz da Jami'ar Prague. Musamman, yana da ikon gani na musamman wanda zai iya kwaikwaya da tsara injuna masu rikitarwa a cikin tunaninsa, wanda ya zama tushen ayyukansa na kirkire-kirkire na gaba. Tun da wuri, ya fahimci yuwuwar lantarki mara iyaka kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga bincike, yana mafarkin tsarin makamashi wanda zai kawo kyakkyawar makoma ga bil'adama. A wannan lokacin, ya fara haɓaka ra'ayoyin farko na tsarin wutar lantarki mai canzawa (AC) wanda ya zama ginshiƙin tsarin wutar lantarki na zamani.
