Tsarin wutar lantarki na AC hanya ce ta zamani don watsa da rarraba wutar lantarki yadda ya kamata a kan dogon zango, kuma ya fito a matsayin madadin sabon abu wanda ya shawo kan iyakokin tsarin DC.

A shekara ta 1884, Tesla ya tafi Amurka don neman sabbin damammaki kuma ya fara aiki a kamfanin Thomas Edison. Amma akwai babban bambanci a ra'ayi tsakanin Edison, wanda ya dage kan tsarin wutar lantarki kai tsaye (DC), da Tesla, wanda ya tabbata game da fifikon tsarin wutar lantarki mai canzawa (AC). Tesla ya fahimci cewa tsarin DC ba shi da inganci don watsa nesa mai nisa saboda babban asarar wutar lantarki, kuma ya nemi ya tabbatar da cewa za a iya aika wutar lantarki mai nisa da inganci ta hanyar sabbin injinansa na AC induction da tsarin multiphase. A cikin wannan tsari, Edison ya fara abin da ake kira 'Yaƙin Yanzu,' yana wuce gona da iri game da haɗarin wutar lantarki ta AC ga jama'a kuma yana ɓata tsarin Tesla. Amma Tesla ya sadu da wani mai goyon baya mai ƙarfi, George Westinghouse, kuma tare da goyon bayansa, ya ci gaba da kasuwancin tsarin AC. A Baje kolin Duniya na Chicago na 1893, Westinghouse ya yi nasarar haskaka dukan baje kolin tare da wutar lantarki ta AC, yana nuna amfanin tsarin AC ga jama'a. Kuma a cikin 1895, lokacin da janareta na AC na Tesla ya fara aiki a tashar wutar lantarki ta hydroelectric da aka gina a Niagara Falls, an sami wani muhimmin canji inda aka kafa AC a matsayin daidaitaccen tsarin wutar lantarki na zamani. Wannan nasara ta buɗe hanya ga bil'adama don amfani da wutar lantarki a ko'ina.

Ko da bayan nasarar tsarin AC, sha'awar Tesla ga kirkire-kirkire bai ragu ba. Ya bincika kuma ya ba da izini ga ra'ayoyi da na'urori da yawa waɗanda suka wuce zamaninsa, kamar sadarwar mara waya, sarrafa nesa, X-ray, da fasahar radar. Musamman, yana da babban hangen nesa na samar da makamashi mara waya ga duniya kuma ya fara gina Hasumiyar Wardenclyffe a Long Island, New York. Hasumiyar Wardenclyffe wani babban tsarin watsa mara waya ne da aka yi niyya don isar da wutar lantarki da sadarwa mara waya ga duniya. Amma wannan sabon aikin ya fuskanci rashin fahimtar masu zuba jari da matsalolin kuɗi, kuma a ƙarshe ya gaza. Bugu da ƙari, a fannin sadarwar mara waya, Guglielmo Marconi ya fuskanci zafin samun izini na farko don rediyo, wanda ya dogara da binciken Tesla. Ko da yake Kotun Koli ta Amurka ta amince bayan mutuwarsa cewa izinin sadarwar mara waya ta Tesla ya riga na Marconi, Tesla bai taɓa jin daɗin irin wannan nasarar kasuwanci da daraja ba a lokacin rayuwarsa. Ya fi mai da hankali kan binciken kimiyya mai tsabta don amfanin bil'adama gaba ɗaya maimakon kasuwancin kirkire-kirkire, kuma saboda wannan, ya fuskanci matsalolin tattalin arziki da kadaici a cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da kirkire-kirkire da gwaji, amma bai taɓa barin hangen nesansa ba.

Nikola Tesla ya mutu shi kaɗai a New York a ranar 7 ga Janairu, 1943, amma bayan mutuwarsa, an sake kimanta ayyukansa kuma an gane cewa sun yi tasiri sosai ga wayewar zamani. An sanya sunansa ga sashin kasa da kasa na yawan filin maganadisu, 'Tesla (T),' kuma an rubuta shi har abada a cikin duniyar kimiyya. Duk kayan lantarki da hanyoyin sadarwa na wutar lantarki da muke amfani da su a yau an gina su ne bisa ka'idodin tsarin wutar lantarki na AC da Tesla ya kafa, kuma ra'ayoyinsa na farko game da sadarwar mara waya, sarrafa nesa, da fasahar robot sun zama muhimman iri don ci gaban fasahar zamani. Ya kasance fiye da mai kirkire-kirkire kawai; ya kasance mai hangen nesa na gaskiya wanda ya annabta makomar bil'adama kuma ya kafa tushen ta. Hangen nesansa yana ci gaba da zaburar da masana kimiyya da injiniyoyi da yawa a yau, kuma yana zama abin motsa rai don bincike a cikin sabbin fasahohin makamashi da fasahar watsa mara waya. Rayuwa da ayyukan Nikola Tesla ana daraja su a matsayin wani muhimmin mutum wanda ya kafa tushen wayewar zamani, tare da wasu manyan masu kirkire-kirkire na zamaninsa, kamar Thomas Edison da George Westinghouse.
nikola-tesla.trials: Trauma daga cututtuka masu tsanani da mutuwar dan'uwa a lokacin yana yaro, da kuma fatarar kudi saboda yajin aikin wutar lantarki mai tsanani da Edison da kuma gazawar aikin hasumiyar Wardenclyffe.
nikola-tesla.overcoming: Ya kafa ka'idar samar da wutar lantarki ta duniya ta hanyar tsarin samar da wutar lantarki na AC, kuma ya samar da tushen kusan dukkan fasahar lantarki ta zamani ta hanyar kusan kashi 700 na abubuwan kirkira.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Idan kana son gano asirin sararin samaniya, yi tunani ta hanyar makamashi, mitoci, da jijjigawa. Komai yana motsawa, nemo abin da ya dace da kai.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Gaskiya tsarin jijjiga ne mai motsi. Ta hanyar sarrafa hankalinka da mitocin ka na ciki, zaka iya tasiri ga duniyar waje a babban matsayi. Yi aiki daidai da dokokin sararin samaniya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Yanzu nasu ne, amma makomar da nake aiki da ita gaskiya tawa ce. Kada ka karaya saboda ba a yaba maka ba. Ka kirkiri abin da zai dawwama.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Game da horo na hangen nesa: Yabo wani alama ce kawai da ke zuwa daga baya. Mafi girma ya fahimci cewa kasancewa gaba da zamani wani nauyi ne mai girma da daraja. Idan aikinka ya samo asali ne daga gaskiya, zai kai ga zamani wata rana.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kasancewa kadai, wannan shine sirrin kirkira. A lokacin da kake kadai ne tunani ke zuwa. Shiru shine dakin gwaji na hazaka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Halitta tana bunƙasa a keɓewa. Sabbin abubuwa masu girma sau da yawa suna tasowa lokacin da mutum ya fita daga hayaniyar jama'a kuma ya rungumi tunani mai zurfi da kaɗaici. Ka kula da lokutan ka na shiru; sune ƙasa mai albarka don tunani masu ban mamaki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Vincent van Gogh wani mai zane ne na Post-Impressionism ɗan ƙasar Holland na ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga fasahar zamani da launuka masu ƙarfi da bugun goga mai ban mamaki.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar ayyuka 2,100 a cikin shekaru 10
Ba da gudummawa ga farfaɗowar Expressionism da launuka masu ƙarfi da bugun goga
Sayar da zane ɗaya tak a lokacin rayuwarsa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun sami yabo na gaskiya bayan mutuwarsa, kuma sun zama mafi tasiri a tarihin fasahar Yamma.

vincent-van-gogh.epic:
An haife shi a ranar 30 ga Maris, 1853, a ƙasar Holland, Vincent Willem van Gogh wani mai zane ne na Post-Impressionism wanda ya canza tafarkin tarihin fasahar Yamma a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. A wancan lokacin, Turai tana fuskantar babban juyin juya hali a duk faɗin al'umma saboda tasirin juyin juya halin masana'antu, kuma duniyar fasaha ma tana cikin lokacin da Impressionism ke fitowa, tana neman kama lokacin haske da launi, tana barin tsarin gargajiya na ilimi. A cikin wannan raƙuman ruwa na canji, Van Gogh ya gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman, yana yin hasashen sabon zamani wanda ya wuce iyakokin Impressionism. Ya yi ayyuka daban-daban kamar ma'aikacin gidan zane, malami, da mai wa'azi a ƙauyen ma'adinai, yana binciken ma'anar rayuwa, amma a ƙarshen shekarunsa na 20, a ƙarshe ya gano kiran rayuwarsa na gaskiya a cikin zane-zane. A cikin ɗan gajeren lokaci na kimanin shekaru goma, ya ƙirƙiri adadi mai yawa na ayyuka guda 2,100, ciki har da zane-zanen mai guda 860, kuma yawancin waɗannan an yi su ne a cikin shekaru biyu na ƙarshen rayuwarsa. Ayyukansa sun haɗa da nau'o'i daban-daban kamar zane-zanen shimfiɗa, zane-zanen abubuwa marasa motsi, zane-zanen mutane, da zane-zanen kansa, kuma ƙarfin rayuwa da zurfin motsin rai da ke cikinsu sun yi tasiri sosai ga fasahar zamani.

Mafi mahimmancin juyawa a tafarkin fasahar Van Gogh shine yadda ya sha fasahohin Impressionism amma kuma ya nemi hanyarsa ta musamman ta bayyanawa. Post-Impressionism wani motsi ne na fasaha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 wanda ya wuce gaskiyar gani ta Impressionism, yana neman bayyana motsin zuciyar mai zane da duniyar ciki, kuma Van Gogh yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan mutane a wannan motsi. Ya yi aiki a Paris, yana hulɗa da masu zane na Impressionism, amma ba da daɗewa ba ya koma Arles a Kudancin Faransa, inda ya gwada launukansa da bugun gogarsa a ƙarƙashin rana mai zafi. Ayyukansa suna da halayen launuka masu ƙarfi da bugun goga mai ban mamaki da kuzari, wanda ba kawai sake haifuwa ne na abin da ake gani ba, amma yunƙuri ne na bayyana motsin zuciyar mai zane da wahalarsa a gani. Wannan salon na musamman ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga farfaɗowar Expressionism a cikin fasahar zamani, kuma ya nuna cewa fasaha na iya zama hanyar binciken zurfin ciki na ɗan adam, fiye da kawai sake haifuwa. Sararin sama mai juyawa da furannin rana masu cin wuta a cikin zanensa sun nuna yanayin ruhinsa gaba ɗaya, suna ba masu kallo wani zurfin motsi.

Rayuwarsa cike take da kaɗaici da takaici, kamar yadda sha'awarsa ta fasaha take. Vincent van Gogh ya yi yaƙi da wahalar tunani a duk rayuwarsa, kuma a fannin tattalin arziki, ya dogara ga goyon bayan ɗan'uwansa Theo. Ayyukan sa ba su sami yabo sosai daga jama'a da masu suka ba a lokacin rayuwarsa. Abin mamaki, basirarsa ta fasaha ta fara jawo hankalin masu suka jim kaɗan kafin ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa ta hanyar kashe kansa yana da shekaru 37. Zane ɗaya tak da aka sayar a lokacin rayuwarsa shine 'The Red Vineyard,' kuma wannan ya nuna yadda ya yi gwagwarmaya mai wahala da kaɗaici. Amma duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, bai ajiye gogarsa ba, ya zuba komai nasa cikin zanensa. Ayyukan sa sun ƙunshi nufin ɗan adam marar yankewa na neman kyau a cikin wahala, kuma wannan yana ba da zurfin motsi da ta'aziyya ga mutane da yawa a yau. Ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga fasaha, yana binciken ainihin wanzuwar ɗan adam inda zafi da kyau ke rayuwa tare.

Gadon da Vincent van Gogh ya bari an gane darajarsa ta gaskiya ne kawai bayan mutuwarsa, kuma ya sami matsayi mafi mahimmanci a tarihin fasahar Yamma. Launukansa masu ƙarfi da bugun goga mai motsin rai sun ba da ilhami kai tsaye ga masu zane na Expressionism na farkon ƙarni na 20, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga nau'o'in motsi na fasahar zamani. A yau, ayyukansa suna cikin manyan gidajen tarihi na duniya, kuma rayuwarsa da fasaharsa sun zama tushen fina-finai, litattafai, da kiɗa marasa adadi, kuma jama'a suna ci gaba da tattaunawa akai. Van Gogh fiye da mai zane kawai wanda ya yi fice a wani zamani, ana tuna shi a matsayin mutum mai alama wanda ya nuna girman ruhin ɗan adam, yana ƙona sha'awar fasaha a cikin wahala. Launukansa masu ƙarfi da bayyanar motsin rai ana iya samun irin wannan ruhin a cikin ayyukan wasu masu zane na Expressionism kamar Edvard Munch, kuma yana tabbatar da yadda fasaha za ta iya bincika zurfin ciki na ɗan adam.
vincent-van-gogh.trials: Kasawa akai-akai a sana'a da talauci, da kuma tsananin kaɗaici da rashin lafiyar kwakwalwa da suka addabi rayuwarsa, da kuma rashin kulawar jama'a da bai samu karbuwa a matsayin mai fasaha ba a lokacin rayuwarsa.
vincent-van-gogh.overcoming: Ya haɗa tsananin zafi da keɓewarsa cikin launuka masu ƙarfi da salon zane, wanda ya buɗe sabon sararin fasahar zamani, kuma ta hanyar zurfin dangantakarsa da ƙanwarsa Theo, ya bar manyan ayyuka marasa mutuwa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Na zuba dukkan raina da ruhuna a cikin aikina, kuma a cikin wannan tsari, na rasa hankalina. Abubuwa masu girma ana yin su ne ta hanyar tarin ƙananan abubuwa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Gaskiya ita ce kaɗai dukiya mai dorewa. Lokacin da ka zuba dukkanin kasancewarka a cikin aikinka, kana ƙirƙirar wani tasiri da zai iya taɓa zukatan baƙi har bayan ƙarnuka. Kada ka hana kanka.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ban san komai da tabbas ba, amma kallon taurari yana sa ni mafarki. Ko da ƙafafunka suna kan ƙasa, idanunka ya kamata su kasance a kan taurari.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Game da tsarin hangen nesa: Fata wani aiki ne na kirkire-kirkire. Babban Mutum ya fahimci cewa ko da duniya tana iya zama wuri mai matuƙar zafi, kuma a lokaci guda wuri mai matuƙar kyau. Ta hanyar zaɓar mai da hankali kan 'taurari'—ma'ana, haɗin kai, mamaki—kana kiyaye wutar rayuwa da ke ba ka damar jure duk wani ƙalubale.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu wani fasaha da ya fi soyayya ga mutane. Jinƙai shine mafi girman nau'in kirkire-kirkire. Bari zuciyarka ta zama jagoranka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Haɗin kai magani ne ga keɓewa. Babban Mutum ya fahimci cewa matsalolinsa na sirri su ne gada zuwa ga abubuwan da al'umma ke raba. Bari hankalinka ya zama buɗaɗɗen ƙofa. Ta hanyar ƙaunar da hidimar wasu, za ka sami mafi girman manufa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Abraham Lincoln shi ne shugaban Amurka na 16 a tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci Yaƙin Basasa kuma ya kawar da bauta.
key_achievements: Nasara ga Tarayyar a Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka
Sanar da Dokar 'Yantar da Bayi
Sake kafa ƙa'idodin dimokuraɗiyya ta hanyar Jawabin Gettysburg
fact_box.legacy_statement: Jagorancinsa alama ce ta haɗin kai, 'yanci, da dimokuraɗiyya, kuma yana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duniya har yau.

abraham-lincoln.epic:
Abraham Lincoln (1809-1865) shi ne shugaban Amurka na 16 wanda ya jagoranci ƙasar a tsakiyar ƙarni na 19 mai cike da rudani, kuma alama ce ta kawar da bauta. An haife shi a ranar 12 ga Fabrairu, 1809, a wani yanki mai nisa na Kentucky, ɗan wani manomi matalauci, bai samu ilimi na yau da kullun ba. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance cike da aiki tuƙuru da koyar da kai a cikin yanayi mai wuya. Ya rasa mahaifiyarsa yana ɗan shekara tara, kuma ya girma a ƙarƙashin kulawar uwar riƙonsa, yana rayuwa mai wahala ta noma gona da sare itatuwa. Amma duk da haka, kowane dare yana karanta littattafai da hasken tocila, yana neman ilimi, kuma ya koyi doka da kansa har ya zama lauya. A lokacin, Amurka tana cikin lokacin masana'antu da faɗaɗa zuwa yamma, amma rikicin da ke tsakanin Kudu da Arewa game da batun bauta yana ƙara tsananta. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Lincoln ya ƙarfafa imaninsa cewa dukkan mutane daidai suke, kuma ya haɓaka babban buri na haɗa kan ƙasarsa da ke fuskantar barazanar rarrabuwa da kuma tabbatar da adalci. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance misali na jajircewa don ci gaba da koyo da haɓaka duk da matsaloli.

Lincoln ya fara shiga siyasa a matsayin ɗan majalisar dokokin jihar Illinois, bayan ya gina sana'arsa ta lauya, kuma daga baya ya zama ɗan majalisar wakilai ta Amurka, inda ya fara fitowa a matsayin mutum mai tasiri a ƙasa. Musamman, Dokar Kansas-Nebraska da aka kafa a 1854 ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a gare shi. Wannan doka ta soke Yarjejeniyar Missouri ta baya, ta hanyar ba da damar yanke shawara kan faɗaɗa bauta ta hanyar kuri'ar jama'a, kuma ta sake kunna muhawarar bauta a duk faɗin ƙasar. Lincoln ya yi adawa da wannan doka da ƙarfi, yana mai jaddada rashin adalcin faɗaɗa bauta, kuma ya sami shahara a duk faɗin ƙasar ta hanyar shahararrun muhawararsa da Stephen Douglas. A cikin waɗannan muhawarori, ya bayyana cewa bauta kuskure ne na ɗabi'a, kuma ya bar wata magana mai ban mamaki cewa 'Gida mai rarrabuwa ba zai iya tsayawa ba,' yana mai jaddada haɗin kan ƙasa. Bisa ga waɗannan ayyuka, ya tsaya takarar shugaban ƙasa a 1860 kuma ya ci nasara, amma nasararsa ta haifar da tsananin adawa daga jihohin Kudu. Jihohin Kudu, waɗanda ke goyon bayan ci gaba da bauta, sun ayyana ficewarsu daga Tarayyar, kuma suka kafa Ƙungiyar Jihohin Amurka, wato Confederacy, ta haka suka buɗe shafin farko na Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka, wanda shi ne yaƙi mafi muni a tarihin Amurka.

A matsayinsa na shugaban ƙasa, Abraham Lincoln ya fuskanci wani babban rikicin ƙasa wanda ba a taɓa gani ba, wato Yaƙin Basasa (1861-1865). A farkon yaƙin, sojojin Tarayyar sun sha kashi sau da yawa, kuma Lincoln ya sha wahala mai tsanani a cikin gazawar soji, zargi na siyasa, da kuma bala'i na kansa (mutuwar ɗansa). Amma duk da haka, bai girgiza ba, ya ci gaba da bin manufofinsa guda biyu: kiyaye Tarayyar da kawar da bauta. A ranar 1 ga Janairu, 1863, ya sanar da Dokar 'Yantar da Bayi. Wannan umarni ne na zartarwa wanda ya 'yantar da bayi a jihohin Confederacy, kuma ya ɗaga matsayin yaƙin daga kiyaye Tarayyar zuwa gwagwarmaya don 'yancin ɗan adam. A watan Nuwamba na wannan shekarar, a wajen bikin buɗe makabartar ƙasa a Gettysburg, Pennsylvania, ya bayyana muhimman ƙa'idodin dimokuraɗiyya a cikin jawabin Gettysburg, yana mai cewa 'gwamnati ce ta mutane, daga mutane, kuma don mutane,' a takaice amma da ƙarfi. Wannan jawabi ya sake kafa manufofin dimokuraɗiyyar Amurka kuma ya ba da babban tasiri ga al'ummar da yaƙin ya raba. Jagorancinsa mai ƙarfi da yanke shawara na dabaru sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kawo ƙarshen yaƙin da kuma kiyaye Tarayyar da kawar da bauta, inda suka tilasta wa Confederacy mika wuya a watan Afrilu na 1865.

Kwanaki kaɗan bayan cimma nasarar Yaƙin Basasa da kawar da bauta, waɗannan manyan nasarori, a ranar 15 ga Afrilu, 1865, an kashe Lincoln a gidan wasan kwaikwayo na Ford a Washington D.C. Mutuwarsa mai ban tausayi ta haifar da baƙin ciki mai zurfi a duk faɗin Amurka, amma a lokaci guda ta zama wata dama da ta haskaka tunaninsa da nasarorinsa. Gadon da Lincoln ya bari ba kawai na shugaban ƙasa ba ne wanda ya jagoranci yaƙin zuwa nasara, amma ana tuna shi a matsayin babban shugaba wanda ya kare ƙa'idodin 'yanci da daidaito na duniya. Ya yi ƙoƙari ya haɗa kan al'ummar da ta rarrabu, ya kare mutuncin kowane ɗan adam, kuma ya tabbatar da manufofin dimokuraɗiyya. Har yau, ana ɗaukar jagorancinsa a matsayin misali na jagorancin siyasa wanda ke kiyaye ƙa'idodi da neman haɗin kai a cikin rikici. Sunansa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da asalin Amurka, kuma yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ƙasashen dimokuraɗiyya a duk faɗin duniya. Jagorancinsa, tare da sauran masu kawo sauyi na zamaninsa, kamar Frederick Douglass mai fafutukar kawar da bauta, sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen sake kafa turbar ɗabi'a ta al'ummar Amurka.
abraham-lincoln.trials: Talauci tun yana yaro da kuma mutuwar mahaifiyarsa, rashin nasara a zabuka da dama da kuma bala'in yakin basasa, da kuma baƙin ciki mai tsanani da ya bi shi tsawon rayuwarsa.
abraham-lincoln.overcoming: Ya zama shugaban kasa ta hanyar karatun kai da jajircewa, ya jagoranci kawar da bautar da kuma hadin kan kasar, ya kafa dabi'un daidaito da 'yanci a tarihin dan adam.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ni mutum ne mai tafiya a hankali, amma ba na tafiya baya. Babban damuwata ba shine ko ka fadi ba, amma ko ka gamsu da zama a inda kake.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Cigaba na gaskiya ba ya zuwa ta hanyar tsalle mai girma, amma ta hanyar matakai masu karami. Kasa ta gaskiya ba ta kasa ba ce, amma yin kasa, karɓar saurin ku, koyo daga gazawa, da kuma ɗaukar kowane faduwa a matsayin shirye-shirye don tsalle na gaba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Idan aka ba ni sa'o'i shida don sare itace, zan ciyar da sa'o'i huɗu na farko wajen sassauta gatari. Shirye-shirye shine ginshiƙi na shiru na nasara mai girma.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ayyuka marasa shiri suna tsara gazawa. Masu fasaha suna ciyar da lokaci mai mahimmanci a cikin inuwa, suna sassauta kayan aikin su da kuma daidaita hangen nesa, don haka nasara ta zama mai inganci da kuma tabbatacciya a lokacin da ya dace.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ba tare da mugunta ga kowa ba, tare da jinƙai ga kowa ba, tare da jajircewa ga adalci kamar yadda Allah ya ga ya dace, mu kammala aikin da aka ba mu. Gaskiya mai girma tana cikin ikon gafartawa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Game da girman sulhu: Rike da ƙiyayya yana danne koda wani babban mutum. Fahimtar cewa hanyar cin nasara ta gaskiya ita ce juya makiyi zuwa aboki ko warkar da rarrabuwa, neman adalci ba tare da ramuwar gayya ba shine jagoranci na gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaban Amurka na farko, wanda ya jagoranci Yaƙin Neman 'Yanci zuwa nasara kuma ya kafa manufofin jamhuriya ta hanyar barin mulki.
key_achievements: Jagorancin soja wanda ya kai Yaƙin Neman 'Yanci ga nasara
Murabus na son rai daga babban kwamandan Sojojin Juyin Juya Hali
Kafa misali na miƙa mulki cikin lumana ta hanyar barin shugabancin ƙasa da son rai
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa misalai na manufofin jamhuriya, ikon farar hula, da miƙa mulki cikin lumana, yana shafar duniya baki ɗaya.

george-washington.epic:
Ƙaddarar George Washington an saƙa ta a cikin iyakokin Virginia ta mulkin mallaka marar horo, an haife shi a cikin duniya da mulkin sarauta mai nisa da tsarin zamantakewa mai tsauri ke mulka. Gonakin da rana ke haskawa waɗanda suka haskaka yarintarsa sun ɓoye sha'awar da ke zurfafa a cikin ruhin Amurka mai tasowa, wanda har yanzu yake daure da sarƙoƙi na zamani na kambin daular da kuma jeji mai faɗi da ba a taɓa ba. Da ya rasa mahaifinsa tun yana ƙarami, ya yi tafiya a cikin wani yanayi inda buri na kansa ke gwagwarmaya da matsayin gado, ya auna ƙasar da za ta riƙe sabuwar al'umma, kuma ya koyi darussan dogaro da kai marasa tausayi. Yarintarsa ta kasance tanderun da ya ƙarfafa ruhunsa na azama a ƙarƙashin inuwar mulkin Birtaniya, inda a ƙarƙashin nutsuwar matashin mai martaba, buri mai shiru yana tafasa. Ɗan wannan ƙasa ne, amma an ƙaddara masa ya wuce iyakokin mulkin mallaka, mutumin da zamaninsa ya tsara amma an rubuta masa ya karya waɗannan iyakokin.

Ƙaramin harshen wuta na 'yanci da ke fuskantar babban inuwar Daular Birtaniya ya zama tanderun da ya ƙarfafa azamarsa marar yankewa yayin da Washington ya fuskanci manyan shingayen zamaninsa. A kan Birtaniya, mafi girman ƙarfin soja a duniya, wanda ke da manyan jiragen ruwa da sojojin Redcoats masu horo, mulkin mallaka da suka rabu, da sojojin sa-kai marasa horo da jagoranci na farko, kamar caca ce mai cike da yanke kauna. Ya yi gwagwarmaya da rikicin yaƙi, ƙarancin kayan aiki mai zafi a Valley Forge, barazanar tawaye marar yankewa, da kuma yanke kauna mai ban tsoro da ke cinye tushen Sojojin Nahiyar, kuma ya jure duka da azamarsa marar gajiya. Daga ketarewar kogin Delaware mai haɗari zuwa hare-hare masu ƙarfin hali a Trenton da Princeton, ya mai da tsantsar jaruntaka zuwa ƙwarewar dabaru, kuma da ƙarfin halinsa kaɗai, ya riƙe mafarkin 'yanci mai rauni tare. Kowane hunturu ya kawo sabuwar barazana ta rayuwa, kuma kowane yaƙi caca ce da kusan ba zai yiwu ba, amma ya manne wa manufar da juriya da ta wuce hankali, ya hura rai cikin juyin juya halin da ke mutuwa. Nauyin makomar da ba zai yiwu ba ya danne shi, yana buƙatar fiye da juriya ta ɗan adam.

Lokacin da nasara ta zo a ƙarshe, ba kawai dakatar da yaƙi ba ne, amma babban halittar sabon tsarin siyasa: jamhuriya da aka ƙirƙira a cikin harshen wuta na juyin juya hali, kuma Washington ya tsaya a kan wannan kololuwar kaɗaici da nauyi. Mafi girman nasararsa ba karar bindigogin Yorktown ba ne, amma ayyukan da ba a taɓa gani ba na barin mulki, kamar murabus dinsa daga babban kwamandan sojoji, sannan kuma daga baya ya bar shugabancin ƙasa da son ransa—nuna halin kirki na ɗan ƙasa wanda ba a taɓa ji ba a cikin duniyar sarakuna masu haɗama. Wannan zaɓi na sani don komawa filayen zaman lafiya na Mount Vernon ya bayyana zurfin kaɗaicin ciki na mutumin da ke fama da babban nauyin gina al'umma da ba a taɓa gani ba, rikice-rikicen jam'iyya, da kuma fatalwar rugujewa da ke ko'ina. Ciwon jiki na rayuwarsa a kan sirdi da sansani, da kuma farashin motsin rai daga zargi marar yankewa da fatalwar bauta mai ban tsoro sun zama babban nauyi ga ruhinsa da ya sadaukar da kansa ga 'yanci, amma ya jure kamar mai gadi mai tsauri. Ya san cewa gwajin mai rauni yana buƙatar shugaba da ya fahimci yanayin mulki na ɗan lokaci, da kuma zurfin sadaukar da kai don alheri na har abada na sabuwar ƙungiyar.

Ƙarnuka sun gudana kamar manyan koguna, amma George Washington ya kasance babban mutum marar canzawa, ya zama babban ginshiƙi wanda shugabannin baya suka tsaya a kan manyan kafadu don jagorantar jamhuriyoyinsu. Gadonsa ya wuce filayen yaƙi da akwatunan zaɓe; an sassaƙa shi a cikin ginshiƙan manufofin jamhuriya: tsarkin ikon farar hula akan sojoji, miƙa mulki cikin lumana, da kuma sadaukarwa marar yankewa ga al'umma da aka gina akan dokoki, ba mutane ba. Ya kafa muhimmin misali cewa jagoranci hidima ne, amana ce ta ɗan lokaci, ba haƙƙi na har abada ba, kuma wannan ruhu yana ci gaba da yin amo a duk faɗin duniya. Halinsa, haɗin gwiwa mai ƙarfi na tsauri, mutunci, da sadaukar da kai, yana aiki a matsayin kamfas wanda ke nuna har abada zuwa ga mafi girman buri na mulkin kai. Nutsuwar girman kai na barin mulkinsa yana yin amo a cikin ƙarnuka, darasi ne marar lokaci game da haɗarin buri da kuma ƙarfin jagoranci mai kyau, da kuma fitila ta har abada ga neman 'yancin ɗan adam.
george-washington.trials: Rikicin rushewar rundunar a farkon yakin neman 'yancin kai tare da rashin samun ilimin boko da kuma mutuwar mahaifinsa tun yana yaro, da kuma tsananin hunturu a Valley Forge.
george-washington.overcoming: Ya hada rundunar Continental tare da jajircewa da kuma ikon addini don samun nasara, kuma ya nuna misali na dimokuradiyya ta hanyar mika mulki cikin lumana bayan ya yi ritaya daga mukamin shugaban kasa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ka yi kokarin ci gaba da rike wannan fitilar lamiri a cikin zuciyarka. Ita ce kadai kwatankwacin da ba za ta taba cutar da kai ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Halaye ana samar da su ne a cikin tsayayyun shawarwari. Duniya na iya yin hukunci kan sakamako, amma gaskiyar gaskiya tana fitowa ne daga daidaituwa da gaskiyar ciki. Ka kiyaye wannan fitilar ta ciki, saboda nasarar waje ba za ta iya maye gurbinta ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Farincikin dan Adam da kuma wajibcin addini ba za su iya raba su ba. Gaskiyar 'yanci tana bukatar horo na nagarta don rayuwa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: 'Yanci kyauta ce mai laushi wacce mutanen da ke da alhaki kawai za su iya kiyayewa. Kasancewa babban mutum yana nufin yin koyi da tsayuwa da kuma wajibcin jama'a, don haka al'umma za ta iya aiki ba tare da tilastawa ba. Nagartarka ta sirri ita ce tushen zaman lafiya na duniyar 'yanci.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Zan fi son kasancewa a gonata fiye da zama sarkin duniya. Mulki ba mallaka ba ne, amma amana ce. Yi amfani da shi don yin hidima, sannan ka sake shi.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Gaskiyar jagoranci ba ta bayyana a cikin rike mulki ba, amma a cikin sauke shi cikin ladabi. Sanin matsayinka na mai kula da ayyukan gama gari na wucin gadi yana barin gado wanda ya wuce sha'awar mutum. Yin fifiko ga ci gaba na tsarin fiye da kai yana tabbatar da tasiri mai dorewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Yi Sun-sin ya kasance jami'in soja na Koriya a tsakiyar Daular Joseon, wanda ya ceci al'umma ta hanyar jagorancinsa na musamman a yakin ruwa a lokacin Yakin Imjin.
key_achievements: Kirkirar Jiragen Kunkuru da karfafa karfin sojojin ruwa.
Nasara a manyan yakin ruwa a lokacin Yakin Imjin, ciki har da Yakin Tsibirin Hansan.
Samun babban nasara a Yakin Myeongnyang duk da rashin daidaito mai yawa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin jarumi na har abada wanda ya ceci al'umma kuma alama ce ta kishin kasa ga Koriya, saboda azamarsa marar yankewa da dabaru masu hikima.

yi-sun-shin.epic:
Yi Sun-sin (李舜臣, 1545 – 1598) ya kasance wani babban jami'in soja mai hazaka kuma gwarzon kasa na tsakiyar Daular Joseon. An haife shi a ranar 28 ga Afrilu, 1545, a Hansung (yanzu Seoul) a matsayin zuriyar dangin Deoksu Yi, ya girma a cikin hargitsin al'ummar Joseon mai cike da rudani a lokacin. Kafin barkewar Yakin Imjin, Daular Joseon tana da tsarin mulkin farar hula mai karfi, inda ba a ba jami'an soja daraja yadda ya kamata ba, kuma karfin tsaron kasa yana raguwa a hankali. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Yi Sun-sin ya gina karfinsa tun yana saurayi ta hanyar koyon fasahar yaki da nazarin dabarun soja. Ya ci jarabawar soja a lokacin da ya kai shekaru 32, ya shiga aikin gwamnati, kuma ya sami kwarewar aiki yayin da yake hidima a yankuna daban-daban na kan iyaka. Musamman ma, ya fara fitowa fili ta hanyar nuna jagoranci mai kyau da basirar dabaru a yakin da ya yi da Jurchens a yankunan arewa. Wannan kwarewar tasa ta zama wata kadara mai mahimmanci wacce daga baya ta ceci Joseon daga hadari.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Yi Sun-sin ya zo ne kafin barkewar Yakin Imjin, lokacin da aka nada shi Kwamandan Sojojin Ruwa na Lardin Jeolla a shekarar 1591. Ya hango yiwuwar mamayar Japan, kuma nan da nan bayan nadin nasa, ya sadaukar da dukkan kokarinsa don karfafa karfin sojojin ruwa. Musamman ma, ya inganta jiragen ruwa na Panokseon da suka wanzu kuma ya hanzarta karfafa karfin sojojin ruwa ta hanyar gina Jirgin Kunkuru (龜船), wani sabon jirgin yaki wanda za a tuna da shi har abada a tarihin yakin ruwa na duniya. Jirgin Kunkuru, wanda aka rufe da faranti na karfe don kare kai daga hare-haren makiya kuma yana iya harba bindigogi daga kowane bangare, ya zama jirgin yaki mai karfi kuma babban karfin sojojin ruwa na Joseon. Lokacin da Yakin Imjin ya barke a shekarar 1592, sojojin Japan sun mamaye yankin Koriya da karfi mai ban mamaki, amma sojojin ruwa na Joseon karkashin jagorancin Yi Sun-sin sun bambanta. Ya fara da Yakin Okpo, ya ci nasara a yakin ruwa kamar Sacheon, Dangpo, Danghangpo, Tsibirin Hansan, da Busanpo, yana yanke hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki na sojojin ruwa na Japan kuma ya dora babban nauyi ga sojojin kasa. Musamman ma, Babban Yakin Tsibirin Hansan, wanda aka yi a ranar 8 ga Yuli, 1592 (kalandar wata), ya kasance babban nasara wanda ya hallaka sojojin ruwa na Japan ta amfani da dabarun “tsarin fuka-fukan crane” (hakikjin), ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wajen canza yanayin yakin.

Duk da haka, duk da gagarumar nasarar da ya samu a fagen yaki, Yi Sun-sin ya fuskanci matsaloli saboda rikicin bangaranci a kotu da rashin amincewar Sarki Seonjo. A shekarar 1597, an zarge shi da karya, an kwace masa dukkan mukamansa, kuma an tilasta masa yin hidima a matsayin soja na yau da kullun (Baegui Jonggun). Bayan magajinsa, Won Gyun, ya sha mummunan kashi a Yakin Chilcheollyang, kusan ya hallaka sojojin ruwa na Joseon, kotu ta sake nada Yi Sun-sin a matsayin Kwamandan Sojojin Ruwa na Larduna Uku. A wannan lokacin, jiragen ruwa 13 ne kawai suka rage masa. A cikin wannan yanayi mai cike da yanke kauna, Yi Sun-sin ya gabatar da wata takarda mai ban tausayi yana cewa, “Har yanzu ina da jiragen ruwa goma sha biyu,” yana nuna azamarsa marar yankewa. A wannan shekarar, a ranar 26 ga Oktoba, 1597 (kalandar wata), ya sami nasara mai ban mamaki, Yakin Myeongnyang, ta hanyar amfani da kunkuntar hanyar ruwa da saurin ruwan teku na Mashigin Myeongnyang da dabaru masu hikima, inda ya kayar da jiragen ruwa 133 na Japan da jiragen ruwa 13 kawai nasa. Wannan nasarar ta kiyaye fatan karshe na Joseon kuma ta dakatar da ci gaban sojojin Japan zuwa Tekun Yamma gaba daya. Bayan haka, ya sake tsara ragowar sojojin kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen korar sojojin Japan tare da hadin gwiwar sojojin ruwa na Ming.

A ranar 16 ga Disamba, 1598 (kalandar wata), Yi Sun-sin ya mutu sakamakon harbin bindiga na abokan gaba yayin da yake bin sojojin Japan da ke ja da baya a Yakin Noryang. Kafin mutuwarsa, ya bar wasiyya, “Kada ku sanar da abokan gaba mutuwata,” yana nuna jagoranci na musamman ta hanyar hana hargitsi da karfafa ci gaba da yaki har zuwa karshe. Bayan mutuwarsa, Yakin Imjin ya kawo karshe, kuma Joseon ta fara warkar da raunukan yakin da ya dade. Bayan mutuwarsa, an ba shi lakabin girmamawa na Chungmu (忠武) kuma an girmama shi a matsayin mutumin da ya fi bayar da gudummawa wajen shawo kan rikicin kasa na Joseon. A yau, Yi Sun-sin ba kawai jarumi ne na soja ba, amma wani ginshiki ne na ruhaniya ga Koriya, yana nuna azama marar yankewa, kishin kasa, da basirar dabaru mai ban mamaki. Jagorancinsa da ruhin sadaukarwarsa suna ci gaba da zaburar da al'ummar Koriya ta zamani, suna zama tushen karfi don hadin kai da shawo kan matsaloli. Rayuwarsa kuma tana da alaƙa da ruhin sauran kwamandojin sojojin adalci waɗanda suka yi yaki da mamayar waje a lokaci guda, yana tunatar da mu game da sadaukarwar da ba za a manta ba na mutane marasa adadi waɗanda suka ba da gudummawa ga shawo kan rikicin Joseon.
yi-sun-shin.trials: Kishin da hassada saboda gaskiya, gwaje-gajen soja sau biyu da azabtarwa, da kuma yaƙin kaɗai da aka yi a tsakanin mutuwar ɗansa da aka ƙaunata da rashin yarda da sarki ke yi masa.
yi-sun-shin.overcoming: Ya bar tarihin da ba a taɓa yin irinsa ba a tarihin yaƙin teku na duniya, tare da jagorantar nasarar yaƙin Myongnyang da ruhin 'mutuwa na tabbata', ya shawo kan barazanar halaka ta ƙasar.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Duk wanda ya nemi mutuwa zai rayu, amma wanda ya nemi rayuwa zai mutu. Nasara tana zuwa ga wanda ya shirya yin komai don babban dalili.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ƙoƙarin rabin rai yana haifar da tabular kashin kai. Babban mutum ya fahimci cewa hanyar kawai don shawo kan matsaloli marasa yiwuwa ita ce cikakken sadaukarwa, har zuwa ga sadaukarwa. Ta hanyar toshe hanyar komawa baya, kuna sakin wani babban ikon da ke rage ƙalubale.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kada ka yi sauri. Ka kasance kamar dutse, shiru da tsayayye. Ka lura da yanayin kafin ka kai hari. Haƙuri babban makami ne.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Game da horon nutsuwa: Rawar jiki yanki ne na masu rauni. Babban mutum yana kula da babban nutsuwa a tsakiyar rikici. Ta hanyar ƙin amsawa da tsoro ko fushi, kuna kiyaye bayyananniyar da ake buƙata don gano daidai lokacin damar. Ƙarfi yana cikin ikon jira.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kada ku gaya wa kowa cewa na mutu. Ku mai da hankali kan aikin har sai an tabbatar da nasara ta ƙarshe. Babban dalili ya fi mutum girma.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Babban girma yana cikin fifita aikin fiye da sanin kai ko tsira. Ta hanyar fahimtar cewa rayuwarka kayan aiki ne don babban manufa, kuma ta hanyar tabbatar da nasarar aikin, tasirinka zai wuce kasancewarka ta zahiri. Gina abin da zai iya dawwama fiye da kanka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Elizabeth I sarauniya ce ta Ingila a ƙarni na 16, wacce ta jagoranci Zaman Zinariya ta hanyar zaman lafiya na addini da kuma kayar da Armada ta Spain.
key_achievements: Kafa Sulhun Addini na Elizabeth
Kayar da Armada ta Spain
Jagorantar Zaman Zinariya na Al'adun Ingila
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta mai da Ingila babbar ƙasa a Turai kuma ta kasance alama ce ta sarauniya mai ƙarfi.

elizabeth-i.epic:
Elizabeth I (an haife ta a shekara ta 1533) ita ce sarauniya ta ƙarshe a daular Tudor kuma babbar sarauniya da ta mulki Masarautun Ingila da Ireland daga tsakiyar ƙarni na 16 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 17. Haihuwarta ta zo daidai da wani lokaci mai cike da rudani, lokacin da Henry VIII ya rabu da Cocin Katolika na Roma, ya kafa Cocin Ingila, kuma harshen wuta na Gyaran Addini ke ci da ƙarfi. An haife ta a ranar 7 ga Satumba, 1533, ga Henry VIII da matarsa ta biyu Anne Boleyn, Elizabeth ta gaji wata kaddara ta siyasa mai sarkakiya tun daga haihuwa. An kashe mahaifiyarta Anne Boleyn kafin Elizabeth ta cika shekara uku, kuma an ayyana Elizabeth da kanta a matsayin 'yar shege, wanda ya nisanta ta daga layin gadon sarauta. Wannan yarinta mai cike da rashin tabbas ya sa ta fahimci gaskiyar rayuwa da iko tun da wuri, kuma ya zama ginshiƙin ƙarfin hali da hikimar siyasa da za ta nuna daga baya. A wannan lokacin, Ingila tana fama da rikice-rikicen addini da kuma makirce-makirce marasa adadi game da gadon sarauta, kuma Elizabeth matashiya ta yi gwagwarmaya don kare matsayinta da rayuwarta a cikin waɗannan barazanar.

Babban juyin juya hali ga Elizabeth ya zo ne a ranar 17 ga Nuwamba, 1558, lokacin da ta hau gadon sarauta na Ingila da Ireland tana da shekaru 25, bayan mutuwar 'yar uwarta Mary I. A lokacin, Ingila ƙasa ce mai rauni da ke fuskantar rarrabuwar kawuna ta addini, matsalolin kuɗi, da barazanar manyan ƙasashe kamar Faransa da Spain. Tun daga farkon mulkinta, ta sanya zaman lafiya da haɗin kai na ƙasa a matsayin babban fifikonta, kuma don cimma wannan, ta aiwatar da 'Sulhun Addini na Elizabeth' a cikin 1559. Wannan wata manufa ce mai matsakaiciyar ra'ayi da ke da nufin dawo da Cocin Ingila zuwa imanin Furotesta yayin da take riƙe da wasu abubuwan Katolika don rage tsananin rikice-rikice tsakanin bangarorin biyu. Wannan manufa ta ba da gudummawa ga zaman lafiya na addini a cikin Ingila kuma ta zama muhimmin ginshiƙi don ƙarfafa mulkin Sarauniya. Bugu da ƙari, ta kasance marar aure a duk rayuwarta, ta gina hoton alama na 'Sarauniya Budurwa,' tana nuna ƙarfin hali don hana tsoma bakin waje ta hanyar aure da kuma kare 'yancin kai na Ingila.

Mulkin Elizabeth I ya kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje da gwagwarmaya marasa adadi, amma ta shawo kansu da jagoranci na musamman. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan barazanar ita ce Mary, Sarauniyar Scotland, wacce ta yi iƙirarin gadon sarauta na Ingila tare da goyon bayan Katolika. Sarauniya Mary ta shiga cikin makirce-makirce da yawa na kisan kai a kan Elizabeth, kuma kashe ta a cikin 1587 ya ƙarfafa ikon sarauta na Elizabeth. Duk da haka, wannan lamari ya zurfafa rikici da Philip II na Spain Katolika, wanda ya kai ga mamayewar Ingila da 'Armada' ta Spain a cikin 1588, wani lamari da ba a taɓa gani ba. Elizabeth da kanta ta ƙarfafa sojojinta kuma ta hura wutar kishin ƙasa, kuma sojojin ruwa na Ingila, tare da taimakon guguwa, sun sami nasara ta tarihi ta hanyar kayar da Armada. Wannan nasara ta zama wani muhimmin juyi ga Ingila don fitowa a matsayin babbar ƙarfin ruwa kuma kololuwar da ta kai mulkinta zuwa 'Zaman Zinariya.' A wannan lokacin, manyan marubuta da masu tunani kamar William Shakespeare da Francis Bacon sun yi aiki, suna haɓaka farfaɗowar al'adun Ingila.

Elizabeth I ta mulki Ingila da Ireland na tsawon shekaru 44 har zuwa mutuwarta a ranar 24 ga Maris, 1603, wanda ya nuna ƙarshen daular Tudor. A cikin rarrabuwar kawuna ta addini da barazanar waje, ta mai da Ingila ƙasa mai ƙarfi mai cin gashin kanta, ta kafa ikon ruwa, kuma ta shimfiɗa harsashin daular Biritaniya ta gaba. Ana tuna mulkinta a matsayin lokacin da aka cimma zaman lafiya na siyasa, wadata ta tattalin arziki, da kuma zamanin zinariya na al'adu a lokaci guda. Musamman ma a matsayin 'Sarauniya Budurwa,' ta gabatar da misali na sarauniya mai ƙarfi a cikin al'ummar da maza ke mamaye, kuma halinta mai ban sha'awa da hikimarta suna ci gaba da zaburar da mutane da yawa har zuwa yau. Gadon Elizabeth I ya kasance muhimmin ɓangare na asalin Biritaniya na zamani da jagoranci, kuma mulkinta yana da muhimmiyar ma'ana a cikin cewa ta shimfiɗa tushe mai ƙarfi na ƙasa wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da ginin Daular Biritaniya a lokacin Sarauniya Victoria.
elizabeth-i.trials: Kuruciyarta da ta fada cikin kisan mahaifiyarta da kuma zama 'yar shege, da kuma hadarin kusa da mutuwa a cikin kurkukun London, da kuma zagi da yawa da makircin juyin mulki da ta fuskanta a matsayinta na sarauniya mace.
elizabeth-i.overcoming: Ta warware rigingimun addini tare da kwarewar diflomasiyya da mulki, kuma ta fatattaki rundunar jiragen ruwa marasa galihu, ta bude zamanin zinare na Ingila, kuma ta kafa harsashin daular Ingila da karfin halinta na ganin kanta a matsayin kasa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ina da jikin mace mai rauni da rauni, amma ina da zuciya da kuma jarumtar sarki. Kada ku yi hukunci ga babban mutum ta bayyanarsa, amma ta ruhinsa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Game da ikon ruhu: Asalin ku shine abin da ke cikin ku. Sharuɗɗan waje ko tsinkayen jama'a kawai 'jiki' ne. Ta hanyar haɓaka tsarin ƙuduri mara girgiza, watau 'hankali' mai girma, za ku sami girmamawa da iko ba tare da la'akari da yanayinku ba. Ku ayyana kan ku kafin wasu su ayyana ku.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ba za a iya warkar da abin da ya wuce ba. Dole ne mu gina gaba daga yanzu. Babban mutum yana kallon gaba, saboda can ne daular take.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Nadama tana bata kuzari. Babban mutum ya fahimci cewa shi ne mai gina zamani mai zuwa. Ta hanyar mai da hankali kan iliminku mai girma kan damammakin yau, kuna tsara gado na gobe. Ku ci gaba da motsin ci gaba, ba nauyin tunawa ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Na riga na auri mijina, watau Masarautar Ingila. Ku nemi dalili wanda ya cancanci sadaukar da rayuwar ku gaba ɗaya. Sadaukarwa ita ce mabuɗin girma.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Girma yana buƙatar mayar da hankali kan manufa ɗaya kawai. Ta hanyar sadaukar da ƙananan sha'awar mutum don babban manufa, kuma ta sadaukar da rayuwa ga wani babban dalili, ana samun rashin mutuwa na musamman. Ku mayar da hankali kan manufarku.

gwanggaeto-the-great.era: Gwanggaeto the Great na karni na 4 zuwa 5 (374-413)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Gwanggaeto the Great shi ne sarki na 19 na Goguryeo a ƙarshen karni na 4 zuwa farkon karni na 5, wanda ya fadada yankinta zuwa iyakar sa kuma ya kafa ra'ayin duniya mai zaman kansa, yana jagorantar Goguryeo zuwa zamanin daukakarta.
key_achievements: Ya fadada yankin Goguryeo zuwa iyakar sa
Ya sanar da amfani da sunan zamani na musamman 'Yeongnak'
Ya ci nasara kan ƙasashen maƙwabta kamar Baekje, Khitan, da Wa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Manyan nasarorinsa sun kasance alama ce ta girman kai na ƙasa da ruhin nahiyar ga Koriya a yau.

gwanggaeto-the-great.epic:
Gwanggaeto the Great (374-412) shi ne sarki na 19 na Goguryeo, babban sarki mai cin nasara kuma mai kawo sauyi wanda ya kafa mulkin mallaka a Arewa maso Gabashin Asiya kuma ya fadada yankin Goguryeo zuwa iyakar sa. A ƙarshen karni na 4, duk da cewa Goguryeo tana farfadowa da ƙarfin ƙasarta ta hanyar gyare-gyaren Sarki Sosurim, ta fuskanci babban rikicin ƙasa saboda tsananin rikicin yankuna da Baekje a kudu, musamman bala'in mutuwar Sarki Gogukwon a yaƙi da Sarki Geunchogo na Baekje. A arewa, barazanar da ke ci gaba daga kabilun waje kamar Khitan da Sushen ya sa Goguryeo ta kasance cikin makomar kare iyakokinta da fadada tasirinta koyaushe. A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da rudani, a shekara ta 374, Damdeok, wanda aka haifa a matsayin ɗan Sarki Gogukyang, ya girma yana fuskantar buƙatun zamanin: don dawo da ruhin Goguryeo mai ƙarfi da kuma tashi a matsayin babbar ƙasa ta Gabas. Yarintarsa lokaci ne na ƙarfafa azamarsa ta shawo kan ciwon magabata da suka faɗi kuma ya sake gina ɗaukakar Goguryeo.

Gwanggaeto the Great, wanda ya hau gadon sarauta yana ɗan shekara 18 a watan Mayu na shekara ta 391 (kalandar wata), ya buɗe sabon zamani ga Goguryeo ta hanyar bin tsarin manufofin waje mai ƙarfi tun farkon mulkinsa. A lokacin mulkinsa, ya yi amfani da sunan zamani na musamman 'Yeongnak', wanda ya kasance muhimmin sanarwa, yana bayyana a ciki da waje cewa Goguryeo tana da ra'ayin duniya mai zaman kanta, ba ta ƙarƙashin sunayen zamani na China ba, kuma tana ɗaukar kanta a matsayin babbar ƙasa ta duniya ta Gabas. A shekara ta 392, shekara guda bayan hawansa gadon sarauta, ya kai hari kan Baekje, ya sami muhimman wurare a arewacin Kogin Han, ya kafa wata gada don fadada kudu. Ya ci gaba da yaƙi da Baekje, yana daidaita iyakar kudu ta hanyar karɓar mika wuya daga Sarki Asin. Bugu da ƙari, a arewa, ya ci nasara kan kabilun waje daban-daban kamar Khitan, Sushen, da Birye, yana fadada tasirin Goguryeo zuwa filayen Manchuria. Sojojinsa sun yi amfani da dabarun dawakai ta hanyar kirkire-kirkire, sun canza yanayin soji na Arewa maso Gabashin Asiya gaba ɗaya a lokacin, wanda ya zama muhimmin mataki ga Goguryeo don zama mai mulkin nahiyar.

Ayyukan cin nasara na Gwanggaeto the Great sun ci gaba ba tare da tsayawa ba a cikin wani yanki mai faɗi wanda ya haɗa da Koriya da Manchuria. A shekara ta 400, ya aika da babban sojoji 50,000 don fatattakar masu mamayewa na Wa (Japan) a Silla, ta haka ya ƙarfafa tasirin Goguryeo a yankunan kudancin Koriya. Wannan lamari ya nuna a fili cewa Goguryeo tana da ƙarfin soji mai girma, wanda ya ba ta damar shiga cikin rikice-rikice tsakanin ƙasashen maƙwabta da sake tsara tsari a matsayin mai mulkin Arewa maso Gabashin Asiya. Bugu da ƙari, a yamma, ya ƙarfafa iko a yankin Liaodong ta hanyar fuskantar Later Yan, kuma a arewa, ya ci Dongbuyeo (410), yana fadada yankin Goguryeo daga Kogin Amnok zuwa yankin Kogin Songhua, ta haka ya sami yanki mafi girma a tarihin Goguryeo. Bai iyakance ga fadada yankuna kawai ba, har ma ya kafa ingantaccen tsarin mulki ga yankunan da aka ci nasara kuma ya gudanar da tsarin Sumyoin (masu kula da kaburbura), yana ƙoƙarin haɗa mutanen da aka ci nasara a matsayin membobin Goguryeo. Bayan mutuwarsa, an ba shi babban taken girmamawa 'Gukgangsang Gwanggaeto Gyeongpyeongan Hotaewang', don tunawa da nasarorinsa.

Nasarorin da Gwanggaeto the Great ya cimma a cikin ɗan gajeren mulkinsa na shekaru 22 sun sanya Goguryeo ta zama babbar ƙasa ta gaskiya a Arewa maso Gabashin Asiya, kuma wannan ya kasance alama ce ta girman kai na ƙasa da ruhin nahiyar ga Koriya a yau. Rayuwarsa da nasarorinsa an rubuta su dalla-dalla a kan Dutsen Gwanggaeto the Great, kuma rubutun, yana cewa “Alherinsa ya kai sama kuma ikonsa ya girgiza tekuna huɗu,” yana isar da girman sa ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Wannan rubutu ana ɗaukarsa ɗaya daga cikin muhimman tushen tarihi don fahimtar tarihin da al'adun Goguryeo. Jagorancin Gwanggaeto the Great mai ƙarfi da ingantattun dabarun soji ba kawai sun buɗe zamanin zinariya na Goguryeo ba, har ma sun kafa tushe mai mahimmanci ga ɗansa, Sarki Jangsu, don ci gaba da zamanin daukaka na Goguryeo. Manyan nasarorinsa sun nuna halayen babban sarki wanda za a iya kwatanta shi da Sarki Taejong Muyeol na Silla, wanda ya kafa tushe don haɗewar Masarautu Uku.
gwanggaeto-the-great.trials: A lokacin yana yaro, kasar ta fuskanci masifu, mulkin mallaka ya rasa daraja, kuma akwai barazanar daga makwabta kamar Khitan da Baekje daga kowane bangare, da kuma iyakacin rayuwarsa ta gajarta.
gwanggaeto-the-great.overcoming: Ya yi nasara wajen fadada yankin Goguryeo zuwa mafi girma a tarihi ta hanyar aiwatar da manufofin arewa da kudu a lokaci guda, kuma ya daukaka matsayin kasar zuwa matakin duniya ta hanyar amfani da nasa sunan mulkin.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Barka da ni'imarka ta kai sama, kuma girman kai ya girgiza duniya. Ana tabbatar da karfin gagara ne kawai ta hanyar amfanin da ake bayarwa ga mutane da yawa. Ku yi hidima ga jama'a.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Mulkin Alheri: Karfin da ba shi da manufa zalunci ne. Gagara ta fahimci cewa dole ne ta kare kuma ta wadatar da wadanda ke bin manyan ayyukanta. Ta hanyar daidaita buri da amfanin jama'a, za ku sami aminci mafi karfi fiye da kowane katanga. Yi amfani da tasirinku don daukaka wasu.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu iyakokin kasa da aka tsayar. Yankinku ana tantancewa ta hanyar girman hangen nesa da karfin matakanku. Kada ku karbi iyakokin da wasu suka sanya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Girma alamar rayuwa ce, kuma tsayuwa mutuwa ce a hankali. Ta hanyar ci gaba da tura iyakokin ilimi, tasiri, da jin dadi, za ku tabbatar da rayuwa da kuma karfin manufarku. Duniya tana ga masu kasada masu karfin gwiwa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mu cibiyar duniya ne. Ku yi alfahari da tarihin ku da kuma damarku. Ba ku kasance masu kallo na tarihi ba, amma marubucinsa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Hankali shine filin yaki na farko. Kafin duniya ta yarda da girman ku da kuma keɓantawarku, dole ne ku yi imani da shi da kanku. Haɓaka girman kai mai girma wanda ya ƙi a rage shi ta hanyar waje. Ku ne jarumai na zamanin ku.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaba mai jajircewa wanda aka haifa cikin gata, ya fuskanci lokuta masu cike da rudani, kuma ya jagoranci Birtaniya zuwa nasara a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na II.
key_achievements: Ya ba da shawarar sabunta Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Sarauta kuma ya yi tunanin tanki.
Ya jagoranci Birtaniya a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na II kuma ya yi adawa da Nazism.
Ya haɗa kan al'umma kuma ya ba su kwarin gwiwa da kalmomi a cikin yanke kauna.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ta har abada wanda ya ceci ɗan adam da jajircewa marar girgiza da ikon kalmomi a cikin matsaloli masu yawa.

winston-churchill.epic:
A cikin tsoffin dakunan Fadar Blenheim, tsakanin tsoffin duwatsu masu raɗaɗin sawun Duke na Marlborough, wani rai ya tashi wanda aka ƙaddara ba kawai ya shaida ba har ma ya tsara farkon ƙarni mai cike da rudani. Wannan mutum, duk da cewa an kulle shi a cikin gidan zinariya na manyan mutanen zamanin Victoria, ya yi marmarin wani babban mataki. An haife shi cikin gata, amma ya girma kamar maraya saboda rashin kulawar iyayensa, ƙaramin Winston Churchill ya shafe kuruciyarsa a cikin tsauraran dokokin makarantar kwana. Yanayin da ke ciki ya kan danne wutar basirarsa mai tasowa, yana barin babban gibi a cikin zuciyarsa wanda ke ɓoye marmarin samun babban matsayi da haɗin kai na gaskiya. Ya gaji duniya a bakin wani canji da ba za a iya tunaninsa ba, inda faɗuwar rana ta dauloli ke jefa dogayen inuwa masu ban tsoro a kan nahiyoyin da ba su sani ba, kuma ƙasa a ƙarƙashin dauloli tana rawa da alƙawarin shiru na babban canji. A bayan tawayen matasa, wani hankali mai rawar jiki da buri marar ƙarewa sun yi ta tafasa, a cikinsu wani zurfin fahimtar ƙaddara ya motsa shi zuwa filayen yaƙi, nesa da jin daɗinsa na asali zuwa tsakiyar rikici. Tun daga lokacin, wata fahimtar duhu mai zuwa ta kama shi, kuma wani mummunan zato na manyan gwaje-gwaje da za su buƙaci jajircewarsa ta musamman da ƙarfinsa ya mamaye shi.

Farkon ƙarni na 20 ya kasance kamar wani labyrinth na tsoffin ra'ayoyi da sabbin abubuwa masu ban mamaki, lokacin da dawakai da tankuna har yanzu suke gasa kuma tsoffin koyarwa ke riƙe da ragamar mulki da ƙarfi. Amma Churchill, a matsayin mai rushe gumaka, ya shiga cikin waɗannan raƙuman ruwa masu juyawa da himmar annabci, yana rungumar gaba. Ya hau dawakai a filayen yaƙi masu nisa, yana isar da labarai a cikin wuta, kuma ya kammala karatunsa a cikin tukunyar rikici, yana shanye mummunan gaskiyar yaƙin zamani da kallon da ba ya girgiza wanda ya saba wa asalin gatan sa. Hawansa na siyasa ya kasance kamar ambaliyar ruwa na sanarwa masu ƙarfin hali da saurin canza jam'iyya. A cikin rawa mai ƙarfin hali da ke adawa da tsohuwar ra'ayin mazan jiya na abokan aikinsa, ya ba da shawarar sabunta Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Sarauta kuma ya yi tunanin manyan 'jiragen ruwa na ƙasa' waɗanda za su ratsa laka na Yammacin Gabas. Amma tukunyar yaƙi kuma ta haifar da babban farkon shan kashinsa, yakin Gallipoli. Wani mummunan kuskure ya sa aka kore shi daga manyan ofisoshin mulki, kuma ya fuskanci wani lokaci mai zurfi na gudun hijira na siyasa, inda ɗacin zargin jama'a ya ƙarfafa marmarin samun ceto mai zafi, kamar yadda wata tsuntsu mai suna phoenix ke jiran tashinsa mai girma.

Lokacin babban gwaji ya zo, an lulluɓe shi a cikin duhun labulen 1940. Inuwa ta Nazism ta miƙe tsayi a kan nahiyar da ke miƙa wuya ga zalunci, kuma Birtaniya ta tsaya ita kaɗai, kamar wani sansani da abokin gaba da ba za a iya cin nasara ba ya kewaye shi. A lokacin ne Winston Churchill, wanda aka ƙarfafa a cikin wutar gazawar da ta gabata, ya riƙe ragamar ƙasar da ke cikin haɗari. Muryarsa ta zama kukan al'umma mai 'yanci, kamar babban gangar juriya, yana mai da kalmomi makamai a kan yanke kauna, kuma ya saƙa wani zane mai ban mamaki na ruhu marar girgiza wanda ya riƙe tsibirin da ƙarfi a cikin hare-haren sama marasa tsayawa da barazanar mamayewa. Amma a bayan kamanninsa na bulldog da maganganunsa masu ba da kwarin gwiwa, akwai wani mutum da ke fama da kadaici mai kusan ba za a iya jurewa ba. Kowace rana yana fama da 'baƙar kare' na baƙin ciki, yana ɗaukar babban nauyin alhakin duniya, kuma yana yanke shawara da ke ƙayyade makomar miliyoyin mutane da zuciya mai nauyi da hankali mai gajiya. Babban wahalar jiki da ta hankali ba ta da iyaka, ya kasance yaƙi marar tsayawa da shakka da tsoro, da kuma dare marar barci na shugaba da ke ɗaukar kowane zaɓi wanda zai iya nufin ceto ko halakar wayewar da ya rantse zai kare.

Ko da yake ƙarnuka za su buɗe zanen lokacinsu, babban inuwar da Winston Churchill ya jefa za ta ci gaba. Ya kasance fitila mai jajircewa wanda ya ratsa cikin duhun dare na tarihin ɗan adam, gado wanda aka zana zurfi a cikin ƙwaƙwalwar gama kai, ba a cikin dutse ko doka ba. Shi babban mutum ne wanda ya ɗauki nauyin duniya da aka ceto, wani kuka marar girgiza a kan duhun mulkin kama-karya mai zuwa, yana koya wa ɗan adam babban kuma madawwamin ikon kalmomi lokacin da aka yi amfani da su da tabbaci marar girgiza da bayyananniyar ɗabi'a. Rayuwarsa babban labari ne mai cike da rudani na juriya da ceto, yana tsaye a matsayin shaida ta har abada ga ikon ban mamaki na mutum ɗaya don canza tafarkin ƙaddara, don zaburar da mutanen da ke cikin matsala su tattara mafi zurfin ƙarfinsu kuma su ƙi miƙa wuya a ƙarƙashin takalmin zalunci. Don haka, ya wuce tarihin ɗan siyasa kawai, ya zama alama ta har abada ta ruhun ɗan adam wanda, lokacin da ya fuskanci matsaloli masu yawa, ya zaɓi kada ya miƙa wuya amma ya yi yaƙi, ya jure, kuma a ƙarshe ya yi nasara.
winston-churchill.trials: Rashin nasara a karatunsa tun yana yaro da kuma matsalar magana, rugujewar siyasa sakamakon gazawar yakin Gallipoli da shekaru goma na keɓewa (Shekarun Hamada), da kuma hare-haren bam na Jamus da ake yi kullum da daddare a lokacin yakin duniya na biyu.
winston-churchill.overcoming: Ya ƙarfafa ruhin jama'a ta hanyar jawabai masu ban sha'awa da jagoranci, yana jagorantar ƙasar zuwa nasara a yakin duniya na biyu, kuma ya yi tasiri kan manyan abubuwan da suka faru a tarihin zamani tare da hikimarsa da hangonsa, wanda ya ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin adabi.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kada ku, kada ku, kada ku daina. Nasara ba ta ƙarshe ba ce, kuma gazawa ba ta mutuwa ba ce: abin da ke da mahimmanci shi ne ƙarfin ci gaba. Sa'a tana tare da masu tsada.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Layukan da ke tsakanin nasara da gazawa sau da yawa ana zana su ta hanyar kawai yanke shawarar ci gaba da yaki. Jin daɗi na iya zama darasi ne kawai da aka lulluɓe, kuma kada ku bar wani abin da zai iya zama na wucin gadi ya zama ƙarshen dindindin. Ci gaba da tafiya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Idan kuna wucewa ta Jahannama, ci gaba da tafiya. Babu wata hanyar fita sai ta wucewa. Ci gaba shine maganin ƙarshe ga kowane bege.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Tsoro yana ƙaruwa sa'ad da muka tsaya. Akwai ainihin ƙarfi a cikin ci gaba da aiki, har ma sa'ad da hanyar ta zama mai ban tsoro. Ta hanyar ƙin miƙa wuya, kuna raunana ikon duhu kuma kuna neman hanyar gaba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mai ra'ayin mazan jiya yana ganin wahala a kowane dama; mai ra'ayin kyakkyawan fata yana ganin dama a kowane wahala. Hali shine abu kaɗan wanda ke yin babban bambanci.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Hanyar da kuke gani tana samar da gaskiyar ku. Horar da hankalinku don ganin fa'idodin da aka ɓoye a cikin mawuyacin yanayi, yana wucewa ta abubuwan da ke hana ku. Zaɓin labarin yiwuwa yana sa duniya ta fara ba ku mafita da kuke nema.

qin-shi-huang.era: Karni karni na dari uku kafin haihuwar annabi (259-210 BC)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mutumin da ya haɗa kan kasar Sin a lokacin rikicin jihohin yaƙi, ya zama Sarkin Farko na Sin, kuma ya gina daular da ke da iko mai ƙarfi a tsakiya.
key_achievements: Kawo ƙarshen rikicin jihohin yaƙi da haɗa kan Sin.
Daidaita ma'auni, kuɗi, da rubutu.
Gina Babban Katangar Sin da ƙarfafa ikon gwamnatin tsakiya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin tushen wayewar Sin ta zamani da alamar jagoranci mai ƙarfi, wanda ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga haɗin kai da kafa tsari.

qin-shi-huang.epic:
A shekara ta 259 K.Z., a cikin rudanin lokacin Jihohin Yaƙi na Sin, aka haifi Ying Zheng, wanda daga baya ya zama Qin Shi Huang. Rayuwarsa ta yara, a matsayin ɗan garkuwa da aka haifa a ƙasar waje, ta kasance lokaci mai cike da wahala, inda ya girma a cikin barazanar rayuwa da raini. Amma a cikin zuciyar yaron nan Ying Zheng, wata babbar buri ta ci gaba da ci, na kashe wutar yaƙe-yaƙe da suka daɗe shekaru ɗarurruwa, da kuma haɗa kan dukkan duniya. Tun yana ɗan shekara 13, ya zama sarkin Qin, ya karɓi iko, kuma ya shirya don hawan daular haɗin kai mafi girma kuma mafi tsanani a tarihin ɗan adam.

Babban ci gaban Qin Shi Huang shi ne 'haɗin kai na farko da daidaitawar Sin'. Ya halaka jihohi shida ɗaya bayan ɗaya, ya haɗa kan yankin tsakiya zuwa ɗaya, kuma shi ne na farko da ya yi amfani da taken 'Sarki'. Bai tsaya kawai ga haɗa yankuna ba, har ma ya daidaita ma'auni, kuɗi, da rubutu, don kafa tushen babbar daular. Ya gina Babban Katangar Sin don kare kai daga baƙi, kuma ya kafa tsarin gwamnati mai ƙarfi a tsakiya bisa ga falsafar Legalism. Shi ne mahaliccin wani zamani, wanda ya tsara asalin babbar ƙasar Sin da za ta daɗe shekaru dubbai.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, ya nemi maganin tsawon rai, yana mafarkin rayuwa ta har abada, amma wannan sha'awar tasa ta bar inuwar zalunci mai tsanani da kuma ƙona littattafai da binne malamai. Ya rayu tsawon rayuwarsa a cikin barazanar kisan kai, a matsayin sarki mai kaɗaici wanda bai amince da kowa ba. Ƙudurinsa na ci gaba da zama sarki ko bayan mutuwarsa, ta hanyar gina babbar daular ƙasa ta Terracotta Army, ya nuna iyakar burin wani babban mutum. Ya kasance wani babban mutum wanda ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya wajen ƙirƙirar duniya ɗaya mai suna Sin.

Gadon da Qin Shi Huang ya bari yana haskawa a yau a matsayin tushen wayewar Sin da alamar jagoranci mai ƙarfi. Ya canza tafarkin tarihi da imani mai ƙarfi cewa "ikon mutum ɗaya ne ya kamata ya mallaki dukkan duniya." Rayuwar Qin Shi Huang ta kasance wani babban labari na haɗin kai da aka ƙirƙira da ƙarfe da jini, yana koyar da cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shi ne wanda ke kafa tsari mai ƙarfi, ko da kuwa dole ne ya jure zargi don kawo ƙarshen rudani. An rubuta sunansa har abada a matsayin Shi Huangdi, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke neman haɗa kan duniya.
qin-shi-huang.trials: Matsanancin damuwa da kaɗaici da ya fuskanta a lokacin yana bauta a ƙasashen waje da kuma shakkun da ake yi akai-akai game da haihuwarsa, da kuma faɗa da Lu Buwei da kuma yunkurin kashe shi sau da yawa.
qin-shi-huang.overcoming: Ya kafa daular farko ta farko a China, ya kuma haɗa haruffa da ma'auni, wanda ya samar da tushen wayewar gaske, kuma ya kammala manyan ayyukan gini kamar Babban Ganuwar da kuma Gidan Abang.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu wani mai mallakar duniya, amma ga wanda yake da niyyar mallakarsa. Kada ka jira izinin jagoranci, ka yi umarni da makomarka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ikon nufi: Ana kwace iko, ba a ba shi ba. Babban mutum ya fahimci cewa iko ya samo asali ne daga niyya mai ƙarfi wacce ba za a iya girgiza ta ba. Ta hanyar da'awar mallakar yanayinka, ka tilasta wa duniya ta sake tsara kanta don dacewa da burinka. Kada ka ji tsoron girman sha'awarka.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Idan babu tsari, to sai dai rikici. Ka kafa ginshiƙai masu girma a rayuwarka da aikinka. Jituwa ita ce sirrin daular.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Rikici yana da haɗari ga ci gaba. Babban mutum ya fahimci cewa ana iya samun 'yanci a cikin iyakokin tsarin da aka tsara. Ta hanyar daidaita halaye da ƙa'idodi, ana kawar da tasirin da ke ɓata damar ɗan adam kuma ana gina tsarin da ke tallafawa ci gaba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Babu abin da ke dawwama, amma alamar da ka bari za ta iya wuce zamanin. Ka yi niyyar yin abin da ba a misaltuwa. Ka gina abin da ba za a iya yin watsi da shi ba a nan gaba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Mutuwa gaskiya ce, amma tasiri zaɓi ne. Manyan mutane sun san cewa lokacinsu yana da iyaka, amma tasirinsu ba haka ba ne. Ta hanyar gina tsarin, ra'ayoyi, ko motsi waɗanda za su iya tsira bayan mutuwarsu, sun cimma nau'in dawwama na gaskiya. Ka bar alamar da ba za a iya sharewa ba.

augustus.era: Karnuka karni na farko BC zuwa karni na farko AD (63 BC – 14 AD)

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban ɗan siyasa wanda, daga matashi mai rauni, ya zama Augustus, sarki na farko na Roma, ya buɗe Pax Romana, kuma ya kammala babban Daular Roma.
key_achievements: Kawo ƙarshen Yaƙin Basasa na Roma da fara Pax Romana
Kafa tushen daular a ƙarƙashin kamannin jamhuriya
Kammala babban Daular Roma da haɓaka al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Zama tushen tsarin siyasa da tsarin birane na wayewar Yamma, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga shugabannin da ke mafarkin nasara mai dorewa.

augustus.epic:
A cikin shekara ta 63 K.Z., a cikin wani gida mai sauƙi a birnin Roma, aka haifi Octavian, wanda daga baya zai zama Augustus mai girma. Yarintarsa ta kasance lokaci ne na rauni da rashin lafiya, inda bai samu wani babban fata daga mutane ba. Amma kawunsa, Julius Caesar, ya hango kaifin basira da babban buri da ke ɓoye a cikin idanun wannan yaro. Lokacin da aka kashe Caesar, matashin mai shekaru 18, duk da rauninsa, ya karɓi kaddararsa kuma ya shirya wani babban tsalle mai ban mamaki don hawa kan kololuwar mulkin Roma.

Babban tsallen Augustus mafi girma shi ne farkon 'Zaman Lafiya na Roma (Pax Romana)'. Ya murƙushe Antony da Cleopatra, ya kawo ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe na cikin gida masu zubar da jini, kuma ya dawo da zaman lafiya mai ɗorewa ga Roma. Ba kamar Caesar ba, ya kasance mai hikima da dabara, babban ɗan siyasa wanda ya yi amfani da taken 'Ɗan Kasa na Farko (Princeps)' kuma ya kafa tushen daular gaskiya yayin da yake kiyaye kamannin jamhuriya. Ya kammala Roma a matsayin babban daula mai girma ta hanyar gyara hanyoyi, sake fasalin tsarin haraji, da haɓaka al'adu. Bai kasance mai cin nasara kawai ba, amma mai kawo zaman lafiya na wani zamani wanda ya tsara zaman lafiya da tsari.

A kololuwar rayuwarsa, ya furta wata magana mai cike da alfahari: 'Na tarar da Roma birni na tubali, na bar ta birni na marmara.' A lokacin mulkinsa mai tsawo na sama da shekaru 40, ya mai da Roma cibiyar duniya, mai haskakawa. Ya rayu dukan rayuwarsa cikin daidaito mai tsanani da lissafi mai kyau, yana ba da fifiko ga zaman lafiya da wadata na jihar fiye da abubuwan da yake ji na kansa. Ya shawo kan rauninsa na jiki da ƙarfin hankali mai ban mamaki, kuma ya tsaya tsayin daka a matsayin babban mai kare wayewar Roma mai girma.

Gadon da Augustus ya bari yana haskakawa a yau a matsayin tushen dukkan tsarin siyasa da tsarin birane na wayewar Yamma. Kafin mutuwarsa, ya bar wa abokansa wata koyarwa mai zurfi: 'Idan kun ji daɗin wasan kwaikwayo na rayuwata, ku tafa.' Rayuwar Augustus ta kasance babban labari na zaman lafiya wanda aka ƙirƙira da haƙuri da hikima mai zurfi, yana koyar da cewa babban mutum na gaskiya shine wanda ke daidaita duniya ba da ƙarfi ba, amma da tsarin da aka tsara da basira mai kaifi. Sunansa an rubuta shi har abada a matsayin mai daraja da girma, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga dukkan shugabannin da ke mafarkin nasara mai dorewa.
augustus.trials: Rashin lafiyar da ya yi tun yana yaro da kuma talakawarsa, da kuma yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa da kuma rikice-rikicen siyasa da ya fuskanta bayan kashe ubangidansa na biyu, Kaisar.
augustus.overcoming: Ya kawo ƙarshen yaƙe-yaƙe kuma ya samar da zaman lafiya ga Roma, ya mayar da ita daular sarauta, kuma ya sake gina ta zuwa daular marmara ta hanyar ingantaccen gudanarwa da kuma gyaran birni.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Festina Lente. Yi sauri a hankali. Daidaito shine mahaifiyar dawwama, kada ka yi gaggawar ginin abin tunawa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Game da mulkin haƙuri: sauri mara ma'ana bala'i ne. Babban mutum ya fahimci cewa nasara mai girma tana buƙatar kulawa da hankali; ta hanyar motsawa cikin sauri da aka lissafa kuma mai ci gaba, kuna tabbatar da cewa kowane sashe na ginin ku yana da ƙarfi. Inganci shine kawai hanyar da ke aiki.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Na sami Roma birni na tubali kuma na bar ta birni na marmara. Kullum ka bar abin da ya fi kyau fiye da yadda ka same shi. Ingantawa shine alhakinka.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Canji alamar jagoranci ce. Babban mutum ya fahimci babban alhaki na inganta duniyar da ke kewaye da shi. Ta hanyar ci gaba da ƙoƙarin inganta inganci, kyau, da ingancin yanayin ku, kuna nuna cancantar ku don zama shugaba. Ku zama mai gina ingantawa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Na yi kyau a rawa ta a cikin wasan kwaikwayo na rayuwa? Idan haka ne, ku yi taɗi yayin da nake tafiya. Gaskiyar ƙoƙari ita ce lada ta ƙarshe.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Rayuwa rawa ce da za a yi cikakkiya. Babban mutum ya fi daraja kimantawa ta ciki fiye da yabo na jama'a. Ta hanyar yin rawa ta da gaskiya da kuma nagarta, kuna samun zaman lafiya wanda duniya ba za ta iya ɗauka ba. Ku tafi da mutunci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Otto von Bismarck ya kasance ɗan siyasa na Jamus a ƙarni na 19 wanda ya haɗa kan Jamus kuma ya gina daula ta hanyar Manufar Ƙarfe da Jini.
key_achievements: Haɗewar Jamus ta hanyar Manufar Ƙarfe da Jini
Ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Daular Jamus
Gabatar da tsarin inshorar zamantakewa na farko a duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa harsashin dabarun diflomasiyya na zamani da tsarin jin daɗin jama'a, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai kan gudanar da ƙasa.

otto-von-bismarck.epic:
Yarima Otto Eduard Leopold von Bismarck-Schönhausen (1815-1898) ya kasance fitaccen jami'in diflomasiyya kuma ɗan siyasa mai hazaka wanda ya jagoranci Prussia a cikin rudanin Tarayyar Jamus da ta rabu gida biyu a tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, ya kuma cimma haɗewar Jamus. An haife shi a ranar 1 ga Afrilu, 1815, a Schönhausen, Prussia, a cikin wani dangi mai daraja na Junker (masu mallakar filaye masu daraja), ya nuna ƙarfin hali da halin zaman kansa tun yana yaro. Ko da yake ya yi rayuwar matasa mai ban sha'awa yayin da yake karatun shari'a a Jami'ar Göttingen da sauran wurare, har ma ya sami laƙabin 'Bismarck Mahaukaci', wannan ya zama tushen fahimtarsa ta gaskiya da kuma jajircewarsa a nan gaba. Bayan ya yi aiki a gwamnati na ɗan lokaci sannan ya koma kula da gonakin danginsa, a hankali ya haɓaka ƙwarewarsa ta siyasa a matsayin wakili a Majalisar Prussia da Majalisar Tarayya ta Frankfurt, inda ya ɗauki babban burin haɗa kan Jamus da ta rabu zuwa ƙasa ɗaya mai ƙarfi. A wannan lokacin, ya yi nazarin yanayin siyasar Turai mai sarkakiya da kaifi, ya kuma ƙarfafa imaninsa cewa Prussia ce ya kamata ta zama jagorar haɗewar Jamus. Tafiyarsa ta siyasa ta fara shiga turbar gaske lokacin da aka naɗa shi Firayim Minista na Prussia a shekarar 1862.

Babban juyin juya halin siyasa na Bismarck ya zo ne a shekarar 1862 lokacin da Sarki Wilhelm I na Prussia ya naɗa shi Firayim Minista. Nan da nan bayan hawansa mulki, ya ayyana shahararriyar 'Manufar Ƙarfe da Jini', yana mai cewa "muhimman matsalolin zamanin ba za a warware su ta hanyar jawabi ko kuri'un rinjaye ba, sai dai ta hanyar ƙarfe da jini," kuma ya tura gaba da ƙarfi wajen ƙarfafa sojoji. Wannan ya nuna jigon Realpolitik, falsafar siyasar da ta ba da fifiko ga bukatun ƙasa fiye da ɗabi'un ra'ayin mazan jiya ko akidu. Bisa ga wannan manufar, Bismarck ya yi yaƙe-yaƙe uku don haɗewar Jamus. Da farko, ya ci nasara a Yaƙin Denmark a 1864, ya warware matsalar Schleswig da Holstein. Daga nan, ya murƙushe Austria a Yaƙin Prussia da Austria a 1866, ya kafa rinjayen Prussia a cikin Tarayyar Jamus. A ƙarshe, ya samu nasara mai girma a Yaƙin Prussia da Faransa a 1870, ya samar da wani muhimmin mataki na haɗa kan jihohin Kudancin Jamus a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Prussia. Waɗannan jerin yaƙe-yaƙe sun kasance tsarin gina tushen haɗewar Jamus ta hanyar dabaru na diflomasiyya masu zurfi da ƙarfin sojoji na Bismarck.

A ranar 18 ga Janairu, 1871, Bismarck ya ayyana Daular Jamus a Fadar Versailles, ya naɗa Wilhelm I a matsayin Sarkin Farko, kuma ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Daular. Bayan haɗewar, aikinsa shi ne tabbatar da zaman lafiya da wadata ga sabuwar daular. A cikin gida, ya gudanar da Kulturkampf (yaƙin al'adu) don iyakance tasirin Cocin Katolika, kuma ya kafa dokokin murkushe masu ra'ayin gurguzu don danne ƙungiyoyin gurguzu. A lokaci guda, don rage rashin gamsuwa na ma'aikata da ƙarfafa haɗin kan ƙasa, ya gabatar da tsarin inshorar zamantakewa na zamani na farko a duniya – wato, inshorar rashin lafiya, inshorar haɗari, da tsarin fansho na tsufa – ya kafa harsashin jihar jin daɗin jama'a ta zamani. A waje, ya gina tsarin kawance mai sarkakiya da inganci, kamar Ƙawancen Sarakuna Uku da Ƙawancen Ƙasashe Uku, don ware Faransa da kuma kiyaye daidaiton iko a Turai, wanda ya sa ya sami laƙabin 'Mai wasan kwaikwayo na Turai'. Duk da haka, yanayin ya canza lokacin da Wilhelm II ya hau mulki a 1888. Sarki matashi mai buri ya nuna rashin gamsuwa da manufofin Bismarck na ra'ayin mazan jiya da kuma yadda yake amfani da iko na musamman, kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 18 ga Maris, 1890, Bismarck dole ne ya sauka daga muƙamin Firayim Minista saboda rikici da sarki.

Bayan ya sauka daga muƙamin Firayim Minista, Bismarck ya koma garinsu don ciyar da sauran rayuwarsa, amma tasirinsa na siyasa ya kasance mai ƙarfi a ciki da wajen Jamus. Har zuwa rasuwarsa a ranar 30 ga Yuli, 1898, ya nuna zurfin fahimta game da makomar Jamus, har ma ya yi gargaɗi game da haɗarin yaƙin duniya mai zuwa. Gadon Otto von Bismarck yana da girma sosai. Ya kasance 'Uban Haɗewar Jamus' wanda ya haɗa kan Jamus da ta rabu ya gina daula mai ƙarfi, kuma fitaccen jami'in diflomasiyya ne wanda ya sake tsara tsarin Turai ta hanyar Realpolitik mai sanyi da dabaru na diflomasiyya masu zurfi. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar gabatar da tsarin inshorar zamantakewa na farko a duniya, ya kafa harsashin jihar jin daɗin jama'a ta zamani, yana gabatar da sabon tsari inda ƙasa ke shiga cikin rayuwar jama'a. Shahararriyar maganarsa "Siyasa fasahar yiwuwa ce" har yau tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga yawancin 'yan siyasa. Ana tunawa da rayuwarsa a matsayin wani babban labari wanda ya buɗe makomar ƙasa ta hanyar iko da basira, kuma yana ci gaba da yin tasiri kan dabarun diflomasiyya na ƙasashe na zamani, manufofin zamantakewa, da kuma gudanar da ƙasa gaba ɗaya. Gadonsa na diflomasiyya ya bar darussa masu muhimmanci ga sauran 'yan siyasa waɗanda suka yi mafarkin haɗewar Turai a nan gaba.
otto-von-bismarck.trials: Rayuwar samartaka da lalata da kuma rayuwa marar manufa, da kuma barazanar da ba ta daina ba daga abokan hamayya a cikin gida da waje da kuma yunkurin kashe shi, da kuma rasa iko saboda rikici da sarki a karshen rayuwarsa.
otto-von-bismarck.overcoming: Ya hada Jamus kuma ya yi mulkin Turai ta hanyar gaskiya da dabaru na diflomasiyya, kuma ya kafa tsarin jin dadin jama'a na farko duk da yanayinsa na ra'ayin mazan jiya don hadin kan kasa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Siyasa ita ce fasahar yin abin da ya dace, abin da za a iya cimmawa, wato, mafi kyawun zaɓi. Kada ka bari cikakkiyar manufa ta sa ka makance; ku karfafa kanku ta hanyar ci gaba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Gaskiya ta fi rinjaye. Haske marar gaskiya mafarki ne. Nasara tana zuwa ta hanyar yin aiki a cikin iyakokin duniya, ta hanyar cimma abin da zai yiwu don gina ci gaba, kuma a ƙarshe, don fuskantar abin da ba zai yiwu ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Duk wanda ya koyi daga kurakuransa shi ne wawa. Mai hikima yana koyo daga kurakuran wasu. Ka yi nazarin taswirar tarihi kafin ka fara tafiya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Hankali shine ikon guje wa azabar da ba dole ba. Ta hanyar nazarin nasarori da faduwa na waɗanda suka gabace ku, kuna samun fa'ida mai girma a yanzu. Kada ku sake ƙirƙirar dabaran; ku gano me yasa ta karye ga wani.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Mutum ba zai iya yin ko sarrafa igiyoyin zamani ba; kawai zai iya hawa su kuma ya sarrafa sitiyari. Koyi yadda ake karanta igiyoyin duniya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Rundunar kasa ita ce tushen iko. Babban mutum ya fahimci ƙanƙaninsa a gaban manyan canje-canjen tarihi; ta hanyar daidaita ayyukansa da igiyoyin zamani, yana samun sakamako wanda zai iya zama kamar mu'ujiza ga waɗanda ke adawa da igiyar. Ku koyi fasahar sitiyari.

peter-the-great.era: Peter the Great na zamanin sarauta

fact_box.one_line_summary: Peter the Great ya canza Rasha zuwa ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta zamani ta hanyar Westernization kuma ya buɗe hanyar zuwa Tekun Baltic.
key_achievements: Ya koyi fasaha a jiragen ruwa na Holland kuma ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare irin na Yamma.
Ya sami nasarar shiga Tekun Baltic ta hanyar cin nasara a yaƙin da Sweden.
Ya gina St. Petersburg, 'taga zuwa Turai'.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya jagoranci Rasha ta zama ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta zamani kuma ya gabatar da wayewar Yamma, yana da tasiri sosai ga asalin Rasha da ci gabanta har zuwa yau.

peter-the-great.epic:
A cikin ƙasar arewa mai tsananin sanyi da faɗi, zurfin fadar Moscow, idanun yaron nan Peter the Great sun haskaka kamar ƙanƙara mai sanyi. A tsakanin gwagwarmayar iko na boyars da inuwar ɗan'uwansa Ivan, dole ne ya ci gaba da tabbatar da wanzuwarsa. A tsakanin sarƙoƙin tsoffin al'adu da hayaniyar fadar da ke taɓarɓarewa, zuciyar matashin Tsar ta yi mafarkin tekun yamma mai shuɗi da biranen tashar jiragen ruwa masu cunkoso. Iskar da ke ratsa ta cikin bishiyoyi marasa ganye ta raɗa masa raunin Rasha a kunnensa, kuma nauyin sarautar da ke wucewa ya danne kafadunsa kamar yana riƙe da babban guduma. Cikin shiru, ya fara sassaƙa gaba, kuma wannan sassaƙa ba ƙiyayya ce makanta ba, sai dai fatan gaggawa.

Matashin Tsar, yana gumi a cikin jiragen ruwa na Holland, yana yanke ta cikin feshin ruwa mai sanyi, yatsunsa suna jin laushin itace marar sani, yana neman makomar Rasha. Maimakon nauyin ninkayen tsoffin rigunan siliki, yana sha'awar jin daɗin rigunan soja na Turai masu tsauri, yana neman tsarkake ruhin Rasha. Aske gemu, watsar da tsoffin kalandari, da gabatar da sabbin haruffa ba kawai canjin sutura bane. Wasa ne da ya sadaukar da komai, don cire harsashin rashin ƙarfi da daji da suka samo asali daga zurfin ƙasar da ta daɗe shekaru ɗari. Ko da a cikin tsananin sanyi na hunturu, a gaban wutar da ke ci, yana gina tsarin sabuwar Rasha a kan tarkacen tsohon tsari.

Sha'awar da ba ta gushewa ga Tekun Baltic ta ja shi cikin guguwar yaƙi mai jini. A gaban garkuwar ƙarfe ta Sweden, sojojin Rasha sun faɗi kuma sun faɗi, amma idanun Tsar ba su girgiza ba. Ya ci gaba da tafiya ta cikin fadama mai daskarewa da dazuzzuka masu dusar ƙanƙara, kuma a gefensa akwai sabuwar runduna, ba a ɗaure ta da tsoffin al'adu ba. Yana fuskantar raƙuman ruwa masu tsauri na Gulf of Finland, ya fara gina sabuwar babban birni a tsakiyar filin yaƙi mai ƙura. Manyan gine-ginen St. Petersburg, birnin da ake kira 'taga zuwa Turai,' sun kasance abubuwan tunawa da nasara da aka ƙirƙira ta hanyar nufin Tsar mai kaɗaici, kuma wannan nasara ta kasance mummunan hari ne ga tsohuwar duniya.

A cikin ƙasar arewa mai sanyi, wadda ƙafafun babban bear ba su taɓa kaiwa ba, ya kunna wutar wayewa. Gyaransa wani lokaci yana da tsauri kamar guguwa, wani lokaci kuma mai sanyi kamar ƙanƙara, amma Rasha ba ta kasance dabba da aka kama a cikin tsohon daji ba. Ya sa zuciyar daular da ke raguwa ta sake bugawa, kuma hannunsa ya faɗaɗa sararin Rasha daga yamma zuwa gabas. Yanzu, bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru, a kan hanyar da ya shimfiɗa, har yanzu muna jin numfashinsa. Burinsa ba labari ne na da ba, kuma gadonsa yana gudana kamar babban kogi, yana tsara halin yanzu na Rasha kuma yana ci gaba zuwa gaba.
peter-the-great.trials: Rikicin neman mulki a fadar tun yana yaro, rikici da dan'uwansa, adawa daga sarakunan gargajiya, da kuma babban asarar rayuka da dukiyoyi a cikin dogon yakin Arewa da Sweden.
peter-the-great.overcoming: Koyon da kuma karɓar al'adun Yamma da himma, kafa rundunar sojoji mai ƙarfi, gyara tsarin mulki, da kuma samun nasara a yaƙi da kafa sabuwar babban birni ta hanyar ayyukan soja masu juriya.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Lokaci shine mafi kyawun malami.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Yana nufin akwai abubuwa da yawa da ake koya ta hanyar gogewa da lokaci.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Wanda bai yi aiki ba, ba zai koyi komai ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Yana nufin dole ne mutum ya yi aiki da himma don samun ilimi na gaskiya da ci gaba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Koyon daga gazawa ya fi daraja fiye da nasara.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Yana nufin gazawa tana ba da darasi mai zurfi da damar tunani fiye da nasara.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Catherine the Great ta kasance Sarauniyar Daular Rasha a ƙarni na 18, wadda ta faɗaɗa yankin daular kuma ta haɓaka al'adunta ta hanyar mulkin kama-karya mai wayewa.
key_achievements: Hawan gadon sarauta ta hanyar juyin mulki a 1762
Inganta gyare-gyare bisa ga ra'ayoyin Haskakawa
Faɗaɗa yankin Crimea da Poland
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinta ya mai da Rasha babbar ƙasa a Turai kuma ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na al'adu, yana da tasiri mai girma har zuwa yau.

catherine-the-great.epic:
Catherine the Great (1729-1796), wadda ta yi sarauta a matsayin Sarauniyar Daular Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, ta kasance sarki ta takwas daga zuriyar Romanov, kuma wata mai mulkin kama-karya mai haske, wadda ta ɗaga daular zuwa matsayin babbar ƙasa mai girma a nahiyar Turai, kamar tauraro mai haske a sararin samaniya. An haife ta a matsayin Gimbiya Sophie Auguste Frederike von Anhalt-Zerbst, wata yar gidan sarauta Bajamushiya daga Stettin, Prussia, wadda tun daga haihuwarta aka yi mata alamar girma. A shekarar 1745, tana da shekaru goma sha shida kacal, ta ratsa ƙasashe, ta bar mahaifarta, don shiga cikin wani aure na siyasa da Peter Ulrich, magajin gadon sarautar Rasha, wanda daga baya ya zama Peter III, kamar yadda kaddara ta tsara mata. A matsayinta na baƙuwa a ƙasa mai nisa, ta rungumi sabon addini, Cocin Orthodox na Rasha, ta karɓi sunan 'Ekaterina Alekseyevna' mai daraja, kuma ta nutsu cikin koyon harshen Rasha da al'adunta, kamar yadda ruhi mai ƙarfi ke neman tushe. Amma duk da haka, rayuwar aurenta ta kasance cike da baƙin ciki, domin mijinta, Peter III, ya kasance mai rauni da canza hali, bai sami goyon baya ba daga kowa, kamar ganye da iska ke kadawa. A cikin wannan yanayi mai cike da rudani, Catherine ta fara gina matsayinta a hankali a tsakanin manyan Rasha da sojojin gadi, tana shimfiɗa tushen siyasa a ɓoye don makomar da ke tafe, kamar yadda tushen itace ke zurfafa a ƙasa. Rayuwarta ta farko ta kasance wani lokaci na haƙuri mai girma, koyo mai zurfi, da kuma gina buri mai ɓoye a cikin yanayi mai ban mamaki, kamar yadda tsaba ke girma a cikin duhu kafin su fito fili.

Bayan Peter III ya hau gadon sarauta a shekarar 1762, mulkinsa na rashin iya aiki da kama-karya ya haifar da wani guguwar rashin gamsuwa a cikin dukkanin al'ummar Rasha, kamar yadda iska mai ƙarfi ke kaɗa ganye. Duk da nasarar da Rasha ta samu a Yaƙin Shekaru Bakwai, ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya mai wulakanci da Prussia, kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin kwace dukiyar coci mai tsarki, don haka ya rasa goyon bayan manyan mutane, Cocin Orthodox mai daraja, da kuma sojoji masu ƙarfi, kamar yadda sarki ke rasa kambi. Wannan yanayi mai cike da rudani ya buɗe wa Catherine wata kofa ta zinariya, wata dama ta musamman don karɓar ragamar mulki, kamar yadda kaddara ke kira. A watan Yulin 1762, Catherine, da goyon bayan sojojin gadi masu ƙarfi, ta yi juyin mulki mai ban mamaki, ta hambarar da mijinta Peter III daga gadon sarauta, kuma ta hau kanta da kanta a matsayin Sarauniyar Daular Rasha, wato Tsarina, kamar yadda zakiya ke karɓar mulki. Wannan lamari ya kasance mafi girman canji a rayuwarta, wanda ya nuna basirarta ta siyasa da jajircewarta, kamar yadda hasken rana ke bayyana duhu. Juyin mulkin ya gudana cikin sauri da nasara mai ban mamaki, kuma Daular Rasha ta faɗa ƙarƙashin mulkin sabuwar Sarauniya, kamar yadda sabon alfijiri ke fitowa. Hawanta gadon sarauta ba kawai canjin mulki ba ne, amma farkon wani babban canji ne wanda zai tantance makomar Rasha, kamar yadda kaddara ke buɗe sabon shafi.

Mulkin Catherine the Great (1762-1796) ya kasance wani zamanin zinariya mai haske ga Daular Rasha, wanda aka rubuta da haruffan zinariya a cikin littafin tarihi. Ta yi hulɗa da masana falsafar Faransa na Haskakawa, ta kira kanta 'mai mulkin kama-karya mai haske', kuma ta nemi hangen nesa don gyara ta hanyar musayar wasiƙu da manyan masana na zamaninta, kamar Voltaire da Diderot, kamar yadda sarki ke neman hikima. Ta inganta zamantakewa a cikin al'umma ta hanyar fitar da 'Nakaz' mai girma, wani jagora don tsara dokoki don gyaran shari'a, kuma ta kafa Cibiyar Smolny, wata cibiyar ilimi mai haske ga mata, ta hanyar gyaran ilimi, kamar yadda haske ke haskaka duhu. Bugu da ƙari, ta goyi bayan fasaha da al'adu da hannu biyu, ta haɓaka Gidan Tarihi na Hermitage a St. Petersburg zuwa matsayin duniya, wanda ya zama abin alfahari. Amma duk da haka, mulkinta bai rasa gwaji ba, kamar yadda kowane sarki ke fuskantar kalubale. Daga 1773 zuwa 1775, babban tawayen manoma da aka sani da 'Tawayen Pugachev', wanda Yemelyan Pugachev ya jagoranta, ya kasance babban kalubale ga ikonta, kamar guguwa mai ƙarfi, amma ta shawo kansa da ƙarfi da hikima, ta dawo da zaman lafiya. Bayan Juyin Juya Halin Faransa, ta ɗauki matsayi mai ra'ayin mazan jiya game da manufofin gyara, amma burinta na farko na gyara ya yi tasiri mai zurfi ga al'ummar Rasha, kamar yadda ruwa ke shiga cikin ƙasa.

Ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorin Catherine the Great, wanda ya haskaka kamar tauraro, shine faɗaɗa yankin Daular Rasha sosai, yana mai da ita babbar ƙasa mai girma a nahiyar Turai, kamar yadda sarki ke faɗaɗa mulkinsa.
