A lokacin mulkinsa, Daular Mali ta kasance kasa mai karfi ta Musulunci a Yammacin Afirka, a matsayin cibiyar cinikin sahara, tana tara dukiya mai yawa ta hanyar cinikin zinariya da gishiri. Ko da yake an kafa Daular Mali a tsakiyar karni na 13 kuma ta riga ta mallaki yankuna masu yawa, amma hawan Mansa Musa ya zama wani muhimmin mataki da ya daga ci gaban daular zuwa wani matsayi. Shi memba ne na Daular Keita, kuma ya hau gadon sarauta a shekara ta 1312 bayan tsohon mansa, Abu Bakr II, ya tafi binciken Tekun Atlantika kuma bai dawo ba. A lokacin, Yammacin Afirka tana ci gaba a fannin ilimi da kasuwanci a karkashin tasirin wayewar Musulunci, kuma Mansa Musa ya kasance a shirye don fitar da cikakken damar daular a cikin wannan yanayin zamani. A farkon mulkinsa, Mansa Musa ya mai da hankali kan gyara tsarin gudanarwa na daular da kuma karfafa karfin soja don kafa tushe mai karfi.

Mafi muhimmancin juyawa a mulkin Mansa Musa shi ne aikin Hajji zuwa Makka da ya fara a shekara ta 1324. Wannan aikin Hajji, wanda aka yi don cika wajibcin addini na Musulmi na ziyartar Makka sau daya a rayuwarsa, ya wuce tafiya ta sirri, ya zama wani taron tarihi da ya sanar da matsayin Daular Mali ga duniya baki daya. Ya ratsa Hamadar Sahara, ya bi ta Alkahira, Masar, zuwa Makka, tare da dubban masu rakiya, daruruwan rakuma da dawakai, da kuma zinariya mai yawa. Wannan jerin gwanon ya ba mutane mamaki da girma da kuma kyawunsa, musamman sadaka da kyautar zinariya mai yawa da Mansa Musa ya bayar a Alkahira sun yi yawa har suka sa farashin zinariya ya fadi a birnin. Wannan lamarin ya sanya arzikin Daular Mali mai yawa a zukatan Gabas ta Tsakiya da Turai, kuma masu zana taswirar Turai a lokacin sun fara zana hoton Mansa Musa tare da zinariya a taswirar Afirka. Hajjinsa ba kawai nuna dukiya ba ne, amma ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na fadada musayar diflomasiyya da al'adu da duniyar Musulunci.

Bayan aikin Hajji zuwa Makka, Mansa Musa ya dawo daular kuma ya karfafa ci gaban al'adun Musulunci da ilimi sosai. Ya gayyaci malamai, masana gine-gine, da masu fasaha da ya hadu da su a lokacin Hajjinsa zuwa Mali don gina masallatai, dakunan karatu, da jami'o'i a manyan birane kamar Timbuktu da Gao. Musamman Timbuktu ta zama cibiyar ilimin Musulunci cikin sauri a karkashin tallafinsa, kuma cibiyoyin ilimi kamar Jami'ar Sankore sun jawo hankalin malamai da dalibai da yawa, suna taka rawar cibiyar ilimi a nahiyar Afirka. Mansa Musa ya kuma fadada yankin daular kuma ya sake fasalin tsarin gudanarwa don inganta shi, yana ci gaba da mulki mai karfi. Ya tabbatar da wuraren hakar zinariya kuma ya kare hanyoyin kasuwanci, yana ci gaba da ci gaban tattalin arzikin daular. Duk da tasirin waje kamar faduwar farashin zinariya da ya faru a Masar a lokacin Hajjinsa, Mansa Musa ya yi amfani da suna na duniya da sabon ilimi da fasaha da ya samu don karfafa daularsa da kuma cimma ci gaban al'adu. Mulkarsa ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen sanya Daular Mali ta zama ba kawai kasa mai arziki ba, har ma da kasa mai karfi a fannin al'adu da ilimi.

Mulkarsa ta Mansa Musa ta kare a kimanin shekara ta 1337 da mutuwarsa, amma gadonsa ya yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin Yammacin Afirka. Ana tuna shi a matsayin mutumin da ya sanya Daular Mali a taswirar duniya kuma ya tabbatar da zamanin zinariya na wayewar Musulunci a nahiyar Afirka. Dukiyarsa mai yawa da sadaka mai karimci har yau ana magana a kai, kuma ana daukarsa daya daga cikin mutane mafi arziki a tarihi. Kokarinsa na taimakawa birane kamar Timbuktu su zama cibiyoyin ilimi da kasuwanci ya zama muhimmin tushe ga samar da asalin al'adun Yammacin Afirka. Labarin Mansa Musa ya nuna misalin shugabanci wanda ya wuce tara dukiya, amma ya yi amfani da wannan dukiya don ci gaban wayewa da ilimi da kuma ba da gudummawa ga bil'adama. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, Daular Mali ta ci gaba da bunkasa na wani lokaci, amma a hankali ta fara koma baya. Gadonsa na Mansa Musa har yau yana nuna babban tarihin Afirka, kuma ana kwatanta shi da sauran sarakunan duniyar Musulunci na zamaninsa, misali, sarakunan Daular Usmaniyya, yana karfafa bincike kan tallafin al'adunsu da hanyoyin gudanar da daula.
mansa-musa.trials: [ha] The primary struggles involved the lack of recognition for the Mali Empire's wealth and influence in the outside world, coupled with the challenge of effectively governing a vast territory and maintaining internal stability.
mansa-musa.overcoming: [ha] Strategic city building, securing trade routes, enhancing prestige through religious pilgrimage, and fostering scholarship and the arts led to the flourishing of the empire's influence and culture.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shaka zulu sarkin Zulu ne a Afirka ta Kudu a farkon ƙarni na 19, wanda ya gina Masarautar Zulu a matsayin ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta hanyar sabunta tsarin soja.
key_achievements: Sabunta tsarin soja na Zulu
Gabatar da ɗan gajeren mashi iklwa da dabarar 'ƙahoni na sa'
Haɗa kabilun da suka rabu zuwa Masarautar Zulu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Hazakarsa ta soja da gina ƙasa sun yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Afirka ta Kudu.

shaka-zulu.epic:
Shaka kaSenzangakhona, sarkin da ya mulki Masarautar Zulu daga 1816 zuwa 1828, mutum ne da ya canza yanayin siyasar Afirka ta Kudu har abada a farkon ƙarni na 19. Lokacin haihuwarsa ya kasance lokaci ne na hargitsi a yankin gabashin Afirka ta Kudu, inda ƙabilu da yawa suka rabu kuma suke fama da rikice-rikice marasa yankewa da fashi. An haife shi a kusan 1787 a matsayin ɗan shege na shugaba Senzangakhona, Shaka ya sha wahala tun yana yaro, an kore shi tare da mahaifiyarsa, kuma ya girma cikin ƙasƙanci da wahalhalu. Wannan yanayin ya bar masa rauni mai zurfi, amma kuma ya zama tushen gina ƙarfin juriya da jagoranci na musamman. Ya shiga ƙungiyar Mthethwa ƙarƙashin jagorancin Dingiswayo kuma ya fara fitowa fili a matsayin soja, inda ya sami suna cikin sauri saboda hazakarsa ta dabaru ta halitta da jaruntaka mai ban tsoro. Abubuwan da ya fuskanta a wannan lokacin sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen canza makomar Zulu a nan gaba. Ya fahimci buƙatar sabon tsari da ƙasa mai haɗin kai a cikin yanayin da rabuwar ƙabilu da fashi suka yi yawa.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Shaka ya zo ne a 1816, lokacin da ya gaji sarautar Zulu bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Senzangakhona. A lokacin, Zulu ƙabila ce kawai a cikin ƙungiyar Mthethwa, amma Shaka yana da babban hangen nesa na canza wannan ƙaramin ƙabila zuwa mafi girman ƙarfin soja a Afirka ta Kudu. Ya gudanar da manyan garambawul na soja waɗanda suka sabunta hanyoyin yaƙin ƙabilu na gargajiya. Babban abin da ke cikin wannan garambawul shine 'iklwa', ɗan gajeren mashi, da dabarar 'ƙahoni na sa'. Iklwa, sabanin mashin jifa na gargajiya, mashi ne gajere kuma mai kaifi wanda aka inganta don yaƙin kusa, yana iya haifar da mummunan rauni ga abokan gaba. Dabarar 'ƙahoni na sa' ta raba sojoji zuwa 'ƙirji' a tsakiya da 'ƙahoni' a gefe don kewaye da halaka abokan gaba, yana haɓaka motsi da ƙarfin halaka. Bugu da ƙari, ya haɓaka ƙarfin yaƙi na sojoji ta hanyar horo mai tsauri da ladabtarwa, kuma ya kafa raka'a bisa ga shekaru don haɓaka aminci. Wannan tsarin soja na zamani ya mai da Zulu zuwa runduna mai ƙarfin yaƙi mai ban tsoro, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen cin nasara da haɗa ƙabilun da ke kewaye.

Nasarorin soja na Shaka sun haifar da saurin faɗaɗa Masarautar Zulu, amma kuma sun haɗa da gwagwarmaya da wahalhalu marasa gujewa. A lokacin mulkinsa, yankin gabashin Afirka ta Kudu ya fuskanci lokacin ƙaura mai yawa da yaƙe-yaƙe tsakanin ƙabilu da ake kira 'Mfecane'. Mfecane yana nufin motsi da rikice-rikice na ƙabilun da ke kewaye sakamakon yaƙe-yaƙen cin nasara na Shaka, wanda ya girgiza rayuka da yawa. Shaka ya haɗa ƙabilun da aka ci nasara cikin Masarautar Zulu kuma ya aiwatar da manufar haɗa al'adunsu cikin al'adun Zulu. Duk da haka, mulkinsa ya cika da ingancin soja da ladabtarwa mai tsanani. An biya hukunci marar tausayi ga tawaye da rashin biyayya, kuma bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa, ya tilasta wa mutanensa lokacin makoki mara ma'ana. Waɗannan hanyoyin mulki na danniya sun haifar da rashin gamsuwa a ciki, kuma a ƙarshe ya fuskanci ƙarshe mai ban tausayi na kashe shi ƙarƙashin jagorancin 'yan uwansa maza, Dingane da Mhlangana. A watan Satumba na 1828, an kashe Shaka a cikin kraal ɗinsa, yana kawo ƙarshen mulkinsa na shekaru 12 mai gajere amma mai ƙarfi.

Ko da bayan mutuwar Shaka, Masarautar Zulu da ya kafa ta kasance mai ƙarfi a Afirka ta Kudu. Garambawul ɗinsa na soja da hanyoyin mulkinsa sun gaji ta sarakunan Zulu na gaba, suna nuna ƙarfin juriya a lokacin yaƙin Zulu da Birtaniya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. Shaka ba kawai mai cin nasara ba ne, amma ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin mai gina ƙasa wanda ya haɗa ƙabilun da suka rabu zuwa ƙasa mai ƙarfi kuma ya ba su sabon asalin ƙasa. Hazakarsa ta soja da jagorancinsa ana tunawa da shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan jarumai a tarihin Afirka. Duk da haka, bala'in Mfecane da kuma sadaukarwa marasa adadi da mulkinsa ya haifar suma wani ɓangare ne na gadonsa. A yau, ana girmama Shaka a matsayin mutum mai alama wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin da al'adun Afirka ta Kudu, kuma labarinsa yana ci gaba a matsayin labarin jaruntaka da gwagwarmaya. Ana iya kwatanta nasarorinsa da na sauran shugabannin Afirka waɗanda suka gina ƙasashe masu ƙarfi kuma suka yi adawa da mulkin mallaka, kamar Menelik na II.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ina horar da jarumaina ba da tsoro ba, sai dai da horo da ruhin da bai san shan kashi ba. Domin karfi na gaskiya yana fitowa daga ciki, wanda aka goge da kokari marar yankewa.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Wannan yana jaddada cewa ainihin karfi yana fitowa daga juriya ta ciki da ci gaba da inganta kai, ba daga matsalolin waje ba. Ku gina tunani mai juriya kuma ku himmatu ga ci gaba da bunkasa kai da sana'a don shawo kan kowace kalubale.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Kara guda daya takan karye, amma damin kara yana tsayawa da hadari. Haka ma mutanena za su kasance, hadin kai kuma ba za a karya su ba.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Wannan yana nuna babban karfi da ake samu a cikin hadin kai da aiki tare. A kowace kokari, inganta hadin gwiwa da hangen nesa tsakanin tawagarka ko al'ummarka yana haifar da karfi marar karyawa wanda zai iya jurewa kowace kalubale.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Hanyar zuwa girma an shimfida ta da kura na yaƙe-yaƙe marasa adadi da kuma nufin tashi sama. Ba na jagoranci da jin dadi ba, sai dai ta hanyar nuna hanya ta cikin hadari.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Jagoranci na gaskiya ya kunshi fuskantar kalubale kai tsaye da kuma zaburar da wasu ta hanyar juriyarka da azamarka. Ka rungumi koma baya a matsayin damar koyo kuma ka nuna azama marar yankewa, kana jagorantar tawagarka ta cikin matsaloli da jaruntaka da imani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi masanin lissafi ne na Farisa a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci a karni na 9, wanda ya tsara ilimin algebra kuma ya gabatar da ra'ayin algorithm.
key_achievements: Ya kafa algebra a matsayin fanni mai zaman kansa na ilimi
Ya yaɗa tsarin lambobi na Indo-Arabiya
Ya samar da asalin kalmar 'algorithm'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idodinsa na lissafi sun zama tushen kimiyyar kwamfuta da fasaha ta zamani, kuma sun yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban wayewar ɗan adam.

al-khwarizmi.epic:
Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi (kimanin 780 – kimanin 850) ya kasance masanin lissafi, taurari, da kuma yanayin kasa na Farisa a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci a karni na 9. Lokacin da ya yi rayuwa ya kasance zamanin kololuwar daular Abbasid, inda Baghdad ta zama cibiyar ilimi da al'adu, tana jawo hankalin malamai daga ko'ina cikin duniya. Musamman, 'Gidan Hikima' (Bayt al-Ḥikmah) wanda aka kafa a karkashin tallafin Khalif Al-Ma'mun, ya kasance babban cibiyar ilimi da ke fassara da bincike kan rubuce-rubucen kimiyya da falsafa na tsohuwar Girka, Indiya, da Farisa zuwa harshen Larabci. An san Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi ya fito daga Khwarazm, wanda a yau yake yankin Khiva a Uzbekistan, kuma a cikin wannan motsi na farfado da ilimi, ya koma Baghdad ya zama babban malami a Gidan Hikima. Ya nemi kayan aikin lissafi masu amfani don magance matsalolin zamantakewa da tattalin arziki masu rikitarwa na lokacin, yana kafa harsashin gina nasarori masu juyin juya hali waɗanda za su dore a tarihin tunanin ɗan adam. Wannan lokaci ya kasance fiye da tarin ilimi kawai; ya cika da kuzarin kirkire-kirkire wanda ya buɗe sabbin fannoni na ilimi da haɗa ilimin da ake da shi.

Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman nasarorin Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi shine tsara ilimin algebra. Ta hanyar littafinsa mai suna "Kitāb al-mukhtaṣar fī ḥisāb al-jabr wa’l-muqābala" (Littafin Takaitaccen Lissafta ta hanyar Haɗawa da Daidaitawa), ya kafa **Algebra** a matsayin wani fanni mai zaman kansa na lissafi, wanda ke magance hanyoyin warware ma'auni masu ɗauke da abubuwan da ba a sani ba. Kalmar 'al-jabr' da ke cikin taken littafin ta zama asalin kalmar 'algebra' a yau. A lokacin, mutane suna fuskantar matsaloli wajen warware matsaloli masu rikitarwa na rayuwa kamar gado, raba filaye, da ciniki, kuma Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi ya gabatar da hanyoyin gabaɗaya don nazari da warware waɗannan matsaloli a tsari. Ya bayyana ka'idoji da matakai bayyanannu don warware ma'auni na layi da na quadratic, kuma ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin 'al-jabr' (haɗawa/gyarawa) da 'al-muqābala' (daidaitawa) don nuna yadda ake sarrafa bangarorin ma'auni. Wannan ya buɗe sabon fage na tunanin lissafi mai zurfi, fiye da warware matsaloli kawai, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana lissafi da yawa daga baya.

Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi ya kuma taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yaɗa tsarin lambobi na Indo-Arabiya zuwa duniyar Musulunci da Turai. Wani littafinsa mai suna "Kitāb al-Jamʿ wa’l-Tafrīq bi-Ḥisāb al-Hind" (Littafin Haɗawa da Rarrabawa ta hanyar Lissafin Indiya) ya bayyana inganci da fifikon tsarin lambobi na decimal wanda ya haɗa da ra'ayin sifili. Wannan tsarin ya sauƙaƙa lissafi sosai idan aka kwatanta da lambobin Roman na gargajiya ko wasu tsarin lambobi, kuma musamman, gabatar da sifili ya faɗaɗa damar ayyukan lissafi ba tare da iyaka ba. Da farko, an sami juriya ga sabon tsarin lambobi, amma yayin da aka fahimci amfaninsa da ingancinsa, ya fara yaɗuwa. Ya kuma bayar da gudummawa mai mahimmanci a fannin ilimin taurari. Ya haɗa ilimin taurari na Indiya da Girka don ƙirƙirar teburin taurari mai suna "Sindhind," wanda daga baya ya yi tasiri sosai ga binciken taurari a duniyar Musulunci da Turai. A fannin yanayin ƙasa, ya gyara kuma ya inganta "Geography" na Ptolemy, yana ba da gudummawa ga ƙirƙirar taswirar duniya, don haka bincikensa na ilimi ya faɗaɗa fiye da lissafi zuwa fannoni daban-daban.

Nasarorin Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi sun yi tasiri mai girma ga wayewar zamani. Sunansa, ta hanyar 'Algorismi' na Latin, ya zama asalin kalmar **Algorithm**, wani muhimmin ra'ayi a kimiyyar kwamfuta ta zamani, wanda ke nufin jerin matakai ko ka'idoji don warware wata matsala. Littafinsa na algebra an fassara shi zuwa Latin a karni na 12 kuma an gabatar da shi ga Turai, wanda ya zama babban mai haɓaka ci gaban lissafi a Turai ta tsakiya. Yaɗuwar tsarin lambobi na Indo-Arabiya da tsarin decimal ya kawo juyin juya hali a lissafi a duk fannoni kamar kasuwanci, kimiyya, da injiniyanci. Daga kwamfutoci, wayoyin hannu, har zuwa tsarin kuɗi masu rikitarwa da muke amfani da su a yau, ka'idodinsa na lissafi da hanyar tunaninsa sun zama tushen fasahar zamani. Muhammad Ibn Musa Alkhwarizmi ya kasance jagora na gaskiya wanda ya ƙirƙiri sabbin fannoni na ilimi kuma ya canza hanyar tunanin ɗan adam, fiye da isar da ilimi kawai. Gadonsa ya kasance wani muhimmin alama a tarihin tunanin ɗan adam, tare da sauran manyan malamai na zamanin zinariya na Musulunci, kamar Ibn Sina da Al-Biruni.

fact_box.one_line_summary: B. R. Ambedkar masanin shari'a ne kuma mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa na Indiya a karni na 20, wanda ya tsara kundin tsarin mulkin Indiya kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga 'yantar da waɗanda ba a taɓa ba.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Shugaban Kwamitin Tsara Kundin Tsarin Mulkin Indiya
Ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar inganta haƙƙoƙin waɗanda ba a taɓa ba (Dalits)
Ya musulunta zuwa addinin Buddha tare da dubban daruruwan mabiyansa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa na daidaito sun yi tasiri sosai ga al'ummar Indiya, kuma suna ba da ilhami ga gwagwarmayar adalci na zamantakewa a duk faɗin duniya.

br-ambedkar.epic:
B. R. Ambedkar masanin shari'a ne, masanin tattalin arziki, mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa, kuma shugaban siyasa na Indiya wanda aka haife shi a shekara ta 1891, wanda ya tsara kundin tsarin mulkin Indiya mai cin gashin kansa kuma ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa don inganta haƙƙoƙin Dalits (waɗanda ba a taɓa ba). A ƙarshen karni na 19, Indiya a ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya ta fuskanci rashin daidaito na zamantakewa saboda tsarin kasta mai zurfi. Musamman, ajin Dalit, waɗanda ake kira 'waɗanda ba a taɓa ba', an bi da su a matsayin ƙasa da mutane kuma an hana su haƙƙoƙi na asali. B. R. Ambedkar ya fito ne daga wannan kasta ta Mahar, an haife shi a Mhow, jihar Madhya Pradesh ta yanzu, kuma ya fuskanci tsananin nuna bambanci da wulakanci tun yana yaro. A makaranta ma, dole ne ya zauna daban da sauran ɗalibai, kuma an takaita masa amfani da wuraren jama'a. Duk da haka, a cikin waɗannan matsaloli, ya haɓaka babban sha'awar ilimi, kuma iyalinsa sun sadaukar da kansu don iliminsa. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fuskanta tun farko sun zama wani muhimmin dalili da ya sa ya sami ƙarfin hali na kawo sauyi mai zurfi a tsarin zamantakewar Indiya a nan gaba. Ya yi imani cewa ilimi ne kawai zai iya 'yantar da waɗanda ake zalunta.

Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta sanya B. R. Ambedkar a sahun gaba na gwagwarmayar kawo sauyi a zamantakewar Indiya. Ya sami tallafin karatu daga Masarautar Baroda, inda ya yi karatun tattalin arziki, kimiyyar siyasa, da shari'a a Jami'ar Columbia da ke Amurka da kuma Makarantar Tattalin Arziki da Kimiyyar Siyasa ta London a Burtaniya, yana zurfafa bincike kan ra'ayoyin sassaucin ra'ayi na Yamma da ka'idodin dimokuradiyya. Musamman, ya sami digirin digirgir a fannin shari'a a London, inda ya kafa harsashin aikinsa na lauya. Bayan ya dawo Indiya a farkon shekarun 1920, ya fara gwagwarmaya mai tsanani don yaƙar rashin adalci na tsarin kasta wanda ya mamaye al'ummar Indiya a lokacin. Tsarin kasta wani tsari ne na zamantakewa wanda ya raba Indiya zuwa manyan matakai huɗu: Brahmin, Kshatriya, Vaishya, da Shudra, kuma ya ɗauki Dalits, waɗanda ke waje da waɗannan matakan, a matsayin mafi ƙasƙanci. A shekara ta 1927, B. R. Ambedkar ya jagoranci Mahad Satyagraha, inda ya yi kira ga Dalits su sami damar amfani da ruwan rijiyar jama'a, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a gwagwarmayar haƙƙoƙin Dalit. Ya kuma buga jaridu kamar 'Mooknayak' don wakiltar muryoyin Dalits, kuma a shekara ta 1936, ya kafa Independent Labour Party don faɗaɗa tasirinsa na siyasa. Ayyukansa sun zama fitilar bege ga mutane da yawa da ake zalunta.

A lokacin da Indiya ke gab da samun 'yancin kai, B. R. Ambedkar ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa harsashin sabuwar ƙasa. Bayan Indiya ta sami 'yancin kai a shekara ta 1947, an naɗa shi Ministan Shari'a na farko, kuma ba da daɗewa ba aka ba shi babban nauyin shugabancin Kwamitin Tsara Kundin Tsarin Mulkin Indiya. Wannan kwamiti yana da alhakin tsara kundin tsarin mulki wanda zai yanke shawarar makomar Indiya mai cin gashin kanta. Ya fuskanci adawa da matsaloli da yawa a lokacin tsara kundin tsarin mulkin, amma ya yi gwagwarmaya da jajircewa don tabbatar da daidaito da adalci ga dukkan 'yan ƙasa, musamman don sanya tanade-tanade a cikin kundin tsarin mulkin da za su soke tsarin waɗanda ba a taɓa ba a bisa doka da kuma hana nuna bambanci. Sakamakon ƙoƙarinsa, kundin tsarin mulkin Indiya ya haɗa da tanade-tanade da ke hana kowane nau'i na nuna bambanci, kuma ya ba da kariya ta musamman da dama ga waɗanda ba su da galihu a cikin al'umma. Wannan wani gagarumin nasara ne wanda ya karya sarƙoƙin tsarin kasta wanda ya daɗe shekaru dubbai, kuma ya kafa harsashin doka don dukkan Indiyawa su rayu a matsayin 'yan ƙasa masu daidaiton mutunci. A shekara ta 1956, ya musulunta zuwa addinin Buddha tare da dubban daruruwan mabiyansa, yana neman sabuwar 'yanci ta ruhaniya daga sarƙoƙin tsarin kasta na Hindu.

Gadon B. R. Ambedkar ya zurfafa a cikin al'ummar Indiya a yau, kuma ra'ayoyinsa har yanzu ana tattaunawa sosai. Ana kiransa 'Uban Kundin Tsarin Mulkin Indiya', kuma kundin tsarin mulkin da ya tsara ya zama ginshiƙin dimokuradiyya da adalci na zamantakewa a Indiya. Gwagwarmayarsa don soke tsarin waɗanda ba a taɓa ba da kuma tabbatar da haƙƙin daidaito ya zama tushen ilhami ga inganta haƙƙoƙin waɗanda ba su da galihu a cikin al'umma, ba kawai a Indiya ba har ma a duk faɗin duniya. Gwagwarmayarsa ta musulunta zuwa addinin Buddha ta ba wa al'ummar Dalit sabon asali da daraja, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga yanayin addini da zamantakewa na Indiya. Ra'ayoyin B. R. Ambedkar sun jaddada muhimmancin ilimi, daidaito na zamantakewa, da mutuncin mutum, kuma sun zama muhimmin jagora wajen neman mafita ga matsalolin da al'ummar Indiya ta zamani ke fuskanta. Ra'ayoyinsa sun bi wata hanya daban wajen neman sauyi a zamantakewa idan aka kwatanta da sauran masu gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai na Indiya na zamaninsa, kamar Mahatma Gandhi, kuma har yau suna haifar da muhawara daban-daban a cikin al'ummar Indiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Chandragupta Maurya, sarkin Indiya na da wanda ya haɗa kai a ƙarshen ƙarni na 4 K.Z., ya kafa daular Maurya kuma ya haɗa kan nahiyar Indiya.
key_achievements: Kafa daular Maurya da haɗa kan Indiya
Hambarar da daular Nanda da karɓar iko
Kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Seleucus I
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa harsashin ci gaban wayewar tsohuwar Indiya kuma ya kasance alamar haɗin kan Indiya.

chandragupta-maurya.epic:
Chandragupta Maurya, babban sarkin Indiya na da wanda ya haɗa kai kuma wanda ya kafa daular Maurya, ya yi aiki a ƙarshen ƙarni na 4 K.Z. A lokacin, Indiya tana fuskantar lokaci mai cike da rudani, wanda aka yi masa alama da hargitsi sakamakon mamayar Alexander Mai Girma da kuma rarrabuwar kawunan ƙananan masarautu da yawa. Musamman a Arewacin Indiya, daular Nanda mai ƙarfi tana riƙe da iko a yankin Magadha, amma mulkinsu na zalunci yana ƙara haifar da rashin gamsuwa a tsakanin jama'a. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an san Chandragupta a matsayin wanda ya fito daga ƙasƙantaccen asali, kuma duk da cewa bayanan yarintarsa ba su da tabbas, ana kyautata zaton ya haɓaka ƙarfin hali da basira na musamman a cikin yanayi mai wahala. Ya kafa harsashin zama mutumin da ke wakiltar burin jama'a na sabon tsari a cikin yanayi mai cike da rudani. Fitowarsa ba kawai nasarar mutum ɗaya ba ce, amma ta nuna farkon wani muhimmin canji na tarihi wanda ya sanar da haɗin kai ga nahiyar Indiya da ta rarrabu. A wannan lokacin, Indiya tana buƙatar sabon jagoranci a cikin barazanar waje da rikice-rikicen cikin gida, kuma Chandragupta shine mutumin da ya amsa kiran zamanin.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Chandragupta shine haɗuwarsa da Chanakya (wanda kuma aka sani da Kautilya), babban mai dabaru da ɗan siyasa na zamaninsa. Chanakya ya fusata da zaluncin daular Nanda kuma yana da babban burin hambarar da su da kuma nemo shugaba mai iyawa don haɗa kan Indiya. Ya gane basirar Chandragupta tun yana yaro kuma ya ɗauke shi a matsayin almajirinsa, yana koya masa duk halayen da sarki ke buƙata, kamar siyasa, soja, da diflomasiyya. A ƙarƙashin jagorancin Chanakya, Chandragupta ya haɓaka ƙwarewar sojansa kuma ya shirya ƙaramin sojoji don fuskantar daular Nanda. Da farko, ya fuskanci gazawa da takaici da yawa, amma dabarun Chanakya masu hikima da jajircewar Chandragupta sun yi nasara a ƙarshe. Ya fara mamaye yankunan arewa maso yamma da ke cikin rudani bayan janyewar Alexander Mai Girma, kuma a ƙarshe, a kusan 322 K.Z., ya yi nasarar mamaye Pataliputra, babban birnin daular Nanda mai ƙarfi, kuma ya kawo ƙarshen daular Nanda. Ta haka, Chandragupta ya kafa daular Maurya, daular farko da ta haɗa kai a tsohuwar Indiya.

Bayan hambarar da daular Nanda da kafa daular Maurya, Chandragupta ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya don tabbatar da zaman lafiya da faɗaɗa daularsa. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan ƙalubalensa shine fuskantar Seleucus I Nicator, ɗaya daga cikin magajin Alexander Mai Girma. Seleucus I ya yi ƙoƙarin dawo da yankunan Indiya da Alexander ya ci, kuma a kusan 305 K.Z., ya yi karo da daular Maurya ta Chandragupta. Wannan yaƙin ya ci gaba tsawon shekaru, amma a ƙarshe, saboda fifikon sojan Chandragupta da ƙwarewar dabarunsa, Seleucus I ya ba da shawarar yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya. A ƙarƙashin wannan yarjejeniya, Seleucus I ya ba da manyan yankuna a yammacin kogin Indus (ciki har da Paropamisadae, Arachosia, Gedrosia, da Oreitai) ga daular Maurya, kuma a madadin haka, ya karɓi giwaye 500 daga Chandragupta. Wannan nasarar diflomasiyya ta tabbatar da iyakokin yammacin daular Maurya kuma ta ɗaukaka matsayin daular a duniya. Chandragupta, ta hanyar nuna ƙwarewar soja da diflomasiyya, ya gina babban daula wanda ya haɗa da dukkan Arewacin Indiya da wani ɓangare na tsakiyar Indiya, kuma ya mulki daular yadda ya kamata ta hanyar kafa tsarin gudanarwa mai ƙarfi da tsakiya wanda ya dogara ga littafin Chanakya na ka'idar siyasa, "Arthashastra."

Chandragupta Maurya ya bar alama mai ɗorewa a tarihin tsohuwar Indiya. Ta hanyar kafa daular Maurya, daular farko mai girma da ta haɗa kai a nahiyar Indiya da ta rarrabu, ya kafa harsashin ci gaban wayewar Indiya a nan gaba. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Indiya ta sami zaman lafiya na siyasa da wadata ta tattalin arziki, wanda ya haifar da ci gaban al'adu da fasaha. Musamman, falsafar mulkinsa da tsarin gudanarwarsa sun zama muhimmin misali ga daulolin Indiya na gaba, kuma "Arthashastra" na Chanakya har yanzu ana nazarin shi a matsayin babban aiki da ke wakiltar tunanin siyasa na tsohuwar Indiya. An ce Chandragupta ya bar gadon sarauta ga ɗansa Bindusara a ƙarshen rayuwarsa kuma ya koma Jainism, inda ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa ta hanyar azumi (Sallekhana). Wannan zaɓinsa ya nuna wani fanni na tunanin tsohuwar Indiya wanda ke neman ƙimar ruhaniya sama da ikon duniya. A yau, ana tuna Chandragupta Maurya a matsayin alamar asalin ƙasar Indiya da haɗin kai, kuma labarinsa ya kasance misali na babban sarki wanda ya buɗe sabon zamani tare da jagoranci mai ƙarfi a cikin rudani. Nasarorinsa sun kafa harsashin daulolin Indiya na gaba da suka haɗa kai, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga mulkin manyan magada kamar Ashoka Mai Girma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Omar Khayyam masanin lissafi ne, masanin taurari, masanin falsafa, kuma mawaki na Farisa na ƙarni na 11, wanda ya tabbatar da ka'idar binomial kuma ya bar Rubaiyat.
key_achievements: Tabbatar da ka'idar binomial da ci gaban algebra
Binciken ilimin taurari da ayyukan lura
Rubuta tarin waƙoƙin quatrain 'Rubaiyat'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Basirarsa ta lissafi da waƙoƙinsa na falsafa suna ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai ga kimiyya da adabi a duk tsawon zamani.

omar-khayyam.epic:
Omar Khayyam (an haife shi a shekara ta 1048) wani babban masanin lissafi, masanin taurari, masanin falsafa, marubuci, kuma mawaki ne na Farisa wanda ya yi aiki daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 11 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 12. Lokacin da aka haife shi shine zamanin zinariya na wayewar Musulunci a fannin ilimi da fasaha, musamman a ƙarƙashin Daular Seljuk, inda Farisa ta bunƙasa a matsayin cibiyar ayyukan ilimi. An haife shi a Nishapur, Khayyam ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban kamar lissafi, ilimin taurari, da falsafa tun yana ƙarami, kuma ya nuna basira mai ban mamaki a ƙarƙashin jagorancin manyan malamai na zamaninsa. Sunansa 'Khayyam' yana nufin 'mai yin tanti', wanda ke nuna cewa kakanninsa sun yi wannan sana'a, amma shi ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga binciken ilimi. Ya yi tafiye-tafiye tsakanin manyan biranen ilimi kamar Bukhara da Samarkand, yana binciken ilimi, yana ba da gudummawa ga fassarar da haɓaka gadon ilimi na tsohuwar Girka zuwa Larabci, kuma yana ƙarfafa tushen ilimi na duniyar Musulunci. Wannan tushen ilimi a wannan lokacin ya zama ginshiƙin manyan nasarorin da zai cimma daga baya.

Shaharar ilimin Khayyam ba da daɗewa ba ta kai ga Sarkin Seljuk Malik-Shah I. Sarkin ya gayyace shi zuwa Isfahan don jagorantar ginin gidan lura da taurari, inda Khayyam ya nutsa cikin binciken ilimin taurari kuma ya tattara muhimman bayanai na lura. Ya yi nazarin ilimin taurari da ke akwai tare da suka, kuma ta hanyar lura daidai, ya gabatar da buƙatar sabon gyaran kalanda. Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman nasarorin lissafinsa a wannan lokacin shine tabbatar da **ka'idar binomial**. Wannan wata dabara ce don gano ma'auni da ake buƙata don faɗaɗa maganganun algebra na nau'in (x+y)^n, kuma ya kasance hujja mai mahimmanci na basirarsa a fannin algebra. Khayyam ya yi ƙoƙarin sabbin hanyoyin lissafi na zamani, kamar binciken hanyoyin warware ma'auni na cubic ta amfani da hanyoyin geometric. Duk da haka, rayuwarsa ba kawai cike take da nasarorin ilimi ba. Rikicin siyasa mai sarkakiya na rayuwar fada da shakku game da koyarwar addini sun haifar da zurfin rikici a cikin zuciyarsa, wanda daga baya ya yi tasiri sosai ga duniyar waƙoƙinsa.

Bayan mutuwar Malik-Shah I da babban waziri Nizam al-Mulk, Khayyam ya rasa manyan masu goyon bayansa kuma ya fuskanci gwaje-gwaje na rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa da raguwar ilimi. Gidan lura da taurari na Isfahan a hankali ya rasa goyon baya, kuma Khayyam ya koma Nishapur, inda ya nutsa cikin bincike mai zurfi na falsafa. A wannan lokacin ne basirarsa ta adabi ta bunƙasa, inda ya bayyana zurfin tunaninsa da ra'ayinsa game da rayuwa ta hanyar tarin waƙoƙin quatrain da ake kira **Rubaiyat**. Rubaiyat tana rera waƙar rashin dawwamar rayuwa, makomar da ba za a iya kauce mata ba, shakku game da koyarwar addini, da farin ciki da hikimar da ake samu a cikin ɗan gajeren lokaci. Ko da a cikin tsauraran ka'idojin ɗabi'a na al'ummar Musulunci, ya yabi giya da soyayya, da kuma jin daɗin yanzu, yana nuna ainihin baƙin ciki na ɗan adam da sha'awar 'yanci. Ko da yake irin waɗannan maganganun waƙa wani lokaci ana fahimtar su ba daidai ba a cikin yanayin ra'ayin mazan jiya na lokacin, waƙoƙinsa sun wuce zamani, sun zama saƙo mai ƙarfi wanda ke wakiltar ainihin hankalin ɗan adam da binciken ilimi.

A ranar 4 ga Disamba, 1131, Omar Khayyam ya rasu, yana kammala doguwar tafiyarsa ta ilimi. Bayan mutuwarsa, nasarorinsa a fannin lissafi da ilimin taurari an manta da su na ɗan lokaci ko kuma an danganta su ga wasu malamai. Duk da haka, a tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, lokacin da mawakin Ingila Edward FitzGerald ya fassara Rubaiyat ɗinsa zuwa Turanci kuma ya gabatar da shi ga duniyar Yamma, an sake haskaka Khayyam a matsayin babban marubuci kuma masanin falsafa na duniya. Waƙoƙinsa sun gabatar da tambayoyi na duniya game da iyakokin rayuwa da ma'anar wanzuwa, suna haifar da zurfin fahimta ga masu karatu marasa adadi. A yau, ana tuna Khayyam ba kawai a matsayin malami ba, amma a matsayin mutumin Renaissance na gaskiya, wanda ya haɗa hankali na kimiyya da hankali na waƙa. Basirarsa ta lissafi ta ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban kimiyya ta zamani, kuma waƙoƙinsa sun kasance saƙo marar mutuwa wanda ke motsa ran ɗan adam. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa ana kwatanta su da sawun sauran manyan malamai kamar Ibn Sina, waɗanda suka nemi daidaito tsakanin hikima da imani a duniyar Musulunci ta wannan zamani, suna barin gadon ilimi marar lokaci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: J. Robert Oppenheimer wani masanin kimiyyar lissafi ne na Amurka a tsakiyar karni na 20 wanda ya jagoranci Manhattan Project don haɓaka bom ɗin atom.
key_achievements: Darektan Los Alamos Laboratory na Manhattan Project
Jagorancin ci gaban bom ɗin atom na farko a duniya
Adawa da kera bom ɗin hydrogen da korar shi daga muƙaman gwamnati
fact_box.legacy_statement: Nasarorinsa sun buɗe sabon zamani na nukiliya kuma sun bar tambaya ta har abada game da alhakin ɗa'a na masana kimiyya.

robert-oppenheimer.epic:
J. Robert Oppenheimer (an haife shi a shekara ta 1904), wani masanin kimiyyar lissafi ne na Amurka wanda ya rayu a cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani a karni na 20, ya zama alamar dangantakar da ke tsakanin kimiyya da da'a, inda ya jagoranci ci gaban makami mafi lalata a tarihin ɗan adam. An haife shi a New York a shekara ta 1904, ya girma a cikin yanayi mai wadata da ilimi, inda ya nuna hazakarsa ta kimiyya tun yana ƙarami. Bayan ya kammala karatunsa na Chemistry a Jami'ar Harvard, ya tafi Turai don yin zurfin bincike a fannin kimiyyar lissafi a ƙarƙashin manyan masana kimiyyar quantum a jami'o'i kamar Jami'ar Cambridge da Jami'ar Göttingen. Wannan lokaci ne da sabbin hanyoyin kimiyyar lissafi ke buɗewa a Turai, kuma Oppenheimer ya bincika ilimi a tsakiyar wannan fannin na zamani, yana gina tushen iliminsa na musamman. Bayan ya dawo Amurka, ya yi aiki na dogon lokaci a matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar California, Berkeley, inda ya samar da sakamakon bincike mai ban mamaki tare da horar da ɗalibai da yawa, kuma ya kafa kansa a matsayin masanin kimiyya mai daraja a fannin kimiyyar lissafi. A wannan lokacin, bincikensa ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban kimiyyar quantum da kimiyyar nukiliya.

Amma rayuwarsa ta ɗauki wani sabon salo da ba a zata ba tare da barkewar Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu. Yayin da damuwa game da yiwuwar Jamus ta Nazi ta haɓaka makaman nukiliya ke ƙaruwa, Amurka ta fara wani aiki na sirri don tinkarar hakan, wanda aka fi sani da Manhattan Project. Manhattan Project wani aiki ne na bincike da ci gaba na sirri wanda ƙasashen haɗin gwiwa suka gudanar a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu don haɓaka bom ɗin atom. A shekara ta 1942, an naɗa Oppenheimer a matsayin darektan Los Alamos National Laboratory, cibiyar wannan babban aiki. Ya jagoranci manyan masana kimiyya da injiniyoyi da aka tattara daga ko'ina cikin duniya don fuskantar wani yanki da ɗan adam bai taɓa gani ba. Tare da zurfin fahimtarsa a matsayin masanin kimiyyar lissafi da kuma jagoranci mai kyau, ya daidaita ayyukan bincike masu rikitarwa kuma ya shawo kan matsalolin fasaha da yawa, yana jagorantar ci gaban bom ɗin atom. A cikin wani dakin bincike na sirri da aka gina a tsakiyar hamada, ya sadaukar da kansa ga bincike dare da rana, yana mai da duk abin da yake da shi don kawo babban ƙarfin da zai canza makomar ɗan adam zuwa gaskiya. Wannan tsari ya kasance babban ƙalubale na kimiyya a gare shi kuma a lokaci guda farkon zurfin gwagwarmayar ɗa'a.

Bayan shekaru da yawa na bincike mai tsanani, a ranar 16 ga Yuli, 1945, an yi nasarar gwajin Trinity, gwajin nukiliya na farko a tarihin ɗan adam, a hamadar Alamogordo, New Mexico. Wannan fashewa ta kasance nasarar kimiyya da Oppenheimer da tawagarsa suka cimma, amma a lokaci guda kuma lokaci ne da aka bai wa ɗan adam ƙarfin lalata da ba a taɓa gani ba. Bayan haka, an jefa bama-baman atom a Hiroshima da Nagasaki a Japan, wanda ya kawo ƙarshen Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu, amma Oppenheimer ya ji laifi mai zurfi game da babban asarar rayuka da lalacewar da makamin da ya ƙirƙira ya haifar. Bayan yaƙin, ya yi kira da a sarrafa makaman nukiliya sosai kuma ya yi kira ga al'ummar duniya da su hana yaɗuwar nukiliya. Amma da zuwan lokacin Yaƙin Cacar Baki, manufofin nukiliya na Amurka sun zama masu tsauri, kuma a shekara ta 1950, lokacin da ya nuna adawa da kera bom ɗin hydrogen, ya fuskanci gwagwarmayar siyasa. A ƙarshe, an kore shi daga dukkan muƙaman gwamnati saboda ana zarginsa da goyon bayan gurguzu, kuma an soke izinin tsaron sa. Wannan ya kasance gwagwarmaya mai ban tausayi na masanin kimiyya wanda ya yi gwagwarmaya tsakanin lamirin kimiyya da babban dalilin tsaron ƙasa, kuma wani taron alama ne da ke nuna babban tasirin rikice-rikicen akida na lokacin Yaƙin Cacar Baki a rayuwar mutum.

Rayuwar J. Robert Oppenheimer tana nuna matsalar da ba ta ƙarewa ba tsakanin hazakar kimiyya da alhakin ɗa'a. Ya bar gadon da ke da rikitarwa na "mahaifin bom ɗin atom," kuma nasarorinsa sun buɗe sabon zamani na nukiliya ga ɗan adam kuma sun haifar da gasar makaman nukiliya a duk duniya. Ana tuna sunansa tare da ƙarfin lalata na makaman nukiliya a matsayin gargaɗi game da yiwuwar haɗarin da ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha zai iya kawowa ga ɗan adam. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, ba a dawo da martabarsa gaba ɗaya ba, amma gudummawarsa ta kimiyya da ƙoƙarinsa na sarrafa makaman nukiliya suna ci gaba da zaburar da mutane da yawa har zuwa yau. Rayuwarsa tana da alaƙa sosai da gwagwarmayar ɗa'a da sauran masana kimiyya da suka shiga cikin ci gaban makaman nukiliya suka fuskanta, kamar Albert Einstein, kuma tana ci gaba da haifar da tattaunawa game da alhakin zamantakewa na masana kimiyya. Labarin Oppenheimer yana gabatar da tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da yadda ɗan adam ya kamata ya yi amfani da kimiyya da fasaha, yana buƙatar zurfin tunani daga tsararraki na yanzu da na gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Saladin wani Sultan ne na Kurdawa a Gabas ta Tsakiya a karni na 12, wanda ya kafa Daular Ayyubid kuma ya kwato Urushalima.
key_achievements: Kafa Daular Ayyubid da haɗin kan Musulunci
Nasara a Yakin Hattin, da kwato Urushalima
Fuskantar Richard na Farko a Yakin Salibiyya na Uku
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta mulkin adalci da haƙuri, wanda ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga Musulunci da Yamma.

saladin.epic:
Saladin (Salah ad-Din Yusuf ibn Ayyub, an haife shi kusan shekara ta 1137) wani maɗaukakin Sultan ne na Kurdawa kuma wanda ya kafa Daular Ayyubid, wanda ya haɗa kan duniyar Musulunci a ƙarshen karni na 12 kuma ya yi yaƙi da Yaƙin Salibiyya. Gabas ta Tsakiya a karni na 12, lokacin da aka haife shi, zamanin hargitsi ne na siyasa da addini. Bayan Yaƙin Salibiyya na Farko, masarautun Salibiyya da dama, ciki har da Masarautar Urushalima, sun kafa kansu a yankin Levant, kuma duniyar Musulunci ta rabu zuwa ƙananan jihohi da yawa saboda rarrabuwar Daular Saljuk. A cikin wannan hargitsi, al'ummar Musulunci ba ta iya mayar da martani yadda ya kamata ga barazanar waje ba, kuma a cikin gida, rikicin tsakanin Shi'a da Sunna ya yi zurfi. An haifi Saladin a Tikrit, Mesopotamiya, a cikin wani gidan soja na Kurdawa, kuma kawunsa, Shirkuh, shugaban soja ne mai daraja. Tun yana yaro, ya himmatu ga horon soja da kuma karatun Musulunci, musamman Alkur'ani da Hadisi, yana kafa harsashin zama mutum mai hankali da jarumtaka. Wannan tarihin ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen jagorantar haɗin kai da kare duniyar Musulunci daga baya. 

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Saladin shi ne karɓar mulki a Masar da kuma kafa Daular Ayyubid. Tare da kawunsa Shirkuh, ya shiga cikin yakin basasa na Daular Fatimid ta Masar don dakile sojojin Salibiyya, kuma a shekara ta 1169, ya gaji Shirkuh ya zama Wazirin Masar. A lokacin, Masar tana ƙarƙashin mulkin Daular Fatimid ta Shi'a, amma Saladin ya goyi bayan farfaɗo da Musulunci Sunna, ya soke Halifancin Fatimid a shekara ta 1171 kuma ya sanya Masar a ƙarƙashin ikon Halifancin Abbasid. Ta haka, ya zama mai mulkin Masar na gaskiya kuma ya kafa Daular Ayyubid mai ɗauke da sunansa. Daular Ayyubid ta kasance ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta Musulunci Sunna wacce ta haɗa da Masar, Siriya, Yemen, da Hejaz, kuma ta zama babban ƙarfi a duniyar Musulunci da ke adawa da Yaƙin Salibiyya. Saladin ya sanya haɗin kan Masar da Siriya a matsayin fifiko na farko, wanda shawarar dabara ce don haɗa kan sojojin Musulunci da suka rabu don fuskantar maƙiyi ɗaya, wato Yaƙin Salibiyya, yadda ya kamata. Waɗannan ƙoƙarinsa sun zama wata dama ta kawo sabon bege ga duniyar Musulunci. 

Bayan ya haɗa kan Masar da Siriya, Saladin ya shirya don cikakken yaƙi da Yaƙin Salibiyya. A ranar 4 ga Yuli, 1187, a Yakin Hattin kusa da Tafkin Galili, ya murkushe babban sojan Masarautar Urushalima, inda ya yi wa Yaƙin Salibiyya mummunan rauni. Wannan yaƙin ya raunana ƙarfin soja na masarautun Salibiyya kuma an rubuta shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin nasarori mafi girma da muhimmanci a tarihin Musulunci. Bayan nasarar Yakin Hattin, Saladin ya kwato biranen da Yaƙin Salibiyya suka mamaye da sauri da ƙarfi, kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 2 ga Oktoba, 1187, ya kwato Urushalima bayan shekaru 88 na mulkin Salibiyya. A lokacin kwato Urushalima, Saladin ya nuna juriya da tausayi ga Kiristoci, inda ya ba su izinin barin birnin lafiya, wanda ya bambanta da kisan kiyashin da aka yi a lokacin mamayar Yaƙin Salibiyya na Farko, kuma hakan ya ɗaukaka matsayinsa na ɗabi'a mai girma. Labarin kwato Urushalima ya girgiza Turai sosai, kuma hakan ya haifar da barkewar Yaƙin Salibiyya na Uku. Yaƙin Salibiyya karkashin jagorancin Richard na Farko na Ingila da Saladin sun yi faɗa sau da yawa, ciki har da Yakin Arsuf, amma babu wanda ya sami nasara mai muhimmanci, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1192, an cimma yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya ta Yarjejeniyar Ramla, inda Urushalima ta kasance ƙarƙashin mulkin Musulunci kuma aka ba da izinin ziyara ga mahajjata Kirista. 

A ranar 4 ga Maris, 1193, shekara guda bayan Yarjejeniyar Ramla, Saladin ya mutu saboda rashin lafiya a Dimashƙu. Bayan mutuwarsa, Daular Ayyubid ta rabu, amma haɗin kan duniyar Musulunci da ruhun juriya ga Yaƙin Salibiyya da ya kafa sun ci gaba na dogon lokaci. Saladin ba kawai mai nasara a soja ba ne, ana tuna shi a matsayin mutum wanda ya shawo kan rarrabuwar kai a duniyar Musulunci kuma ya yi ƙoƙari ya tabbatar da mulkin adalci da haƙuri. Musamman, juriya da ya nuna a lokacin kwato Urushalima an girmama shi har ma a cikin duniya ta Yamma mai adawa, kuma an ɗauke shi a matsayin misali mafi kyau na jarumtaka ta zamanin da. Ana girmama shi sosai a matsayin jarumi kuma mai kare duniyar Musulunci, kuma har yau, ya kasance fitaccen alama na ƙasar Larabawa da ƙungiyoyin farfaɗo da Musulunci. Labarinsa yana tunatar da mu muhimmancin hikima, jarumtaka, da jagoranci na ɗabi'a da shugaba ke buƙata a cikin zamanin hargitsi. Rayuwar Saladin tana kwatanta da ta jarumai Musulunci na baya kamar Baybars na Farko, wanda ya kare wayewar Musulunci daga mamayar Mongol, kuma yana sa mu yi tunani kan rawar da suka taka a tarihi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Srinivasa Ramanujan wani hazikin masanin lissafi ne mai koyar da kai daga Indiya a farkon karni na 20, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai juyin juya hali ga ka'idar lambobi da jerin marasa iyaka.
key_achievements: Gudummawa ta asali ga ka'idar lambobi, jerin marasa iyaka, da ci gaba da juzu'i
An karɓe shi a duniyar lissafi ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa tare da G.H. Hardy
Gano zurfin ra'ayoyin lissafi kamar ayyukan mock theta
fact_box.legacy_statement: Littattafansa da dabaru da ba a buga ba sun ci gaba da buɗe sabbin fannoni na lissafi da kuma ba da gudummawa ga kimiyyar zamani har bayan mutuwarsa.

srinivasa-ramanujan.epic:
Srinivasa Ramanujan (1887-1920) wani babban masanin lissafi ne kuma hazikin koyar da kai daga Indiya a farkon karni na 20. An haife shi a Erode, Tamil Nadu, Indiya, a karkashin mulkin Birtaniya, ya nuna basira ta musamman ga lambobi tun yana yaro duk da tsananin talauci. Duk da rashin samun cikakken ilimi na yau da kullun, ya karanta littattafan lissafi da kansa kuma ya gano ka'idoji da dabaru marasa adadi ta hanyarsa ta musamman. Musamman, ya kware a littafin lissafi na ɗaliban jami'a yana ɗan shekara 11, kuma yana ɗan shekara 16, ya ci karo da littafin G.S. Carr mai suna 'Synopsis of Elementary Results in Pure and Applied Mathematics,' wanda ya haɓaka basirarsa ta lissafi sosai. Wannan littafi ya zama mai haɓaka masa, yana ƙarfafa shi ya samo dubban ka'idoji da dabaru da kansa, kuma littattafansa sun fara cika da ra'ayoyi na asali waɗanda daga baya za su girgiza duniyar lissafi. Bincikensa na farko ya fi mayar da hankali kan ka'idar lambobi, jerin marasa iyaka, da ci gaba da juzu'i.

Basirar Srinivasa Ramanujan ta kasance da wuya a fahimta gaba ɗaya a cikin al'ummar ilimi na Indiya a lokacin. Saboda bai sami ilimin lissafi na Yamma da ake buƙata don tabbatar da abubuwan da ya gano ba, sakamakonsa galibi ana gabatar da su ne a cikin tsari mai ma'ana da kuma mara tsari. Wannan ya sa ya fuskanci wahala wajen samun karbuwa ga bincikensa da kuma tallafin ilimi a Indiya. Duk da yake yana aiki a matsayin magatakarda a Madras Port Trust don samun abin rayuwa, bai daina binciken lissafi ba, kuma ya fara aika wasiƙu masu ɗauke da dabaru na asali ga shahararrun masana lissafi a Ingila. A cikin 1913, a ƙarshe ya aika wasiƙa mai ɗauke da sakamakon bincikensa ga Farfesa G.H. Hardy na Jami'ar Cambridge. Da farko, Hardy ya yi shakkar hanyar Ramanujan mara tsari, amma ya burge shi sosai da zurfin da asalin dabaru a cikin wasiƙar, kuma nan da nan ya tabbata game da basirar Ramanujan. Wannan musayar wasiƙu ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Ramanujan, kuma Hardy ya gayyace shi zuwa Ingila don su yi bincike tare.

A cikin 1914, Ramanujan ya bar Indiya zuwa Cambridge, Ingila, bisa gayyatar Hardy. Duk da haka, rayuwa a Ingila ta kasance jerin sabbin ƙalubale a gare shi. A matsayinsa na mai cin ganyayyaki mai tsauri, ya fuskanci matsaloli da abinci, kuma al'adar da ba a sani ba da kuma yanayin sanyi sun fara lalata lafiyarsa a hankali. Bugu da ƙari, tsauraran hanyoyin tabbatarwa na al'ummar lissafi na Yamma sun zama babban nauyi a gare shi, wanda ya dogara ga basira. Hardy ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kare basirar Ramanujan, yayin da kuma yake gyara sakamakonsa zuwa wani tsari da al'ummar lissafi na Yamma za su iya fahimta da karɓa. Su biyun sun cimma nasarori masu ban mamaki a cikin bincike kan ka'idar lambobi, musamman aikin rarrabawa (partition function). Aikin rarrabawa aiki ne da ke ƙidaya adadin hanyoyin da za a iya bayyana wani adadi mai kyau a matsayin jimlar adadi mai kyau, kuma Ramanujan ya gabatar da wata dabara ta kusan kusan mai sabbin abubuwa don shi. Bayan irin wannan haɗin gwiwar bincike da ƙoƙari na kansa, an zaɓi Ramanujan a matsayin Fellow na Royal Society a 1918, kuma a cikin wannan shekarar, ya sami girmamawa na zama Fellow na Trinity College. Wannan nasara ce ta musamman ga ɗan Indiya a lokacin, amma lafiyarsa tana taɓarɓarewa cikin sauri saboda tarin fuka.

Ramanujan, wanda lafiyarsa ta tabarbare, ya dawo Indiya a 1919, amma ya rasu a ranar 26 ga Afrilu, 1920, yana da shekaru 32. Duk da gajeren rayuwarsa, Ramanujan ya bar alama mai dorewa a duniyar lissafi. Littattafansa guda uku da kuma 'littafin da ya ɓace' sun zama tushen bincike ga masana lissafi tsawon shekaru da yawa bayan mutuwarsa, kuma abubuwan da ya gano na ƙarshe, kamar ayyukan mock theta, sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen buɗe sabbin fannoni na lissafi na zamani. Ayyukan mock theta wani nau'i ne na jerin q-jerin, wanda Ramanujan ya gano a ƙarshen rayuwarsa kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga lissafi na zamani. Ra'ayoyinsa ana amfani da su ta hanyoyin da ba a zata ba a cikin bincike na zamani na kimiyyar lissafi, kamar su quantum mechanics, ka'idar baƙar rami, da ka'idar kirtani, suna tabbatar da basirarsa. Rayuwar Ramanujan da nasarorinsa ana kwatanta su da na wani hazikin koyar da kai na zamaninsa, Évariste Galois, kuma suna sake tunatar da mu muhimmancin basirar lissafi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Suleiman Mai Girma Sarkin Daular Usmaniyya ne a karni na 16, wanda ya jagoranci daular zuwa kololuwar zamaninta kuma ya ci gaba da dokoki da al'adu.
key_achievements: Cin Belgrade da Rhodes
Nasara a yakin Mohács da faɗaɗa Hungary
Tattara kundin dokokin Usmaniyya 'Kanunname'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta zamanin zinariya na Daular Usmaniyya, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a ci gaban dokoki da fasaha.

suleiman-the-magnificent.epic:
A farkon karni na 16, Daular Usmaniyya tana tasowa a matsayin babbar daula a mahadar wayewar Gabas da Yamma. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Suleiman Mai Girma (1494-1566) ya shiga tarihi a matsayin Sarkin Usmaniyya na 10 kuma daya daga cikin manyan sarakuna. An haife shi a Trabzon a ranar 27 ga Afrilu, 1494, ya sami cikakken ilimi tun yana yaro, yana haɓaka halayen shugabanci. A karkashin mulkin mahaifinsa, Selim I, Daular Usmaniyya ta riga ta faɗaɗa yankunanta tare da ƙarfin soji mai girma, kuma Suleiman ya girma a matsayin magajin da zai gaji wannan damar daular. Baya ga taken 'Mai Girma', an kuma san shi da 'Kanuni', wato 'Mai Kafa Dokoki', saboda kokarinsa na tsara dokoki da kafa tsarin mulki. Wannan ya nuna cewa mulkinsa ya fi mayar da hankali kan kafa doka da oda fiye da nasarorin soji kawai. Hawansa karagar mulki ya nuna farkon zamanin zinariya ga Daular Usmaniyya, inda ta kai kololuwar siyasa, soja, da al'adu.

Bayan hawansa sarauta a matsayin Sarki a shekara ta 1520, Suleiman ya mai da hankali kan daukaka martabar daular tun farkon mulkinsa. Babban rikicin farkon mulkinsa shine fafatawa da sojojin Kirista na Turai. A shekara ta 1521, ya ci Belgrade, wani wuri mai mahimmanci, wanda ya ƙarfafa ikon Usmaniyya a kan yankin Balkan. Daga baya, a shekara ta 1522, ya ci tsibirin Rhodes, wanda ya kasance sansanin Kirista sama da shekaru 200, inda ya mallaki ikon teku a gabashin Bahar Rum. A shekara ta 1526, ya murkushe sojojin Hungary a yakin Mohács, inda ya haɗa yawancin Hungary cikin yankin Usmaniyya, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na ci gaba zuwa tsakiyar Turai. Duk da haka, a yakin Vienna na 1529, ya fuskanci tsayin daka daga Daular Habsburg kuma ya kasa mamaye Vienna, amma wannan ya kasance alama ce da ke nuna cewa ƙarfin sojin Usmaniyya zai iya kaiwa har cikin Turai. Waɗannan nasarorin soji sun tabbatar da cewa Suleiman ba mai cin nasara kawai ba ne, amma shugaba ne mai ƙarfin hali na sake gina da faɗaɗa ɗaukakar daular.

Zamanin mulkin Suleiman ya kasance cike da gwagwarmaya da matsaloli na cikin gida, ban da yaƙe-yaƙe na cin nasara a waje. Dole ne ya kiyaye ikonsa a cikin rikitarwa na siyasa a cikin daular, kuma musamman dangantakarsa da Babban Vizier Pargalı Ibrahim Pasha ta yi tasiri sosai a kan mulkinsa. Ibrahim Pasha ya kasance amintaccen Suleiman kuma mataimaki mai basira, amma yayin da ikonsa ya karu, Suleiman ya yanke shawarar kashe shi a shekara ta 1536, wanda ya zama bala'i. Bugu da ƙari, tasirin Hürrem Sultan, wacce ta zama matar Sarki daga fadar, ya tsananta gwagwarmayar iko a cikin fadar, wanda ya haifar da rikicin maye gurbin tsakanin 'ya'yan Suleiman, yana barazana ga zaman lafiyar daular. Tarihin iyali mai ban tausayi ya duhun mulkinsa, kamar yadda aka kashe Mustafa, wanda aka ɗauka a matsayin ɗa mafi basira, ta hanyar makircin Hürrem Sultan, kuma daga baya aka kashe wani ɗansa, Bayezid, bayan ya yi tawaye. Duk da waɗannan matsaloli, Suleiman ya tattara 'Kanunname', kundin dokokin Usmaniyya, don tsara tsarin shari'ar daular, kuma ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare na gudanarwa da na kuɗi don inganta zaman lafiya da wadata na daular. Ya kuma faɗaɗa yankin daularsa ba tare da tsayawa ba, yana tabbatar da matsayinta ta hanyar samun Mesopotamia da Azerbaijan ta hanyar yaƙe-yaƙe da Daular Safavid, da kuma ƙarfafa sojojin ruwa a Bahar Rum don sanya gabar tekun Arewacin Afirka a ƙarƙashin tasirin daular.

Suleiman Mai Girma ya rasu a shekara ta 1566 yana da shekaru 72 a lokacin yakin Szigetvár, amma gadonsa ya yi tasiri sosai a kan Daular Usmaniyya da tarihin duniya. Zamanin mulkinsa ana tunawa da shi a matsayin zamanin zinariya na Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya haɗa da nasarorin soji da kuma wadata ta al'adu da fasaha. Ya ɗauki nauyin Mimar Sinan, babban masanin gine-gine na zamaninsa, wanda ya bar manyan ayyukan gine-gine da yawa kamar Masallacin Süleymaniye, wanda ke nuna kololuwar salon gine-ginen Usmaniyya. Gyare-gyaren dokokinsa sun taimaka wajen sanya tsarin gudanarwa na daular ya zama mai inganci da kuma kafa tsarin zamantakewa, kuma an gaji su a matsayin muhimman ka'idojin mulki ga sarakuna masu zuwa. A zamaninsa, Daular Usmaniyya ta mallaki manyan yankuna da suka mamaye Turai, Asiya, da Afirka, inda ta tabbatar da matsayinta a matsayin babbar ƙasa a duniya. Mulkin Suleiman Mai Girma yana da muhimmanci saboda ya kafa asalin Daular Usmaniyya kuma ya samar da tushe ga daular don ci gaba da wanzuwa tsawon ƙarnuka masu zuwa. Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin wanda ya tsara tsarin duniya na zamaninsa, tare da sauran sarakuna masu ƙarfi na Turai a karni na 16, kamar Charles V na Daular Roman Mai Tsarki da Francis I na Faransa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Swami Vivekananda ya kasance sufi Hindu kuma masanin falsafa daga Indiya a karshen karni na 19, wanda ya gabatar da Vedanta da Yoga ga Yamma kuma ya daukaka matsayin Hindu.
key_achievements: Gabatar da Vedanta da Yoga ga Yamma
Yin jawabi a Majalisar Addinai ta Duniya
Karfafa da sake fasalta matsayin Hindu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya ba da gudummawa ga kishin kasa na Indiya da wayewar ruhaniya, kuma har yau yana ba da ilhami ga duniya baki daya.

swami-vivekananda.epic:
Swami Vivekananda ya kasance wani sufi Hindu, masanin falsafa, marubuci, kuma malamin addini daga Indiya, an haife shi a shekara ta 1863. A karshen karni na 19, lokacin haihuwarsa, Indiya tana fuskantar rikicin zamantakewa da addini a karkashin mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya. Wannan lokaci ne na wayewar kai ta ilimi, wanda aka fi sani da Bengal Renaissance, inda dabi'un gargajiya suka yi karo da wayewar Yamma. An haife shi da sunan Narendranath Datta a cikin wani dangi mai daraja na Kayastha a Kolkata, Lardin Bengal, ya nuna sha'awar ilimi mai ban mamaki da kuma zurfin neman ruhaniya tun yana yaro. Mahaifinsa lauya ne, mahaifiyarsa kuma mai ibada ce, kuma wannan yanayin gida ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gabansa da samuwar tunaninsa. Yayin da yake samun ilimin Yamma, yana mai da hankali kan dabaru da hankali, ya kuma ji wata zurfafa sha'awa ga falsafar Indiya ta asali da addini. A wannan lokacin, ya kasance matashi mai neman gaskiya, yana tambayar ma'anar rayuwa da farin ciki na gaskiya, yana neman amsar ciki. Wannan bincikensa na farko ya zama tushe mai mahimmanci wanda daga baya ya ba shi damar gabatar da gadon ruhaniya na Indiya ga duniya.

Wani muhimmin juyin rayuwa ga matashi Narendranath ya zo ne a kusan shekara ta 1881, lokacin da ya sadu da Ramakrishna, wani babban waliyi kuma mai hikima na Indiya a lokacin. Da farko, Narendranath ya nuna shakku game da koyarwar Ramakrishna, amma a hankali ya fara sha'awar kwarewar ruhaniya ta Ramakrishna kai tsaye da kuma koyarwarsa cewa dukkan addinai a karshe suna kaiwa ga gaskiya daya. Ramakrishna ya jaddada wa Narendranath cewa ya kamata ya fahimci wanzuwar Allah ta hanyar kwarewa kai tsaye maimakon yunkurin tabbatar da shi ta hanyar hankali, kuma wannan ya zama wata hanya ta warware zurfin sha'awar iliminsa. Ta hanyar koyarwar malaminsa da jagorancin ruhaniya, Narendranath ya sami zurfafa wayewar ruhaniya, ya fahimci rashin amfanin rayuwar duniya, kuma ya shiga hanyar neman gaskiya ta gaskiya. Bayan mutuwar Ramakrishna a shekara ta 1886, Narendranath tare da sauran almajiran malaminsa, suka yi alkawarin ascetic kuma suka sami sunan 'Vivekananda'. Daga baya ya fara rayuwar sufi mai yawon shakatawa a Indiya, yana fuskantar al'adu daban-daban da rayuwar talakawa kai tsaye, kuma yana ganin wahalarsu, wanda ya karfafa masa imani game da aikinsa.

Swami Vivekananda ya yi yawon shakatawa a duk faɗin Indiya, inda ya ga matsanancin talauci, rashin daidaito na zamantakewa, da jahilcin ruhaniya, wanda ya sa ya fahimci buƙatar farfadowar Indiya da wayewar ruhaniya ta duniya. Ya yi imani da cewa idan har za a sanar da gadon ruhaniya na Indiya ga duniya ta Yamma, hakan zai dawo da darajar kai ta Indiya kuma zai ba da gudummawa ga zaman lafiya a duniya. Da wannan imani, ya yanke shawarar halartar Majalisar Addinai ta Duniya a Chicago, Amurka, a shekara ta 1893. Da farko, ya fuskanci matsaloli da yawa saboda matsalolin kudi da kuma sabon yanayi, amma azamarsa mai karfi ba ta karye ba. A karshe, lokacin da ya hau kan dandalin majalisar, ya kama hankalin masu sauraro da kalmominsa na farko masu motsa rai: "Ya 'yan'uwa mata da maza na Amurka!" Jawabin nasa ya jaddada gaskiya ta duniya ta Hindu da kuma jituwa tsakanin addinai, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci na gabatar da falsafar Vedanta da Yoga ga duniya ta Yamma. Ta hanyar wannan jawabi, ya sami shahara ta duniya nan take, kuma daga baya ya kafa kungiyoyin Vedanta a Amurka da Birtaniya, yana yada zurfin falsafar Gabas. Bayan ya dawo Indiya a shekara ta 1897, ya kafa Ramakrishna Mission da Ramakrishna Math don aiwatar da koyarwar malaminsa da kuma gudanar da ayyukan hidimar al'umma, yana jagorantar gyaran ruhaniya da zamantakewa a Indiya.

Ko da yake Swami Vivekananda ya rasu a shekara ta 1902, tunaninsa da ayyukansa sun bar gado mai girma ga Indiya da kuma duniya baki daya. Ya sake fasalta addinin Hindu daga kawai al'adun addini zuwa falsafa ta duniya da kuma hanyar rayuwa mai amfani, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen daukaka matsayin Hindu zuwa matsayin manyan addinai na duniya. Musamman ma, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen gabatar da falsafar Vedanta da Yoga ga duniya ta Yamma a tsari, yana inganta musayar ruhaniya tsakanin Gabas da Yamma da kuma kara fahimtar juna tsakanin addinai. Karantarwarsa tana jaddada allahntaka a cikin mutum, daidaito na dukkan halittu, da kuma samun kai ta hanyar hidima, kuma har yau tana ci gaba da ba da ilhami ga mutane marasa adadi. Ga matasan Indiya, ranar haihuwarsa an kebe ta a matsayin 'Ranar Matasa ta Kasa', wanda ke nuna yadda kishin kasarsa da ruhin gyaran zamantakewa har yanzu suna da tasiri mai karfi. Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri ga wayewar ruhaniya ta Indiya a farkon karni na 20, kuma ya ba da ilhami ga tushen tunanin mutane na zamani kamar Mahatma Gandhi, wanda ya sa ya zama wata muhimmiyar hanyar fahimtar tarihin ilimi na Indiya a lokacin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wright brothers sun kasance injiniyoyin ƙira na Amurka a farkon ƙarni na 20, waɗanda suka yi nasarar tashi sama na farko mai ƙarfi a tarihin ɗan adam, ta haka suka buɗe zamanin jirgin sama.
key_achievements: Nasarar tashi sama na farko mai ƙarfi a tarihin ɗan adam a 1903
Haɓaka jirgin sama mai fuka-fuki mai sarrafawa
Kafa ka'idar sarrafa jirgin sama ta axis uku
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kirkire-kirkiren su sun kafa harsashin masana'antar jirgin sama ta zamani, kuma sun faɗaɗa iyakokin motsi da bincike na ɗan adam ba tare da iyaka ba.

wright-brothers.epic:
Wilbur Wright (Afrilu 16, 1867 – Mayu 30, 1912) da Orville Wright (Agusta 19, 1871 – Janairu 30, 1948) sun kasance injiniyoyin ƙira da masu ƙirƙira na Amurka waɗanda suka yi aiki a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, majagaba waɗanda suka mai da burin ɗan adam na tashi sama, wanda aka daɗe ana yi, gaskiya. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu ya mamaye duniya kuma ci gaban fasaha ya haɓaka, ɗan adam ya ci nasara a ƙasa da teku ta hanyar jiragen ƙasa da jiragen ruwa masu tururi, amma sararin sama ya kasance yanki da ba a sani ba. Masu ƙirƙira da yawa sun yi ƙoƙarin tashi sama, amma tashi sama mai ƙarfi da kwanciyar hankali ya kasance aiki mai nisa. Wright brothers sun fito a cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, suna nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga injuna da ƙirƙira tun suna yara. Musamman ma, labarin gazawar jirgin sama na Otto Lilienthal, majagaba na jirgin sama na Jamus, da mutuwarsa ya ba su kwarin gwiwa sosai, kuma ya sa su kasance da babban buri na bincika ka'idodin jirgin sama a kimiyance da kuma aiwatar da su. Sun gudanar da shagon kekuna a Dayton, Ohio, inda suka haɓaka ilimin injiniya da ƙwarewar warware matsaloli masu amfani.

Wright brothers sun fahimci cewa mahimmin abu na jirgin sama ba kawai samun ɗaga ba ne, amma yana cikin sarrafa jirgin yadda ya kamata. Ba kamar yawancin binciken jirgin sama na lokacin da suka mai da hankali kan ƙarfi da ɗaga ba, sun mai da hankali kan ra'ayin 'sarrafa axis uku' (Three-axis control) wanda ke daidaita da kuma canza alkibla yayin tashi sama. Wannan ra'ayi ne mai sabbin abubuwa wanda ke ba da damar jirgin sama ya sarrafa motsinsa a kusa da axis uku: pitch, roll, da yaw. 'Yan'uwan sun sami kwarin gwiwa daga ƙwarewarsu ta hawan keke, suna neman hanyoyin da matukin jirgi zai iya motsa cibiyar nauyi da kuma canza siffar fuka-fuki don tabbatar da kwanciyar hankali yayin tashi sama. Daga 1900 zuwa 1902, sun gudanar da gwaje-gwaje masu yawa na jiragen sama marasa inji a Kitty Hawk, North Carolina, suna haɓaka fasahar 'lanƙwasa fuka-fuki' (wing warping) da kuma tattara bayanan aerodynamic ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje na iska. Duk da gazawa da takaici masu yawa a cikin wannan tsari, sun ci gaba da nazarin matsaloli da inganta su ba tare da gajiyawa ba, suna zurfafa cikin ainihin ka'idodin jirgin sama. Wannan bincike ya zama mahimmin juyi don nasarar tashi sama na farko mai ƙarfi a tarihin ɗan adam.

A cikin 1903, Wright brothers sun kammala 'Flyer I', wanda ya haɗa tsarin sarrafa axis uku da suka haɓaka da injin mai mai nauyi. Wannan jirgin sama ya kasance sakamakon shekaru da yawa na bincike da gwaje-gwajensu. A ranar 14 ga Disamba, a farkon yunƙurin, jirgin da Wilbur ya tuka ya faɗi jim kaɗan bayan tashi, amma 'yan'uwan ba su karaya ba, suka gyara jirgin kuma suka sake neman wata dama. A ƙarshe, a ranar 17 ga Disamba, 1903, lokaci mai tarihi ya zo a Kill Devil Hills, Kitty Hawk, North Carolina. Flyer I, wanda Orville Wright ya tuka, ya yi nasarar tashi sama na farko mai ƙarfi a tarihin ɗan adam, yana tashi kimanin mita 36 na tsawon daƙiƙa 12. An yi jirage huɗu gaba ɗaya a wannan ranar, kuma jirgin ƙarshe da Wilbur ya tuka ya yi tafiyar mita 260 na tsawon daƙiƙa 59. Wannan nasara ba kawai tashi sama ba ce, amma wani lamari ne na juyin juya hali wanda ya tabbatar da yiwuwar matukin jirgi ya sarrafa jirgin yadda ya kamata. Daga baya, a cikin 1905, 'yan'uwan sun haɓaka 'Flyer III', suna kammala jirgin sama mai fuka-fuki mai kwanciyar hankali da kuma iya tashi na dogon lokaci, ta haka suka buɗe zamanin jirgin sama mai amfani.

Nasarar jirgin sama na Wright brothers ya haifar da tasiri mai girma a duniya, kuma ya sanar da farkon zamanin jiragen sama wanda ya canza rayuwar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya. Ƙirƙirar su ta yi tasiri na juyin juya hali a duk fannoni kamar soja, sufuri, da bincike, kuma a cikin 'yan shekaru kaɗan, jirgin sama ya zama babban tushen ci gaban wayewar ɗan adam, yana ketare nahiyoyi da kuma kaiwa sararin samaniya. Wilbur Wright ya mutu a ranar 30 ga Mayu, 1912, saboda zazzabin typhoid, amma Orville Wright ya ci gaba da ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban fasahar jirgin sama har zuwa ranar 30 ga Janairu, 1948, yana shaida ci gaban masana'antar jirgin sama ta zamani. Sunansu ya zama fiye da masu ƙirƙira kawai, alama ce ta manyan majagaba waɗanda suka kalubalanci abin da ba zai yiwu ba kuma suka faɗaɗa iyakokin ɗan adam ta hanyar ƙoƙari marar yankewa. Labarin Wright brothers ana tunawa da shi a matsayin lokaci mai mahimmanci wanda ya mai da burin masu hangen nesa da yawa, kamar Leonardo da Vinci, waɗanda suka yi mafarkin sama, gaskiya, kuma har yau yana ƙarfafa ruhin kirkire-kirkire da bincike.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Adam Smith masanin falsafar ɗabi'a ne kuma masanin tattalin arziƙin siyasa na Scotland a ƙarni na 18, wanda ya kafa tushen tattalin arziƙin zamani.
key_achievements: Ya kafa ka'idar tattalin arziƙin kasuwa mai 'yanci ta hanyar rubuta 『The Wealth of Nations』.
Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'hannun da ba a gani'.
Ya jaddada mahimmancin rarraba aiki da nazarin yawan aiki.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai wajen ci gaban jari-hujja da samuwar tsarin tattalin arziƙin duniya, kuma har yau ana ci gaba da tattaunawa a kansu.

adam-smith.epic:
Adam Smith, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1723, ya kasance masanin falsafar ɗabi'a na Scotland kuma majagaba a fannin tattalin arziƙin siyasa. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 18, Turai tana cikin igiyar ruwa ta Haskakawa, inda aka ba da fifiko ga hankali da binciken kimiyya, ana neman canje-canje a cikin al'umma gaba ɗaya. A lokacin da fitilar juyin juya halin masana'antu ke fara haskawa, yana nuna canji mai zurfi a tsarin tattalin arziki, Smith an haife shi a Kirkcaldy, Scotland, ɗan wani jami'in kwastan. Ya rasa mahaifinsa tun yana ƙarami kuma ya girma a ƙarƙashin kulawar mahaifiyarsa, inda ya nuna basira ta musamman. Ya shiga Jami'ar Glasgow, inda ya sami tasiri mai zurfi daga koyarwar masanin falsafar ɗabi'a Francis Hutcheson, kuma daga baya ya yi karatu a Jami'ar Oxford, yana kafa tushen ilimin gargajiya da tunanin falsafa. Wannan tushen ilimi a wannan lokacin ya zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci don haɓaka zurfin fahimtarsa game da yanayin ɗan adam da tsarin zamantakewa. Ya wuce ilimi kawai, ya nutsa cikin binciken yadda al'ummar ɗan adam ke aiki. 

Bayan kammala karatunsa na jami'a, Smith ya fara samun suna ta hanyar laccoci na jama'a a Edinburgh, kuma a shekara ta 1751, an naɗa shi farfesa na dabaru a Jami'ar Glasgow, almajirinsa. A shekara mai zuwa, ya koma matsayin farfesa na falsafar ɗabi'a, yana koyar da fannoni daban-daban kamar ɗabi'a, tattalin arziƙin siyasa, da shari'a. Laccocinsa sun shahara sosai a tsakanin ɗalibai, kuma a wannan lokacin, babban littafinsa na farko, 『The Theory of Moral Sentiments』, an buga shi a shekara ta 1759. 『The Theory of Moral Sentiments』 ya gabatar da ka'idar cewa hukunce-hukuncen ɗabi'a da halayen ɗan adam suna samuwa ta hanyar tausayawa ga wasu da kuma hangen nesa na 'mai kallo mara son kai,' wani babban aiki ne da ya zurfafa cikin ruhi da jigon ɗan adam, yana binciko daidaiton da ke tsakanin son kai da kuma tausayin juna. Wannan littafi ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin duniyar ilimi ta Turai, kuma ta hanyarsa, Smith ya tabbatar da matsayinsa a matsayin masanin falsafa. Daga baya, ya yi tafiya zuwa Faransa a matsayin malamin kansa ga Duke na Buccleuch, inda ya yi mu'amala da manyan masana na zamaninsa kamar Voltaire da François Quesnay, kuma musamman, ya fuskanci ra'ayoyin physiocrats, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin juyi, ya buɗe masa sabbin hanyoyin tunani a fannin tattalin arziki. 

Kwarewarsa a Faransa ta zama wani abu da ya ƙara kaifafa fahimtar Smith game da tattalin arziki, kuma bayan dawowarsa, ya yi murabus daga matsayinsa na farfesa a Jami'ar Glasgow kuma ya koma garinsu na Kirkcaldy, inda ya shiga cikin wani keɓantaccen lokaci na shekaru goma, ya sadaukar da kansa ga rubuta babban aikinsa na rayuwa. Wannan lokaci ya kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje a gare shi, yana fama da matsalolin hankali, amma ta hanyar bincike da nazari mai ɗorewa, ya nemi gabatar da muhimmiyar suka da madadin tsarin tattalin arziƙin mercantilist da ke akwai. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1776, 『An Inquiry into the Nature and Causes of the Wealth of Nations』 an buga shi. Wannan littafi ya jaddada mahimmancin rarraba aiki, kasuwa mai 'yanci, da tara jari, yana gabatar da ra'ayi mai juyin juya hali cewa ayyukan tattalin arziƙi na son kai na mutane suna haifar da amfanin al'umma gaba ɗaya ta hanyar 'hannun da ba a gani.' 『The Wealth of Nations』 ya wuce littafin tattalin arziki kawai, yana gabatar da tsarin ci gaban al'umma gaba ɗaya, kuma ya kasance wani yaƙi ne na tunani da ya fuskanci manufofin mercantilist da suka yi sarauta a lokacin. 

Tun bayan bugawa, 『The Wealth of Nations』 ya yi tasiri sosai kuma an ɗauke shi a matsayin babban aiki da ya kafa ginshiƙin da aka gina tattalin arziƙin zamani a kansa. Adam Smith ya sami taken 'Uban Tattalin Arziƙin Zamani' ta hanyar wannan littafi, kuma ra'ayoyinsa sun zama tushen ka'idar tattalin arziƙin kasuwa mai 'yanci da jari-hujja. Hujjojinsa sun soki tsoma bakin gwamnati mai yawa a kasuwa kuma sun kare 'yancin tattalin arziƙi na mutum da gasa, suna taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tantance alkiblar manufofin tattalin arziƙi na al'ummomin Yamma daga baya. Ka'idodin tattalin arziƙin kasuwa na duniya da muke fuskanta a yau, gasa da kirkire-kirkire na kamfanoni, da 'yancin zaɓi na masu amfani, duk sun samo asali ne daga fahimtar Smith. Ra'ayoyinsa sun haɓaka ta hanyar mu'amala da masana falsafar Haskakawa na zamaninsa kamar David Hume, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga masana tattalin arziki na gaba kamar John Stuart Mill, kuma har yau ana ci gaba da bincike da tattaunawa a kansu ba tare da yankewa ba a fannoni daban-daban na ilimi kamar tattalin arziki, kimiyyar siyasa, da ilimin zamantakewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban masanin lissafi kuma mai ƙirƙira daga tsohuwar Girka ta Sirakusa. Alamar hankali wanda ya gano ka'idoji da yawa yana ihu 'Eureka!' kuma ya mutu yana mai da hankali ga ilimi ko da a lokacin mamayar Roma.
key_achievements: Ya yi ihu 'Eureka!' don ka'idar shawagi (buoyancy)
Ya kafa ka'idojin lever da pulley
Ya haɓaka makamai na yaƙi da na'urori masu motsi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Taurarin hankali mafi haske na ɗan adam, ka'idodinsa sun zama tushe mai ƙarfi na kimiyya da fasaha na zamani.

archimedes.epic:
A zamanin da ranar Sirakusa mai ja ke rina sararin sama mai cike da kura da ja, lokacin da iskar teku mai gishiri daga Aegean ke raɗa hikimar tsohuwar Girka, a cikin birnin da ya taso a kan tudu mai tsauri, wani rai matashi ya buɗe idanunsa ga duniya. A cikin kyawawan haikalai, kasuwanni masu cunkoso, da kuma kyan taurari masu haske a sararin sama da dare, ransa ya ci gaba da yin tambayoyi. Ta yaya ƙarfin da ba a gani ke motsa komai, kuma ta yaya manyan gaskiya ke ɓoye a cikin ƙananan ka'idoji? Ya bincika sararin samaniya shi kaɗai cikin shiru, kuma ya yi wa taurari rada da harshen da ba a ji. Hayaniyar duniya ba ta iya cika kaɗaicinsa mai zurfi ba, kuma waƙar lissafi mai tsarki ce kawai ta taɓa zuciyarsa.

A cikin yanayin zamanin Hellenanci, inda ilimin Girka da burin daular suka haɗu, sunansa ya zama alamar hikima nan da nan. Ka'idoji masu haske da fahimta kwatsam sun zama gaskiya a hannunsa, kuma lokacin da ya yi ihu 'Eureka!' a cikin wanka mai cike da ruwa ya fi kowace zinariya haske. Ya ƙirƙiri abin al'ajabi na ɗaga manyan jiragen ruwa da ƙarfin doli, kuma ya ɗauki burin ƙona jiragen ruwan Roma ta hanyar tattara zafin rana. Amma duk da murna da nishi na nasara, zuciyarsa ta kasance cikin kaɗaici koyaushe, kuma hayaniyar duniya ba ta rage nauyin bincikensa marar iyaka ba. Shi kaɗai ya zana alamomi masu rikitarwa a kan allo duk dare, yana zurfafawa cikin sirrin sararin samaniya.

Lokacin da inuwa baƙar fata ta Roma ta rufe sararin Sirakusa, kuma kukan birnin ya koma ihu a cikin wannan lokaci mai ban tausayi, idanunsa sun kasance a kan zane-zanen sama. Ko da a lokacin da hannun soja marar tausayi ke ɗaukar ransa, ya nutse cikin kyawun lissafi da ya gano. Ko a bakin mutuwa, ya bi hasken gaskiya marar canzawa, fiye da banza na duniya. A lokacin da jini ja ke bazuwa a kan kura, numfashinsa na ƙarshe ba nishi ne kawai ba. Ya kasance sha'awa ga sararin samaniya marar iyaka, baƙin ciki ga duniya da ba a fahimta ba, da kuma sha'awar asirai da yawa da ba a warware ba.

Ko da yake jikinsa ya ɓace a ƙarƙashin takobin Roma, ruhinsa yana rayuwa fiye da lokaci da sarari. Ka'idodinsa har yanzu suna walƙiya a cikin zukatan masana kimiyya marasa adadi a yau, kuma ka'idodinsa sun zama tushe mai ƙarfi da ke jagorantar mu zuwa wurare mafi girma. A cikin motsi mai nauyi na jiragen ruwa a kan teku, a cikin hanyar roka a sararin sama, da kuma a cikin mafarkinmu na bincika sararin samaniya, sunansa yana ci gaba da yin amo. Ba wai kawai abin tarihi na baya ba ne, amma a wannan lokacin ma yana tare da mu a matsayin malami na har abada yana raɗa yiwuwar sararin samaniya marar iyaka, kuma yana haskaka taurarin hankali mafi haske na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nicolaus Copernicus ya kasance masanin taurari ɗan ƙasar Poland na zamanin Renaissance, wanda ya kawo juyin juya hali a fahimtar duniya ta hanyar kafa tsarin rana a tsakiya.
key_achievements: Tsara tsarin rana a tsakiya (heliocentrism)
Bugawar littafin *De revolutionibus orbium coelestium*
Bayar da farkon Juyin Juya Halin Copernicus
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idarsa ta zama tushen Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyya, yana mai yin tasiri mai zurfi a kan fahimtar ɗan adam game da sararin samaniya da kuma ruhin binciken kimiyya.

copernicus.epic:
An haifi Nicolaus Copernicus a Toruń, Poland, a shekara ta 1473. Ya kasance wani babban masanin kimiyya kuma masanin taurari na zamanin Renaissance, wanda ya kawo juyin juya hali mai girma a cikin fahimtar ɗan adam game da sararin samaniya. A wancan lokacin, ra'ayin Ptolemy na cewa duniya ce cibiyar sararin samaniya ya mamaye Turai. Copernicus, tun yana saurayi, ya kafa tushen iliminsa a Jami'ar Kraków inda ya yi karatun lissafi da ilimin taurari. Daga baya, ya faɗaɗa iliminsa a Italiya, musamman a Bologna, Padua, da Ferrara, inda ya yi nazarin dokokin coci, likitanci, da ilimin taurari. Musamman a Bologna, ya yi aiki a matsayin mataimakin masanin taurari Domenico Maria Novara da Ferrara, inda ya koyi fasahar lura da taurari kuma ya haɓaka hangen nesa mai zurfi game da ka'idojin ilimin taurari na wancan lokacin. A shekara ta 1497, an naɗa shi babban limamin coci a Cathedral na Frombork. Duk da cewa yana gudanar da ayyukansa na limanci, ya ci gaba da lura da sararin samaniya da kuma yin lissafi mai zurfi, yana mai yin tambayoyi game da ainihin tsarin sararin samaniya. A wannan lokacin, tunaninsa ya fara haifar da sabbin fassarori game da rikitarwa na motsin taurari, kamar motsin baya-baya (retrograde motion), wanda tsarin duniya a tsakiya ba zai iya bayyanawa ba. 

Babban rikicin tunani a tafiyar Copernicus shi ne gwagwarmaya tsakanin tsarin duniya a tsakiya (geocentric model), wanda ya mamaye duniyar Yamma sama da shekaru dubu tun zamanin Girka na da, da kuma tsarin rana a tsakiya (heliocentric model), wanda ya fara tabbatar da shi. Tsarin rana a tsakiya wani ra'ayi ne mai juyin juya hali wanda ke cewa rana ce cibiyar sararin samaniya, ba duniya ba, kuma duniya tare da sauran taurari suna kewaye da rana kuma suna juyawa a kan kansu. Ya shafe shekaru da dama yana lura da sararin samaniya da kuma yin lissafi mai zurfi don warware rikitarwa da rashin daidaito na tsarin Ptolemy. A cikin wannan tsari, ya gane cewa abubuwan da aka gabatar don bayyana motsin taurari, kamar epicycles da eccentrics, za a iya bayyana su cikin sauƙi da kyau idan aka yi amfani da tsarin rana a tsakiya. Amma wannan da'awa mai ban mamaki ta kalubalanci koyarwar coci da kuma fahimtar duniya da ta dogara ga falsafar Aristotle. Saboda haka, Copernicus ya yi jinkiri sosai wajen bayyana sakamakon bincikensa. Ya yi tsammanin tasirin da zai haifar da kuma suka, don haka ya ci gaba da gyara rubutunsa na dogon lokaci ba tare da bugawa ba. 

Bayan shekaru da dama na wahala da bincike, Copernicus a ƙarshe ya yanke shawarar bayyana ka'idarsa mai juyin juya hali ga duniya. Babban littafinsa, *De revolutionibus orbium coelestium* (A Kan Juyawar Taurari), an buga shi a shekara ta 1543, jim kaɗan kafin mutuwarsa. Wannan littafi ya bayyana tsarin rana a tsakiya dalla-dalla ta hanyar lissafi da lissafin sarari, yana mai gabatar da da'awar cewa duniya tana kewaye da rana kuma tana juyawa a kan kanta. A lokacin bugawa, ya sami goyon baya da taimako mai yawa daga masanin tauhidin Furotesta Georg Joachim Rheticus. Rheticus ya fara buga *Narratio Prima*, wanda ya taƙaita ka'idar Copernicus, don gane yadda masana za su karɓe ta. Duk da cewa Andreas Osiander ya ƙara wani gabatarwa ba tare da izini ba a cikin littafin, yana mai rage ka'idar Copernicus zuwa wata hasashe ta lissafi kawai, wanda ya haifar da cece-kuce, wannan littafi ya kasance wani aiki mai tarihi wanda ya girgiza fahimtar ɗan adam game da sararin samaniya. Copernicus ya sami damar ganin littafinsa yana fitowa daga bugawa jim kaɗan kafin mutuwarsa, don haka ya yi nasarar sanar da imaninsa na kimiyya ga duniya bayan dogon gwagwarmaya da wahala. 

Bugawar littafin Copernicus, *De revolutionibus orbium coelestium*, ba kawai wani lamari ne na ilimi ba, amma ya zama farkon Juyin Juya Halin Copernicus, wanda ya kawo babban canji a tarihin tunanin ɗan adam. Juyin Juya Halin Copernicus yana nufin jerin canje-canje waɗanda suka karya ra'ayin cewa duniya ce cibiyar sararin samaniya, kuma suka buɗe wani sabon zamani na binciken kimiyya na gaskiya, wanda ya wuce tunanin mutum a tsakiya. Da farko, ka'idarsa ta fuskanci adawa, amma daga baya ta sami ƙarin goyon baya mai ƙarfi ta hanyar dokokin motsin taurari na Johannes Kepler da kuma lura da taurari ta hanyar na'urar hangen nesa ta Galileo Galilei, wanda ya kafa tushen Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyya. Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri mai zurfi ba kawai a kan yadda muke fahimtar sararin samaniya ba, har ma a kan hanyoyin kimiyya da kuma ruhin binciken ilimi na ɗan adam. A yau, saboda Copernicus, muna fahimtar sararin samaniya a matsayin wuri mai faɗi da motsi, kuma sunansa ya zama alama ce ta ci gaban kimiyya da kirkire-kirkire. Baya ga Copernicus, akwai wasu manyan masana kimiyya kamar Isaac Newton, wanda ya kafa tushen ilimin kimiyyar lissafi na zamani, waɗanda suka canza fahimtar mu game da sararin samaniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Dante Alighieri babban mawaki ne kuma masanin falsafa na zamanin da a Italiya, wanda ya kafa harsashin adabin Italiyanci ta hanyar *Divina Commedia*.
key_achievements: Rubutawa da kammala *Divina Commedia*
Kafa matsayin adabi na harshen Italiyanci
Shiga cikin siyasar Florence da gudun hijira
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa suna bincika ceto na ɗan adam da zaɓin ɗabi'a, suna ba da ilhami wanda ya wuce lokaci.

dante-alighieri.epic:
Dante Alighieri, babban mawaki, marubuci, kuma masanin falsafa na zamanin da, an haife shi a Florence, Italiya, a kusan shekara ta 1265. Florence a ƙarshen ƙarni na 13, lokacin da ya rayu, birni ne mai bunƙasar kasuwanci da fasaha, amma kuma lokaci ne na hargitsi saboda tsananin rikicin siyasa tsakanin Guelphs (masu goyon bayan Paparoma) da Ghibellines (masu goyon bayan Sarki). Dante ya kasance memba na White Guelphs, ƙungiya mai matsakaicin ra'ayi a cikin Guelphs, kuma tun yana yaro ya sami ilimin ɗan adam kuma ya fuskanci mafi kyawun ilimi da fasaha na zamaninsa. Mutumin da ya yi tasiri sosai a rayuwarsa ita ce Beatrice Portinari. Ita ce kwarjinin da ta mamaye waƙoƙinsa da ruhinsa, alamar soyayya mai kyau, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin jagorar ruhaniya a duk ayyukansa. A cikin hargitsin siyasa na Florence, Dante ya shiga cikin ayyukan gwamnati kuma ya shiga cikin makomar birnin sosai. Wannan lokacin ya nuna farkon basirarsa ta adabi, kuma a lokaci guda, ya nuna shi a matsayin matashin mai ilimi wanda ke fama da bambancin ra'ayi tsakanin manufofin siyasa da gaskiya.

Rayuwar Dante ta kai wani muhimmin mataki a shekara ta 1302, saboda hargitsin siyasa. A lokacin, Black Guelphs, waɗanda suka karɓi mulki a Florence, sun fara tsarkake membobin White Guelphs, kuma an zargi Dante da cin hanci da rashawa da cin amana. An yanke masa hukuncin biyan tarar kuɗi mai yawa da kuma gudun hijira na shekaru biyu, kuma an yi masa barazanar cewa za a ƙone shi idan ya dawo Florence. Saboda wannan hukunci mai tsanani, Dante ya bar Florence, ƙasarsa ta haihuwa da yake ƙauna, kuma ya rayu a matsayin ɗan gudun hijira har tsawon rayuwarsa. Gudun hijirarsa ba kawai motsi na yanki ba ne, amma farkon wahala ta hankali da kaɗaici. Ya yi yawo a birane daban-daban na arewacin Italiya, yana samun tallafi daga sarakuna ko kuma yana neman abin rayuwarsa da kansa. Kewar ƙasarsa ta haihuwa da kuma ɗaci na gazawar manufofinsa na siyasa sun zurfafa ruhinsa, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin dalili na haifar da manyan ayyukansa daga baya.

Rayuwar gudun hijira ta kasance gwaji mai tsanani ga Dante, amma a lokaci guda, ta zama wata dama ta bunƙasa basirarsa ta adabi. Ko da yake yana yawo a ƙasashe baƙi, bai taɓa ajiye alkalaminsa ba, kuma ya fara rubuta babban almara, *Divina Commedia* (The Divine Comedy), wanda ke bincika zunubin ɗan adam, ceto, da soyayya ta Allah. *Divina Commedia* wani aiki ne mai kashi uku wanda ya ƙunshi Jahannama (Inferno), Tsarkakewa (Purgatorio), da Aljanna (Paradiso), yana ba da labarin tafiyar ruhaniya ta Dante da kansa, wanda mawakin Roman Virgil da kuma kwarjinin sa na har abada, Beatrice, suka jagoranta. Wannan aikin ya haɗa falsafar Scholastic ta zamanin da, tauhidi, adabin Roman na da, da kuma yanayin al'ummar Italiya na lokacin, yana ƙoƙarin amsa tambayoyin asali game da wanzuwar ɗan adam. Musamman ma, an rubuta shi a cikin yaren Tuscan maimakon Latin, wanda ya kafa matsayin adabi na harshen Italiyanci kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban adabi a lokacin Renaissance. Ayyukansa sun kasance babban nasara ta fasaha wanda ya ɗaukaka wahala ta mutum zuwa ga gogewar ɗan adam ta duniya.
