Dante Alighieri ya rasu a Ravenna a ranar 14 ga Satumba, 1321, amma gadonsa na adabi ya wuce lokaci kuma yana raye har zuwa yau. *Divina Commedia* ya wuce labarin addini kawai, yana ba da zurfin fahimta game da yanayin ɗan adam, zaɓin ɗabi'a, da kuma yiwuwar ceto, yana ba da ilhami ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya. Ana kiransa uban harshen Italiyanci kuma ya kafa harsashin adabin Italiyanci na zamani, kuma ana ɗaukar ayyukansa a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyuka a tarihin adabin Yamma. Tasirin Dante ya bayyana ba kawai a cikin adabi ba har ma a fannoni daban-daban kamar fasaha, kiɗa, da falsafa, yana ba da ilhami ga masu fasaha da masu tunani da yawa. Rayuwarsa da ayyukansa suna nuna wahala da bege na ɗan adam, da kuma ruhun da ba za a iya karya ba, kuma tare da mutane na zamaninsa kamar Petrarch da Boccaccio, ya buɗe sabon shafi ga adabin Renaissance.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mutum a Mainz ya ƙirƙira bugu da haruffan ƙarfe a cikin wahala, ya buɗe sabon zamani na yaɗuwar ilimi.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar bugu da haruffan ƙarfe
Kafa tushen yaɗuwar ilimi ga jama'a
Buɗe farkon juyin juya halin bayanai
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fasahar bugunsa ta jagoranci yaɗuwar ilimi ga jama'a, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban wayewar ɗan adam.

johannes-gutenberg.epic:
Numfashin kogin Rhine mai zafi yana bugun tagogin tsoffin gidajen katako, kuma dare a Mainz ya zurfafa a ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka. A tsakiyar birnin, inda shiru mai tsarki na firistoci masu ɗauke da nauyin giciye ya haɗu da hayaniyar 'yan kasuwa masu aiki, a cikin wani ɗakin aiki inda sanyin ƙarfe da ɗanɗanon tawada mai ɗaci suka haɗu, wani mutum yana gwagwarmaya da ƙaddararsa. Gumin da ke kan yatsunsa masu tsatsa ya kasance iri na bege kuma alamar yanke kauna, kuma idanunsa da suka yi dare suna ci da sha'awar gaskiya. Ya yi mafarkin ƙarfe da zai haɗa ilimin ɗan adam.

Hanyar zuwa ga 'ya'yan itacen da aka haramta na bugu ta kasance mai cike da ƙaya. Raɗaɗin shakka da ke yawo a kunnuwansa, inuwar bin bashin bashi, da kuma cin amanar abokan kasuwancinsa sun yi ƙoƙarin murkushe mafarkinsa. Da aljihunsa fanko, leɓunansa a rufe, da idanunsa ja, ya kalli zurfin yanke kauna. Ayyukan kada guduma ba tare da tsayawa ba, narkar da guntun gubar, da sassaƙa haruffa na dare da yawa sun cinye jikinsa, amma a cikin zurfin ruhinsa, wutar da ba ta mutuwa tana ci. Yana ƙirƙirar kayan aiki don haɗa hikimar tsohuwar duniya da shuka iri na gaba.

A ƙarshe, lokacin da aka buga wasiƙar mai haske a kan takarda mai ɗauke da ƙamshin tawada, mu'ujiza ta zama gaskiya. Daga yatsunsa da suka sassaƙa ƙaddararsa a hankali, tunani ɗaya, labari ɗaya ya bazu cikin dubban martani. Wannan lokaci ne da manyan ganuwar iko suka rushe, kuma maɓuɓɓugar ilimi ta fara gudana ba tare da tsayawa ba. Wannan ƙaramar na'ura, wadda aka ƙirƙira da hannun ɗan adam, da tunanin ɗan adam, da ruhin ɗan adam, ta kasance farkon buɗe wani sabon zamani ta hanyar raba duhu.

Haruffan ƙarfe da hannunsa ya ƙirƙira suna rayuwa tare da mu har yanzu, suna ketare kogin lokaci. A cikin littattafan da muke karantawa kowace rana, ilimin da muke rabawa, da labaran da muke ba da labari, gumi da kaɗaicinsa, da kuma jajircewarsa marar yankewa suna nan. Ƙaramar juyin juya halin da aka fara a wani ɗakin aiki a Mainz shekaru ɗari da suka wuce yanzu ya zama babban rafi mai canza duniya, kuma yana gudana har abada a bayan sararin sama har yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Louis Pasteur, masanin kimiyya mai girma na karni na 19, ya ci gaba da allurar rigakafi da hanyar kashe ƙwayoyin cuta, ya ceci ɗan adam daga tsoron cututtuka.
key_achievements: Ci gaban da rarraba allurar rigakafi
Ƙirƙirar hanyar kashe ƙwayoyin cuta (Hanyar Pasteur)
Gudunmawa ga rigakafin cututtuka da lafiyar jama'a
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun zama ginshiƙin likitancin zamani da lafiyar jama'a, sun ceci rayuka marasa adadi kuma sun ba ɗan adam bege.

louis-pasteur.epic:
A cikin daren Faransa na karni na 19, cikin gurbataccen iska mai cike da ƙurar ƙasa mai laushi da hayakin gawayi mai kaifi, wani mutum a gaban tsohuwar na'urar hangen nesa, idanunsa suna bin halittu marasa ganuwa da ke rawa a ƙarƙashin hasken fitila mai rauni. A cikin dakin gwaje-gwaje mai tsoho, cike da beraye, ƙarƙashin rufin da ya yi tsatsa, ya sadaukar da kansa ga tauraruwar gaskiya mai wucewa. Duk da gazawa da ba'a da yawa da suka danne kafadunsa, ruhunsa ya kasance an ƙarfafa shi da ƙarfen nufi marar karyawa, sunansa Louis Pasteur. Kaɗaicinsa ya yi zurfi kamar daren duhu, kuma damuwarsa ta yi zafi kamar lafa mai tafasa.

Allurar rigakafin da aka haifa daga hannunsa ita ce garkuwa ta ƙarshe da ke fuskantar tsoron guba mai kisa, kuma mu'ujiza ce da ta ɗaga ɗan adam wanda ya durƙusa a gaban babban bala'in ruɓewa. Tunaninsa na kawar da ƙwayoyin cuta da zafin ruwan zafi ya ba da haske ga rayukan da ke fama a cikin inuwar mutuwa. Cikin ƙyama da shakku, bai durƙusa ba, amma ya zurfafa cikin rami mai zurfi don shuka iri na gaskiya. Dakin gwaje-gwajensa lambu ne mai ban mamaki wanda ke fure da furannin bege a kan tokar yanke kauna.

Amma bai tsaya ba. A lokacin da dodo mai ban tsoro na cutar hauka ke sace mafarkin yara, zuciyarsa ta girgiza tare da wannan zafin. Don kada ya kashe wutar bege ta ƙarshe, ya yi ƙarfin hali ya sanya jikinsa a kan teburin gwaji. Ko da a cikin zazzaɓi mai tsanani da ciwo marar iyaka, ya tabbatar da ƙarfin hali da ke ɓoye a cikin zurfin ɗan adam. Gumin jikinsa ya faɗi a kan sanyin bene na dakin gwaje-gwaje, yana kammala ilimin kimiyyar canza ɗacin yanke kauna zuwa zaƙin bege.

Yanzu lokaci ya wuce, rayuka marasa adadi suna gudana a kan hanyar da ya share. Ƙaramin kwalba ɗaya mai ɗauke da sunansa, ɗigon maganin kashe ƙwayoyin cuta mai ɗauke da numfashinsa ya mamaye duniya. Duk da cewa barazanar ƙwayoyin cuta masu tsanani har yanzu tana nan, muna kiran sunansa kuma muna cin nasara kan tsoro. Ruhunsa bai taƙaita a cikin tsoffin littattafai ba, kamar allurar rigakafi mai rai, kamar hannu mai ɗumi da ke taimakon maƙwabta marasa lafiya, yana rayuwa har abada a cikin rayuwarmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Niccolò Machiavelli (1469-1527) ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya kuma masanin tunani daga Florence a zamanin Farfaɗo na Italiya, wanda ya kafa harsashin falsafar siyasa ta zamani ta hanyar littafinsa 'Yarima'.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya na Jamhuriyar Florence
Ya rubuta littafin siyasa 'Yarima'
An ɗauke shi a matsayin uban falsafar siyasa ta zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa na siyasa mai gaskiya ya ba da zurfin fahimta game da ainihin mulki kuma har yau ana ci gaba da tattaunawa a kai.

machiavelli.epic:
Niccolò Machiavelli (1469-1527) ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya, marubuci, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin tarihi daga Florence a zamanin Farfaɗo na Italiya. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 15, yankin Italiya ya kasance cikin rikice-rikicen siyasa da yaƙe-yaƙe marasa adadi, ba tare da wata ƙasa mai haɗin kai ba, kuma yana ƙarƙashin tasirin birane-jihohi daban-daban da kuma ƙasashen waje. A cikin wannan hargitsi, Florence ta yi gwagwarmaya don kiyaye 'yancinta mara tabbas, tana shawagi tsakanin mulkin gidan Medici da tsarin jamhuriya. An haifi Machiavelli a shekara ta 1469 a cikin wani tsohon gida mai daraja a Florence, inda ya sami ilimin Latin na gargajiya kuma ya zurfafa cikin tarihin tsohuwar Roma da tunanin siyasa. Tun yana saurayi, ya shaida da kansa yanayin siyasa mai sarkakiya na Florence a lokacin, kuma ya fara tunani mai zurfi game da gibin da ke tsakanin ka'ida da gaskiya, da kuma ainihin yanayin mulki mai tsauri. Wannan yanayin tarihi da abubuwan da ya fuskanta sun zama tushe mai mahimmanci wanda daga baya ya sanya shi zama majagaba na tunanin siyasa mai gaskiya.

Mafarkin rayuwar Niccolò Machiavelli ya zo a shekara ta 1498, lokacin da aka naɗa shi Sakatare na Biyu na Jamhuriyar Florence. Tsawon shekaru 14, ya gudanar da al'amuran diflomasiyya da na soja, ya shiga cikin tawagar diflomasiyya da yawa, kuma ya yi mu'amala kai tsaye da sarakunan ƙasashen Turai daban-daban. Ta hanyar haɗuwa da manyan masu mulki na lokacin, kamar Louis XII na Faransa, Maximilian I na Daular Roma Mai Tsarki, da Cesare Borgia, ɗan Paparoma Alexander VI, ya sami zurfin fahimta game da yadda ake samun mulki, yadda ake kiyaye shi, da kuma yadda ake rasa shi. Musamman, salon mulkin Cesare Borgia mai tsauri da inganci ya burge shi sosai. Amma a shekara ta 1512, lokacin da gidan Medici ya dawo Florence tare da goyon bayan sojojin Spain, jamhuriyar ta ruguje, kuma Machiavelli ya fuskanci gwaji mai tsanani: an kore shi daga dukkan muƙaman gwamnati, an ɗaure shi bisa zargin cin amana, kuma an azabtar da shi. Wannan lamari ya girgiza rayuwarsa har tushe, amma a lokaci guda ya zama wata dama ta zurfafa tunaninsa.

Bayan ya bar aikin gwamnati, Machiavelli ya rayu a matsayin gudun hijira a wani ƙaramin gona a wajen Florence, yana mai da hankali kan tunani mai zurfi da rubuce-rubuce shi kaɗai. A wannan lokacin ne ya fara tsara tunaninsa na siyasa, bisa ga abubuwan da ya fuskanta da kuma tarihin tsohuwar Roma. Babban aikinsa, 'Yarima' (The Prince), wani rubutun siyasa ne wanda aka rubuta a kusan shekara ta 1513 amma aka buga shi bayan mutuwarsa a shekara ta 1532. Ya ƙunshi shawarwari masu gaskiya da tsauri game da yadda sarki zai iya samun mulki, kiyaye shi, da kuma faɗaɗa shi. A cikin wannan littafi, ya jaddada fasahar mulki mai amfani don zaman lafiya da wadata na ƙasa, maimakon ɗabi'a ko manufofin addini, kuma ya nuna cewa wani lokaci zalunci ko yaudara na iya zama dole. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar 'Tattaunawa kan Livy' (Discourses on Livy), ya bincika kyawawan halaye da zaman lafiya na jamhuriya, kuma ya bar rubuce-rubuce daban-daban kamar 'Fasahar Yaƙi' (The Art of War) da 'Tarihin Florence' (Florentine Histories), yana gina gagarumin gadon ilimi a fannin siyasa, tarihi, da soja. Ya yi fatan a sake dawo da shi a aiki ta gidan Medici, amma burinsa bai cika ba, kuma ya mutu a Florence a shekara ta 1527.

Bayan mutuwar Machiavelli, littafin 'Yarima' ya haifar da gagarumin tasiri a duk faɗin Turai da zaran an buga shi. Sunansa sau da yawa ana amfani da shi a matsayin kalmar 'Machiavellianism', wanda ke nufin dabaru na siyasa marasa tausayi inda manufa ke halatta hanya, amma wannan yana da ƙarfi a matsayin sauƙaƙawa ko rashin fahimtar tunaninsa. Ta hanyar ajiye hukunce-hukuncen ɗabi'a a gefe da ƙoƙarin nazarin al'amuran siyasa kamar yadda suke, ana kiransa uban falsafar siyasa ta zamani da kimiyyar siyasa. Tunaninsa ya raba siyasa da ɗabi'a, kuma ya gabatar da tsarin gaskiya wanda ke ba da fifiko ga bukatun ƙasa, yana mai tasiri mai zurfi a tarihin tunanin siyasa na Yamma. Har yau, rubuce-rubucensa suna ba da zurfin fahimta game da ainihin mulki, rawar jagoranci, da dabarun rayuwar ƙasa, kuma ana ci gaba da nazari da tattaunawa a kai. Tunaninsa ya kuma yi tasiri mai mahimmanci ga tattaunawar masana tunanin siyasa na zamani kamar Thomas Hobbes da Jean Bodin, kuma har yau yana ba da zurfin fahimta ga waɗanda ke binciken ainihin mulki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mai tunani a Faransa ta karni na 18 wanda ya farkar da zamani ta hanyar yaƙar cin hanci da rashawa da zalunci da alƙalaminsa, yana wa'azin 'yanci da hankali.
key_achievements: Ya soki tsoffin al'adu da imani makaho
Ya yi adawa da iko da rashin adalci da alƙalaminsa
Ya ba da gudummawa ga yaɗa ra'ayoyin 'yanci da hankali
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya wuce lokaci, kuma ya kasance jagora na har abada ga waɗanda ke neman gaskiya da kuma adawa da rashin adalci.

voltaire.epic:
A titunan Faransa na karni na 18, inda hauka mai haske da duhu suka haɗu, inuwar cin hanci da rashawa da zalunci ta mamaye bayan abin rufe fuska mai kyau na Ancien Régime. A cikin wani ɗaki mai kunkuntar hanya a Paris, inda tsofaffin littattafai da alkalami suka taru, wata matashiyar rai ta sha wutar 'yanci. Ya yanke sarƙoƙin tsoffin al'adu da imani makaho, kuma ya haskaka duniya da hasken hankali. Yayin da ƙararrawa mai rauni na waɗanda aka zalunta ke buga tagogi, kuma dariyar girman kai na masu iko ke ratsa kunnuwansa, shi kaɗai ya farka, yana shan wahala, yana kuma goge takobin gaskiya. Duniya ta nuna shi a matsayin mahaukaci, amma a idanunsa, fitowar sabon zamani ta riga ta fara haskawa.

Zarginsa da ya fito daga ƙarshen alƙalaminsa ya zama takobi mai kaifi wanda ya girgiza ganuwar da ke da ƙarfi, kuma izgilinsa ya girgiza kursiyin iko kamar tsawa. Ko da a kan sanyin dutsen kurkuku, ko kuma a cikin baƙon ƙasa ta gudun hijira, ruhinsa bai karye ba, sai ma ya ƙara ƙarfi. Ya canza sunaye da yawa, ya ɓoye a bayan sunayen bogi don shuka iri na gaskiya. A gaban ɗacin gaskiya da raunin ɗan adam, wani lokaci yakan faɗa cikin yanke ƙauna, amma farin cikin fahimta da ke biyo baya ya sake tashe shi. Ko da a cikin gwagwarmaya ta kaɗaici, bai taɓa zama shi kaɗai ba. A gefensa akwai fahimtar da ke karanta yanayin zamani, da kuma zurfin ƙauna ga ɗan adam.

Duk lokacin da alƙalaminsa ya yi rawa, shiru da aka zalunta ya karye, kuma tunanin da aka ɗaure ya sami fuka-fuki. Kukan da ya yi game da tsarin zamantakewa mara daidaito ya sanya ƙarfin hali a cikin zukatan mutane da yawa, kuma izgilinsa ga camfi da son zuciya ya kunna wutar sha'awar gaskiya. Kafin sarƙoƙin kurkukun Bastille su karye, rubuce-rubucensa sun riga sun rushe kurkuku da yawa a cikin zukatan mutane. Ko da lokacin da takobin iko ya nuna wuyansa, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba, ya kuma yi adawa da rashin adalci da kalmomi masu ƙarfi. Ko da yake tafiya ce mai wahala, ya ci gaba da tafiya a hankali zuwa ga manyan manufofin 'yanci da adalci.

Yanzu karni ya canza. Sunansa ba a ɗaure shi kawai a cikin haruffa masu ƙura na tsofaffin littattafai ba, amma har yanzu yana raye a cikin iskar wannan zamani da muke numfashi. Kalmominsa sun wuce lokaci, sun zama kamfas ga masu neman gaskiya, da kuma makami ga waɗanda ke adawa da rashin adalci. A inda raƙuman ruwa na tunani mai 'yanci suka wuce, ruhinsa ya kafa tushe mai ƙarfi, yana ci gaba da fitar da sabuwar rayuwa. Gadonsa ba kawai abin tarihi na baya ba ne, amma yana ci gaba da haskakawa a matsayin jagora na har abada ga dukkanmu da muke rayuwa a yanzu kuma muke mafarkin nan gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alexander Graham Bell, masanin kimiyya Ba'amurke haifaffen Scotland na karshen karni na 19, ya kirkiro wayar tarho mai amfani wanda ya kawo sauyi a sadarwa.
key_achievements: Kirkirar wayar tarho ta farko mai amfani
Kafa Kamfanin Wayar Tarho na Bell da kuma kasuwancinsa
Ilimin kurame da bincike kan ilimin sauti
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kirkire-kirkirensa sun zama ginshikin fasahar sadarwa ta zamani, inda suka hada kan duniya tare da fadada iyakokin sadarwar dan Adam.

alexander-graham-bell.epic:
Alexander Graham Bell (3 Maris 1847 – 2 Agusta 1922) wani masanin kimiyya ne kuma mai kirkire-kirkire Ba'amurke haifaffen Scotland, wanda aka fi sani da mai kirkirar wayar tarho mai amfani, wanda ya kawo sauyi a yadda bil'adama ke sadarwa. An haife shi a Edinburgh a tsakiyar karni na 19, wani zamani mai cike da hargitsi inda juyin juya halin masana'antu ya mamaye Turai da Arewacin Amurka. Tun yana yaro, Bell ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga sauti da harshe. Kakansa ya kasance dan wasan kwaikwayo kuma malamin magana, yayin da mahaifinsa ya kasance shahararren masanin ilimin sauti wanda ya kirkiro tsarin 'Maganar Ganin Gani' ga kurame. Musamman, kurame na mahaifiyarsa ya ba wa Bell mai karamin karfi kwazo mai tsanani don fahimtar kalubalen sadarwa da kuma yadda za a shawo kansu. Ta hanyar tasirin iyalinsa, ya fara shiga cikin ilimin sauti da ilimin sauti tun da wuri, wanda ya zama muhimmin harsashi ga manyan kirkire-kirkirensa na gaba. Sadaukarwarsa ga ilimin kurame ya wuce sana'a kawai, ya jagorance shi zuwa tafiya ta rayuwa don bincika ikon sauti da ainihin sadarwa. Wannan tarihin ya zama dalili mai muhimmanci da ya sa ya fara sha'awar fasahar canza sauti zuwa siginar lantarki don watsawa.

Rayuwar Bell ta dauki wani babban canji a farkon shekarun 1870 tare da hijirarsa zuwa nahiyar Arewacin Amurka. Bayan ya koma Ontario, Kanada, sai ya wuce zuwa Boston, inda ya yi aiki a matsayin malami a makarantar kurame, yana mai da hankali kan ilimin kurame. Yayin da yake aiki a matsayin farfesa na ilimin sauti a Jami'ar Boston, ya fara bincike sosai kan yiwuwar watsa sauti ta hanyar lantarki. A lokacin, masana kimiyya da masu kirkire-kirkire da yawa suna bunkasa fasahar telegraph, amma Bell ya mai da hankali kan tunanin 'wayar tarho' wanda zai watsa muryar dan Adam kai tsaye, fiye da aika sakonnin Morse kawai. Wayar tarho wata na'ura ce da ke ba da damar tattaunawar murya tsakanin mutane biyu masu nisa ta hanyar siginar lantarki, wani sabon tunani mai ban mamaki wanda ba a taba tunani ba a lokacin. Tare da mataimakinsa Thomas Watson, yayin da suke gudanar da bincike kan 'multiple telegraph' wanda zai iya aika sakonni da yawa lokaci guda ta hanyar wayoyin telegraph, ba zato ba tsammani ya gano yiwuwar watsa murya. Ko da yake akwai rubuce-rubuce da ke nuna cewa Antonio Meucci na Italiya ya kirkiro wayar tarho shekaru 21 kafin Bell, Bell ya bayar da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen sanya ta mai amfani a kasuwanci da kuma yada ta ga jama'a.

Tsarin kirkirar wayar tarho ya kasance jerin gwagwarmaya da kalubale marasa adadi. Bell ya ci gaba da bincike da juriya duk da karancin kudade, matsalolin fasaha, da kuma shakku daga mutane. Musamman, gasar mallakar fasaha da masu fafatawa kamar Elisha Gray, wanda kamfanin telegraph na Western Union ke tallafawa, ya zama babban matsin lamba a tafiyarsa ta kirkire-kirkire. A ranar 7 ga Maris, 1876, Bell ya cimma wani muhimmin mataki ta hanyar samun takardar mallakar fasaha don na'urar watsa murya. Kuma kwana uku bayan haka, a ranar 10 ga Maris, 1876, wani lokaci mai tarihi ya faru a dakin gwaje-gwajensa na Boston. Bell ya zubar da sinadarin batir a kan tufafinsa bisa kuskure, kuma ya kira mataimakinsa Thomas Watson, yana cewa, “Mr. Watson, zo nan, ina so in gan ka.” An ji wannan magana sarai ta hanyar wayar tarho ta Watson a dakin da ke kusa, kuma an rubuta shi a matsayin nasarar kiran murya ta farko ta hanyar wayar tarho a tarihin dan Adam. Wannan nasarar ta ba Bell babban kwarin gwiwa, kuma daga baya ya nuna wayar tarho ga jama'a, yana bayyana wa duniya damar da ke cikinsa. Irin waɗannan nune-nunen sun haifar da sha'awa mai yawa daga jama'a, kuma sun shimfida harsashin nasarar kasuwancin wayar tarho.

Kirkire-kirkire na Alexander Graham Bell sun kawo sauyi mai juyin juya hali a yadda bil'adama ke sadarwa. A shekarar 1877, ya kafa Kamfanin Wayar Tarho na Bell kuma ya fara rarraba wayar tarho a kasuwanci, wanda ya zama mafarin gina hanyar sadarwa ta duniya. Wayar tarho ta hada kan mutane ta hanyar wuce iyakokin kasa, kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a kan al'umma, tattalin arziki, da al'adu gaba daya. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, fasahar wayar tarho ta ci gaba da bunkasa ba kakkautawa, inda ta shimfida harsashin wayoyin zamani da sadarwa ta intanet a yau. Baya ga wayar tarho, Bell ya kirkiro wasu kirkire-kirkire daban-daban kamar Photophone da Audiometer, kuma sha'awarsa ga ilimin kurame ta ci gaba har tsawon rayuwarsa. Gadonsa ya kasance alama ce ta kokari marar yankewa don inganta ainihin sadarwar dan Adam da kuma samun damar yin amfani da ita, fiye da ci gaban fasaha kawai. Nasarorin Bell, kamar fitilar Edison da telegraph mara waya ta Marconi, sun bayar da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban wayewar dan Adam, tare da nasarorin sauran manyan masu kirkire-kirkire da suka jagoranci juyin juya halin kimiyya da fasaha a karshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Amelia Earhart ta kasance matuƙin jirgi ƴar Amurka a farkon ƙarni na 20, lokacin da jirgin sama ke bunƙasa, kuma ta kafa tarihin tashi sama da yawa, ciki har da zama mace ta farko da ta tsallaka Tekun Atlantika ita kaɗai.
key_achievements: Mace ta farko da ta tsallaka Tekun Atlantika ita kaɗai (1932)
Nasara ta farko a jirgin sama ita kaɗai daga Hawaii zuwa California (1935)
Co-kafa ƙungiyar mata masu tashi sama 'The Ninety-Nines'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta kasance alamar ƙarfin hali da ruhin ƙalubale, tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mata don shiga cikin al'umma da ci gaban fannin jirgin sama.

amelia-earhart.epic:
Amelia Mary Earhart (an haife ta a 1897) ta kasance majagaba ce a fannin jirgin sama, marubuciya, kuma mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin mata ƴar Amurka a farkon ƙarni na 20, lokacin da jirgin sama ke bunƙasa. An haife ta a Atchison, Kansas a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, ta nuna halin kasada da ƴancin kai tun tana ƙarama. A wancan lokacin, jirgin sama sabon fanni ne da ke tasowa, kuma tashi sama kalubale ne mai haɗari wanda ake ganin na maza ne kawai. Duk da haka, jirgin sama na minti 10 da ta yi a California a 1920 ya canza rayuwarta gaba ɗaya. Amelia Earhart, wacce ta burge da al'ajabin tashi sama, nan da nan ta fara horon tashi sama, kuma a 1921, ta koyi fasahar tashi sama a ƙarƙashin jagorancin malamar jirgin sama mace, Neta Snook. Ta cika da sha'awar tashi sama, kuma duk da ƙuntatawa da nuna bambanci na zamantakewa a wancan lokacin, ta kasance a shirye don ci gaba da bin burinta ba tare da tsoro ba. Wannan lokaci ne mai cike da tashin hankali inda ɗan adam ya fara cin nasara a sararin sama kuma ya yi mafarkin damammaki marasa iyaka.

Sunan Amelia Earhart ya fara yaɗuwa a duniya a 1928, lokacin da ta zama mace ta farko da ta tsallaka Tekun Atlantika a matsayin fasinja. Wannan jirgin ya ba ta laƙabin 'Lady Lindbergh', amma rawar da ta taka a matsayin fasinja maimakon matuƙin jirgi bai gamsar da ainihin burinta ba. Ta ƙone da ƙarfin hali don ta riƙe sitiyarin da kanta kuma ta ci nasara a sararin sama. Wannan ƙwarewar ta zama wani muhimmin juyi ga Amelia Earhart, kuma bayan haka, ta fara ƙalubale marasa iyaka don tabbatar da matsayinta a matsayin matuƙin jirgi mace. Ta yi aiki a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa 'The Ninety-Nines', wata ƙungiya da ke ƙarfafawa da tallafawa mata masu tashi sama, kuma ta ba da gudummawa sosai wajen faɗaɗa rawar da mata ke takawa da damammaki a fannin jirgin sama. A fannin jirgin sama, wanda ba a saba gani ba ga mata a wancan lokacin, ayyukanta sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa kuma sun zama alamar ƙarfin hali da ke wuce iyakokin jinsi.

A ranar 20 ga Mayu, 1932, Amelia Earhart ta cimma wani gagarumin aiki da zai ci gaba da rayuwa a tarihi ta hanyar tsallaka Tekun Atlantika ita kaɗai daga Newfoundland zuwa Ireland. Wannan shi ne tarihin farko na mace da ta tashi sama ita kaɗai a Tekun Atlantika, kuma saboda wannan nasarar, Majalisar Dokokin Amurka ta ba ta 'Distinguished Flying Cross'. An yi wannan jirgin a cikin gwaje-gwaje da yawa na mummunan yanayi da matsalolin inji, amma an shawo kansu ta hanyar ƙarfin halinta da ƙwarewar tashi sama. Bayan haka, ƙalubalenta sun ci gaba, kuma a 1935, ta zama mutum na farko da ya tsallaka Tekun Pasifik ita kaɗai daga Honolulu, Hawaii zuwa Oakland, California. Wannan an ɗauke shi ɗaya daga cikin hanyoyin tashi sama mafi haɗari a wancan lokacin, kuma ya zama wata dama ta sake tabbatar da ƙarfin hali da fasaharta. Ta nuna ba kawai ta kafa tarihin tashi sama ba, har ma ta nuna cewa mata ma za su iya samun nasara a fannoni masu haɗari da ƙalubale daidai da maza.

A 1937, Amelia Earhart ta ɓace a sararin Tekun Pasifik yayin da take ƙoƙarin yin jirgin sama na zagaye duniya. Batan ta ya girgiza duniya, kuma duk da bincike, ba a taɓa samun ta ba. Duk da haka, jirginta ya wuce kasada kawai, yana ɗauke da ma'anar alama ta ƙalubalantar iyakokin ɗan adam da faɗaɗa damammakin mata. Amelia Earhart ana tunawa da ita a matsayin alamar ƙarfin hali, juriya, da ruhin ƴanci, kuma har yau, tana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa don kada su daina bin burinsu. Gadonta ba wai kawai ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban fannin jirgin sama ba, har ma ya yi tasiri sosai wajen inganta rawar da mata ke takawa a cikin al'umma da matsayinsu. Ƙalubalenta masu ƙarfin hali, tare da nasarorin wasu mata majagaba na zamaninta, kamar Bessie Coleman, sun zama wani muhimmin mataki wajen faɗaɗa damammakin mata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Andrew Carnegie ɗan kasuwa ne kuma mai ba da agaji ɗan asalin Scotland-Amurka wanda ya jagoranci masana'antar Amurka a ƙarshen karni na 19, ya gina daular karfe kuma ya mayar da dukiya mai yawa ga al'umma.
key_achievements: Jagorancin ci gaban masana'antar karfe ta Amurka.
Kafa da gudanar da Kamfanin Karfe na Carnegie.
Manyan ayyukan agaji bisa ga 'The Gospel of Wealth'.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukan agajinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga ruhin kasuwanci da alhakin zamantakewa a cikin al'ummar jari-hujja ta zamani.

andrew-carnegie.epic:
Andrew Carnegie (1835-1919) ɗan kasuwa ne kuma mai ba da agaji ɗan asalin Scotland-Amurka wanda ya jagoranci masana'antar Amurka a ƙarshen karni na 19. An haife shi a Dunfermline, Scotland a shekara ta 1835, ɗan wani mai saƙa ne, ya fuskanci matsanancin talauci yayin da masana'antar gida ke raguwa a cikin raƙuman ruwa na juyin juya halin masana'antu. Iyalinsa sun ƙaura zuwa Allegheny, Pennsylvania, Amurka a shekara ta 1848 don neman rayuwa mafi kyau, kuma matashin Carnegie, yana da shekaru 13, ya zama dole ya ɗauki nauyin iyali ta hanyar aiki a matsayin yaro mai ɗaukar zaren (bobbin boy) a masana'antar saƙa. Duk da cewa ya sha wahala aiki mai wuya da rana, ya himmatu wajen koyon ilimi da kansa da daddare, kuma ya koyi fasahar telegraphy yayin da yake aiki a matsayin mai isar da saƙon waya a kamfanin telegraph, inda ya ga damar da ke cikin fannin sadarwa. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fuskanta tun farko sun kafa masa darajar aiki tuƙuru da tanadi, kuma sun zama tushen gina burinsa mai ƙarfi na gaba.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Carnegie ya zo ne lokacin da ya shiga Kamfanin Jirgin Kasa na Pennsylvania. Ya yi aiki a matsayin sakatare kuma mai aikin telegraph ga mai kula Thomas A. Scott, inda ya koyi hadaddun hanyoyin aiki na masana'antar jirgin kasa da kuma yanayin jari-hujja. A ƙarƙashin jagorancin Scott, Carnegie ya fahimci ainihin kasuwancin jirgin kasa kuma ya fara saka hannun jari na farko bisa ga fahimtarsa. Ya saka hannun jari a kamfanoni irin su Woodruff Sleeping Car, kamfanin motocin barci, da kuma rijiyoyin mai, da kamfanin gina gadoji, Keystone Bridge Company, inda ya samu riba mai yawa. Musamman ma, ya gane tun da wuri yuwuwar karfe, wanda ke da mahimmanci ga gina jirgin kasa, kuma ya fara neman shiga masana'antar karfe. Wannan ya zama tushen da ya kafa kansa a matsayin ɗan kasuwa, ba kawai ma'aikaci ba, kuma daga baya ya gina wata babbar daular karfe wacce ta girgiza tushen masana'antar Amurka.

A cikin shekarun 1870, Carnegie ya fara mai da hankali kan masana'antar karfe, kuma ya shiga cikin samar da karfe sosai ta hanyar kafa Edgar Thomson Steel Works. Ya haɓaka ingancin samarwa da rage farashi ta hanyar dabarun haɗin kai na tsaye (Vertical Integration), inda ya mallaki kuma ya sarrafa duk matakai daga hakar albarkatun kasa zuwa sufuri, samar da karfe, da samar da samfura. A shekara ta 1892, ya haɗa kamfanoni da yawa masu alaƙa da karfe don kafa Carnegie Steel Company, wanda ya zama babban kamfanin samar da karfe a Amurka. Amma hanyar nasararsa ba ta rasa gwaji ba. Yajin aikin Homestead na 1892 ya kasance wani lamari mai mahimmanci wanda ya nuna tsananin rikici tsakanin yanayin aiki mara kyau na ma'aikata da kuma neman riba na ɗan kasuwa, wanda ya bar babban tabo a kan sunan Carnegie. Wannan lamarin ya sa ya yi tunani mai zurfi game da alhakin zamantakewa na dukiya, kuma a shekara ta 1901, ya sayar da kamfanin karfensa ga J.P. Morgan kan dala miliyan 480, ya janye daga kasuwanci kuma ya fara mai da hankali kan ayyukan agaji.

Bayan ya yi ritaya daga kasuwanci, Andrew Carnegie ya aiwatar da falsafarsa, 'The Gospel of Wealth', wato imani cewa masu arziki su raba dukiyarsu da alhakin ci gaban al'umma. A tsawon rayuwarsa, ya ba da gudummawar dukiya mai yawa fiye da dala miliyan 350 (wanda ya kai biliyoyin daloli a yau) ga ayyukan agaji don ilimi, kimiyya, da inganta zaman lafiya. Musamman ma, ya gina fiye da dakunan karatu na Carnegie 2,500 a duk faɗin duniya don haɓaka damar jama'a ga ilimi, kuma ya kafa Carnegie Corporation of New York, Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, da Carnegie Institution for Science, yana ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ɗan adam da zaman lafiya. Waɗannan ƙoƙarinsa sun zama abin koyi ga ayyukan agaji na zamani, kuma sun bar wani muhimmin misali na yadda nasarar kasuwanci za ta iya haɗuwa da alhakin zamantakewa. Rayuwarsa, tare da ayyukan agaji na wasu manyan 'yan kasuwa na zamaninsa kamar John D. Rockefeller, tana gabatar da muhimman tambayoyi game da alhakin da rawar da al'ummar jari-hujja ke takawa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Edgar Allan Poe marubuci ne, mawaki na zamanin soyayya na Amurka a karni na 19, wanda ya fara kirkira nau'in labarin bincike kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban gajerun labarai.
key_achievements: Ya fara kirkira nau'in labarin bincike na zamani
Ya taka rawar majagaba a adabin gajerun labarai na Amurka
Babban mai fasaha a adabin ban tsoro da na tunani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan nau'ikan adabi na zamani, kuma sun kasance manyan ayyuka masu bincika zurfin tunanin ɗan adam.

edgar-allan-poe.epic:
Edgar Allan Poe (an haife shi a shekara ta 1809) ya kasance marubuci, mawaki, edita, kuma mai sukar adabi wanda ya wakilci zamanin soyayya na Amurka a karni na 19. An haife shi a ranar 19 ga Janairu, 1809, a Boston, a matsayin ɗa na biyu ga ma'auratan 'yan wasan kwaikwayo masu yawon shakatawa. Kafin ya kai shekara biyu, ya fuskanci bala'in rasa iyayensa duka, inda ya zama maraya. Daga baya, ko da yake ba a ɗauke shi a matsayin ɗa ba, ya girma a ƙarƙashin kulawar John Allan, wani attajiri ɗan kasuwa a Richmond, Virginia, da matarsa Frances Allan. Ya sami ilimi a cikin yanayi mai kwanciyar hankali a lokacin yarintarsa, amma dangantakarsa da John Allan ta kasance mai rikitarwa da cike da sabani. Ya shiga Jami'ar Virginia a 1826, amma dole ne ya bar makarantar kafin ya cika shekara ɗaya saboda bashin caca da matsalolin kuɗin makaranta. Wannan rashin kwanciyar hankali na farkon rayuwarsa ya jefa inuwar matsalolin kuɗi da kadaici waɗanda suka bi shi har tsawon rayuwarsa.

A lokacin da Poe ya zama saurayi, ya kafa babban buri na zama marubuci na farko a Amurka wanda zai dogara ga rubuce-rubuce kawai don rayuwa. Amma kasuwar adabi ta Amurka a lokacin, wacce ba ta balaga ba, ba ta isa ta ɗauki sha'awarsa ba. A shekara ta 1827, ya shiga aikin soja ta amfani da sunan bogi, kuma daga baya ya shiga Kwalejin Soja ta West Point, amma bai iya daidaitawa da rayuwar soja ba kuma an kore shi a 1831. A wannan lokacin, ya buga wasu tarin waƙoƙi, amma bai sami babban kulawa ko lada ta kuɗi ba. Daga tsakiyar shekarun 1830, ya fara aiki a matsayin edita ga mujallu na adabi daban-daban kamar 'Southern Literary Messenger' da 'Graham's Magazine', inda ya fara samun suna saboda sukar adabi mai kaifi da mahimmanci. Wannan lokaci ya kasance lokacin da hazakarsa ta adabi ta bunƙasa, amma a lokaci guda, dole ne ya fuskanci matsalolin kuɗi da wahalar rayuwa. A kusan 1835, ya auri 'yar uwarsa Virginia Eliza Clemm Poe, mai shekaru 13, wanda ya ba shi kwanciyar hankali ta zuciya mai mahimmanci a rayuwarsa.

Rayuwar Poe ta kasance jerin bala'o'i na kansa da gwagwarmayar fasaha. A shekara ta 1842, lokacin da matarsa ƙaunatacciya Virginia ta kamu da tarin fuka kuma ta kwanta rashin lafiya, rayuwarsa ta faɗa cikin zurfin yanke kauna. Dogon rashin lafiyar matarsa da mutuwarta a 1847 sun kawo masa baƙin ciki da azaba marasa misaltuwa, kuma wannan ya kasance mai zurfi a cikin dukkan ayyukansa a matsayin jigogi na mutuwa, rashi, da rashin dawwamar kyau. Matsalolin kuɗi masu tsanani da azabar tunani da mutuwar matarsa ta haifar sun jefa shi cikin shaye-shaye da baƙin ciki, wanda ya ƙara lalata rayuwarsa. Duk da haka, a wannan lokacin ne ya samar da manyan ayyukansa. 'The Murders in the Rue Morgue', wanda aka buga a 1841, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin aikin farko da ya fara kirkira nau'in labarin bincike na zamani, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga marubuta da yawa kamar Conan Doyle. Bugu da ƙari, waƙar 'The Raven', wacce aka buga a 1845, ta kawo masa shahara mai yawa, amma har yanzu matsalolin kuɗi ba su warware ba. Ya yi tasiri sosai ba kawai a kan labaran asiri da na ban tsoro ba, har ma a kan samuwar nau'in labarin kimiyya.

Edgar Allan Poe ya mutu a ranar 7 ga Oktoba, 1849, yana da shekaru 40, a Baltimore, a cikin wata mutuwar da ba a fahimta ba. Mutuwarsa ta kasance asiri har zuwa yau, kuma ta zama alamar ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da bala'i. Bayan mutuwarsa, an fara sake kimanta ayyukansa a duk faɗin duniya, ba kawai a Amurka ba, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a kan mawakan Faransa masu alamar alamomi, inda marubuta kamar Charles Baudelaire suka ba da gudummawa wajen fassara da yaɗa ayyukansa. Ana kiransa majagaba na gajerun labarai kuma uban labarin bincike, kuma ya nuna hazaka ta musamman wajen bincika duhun tunanin ɗan adam da tsoro. Ayyukansa sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga fannoni daban-daban na fasaha kamar adabi, fina-finai, da kiɗa, kuma ana sake fassara su har zuwa yau. Rayuwarsa mai cike da bala'i da gwagwarmayar fasaha suna da alaƙa da wahalar da marubuta irin su Baudelaire da Dostoevsky na karni na 19 a Turai suka fuskanta, kuma suna sa mu yi tunani a kan tafiya ta kadaici ta mai fasaha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ernest Hemingway marubuci ne ɗan Amurka na tsakiyar karni na 20 wanda ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta adabi saboda salon rubutunsa mai sauƙi da rayuwarsa mai cike da kasada.
key_achievements: Kafa salon rubutu mai sauƙi da rashin fahimta (Iceberg Theory)
Lashe kyautar Pulitzer don 『The Old Man and the Sea』
Lashe kyautar Nobel ta adabi a 1954
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Iceberg Theory' dinsa ta yi tasiri sosai a kan adabin karni na 20, kuma ana ci gaba da karanta ayyukansa a matsayin manyan ayyuka har zuwa yau.

ernest-hemingway.epic:
Ernest Miller Hemingway (1899-1961) marubuci ne ɗan Amurka, marubucin gajerun labarai, kuma ɗan jarida wanda ya rayu a cikin lokaci mai cike da rudani a farkon da tsakiyar karni na 20. An haife shi a ranar 21 ga Yuli, 1899, a Oak Park, Illinois, ya girma a ƙarƙashin mahaifinsa likita da mahaifiyarsa mawaƙiya, inda ya haɓaka sha'awarsa ta farko ga yanayi da adabi. A lokacin, Amurka tana fuskantar iskar canji a duk faɗin al'umma, yayin da masana'antu da inuwar yaƙe-yaƙe na duniya suka fara bayyana. Bayan kammala karatunsa na sakandare, Ernest Hemingway ya yi aiki a matsayin ɗan jarida a Kansas City Star, inda ya koyi salon rubutu mai sauƙi da kai tsaye, wanda daga baya ya zama tushen 'salon tattalin arziki da rashin fahimta' wanda ya ratsa duk ayyukansa. Wannan salon yana da halin kawar da kalmomin da ba dole ba kuma yana isar da ainihin abin da ke ciki kawai, yana barin babban tasiri ga mai karatu. Rayuwarsa ta farko cike take da sha'awar kasada da gogewa, kuma wannan yana da alaƙa sosai da rayuwar haruffa a cikin ayyukansa. A duk rayuwarsa, ya nemi ya bincika ainihin rayuwa da ma'anar wanzuwar ɗan adam.

Wani muhimmin lokaci a rayuwar Ernest Hemingway da adabinsa shine gogewarsa a yakin duniya na farko. A cikin 1918, ya ji rauni mai tsanani yayin da yake aiki a matsayin direban motar asibiti na Red Cross a gaban Italiya, kuma wannan ya bar alama mara gogewa a kan ra'ayinsa na duniya da ayyukansa. Ganin ta'asar yaƙi da raunin ɗan adam kai tsaye ya sa ya zurfafa cikin jigogi na duniya kamar rayuwa da mutuwa, jaruntaka da yanke kauna. Bayan yaƙin, ya koma Paris, inda ya yi hulɗa da marubutan da aka sani da 'Lost Generation,' yana kafa tushen adabinsa. Littafinsa na 1926, 『The Sun Also Rises』, ya haifar da babban tasiri ta hanyar nuna matasa masu yawo bayan yaƙin, kuma a cikin 1929, ya tabbatar da sunansa a matsayin marubuci tare da 『A Farewell to Arms』, yana nuna soyayya da asara da ke fitowa daga bala'in yaƙi. Ayyukansa a wannan lokacin sun bincika raunukan yaƙi da nihilism, yayin da kuma suke bincika mutuncin ɗan adam da dole ne a samu a cikinsu.

Daga baya, Ernest Hemingway ya ci gaba da jefa kansa cikin sahun gaba na rayuwa, yana shiga cikin yakin basasa na Spain da yakin duniya na biyu, ko kuma yana aiki a matsayin ɗan jarida na yaƙi. Kwarewarsa a yakin basasa na Spain ta zama tushen babban aikinsa na 1940, 『For Whom the Bell Tolls』, wanda ya nuna bala'in yaƙi da haɗin kai na ɗan adam. Ya haɗa abubuwan da ya samu daga ayyukan kasada kamar farauta a Afirka da kamun kifi a Cuba cikin ayyukansa, wanda ya ƙara musu rayuwa da zurfi. Amma rayuwarsa cike take da gwaji kamar yadda take da ɗaukaka. Aure da saki da yawa, rashin lafiya, da shaye-shaye sun ci gaba da addabar shi. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin na kansa, ya sake kai kololuwar adabi tare da buga 『The Old Man and the Sea』 a 1952. Wannan aikin ya nuna alamar jajircewar ɗan adam da mutunci ta hanyar gwagwarmayar mai kamun kifi tsoho, yana ba da zurfin motsin rai ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya.

Nasarar 『The Old Man and the Sea』 ta kai ga lambar yabo ta Pulitzer a 1953, kuma a ƙarshe, a 1954, ya kai kololuwar nasarorin adabinsa ta hanyar lashe kyautar Nobel a fannin adabi don "ƙwarewarsa a cikin adabin labarai na zamani da kuma tasirin salon da ya nuna a cikin aikinsa na baya-bayan nan, 『The Old Man and the Sea』." Ernest Hemingway ya yi tasiri sosai a kan adabin karni na 20 tare da salon rubutunsa mai sauƙi da rashin fahimta, wanda aka sani da 'Iceberg Theory.' Wannan wata dabara ce ta adabi wacce ke nuna cewa akwai ma'anoni da motsin rai da yawa da ke ɓoye fiye da abin da ke bayyane a saman. Hotonsa na kasada da ƙarfi ya burge mutane da yawa, kuma ana ci gaba da karanta ayyukansa a matsayin manyan ayyukan adabin Amurka har zuwa yau. A ranar 2 ga Yuli, 1961, ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa, amma gadon adabinsa ya wuce lokaci, yana ba da ilhami ga marubuta da yawa, kuma tare da ayyukan marubuta na zamani kamar William Faulkner da John Steinbeck, waɗanda suka bincika yaƙi da yanayin ɗan adam, ya zama wani muhimmin ginshiƙi na adabin Amurka na karni na 20.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Henry David Thoreau marubuci ne, masanin falsafa, mai nazarin yanayi, kuma mai bin falsafar wuce gona da iri na Amurka a karni na 19, wanda ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin wuce gona da iri da rashin biyayya ga gwamnati.
key_achievements: Ya gabatar da rayuwa mai dacewa da yanayi ta hanyar littafinsa "Walden".
Ya tsara ka'idar juriya mara tashin hankali ta hanyar "Civil Disobedience".
Ya shiga cikin motsin kawar da bauta da gaske.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya zaburar da motsin kare muhalli da motsin juriya mara tashin hankali, kuma yana da tasiri mai zurfi a kan al'ummar zamani.

henry-david-thoreau.epic:
Henry David Thoreau (1817-1862) marubuci ne, masanin falsafa, mai nazarin yanayi, mai bin falsafar wuce gona da iri, kuma mai kin biyan haraji na Amurka a karni na 19. A lokacin da masana'antu da son abin duniya suka yi yawa, ya gabatar da tunaninsa na musamman, yana mai jaddada 'yancin ruhaniya na mutum da daidaituwa da yanayi. An haife shi a Concord, Massachusetts, kuma ya kammala karatu daga Jami'ar Harvard, ya yi aikin malami na ɗan lokaci, amma ya yi shakkar ilimin gargajiya kuma ya nemi rayuwa mai zaman kanta. Tunaninsa yana da alaƙa mai zurfi da motsin falsafar wuce gona da iri wanda ya mamaye duniyar ilimi ta Amurka a lokacin, wato falsafar da ke ba da fifiko ga hankali mai wuce hankali da gogewa, da gaskiyar ciki ta mutum. Mu'amalarsa da Ralph Waldo Emerson ta yi tasiri mai girma a kan samuwar tunaninsa, kuma ya fara aiwatar da falsafarsa ta hanyar fara rayuwa a cikin daji a gonar Emerson. Wannan lokacin ya kasance lokacin tashin hankali ga Amurka saboda fadada yamma da batun bauta, kuma ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga waɗannan matsalolin zamantakewa. Thoreau ya saba wa dabi'un son abin duniya na al'ummar lokacin, yana mai imani cewa za a iya samun farin ciki na gaskiya da 'yanci ta hanyar rayuwa mai sauƙi da dogaro da kai.

Babban mafari a rayuwar Henry David Thoreau shine lokacin da ya fara zama a cikin bukkarsa da ya gina da kansa a gefen Tafkin Walden kusa da Concord, a ranar 4 ga Yuli, 1845. Wannan wani yunkuri ne na kubuta daga takunkumin wayewa, don bincika ainihin kansa ta hanyar rayuwa mai dogaro da kai da sauƙi a cikin yanayi. A wannan lokacin, ya shagaltu da lura da yanayi, tunani, da rubutu. Wannan gogewa ta zama tushen babban aikinsa, “Walden; ko, Rayuwa a cikin Daji,” wanda ke dauke da falsafarsa da ke sukar rayuwar son abin duniya, da kuma jaddada sadarwa da yanayi, da wadatar ciki. Bugu da ƙari, ya nuna adawarsa ga yakin Mexico da Amurka da bauta ta hanyar kin biyan haraji. Saboda haka, an daure shi dare daya a kurkuku, kuma wannan gogewa ta zama wahayi ga wani muhimmin rubutunsa, “Civil Disobedience.” “Civil Disobedience” rubutu ne da ke kare juriya ta lamiri ta mutum ga dokoki marasa adalci da gwamnati, kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma ga mutane kamar Mahatma Gandhi da Martin Luther King Jr. a baya.

Ko da bayan ya kammala rayuwarsa ta shekaru biyu da watanni biyu a Tafkin Walden, Thoreau bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba a kan imaninsa kuma ya ci gaba da rike ra'ayi mai mahimmanci game da rashin adalci na zamantakewa. Ya shiga cikin motsin kawar da bauta da gaske, kuma musamman, ya yi jawabai da yawa yana kare John Brown, mai kawar da bauta. Lokacin da aka kama John Brown kuma aka kashe shi saboda harin Harper's Ferry, Thoreau ya kira shi “mala'ika” da “jarumi” kuma ya tabbatar da ayyukansa. Ko da yake al'ummar lokacin sun soki ayyukansa, ya yi imani cewa yin aiki bisa ga lamirinsa shine mafi muhimmanci. Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai aikin bincike, mai kera fensir, da malami don samun abin rayuwa, amma babban sha'awarsa koyaushe shine nazarin yanayi da rubutu. Ya bar rubuce-rubuce masu yawa na lura da yanayi, waɗanda ke ɗauke da zurfin fahimtar falsafa fiye da rubuce-rubuce kawai. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya don neman 'yancin ruhaniya da daidaituwa da yanayi maimakon wadatar abin duniya, kuma wannan daraja ce da ba ta canzawa a cikin wahalar tattalin arziki ko keɓewar zamantakewa da ya fuskanta.

Henry David Thoreau ya rasu a ranar 6 ga Mayu, 1862, saboda tarin fuka, amma tunaninsa ya bar gado mai karfi ko da bayan mutuwarsa. “Walden” yana ba da tunani mai mahimmanci game da son abin duniya da cin abinci na al'ummar zamani, kuma ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin samfurin rayuwa mai dacewa da yanayi da kuma rayuwa mai sauƙi. “Civil Disobedience” ya zama tushen ka'idar motsin juriya mara tashin hankali kuma ya zaburar da gwagwarmayar 'yanci da adalci a duk duniya. Ra'ayinsa na yanayi ya samar da tushen tunani na farko na motsin kare muhalli, kuma har yau yana tunatar da mu muhimmancin rayuwa mai dorewa da hankali ga muhalli. Thoreau ya kare lamirin mutum da ruhu mai 'yanci, kuma ya nuna jajircewa don kada ya mika wuya ga matsin lamba na zamantakewa. Tunaninsa, tare da na masu falsafar wuce gona da iri na zamani kamar Ralph Waldo Emerson, ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan adabin Amurka da falsafa, kuma har yau yana da tasiri mai zurfi ga mutane da yawa. Ana kwatanta tunaninsa da motsin juriya mara tashin hankali na mutane kamar Mahatma Gandhi da Martin Luther King Jr., ana sake nazarin darajarsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: J.P. Morgan, wani babban jigo a fannin kuɗi na Amurka, ya kafa ginshiƙin jari-hujja na zamani ta hanyar sake fasalin masana'antu da shawo kan rikicin tattalin arziki.
key_achievements: Gina daular kuɗi ta J.P. Morgan & Co.
Jagorantar sake fasalin masana'antu na Amurka da haɗakar kamfanoni
Ceto tattalin arzikin Amurka daga rikicin kuɗi na 1907
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙa'idodin kuɗinsa da kamfanoninsa sun zama ginshiƙin tattalin arzikin duniya, suna kasancewa alamar babban tasiri.

jp-morgan.epic:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar New England mai launin toka, wata ƙasa baƙuwa da raƙuman ruwa masu tsauri na Arewacin Atlantika suka siffanta, a cikin hayaniyar birni inda tsoffin katako da sabbin ƙarfe suka haɗu, an haifi wani rai. J.P. Morgan, ɗan wani tsohon mai shago a Connecticut, tun da wuri ya hango raƙuman ruwa masu sanyi na lissafi da ke ɓoye a bayan duniya mai daɗi kamar ruwan inabi a cikin kofin zinariya. A tsakanin littattafan lissafin mahaifinsa da aka yi amfani da su da kuma raɗaɗin ciniki da ke yawo a kunnuwansa, ya ga siffar babban iko da rawan lambobi ke haifarwa, kuma ya gane cewa wannan ita ce ainihin ƙarfin da ke motsa duniya. Ko da yake yana matashi, nauyin nan gaba ya riga ya rataya a kansa.

A shekara ta 1871, an shuka wani ɗan ƙaramin iri mai suna J.P. Morgan & Co. a tsakanin bangon dutse mai sanyi na yankin kuɗi. Yayin da ƙarar layin dogo, rurin masana'antu, da hasken walƙiya na wutar lantarki ke motsa babban injin Amurka, Morgan ya zama babban hannu da ke sarrafa wannan ƙarfin. Kamfanoni marasa adadi sun durƙusa a gabansa, kuma da yanke shawara ɗaya nasa, dubban ayyuka sun samu ko sun ɓace. Kamfanoni masu arangama da juna da ƙarfi a cikin sunan haɗaka an sake tsara su a ƙarƙashin hukuncinsa mai sanyi, kuma yaƙin jini na gasa ya tsaya tare da shiga tsakaninsa. Ya riƙe zuciyar masana'antar Amurka, wadda ke juyawa kamar manyan kayan aiki masu haɗaka, kuma wani lokaci, shi da kansa ya haifar da bugun zuciyarta.

A shekara ta 1907, a wani dare lokacin da raƙuman ruwa na rikici suka yi barazanar haɗiye tsarin kuɗi, yayin da yake zaune shi kaɗai a ofishi mara komai, yana kallon murhu mai cin wuta, zurfin kaɗaici ya bayyana a idanunsa. Yawancin masu banki sun gudu cikin firgici, amma shi shiru ya yi kira, ya yi shawarwari, kuma ya rubuta kwangiloli duk dare. Wani takardar cak guda ɗaya mai ɗauke da sunansa ya zama garkuwa ta ƙarshe da ke riƙe kasuwar da ke rugujewa. A cikin guguwar hargitsi, shi kaɗai ya yi gwagwarmaya, yana yin mu'ujiza ta hanyar ceto tattalin arzikin Amurka daga bakin halaka. Ko da a wannan lokacin nasara, maimakon murmushin jin daɗi, kawai tsananin nauyin alhakin nan gaba ne ya bayyana a fuskarsa.

Yawancin kamfanoni da hannunsa ya taɓa yanzu sun zama babban ginshiƙin tattalin arzikin duniya, kuma ƙa'idodin kuɗi da ya kafa har yanzu suna ratsa kuma suna numfashi ta cikin zamani. Sunansa, wanda ya gina babban daula kuma wani lokaci ya yi amfani da ƙarfin hallaka don canza tafarkin tarihi, har yanzu ana magana a kai a yau a matsayin alamar babban tasiri. A cikin raƙuman ruwa marasa ganuwa na jari, a cikin zuciyar kamfanoni, har yanzu muna jin amon sunan J.P. Morgan. Wannan ya fi kasancewar wani mutum na tarihi; shaida ce ta har abada game da yadda dukiya da iko ke motsawa a cikin duniya mai canzawa koyaushe.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mai tunani wanda aka haife shi a matsayin ɗan fasto, ya fita daga tsarin addini, ya gano dogaro da kai a cikin yanayi, kuma ya farkar da rayuka don fuskantar son zuciya na zamaninsa.
key_achievements: Fita daga tsarin addini da tsoffin tsarin.
Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Dogaro da Kai' da kuma jaddada mutuncin mutum.
Farkar da rayukan da ke barci don fuskantar son zuciya na zamaninsa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhunsa yana wuce lokaci, yana farkar da Allahntaka ta ciki, kuma yana ba da kwarin gwiwa don bin hanyar 'yanci na gaskiya da ƙirƙira.

ralph-waldo-emerson.epic:
A cikin tsohon ɗakin karatu na Boston, inda hazo mai kauri da igiyoyin ruwa masu ƙarfi na Tekun Atlantika suka haɗu da shiru mai tsarki na Quakers da kuma babban alkawarin sabuwar ƙasa, wani rai ya samo asali daga baƙin ciki mai zurfi da kuma babban manufa. Ƙanshin tsoffin takardun Littafi Mai Tsarki da littattafan falsafa da ke cike da tsoffin ɗakunan littattafai, waƙoƙin ban mamaki da ke fitowa daga mimbarin mahaifinsa, da kuma tambayoyi masu kaifi game da rashin adalci na duniya sun shiga cikin zuciyarsa ta matashiya, tuni ya zama alamar wani babban rafi da ke shirin canza tafarkin duniya.

An haife shi a matsayin ɗan fasto, ruhunsa da aka kulle a cikin al'adun addini da tsari ya yi marmarin gaskiyar sararin samaniya da ke fitowa koyaushe, amma ƙaƙƙarfan tsarin ya zama kamar sarƙoƙi da ke ƙoƙarin karya fikafikansa. A lokacin da yake jin zafin rashin dawwama na rayuwa, mutuwar matarsa ​​ƙaunatacciya ta girgiza duniyarsa gaba ɗaya, ta jefa shi cikin zurfin rami na yanke kauna. A cikin dare mai kaɗaici, yana tsaye shi kaɗai a ƙarƙashin sararin samaniya mai cike da taurari, ya tambayi ma'anar rayuwa, ainihin wanzuwa, kuma ya sake tambaya.

Don haka, ya jefar da tsoffin tsarin, ya shiga cikin yanayi. A cikin raɗaɗin daji, waƙar iska, da rawanin hasken rana, ya sake gano kansa da ya ɓace, wutar Allah. Yana ɗauke da tocila mai suna 'Dogaro da Kai' sama, ya yi tafiya shi kaɗai, yana fuskantar son zuciya na zamaninsa da makantar taron jama'a. Muryarsa ta yi ta yawo ba tare da tsoro ba, kuma rubuce-rubucensa sun zama kuka da ke farkar da rayukan da ke barci na duniya, da kuma waƙar bege.

Kalaman sa ba kawai jimloli ba ne. Sun kasance bincike ne marar iyaka zuwa sararin samaniya, kuma shaida ce ga iyawar ruhun ɗan adam marar iyaka. Har yanzu, kukan sa mai kaɗaici yana ratsa cikinmu, yana wuce lokaci. Yana raɗa mana mu 'yantar da kanmu daga tsoffin al'adu, mu farkar da Allahntaka a cikinmu, kuma mu bi hanyar 'yanci na gaskiya da ƙirƙira. Ruhunsa yana raye har yanzu, yana jiran mu zama taurari masu haskakawa da kanmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Susan B. Anthony ta kasance mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa a Amurka a karni na 19 kuma majagaba a yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a, wacce ta sadaukar da rayuwarta ga 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a.
key_achievements: Babban jagora a yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a
Co-kafa kungiyar National Woman Suffrage Association (NWSA)
Kafa tushen gyaran kundin tsarin mulki na 19
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gwagwarmayarta ta zama tushe mai mahimmanci don samun 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a kuma har yau tana ci gaba da zama kwarin gwiwa ga daidaito da adalci.

susan-b-anthony.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, Amurka ta kasance cikin wani yanayi na sauye-sauyen zamantakewa masu yawa, ciki har da ci gaban masana'antu, kawar da bauta, da kuma yunkurin hana shan giya. A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da rudani, Susan B. Anthony (1820-1906) ta rubuta sunanta a tarihi a matsayin mai kawo sauyi a Amurka kuma majagaba a yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a. An haife ta a ranar 15 ga Fabrairu, 1820, a Adams, Massachusetts, a matsayin 'yar iyali masu bin addinin Quaker, ta girma a cikin yanayi mai tsauri amma mai daraja daidaito. Tun tana karama, ta fahimci muhimmancin ilimi, kuma ta fara rayuwar aiki a matsayin malama, inda ta fara yin tambayoyi game da iyakokin matsayin da aka ba mata a lokacin. Ta shiga cikin yunkurin hana shan giya da kuma yunkurin kawar da bauta, wanda hakan ya sa ta fahimci matsalolin zamantakewa sosai, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na zama mai kare hakkin mata daga baya. Musamman ma, kwarewarta ta rashin samun damar yin magana a bainar jama'a saboda kasancewarta mace ta zama wani abu mai mahimmanci wanda ya tsara alkiblar rayuwarta.

Babban juyin juya halin rayuwar Susan B. Anthony ya samo asali ne daga zurfin fahimtar hakkin mata. Duk da sadaukarwarta ga yunkurin hana shan giya da kawar da bauta, ta fuskanci gaskiyar cewa mata ba su da damar yin magana ko shiga cikin al'amura daidai da maza. A shekara ta 1851, ta sadu da Elizabeth Cady Stanton, wata babbar jagora a yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a, kuma suka kulla abota da haɗin gwiwa na rayuwa. Wannan haɗuwa ta zama dalilin da ya sa Anthony ta sadaukar da kanta ga hakkin mata, musamman ma samun 'yancin kada kuri'a. Bayan yakin basasa, lokacin da gyare-gyare na 14 da na 15 na kundin tsarin mulkin Amurka suka ba maza baƙar fata 'yancin kada kuri'a amma suka ware mata, Anthony da Stanton sun ji takaici sosai. Saboda haka, a shekara ta 1869, suka kafa kungiyar National Woman Suffrage Association (NWSA) tare, da nufin samun 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a a matsayin babban burinsu, kuma suka fara yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a a tsari. Wannan kungiya ta yi kamfen a duk faɗin ƙasar, tana mai cewa 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a haƙƙi ne na asali ga kowane ɗan ƙasa.

Ta hanyar National Woman Suffrage Association (NWSA), Susan B. Anthony ta fuskanci gwagwarmaya da matsaloli masu yawa a sahun gaba na yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a. Ta zagaya ƙasar tana ba da jawabai masu zafi, tana jaddada buƙatar 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a, kuma ta buga jaridar "The Revolution" don ɗaga murya don ci gaban hakkin mata. A shekara ta 1872, Anthony ta yi wani gagarumin aiki na jefa kuri'a ba bisa ka'ida ba a zaɓen shugaban kasa a Rochester, New York, tana mai cewa mata ma suna da 'yancin kada kuri'a. Saboda wannan, an kama ta kuma an yi mata shari'a, kuma an yanke mata hukuncin laifi tare da tarar kuɗi, amma ta ƙi biyan tarar da ƙarfi, tana kare hakkin mata a kotu. Wannan lamari ya jawo hankalin ƙasa baki ɗaya kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na haɓaka fahimtar jama'a game da yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a. Ba ta ja da baya ba duk da izgili da zargi na jama'a, da kuma matsin lamba na shari'a, kuma ta jagoranci yunkurin da jajircewa, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara abin da ake kira "Anthony Amendment," wanda ya zama tushen gyaran kundin tsarin mulki na 19 daga baya.

Susan B. Anthony ta rasu a ranar 13 ga Maris, 1906, ba tare da ta ga cikar burinta na samun 'yancin mata na kada kuri'a ba, wanda ta sadaukar da rayuwarta gaba ɗaya. Amma sadaukarwarta da gwagwarmayarta marar yankewa ba su tafi a banza ba. Shekaru 14 bayan mutuwarta, a shekara ta 1920, an amince da gyaran kundin tsarin mulki na 19 na Amurka, wanda ya ba mata 'yancin kada kuri'a, kuma ana kiran wannan gyaran kundin tsarin mulki sau da yawa da "Susan B. Anthony Amendment" don tunawa da gudunmawarta. Anthony ta kasance alama ce ta gwagwarmaya don daidaito ga dukkan 'yan ƙasa, ba kawai hakkin mata ba. Hotonta yana kan dalar Amurka ɗaya, wanda ke nuna babban tasirin da ta yi ga al'ummar Amurka. Rayuwarta shaida ce mai ƙarfi na yadda jajircewa da aiki mai ɗorewa wajen yaƙar rashin adalci zai iya canza al'umma. Wannan gwagwarmaya mai ɗorewa ta Anthony ta ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fafutukar kare hakkin bil'adama kamar Martin Luther King Jr. a lokacin da suke yaƙar wariyar launin fata, kuma har yau tana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke neman daidaito da adalci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Walt Whitman ya kasance mawaki kuma ɗan jarida na Amurka a tsakiyar karni na 19, majagaba na waƙar 'yanci, kuma ya kawo sabon salo ga adabin Amurka ta hanyar 'Leaves of Grass'.
key_achievements: Buga 'Leaves of Grass' ya buɗe hanyar waƙar 'yanci
Aikin jinya ga sojojin da suka ji rauni a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa
Haɗin Transcendentalism da Realism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa na 'yanci da manufofin dimokuradiyya sun yi tasiri sosai ga adabin zamani kuma suna isar da darajoji marasa lokaci.

walt-whitman.epic:
Walt Whitman (an haife shi a 1819) ya kasance mawaki, marubucin kasidu, kuma ɗan jarida wanda ya fuskanci canje-canje masu girma a cikin al'ummar Amurka a tsakiyar karni na 19. Wannan lokaci ne da Amurka ke fuskantar barazanar Yaƙin Basasa, masana'antu na haɓaka cikin sauri, kuma Transcendentalism da Realism suna tsara yanayin adabi. An haife shi a West Hills, New York, a ranar 31 ga Mayu, 1819, Whitman ya girma yana fuskantar ayyuka daban-daban a Brooklyn da Long Island tun yana yaro. Yayin da yake canza ayyuka kamar mai buga littattafai, malami, da ɗan jarida, ya shaida kuma ya ji daɗin rayuwar talakawa, shimfiɗar wuri mai faɗi na Amurka, da kuma birane masu saurin canzawa. Waɗannan abubuwan sun yi tasiri sosai wajen tsara duniyar waƙoƙinsa daga baya. Musamman, ta hanyar titunan New York masu cike da rayuwa da haɗuwar mutane daga kabilu da matsayi daban-daban, ya sami zurfin fahimta game da manufofin dimokuradiyya da mutuncin ɗan adam. Ayyukansa na farko sun fi mayar da hankali kan aikin jarida, wanda ya taimaka masa wajen haɓaka ƙwarewar lura da al'umma da mutane.

Babban juyin juya hali a rayuwar Whitman shine buga kansa na tarin waƙoƙinsa mafi shahara, “Leaves of Grass,” a cikin 1855, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin mataki a tarihin adabin Amurka. Wannan tarin waƙoƙi ya haifar da cece-kuce mai yawa saboda tsarin sa da abun ciki, waɗanda ba a saba gani ba a lokacin. Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin majagaba na waƙar 'yanci (free verse), wanda ba ya bin ka'idodin gargajiya na waƙa da tsari, hanya ce ta bayyana duniyar ciki da waje ta mawaki cikin 'yanci da gaskiya. “Leaves of Grass” ya ƙunshi yabo ga manufofin dimokuradiyya na Amurka, rayuwar talakawa, yanayi, da kuma abubuwan da ɗan adam ke fuskanta na jiki da na ruhu. Musamman, bayyananniyar sha'awa da maganganun jima'i da ke cikinsa sun haifar da babban cece-kuce, inda aka soki shi a matsayin “batsa” a cikin yanayin al'ummar masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na lokacin. Wasu masu tunani na Transcendentalist kamar Emerson sun yaba da aikinsa sosai, amma ya zama batun muhawara mai zafi tsakanin jama'a da masu sukar. Wannan tarin waƙoƙi ya kafa asalin adabin Whitman, kuma a lokaci guda, ya mai da shi mai kirkire-kirkire mai kaɗaici.

Bayan buga “Leaves of Grass,” Whitman bai taɓa barin imaninsa na adabi ba duk da suka daga al'umma da matsalolin kuɗi. Lokacin da Yaƙin Basasa (1861-1865) ya barke, ya shaida ta'asar yaƙin kai tsaye kuma ya fuskanci matsanancin zafi yayin da yake aikin sa kai don kula da sojojin da suka ji rauni. Musamman, yayin da yake kallon wahala da mutuwar sojoji da yawa a asibitocin Washington D.C., ya fahimci raunin ɗan adam da kuma ƙarfinsa. Abubuwan da ya fuskanta a wannan lokacin sun ba da zurfin jin kai da fahimtar bala'i ga waƙoƙinsa, wanda ya kai ga tarin waƙoƙin yaƙi kamar “Drum-Taps.” Bayan yaƙin, ya yi aiki a gwamnati, amma ya fuskanci gwaji na korar shi saboda abun ciki na “Leaves of Grass.” Duk da haka, ya ci gaba da gyarawa da faɗaɗa “Leaves of Grass,” yana haɓaka hangen nesansa na adabi. A cikin 1873, lafiyarsa ta tabarbare sosai saboda shanyewar jiki, amma bai daina rubutu ba, kuma a cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, ya yi rayuwa mai natsuwa a Camden, New Jersey, yana mai da hankali kan kammala aikinsa. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya da tabbatar da kai.

Walt Whitman ya mutu a ranar 26 ga Maris, 1892, amma gadonsa na adabi ya yi tasiri sosai ba kawai ga adabin Amurka ba har ma ga adabin duniya. Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin wanda ya nuna ainihin Amurka da manufofin dimokuradiyya a cikin waƙa, kuma ya buɗe sabon fagen adabi ta hanyar haɗa Transcendentalism da Realism. Waƙoƙinsa na 'yanci sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mawakan zamani na karni na 20, kuma ana fassara ayyukansa zuwa harsuna da yawa kuma masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya suna karanta su har yau. Whitman ya bincika abubuwan da ɗan adam ke fuskanta ta hanyar rera waƙar jituwa tsakanin jiki da rai, yanayi da wayewa, mutum da al'umma. Waƙoƙinsa sun jaddada musamman darajar bambancin ra'ayi da haɗawa, kuma suna da alaƙa mai zurfi da ƙimar al'adu daban-daban na zamani. Ana kiransa ɗaya daga cikin “ubannin” adabin Amurka, kuma ruhinsa, tare da ra'ayoyin masu tunani na Transcendentalist na zamani kamar Ralph Waldo Emerson da Henry David Thoreau, sun kafa wani muhimmin ginshiƙi a tarihin tunanin Amurka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Max Planck masanin kimiyyar lissafi ne na Jamus a farkon ƙarni na 20 wanda ya gano ra'ayin quantum na makamashi, ya kafa tushen injiniyancin quantum.
key_achievements: Gano ra'ayin quantum na makamashi (1900)
Gabatarwa da kafa Planck constant
Samun lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin kimiyyar lissafi a 1918
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idar quantum ɗinsa ta zama tushen ci gaban kimiyyar lissafi na zamani da fasahar zamani.

max-planck.epic:
A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, lokacin da tsarin ilimin kimiyyar lissafi na gargajiya ya mamaye duniya da ƙarfinsa, wani masanin kimiyyar lissafi na Jamus, Max Planck (an haife shi a 1858), ya buɗe sabon babi a cikin littafin ilimin kimiyya. An haife shi a Kiel a ranar 23 ga Afrilu, 1858, ya gina tushen iliminsa ta hanyar nazarin kimiyyar lissafi a jami'o'in Munich da Berlin. A wancan lokacin, masana kimiyyar lissafi sun yi imani cewa za a iya bayyana duk abubuwan da ke faruwa a sararin samaniya ta hanyar injiniyancin Newton da electromagnetism na Maxwell, amma wasu abubuwan da ke faruwa a cikin ƙananan duniya sun kasance matsaloli masu wuyar warwarewa waɗanda ba za a iya bayyana su da ka'idojin da ake da su ba. Musamman, al'amarin radiation na baƙar fata ya kasance babban matsala da ke nuna iyakokin kimiyyar lissafi na gargajiya a fili. A cikin wannan yanayi na zamani, Max Planck ya nutsa cikin binciken thermodynamics, ya fara zurfafa bincike wanda ya shiga cikin gibin ka'idojin da ake da su. Bincikensa na farko ya ba da gudummawa ga zurfafa fahimtar entropy da doka ta biyu ta thermodynamics, wanda ya zama muhimmin ginshiƙi don kafa tushen ka'idar quantum a nan gaba. Ya nuna basira mai zurfi wajen haɓaka cikakken tsarin kimiyyar lissafi na gargajiya, yayin da yake fuskantar rashin daidaituwa na asali da ke ɓoye a cikinsa.

Tafiyar ilimi ta Max Planck ta kai ga wani muhimmin juyi lokacin da ya fuskanci matsalar radiation na baƙar fata wanda ya girgiza duniyar kimiyyar lissafi a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. Radiation na baƙar fata yana nufin bakan radiation na lantarki wanda baƙar fata, wanda shine mai sha da mai fitarwa mai kyau, ke fitarwa dangane da zafin jiki. Kimiyyar lissafi ta gargajiya ta fuskanci iyakoki wajen bayyana yankin gajeren zango na wannan bakan daidai. Wannan matsala mai wuyar warwarewa, wanda aka fi sani da 'bala'in ultraviolet,' ya jefa masana kimiyyar lissafi cikin zurfin tunani. A shekara ta 1900, Max Planck ya gabatar da wani zato mai juyin juya hali don warware wannan matsala. Ya gabatar da wani ra'ayi mai ban mamaki cewa makamashi ba ya gudana ci gaba da kai, amma ana sha ko fitar da shi ne kawai a cikin ƙananan raka'a, wato quanta. Ma'aunin daidaito wanda ke tantance girman wannan quantum daga baya an kira shi Planck constant, kuma ya kafa ainihin ra'ayin quantization na makamashi. Wannan zato ya kasance mai tsattsauran ra'ayi a wancan lokacin, kuma Max Planck da kansa da farko ya ɗauke shi a matsayin kayan aikin lissafi don sauƙin lissafi, amma ya zama alamar farkon sabon tsarin da ya girgiza tushen kimiyyar lissafi na gargajiya.

Zaton quantum na Max Planck ya fuskanci babban turjiya a cikin duniyar kimiyyar lissafi da farko. Abokan aikinsa waɗanda suka saba da tsarin kimiyyar lissafi na gargajiya ba su karɓi ra'ayinsa da sauƙi ba, kuma Max Planck da kansa bai gane cikakken ma'anar wannan ra'ayi mai juyin juya hali nan da nan ba. Duk da haka, lokacin da Albert Einstein ya bayyana tasirin photoelectric ta hanyar zato na quantum, ka'idar Max Planck ta fara samun matsayi mai ƙarfi. Gudunmawarsa ta kai ga samun lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin kimiyyar lissafi a shekara ta 1918, a matsayin sanarwa ga gudunmawarsa ga ci gaban kimiyyar lissafi ta hanyar gano quanta na makamashi. Amma rayuwarsa ta cika da bala'o'i na kashin kai da hargitsi na zamani. A lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, ya fuskanci zafin mutuwar ɗansa na fari, Karl, a yaƙi, kuma bayan hawan mulkin Nazi, ya yi gwagwarmaya don kare tsarkin kimiyya. Ya yi ƙoƙari ya kare masana kimiyya Yahudawa, amma waɗannan ayyuka sun jawo masa babban haɗari. A shekara ta 1944, a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu, an lalata gidansa a Berlin ta hanyar harin bam, kuma a shekara ta 1945, ya fuskanci mummunan bala'in kisan ɗansa na biyu, Erwin, wanda aka kashe saboda zargin hannu a yunƙurin kashe Hitler. Duk da irin waɗannan matsanancin gwaji, Max Planck bai daina binciken kimiyya ba, kuma ya nuna ruhin masanin kimiyya mai ƙarfi wanda ke neman gaskiya a cikin lokuta masu hargitsi.

Zaton quantum na Max Planck ya buɗe zamanin injiniyancin quantum, juyin juya hali mafi mahimmanci a kimiyyar lissafi na ƙarni na 20. Gano da ya yi ya samar da sabon tsari don bayyana halayen atoms da ƙananan barbashi, kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma a kusan dukkan fannoni na kimiyyar lissafi na zamani, wato ka'idar filin quantum, kimiyyar lissafi na barbashi, kimiyyar lissafi na abubuwa masu haɗaka, har ma da ilimin sararin samaniya. Fasahar zamani da yawa da muke amfani da su a yau, kamar lasers, transistors, na'urorin Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI), da fasahar makamashin nukiliya, ba za a iya tunanin su ba tare da ra'ayin quantum da Max Planck ya gabatar ba. Sunansa yanzu ana tunawa da shi har abada tare da Planck constant, ma'aunin asali na kimiyyar lissafi, kuma yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga dukkan masana kimiyya waɗanda ke binciken ainihin ka'idojin ƙananan duniya. A ranar 4 ga Oktoba, 1947, ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da abubuwan ban mamaki, amma ko da bayan mutuwarsa, ka'idar quantum ta ci gaba da haɓaka ta hanyar masana kimiyya na gaba kamar Albert Einstein, Niels Bohr, da Werner Heisenberg, suna faɗaɗa iyakokin ilimin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Hypatia masanin falsafa ce ta Neoplatonism, masanin taurari, kuma masanin lissafi a Iskandariya a ƙarshen karni na 4, wadda ta kare harshen wuta na ƙarshe na ilimin da.
key_achievements: Koyar da falsafar Neoplatonism da ilimin taurari
Rubuta sharhi game da *Arithmetica* na Diophantus
Alamar ilimin Iskandariya ta da
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta hankali da hikima kuma majagaba ce ga mata masana, tana tunatar da mu 'yancin neman ilimi har yau.

hypatia.epic:
A ƙarshen karni na 4, Iskandariya a Masar, wadda ke bunƙasa a ƙarƙashin mulkin Daular Roma, ta kasance sansanin ƙarshe na ilimin da, kuma cibiyar ilimi inda al'adu da addinai daban-daban suka haɗu. A cikin wannan zamani mai cike da rudani, **Hypatia (an haife ta kusan 350/370 – ta mutu 415) ta tsaya a sahun gaba na ilimi a matsayin masanin falsafa na Neoplatonism, masanin taurari, kuma masanin lissafi**. An haife ta ga Theon, wani shahararren masanin lissafi kuma masanin taurari, kuma ta girma tana samun zurfin ilimi daga mahaifinta. A cikin wadataccen gadon ilimi na Laburare na Iskandariya da Museion, Hypatia ta nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki tun tana ƙarama, kuma ta zurfafa cikin falsafar da kimiyyar Girka ta da, musamman ra'ayoyin Plato da Aristotle. Ba wai kawai ta kasance mai gadon ilimi ba, an gane ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana na zamaninta, kuma ta zama wani muhimmin mutum a makarantar Iskandariya. Koyarwarta ta haɗa da falsafa da ilimin taurari, ta zaburar da ɗalibai da yawa, kuma ta shahara a matsayin mai ba da shawara mai hikima. Hypatia, a matsayinta na mace, ta sami matsayi da tasiri da ba a taɓa gani ba a fagen ilimi, ta buɗe sabon babi a cikin yanayin ilimi na duniyar da. 

Shaharar Hypatia ta bazu fiye da Iskandariya, kuma ɗakin karatunta ya kasance cike da ɗalibai daga bangarori daban-daban. Ba wai kawai ta isar da ilimi ba, har ma ta jaddada tunani mai zurfi da tunani mai ma'ana, tana ba ɗalibanta zurfin fahimta. Musamman, ta rubuta sharhi game da *Arithmetica* na Diophantus, wanda ake kyautata zaton an saka shi a cikin rubutun asali na Diophantus da ke wanzu a yau. Har ila yau, ta bar sharhi game da *Conics* na Apollonius, amma wannan aikin ba ya wanzu a yanzu. Yawancin masana na zamani sun kuma ba da shawarar cewa Hypatia na iya gyara rubutun *Almagest* na Ptolemy da ke wanzu, bisa ga cewa mahaifinta Theon ya rubuta sharhi game da littafi na 3 na *Almagest*. Duk da haka, a farkon karni na 5, Iskandariya ta shiga cikin guguwar rikice-rikicen addini da siyasa masu saurin canzawa. Yayin da Kiristanci ya zama addinin hukuma na Daular Roma, matsin lamba kan ra'ayoyin arna da ilimin da ya ƙaru, wanda ya zama barazana kai tsaye ga masana arna kamar Hypatia. 

A wannan lokaci na canji, Hypatia ta ci gaba da dangantaka mai zurfi da Orestes, gwamnan Roma na Iskandariya, kuma ta yi amfani da tasirinta na siyasa. Orestes yana cikin tsaka mai wuya da Cyril, Bishop na Iskandariya, kuma Hypatia ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a yanke shawarar gwamnan a matsayin mai ba da shawara mai hikima. Cyril ya yi imani cewa Hypatia tana sarrafa Orestes don adawa da Kiristanci, kuma ya ɗauki hazakar arna da tasirinta a matsayin haɗari. Wannan ya sa Hypatia ta zama abin hari ga masu tsattsauran ra'ayin Kirista, kuma ƙiyayya a gare ta ta ƙaru. A ƙarshe, a kusan shekara ta 415, ta fuskanci mummunan hari daga Kiristoci masu tsattsauran ra'ayi waɗanda hauka ya mamaye. Sun ja ta zuwa titi, suka kashe ta da mugunta, kuma suka lalata gawarta. Wannan mummunan lamari an rubuta shi a tarihi a matsayin wani lamari mai ma'ana wanda ya nuna yadda rikicin tsakanin ilimin arna na da da Kiristanci ya kai matsanancin matsayi. Mutuwarta ta zama wani mummunan canji wanda ya hanzarta raguwar ilimin Iskandariya. 

Mutuwar Hypatia mai ban tausayi ba wai kawai ƙarshen wani mutum ba ne, an rubuta shi a tarihi a matsayin wani lamari mai ma'ana wanda ya nuna ƙarshen ilimin arna na da. Bayan mutuwarta, sunanta ya zama alama ce ta hankali da hikima, da kuma shahidi wanda aka sadaukar da shi ga hauka na addini. Ko da yake yawancin ayyukanta sun ɓace, gadon iliminta da sha'awarta ga ilimi sun zaburar da masana na gaba, kuma ana tunawa da ita a matsayin majagaba, musamman ga masana kimiyya mata da masana falsafa. Hypatia ta cimma nasarorin ilimi waɗanda kusan ba zai yiwu ba ga mace a cikin al'ummar zamaninta, kuma wannan ya kasance har yau a matsayin sako mai ƙarfi wanda ke tunatar da mu muhimmancin 'yancin neman ilimi da haƙuri na addini. Rayuwarta da mutuwarta sun nuna sarai yadda zamanin zinariya na ilimi a Iskandariya ta da ya faɗi a cikin hauka na addini da rudani na siyasa. A cikin irin wannan lokaci mai cike da rudani, za a iya kwatanta rayuwar mutane kamar Augustine na zamaninta ko Ibn Sina na baya da waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin kare ilimi da imani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ibn al-Haytham fitaccen masanin ilimi ne na Larabawa mai fannoni daban-daban a zamanin zinare na Musulunci na ƙarni na 10, wanda ya kawo sauyi a ka'idar gani kuma ya kafa tushen hanyar kimiyya.
key_achievements: Ya rubuta “Littafin Optics” wanda ya kawo sauyi a ka'idar gani.
Majagaba na hanyar kimiyya wanda ya jaddada gwaji da lura.
Ya bar manyan nasarori yayin da yake tsare a gida bayan gazawar sarrafa kogin Nilu.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idar gani da hanyar kimiyya ta Ibn al-Haytham sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyyar Yamma.

ibn-al-haytham.epic:
Ibn al-Haytham (c. 965 – c. 1040) fitaccen masanin ilimi ne na Larabawa mai fannoni daban-daban, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, masanin lissafi, da masanin taurari a zamanin Daular Abbasiyawa a lokacin Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci. Ana kiransa uban kimiyyar gani na zamani, kuma ya kawo sauyi mai girma a fahimtar gani da haske. An haifi Ibn al-Haytham a Basra, mahaifar wayewar Mesopotamiya, a ƙarshen ƙarni na 10, kuma ya girma yana shan wadataccen gadon ilimi na duniyar Musulunci a lokacin. Wayewar Musulunci, da ke cibiya a Baghdad, tana adanawa da haɓaka ilimin wayewar Girka ta da, Farisa, da Indiya, kuma ta sami ci gaba mai ban mamaki a fannoni daban-daban kamar kimiyya, falsafa, da likitanci. A cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga fannoni daban-daban kamar lissafi, ilimin taurari, kimiyyar lissafi, da likitanci tun yana ƙarami, kuma musamman ya fara yin tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da haske da abubuwan gani. Ya fara tafarkin bincike don kafa sabuwar zato cewa haske yana fitowa daga abubuwa kuma yana shiga ido, yana yin tambaya game da ka'idar fitar da gani ta Euclid da Ptolemy, wacce ta mamaye a lokacin, wato ra'ayin cewa haske yana fitowa daga ido don ganin abubuwa. Wannan tunaninsa na farko shine farkon manyan nasarori da za su yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin kimiyya na ɗan adam.

Rayuwar Ibn al-Haytham ta sami wani muhimmin canji. An gayyace shi zuwa Alkahira bayan ya ba da shawarar ga Khalifan Daular Fatimiyya ta Masar, Al-Hakim bi-Amr Allah, cewa zai iya sarrafa ambaliyar kogin Nilu don haɓaka samar da noma. A lokacin, Masar tana fuskantar tasiri mai girma ga noma da rayuwa saboda ambaliyar kogin Nilu ta lokaci-lokaci, kuma yunƙurin sarrafa shi ya kasance buri na dogon lokaci. Ibn al-Haytham ya yi tunanin gina madatsar ruwa don sarrafa kwararar kogin Nilu a yankin kudu da Aswan, amma ta hanyar binciken fili, ya gane cewa fasahar lokacin ba za ta iya aiwatar da babban shirin nasa ba. Don guje wa fushin Khalifan Al-Hakim, wanda aka sani da halinsa mai ƙarfi da canzawa, ya yi kamar mahaukaci kuma an sanya shi a tsare a gida. Wannan gwaji ya kasance masa babban zafi, amma a akasin haka, rabuwa da duniya ta waje ta ba shi damar mai da hankali gaba ɗaya ga binciken ilimi. A wannan lokacin, ya rubuta muhimman ayyukansa, yana gina nasarori da za su dore a tarihin ilimin ɗan adam.

A cikin gwajin tsarewa a gida, Ibn al-Haytham ya himmatu ga zurfin bincike kan haske da gani, kuma ya kammala babban aikinsa, “Littafin Optics” (Kitāb al-Manāẓir). Wannan littafin wani babban aiki ne da ya bincika ainihin gani, kuma ya musanta ra'ayin ka'idar fitar da gani ta Girka ta da, wacce ta yadu a Yamma da duniyar Musulunci a lokacin, wato ra'ayin cewa haske yana fitowa daga ido don ganin abubuwa. Ya yi iƙirarin 'ka'idar shiga' cewa haske yana fitowa daga abubuwa kuma yana shiga ido don samar da gani, kuma don tabbatar da wannan, ya yi amfani da gwaje-gwaje masu inganci da tunani na lissafi. Ibn al-Haytham ya bayyana ka'idar Camera Obscura, ya yi nazari sosai kan abubuwan da suka shafi juyawar haske da tunani, kuma ya bayyana dalla-dalla tasirin girman ruwan tabarau da tsarin jikin ido. Bincikensa ya wuce iƙirarin ka'ida kawai, ya gabatar da misali na farko na hanyar kimiyya ta zamani wacce ta haɗa da tsarin lura, tsarin gwaji, da tabbatar da lissafi. Wannan tsarin mai tsauri ya zama muhimmin tushe ga juyin juya halin kimiyya na gaba, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya canza wahalhalunsa na sirri zuwa nasarorin ilimi.

“Littafin Optics” na Ibn al-Haytham ya yi tasiri sosai a duniyar Musulunci da Turai tsawon ƙarnuka bayan mutuwarsa. Wannan littafin, wanda aka fassara shi zuwa Latin kuma aka sani da 'Opticae Thesaurus Alhazeni', ya zaburar da manyan masana kimiyya na Yamma kamar Roger Bacon, Witelo, Johannes Kepler, da René Descartes, kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban kimiyyar gani ta zamani. Tsarin gwajinsa da kuma jaddada tabbatar da lissafi sun kafa wani muhimmin mataki a ci gaban hanyar kimiyya, kuma sun taimaka wajen kafa ka'idodin binciken kimiyya na asali waɗanda muke ɗauka a yau. Nasarorin Ibn al-Haytham sun wuce fahimtar haske da gani kawai; gadonsa yana rayuwa a cikin kimiyya ta zamani gaba ɗaya ta hanyar wayar da kan jama'a game da mahimmancin neman ilimi ta hanyar lura da gwaji. Ruhin bincikensa, tare da sauran masana Musulunci na zamaninsa, kamar Al-Biruni da Ibn Sina, ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin ilimin kimiyya, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe ga ci gaban kimiyyar Yamma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Blaise Pascal masanin lissafi ne, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, kuma masanin falsafa na Faransa a karni na 17, wanda ya ba da gudummawa ga ƙirƙirar Pascaline da kafa ka'idar yiwuwa.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar na'urar lissafi ta Pascaline
Kafa ka'idar yiwuwa da ka'idar Pascal
Zurfafa tunani na falsafa ta hanyar 'Pensées'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadonsa na lissafi, kimiyya, da falsafa sun yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban kimiyya da tunani na zamani.

blaise-pascal.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 17, Turai tana cikin guguwar juyin juya halin kimiyya, tana neman sabon daidaito tsakanin hankali da imani. Faransa ma tana cikin tasirin ra'ayin Descartes na hankali wanda ya mamaye al'ummar masu ilimi, kuma saboda tasirin gyaran addini, an yi muhawara mai zurfi ta tauhidi a cikin Katolika. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Blaise Pascal, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1623, ya kasance masanin lissafi, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, mai ƙirƙira, masanin falsafa, kuma marubucin Katolika na Faransa. An haife shi a Clermont-Ferrand a matsayin ɗan Étienne Pascal, mai karɓar haraji kuma masanin lissafi mai son. Tun yana yaro, Pascal ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin ilimi, musamman ma zurfin fahimta da sha'awar bincike a fannin lissafi. Mahaifinsa ya gane basirar ɗansa tun da wuri kuma ya ba shi ilimi kai tsaye, yana ƙarfafa shi ya nutsa cikin duniyar lissafi da kimiyya. An ce Pascal ya tabbatar da ka'idodin lissafin Euclid da kansa yana ɗan shekara 12, wanda ya kasance labarin da ke tabbatar da basirarsa. Tun daga wannan lokacin, ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi wajen binciken tushen abubuwan da ke faruwa a zahiri da kuma warware matsaloli masu rikitarwa.

A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Blaise Pascal ya cimma nasarori masu ban mamaki a jere a fannin kimiyya da lissafi, yana sanar da basirarsa ga duniya baki ɗaya. A shekara ta 1642, don taimaka wa mahaifinsa a aikin lissafin haraji, ya ƙirƙira Pascaline, ɗaya daga cikin na'urorin lissafi na farko a duniya. Wannan wata na'ura ce mai juyin juya hali da ke yin ƙari da ragi ta atomatik, kuma ya kasance muhimmin mataki na farko ga kwamfutocin zamani. Daga baya, ya kafa ka'idar Pascal (Pascal's principle) a fannin ruwa mai tsayawa, yana bayyana cewa matsin lamba da aka yi wa ruwa mai rufi yana yaduwa daidai gwargwado a kowane bangare. Bugu da ƙari, a shekara ta 1654, ya yi musayar wasiƙu da Pierre de Fermat, inda suka kafa tushen ka'idar yiwuwa (Probability theory), wanda wata muhimmiyar ka'idar lissafi ce da ta fara daga warware matsalolin caca kuma a yau ana amfani da ita a fannoni daban-daban kamar kididdiga da tattalin arziki. Amma wani babban juyi a rayuwarsa ya zo a daren Nuwamba 23, 1654, wato abin da ake kira 'Daren Wuta', wani zurfin kwarewar addini. Ta hanyar wannan kwarewa, ya ji wata ƙishirwa ta ruhaniya da binciken hankali kaɗai ba zai iya biya ba, kuma ya shiga cikin hanyar imani fiye da nasarorin kimiyya.

Bayan 'Daren Wuta', Pascal ya kulla dangantaka mai zurfi da gidan sufi na Port-Royal kuma ya nutsa cikin Jansenism. Jansenism wani motsi ne na tauhidin Katolika na karni na 17 wanda ya jaddada yanayin ɗan adam da ya faɗi da kuma cikakken buƙatar alherin Allah, yana adawa da Jesuits. Pascal ya kare Jansenism kuma ya buga jerin rubuce-rubuce ba tare da sunansa ba, yana sukar lalacewar ɗabi'a da koyarwar Jesuits, waɗannan su ne 'Lettres provinciales'. Waɗannan wasiƙun, tare da kaifin hankali da salon rubutu mai ban dariya, sun haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Faransa a lokacin, kuma ana ɗaukarsu a matsayin manyan ayyukan adabin Faransanci, fiye da muhawarar addini. A wannan lokacin, ya sha wahala daga cututtuka na yau da kullun kamar ciwon kai mai tsanani da rashin narkewar abinci. Ciwon jiki ya zurfafa tunaninsa, kuma ya hanzarta bincikensa na falsafa game da gwagwarmayar da ke tsakanin iyakokin ɗan adam da rashin iyaka na Allah. Ko da a cikin wahala, ya ci gaba da binciken ainihin imani da ma'anar wanzuwar ɗan adam, kuma wannan gwagwarmayar ciki ta bayyana sosai a cikin rubuce-rubucensa na baya.

Blaise Pascal ya rasu yana ɗan shekara 39 a shekara ta 1662, amma tunaninsa da nasarorinsa sun yi tasiri mai zurfi fiye da zamani. Rubuce-rubucensa da ba a kammala ba, 'Pensées', wanda aka buga bayan mutuwarsa, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin kololuwar tunani na falsafa da tauhidi da ke bincika baƙin ciki da girman ɗan adam, da dangantakar hankali da imani. Musamman ma, 'Pascal's Wager' wata hujja ce mai amfani game da wanzuwar Allah, tana jayayya cewa ga mutum mai hankali, yana da amfani a yi imani da Allah, kuma har yau yana haifar da muhawara mai yawa. A fannin lissafi, a matsayinsa na wanda ya kafa ka'idar yiwuwa, ya kafa tushen kididdiga ta zamani, kuma a fannin kimiyyar lissafi, ya ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga ilimin ruwa har ma an sanya sunansa ga rukunin matsin lamba, 'Pascal (Pa)'. Salon rubutunsa mai bayyanawa da gamsarwa ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban adabin Faransanci, kuma falsafarsa ta ba da muhimmiyar kwarjini ga existentialism da falsafar addini. Kamar yadda René Descartes na zamaninsa ya faɗaɗa iyakokin tunani mai hankali, gadon Pascal, wanda ya ratsa tsakanin hankali da imani kuma ya yi tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da wanzuwar ɗan adam, ya bar alama mai dorewa a tarihin tunanin Yamma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Dmitri Mendeleev masanin kimiyyar sinadarai ne na Rasha na karni na 19 wanda ya kafa Dokar Lokaci na Abubuwa kuma ya kammala Teburin Lokaci, yana kafa tushen ilmin sinadarai na zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa Dokar Lokaci na Abubuwa
Haɓakawa da Kammala Teburin Lokaci na Abubuwa
Hasashen Halayen Abubuwan da Ba a Gano Su Ba
