fact_box.legacy_statement: Teburin lokaci nasa ya zama tushen ilmin sinadarai na zamani kuma yana da tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyya.

dmitri-mendeleev.epic:
Dmitri Mendeleev (an haife shi a shekara ta 1834) ya kasance fitaccen masanin kimiyyar sinadarai, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, farfesa a jami'a, kuma masanin tattalin arziki wanda ya yi aiki a Daular Rasha a tsakiyar karni na 19. A ranar 27 ga Janairu, 1834, lokacin da aka haife shi, Rasha tana cikin lokacin binciken kimiyya mai zurfi, amma a fannin ilmin sinadarai, babu wata ka'ida ta asali da aka kafa don rarraba abubuwa yadda ya kamata da kuma hango halayensu, wanda ya haifar da rudani. An haife shi a Tobolsk, Siberia, a matsayin ɗan ƙarami a cikin yara 17, Mendeleev ya fuskanci matsalolin iyali a lokacin ƙuruciyarsa saboda rashin gani da mutuwar mahaifinsa da wuri. Godiya ga sadaukarwar mahaifiyarsa, Mariya Dmitriyevna Mendeleyeva, ya sami ilimi kuma ya haɓaka sha'awa mai zurfi ga kimiyya. Ya yi karatu a Babban Cibiyar Pedagogical a Saint Petersburg, inda ya kafa tushen ilmin sinadarai, kuma daga baya ya faɗaɗa ƙwarewarsa ta ilimi ta hanyar samun sabon ilimin kimiyya a lokacin ta hanyar karatu a Turai. Wannan tushe ya zama wani muhimmin ginshiƙi a gare shi don cimma manyan nasarori waɗanda za su kasance har abada a cikin tarihin kimiyyar ɗan adam.

A zamanin da ake ɗaukar abubuwan sinadarai a matsayin masu zaman kansu, Mendeleev ya kasance yana da sha'awar gano tsari da ka'idojin da ke ɓoye a tsakaninsu. Babban rikicin tafiyarsa ta ilimi shine gano ka'ida ta duniya a cikin rudanin waɗannan abubuwa. A cikin 1869, Mendeleev ya kafa **Dokar Lokaci (Periodic Law)**, wanda shine al'amarin da halayen jiki da na sinadarai na abubuwa ke maimaitawa lokaci-lokaci bisa ga nauyin atomic, kuma a kan wannan tushe, ya buga **Teburin Lokaci na Abubuwa (Periodic Table of Elements)**, teburin da ke nuna maimaitawar halayen ta hanyar jera abubuwa a cikin tsarin nauyin atomic da kuma shirya su bisa ga dokar lokaci. Wannan ba wai kawai ya rarraba abubuwa 63 da aka sani a lokacin ba ne, har ma ya kasance wani yunƙuri mai ƙarfin hali na barin wurare marasa amfani a cikin teburin lokaci don abubuwan da ba a gano su ba kuma ya hango kasancewarsu da halayensu. Musamman ma, ya hango nauyin atomic da halayen sinadarai na abubuwa uku da ba a gano su ba - germanium, gallium, da scandium - tare da daidaito mai ban mamaki, kuma ya gyara valence da nauyin atomic na wasu abubuwan da aka sani, ciki har da uranium, waɗanda aka yarda da su a lokacin. Wannan ra'ayi mai juyin juya hali ya buɗe sabon babi a cikin binciken ilmin sinadarai.

Teburin lokaci na Mendeleev ba dukkan masana kimiyya suka karɓa nan da nan ba tun farko. Ya ɗauki lokaci don tabbatar da daidaiton hasashen da ka'idarsa ta ƙunsa, kuma wannan ya kasance wani muhimmin gwaji na ilimi da tsarin gwagwarmaya a gare shi. Amma hasashensa ya zama gaskiya ba da daɗewa ba. A cikin 1875, Paul-Émile Lecoq de Boisbaudran na Faransa ya gano gallium, a cikin 1879, Lars Fredrik Nilson na Sweden ya gano scandium, kuma a cikin 1886, Clemens Winkler na Jamus ya gano germanium, abubuwan da ba a gano su ba waɗanda Mendeleev ya hango sun bayyana a duniya ɗaya bayan ɗaya. Ta haka, teburin lokaci nasa ya sami ƙaƙƙarfan shaidar gwaji, kuma al'ummar kimiyya ta duniya ba ta da wani zaɓi sai dai ta yarda da hazakarsa. Bai tsaya a matsayin masanin kimiyyar sinadarai kawai ba, amma ya nuna sha'awar ilimi a fannoni daban-daban kamar kimiyyar lissafi da tattalin arziki, kuma a matsayinsa na farfesa a Jami'ar Saint Petersburg, ya horar da ɗalibai da yawa kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga ci gaban kimiyyar Rasha. Rayuwarsa ta kasance tsarin ci gaba zuwa gaskiyar kimiyya ta hanyar bincike mara iyaka da kuma da'awar da aka tabbatar.

A ranar 20 ga Janairu, 1907, Dmitri Mendeleev ya mutu yana da shekaru 72, amma gadonsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga kimiyyar zamani kuma yana raye har yau. Teburin lokaci nasa ya zama tushen duk ilimin sinadarai da kuma farkon bincike, kuma ya zama kayan aiki mai mahimmanci don gano sabbin abubuwa da fahimtar halayen abubuwa. Bayan mutuwar Mendeleev, don girmama nasarorinsa, an ba da sunan **Mendelevium** ga abun mai lamba atomic 101 a cikin 1955, yana tunawa da gudummawarsa marar mutuwa har abada. Fahimtarsa ta bayyana tsarin asali da ke ɓoye a cikin dangantakar abubuwa masu rikitarwa, kuma wannan ya zama tushen ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha mai faɗi, ba kawai a fannin ilmin sinadarai ba har ma a kimiyyar kayan aiki da magani. Nasarorin Mendeleev, tare da binciken wasu manyan masana kimiyya kamar John Dalton wanda ya bincika ainihin abubuwa da Ernest Rutherford wanda ya bayyana tsarin atomic, sun ba da gudummawa ga faɗaɗa hangen nesa na kimiyya na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ada Lovelace, wacce aka haifa a matsayin 'yar mawaki, ta ƙirƙiro shirin kwamfuta na farko don Injin Nazari na Babbage, kuma ta zama majagaba na kimiyyar kwamfuta ta zamani.
key_achievements: Fahimtar damammaki marasa iyaka na Injin Nazari
Ƙirƙirar shirin kwamfuta na farko a duniya
Hasashen ikon inji na sarrafa alamomi masu ma'ana
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta kafa harsashin kimiyyar kwamfuta ta zamani, kuma ta kasance tushen wahayi na kirkire-kirkire marasa iyaka a zamanin bayanai.

ada-lovelace.epic:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar London mai launin toka, a cikin shekarar 1815, lokacin da hazo mai kauri ya sauka a kan tsoffin titunan Victorian na London ba tare da sauti ba, an haifi wata rai a cikin gida inda jinin mawaki da duniyar dabaru masu sanyi suka haɗu. Ko da yake ta gaji jinin mahaifinta mai cike da sha'awar soyayya da inuwar hauka, tsauraran tarbiyyar mahaifiyarta ta kaifafa tunaninta kamar kaifin takobi na dabaru masu inganci. Sha'awarta ta yarinta ta ɓace a cikin littattafan kimiyya masu ƙura a kan shiryayye, ko kuma a cikin waƙoƙin piano masu baƙar fata da fari, amma a ƙarshe ta yi zafi sosai zuwa ga tsarin lambobi da dabaru na alamomi. Kamar yadda ake mafarkin sararin sama mai shuɗi ko da a cikin kejin da aka kulle, danniya ya jagoranci sha'awarta ta bincike zuwa ga zurfin rami mai zurfi da sirri.

A cikin shekarar 1833, lokacin da sautin juyawar kayan aiki ya farka da daren London, Ada Lovelace mai shekaru 17 ta tsaya a gaban zane-zanen Charles Babbage na hazaka. Kayan aiki masu sarkakiya da levers, da kuma duniyar damammaki marasa iyaka da suka buɗe a kansu. Mafarkin inji mai tunani, fiye da kalkuleta mai sauƙi. 'Injin Nazari' na Babbage ya sa zuciyarta ta buga, kuma ta ga yiwuwar. Fiye da layukan ƙari da ragi, don yin rawanin dabaru masu rikitarwa, har ma da ƙirƙirar waƙoƙin kiɗa. Yayin da take nazarin zane-zanen dare a cikin ɗaki mai kunkuntar, tunaninta ya riga ya tauna kuma ya tofa harshen inji, yana ƙirƙirar sabbin jimloli.

A cikin shekarar 1843, bayan rufe wata takarda mai sanyi a cikin harshen Italiyanci, ta fitar da wani babban 'Bayani' ga duniya, wanda aka fassara shi zuwa sabon harshe, wato nata dabaru. Wani tsari na sabuwar duniya, fiye da fassarar kawai. Algorithm mai rikitarwa don lissafin lambobin Bernoulli an rubuta shi a cikin tarihi ba a matsayin aikin inji mai sauƙi ba, amma a matsayin 'shirye-shirye' na farko. Ta fahimci cewa inji na iya yin ayyuka masu kirkira ta hanyar sarrafa alamomi masu ma'ana fiye da lambobi, kamar yadda ake ƙirƙirar tsarin dabaru kamar yadda ake saƙa da kyau. Kamar fitila mai haske a cikin duhu, hangen nesanta ya miƙa zuwa ga gaba da ƙarfi.

Wani lokaci ciwon jiki mai rauni, wani lokaci kuma jarabawar caca marar amfani sun toshe mata hanya, amma ruhinta bai karye ba. A cikin ɗan gajeren rayuwarta na shekaru 36, ta buɗe fuka-fukan tunani waɗanda suka wuce iyakokin ɗan adam. Ko da yake tana fama da ciwon cuta da nauyin rayuwa, yawancin bayanan da ta bari da algorithms suna rayuwa har yau, suna wuce lokaci. Sunanta, Ada Lovelace. Wannan suna yanzu ba kawai mutum ne na baya ba, amma yana haskakawa har abada a matsayin tushen wahayi wanda ke ci gaba da ƙirƙirar sabbin duniya a cikin kwamfutocin da muke amfani da su yau da kullun, a cikin gudunwar bayanai marasa ganuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani haziki mai baƙin ciki, majagaba na hankali na wucin gadi a cikin danniya, wanda ya ba da gudummawa ga nasarar yaƙi amma ya zama wanda aka azabtar da son zuciya.
key_achievements: Gabatar da ra'ayin hankali na wucin gadi a matsayin majagaba
Ba da gudummawa ga nasara ta hanyar warware lambobin sirri na yaƙi
Kafa harsashin wayewar dijital ta zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Uban hankali na wucin gadi da zamanin dijital, ruhunsa har yanzu yana sa mu mafarkin sabbin damammaki a yau.

alan-turing.epic:
A cikin tsohon gidan kwanan dalibai kusa da London, inda hazo mai shudi na Tekun Arewa ke lullube shi sosai, kuma fitilun titi masu rauni ke haskawa a bayan tsoffin katangar bulo, a lokacin da ka'idojin al'umma masu danniya da shingen karfe mai sanyi na dabaru ke mamaye, wani ruhu mai girma ya fara farkawa shi kaɗai. Sai kawai karar gadon da ke motsi da kuma wutar murhu da ke ci da daddare suka lullube tunaninsa, kuma alamomin da ke kan teburinsa sun yi masa katanga kamar sararin samaniya da ba a sani ba. Duniya ta gina masa bango marar ganuwa, amma ya miƙa hannunsa da ƙarfi zuwa ga damar da ba ta da iyaka a bayan wannan bangon.

Na'urar da ta fito daga tsakiyar yatsunsa ba karfe kawai ba ce, a'a, ta kasance martanin wani ruhu mai girma da ke neman kwaikwayon hankalin ɗan adam, ko ma mafarkin wani abu fiye da haka. Tafiyarsa ta bin haske mai rauni ta hanyar warware sirrin lambobin sirri ta kasance tafiya ce ta kaɗaici mai zurfi. Ko da a cikin kukan yanke kauna da ke fitowa daga harsashin yaƙi, ya zurfafa cikin matsalolin da ba za a iya warware su ba, yana haɗa zaren bege da hankali mai sanyi. Katangar dabaru da ya gina ta hanyar kwana da yawa, kamar wani katafaren gini, a ƙarshe ta raba duhu kuma ta ɗaga tutar nasara, amma abin da ya matsa zuciyarsa ba nasarar na'urar ba ce, sai dai gaskiyar da ba a sani ba mai suna ɗan adam.

Mene ne ɗan adam, kuma mene ne soyayya? Duniya ta jefa masa gwaji mai ban mamaki, kamar wani makirci na kaddara, shi da ke kulle a cikin duniyar dabaru, kuma gaskiyarsa ta yanke da ruwan wukake masu sanyi na rashin fahimta da son zuciya. Daraja da lambobin yabo sun zama marasa amfani, kamar ganyen kaka, kuma manyan nasarorinsa an ɗauke su a matsayin tabo marar amfani. Ruhunsa, wanda nauyin danniya ya murkushe, ya nutse cikin azaba marar misaltuwa, kamar jirgin ruwa da ya nutse a cikin teku, amma ko da a cikin zurfin yanke kauna inda ko da haske mai rauni ba ya kaiwa, bai taɓa barin gaskiyarsa ba har zuwa ƙarshe.

Ko da yake rayuwarsa ta kasance gajere, amma tunaninsa bai taɓa tsayawa ba har abada. Sunansa yanzu ana kiransa uban wayewar inji, majagaba na sabon sararin samaniya mai suna hankali na wucin gadi, kamar wani tauraro mai haske, kuma iri da ya shuka sun shiga ko'ina cikin duniyar dijital da muke rayuwa a yau, suna numfashi, kamar iska mai ba da rai. Ruhunsa, wanda ke motsa duniya daga wurare marasa ganuwa, har yanzu yana rubuta wani labari marar ƙarewa a cikin zukatanmu da ke mafarkin sabbin damammaki, kamar wani marubuci na sama.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Charles Babbage masanin lissafi ne kuma mai ƙirƙira na Biritaniya na ƙarni na 19, wanda ya kafa ra'ayin kwamfuta mai iya shirye-shirye ta dijital.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar Injin Bambanci da fara haɓakawa
Ƙirƙirar ra'ayin Injin Nazari da ƙirarsa
Gabatar da ra'ayin kwamfuta mai iya shirye-shirye
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa na majagaba sun zama ginshiƙin kimiyyar kwamfuta ta zamani da zamanin dijital.

charles-babbage.epic:
Charles Babbage, wani masanin lissafi, masanin falsafa, mai ƙirƙira, kuma injiniyan inji na Biritaniya wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1791, ya yi mafarkin gagarumin canji wanda zai kawo juyin juya hali a hanyoyin lissafin ɗan adam a cikin guguwar juyin juya halin masana'antu na ƙarni na 19. A wancan lokacin, Biritaniya tana fuskantar buƙatar haɓaka daidaito a cikin hadaddun lissafin lissafi tare da ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha. Musamman ma, ana amfani da teburan lissafi (numerical tables) masu ɗauke da kurakurai marasa adadi a fannin jiragen ruwa, ilimin taurari, da injiniyanci, wanda hakan yakan haifar da sakamako mai muni. An haife shi a London a matsayin ɗan wani ma'aikacin banki, Babbage ya nuna baiwa ta musamman a fannin inji da lissafi tun yana yaro. Ya shiga Kwalejin Trinity na Jami'ar Cambridge don nazarin lissafi, kuma a nan, tare da abokan aikinsa, ya kafa Ƙungiyar Nazari (Analytical Society), yana ba da gudummawa ga gabatar da hanyoyin lissafi na nahiyar Turai zuwa Biritaniya. Tun daga wannan lokacin, ya fara jin sha'awar rage kurakuran lissafi da ke faruwa saboda kuskuren ɗan adam, kuma ya fara tunanin ra'ayin sarrafa lissafi ta hanyar inji. Wannan ya zama ginshiƙin da daga baya ya kafa ra'ayin 'kwamfuta mai iya shirye-shirye ta dijital'.

Ra'ayin Babbage mai juyin juya hali ya fara bayyana a shekara ta 1822, tare da ƙirar 'Injin Bambanci' (Difference Engine). Injin Bambanci wata na'ura ce ta inji da aka keɓance don lissafin ayyukan polynomial da kuma tsara su a cikin tebur, kuma ana sa ran zai rage kurakuran da ke faruwa a cikin lissafin hannu a wancan lokacin. Gwamnatin Biritaniya, da ta fahimci mahimmancin wannan aikin, ta yi alƙawarin ba da tallafin kuɗi mai yawa, amma matakin fasaha na wancan lokacin ya sa yin sassa masu daidaito ya yi matuƙar wahala, kuma an samu babban kuɗi da jinkiri. A cikin wannan tsari, Babbage ya fara tunanin wani ra'ayi mafi ci gaba, wato 'Injin Nazari' (Analytical Engine). Injin Nazari ba kawai na'urar lissafi ba ce, amma na'ura ce mai iya shirye-shirye gabaɗaya, kama da kwamfutocin zamani. Wannan wani ƙira ne mai juyin juya hali wanda ya yi amfani da katunan bugu (punch cards) don shigar da umarni da bayanai, kuma yana da na'urar sarrafawa (mill), na'urar adanawa (store), da na'urorin shigarwa/fitarwa. Wannan canji ya nuna cewa ya yi mafarkin na'ura wacce ba kawai za ta sarrafa lissafi ba, har ma za ta iya yin ayyukan dabaru da kuma rarrabuwar sharadi. A wannan lokacin, masanin lissafi Ada Lovelace ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen fahimta da faɗaɗa hangen nesa na Babbage ta hanyar haɓaka algorithms don Injin Nazari.

Duk da haka, hangen nesa na Babbage mai gabatarwa ya fuskanci matsaloli marasa adadi saboda iyakokin fasaha da kuɗi na zamaninsa. Aikin Injin Bambanci ya fuskanci dakatarwar tallafin gwamnati saboda ci gaba da canje-canjen ƙira da wahalar yin sassa masu daidaito, kuma Injin Nazari ma bai kammala ba a lokacin rayuwarsa. A wancan lokacin, fasahar injiniyanci ta sa kusan ba zai yiwu ba a yi da kuma haɗa dubban sassa masu daidaito ba tare da kuskure ba, kuma babu wani tushe na zamantakewa da zai iya fahimta da tallafawa ra'ayoyinsa gabaɗaya. An zarge shi da kuma yi masa ba'a a matsayin 'mahaukaci mai tunani', amma bai taɓa barin imaninsa ba. Baya ga bincikensa kan injunan lissafi, Babbage ya nuna kansa a matsayin masanin kimiyya mai fannoni daban-daban ta hanyar gabatar da ra'ayoyi masu juyin juya hali a fannoni daban-daban kamar gyaran tsarin gidan waya, inganta tsarin siginar fitilar hasken teku, da ƙirƙirar na'urorin tsaro na jirgin ƙasa. A cikin wannan takaici da kaɗaici, ya ci gaba da gyara da inganta zane-zanensa, yana ƙonewa da azama ga gaba. Ko da yake ƙoƙarinsa mai ɗorewa da ruhinsa marar yankewa ba su yi nasara ba a zamaninsa, sun zama tushen ɗaya daga cikin manyan gadon ilimi a tarihin ɗan adam.

Charles Babbage ya rasu a shekara ta 1871, amma ra'ayoyinsa masu juyin juya hali sun fara samun karɓuwa bayan shekaru da yawa. Ko da yake Injin Bambanci da Injin Nazari ba su kammala ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, ƙirarsa ta ƙunshi kusan cikakken tsarin asali da ka'idodin aiki na kwamfutocin zamani. Musamman ma, ra'ayin Injin Nazari ya riga ya haɗa da mahimman abubuwan kimiyyar kwamfuta na yau, kamar tsarin shirye-shirye na ciki, rarrabuwar sharadi, da madauki, wanda ke tabbatar da cewa ya kasance majagaba wanda ya riga zamaninsa da nisa. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 20, tare da fitowar kwamfutocin lantarki, an sake nazarin tushen ka'idar Babbage, kuma an kira shi 'Uban Kwamfuta'. Gadonsa shine tushen duk fasahar dijital da muke amfani da ita yau, kamar wayoyin hannu, intanet, da basirar wucin gadi. Mafarkin Babbage ya zama gaskiya ba kawai ta hanyar gears da tururi ba, amma ta hanyar kwararar lantarki, kuma ruhinsa yana raye a cikin wayewar fasaha ta zamani. Idan aka kwatanta da rayuwar wasu masu ƙirƙira waɗanda ba a fahimce su ba a zamaninsu, kamar abokiyar aikinsa Ada Lovelace, labarin Babbage yana ba da zurfin tunani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ibn Sina masanin falsafa ne kuma likita na Farisa a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci, wanda ya rubuta “Al-Qanun fi al-Tibb” da “Kitab al-Shifa,” yana da tasiri sosai ga ilimin Gabas da Yamma.
key_achievements: Rubuta “Al-Qanun fi al-Tibb” (The Canon of Medicine)
Rubuta “Kitab al-Shifa” (The Book of Healing)
Haɗa falsafar Aristotle da tunanin Musulunci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa na likitanci da falsafa sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban likitanci da kimiyya a Turai ta zamanin da, kuma suna ci gaba da ba da zurfin fahimta ga ilimin zamani.

ibn-sina.epic:
Ibn Sina (kimanin 980 – 1037) ya kasance masanin falsafa, likita, kuma masanin kimiyya na Farisa a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci, wanda aka kira shi 'Sarkin Masana' saboda iliminsa mai yawa da nasarorinsa. An haife shi a Afshana kusa da Bukhara, a tsakiyar Asiya, a ƙarshen ƙarni na 10, ya kasance a tsakiyar wani zamani inda duniyar Musulunci ke karɓar ilimin tsohuwar Girka da Roma, yana haɓaka ci gaban ilimi. Tun yana yaro, Ibn Sina ya nuna hazaka ta musamman, ya haddace Alkur'ani kafin ya kai shekara 10, kuma yana da shekara 14, ya zarce malamansa, yana nazarin fannoni daban-daban kamar fikihun Musulunci, falsafa, kimiyyar halitta, lissafi, da ilimin taurari da kansa. Ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi a fannin likitanci, inda ya sami koyarwa daga manyan likitocin zamaninsa tun yana da shekara 16, kuma yana da shekara 18, ya fara samun suna ta hanyar warkar da rashin lafiyar Sarkin daular Samanid a Bukhara. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta cika da ƙishirwa mara iyaka ga ilimi da bincike, wanda ya kafa harsashin zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana daban-daban a tarihin ɗan adam. Tun yana saurayi, ya riga ya mallaki kusan dukkan fannoni na ilimi na zamaninsa, yana karya iyakokin ilimi.

Rayuwar Ibn Sina ta kasance ci gaba da neman ilimi, amma kuma ta faru ne a cikin yanayin siyasa mai cike da rudani. Tun yana farkon shekarunsa na ashirin, ya yi aiki a matsayin likita kuma waziri a fadojin sarakuna daban-daban, yana shiga cikin siyasa da gudanarwa. Duk da haka, yanayin siyasa mara tabbas, kamar faɗuwar daular Samanid da hawan daular Ghaznavid, ya tilasta masa rayuwar ƙaura da gudun hijira akai-akai. A cikin wannan rudani, Ibn Sina ya fara rubuta manyan ayyukansa. Ɗaya daga cikinsu, “Al-Qanun fi al-Tibb” (The Canon of Medicine), wani babban littafi ne na likitanci wanda ya tsara ilimin likitanci na tsohuwar Girka da Larabawa a tsari, tare da ƙarin gogewarsa ta asibiti. Wannan littafi ya ƙunshi abubuwan da ke haifar da cututtuka, ganewar asali, hanyoyin magani, da ilimin magunguna, kuma an karɓe shi a matsayin littafin koyarwa na yau da kullun don ilimin likitanci na Yammacin Turai a zamanin da, yana da tasiri mai girma tsawon ƙarnuka. Wani babban aiki kuma, “Kitab al-Shifa” (The Book of Healing), wani littafi ne na falsafa da kimiyya wanda ya ƙunshi fannoni daban-daban kamar dabaru, kimiyyar halitta, ilimin halayyar ɗan adam, lissafi, ilimin taurari, da kiɗa, yana nuna cikakken iliminsa. Wannan lokaci ya nuna kololuwar ƙwarewarsa ta ilimi, amma kuma wani lokaci ne na canji inda gwagwarmaya saboda rikicin siyasa suka fara.

A cikin rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa, Ibn Sina ya yi ta yawo a birane daban-daban, yana fuskantar wahalhalu. Ya yi aiki a ƙarƙashin sarakuna a yankuna daban-daban kamar Gurganj, Ray, Hamadan, da Isfahan, amma gwagwarmayar iko da sauye-sauyen dauloli sun kasance barazana a gare shi. Musamman a Hamadan, yayin da yake aiki a matsayin waziri, an kama shi a cikin makircin siyasa har ma an ɗaure shi. Duk da haka, ko a cikin waɗannan matsaloli, sha'awarsa ta ilimi ba ta ragu ba. Ya ci gaba da rubutu da bincike har a cikin kurkuku, kuma bai daina muhimman ayyukansa na rubuce-rubuce ba ko a lokacin tafiye-tafiyensa. Ibn Sina kuma ya fuskanci suka da adawa daga masana addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya saboda ra'ayoyinsa na falsafa. Musamman, ra'ayoyinsa game da dawwamar duniya da ilimin Allah game da abubuwa na musamman sun haifar da rikici da masana tauhidin Musulunci na gargajiya. Ya shiga cikin waɗannan muhawarar ilimi da himma, yana kare ra'ayoyinsa, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a duniyar ilimi ta zamaninsa ta hanyar wasiƙu da rubuce-rubuce masu yawa. Rayuwarsa ta yi gwagwarmaya akai-akai tsakanin ginshiƙai biyu na neman ilimi da rayuwar siyasa, yana nuna ƙarfin hali mara yankewa don cimma nasarorin ilimi a kowane yanayi.

A ranar 18 ga Yuni, 1037, Ibn Sina ya rasu saboda rashin lafiya yayin da yake tafiya daga Isfahan zuwa Hamadan, amma gadonsa na ilimi ya yi tasiri sosai ga ɗan adam a tsawon zamani. Ayyukansa, musamman “Al-Qanun fi al-Tibb,” an fassara su zuwa Latin tun daga ƙarni na 12, an yi amfani da su a matsayin littafin koyarwa na yau da kullun a makarantun likitanci a duk faɗin Turai tsawon ƙarnuka, suna ba da tushe mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban likitancin Yamma. Rubuce-rubucensa na falsafa, wani yunƙuri ne na haɗa tunanin Aristotle da Neoplatonism da ra'ayoyin Musulunci, sun yi tasiri sosai ba kawai ga falsafar Musulunci ta zamanin da ba har ma ga masana falsafar Scholastic na Yamma. Hanyar Ibn Sina mai tsari da kuma jaddada mahimmancin lura da asibiti har yau ana ɗaukar su a matsayin abin koyi don binciken kimiyya. Nasarorinsa na ilimi, tare da gadon ilimi na masana Musulunci na zamaninsa kamar Al-Razi da Al-Farabi, suna wakiltar Zamanin Zinariya na wayewar Musulunci ta zamanin da kuma sun ba da gudummawa wajen kafa harsashin ci gaban kimiyyar Yamma.
ibn-sina.trials: [ha] Ibn Sina faced periods of exile and imprisonment due to political instability and power struggles. His great fame also made him a target of envy and opposition.
ibn-sina.overcoming: [ha] Despite challenging circumstances, Ibn Sina maintained his passion for scholarship. He produced numerous masterpieces through constant research and writing, and his exceptional medical skills and knowledge earned him respect, becoming a driving force to overcome adversity.

fact_box.one_line_summary: James Watt (1736-1819) ya kasance mai ƙirƙira kuma injiniyan inji ɗan Scotland a lokacin Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu, wanda ya inganta injin tururi don jagorantar ci gaban masana'antu.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar mai raba tururi (separate condenser) na injin tururi
Haɓaka injin tururi mai iya juyawa
Ba da shawarar naúrar ƙarfi 'watt'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Injin tururinsa ya zama babban ƙarfi na Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu, ya kafa tushen wayewar zamani, kuma ana amfani da 'watt' a matsayin ma'aunin ƙarfi har zuwa yau.

james-watt.epic:
James Watt (1736-1819) ya kasance wani mai ƙirƙira kuma injiniyan inji ɗan Scotland wanda ya yi aiki a lokacin fitowar Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu a tsakiyar ƙarni na 18, wanda ya canza rayuwar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya. Haihuwarsa ta zo daidai da lokacin da sabon ƙarfi, injin tururi, ke fara fitowa. An haife shi a Greenock, Scotland, a ranar 19 ga Janairu, 1736, Watt ya girma a ƙarƙashin mahaifinsa mai ginin jirgi kuma mai kera kayan aiki, inda ya fara haɓaka sha'awa mai zurfi ga injina da kayan aiki tun yana ƙarami. Tun yana yaro, ya kasance mai rauni, don haka ya fi mai da hankali kan ilimin kai a gida a fannin lissafi, kimiyya, da injiniyanci maimakon ilimin makaranta, wanda ya zama tushen muhimmiyar gudummawa ga sabbin abubuwan da ya ƙirƙira a nan gaba. A wancan lokacin, al'umma sun dogara ne ga iyakantattun tushen wuta kamar injinan ruwa, injinan iska, da kuma farkon nau'in injin tururi na Newcomen, kuma fasahar canza makamashi mai inganci ita ce babbar ƙalubale ga ci gaban masana'antu. Watt yana shirye don bunƙasa basirarsa a cikin wannan buƙatar ta zamani.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Watt ya faru ne a shekara ta 1764, lokacin da yake aiki a matsayin mai kera kayan aiki a Jami'ar Glasgow. A lokacin da yake gyara samfurin injin tururi na Newcomen mallakar jami'ar, ya gano rashin ingancin injin tururi na gargajiya. Injin Newcomen yana buƙatar sanyaya silinda akai-akai sannan a sake dumama shi don tattara tururi, kuma a cikin wannan tsari, an ɓata adadi mai yawa na makamashin zafi. Watt ya yi tunani sosai don magance wannan matsala, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1765, ya fito da ra'ayin tattara tururi a wani wuri daban a waje da babban silinda, wato, ra'ayin 'mai raba tururi' (separate condenser). Wannan wani ra'ayi ne mai juyin juya hali wanda zai iya haɓaka ingancin injin tururi sosai. Mai raba tururi ya kasance fasaha mai mahimmanci wanda ke rage amfani da mai sosai ta hanyar kiyaye silinda na injin tururi a koyaushe yana da zafi yayin da yake tattara tururi yadda ya kamata. Duk da haka, aiwatar da wannan ra'ayi zuwa inji mai aiki ya kasance babban ƙalubale tare da matakin fasaha da jari na wancan lokacin, kuma Watt ya fuskanci gwaje-gwaje da yawa da matsalolin kuɗi.

Gwagwarmayar Watt don aiwatar da ra'ayin mai raba tururi ya kasance mai tsawo da wahala. Da farko, ya sami goyon baya daga 'yan kasuwa kamar John Roebuck, amma ya fuskanci matsalolin fasaha da rashin kuɗi. Musamman ma, ƙirƙirar sassa masu inganci waɗanda zasu iya jure matsin lamba mai yawa ya kusan zama ba zai yiwu ba tare da fasahar wancan lokacin. A shekara ta 1769, Watt ya sami haƙƙin mallaka don mai raba tururi, amma nasarar kasuwanci ta kasance mai nisa. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 1775, ya kulla haɗin gwiwa mai mahimmanci tare da Matthew Boulton, wani ɗan kasuwa mai hazaka kuma mai masana'antu. Jarin Boulton da ƙwarewar fasaha mai kyau na masana'antar Soho ta Birmingham sun samar da tushe don mayar da abubuwan da Watt ya ƙirƙira zuwa gaskiya. Kamfanin Boulton & Watt ya haɓaka fasahar ƙirƙirar sassa masu inganci kuma ya sa injin tururi na Watt ya yi nasara a kasuwanci. Watt bai tsaya a nan ba, ya ci gaba da haɓaka 'kayan aikin rana da duniya' (sun and planet gear) wanda ke canza motsi na gaba da gaba zuwa motsi na juyawa, 'haɗin gwiwar motsi mai layi daya' (parallel motion linkage) wanda ke kiyaye motsi na piston a cikin silinda a madaidaiciya, da kuma 'mai sarrafa centrifugal' (centrifugal governor) wanda ke sarrafa saurin injin ta atomatik, ta haka ya haɓaka aiki da amfani da injin tururi. Waɗannan sabbin abubuwa sun sa injin tururi ya zama mai amfani a fannoni daban-daban na masana'antu kamar masana'antu da masana'antar yadi, fiye da famfunan ruwa na ma'adinai.

Injin tururi na James Watt ya zama alama mafi ƙarfi kuma babban ƙarfi na Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu. Abubuwan da ya ƙirƙira sun kawo sauyi a hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki a masana'antu, sun ba da damar fitowar sabbin hanyoyin sufuri kamar layin dogo da jiragen ruwa na tururi, kuma sun canza tsarin wayewar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya. Don girmama nasarorin da ya samu, an sanya wa naúrar ƙarfi ta duniya suna 'watt', kuma ana amfani da ita sosai a yau don nuna yawan amfani da wutar lantarki. Watt ya kasance fiye da mai ƙirƙira kawai; ya kasance majagaba wanda ya aiwatar da ka'idodin kimiyya ta hanyar injiniyanci, yana da tasiri mai girma ga rayuwar ɗan adam. Injin tururinsa ya yi amfani da man fetur kamar gawayi yadda ya kamata don haɓaka samar da kayayyaki da birane, kuma wannan ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen al'ummar masana'antu ta zamani. Sabbin abubuwan da Watt ya ƙirƙira sun kasance misali bayyananne na tasirin ci gaban fasaha ga al'umma da tattalin arziki. Nasarorin da ya samu sun buɗe hanya ga masu ƙirƙira na gaba kamar George Stephenson tare da injin tururi na layin dogo da Robert Fulton tare da jirgin ruwa na tururi, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban wayewar ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: George Stephenson injiniyan farar hula ne kuma injiniya a Biritaniya a lokacin juyin juya halin masana'antu na karni na 19, wanda ya kafa ma'aunin layin dogo na duniya kuma aka kira shi 'Uban Jirgin Kasa'.
key_achievements: Gina layin dogo na farko na jama'a mai amfani da injin tururi (Stockton-Darlington)
Cin nasara da 'Rocket' a Rainhill Trials
Kafa ma'aunin layin dogo (Stephenson gauge) wanda ya zama ma'aunin duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kirkire-kirkirensa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen tsarin sufuri na duniya da kuma hanzarta ci gaban masana'antu.

george-stephenson.epic:
George Stephenson (an haife shi a 1781) injiniyan farar hula ne kuma injiniya a Biritaniya a lokacin juyin juya halin masana'antu na karni na 19, mutumin da ya buɗe sabon zamani na jirgin ƙasa wanda ya canza rayuwar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya. An haife shi a ranar 9 ga Yuni, 1781, a Wylam, Northumberland, Ingila, ɗan wani talaka mai hakar ma'adinai, bai sami ilimi na yau da kullun ba. Tun yana yaro, dole ne ya yi aiki a ma'adinan kwal don samun abin rayuwa, kuma yarintarsa ​​cike take da ƙura da hayakin kwal. Duk da haka, tare da basirar injiniya ta halitta da kuma sha'awar koyo mara iyaka, ya koyi injinan tururi da na'urorin inji da ke kewaye da shi da kansa. Ya sami zurfin fahimtar injina ta hanyar ayyuka daban-daban kamar mai kula da fitilu, mai kula da birki, da injiniya, kuma ya nuna ƙwarewa ta musamman wajen sarrafa famfunan ruwa da injinan ɗagawa a ma'adinan kwal. Wannan ƙwarewar aiki ta zama tushen da ba makawa a gare shi don haɓaka injinan tururi da gina tsarin jirgin ƙasa daga baya. Ya kasance matashi mai cike da sha'awar bincika yadda injina ke aiki da kuma neman hanyoyin ingantawa, fiye da yin aikin da aka ba shi kawai.

Wani muhimmin lokaci a rayuwar Stephenson ya zo lokacin da yake aiki a matsayin injiniya a ma'adinan kwal na Killingworth. A lokacin, ana amfani da dawakai ko injinan tururi na farko don jigilar kwal a ma'adinan, amma akwai iyakoki bayyanannu a cikin inganci da dogaro. Don magance waɗannan matsalolin, ya fara haɓaka injinan tururi da kansa. A cikin 1814, ya kammala injin tururi na farko, 'Blücher'. An yi amfani da shi cikin nasara don jigilar kwal a ma'adinan Killingworth, amma har yanzu yana da jinkiri, mai nauyi, kuma yana lalata layin dogo. A lokacin, injiniyoyi da yawa sun yi shakkar amfanin injinan tururi, kuma akwai ra'ayi mai yawa cewa dawakai sun fi inganci don jigilar kaya masu nauyi a kan dogon zango. Stephenson ya yi yaƙi da waɗannan matsalolin fasaha da ra'ayoyin jama'a, yana mai da hankali kan ƙirƙirar injin da ya fi ƙarfi da inganci. Fiye da ƙirƙirar injin kawai, ya fara tunani game da inganta tsarin gaba ɗaya, gami da juzu'i tsakanin layin dogo da ƙafafun, da kuma ingantaccen amfani da matsin tururi.

Ƙoƙarin Stephenson marar yankewa ya haifar da gina layin dogo na Stockton-Darlington a 1825. Wannan shine layin dogo na farko a duniya da aka buɗe wa jama'a ta amfani da injin tururi, inda injin mai suna 'Locomotion No. 1' ya jigilar kwal da fasinjoji, yana sanar da farkon zamanin jirgin ƙasa. Wannan nasarar ta kawo masa babban ƙalubale: aikin gina layin dogo na Liverpool-Manchester. Wannan aikin ya fuskanci matsalolin injiniya da ba a taɓa gani ba, kamar ketare Chat Moss, wani yanki mai fadama. Stephenson ya jagoranci gina layin dogo cikin nasara ta hanyar shawo kan fadama tare da sabbin hanyoyin injiniya. A cikin 1829, an gudanar da 'Rainhill Trials' don zaɓar injin mafi kyau don layin dogo na Liverpool-Manchester, kuma 'Rocket', wanda Stephenson da ɗansa Robert suka tsara, ya ci nasara tare da babban aiki. 'Rocket' ya kai gudun kilomita 48 a kowace awa, wanda ya kasance abin al'ajabi a lokacin, yana tabbatar da yiwuwar injinan tururi marasa iyaka, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci a ci gaban fasahar jirgin ƙasa. A cikin wannan tsari, Stephenson ya kafa ma'aunin layin dogo na ƙafa 4 da inci 8.5 (milimita 1,435) a matsayin ma'auni, wanda daga baya aka kira shi 'Stephenson gauge' kuma ya zama tushen ma'aunin layin dogo na duniya.

George Stephenson ana kiransa 'Uban Jirgin Kasa', kuma nasarorinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga tarihin wayewar ɗan adam, fiye da ci gaban fasaha kawai. Tsarin jirgin ƙasa da ya kafa ya zama jijiya ta juyin juya halin masana'antu, yana kawo sauyi ga jigilar kayan masarufi da samfura, kuma ya canza yadda mutane ke tafiya gaba ɗaya. Wannan ya hanzarta birane da masana'antu, ya haɓaka musayar tsakanin ƙasashe, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga ci gaban tattalin arzikin duniya. Juriya da ruhin kirkire-kirkire nasa suna ci gaba da zaburar da mutane da yawa a yau, kuma ma'aunin layin dogo da ya kafa har yanzu ana amfani da shi a yawancin layin dogo na duniya, yana tabbatar da cewa gadonsa yana raye. Rayuwar Stephenson ana tunawa da ita a matsayin misali na mutumin da ya yi nasara da kansa wanda ya cimma manyan nasarori ta hanyar ci gaba da koyo da aiki, duk da yanayin talauci. Nasarorinsa, tare da na James Watt, wanda ya jagoranci ci gaban injin tururi a lokaci guda, da kuma majagaba na jirgin ƙasa na Amurka waɗanda suka yi mafarkin layin dogo na nahiyoyi, suna nuna babban ci gaban fasaha na zamanin juyin juya halin masana'antu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An haife shi ɗan talaka manomi, Gregor Mendel ya zama sufuri kuma ya gano dokokin gado ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje da wake, ya kafa tushen ilimin gado na zamani.
key_achievements: Gano dokokin gado ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje na haɗin gwiwar wake
Bugawa takarda mai taken 'Gwaje-gwaje kan Haɗin Gwiwar Shuke-shuke' wanda ke ɗauke da ka'idodin gado
Kafa tushe mai ƙarfi na ilimin gado na zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Dokokin gadonsa sun zama ginshiƙin ilimin gado na zamani, suna da tasiri mai girma wajen fahimtar abubuwan rayuwa da kuma maganin cututtuka.

gregor-mendel.epic:
A ƙauyen Hynčice mai ƙura a Silesia, Daular Austriya, a ƙarƙashin tsananin rana na shekarar 1822, Yohannu ɗan yaro ya yi ƙoƙarin fahimtar duniya, yana kallon asirin da ke cikin fuka-fukan kwari da kuma alkawarin tsaba da ke ɓoye a cikin ƙasa. An haife shi ɗan talaka manomi, amma ruhinsa ya riga ya wuce iyakokin gaskiya na wucin gadi, yana shiga cikin zurfin kaɗaici, yana marmarin hikimar nan gaba mai nisa. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi mai tsanani ta ci karo da katangar kuɗi mai sanyi, kuma rayuwarsa ta yi rawar jiki kamar tana kan gabar teku, amma basirarsa mai kama da wuta ta sami hanyarta a hankali, ta sami damar shiga cikin gidan sufi na Augustinian mai natsuwa a Brno, da sabon suna Gregor. A cikin rigar sufi mai launin toka, zai zama wani katon mutum mai bin numfashin halitta.

Ya fahimci cewa a cikin asirai masu yawa na lambun gidan sufi, da kuma kowane tushe na wake mai girma, akwai tsarin sararin samaniya. Shekaru bakwai, rayuka sama da 30,000 sun fito daga ƙarƙashin hannunsa mai juriya, kuma ya bincika a hankali, amma da himma, babban dokar da ke ɓoye a cikin canje-canje na ɗan lokaci, har zuwa siffar iri, launi, tsayin tushe, da launi na fure. Yana fassara rawan rayuwa mai rikitarwa da harshen lissafi mai sanyi, ya bayyana asirin yadda ɓoyayyun halaye ke wucewa daga iyaye zuwa zuriya. A cikin wannan ƙaramin sararin samaniya na lambun da aka keɓe, ya buɗe ƙofar babban asirin da duniya ba ta sani ba tukuna: gado.

A shekarar 1866, gaskiyarsa, wadda aka buga a ƙarƙashin taken “Gwaje-gwaje kan Haɗin Gwiwar Shuke-shuke,” ta faɗa cikin shiru mai sanyi. Ko da yake manyan mutanen zamaninsa sun karanta takardarsa, ba su fahimci cikakken hangen nesa na juyin juya hali da ke cikinta ba. Kaifin tunanin lissafi ya ɓace a cikin muhawarar ilimin halittu mai laushi, kuma har ma Darwin ya yi watsi da aikinsa. Shi kaɗai, yana kallon yadda aka binne abin da ya gano, ya zauna a gaban tsohon teburinsa, yana yaƙi da raƙuman ruwa na yanke kauna da ke ci gaba da zuwa. A cikin hamadar rashin kulawar duniya, babban basirarsa tana haskakawa shi kaɗai.

Amma kogin lokaci bai iya wanke gaskiyarsa ba. Bayan shekaru da yawa, dokokin Gregor Mendel sun bayyana kamar sun farka daga barci a cikin takardar da aka manta. Sunansa yanzu yana kan bakin kowa da kowa da ke binciken asalin rayuwa, kuma hangen nesansa, wanda ya fara da gwajin wake mai sauƙi, ya zama tushe mai ƙarfi na ilimin gado na zamani. A kowane matakinmu na fahimtar gudun jinsin da ba a gani ba, warkar da cututtuka, da binciken al'ajabin rayuwa, za mu tuna cewa gadon tsaba da suka fito daga lambun Gregor Mendel mai kaɗaici yana raye kuma yana numfashi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masani kimiyya wanda ya hambarar da alchemy ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje masu tsauri a Paris a lokacin juyin juya hali kuma ya kafa tushen ilimin kimiyyar zamani, amma aka sadaukar da shi a cikin haukan juyin juya hali.
key_achievements: Kafa tushen ilimin kimiyyar zamani ta hanyar gwaje-gwaje masu tsauri
Gudummawa mai girma wajen gano ainihin iskar gas da abubuwa
Kawo karshen zamanin alchemy da kafa hanyoyin kimiyya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa mai dorewa ya zama ginshikin kimiyyar zamani, kuma shine tushen duk wani binciken kimiyya a yau.

antoine-lavoisier.epic:
A lokacin da manyan gine-ginen Paris ke cike da radadin tsohuwar hikima, a cikin duhun wani zamani da iskar canji ke hargitsa tsohuwar iko, a cikin birnin duwatsu masu sanyi, Antoine Lavoisier yana goge kansa. A cikin dakinsa na gwaji inda haske da inuwa ke rawa, tsakanin launuka masu ban mamaki na kwalabe masu dauke da sinadarai da harshen wutar fitila mai ci gaba da ci, ya shafe darare yana hadiye tambayoyi masu kama da izgili ga gaskiyar da aka sani. Ruhinsa, yana bin yiwuwar canje-canje marasa tabbas, a waje yana da nutsuwa amma a ciki yana da harshen wuta mai zafi, ya yi ta neman hanyarsa a cikin rudanin gaskiya.

A lokacin da iskar gas marar launi da kamshi ta rayu a hannunsa, ta sami sabuwar rayuwa, kuma abubuwan da ke boye a cikin toka suka haskaka da zinariya, yana girgiza tsarin duniya. Tsoffin mafarkai marasa tushe na alchemy sun dushe, kuma wayewar kimiyya, dauke da gwaje-gwaje masu tsauri da ma'auni, tana fitowa. Mutane sun yi masa rada, amma kadan ne suka fahimce shi. Kadaicin bincike mai girma ya zama gicciye a kansa, kuma hanyar ci gaba sau da yawa tana haduwa da bakin kogi na yanke kauna.

A wani mummunan rana da jajayen igiyoyin juyin juya hali suka mamaye birnin, kuma barazanar takobi ta yanke iska, hankalinsa ya shiga cikin guguwar tarihi. Alkawarin babban hankali da binciken kimiyya an tattake shi ba tare da tausayi ba a gaban hauka da kwadayi na dan Adam. Karfen sanyi na guillotine ya nufi kansa, kuma sirrin sararin samaniya da suka cika kwakwalwarsa, ba tare da sun cika ba, sun yi sanyi tare da numfashinsa na karshe.

Amma bai bace ba. A cikin rubuce-rubucen gwaje-gwajensa, a cikin dokokin da aka rubuta sunansa, ruhinsa yana rayuwa har abada. A yau, a karkashin duk wani bincike da aka yi a cikin sunan kimiyya, akwai bincikensa mai dorewa wanda ya hambarar da tsohuwar duniya kuma ya bude sabbin sararin samaniya. Ruhinsa, wanda ya bi haske mai rauni a cikin duhu, yanzu ya zama ginshiki mai karfi wanda ke samar da babban tsaunin ilimi da bil'adama ke tsaye a kai.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Likitan da ya buɗe sabon fagen warkar da cututtuka da kuma ba wa ɗan adam bege ta hanyar bincike mai zurfi da juriya a zamanin daular Ming.
key_achievements: Binciken ganyen magani ta hanyar ratsa tsaunuka masu haɗari
Rubuta wahalar cututtuka da neman hanyoyin warkarwa
Buɗe sabuwar hanya ta hanyar karya tsoffin ilimi da haramun
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadon warkarwa da ya ƙirƙira da hikimarsa da juriya har yanzu yana raye a matsayin fitilar bege ga ɗan adam, ko da bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru.

li-shizhen.epic:
A zamanin daular Ming mai girma, a wani wuri mai natsuwa inda kamshin ganyen magani da tawada suka haɗu, a lokacin da rana mai zafi ke faɗuwa, kuma inuwar tsoffin al'adu ke rufe ko'ina, zuciyar wani yaro ta fara bugawa. Cikin littattafai masu kura da aka tara, a cikin duhun dare inda ko hasken taurari ba ya shiga, ya zama kamar yana sauraron sirrin harshen da ke cikin kowane ganye da bawon itace a duniya. Yana tattara gutsuttsarin littattafan magani da suka warwatse, a ƙarƙashin fitilar mai haske kaɗan, a gaban babban tsarin rayuwa da mutuwa na dukkan halittu, dole ne ya yi tambayoyi masu zurfi shi kaɗai. Kamar dukkan halittu suna masa raɗa a kunne, amma ya ɗauki nauyin wannan shiru mai nauyi wanda ba zai iya faɗa wa kowa ba.

Cikin laka mai zafi na wahala inda gumi ja da sanyin yanke kauna suka haɗu, ya rubuta dukkan wahalhalun duniya da goga mai tsufa. Ko a cikin sanyin da ke ratsa kashi, ya ratsa tsaunuka masu haɗari, ya ratsa dazuzzuka masu zurfi cike da macizai, yana so ya ji bugun zuciyar kowane abu mai rai. A gaban tsarin mulki mai danniya da kuma kallon jahilci na duniya, bincikensa wani lokaci ana masa kallon hauka ko kuma sha'awa mara amfani. Duk da dubban gazawa da ɗaruruwan takaici da suka tare masa hanya, bai karaya ba. Maimakon haka, da zuciyar da ke kan bakin kogi, dole ne ya ci gaba da zurfafa da kuma nisa.

Bayan shekaru da dama, da zafin wahala da lokutan kaɗaici masu yawa, a ƙarshe, ya fara haɗa launuka masu haske da ke cikin kowane ganyen magani na duniya. Kamar kuzarin alfijir da ke fitowa bayan ya yaga duhun dare, jarumtakar karya haramun, da fahimtar da ke juyar da tsoffin ilimi sun yi rawa a yatsunsa. Mutanen da ba su da ƙarfi a gaban tsananin cututtuka, sun fara samun bege ɗaya bayan ɗaya a gaban hannun warkarwa da ya ƙirƙira da hikimarsa da juriya. A lokacin fahimtar da ta zo masa kamar walƙiya, ya buɗe sabuwar hanya wacce babu wanda ya taɓa gani a baya. Bincikensa mara iyaka game da sirrin rayuwa da wannan kyakkyawar haɗin kai ya fara ba da 'ya'ya.

Yanzu, ko da bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru, tsohon littafinsa har yanzu yana raye kamar fitilar hikima. A cikin takun matafiyi da ke hawan hanyoyin tsaunuka masu haɗari, kukan yaro da ya ɓace, cikin nishin mutanen da suka gaji da wahalar rayuwa, sunansa har yanzu yana yaɗuwa a hankali kamar kamshin ganyen magani. Rawan rayuwa da ta fito daga fashewar tsohon ilimi, waƙar bege da ke furewa daga wahala ta fara ne daga ƙarshen gogarsa, kuma har yanzu tana raye tare da mu a wannan lokacin, muna jin hakan a fili ta hanyar gadonsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Guglielmo Marconi, injiniyan Italiya kuma mai ƙirƙira a ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, ya haɓaka tsarin waya mara waya mai amfani, wanda ya buɗe zamanin rediyo.
key_achievements: Haɓaka tsarin waya mara waya mai amfani
Nasarar sadarwa mara waya a fadin Tekun Atlantika
Samun lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics tare a shekara ta 1909
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fasahar sadarwarsa mara waya ta zama tushen rediyo na zamani da duk fasahohin mara waya, tana faɗaɗa iyakokin sadarwar ɗan adam.

guglielmo-marconi.epic:
Guglielmo Marconi (1874-1937) ya kasance wani injiniyan rediyo mai mitar rediyo, mai ƙirƙira, kuma ɗan siyasa daga Italiya, wanda ya yi rayuwarsa mai cike da tarihi a ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20. An haife shi a Bologna, Italiya, a shekara ta 1874, ya kasance mai sha'awar ra'ayin canja wurin bayanai ta hanyar raƙuman rediyo marasa ganuwa, wanda ya yi kama da sihiri a lokacin da fasahar waya ke dogara ga sadarwar waya. A lokacin, duniyar kimiyya tana buɗe sabon babi tare da tabbacin Heinrich Hertz na wanzuwar raƙuman lantarki, amma aiwatar da wannan a cikin tsarin sadarwa mai amfani ya kasance yanki ne da ba a sani ba, kamar wani teku mai zurfi da ba a taɓa shiga ba. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, matashin Marconi ya fahimci yiwuwar raƙuman rediyo da wani hangen nesa mai zurfi, kuma ya fara nutsa cikin gwaje-gwaje na kansa a gidansa. An san shi sosai a matsayin mutumin da ya kafa tushen rediyo na zamani ta hanyar haɓaka tsarin waya mara waya mai amfani da raƙuman rediyo, wanda ya zama farkon canjin yanayin sadarwar ɗan adam, kamar wani sabon alfijir da ya fito. Bincikensa na farko ya kasance farkon jajircewarsa, wanda ya yi kama da wutar da ba ta mutuwa, na mayar da mafarkin sadarwa mai nisa ta hanyar raƙuman rediyo zuwa gaskiya.

Gwaje-gwajen Marconi na farko sun faru ne galibi a cikin kadarorinsa masu zaman kansu, inda ya ci gaba da inganta na'urorin da ke aika da karɓar sigina ta hanyar raƙuman rediyo, kamar wani mai sana'a da ke sassaƙa wani abu mai daraja. Kusan shekara ta 1895, ya yi nasarar aika siginar rediyo zuwa nisan kilomita da yawa ta amfani da na'urarsa, yana tabbatar da yiwuwar sadarwa mara waya, wanda ya zama kamar wani haske da ya bayyana a cikin duhu. Duk da haka, gwamnatin Italiya ba ta nuna sha'awa sosai ga ƙirƙirarsa ba, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi, wanda ya canza alkiblar tafiyarsa. Da yake da tabbacin cewa fasaharsa tana da babban damar, ya koma Birtaniya a shekara ta 1896 don neman sabbin damammaki, kamar wani jarumi da ke neman sabuwar ƙasa. A Birtaniya, fahimta da goyon baya ga fasaharsa sun fi ƙarfi, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya sami takardar izini ta farko don waya mara waya. Waya mara waya (Wireless Telegraphy) fasaha ce ta musayar bayanai ta hanyar raƙuman rediyo ba tare da amfani da wayoyi ba. Binciken Marconi ya buɗe damar amfani da ita a fannin kasuwanci da soja, kuma musamman ma, ya ƙunshi damar kawo sauyi mai girma a sadarwar teku, kamar wani sabon haske da ya bayyana a cikin duhu.

A Birtaniya, Marconi ya hanzarta ci gaba da fasahar sadarwa mara waya, yana gina gadar da za ta haɗa duniya. Ya kafa Kamfanin Marconi a shekara ta 1897, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yaɗuwar fasahar waya mara waya ta kasuwanci, kuma ta hanyar ci gaba da bincike, ya ƙara nisan sadarwa sosai, yana miƙa hannunsa zuwa ga nesa. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorinsa, wanda ya yi kama da wani babban sihiri, shine nasarar aika siginar rediyo a fadin Tekun Atlantika a shekara ta 1901. Wannan wani gagarumin lamari ne wanda ya karya ra'ayin kimiyya na lokacin cewa raƙuman rediyo ba za su iya yaɗuwa a kan lanƙwasa duniya ba, kuma ya nuna a fili yiwuwar haɗa duniya baki ɗaya ba tare da waya ba, kamar yadda aka haɗa zukatan mutane. Tsarin waya mara waya na Marconi ya zama fasaha mai mahimmanci a fannoni daban-daban, kamar sadarwa tsakanin jiragen ruwa da aika siginar damuwa na teku. Musamman ma, muhimmancinsa ya fito fili lokacin da sadarwa mara waya ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a ayyukan ceto a lokacin nutsewar jirgin Titanic, yana ceton rayuka da yawa. Don gane waɗannan gudummawar, an ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin Physics tare da Ferdinand Braun a shekara ta 1909 don "gudummawarsu ga ci gaban waya mara waya", wanda ya zama alamar darajarsa.

Nasarorin Guglielmo Marconi sun yi tasiri sosai wajen tsara yanayin sadarwa na zamani, suna zana sabon taswirar duniya. Haɓaka tsarin waya mara waya mai amfani da shi ya wuce kawai aika saƙon waya ba tare da waya ba; ya buɗe zamanin watsa shirye-shiryen rediyo kuma a ƙarshe ya kafa tushen duk fasahohin sadarwa mara waya da muke amfani da su a yau, kamar wani babban gini da aka gina a kan dutse mai ƙarfi. Ya mayar da yiwuwar isar da bayanai ta hanyar raƙuman rediyo zuwa gaskiya, kuma wannan ya zama ginshiƙin hanyar sadarwa ta duniya, wanda ya haɗa zukatan mutane daga kowane lungu na duniya. Ƙirƙirarsa ta kawo sauyi a tsaron teku, ta zamantar da sadarwar soja, kuma ta buɗe hanya ga sabbin nau'ikan bayanai da nishaɗi ga jama'a, kamar wani sabon kofa da aka buɗe. An san Guglielmo Marconi a matsayin mai ƙirƙira rediyo, kuma ko bayan mutuwarsa, fasaharsa ta ci gaba da haɓaka, tana shiga cikin rayuwar ɗan adam sosai, kamar wani ruwa mai gudana. Muhimmancin nasarorinsa ya ƙaru saboda sun canza yanayin sadarwar ɗan adam tare da binciken lantarki na wasu masu ƙirƙira na zamani kamar Nikola Tesla, suna haskaka hanyar gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, gwagwarmayar masanin kimiyya mai jajircewa da nasarorin da ya samu wajen binciken tushen cututtuka da kuma ba da gudummawa wajen kawar da cututtuka masu yaduwa kamar tarin fuka da kwalara.
key_achievements: Gano kwayar cutar tarin fuka da ba da gudummawa wajen kawar da ita
Bincike da rigakafin cututtuka masu yaduwa ciki har da kwalara
Kafa tushen ci gaban alluran rigakafi masu sabbin abubuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarsa ta zama tushen ci gaban likitancin zamani, yana ba da bege na har abada ga rayuwar lafiya ta ɗan adam da kuma shawo kan cututtuka.

robert-koch.epic:
A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, a wani ɗakin gwaje-gwaje mai nisa a Turai, inda bangon filasta mai gurbi da inuwar fitilu masu duhu suka mamaye, wani rai ya farka yana binciken tushen cututtuka ta hanyar tsohuwar gilashin microscope. A wannan wuri inda kawai ƙamshin magunguna masu tsami da shiru na ɗan lokaci suka zauna, a cikin wani yanki da ba a sani ba inda ƙananan aljanu da idon ɗan adam ba zai iya gani ba suke rawa, ya sanya alƙawarin canza duniya a cikin zuciyarsa. Yawan raɗaɗin mutuwa da ke yawo a kunnuwansa, da kukan waɗanda suka yanke kauna, sun matse zuciyarsa, duk da haka, ƙishirwarsa ta gaskiya ba za a iya danne ta da komai ba.

A lokacin da babban dodo na tarin fuka ke cinye birane, bege ya watse kamar ƙura. Ya kulle kansa a cikin ɗakin gwaje-gwaje dare da rana, yana tattara gutsuttsarin bege mai ja ɗaya bayan ɗaya. A tsakanin ƙarfe mai sanyi da matsakaicin al'adu mai ɗanko, a cikin tarkacen gazawar da suka taru, bai ɓace ba. Ko da a cikin kallon shakku na abokan aikinsa da rashin kulawar al'umma, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba a cikin imaninsa. Kawai jajircewar bayyana ainihin waɗannan aljanu masu taurin kai, ƙananan halittu a ƙarƙashin microscope, shine haskensu guda ɗaya.

A ƙarshe, bayan gilashin da ke cike da azaba mai zafi da gumi, an bayyana ainihin abokin gaba da ba a gani ba. Farin cikin nasarar da aka samu bayan jajircewar ƙoƙari ya cika zuciyarsa kamar lava mai zafi, duk da haka, a wannan lokacin ma, bai tsaya ba. Yana yaƙi da ruɗin gurɓatawa mai wucewa, ya yi niyya ga zuciyar wata tsoro da za ta mamaye ɗan adam, cutar kwalara. Don zama haske ga waɗanda suka ɓace a cikin raƙuman ruwa na annoba mai tsanani, ya shiga cikin haɗari da son rai.

Sunansa yanzu yana haskakawa har abada a cikin zauren tarihi, kuma hasken duhu na tsohon ɗakin gwaje-gwaje ya zama hasken taurari da ke sanar da haihuwar alluran rigakafi masu sabbin abubuwa waɗanda suka ceci rayuka marasa adadi. Tafiyarsa, wadda gumi da hawaye suka gurbata, shaida ce mai rai ta jajircewar ɗan adam a kan barazanar da ba a gani ba. Rayuwar lafiya da muke morewa a yau, jajircewar rashin rasa bege a fuskar cuta, sune sautin babban gadon da ya bari.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Thomas Aquinas masanin tauhidi ne kuma masanin falsafa na ƙarni na 13 daga Italiya ta tsakiya, wanda ya kammala falsafar Scholasticism ta hanyar haɗa tauhidi da hankali.
key_achievements: Rubuta "Summa Theologiae"
Sake fassara falsafar Aristotle
Neman daidaito tsakanin imani da hankali
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya zama tushen falsafa na hukuma na Cocin Roman Katolika kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tunanin Yammacin Turai.

thomas-aquinas.epic:
Thomas Aquinas (an haife shi a kusan 1224/1225) ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana tauhidi da falsafa na Scholasticism a Cocin Yammacin Turai na Tsakiya, wanda tasirinsa ya ratsa ƙarnuka. Ƙarni na 13 ya kasance lokaci mai cike da rudani da girgiza, inda jami'o'i suka bunƙasa a faɗin Turai, kuma aka sake gano falsafar Aristotle, wanda ya buɗe sabon tattaunawa mai zurfi tsakanin imani da hankali. An haife shi a matsayin ɗan Count na Aquino a Italiya, an ba shi ilimi tun yana yaro a gidan sufi na Benedictine na Monte Cassino, inda ya haɓaka sha'awar ilimi mai zurfi da ba ta misaltuwa. A cikin al'adar tauhidin Augustine da ya mamaye lokacin, ya ji wata ƙishirwa ta asali da ba za a iya shawo kanta ba don bincika gaskiyar Allah ta hanyar hankali. A cikin wannan yanayi, ya kafa harsashin zama kololuwar falsafar Scholasticism, hanyar ilimi ta jami'o'in tsakiya, wato, tsarin ilimi wanda ke neman bincika da bayyana gaskiyar tauhidi ta hanyar hankali da tsari. Haihuwarsa ba kawai bayyanar wani mutum ɗaya ba ce, amma farkon wani babban canji a tarihin tunanin Yammacin Turai. 

Ɗaya daga cikin mahimman sauye-sauye da suka girgiza rayuwar Thomas Aquinas shine shawararsa ta shiga Order na Dominican, duk da adawar iyalinsa mai tsanani. A lokacin, iyalai masu daraja suna fatan 'ya'yansu su zama manyan jami'an coci, amma Order na Dominican, wanda ke rayuwa da sadaka, ya yi nisa da abin da suke tsammani. Iyalinsa sun sace shi, suka kulle shi a cikin gida, kuma suka yi ƙoƙarin shawo kansa ya bar shiga gidan sufi, amma Thomas Aquinas ya tsaya tsayin daka kamar dutse a kan imaninsa. Daga ƙarshe, ya tsere daga tsarewar iyalinsa kuma ya ci gaba da karatunsa a Naples, sannan ya yi zurfin bincike kan falsafar Aristotle a ƙarƙashin Albertus Magnus, wanda ya kasance babban masanin ilimi kuma malami a lokacin, a Paris da Cologne. Wannan lokaci ya yi tasiri sosai wajen neman daidaito tsakanin imani da hankali. A matsayinsa na majagaba na tauhidin halitta wanda ke bincika wanzuwar Allah da halayensa ta hanyar hankali, ya fuskanci babban ƙalubale na ilimi mai girma don haɗa tunanin falsafar Girka ta dā, musamman na Aristotle, cikin tauhidin Kirista. 

Yayin da yake aiki a matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar Paris da kuma a wurare daban-daban a Italiya, Thomas Aquinas ya bunƙasa basirarsa ta ilimi har ta kai ga kololuwa. Babban nasararsa ita ce rubuce-rubucensa masu yawa, musamman babban aikinsa, “Summa Theologiae,” wanda shine wani aiki mai ban mamaki da ba za a manta da shi ba wanda ya yi magana kan duk manyan batutuwan tauhidin Kirista a tsari da hankali. Wannan rubutu ya ƙunshi fannoni daban-daban, daga tabbatar da wanzuwar Allah zuwa ɗabi'ar ɗan adam da ceto, kuma yana tattare da ƙoƙarinsa na bayyana gaskiyar imani ta hanyar hankali. Duk da haka, tunaninsa ya fuskanci suka da adawa mai zafi daga masana tauhidi masu ra'ayin mazan jiya a lokacin, waɗanda suka yi imanin cewa abubuwan arna na falsafar Aristotle na iya gurɓata imaninsu na Kirista. Thomas Aquinas ya ci gaba da tafarkinsa na ilimi ba tare da girgiza ba a cikin waɗannan ƙalubale masu tsanani, kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin tabbatar da cewa imani da hankali ba sa adawa da juna, amma suna cika juna. Bincikensa mai ɗorewa da kuma lallashinsa na hankali mai kaifi daga ƙarshe sun sami karɓuwa daga mutane da yawa, kuma ya zama kololuwar falsafar Scholasticism ta tsakiya. 

A ranar 7 ga Maris, 1274, jikin Thomas Aquinas ya shuɗe kamar iska, amma tunaninsa ya bar gado mai ɗorewa da ba za a iya gogewa ba a wayewar Yammacin Turai. Bayan mutuwarsa, makarantar Thomism, wacce ke bin koyarwarsa, ta samo asali kuma ta zama babban al'adar falsafa na Cocin Roman Katolika tsawon ƙarnuka. An ayyana shi a matsayin waliyi a shekara ta 1323, kuma an sanar da shi a matsayin Doctor na Coci a shekara ta 1567, kuma har yau ana girmama shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana tauhidi da ake girmamawa a Cocin Roman Katolika. Ayyukansa, ciki har da “Summa Theologiae,” sun yi tasiri mai zurfi da ya ratsa kowane lungu a fannoni daban-daban kamar tauhidi, falsafa, ɗabi'a, da shari'a, kuma babban tunaninsa na daidaita imani da hankali yana aiki a matsayin muhimmin samfuri da ke haskaka hanya don bincike na ilimi har zuwa yau. Tunaninsa, tare da gadon wasu masana tunani na tsakiya kamar Augustine da Bonaventure, sun bar babban tasiri da ba za a manta da shi ba a tarihin tunanin Yammacin Turai, kuma har yau suna zama muhimmin ginshiƙi da ke riƙe da komai na binciken tauhidi da falsafa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jalal al-Din Muhammad Rumi mawaki ne Bajamushe kuma mai bin tafarkin Sufanci na ƙarni na 13, wanda ya rubuta Masnavi, babban littafin Sufanci, kuma ya kafa Ƙungiyar Mevlevi.
key_achievements: Rubuta 'Masnavi', babban littafin adabin Sufanci
Ƙirƙirar 'Divan' da aka keɓe ga malamin ruhinsa Shams
Kafa 'Ƙungiyar Mevlevi' ta hanyar rawa da kiɗa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa suna farkar da zukatan mutane a duk faɗin duniya da saƙonnin soyayya da haƙuri waɗanda suka wuce lokaci, suna ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi.

rumi.epic:
Jalal al-Din Muhammad Rumi (1207-1273) babban mawaki ne Bajamushe na ƙarni na 13, malamin Musulunci, masanin tauhidi, kuma mai bin tafarkin Sufanci. Farkon ƙarni na 13 lokaci ne na babban tashin hankali, inda mamayar Daular Mongol ta mamaye duk faɗin Asiya ta Tsakiya da Gabas ta Tsakiya. A cikin wannan zamani na hargitsi da rashin tabbas, an haifi Rumi a ranar 30 ga Satumba, 1207, a Balkh (yanzu Afghanistan), wani muhimmin cibiyar al'adu na Daular Khwarazm a lokacin. Mahaifinsa, Baha-ud-Din Walad, fitaccen masanin tauhidi ne kuma malamin Sufanci, kuma Rumi ya girma a cikin wannan yanayi na ilimi da ruhi. Yayin da barazanar mamayar Mongol ke ƙaruwa, iyalinsa sun fara doguwar hijira, suna wucewa ta biranen Musulunci daban-daban kafin su zauna a Konya (yanzu Turkiyya), babban birnin Sultanate na Rum. A nan, Rumi ya bi sawun mahaifinsa, ya sami suna a matsayin malami da mai wa'azi, yana bin tafarkin ilimin Musulunci na gargajiya. 

Rayuwar Rumi ta ɗauki canji mai girma a kusan shekara ta 1244, ta hanyar haɗuwa mai muhimmanci da Shams-i Tabrizi, wani mai bin tafarkin Sufanci mai yawon buɗe ido. Shams-i Tabrizi ruhi ne mai 'yanci, wanda ba kasafai ake samun irinsa ba a duniyar Musulunci a lokacin. Rumi ya shiga cikin duniyar fahimtar Sufanci ta hanyar zurfin haɗin kai na ruhi da shi, yana wucewa bayan tsarin iliminsa na yanzu. Wannan haɗuwa ta kawo wa Rumi ba kawai dangantaka ta malami da ɗalibi ba, amma girgiza da canji kamar yana fuskantar madubi ga ruhinsa. Ta hanyar tattaunawa da mu'amala da Shams, ya fahimci iyakokin ilimin duniya kuma ya zurfafa cikin tafarkin Sufanci, yana neman soyayya ta Ubangiji da farin ciki mai girma. Duk da haka, koyarwar Shams marasa al'ada da tasirinsa mai girma ga Rumi sun haifar da kishi da ƙiyayya a tsakanin almajiransa da iyalinsa. A ƙarshe, Shams ya bar Konya a karon farko a shekara ta 1246 amma ya dawo bisa roƙon Rumi mai tsanani. Ya sake ɓacewa a kusan shekara ta 1248, kuma ɓacewarsa ta haifar wa Rumi babban rashi da baƙin ciki na ruhi. 

Bace-bacen Shams ba zato ba tsammani ya haifar wa Rumi baƙin ciki da zafi marar misaltuwa, amma kuma ya kunna wahayin waƙa da ke ɓoye a cikin zuciyarsa. Ya mai da sha'awarsa ga Shams da soyayya ta Ubangiji zuwa waƙa, yana ƙirƙirar babban tarin waƙoƙi mai suna “Divan-e Shams-e Tabrizi.” Wannan tarin, yana amfani da sunan Shams a matsayin sunan alkalaminsa, yana rera waƙar sadaukarwarsa da soyayyarsa ta har abada ga Shams, wani babban aiki da ke nuna hazakar waƙar Rumi. Har ila yau, Rumi ya fara rubuta “Masnavi,” wani babban littafin waƙa mai juzu'i shida, don isar da koyarwar Sufanci da fahimtar ruhi ga jama'a. Ana ɗaukar Masnavi a matsayin mafi girman matsayi a adabin Sufanci, yana magana game da soyayya ta Ubangiji, tsarkake rai, da tafiya zuwa haɗuwa da Allah ta hanyar tatsuniyoyi, misalai, da labarai masu yawa. Baya ga waɗannan ayyukan adabi, Rumi ya haɓaka “Sema,” wata hanya ta musamman ta ruhi da ke haɗa kiɗa, rawa, da waƙa don neman haɗuwa da Allah. Bisa ga wannan, ya kafa “Ƙungiyar Mevlevi” don yaɗa ruhin Sufanci a ko'ina. 

Lokacin da Rumi ya rasu a ranar 17 ga Disamba, 1273, mutane marasa adadi, ba tare da la'akari da addini ko matsayi ba, sun taru a jana'izarsa don yin makokin mutuwarsa. Bayan mutuwarsa, ɗansa, Sultan Walad, ya tsara Ƙungiyar Mevlevi sosai, kuma tana ci gaba har zuwa yau. Waƙoƙin Rumi da falsafarsa suna ratsa zukatan mutane a duk faɗin duniya, suna wucewa lokaci. Ayyukansa suna isar da saƙonnin soyayya, haƙuri, zaman lafiya, da haɗuwa da Ubangiji, suna jan hankalin jiye-jiye na ɗan adam na duniya da sha'awar ruhi fiye da iyakokin addini da al'adu. Musamman a duniyar Yamma, an sake kimanta waƙoƙinsa tun ƙarshen ƙarni na 20 kuma ya zama ɗaya daga cikin mawakan da aka fi karantawa. Waƙoƙinsa sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga fannoni daban-daban kamar adabi, kiɗa, da fasaha, kuma an sanya al'adar Sema ta Ƙungiyar Mevlevi a matsayin Gadajen Al'adu na Duniya na UNESCO, yana kiyaye gadonsa. Yadda ake son waƙoƙinsa a duk tsawon zamani za a iya kwatanta shi da yadda ayyukan wani babban marubuci Bajamushe, Hafez, ke ci gaba da motsa zukatan mutane a duk faɗin duniya a yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ibn Rushd (1126-1198) ya kasance masanin falsafa kuma likita Balarabe na karni na 12 a Al-Andalus, wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin daidaita falsafar Aristotle da tauhidin Musulunci.
key_achievements: Ya yi tasiri a kan tunanin Yamma ta hanyar sharhinsa kan Aristotle
Ya yi aiki a matsayin alkali na Musulunci da likitan fada
Masanin falsafa mai hankali wanda ya nemi daidaito tsakanin hankali da imani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa na hankali ya yi tasiri sosai a kan Renaissance na Turai da Zamanin Haskakawa, kuma ya kasance alamar binciken hankali.

ibn-rushd.epic:
Abul Walid Muhammad ibn Ahmad ibn Rushd (Averroës, 1126-1198) ya kasance fitaccen masanin falsafa kuma likita Balarabe na karni na 12 a Al-Andalus (yankin Iberian da Musulmai suka mallaka). Cordoba, inda aka haife shi, ta kasance daya daga cikin manyan cibiyoyin ilimi na duniyar Musulunci a lokacin, inda al'adu da ilimi daban-daban suka haɗu suka bunƙasa. An fassara ilimin tsohuwar Girka zuwa Larabci kuma an yi nazari a kai, yayin da masana Musulmi, Yahudawa, da Kirista suka yi mu'amala, suna jin daɗin zamanin zinariya na ilimi. An haifi Ibn Rushd a cikin wani gida mai daraja na alkalai, inda kakansa da mahaifinsa duk sun riƙe muƙamin babban alkali (Qadi) na Cordoba. Ya sami ilimi mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban kamar shari'ar Musulunci, tauhidi, falsafa, likitanci, da ilimin taurari. Wannan yanayi ya yi tasiri sosai a kan zurfin bincikensa game da dangantakar hankali da wahayi, falsafa da addini, kuma tun yana saurayi ya fara gina tsarin tunaninsa na musamman, yana shanye hikimar tsohuwar duniya da kuma ilimin zamani. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta fara ne a wani muhimmin lokaci na gadon da kuma ci gaban al'adun Musulunci masu haske.

Babban abin da Ibn Rushd ya fi mayar da hankali a kai a fannin ilimi shi ne zurfin sharhinsa kan falsafar Aristotle. Ya fassara kuma ya yi sharhi kan manyan ayyukan Aristotle zuwa Larabci, ta haka ya sake gabatar da ainihin falsafar tsohuwar Girka ga duniyar Musulunci. Musamman ma, ya yi ƙoƙarin daidaita tunanin Aristotle da tauhidin Musulunci, kuma a cikin wannan tsari ya jaddada daidaito tsakanin binciken hankali da gaskiyar addini. Saboda waɗannan ƙoƙarin, ya sami suna a Yammacin duniya a matsayin 'Mai Sharhi' (The Commentator). Ya yi aiki a matsayin alkali a Seville da Cordoba, sannan kuma ya zama likitan fada ga Khalifa Almohad Abu Yaqub Yusuf da magajinsa Abu Yusuf Yaqub al-Mansur, inda ya kai kololuwar zamaninsa na ilimi. A wannan lokacin, ya rubuta ayyuka da yawa a fannoni daban-daban kamar falsafa, likitanci, da ilimin taurari, amma hanyarsa ta hankali ta zama sanadin zurfafa rikici da masana addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya.

Amma shahararsa da matsayinsa ba su daɗe ba. Ra'ayoyin falsafarsa na Ibn Rushd, musamman ma da'awarsa game da dawwamar duniya da haɗin kai na hankali, wasu ƙungiyoyin addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya sun ɗauke su a matsayin bidi'a. Kusan shekara ta 1195, a lokacin mulkin Khalifa Abu Yusuf Yaqub al-Mansur na daular Almohad, yayin da ra'ayin mazan jiya na addini ya ƙarfafa kuma rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa ya ƙaru, Ibn Rushd ya fuskanci tsanantawa mai tsanani. An kai shi gudun hijira zuwa Lucena, an ƙone littattafansa a bainar jama'a, kuma an hana koyarwarsa. Wannan ya kasance wani alama ce ta danniya ga falsafar hankali a Al-Andalus. Duk da wahalhalu da zafin gudun hijira, bai rasa imaninsa ga ikon hankali da mahimmancin neman gaskiya ba. Ko da yake an danne tunaninsa a yankin yammacin Musulunci, an kira shi zuwa Marrakech a shekara ta 1198, jim kaɗan kafin mutuwarsa, kuma ya sami ɗan dawo da mutuncinsa.

Ko da yake tasirin Ibn Rushd kai tsaye ya ragu a duniyar Musulunci, bayan mutuwarsa an fassara ayyukansa zuwa Latin da Ibrananci, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin Turai na tsakiya. Sharhinsa kan Aristotle ya taka rawa sosai wajen sake gabatar da falsafar Aristotle ga Yammacin Latin, kuma ya haifar da wani motsi na ilimi da ake kira 'Averroism,' wanda ya jaddada rabuwar hankali da tauhidi da kuma fifikon hankali. Ya yi tasiri a kan manyan masana falsafa na Scholastic kamar Thomas Aquinas da Albertus Magnus, kuma ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa tushen ilimi na Renaissance na Turai da kuma Zamanin Haskakawa. A yau, ana tuna Ibn Rushd a matsayin alamar 'yancin binciken hankali da jajircewar ilimi, kuma ana daraja shi a matsayin wani muhimmin gada da ya haɗa hikimar tsohuwar Girka da tunanin Musulunci da Turai na tsakiya. Tunaninsa, tare da na sauran manyan masana na duniyar Musulunci a lokacinsa, kamar Ibn Sina (Avicenna), ya bar babban tasiri a tarihin ilimi na tsakiya, kuma ya haifar da muhawara marar iyaka game da dangantakar hankali da imani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai tunani mai kaɗaici wanda ya bincika ruhin ɗan adam da kwararar hankali a cikin tsananin zamanin Victoria, ya rushe tsarin da aka sani kuma ya buɗe sabon sararin fahimta.
key_achievements: Binciken ruhin ɗan adam da kwararar hankali
Rushewar tsarin ilimi na gargajiya da gabatar da sabon sarari
Tambayoyi marasa yankewa game da ainihin wanzuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya buɗe sabon sararin fahimtar ɗan adam fiye da zamani, kuma har zuwa yau yana girgiza hankalinmu kuma yana sa mu tambayi ma'anar rayuwa.

william-james.epic:
Yayin da hazo mai kauri na Arewacin Atlantika ke watsewa, sai ga gabar tekun New England mai ban sha'awa tana motsi da kuzarin rayuwa na farko. A tsakanin katangar dutse na tsoffin jami'o'i, damuwar hankali da tashin hankali na zamani sun haɗu, kuma a kan wannan babban nahiyar inda tsaba na sabbin tunani ke neman tushe, ruhin mutum ɗaya ya farka. Yana tafiya a kan giciye inda imani da shakka ke gwagwarmaya, tsakanin nauyin gaskiyar da ke gabansa da muryar gaskiya da ke raɗaɗi daga zurfin zuciyarsa, ya ci gaba da tafiya yana girgiza ba tare da tsayawa ba.

Idanunsa sun yi rawa kamar fitila mai haske, suna binciken zurfin da ba a gani ba. A ƙarƙashin hasken tsohuwar fitila, inuwar littattafai marasa adadi da gadon falsafa sun cika ɗakinsa mai kaɗaici. Tafiyarsa, tana yawo a cikin hasken ilimin likitanci da kuma labyrinth na ruhin ɗan adam, ta nemi rushe tsarin duniya da aka sani da buɗe sabon sararin fahimta. Dararensa, inda ya sanya nama na motsin rai da nufi a kan kwarangwal na gaskiya, yana ci gaba da yin tambayoyi da zurfafa cikin ainihin wanzuwa, sun cika da tambayoyi masu zafi da ya yi wa kansa.

A kan kunkuntar hanyar da ke tsakanin tsarin da duniya ke buƙata da kuma dokokin ciki da ya gano, ya yi tafiya shi kaɗai. Duk da cewa ƙa'idodin ɗabi'a masu tsauri na zamanin Victoria sun yi ta maimaitawa a kunnuwansa, zuciyarsa ta yi marmarin raƙuman ruwa na tunani mai 'yanci da sabon zamani ke sanarwa. Tare da haɗakar damuwa da ba a sani ba da kuma raunin fata, ya ci gaba da bincike, yana nazarin babban zane na gogewar ɗan adam da kuma bin kogin da ba a iya faɗi ba na kwararar hankali. Maimakon farin cikin nasara, ya nutse cikin zurfin teku na tunani mai kaɗaici.

Tunaninsa yana gudana a kan kogin lokaci har zuwa yau. Tsaba na tunani da ya shuka, yana share daji na tsoffin ilimi, yanzu suna fure a sassa daban-daban na duniya a cikin nasu siffofin. Kamar iskar da muke shaka, a wasu lokuta kuma kamar raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi da ke rufe mu, har yanzu yana girgiza hankalinmu kuma yana jagorantar mu mu tambayi ma'anar rayuwa. Muryarsa ba ta gushe ba, tana rayuwa a cikinmu a matsayin harshen wuta na bincike marar yankewa don buɗe sabon sararin fahimtar ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marubuci wanda ya yi sha'awar 'yanci da adalci a cikin zalunci, ya bayyana rashin biyayya ga zamani da alƙalami, kuma ya rera mutuncin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar adabi da ke kiran 'yanci da adalci a kan zalunci
Wakiltar kukan mutanen da aka zalunta ta hanyar ayyuka kamar "Die Räuber"
Tabbatar da ƙarfin ruhin ɗan adam ta hanyar shawo kan wahala da matsaloli
fact_box.legacy_statement: Adabinsa ya kasance jagora ga waɗanda ke adawa da zalunci, kuma haske na har abada da ke haskaka 'yanci da bege.

friedrich-schiller.epic:
Lokacin sanyi da Rhine ya daskare, cikin shiru mai zurfi inda ko kukan kerkeci a cikin daji ya lafa, kamar dokin baƙi da ke barci yana jingina da katangar dutse na tsohon gida, rai na wani yaro ya zama mai ƙarfi ta iskar zamani mai tsanani. A cikin dajin hargitsi inda tsoffin nassosi da ra'ayoyin wayewa da aka hana suka haɗu, kukan 'yanci ya yi ta yawo a cikin huhunsa kamar numfashi mai matsi, kuma fitilar adalci ta haskaka da niyyar raba duhu. A ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka, nishi na mutanen da aka zalunta ya kai zuciyarsa, ya shuka masa kaɗaici baƙon abu, kuma sha'awar da ta fito daga ƙarshen alƙalami ta kasance sanarwar rashin biyayya ga tsohon tsari.

An kulle shi a ƙarƙashin sunan magani, hasken rana da ke ratsa ta sandunan ƙarfe ya zurfafa masa yanke kauna. Kallon sanyi na likita da ƙa'idodi masu tsauri sun kasance sarƙoƙi da ke daure 'yancin rai na ɗan adam, kuma hannun da ba zai iya riƙe goga ba ya raunana, amma ruhinsa ya ƙara ƙarfi. A cikin baƙon ƙasa da baƙon harshe, ya fuskanci wutar da ke sassaƙa shi da sake fasalinsa. Wahala ta zama taki don samar da 'ya'ya masu daraja, kuma zalunci ya haifar da sha'awar sararin sama mai tsayi.

Ƙarshen alƙalami mai cike da sha'awa ya yi rawa a kan farar takarda. A ƙarƙashin tutar "Die Räuber", yana rungumar soyayyar "Don Carlos", yana rera jaruntakar "The Robbers", harshensa ya zama kukan waɗanda aka zalunta, kuma waƙar yabo ga mutuncin ɗan adam na asali. A cikin rayuwa mai kama da rashin jituwa ta Beethoven, ya tsara waƙar bege, kuma a kan mataki da inuwar bala'i ta rufe, ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo marar mutuwa na 'yanci da adalci. Ko da a cikin raɗaɗin zalunci da ke yawo a kunnuwansa, ya yi amfani da alƙalami a matsayin makami, yana sha'awar 'yantar da rai.

Labarinsa bai binne a cikin ƙurar tsoffin ɗakunan littattafai ba. Sha'awar da aka tattara a ƙarƙashin tsohuwar tuta ta gudana tare da iskar zamani, kuma har yanzu tana rayuwa a matsayin bugun zuciya mai zafi a cikin zukatan da ke adawa da zalunci. Waƙoƙinsa da wasanninsa sun zama waƙar waɗanda aka zalunta, kuma jagora ga waɗanda ke sha'awar 'yanci. Ruhinsa mai daraja, wanda aka zana da goga na tsohon zamani, har yanzu tauraruwar bege ce da ke haskaka duhun zamaninmu, tana tabbatar da hasken rai na ɗan adam na har abada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai kirkire-kirkire wanda ya shawo kan talauci ta hanyar binciken noma a cikin yanayi na zalunci kuma ya shigar da rai cikin ƙasar da ta lalace.
key_achievements: Ya haɓaka hanyoyin amfani da amfanin gona daban-daban kamar gyada da dankali mai zaki.
Ya shigar da sabon rai cikin filayen noma da suka lalace.
Ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen magance matsalar abinci ga talakawa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar gado wanda ya wuce wadata ta zahiri, yana tunatar da mu bege a cikin zalunci da darajar ƙasa.

george-washington-carver.epic:
A kan jajayen ƙasa na Alabama, a ƙarƙashin fitilar da ba ta da haske a cikin tsohuwar bukkarsa, a cikin dare mai duhu inda kukan dabbobi da inuwar zalunci suka haɗu, an haifi wata ƙaramar rai da ta ɗauki nauyin duniya. Ba tare da suna ba, ba tare da tushe ba, a cikin inuwar sarƙoƙi, ya girma yana jin ƙamshin ƙasa da raɗaɗin iska. Rayuwar kwari marar yankewa, baƙin cikin ganyen ƙarshe da ke rataye a kan reshe mara tushe – a cikin duk wannan wahala da yanke kauna, ya koyi hikimar duniya kuma ya binne tsaba na bege marar ganuwa a cikin zuciyarsa. Idanunsa sun kasance masu kaɗaici kamar tauraro da ya ɓace a sararin sama, amma a cikinsu akwai sha'awa mai zafi kamar baƙin ciki da aka danne.

Tambayoyin da duniya ta jefa masa sun kasance kamar ƙaya mai kaifi. A cikin wannan mummunan gaskiya da aka ɗauka a matsayin ƙasar baƙar fata, rabon waɗanda aka zalunta, ya ga damammaki marasa iyaka a cikin ɗan ƙasa kaɗan. Yana noma ƙasa da hannayensa masu gumi da hawaye, ya fara shigar da rai cikin filayen da suka lalace. Mafarkinsa da ya fara da goro ɗaya ya fara fitowa, kuma ya bazu kamar motsi mai laushi kamar auduga. Hannunsa da ya wadatar da teburin maƙwabta masu fama da yunwa kuma ya cika ƙasar da ta lalace da sabon rai ya kasance kamar sihiri. Amma tafiyarsa ba ta taɓa zama mai sauƙi ba. Kallon sanyi da rashin kulawa sun danne kafadunsa, amma bai durƙusa ba.

Ya kasance annabi mai sadarwa da Allah ta hanyar ƙasa. Gyada, dankali mai zaki, wake. Ya shigar da sabon rai a kan teburin da aka manta, kuma ya samo albarkatu masu daraja daga ciyayi da aka jefar a kusurwar rumbun ajiya. Dakin bincikensa wuri ne ƙarami mai cike da ƙura, amma a can ya yi amfani da ilimin kimiyya don canza yanke kauna zuwa bege, talauci zuwa wadata. Yana farfado da aikin gona da ya lalace, kuma yana samar da abinci mai gina jiki ga mutanen da ke fama da yunwa, ya haifar da juyin juya hali marar ganuwa. Sunansa ya bazu fiye da Alabama zuwa ƙasashe masu faɗi, amma a cikin zuciyarsa akwai har yanzu sha'awar taurari marasa isa, da kaɗaici kamar ya rungumi duk baƙin cikin duniya.

A yau, sunansa yana raye tare da mu a matsayin alamar binciken kimiyya da jin kai. Sabbin canje-canje na masara, damammaki marasa iyaka na gyada, 'ya'yan itacen da ya noma da gumi har yanzu suna wadatar da teburinmu, kuma suna shigar da numfashin rai cikin ƙasar da ta lalace. Gadonsa ya wuce wadata ta zahiri kawai, muryar bege ce da ba ta karye ba duk da zalunci da nuna bambanci, kuma wani abu ne mai zurfi da ke tunatar da mu darajar ɗan ƙasa kaɗan. Ƙarfin ƙananan motsi da ke canza duniya a wuraren da ba a gani, wannan shine mafi girman kyauta da George Washington Carver ya bar mana.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani ɗan Corsica wanda ya zama Sarkin Faransa a lokacin juyin juya hali, ya mamaye Turai amma ya faɗi, ya bar kundin dokoki da tushen jihar zamani.
key_achievements: Zama Sarki wanda ya mamaye nahiyar Turai
Haɗawa da yaɗa Dokokin Napoleon
Bayar da gudummawa ga kafa tsarin jihar zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kundin dokokinsa da tsarin jihar zamani sune tushen duniyar yau, kuma nufinsa marar yankewa har yanzu yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa.

al-ghazali.epic:
A kan tsaunukan Corsica masu tsauri, waɗanda Tekun Bahar Rum mai shuɗi ke kallonsu, inda tsohuwar aminci ke mutuwa kamar wutar da ke raguwa, kuma farkon juyin juya hali mai zafi ke ta faman tashi, a can ne aka ƙirƙiri wani rai. A cikin zuciyar matashin Napoleon, wanda zafin rana mai zafi ke dannewa kuma iskar sanyi ta ƙasar baƙi ke sanyaya, tuni burin daular ya fara ci. A cikin hayaniyar yaƙi, tsakanin kururuwar da ke ratsa kunnuwa da ƙarar sarƙoƙi masu kaifi, ya ga idanun sojoji masu mutuwa ba tare da wani amfani ba, kuma ya ji fanko na lokacin da kururuwar nasara ke amsa ba tare da wani ma'ana ba. Nasara tana haifar da wani yaƙi, kuma ɗaukaka tana jefa inuwar kaddara. A gaban babbar dabaran tarihi, shi tauraro ne mai kaɗaici.

Hanyar da ta ratsa teku zuwa tsakiyar Faransa, wadda jinin juyin juya hali ya zuba, ta kasance mai wahala. A ƙarƙashin fitilun Champs-Élysées masu haske, ya bi tafarkinsa a cikin guguwar tarihi inda fatalwar maido da sarauta da haihuwar sabuwar jamhuriya, manyan raƙuman ruwa biyu, suka yi karo. A cikin ƙurar filin yaƙi, a cikin yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi inda tutoci ke yagewa, ya shaida matsanancin lokacin raunin ɗan adam da ƙarfi, yanke kauna da bege. Lokacin da yake yanke shawara da ke shafar makomar Turai ta hanyar bin taswira da yatsansa, nauyin da ke kan kafadunsa ya fi kowane makami kaifi. A cikin shiru na dare, a ƙarƙashin hasken taurari masu zuba, ya yi ƙoƙarin daidaita duniya mai girgiza da nufinsa kaɗai.

Lokacin da tutar cin nasara ta mamaye nahiyar, kuma bikin naɗin sarauta ya haskaka a kan rugujewar Roma, ya tsaya a kan kololuwar ɗaukaka da ba a taɓa gani ba a tarihin ɗan adam. Amma kaɗaici mai sanyi kamar dusar ƙanƙara ta Alps bai taɓa barin gefensa ba. Sarauta mai kaɗaici inda ko da kururuwar nasara ba ta amsa ba, a cikin labaran yaƙi da inuwar cin amana da ke ci gaba da zuwa, ransa ya yi ta fama da damuwa ba tare da tsayawa ba. A ƙarshen alkalami na Yarjejeniyar Tilsit, a kan filin da jinin Waterloo ya zuba, ya ɗanɗana zaƙin nasara da ɗacin shan kashi a lokaci guda. Komai ya zama kamar yana hannunsa, amma yanke kauna na iya rasa komai a ƙarshe ya cinye zuciyarsa.

Don haka, ɗaukakar daular ta shuɗe, kuma sunansa ya kasance a matsayin haruffa masu sanyi a cikin littattafan tarihi, amma tsaba na juyin juya hali da ya shuka ba su tsaya ba. Gadonsa, wato kundin dokoki, yana rayuwa a cikin tsarin shari'a na duniya baki ɗaya, kuma dabarunsa har yanzu suna kunna wuta a cikin zukatan sojoji. Tsohuwar kambi ta karye kuma ta ɓace, amma tsarin jihar zamani da ya tsara shine tushen duniyar da muke rayuwa a yau, kuma nufinsa marar yankewa har yanzu yana bugawa da zafi a cikin zukatan masu mafarki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mai tunani daga Arewacin Afirka a karni na 14, wanda ya fahimci dokokin zagayowar wayewa da kuma ra'ayin 'Asabiyyah' ta hanyar lura da tashin da faduwar dauloli.
key_achievements: Fahimtar dokokin tashin da faduwar dauloli da kuma zagayowar wayewa
Kafa ra'ayin 'Asabiyyah' a matsayin karfin tarihi
Bincika babban kwararar al'ummar dan Adam da tarihi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fahimtarsa ta wuce lokaci kuma har yanzu tana zama hikima da ke nuna hanyar wayewar dan Adam a yau.

ibn-khaldun.epic:
A zamanin da zafin rana ke zuba a kan hamadar Arewacin Afirka mai launin kasa, a karni na 14, inda harsuna da kamshi daban-daban ke cakude a cikin kunkuntar titunan Tunis. Yayin da kura mai ja ke rawa da iska, a karkashin tsoffin ganuwar birnin, wani matashin mai tunani ya shuka iri na tunani mai zurfi, yana jin bambanci tsakanin tsarin duniya marar canzawa da kuma gaskiyar da ta karkace. A cikin wannan hargitsi inda dauloli ke tashi da faduwa, kuma yake-yake da annoba ke kawo karshen rayuwar mutane ba tare da wani dalili ba, ya yi marmarin fahimtar babban kwararar da ke ratsa komai, fiye da abin da ke gabansa. Hannunsa ya yi rawa yayin da yake tsoma tawada a cikin tsoffin takardun papyrus, amma a cikinsu, sabbin fahimtar da za su girgiza tsohuwar duniya sun fara bayyana.

Guguwar iko ba ta taba tsayawa ba, kuma ya ci gaba da rayuwa mai hatsari a gefen rami, yana bin inuwar sarauta. Yayin da ya shaida aminci yana watsewa kamar yashi na hamada da kuma dabarun halin dan Adam, ya ji zafin banza na iko mai wucewa da kuma gaskiyar da ba ta da tausayi da ke boye a bayansa. Yayin da ya kalli tutocin masarautu masu faduwa suna durkushewa, da kuma birane masu haske suna komawa kango, a cikin zuciyarsa, fahimtar zagayowar wayewar dan Adam da kuma dokokin tarihi marasa canzawa sun zauna. Ko da a cikin yanke kauna kamar shan shayi mai daci, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba. Ya so ya ga sabon farawa a karshen wannan duniya mai wucewa.

A cikin fadar Alhambra ta Granada, a cikin wannan kango mai haske inda fitilar wayewar Musulunci ke mutuwa, ya dauki alkalami. Yayin da ya kalli faduwar dauloli masu wucewa, ya fahimci karfin da ba a gani ba wanda ke sarrafa haihuwa da mutuwa, wadata da raguwar al'ummar dan Adam, wato 'Asabiyyah', babban karfin tarihi. Tragediyar gaskiya da ya fuskanta a karshen tafiyarsa mai wahala ta kara kaifafa tunaninsa, kuma ya fara tattara gutsuttsura don hada babban zane na tarihi. A karkashin sararin sama mai launin toka, ya rike igiyar gaskiya mai wucewa kuma ya kunna wutar bege a cikin yanke kauna.

Yanzu, rubuce-rubucensa sun wuce shingen harsuna daban-daban, sun wuce lokaci, kuma suna rayuwa tare da mu. Iska mai bushewa ta hamada a karkashin zafin rana da kuma hayaniyar tsoffin birane suna rayuwa a cikin kalmominsa, suna ci gaba da yin tambayoyi game da ainihin al'ummar dan Adam da kuma babban kwararar tarihi. Muryarsa, wacce ta bincika nufin dan Adam a cikin alamun halaka, kuma ta fahimci zagayowar wayewa a cikin banza na iko mai wucewa, har yanzu tana ci gaba da yin amo a yau, tana zama kamar kamfas da ke haskaka mana hanyar da za mu bi a cikin duniya mai canzawa. Gadonsa ba a kulle shi a cikin tsoffin littattafai masu kura ba, amma yana jagorantar mu da hikimar rayuwa ta yanzu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban masanin falsafa wanda aka haifa a Fez, ya binciki likitanci da falsafa a Masar, kuma ya sake fassara Yahudanci.
key_achievements: Ya binciki likitancin Galenus, ya yi jinya ga marasa lafiya, kuma ya tattara ilimin likitanci
