Ya haɗa dabaru na Talmud da hankalin Aristotle don sake fassara ka'idodin Yahudanci
Ya gina tsarin falsafarsa na musamman duk da tsanantawa da zargi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya wuce zamani, ya zama fitilar bincike mai hankali da bege, yana jagorantar ɗan adam har zuwa yau.

maimonides.epic:
A cikin mahadar hanyoyi uku, inda hasken zinariya na zamanin Musulunci ya haɗu da inuwar littattafan Yahudawa masu tsarki, a cikin kasuwar Fez mai cunkoso, ruhin wani yaro yana samun horo a cikin guguwar zamani inda yaƙe-yaƙe masu tsarki da kuma manyan kiran daular Almohad suka kasance tare. Kamar ɗigon tawada da ke warwatse a kan tsohuwar takarda, nauyin tsanantawa a ƙasarsa da kuma rayuwa a sabuwar ƙasa sun yi masa nauyi a ciki, yana gwagwarmayar haske da duhu a cikin nazarin littattafai masu tsarki da ke ci gaba har tsawon dare. Sautin addu'o'i daga nesa, da raɗaɗin harsunan baƙi, duk sun kewaye ruhinsa, suna nuna tafiya ta kadaici don neman duk hikimar duniya da kuma gano haskensa na musamman.

Ƙarƙashin zafin rana na Masar, a cikin gaskiyar da manyan fadojin Alkahira da kunkuntar tituna masu duhu suka haɗu, ya yi nazarin koyarwar Galenus, wanda ake kira uban likitanci, da kuma tsauraran gargaɗin Hippocrates, yana mai sha'awar sirrin jikin ɗan adam da kuma raɗaɗin cututtuka. A cikin dararen da suka cika da gumi da wahala, a cikin nishi mai zafi da numfashi mai rauni na marasa lafiya da yawa, ya fuskanci darajar rayuwa da inuwar mutuwa a lokaci guda, yana tafiya a kan iyakar da ke tsakanin hikimar Ubangiji da raunin ɗan adam. Alƙalaminsa ya wuce rubutu kawai, yana tattara ɓangarorin ilimi da suka ɓace a cikin mantuwa, ya zama ceto da ke haskaka fitilar bege ga bil'adama masu shan wahala.

Tsakanin salo mai kyau na harshen Larabci da tsarin tsarki na harshen Ibrananci, ya haɗa dabaru masu sarkakiya na Talmud da hankali mai tsauri na Aristotle, ya fara babban aikin sake fassara ka'idodin Yahudanci da tunanin zamani. Yana tattara ɓangarorin hikima da aka rasa, kuma yana shawo kan ganuwar rashin fahimta da son zuciya, ya kunna wutar bincike game da faɗin ruhin ɗan adam da rashin iyaka na sararin samaniya. Duk da raini da zargi na duniya, bai yi sanyin gwiwa ba, a maimakon haka, ya gina kagararsa ta falsafa tare da zurfin tunani da imani mai ƙarfi, yana haƙa rijiyar hikima a cikin busasshiyar ƙasa ta gaskiya.

Ko da ƙurar zamani ta taru kuma dauloli suka faɗi, sunansa bai ɓace ba, yana raye kuma yana numfashi, yana adawa da raƙuman ruwa na zamani. A cikin harsunan da aka manta, a cikin shafi ɗaya na tsoffin littattafai, har yanzu yana tare da mu, yana kalubalantar iyakar hankalin ɗan adam, kuma yana raɗa mana mu ci gaba da neman ilimi mara iyaka. Tunaninsa, kamar tauraro mai wutsiya da ke ratsa sararin samaniya mai duhu, yana ci gaba da haskaka rayuka da yawa da suka ɓace a cikin duhu, kuma yana zama anga mai ƙarfi na bege ga waɗanda ke cikin rami na yanke kauna, yana ci gaba da zama jagora a rayuwarmu har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Zoroaster ya kasance mai gyara addini kuma annabi na tsohuwar Iran, wanda ya kafa Zoroastrianism kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin tunani na duniya.
key_achievements: Kafa Zoroastrianism a ruhaniya
Yin wa'azin bautar Allah guda ɗaya Ahura Mazda
Rubutawa da yada littafin tsarki na 'Gathas'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa na bangarori biyu da koyarwarsa ta ɗabi'a sun yi tasiri sosai a kan addinan Ibrahim na baya da falsafar Yamma.

zoroaster.epic:
Zoroaster (an haife shi kusan 628 K.Z.), wani mai gyara addini ne kuma annabi na tsohuwar Iran, kuma shi ne wanda ya kafa addinin Zoroastrianism a ruhaniya. Zamanin da ya rayu ya kasance lokaci ne da addinan kabilu daban-daban da al'adun ibada suka haɗu a yankin tsaunukan Iran. Addinin a wancan lokacin yana da halayen gumaka da yawa, kuma sau da yawa ya haɗa da hadayu masu rikitarwa da hadayu na dabbobi. A cikin irin wannan yanayi, Zoroaster an haife shi a cikin gidan Spitama, kuma tun yana yaro ya fara zurfafa tunani da bincike na ruhaniya. Ya yi tambaya game da al'adun addini na lokacin da rashin adalci na zamantakewa, kuma ya yi gwagwarmaya don neman amsoshin game da ainihin tsarkaka da alhakin ɗabi'a na ɗan adam. Wannan bincikensa ya zama tushen sabon hangen nesa na addini da zai yi wa'azi daga baya. Zoroaster ya bayyana kansa a matsayin mawaki kuma annabi, kuma "Gathas," tsoffin rubutun Zoroastrianism da aka yi imani ya rubuta, sun ƙunshi tunaninsa da koyarwarsa. Wannan "Gathas" a fili ya gabatar da manyan koyarwar Zoroastrianism, yana mai da hankali kan adawa ta bangarori biyu tsakanin nagarta da mugunta, bautar Allah guda ɗaya Ahura Mazda, da kuma 'yancin zaɓi na ɗan adam.

Mafi mahimmancin juyin juya hali a rayuwar Zoroaster shi ne wahayin ruhaniya da aka ce ya samu yana ɗan shekara 30. Ya yi iƙirarin cewa ya sami koyarwa kai tsaye daga Ahura Mazda, wato 'Ubangiji Mai Hikima,' kuma ya ƙarfafa ra'ayinsa na sukar tsarin addinin gumaka na lokacin. Ya ayyana alloli da yawa da ake bautawa a lokacin, musamman waɗanda ake kira 'Daevas,' a matsayin sojojin mugunta, kuma ya jaddada cewa Ahura Mazda shi kaɗai ne mahalicci mai kyau kuma mai adalci. Wannan iƙirarin ya haifar da babban adawa daga manyan addini da firistoci na lokacin. Domin koyarwarsa ta ƙi al'adun ibada da hadayu na gargajiya, kuma ta jaddada sadarwa da Allah ta hanyar ayyukan alheri da zuciya mai gaskiya. Ko a garinsu ma, ba a maraba da shi ba, an tsananta masa, kuma ya yi gudun hijira sau da yawa. Duk da waɗannan gwagwarmaya, Zoroaster bai taɓa yin watsi da imaninsa ba, kuma ya ci gaba da ƙoƙarin yada kalmar gaskiya. Saƙonsa ya buƙaci fiye da sauye-sauyen addini kawai; ya buƙaci sake fassara rayuwar ɗan adam da tsarin sararin samaniya gaba ɗaya.

A cikin tsananin adawa da wahalhalu na farko, Zoroaster ya yi yawo a yankuna daban-daban don neman mai goyon baya wanda zai karɓi koyarwarsa. Ya fahimci cewa yana buƙatar goyon baya mai ƙarfi don saƙonsa ya yadu. Daga ƙarshe, ya sadu da Sarki Kavi Vishtaspa na gabashin Iran, kuma ya yi masa wa'azi da koyarwarsa, yana mai lallashinsa da juriya, duk da cewa da farko sarkin yana da shakku. A cewar labari, Sarki Vishtaspa, wanda ayyukan mu'ujiza na Zoroaster da koyarwarsa mai zurfi suka burge shi, daga ƙarshe ya musulunta zuwa Zoroastrianism kuma ya zama babban mai goyon bayansa. Juyin addinin sarkin ya zama wani muhimmin mataki ga Zoroastrianism don haɓaka daga imani na mutum zuwa addinin ƙasa. A ƙarƙashin kariyar Sarki Vishtaspa, Zoroaster ya sami damar yada ra'ayoyinsa cikin 'yanci, kuma mabiya da yawa sun fara bin koyarwarsa. A wannan lokacin ne Zoroastrianism ya fara samun tsarin koyarwa da al'adu, kuma ya kafa tushe don yaduwarsa a duk faɗin tsaunukan Iran. Ko da yake har yanzu akwai rikice-rikice da masu adawa, goyon bayan sarkin ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tabbatar da matsayin Zoroaster a matsayin mai gyara addini da kuma kafa gadonsa.

Ko da bayan mutuwar Zoroaster, wanda aka ce ya mutu kusan 551 K.Z., koyarwarsa ta yi tasiri sosai a kan wayewar Iran da tarihin tunani na duniya. Zoroastrianism ya bunƙasa a lokacin Daular Achaemenid kuma ya zama addinin jihar Farisa, kuma ra'ayoyinsa na duniya na bangarori biyu, adawa tsakanin nagarta da mugunta, hukunci na ƙarshe, da tashin matattu sun yi tasiri sosai a kan manyan addinan baya. Musamman ma, ya samar da muhimmin tushe na tunani ga ci gaban tauhidin addinan Ibrahim kamar Yahudanci, Kiristanci, da Musulunci. An yi iƙirarin cewa hikimarsa ta yi tasiri kai tsaye ko a kaikaice a kan masana falsafa na Yamma, kamar Heraclitus, Plato, da Pythagoras, yana mai nuna cewa ta wuce lokaci. A yau, Zoroastrianism ya kasance addini ne na 'yan tsiraru, amma gadonsa na ruhaniya har yanzu yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga tunanin ɗabi'a da ɗa'a na ɗan adam. Rayuwa da koyarwar Zoroaster sun yi daidai da sawun masu gabatarwa waɗanda suka kalubalanci al'adun addini na lokacin kuma suka buɗe sabbin hanyoyin ruhaniya, kamar Akhenaten na tsohuwar Masar.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mawallafin 'Don Quixote' wanda ya bi manufofi kuma ya bincika saɓanin wanzuwar ɗan adam duk da zaman fursuna da talauci.
key_achievements: Ya tsira daga zaman fursuna na shekaru 5
Ya rubuta kuma ya buga littafin gargajiya 'Don Quixote'
Ya ɗaukaka rata tsakanin manufa da gaskiya zuwa matsayin adabi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya wuce lokaci, yana rera waƙar girman ruhin ɗan adam da sha'awar manufofi, yana ba da tasiri mai zurfi ga duniya baki ɗaya.

miguel-de-cervantes.epic:
Lokacin da raƙuman ruwa masu zafin gaske na Bahar Rum suka lafa, kuma hasken rana na sabuwar Spain ya faɗi a kan ƙasashe masu nisa, a cikin ragowar tsohuwar aminci da hayaniyar juyin juya hali, wani rai ya zama ƙarfe. A cikin titunan ƙura na Alcalá de Henares, labaran jarumtaka na jarumai marasa tushe waɗanda suka cika tsoffin shafukan littattafai sun yi ta yawo a kunnuwansa, amma tuni kuruciyarsa ta tuna da ƙamshin gishiri na Bahar Rum, zafin rana na Arewacin Afirka, da sanyin sarƙoƙi. Zaman fursuna na shekaru biyar ya zana alamun zalunci mai zurfi a cikin ransa, kuma mafarkin 'yanci mai wucewa da kuma sha'awar mutuncin ɗan adam marar yankewa sun ci gaba kamar bugun zuciyarsa. Ko da yake raurawar yunwa da rashin kulawar duniya sun kasance a hannunsa mai riƙe da alƙalami, amma idanunsa har yanzu suna kallon taurari.

Ko da bayan dawowarsa gida, rayuwarsa ta kasance guguwa ce marar tsayawa. Nauyin bashi ya danne shi, kuma ya sha wahala daga kallon ƙyama na jami'an gwamnati masu cin hanci, wani lokaci ma ya faɗi a kan sanyin dutsen gidan yari. Hannun gaskiya mai zafi ya yi kamar zai murƙushe ƙashinsa, kuma fata ta fashe kamar gilashi mai laushi. Amma a cikin zurfin yanke ƙauna, akwai wani manufa da ta zama mafi bayyane. Jarumi makaho wanda ke sanye da tsohon sulke kuma ya ɗauki injin iska a matsayin aljan, har yanzu rantsuwar banza ta jarumai tana ta yawo a kunnuwansa, amma ya ga gaskiya a cikin wannan banza. Babban rata tsakanin manufofin ɗan adam da kuma gaskiyar rayuwa mai rauni, wannan ne ya jagoranci alƙalaminsa.

Lokacin da sunan Miguel de Cervantes ya bazu a duniya, ya ji kamar an 'yanta shi daga sarƙoƙin wahala da suka daure shi. Tsoffin ganuwar birni, ɗaukaka mai wucewa, da kuma inuwar wani wawa mai daraja sun rayu a ƙarshen alƙalaminsa. Gwagwarmaya marar iyaka tsakanin manufa da gaskiya, mahaukaciyar hankali mai haske da ke fitowa daga wautar ɗan adam, da kuma zurfin fahimtar da ke rungumar duk wannan. Ta hanyar inuwar Don Quixote da Sancho Panza, ya fuskanci rikitarwa da kyakkyawar saɓani na wanzuwar ɗan adam. Ko da yake aikinsa ya girgiza duniya, aljihunsa marasa komai da jikinsa mai tsufa har yanzu suna buƙatar ɗaukar nauyin gaskiya.

Shekaru sun shude, kuma a ranar haihuwarsa, a ƙarshe ya ajiye alƙalaminsa. Ayyukansa da ke kan tsohon tebur, su ne duwatsu masu daraja masu haske waɗanda suka tattara lokutan da aka ɗaure shi da sarƙoƙi, dararen da ya yi rawar jiki da yunwa, da kuma lokutan da bai taɓa rasa bege ba. Labarinsa ya wuce lokaci, an fassara shi zuwa harsuna daban-daban, yana ba da tausayi, dariya, da kuma zurfin tunani ga rayuka marasa adadi, daga mawaƙan titi zuwa masana na sarauta. Har yanzu yana raye a tare da mu, yana ci gaba da rera waƙar girman ruhin ɗan adam wanda ke bin manyan manufofi ko da a cikin mafi raunin gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marubuci mai daraja daga Rasha wanda ya shaida yaƙe-yaƙe da rashin adalci na zamantakewa, ya bincika ainihin ɗan adam da gaskiya, kuma ya bar gadon adabi wanda ya wuce lokaci.
key_achievements: Binciken tushen wahalar ɗan adam da gaskiya
Sukar rashin adalci na zamantakewa da kuma bayyana rayuwa mai adalci
Haɓaka ruhin ɗan adam ta hanyar ayyukan adabi waɗanda suka wuce lokaci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa suna tambaya da amsa game da ma'anar rayuwa da ainihin ɗan adam, kuma suna haskaka kamar tauraro na har abada a cikin ruhin ɗan adam.

leo-tolstoy.epic:
A cikin fadin kasar Rasha, a cikin shiru na dazuzzukan da guguwar dusar kankara ta share, a kan tsoffin benaye masu kara na wani tsohon gida, an haifi wani rai da ke fuskantar rashin dawwama na rayuwa mai wucewa. Kamar yadda numfashin hunturu mai sanyi ke buga tagogi, wani wuri a cikin zuciyarsa akwai wani wofi da ba a taba cikawa ba, kuma ko da a cikin kyawun sarauta, ya ji sarƙoƙin ka'idoji da yaudara da ke daure shi. Sunan da matsayin da duniya ta ba shi ba komai bane illa abin rufe fuska na baƙo a gare shi, kuma kadaicinsa, yana kunna fitila shi kaɗai a cikin zurfin dare yana bincika zurfin ransa, ya ji sanyi kamar kogi mai daskarewa. Ya riga ya sani cewa duk kyawun da munin wannan duniya za su koma toka a ƙarshe.

Guntun gaskiya, sun fi kaifi fiye da harsasai da aka harba a cikin hayaniyar yaƙi, sun ratsa cikin ruhinsa. Kukan sojoji da ke kwance a cikin tafkunan jini na Borodino ya yi ta kara a kunnuwansa, kuma kukan manoma da yunwa da yanke kauna suka addaba ya girgiza lamirinsa. Ya fahimci da zafi yadda nasarar duniya da daraja suke da banza. Lokacin da ya riƙe alkalami, ya buɗe sabon filin yaƙi da shi, kuma tawada wutar adalci da soyayya ce da ke fitowa daga zurfin ransa. Ko da yake ya bayyana yana rayuwa mai natsuwa a waje, ciki nasa ya kasance tukunyar gwagwarmaya marar iyaka, kuma sha'awar gaskiya ta kai shi ga bakin kogi.

Bai sake ajiye alkalaminsa ba. Ya cire fatar arziki da daraja mai ban sha'awa, kuma ya bincika tushen wahalar ɗan adam. Rubutunsa ya kashe ƙishirwa kamar rijiyar ruwa a cikin hamada, kuma ya zama fitila ga rayukan da suka ɓace a cikin duhu. Wani lokaci ya yi ihu da fushi game da rashin adalci na al'umma, wani lokaci kuma ya zana abubuwan da ke cikin zuciyar ɗan adam da kyau kamar furen iris. Bai durƙusa ga iko ba, kuma bai taƙaita kansa ga al'adun duniya ba. Rayuwarsa kanta babbar aikin adabi ce, tafiya ce mai tsanani da ta ratsa tsakanin gaskiya da ƙarya, nagarta da mugunta.

Yanzu lokaci ya wuce, sunansa an fassara shi zuwa harsuna da yawa kuma yana yawo ko'ina cikin duniya. Babban labarinsa har yanzu yana raye tare da mu, yana ci gaba da tambaya da amsa game da ma'anar rayuwa da ainihin ɗan adam. Muryarsa, cike da kadaici da gwagwarmaya, yanke kauna da bege, ta ratsa lokaci kuma tana taɓa zukatanmu a yau. Tafiyarsa, wadda ta fara a kan tsoffin benaye masu kara na wani tsohon gida, tana haskaka kamar tauraro na har abada a cikin sararin samaniya na ruhin ɗan adam, kuma tana sa yadda muke kallon duniya ya zama mai zurfi da wadata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marubuciya Murasaki Shikibu wacce ta bincika farin ciki da baƙin ciki na ɗan adam a cikin kaɗaicin fadar Heian, ta ƙirƙira labarin shekaru dubu.
key_achievements: Ta fahimci zurfin halin ɗan adam da kaifi
Ta bayyana bala'i da soyayya a fadar Heian da laushi
Ta ƙirƙira babban adabin labari wanda ya wuce zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Labarinta ya zama gaskiya ta duniya wacce ta wuce zamani, kuma fitila ce da ke sake tambayar ma'anar rayuwar ɗan adam.

murasaki-shikibu.epic:
A safiyar Kyoto mai hazo mai laushi, inuwar fadar Heian mai ban sha'awa ta lulluɓe. Kamar yadda labarai da aka ƙirƙira da ƙarshen goga ke tasowa a ɗakuna masu sirri, a cikin ƙamshin littattafan mahaifinta masanin ilimi da shiru mai daɗi na danginsu, wata rai ta tattara raɗaɗin zamani. Da wuri ta rungumi baƙin ciki na rayuwar ɗan adam mai wucewa, baƙin ciki mai zurfi ya yi rawa a idanunta masu haske kamar igiyar ruwa. A lokacin yarintarta, tana tattara gutsuttsarin gaskiya a cikin duniya mai cike da ƙalubale, goga ta riga ta fara saƙa zaren kaddara da ba a gani ba.

Kamar ta ratsa dubban shekaru, an bar ta ita kaɗai a wuri mara komai bayan dangantaka mai wucewa ta wuce. A cikin dakunan mata na fadar mai sanyi, kukan mata masu shuɗewa kamar furanni da gwagwarmayar iko mai cike da tashin hankali sun buɗe kamar siliki mai rai. A cikin shiru mai matsi, ruhin da ba ya karyewa ya bincika farin ciki da baƙin ciki na ɗan adam ta hanyar kaɗaici da fahimtar da ke tattare da ƙarshen alkalami. Echoes na soyayya da sha'awa da ke ɓacewa kamar mafarki na ɗan lokaci, suna farfaɗowa da rubutu mai laushi a kowane yatsa da ke riƙe da goga, suna fara bin sawun shekaru masu wucewa.

A cikin dare mai shiru, goga tana rawa a ƙarƙashin fitilar mai. Bayan allon da aka yi wa ado da zinariya, raɗaɗi masu sirri da sha'awa mai ban tausayi sun haɗu, suna buɗe wani babban labari. Kamar ta koma baya dubban shekaru, kyawun mai wucewa da soyayyar yarima mai haske, da baƙin ciki na zuriyarsa, an rubuta su da tawada mai duhu. A ƙarƙashin hasken wata mai rauni, wani kallo mai kaifi da ke duban zurfin halin ɗan adam, yana rubuta kowane inuwa na duniya mai ban sha'awa amma mara amfani.

Labarin shekaru dubu da aka ƙirƙira haka, sawun rayuka marasa adadi da suka shuɗe suna rayuwa tare da mu a yau. Idanun Genji da raɗaɗin mata har yanzu suna ratsa zurfin zukatanmu, suna sake tambayar ma'anar sha'awar ɗan adam ta har abada, baƙin ciki, da soyayya. Gwagwarmayar kaɗaici ta wata mace da ta fito daga ƙarshen goga, ta zama gaskiya ta duniya wacce ta wuce zamani, kuma har yanzu tana zama fitila mai haskaka duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Edgar Degas ya kasance mai zane na Impressionist na Faransa a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya ɗauki 'yan rawa da rayuwar birni ta zamani a hanya ta musamman.
key_achievements: Jerin ayyuka game da 'yan rawa da wuraren tseren dawakai
Ɗaukaka matsayin fasaha na kayan aikin pastel
Kwatancin gaskiya na rayuwar birni ta zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sabbin tsare-tsarensa da ɗaukar motsi sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fasaha na gaba kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a fasahar zamani.

edgar-degas.epic:
Edgar Degas (1834-1917) ya kasance wani shahararren mai zane, mai sassaƙa, kuma mai buga hotuna na Faransa a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya wakilci Impressionism. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, Paris ta kasance cikin sauye-sauye masu sauri saboda masana'antu da sake fasalin birane, inda sabbin matakan zamantakewa da al'adu suka fara fitowa. Yayin da tsarin tallafin fasaha na gargajiya da ke kan manyan mutane ya raunana kuma masu hannu da shuni suka zama sabbin masu amfani da fasaha, masu fasaha sun fara neman sabbin jigogi na zamani da sabbin hanyoyin bayyanawa, suna barin ƙa'idodin ilimi masu tsauri. An haifi Degas a ranar 19 ga Yuli, 1834, a Paris, ga mahaifin banki mai arziki da mahaifiyar Creole. Yanayin gidansa mai wadata ya ba shi damar bin hanyar fasaha ba tare da matsin lamba na kuɗi ba. Ya ɗan yi karatu a fannin shari'a, amma ya bar shi saboda sha'awar fasaha, kuma ya shiga École des Beaux-Arts a 1855, inda Louis Lamothe, almajirin Jean Auguste Dominique Ingres, ya koyar da shi. Wannan ilimin gargajiya ya ba shi tushe mai ƙarfi a zane da tsari, wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kiyaye ƙarfin ayyukansa yayin da yake bincika jigogi na zamani.

A farkon rayuwarsa, Degas ya yi tasiri sosai da fasahar gargajiya ta hanyar tafiye-tafiyensa zuwa Italiya, kuma ya mai da hankali kan zanen tarihi da hotuna. Duk da haka, a hankali ya fara nisantar jigogi na gargajiya na ilimi kuma ya mai da hankali kan ɗaukar rayuwar yau da kullun ta mutanen Paris na zamani da kuma fannoni na rayuwar birni ta zamani. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin canji a fasaharsa, kuma ya sanya shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan mutane a cikin motsin Impressionism. Degas ya shiga cikin nune-nunen Impressionist tun daga 1874 kuma ya yi hulɗa da sauran masu zane, amma ya bambanta kansa ta hanyar kiran kansa 'mai gaskiya' ko 'mai zane mai zaman kansa' maimakon 'Impressionist'. Sabanin hanyar Impressionists na ɗaukar canje-canjen haske na ɗan lokaci a waje, ya yi aiki a cikin studio tare da zane mai kyau da tsari. Musamman, 'yan rawa, masu wanki, mata masu sayar da hula, wuraren tseren dawakai, da hotunan mutane sun zama manyan jigoginsa, kuma ya ɗauke su daga kusurwoyi da tsare-tsare marasa tsammani, yana ba su rai da gaskiya kamar an ɗauki hoto. Wannan ya yi tasiri sosai da sabbin fasahar daukar hoto da buga hotuna na Japan, kuma ta hanyar waɗannan, Degas ya bincika ainihin motsi da zurfin tunanin mutum.

Rayuwar Degas ta cika da gwagwarmaya kamar yadda sha'awar fasaharsa ta cika. Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa a 1874, ya fuskanci matsalolin kuɗi saboda ya gaji babban bashi na iyali. Wannan ya sa ya sayar da tarin fasaharsa kuma ya ƙara himma wajen aikinsa, wanda ya zama babban abin motsa shi ga ayyukansa na kirkire-kirkire. Bugu da ƙari, raguwar gani da ya fara a shekarun 1880s ya zama babban ciwonsa da ƙalubalensa. Yayin da yake rasa ganinsa a hankali, ya fara amfani da pastel a matsayin babban kayan aikinsa maimakon zanen mai. Pastel ya ba da damar bayyanawa mai ƙarfi da sauri fiye da goge-goge, kuma ya kasance kayan aiki mai amfani don bincika launi da siffa ko da tare da raunin gani. A shekarunsa na ƙarshe, kusan ya rasa ganinsa gaba ɗaya, kuma ya mai da hankali kan aikin sassaƙa. Degas kuma yana da hali mai wuya da taurin kai, wanda ya sa dangantakarsa da mutanen da ke kewaye da shi ba ta da kyau, kuma a hankali ya rayu rayuwa mai zaman kansa. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin sirri da iyakokin jiki, ya ci gaba da neman sabbin hanyoyin bayyanawa tare da jajircewa ga fasaha, yana gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman.

Edgar Degas ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin fasaha ta hanyar sabbin tsare-tsare, kyakkyawar fahimta game da motsi, da kuma gaskiya a cikin kwatancin rayuwar birni ta zamani. Ya bincika fannoni daban-daban na wanzuwar ɗan adam ta hanyar ɗaukar motsin 'yan rawa masu kyau amma masu wahala, lokutan motsi na tseren dawakai, da rayuwar yau da kullun ta talakawa. Musamman, gudunmawarsa wajen ɗaukaka pastel daga kayan aikin zane mai sauƙi zuwa wani kayan fasaha mai zaman kansa yana da girma sosai. Ayyukansa, waɗanda suka yi tasiri da daukar hoto da buga hotuna na Japan, sun nuna ra'ayoyi na musamman da tsare-tsare masu ƙarfi, kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu ɗaukar hoto da masu shirya fina-finai na gaba. Degas ya yi aiki a matsayin gada tsakanin fasahar ilimi ta gargajiya da fasahar avant-garde ta ƙarni na 20, yana kafa muhimmin tushe don ci gaban fasahar zamani. A yau, ana ajiye ayyukansa a manyan gidajen tarihi na fasaha a duk faɗin duniya, kuma har yanzu mutane da yawa suna son su. Ya bambanta sosai da abokin aikinsa na Impressionist, Claude Monet: yayin da Monet ya bincika canje-canjen haske, Degas ya mai da hankali kan ɗaukar motsin ɗan adam da zurfin tunanin mutum.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Oscar Wilde marubuci ne kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na Irish a zamanin Victoria, wanda ya goyi bayan Aestheticism kuma ya gina duniyar ayyuka na musamman.
key_achievements: Rubuta *The Picture of Dorian Gray*
Bugawa wasan kwaikwayo *The Importance of Being Earnest*
Aiki a matsayin babban jigo a motsin Aestheticism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa da rayuwarsa mai ban tausayi har yanzu suna da tasiri mai zurfi a kan adabi, wasan kwaikwayo, da kuma haƙƙin ɗan adam na 'yan tsiraru na zamantakewa a yau.

oscar-wilde.epic:
Oscar Fingal O'Fflahertie Wills Wilde (1854~1900) marubuci ne, mawaki, kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo wanda ya wakilci adabin Birtaniya da Irish na ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 a zamanin Victoria. An haife shi a Dublin, Ireland, ga mahaifi likitan tiyata mai daraja da mahaifiya mawakiya kuma mai kishin ƙasa ta Irish, ya girma a cikin yanayi mai wadata da ilimi da al'adu tun yana ƙarami. Ya yi karatu a Trinity College a Dublin da Magdalen College a Oxford, inda basirarsa ta musamman da hankalinsa suka sa ya zama sanannen mutum a fannin ilimi da kuma cikin al'umma. Musamman ma, ya kasance mai goyon bayan 'Art for Art's Sake' (Fasaha don Fasaha), kuma ya zama babban jigo a cikin motsin Aestheticism, yana ba da fifiko ga kyawun fasaha na asali da kuma tsarin fasaha. Waƙoƙinsa na farko da kasidunsa sun riga sun nuna salo na musamman da kuma ra'ayin falsafa, wanda ya shimfida masa hanyar samun nasara a matsayin marubucin wasan kwaikwayo daga baya. Ya nemi buɗe sabbin hanyoyin fasaha, yana kalubalantar ƙa'idodin ɗabi'a masu tsauri na zamanin Victoria.

Oscar Wilde, wanda ya rubuta a cikin salo daban-daban na adabi a cikin shekarun 1880s, ya zama ɗaya daga cikin shahararrun marubutan wasan kwaikwayo masu tasiri a London a farkon shekarun 1890s. Littafinsa guda ɗaya tilo, *The Picture of Dorian Gray* (1890), littafi ne na Gothic wanda ya binciko duhun sha'awoyi da lalacewar ɗabi'a na ɗan adam da ke marmarin samun matasa da kyau na har abada, wanda ya haifar da babban girgiza ga al'umma a lokacin. Baya ga wannan aikin, ya sami shahara ta hanyar buga wasannin kwaikwayo masu nasara da yawa kamar *Lady Windermere's Fan* (1892), *A Woman of No Importance* (1893), *An Ideal Husband* (1895), da kuma babban aikinsa, *The Importance of Being Earnest* (1895). Zolayarsa mai kaifi, maganganunsa masu basira, da kuma salon tufafinsa mai ban sha'awa da na musamman sun sa ya zama alama a cikin al'ummar London, amma a lokaci guda, rayuwarsa ta sirri, musamman dangantakarsa da Lord Alfred Douglas, ta yi karo da ƙa'idodin ɗabi'a masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na lokacin, wanda ya nuna wani babban canji a rayuwarsa.

A shekarar 1895, rayuwar Oscar Wilde ta ɗauki mummunan juyi wanda ba za a iya gyarawa ba. Lokacin da Marquess of Queensberry, mahaifin Lord Alfred Douglas, ya zargi Wilde da 'nuna kansa a matsayin mai luwaɗi,' Wilde ya shigar da ƙarar cin mutunci. Amma, wannan ƙarar ta bayyana ayyukansa na luwaɗi ga duniya, kuma a ƙarshe, an tuhumi Wilde kuma an yanke masa hukunci saboda 'mummunan rashin ɗabi'a'. Wannan ya kasance daidai da dokar Birtaniya a lokacin da ke hukunta ayyukan luwaɗi, kuma ya zama wani juyi mai mutuwa a rayuwarsa. An yanke masa hukuncin shekaru biyu na aikin wahala a kurkukun Reading Gaol, wanda ya rushe kyakkyawar aikinsa, ya kai shi ga fatara, kuma ya lalata lafiyarsa cikin sauri. A kurkuku, ya rubuta *De Profundis*, wata doguwar wasiƙa da ke nuna tunani game da rayuwarsa, imani, da wahalarsa. Bayan fitowarsa, ya buga *The Ballad of Reading Gaol* (1898), wata waƙa da ke nuna zurfin tausayi ga rayuwar kurkuku da hukuncin kisa, yana isar da saƙo game da mutuncin ɗan adam.

Bayan fitowarsa daga kurkuku, Wilde ya rasa komai kuma ya tafi gudun hijira zuwa Faransa, inda ya yi sauran rayuwarsa shi kaɗai a Paris, kuma ya rasu a ranar 30 ga Nuwamba, 1900, yana da shekaru 46. Bayan mutuwarsa, an fara sake kimanta ayyukansa, kuma a yau ana tuna shi a matsayin babban marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na zamanin Victoria kuma babban malami na adabin Aesthetic. *The Picture of Dorian Gray*, *The Importance of Being Earnest*, da kuma maganganunsa masu yawa da tatsuniyoyinsa har yanzu suna ba da zurfin fahimta game da munafuncin ɗan adam, al'adun zamantakewa, da kuma yanayin fasaha, kuma ana ci gaba da sake fassara su. Rayuwarsa mai ban tausayi da gwagwarmayar fasaha har yanzu suna ba da muhimmiyar kwarin gwiwa ga tattaunawa game da haƙƙin ɗan adam da 'yancin faɗar albarkacin baki ga 'yan tsiraru na zamantakewa a yau, kuma suna da alaƙa da labaran wasu hazikan da ba su da sa'a na zamanin, kamar Vincent van Gogh, waɗanda suka yi yaƙi da nuna bambancin zamantakewa kuma suka ƙone da sha'awar fasaha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban mawaƙi kuma mai tunani wanda ya wakilci muryar mutanen da aka zalunta a zamanin mulkin mallaka, kuma ya rera waƙar rashin mutuwa ta ruhin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Wakilcin wahalar mutanen mulkin mallaka
Binciken asalin wanzuwar ɗan adam
Gabatar da bege ta hanyar waƙa da adabi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Adabinsa ya kasance gado mai rai wanda ya wuce zamani, yana shayar da rai kuma yana haskaka bege.

rabindranath-tagore.epic:
A lokacin da iska ke ɗauke da ɗanɗanon gishiri daga Tekun Bengal, kuma ƙurar ja ta Kogin Ganges ke sauka a kan tsoffin ganuwar bulo, wata ƙaramar rayuwa ta fara motsi a cikin tsakar gidan sarauta mai natsuwa. A lokacin da waƙar ruwan teku mai girma da kukan jariri suka haɗu, tuni zurfin littattafan tsufa da damuwar zamanin da ke tafe suka zauna a cikin idanunsa. Yana riƙe da alƙalami maimakon goga, zaune shi kaɗai a wani lungu na lambun da ke ƙamshin furen iris, ya fara sauraron rashin adalcin duniya, yana shuka iri na harshe marar ganuwa.

A cikin titunan mulkin mallaka da duhu ya lulluɓe su, inda nishi na mutanen da aka zalunta ke amsawa, kallonsa ya zurfafa. A ƙarƙashin faɗuwar rana mai ja, shi kaɗai kamar gashin tsuntsu da ya warwatse, ya amsa kukan rayukan da aka murƙushe a ƙarƙashin manyan gine-gine. A kunnuwansa akwai ƙarar sarƙoƙin zalunci, kuma a zuciyarsa ƙishirwa mai girma ta 'yanci ta yi ta tafasa. Da goga, da alƙalami, wani lokaci kuma da jinkiri, ya zaɓi hanyar bayyana wa duniya muryoyin da aka ɓoye na waɗanda aka zalunta.

A cikin zurfin rai inda basira mai haske da baƙin ciki mai duhu suka haɗu, ya ci gaba da bincika tambayoyin asali na wanzuwar ɗan adam. Tsakanin sha'awa mai ƙonewa kamar wutar rawa da zurfin yanke kauna kamar daren shiru, ya ci gaba da babban gwaji a cikin sunan fasaha. A kan hanyoyin da ƙura ke tashi, yana fuskantar iska mai ƙarfi, ya rera waƙar rashin mutuwa ta ruhin ɗan adam, kuma ya sassaƙa guntun ji da aka manta da su da fasaha.

A yau, sunansa ya zama numfashi mai rai, fiye da tarihin lokaci kawai. A tsakanin tsoffin shafukan littattafai, kamar ƙamshin furen da ya buɗe yanzu, waƙoƙinsa da waƙoƙinsa har yanzu suna tare da mu, suna haskaka duhu. Kamar yadda ruwan Kogin Ganges ke gudana ba tare da tsayawa ba, adabinsa ya wuce zamani, yana shayar da bushewar rai, kuma yana sake zana hasken bege da aka manta da shi a fili.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sor Juana Ines De La Cruz marubuciya ce kuma sufiya a ƙasar Mexico ta ƙarni na 17, wacce ta kare 'yancin kai na hankali na mata.
key_achievements: Kare haƙƙin mata na ilimi ("Respuesta a Sor Filotea de la Cruz")
Kololuwar adabin Mexico na zamanin Baroque
Ci gaba da binciken ilimi a cikin gidan sufi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ita ce alamar ƙasa ta Mexico kuma majagaba ce ta mata masu ilimi, tana tunatar da mu muhimmancin 'yancin kai na hankali har zuwa yau.

sor-juana-ines-de-la-cruz.epic:
Sor Juana Ines De La Cruz (1648-1695) marubuciya ce, masaniyar falsafa, mawakiya, kuma mawaƙiyar zamanin Baroque, kuma sufiya a ƙasar Mexico ta ƙarni na 17. New Spain (Nueva España), inda aka haife ta, lokaci ne da ƙa'idodin al'adu da addini masu tsauri suka mamaye ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka na Spain. An haife ta a ranar 12 ga Nuwamba, 1648, a San Miguel Nepantla, Mexico, da sunan Doña Inés de Asbaje y Ramírez de Santillana, kuma ta nuna basirar hankali ta musamman tun tana ƙarama. Duk da cewa damar samun ilimi na yau da kullun ga mata a lokacin yana da iyaka sosai, ta koyi Latin da kanta a ɗakin karatu na kakanta kuma ta karanta fannoni daban-daban, tana haɓaka ƙishirwar ilimi. Har ma ta nuna sha'awar shiga jami'a sanye da kayan maza don neman ilimi, wanda ke nuna irin sha'awarta ga ilimi. Waɗannan abubuwan farko sun zama wani abu da ya sanya mata muhimmancin 'yancin kai na hankali da bincike a cikin rayuwarta da ayyukanta. 

Tun tana ƙarama, basirarta ta musamman ta kai ga saninta a fadar Viceroy na Mexico, inda ta zama mai jiran gado ga Leonor Carreto, matar Viceroy. Rayuwar fada ta ba ta dama mai daraja don mu'amala da manyan masana na zamaninta da faɗaɗa iliminta, kuma an san basirarta ta adabi sosai. Amma ta yanke shawarar cewa aure na duniya da rayuwar iyali za su hana ta cimma burinta na ilimi. A shekara ta 1667, ta shiga ƙungiyar Carmelites amma ta bar ta da wuri saboda matsalolin lafiya, kuma a shekara mai zuwa, 1669, ta sake shiga ƙungiyar St. Jerome kuma ta yanke shawarar ciyar da sauran rayuwarta a gidan sufi. Wannan zaɓi ya wuce sadaukarwa ta addini kawai; ya kasance yanke shawara mai dabara don zaɓar gidan sufi a matsayin wuri ɗaya tilo na 'yancin kai na hankali da aka ba mata a lokacin. A cikin gidan sufi, ta gina babban ɗakin karatu, ta nutsa cikin binciken ilimi da ayyukan kirkire-kirkire, tana gina duniyarta ta hankali. 

A lokacin rayuwarta a gidan sufi, Sor Juana Ines De La Cruz ta ƙirƙiri ayyuka masu yawa a cikin nau'o'i daban-daban kamar waƙoƙi, wasan kwaikwayo, kasidu, da rubuce-rubucen tauhidi, wanda ya kai ga kololuwar adabin Mexico na zamanin Baroque. Musamman ma, babban aikinta "Respuesta a Sor Filotea de la Cruz" (Amsa ga Sor Filotea de la Cruz), wanda aka buga a 1691, ya kasance sanarwa mai ƙarfi da ke kare haƙƙin mata na ilimi da kuma halaccin binciken hankali. Wannan rubutu ya kasance amsa ga sukar Bishop Manuel Fernández de Santa Cruz na Puebla (wanda ya buga sukar wa'azinta a ƙarƙashin sunan Sor Filotea), yana mai da'awar basirar mata da 'yancin ilimi, kuma ya kalubalanci al'ummar maza da ikon coci a lokacin. Amma waɗannan ayyukan hankali sun fuskanci matsin lamba daga masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na coci, musamman daga mai ikirari da Archbishop na Mexico. A ƙarshe, a kusan 1694, ta sanya hannu kan wata takarda ta alƙawari don barin ɗakin karatunta da kayan kimiyya, ta daina duk wani rubutu na duniya, kuma ta sadaukar da kanta ga sadaukarwa ta addini da ayyukan agaji. Wannan ya kasance babban gwaji ga 'yancinta na hankali kuma sadaukarwa ce mai ban tausayi. 

Sor Juana Ines De La Cruz ta mutu a ranar 17 ga Afrilu, 1695, saboda annobar da ta bazu a gidan sufi, amma gadonta ya wuce lokaci kuma yana da tasiri mai ƙarfi har zuwa yau. Ana ɗaukar ta ɗaya daga cikin manyan marubuta na Zamanin Zinariya na Spain, kuma ita ce masaniyar mata ta farko a Latin Amurka. Ayyukanta ba wai kawai suna da darajar adabi ba ne, har ma suna gabatar da tambayoyi masu zurfi game da 'yancin kai na hankali na mata da rawar da suke takawa a cikin al'umma, kuma ana ci gaba da bincika su a zamanin yau. A Mexico, ana girmama ta a matsayin jarumar ƙasa kuma alama ce ta 'yancin kai na hankali da juriya ga zalunci, kuma hotonta yana kan kuɗin Mexico. Rayuwarta da gwagwarmayarta sun yi daidai da na sauran majagaba a Turai waɗanda suka kare haƙƙin mata da 'yancin kai na hankali a lokaci guda, suna isar da saƙo mai wuce gona da iri.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mawaƙiya ce ta mata a daular Song ta Arewa, wacce ta gina zurfin duniyar waƙa da ta wuce bala'in mutum a cikin lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali, kuma ta ba da babban tasiri ga tsararraki masu zuwa.
key_achievements: Kafa salon waƙa na musamman a cikin da'irar adabin Song ta Arewa
Rera waƙar zamanin da hankali mai laushi da zurfin waƙa
Ɗaukaka bala'in mutum zuwa kaɗaicin ɗan adam na duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinta suna ba da ta'aziyya ga baƙin ciki da kaɗaicin ɗan adam na asali a cikin lokuta daban-daban, suna ba da motsin rai na har abada.

li-qingzhao.epic:
Lokacin da daular Song ta Arewa mai girma ke faɗuwa cikin duhu, a cikin ɗakin karatu mai natsuwa a Jinan, inda koguna masu shuɗi ke karkata, tsakanin sautin niƙa tawada da rawan goga mai laushi, wata rai ta farka. Ko da yake a idon mutane da yawa, yarinya ce mai hankali kawai, a cikinta akwai sararin samaniya mai littattafai dubu goma da kuma dubban jihohin motsin rai da za a iya bayyanawa da goga. Hankalinta mai laushi, wanda ilimin mahaifinta mai tsabta da hikimar mahaifiyarta mai zurfi suka gina, ya fara ƙirƙira nata harshe na musamman, ba tare da la'akari da hayaniyar duniya ba, kamar rubutun da za a zana a kan hanyar siliki. A lokacin kuruciyarta, lokacin da ko da kayan shafa mai sauƙi ba ta saba da shi ba, zuciyarta ta riga ta farka ita kaɗai a ƙarƙashin hasken wata mai natsuwa, tana shirin ɗaukar sha'awa da kaɗaici waɗanda suka wuce lokaci.

A lokacin zafi na samartaka, kaddara ta haɗa ta da zuriyar wani jami'in soja. Ko da dariyar manyan liyafa ko hawa da saukar aikin gwamnati ƙura ce kawai a gare su na ɗan lokaci, su biyun sun zauna fuska da fuska a tebur mai natsuwa, suna share ƙurar tsoffin littattafai, suna jin numfashin kayan tarihi masu daraja kamar jade, kuma suna kwana. Waƙoƙinta, mai suna 'Neman Kaka (尋秋)', sun haifar da raƙuman ruwa masu laushi a cikin da'irar adabin Song ta Arewa tare da rawar jiki mai laushi wanda ba a rasa ba ko da a cikin wadata mai yawa. Harshenta, wanda ke gudana kamar ruwan kogi mai tsabta da haske, ya ba da nutsuwa amma zurfin amo a cikin zukatan masu sauraro, kuma kwanakin mafarki da soyayya da fasaha suka ƙirƙira sun buɗe da haske kamar za su dawwama har abada.

Amma babu abin da ke dawwama, kuma harin daular Jin mai kaifi fiye da takobin Mongol ya zubar da jini a ƙasar Song ta Arewa. Faɗuwar Kaifeng, babban birnin da ya kasance mai girma, bala'i ne wanda ya girgiza dukkan rayuwarta. A kan hanyar gudun hijira mai cike da ƙura, tare da dukiyoyin da aka rasa, mutuwar mijinta, wanda ya ɗauke duk wani haske daga duniya, ya jefa ta cikin duhu mai zurfi. Da zuciya mai rauni da hannaye marasa komai, tafiyarta a cikin ƙasar kudu mai baƙon abu ta kasance cike da baƙin ciki na dubban shekaru da kuma babban kaɗaici da dole ne ta jure ita kaɗai.

A kan kango inda sama da ƙasa suka juye, kuma komai ya rushe, ta sake ɗaukar goga. Kukan 'Rayuwa kamar mafarki ce, me ya sa zan yi baƙin ciki?' ya rera baƙin ciki na mutum ɗaya, ciwon zamanin, har ma da asalin kaɗaicin ɗan adam. Ta tattara guntun rayuwarta da suka warwatse, ta bayyana hawaye ɗaya a kan goga, da kukan da ya fito daga zurfin zuciyarta a cikin waƙoƙi masu daɗi. Bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru sun shude, kuma bayan ta kammala tafiyarta mai wahala, harshenta har yanzu yana raba iska mai sanyi, yana jika ƙasa mai bushewa, kuma yana kasancewa a nan, a cikin zukatanmu, a matsayin amo mai dawwama wanda ke rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Matsuo Basho ya kasance mawakin Japan na zamanin Edo, wanda ya ɗaukaka haiku zuwa matsayin fasaha kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga adabin Japan.
key_achievements: Ya ɗaukaka haiku zuwa wani nau'in fasaha mai zurfi
Ya rubuta littafin tafiye-tafiye 'Oku no Hosomichi'
Ya kafa kyawawan ra'ayoyin Sabi, Wabi, da Karumi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Haikunsa, wanda ke ɗauke da haɗin kai da yanayi da kuma kyawun wucewa, yana ci gaba da ba da kwarjini mai zurfi ga duniya har yau.

matsuo-basho.epic:
Matsuo Basho (kimanin 1644 – 1694) ya kasance mawakin Japan ne na farkon zamanin Edo, babban malami wanda ya ɗaukaka haiku zuwa matsayin fasaha mai girma, kuma ɗaya daga cikin fitattun mutane masu daraja a tarihin adabin Japan. Sunansa na asali Matsuo Juemon Munefusa ne, kuma sunansa na yara Kinsaku ne. An haife shi a kimanin shekara ta 1644, a lokacin da Japan ke jin daɗin zaman lafiya da ci gaban al'adu a ƙarƙashin mulkin Tokugawa Shogunate. Wannan lokaci ne da kasuwanci ya bunƙasa kuma al'adun birane suka yi fure, inda sabbin nau'ikan fasaha da adabi suka yaɗu ga jama'a. Basho ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga adabi tun yana ƙarami, musamman ga renga da haikai waɗanda suka shahara a lokacin. An san shi a matsayin wanda ya fito daga iyalin samurai, amma a hankali ya zurfafa cikin duniyar waka fiye da rayuwar duniya. Bayan ya koma Edo, ya yi mu'amala da mawaka daban-daban, ya goge basirarsa ta waka, kuma a hankali ya fara samar da salon wakarsa na musamman. Ayyukansa na farko, duk da cewa sun bi salon zamani, sun riga sun nuna yunƙurin haɗa zurfin fahimtar yanayi da wanzuwar ɗan adam. A cikin wannan yanayi, Basho yana shirin buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a adabin Japan, ba kawai a matsayin mawaki mai sauƙi ba.

Wani muhimmin lokaci a rayuwar Basho ya zo ne lokacin da ya gina wata ƙaramar bukkoki mai suna 'Basho-an' a Edo kuma ya fara rayuwar kadaici. An samo sunan wannan bukkoki daga bishiyoyin ayaba (basho) da almajiransa suka dasa masa, kuma daga baya ya zama sunansa na rubutu. A nan, ya nisanta kansa daga shaharar duniya da dukiya, ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken kwarjinin waka ta hanyar haɗuwa da yanayi. A lokacin, haikai ya kasance nau'in adabi mai sauƙi wanda ke jaddada barkwanci da basira, amma Basho ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin kyau kamar 'sabi', 'wabi', da 'karumi' a cikinsa don ba shi zurfi da falsafa. Sabi yana nufin kyau mai shiru da kaɗaici, wabi yana nufin kyau mai sauƙi da tattali, kuma karumi yana nufin kyau mai haske da na halitta, kuma waɗannan sun zama muhimman abubuwa a duniyar wakarsa. Ya nemi gano gaskiyar duniya a cikin abubuwan yau da kullun da abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi, yana mai da hankali kan sanya ma'ana mara iyaka a cikin gajerun haiku. Wannan yunƙuri ya kawo sabon mamaki ga duniyar adabi, kuma almajirai da yawa sun bi koyarwarsa, suna samar da sabon salo a haikai. A wannan lokaci, Basho ya riga ya kafa kansa ba kawai a matsayin mawaki ba, har ma a matsayin mai tunani da mai fasaha.

Tafiyar Basho ta waka ta zurfafa sosai ta hanyar tafiye-tafiye marasa yankewa da wahalhalu. Daga 1684 har zuwa mutuwarsa a 1694, ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duk faɗin Japan na kimanin shekaru 10, inda ya bar littattafan tafiye-tafiye da yawa, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin abu wajen kammala duniyar wakarsa. Musamman tafiyar 'Oku no Hosomichi' (Hanyar Kunkuntar zuwa Arewa Mai Zurfi), wadda ta fara a 1689, ana ɗaukarta a matsayin babban aikinsa kuma ɗaya daga cikin kololuwar adabin Japan. A lokacin wannan tafiya, ya fuskanci iyakokin wanzuwar ɗan adam da girman yanayi kai tsaye a cikin hanyoyin tsaunuka masu wahala da daji mai tsauri, yana haɗa waɗannan cikin wakokinsa da rubutunsa. Duk da wahalhalun jiki kamar sanyi, yunwa, da rashin lafiya, Basho bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba, yana samun zurfin fahimta daga shimfiɗar wuri mai wucewa da rayuwar mutanen da ya haɗu da su. Wakokinsa sun bayyana yanayi mai canzawa, wucewar rayuwa, da kuma kyau na har abada da ake samu a cikinta, ta amfani da harshe mai ladabi. Ta hanyar irin wannan aikin ruhaniya, Basho ya ɗaukaka waka daga wasan kalmomi kawai zuwa kayan aikin ruhaniya don binciken ainihin rayuwa. Almajiransa sun bi sawun malaminsu, suna gadon da haɓaka salon wakar Basho.

A ranar 28 ga Nuwamba, 1694, Basho ya rasu sakamakon rashin lafiya a lokacin tafiya a Osaka, amma wakokinsa da falsafarsa sun yi tasiri sosai ba kawai ga adabin Japan ba har ma ga adabin duniya. Haikunsa ya nuna ainihin kyau na isar da zurfin tunani da motsin rai a cikin gajeren tsari, ya zama tushen kwarjini na har abada ga mawaka na gaba. Basho ya ɗaukaka haiku daga nishaɗi kawai zuwa wani nau'in fasaha mai zurfi wanda ke binciken ainihin yanayi da ɗan adam. Ayyukansa suna jaddada haɗin kai da yanayi, kyawun wucewa, da kuma girma a rayuwar yau da kullun, suna sa masu karatu su sake tunani game da ma'anar rayuwa. Har yau, ana fassara haikun Basho kuma ana karanta shi a cikin harsuna marasa adadi a duk faɗin duniya, kuma duniyar wakarsa, wadda ta yi daidai da tunanin Zen na Gabas, tana ratsa zuciyar mutanen zamani sosai. Ruhun tafiyarsa yana nuna tafiyar ɗan adam ta asali na neman tunani na ciki da wayewa. Gadon Basho ya yi tasiri sosai ga sauran mawaka na zamaninsa da marubuta na gaba, kuma matsayinsa yana da ƙarfi a cikin dogon al'adar adabin Japan wanda ke binciken dangantakar da ke tsakanin yanayi da ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William Wilberforce ya kasance ɗan siyasa kuma mai taimakon jama'a na Biritaniya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, wanda ya jagoranci kawar da cinikin bayi.
key_achievements: Jagorantar yakin kawar da cinikin bayi
Zartar da Dokar Kawar da Cinikin Bayi a 1807
Ba da gudummawa ga kafa Dokar Kawar da Bauta a 1833
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarsa ta yi tasiri sosai ga tabbatar da haƙƙin ɗan adam na duniya da adalci na zamantakewa.

william-wilberforce.epic:
William Wilberforce (1759-1833) ya kasance fitaccen ɗan siyasa, mai taimakon jama'a, kuma jagora mai jajircewa a yakin kawar da cinikin bayi a Biritaniya daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 18 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 19. A lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu ke girgiza al'ummar Biritaniya kuma Daular Biritaniya ke faɗaɗa tasirinta a duniya, cinikin bayi, wanda ke samar da dukiya mai yawa, yana lalata rayuwar miliyoyin 'yan Afirka. An haife shi a shekara ta 1759 a Hull, Yorkshire, cikin dangi masu arziki na 'yan kasuwa, ya sami ilimi a Jami'ar Cambridge kuma ya nuna basirar siyasa tun yana ƙarami. A lokacin da yake ɗan shekara 21, an zaɓe shi a matsayin ɗan majalisar wakilai, inda ya shiga majalisar kuma ya zama aboki na kud da kud da Firayim Minista na lokacin, William Pitt the Younger, wanda hakan ya nuna masa kyakkyawar makoma. Amma bai gamsu da jin daɗin kansa da nasarar siyasa ba, sai ya zaɓi ya yi yaƙi da rashin adalci na zamantakewa da ya yadu a lokacin, musamman babban mugun abu na cinikin bayi wanda ke tattake mutuncin ɗan adam. Wannan shawararsa ta yi tasiri sosai a cikin al'ummar Biritaniya, kuma ta zama wani muhimmin abin da ya haifar da motsin tarihi na kawar da cinikin bayi.

Juyin juya halin rayuwar Wilberforce ya faru ne tsakanin shekarar 1785 zuwa 1786, lokacin da ya fuskanci zurfin tuba na ruhaniya. Juyawarsa zuwa Kiristanci na bishara ya canza dabi'unsa da manufofin rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya, kuma ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga manyan manufofi biyu: kawar da cinikin bayi da kuma gyara ɗabi'un al'umma. Musamman ma, bayan ya ga mummunan yanayin cinikin bayi, ya ɗauke shi a matsayin babban zunubi da ya saɓa wa lamirin addini. A shekarar 1787, ya haɗa kai da masu fafutuka masu himma irin su Thomas Clarkson na Society for Effecting the Abolition of the Slave Trade, kuma ya zama jagoran yakin kawar da cinikin bayi a cikin majalisa. Ya yi jayayya da gamsarwa cewa cinikin bayi ba wai kawai rashin ɗan adam ba ne kuma rashin ɗabi'a ba ne, har ma ba shi da inganci ta fuskar tattalin arziki, kuma ya mai da hankali kan wayar da kan majalisa da jama'a ta hanyar shaidu da bayanai masu yawa. Wannan ƙoƙarinsa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen canza fahimtar cinikin bayi da ya yi tushe sosai a cikin al'ummar Biritaniya a lokacin.

Amma gwagwarmayarsa ta kawar da cinikin bayi ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba. Ya fuskanci tsayin daka mai ƙarfi daga masu gonaki a Yammacin Indies da 'yan kasuwa waɗanda ke samun riba mai yawa daga cinikin bayi, kuma a cikin majalisa ma, yawancin 'yan majalisa sun yi watsi da jayayyarsa saboda alaƙar tattalin arziki da al'adun gargajiya. Daga shekarar 1791, Wilberforce ya gabatar da kudirin dokar kawar da cinikin bayi ga majalisa kowace shekara, amma a kowane lokaci ya fuskanci ɗacin takaici. Lafiyarsa ta tabarbare, kuma ya fuskanci hare-hare na sirri da ba'a. Duk da haka, tare da goyon bayan ƙungiyar masu gyara bishara da ake kira 'Clapham Sect', ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya da haƙuri mai ɗorewa da kuma jajircewa marar yankewa. Bayan shekaru da dama na ƙoƙari mai wuya, a ƙarshe a ranar 25 ga Maris, 1807, Majalisar Biritaniya ta zartar da 'Dokar Kawar da Cinikin Bayi' wanda ya haramta cinikin bayi a cikin Daular Biritaniya. Wannan nasara ce ta tarihi da sadaukarwarsa ta rayuwa ta cimma.

Ko da bayan zartar da Dokar Kawar da Cinikin Bayi, gwagwarmayar Wilberforce ba ta tsaya ba. Ya ci gaba da yakin kawar da bauta gaba ɗaya, ba kawai cinikin bayi ba, kuma ya shiga cikin sauran motsin gyaran zamantakewa. A ƙarshe, ƙoƙarinsa ya zama tushe mai mahimmanci wajen zartar da 'Dokar Kawar da Bauta' a Majalisar Biritaniya a shekarar 1833. An zartar da wannan doka kwanaki uku kacal kafin rasuwarsa, wanda ke nufin cewa burinsa na rayuwa ya cika a ƙarshe. Ana tuna Wilberforce a matsayin mutum mai alama wanda ya nuna jajircewa marar yankewa ga mutuncin ɗan adam da 'yanci. Gadonsa yana ci gaba da zaburar da motsin kare haƙƙin ɗan adam da tabbatar da adalci na zamantakewa a duniya har zuwa yau, kuma rayuwarsa da gwagwarmayarsa, tare da ƙoƙarin mutane irin su John Howard waɗanda suka jagoranci gyaran zamantakewa a Biritaniya a lokaci guda, sun ba da gudummawa sosai wajen ɗaukaka darajar mutuncin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Toussaint Louverture ya kasance ɗan juyin juya hali na ƙarshen ƙarni na 18 a Caribbean, wanda ya kawo ƙarshen bauta kuma ya jagoranci Haiti zuwa 'yanci.
key_achievements: Jagorantar Juyin Juya Halin Haiti da 'Yantar da Bayi
Ya yi aiki a matsayin ainihin mai mulkin Saint-Domingue
Gudunmawa ga kafa jamhuriya ta farko ta baƙar fata
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kasance alamar 'yantar da bayi da 'yancin mulkin mallaka, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga gwagwarmayar 'yanci a duk faɗin duniya.

toussaint-louverture.epic:
Toussaint Louverture, wani ɗan juyin juya hali kuma mai fafutukar samun 'yanci daga Haiti wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1743, ya kasance wani mutum mai alama wanda ya yi yaƙi da tsarin bauta a Saint-Domingue (yanzu Haiti), wani mulkin mallaka na Faransa a Caribbean. A lokacin haihuwarsa, Saint-Domingue wuri ne da bauta mai zafi ta yi yawa, wanda ya dogara ga tattalin arzikin gonakin rake, inda aka tilasta wa baƙar fata da yawa da aka kawo daga Afirka rayuwa mara mutunci. Ko da yake an haifi Toussaint a matsayin bawa, ya girma a cikin yanayi mafi kyau fiye da sauran bayi, inda ya yi aiki a matsayin mai tuƙa doki ga ubangiji mai sauƙi kuma ya koyi karatu. Ya kasance mai tasiri daga tunanin wayewar Faransa da addinin gargajiya na Afirka, Vodou, kuma ya fahimci zaluncin 'yan uwansa sosai, yana haɓaka sha'awar 'yanci. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, yayin da ruhun 'yanci, daidaito, da 'yan uwantaka na Juyin Juya Halin Faransa ya bazu ko'ina cikin Tekun Atlantika zuwa mulkin mallaka, Saint-Domingue tana shirin shiga cikin guguwar canji mai girma.

A watan Agusta na 1791, tawayen bayi ya barke a Saint-Domingue, wanda ya buɗe farkon wani babban tarihi da aka sani da Juyin Juya Halin Haiti. Juyin Juya Halin Haiti, wanda ya fara da tawayen bayi a Saint-Domingue a 1791, shi ne juyin juya hali tilo da bayi suka yi nasara a tarihin duniya, kuma ya haifar da kafa jamhuriya ta farko ta baƙar fata. Toussaint Louverture da farko ya shiga a matsayin mai ba da agaji ga sojojin tawaye, amma da sauri ya hau matsayin jagoranci saboda basirar soja ta halitta da dabara mai ban mamaki. Ya haɗa kai da sojojin Spain don yaƙi da sojojin Faransa, kuma daga baya, lokacin da Jamhuriyar Faransa ta soke bauta, ya koma gefen Faransa don ci sojojin Spain da Birtaniya, yana nuna diflomasiyya mai kyau da dabarun soja a cikin yanayin siyasar duniya mai sarkakiya. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinsa, sojojin bayi sun haɓaka daga masu tawaye zuwa ƙungiyar soja mai tsari, kuma a ƙarshen shekarun 1790, ya zama ainihin mai mulkin Saint-Domingue. Ya kawo ƙarshen bauta kuma ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare don sake gina al'umma, yana kafa harsashin sabuwar ƙasa.

Toussaint Louverture ya yi ƙoƙari don zaman lafiya da wadata a Saint-Domingue, amma ayyukansa na 'yanci sun jawo shakku daga Faransa. A shekara ta 1801, ya sanar da kundin tsarin mulki wanda ya bayyana cin gashin kai na Saint-Domingue kuma ya ayyana kansa gwamna-janar na rayuwa. Wannan a zahiri yana nufin 'yanci daga Faransa, kuma ya fusata Napoleon Bonaparte, wanda ke mulkin Faransa a lokacin. Napoleon ya tura babban rundunar sojoji zuwa Saint-Domingue, karkashin jagorancin Janar Charles Leclerc, don farfado da bauta da sake mamaye mulkin mallaka. Toussaint ya yi tsayin daka da sojojin Faransa, amma a ƙarshe sojojin Faransa suka kama shi a watan Yuni 1802 kuma aka tilasta masa zuwa Faransa. An ɗaure shi a Fort de Joux a gabashin Faransa, kuma ya sha wahala a cikin sanyi da yanayi mara kyau har ya mutu shi kaɗai a ranar 7 ga Afrilu, 1803, yana da shekaru 60. Mutuwarsa ta yi kama da kashe wutar juyin juya hali na ɗan lokaci, amma a maimakon haka ta ƙara rura wutar sha'awar 'yancin Haiti.

Mutuwar Toussaint Louverture ba ƙarshen Juyin Juya Halin Haiti ba ne, amma sabon farawa ne. Mataimakansa, Jean-Jacques Dessalines da Alexandre Pétion, sun ci gaba da adawa da sojojin Faransa, suna bin burin Toussaint. A ƙarshe, a ranar 1 ga Janairu, 1804, Haiti ta ayyana 'yancinta, ta zama ƙasa ta biyu da ta sami 'yanci a Yammacin Duniya, kuma jamhuriya ta farko ta baƙar fata a tarihin duniya. Ana tunawa da Toussaint Louverture a matsayin babban jagora wanda ya tsere daga bauta kuma ya yi yaƙi don 'yancin mulkin mallaka da 'yancin ɗan adam na duniya. Rayuwarsa da gwagwarmayarsa sun yi tasiri mai zurfi ga ƙungiyoyin 'yancin mulkin mallaka a Latin Amurka da Afirka, da ma duniya baki ɗaya, kuma ya kasance alamar bege da jaruntaka ga dukkan waɗanda aka zalunta. Gadonsa yana nuna ruhin juriya na 'yan Afirka mazauna ƙasashen waje, kuma ya yi daidai da gwagwarmayar mutane irin su Simón Bolívar, waɗanda suka jagoranci 'yanci a Latin Amurka a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An haife ta a matsayin bawa, ta yi gwagwarmaya don 'yanci da 'ya'yanta, kuma ta zama mai fafutukar kare hakkin bil'adama wacce ta yada gaskiya a matsayin Sojourner Truth.
key_achievements: Gudun hijira daga bauta da gwagwarmaya don dawo da 'ya'yanta
Fara gwagwarmaya don 'yantar da dukkan wadanda ake zalunta
Ayyukan aikin hajji na yada gaskiya a matsayin Sojourner Truth
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rayuwarta ta kasance alama ce ta gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don 'yanci, 'yancin ɗan adam, da gaskiya.

sojourner-truth.epic:
A cikin ƙasar New York ta arewa mai cike da ƙalubale, a cikin dare mai cike da iskar hunturu mai ratsa jiki da kukan dabbobi, kukan rayuwa da aka haifa bai bambanta da nishi na zafi ba. Isabella ƙarama ta fara numfashi a kan ƙura mai sanyi. Raunukan bulala masu ja da fuskokin iyali da aka raba su ne kawai suka rage a matsayin abubuwan tunawa marasa kyau, suna barin tabo marar gogewa a cikin zurfin ranta. A cikin raɗaɗin harshen baƙo da ba ta fahimta ba, an kulle ta a cikin kurkukun shiru, tana jure nauyin yanke kauna da ke zuwa kowace rana. Ko da a cikin wahalar da ke cinye jiki da rai, ta kunna wutar bege marar ganuwa, tana mafarkin ranar da za ta karya waɗannan sarƙoƙi a asirce.

'Yarwa ga 'yanci ta ƙone a cikin zuciyarta kamar wuta mai zafi, kuma a ƙarshe ta jefar da sarƙoƙin mafarki mai ban tsoro, amma abin da ya rage a bayanta shine kukan 'ya'yanta da suka ɓace da hawayen rashin adalci. A cikin wani wuri baƙo na kotu, ta fitar da dukkan zaluncin da ta sha da muryarta, tana kuka game da yadda darajar ɗan adam da aka tattake take da tsada. Gwagwarmayarta a gaban babban ƙofar adalci ba kawai yaƙi ba ne don dawo da yaro ɗaya; shi ne farkon 'yantar da dukkan rayuka da aka zalunta. A cikin kagara na gaskiya da aka gina a kan kango, ta sami ikon gina makomarta da kanta.

Bayan shekaru da yawa, Isabella ta kira kanta 'Sojourner Truth' kuma ta zama mai aikin hajji da ke yada gaskiya ga duniya. Ayoyin Littafi Mai Tsarki na da suka jagoranci tafiyarta, kuma imani mai ƙarfi ya ba ta tabbaci marar girgiza. Ta jefar da dukkan sarƙoƙin da zamanin ya ɗora mata a matsayin mace baƙar fata, kuma ta ci gaba da gaba da jaruntaka. Muryarta ta zama kira mai ƙarfi da ke karya sarƙoƙin bauta da kuma kare haƙƙin mata, tana shuka iri na 'yanci da daidaito a cikin zukatan mutane da yawa. Ta tsaya a kan mimbari, wani lokaci da waƙa, wani lokaci da addu'a mai tsanani, wani lokaci kuma da jawabi marar yankewa, tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke yaƙi da rashin adalci. Kowane kalma nata ya kasance amo na bege da ke ratsa zukatan waɗanda ake zalunta.

Tafiyarta cike take da wahalhalu da ƙalubale, amma ba ta taɓa ja da baya ba. Ko da a cikin tashin hankalin Yaƙin Basasa, ta taimaka wa sojojin Tarayyar Arewa kuma ta tallafa wa baƙin haure da aka 'yanta su zauna, tana ba da kanta don haskaka fitowar sabon zamani. Ta yi imani da ƙarfi cewa dukkan mutane suna da haƙƙoƙi daidai ba tare da la'akari da launin fata ko jinsi ba, kuma ta riƙe wannan imani da ƙarfi har zuwa lokacin mutuwarta. Sojourner Truth ba kawai suna ba ne. Ya kasance amo na har abada da ke nuna jaruntaka da bege na duk waɗanda ke adawa da rashin adalci, suna shelar gaskiya, kuma suna ƙoƙarin cimma duniya mafi kyau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Majagaba wacce ta yaƙi zaluncin mata a zamanin Victoria, ta yi gwagwarmaya don samun haƙƙin zaɓe, kuma ta shuka iri na yanci da daidaito.
key_achievements: Jagoranci gwagwarmaya don samun haƙƙin zaɓen mata.
Karya shurun zaluncin mata da kunna harshen wuta na juriya.
Kare mutuncin ɗan adam a kan rashin daidaito.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gwagwarmayarta ta zama ginshiƙin yanci da daidaito a yau, tana ci gaba da amo a cikin zamani, kuma tana ba da ƙarfafawa ta har abada ga waɗanda aka zalunta.

emmeline-pankhurst.epic:
A ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka na Landan, wanda hayakin Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu ya lulluɓe, inda shurun matan da aka zalunta ke yawo a tituna kamar nishi mai ɓoye, a nan aka haifi Emmeline Pankhurst, a ɗaure da sarkoki masu nauyi na al'adun zamanin Victoria. Kamar yaran titi masu tsofaffin tufafi, ranta ya girma yana shakar iskar zalunci mai sanyi, kuma ta ji zafi mai zurfi game da karkiyar shiru da biyayya da ake sa ran mata su jure. A ƙarƙashin hasken fitilar gas mai duhu, ta riƙe harshen wuta na fushi da tausayi a cikin zuciyarta, kuma nan da nan ta hango alamar babban guguwar da ke tafe.

Kukan masu yunwa daga tituna da inuwar rashin daidaito da tsofaffin dokoki suka haifa sun danne zuciyarta. A gaban kallon sanyi da ke watsi da wahalar wasu, da mutuncin da ake tattake saboda kasancewar mace, ta fara gwagwarmaya ita kaɗai. Lokacin da ta ɗaga tsohuwar tuta da hannayenta marasa ƙarfi, duniya ta nuna mata yatsa a matsayin mahaukaciya, amma idanunta ba su girgiza ba. Dare da yawa, tana kwance a kan dutsen gidan yari mai sanyi, tana haɗiye yanke kauna mai zafi, ba ta taɓa sakin igiyar haɗin kai ba.

Ko a cikin jifa da raini, ba ta karye ba. A zamanin da ake ɗaukar kalmar 'haƙƙin zaɓe' kamar saba wa Allah, ta mai da wannan kalmar ihu. A cikin wahalar da ta wuce yunwa har zuwa bakin mutuwa, ta girmama cikakken darajar mutuncin ɗan adam. Duk da tsofaffin tufafi, jiki mai rauni, da aljihu mara komai, zuciyarta ba ta tsaya ba. Ta ga mu'ujizar ƙaramin iri mai suna fata yana tushe a cikin ƙasar yanke kauna mara haihuwa.

Yanzu gwagwarmayarta ta zama waƙa mara ƙarewa. Iri na ƙarfin hali da aka shuka a cikin zukatan waɗanda aka zalunta sun tsiro sun zama babban daji, kuma hawaye da jinin da ta zubar sun zama maɓuɓɓugar gaskiya, ba a banza ba. Ihunta, wanda ya karya rufin gilashi kuma ya rushe bangon shiru, yana ci gaba da amo a cikin zamani, kuma har yanzu yana raye a yau a cikin sunan yanci da daidaito da muke ɗauka a matsayin al'ada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: José Rizal jarumin kasa ne kuma marubuci na Philippines a karshen karni na 19, wanda ya tada hankalin kasa don adawa da mulkin mallaka na Spain.
key_achievements: Rubuta littafin "Noli Me Tángere"
Tada tunanin kishin kasa na Philippines
Ya mutu a matsayin shahidi yana adawa da mulkin mallaka na Spain
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarsa ta zama wutar motsin 'yancin kai na Philippines kuma har yau tana zama alamar asalin ƙasar Philippines.

jose-rizal.epic:
José Rizal (an haife shi a shekara ta 1861) ya kasance jarumin kasa, mai kawo sauyi, likita, kuma marubuci a Philippines a karshen karni na 19, lokacin da Spain ke mulkin mallaka. A shekarar 1861, lokacin da aka haife shi, Philippines tana karkashin mulkin Spain sama da shekaru 300, kuma rashin daidaito da zalunci sun yadu a duk fadin al'umma. Musamman, gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Spain da kungiyoyin sufaye na Katolika sun yi amfani da ikonsu sosai wajen takura rayuwar mutanen Philippines, kuma cin zarafin filaye, aikin tilas, da dokoki masu nuna bambanci sun sa mutuncin kasa ya ragu sosai. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haifi Rizal a cikin dangi masu arziki na Mestizo a Calamba, Laguna. Iyalinsa sun kasance daga cikin masu ilimi, 'Ilustrado', kuma Rizal ya nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki da kuma hankali mai zurfi tun yana yaro. Ya girma yana shaida kyawawan dabi'un garinsu da kuma rashin adalcin mulkin mallaka a lokaci guda, wanda daga baya ya zama tushen tunaninsa da ilhamarsa ta adabi. Musamman, wahalar mutanen Philippines da ya gani tun yana yaro ta shiga zuciyarsa sosai, kuma ta zama dalilin da ya sa ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga kasarsa.

Bayan ya kammala karatunsa na farko a Manila, Rizal ya tafi Turai don karatu a shekara ta 1882, inda ya yi nazarin fannoni daban-daban kamar likitanci, falsafa, da adabi a wurare irin su Madrid a Spain, Paris a Faransa, da Heidelberg da Berlin a Jamus. Musamman, yayin da yake haɓaka ƙwarewarsa a matsayin likitan ido, ya kuma sami tasiri sosai daga ra'ayoyin 'yanci na Turai da ƙimar wayewa. A Turai, ya kalli halin da Philippines ke ciki a zahiri, kuma ya fahimci rashin adalcin mulkin mallaka na Spain da mahimmancin kafa asalin ƙasar Philippines. Wannan fahimtar ta zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya kai ga ayyukansa na adabi. A shekara ta 1887, ya buga littafinsa na farko, "Noli Me Tángere". Wannan aikin ya soki cin hanci da rashawa da munafuncin gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Spain da kungiyoyin sufaye na Katolika, yana mai kira ga mutanen Philippines su farka. A shekara ta 1891, ya buga mabiyinsa, "El filibusterismo", wanda ya ƙunshi saƙo mai tsattsauran ra'ayi fiye da na farko, kuma ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Philippines. Waɗannan ayyuka biyu sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kunna wutar kishin ƙasa na Philippines, amma a lokaci guda sun jawo kulawa da tsanantawa daga hukumomin Spain.

Rizal, wanda ke jagorantar motsin kawo sauyi a Philippines daga Turai, ya koma kasarsa a shekara ta 1892 kuma ya kafa 'La Liga Filipina' a Manila. La Liga Filipina kungiya ce ta farar hula da ke neman hadin kan mutanen Philippines da kuma kawo sauyi cikin lumana ta hanyar ci gaban ilimi, noma, da kasuwanci. Duk da haka, hukumomin Spain sun yi taka-tsantsan da tasirin Rizal, suka kama shi kuma suka kai shi gudun hijira zuwa Dapitan, wani yanki mai nisa a tsibirin Mindanao. Shekaru huɗu na gudun hijira a Dapitan sun kasance gwaji ga Rizal, amma kuma lokaci ne da ya nuna hazakarsa. A can, ya yi aiki a matsayin likita yana kula da mazauna yankin, ya kafa makarantu don koyar da yara, ya yada fasahar noma, har ma ya gina wuraren jama'a a yankin. Bugu da kari, ya ci gaba da binciken kimiyya kuma ya gano nau'ikan dabbobi da tsirrai da yawa. A shekara ta 1896, kungiyar juyin juya hali ta sirri mai suna Katipunan, karkashin jagorancin Andres Bonifacio, ta fara tawaye da Spain a Philippines. Ko da yake Rizal ba shi da wata alaƙa kai tsaye da wannan juyin juya hali na makamai, hukumomin Spain sun nuna shi a matsayin jagoran juyin juya halin. An kama Rizal yayin da yake kan hanyarsa ta zuwa Cuba don aikin likita, an gurfanar da shi a gaban kotun soji bisa zargin cin amanar kasa, tayar da zaune tsaye, da kafa kungiyar ba bisa ka'ida ba, kuma a karshe an yanke masa hukuncin kisa.

A ranar 30 ga Disamba, 1896, José Rizal ya mutu a matsayin shahidi ta hanyar harbin bindiga na sojojin Spain a Bagumbayan, Manila (yanzu Rizal Park). Mutuwarsa ta haifar da babban firgici da fushi ga mutanen Philippines, kuma ta zama wani muhimmin dalili na kara rura wutar juriya ga mulkin mallaka na Spain. Rizal ya yi kira ga sauyi maras tashin hankali, amma shahadarsa, a wata hanya, ta kunna wutar juyin juya halin Philippines kuma ta zama alamar motsin 'yancin kai na kasa. Bayan mutuwarsa, ayyukansa na adabi da tunaninsa sun zama tushen asalin ƙasar Philippines, kuma har yau suna ba da babban ilhami ga mutanen Philippines. Ana girmama shi a matsayin uban kasa kuma jarumin kasa na Philippines, kuma ana bikin ranar haihuwarsa da ranar mutuwarsa a matsayin ranakun hutu na kasa. An sanya sunansa a kan makarantu da yawa, tituna, da wuraren shakatawa, kuma an gina mutum-mutuminsa a duk faɗin Philippines da kuma a wurare daban-daban a ƙasashen waje. Rayuwarsa da tunaninsa za a iya kwatanta su da na mutane irin su Gandhi da Sun Yat-sen, waɗanda suka yi gwagwarmaya don samun 'yancin kai a wasu ƙasashe masu mulkin mallaka a Asiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai gabatarwa wacce ta yi gwagwarmaya da alƙalami don mutunci da daidaiton mata a zamanin zalunci.
key_achievements: Kafa ra'ayoyin da ke tabbatar da mutunci da daidaiton mata
Gwagwarmaya don 'yantar da mata masu zalunci
Sanar da mahimmancin haƙƙin mata ta hanyar hankali da ilimi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta dasa darajar 'yanci, daidaito, da haƙƙin ɗan adam, ta zama kambu ga al'ummar zamani, tana haskaka hanyar zuwa ga duniya mafi kyau.

mary-wollstonecraft.epic:
A ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka na London, ruwan sama na zuba ba kakkautawa ta tagar wani tsohon gida mai bulo. Cikin al'adu masu zalunci da sarƙoƙi na Ingila, rayuka marasa adadi da aka ɗaure da sunan mace sun kasance a kulle cikin shiru. Tana jin shaƙewar wannan gaskiya mai cike da damuwa a jikinta, wata mace ta ɗauki goga da alƙalami. Cikin wannan hargitsi na zamanin hargitsi inda sabbin ra'ayoyi ke kaɗawa kamar guguwa, ta fara gwagwarmaya ta kaɗaici don kunna wutar gaskiya. Hasken hankali da ke walƙiya tsakanin tsoffin shafukan littattafai ya fara ci da ƙarfi kamar idanunta, ba tare da girgiza ba.

Tashin hankalin mahaifinta da rugujewar iyali da ta fuskanta tun tana ƙarama sun zama tabo mai zurfi a zuciyarta. A gaban nuna bambanci da rashin daidaito da al'ummar maza ke ɗauka a matsayin al'ada, ta ɗanɗana fushi da takaici. A cikin dare masu yawa, ita kaɗai a cikin ɗaki mara komai, tana zubar da hawaye masu zafi, ta yi marmarin hanyar 'yantar da mata masu irin halin da take ciki. Kukan rayuka masu zalunci da ke son fita daga cikin kejin da aka kulle su, su tashi zuwa sararin sama mai shuɗi da fukafukai masu 'yanci, ya bazu kamar tawada ja daga ƙarshen alƙalaminta.

Kukan nata ya gamu da tsananin suka da izgili. An nuna ta da yatsa a matsayin mai ra'ayoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi da ke girgiza tsarin da aka saba, kuma ta fuskanci kibau na zargi saboda ta taɓa haramtattun abubuwan al'umma. Duk da haka, ba ta durƙusa ba. Ko da a cikin wahalhalun rayuwa mai cike da ƙalubale, ba ta taɓa sakin igiyar bege ba. Ta ɗaga fitilar hankali sama, kuma ta yi amfani da ƙarfin ilimi, ta sanar da cewa mata ma suna da haƙƙin rayuwa mai daraja a matsayin ɗan adam, da murya mai ƙarfi ga kowa da kowa.

Ƙananan iri da ta shuka, bayan shekaru masu yawa, sun girma zuwa bishiya mai girma da ta rufe duniya a yau. A ƙarƙashin sunan 'yanci, daidaito, da haƙƙin ɗan adam, ruhinta yana raye tare da mu har yanzu. Kukan nata mai jarumtaka, wanda ya karya sarƙoƙin tsoffin al'adu kuma ya rushe ganuwar zalunci, har yanzu yana zama kambu ga zamaninmu, yana haskaka hanyar bege zuwa ga duniya mafi kyau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata jarumar mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin ɗan adam wacce ta sadaukar da rayuwarta don 'yancin baƙaƙe da 'yancin mata na zaɓe a Philadelphia a ƙarni na 18.
key_achievements: Jagoranci a fafutukar 'yantar da bayi baƙaƙe
Matsayin majagaba a fafutukar neman 'yancin mata na zaɓe
Yaɗa darajar daidaito da 'yancin ɗan adam
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kiran da ta yi don daidaito da 'yanci ya wuce zamani kuma yana ci gaba da zama fitila mai ba da ƙarfin hali da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa har zuwa yau.

lucretia-mott.epic:
Sautin raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi na Tekun Atlantika suna bugun tsoffin jiragen ruwa, kuma sarkar zalunci na ƙara a ƙarƙashin sararin samaniya mai launin toka na Philadelphia a ƙarni na 18, inda wutar adalci ta tashi a cikin zuciyar wata yarinya. A cikin addu'o'in Quakers masu tsanani, kamar yadda muryar mace ke gwagwarmaya don karya shiru da aka danne, ta yi baƙin ciki a gaban ganuwar da ba a gani. Ganin rayuka marasa adadi suna mutuwa cikin bauta, ciwon wasu ya zama wuƙa da ta soke zuciyarta, kuma ta karɓi gaskiyar wannan duniya mara adalci mai raɗaɗi da dukkan jikinta.

Idanu masu lura, zargi marasa murya sun danne tafiyarta, amma ruhun Lucretia Mott bai karye ba. A cikin kunnuwanta da kukan bayi baƙaƙe ke amsawa, da jin kukan damar da aka kulle saboda kawai mace ce, ta ci gaba da tafiya a hankali. Ko da a cikin gulma da izgili, tana tsaye ita kaɗai a kan hanya mai ban mamaki, ɗauke da inuwar waɗanda aka danne, ta goge muryar gaskiya da za ta yi wa duniya ihu. Sha'awar da take da ita ta karya sarƙoƙin zalunci ta ƙone zuciyarta.

Muryarta a kan dandalin yanzu tana tafe kamar hadari. Kukan neman 'yancin baƙaƙe, kukan neman 'yancin mata na zaɓe, sun wanke kaɗaicin da ke cikin kunnuwanta. Har sai gumi ya zubo mata kuma muryarta ta yi rauni, ba ta tsaya ba. Ta fito da tsaba na bege daga cikin laka na yanke kauna, kuma ta ɗaga tutar 'yanci daga cikin tokar zalunci. Ba tare da tsoron adawa da izgili marasa adadi ba, sai dai kiran ɗaukaka don mutuncin ɗan adam ne kawai ke sa zuciyarta ta buga.

Kogin lokaci yana gudana, kuma rubuce-rubucenta da suka rage a matsayin tsoffin tabo na tawada har yanzu suna raye. Kukan waɗanda aka zalunta ya ragu, kuma kukan da aka danne ya tashi a ranar, har yanzu yana amsawa a matsayin kaho da ke sanar da farkon sabuwar gwagwarmaya. Kiran ɗaukaka da ta yi don daidaito da 'yancin ɗan adam ya wuce shinge na zamani, kuma yana tsaye a gefenmu a matsayin fitila mara mutuwa wacce ke ba da ƙarfin hali da kwarin gwiwa ga rayuka marasa adadi har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marco Polo, mai binciken Venice, ya bincika Gabas kuma ya rubuta al'adun Daular Mongol, yana faɗaɗa musayar Gabas da Yamma da fahimtar duniyar da ba a sani ba.
key_achievements: Ya buɗe duniyar da ba a sani ba ta hanyar binciken Gabas
Ya rubuta wayewar Daular Mongol mai ban mamaki
Ya kafa tushen musayar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yamma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Yana motsa tunani game da duniyar da ba a sani ba, kuma ya kasance babban gadon ruhin ɗan adam wanda ke rubutawa koyaushe.

marco-polo.epic:
A lokacin da hazo mai kauri na Venice ke lulluɓe da tsoffin jiragen ruwa, kuma soyayyar jamhuriyar da ke raguwa ke ratsa tsoffin gine-ginen dutse, wata zuciya matashiya mai bin inuwar sirri ta Gabas ta yi ta shawagi a cikin iska mai zafi ta teku. A cikin tsoffin taswirori, da kallon mahaifinsa mai nauyi, da kuma raɗaɗin harsunan baƙi da ke yawo a kunnuwansa, ya ji farkon tafiyarsa. Sha'awar duniyar da ba a sani ba, wadda ke ɓoye a zurfin teku fiye da raƙuman ruwa masu haɗari, da kuma kaɗaici mai zafi da waɗanda suka bar ƙasarsu kawai ke iya ji, sun yi masa nauyi a kan matashin kafadarsa. Yana tsammanin kyawun ƙasashe baƙi da kuma tsananin wahalar da ke ɓoye a cikinsu, tafiyarsa ta riga ta wuce bincike kawai, ta zama gwaji mai gwada iyakar ruhin ɗan adam.

A ƙarshen hamada inda iska mai yashi mai launin zinariya ke ratsawa, a cikin zuciyar daular Mongol mai girma, ya fuskanci abubuwan gani da ko da fensir ba zai iya ɗauka ba. Darajar Khan da ke zaune a kan kursiyinsa, da hargitsin jakadu daga ƙasashe daban-daban, da kuma kyawun fadar da ke cike da dukiya marar adadi, duk wani babban mafarki ne da ke buɗe a gabansa. Amma a bayan wannan kyawun, akwai nishi na mutanen da aka zalunta da kuma inuwar mulkin kama-karya. A cikin tukunyar narke-narke mai girma inda al'adun Gabas da Yamma suka haɗu, ya ga sha'awar ɗan adam marar iyaka, da kuma ƙarfin hali na rayuwa da ke ci gaba da bunƙasa duk da haka. Cututtuka marasa sani da tsoron mutuwa sun yi ta yawo a kusa da shi, amma bai ajiye fensirinsa ba.

A daren da dubban fitilu ke haskawa, ƙarƙashin taurari marasa sani, ya motsa fensirinsa yana kewar gida. Rawar mata masu rawa sanye da jajayen rigunan siliki, da ƙamshin kayan yaji mai daɗi, har ma da sanyin lambunan da aka yi da jade, duk sun rayu a cikin zuciyarsa. Amma a lokaci guda, wata kewar da ba za a manta ba ta ratsa zuciyarsa. Lokacin da ya ɓata a cikin doguwar tafiya, fuskar mahaifinsa da ta tsufa, da kuma rashin begen cewa watakila ba zai taɓa komawa ba, sun yi masa nauyi a kan fensirinsa. Ya rubuta. Farin ciki na ɗan lokaci da baƙin ciki na har abada, duk abin da ya faru.

Bayan shekaru masu yawa, labarinsa ya sake rayuwa a cikin tsofaffin shafukan littafi. Sawunsa da ya ratsa taswirori yanzu ya kai har zuwa ɗayan gefen duniya, yana kawo fahimta da mamaki ga al'adun baƙi. Sirrin Gabas da ya haɗa da fensirinsa ya wuce tazara ta lokaci, yana motsa tunaninmu a yau kuma yana ƙarfafa mu mu shiga duniyar da ba a sani ba. Ƙarfin halinsa na rubutawa, ba tare da rasa bege ba a cikin kaɗaici da rashin bege, har yanzu yana kaiwa ko'ina a duniya, yana zama abin ƙarfafawa ga waɗanda ke buɗe sababbin hanyoyi. Sunan Marco Polo ba kawai tsohon labari ba ne, amma yana rayuwa a matsayin babban gadon ruhin ɗan adam wanda ke fuskantar duniya koyaushe kuma yana rubutawa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Vasco da Gama ya kasance mai bincike na Portugal a ƙarshen karni na 15, wanda ya buɗe hanyar teku daga Turai zuwa Indiya, kuma ya buɗe Zamanin Bincike.
key_achievements: Farkon buɗe hanyar teku tsakanin Turai da Indiya
Kafa harsashin daular teku ta Portugal
Fara mamayar kasuwancin kayan yaji na Tekun Indiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tafiye-tafiyensa sun canza yanayin kasuwancin duniya kuma sun buɗe sabon babi a musayar Gabas da Yamma, amma kuma sun buɗe hanyar mulkin mallaka.

vasco-da-gama.epic:
Vasco da Gama, wani mai bincike kuma mai tukin jirgin ruwa na Portugal, an haife shi a kusan 1460 (ko kusan 1469), ya bayyana a ƙarshen karni na 15 lokacin da Turai ke matuƙar neman sabbin hanyoyin kasuwanci ta teku saboda mamayar da Daular Usmaniyya ta yi wa kasuwancin gabas. Musamman ma, Portugal tana da babban buri na buɗe hanyar zuwa Indiya tun zamanin Yarima Henry Mai Bincike, ta hanyar binciken gabar yammacin Afirka. An haife shi a Sines, kudu maso yammacin Portugal, a cikin gidan sarauta, tun yana yaro, ya saba da ayyukan teku, ya sami gogewar soja, kuma ya haɓaka fasahar tukin jirgin ruwa da jagoranci. A lokacin, Sarki Manuel I na Portugal yana neman wanda zai buɗe hanyar ƙarshe zuwa Indiya bayan Bartolomeu Dias ya gano Cape of Good Hope. A cikin wannan buƙatar ta tarihi, an ƙaddara Da Gama ya ɗauki wannan aikin mai girma. Tafiyarsa ba kawai binciken yanki ba ce, amma zai zama wani muhimmin al'amari da zai buɗe sabon tsarin duniya wanda zai haɗa Turai da Asiya kai tsaye.

A ranar 8 ga Yuli, 1497, Vasco da Gama, bisa umarnin Sarki Manuel I na Portugal, ya bar Lisbon don fara tafiyarsa ta farko mai tarihi zuwa Indiya. Jiragen ruwansa sun fara tafiya mai haɗari, suna tsallaka Tekun Atlantika da ba a sani ba, suna kewaye Cape of Good Hope, kuma suna tafiya arewa tare da gabar tekun Gabashin Afirka. Wannan tafiya ta cika da gwaje-gwaje masu yawa: guguwa mai tsanani, mutuwar ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa da yawa daga cutar scurvy, ƙarancin abinci, da yunƙurin tawaye saboda rashin gamsuwa na ma'aikatan jirgin. Amma Da Gama ya shawo kan waɗannan matsalolin da jagoranci mai ƙarfi da jajircewa marar yankewa, kuma ya ci gaba da tafiya. A ƙarshe, a ranar 20 ga Mayu, 1498, jiragen ruwansa sun isa Calicut (Kozhikode) a gabar yammacin Indiya, inda suka kammala tafiya ta farko mai nasara daga Turai zuwa Indiya ta teku. Wannan ya buɗe hanyar ga Turai don samun damar kai tsaye ga kayan yaji da masaku masu yawa na Asiya, amma a Indiya, sun fuskanci sabbin rikice-rikice: adawa daga 'yan kasuwar Larabawa da wahalar tattaunawar kasuwanci da sarkin yankin, Zamorin.

Duk da rikice-rikicen farko a Indiya, Vasco da Gama ya dawo Portugal a watan Satumba na 1499 kuma an tarbe shi a matsayin gwarzo. Nasararsa ta kawo wa Portugal dukiya mai yawa da daraja, kuma Sarki Manuel I ya nemi ya mallaki kasuwancin kayan yaji na Indiya gaba ɗaya. Don haka, Da Gama ya jagoranci jiragen ruwa masu yawa na biyu zuwa Indiya a 1502. A wannan tafiyar, ya yi amfani da ƙarfi sosai don kafa ikon Portugal a Tekun Indiya. Ya kai hari kan jiragen ruwan kasuwanci na Larabawa a Tekun Indiya kuma ya yi ruwan bama-bamai a Calicut, yana ɗaukar matakan ramuwar gayya masu tsanani, yana mai tabbatar da ikon teku na Portugal. Waɗannan matakan tsauri sun taimaka wajen tabbatar da matsayin Portugal na musamman a hanyar kasuwancin Tekun Indiya, amma kuma sun nuna a fili gefen tashin hankali na mulkin mallaka na Turai. Daga baya ya zauna a Portugal na wani lokaci, sannan a 1524, an naɗa shi Mataimakin Sarki (Viceroy) na Indiya kuma ya sake tafiya Indiya, amma ya mutu a ranar 24 ga Disamba na wannan shekarar a Kochi, Indiya, mai yiwuwa daga cutar zazzabin cizon sauro. Rayuwarsa ta ƙunshi binciken duniya da ba a sani ba, gwagwarmayar kafa sabon tsarin kasuwanci, da cin nasara mai tsanani.

Tafiye-tafiyen Vasco da Gama sun yi tasiri mai zurfi a tarihin ɗan adam. Ta hanyar buɗe hanyar teku kai tsaye tsakanin Turai da Asiya, ya canza gaba ɗaya yanayin kasuwancin Gabas da Yamma wanda ya wuce ta Gabas ta Tsakiya tsawon ƙarnuka. Wannan ya kafa harsashin ginin da Portugal ta yi na daular teku mai ƙarfi kuma ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wajen samar da tsarin tattalin arzikin duniya mai tsakiya a Turai. Sunansa ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar Zamanin Bincike, yana wakiltar ruhun ɗan adam na ci gaba da kalubalantar abin da ba a sani ba. Duk da haka, mulkin mallaka da mamayar kasuwanci mai tashin hankali da tafiye-tafiyensa suka kawo har yanzu ana kimanta su da rikitarwa a yau. Ya kasance babban mai bincike kuma majagaba na mulkin mallaka, wani mutum wanda ya buɗe hanyar rikicin wayewar Gabas da Yamma. Nasarorinsa, tare da na sauran masu bincike na Zamanin Bincike kamar Christopher Columbus da Ferdinand Magellan, sun taimaka wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin yanki na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai binciken Portugal wanda ya kalubalanci abin da ba zai yiwu ba, ya buɗe hanyar zagayawa duniya ta farko ga ɗan adam, amma ya mutu a Philippines.
key_achievements: Ya fara kuma ya jagoranci tafiyar zagayawa duniya ta farko ga ɗan adam.
Ya buɗe sabuwar hanyar teku da ta ratsa Tekun Atlantika da Tekun Pasifik.
Ya ba da gudummawa wajen tabbatar da siffar duniya mai zagaye ta hanyar gwaji.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Jaruntakarsa ta bayyana sirrin duniya mai zagaye kuma ta ƙarfafa ruhun bincike na ɗan adam, ya zama alama marar mutuwa da ta buɗe sabon zamani.

ferdinand-magellan.epic:
A wata rana da rana mai zinariya ta Zamanin Bincike ke ratsa kunnuwa, kuma iska mai gishiri ke hura tsoffin jiragen ruwa, zuciyar wani mutum ta fara bugawa zuwa ga abin da ba zai yiwu ba a cikin zaluncin Portugal da rashin kulawar sarki. Tekun Atlantika mai tsananin guguwa ya kai shi ga bakin teku marar sani, inda labarin kayan yaji da zinariya na Gabas suka kama idanunsa, kuma tsofaffin taswirori suka rada masa burinsa. Ko da yake daraja da aka rasa, girman kai da aka taka, da inuwar shakku da kishi da ke ci gaba da damunsa sun yi masa doguwar inuwa, bai tsaya ba. Maimakon haka, a cikin wannan duhu, ya ƙarfafa nufinsa kamar takobin ƙarfe, kuma sha'awar babban teku ta mamaye ruhinsa.

Lokacin da ya tunkari labulen shudi na farko, wanda har yanzu ba a kira shi Tekun Pasifik ba, akwai fuskoki marasa sani a gefensa, cike da damuwa da bege. A cikin yunwa da cututtuka, da kuma barazanar tawaye a jirgin ruwa, ya zama tsibiri mai kadaici. Yana bin taurari marasa sani, yana fama da yunwa da ƙishirwa na kwanaki, amma bai taɓa barin burinsa na duniya marar zane ba. Yana kallon sararin sama da idanu jajaye, ya shafe dare marasa adadi, kuma ko da yake raƙuman takaici da bege sun mamaye shi, bai taɓa ɗaga anka ba. Gunaguni na abokan aikinsa sun yi ta maimaitawa a kunnuwansa, amma bugun zuciyarsa ya ji rada na babban teku kawai.

A ƙarƙashin rana mai zafi na Philippines, a ƙasar da murna da cin amana na kabilu marasa sani suka haɗu, sunansa ya zama mai ƙarfi. Jini ja ya haɗu da ƙura, kuma iyakokin duniya da ya sani sun rushe. Ya ɗanɗana ɗan lokaci na ɗaukaka, tare da fahimtar cewa ya zagaya babban duniyar Duniya daga gabas zuwa yamma. Amma kibiyoyin kwaɗayi da ƙiyayya ba su kauce masa ba, kuma ƙasar waje ta zama wurin hutawa kaɗai. A lokacin ƙarshensa mai ja-jajir, shin nahiyoyi da tekunan da ya taka da ratsa sun ratsa idanunsa, ko kuwa kawai nadama ce ta duniya marar sani da bai taɓa gani ba?

Jininsa ya shiga cikin tsibiri marar sani, amma hanyar da ya buɗe ba ta ɓace ba. Wannan shine mataki na farko da ɗan adam ya ɗauka don fuskantar sirrin duniya mai zagaye, lokacin da mafarkin da aka zana a taswira ya zama gaskiya. Ƙarnuka sun shude, kuma yanzu muna ci gaba zuwa duniya mai faɗi, muna bin hanyar teku da jaruntakarsa ta buɗe. Sunansa yanzu ya wuce shafin tarihi kawai; ya zama alama marar mutuwa na ruhun ɗan adam mai ci gaba da kalubale, yana haifar da raƙuman ruwa har abada a cikin zukatanmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Cornelius Vanderbilt ya kasance ɗan kasuwa kuma mai ba da agaji wanda ya fara kasuwancin jigilar ruwa da layin dogo a Amurka a karni na 19, yana tara dukiya mai yawa.
key_achievements: Faɗaɗa kasuwancin jirgin ruwa mai tururi da mamaye masana'antar jigilar ruwa.
Haɗa manyan kamfanonin layin dogo don gina daular layin dogo.
Ba da gudummawa ga ayyukan agaji, gami da kafa Jami'ar Vanderbilt.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin alamar juyin juya halin masana'antu na Amurka kuma mutumin da ya kafa harsashin jari-hujja na zamani, kuma gadonsa yana ci gaba har yau.

cornelius-vanderbilt.epic:
