Wannan mataki mai ban mamaki ya girgiza al'ummar Masar a lokacin, amma ta ci gaba da kafa ikonta ta hanyar jaddada cewa ita mai mulki ce ta nufin Allah.

Mulkinta ya dauki kimanin shekaru 22, kuma ana daukar wannan lokacin a matsayin daya daga cikin zamanin zinariya na Sabuwar Masarautar Masar. Ta fi mayar da hankali kan harkokin cikin gida da wadata tattalin arziki fiye da cin nasarar soja. Musamman, babban balaguron kasuwanci zuwa 'Punt', wanda ya kasance muhimmin abokin ciniki na Masar ta dā, yana daya daga cikin shahararrun nasarorinta. Balaguron Punt ya kawo kayayyaki masu daraja kamar turare, mur, hauren giwa, itacen baƙi, da zinariya zuwa Masar, wanda ya farfado da tattalin arzikin kasa sosai, kuma ya taimaka wajen farfado da harkokin kasuwanci na Masar da kuma daukaka matsayinta na kasa da kasa. Bugu da kari, Hatshepsut ta gudanar da manyan ayyukan gine-gine masu ban sha'awa a duk fadin Masar. Daga cikin shahararrun gine-ginenta akwai 'Haɗin Haikali na Deir el-Bahari' da ke yammacin Thebes. Wannan haikali wani babban aiki ne na fasahar gine-gine, wanda aka yi masa ado da matakala masu hawa da sassaka-sassaka masu kyau, yana nuna kololuwar fasahar gine-gine ta Masar a lokacin mulkinta. A Haikali na Karnak, ta gina manyan obelisks don sadaukarwa ga alloli, tana nuna ikonta na allahntaka. Wadannan gine-gine sun tabbatar da ikonta na mulki a zahiri, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban al'adu da fasahar Masar.

Bayan mutuwar Hatshepsut, Thutmose III, wanda ya kasance dan cikinta kuma mai mulki tare da ita, ya zama Fir'auna guda daya. Bayan mutuwarta, an goge ko lalata sunan Hatshepsut da hotunanta a kan abubuwan tarihi da yawa. Ana kyautata zaton cewa wannan wani yunkuri ne na Thutmose III don karfafa halaccin mulkinsa da kuma tabbatar da zuriyar Fir'aunoni maza. Saboda haka, an manta da ita a tarihi na dogon lokaci, har sai da aka sake gano ta ta hanyar binciken kayan tarihi a karni na 19. A yau, ana tuna Hatshepsut a matsayin daya daga cikin mata masu mulki mafi karfi da nasara a tarihin Masar ta dā. Mulkinta na zaman lafiya, wadata tattalin arziki, da kuma gadon gine-gine maras mutuwa kamar Haikali na Deir el-Bahari, ana gane darajarsu a duk tsawon zamani. Rayuwarta tana kwatanta da sauran sarauniyoyi masu karfi na Masar ta dā, kamar Cleopatra VII da Nefertiti, kuma ta kasance muhimmin misali don bincika damammaki da iyakokin jagorancin mata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Heraclitus masanin falsafa ne na Girka ta dā kafin Socrates, wanda ya kafa tushen falsafar Yamma ta hanyar ra'ayoyin canji da logos.
key_achievements: Majagaba na falsafar Girka ta dā kafin Socrates
Jaddada ci gaba da canji da gudana na dukkan abubuwa
Gabatar da ra'ayin 'logos' a matsayin ka'idar duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai a falsafar Yamma ta baya, yana gabatar da tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da wanzuwa da canji.

heraclitus.epic:
Heraclitus (kimanin 535 K.Z. – kimanin 475 K.Z.) wani masanin falsafa ne na Girka ta dā, wanda ake kira masanin falsafa kafin Socrates, an haife shi a Ephesus a lokacin wani zamani mai cike da rudani, lokacin da mutane suka fara bincike na hankali, suna barin ra'ayoyin duniya na tatsuniyoyi. Yankin Ionia da ke bakin tekun Aegean a lokacin ya kasance mahadar wayewar Bahar Rum kuma cibiyar ilimi inda sabbin ra'ayoyi ke fitowa. Ya girma a cikin wannan yanayi, bai gamsu da tatsuniyoyi na gargajiya da bayanan addini da suka mamaye duniya ba, sai ya sadaukar da kansa ga binciken asalin abubuwa duka da kuma yanayin canji. A lokacin, al'ummar Girka tana fuskantar ci gaban siyasa da al'adu mai ƙarfi, tare da birane-jihohi (polis) a matsayin cibiyoyinsu, kuma an fara gabatar da tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi da kuma wanzuwar ɗan adam. A cikin wannan yanayin zamani, Heraclitus ya shiga cikin motsin majagaba na masana falsafa na farko waɗanda suka nemi ka'idodin duniya da ke wanzu bayan abubuwan da ake gani, kuma ya buɗe wani muhimmin shafi a tarihin falsafar Yamma. Fitowarsa ba kawai bayyanar mutum ɗaya ba ce, amma wani alama ce da ke nuna cewa hankalin ɗan adam ya fara neman sabbin hanyoyin fahimtar duniya.

A lokacin, masana falsafa kafin Socrates sun mai da hankali kan binciken asalin kwayar halitta ta sararin samaniya, wato 'arche'. Heraclitus ma, a cikin wannan yanayin ilimi, ya haɓaka tunaninsa na musamman kuma ya nemi zurfin fahimta game da yanayin duniya. Ya gabatar da wani ra'ayi daban da sauran masu tunani na zamaninsa waɗanda suka nemi tsari mara canzawa a cikin abubuwan da ke canzawa koyaushe, yana mai da hankali kan asalin kuzarin wanzuwa da kuma ci gaba da tsarin halitta da lalacewa. Bincikensa na falsafa ya wuce neman asalin abu kawai, ya yi ƙoƙarin bayyana ka'idodin jituwa da adawa a duniya ta hanyar ra'ayin 'logos', wato ka'idar duniya da ke ratsa dukkan abubuwa. Wannan ya kasance babban ƙalubale ga ra'ayin duniya mai tsayayye da aka saba da shi ga Girkawa a lokacin, kuma tunaninsa ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya haifar da muhawara mai zurfi da tunani a tsakanin masana na zamaninsa. Ta hanyar fahimtarsa cewa komai a duniya yana canzawa kuma yana gudana koyaushe, ya buɗe sabon fagen falsafa wanda ke neman fahimtar gaskiya a cikin tsari da dangantaka, maimakon a cikin abubuwa masu tsayayye.

Wannan zurfin tunani na Heraclitus ya sa mutane da yawa a zamaninsa su ga yana da wuyar fahimta. Rubuce-rubucensa sun kasance gajeru, cike da ma'ana, kuma wani lokaci cike da maganganu masu ban mamaki, wanda ya sa aka ba shi laƙabin 'Mai Duhu' ko 'Mai Sirri'. Ya ɗauki matsayi mai mahimmanci game da ilimin sama-sama na jama'a da ra'ayoyin gargajiya, kuma ya yi imani cewa za a iya samun hikima ta gaskiya ta hanyar zurfin tunani da bincike marar yankewa kawai. Wannan halinsa ya yi karo da manyan ra'ayoyin al'ummar lokacin, kuma yana yiwuwa ya sa ya bi hanyar masanin falsafa mai kaɗaici. Ya bar rubuce-rubuce da ke ɗauke da fahimtarsa ta falsafa, amma a yau, guntun maganganu ne kawai suka rage, wanda ke sa fahimtar tunaninsa gaba ɗaya ya zama da wahala. Duk da haka, bai taɓa yin watsi da imaninsa ba, kuma ya ci gaba da haɓaka fassararsa ta musamman game da yanayin duniya. Tunaninsa ba kawai jerin ilimi ba ne, amma ya gabatar da tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da yadda ɗan adam ke fahimtar duniya, wanda ke nuna zurfin wahalar ilimi da gwagwarmayar da ya fuskanta.

Falsafar Heraclitus ta yi tasiri sosai a tarihin tunanin Yamma ko da bayan mutuwarsa. Tunaninsa ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana falsafa na Girka na baya kamar Plato da Stoics, kuma musamman fahimtarsa cewa komai yana canzawa koyaushe ya zama ɗaya daga cikin muhimman batutuwa a cikin metaphysics na Yamma. Ta hanyar gabatar da sabon tsarin neman gaskiya a cikin tsari da dangantaka maimakon a cikin abubuwa masu tsayayye, ya ci gaba da gabatar da tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da wanzuwa da canji. Rubuce-rubucensa guntu-guntu sun kasance batun fassara da muhawara ga masana da masu tunani da yawa har zuwa yau, dubban shekaru bayan haka, kuma ana sake nazarin tunaninsa a fannoni daban-daban kamar falsafar zamani, kimiyya, da fasaha. Ko da yake Heraclitus masanin falsafa ne na Girka ta dā, tunaninsa ya wuce lokaci, yana ba da zurfin tunani game da yadda ɗan adam ke fahimtar duniya, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen falsafar Yamma tare da sauran masana falsafa na zamaninsa kamar Parmenides.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Pythagoras masanin falsafa ne kuma masanin lissafi na tsohuwar Girka, wanda ya kafa makarantar Pythagorean kuma ya bincika ainihin lambobi.
key_achievements: Gudummawa ga tabbatar da ka'idar Pythagoras
Kafawa da gudanar da makarantar Pythagorean
Gano ka'idodin lambobi na kiɗa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa na lissafi da falsafa sun zama tushen kimiyya da falsafa ta Yamma, kuma suna ci gaba da yin tasiri har zuwa zamani.

pythagoras.epic:
Pythagoras (kimanin 570 K.Z. – kimanin 495 K.Z.) ya kasance masanin falsafa mai tasiri, masanin lissafi, kuma wanda ya kafa makarantar Pythagorean a tsohuwar Girka. Karni na 6 K.Z., lokacin da aka haife shi, ya kasance lokaci mai cike da rudani inda wayewar Aegean ke bunƙasa, kuma tunani mai ma'ana da binciken kimiyya ke fara fitowa a yankin Ionia. An haife shi a tsibirin Samos da ke gabar tekun Asiya Ƙarama, ɗan wani attajiri ne, Pythagoras ya sami ilimi daga manyan masana na zamaninsa tun yana yaro, yana haɓaka sha'awar ilimi. Labari ya nuna cewa ya yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa gabas, kamar Masar da Babila, inda ya fuskanci al'adu da ilimi daban-daban, kuma musamman ya koyi ilimin lissafi (geometry), ilimin taurari (astronomy), da ilimin asiri daga firistocin Masar. Waɗannan gogewa masu yawa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da nasa ra'ayin falsafa na musamman, inda ya nemi tushen ka'idodin duniya a cikin lambobi da jituwa, fiye da samun ilimi kawai. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta zama tushen tunani na musamman na makarantar da zai kafa daga baya, kuma yana shirin buɗe sabon babi a cikin yanayin ilimi na tsohuwar duniya.

Kimanin 530 K.Z., Pythagoras ya ƙaura zuwa Croton, wani yanki na Girka a kudancin Italiya, don guje wa rikicin siyasa, inda ya fuskanci wani muhimmin canji a rayuwarsa. A nan ya kafa makarantar Pythagorean, wadda ta wuce al'ummar ilimi kawai. Makarantar Pythagorean ta kasance al'ummar addini da falsafa, bisa ga ƙa'idodin ɗabi'a masu tsauri da ra'ayin sake haihuwar rai (metempsychosis). Membobin makarantar sun mallaki dukiya tare, sun yi cin ganyayyaki, kuma sun jaddada horon ruhaniya ta hanyar shiru da tunani. Sun nemi tushen dukkan abubuwa a cikin lambobi, kuma sun yi ƙoƙarin bayyana tsari da jituwar sararin samaniya ta hanyar rabo na lambobi. Musamman, ka'idar Pythagoras (a² + b² = c²), wadda ke nuna dangantakar da ke tsakanin bangarorin uku na alwatika mai kusurwa dama, an san cewa ko dai shi da kansa ya tabbatar da ita ko kuma makarantarsa ce ta tsara ta, kuma wannan ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga ci gaban lissafi na tsohuwar duniya. Duk da haka, rufin asiri da tasiri mai ƙarfi na makarantar sun zama tushen rikici a cikin al'ummar Croton, kuma wannan ya zama gwaji mai barazana ga wanzuwar makarantar daga baya.

Yayin da tasirin makarantar Pythagorean ya karu, yanayin siyasa na Croton ya zama marar tabbas. Kimanin 510 K.Z., wata tawaye ta jama'a ta faru don nuna adawa ga shigar makarantar Pythagorean cikin siyasa da kuma halayenta na son kai. Wannan lamari, wanda aka fi sani da 'Tawayen Cylon', ya kasance gwaji mai tsanani ga makarantar Pythagorean. An lalata gine-ginen makarantar, an kashe yawancin membobinta, kuma an ce Pythagoras da kansa ya mutu a wannan lokacin ko kuma ya gudu zuwa Metapontum inda ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa. Ko da yake wannan lamari ya haifar da rushewar makarantar Pythagorean a zahiri, ra'ayoyinsa sun bazu ko'ina. Musamman, ga makarantar Pythagorean da ke ƙoƙarin bayyana komai da lambobi, gano lambobi marasa ma'ana (irrational numbers) ya zama babban rikici na ciki kuma a lokaci guda wata dama ce ta ci gaban ilimi. Wannan ya kalubalanci imani na gargajiya cewa za a iya bayyana cikakkiyar jituwar sararin samaniya ta hanyar lambobi kawai, amma a maimakon haka, ya bayyana rikitarwa da zurfin duniyar lambobi, yana faɗaɗa iyakokin tunanin lissafi. Duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, koyarwar Pythagoras ta ci gaba ta hannun almajiransa, kuma ra'ayoyinsa sun bazu ko'ina cikin tsohuwar Girka, suna ba da babban wahayi ga masana falsafa na gaba.

Gadon Pythagoras ya yi tasiri sosai ga wayewar ɗan adam, tun daga tsohuwar duniya har zuwa zamani. Ka'idar Pythagoras, wadda aka sanya masa suna, ita ce dokar lissafi ta asali da ɗalibai a duk faɗin duniya ke koyo a yau, kuma ana amfani da ita a matsayin kayan aiki mai mahimmanci a fannoni daban-daban kamar gine-gine da injiniyanci. Rabon lambobi na kiɗa da ya gano ya kafa tushen ka'idar kiɗa ta Yamma, kuma ƙoƙarinsa na bayyana jituwar sararin samaniya ta hanyar lambobi ya ba da wahayi ga masana kimiyya kamar Copernicus da Kepler, yana zama tushen tunani na juyin juya halin kimiyya na zamani. Koyarwar ɗabi'a da addini ta makarantar Pythagorean ta shiga cikin tunanin masana falsafa na gaba kamar Plato, kuma ra'ayin sake haihuwar rai ya zama wani muhimmin rafi a cikin metaphysics na Yamma. Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga masana falsafa na gaba kamar Plato, kuma tare da sauran masu tunani na zamanin kafin Socrates, ya kafa tushen tarihin tunani na Yamma. Pythagoras ana tunawa da shi ba kawai a matsayin masanin lissafi ba, amma a matsayin mai tunani marar mutuwa wanda ya gabatar da sabon tsarin fahimtar sararin samaniya da ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ramesses II Fir'auna ne na Masar a zamanin Sabuwar Masarautar, wanda ya jagoranci daular zuwa zamanin zinariya ta hanyar Yakin Kadesh da manyan ayyukan gine-gine.
key_achievements: Ya yi Yakin Kadesh da Hittites
Ya sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya ta farko a duniya
Manyan gine-gine kamar Abu Simbel
fact_box.legacy_statement: Manyan gine-ginensa har yau suna ba da shaida ga girman wayewar tsohuwar Masar.

ramesses-ii.epic:
Ramesses II (ya yi mulki kimanin 1279-1213 K.Z.) an tuna shi a matsayin Fir'auna na uku na Daular 19 ta Sabuwar Masarautar Tsohuwar Masar, kuma daya daga cikin manyan sarakuna da suka taba yin mulki a tarihin Masar. Haihuwarsa ta zo daidai da wani lokaci mai cike da tarihi, lokacin da Masar ke karfafa matsayinta na daula mai girma kuma tana fuskantar gasa mai tsanani daga manyan kasashe makwabta, kamar yadda taurari ke fuskantar juna a sararin samaniya. An haife shi ga mahaifinsa Seti I da Sarauniya Tuya, tun yana yaro ya sami tsauraran ilimin sarauta, wanda ya gina masa halayen shugabanci na gaba, kamar yadda aka gina ginin haikali mai tsarki. Musamman ma, tun yana dan kimanin shekaru 14, an riga an nada shi Yarima Regent, yana raka mahaifinsa a ayyukan soja don samun kwarewar yaki, wanda ya zama tushen ci gabansa a matsayin babban jarumi kuma mai dabarun yaki, wanda zai jagoranci sojojin Masar zuwa nasara. A kasar da yalwar Kogin Nilu ke gudana kamar jinin rayuwa, da tsananin hamada ke gwada juriya, Ramesses II ya shirya hawa karagar mulki da babban nauyin gadon daukakar daular da kuma bude sabon zamani, kamar yadda rana ke fitowa bayan duhu. Zamaninsa zai zama zamanin zinariya, ba kawai gado ba, amma lokacin da za a nuna karfin Masar da al'adunta ga duniya baki daya, kamar yadda tauraro mai haske ke haskaka sararin samaniya.

Kimanin 1279 K.Z., Ramesses II ya hau karagar mulkin Masar, kuma babban kalubalen farkon mulkinsa shine gwagwarmayar neman iko da daular Hittite mai karfi a arewa, wacce ke tsaye kamar katanga mai girma. Kasashen biyu sun yi takara kan ikon yankin Siriya, kuma wannan ya kai kololuwa a **Yakin Kadesh** da aka yi a bakin Kogin Orontes a Siriya kimanin 1274 K.Z., wanda ya girgiza kasa da sama. Wannan yaki yana daya daga cikin manyan yakokin karusai da aka rubuta dalla-dalla a tsohuwar duniya, inda Ramesses II ya jagoranci sojojinsa da kansa, yana nuna jaruntaka irin ta zaki, kuma ya yi fice a fagen daga. Duk Masar da Hittites sun yi ikirarin nasara, amma a zahiri ya kasance kusan daidaito na dabaru, kamar yadda igiyoyi biyu masu karfi suka ja juna ba tare da wanda ya ci nasara ba, wanda ya sa suka fahimci iyakokin dogon yakin gajiya da zai iya cinye dukkan bangarorin. Ko da bayan Yakin Kadesh, rikice-rikice sun ci gaba, amma Ramesses II, da hikimarsa ta sarki, ya nemi hanyoyin diflomasiyya kuma ya sanya hannu kan **Yarjejeniyar Zaman Lafiya ta Hittite** tare da Hattusili III na Hittite kimanin 1258 K.Z., wanda ya zama hasken bege a cikin duhun yaki. Wannan yarjejeniya ita ce yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya ta kasa da kasa ta farko da aka rubuta a tarihi, wacce ta kawo karshen dogon gaba tsakanin kasashen biyu, kamar yadda aka rufe littafin yaki, kuma ta kawo zaman lafiya mai dorewa na shekaru da yawa. Wannan ya kasance wani muhimmin juyi da ya tabbatar da cewa Ramesses II ba kawai sarkin jarumi ba ne, amma kuma babban jami'in diflomasiyya ne, wanda ya fi karfin takobi da alkalami.

Baya ga nasarorin soja da diflomasiyya, mulkin Ramesses II ya haskaka da ayyukan gine-gine masu girma da ba a taba gani ba, wanda ya nuna ikonsa kamar yadda taurari ke nuna haskensu. Ya gina haikali da abubuwan tarihi marasa adadi a duk faɗin Masar, yana nuna ikonsa da tsarkakarsa ga duniya. Musamman ma, **Haikan Abu Simbel** da aka gina a saman Kogin Nilu wani gini ne mai alama inda manyan sassakarsa ke tunawa da daukakar Fir'auna har abada, kuma **Ramesseum**, haikalinsa na jana'iza da aka gina a Thebes, shima yana alfahari da sassaka masu kyau da girma mai ban mamaki, kamar yadda dutse mai daraja ke nuna kyawunsa. Ya kuma ba da gudummawa sosai ga fadada haikalin Karnak da Luxor, kuma ya gina sabon babban birni, **Pi-Ramesses**, a gabashin yankin Kogin Nilu, yana mai da shi cibiyar gudanarwa da soja ta daular, kamar yadda zuciya ke bugawa ga jiki. Wadannan ayyukan gine-gine ba kawai nasarorin fasaha ba ne, amma kuma wata hanya ce mai karfi ta sanar da wadata da kwanciyar hankali na daular, da kuma ikon Fir'auna mai tsarki, a ciki da waje, kamar yadda sarki ke sanar da dokokinsa. A lokacin mulkinsa mai tsawo na shekaru 66, Ramesses II ya daidaita iyakokin Masar, ya kiyaye zaman lafiya na ciki, kuma ya jagoranci daular zuwa zamanin zinariya, kamar yadda mai kiwo ke jagorantar garkensa. Ko da yake ya fuskanci gwaji na mutuwar yarima da yawa a lokacin mulkinsa mai tsawo, ya ci gaba da mulkin daular ba tare da girgiza ba, yana barin gado mai dorewa ga tsararraki masu zuwa, kamar yadda itace mai girma ke barin inuwa mai dorewa.

Bayan mutuwarsa, Ramesses II ya sami lakabin 'Ramesses Mai Girma' kuma an girmama shi a matsayin daya daga cikin manyan Fir'auna a tarihin Masar, wanda sunansa ya daukaka har abada. Manyan gine-ginensa, har zuwa yau bayan dubban shekaru, suna ba da shaida ga girma da fasahar wayewar tsohuwar Masar, suna jawo sha'awar duniya baki daya, kamar yadda hasken rana ke jawo hankalin kowa. Musamman ma, Haikan Abu Simbel an motsa shi kuma an adana shi ta hanyar kokarin kasa da kasa daga barazanar nutsewa saboda gina Dam din Aswan a shekarun 1960, wanda ke nuna muhimmancin gadonsa har zuwa zamanin yau, kamar yadda taska mai daraja ke ci gaba da haskaka. Gawarsa da aka gano a 1881 ta kuma samar da bayanai masu mahimmanci don nazarin fasahar yin gawa ta tsohuwar Masar da yanayin lafiyar sarauta, kamar yadda littafi mai tsarki ke bayyana asirai. Mulkin Ramesses II yana nuna kololuwar daular Masar, kuma nasarorin da ya samu a fannin soja, diflomasiyya, da gine-gine sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga Fir'auna na gaba, kuma ana daukarsa a matsayin wanda ya nuna zamanin zinariya na daular Masar tare da sauran manyan sarakunan da suka ci nasara kamar Thutmose III, kamar yadda taurari biyu masu haske ke haskaka sararin sama.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Diogenes masanin falsafa ne na tsohuwar Girka wanda ya ƙi girman kai na duniya, ya zauna a cikin ganga, kuma ya nemi 'yanci na ciki da rayuwa mai wadatar kai.
key_achievements: Ya ƙi wadata ta abin duniya kuma ya zauna a cikin ganga.
Ya nemi Alexander Mai Girma ya matsa daga hasken rana.
Ya jaddada darajar 'yanci na ciki da rayuwa mai wadatar kai.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rayuwarsa mai sauƙi da 'yanci har yau tana ba da zurfin tunani game da ainihin wadata da 'yanci.

diogenes.epic:
A ƙarni na huɗu kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa, a bakin tekun Aegean mai zurfin shuɗi, inda taguwar ruwa ke rawa, a tashar jiragen ruwa mai hasken rana ta tsohuwar birnin Sinope, kuɗaɗen azurfa sun riƙa fitowa kamar ruwan sama. A cikin wannan yanayi ne numfashin wani saurayi ya shiga ciki, sunansa Diogenes. Rai nasa, wanda ya yi burin goge hankalinsa mai kaifi don ya fuskanci girman kai da iko na duniya, ya shiga cikin guguwa mai ƙarfi tun lokacin da hannunsa ya taɓa jabun da aka haramta, kamar jirgin ruwa da aka yi wa fashi. Kamar an manta da ƙamshin gishiri na garinsu da ya bari, bayan ya yaga tsohuwar jirgi, ya taka matakai a kan hanyoyin Athens masu ƙura, yana marmarin sabon fahimta. A hannunsa babu komai sai tsohuwar riga ɗaya, a cikin zuciyarsa kuma, yunwa ce kawai da hasken taurari masu sanyi.

A tsakiyar kasuwar Athens mai cunkoso, a dandalin da gumakan alloli ke shiru, gidansa bango ne da ba a gani. Idanunsa sun yi kaifi, suna huda cikin abin rufe fuska na al'umma da alkawuran abin duniya marasa amfani, kuma a cikin tsohuwar ganga ta katako, ya yi wa ƙarya ta duniya dariya. Yana yawo a kan tituna da jikinsa a buɗe, ya yi ihu cewa abin da mutum ya kamata ya yi marmari da gaske ba bayyanar waje ba ne, sai dai gaskiya ta ciki da rayuwa mai wadatar kai. Yunwa da sanyi sun zama abokansa, kuma nuna yatsa na mutane ya ba shi sabon ƙarfin hali. A cikin duk wannan wahala da kunya, ruhinsa ya ƙara ƙarfi, yana tafiya a kan hanyar da ta yi kama da hikimar dabba.

Wata rana, wani matashi mai cin nasara sanye da jan rawani na Macedonia, ya tsaya a gabansa tare da sojoji masu yawa. “Shin har yanzu kana da nutsuwa haka bayan ka ga wannan babban Alexander? Zan iya ba ka komai, ka faɗi abin da kake so!” A ƙarƙashin hasken rana mai zafi, Diogenes ya rufe idanunsa na ɗan lokaci sannan ya buɗe su, ya amsa a hankali. “Kada ka toshe mini hasken rana, ka matsa daga nan.” A gaban mutumin da ke kan kololuwar burin da iko na babbar daula, ya tsare cikakken 'yancinsa ba tare da wani rawar jiki ba. Shirunsa yana da ƙarfi fiye da kowace yabo, kuma abubuwan duniya marasa amfani sun zama ƙura a ƙafafunsa.

Gwagwarmayarsa ta kaɗaici ta zo kamar taguwar ruwa, ta jika duniya. A cikin dauloli masu faɗuwa da dabi'u masu gurbata, rayuwar Diogenes ta ci gaba da raɗa cewa sauƙi shine ainihin wadata, kuma 'yanci daga duk wani takura shine ainihin 'yanci. Sunansa bai manta ba, yana rayuwa a cikin tsohuwar tukunya, a cikin ƙarfin halin tafiya a kan tituna tsirara, a cikin marmarin hasken rana mai sauƙi. Har yau, mutane da yawa suna tsayawa a gaban tambayoyinsa masu sauƙi amma masu zurfi, suna tunani game da abin da ke da muhimmanci da gaske, da kuma yadda za su rayu a matsayin ruhi mafi 'yanci.
diogenes.trials: [ha] Diogenes was exiled for counterfeiting coins, a significant hardship in his life. He faced misunderstanding and criticism from contemporaries for rejecting social conventions and honor, opting for extreme asceticism.
diogenes.overcoming: [ha] Diogenes turned his exile and social criticism into an opportunity to pursue freedom. He renounced all possessions and pursued inner virtue and self-sufficiency through a simple life, making his very existence a philosophical statement.

fact_box.one_line_summary: James Hutton masanin ilmin kasa ne na Scotland a karni na 18 wanda ya gabatar da ka'idar Uniformitarianism, ya kafa tushen ilmin kasa na zamani.
key_achievements: Gabatar da Ka'idar Uniformitarianism (canjin duniya a hankali)
Rubuta "Theory of the Earth" (tarin fahimtar ilmin kasa)
Gano Unconformity a Siccar Point (tabbatar da lokaci mai zurfi)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ka'idarsa ta zama tushe don fahimtar dogon tarihin duniya kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyyar duniya ta zamani.

james-hutton.epic:
James Hutton (1726-1797) masanin ilimin kasa ne kuma masanin falsafar halitta na Scotland a karni na 18, wanda ya bude sabon babi a kimiyyar duniya a cikin yanayin binciken ilimi na zamanin Haskakawa wanda ya mamaye Turai a lokacin. An haife shi a ranar 3 ga Yuni, 1726, a Edinburgh, Scotland, ɗan wani attajiri, ya nuna sha'awar abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi tun yana yaro. Ya fara karatun likitanci a Jami'ar Edinburgh, amma ba da daɗewa ba ya sami sha'awa mai zurfi a cikin ilmin sunadarai da ilmin ma'adanai, kuma ya yi karatu a wurare daban-daban a Turai, ciki har da Paris da Leiden, inda ya sami digiri na likitanci. Duk da haka, ainihin sha'awarsa ta kasance a cikin binciken ka'idodin asali na duniyar halitta, maimakon likitanci. Bayan ya dawo gida, ya shiga cikin gudanar da gona, inda ya fara lura da yadda kasa ke lalacewa da kuma yadda duwatsu ke samuwa, kuma ya fara yin tambaya game da ra'ayoyin da aka saba game da tarihin duniya. Kwarewarsa ta filin a wannan lokacin ta zama muhimmiyar tushe ga ka'idarsa ta ilmin kasa mai juyin juya hali daga baya.

Binciken ilmin kasa na Hutton ya fara ne da kalubale mai zurfi ga ka'idar cataclysms (catastrophism) wanda ya mamaye a lokacin. Ka'idar cataclysms ta yi iƙirarin cewa an kafa yanayin duniya ta hanyar manyan bala'o'i masu sauri da faruwa sau ɗaya, kamar ambaliyar Nuhu. Duk da haka, ta hanyar gudanar da aikin gona da kuma bincike mai zurfi a filin, Hutton ya gabatar da **Ka'idar Uniformitarianism**, yana mai cewa matakai na ilmin kasa kamar zaizayar kasa, tarawa, da hawan dutse da ke faruwa a yanzu a duniya sun yi aiki iri ɗaya a baya, kuma a hankali a kan dogon lokaci. Uniformitarianism an taƙaita shi da maganar 'yanzu shine mabuɗin baya', kuma yana jaddada cewa canje-canjen duniya sakamakon matakai ne masu jinkiri da ci gaba. Wannan wani ra'ayi ne mai juyin juya hali wanda ya nuna cewa shekarun duniya ba dubban shekaru ba ne kamar yadda Littafi Mai Tsarki ya nuna, amma ya wuce 'lokaci mai zurfi' wanda ba za a iya tunanin sa ba. A cikin 1785, ya gabatar da bincikensa a cikin littafinsa "Theory of the Earth" a Royal Society of Edinburgh, wanda ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar ilimi da addini a lokacin.

Ka'idar Uniformitarianism ta Hutton ta yi karo kai tsaye da ra'ayoyin addini da kimiyya na lokacin, kuma ta fuskanci suka da adawa mai yawa. Musamman, hujja ce da ba za ta iya dacewa da ra'ayin halitta ba wanda ya ga tarihin duniya a matsayin dubban shekaru. Bugu da ƙari, salon rubutunsa ya kasance mai wuyar fahimta da rikitarwa, wanda ya sa ya zama da wuya a sami fahimtar jama'a, kuma wannan ya zama cikas ga farkon yaɗuwar ka'idar. Duk da haka, Hutton bai karaya ba a cikin waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, kuma ya ci gaba da bincika ko'ina cikin Scotland don tattara shaidun ilmin kasa don tabbatar da ka'idarsa. Musamman, **unconformity** da aka gano a Siccar Point a gabar tekun gabashin Scotland a cikin 1788 ya zama muhimmiyar shaida da ke tabbatar da ka'idarsa ta Uniformitarianism da ra'ayin lokaci mai zurfi. Unconformity wuri ne inda yadudduka na duwatsu masu karkata a kusurwoyi daban-daban ke haɗuwa, yana nuna a sarari cewa akwai babban rata na lokaci tsakanin yadudduka biyu na duwatsu. Ta hanyar irin waɗannan bincike na filin, ka'idarsa ta fara samun karbuwa a hankali, kuma a cikin 1795, ya buga wani faɗaɗɗen bugu na "Theory of the Earth" a cikin littattafai biyu, yana bayyana hujjojinsa dalla-dalla da tsari.

Ka'idar Uniformitarianism ta James Hutton daga baya Charles Lyell ya ci gaba da kuma yaɗa ta, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga ka'idar juyin halitta ta Charles Darwin. Ka'idarsa ta zama muhimmiyar ka'ida da ke zama tushen kimiyyar duniya, kuma ta zama tushe mai mahimmanci don fahimtar dogon tarihin duniya da canje-canjen ta marasa iyaka. Hutton ya ga duniya a matsayin tsarin da ke ci gaba da zagayawa kamar halitta mai rai, kuma ana ɗaukar wannan a matsayin farkon ra'ayin kimiyyar tsarin duniya na zamani. Godiya ga aikinsa, ilmin kasa ya iya ci gaba zuwa wani fanni mai zaman kansa wanda ya dogara ga lura da gwaji da tunani na kimiyya, maimakon fassarar tauhidi. Har yau, masana ilmin kasa suna fassara tarihin duniya kuma suna hango makomarta bisa ga fahimtar Hutton, kuma gadonsa yana rubuce a kowane yanki na ƙasar da muke tsaye a kai. Ra'ayin Hutton na lokaci mai zurfi za a iya kwatanta shi da ayyukan sauran masana kimiyyar halitta na zamaninsa, saboda ya samar da wani juyin juya hali a cikin fahimtar tarihin duniya kamar yadda ka'idar juyin halitta ta Charles Darwin ta yi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Labarin Ernest Shackleton, mai bincike wanda ya nuna ruhun ɗan adam marar girgiza ta hanyar ceton abokan aikinsa a cikin matsanancin gwaji bayan nutsewar jirgin ruwa mai karya kankara a Antarctica.
key_achievements: Jagorancin balaguron jirgin ruwa mai karya kankara Endurance a Antarctica
Ceton dukkan abokan aiki a cikin matsanancin yanayin Antarctica
Buɗe hanyar rayuwa marar girgiza daga gidan yarin kankara
fact_box.legacy_statement: A matsayin alamar nufin ɗan adam wanda baya kasala a cikin matsanancin hali, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa na har abada ga waɗanda ke neman bege a cikin yanke kauna.

ernest-shackleton.epic:
A lokacin da hancin jirgin ruwa mai karya kankara Endurance ke ratsa cikin guntayen kankara masu turawa ba kakkautawa a zuciyar Antarctica mai daskarewa, sautin iska da ke fitowa daga bayan hazo mai kauri ba sautin yanayi ba ne kawai. Wannan shi ne farkon wani babban gwaji wanda har yanzu ba a ba shi suna ba, kuma alama ce ta wani zamani mai tasowa. Ernest Shackleton, sunansa ya riga ya yi shawagi kamar tuta a cikin iskar Antarctica mai sanyi, amma idanunsa sun fi kowace tuta kaɗaici, kuma sun ƙunshi duhu marar iyaka kamar yana ɗauke da babban nauyin kaddara shi kaɗai. Wani ɗan ƙaramin iri da ya fito daga ƙasar Corsica mai tsaunuka yanzu yana shirin yin tushe a ƙarshen duniya, a cikin hamadar da kankara ta rufe, don ƙirƙirar mu'ujiza.

A lokacin da jirgin Endurance, gidan yarin kankara mai ƙarfi, ke nishi a hankali yana nutsewa, a wannan lokacin na yanke kauna, zuciyar Ernest Shackleton ta ƙara ruruwa da zafi a cikin iska mai sanyi. Duk da sanyin da ke ratsa kashi, yunwa, da kuma raɗaɗin yanke kauna da ke yawo a kunnuwan abokan aikinsa, leɓunansa sun rufe sosai, kuma idanunsa sun riƙe wutar bege marar girgiza. A cikin wannan tafiya mai kusan ba zai yiwu ba zuwa ƙasa mai nisan ɗaruruwan kilomita, a cikin wannan caca mai haɗari, dole ne ya buɗe hanya wacce ba ta wanzu a taswira. Tafiyarsa ba tafiya ce a kan kankara ba, sai dai babban tattakin nufin da ke gwada iyakokin ruhin ɗan adam.

A ƙarshen doguwar tafiya mai zafi, a bakin tekun Landspit Island da ba a sani ba wanda suka isa a ƙarshe, yayin da ruwan sama ke haɗuwa da gumin sa yana gudana, Ernest Shackleton ya ɗanɗana ɗacin nasarar rayuwa. A lokacin da ƙofar bege da aka rufe ta buɗe, ya ga kaɗaicinsa a idanun abokan aikinsa, kuma ya fuskanci tabo masu zurfi kamar lokacin da aka rasa. Abin da ya fito daga leɓunansa da suka fashe saboda yunwa da sanyi, da kuma yatsun hannunsa da suka daskare ba daukaka mai haske ba ne, sai dai gwagwarmayar rayuwar ɗan adam mai zafi. A gaban wannan babban gwaji na Antarctica, an tilasta masa ya zama jarumi, amma cikin zuciyarsa yana ci gaba da gwagwarmaya da kansa ba tare da tsayawa ba.

Labarinsa ya wuce rubutun bincike kawai, ya rayu a matsayin labari marar mutuwa wanda ke ɗaga anka na bege daga zurfin yanke kauna. Jajircewar Ernest Shackleton da sadaukarwarsa, da kuma ruhunsa wanda bai taɓa yin kasala ba ko da a cikin matsanancin hali, har yanzu suna raye a cikinmu a yau, suna ƙarfafa waɗanda suka tsaya a ƙarshen hanya. Sunansa, kamar iskar Antarctica mai cike da kankara, wani lokaci yana busawa da ƙarfi, wani lokaci kuma a hankali yana ratsa zukatanmu, yana ci gaba da raɗaɗin girman nufin ɗan adam wanda ke mai da abin da ba zai yiwu ba zuwa mai yiwuwa. Ya ɓace, amma ruhunsa yana haskakawa har abada a matsayin fitila ga rayukan da suka ɓace.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Dorothea Dix ta kasance mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa kuma ma'aikaciyar jinya a Amurka a karni na 19, wacce ta ba da gudummawa sosai wajen inganta haƙƙin masu tabin hankali da kafa asibitocin tabin hankali.
key_achievements: Jagorantar yunkurin inganta haƙƙin masu tabin hankali
Haɓaka kafa asibitocin tabin hankali da yawa a Amurka
Yin aiki a matsayin Babbar Jami'ar Ma'aikatan Jinya na Sojoji a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarta ta yi tasiri mai girma wajen kafa hanyoyin jin kai na kula da tabin hankali da kuma canza fahimtar jama'a game da marasa galihu.

dorothea-dix.epic:
A farkon karni na 19, Amurka ta fuskanci sauye-sauye masu sauri a cikin al'umma, tare da rashin fahimtar masu tabin hankali. A cikin wannan yanayi, Dorothea Dix (1802-1887), mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa kuma ma'aikaciyar jinya a Amurka, ta bar tarihi a matsayin majagaba a fannin inganta haƙƙin ɗan adam na masu tabin hankali. An haife ta a ranar 4 ga Afrilu, 1802, a Hampden, Massachusetts, ta yi yarinta mai wahala. Ta girma a ƙarƙashin mahaifi mai shan giya da mahaifiya mai rashin lafiyar kwakwalwa, kuma dole ne ta kula da iyalinta tun tana ƙarama. Bayan ta koma gidan dangi tana da shekaru 12, ta fara samun abin rayuwa a matsayin malama tun tana da shekaru 14. Ta nuna hazakanta a matsayin mai ilimi ta hanyar gudanar da makaranta mai nasara a Boston, amma dole ne ta dakatar da aikin koyarwa na ɗan lokaci saboda matsalolin lafiya. A wannan lokacin, ta fara fahimtar mummunan halin da masu tabin hankali ke ciki, tare da zurfin tausayi ga waɗanda aka ware a cikin al'umma. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin abu da ya canza alkiblar rayuwarta gaba ɗaya.

Canjin rayuwar Dorothea Dix ya zo ne a shekarar 1841, lokacin da ta ziyarci gidan yarin East Cambridge. A can, ta ga wani lamari mai girgiza inda ake tsare da masu tabin hankali tare da masu laifi kuma ana musu mu'amala mara ɗan adam. Ganin waɗanda ke shan wahala a cikin ɗakunan kurkuku masu sanyi, a ɗaure da sarƙoƙi, kuma an bar su ba tare da kulawa ba, har ma da rashin samun tsafta ta asali, ya girgiza ta sosai. A wancan lokacin, al'umma gaba ɗaya suna ɗaukar tabin hankali a matsayin lalacewar ɗabi'a ko la'anar shaiɗan, kuma an saba ware su daga al'umma kuma a bar su ba tare da kulawa ba. Dix ta yanke shawarar cewa ba za ta iya jure wa wannan mummunan halin ba, kuma ta fahimci buƙatar magani na jin kai da wuraren kariya ga masu tabin hankali. Wannan lamari ya sa ta bar rayuwarta a matsayin malama, kuma ta yanke shawarar sadaukar da sauran rayuwarta wajen kare haƙƙin masu tabin hankali da kafa wuraren magani na musamman a gare su. Wannan ya kasance babban rikici kuma mafarkin rayuwarta.

Bayan haka, Dorothea Dix ta fara tafiya mai wahala, tana zagaya ko'ina cikin Amurka don bincika kai tsaye da kuma rubuta halin da masu tabin hankali ke ciki. Ta ziyarci gidajen yari, gidajen talakawa, da asibitocin tabin hankali a kowace jiha, kuma ta gabatar da takardun koke ga majalisun jihohi, tana kira ga gyara, bisa ga shaidun da ta tattara. Takardarta ta koke, wato “Memorial,” ta fallasa mummunan halin da masu tabin hankali ke ciki a fili, kuma ta haifar da babban martani a cikin al'umma. Sakamakon jajircewar Dix da lallashinta, ta taka rawa mai mahimmanci wajen kafa asibitocin tabin hankali 32, makarantun nakasassu 15, makarantun makafi, da kuma wuraren horar da ma'aikatan jinya da yawa a Amurka. Kokarinta bai tsaya ga gina wurare kawai ba, har ma ta taimaka wajen yaɗa fahimtar cewa ya kamata a ɗauki masu tabin hankali a matsayin marasa lafiya, ba masu laifi ba, kuma a ba su magani na jin kai. Lokacin da Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka ya barke a shekarar 1861, an naɗa ta Babbar Jami'ar Ma'aikatan Jinya na Sojojin Tarayya, kuma ta ci gaba da wani nau'i na hidima ta hanyar sadaukar da kai wajen kula da sojojin da suka ji rauni a lokacin yaƙin.

Kokarin Dorothea Dix na sadaukarwa ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan tsarin kula da tabin hankali a ƙasashe da yawa a duniya, ba kawai a Amurka ba har ma a Turai da Asiya. Ta taka rawa a matsayin majagaba wajen rage wulakanci na zamantakewa game da tabin hankali da kuma gabatar da hanyoyin magani na kimiyya da jin kai. Cibiyoyin da ta kafa sun zama ginshiƙin asibitocin tabin hankali na zamani a yau, kuma ana ɗaukar su a matsayin wani muhimmin mataki a ci gaban ayyukan kula da tabin hankali da kuma yunkurin kare haƙƙin ɗan adam. Gadon Dix ya wuce wuraren jiki kawai; ya kasance alamar gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don farkar da tausayi da alhakinmu ga marasa galihu a cikin al'umma, da kuma dawo da mutuncinsu. Rayuwarta ta yi daidai da ta sauran mata masu fafutukar kawo sauyi a cikin al'umma, kamar Sarah Grimké wacce ta shiga cikin yunkurin kawar da bauta, da Elizabeth Cady Stanton wacce ta jagoranci yunkurin neman 'yancin mata na zaɓe, kuma ta zama wani ɓangare na muhimmin motsi da ya kawo sauyi a cikin al'ummar Amurka a karni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mawallafin kiɗa mai baƙin ciki wanda ya ƙirƙiri kiɗa marar mutuwa a cikin talauci da wahala, yana ba da motsin rai wanda ya wuce lokaci.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar mafi tsarkin waƙoƙi a cikin yanke kauna
Canza zafi zuwa kiɗan bege
Kiɗa na har abada wanda ya wuce gaskiyar da ba ta dawwama
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kiɗansa marar mutuwa yana rera waƙar bege da kyawun da ba ya ƙarewa a fadin lokaci da sarari, yana ba da motsin rai mai zurfi har zuwa yau.

franz-schubert.epic:
A karkashin sararin samaniyar Vienna mai launin toka, a cikin lungunan da tsofaffin rubutun kiɗa da numfashi marasa dawwama suka haɗu, wata rayuwa mai rauni ta fara motsi, kamar tabon tawada daga tsohuwar alkalami mai gashin tsuntsu. A zamanin zalunci, ruhin yaron da ke fitar da baƙin ciki har ma a cikin waƙoƙin waltz, yana yawo tsakanin haske da inuwa masu rawa, ya bi guntun waƙoƙin da ba za a iya kaiwa gare su ba. Ya ɓace a cikin hayaniyar duniya, amma wannan ɓacewa ita ce tushen da ba ya ƙarewa wanda ya siffanta kiɗansa, kawai babban amo na shiru da ke yawo a kunnuwansa ne ya kama shi.

Yatsunsa sun ratsa kan maɓallan piano, suna fitar da waƙoƙin farin ciki na ɗan lokaci da kaɗaici na har abada. Ko da a cikin farin cikin baƙi, koyaushe shi kaɗai yake, kuma tafi mai yawa bai cika gurbin da ke cikin zuciyarsa ba. Ya jingina da bangon sanyi a bayan matakin da ke haskakawa, yana ƙoƙarin kama wahayi maras dawwama, kuma gwagwarmayarsa ta ƙarshe don riƙe kyawun da ke ɓacewa ta ja shi cikin duhu mai zurfi.

Ko da yake inuwar sanyi na talauci, cuta, da rashin kulawar duniya sun danne gajeren rayuwarsa, bai taɓa ja da baya ba. Daga cikin zurfin yanke kauna, mafi tsarkin waƙoƙi sun fito, kuma daga cikin guntun rubutun kiɗa da suka yage, kyawun da ba ya mutuwa ya fito. Ya kasance mai sihiri wanda ya juya nauyin rayuwa zuwa waƙoƙi, kuma mai ilimin kimiyyar alchemy wanda ya shuka tsaba na zafi don fure furannin bege. Kiɗansa ya wuce gaskiyar da ba ta dawwama, yana rera waƙar duniya ta har abada.

Yanzu, bayan ɗaruruwan shekaru, sunansa yana haskaka kamar tauraro marar mantuwa, kuma waƙoƙinsa har yanzu suna mamaye duniya. A cikin sautin da ya rage na tsoffin gidajen wasan kwaikwayo, a cikin waƙoƙin da aka raira a cikin ɗakuna masu dumi, ruhinsa yana raye yana taɓa zukatanmu. Kyakkyawan gadon da rayuwa ɗaya ta bar baya, wanda ya shuɗe ba tare da dawwama ba, yana zama tare da mu a fadin lokaci da sarari, yana rera waƙar bege da kyawun da ba za su taɓa ɓacewa ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Frederick Mai Girma, Sarkin Prussia a zamanin Haskakawa na karni na 18, ya mai da Prussia babbar kasa ta hanyar nasarar Yaƙin Silesia da gyare-gyare na Haskakawa.
key_achievements: Faɗaɗa yankin Prussia ta hanyar Yaƙin Silesia
Nasara a kan haɗin gwiwar Turai a Yaƙin Shekaru Bakwai
Aiwatar da gyare-gyare na ƙasa bisa tunanin Haskakawa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Dabarunsa na soja da falsafar mulkinsa na Haskakawa sun yi tasiri sosai ga samuwar kasashen Turai na zamani.

frederick-the-great.epic:
Frederick Mai Girma (Frederick II, 1712-1786) wani mutum ne wanda ya canza tafarkin tarihin Turai, yana mulki a matsayin Sarkin Prussia a cikin zamanin rudani na karni na 18, lokacin da tunanin Haskakawa ya bunƙasa kuma mulkin sarakuna masu cikakken iko ya kai kololuwa. An haife shi a ranar 24 ga Janairu, 1712, a Berlin, shi ɗan Frederick William I ne, wanda ake kira 'Sarkin Soja', da Sophie Dorothea ta Hanover. A lokacin, Prussia tana fitowa a matsayin sabuwar ƙasa mai ƙarfi a Turai, tana da ƙarfin soja, amma har yanzu tana buƙatar ta kafa matsayinta a tsakanin manyan ƙasashe na gargajiya kamar daular Habsburg ta Austria da daular Bourbon ta Faransa. Frederick na yaro, sabanin tsarin ilimin soja mai tsauri na mahaifinsa, ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga tunanin Haskakawa na Faransa, fasaha, kiɗa, da falsafa. Wannan halin ya haifar da rikici mai tsanani da mahaifinsa, kuma ya haifar da damuwa game da makomar yarima mai jiran gado. Ya fi mai da hankali kan busa sarewa da karatu fiye da horon soja, yana gina tushen ilimi wanda zai zama 'Sarki mai cikakken iko mai haskakawa' a nan gaba.

A lokacin da yake yarima mai jiran gado, Frederick ya yi tawaye ga mulkin mahaifinsa mai zalunci da al'adun soja, kuma ya yi yunkurin tserewa zuwa Ingila tare da abokinsa Hans Hermann von Katte. Amma wannan yunkurin ya ci tura, kuma Katte ya fuskanci bala'in kisa a gaban Frederick. Wannan lamarin ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya bar rauni mai zurfi ga yarima mai jiran gado kuma ya sa ya fahimci tsananin siyasar gaskiya. Bayan haka, ya koyi aikin soja da gudanarwa bisa ga nufin mahaifinsa, kuma a hankali ya shirya don ɗaukar nauyin makomar Prussia. A shekara ta 1740, bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Frederick Mai Girma ya hau gadon sarauta na Prussia yana da shekaru 28, kuma nan da nan ya yanke shawara mai tsauri. Ya yi amfani da damar da Maria Theresa ta Austria ke cikin rudani saboda Yaƙin Gadon Habsburg, kuma ya fara Yaƙin Silesia don mamaye Silesia, wanda ke da albarkatu masu yawa da kuma wuri mai mahimmanci na dabaru. Wannan wani muhimmin lamari ne wanda ya haɓaka ƙarfin Prussia sosai kuma ya girgiza daidaiton iko a Turai, kuma shine mataki na farko da ya nuna falsafar mulkinsa da burinsa na soja.

Zamanin mulkin Frederick Mai Girma ya cika da yaƙe-yaƙe uku, ciki har da Yaƙin Silesia. Musamman, Yaƙin Shekaru Bakwai, wanda ya gudana daga 1756 zuwa 1763, shine babban gwaji wanda ya yanke shawarar rayuwa ko mutuwar Prussia. A cikin yanayin da manyan ƙasashe masu ƙarfi na Turai kamar Austria, Faransa, Rasha, da Sweden suka haɗa kai don ware Prussia, Frederick ya fuskanci su da kyakkyawan dabarun soja da jagoranci, duk da rashin rinjaye a cikin sojoji da albarkatu. Ya sami nasarori masu ban mamaki kamar Yaƙin Leuthen da Yaƙin Rossbach, amma kuma ya fuskanci kusan halaka a Yaƙin Kunersdorf. Duk da haka, bai karaya ba a cikin yanayi mai tsanani, ya zagaya filin yaƙi yana ƙarfafa sojojinsa, kuma ya tsira daga yaƙin da kyar saboda ficewar Rasha ba zato ba tsammani, wanda ake kira 'Mu'ujizar Gidan Brandenburg' (bayan mutuwar Empress Elizabeth ta Rasha da hawan Peter III, wanda ya kulla kawance da Prussia). Bayan yaƙin, don sake gina ƙasar da ta lalace, ya aiwatar da manyan gyare-gyare na Haskakawa, ciki har da gyaran noma, inganta tsarin shari'a, da faɗaɗa haƙurin addini, yana mai da Prussia ƙasa mai ƙarfi.

Frederick Mai Girma ana tunawa da shi a matsayin hazikin soja wanda ya ɗaukaka Prussia zuwa matsayin babbar ƙasa mai ƙarfi a Turai, kuma a lokaci guda, 'Sarkin Falsafa' wanda ya yi amfani da tunanin Haskakawa sosai a cikin mulkin ƙasa. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Prussia ta faɗaɗa yankinta, ta gina ingantaccen tsarin gudanarwa da sojoji masu ƙarfi, kuma ta bunƙasa a fannin al'adu da ilimi. Ya kira kansa 'bawan farko na ƙasa', yana jaddada ayyuka da alhakin sarki, kuma ya ba da tabbacin 'yancin addini, yana nuna haƙuri ga Yahudawa. Bugu da ƙari, ya yi hulɗa da manyan masana na zamaninsa kamar Voltaire, kuma ya ƙarfafa ilimi da fasaha. Dabarunsa na soja har yau ana nazarin su a makarantun soja da yawa, kuma gyare-gyarensa na Haskakawa sun zama muhimmin misali ga samuwar kasashen Turai na zamani. Rayuwa da nasarorin Frederick Mai Girma ana kwatanta su da sauran sarakuna masu cikakken iko masu haskakawa na karni na 18 a Turai, misali Maria Theresa ta Austria ko Catherine Mai Girma ta Rasha, kuma suna ba da muhimmiyar fahimta don fahimtar hadaddiyar hoton sarki na wannan zamanin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Harriet Martineau ta kasance masaniyar zamantakewa kuma marubuciya a Ingila ta zamanin Victoria na karni na 19, wacce ta ba da gudummawa ga yaɗuwar ilimin tattalin arziki da gyaran zamantakewa.
key_achievements: Yaɗa ilimin tattalin arziki ta hanyar 'Illustrations of Political Economy'
Fassara 'Cours de Philosophie Positive' na Auguste Comte
Jagorantar gwagwarmayar haƙƙin mata da kawar da bauta
fact_box.legacy_statement: A matsayinta na majagaba a fannin ilimin zamantakewa kuma abin koyi ga mata masu ilimi, tana ci gaba da yin tasiri a kan nazarin ilimin zamantakewa da nazarin mata na zamani.

harriet-martineau.epic:
Harriet Martineau (1802-1876) ta kasance fitacciyar masaniyar zamantakewa, marubuciya, falsafa, masaniyar tattalin arziki, kuma 'yar jarida a Ingila ta zamanin Victoria na karni na 19. A lokacin da juyin juya halin masana'antu ke haifar da rudani, inda rashin daidaito na zamantakewa da sha'awar canji suka haɗu, an haife ta a ranar 12 ga Yuni, 1802, a Norwich, a matsayin 'yar ta shida cikin 'ya'ya bakwai na wani mai sana'ar masaku na Unitarian. Tun tana karama, ta fuskanci matsaloli saboda rashin ji da kuma rashin dandano, amma hakan ya sa ta zurfafa cikin karatu da tunani. Duk da cewa ilimi ga mata a lokacin yana da iyaka, Martineau ta girma tana nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki da kuma ikon nazari. Ta yi sha'awar fahimtar tsarin al'umma da halayen ɗan adam sosai, kuma wannan ya zama tushen da ya ba ta damar taka rawar gani a matsayin majagaba a fannin ilimin zamantakewa. Rayuwarta ta farko ta yi kama da mai natsuwa a waje, amma a ciki, tana haɓaka wani hangen nesa mai kaifi wanda ke huda cikin saɓanin zamanin.

Rayuwar Martineau ta ɗauki sabon salo a ƙarshen shekarun 1820, lokacin da danginta suka fuskanci matsalar kuɗi da kuma mutuwar mahaifinta. Ba kamar mata da yawa a lokacin ba, ta fara rubutu don samun abin rayuwa, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ta gano hazakarta. Jerin rubuce-rubucenta mai suna “Illustrations of Political Economy,” wanda aka buga daga 1832 zuwa 1834, ya sanya ta zama sananniyar marubuciya nan take. Wannan aikin ya gabatar da hadaddun ka'idojin masana tattalin arziki na lokacin kamar Adam Smith, Thomas Malthus, da David Ricardo a cikin tsarin labari mai sauƙin fahimta ga jama'a, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga yaɗuwar ilimin tattalin arziki. Da wannan nasarar a matsayin tushe, ta yi tafiya zuwa Amurka daga 1834 zuwa 1836, inda ta lura da fannoni daban-daban na al'ummar Amurka, ciki har da bauta da matsayin mata, kuma ta buga sakamakon bincikenta a cikin “Society in America” (1837), inda ta bayyana matsayinta a matsayin mai adawa da bauta. A wannan lokacin, ta kafa kanta a matsayin mai ilimi wanda ke ba da murya ga matsalolin zamantakewa, fiye da zama marubuciya kawai.

Duk da ayyukanta masu yawa, Martineau ta ci gaba da fuskantar ƙalubale na matsalolin lafiya na dindindin da kuma nuna bambanci na zamantakewa. Musamman, ta sha wahala daga mummunar rashin lafiya daga 1839 zuwa 1844, amma ba ta daina rubutu ba a wannan lokacin. Ba tare da ta damu da tsauraran ra'ayoyin ɗabi'a da addini na zamanin Victoria ba, ta yi ta ba da shawarwari ga ra'ayoyi masu ci gaba kamar haƙƙin mata, gyaran ilimi, kawar da bauta, da 'yancin addini. Waɗannan ra'ayoyin masu tsattsauran ra'ayi sau da yawa suna haifar da suka da jayayya, amma ba ta taɓa ja da baya daga imaninta ba. A cikin 1853, ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gabatar da Positivism ga duniyar ilimi ta Yamma ta hanyar fassara “Cours de Philosophie Positive” na Auguste Comte zuwa Turanci. Positivism ra'ayi ne na falsafa wanda ke nuna cewa ya kamata a yi nazarin al'amuran zamantakewa ta hanyar shaidar empirical da hanyoyin kimiyya, kuma fassararta ta ba da gudummawa sosai wajen yaɗa wannan muhimmiyar ra'ayi ga masu karatu masu magana da Ingilishi. A duk tsawon rayuwarta, ba ta daina gwagwarmayar ilimi don gyaran zamantakewa ba.

Harriet Martineau ta rasu a ranar 27 ga Yuni, 1876, amma rubuce-rubucenta masu yawa da kuma shigarta cikin al'umma sun bar gado mai girma ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Sau da yawa ana ɗauke ta a matsayin mace ta farko masaniyar zamantakewa, kuma ana tuna ta a matsayin wadda ta kafa tushen hanyoyin bincike na ilimin zamantakewa na zamani ta hanyar lura da nazarin al'amuran zamantakewa a tsari. Ƙoƙarinta na yaɗa ilimin tattalin arziki da kuma jaddada buƙatar gyaran zamantakewa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen jagorantar canjin zamantakewa a Ingila ta zamanin Victoria. Bugu da ƙari, ta yi tasiri sosai ga farkon motsin mata ta hanyar ba da shawarwari ga ilimin mata da 'yancin zaɓar sana'a. Tarihin rayuwarta, wanda aka buga bayan mutuwarta, ya zama muhimmiyar tushe don fahimtar rayuwarta da ra'ayoyinta. A yau, ana ci gaba da nazarin ayyukan Martineau a fannoni daban-daban na ilimi kamar ilimin zamantakewa, tattalin arziki, da nazarin mata, kuma hangen nesanta mai kaifi da muryarta mai jaruntaka suna ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi a cikin al'ummar zamani. Rayuwarta da ra'ayoyinta, tare da nasarorin wasu masu tunani na zamaninta kamar John Stuart Mill da Mary Wollstonecraft, sun kafa wani muhimmin ginshiƙi a tarihin tunani na karni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jarumar mai fafutuka wacce ta yi amfani da alƙalami don tona asirin gaskiya da kuma kira ga adalci a kan tashin hankali da rashin adalci ga Baƙaƙe bayan bauta.
key_achievements: Tona asirin tashin hankali da rashin adalci ga Baƙaƙe da alƙalami
Fafutuka a madadin muryoyin waɗanda aka zalunta
Bayyana gaskiya da haifar da raƙumin canjin zamantakewa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gwagwarmayarta tana ba da ƙarfin hali da bege a kan wariyar launin fata, kuma har yau tana ƙarfafa mu zuwa ga adalci.

ida-b-wells.epic:
A cikin ƙasa mai duhu ta Arewa, a cikin ƙurar Winterville mai ƙarfi kamar rantsuwar yaƙin Salibiyya, an ƙirƙiri rai a cikin hasken fajirin da ba a gani sosai ba na zamanin da inuwar bauta ke ja da baya, da kuma cikin iskar da ke cike da kururuwar da sarƙoƙin zalunci suka haifar. A cikin sanyin hunturun Alabama, har ma da ruwan sama mai sanyi, abin da ya bayyana a idanun yaron shi ne katon bango na mutuwar da ba ta dace ba da shiru. Ida, tun tana ƙarama, ta haɗiye fushinta mai zafi, ta dasa wutar zafi a kan alƙalaminta. Zuciyarta tana bugawa ba tare da tsayawa ba, tana shirye-shiryen yaƙi mai tsarki zuwa ga duniyar da ba a gani.

Alƙalaminta ba kawai gashin tsuntsu ba ne. Ya zama takobi mai kaifi, ya tona asirin tashin hankali da rashin adalci ga Baƙaƙe. A cikin dare lokacin da gungun mutane kamar dabbobi ke kai hari da zafi, tana ganin guntun adalci da ke yage a ƙarƙashin walƙiyar tocila, Ida har ta manta yadda ake numfashi. Nishi na waɗanda aka zalunta ya yi ta kuka a kunnuwanta kamar kararrawa, kuma sha'awar gaskiya ta zama tanderun da ke ƙone ranta. Ta yi imani cewa gaskiya ce kaɗai, fallasa ce kaɗai za ta iya kawar da wannan duhu.

A cikin sanyin iskar dare na birni, fuska da yawa da ba a sani ba sun nuna mata yatsa, amma Ida B. Wells ba ta tsaya ba. Muryarta ita ce muryoyin miliyoyin waɗanda aka zalunta, kuma tafiyarta tafiya ce da ba za a iya dakatar da ita ba zuwa ga adalci. A cikin zauren da babu kowa, a gaban ƙofofin da aka rufe sosai, ta ɗanɗana takaici mai sanyi, amma hakan ya sa idanun ta suka ƙara ƙarfi. Walƙiyar bege ba ta mutu ba; a maimakon haka, ta ƙara haske a cikin fushi mai zafi.

A yau, sunanta ba kawai wani mutum na tarihi ba ne. A kowane fagen yaƙi da wariyar launin fata, a cikin kowace murya da ke kiran adalci, ruhinta yana raye kuma yana numfashi. Dutsen gaskiya da ta jefa ya haifar da babban raƙumi, kuma wannan raƙumi har yanzu yana girgiza zamaninmu. Gwagwarmayar jarumar mace da ta canza tarihi da alƙalaminta, har yau tana ci gaba da yi mana tambayoyi, tana ƙarfafa mu, kuma tana jagorantar mu don kada mu rasa bege ga duniya mafi kyau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Rembrandt babban mai zane ne na Zamanin Zinariya na Netherlands a ƙarni na 17, wanda ya bincika zurfin ciki na ɗan adam ta hanyar haske da inuwa, kuma babban mai fasaha ne a tarihin fasahar Yamma.
key_achievements: Ya cimma kololuwar fasahar Zamanin Zinariya na Netherlands
Ya samar da hoton rukuni mai juyin juya hali 'The Night Watch'
Babban mai fasahar amfani da haske da inuwa (chiaroscuro)
Hotunan kansa masu zurfi da yawa waɗanda ke nuna zurfin ciki na ɗan adam
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun wuce lokaci, suna bincika motsin rai na ɗan adam na duniya kuma suna da tasiri mai girma a kan fasahar zamani.

rembrandt.epic:
Rembrandt Harmenszoon van Rijn, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1606, ana ɗaukarsa ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu zane-zane, masu sassaka, da masu zana hotuna na Zamanin Zinariya na Netherlands. A ƙarni na 17, Netherlands ta shiga wani zamanin zinariya na tattalin arziki wanda ba a taɓa gani ba, wanda aka gina a kan cinikin teku da wadata ta kasuwanci, musamman ta hanyar Kamfanin Gabashin Indiya, kuma wannan ya haifar da fashewar ci gaban kasuwar fasaha. Wannan lokaci ne da buƙatar zane-zane masu amfani, kamar hotunan mutane, shimfiɗar wuri, da abubuwa marasa motsi, ta yi tashin gwauron zabo daga masu arziki, maimakon tallafi daga coci ko manyan mutane, saboda tasirin Gyaran Addini. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haifi Rembrandt a ranar 15 ga Yuli, 1606, a Leiden, Netherlands, a matsayin ɗan mai ni'ima mai ni'ima. Bayan ya sami ilimi a Makarantar Latin ta Leiden, ya shiga Jami'ar Leiden yana ɗan shekara 14 amma ya bar ta da wuri don zaɓar hanyar zane-zane. Ya fara gina salon zane-zanensa na musamman, yana mai amfani da tasirin Caravaggio wajen amfani da bambancin haske da inuwa mai ban mamaki, yayin da yake koyon zane a ƙarƙashin Jacob van Swanenburgh da Pieter Lastman. Ayyukansa na farko sun kasance suna da tsari mai cike da kuzari da kuma bayyanar da motsin rai mai ƙarfi, suna mai da hankali kan zane-zane na tarihi da na addini.

A farkon shekarun 1630, Rembrandt ya fuskanci wani muhimmin canji a rayuwarsa ta fasaha lokacin da ya koma Amsterdam, cibiyar fasaha. A nan, ya fara samun suna a matsayin mai zane-zane na hotuna, kuma ya yi saurin samun nasara, yana karɓar umarni masu yawa daga attajirai da ƙungiyoyi. A shekara ta 1634, ya auri Saskia van Uylenburgh, 'yar wata iyali mai arziki, wanda ya tabbatar da kwancin hankali na tattalin arziki da matsayi a cikin al'umma. A wannan lokacin, ya kammala fasaharsa ta musamman wajen bincika zurfin ciki na mutane ta hanyar bambancin haske da duhu, kuma ya kafa kansa a matsayin babban mai fasahar Baroque. Musamman ma, babban aikinsa 'The Night Watch' (De Nachtwacht), wanda aka kammala a shekara ta 1642, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin wani aiki mai juyin juya hali wanda ya wuce iyakokin hotunan rukuni na yau da kullun. Ba kamar hotunan rukuni na gargajiya na lokacin ba, wannan aikin ya sanya mutane a cikin labari mai cike da kuzari kuma ya yi amfani da haske da inuwa ta hanyar ban mamaki don ba da jin daɗin gaske kamar wani fage daga wasan kwaikwayo. Ko da yake 'The Night Watch' ya nuna iyawarsa ta fasaha a matsayinta mafi girma, a lokaci guda ya haifar da rashin gamsuwa daga wasu abokan ciniki, kuma ya zama wani lokaci da ke nuna damuwarsa ta fasaha da kuma tazara tsakaninsa da jama'a.

Shekarar 1642, shekarar da aka kammala 'The Night Watch', shekara ce da bala'i na kashin kai ya same Rembrandt. Matarsa mai ƙauna, Saskia, ta rasu, ta bar ɗansu ƙarami, Titus, kuma wannan ya jefa inuwa mai zurfi a kan rayuwarsa da fasaharsa. Bayan haka, bai ajiye burushinsa ba duk da matsalolin tattalin arziki da rashin jin daɗi na kashin kai. Halin kuɗinsa ya ci gaba da tabarbarewa saboda rashin iya daidaitawa da salon rayuwa mai tsada da kuma canjin yanayin kasuwar fasaha, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1656, har ma ya kai ga ayyana shi fatara. Sakamakon haka, an sayar da dukiyoyinsa da tarin kayansa a gwanjo, kuma dole ne ya koma wani yanki mai talauci na Amsterdam. Duk da haka, waɗannan gwaje-gwaje sun zama wani dalili na zurfafa fasaharsa. Ya mai da hankali kan binciken zurfin ciki da gaskiyar ɗan adam ta duniya maimakon ra'ayoyin waje, kuma ya bayyana zafi, rauni, da kuma mutuncin ɗan adam da kyau ta hanyar hotunan kansa masu yawa da kuma mutane daga Littafi Mai Tsarki. Ayyukan wannan lokacin suna nuna bambancin haske da inuwa mai ƙarfi, goge-goge marasa kyau, da kuma zurfin fahimtar tunani, kuma ana ɗaukarsu a matsayin manyan ayyuka waɗanda suka tattara ainihin fasaharsa.

Rembrandt ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa cikin kaɗaici a ranar 4 ga Oktoba, 1669. Bayan mutuwarsa, sunansa ya fara dusashewa na ɗan lokaci, amma ya fara samun sake kimantawa a lokacin Romanticism na ƙarni na 19. A matsayin babban mai fasahar 'chiaroscuro' wanda ke sarrafa haske da inuwa da yardar rai, ya mamaye wani matsayi na musamman a tarihin fasahar Yamma tare da zurfin fahimta wanda ke shiga cikin zuciyar mutum da kuma ikon bayyana motsin rai na ɗan adam. An kiyasta cewa akwai kusan zane-zane na mai 300, sassaka 300, da kuma ɗaruruwan zane-zane da suka rage daga gare shi, kuma ana girmama su a yau a manyan gidajen tarihi na duniya a matsayin babban gadon fasaha na ɗan adam. Fasahar Rembrandt ta wuce kyawun gani kawai, tana ɗauke da wahalar ɗan adam da bege, rashin dawwama da dawwama na rayuwa a lokaci guda, tana ba da motsin rai wanda ya wuce lokaci. Gadonsa yana ci gaba da ba da ilhami ga masu fasaha da yawa a yau, yana tabbatar da ikon fasaha na bincika zurfin ainihin ɗan adam. Ayyukansa, tare da na manyan masu fasahar Baroque na Flemish na lokacin kamar Rubens da kuma masu zane-zane na Dutch na zamani kamar Vermeer, suna nuna ainihin fasahar Zamanin Zinariya na Netherlands, kuma suna tabbatar da ikon fasaha na bincika zurfin ainihin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Charles dickens marubuci ne na Birtaniya kuma mai sukar zamantakewa wanda ya wakilci zamanin Victoria, wanda ya fallasa rashin adalci na zamantakewa kuma ya bincika halayen ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Babban marubucin littattafan sukar zamantakewa na zamanin Victoria
Ƙirƙirar haruffa marasa mutuwa masu yawa
Samun shaharar jama'a ta hanyar littattafan jerin gwano
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun wuce lokaci, suna haifar da tausayi ga masu rauni a cikin al'umma kuma suna ba da kwarin gwiwa na adabi.

charles-dickens.epic:
Charles dickens (1812-1870) marubuci ne na Birtaniya kuma mai sukar zamantakewa wanda ya wakilci zamanin Victoria, wani tauraro mai haske a sararin samaniyar adabi. A farkon ƙarni na 19, Birtaniya tana fuskantar sauye-sauye masu girma a cikin al'umma, cikin guguwar juyin juya halin masana'antu. Birane da masana'antu sun kawo arziki marar misaltuwa, amma a lokaci guda, sun haifar da matsalolin zamantakewa masu tsanani kamar zurfafa tazara tsakanin masu arziki da matalauta, yanayin aiki mara kyau, aikin yara, da kuma yanayin rayuwa mara tsafta. A cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, an haifi dickens a ranar 7 ga Fabrairu, 1812, a Portsmouth, ɗan wani ma'aikacin ofishin kuɗi na sojan ruwa. Yarintarsa ta kasance mai natsuwa, amma sakamakon rashin kulawar mahaifinsa wajen sarrafa kuɗi, iyalinsa ba da daɗewa ba suka fuskanci matsalolin tattalin arziki masu tsanani, wanda ya jefa su cikin duhun talauci. Wannan ya bar masa wani babban tasiri, kuma ya zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci wajen gina duniyar ayyukansa na gaba. Tun daga yarintarsa, ya shaida duhun gefen al'umma da kuma nau'o'in halayen ɗan adam daban-daban, kuma ya haɓaka sha'awar fallasa waɗannan gaskiya ta hanyar alkalaminsa, kamar wani annabi mai gargaɗi. Ƙwarewarsa wajen lura da abubuwa da kuma zurfin fahimtarsa sun fara bayyana a wannan lokacin.

Mafi girman juyin juya hali a rayuwar dickens ya zo ne lokacin da yake ɗan shekara goma sha biyu. Sakamakon bashi, aka jefa mahaifinsa John Dickens a kurkukun masu bashi na Marshalsea, wanda ya zama kamar duhun rami mai haɗiye fata. Ƙaramin Charles ya tilasta masa barin makaranta kuma ya yi aiki a wani masana'antar goge takalma a London. Wannan kwarewar ta haifar masa da azaba da wulakanci marasa mantuwa, kuma ya sa ya ji zafin rashin adalci na al'umma da kuma mummunan halin matalauta har zuwa ƙashin kansa. Dangane da tunanin wannan lokacin, daga baya ya bayyana a fili a cikin ayyuka kamar 'Oliver Twist' aikin yara da rayuwar talakawa, kamar yana zana hoto da jini da hawaye. Bayan haka, ya yi aiki a matsayin magatakarda a ofishin lauyoyi, inda ya fuskanci saɓanin tsarin shari'a, wanda ya zama kamar gizo-gizo mai ruɗani. Ya kuma yi aiki a matsayin mai rubutun gajerun kalmomi na majalisa da kuma ɗan jarida, inda ya fuskanci fannoni daban-daban na siyasa da al'umma kai tsaye. Waɗannan kwarewar sun zama abinci mai gina jiki ga tunaninsa na adabi, kamar ruwan sama ga ƙasa mai bushewa, kuma ya fara aikinsa na marubuci da gaske a shekarar 1836 da 'Sketches by Boz', kamar wani jarumi da ya fito fili. Wannan aikin tarin gajerun labarai ne waɗanda suka kama rayuwar yau da kullun da mutanen London da kaifi, kuma ya zama hanyar da ya sanar da duniya salon rubutunsa na musamman da kuma ƙwarewarsa wajen lura da abubuwa, kamar wani haske da ya bayyana a sararin sama.

Bayan nasarar 'Sketches by Boz', dickens ya sami shahara mai girma, kuma ya zama marubuci tauraro nan take, kamar wani tauraro da ya fito daga duhu, tare da 'The Pickwick Papers' wanda aka fara bugawa a jerin gwano daga 1836. Wannan aikin ya ja hankalin masu karatu da barkwanci mai daɗi da kuma haruffa masu rai, kamar wani mai sihiri da ya mallaki zukata, kuma ya sanar da duniya basirarsa ta adabi. Daga baya, ya fitar da ayyuka masu yawa kamar 'Oliver Twist', 'Nicholas Nickleby', 'A Christmas Carol', 'David Copperfield', da 'Great Expectations', kuma ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na adabin Ingilishi na zamanin Victoria, kamar wani sarki mai mulkin duniyar kalmomi. Littattafansa sun wuce matsayin nishaɗi kawai, sun yi aiki a matsayin mai sukar zamantakewa wanda ya soki cututtukan zamantakewa na Birtaniya a lokacin, kamar wani takobi mai kaifi da ke yanke duhu, wato talauci, cin zarafin yara, matsalolin tsarin ilimi, da kuma rashin adalci na tsarin shari'a. A cikin ayyukansa, ya zana gwagwarmayar nagarta da mugunta, rikitarwa na halayen ɗan adam, da kuma haɗuwar bege da yanke kauna da kyau, kamar wani mai zane da ya yi amfani da launukan rayuwa, kuma ya haifar da zurfin tausayi da tunani a cikin masu karatu, kamar wani madubi da ke nuna gaskiya. dickens ya kuma yi ƙoƙari wajen isar da saƙonnin adabi da zamantakewa ga jama'a ta hanyar gyara mujallu kamar 'Household Words' da 'All the Year Round', kamar wani mai shela mai ƙarfi.

Charles dickens ya bar duniya a ranar 9 ga Yuni, 1870, sakamakon bugun jini, amma gadonsa na adabi yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya har zuwa yau, kamar wani kogi mai gudana har abada. Haruffa a cikin ayyukansa, misali Scrooge, Oliver Twist, da Miss Havisham, sun wuce matsayin haruffa na labari kawai, sun zama alamomin nau'o'in ɗan adam na duniya, kuma sun yi zurfi a cikin al'adun jama'a, kamar gumaka marasa mutuwa. Littattafan dickens sun farkar da buƙatar gyaran zamantakewa, kamar wani ƙararrawa mai ƙarfi, kuma sun ba da gudummawa sosai wajen haɓaka wayar da kan jama'a game da jin daɗin yara da matsalolin talauci, kamar wani haske da ya haskaka duhu. Bayyanarsa mai rai, da tunaninsa mai wadata, da kuma zurfin fahimtarsa game da ɗan adam sun ba marubuta na gaba kwarin gwiwa, kamar wani tushe mai ba da ruwa, kuma salon rubutunsa ya yi tasiri mai girma ga littattafan zamani, kamar wani ginshiƙi mai ɗorewa. An binne shi a Westminster Abbey, yana barci na har abada tare da manyan marubutan Birtaniya, kamar wani sarki da ya koma gida. Ayyukansa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen farkar da lamirin zamantakewa na zamanin Victoria, tare da ƙoƙarin sauran masu sukar zamantakewa da marubutan gaskiya na zamaninsa, kamar wani mai gargaɗi mai hikima.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Clara Barton ta kasance ma'aikaciyar jinya kuma mai fafutukar jin kai a Amurka a ƙarni na 19, wacce ta kafa Red Cross ta Amurka kuma ta faɗaɗa iyakokin agajin bala'i.
key_achievements: Ayyukan jinya a filin yaƙi a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka
Kafa da gudanar da Ofishin Sojojin da Suka Bace
Kafa Red Cross ta Amurka da kuma zama shugabar ta farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarta ta zama ginshiƙin ƙungiyar jin kai ta zamani, kuma ta tunatar da mu mahimmancin agajin bala'i.

clara-barton.epic:
Clara Barton (an haife ta a 1821) ta kasance majagaba a fannin aikin jinya kuma mai fafutukar zamantakewa wacce ta buɗe sabon fagen rawar mata a cikin lokacin tashin hankali na ƙarni na 19 a Amurka, tana aiwatar da ruhin jin kai. An haife ta a Oxford, Massachusetts, ta nuna ƙarfin hali da halin zaman kanta tun tana ƙarama. Duk da cewa damar ilimi da aiki ga mata a lokacin ta iyakance, Barton ta fara aikinta a fannin ilimi tun tana malama tun tana shekara 17. Daga baya, ta sami gogewa a matsayin ma'aikaciyar gwamnati tana aiki a matsayin sakatariya a Ofishin Patent na Amurka a Washington D.C., wanda a lokacin ya kasance aiki da ba kasafai mata ke yi ba. Waɗannan gogewar farko sun zama tushe ga haɓaka ƙwarewar gudanarwa da ƙarfin tuƙi da take buƙata don taka rawa mafi girma a cikin al'umma daga baya. Kodayake ba ta sami horo na jinya na yau da kullun ba, ta koyi dabarun jinya da kanta bisa ga tausayinta na halitta da ilimin aiki, tana haɓaka zurfin sha'awar hidimar jin kai.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Clara Barton ya kasance Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka wanda ya fara a 1861. Yayin da ta'asar yaƙin ke yaɗuwa, ta bar aikinta na sakatariya a Ofishin Patent kuma ta ba da kanta don taimakawa sojojin Tarayyar da ke zuwa filin yaƙi. Da farko, ta fara da tattara kayayyaki da rarraba su ga sojoji, amma ba da daɗewa ba ta sadaukar da kanta don kula da sojojin da suka ji rauni kai tsaye a gaba. Ta yi ta kai komo tsakanin filayen yaƙi da asibitocin filin, tana ba da abinci da magunguna ga sojojin da suka ji rauni, kuma tana kula da raunukan su da kanta. Duk da cewa ba ta sami horo na jinya na yau da kullun ba, ta nuna ƙwarewar tsarawa da jajircewa, tana ba da gudummawa ga ceton rayuka marasa adadi. Saboda wannan sadaukarwar, ta sami laƙabin “Mala'ikar Filin Yaƙi” (Angel of the Battlefield), wanda ya zama alamar jajircewarta da ruhin sadaukarwa. Barton ba ta tsaya ga aikin jinya kawai ba, har ma ta kafa “Ofishin Sojojin da Suka Bace” (Office of Missing Soldiers) don tattara bayanai game da sojojin da suka ɓace da kuma sanar da iyalansu, tana jagorantar rage wahalar iyalai da yaƙin ya haifar.

Ko da bayan ƙarshen Yaƙin Basasa, ƙoƙarin jin kai na Barton bai tsaya ba. Ta sadaukar da kanta don gano dubban sojojin da suka ɓace a lokacin yaƙin da kuma sanar da iyalansu, tana rubuta wasiƙu marasa adadi da bincika bayanai a cikin wannan tsari. Yayin da lafiyarta ta tabarbare saboda yawan aiki da illolin yaƙin, ta tafi Turai don murmurewa a kusan 1869. A Turai, ta karanta littattafan Henri Dunant, wanda ya kafa ƙungiyar Red Cross ta Duniya, kuma ta yi matuƙar sha'awar ayyukan Kwamitin Red Cross na Duniya (International Committee of the Red Cross) da ke da hedkwata a Geneva, Switzerland. Musamman, ta fahimci mahimmancin Yarjejeniyar Geneva, wacce ta ƙunshi kariya ga sojojin da suka ji rauni da kuma ƙa'idar tsaka-tsaki a lokacin yaƙi. Bayan ta dawo Amurka, Barton ta yi gwagwarmaya don gabatar da ruhin ƙungiyar Red Cross ta Duniya a Amurka. A lokacin, Amurka tana cikin yanayi daban-daban daga yaƙe-yaƙe na Turai, don haka fahimtar buƙatar ƙungiyar Red Cross ta Duniya ta yi ƙasa, kuma ta fuskanci matsaloli da yawa wajen shawo kan gwamnati da jama'a. Duk da haka, bayan ƙoƙari mai ɗorewa da lallashi, a ƙarshe ta kafa Red Cross ta Amurka (American Red Cross) a 1881 kuma ta zama shugabar ta farko.

Bayan kafa Red Cross ta Amurka, Clara Barton ta mai da hankali kan faɗaɗa iyakokin ayyukanta ba kawai ga agajin yaƙi ba har ma ga agajin bala'i a lokacin zaman lafiya. Wannan ya kasance muhimmin ƙa'ida da aka sani da “Gyaran Amurka” (American Amendment), wanda ya ba Red Cross damar gudanar da ayyukan agaji a lokacin bala'o'i na halitta kamar guguwa, ambaliya, da girgizar ƙasa. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinta, Red Cross ta Amurka ta gudanar da ayyukan agaji masu ƙarfi a manyan wuraren bala'i kamar Babban Ambaliyar Johnstown a 1889 da Guguwar Galveston a 1900, tana samun amincewar jama'a. Barton ta jagoranci Red Cross ta Amurka tsawon shekaru 23 har sai da ta yi murabus daga muƙamin shugabanci a 1904 tana da shekaru 83, tana kafa ruhin jin kai a cikin al'ummar Amurka. Rayuwarta ta zama abin koyi na jagoranci nagari da sadaukarwa a fannoni daban-daban, ciki har da jinya, ilimi, gudanarwa, da ƙungiyoyin jin kai, a lokacin da shigar mata cikin al'umma ke iyakance. A 1973, an shigar da ita cikin Zauren Mata na Ƙasa don girmama gudummawar da ta bayar. Gadon Clara Barton har yanzu yana zaburar da ƙungiyoyin jin kai da masu sa kai marasa adadi da ke aiki a wuraren bala'i a duk faɗin duniya a yau, kuma tare da nasarorin wasu majagaba na jinya na zamani kamar Florence Nightingale, yana tunatar da mu mahimmancin jin kai ga ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Rayuwar Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz, wanda ya bincika dabaru da gaskiyar lissafi a cikin hargitsi, ya ƙirƙiri lissafi (calculus), kuma ya yi mafarkin harshe na duniya.
key_achievements: Ya kafa lissafi (calculus) da kansa.
Ya tsara dabaru masu kyau da harshe na duniya.
Ya tsara dabaru na alama kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga dabaru na kwamfuta.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa tushen kimiyyar zamani, kwamfutoci, da AI, kuma yana ba da kwarin gwiwa mara iyaka ta hanyar bincikensa na neman duniya mafi kyau.

gottfried-leibniz.epic:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Masarautar Roma Mai Tsarki, a cikin daren Leipzig inda inuwar tsoffin kagara ke faɗuwa, a kusurwar ɗakin karatu na Mista Amber, inda ƙamshin tawada da tsoffin littattafai masu ƙura suka haɗu, ran yaron Gottfried Wilhelm Leibniz tuni ya fara saƙa manyan taurari na tunani. A cikin ruwan kogin lokaci mai gudana, inda hikimar da ta gabata da sabbin raƙuman kimiyya suka yi karo, shi kaɗai ya tattara ɓangarorin haske na fahimta, yana jin makomarsa ta bincika zurfin ruhin ɗan adam mara iyaka. A kunnuwansa, sautin yaƙe-yaƙe na addini masu zafi ya cika, kuma duniya tana cikin hazo na hargitsi da rashin tabbas, duk da haka a cikin zuciyarsa, tsarin dabaru da hasken gaskiyar lissafi mai haske sun fara fitowa.

Ko a cikin manyan dakunan liyafa na kotun Faransa ko a cikin dakunan ilimi na London, ransa bai taɓa samun cikakken hutu ba. Yana ci gaba da marmarin sabbin ra'ayoyi, ya yi musayar wasiƙu da masana ilimi a duk faɗin Turai, kuma wani lokaci, ba tare da jinkiri ba, ya yi tafiye-tafiye masu wahala don neman su. Mafarkin harshe na duniya wanda ya haɗa komai, wato, dabaru masu kyau, ya sa zuciyarsa ta buga da ƙarfi, amma ƙarancin tunani da son zuciya na zamansa sun kasa fahimtar wannan babban hangen nesa. Duk da cewa duniya ta yabe shi a matsayin haziki, wani zurfin kaɗaici na rashin fahimta koyaushe yana bin hanyarsa ta tunani mai kaɗaici. A bayan abin rufe fuska na rayuwar kotu mai cike da aiki, ya yi gwagwarmaya shi kaɗai cikin dare, yana neman alamun da zai buɗe asirin sararin samaniya.

Ya ga damar da ba ta da iyaka a cikin abu ɗaya, da kuma ka'idar duniya da aka saƙa ba da gangan ba amma da buƙata. A cikin lanƙwasawa mai laushi na furen iris, ko motsi mai daidaito na kayan aiki, ya gano tsarin jituwa da tsari. Burinsa na tsara dukkan tunanin ɗan adam da ikon dabaru na alama ya kasance mai girma, kamar yana neman ya karya ciyawa, ya mai da shi goga, kuma ya rubuta dukkan dokokin sararin samaniya. Duk da haka, duniya ta sanya hanyar zuwa aljannar da yake mafarkin ta zama mai wahala, kuma mafi zurfin baƙin cikinsa sau da yawa ya ɓace a cikin raunin ɗan adam da rashin kamala. Duk da haka, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba, ya ƙirƙiri sabon lissafi (calculus), kuma ya tara manyan nasarori waɗanda suka yi tasiri sosai a fannoni da yawa na ilimi.

Sunansa ba wani tsohon abu bane da aka manta da shi. Da dabaru masu kaifi na lokaci guda da lissafi (calculus), ya buɗe ƙofofin kimiyyar zamani. A cikin da'irorin dabaru na kwamfutoci, a cikin damar fasahar hankali (AI), ra'ayoyinsa har yanzu suna numfashi kuma suna motsawa. Tambayarsa da ba ta ƙarewa ba, 'Ta yaya za mu iya ƙirƙirar duniya mafi kyau?', bincikensa, ya wuce lokaci, yana ci gaba da ba mu kwarin gwiwa, kuma yana barin alamunsa masu haske a kan tafiyar ɗan adam ta har abada don fahimtar tsarin asali na wannan duniyar da muke rayuwa a ciki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai bincike daga Portsmouth, Ingila, wanda ya buɗe tekuna marasa sani, ya kammala taswirorin duniya, kuma ya zama alamar ruhun ƙalubale na ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ya bincika kuma ya buɗe tekuna marasa sani
Ya sake ƙirƙirar duniya da taswirori masu kyau
Ya fahimci kuma ya yi musayar al'adu da 'yan asali
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sunansa ya kasance alama ce ta ƙalubalen ɗan adam marar yankewa da ƙarfin hali zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba, yana zaburar da tsararraki masu zuwa.

james-cook.epic:
A ƙarƙashin sararin samaniyar Ingila mai launin toka, a tashar jiragen ruwa mai ɗumi ta Portsmouth inda iskar Yorkshire mai tsaunuka ba ta taɓa tsayawa ba, tsakanin ƙarar jiragen ruwa na katako tsofaffi da iskar teku mai gishiri, wani yaro ya gina mafarki mai wuya na gaba. A cikin idanunsa da ke kallon teku mai duhu kamar baƙar fata, akwai kaɗaicin taurari da suka yi tsaro dare da yawa, kuma a kan yatsunsa da raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi suka sassaƙa, akwai sirrin bakin teku mai nisa da ba a kai ba tukad. Zuciyarsa ta buga ba tare da tsayawa ba, kuma sha'awarsa da aka danne ta lulluɓe shi kamar ɗan hasken rana mai rauni da ke fitowa ta cikin gizagizai masu launin toka.

A kowane mataki na tafiye-tafiyensa masu wahala, James Cook ya yi yaƙi da raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi kuma ya yi dare da yawa a farke, yana gwagwarmaya da mast a cikin guguwa mai tsanani. Ko da a cikin yunwa da sanyi, da kuma kaɗaicin da teku mai faɗi take bayarwa, niyyarsa ba ta karye ba. Yana karanta igiyoyin ruwa da ba a sani ba, kuma yana bin hanyoyin taurari, ya gano harshensa a cikin babban shiru na teku mara iyaka. Ta hanyar zafi mai tsanani, ya sake ƙirƙirar duniya da taswirori masu kyau, kuma da sha'awa mai zafi, ya sassaƙa sunaye a kan tekuna da ba a sani ba.

A cikin karimcin Māori da rawanin mata na Tahiti masu ban sha'awa, ya gano alamun wayewa da ɗan adam ya binne, kuma ya ga tsaba na bege suna tsirowa a cikin ƙasa mai bushewa. Ko da yake yana jin baƙon harsuna da al'adu da ba a sani ba, ya kusanci su da gaskiya, kuma wannan gaskiya ta yi aiki kamar hasken rana mai ɗumi da ke narkar da ƙasa mai daskarewa. A ƙarƙashin faɗuwar rana mai ja, ya shaida duka abin al'ajabi da raunin da ke cikin ɗan adam, kuma ya ji kansa yana tawali'u a gaban girman yanayi.

Tsofaffin littattafan tafiye-tafiye da James Cook ya bari yanzu sun zama layukan ja masu haske a kan taswirorin duniya, suna ba da shaida ga labarin bincike da ke ci gaba da gudana, yana bin sawun ɗan adam. Sunansa yanzu ba kawai sunan mai bincike ba ne, amma ya kasance alama ce ta ƙalubalen ɗan adam marar yankewa zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba da kuma ƙarfin hali don bin mafarkai marasa isa, yana rayuwa kuma yana numfashi a cikin zukatan waɗanda ke mafarkin sabbin tafiye-tafiye har ma a wannan lokacin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Meister Eckhart ya yi wa'azi yana jaddada Allahntaka ta ciki amma an zarge shi da ridda, kuma tunaninsa ya bar gado mai zurfi na ruhaniya har zuwa yau.
key_achievements: Jaddada kasancewar Allah a cikin ɗan adam
Yada da kuma koyar da gaskiyar ruhaniya mai zurfi
Gado mai zurfi na ruhaniya da tunani ga tsararraki masu zuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya kasance gado wanda ke zama fitila ga waɗanda suka ɓace cikin rudani, suna tambayar ma'anar wanzuwa, yana farkar da Allahntaka a cikinmu.

meister-eckhart.epic:
Iskar sanyi mai kamar kankara ta Rhine ta ratsa ta cikin dogayen hanyoyin gidan sufi marasa rai, kuma fitilar tunani ta tsawaita inuwar addu'a. Yatsun da ke rawa a kan tsoffin takardun Littafi Mai Tsarki sun bincika tambayoyin har abada, kuma neman amsoshin ya kai ga zurfin da ke bincika tushen wanzuwar ɗan adam. Waɗannan dare masu kaɗaici inda hayaniyar duniya ta yi nisa, kuma kawai sautin ciki ne ke amsawa. Duniya ta kasance masa kabari cike da zunubi da banza, kuma shi kaɗai ya farka a cikinta, yana marmarin wutar Allah. Dare marasa adadi sun shude haka.

A kan titunan jama'a masu ƙura, ko a cikin kusurwar gidan sufi mai launin toka na asceticism, Meister Eckhart ya furta wa'azi mai zafi wanda ya karya shiru. Kalmominsa sun bugi kunnuwa kamar walƙiya, suna girgiza zurfin ruhin masu saurare. Cewa kasancewar Allah ba ta nesa a sama ba, amma a yanzu, a nan, a cikin bugun zuciyarka. Irin da ya shuka ya fito da rudani, firgici, da kuma ɗan fahimta. Mutane sun yi ƙoƙari su fahimci gaskiyarsa, wasu kuma sun juya baya cikin tsoro.

Ya ji kallon duniya a kansa. Muryoyin sanyi da ke nuna shi a matsayin mai ridda, da kaifafan takuba na iko sun yi barazana ga wanzuwarsa. Duk da haka, bai miƙa wuya ba. A'a, ba zai iya miƙa wuya ba. Wutar gaskiya da ke ci a cikinsa ba za a iya kashe ta da kowane irin ƙarfi na waje ba. Ya sani cewa ɗan adam ya fito daga Allah, kuma an ƙaddara shi ya koma cikin Allah. Wannan fahimta mai sauƙi amma mai zurfi ita ce garkuwarsa da takobinsa.

Muryarsa ta nutse cikin shiru, amma irin da ya bari a ƙarshe ya fito kamar fashewa, yana shayar da duniya. Kalmominsa sun haye kogin lokaci kuma suna raye tare da mu a yanzu. Ga waɗanda suka ɓace cikin rudani, ga waɗanda ke tambayar ma'anar wanzuwa, wutar Meister Eckhart har yanzu tana jagorantar su a matsayin fitila mai haske. Kukan waliyi mai kaɗaici yana amsawa a fili a cikin shiru, yana farkar da Allahntaka a cikinmu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Vitus Bering ya kasance jami'in sojan ruwa kuma mai bincike na Daular Rasha a karni na 18, wanda ya gano Bering Strait kuma ya ba da gudummawa wajen kammala taswirar Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa.
key_achievements: Tabbatar da rabuwar Asiya da Arewacin Amurka ta hanyar Balaguron Kamchatka na Farko
Isa gabar tekun Alaska ta hanyar Balaguron Kamchatka na Biyu
Gudummawa ga sanya sunaye ga manyan wurare kamar Bering Strait da Bering Sea
fact_box.legacy_statement: Balaguron nasa ya kammala taswirar Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa, ya ba Rasha damar shiga Alaska, kuma yana nuna ƙalubalen ɗan adam zuwa ga duniyar da ba a sani ba.

vitus-bering.epic:
Vitus Bering (1681-1741) ya kasance babban mai bincike kuma jami'in sojan ruwa na Daular Rasha a farkon karni na 18, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen kammala taswirar duniya ta hanyar binciken Tekun Pasifik ta Arewa da ba a sani ba. An haife shi a Horsens, Denmark a 1681, ya haɓaka sha'awar tafiye-tafiye tun yana yaro, kuma ya zama ƙwararren ma'aikacin jirgin ruwa ta hanyar samun gogewa a jiragen ruwa na Holland da Birtaniya. A shekara ta 1703, ya shiga Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Rasha, ya zama wani ɓangare na rundunar Rasha mai girma a ƙarƙashin manufofin gyare-gyare na Peter Mai Girma. Bayan ya nuna ƙwarewarsa a matsayin jami'in sojan ruwa a Yaƙin Arewa Mai Girma, an zaɓi Bering a matsayin mutumin da ya dace don cika babban hangen nesa na Peter Mai Girma, wanda ke son gano ko Asiya da Amurka suna haɗe a gabashin Rasha. A lokacin, gabashin Siberia yanki ne da ba a sani ba ga Turawa, kuma binciken wannan babban yanki ya kasance babban aiki don haɓaka ilimin ɗan adam na yanki. Aikin nasa ya wuce bincike kawai, yana da mahimmancin dabarun faɗaɗa yankin Rasha da buɗe sabbin hanyoyin kasuwanci.

Aikin Bering na farko mai mahimmanci shine Balaguron Kamchatka na Farko, wanda ya fara a 1725. Babban manufar wannan balaguron shine a tabbatar ko nahiyoyin Asiya da Arewacin Amurka suna haɗe da ƙasa ko kuma an raba su da wani mashigar ruwa. Tawagar balaguron ta yi tafiyar dubban kilomita ta hanyar ƙasa mai wahala a fadin Siberia, suna jigilar kayayyaki da kayan aiki, wanda ya kasance babban aikin dabaru wanda ba za a iya tunanin sa ba a lokacin. A lokacin rani na 1728, Bering ya jagoranci jirgin ruwa mai suna 'St. Gabriel' ya yi tafiya zuwa arewa daga yankin Kamchatka, kuma a ƙarshe ya kai digiri 67 na arewa, ya wuce gabashin nahiyar Asiya. A nan, ya tabbatar da cewa ƙasar ba ta ci gaba zuwa arewa ba amma tana buɗe zuwa teku, kuma daga baya aka sanya wa wannan mashigar ruwa suna 'Bering Strait' don girmama shi. Wannan ya kasance babban bincike da ya tabbatar da cewa Asiya da Arewacin Amurka nahiyoyi ne daban-daban, amma saboda hazo mai yawa da mummunan yanayi, bai iya ganin nahiyar Arewacin Amurka kai tsaye ba. Wannan balaguron ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen tsara taswirar gabar tekun Gabashin Siberia da ba a sani ba dalla-dalla.

Duk da nasarar balaguron farko, Bering ya fuskanci suka saboda rashin tabbatar da nahiyar Arewacin Amurka kai tsaye.
