Ya fara aiki a matsayin ɗan majalisa a shekara ta 1504, kuma ya yi saurin hawa matsayi, ya zama Mataimakin Magajin Garin London, Mashawarcin Sarki, da sauransu, har ya kai matsayin Lord Chancellor a shekara ta 1529, wanda shi ne babban matsayi a Ingila. A matsayinsa na Lord Chancellor, ya aiwatar da gyare-gyaren dokoki kuma ya yanke hukunci na adalci, inda ya sami amincewar jama'a. Ya kuma shiga cikin manufofin harkokin waje na sarki, yana sadaukar da kai don zaman lafiyar Ingila. Henry na VIII ya amince da More sosai kuma yana ƙaunarsa, kuma More ma ya yi biyayya ga sarki. Amma dangantakarsu ta fara samun matsala lokacin da Henry na VIII ya ayyana soke aurensa da Sarauniya Catherine kuma ya nemi ya auri Anne Boleyn. Duk da adawar Fafaroma na Roma, sarki ya nace kan nufinsa, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci wanda ya haifar da mummunar rikici ga zurfin bangaskiyar More da lamirinsa. Ya ƙi shiga cikin al'amuran sirri na sarki, kuma ya yi gwagwarmaya tsakanin imaninsa na addini da biyayyarsa ga ƙasa.

Henry na VIII ya yanke dangantaka da Fafaroma na Roma don ƙarfafa ikon sarauta, kuma ya ayyana kansa a matsayin shugaban Cocin Ingila. A shekara ta 1534, Majalisa ta zartar da 'Dokar Supremacy,' wacce ta amince da sarki a matsayin babban shugaban Cocin Ingila, da kuma 'Dokar Gado,' wacce ta ba wa 'ya'yan Anne Boleyn haƙƙin gadon sarauta. Waɗannan dokokin sun buƙaci dukkan talakawa su yi rantsuwar biyayya, kuma duk wanda ya ƙi zai fuskanci hukuncin cin amanar ƙasa. More, wani Katolika mai ibada, ya ɗauka cewa matakin sarki ya saba wa ikon coci da lamiri. Ya yi adawa a kaikaice ta hanyar yin murabus daga matsayinsa na Lord Chancellor a shekara ta 1532, kuma daga baya ya ƙi yin rantsuwar Dokar Supremacy da ƙarfi. Sakamakon haka, a watan Afrilu na shekara ta 1534, an ɗaure shi a Hasumiyar London bisa zargin cin amanar ƙasa. A cikin kurkukun Hasumiyar London, More bai yi watsi da imaninsa ba duk da lallashin iyalinsa da kuma roƙon sarki. Ya ci gaba da yin shiru, yana ƙoƙarin guje wa muhawara game da fifikon ikon sarki da na Fafaroma, amma a ƙarshe an tuhume shi da cin amanar ƙasa kuma an yi masa shari'a. Gwagwarmayarsa ta zama alamar wani batu na duniya: rikicin tsakanin lamirin mutum da ikon gwamnati.

A ranar 6 ga Yuli, 1535, an kashe Thomas More a kan tudun Hasumiyar London, inda ya bi tafarkin shahada. A gaban mutuwa, ya riƙe imaninsa, yana barin sanannen furucin cewa, 'Ni bawan sarki ne mai kyau, amma fiye da haka, ni bawan Allah ne.' Mutuwarsa ta girgiza al'ummar Turai a lokacin, kuma ta haifar da baƙin ciki mai zurfi da fushi ga masu ilimin ɗan adam kamar Erasmus. Bayan mutuwarsa, Cocin Katolika ta yi masa albarka kuma an mai da shi waliyi a shekara ta 1935, kuma a shekara ta 2000, an ayyana shi a matsayin waliyin siyasa da ma'aikatan gwamnati. Har zuwa yau, Thomas More ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar 'yancin lamiri, 'yancin tunani, da kuma muhimmancin imani na mutum a gaban ikon gwamnati. Al'ummarsa mai kyau, 'Utopia,' tana ci gaba da yin tasiri a falsafar siyasa da adabi, kuma tana wakiltar burin samun al'umma mafi kyau. Rayuwarsa tana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar mutane kamar Martin Luther da Erasmus, waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin riƙe imaninsu a cikin guguwar Gyaran Addini na lokacin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata mai tunani da aka haifa a Paris a shekarar 1909, wacce ta bincika ainihin wahalar ɗan adam ta hanyar ratsa wuraren aiki da filayen yaƙi, tana ba da shawarar soyayya mai girma da mutuncin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ta fuskanci wahalar ma'aikata ta hanyar aiki a matsayin ma'aikaciyar masana'anta.
Ta fuskanci bala'in yaƙi ta hanyar shiga Yaƙin Basasa na Spain.
Ta kafa zurfin tunani game da wanzuwar ɗan adam da wahala.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninta da rubuce-rubucenta tambaya ce ta har abada game da rashin adalci da kuma yabo ga mutuncin ɗan adam, suna ci gaba da yin amo sosai har zuwa yau.

simone-weil.epic:
A shekarar 1909, a lokacin da inuwar karni na 20 mai ban mamaki ta faɗa kan tsoffin duwatsun Paris, an haifi wata mace a cikin wani tukunyar narke mai zafi na hankali da ruhi. Wata matashiyar rai, mai haske kamar tauraro mai kaɗaici a tsakanin tsoffin ɗakunan littattafai, ta nemi ainihin fuskar wanzuwar ɗan adam, tana binciken ƙasusuwan gaskiya masu sanyi maimakon ayoyin Littafi Mai Tsarki da suka shuɗe. Jikinta mai rauni yana da haɗari kamar kyandir mai mutuwa, duk da haka, zafin da ke ci a cikinta babban runguma ne da ke neman haɗa dukkan wahalhalun duniya; tsoffin titunan Paris sun riga sun ɗauki kaɗaicin ta mai girma.

Ta bar gadon sarautar masu ilimi ta jefa kanta cikin hayakin masana'antu masu launin toka. A can, a tsakanin ƙamshin ƙarfe da nishi na ma'aikata masu gumi, ta ɗauki nauyin yanke kauna da ke gudana ta cikin jijiyoyin jini da suka gaji; zafin jiki mai raɗaɗi nan da nan ya zama kamar wahalar ɗan adam. Kwanakin da ta ratsa filayen yaƙi inda harsasai ke zuba a cikin jajayen ƙurar Spain, rawa ce ta bege mai walƙiya na ɗan lokaci da kuma yanke kauna mara iyaka, kuma ranta yana da haɗari, kamar tafiya a kan gefen wuƙa a bakin rami.

An kulle ta a cikin sanyin hasumiyar gudun hijira, har ma a ƙasar 'yanci, ta ci gaba da rungumar wahalar ƙasarta. Gaskiyar Faransa, tare da ƙasusuwan yunwa da suka bayyana a fili, wuƙa ce da ke yaga zuciyarta, kuma kukan da ta yi sama kamar taurarin da suka watse ne waɗanda suka kasa kaiwa. A cikin zurfin wahala, ta fuskanci shiru na Allah, tana neman hasken soyayya mai girma; siffarta a gaban gicciye mara komai babban yanke kauna ne, kuma a lokaci guda, wani yanki ne na bege mara mutuwa.

Ko da yake ta kawo ƙarshen gajeren rayuwarta na shekaru 34 a kan gadon asibiti mai sanyi, ruhinta har yanzu yana kewaye da mu. A tsakanin tsoffin alamomin littattafai, a cikin raɗaɗin waɗanda ake zalunta, kuma a cikin haɗin kai na soyayya da ke fure har ma a cikin wahala. Kalmomin da ta bari, kamar wuta mara tsufa, tambaya ce ta har abada game da duniya mara adalci da kuma babban yabo ga mutuncin ɗan adam, suna ci gaba da yin amo a cikin zukatanmu kuma suna rayuwa har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An haifi Antonio Gramsci a cikin yanayi mai wuya na Sardiniya a 1891, kuma duk da jikinsa mai rauni, ya sami wayewar kai ta ilimi ta hanyar saduwa da tunanin Marx a Turin.
key_achievements: Horon basira a cikin yanayi mai wuya
Shawo kan cututtuka da binciken ilimi
Gano tunanin Marx a Turin
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tafiyarsa ta ilimi da ta fara da jiki mai rauni daga baya ta zama ginshiƙin babban gadon tunani.

antonio-gramsci.epic:
A cikin ƙasar Sardiniya mai cike da ƙalubale, a cikin titunan Alghero masu ƙura, a shekara ta 1891, inda kukan rayuka masu fama da kuma raɗaɗin bege suka haɗu, ruhin yaron Antonio Gramsci ya fara samun horo.

A cikin inuwar iyali mai raguwa da kuma rashin mahaifinsa, basirar da ba ta gajiya ba da ke zaune a cikin jikinsa mai rauni ta haskaka kamar fitila mai haske a cikin duhu.

Maimakon haka, sarƙoƙin jiki da cututtuka suka bari sun zama fuka-fukai na bincike mara iyaka zuwa ga duniya mai girma.

Kuma ta hanyar gano harshen wuta na Marx a cikin sanyin dakunan karatu na jami'ar Turin, makomarsa ta kafa anga.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata mai tunani kuma mai gwagwarmaya wacce aka haifa a Poland a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, ta yi yaƙi da mulkin mallaka da jari-hujja, kuma ta sadaukar da kanta ga juyin juya hali.
key_achievements: Sukar mulkin mallaka da yaɗa ra'ayoyin adawa da yaƙi
Rubuta 'Socialism ko Barbarism' a kurkuku
Rubuta 'The Accumulation of Capital' wanda ke nazarin jari-hujja
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta bar gadon tunani wanda har yanzu yake raye a yau, tare da ƙarfin hali na fuskantar rashin adalci da sha'awar duniya mai adalci.

rosa-luxemburg.epic:
A cikin duhun ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, a wata ƙasa mai nisa ta Poland, inda iskar sanyi ta tsaunukan Armenia ke kaɗawa, kuma zalunci da fata suka haɗu, wani rai ya farka a cikin hargitsi na kukan waɗanda aka zalunta da kuma fitowar sabon zamani. Tun tana yarinya, a ƙarƙashin inuwar tsoffin dokoki, kukan waɗanda aka zalunta yana amsa a kunnuwanta. Wutar ja ta tashi a cikin zuciyarta, kuma kaifin hankalinta ya yi kaifi. Idanunta masu kaifi sun huda rashin adalcin duniya, kuma nufinta marar yankewa ya buga ƙofofin da aka rufe. Wannan shine farkon gwagwarmaya mai kadaici.

Lokacin da Yaƙin Duniya na Farko mai hauka ya mamaye Turai, Rosa Luxemburg ta riƙe fitilar fata a cikin hazo mai jini. Ta fallasa bala'in da haɗamar manyan ƙasashe masu mulkin mallaka suka haifar da dukkan jikinta, kuma rubuce-rubucenta daga bayan sandunan kurkuku sun zama walƙiya mai raba duhu. "Socialism ko Barbarism," kadaici a kurkuku ya ƙara kaifafa muryarta, kuma ya zama gargaɗi mai tsanani ga ɗan adam da ke gab da halaka. Nufinta marar karyawa a cikin tsananin azaba ya dasa nufin juriya mai girma a cikin waɗanda suka faɗa cikin yanke kauna.

Katangar siminti mai sanyi na kurkuku ba zai iya ɗaure ran Rosa Luxemburg ba. Maimakon haka, sararin da aka rufe ya buɗe sararin samaniya na tunani marar iyaka, kuma ta annabta makomar da haɗamar jari da haukatar mulkin mallaka za su haifar. Nishin masu yunwa, fushin waɗanda aka zalunta, sun zama kaifin ra'ayoyi a ƙarshen alkalaminta. Littafinta "The Accumulation of Capital" ya warware zaren tarihi mai sarkakiya, yana nuna hoton mai bincike mai kadaici wanda ke bin hasken gaskiya, ba tare da ja da baya ba a cikin zalunci.

A shekarar 1919, lokacin da wutar juyin juya hali ta mamaye titunan Jamus, Rosa Luxemburg ta tsaya a gaba ba tare da jinkiri ba. Ko da yake an murƙushe tawayen, kuma mugun tashin hankali ya yayyage jikinta, ra'ayoyinta ba su mutu ba. Ja tauraro bai faɗi ba. Muryarta tana ci gaba da amsa a cikin zamani, kuma har yanzu tana raye a cikin zukatanmu a yau a matsayin ƙarfin hali na fuskantar rashin adalci, nufin juriya ga zalunci, da kuma sha'awa marar yankewa ga duniya mai adalci ga kowa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: George Santayana masanin falsafa ne ɗan asalin Sifen na ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya kafa ilimin kyau na naturalism da falsafar hankali.
key_achievements: Ya kafa ilimin kyau ta hanyar wallafa “The Sense of Beauty”
Ya tsara falsafar hankali da “The Life of Reason”
Ya gabatar da ilimin sani da “Skepticism and Animal Faith”
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar tasiri mai ɗorewa a tunanin zamani tare da zurfin fahimta game da yanayin ɗan adam, al'adu, da fasaha.

george-santayana.epic:
George Santayana, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1863, masanin falsafa ne, marubucin kasidu, mawaki, kuma marubucin littattafai ɗan asalin ƙasar Sifen, wanda ya bar babban tasiri a fannin tunanin Yamma a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20. An haife shi a Madrid, Sifen, a ranar 16 ga Disamba, 1863, ya fuskanci tarihin iyali mai sarkakiya saboda rabuwar iyayensa tun yana yaro. Mahaifiyarsa ta koma Boston, Amurka, kuma Santayana ya bi ta zuwa Amurka a shekara ta 1872, yana ɗan shekara takwas, inda ya fara samun ilimi a Makarantar Latin ta Boston. Ya girma tsakanin al'adun Katolika na Sifen da al'adun Furotesta masu amfani na Amurka, inda ya fara fuskantar karo da jituwa tsakanin duniyoyi biyu tun da wuri. Wannan yanayin ya zama muhimmin tushe ga tunanin falsafarsa, kuma ya taka rawa sosai wajen samar da ra'ayinsa na musamman game da al'adu, addini, da yanayin ɗan adam. Ya karanci falsafa a Jami'ar Harvard, inda ya samu jagoranci daga manyan masana tunani na lokacin kamar William James da Josiah Royce.

Bayan kammala karatunsa daga Jami'ar Harvard, Santayana ya yi aiki a matsayin farfesan falsafa a jami'arsa tun daga shekara ta 1889, inda ya bunƙasa a fannin ilimi. A wannan lokacin, ya wallafa littafin “The Sense of Beauty” (1896), wanda ake ɗauka a matsayin littafi mai daraja a fannin ilimin kyau, inda ya binciki ilimin kyau daga mahangar ilimin halayyar ɗan adam kuma ya gabatar da tushen halitta na ƙimar kyau. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, “The Life of Reason” (1905-1906), ya gina tsarin falsafa mai faɗi wanda ya bayyana yadda hankalin ɗan adam ke daidaita buƙatun halitta da sha'awoyi don ƙirƙirar wayewa da al'adu. Duk da haka, ya ji babban shakku game da halaye masu amfani na al'ummar Amurka da yanayin ilimi. Da yake ya fahimci cewa fahimtarsa ta Sifen da tunanin Turai ba za su iya haɗuwa gaba ɗaya da yanayin Amurka ba, ya yi murabus daga matsayinsa na farfesa a Harvard a shekara ta 1912, yana ɗan shekara 49, kuma ya tafi Turai, wanda ya zama babban canji a rayuwarsa. Wannan ba kawai canjin wuri ba ne, amma wani yanke shawara ne don 'yancin tunaninsa da tunani mai 'yanci.

Bayan ya koma Turai, Santayana ya yi tafiye-tafiye tsakanin Ingila, Faransa, da Italiya, yana bin tafarkin tunaninsa na kansa. Godiya ga gadon da ya samu bayan murabus dinsa daga Harvard, ya sami damar sadaukar da kansa ga bincike da rubuce-rubuce ba tare da takunkumin kuɗi ba. Ko da a lokutan tashin hankali na Yaƙin Duniya na Farko da na Biyu, ya kiyaye kwanciyar hankali na ciki a cikin rudanin duniya ta waje, yana binciken matsalolin asali na wanzuwar ɗan adam. A wannan lokacin, ya wallafa “Skepticism and Animal Faith” (1923), inda ya gabatar da ilimin saninsa na musamman wanda ya yarda da iyakokin ilimin ɗan adam amma ya jaddada muhimmancin imani na halitta da ake buƙata don rayuwa. Bugu da ƙari, littafinsa na labari guda ɗaya, “The Last Puritan” (1935), ya ƙunshi abubuwan da suka shafi rayuwarsa, yana nuna rikice-rikicen hankali da ɗabi'a na zamanin ta hanyar tafiyar ruhaniya ta wani hali. Ya zauna galibi a Roma, yana rayuwa mai kaɗaici amma cike da ma'ana ta ilimi, kuma ya rasu a can a ranar 26 ga Satumba, 1952.

Falsafar George Santayana ta haɗa naturalism, realism, skepticism, da mahangar ilimin kyau ta hanyar musamman, wanda ya bar babban tasiri a tunanin zamani. Musamman ma, sanannen kalaminsa cewa “Waɗanda ba za su iya tunawa da abin da ya gabata ba, an hukunta su da maimaita shi” ana ambato shi sosai har zuwa yau, yana jaddada muhimmancin tarihi da tunanin gama gari. Tunaninsa yana ba da zurfin fahimta game da yanayin ɗan adam, al'adu, addini, da fasaha, kuma yana zama jagora mai muhimmanci ga mutanen zamani wajen neman jituwa tsakanin hankali da motsin rai a cikin ruɗanin ƙima da suke fuskanta. Ko bayan rasuwarsa, ana ci gaba da nazarin ayyukansa da sake fassara su, kuma musamman ilimin kyau na naturalism dinsa yana ci gaba da zaburar da fannin falsafar fasaha. Ya bi wata hanya dabam da masana falsafa masu amfani na Amurka na zamani kamar William James da John Dewey, amma ana iya samun manufa ɗaya a cikin ƙoƙarinsu na fahimtar cikakken gogewar ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masanin falsafa ɗan Faransa Henri Bergson ya bincika ainihin lokaci da hankali ta hanyar ra'ayoyin 'ci gaba' da 'fahimta kai tsaye', kuma ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Adabi a shekarar 1927, inda ya ɗaukaka tunanin falsafa zuwa matsayin adabi.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar ra'ayin 'ci gaba' da binciken ainihin lokaci da hankali
Gabatar da hanyar kaiwa ga zurfin wanzuwa ta hanyar 'fahimta kai tsaye'
Samun lambar yabo ta Nobel ta Adabi a shekarar 1927, wanda ya tabbatar da zurfin tunaninsa
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Ci gaba' da 'fahimta kai tsaye' nasa sun kasance gado da ke wuce lokaci, suna farkar da yiwuwar abubuwan da muka samu na rayuwa da kuma juyin halitta mai ƙirƙira.

henri-bergson.epic:
A shekarar 1859, a daren da hankalin Yahudawa ya sauka kamar tauraro mai sanyi a titunan Paris masu natsuwa, aka haifi Henri Bergson. A tsakanin littattafai masu ƙura a tsohuwar ɗakin karatu, a cikin iskar da kaifin dabaru na lissafi da zurfin falsafar gargajiya suka haɗu, ruhunsa ya riga ya ɗauki iri na bincike mai zaman kansa. A gaban teburin da aka yi amfani da shi sosai a Lycée Henri-IV, ya ji ƙishirwar zurfin hankalin ɗan adam mara iyaka, fiye da madaidaicin tafarkin agogo. A kan dandamalin École Normale Supérieure, inda kwarangwal na dabaru da jinin fahimta suka haɗu, zai yaga fatar 'lokaci' mai wucewa wanda duniya ke ɗauka a matsayin abu na yau da kullun, kuma a cikinsa, zai gano 'ci gaba' (duration), kogin rayuwa mai gudana har abada.

Ra'ayin 'ci gaba' ya fara fitowa daga gare shi. Ba lokaci ne na inji ba wanda ke aiki kamar kayan aiki, kuma ba kayan aiki ne na ma'auni mai sanyi ba. Ci gaba da gudana na dukkan abubuwa masu rai, zurfin hankali inda baya, yanzu, da gaba suka haɗu a cikin rawa ɗaya. Don duba cikin wannan zurfin, ya ɗauko ruwa daga maɓuɓɓugar 'fahimta kai tsaye' (intuition) mai tsabta. Wani rawar jiki da ke kaiwa ga mafi zurfin wanzuwa, wanda kaifin sanyi na hankali ba zai iya kaiwa gare shi ba. Duk lokacin da ya buɗe shafukan "Lokaci da 'Yancin Zaɓi" da kuma "Abu da Tunani", ya bayyana ƙarfin ƙirƙira na ruhun ɗan adam, ainihin rayuwa wacce ke sabunta kanta koyaushe kuma take ci gaba.

A farkon ƙarni na 20, salons na Paris sun cika da sunansa. Taron jama'a da suka cika zauren lacca sun riƙe numfashinsu yayin da yake magana, kuma tunaninsa ya ratsa katangar falsafa, ya shiga cikin dajin adabi, lambun fasaha, har zuwa hasumiyar kimiyya. Babban raƙuman ruwa na 'Juyin Halitta Mai Ƙirƙira' ya gabatar da sabon fassarar rayuwa, kuma masu fasaha sun sami kwarjini daga kalmominsa, suka ɗauki goge, suka kunna kayan kiɗa. A shekarar 1927, kambin daraja na kyautar Nobel ta Adabi ya kasance kyakkyawan 'ya'yan itace na tunaninsa na asali, zurfin fahimtarsa mai wadata, da kuma ƙoƙarinsa na bayyana ainihin gaskiya da sha'awa. Wannan kyauta da aka ba shi a matsayin masanin falsafa, ta tabbatar da cewa tunaninsa ba kawai wasan hankali bane, amma babban adabi ne da ke rera waƙar kyawun rayuwa.

Duniya ta koma filin yaƙi na hauka, kuma ƙasarsa Faransa ta zama toka. Ƙaddararsa a matsayin Bayahude ta jefa inuwar yanke kauna da ba za a iya gujewa ba, amma ya tashi da tsohon jikinsa ya ci gaba da gwagwarmaya shi kaɗai. Tunaninsa ya kasance wutar bege da ba ta mutuwa a cikin lokacin zalunci, kuma bai rasa hasken gaskiya ba a cikin duhun tsanantawa. A yau, 'ci gaba' nasa har yanzu yana raye a cikin hankalinmu, kuma 'fahimta kai tsaye' ta zama kambu mai haskaka hanya a cikin rikitarwa na rayuwa. Sautin Henri Bergson har yanzu yana wuce lokaci, yana ci gaba da raɗa mana game da abubuwan da muka samu na rayuwa da kuma yiwuwar juyin halitta mai ƙirƙira.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William of Ockham ya kasance friar na Franciscan kuma masanin falsafa na ƙarni na 14 daga Ingila, wanda ya gabatar da 'Reza ta Ockham' kuma ya ƙalubalanci ikon Paparoma.
key_achievements: Gabatar da ka'idar Reza ta Ockham
Jagorantar ci gaban tunanin nominalism
Sukar ikon Paparoma da kuma da'awar gyaran Coci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri mai girma a kan ci gaban kimiyyar zamani, falsafa, da tunanin siyasa.

william-of-ockham.epic:
William of Ockham ya kasance wani friar na Franciscan, masanin falsafar Scholastic, kuma masanin tauhidi daga Ingila, wanda ya yi aiki daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 13 zuwa tsakiyar ƙarni na 14. Turai a kusan shekara ta 1287, lokacin haihuwarsa, lokaci ne na kololuwar falsafar Scholastic ta Tsakiya da kuma muhawara mai zurfi ta ilimi, amma kuma lokaci ne mai cike da tashin hankali inda rikici tsakanin ikon Paparoma da ikon sarakunan duniya ke ƙara tsananta. An haife shi a Surrey, Ingila, ya shiga tsarin Franciscan tun yana ƙarami, ya fara rayuwa mai tsauri ta addini, kuma daga baya ya nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki ta hanyar zurfafa bincike a fannin tauhidi da falsafa a Jami'ar Oxford. A wannan lokacin ne ya haɓaka ka'idar hanyar "Reza ta Ockham," wacce ke nuna cewa dole ne a kawar da zato marasa amfani a cikin muhawarar metaphysical masu rikitarwa kuma a zaɓi bayani mafi sauƙi. An ba da sunansa ga wannan ka'ida, kuma tana wakiltar matsayinsa na falsafa wanda ke rage da'awar ontological kuma yana jaddada shaidar empirical. Bincikensa na ilimi ya shafi fannoni daban-daban kamar dabaru, kimiyyar lissafi, da tauhidi, kuma ya yi sauri ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan mutane a cikin tunanin zamanin da. Tunaninsa mai haske da mai mahimmanci ya ba da sabon girgiza ga duniyar ilimi a lokacin, yana nuna sabon salo na tunani.

Shaharar William of Ockham ba ta tsaya ga nasarorin ilimi kawai ba, amma ta kai shi tsakiyar manyan muhawarar ilimi da siyasa waɗanda suka girgiza Turai a ƙarni na 14. Ya ɗauki matsayi mai mahimmanci game da cikakken ikon Paparoma John XXII da arzikin duniya na Cocin, yana kare ruhun talauci na Franciscan. Musamman ma, ya yi adawa da Paparoma yana amfani da ikon duniya, kuma ya yi tambaya game da rashin kuskuren Paparoma (infallibility), yana mai cewa ikon Coci ya kamata ya dogara ne akan Littafi Mai Tsarki da majalisun coci. Waɗannan da'awarsa sun fusata Paparoma a lokacin, kuma a ƙarshe, a cikin 1324, an kira shi zuwa fadar Paparoma a Avignon, Faransa, don a bincika shi bisa zargin bidi'a. A Avignon, an tsare shi a gida na tsawon shekaru, kuma a wannan lokacin ya fahimci zurfin cin hanci da rashawa da cin zarafin iko na Paparoma. Wannan gwaji ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci a cikin tunaninsa, kuma ya ƙarfafa ra'ayinsa na sukar ikon Paparoma, yana ci gaba da zurfafa tunani game da ainihin Coci da iyakokin iko. Ƙarfin halinsa na ilimi ya kasance fuskantar ikon addini mai ƙarfi na lokacin kai tsaye.

Tsarewa a gida a Avignon ya kasance babban gwaji ga William of Ockham, amma bai karya ruhun gwagwarmayarsa ba. A cikin 1328, don guje wa tsanantawar Paparoma John XXII, ya tsere daga Avignon tare da Michael of Cesena, Janar Ministan Franciscan, da sauran su, kuma ya nemi mafaka a Munich don samun kariya daga Sarkin Roman Mai Tsarki, Louis IV. Tun da Louis IV ma yana adawa da Paparoma, Ockham ya sami yanayi a kotun Sarkin inda zai iya bayyana ra'ayoyinsa cikin 'yanci. A lokacin gudun hijirarsa, ya rubuta littattafai da yawa na siyasa da tauhidi waɗanda ke musanta ikon Paparoma na duniya da kuma sukar rashin kuskuren Paparoma. Ya jaddada cewa Paparoma jagora ne na ruhaniya kawai, ba mai mulkin duniya ba, kuma ikon Coci ya kamata ya dogara ne akan yardar muminai da Littafi Mai Tsarki. Waɗannan da'awar sun kasance babban ƙalubale ga tsarin Paparoma mai rinjaye a Turai ta Tsakiya, kuma sun ba da gudummawa ga kafa tushen tunani na Gyaran Furotesta na gaba. Ko da yake Paparoma ya kore shi daga Coci, bai taɓa barin imaninsa ba kuma ya ci gaba da gwagwarmayar ilimi, yana yin tasiri mai girma a kan tunanin Yammacin Turai na ƙarshen zamanin da.

An yi imanin cewa William of Ockham ya mutu a Munich a kusan shekara ta 1347, kuma bayan mutuwarsa, ra'ayoyinsa sun bar alama mai dorewa a tarihin tunanin Yammacin Turai. "Reza ta Ockham" da ya gabatar ta zama muhimmiyar ka'ida ta hanyar kimiyya wacce ke neman sauƙi da tattalin arziki, kuma har yau ana amfani da ita a matsayin muhimmiyar kayan aikin tunani a cikin warware matsaloli daban-daban, har ma a fannin kimiyya, falsafa, da kuma fasahar hankali (AI). Matsayinsa na nominalist, wanda ke musanta gaskiyar ra'ayoyin duniya, ya ba da muhimmiyar tushe ta tunani ga ci gaban empiricism da kimiyyar zamani. Bugu da ƙari, sukar da ya yi game da ikon Paparoma da kuma da'awarsa na raba Coci da Jiha sun zaburar da masu Gyaran Furotesta na gaba, kuma sun yi tasiri a kan samuwar tunanin siyasa na zamani. An ɗauke shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa motsinsu ta hanyar nominalists na ƙarni na 15. Cocin Ingila yana tunawa da shi a ranar 10 ga Afrilu a matsayin ranar mutuwarsa. Ra'ayoyinsa sun kuma yi tasiri a kan tushen tunani na masu Gyaran Furotesta kamar Martin Luther, kuma ana tunawa da shi tare da sauran majagaba waɗanda suka ba da gudummawa ga sake fasalin yanayin ilimi na Turai a ƙarshen zamanin da).

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ernst Mach masanin kimiyyar lissafi ne kuma masanin falsafa na Austriya a karni na 19, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga kimiyya da falsafa ta hanyar Lambar Mach da Empirio-criticism.
key_achievements: Gabatar da ra'ayin Lambar Mach da binciken raƙuman ruwa
Sukar sararin samaniya da lokaci na Newton (Ka'idar Mach)
Tsara Empirio-criticism da tasiri ga logical positivism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya kafa tushe mai mahimmanci ga ka'idar dangantaka ta Einstein da ci gaban falsafar kimiyya ta zamani.

ernst-mach.epic:
Ernst Mach (1838-1916) ya kasance majagaba a fannin kimiyyar lissafi kuma masanin falsafa, wanda ya yi aiki a cikin yanayin ilimi mai cike da rudani na Daular Austriya a tsakiyar karni na 19. A lokacin, Turai tana fuskantar juyin juya halin masana'antu da zamanin zinariya na gano kimiyya, inda ra'ayin duniya da ilimin kimiyyar lissafi na Newton ya mamaye sosai. An haife shi a ranar 18 ga Fabrairu, 1838, a wani ƙaramin ƙauye a Moravia, Mach ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi game da abubuwan da ke faruwa a yanayi da kuma tunani mai zurfi game da ra'ayoyin da aka saba tun daga ƙuruciyarsa. Ya gina tushen iliminsa ta hanyar nazarin lissafi da kimiyyar lissafi a Jami'ar Charles da ke Prague, kuma musamman ma, ya fara haɓaka fahimtar falsafa cewa hankali da gogewa sune tushen ilimi. Wannan ya zama iri na tsarin falsafarsa na musamman, wato Empirio-criticism, a nan gaba. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ba wai kawai don samun ilimi ba ce, a'a, ta kasance don jefa tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da yadda mutane ke fahimtar duniya.

Wani muhimmin juyi a tafiyar Mach ta ilimi shi ne bincikensa mai zurfi game da sararin samaniya da lokaci na Newton. Ya nuna cewa ra'ayoyin cikakken iko da ke tushen ilimin kimiyyar lissafi na Newton ba za a iya lura da su ta hanyar gogewa ba, kuma ya gabatar da **Ka'idar Mach**, wadda ke cewa dukan motsi yana da alaƙa kuma yana ƙaddara ta hanyar mu'amala da sauran abubuwa masu nauyi a cikin sararin samaniya. Ka'idar Mach wani hasashe ne cewa juriya na abu yana ƙaddara ta hanyar rabon nauyi na dukan sararin samaniya, kuma daga baya ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban ka'idar dangantaka ta gabaɗaya ta Albert Einstein. Bugu da ƙari, ya gudanar da bincike na farko game da motsin abubuwa masu sauri fiye da sauti da kuma abubuwan da ke faruwa na raƙuman ruwa. Musamman ma, ya gabatar da ra'ayin **Lambar Mach**, wadda ke nuna rabon gudun abu zuwa gudun sauti, don kafa tushen binciken jirgin sama mai sauri fiye da sauti. Waɗannan bincikensa sun kalubalanci ra'ayoyin da aka fi sani a fannin kimiyyar lissafi a lokacin, kuma sun kasance da alaƙa mai zurfi da imaninsa na falsafa cewa binciken kimiyya ya kamata a iyakance shi ga abubuwan da za a iya lura da su ta hanyar gogewa kawai.

A matsayinsa na farfesa a Jami'ar Charles da ke Prague da Jami'ar Vienna, Mach ya mai da hankali kan tsara da yaɗa falsafarsa ta musamman, wato **Empirio-criticism**. Empirio-criticism wani matsayi ne na falsafa wanda ke cewa dukan ilimi yana fitowa ne kawai daga gogewar hankali, kuma kimiyya ya kamata ta bayyana tsari da alaƙar waɗannan gogewar hankali. Ya jaddada cewa ya kamata a cire hasashe na falsafa ko ra'ayoyin da ba za a iya tabbatar da su ba daga kimiyya, kuma ya nuna shakku game da ra'ayin gaskiya mai ma'ana kamar atomism wanda ya yadu a fannin kimiyya a lokacin. Waɗannan da'awarsa sun buƙaci sake nazarin tushen kimiyya, don haka sun haifar da muhawara mai zafi a cikin ilimi na zamani. Musamman ma, faɗa da masana kimiyya masu goyon bayan gaskiyar atom ya kasance muhimmin sashi na gwagwarmayarsa ta ilimi. Duk da haka, Mach bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba a cikin imaninsa duk da waɗannan sukar da muhawara, kuma ya ƙarfafa matsayinsa na falsafa ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce kamar 'Binciken Hankali (Die Analyse der Empfindungen)'. Tunaninsa ya jaddada tsaurin hanyar kimiyya, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga logical positivism na baya da kuma samuwar Vienna Circle.

Gadon Ernst Mach ya kasance mai zurfi kuma mai faɗi a fannin kimiyyar lissafi da falsafa. Ra'ayinsa na Lambar Mach ya zama wani muhimmin sashi na injiniyancin sararin samaniya na zamani, kuma binciken raƙuman ruwa ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ilimin ruwa. Fiye da duka, Empirio-criticism dinsa da sukar da ya yi wa ilimin kimiyyar lissafi na Newton sun ba Albert Einstein muhimmiyar kwarin gwiwa wajen tsara ka'idar dangantaka. Einstein ya samo ra'ayin cewa rabon nauyi na dukan sararin samaniya yana shafar juriya daga Ka'idar Mach, kuma ya yi amfani da shi don sake fasalta alaƙar da ke tsakanin nauyi da sararin samaniya. Ko da bayan mutuwar Mach, falsafarsa ta zama ginshiƙin motsin logical positivism a farkon karni na 20, kuma ta haifar da tattaunawa game da yanayi da iyakokin ilimin kimiyya. Ya kafa ƙa'idodi masu tsauri cewa kimiyya dole ne ta dogara ne kawai ga hujjojin gogewa, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen canza yanayin falsafar kimiyya ta zamani. Ana kwatanta ra'ayoyinsa da na masana falsafar kimiyya na zamani kamar Henri Poincaré, kuma ana nazarin su sosai a yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William Tyndale ya kasance mai gyara addini a Ingila a karni na 16, wanda ya jagoranci fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki na farko zuwa Turanci.
key_achievements: Fassarar Sabon Alkawari zuwa Turanci bisa ga ainihin rubutun Helenanci (1526)
Fassarar wasu sassa na Tsohon Alkawari (kamar Pentateuch) zuwa Turanci
Kafa tushen yaɗuwar Littafi Mai Tsarki na Turanci da shahada
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fassararsa ta zama tushen Littafi Mai Tsarki na King James, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga harshen Turanci da addinin Kiristanci.

william-tyndale.epic:
A farkon karni na 16, Turai ta kasance cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani, inda babban rafin Gyaran Addini ke gudana. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, **William Tyndale (an haife shi kusan 1494)** ya bar wata alama mai zurfi a tarihi a matsayin majagaba na fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa Turanci kuma mai gyara addini. Bayan ya sami ilimi mai zurfi a jami'o'in Oxford da Cambridge, inda ya yi nazarin harsunan gargajiya da tauhidi, ya ji takaici sosai game da gaskiyar cewa a lokacin, Littafi Mai Tsarki na Latin Vulgate ne kawai aka yarda da shi a hukumance, kuma talakawa ba za su iya karantawa da fahimtar Littafi Mai Tsarki da kansu ba. Ya riƙe imani mai ƙarfi cewa gaskiyar Littafi Mai Tsarki bai kamata ya zama mallakin wasu 'yan tsiraru masu gata ba, kuma kowane mutum ya kamata ya sami damar samun Kalmar Allah a cikin harshensa na asali. Wannan wani tunani ne mai tsattsauran ra'ayi wanda ya kalubalanci ikon coci da al'adunsa kai tsaye a lokacin. Tyndale ya kafa babban buri na fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa Turanci domin dukkan mutanen Ingila su iya karantawa, kuma wannan ya zama manufar rayuwarsa.

Wannan buri na Tyndale ya fuskanci tsayin daka mai ƙarfi daga cocin Ingila a lokacin. Bishop Cuthbert Tunstall na London ya ayyana yunƙurinsa na fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki a matsayin bidi'a kuma bai ba shi izini ba. Duk da cewa Ingila a zamanin Henry VIII tana cikin rikici mai tsanani da Papacy, har yanzu tana riƙe da ra'ayin mazan jiya game da yaɗuwar Littafi Mai Tsarki, wanda zai iya kawo cikas ga ikon coci. A ƙarshe, Tyndale ya gane cewa ba zai iya cimma burinsa a Ingila ba, kuma a kusan 1524, ya tafi gudun hijira zuwa nahiyar Turai. Ya yi yawo a wurare kamar Hamburg, Wittenberg, Worms a Jamus, da Antwerp a Belgium, inda ya shaida kuma ya sami tasiri daga motsin Gyaran Addini na Luther. Musamman a Worms, ya yi nasarar buga fassarar Sabon Alkawari zuwa Turanci a asirce a 1526. Wannan fassarar, wadda aka fassara kai tsaye daga ainihin rubutun Helenanci, ta yi alfahari da daidaito da kuzari waɗanda suka bambanta ta da fassarorin da suka dogara ga Latin Vulgate a lokacin.

Bayan an buga Sabon Alkawari na Tyndale na Turanci, an shigo da dubban kwafi cikin Ingila a asirce, kuma wannan ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Ingila. Coci da masarauta sun yi tsanani wajen murkushe shi, suna ƙona fassarorinsa da hukunta waɗanda suka mallake su, amma Littafi Mai Tsarki ya yaɗu cikin sauri a ɓoye. Duk da ci gaba da bin diddigi da sa ido, Tyndale ya ci gaba da aikin fassarar Tsohon Alkawari, yana fassara Pentateuch (Littattafan Musa biyar) da Littafin Yunana, da sauransu. Rayuwarsa ta kasance jerin gudu da tashin hankali mai ban tsoro, amma bai taɓa barin imaninsa ba. Amma a 1535, an kama shi a Antwerp saboda cin amanar Henry Phillips kuma aka ɗaure shi a gidan yarin Vilvoorde Castle a Belgium. Bayan ya sha wahala a kurkuku fiye da shekara guda, an yi masa shari'a bisa zargin bidi'a, kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 6 ga Oktoba, 1536, ya fuskanci shahada ta hanyar rataya sannan aka ƙone shi. An ce kiran sa na ƙarshe shine, “Ya Ubangiji, ka buɗe idanun Sarkin Ingila!”

Shahadar William Tyndale ta kawo babban canji a Ingila, kamar yadda ya yi fata. Bayan mutuwarsa, Henry VIII a ƙarshe ya ba da izinin fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki zuwa Turanci, kuma fassarar Tyndale ta zama tushen Littafi Mai Tsarki na Matthew da Babban Littafi Mai Tsarki. Musamman, Littafi Mai Tsarki na King James (King James Version) wanda aka buga a 1611 ya aro fiye da kashi 80% daga fassarar Tyndale, yana nuna girman gadonsa na harshe da tauhidi. Ana kiransa uban Littafi Mai Tsarki na Turanci, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai wajen samar da salon rubutu na Turanci da kuma ƙamus. A yau, akwai fassarorin Littafi Mai Tsarki na Turanci da yawa, amma tushensu yana da zurfi a cikin jarumtaka da sadaukarwar Tyndale. Rayuwarsa ta ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda suka yi yaƙi don 'yancin addini da yaɗuwar ilimi, kuma wannan yana da alaƙa da ruhun majagaba na zamaninsa kamar John Wycliffe.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Geoffrey Chaucer (c. 1343-1400) mawaki ne kuma marubuci na ƙarni na 14 a Ingila, wanda ya kafa Ingilishi na Tsakiya a matsayin harshen adabi kuma ya bar mana 'The Canterbury Tales'.
key_achievements: Kafa matsayin adabi na Ingilishi na Tsakiya
Rubuta 'The Canterbury Tales'
Ana girmama shi a matsayin Uban Adabin Ingilishi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa, waɗanda ke ɗauke da zurfin fahimta da zolaya game da yanayin ɗan adam, har yau suna ba da kwarjini ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya.

chaucer.epic:
Geoffrey Chaucer (an haife shi kusan 1343) ya kasance mawaki, marubuci, masanin falsafa, jami'in diflomasiyya, kuma ma'aikacin gwamnati wanda ya rayu a cikin lokaci mai cike da rudani a Ingila a ƙarshen ƙarni na 14. Ingila ta ƙarni na 14, lokacin haihuwarsa, ta kasance cikin hargitsi mai tsanani na zamantakewa saboda Yaƙin Shekaru Dari da kuma baƙar annoba, kuma tana da yanayin harsuna masu yawa inda Latin ke harshen ilimi da addini, Faransanci harshen fada da manyan mutane, kuma Ingilishi harshen talakawa. An haife shi a cikin dangi mai arziki na masu sayar da giya a London, Chaucer ya kasance a buɗe ga nau'ikan al'ummomi da harsuna daban-daban tun yana yaro. Tun da wuri, ya shiga aikin fada a matsayin bawa ga wani dangi mai daraja, inda ya sami gogewa a rayuwar fada kuma ya koyi al'adun manyan mutane da siyasar su, wanda ya zama tushen zurfin fahimta a cikin ayyukansa na gaba. Rayuwarsa ta farko ba ta kasance ta ɗan kasuwa kawai ba, amma lokaci ne mai muhimmanci na lura da duniya da binciken harshe a matsayin babban marubuci na gaba.

Rayuwar Chaucer ta wuce hanyar marubuci kawai, an cika ta da gogewa daban-daban a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya da ma'aikacin gwamnati. Yayin da yake riƙe da manyan mukamai a fadar Sarki Edward III da Sarki Richard II, an tura shi a matsayin jakadan diflomasiyya zuwa Faransa da Italiya sau da yawa. Ziyarar da ya kai Italiya ta zama juyawar adabi a gare shi, inda ya sha kwarjinin adabi da dabarun ba da labari daga manyan marubutan Renaissance na Italiya kamar Dante, Petrarch, da Boccaccio. Kuma gogewar da ya yi na kama shi a Faransa a lokacin Yaƙin Shekaru Dari sannan aka fanshe shi ya koya masa bala'in yaƙi da raunin halittar ɗan adam. Duk da cewa yana gudanar da mukamai na aiki kamar mai kula da haraji da mai kula da ayyukan sarauta, ya ci gaba da ayyukansa na rubuce-rubuce na adabi a lokacin hutunsa. Duk da cewa Faransanci ko Latin sun fi yawa a cikin al'ummar masu ilimi na Ingila a lokacin, Chaucer ya yanke shawarar rubuta ayyukansa a cikin Ingilishi, harshen talakawa, kuma wannan zaɓi ne mai muhimmanci wanda zai yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin adabin Ingila.

Tafiyar adabi ta Chaucer ta kai kololuwa ta hanyar babban aikinsa, *The Canterbury Tales*. *The Canterbury Tales* wani almara ne mai tsarin labari-ciki-labari inda mahajjata daga nau'ikan al'ummomi daban-daban ke ba da labaransu a kan hanyarsu ta zuwa Canterbury, yana nuna hoton al'ummar Ingila ta tsakiya a fili. Ta hanyar wannan aikin, ya ɗaukaka Ingilishi na Tsakiya, wanda a lokacin ake ɗauka a matsayin harshe mara kyau, zuwa harshen adabi, yana faɗaɗa faɗin da zurfin bayyanawarsa. Cikakkun bayanai da zolaya waɗanda ke nuna halayen kowane mutum, daga firistoci, jarumai, 'yan kasuwa, zuwa manoma, suna ba da zurfin fahimta game da sha'awar ɗan adam ta duniya, munafunci, imani, soyayya, da cin amana. Duk da matsalolin kuɗi da hargitsi na siyasa kamar saukar Sarki Richard II, Chaucer bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba. Ya lura kuma ya rubuta farin ciki da baƙin ciki na ɗan adam, yana bayyana saɓanin al'umma da ainihin yanayin ɗan adam ba tare da ɓoyewa ba. Ko da yake *The Canterbury Tales* bai kammala ba, wannan yana nuna sarkakiya ta rayuwa da yiwuwar labarai marasa iyaka.

Geoffrey Chaucer ana kiransa "Uban Adabin Ingilishi," kuma ayyukansa sun bar alama marar gogewa a tarihin adabin Ingila. Ya ɗaukaka Ingilishi na Tsakiya daga yaren yanki kawai zuwa harshe mai tsananin kyau da wadata wanda zai iya bayyana adabi. Ayyukansa sun zama tushen kwarjini ga marubutan Birtaniya da yawa, ciki har da William Shakespeare, kuma sun ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban da daidaita harshen Ingilishi. Ya rasu a ranar 25 ga Oktoba, 1400, kuma shi ne mutum na farko da aka binne a "Poets' Corner" a Westminster Abbey, wanda ke nuna darajarsa a lokacin rayuwarsa da matsayinsa na adabi bayan mutuwarsa. Har yau, ana karanta kuma ana nazarin *The Canterbury Tales* a duk faɗin duniya saboda zurfin fahimtarsa game da yanayin ɗan adam, barkwanci marar lokaci, da tsarin labari mai ban mamaki. Ayyukansa, tare da ayyukan zamani kamar *Piers Plowman* na William Langland, sun buɗe zamanin zinariya na adabin Ingilishi na Tsakiya, kuma sun ba da kwarjini mai zurfi ga marubutan gaba kamar Shakespeare.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jonathan Swift marubucin zolaya ne kuma limami mai tasiri a ƙarni na 18 a Ingila, wanda ya soki ɗan adam da al'umma ta hanyar 'Gulliver's Travels'.
key_achievements: Ya rubuta 'Gulliver's Travels', yana nuna kololuwar adabin zolaya.
Ya gabatar da suka kan matsalar talauci a Ireland ta hanyar 'A Modest Proposal'.
Ya shiga cikin muhawarar siyasa ta zamaninsa sosai ta hanyar takardun siyasa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun kasance littattafan gargajiya waɗanda suka wuce lokaci, suna ba da fahimta game da yanayin ɗan adam da munafuncin al'umma.

jonathan-swift.epic:
Jonathan Swift (an haife shi a shekara ta 1667) ya kasance fitaccen marubucin zolaya, marubucin kasidu, marubucin takardun siyasa, kuma limamin Cocin Anglican wanda ya rayu a cikin zamanin hargitsi da tashin hankali na farkon ƙarni na 18 a Ingila da Ireland. An haife shi a Dublin, Ireland, a ranar 30 ga Nuwamba, 1667, watanni kaɗan bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Swift ya girma a ƙarƙashin kulawar kawunsa a matsayin ɗan maraya. A wancan lokacin, Birtaniya tana cikin wani lokaci na ƙaruwar rikice-rikicen siyasa da addini bayan Juyin Juya Halin Daraja (1688), kuma Ireland tana fuskantar matsalolin tattalin arziki da zamantakewa a ƙarƙashin mulkin Birtaniya. Wannan yanayin tarihi ya yi tasiri sosai wajen samar da hankalinsa mai zurfi da saurin motsawa da kuma hangen nesansa mai sukar lamiri. Ya yi karatu a Kilkenny College da Trinity College Dublin, kuma daga baya ya yi aiki a matsayin sakataren Sir William Temple, wani fitaccen jami'in diflomasiyya kuma ɗan siyasa, inda ya haɓaka basirar adabinsa kuma ya sami fahimtar zurfi game da fannoni daban-daban na al'umma. Wannan lokacin ya zama muhimmin tushe a gare shi don zama marubuci wanda ya hango zurfin zamaninsa da zolaya mai kaifi kamar takobi.

Bayan mutuwar Sir William Temple, an naɗa Swift a matsayin limamin Cocin Anglican kuma ya yi hidima a matsayin limamin coci a Ireland. Amma burinsa bai tsaya a ƙasar Ireland ba, sai ya tafi London kuma ya fara aiki tuƙuru a fagen siyasa da adabi. Da farko ya goyi bayan Jam'iyyar Whig, amma a hankali ya koma Jam'iyyar Tory kuma ya yi suna sosai a matsayin babban mai sharhi kan siyasa kuma mai yada farfaganda ga gwamnatin Tory. Musamman ma, ayyukansa na zolaya da aka buga ba tare da sunansa ba sun soki munafunci da rashin adalci na al'umma, addini, da fagen adabi na wancan lokacin sosai. Daga cikin fitattun ayyukansa akwai "A Tale of a Tub" (1704), wanda ya yi zolaya kan tsattsauran ra'ayin addini da girman kai na ilimi, da kuma "The Battle of the Books" (1704), wanda ya yi magana kan muhawarar fifiko tsakanin adabin gargajiya da na zamani. A wannan lokacin, ta hanyar takardun siyasa kamar "The Conduct of the Allies" (1711), ya yi tasiri mai girma wajen samar da ra'ayin jama'a, yana mai kira ga kawo ƙarshen Yaƙin Gadon Sarautar Spain, kuma ya zama wani jigo a cikin masu ilimi na London.

Amma da gwamnatin Tory ta faɗi a shekara ta 1714, Swift ya rasa matsayinsa na siyasa kuma an naɗa shi Babban Limamin St. Patrick's Cathedral a Dublin, Ireland, dole ne ya koma Ireland. Wannan ya kasance kusan koma baya ne idan aka kwatanta da yadda yake fatan samun babban matsayi na addini a Ingila. Duk da haka, wannan gwagwarmaya ta sa ya fahimci wahalar mutanen Irish sosai, kuma ya zama dalilin samar da mafi ƙarfin ayyukansa na zolaya. Ya soki lamiri sosai kan manufofin mulkin Birtaniya a Ireland da kuma rashin kulawa da talaucin mutanen Irish. Fitaccen littafinsa, "Gulliver's Travels" (1726), labari ne na tafiye-tafiyen Gulliver zuwa ƙasashe na almara kamar Lilliput, Brobdingnag, Laputa, da Houyhnhnms, wanda ya yi zolaya mai zafi da tsanani kan wawancin ɗan adam, cin hanci da rashawa na siyasa, munafunci na zamantakewa, da kuma girman kai na wayewar Turai. Bugu da ƙari, "A Modest Proposal" (1729) ya gabatar da wani abin da ke girgiza hankali, yana ba da shawarar cewa talakawa na Ireland su sayar da yaran da ke fama da yunwa ga masu arziki na Ingila a matsayin abinci, yana fallasa mummunan halin da ake ciki a Ireland a wancan lokacin da kuma rashin kulawar masu mulkin Birtaniya da zagi mai tsanani da ban mamaki, wanda ya haifar da babban martani.

Shekarun ƙarshe na Swift sun kasance cike da wahala saboda rashin ji, jiri, da alamomin hauka sakamakon cutar Meniere. Ya rasu a ranar 19 ga Oktoba, 1745, a Dublin kuma aka binne shi a St. Patrick's Cathedral. Gadonsa ya bar tasiri mai girma da ba za a manta ba a tarihin adabi. "Gulliver's Travels" ya wuce littafin yara kawai, ya zama littafin sukar zamantakewa mai zurfi da hikima kuma tunani na falsafa mai zurfi game da yanayin ɗan adam, littafin gargajiya wanda har yau ake karantawa da nazari a duk faɗin duniya. Zolayarsa mai kaifi da fushinsa na ɗabi'a mai tsarki sun wuce lokaci, suna kasancewa murya mai gargaɗi da ke ratsa zukata game da girman kai na masu iko da wawancin ɗan adam. Swift ba kawai marubuci ba ne, an tuna da shi a matsayin alama ce ta masanin ilimi wanda ya yi yaƙi da zalunci kuma ya tsaya tare da marasa ƙarfi. Ayyukansa, tare da na Voltaire, wani ginshiƙi ne na gadon ilimi wanda ya haskaka zamaninsa da hankali da ruhin suka a zamanin wayewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: George Sand marubuciya ce ta Faransa a zamanin Romanticism na karni na 19, wacce ta bar littattafai sama da 70 da ke magana kan 'yancin mata da gyaran zamantakewa.
key_achievements: Ta shiga duniyar adabi da sunan alkalami na namiji, tana kalubalantar nuna bambanci na zamantakewa
Ta rubuta littattafai da yawa da ke bincika cin gashin kai na mata da soyayya
Ta yi aiki a matsayin muhimmiyar marubuciya kuma mai gyaran zamantakewa a zamanin Romanticism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta faɗaɗa hangen nesa na marubutan mata kuma ta kalubalanci haramcin zamantakewa, kuma har yau ana tuna ta a matsayin alamar 'yancin mata da 'yancin fasaha.

george-sand.epic:
George Sand (1804-1876) marubuciya ce ta Faransa, mai rubuta tarihin rayuwa, kuma 'yar jarida wacce ta wakilci zamanin Romanticism na Turai a karni na 19. Faransa a farkon karni na 19, wanda ya fuskanci lokacin tashin hankali tare da faduwar Daular Napoleon, lokaci ne da adabin Romanticism ya bunƙasa a cikin raƙuman ruwa na canjin zamantakewa da siyasa. An haife ta a Paris a shekara ta 1804 da sunan Amantine Lucile Aurore Dupin de Francueil, tana da asali mai rikitarwa, an haife ta daga dangin sarauta da kuma uwa mai talakawa. Bayan ta rasa mahaifinta tun tana ƙarama, ta girma a gidan kakarta a Nohant, inda ta nutsu cikin yanayi da karatu. A ƙarƙashin kulawar kakarta mai tsauri amma mai ƙauna, ta haɓaka tunani mai zaman kansa da ƙarfin hali, kuma ta sami hangen nesa mai faɗi game da al'umma ta hanyar hulɗa da mutane daga kowane mataki. Wannan tushe ya yi tasiri sosai a kan ayyukanta na gaba, kuma ya zama ginshiƙi don bincika rashin daidaito na zamantakewa da kuma ainihin motsin zuciyar ɗan adam.

A shekara ta 1822, ta auri Baron Casimir Dudevant kuma sun haifi 'ya'ya biyu, amma wannan auren ya kawo mata takaici mai zurfi. Matsayin gargajiya da aka tilasta wa mata a lokacin da kuma zaluncin al'ummar maza ba su iya danne sha'awarta ta ilimi da ruhinta mai 'yanci ba. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1831, ta bar igiyar aure kuma ta tafi Paris, inda ta yanke shawarar fara sabuwar rayuwa a matsayin marubuciya. Don shawo kan iyakokin da take fuskanta a matsayin marubuciya a cikin duniyar adabi da maza ke mamaye, ta zaɓi sunan alkalami na namiji 'George Sand'. Wannan sunan alkalami ya nuna ƙarfin halinta na shawo kan iyakokin da marubutan mata ke fuskanta a lokacin da kuma fitar da muryarta da ƙarfin hali. Littafinta na farko, 'Indiana', wanda aka buga a shekara ta 1832, ya haifar da babban tasiri ta hanyar magance rayuwar mata da aka danne da kuma soyayya. Ayyukanta na farko kamar 'Valentine' (1832) da 'Lélia' (1833) sun bincika munafuncin zamantakewa da batutuwan cin gashin kai na mata da kaifi, suna kafa ta a matsayin muhimmiyar marubuciya a zamanin Romanticism. Ta sanya tufafin maza kuma ta rayu cikin 'yanci, tana kalubalantar al'adun zamantakewa na lokacin kai tsaye.

George Sand ta nuna ƙarfin ƙirƙira mai ban mamaki, ta bar fiye da littattafai 50, ciki har da littattafai sama da 70, wasannin kwaikwayo, da rubuce-rubucen siyasa. Ayyukanta sun wuce Romanticism mai sauƙi, suna magance hangen nesa na zamantakewa da kuma batun cin gashin kai na mata da zurfi. Soyayyarta da masu fasaha na lokacin kamar Alfred de Musset da Frédéric Chopin sun yi tasiri sosai a rayuwarta, kuma musamman dangantakarta ta shekaru goma (1838-1847) da Chopin ta kasance tushen ilham ta fasaha da kuma abin da jama'a ke ci gaba da sha'awa da suka. Ko da a cikin gwagwarmayar rayuwarta ta sirri, ba ta taɓa ajiye alkalaminta ba. A lokacin juyin juya halin 1848, ta shiga cikin siyasa sosai, tana goyon bayan ra'ayoyin gurguzu, tana rubuta sharhin siyata, da kuma buga jaridu. Wannan shigar siyasa ya zurfafa sha'awarta ta gyaran zamantakewa da adalci a cikin ayyukanta. Ta tsaya tsayin daka a kan imaninta da salon rayuwarta mai 'yanci, tana fuskantar nuna bambanci da suka na zamantakewa, kuma ko da bayan ta koma Nohant, ta ci gaba da rubutu da kuma samar da wuri don masu fasaha da masana su yi hulɗa, tana ci gaba da ayyukanta na adabi.

George Sand, wacce ta mutu a Nohant a shekara ta 1876, ta bar alama mai zurfi a tarihin adabin Faransa na karni na 19. Ta kasance fiye da marubuciya kawai; ta kasance majagaba wacce ta yi gaba da zamani, tana kare haƙƙin mata da 'yancin fasaha. Ta bincika batutuwan tunani da zamantakewa masu rikitarwa a cikin littattafai sama da 70, tana wakiltar muryar mata kuma tana ba da ilham mai zurfi ga marubuta na gaba. Ayyukanta ana ɗaukar su a matsayin muhimmin ɓangare na motsin Romanticism, kuma har yau ana nazarin su don darajar adabi da saƙon su na sukar zamantakewa. George Sand ta kalubalanci haramcin al'ummar maza, ta tabbatar da cin gashin kai da 'yancin mata ta hanyar rayuwarta da fasaharta, kuma ta faɗaɗa hangen nesa na mata masu fasaha da masana. Rayuwarta mai jaruntaka da adabinta sun kasance alamar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin mata da adalci na zamantakewa. Rayuwarta da ayyukanta, tare da na marubuta na zamani kamar Victor Hugo da Honoré de Balzac, sun sanya yanayin adabin Faransa na karni na 19 ya zama mai launi, kuma sun yi daidai da gwagwarmayar sauran marubutan mata na Turai kamar Jane Austen da 'yan uwan Brontë waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin wakiltar muryar mata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Paul Cézanne wani mai zane ne na Faransa daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin gada tsakanin Impressionism da Cubism.
key_achievements: Ya taka rawar majagaba a fasahar Post-Impressionism.
Ya yi tasiri a fasahar avant-garde ta ƙarni na 20, ciki har da Cubism.
Ya kafa salon zane na musamman wanda ke bincika ainihin tsarin yanayi.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Harshen zanensa na kirkire-kirkire ya zama tushen fasahar zamani, kuma yana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fasaha marasa adadi har zuwa yau.

paul-cezanne.epic:
Paul Cézanne, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1839, wani fitaccen mai zane ne na Faransa daga zamanin Post-Impressionism. Ya kasance majagaba wanda ya buɗe kofa ga fasahar avant-garde ta ƙarni na 20, ta hanyar gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman a cikin raƙuman ruwa na Impressionism a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. Aix-en-Provence, garin haihuwarsa, birni ne mai natsuwa a yankin Provence, kuma mahaifinsa, Louis Auguste Cézanne, babban ma'aikacin banki ne mai nasara. Mahaifinsa ya so ɗansa ya zama lauya, amma tun yana yaro, Cézanne ya riga ya mallaki sha'awa mai tsanani ga fasaha. Ya haɓaka basirar fasaharsa ta hanyar abota ta rayuwa da Émile Zola a lokacin karatunsa, kuma ya yanke shawarar zuwa Paris don bin hanyar zane. A lokacin, Paris tana cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani inda Impressionism ke fitowa, tana kalubalantar fasahar gargajiya ta ilimi. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Cézanne ya yi hulɗa da masu zane-zane na Impressionist, yana bincika sabbin hanyoyin bayyanawa, amma a cikin zuciyarsa akwai sha'awa mai zurfi don kama ainihin abin da ba ya mutuwa fiye da hotuna na ɗan lokaci. Ya ci gaba da neman hanyarsa a cikin cunkoson Paris da kuma kallon sanyi na duniyar fasaha, yana kafa kansa a matsayin mai fasaha.

A Paris, Paul Cézanne ya yi hulɗa da masu zane-zane na Impressionist, ciki har da Camille Pissarro, kuma bincikensu game da haske da launi ya rinjaye shi. Duk da haka, ya yi imanin cewa Impressionism ta fi mai da hankali kan hotuna na gani na ɗan lokaci, tana watsi da siffa mai ƙarfi da tsarin abubuwa. Wannan fahimta ta zama mafarkin canjin fasaharsa, kuma ya fara bincika ainihin siffofin abubuwa fiye da saman da ke wucewa. Wannan shine ɗayan mahimman ra'ayoyin 'Post-Impressionism', wanda ke nufin wani motsi na fasaha wanda ya shawo kan iyakokin Impressionism kuma ya bi bayyanawa ta musamman. Cézanne ya yi ƙoƙari ya nuna ƙarfi da dawwama na abubuwa a kan zane ta hanyar rage yanayi zuwa siffofin geometric kamar silinda, ƙwallo, da mazugi. Wannan hanyar da ya bi ta kasance ba a saba gani ba kuma tana da wuyar fahimta ga duniyar fasaha a lokacin. Ya sha fuskantar gazawa a nune-nunen Salon kuma masu sukar sun yi masa ba'a, yana ci gaba da gwagwarmaya shi kaɗai, amma bai taɓa yin sulhu da imaninsa na fasaha ba, yana mai da hankali kan binciken sabon harshe na zane. A wannan lokacin, ayyukansa sun fara nuna halaye na musamman waɗanda suka bambanta da Impressionism.

Lokacin da Paul Cézanne ya ji ba a gane shi ba kuma ya keɓe daga duniyar fasaha ta Paris, ya koma garinsu na Aix-en-Provence daga ƙarshen shekarun 1870, yana rayuwa kusan a keɓe, yana mai da hankali ga zane kawai. Ya ci gaba da zana batutuwa na musamman kamar Dutsen Sainte-Victoire, hotunan rayuwa na apple, da mutanen da ke wasan kati, yana zurfafa cikin ainihin batun. Hanyar aikinsa tana da jinkiri sosai kuma mai dagewa, har ma wasu zane-zane suna ɗaukar shekaru don kammalawa. Ya gina wata duniyar zane ta musamman ta hanyar haɗa gajerun goge-goge masu ƙarfi a kan zane, inda launi da siffa ke haɗuwa da juna ta hanyar halitta. Ya rushe tsarin hangen nesa na gargajiya kuma ya yi ƙoƙari ya nuna abubuwa a cikin siffa uku ta hanyar haɗa ra'ayoyi daban-daban a kan zane ɗaya. Wannan ƙoƙarinsa ya kasance mai ban mamaki a lokacinsa, kuma ya haifar da rudani ga mutane da yawa, amma bai taɓa girgiza ba ta hanyar kimantawa na waje kuma bai daina bincikensa na fasaha ba. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da wahalar fasaha da kaɗaici, amma gwagwarmayar kaɗaici ta wannan lokacin ta zama tushe wanda daga baya ya haskaka darajar juyin juya hali na ayyukansa.

A ranar 22 ga Oktoba, 1906, Paul Cézanne ya faɗi yayin da yake zane a waje kuma ya mutu. Ko da yake ya sami ɗan gane a lokacin rayuwarsa, bayan mutuwarsa, an fara sake kimanta ayyukansa, kuma sun yi tasiri mai girma a duniyar fasaha ta farkon ƙarni na 20. Musamman maganarsa, 'Ku bi da yanayi ta hanyar silinda, ƙwallo, mazugi,' ta ba da kwarin gwiwa mai mahimmanci ga haihuwar Cubism. Cubism wani motsi ne na fasaha wanda ke nazarin, rarrabawa, da sake ginawa abubuwa daga ra'ayoyi daban-daban, kuma Pablo Picasso da Georges Braque sun haɓaka shi ta hanyar gadon gwaje-gwajen zane na Cézanne. Don haka, Cézanne ya yi aiki a matsayin 'gada' tsakanin Impressionism na ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da fasahar avant-garde ta farkon ƙarni na 20, musamman Cubism, yana kafa tushen fasahar zamani. Ayyukansa sun wuce kawai sake nuna abubuwa, suna gabatar da sabon harshe na gani ta hanyar sake fassara ainihin tsarin abubuwa da sarari, kuma wannan yana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fasaha marasa adadi har zuwa yau. Ƙoƙarinsa na kirkire-kirkire, tare da hanyoyin musamman na sauran masu zane-zane na Post-Impressionist da suka yi aiki a lokaci guda, kamar Vincent van Gogh da Paul Gauguin, sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen faɗaɗa hangen nesa na fasahar zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Auguste Rodin ya kasance mai sassaka na Faransa a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya karya al'ada kuma ya buɗe sabon fagen sassaka na zamani.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar manyan ayyuka waɗanda suka bincika ciki na ɗan adam, kamar "Mai Tunani".
Ƙoƙarin aikin sassaka mai girma ta hanyar "Ƙofar Jahannama".
Bayyana wahala da sadaukarwa ta gama-gari ta hanyar "Mutanen Calais".
Jagorantar sabuntawa a sassaka ta hanyar cikakken bayani da bayyanar motsin rai.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa 'Uban Sassaka na Zamani', kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga masu fasaha na gaba, yana nuna hanyar sassaka ta zamani.

auguste-rodin.epic:
Auguste Rodin (an haife shi a shekara ta 1840) ya kasance babban mai sassaka na Faransa a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya karya tsarin sassaka na gargajiya kuma ya buɗe sabon fagen sassaka na zamani. An haife shi a kusa da Paris a shekara ta 1840, ya nuna zurfin sha'awar fasaha tun yana yaro, amma ya kasa shiga makarantar École des Beaux-Arts bayan ya fadi jarabawar shiga sau uku, wanda hakan ya hana shi shiga tsarin ilimi na yau da kullun. Amma wannan koma baya ya jagorance shi zuwa ga koyon kai, inda ya mai da hankali kan binciken jikin ɗan adam da kuma bayyana motsin rai da ciki na mutum. Ya kauce daga salon bayyanawa na Neoclassical wanda ya mamaye lokacin, Rodin ya fara gina nasa duniyar fasaha ta musamman, yana neman cikakken bayanin jikin ɗan adam da zurfin tunani da ke cikinsa. Ayyukansa na farko sun nuna farkon wannan bincike, kuma sun zama iri na duniyar sassaka mai juyin juya hali da zai bayyana daga baya. Ya yi ƙoƙari ya kama yanayin jiki da motsi na ɗan adam a sarari ta hanyar amfani da kayan daban-daban kamar yumbu, tagulla, da marmara. Ya cika da sha'awar bayyana ruhin mutane da wahalhalunsu, fiye da kamanninsu na waje.

Duniyar fasahar Rodin sau da yawa ta haifar da muhawara mai zafi da girgiza a cikin duniyar fasaha ta lokacin. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa na farko, 「L'Âge d'airain」 (Zaman Tagulla), wanda aka fitar a shekara ta 1877, ya kasance mai gaskiya sosai har aka zarge shi da yin simintin gyare-gyare kai tsaye daga samfurin rayuwa. Wannan lamari ne wanda a kaikaice ya tabbatar da yadda sassakarsa ke cike da rai da kuma gaskiya. Daga baya, 「La Porte de l'Enfer」 (Ƙofar Jahannama), wanda ya fara aiki a kai daga shekara ta 1880, wani aiki ne mai girma da bai kammala ba wanda aka yi wahayi daga "Divine Comedy" na Dante, yana ƙoƙarin bayyana wahalhalu da sha'awar ɗan adam a babban sikelin. 「Le Penseur」 (Mai Tunani), wanda aka tsara a matsayin wani ɓangare na wannan aikin, ya haifar da babban tasiri a duniya bayan an fitar da shi a matsayin aiki mai zaman kansa. Saboda cikakken bayanin jikin ɗan adam da kuma bayyanar motsin rai mai ƙarfi a cikin ayyukansa, an soki su a lokacin a matsayin marasa al'ada kuma wani lokacin ma batsa. Duk da waɗannan suka da muhawara, Auguste Rodin bai karaya ba kuma bai daina binciken rikitarwa da zurfin wanzuwar ɗan adam ba.

Auguste Rodin ya wuce kawai siffanta kyawawan siffofi; ya bincika rikitarwa da zurfin wanzuwar ɗan adam. Mutanen da ke cikin ayyukansa sau da yawa suna nuna wahala, ko kuma suna ƙoƙarin shawo kan wahala, ko kuma suna bayyana rikice-rikice na ciki. Ayyuka masu girma kamar 「Les Bourgeois de Calais」 (Mutanen Calais, 1884-1889) sun kama wahalhalu da jaruntakar shida na mutanen da suka yi niyyar sadaukar da kansu don ceton birnin a lokacin Yaƙin Shekaru Dari, suna nuna girman ruhin ɗan adam na gama-gari. Da farko, wannan aikin ya haifar da muhawara saboda ya bambanta da siffofin jarumai na gargajiya na sassaka na tunawa, amma a ƙarshe an gane basirarsa ta fasaha. Ayyuka kamar 「Le Baiser」 (Sumbar) suna nuna soyayya mai zafi, yayin da 「Le Baiser」 (Sumbar) kuma ke nuna jin kai na ɗan adam wanda ke fitowa ko da a cikin wahala. Ya yi amfani da kayan daban-daban kamar yumbu, tagulla, da marmara don bayyana yanayin jiki da motsi na ɗan adam a sarari, kuma ya ƙara tasiri mai ban mamaki ga ayyukansa ta hanyar hulɗar haske da inuwa. Duk da waɗannan gwagwarmaya da ƙalubale marasa ƙarewa, Auguste Rodin ya ci gaba da riƙe imaninsa na fasaha da ƙarfi.

Auguste Rodin ya karya tsarin sassaka na gargajiya kuma ya buɗe sabon fagen sassaka na zamani. Ya hura rai cikin sassaka ta hanyar amfani da saman da ba a gama ba, tsarin da ba daidai ba, da motsi mai ƙarfi, wanda ya ba da zurfin wahayi ga masu sassaka na zamani da yawa daga baya. Ayyukansa ba su kasance siffofi masu tsayayye da aka tsara ba, amma sun zama hanyar bayyana motsin rai da ruhin ɗan adam mai rai. Har zuwa rasuwarsa a shekara ta 1917, Auguste Rodin ya bar ayyuka masu yawa kuma ana tuna shi a matsayin babban mai fasaha wanda ya yi ƙoƙari ya sanya ruhin ɗan adam a cikin sassaka. Gadonsa yana ci gaba da motsa zukatan mutane a duk faɗin duniya har zuwa yau ta hanyar Musée Rodin a Paris, kuma ana kiransa da gaskiya "Uban Sassaka na Zamani." Ƙoƙarinsa na sabuntawa ya yi daidai da canje-canjen da masu zanen Impressionist na lokacin suka nema a zanen, kuma ya jefa tambayoyi masu zurfi game da ainihin fasaha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Claude Debussy ya kasance mawaki ɗan Faransa na ƙarshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20, wanda ya buɗe hanyar Impressionism na Kiɗa kuma ya buɗe sabon fage ga kiɗa na zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa da tabbatar da Impressionism na Kiɗa
Fitowa da ayyuka masu kawo sauyi kamar <Prélude à l'après-midi d'un faune>
Gina harshen kiɗa na musamman wanda ya fita daga jituwa ta gargajiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kiɗansa ya yi tasiri ga mawaka da yawa da kuma nau'o'i daban-daban bayan karni na 20, ya zama muhimmin tushe ga kiɗa na zamani.

claude-debussy.epic:
A ƙarshen karni na 19, Faransa ta kasance cikin wani lokaci na hargitsi, inda babban rafin soyayya ke raguwa a hankali, kuma sabbin bincike na fasaha ke fitowa. A cikin wannan yanayi, Claude Debussy (1862-1918) ya fito a matsayin wani majagaba mai kawo sauyi a cikin kiɗan Faransa, yana kalubalantar ka'idojin kiɗa na gargajiya da kuma gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman. An haife shi a ranar 22 ga Agusta, 1862, a Saint-Germain-en-Laye, ya nuna hazaka ta kiɗa tun yana yaro, kuma ya fara samun ilimi na yau da kullun a Makarantar Kiɗa ta Paris yana ɗan shekara 10. Amma ya ci gaba da yin tambayoyi game da tsauraran ka'idojin koyarwa na makarantar kiɗa, yana nuna halin rashin son bin ka'idojin gargajiya na jituwa da adawa. Debussy ya daɗe yana da babban sha'awar neman harshen kiɗansa na musamman, kuma wannan ya zama tushe mai muhimmanci wanda daga baya ya buɗe sabon fage na 'Impressionism na Kiɗa'. Tun daga farkon ayyukansa, an ga alamun wannan ruhun gwaji da kuma adawa ga al'adun gargajiya. 

Wani muhimmin juyi a tafiyar Debussy ta kiɗa ya zo ne a shekara ta 1884, lokacin da ya lashe Prix de Rome da cantata dinsa <L'enfant prodigue>, wanda ya ba shi damar yin karatu a Roma. Amma rayuwarsa a Roma ta zurfafa masa shakku game da tsarin kiɗa na gargajiya, kuma a hankali ya nisanta kansa daga salon wasan kwaikwayo na Wagner mai girma. Maimakon haka, ya fara samun kwarin gwiwa daga harshen da ke da laushi na mawakan Symbolist na Faransa da kuma binciken haske da launi na masu zane-zane na Impressionist. Debussy ya haɗa waɗannan ra'ayoyin fasaha cikin kiɗa don ƙirƙirar sabon salo da ake kira **Impressionism na Kiɗa**. Wannan wata hanya ce ta kiɗa da ke mai da hankali kan yanayi, launi, da kuma yanayin sauti, maimakon waƙoƙi masu bayyane ko tsarin gargajiya, don bayyana abubuwan da suka faru na lokaci-lokaci da ji. Fitaccen aikinsa <Prélude à l'après-midi d'un faune>, wanda aka fitar a shekara ta 1894, ya sanar da farkon wannan Impressionism na Kiɗa, kuma ya girgiza duniyar kiɗa a lokacin da sautinsa mai laushi da mafarki da kuma tsarin sa mai 'yanci. Wannan aikin ya zama muhimmin alama wajen kafa duniyar kiɗansa ta musamman. 

A farkon lokacin, kiɗan Debussy mai kawo sauyi ya fuskanci rashin fahimta da suka daga jama'a da masu sukar. Jituwarsa da tsarin sa na ban mamaki an ɗauke su a matsayin 'rashin jituwa' ko 'marasa tabbas', kuma saboda haka, ya fuskanci matsalolin kuɗi da kuma wahalar fasaha. Duk da haka, Debussy bai taɓa barin imaninsa na kiɗa ba kuma ya ci gaba da aiki a kan ayyukansa. Opera dinsa guda ɗaya, <Pelléas et Mélisande>, wanda aka fara yi a shekara ta 1902, ya haifar da babban tasiri tare da salon sa na musamman wanda ya dogara ga wasan kwaikwayo na Symbolist na Maeterlinck, yana guje wa tsarin gargajiya na opera na aria da recitative, kuma yana ba da damar tattaunawa da kiɗa su gudana tare da juna. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar ayyukansa na orchestra kamar <La Mer> da <Nocturnes>, da kuma ayyukansa na piano kamar <Images> da <Préludes>, ya nuna iyawa ta musamman wajen canje-canje masu laushi a cikin sautin da kuma ƙirƙirar yanayi, yana ƙara inganta harshen kiɗansa na musamman. A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, duk da rashin lafiya da hargitsin Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, bai taɓa barin sha'awarsa ta ƙirƙira ba. 

Claude Debussy ya rasu a ranar 25 ga Maris, 1918, a Paris, a tsakiyar Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, saboda ciwon daji, amma gadonsa na kiɗa ya yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin kiɗa na karni na 20. Ya buɗe kofofin kiɗa na zamani ta hanyar gabatar da sabon tunani na kiɗa wanda ke mai da hankali kan sautin, rhythm, da yanayi, yana 'yantar da kansa daga takunkumin tsarin tonal na gargajiya da tsari. Sabbin abubuwan da Debussy ya kawo sun ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi ga mawakan da suka biyo baya kamar Maurice Ravel, Igor Stravinsky, da Olivier Messiaen, kuma sun yi tasiri a kan nau'o'i daban-daban kamar jazz da kiɗan fim. Ayyukansa har yanzu ana ci gaba da yin su a cikin dakunan kide-kide da kuma a kan faifai a duk faɗin duniya, suna ba masu sauraro kyawawan abubuwa masu laushi da mafarki. Ana tuna Debussy a matsayin mai fasaha wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin kama abubuwan da suka faru na lokaci-lokaci da ji ta hanyar kiɗa, kuma ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin wanda ya buɗe sabon zamani a cikin kiɗan Faransa tare da abokin zamansa kuma wani mai kawo sauyi, Erik Satie.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Virginia Woolf marubuciya ce ta zamani (modernist) a Biritaniya a farkon karni na 20, wacce ta fara amfani da fasahar 'gudun tunani' kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga adabin mata.
key_achievements: Gabatar da fasahar 'gudun tunani' a adabi
Kasancewa babbar memba a Ƙungiyar Bloomsbury
Wallafa littafin kasida na mata mai suna *A Room of One's Own*
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta sun faɗaɗa iyakokin adabin zamani kuma suna ci gaba da ba da zaburarwa ga tattaunawa game da jinsi da lafiyar tunani.

virginia-woolf.epic:
Virginia Woolf (1882-1941) marubuciya ce kuma mai sukar adabi wacce ta jagoranci adabin zamani (modernism) a Biritaniya a farkon karni na 20. An haife ta a London cikin tsananin yanayin zamanin Victoria na ƙarshen karni na 19. Ita ce ta uku a cikin yara shida na iyali masu ilimi, 'yar Sir Leslie Stephen, wani shahararren mai sukar adabi kuma marubucin tarihin rayuwa, da Julia Stephen. Maimakon ilimin gargajiya, ta koyi ilimi mai yawa daga babban ɗakin karatu na mahaifinta, amma tun tana ƙarama ta fara fama da raunin tunani. Mutuwar mahaifiyarta ba zato ba tsammani a 1895, mutuwar 'yar uwarta Stella a 1897, da mutuwar mahaifinta a 1904 sun jefa ta cikin babban rashi da girgizar tunani, wanda ya zama iri na ciwon hauka da ya addabe ta har tsawon rayuwarta. Waɗannan bala'o'i na kashin kai sun yi tasiri sosai ga duniyar ayyukanta, inda suka zama babban dalili na binciken rikitarwa na zuciyar ɗan adam da zafin rashi.

Bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, Virginia ta koma Bloomsbury, London, tare da 'yan uwanta, inda ta buɗe sabon babi a rayuwarta. A nan, ta yi hulɗa da manyan masana da masu fasaha na zamanin, kamar Leonard Woolf, E. M. Forster, John Maynard Keynes, da Lytton Strachey, inda suka kafa 'Ƙungiyar Bloomsbury'. Waɗannan mutane sun kalubalanci dabi'un gargajiya na zamanin Victoria, inda suka jagoranci sabbin ra'ayoyin al'adu ta hanyar tattaunawa mai 'yanci game da fasaha, ra'ayoyi, da jima'i. Bayan ta auri Leonard Woolf a 1912, a 1917 ta kafa Hogarth Press tare da mijinta, inda suka wallafa ayyukanta da kuma sabbin ayyukan marubuta irin su T. S. Eliot da Katherine Mansfield, ta haka suka samar da wani dandali na gwajin adabi. A wannan lokacin, ta haɓaka fasahar 'gudun tunani' (stream of consciousness), inda ta gabatar da salon labari na musamman wanda ke zurfafa cikin tunanin ciki na haruffa. Shahararren littafinta, *Mrs Dalloway* (1925), yana nuna ainihin wannan fasaha ta hanyar binciken duniyar ciki na Clarissa Dalloway, wata mace mai daraja a London, a cikin yini guda.

Rayuwar Virginia Woolf ta kasance cike da sha'awar kirkira da gwagwarmaya marar yankewa da ciwon hauka. Ciwon haukanta, wanda ake kyautata zaton bipolar disorder ne, yana tsananta lokaci-lokaci, kuma ya shafi rayuwarta da ayyukanta sosai. Duk da haka, ko a cikin wahala, ta sami hanyar bayyana kanta da sadarwa da duniya ta hanyar rubutu. Ayyukanta sun zurfafa bincike kan ainihin mata, takunkumin zamantakewa, da raunin wanzuwar ɗan adam. Musamman ma littafinta na kasida mai suna *A Room of One's Own* (1929) an ɗauke shi a matsayin aiki na farko na adabin mata (feminism), wanda ya jaddada muhimmancin 'yancin tattalin arziki da sararin jiki ga marubuta mata, tare da sukar takunkumin zamantakewa da ke hana ayyukan kirkira na mata. Barkewar Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu da lalacewar gidanta a London sun ƙara tsananta lafiyar tunaninta, inda suka jefa ta cikin matsanancin yanke kauna. Duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, ba ta rasa basirarta mai kaifi game da rikitarwa na tunanin ɗan adam da rashin adalci na zamantakewa ba.

A ranar 28 ga Maris, 1941, Virginia Woolf ta kasa jurewa ciwon haukanta da ya tsananta da kuma tsoron yaƙi, inda ta kawo ƙarshen rayuwarta ta hanyar jefa kanta cikin Kogin Ouse a Sussex. Mutuwarta ta kasance abin baƙin ciki, amma gadonta na adabi yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi a cikin zamani. Ana tuna Woolf a matsayin jagora a adabin zamani wacce ta rushe tsarin labari na gargajiya kuma ta nuna kyawawan yanayin rikitarwa na zuciyar ɗan adam ta hanyar fasahar 'gudun tunani'. Ayyukanta sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban adabin mata, inda suka zaburar da marubuta na gaba ta hanyar sanya muryoyin mata da abubuwan da suka faru a tsakiyar adabi. Har yau, littattafanta da kasidunta suna haifar da muhimman tattaunawa game da lafiyar tunani, jinsi, da rashin daidaito na zamantakewa, suna ba da zurfin fahimta ga masu karatu na zamani. An ɗauke ta a matsayin majagaba wacce ta faɗaɗa iyakokin adabin zamani tare da takwarorinta irin su James Joyce da Marcel Proust.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marubuci wanda aka haifa a Prague, ya shaida gaskiya mara ma'ana a cikin inuwar mahaifinsa da kuma labyrinth na ciki, kuma ya canza kaɗaici da keɓewa zuwa ayyuka.
key_achievements: Bayyana tsarin mulki da gaskiya mara ma'ana
Nuna kaɗaici da keɓewa na ciki na ɗan adam
Rubuta manyan ayyuka kamar 《Canji》 da 《Shari'a》
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa suna wakiltar kaɗaici da keɓewa na ɗan adam a cikin gaskiya mara ma'ana, kuma suna kunna tambayoyi marasa iyaka da kuma hasken bege.

franz-kafka.epic:
A cikin kunkuntar titunan Prague, zuciyar tsohuwar Daular Austro-Hungary, inda rufin ja da sararin sama mai launin toka suka haɗu, an haifi wani yaro a cikin wani tsohon gidan Yahudawa. A ƙarƙashin inuwar mahaifinsa mai nauyi kamar shiru na tsohuwar hasumiyar agogo, da kuma cikin numfashi mai matsi, yaron Franz Kafka ya riga ya fara gina nasa katangar duhu. Ko da ɗan ɗumi na mahaifiyarsa, mai rauni kamar raƙuman ruwa na Kogin Julian, ya zama fitila mai haske kawai a gaban babban fatalwar mahaifinsa. Ƙaramin ruhin yaron ya ɓace kuma ya yi yawo a gaban bangon harshe baƙo da nauyin ayyuka masu yawa. A nan, a cikin wannan birni inda tsohuwar tsari da sabon damuwa suka haɗu, cikin zuciyarsa ya riga ya nuna farkon wani babban labyrinth.

Dokokin da suka fito daga kaifin alkalami na lauya sun zama sarƙoƙi da suka daure rayuwarsa. Da rana, yana jin kukan ma'aikata da suka fuskanci hatsarin masana'antu a cikin tarin takardu, da dare kuma, yana zubar da tawada yana yaƙi da dabba ta ciki da ke daure shi. A cikin ofisoshin kamfanin inshora marasa rai, da kuma cikin sanyin hanyoyin tsarin mulki mai juyawa kamar inji, ya shaida rashin ma'ana na wanzuwar ɗan adam, kuma ya fahimci tsarin gaskiya mai ban mamaki da ban tsoro kamar jimlolin tsohuwar doka. Kamar fursuna da aka manta, ya ji raunin rashin ƙarfinsa a gaban shari'ar da ba a gani ba, kuma wannan azabar ta zubo daga ƙarshen alkalaminsa, yana fara zana hoton yanke kauna wanda ya zama kamar an daidaita shi sosi a duniya.

Yana yawo a cikin madauwari na alƙawarin aure da warware shi, wani ruɗi mai wucewa da ake kira soyayya, yana marmarin gaskiyar da ba zai taɓa kaiwa ba. A tsakanin idanuwan Felice masu rawa da muryar Milena mai rawa, ya gano rikitarwa na dangantakar ɗan adam da kuma yanayinsa mara tabbas yana gwagwarmaya a cikinsu. Kamar matafiyi da ya ɓace a cikin daji, yana ci gaba da tambayar hanya amma abin da ke dawowa shine kawai amo, kuma ayyukansa sun rubuta waɗannan alamun gaba ɗaya. Ko da a cikin azabar tarin fuka da ke cinye huhunsa, ya nuna kaɗaicinsa da keɓewarsa a cikin madubin harshe, yana tattara guntun gaskiya marasa gogewa.

A cikin ƙurar ɗakin da ya bari, sunansa yanzu yana rayuwa a matsayin jigon yanke kauna kuma a lokaci guda shaida mai ɗorewa na ruhin ɗan adam da ke fuskantar duniya mara ma'ana. Rubuce-rubucen da ba a ƙone ba, kamar ruwan maɓuɓɓugar ƙasa, suna shayar da zurfin rayukan waɗanda aka zalunta da kuma keɓe. Mummunan kukan kwari a cikin 《Canji》 yana farkar da dodo da ke ɓoye a cikinmu, kuma a gaban ƙofar 《Shari'a》 da aka rufe, muna yin tambayoyi marasa iyaka. Rayuwarsa ta kaɗaici da ta gwagwarmaya, ta wuce lokaci, kuma har yanzu tana zama muryar waɗanda suka ɓace a cikinmu, tana kunna ɗan hasken bege ko da a cikin wannan gaskiya mara ma'ana da muke rayuwa a ciki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban marubuci na karni na 20 daga Dublin wanda ya karya iyakokin harshe kuma ya fara fasahar 'stream of consciousness'.
key_achievements: Ya fara fasahar 'stream of consciousness' don faɗaɗa iyakokin labari.
Ya rushe ka'idojin harshe kuma ya gwada sabbin gwaje-gwaje na adabi.
Ya bincika rikitarwa na cikin mutum ta amfani da Dublin a matsayin wuri.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Yana ci gaba da bincika iyakar damar ruhin ɗan adam kuma yana da tasiri mai girma a kan adabin zamani.

james-joyce.epic:
A shekarar 1882, lokacin da layin dogo ke ruri da jigilar kaya ta wuce tsoffin tashoshin jiragen ruwa, kuma hazo mai sanyi ya mamaye titunan Dublin a karkashin sararin sama mai launin toka, wani yaro ya zo duniya a cikin wani daki mai duhu a wani tsohon gida na zamanin Sarki James I. A wurin da kamshi mai tsarki da inuwar giciye mai nauyi suka mamaye, ruhi mai karancin shekaru ya kamu da sha'awar duk sautunan duniya da rawan kalmomi, amma a lokaci guda kuma ya matsu a karkashin nauyin addu'o'i masu tsauri da shiru da aka hana. Tsakanin Latin da ke birgima a kan harshe mai lankwasa da kuma karin maganar Irish da ake radawa, ya fara shuka iri na harshe, kamar yana sassaƙa ma'anar duniya mai rudani. A cikin daki kunkuntar, a karkashin fitila mai haske, tuni ya fara hadiye duk muryoyin duniya kuma yana gina babban sararin samaniya a cikinsa.

Matashin da ya kasa jurewa kamshin gishiri na teku mai launin toka, ko kuma karar kararrawa mai nauyi na tsohuwar coci, ya jefar da iska mai matsi da tsoffin gaskiya, ya tafi tare da Nora zuwa kasashen waje. Titunan Trieste masu kunkuntar, gefen tafkin Zurich mai natsuwa, filayen cafe na Paris masu cunkoso. Duk da aljihunsa marasa komai da cikinsa mai yunwa, hannunsa bai daina rubutu ba, yana shafa tawada. Rayuwar yau da kullum a Dublin ta kasance kamar kukan tsuntsaye da aka kulle, kuma hoton matashin mai fasaha ya kasance hoton kai na kadaici mai tsanani. Harshe ya ji kamar tsoffin sarƙoƙi, amma ya yanke waɗannan sarƙoƙi da kaifin harshensa, yana zurfafa cikin ramin wanzuwa.

A shekarar 1922, shekarar da karar bindigogin yaki ke girgiza duniya, harshensa ya haifar da babban fashewa. Wata rana a Dublin tare da jarumin Homer, tunanin Leopold Bloom da suka gauraye sun zama babban kogi na hankali da ke gudana. Tsoffin radadi da sabbin kuka, duk wani karkatarwa na cikin mutum da haske mai rauni sun gauraye suna rawa. A cikin wannan babban rudani, ya bayyana tushen wanzuwar mutum, kuma ya buɗe sabon sararin harshe wanda babu wanda ya taɓa kuskura ya kusanta. Gaskiyar rayuwa mara tacewa, wacce ta fito ba tare da tsohon tacewa ba, ta kama masu karatu da mamaki da tsoro.

Kuma ya sake jefa kansa cikin 'Finnegans Wake', wani babban halitta mai rarrafe wanda ke rushe iyakokin mafarki da gaskiya, yana yi wa duk ka'idojin harshe izgili. A wurin da duk harsunan duniya suka gauraye, kuma sarƙoƙin lokaci suka ɓace, ya zama kamar ya ɓace har abada, ko kuma yana ƙirƙirar sabbin hanyoyi har abada. A shekarar 1941, an binne shi a cikin ƙasa mai sanyi ta Zurich, amma kalmomin da suka fito daga harshensa har yanzu suna ta daɗaɗawa a kunnuwanmu a wannan lokacin, suna girgiza tsohuwar duniya, kuma suna ci gaba da amsa zuwa ga iyakar damar ruhin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Giacomo Puccini mawallafin opera ne na Italiya a ƙarshen karni na 19, kuma babban gwanin opera na verismo mafi nasara bayan Verdi.
key_achievements: Gadon opera ta Italiya bayan Verdi
Majagaba na salon opera na verismo
Rubuta opera mai motsa rai ta gaskiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Operarsa tana samun soyayya a matakan duniya ba tare da la'akari da lokaci ba, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban opera.

giacomo-puccini.epic:
Giacomo Puccini, wani mawallafin kiɗa ne na Italiya wanda ya yi aiki daga ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, ya bar gagarumar gudunmawa musamman a fannin opera. Ya girma yana gadon baiwar kiɗa da al'ada, kasancewar ya fito daga zuriyar mawakan da suka daɗe tun daga ƙarshen zamanin Baroque. Duk da cewa a lokacin Italiya tana ƙarƙashin inuwar wani babban gwanin kiɗa, Giuseppe Verdi, Puccini ya zama babban mai fafutukar opera na Italiya mafi girma kuma mafi nasara wanda ya bi sawunsa. Ayyukansa na farko sun kafu sosai a cikin salon opera na gargajiya na soyayya na Italiya na ƙarshen karni na 19. Opera a wannan lokacin ta mai da hankali kan bayyana ji da sha'awar ɗan adam na duniya ta hanyar waƙoƙi masu daɗi, aria masu ratsa jiki, da labarai masu ban mamaki, kuma a cikin wannan al'ada, Puccini ya fara binciken nasa na musamman na harshen kiɗa. Kiɗansa tun daga wannan lokacin ya riga ya nuna zurfin motsin rai da hazaka mai ban mamaki, kamar wani gabatarwa ne ga zuwan sabon zamani.

Wani muhimmin juyi a tafiyar kiɗa ta Puccini shi ne ci gabansa daga opera ta gargajiya zuwa salon verismo. Verismo wani salon opera ne na gaskiya wanda ya bunƙasa a Italiya a ƙarshen karni na 19, kuma yana da halin nuna labarai na gaskiya da motsin rai na rayuwar yau da kullun a kan mataki. Wannan ya kauce daga yanayin opera na gargajiya wanda ya fi mai da hankali kan labaran sarakuna ko na tatsuniyoyi, kuma wani yunƙuri ne na nuna rayuwa, soyayya, da wahalar talakawa a fili da kuma da ƙarfi. Puccini ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu fafutukar salon verismo, kuma ayyukansa sun zama manyan ayyuka da ke wakiltar wannan sabon salo. Ya nuna hazaka ta musamman wajen bayyana motsin rai na ɗan adam a hankali amma da ƙarfi, kuma ya haɗa wasan kwaikwayo na gaskiya da waƙoƙi masu ratsa jiki don ba da zurfin tausayi da motsin rai ga masu sauraro. Wannan canjin salo bai wuce zaɓin fasaha na kansa kawai ba, ya zama wani muhimmin mataki wajen faɗaɗa hangen nesa na opera ta Italiya da buɗe sabon zamani.

Tare da babban tsammani na buɗe sabon zamani na opera ta Italiya bayan Verdi, Puccini ya fuskanci gwagwarmayar fasaha da ƙalubale don gina nasa duniyar kiɗa ta musamman. Yayin da yake girmama gadon opera ta gargajiya, yana da aikin haɗa sabon yanayin zamani da tsarin gaskiya a cikin kiɗansa. A cikin wannan tsari, a matsayin majagaba na salon verismo, ya ci gaba da haɓaka fasaharsa, yana mai da hankali sosai ga canjin al'adun zamani da buƙatun masu sauraro. Puccini ya mai da hankali kan magance farin ciki da baƙin ciki na ɗan adam a hanya mafi duniya kuma mai zurfi, kuma ta haka ne operarsa ta ba da kwarewar fasaha wacce ta wuce nishaɗin kiɗa kawai, tana bincika ainihin rayuwa. Ayyukansa sun sami nasara a tsakanin jama'a duk da bambancin ra'ayoyin masu sukar zamani, kuma sun zama wani muhimmin mataki da ke nuna hanyar da opera ta Italiya za ta bi. Ta hanyar wannan gwagwarmayar fasaha da kirkire-kirkire, Puccini ya gadon babban gadon Verdi, ya kafa nasa yanki na musamman kuma ya rubuta sunansa marar mutuwa a tarihin opera.

Gadon kiɗa na Giacomo Puccini yana ci gaba da haskawa a kan matakan opera na duniya har zuwa yau. Ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na opera ta Italiya bayan Verdi, kuma ayyukansa suna samun soyayya ta dindindin saboda waƙoƙinsu masu ban mamaki, haɗin kai mai arziki, da tasirin wasan kwaikwayo mai ƙarfi. Musamman ma, salon verismo da ya fara kuma ya kammala ya yi tasiri sosai ga mawakan opera na gaba, kuma ya buɗe sabuwar hanya don bincika jigogi na gaskiya da zurfin motsin rai na ɗan adam. Operar Puccini tana nuna zurfin ciki na ɗan adam a hankali, kuma tana rera waƙoƙin jigogi na duniya kamar soyayya, kishi, sadaukarwa, da bala'i a hanya mai motsa rai. Kiɗansa ya sa opera ta zama kusa da jama'a, kuma ya sa mutane da yawa su fuskanci kyawun opera. Gadon kiɗansa, tare da na sauran manyan mawakan Italiya na zamaninsa, kamar Giuseppe Verdi, yana wadatar da matakan opera na duniya har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Charles Baudelaire ya kasance mawaki kuma mai sukar adabi na Faransa a karni na 19, wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin adabi ta hanyar buga 'Les Fleurs du mal' wanda ya bincika duhun birni da ciki na ɗan Adam.
key_achievements: Buga 'Les Fleurs du mal' da haifar da cece-kuce a adabi
Gabatar da ayyukan Edgar Allan Poe ga duniyar adabi ta Faransa ta hanyar fassara
Taka rawar majagaba a cikin sukar fasahar zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa sun zama harsashin Symbolism da Modernism, suna yin tasiri mai girma a kan adabin zamani.

charles-baudelaire.epic:
Charles Baudelaire (1821-1867) ya kasance mawaki kuma mai sukar adabi na Faransa a karni na 19, wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin adabi ta hanyar binciken hadaddun yanayin biranen zamani da zurfin ciki na dan Adam. An haife shi a Paris a shekara ta 1821, ya girma cikin rikici da uban rana bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa tun yana karami da kuma sake auren mahaifiyarsa.
