A wannan lokacin, Paris tana fuskantar sauye-sauye masu sauri a cikin igiyar juyin juya halin masana'antu, kuma lokaci ne na sauyi inda Romanticism ke raguwa kuma Realism ke fitowa. A cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, Charles Baudelaire ya haɓaka kaɗaici da ruhin tawaye, yana neman ruhin 'yanci wanda ba a ɗaure shi da dabi'un gargajiya ba. Ya yi karatun shari'a amma bai iya barin sha'awar adabi ba, kuma a ƙarshe ya zaɓi hanyar adabi, ya shiga rayuwar bohemia ta Paris. Tun yana matashi, ya sha wahala daga rayuwa mai ban sha'awa da matsalolin kuɗi, amma wannan ya zama wata dama a gare shi ya yi zurfin tunani game da duhun birni da kuma sabanin wanzuwar ɗan Adam. Ayyukansa na farko sun riga sun nuna ƙoƙari na ban mamaki da ke ƙalubalantar ra'ayoyin kyawawan halaye na gargajiya, suna nuna alamar juyin juya halin adabi mai zuwa.

Babban juyi a tafiyar adabi ta Charles Baudelaire shine buga tarin waƙoƙinsa mai suna 『Les Fleurs du mal』 (Furannin Mugunta) a shekara ta 1857. 『Les Fleurs du mal』 tarin waƙoƙinsa ne na musamman wanda ya bincika rikicin kyau da muni, nagarta da mugunta, manufa da gaskiya, yana bayyana a fili wahalhalu da sha'awar mazaunan birane na zamani. Wannan tarin waƙoƙi ya girgiza al'umma nan da nan bayan bugawa, kuma ya fuskanci tuhuma kan batsa da saɓo saboda an ce ya saɓa wa ka'idodin ɗabi'a na lokacin. A kotu, ya kare cewa aikinsa ƙoƙari ne na fasaha don bincika kowane fanni na ruhin ɗan Adam, amma a ƙarshe an ba da umarnin cire wasu waƙoƙi kuma an ci shi tara. Wannan lamari ya yi masa rauni mai zurfi, amma a lokaci guda ya ƙarfafa imaninsa na fasaha. Ya kare 'yancin fasaha a kan munafuncin al'umma da ka'idodin ɗabi'a, kuma ya gina nasa tsarin kyawawan halaye wanda ke fuskantar duhun sha'awar ɗan Adam da kuma kyawun birni mai lalacewa kamar yadda suke. A cikin waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, 『Les Fleurs du mal』 ya kafa asalin adabinsa kuma ya zama aiki marar mutuwa wanda ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan adabin zamani.

Ko da bayan buga 『Les Fleurs du mal』, rayuwar Charles Baudelaire ta kasance jerin wahalhalu. Ya sha wahala daga matsalolin kuɗi na dindindin, kuma ya rayu cikin bin bashi koyaushe. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin tattalin arziki, bai daina ayyukansa na adabi ba. Musamman ma, ya ba da gudummawa mai girma wajen gabatar da hangen nesa na musamman na Edgar Allan Poe ga duniyar adabi ta Faransa ta hanyar fassara ayyukan marubucin Amurka zuwa Faransanci. Wannan aikin fassara ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan duniyar adabi ta Charles Baudelaire da kansa, kuma yana da alaƙa da yanayin duhu da ban mamaki da ke bayyana a cikin waƙoƙinsa. Bugu da ƙari, ya taka rawar majagaba a cikin sukar fasahar zamani ta hanyar sukar fasahar zamani da kaifi. Rubuce-rubucensa na sukar, ciki har da sukar Salon, sun ba da haske game da yanayin fasaha na lokacin kuma sun gabatar da sabbin ka'idodin kyawawan halaye. Amma jikinsa ya fara raunana a hankali. Rashin lafiyarsa saboda cutar syphilis ya jefa shi cikin matsanancin zafi, kuma a shekara ta 1866, ya kai ga inda ba zai iya yin rubutu ba saboda shanyewar jiki da rashin iya magana. Ya yi rayuwa mai jinya a Belgium, amma a ƙarshe ya koma Paris kuma ya shafe lokacinsa na ƙarshe a kan gadon asibiti.

A shekara ta 1867, Charles Baudelaire ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai gajarta yana da shekaru 46. Rayuwarsa ta cika da zafi da takaici, amma 『Les Fleurs du mal』 da ya bari ya haskaka fiye da kima bayan mutuwarsa, yana taka rawa mai mahimmanci wajen canza yanayin adabin zamani. Charles Baudelaire ya bincika rayuwar birni da hadaddun ciki na ɗan Adam, yana kafa harsashin Symbolism da Modernism. Waƙoƙinsa sun kauce daga ra'ayin Romanticism na gargajiya, suna gabatar da sabon tsarin kyawawan halaye wanda ke gano kyau a cikin damuwa da keɓewar mutanen zamani, da kuma cikin muni. Wannan ya ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi ga mawakan Symbolist kamar Stéphane Mallarmé da Arthur Rimbaud, kuma ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan adabin karni na 20 gaba ɗaya. A yau, muna fahimtar ruhin biranen zamani da zurfin gaskiyar wanzuwar ɗan Adam ta hanyar Charles Baudelaire, kuma gwagwarmayarsa ta kaɗaici har yanzu tana ba da tasiri mai zurfi ga masu fasaha na zamaninmu. Gadonsa na waƙa ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen faɗaɗa sararin adabin zamani tare da sauran masu juyin juya halin adabi na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Lauya da ya zama mai zane, wanda Monet ya zaburar da shi ya zama majagaba na fasahar zane-zane, mai fasaha wanda ya bayyana ruhin ciki da launuka da siffofi.
key_achievements: Ya buɗe fasahar zane-zane mai tsabta ta hanyar larurar ciki
Ya kafa ka'idar fasahar zane-zane a Bauhaus
Ya rubuta 'Game da Ruhaniya a Fasaha'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fasahar zane-zanensa, wanda ke bincika ruhin ciki, yana ba da zaburarwa marar iyaka kuma yana ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a duniyar fasaha har zuwa yau.

wassily-kandinsky.epic:
A cikin iska mai tsanani da ke ratsa filayen Rasha masu faɗi, da kuma shiru mai ban mamaki da ke lulluɓe da Red Square na Moscow, ƙarƙashin zaluncin da karkiya mai daɗi ta lauya da kuma tunani mai sanyi na tattalin arziki suka haifar, wani rai yana girgiza da sha'awar launuka masu ban mamaki. Kwanakin da aka danne shi da tsofaffin littattafai da nauyin gaskiya mai nauyi, da kuma ɓangarorin haske masu rawa a kan zane a cikinsu. A ranar haihuwarsa ta 30, wani raɗaɗi mai haske na Monet da ya gani a wani nuni mai ban mamaki a Munich ya raba makomarsa kamar walƙiya, kuma wani firgici mai ban tsoro na rushewar dukkan ganuwar da ke da ƙarfi na duniyar da ya saba da ita ya mamaye shi. Ƙofar gaskiya mai haramtawa tana buɗewa, cewa ba zane-zane marasa amfani ba ne da ke kwaikwayon abin da ba a gani ba, amma launuka da kansu za su iya zama harshe da ke girgiza zuciya.

Ya yanke sarƙoƙin matsayin farfesa mai tsaro da yardar rai, ya jefa kansa cikin guguwar zane-zane a Munich. Da farko, ya yi rawar Expressionism mai zafi kamar jijiya mai ja, amma nan da nan ya ji damuwa da karkiyar da ke tilasta siffofin gaskiya. Launuka za su yi rawa, siffofi za su yi waƙa. Wata sha'awa ta mamaye shi cewa zai iya girgiza cikin mutum da amo na launuka masu tsabta, kamar yadda kiɗa ke taɓa zurfin rai. A cikin 1910, a kan zane mai suna 'Improvisation', ya buɗe wani yanki da ba a sani ba wanda babu wanda ya taɓa kuskura ya shiga. Zane-zane da ba su da alaƙa da siffofin duniya na waje masu canzawa, amma suna wanzuwa kawai ta hanyar larurar ciki. Wannan kiran rai ne marar musantawa, yana sanar da sabon haihuwar zane-zane.

Kwanakin da aka dawo da shi zuwa ƙasarsa ta hanyar guguwar juyin juya hali, a cikin farin ciki na mafarkin sabon tsari, ya yi ƙoƙarin buɗe sabon fagen ilimin fasaha, amma kaifin takobin akida ya matse numfashin 'yancin fasaha. Ya sake komawa wata ƙasa mai ban mamaki, Bauhaus a Jamus, inda ya ƙarfafa ka'idar fasahar zane-zane a cikin tsarin lissafi da jituwar launuka. Ayyukansa, waɗanda aka gina kamar rubutun kiɗa mai kyau, sun ƙunshi damuwa da bege na zamanin a lokaci guda. Lokacin da haukan Nazi ya cinye komai, ya ci gaba da zane-zane mai kaɗaici a Faransa, wurin gudun hijira na ƙarshe. A kan ɓangarorin zamanin da ke shuɗewa ba tare da amfani ba, yana neman muryar rai marar canzawa.

Kaifin burushin Wassily Kandinsky ya wuce abin da ido ke gani kawai, yana nufin zurfin wanzuwa. Ya tabbatar da cewa “fasaha bayyanar da rai mai larura ce,” kuma ya fitar da raurawa ta sirri da kwarewar ruhaniya marar isa na cikin mutum ta hanyar harshen zane-zane na launuka da siffofi. Littafinsa 'Game da Ruhaniya a Fasaha' har yanzu yana ba mu fahimta mai zurfi, mu da muke rayuwa a cikin zamanin rikice-rikice, kuma kamar kiɗa mai wuce zamanai, duniyar fasaharsa mai sabbin abubuwa tana rayuwa har zuwa yau a matsayin amo na har abada da ke farkar da launukan ciki da muka manta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Paul Gauguin ya kasance mai zane ɗan Faransa na ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 wanda ya buɗe sabon sararin fasahar zamani ta hanyar Synthetism da launuka masu gwaji.
key_achievements: Haɓaka salon fasaha na Synthetism
Gina duniyar fasaha ta asali a Tahiti
Binciko launuka masu gwaji da dabarun alama
fact_box.legacy_statement: Fasaharsa ta musamman ta yi tasiri sosai ga fasahar zamani ta ƙarni na 20 kamar Fauvism da Expressionism.

paul-gauguin.epic:
A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, a cikin wani lokaci na hargitsi inda igiyar masana'antu da canjin zamantakewa suka mamaye Paris ta Faransa, Paul Gauguin, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1848, ya kasance mai zane, mai sassaƙa, mai buga zane, mai yin tukwane, kuma marubuci ɗan Faransa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta cika da abubuwan ban mamaki. Ya yi yarinta a Peru, yana bin iyayensa waɗanda suka tafi gudun hijira na siyasa bayan juyin juya halin Faransa, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe wanda ya kawo wahayi mai ban mamaki ga duniyar fasaharsa daga baya. Bayan ya dawo Faransa, ya yi aiki a cikin sojojin ruwa kuma ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duniya, sannan ya zauna a Paris a matsayin mai ciniki na hannun jari mai nasara. Amma a cikin zuciyarsa, akwai wata sha'awa mai zafi ga fasaha. Ya fara zane a lokacin hutunsa, kuma ya tattara ayyukan masu zane na Impressionist, yana zurfafa cikin hanyar fasaha a hankali. Waɗannan abubuwan farko sun shuka iri don neman fasaha ta asali da ta halitta, wanda ya fita daga tsarin wayewar zamantakewa.

Rayuwar Paul Gauguin ta sami juyin juya hali mai ban mamaki a tsakiyar shekarun 1880, lokacin da ya bar aikinsa mai tsayayye da iyalinsa don zaɓar hanyar zama cikakken mai zane. Wannan shawarar ce mai jarumtaka wacce ta saba wa al'adun zamantakewa na lokacin. Ya gaji da cunkoson Paris da iyakokin Impressionism, kuma ya nufi Pont-Aven a yankin Brittany na arewa maso yammacin Faransa don neman wahayi na fasaha mai tsabta da asali. A nan, ya haɗu da matasa masu zane kamar Émile Bernard kuma ya haɓaka sabon salon fasaha, Synthetism. Synthetism wata dabara ce da ke sauƙaƙa siffofin halitta kuma tana amfani da launuka masu zaman kansu don bayyana ainihin abin da mai zane yake ji, da kuma ma'anar alama, yana neman zurfin ruhaniya fiye da wakilcin gani na Impressionism. A wannan lokacin, ya yi gajeren lokaci amma mai tsanani tare da Vincent van Gogh a Arles, amma saboda bambancin ra'ayi na fasaha da rikice-rikice na hali, dangantakar ta kai ga rugujewa. Waɗannan abubuwan sun zurfafa shakku game da wayewar Yammacin Turai kuma sun haifar da sha'awar duniyar asali da ta ban mamaki.

Ƙin jinin da ya zurfafa game da wayewar Yammacin Turai da kuma sha'awar rayuwa ta asali sun ja Paul Gauguin zuwa tsibirin Tahiti a Tekun Pasifik a shekara ta 1891. A nan, ya nemi gano rayuwa mai tsabta, ba tare da gurbatawar wayewa ba, da kuma kyawun halitta. Amma rayuwa a Tahiti ma ba ta yi sauƙi ba. Ya sha wahalar talauci da cututtuka, kuma ya yi yaƙi da kaɗaici a cikin rabuwa da Turai. Duk da haka, Gauguin ya gina duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman, yana samun wahayi daga rayuwar 'yan asalin Tahiti, al'adunsu, da tatsuniyoyinsu. Ayyukansa sun cika da launuka masu ƙarfi, siffofi masu sauƙi, da hotuna masu alama, suna bincika kyawun asali da ji na asali na ɗan adam. Musamman, babban aikinsa 'Daga Ina Muka Fito? Me Muke? Ina Muke Zuwa?', wanda aka yi a kusan 1897, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin babban aiki da ya tattara tunaninsa na falsafa da ƙwarewar fasaharsa. Ya dawo Faransa na ɗan lokaci, amma ya sake komawa Tekun Pasifik, kuma a ƙarshe ya koma Tsibirin Marquesas a 1901, inda ya mutu a 1903. Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da yawo da gwagwarmayar fasaha.

Ko da yake Paul Gauguin bai sami nasara a bainar jama'a ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, bayan mutuwarsa, an fara sake kimanta darajar fasaharsa. Amfani da launuka na musamman da salon Synthetism sun yi tasiri sosai ga masu zane na gaba, kuma ya zama majagaba mai mahimmanci na ƙungiyoyin fasahar zamani na farkon ƙarni na 20 kamar Fauvism da Expressionism. Ya haifar da sha'awa ga fasahar asali da al'adun da ba na Yammacin Turai ba, kuma ya tabbatar da cewa fasaha na iya ƙunsar cikin zuciya da ma'anar alama fiye da wakilci kawai. A yau, ayyukansa suna cikin manyan gidajen tarihi na duniya, kuma har yanzu suna ba da wahayi mai zurfi da kuma muhawara a lokaci guda ga mutane da yawa. Rayuwarsa da fasaharsa suna nuna tafiya mai tsanani na wani mai zane wanda ya ci gaba da ƙalubalantar kansa don neman ainihin kansa da 'yancin fasaha, yana fita daga takunkumin wayewa. Wannan ruhun Gauguin yana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar masu zane na zamani kamar Vincent van Gogh, kuma ya kasance muhimmiyar gada da ta faɗaɗa sararin fasahar zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William Blake mawaki ne kuma mai zane na Ingila a zamanin Romanticism, wanda ya gina duniyar fasaha ta musamman ta hanyar haɗa waƙoƙi da zane-zane.
key_achievements: Haɓaka fasahar bugawa mai haske (illuminated printing)
Bugawa 'Songs of Innocence and of Experience'
Jaddada mahimmancin tunani ta hanyar ayyukan annabci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ko da yake ba a yaba masa ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, an sake kimanta shi a matsayin majagaba na fasahar Romanticism bayan mutuwarsa, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga fasahar zamani.

william-blake.epic:
William Blake (1757-1827) ya tashi a matsayin wani mawaki, mai zane, kuma mai zane-zane na Ingila wanda ya yi aiki daga ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19. A wani zamani da farkon raƙuman juyin juya halin masana'antu da hankali na Haskakawa suka mamaye, ya gina wata daula ta fasaha mai zaman kanta, wadda ba ta da kamarta, yana kare tunanin ɗan adam da hangen nesa na ruhaniya. An haife shi a Soho, London a 1757, an ce Blake ya ga wahayi masu ban mamaki tun yana yaro, waɗanda suka zama fitilar da ke haskaka hanyar wahayin fasaharsa. Ya bincika adabi da fasaha ta hanyar koyar da kai maimakon ilimin yau da kullun, kuma yana da shekaru 14, ya shiga aikin koyon zane-zane a wurin James Basire, inda ya koyi fasahar zane-zane tsawon shekaru bakwai. A wannan lokacin, ya nutse cikin zurfin sha'awar salon Gothic da fasahar zamanin da, kamar yadda ruhi ke nutsewa cikin teku, wanda ya zama tushen salon sa na musamman da ya bayyana a ayyukansa daga baya. 'Ayyukansa na annabci' sun wuce waƙoƙi ko zane-zane kawai, sun kasance wani nau'i na fasaha na musamman mai ɗauke da hangen nesa na asiri da sukar zamantakewa; a zamaninsa, kamar tauraro ne da ke haskaka a cikin duhu, ba a fahimta ba, amma daga baya, haskensa ya haskaka duniya, kuma an gane darajarsa ta gaskiya. Ya ci gaba da jaddada 'yancin rai da mahimmancin tunani, yana adawa da al'ummar da ke mai da hankali kan abubuwan duniya da hankali, kamar yadda annabi ke kiran mutanensa zuwa ga gaskiya.

Wani babban juyi a rayuwar William Blake, kamar yadda kogi ke canza alkiblarsa, shine aurensa da Catherine Boucher a 1782. Catherine ta kasance abokiyar rayuwarsa da abokiyar fasaharsa, wadda ta zama ginshiƙin da ke tallafa masa, ta ba da gudummawa wajen haɓaka fasahar 'illuminated printing' ta Blake. 'Illuminated printing' da ya haɓaka wata hanya ce ta musamman ta zana waƙoƙi da zane-zane a kan farantin tagulla guda ɗaya kuma a buga su kai tsaye, ta zama makamin da ya fi muhimmanci wajen bayyana zurfin tunaninsa, kamar yadda ruwa ke bayyana zurfin teku, ta hanyar haɗa rubutu da hotuna a zahiri. Ta hanyar wannan fasaha, ya buga manyan ayyuka kamar 'Songs of Innocence and of Experience' a 1789, yana bincika abubuwan da suka bambanta na ɗan adam kamar tsarki da lalacewa, rashin laifi da wahala, ta hanyar gani da adabi. Amma saboda ayyukansa sun yi nisa da al'adun fasaha na lokacin, kamar yadda lu'u-lu'u ke ɓoye a cikin harsashi, bai sami karbuwa daga jama'a ba a lokacin rayuwarsa. Yawancin mutane sun ɗauki tunaninsa na musamman da bayyanarsa mai ban mamaki a matsayin masu wuyar fahimta, kuma wannan shine babban dalilin da ya sa ya ci gaba da ƙirƙira a cikin hamadar matsalolin tattalin arziki da kaɗaici a duk rayuwarsa.

William Blake ya yi gwagwarmaya mai tsanani, kamar jarumi a filin yaƙi, da matsalolin kuɗi da rashin fahimta na zamantakewa a duk rayuwarsa. Shekaru uku da ya yi a Felpham daga 1800 zuwa 1803 a ƙarƙashin tallafin William Hayley sun kasance lokaci ne na ɗan gajeren kwanciyar hankali, kamar yadda gajimare ke rufe rana na ɗan lokaci, amma ya rabu da Hayley saboda bambancin ra'ayi na fasaha. A wannan lokacin, ya fuskanci gwaji na tuhumar sa da cin amanar ƙasa bayan ya yi jayayya da wani soja, amma an same shi ba shi da laifi. Duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje na waje, Blake bai taɓa durƙusa imaninsa na fasaha ba, kamar dutse mai tsayi da ba ya rushewa. Ya sami wahayi daga littattafai na gargajiya kamar Littafi Mai Tsarki, Milton, da Shakespeare don gina nasa tsarin tatsuniyoyi, wanda ya zama sararin samaniyarsa ta tunani, kuma ya ƙirƙiri manyan ayyuka na annabci kamar 'Milton' da 'Jerusalem'. Waɗannan ayyukan sun ƙunshi zurfin tunaninsa na falsafa game da ruhin ɗan adam, cin hanci da rashawa na zamantakewa, ceto, da 'yanci. Ya ɗauki tunani a matsayin 'jikin Allah' kuma 'kasancewar ɗan adam da kansa', yana nuna ƙarfin hali mai ƙarfi, kamar wutar da ba ta mutuwa, don bincika gaskiyar ruhaniya da canza duniya ta hanyar fasaha. Ayyukansa sun kasance babban adawa, kamar yadda igiyar ruwa ke buga dutse, kuma sanarwa ce ta iyakar damar ruhin ɗan adam, kamar yadda taurari ke sanar da girman sararin samaniya.

Ko da yake William Blake bai sami karbuwa ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, bayan mutuwarsa, a cikin karni na 20, an fara sake kimanta darajarsa ta gaskiya, kamar yadda aka gano taska da aka ɓoye. Waƙoƙinsa na musamman da zane-zanensa, da kuma mahimmancin tunani da ya gabatar, sun sanya shi a matsayin majagaba na zamanin Romanticism kuma wani mutum da ya zuba ruwa mai zurfi na tasiri ga fasahar zamani da adabi. Musamman 'ayyukan annabci' nasa, duk da wahalarsu, sun ba da wahayi ga masana da masu fasaha da yawa tare da fahimtar da ke shiga cikin ciki na ɗan adam da rikice-rikicen zamantakewa, kamar yadda hasken rana ke shiga cikin duhu. Fasahar Blake ta rushe iyakokin fasahar gani da adabi, ta gabatar da sabon hangen nesa game da rawar mai fasaha, kamar yadda annabi ke gabatar da sabon alkawari, kuma har yau tana ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai ga masu ƙirƙira da yawa. Duniyar fasaharsa ta musamman ta bincika zurfin ruhin ɗan adam ta wata hanya daban da sauran mawakan Romantic na zamaninsa, kamar Wordsworth ko Coleridge, kuma tana ci gaba da zama tushen wahayi na har abada, kamar yadda ruwa ke gudana daga maɓuɓɓuga.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani matalaucin yaro ɗan Denmark wanda ya shawo kan matsaloli ya zama marubucin tatsuniyoyi mai nasara, yana ba da ta'aziyya da bege ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya ta hanyar labarun da suka nuna rayuwarsa.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar tatsuniyoyi masu daraja kamar 'The Little Mermaid' da 'The Little Match Girl'
Shawo kan talauci da matsaloli don zama marubuci mai nasara da fara fitowa
Samun shahara a duniya da ake kiransa 'Yarima na Tatsuniyoyi'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Yana ba da tausayi da ta'aziyya waɗanda suka wuce lokaci, kuma har yau yana raye a matsayin haske mai dumi wanda ke ba da ƙarfin hali na rayuwa.

hans-christian-andersen.epic:
A cikin dogon dare mai sanyi na Arewacin Turai, ƙarƙashin tsohon rufin gida a Odense, Denmark, cikin ƙamshin datti da taɓaɗɗen tsofaffin yadudduka, wani ƙaramin rai yana fitowa. A kan tsohon bene mai ƙara, idanunsa suna kallon tsofaffin takalman mahaifinsa, tuni sun fara kawar da inuwar gaskiya. Fukafukan tunaninsa da suka yage suna shawagi a kan dandalin wasan kwaikwayo mai cike da ƙura, yana ba da rai ga tsofaffin tsana masu datti, ya zauna a kan kursiyin kaɗaici. Ya ɗaga tsohuwar jirgin ruwa mai tsohon jirgin ruwa na fatan da ba shi da ƙarfi, yana ɗauke da kaya marasa isassu na shilling 13, ya juya gaban jirgin zuwa babban rami na Copenhagen. Zuciyarsa, kamar dodon da ke kwance, tana bugawa a hankali zuwa ga hasken mafarki da fasaha.

Kamar yadda manyan raƙuman ruwa na Tekun Arewa suka yaga tsohuwar jirgin ruwa, haka kuma gaskiyar Copenhagen mai sanyi ta farfasa mafarkinsa na dandalin wasan kwaikwayo. Mafarkinsa na zama ɗan wasan kwaikwayo ya ɓace ba tare da amfani ba, kuma sautunan kiɗa sun watse a cikin iska mara komai. Tsohuwar alƙalaminsa tana fitar da baƙin ciki mai rauni maimakon tawada, kuma wani haske na alheri daga mai tallafawa ya shiga ta taga ɗakin karatu mai kunkuntar, amma hanyoyin gidan wasan kwaikwayo na sarauta masu sanyi sun cika da kallon raini ga sunaye da asali marasa sani. Yatsunsa masu tauri suna taɓa tsofaffin ɗakunan littattafai, suna danne raƙuman ruwa na ƙasƙanci da ke tasowa, kuma kamar yadda ake ƙara nama ga kwarangwal, yana siffanta kowace kalma. A shekarar 1829, ya fara fitowa a duniya da sunan 'The Spy and His Poet', amma har yanzu ruhinsa yana neman hanya a cikin duhu mai zurfi.

Abin da ya fara yaɗuwa a kunnuwan duniya shi ne baƙin cikin rayuwa mai cike da rikitarwa kamar igiyoyin tsofaffin takalma, baƙin ciki mai shuɗi na 'The Little Mermaid', da kuma wutar ƙarshe ta 'The Little Match Girl'. Ya yaga guntun rayuwarsa mai wucewa, wahalar da ya sha, da kuma guntun fatan da ya tashi ba tare da amfani ba, ya sa su a cikin shafukan tsofaffin tatsuniyoyi. Wani lokaci takobin gaskiya mai zafi, wani lokaci kuma ƙaunar ɗan adam mai dumi, sun jefa haske mai kaifi a cikin labaransa. Masu karatu sun gano gaskiya mai haske da ta'aziyya a cikin rayuwarsu ta yau da kullun ta hanyar labaransa, kuma taken 'Yarima na Tatsuniyoyi' ya sauka a kansa kamar tsohuwar kambi. Muryarsa, wadda aka fassara zuwa harsuna da yawa, ta ratsa kogin lokaci, tana kaiwa ga zukatan kowane yaro.

Yanzu, labarun da ya ƙirƙira suna share ƙurar tsofaffin ɗakunan littattafai, suna bin rafin tawada na dijital, suna fitar da sabon rai a ko'ina cikin duniya. Daga tsohuwar kujera, ko kuma a cikin allon na'urori masu fasaha, muryarsa tana ci gaba da yaɗuwa. Yana raɗaɗa bege da ke cikin tsofaffin takalma na kasuwar sayar da kayan tsoffi, furanni masu kyau da suka fito a ƙasar baƙi, kuma sama da duka, ƙarfin hali na rayuwa wanda ba ya mutuwa ko da a cikin mafi ƙasƙanci da marasa amfani. Tatsuniyoyinsa ba labarai ne kawai ba, sun zama harshen tausayi da ta'aziyya wanda ya wuce lokaci, kuma har yau yana raye a matsayin haske mai dumi wanda bai kamata mu manta ba lokacin da muka fuskanci inuwar rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Joseph Rudyard Kipling marubucin littattafai ne kuma mawaki dan Birtaniya na karshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20, wanda ya samu shahara a duniya ta hanyar 《The Jungle Book》.
key_achievements: Samun shahara a duniya ta hanyar buga 《The Jungle Book》
Birtaniya na farko da ya lashe lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin adabi (1907)
Kwatanta rayuwa da al'adu a zamanin Daular Birtaniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa manyan littattafai ne na adabin yara kuma suna nuna rikitarwar gadon zamanin mulkin mallaka.

rudyard-kipling.epic:
Joseph Rudyard Kipling (an haife shi a shekara ta 1865) marubucin littattafai ne kuma mawaki dan Birtaniya, wanda ya gina duniyar adabi ta musamman a cikin zamanin zinare na Daular Birtaniya. A karshen karni na 19, Daular Birtaniya, wadda ake kira daular da rana ba ta faduwa a kanta, ta yi tasiri mai girma a duk fadin duniya, musamman Indiya, wadda ake kira 'lu'ulu'u na kambin' wannan daula. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haifi Kipling a ranar 30 ga Disamba, 1865, a Bombay (yanzu Mumbai), Indiya, ga iyayen Birtaniya. Mahaifinsa, John Lockwood Kipling, shugaban makarantar fasaha ne ta Bombay kuma mai zane. Kipling ya yi yarintarsa a Indiya, inda ya zurfafa cikin harsuna da al'adun gida, amma aka tura shi Birtaniya don karatu lokacin da ya kai shekaru biyar. Wannan kwarewa ce ta yau da kullun ga yaran Birtaniya a lokacin, amma ga Kipling na yaro, ya haifar da kadaici da kuma jin rabuwa da al'adu, kuma ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan duniyar ayyukansa.

Bayan ya yi wahalar rayuwar makaranta a Birtaniya, Kipling ya koma Indiya a shekara ta 1882 yana da shekaru 16, kuma ya fara aikin jarida. Ya yi aiki a matsayin dan jarida a 'Civil and Military Gazette' a Lahore da 'Pioneer' a Allahabad, yana tafiya ko'ina cikin Indiya kuma yana saduwa da mutane daga kowane bangare na rayuwa. Wannan lokaci ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya fito da basirarsa ta adabi. Ya fara rubuta gajerun labarai da wakoki, bisa ga lura da ya yi game da shimfidar Indiya, rayuwar mulkin mallaka, rayuwar sojoji, da al'adun gida. Ya gina suna a matsayin matashin marubuci ta hanyar buga tarin wakoki mai suna 《Departmental Ditties》 a 1886 da tarin gajerun labarai mai suna 《Plain Tales from the Hills》 a 1888. Waɗannan ayyuka sun shahara sosai, suna isar da hoton Indiya mai ban mamaki ga masu karatu na Birtaniya a lokacin, kuma Kipling ya fito a matsayin sabuwar murya a cikin adabin Daular Birtaniya.

A shekara ta 1889, Kipling ya bar Indiya zuwa London, kuma ba da jimawa ba ya zama marubuci na duniya. Bayan ya auri Caroline Balestier 'yar Amurka, ya zauna na ɗan lokaci a Vermont, Amurka, yana mai da hankali kan rubuce-rubuce. A wannan lokaci ne aka buga ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, 《The Jungle Book》, a shekara ta 1894. Wannan aiki jerin labarai ne da ke ba da labarin kasadar Mowgli, wani yaro da kerkeci suka reno a cikin dajin Indiya, yana bincika dangantakar yanayi da wayewa, mutum da dabba, kuma ya ba da zurfin motsin rai ga yara da manya a duk faɗin duniya. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar 《Kim》 (1901), wanda ake ɗauka a matsayin majagaba na littattafan leƙen asiri, ya yi nazari mai zurfi kan dangantakar Indiya da Daular Birtaniya. Amma rayuwarsa ba ta guje wa bala'i na kashin kai ba. Musamman ma, asarar 'yarsa ƙaunatacciya Josephine mai shekaru shida ga ciwon huhu a shekara ta 1899, ta bar masa rauni marar warkewa. Duk da wannan zafi, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba, kuma a shekara ta 1907, an ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin adabi, wanda ya zama Birtaniya na farko da ya samu wannan karramawa, saboda "ƙarfin lura, tunani na asali, ikon ba da labari, da kuma kyawun labarinsa."

Gadon adabi na Rudyard Kipling ya ci gaba da yaduwa har zuwa yau. Ayyukansa sun zama manyan littattafai, musamman a fannin adabin yara, kuma 《The Jungle Book》 an daidaita shi zuwa fina-finai da yawa, zane-zane, da wasan kwaikwayo, ana ƙaunarsa tsawon tsararraki. Amma kimantawar ayyukansa tana da rikitarwa. An soki shi a matsayin marubucin mulkin mallaka saboda wakoki irin su "The White Man's Burden," waɗanda ke nuna ra'ayin da ke goyon bayan faɗaɗa da mulkin mallaka na Daular Birtaniya. Duk da haka, basirarsa ta amfani da harshe, bayyananniyar kwatance, da kuma ƙwarewarsa a matsayin mai ba da labari gaskiya ce da ba za a iya musantawa ba. Ya yi tasiri mai girma a kan adabin harshen Ingilishi, kuma wakokinsa da littattafansa sun kasance muhimman kayan aiki don bincika yanayin ɗan adam da rikitarwar wayewa. Ayyukan Kipling suna ba da taga mai mahimmanci don fahimtar rikitarwar ruhin zamanin mulkin mallaka, kuma ana iya samun zurfin fahimta lokacin da aka karanta su tare da kwatanta su da ra'ayoyin sukar mulkin mallaka na marubuta irin su George Orwell da E. M. Forster, waɗanda suka rayu a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Dorothea Lange wata mai ɗaukar hoto ce ta Amurka a lokacin Babban Bala'i, wacce ta rubuta wahalhalun zamanin ta hanyar ɗan adam ta hanyar ayyukanta na Hukumar Kula da Noma (FSA).
key_achievements: Ta yi aiki a matsayin mai ɗaukar hoto na Hukumar Kula da Noma (FSA) a lokacin Babban Bala'i.
Ta haifar da tasirin zamantakewa tare da hotuna masu ban mamaki kamar 'Migrant Mother'.
Ta yi tasiri sosai a ci gaban ɗaukar hoto na takardun shaida.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Hotunanta suna isar da saƙo game da darajar ɗan adam da rashin daidaito na zamantakewa, kuma suna ci gaba da ba da tasiri mai zurfi har zuwa yau.

dorothea-lange.epic:
A farkon karni na 20, Amurka ta fuskanci ci gaban tattalin arziki mai sauri da sauye-sauyen zamantakewa, amma da inuwar Babban Bala'i na 1929 ta lulluɓe ta, ta fuskanci rikicin tattalin arziki da zamantakewa wanda ba a taɓa gani ba. A cikin wannan lokaci na yanke kauna, Dorothea Lange (an haife ta a 1895), wata mai ɗaukar hoto ta Amurka kuma mai rubuta labarai ta hoto, ta sadaukar da rayuwarta don rubuta wahalhalun zamanin ta hanyar kyamara da kuma bincika darajar ɗan adam. An haife ta a Hoboken, New Jersey, ta haɓaka zurfin fahimtar duniyar gani tun tana yarinya, kuma ta fahimci cewa hoto kayan aiki ne mai ƙarfi don isar da saƙon zamantakewa fiye da rubutu kawai. Ta fara aikinta ta hanyar gudanar da ɗakin studio na hotunan mutane a San Francisco, amma yayin da Babban Bala'i ya tsananta, ta ji tausayi sosai ga marasa aikin yi da marasa gida a kan tituna kuma ta fara ɗaukar rayuwarsu a cikin ruwan tabarau. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a cikin hanyar aikinta, yana jagorantar ta zuwa hanyar ɗaukar hoto na takardun shaida wanda ke haskaka hoton al'umma gaba ɗaya fiye da hotunan mutane.

A tsakiyar shekarun 1930, Babban Bala'i wanda ya mamaye Amurka ya haifar da matsanancin wahala musamman a yankunan karkara. Manoma da yawa sun rasa gidajensu saboda fari da koma bayan tattalin arziki, wanda ya haifar da babban ƙaura zuwa yamma. A cikin wannan yanayi mai ban tausayi, Dorothea Lange an ɗauke ta aiki a matsayin mai ɗaukar hoto na Hukumar Kula da Noma (FSA), inda ta ɗauki muhimmin aiki na rubuta rayuwar ma'aikatan ƙaura da talakawa. Hukumar Kula da Noma (FSA) wata hukuma ce ta gwamnatin Amurka da aka kafa don magance talauci da rashin aikin yi a yankunan karkara a lokacin Babban Bala'i, kuma a ƙarƙashin tallafin wannan hukuma, Lange ta yi tafiye-tafiye a duk faɗin Amurka, ta zama shaida ga zamanin ta hanyar ruwan tabarau. Kyamararta ta ɗauki fuskokin mutane da hannayensu, da kuma muhallinsu da suka lalace, waɗanda ke ci gaba da rayuwa cikin yunwa da yanke kauna. Ayyukanta a wannan lokacin sun wuce rubutu kawai, suna taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haskaka tasirin Babban Bala'i a kan rayuwar mutane daga hangen nesa na ɗan adam da kuma jawo hankalin jama'a.

Hoton da ya fi shahara a cikin ayyukan Lange na FSA shine 'Migrant Mother' wanda aka ɗauka a Nipomo, California a 1936. Wannan hoton yana nuna wata mata mai suna Florence Owens Thompson, mai yara bakwai, tana riƙe da yaranta da fuskar yanke kauna, kuma ya zama alama ta duniya da ke nuna wahalar ma'aikatan ƙaura a lokacin Babban Bala'i. 'Migrant Mother' ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Amurka a lokacin, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen faɗaɗa tallafin gwamnati ga talakawa. Lange ba ta yi jinkiri ba wajen fallasa rashin daidaito na zamantakewa da wahalar ɗan adam ta hanyar hotuna, kuma ruwan tabarau nata ya bayyana tsananin gaskiya ba tare da lalata darajar abin da aka ɗauka ba. Ta tabbatar da cewa hoto kayan aiki ne mai ƙarfi wanda zai iya haifar da canjin zamantakewa fiye da bayyanar kyawawan abubuwa kawai. Wannan aikin wani lokaci ya haifar da rikici da hukumomin gwamnati, amma Lange ba ta taɓa yin kasa a gwiwa ba wajen sadaukar da kanta ga ɗaukar gaskiya. Hotunanta sun ba da shaida ta gani game da bala'in Babban Bala'i, kuma sun haifar da zurfin tausayi da haɗin kai ga mutane da yawa.

Hotunan Dorothea Lange sun yi tasiri sosai a ci gaban ɗaukar hoto na takardun shaida, kuma sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haskaka mummunan sakamakon Babban Bala'i daga hangen nesa na ɗan adam. Ta ɗauki zurfin ciki na abin da aka ɗauka, tana bayyana rayuwa da motsin zuciyar mutane waɗanda aka ɓoye a bayan lambobin ƙididdiga kawai. Ayyukan Lange sun nuna cewa hoto na iya zama shaida ta zamantakewa kuma mai haifar da canji, kuma ya zaburar da masu ɗaukar hoto na takardun shaida da yawa daga baya. Har zuwa yau, hotunanta suna isar da saƙo mai ƙarfi game da darajar ɗan adam, rashin daidaito na zamantakewa, da kuma ruhun ɗan adam wanda ba ya karyewa duk da matsaloli. Ko da bayan mutuwarta a 1965, ayyukan Lange suna ci gaba da ba da tasiri mai ɗorewa, ana nuna su a gidajen tarihi da wuraren nune-nunen a duk faɗin duniya. Gadonta ya wuce rubutun tarihi kawai, yana tasiri sosai ga yadda muke kallon rashin daidaito da waɗanda aka ware a cikin al'ummar zamani, kuma yana ɗauke da ma'ana mai zurfi tare da ayyukan wasu masu ɗaukar hoto na takardun shaida kamar Walker Evans, waɗanda suka rubuta gaskiyar zamantakewa a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Clara Schumann ta kasance mai buga piano, mawakiya, kuma malama 'yar Jamus a zamanin Romantic, wacce ta kawo sauyi a tsarin da kuma jerin waƙoƙin piano, tare da ɗaukaka matsayin mata masu kiɗa.
key_achievements: Nasarar aikinta na wasanni na shekaru 61
Kawo sauyi a tsarin da kuma jerin waƙoƙin piano
Rubuta waƙoƙin piano da yawa, kide-kide, da waƙoƙin murya
Yada da tallata ayyukan Robert Schumann
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadononta na fasaha ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kiɗan Romantic, kuma ya ba da ilhamar ga mata masu kiɗa, ana tuna ta har yau.

clara-schumann.epic:
Clara Schumann (1819-1896) ta kasance fitacciyar mai buga piano, mawakiya, kuma malamar piano 'yar Jamus a zamanin Romantic. An haife ta a Leipzig a farkon karni na 19, inda ake daraja hazakar kiɗa sosai. Ta sami horon piano tun tana ƙarama a ƙarƙashin tsauraran jagorancin mahaifinta, Friedrich Wieck, wanda ya kasance shahararren malamin piano kuma mai buga littattafai. Ta yi wasanta na farko a bainar jama'a tana da shekaru bakwai, kuma tana da shekaru tara, ta fara fitowa a Gewandhaus na Leipzig, inda ta zama sananniya a duk faɗin Turai a matsayin wata baiwa mai ban mamaki. Wannan lokaci ne da kiɗan Romantic, wanda ke jaddada bayyanar da motsin rai da daidaikun mutane, ke bunƙasa. Clara ta fara tafiyarta ta kiɗa a tsakiyar wannan lokaci, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara yanayin wannan zamanin. Farkon aikinta ya cika da ci gaba da yin aiki da wasanni, wanda ya zama tushen shahararren aikinta na wasanni wanda ya ɗauki shekaru 61.

Ɗaya daga cikin mahimman sauye-sauye a rayuwar Clara shine haɗuwarta ta kaddara da Robert Schumann, wanda ya kasance ɗalibin mahaifinta. Su biyun sun faɗa cikin soyayya mai zurfi fiye da fahimtar kiɗa, amma mahaifinta ya yi adawa da auren sosai, yana mai fargabar cewa auren Robert zai kawo cikas ga kyakkyawar aikinta. Soyayyarsu ta kasance ƙalubale ga al'adun zamantakewa da ikon iyaye na lokacin, kuma mahaifinta ya kai ƙarar kotu don hana auren. Duk da haka, Clara da Robert sun shawo kan duk matsaloli da ƙarfin hali, kuma a ƙarshe sun yi nasarar yin aure a 1840 tare da amincewar kotu. Wannan aure ya buɗe sabon babi a rayuwar Clara, yana gabatar mata da ƙalubale masu sarkakiya na gudanar da rayuwarta a matsayin mai wasa, mata, kuma nan ba da jimawa ba, uwa ga yara takwas. Ta zama tushen ilhamar kiɗa ga Robert kuma mafi girman mai goyon bayansa.

Bayan aure, rayuwar Clara ta kasance tafiya mai sarkakiya, inda nasarorin fasaha da matsalolin sirri suka haɗu. Duk da cewa tana renon yara takwas, ta ci gaba da yin wasanni a duk faɗin Turai, inda ta kafa kanta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu buga piano na zamaninta. Har ila yau, ta taka rawar gani wajen yada ayyukan mijinta Robert, tana buga su da kuma tallata su, ta haka ta gabatar da duniyar kiɗansa ga jama'a. Amma farin ciki bai daɗe ba. Lafiyar Robert ta tabarbare a hankali, kuma an shigar da shi asibitin mahaukata a 1854. Mutuwarsa a 1856 ta bar Clara cikin matsanancin girgiza da baƙin ciki. Duk da babban nauyin da ke kanta na renon yara takwas ita kaɗai a matsayin shugabar iyali da kuma matsalolin tattalin arziki, ba ta karaya ba. Clara ta shawo kan baƙin cikinta kuma ta sake mai da hankali kan wasanni, tana nuna ƙarfin hali da sadaukarwarta a matsayin mai fasaha ta hanyar fara buga ayyukan matasa mawaka kamar Johannes Brahms.

Gadon Clara Schumann ya wuce kawai kasancewarta fitacciyar mai wasa. Ta kawo sauyi a tsarin da kuma jerin waƙoƙin piano ta hanyar dogon aikinta na wasanni na shekaru 61. Maimakon mayar da hankali kan ayyukan da ke nuna fasaha kawai, ta gabatar da daidaitattun ayyuka masu zurfi daga manyan mawaka kamar Bach, Beethoven, da Chopin, tare da sabbin ayyuka daga mawaka na zamani, ta haka ta haɓaka fahimtar kiɗa na masu sauraro. Bugu da ƙari, a matsayinta na mace mai kiɗa, ta shawo kan ƙuntatawa na zamantakewa na lokacin kuma ta sami shahara a duniya, tana ba da ilhamar ga mata masu fasaha na gaba. A matsayinta na mawakiya, ta bar ayyuka masu ma'ana a nau'o'i daban-daban, ciki har da waƙoƙin piano, kide-kide na piano, kiɗan ɗaki, da waƙoƙin murya, waɗanda ake sake kimantawa a yau. Rayuwarta da kiɗanta suna wakiltar sha'awar fasaha da ƙarfin hali na mutum a zamanin Romantic, kuma har yau suna ci gaba da shafar mutane da yawa. Idan aka kwatanta da rayuwar Fanny Mendelssohn, wata mawakiya mai hazaka kuma abokiyar zamanta, Clara Schumann za a iya cewa ita ce fitacciyar mace mai fasaha wacce ta nuna tasiri mara iyaka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jane Addams ta kasance mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewar Amurka a karshen karni na 19, ta kafa Hull House kuma ta samu lambar yabo ta Nobel ta zaman lafiya.
key_achievements: Kafa Hull House tare da wasu
Samun lambar yabo ta Nobel ta zaman lafiya
Jagorantar motsin ikon mata na kada kuri'a da zaman lafiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninta da ayyukanta sun kafa harsashin ilimin jin kai na zamantakewa na zamani kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga tabbatar da adalci a zamantakewa.

jane-addams.epic:
Karshen karni na 19 a Amurka lokaci ne mai cike da rudani, inda masana'antu da birane suka bunkasa cikin sauri, tare da yawan bakin haure, wanda hakan ya zurfafa matsalolin rashin daidaito a zamantakewa da talauci. A cikin wannan yanayi, **Jane Addams (1860-1935)** ta fito a matsayin mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewar Amurka kuma majagaba a fannin aikin jin kai na zamantakewa, inda ta sadaukar da kanta wajen samar da muhalli ga wadanda aka ware da kuma tabbatar da adalci a zamantakewa. An haife ta a shekarar 1860 a wani gida mai arziki a Cedarville, Illinois, ta girma karkashin tasirin mahaifinta, John Huy Addams, wanda ya kasance dan kasuwa mai nasara kuma sanata na jihar. Matsalolin lafiya tun tana karama sakamakon cutar tarin fuka a kashin baya da kuma tunanin iyakokin rawar mata a cikin al'umma sun haifar mata da zurfin tunani. Bayan ta kammala karatunta a Rockford Female Seminary, maimakon ta zabi aure ko koyarwa, hanyoyin da mata ke bi a lokacin, ta shiga cikin zurfin tunani don neman manufar rayuwarta. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin mataki da ya kai ta ga shiga cikin matsalolin zamantakewa da karfi.

Yayin da take neman alkiblar rayuwarta, Jane Addams ta fadada iliminta ta hanyar yin tafiye-tafiye zuwa Turai sau biyu a cikin shekarun 1880s. Musamman ma, ziyarar da ta kai **Toynbee Hall** a London a shekarar 1888 ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwarta. Toynbee Hall ita ce gidan zama na farko (settlement house) inda daliban jami'a ke zama a yankunan talakawa don samar da ilimi da ayyukan zamantakewa ga mazauna yankin, wanda ya gabatar da sabon tsarin kawo sauyi a zamantakewa. A nan, Addams ta ga yiwuwar yadda masu ilimi za su iya shiga kai tsaye cikin matsalar talauci don kawo canji a zamantakewa. Wannan kwarewa ta ba ta kwarin gwiwa sosai, kuma ta dawo Amurka tare da abokiyarta Ellen Gates Starr, suka yanke shawarar kafa irin wannan cibiya a yankin da bakin haure suka fi yawa a Chicago. A shekarar 1889, a karshe sun gyara wani gida da aka yi watsi da shi suka kafa **Hull House**. Hull House ba kawai wuri ne na zama ba, ta zama cibiyar al'umma mai hadaka da kuma cibiyar motsin kawo sauyi a zamantakewa, inda take samar da ayyuka daban-daban ga bakin haure da talakawa, kamar kula da yara, ilimi, horar da sana'o'i, da ayyukan fasaha.

Hull House ta yi saurin zama abin koyi mai nasara, kuma ta yi tasiri wajen kafa gidajen zama da yawa a duk fadin Amurka. Jane Addams, ta hanyar Hull House, ta shiga cikin manyan motsin kawo sauyi a zamantakewa, kamar hana aikin yara, fadada ikon mata na kada kuri'a, inganta lafiyar jama'a, da kare hakkin ma'aikata. Ta gudanar da bincike da nazari a zamantakewa don gano tushen talauci da kuma neman hanyoyin magance shi, ta haka ta kafa harsashin ilimin zamantakewa mai amfani. Musamman ma, lokacin da yakin duniya na farko ya barke, ta jagoranci motsin adawa da yaki bisa ga tsayayyen imaninta na zaman lafiya. A shekarar 1915, ta kafa Women's Peace Party tare da wasu, kuma daga baya ta jagoranci motsin zaman lafiya na kasa da kasa a matsayin shugabar Women's International League for Peace and Freedom (WILPF). A lokacin yakin, ayyukanta na zaman lafiya sun fuskanci suka daga jama'a da kuma zargin rashin biyayya, amma Addams ta ci gaba da rike imaninta ba tare da girgiza ba, tana mai imani da karfin rashin tashin hankali da hadin gwiwar kasa da kasa. Wannan jajircewa da sadaukarwa sun zama muhimmin mataki na samun karbuwa a duniya daga baya.

Kokarin Jane Addams na neman zaman lafiya da adalci a zamantakewa ya samu karbuwa a duniya. A shekarar 1931, an ba ta lambar yabo ta Nobel ta zaman lafiya, wanda hakan ya sa ta zama mace ta farko 'yar Amurka da ta samu wannan karramawa saboda gudunmawarta ga motsin zaman lafiya. Ko da bayan rasuwarta a shekarar 1935, Hull House ta ci gaba da aikinta har zuwa shekarar 2012, tana ba da bege ga mutane da yawa. Ayyukan Addams sun kafa harsashin ilimin jin kai na zamantakewa na zamani kuma sun gabatar da muhimmin tsari don ci gaban al'umma. Ta yi jayayya cewa talauci da matsalolin zamantakewa ba laifin mutum ba ne na dabi'a, amma abubuwan da ke tattare da muhalli ne, kuma ya kamata a magance su ta hanyar canjin tsarin al'umma gaba daya. Tunaninta game da adalci a zamantakewa, zaman lafiya, da shigar jama'a har yau yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga motsin zamantakewa da ayyukan kare hakkin dan adam a duk fadin duniya. Rayuwarta, tare da sawun Susan B. Anthony, wacce ta jagoranci motsin ikon mata na kada kuri'a a lokaci guda, da sauran masu kawo sauyi da suka yi gwagwarmaya don adalci a zamantakewa, har yau tana da tasiri mai zurfi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Maria Montessori likita ce kuma malama daga Italiya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, wacce ta kafa Hanyar Ilimi ta Montessori.
key_achievements: Mace ta farko likita a Italiya
Kafa Hanyar Ilimi ta Montessori
Yaɗuwar 'Gidajen Yara' a duk duniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafar iliminta mai mai da hankali kan yara tana da tasiri mai girma a kan ilimin zamani.

maria-montessori.epic:
Maria Montessori (1870-1952) ta kasance likita ce mai hangen nesa, malama, kuma masaniyar falsafa daga Italiya, wacce ta kawo sauyi a tsarin ilimi a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, a cikin al'ummar Turai mai cike da rudani. An haife ta a ranar 31 ga Agusta, 1870, a Chiaravalle, Lardin Ancona, Italiya, ta nemi ilimi mai zurfi a lokacin da yake da iyaka ga mata. Duk da yanayin zamantakewa mai ra'ayin mazan jiya, Montessori ta himmatu sosai a karatunta, kuma a shekarar 1896, ta cimma gagarumar nasara ta zama mace ta farko da ta samu digirin likitanci a Italiya daga Jami'ar Sapienza ta Roma. A farkon aikinta na likita, ta fi mai da hankali kan kula da yara masu nakasa a asibitocin mahaukata. A cikin wannan tsari, ta fahimci cewa matsalolin waɗannan yaran ba kawai na likitanci ba ne, amma kuma suna iya samo asali ne daga yanayin ilimi mara kyau. Wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe ga falsafar iliminta daga baya, kuma ya kai ga binciken sabbin hanyoyin ilimi don fitar da damar yara. Ta yi ƙoƙari ta fahimci ainihin ka'idodin ci gaban ɗan adam, fiye da kawai magance cututtuka.

Ta hanyar kwarewarta a matsayin likita, Maria Montessori ta tabbata cewa yara masu nakasa suna buƙatar hanyoyin ilimi na musamman fiye da maganin likita kawai. Ta gano cewa waɗannan yaran za su iya nuna ci gaba mai ban mamaki ta hanyar ilimin hankali, kuma wannan ya kai ga imanin cewa akwai ka'idodin ilimi na duniya waɗanda za a iya amfani da su ga dukkan yara. Bisa ga wannan tabbaci, Montessori ta buɗe 'Gidan Yara' (Casa dei Bambini) na farko a ranar 6 ga Janairu, 1907, a yankin San Lorenzo na Roma. 'Gidan Yara' cibiyar kula da yara ce ga yara matalauta, amma a nan ta yi amfani da 'Hanyar Ilimi ta Montessori,' wata sabuwar hanya ta ilimi inda yara ke koyo da haɓaka da kansu. Hanyar Ilimi ta Montessori falsafar ilimi ce mai mai da hankali kan yara wacce ke taimaka musu su bayyana damar da ke tattare da su ta hanyar zaɓar da yin amfani da kayan ilimi a cikin 'yanayi mai shirye-shirye.' Maimakon malami ya cusa ilimi, an jaddada rawar malami wajen tallafawa binciken yara da gano abubuwa da kansu. A cikin wannan sarari na gwaji, yara sun nuna gagarumar mai da hankali da jagorancin kai, wanda ya zama babban ƙalubale ga tsarin ilimi na gargajiya kuma ya nuna farkon sabon tsarin ilimi.

Nasarar Hanyar Ilimi ta Montessori ta bazu cikin sauri a duk faɗin duniya, kuma an kafa 'Gidajen Yara' a ƙasashe da yawa, inda falsafar iliminta ta fara samun karɓuwa a duniya. Amma rayuwarta ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba. A cikin shekarun 1930, gwamnatin Fascist ta Italiya ta yi ƙoƙarin amfani da ilimin Montessori a matsayin kayan aikin siyasa, kuma ta yi yaƙi da yunƙurin lalata ainihin ilimi. Daga ƙarshe, a shekarar 1934, Montessori ta bar Italiya kuma ta tafi gudun hijira zuwa Spain, Netherlands, da sauran ƙasashe. Barkewar Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu ya kawo mata babban ƙalubale a ayyukanta. Musamman ma a lokacin da take Indiya, an tsare ta a gida saboda kasancewarta ƴar ƙasar abokan gaba, amma duk da waɗannan matsaloli, ba ta rasa sha'awarta ga ilimi ba. Maimakon haka, ganin mummunan sakamakon yaƙi ya sa ta ƙara tabbata cewa ilimi ne kayan aiki mafi ƙarfi don zaman lafiya, kuma ta jaddada muhimmancin 'ilimin zaman lafiya,' tana mai da hankali kan taimaka wa yara su girma su zama ƴan ƙasa masu zaman lafiya na al'ummar gaba. Ta yi imani cewa farkar da halin zaman lafiya da ke cikin yara shine hanyar samar da duniya mara yaƙi, kuma ta zagaya duniya tana ba da laccoci da ayyukan ilimi.

Falsafar ilimi ta Maria Montessori ta ci gaba da yaɗuwa a duk faɗin duniya kuma ta yi tasiri mai zurfi har bayan mutuwarta. Ta rasu a ranar 6 ga Mayu, 1952, a Netherlands, amma ra'ayoyinta na 'hankali mai sha'awa' da 'yanayi mai shirye-shirye' sun ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga ka'idar ci gaban yara da ilimin koyarwa. Ilimin Montessori, ta hanyar ba wa yara 'yancin koyo da girma a kan nasu gudu, ya ba da gudummawa wajen haɓaka mutane masu tunani mai kirkire-kirkire da masu zaman kansu. A yau, ana aiwatar da ka'idodin iliminta a dubban makarantun Montessori a duk faɗin duniya, suna ci gaba da tunatar da mu muhimmancin ilimi mai mai da hankali kan yara. An zaɓe ta don Kyautar Nobel ta Zaman Lafiya sau da yawa, don gane gudummawar da ta bayar wajen samar da zaman lafiya ta hanyar ilimi. Gadon Montessori ya wuce hanyoyin ilimi kawai, yana gabatar da ra'ayi na jin kai wanda ke girmama yara kuma yana gaskata da damar su, kuma wannan, tare da nasarorin wasu masu tunani na ilimi masu ci gaba kamar Rudolf Steiner da John Dewey, ya zama muhimmin ginshiƙi na ilimin zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: William Lloyd Garrison ya kasance mai adawa da bauta a Amurka a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya yi kira ga kawar da bauta nan take ta hanyar jaridar "The Liberator".
key_achievements: Kafa da buga jaridar "The Liberator"
Haɗin gwiwar kafa American Anti-Slavery Society
Jagorantar motsin kawar da bauta nan take
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gwagwarmayarsa mai ɗorewa ta yi tasiri sosai wajen kawar da bauta a Amurka, kuma ya kasance alamar motsin haƙƙin ɗan adam.

william-lloyd-garrison.epic:
William Lloyd Garrison (an haife shi a 1805) ya kasance fitaccen mai adawa da bauta, ɗan jarida, kuma mai fafutukar zamantakewa a Amurka a ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a ranar 10 ga Disamba, 1805, a Newburyport, Massachusetts, ya rayu a wani lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali inda bauta ke girgiza tushen al'ummar Amurka. A lokacin, Amurka ta kasance da bambanci sosai tsakanin masana'antu a Arewa da tattalin arzikin noma a Kudu, musamman a Kudu inda dogaro ga aikin bayi na Baƙar fata Amurkawa ya yi yawa, wanda ya sa bauta ta zama matsalar zamantakewa da ɗabi'a fiye da matsalar tattalin arziki kawai. Garrison ya girma a cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, kuma ya fahimci rashin adalcin bauta wanda ke take mutuncin ɗan adam. Tun da wuri, ya yi aikin buga littattafai kuma ya fahimci ƙarfin jarida, yana haɓaka sha'awar kawo gyaran zamantakewa ta hanyarsa. Mai adawa da bauta shine wanda ke goyon bayan ra'ayi da motsi na kawo ƙarshen bauta gaba ɗaya kuma nan take, kuma Garrison ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu magana da yawun wannan motsi.

Mafi mahimmancin juyawa a rayuwar Garrison shine a ranar 1 ga Janairu, 1831, lokacin da ya kafa jaridar "The Liberator" wacce ke kira ga kawar da bauta. Wannan jarida ta haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Amurka, tana mai sukar bauta ba tare da sassauci ba kuma tana kira ga kawar da ita nan take ba tare da diyya ba. Sabanin yawancin masu adawa da bauta a lokacin waɗanda ke kira ga 'yanci a hankali ko diyya ga masu bayi, Garrison ya ɗauki bauta a matsayin zunubi na ɗabi'a kuma ya ƙi yarda da kowane irin sulhu. Ra'ayoyinsa masu tsauri ba kawai sun jawo masa tsananin suka da barazana daga masu bayi a Kudu ba, har ma sun haifar da rashin jin daɗi ga mutane da yawa a Arewa. A wannan shekarar, ya zama ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa American Anti-Slavery Society, yana jagorantar motsi mai tsari, kuma rubuce-rubucensa sun girgiza lamirin mutane da yawa kuma sun kunna wutar motsin kawar da bauta. Ya yi imani cewa shiru game da bauta yana nufin haɗin kai, kuma bai taɓa ja da baya daga imaninsa ba.

Ta hanyar "The Liberator," Garrison ya fuskanci gwagwarmaya da matsaloli masu yawa a gaba-gaba na motsin kawar da bauta. Ra'ayoyinsa masu tsauri sau da yawa suna haifar da martani mai zafi, kuma a 1835 a Boston, an ja shi a cikin taron masu adawa kuma an yi masa barazanar rayuwa. Duk da waɗannan barazanar da kallon sanyi daga abokan aiki, bai ja da baya daga imaninsa ba. Da farko, ya yi kira ga kawar da bauta daga ra'ayin anarchism bisa ga zaman lafiya na Kirista, amma lokacin da Yaƙin Basasa ya barke, ya canza matsayinsa zuwa goyon bayan gwagwarmaya ta makamai da gwamnatin Abraham Lincoln don babban dalilin kawar da bauta. Wannan ya kasance muhimmin canji a cikin imaninsa, kuma ya nuna niyyarsa ta neman hanyoyin da za a iya amfani da su don kawar da bauta. Ya cika alkawarinsa na ci gaba da buga "The Liberator" har sai an 'yantar da bayi, kuma a ƙarshe ya daina buga jaridar lokacin da aka kawar da bauta ta hanyar Kwaskwarimar 13 ga Kundin Tsarin Mulkin Amurka a 1865.

William Lloyd Garrison ya rasu a ranar 24 ga Mayu, 1879, a Birnin New York, amma gadonsa ya yi tasiri sosai a cikin al'ummar Amurka. Gwagwarmayarsa mai ɗorewa da ƙa'idodinsa marasa sassauci sun taka rawar gani wajen cimma babban aikin tarihi na kawar da bauta. Har bayan mutuwarsa, ana tuna shi a matsayin alamar gwagwarmaya don haƙƙin ɗan adam da adalci na zamantakewa, kuma ruhinsa yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga waɗanda ke yaƙi da nau'ikan zalunci daban-daban har zuwa yau. Musamman ma, bayan kawar da bauta, bai daina ƙoƙari ba don haɓaka haƙƙin masu rauni a cikin al'umma, kamar yadda ya yi kira ga faɗaɗa haƙƙin mata na zaɓe a cikin shekarun 1870s. Rayuwarsa da gwagwarmayarsa, tare da ƙoƙarin sauran masu adawa da bauta kamar Frederick Douglass, sun nuna cewa sun kasance muhimmin ƙarfi wanda ya haifar da canji mai zurfi a cikin al'ummar Amurka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin tauhidi, masanin falsafa, kuma mawaƙi wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga aikin likitanci a Lambaréné, Afirka, yana aiwatar da falsafar girmama rayuwa.
key_achievements: Fara aikin likitanci a Lambaréné, Afirka.
Sadaukar da kai wajen kula da waɗanda ke fama da cututtuka da talauci.
Gabatar da falsafar girmama rayuwa da kuma gudanar da motsin zaman lafiya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Falsafar girmama rayuwarsa ta zama babban gado, tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya da ruhin haɗin kai a duk faɗin iyakoki, kuma tana jefa tambayoyi marasa iyaka ga ɗan adam.

albert-schweitzer.epic:
A cikin daren Strasbourg mai tsarki, inda gabobin coci ke bugawa da karfi, a karkashin hazo mai kauri na Alsace, wani matashi mai rai ya nutsa cikin tsananin doka da ruhin kiɗa. Gaskiyar da aka debo daga zurfin rijiyar tunani ta sauka a cikin hankalinsa kamar gwal-gwal na tsohon Littafi Mai Tsarki, kuma ta shiga cikin zurfin wanzuwar ɗan adam mai rikitarwa, kamar waƙar Bach's fugue da ke yawo a kunnuwansa. Ya riga ya ci nasara a kan kololuwar ilimin tauhidi kuma ya yi tafiya a cikin filayen falsafa masu faɗi, amma kukan ƙasa mai nisa, nesa da ɗumin birane masu cunkoso, ya fara haifar da raƙuman ruwa a cikin zurfin ransa. Cikin ransa, ya riga ya nutsa cikin shiru na gaban babban hadari, yana jefa rigar ɗaukaka ta banza, kuma yana marmarin tsohuwar rigar likitanci da ta gaji.

A cikin Lambaréné mai cike da kango, inda jajayen ƙura ke shafa kunnuwa, kuma danshi mai nauyi ke danne huhu, Albert Schweitzer ya tsaya. Hasken da ke fitowa daga tsohuwar tanti ya haskaka fuskoki marasa adadi da ke fama da cututtuka, kuma kukan dabbobin daji da ihu na harsunan baƙi sun raba shiru na dare. Ya fuskanci warin raunuka masu ruɓewa da idanuwan da yunwa ta gaji, kuma ya ji waƙar rayuwa mafi tsanani fiye da ayoyin Littafi Mai Tsarki. Duk da cewa sunansa na masanin tauhidi mai daraja har yanzu yana nan a kunnuwansa, hannunsa yanzu ya riƙe scalpel maimakon alkalami, kuma zuciyarsa tana taɓa fatar da ta kumbura kuma ta yi ja saboda fashewar jijiyoyi, maimakon Littafi Mai Tsarki. A gaban wahalar ɗan adam, tauhidi ya zama marar amfani; sadaukarwa ce kaɗai harshe.

Haukan yaƙi ya yaga ƙasa kuma ya share wayewa, amma ruhinsa bai karye ba ko da an ɗaure shi da sarƙoƙi. Alamar cewa shi abokin gaba ne ta sa shi tsayuwa da ƙarfi a gaban gicciyen jin kai. Ya sake gina tsohuwar asibitin, kuma ya riƙe hannun yara masu yunwa. Saƙonnin zaman lafiya da ke fitowa daga rediyo sun shiga kunnuwansa, amma zuciyarsa har yanzu tana rawa a gaban barazanar makaman nukiliya masu halakarwa. Ya cika da ƙura da gumi, yana da tabo na jini da ƙura, ya yi ƙoƙarin toshe inuwar halaka da ke gabatowa ga ɗan adam da dukan jikinsa. Fiye da ɗaukakar Nobel, ya fi daraja guntun burodi ga mai yunwa, da ɗigon gumi ga mai ciwo.

Jajayen ƙura na Lambaréné, inda ya koma ƙasa, yanzu sun zama iri na bege kuma suna tsirowa. Girmamawarsa ga rayuwa ba ikirari ba ne mai cike da ƙura a cikin tsohon littafi, amma yana raye a cikin hannayen ma'aikatan kiwon lafiya marasa adadi da ke aiki tuƙuru a yau, da kuma ɗumin haɗin kai da ake miƙawa ga maƙwabta masu wahala. Bayan bangon tsohuwar asibitin, ruhinsa ya wuce iyakoki don buɗe hanyoyin ruwa na rayuwa a cikin busasshiyar ƙasa, kuma ya zama kamfas ga waɗanda suka ɓace a cikin fadama na yanke kauna. Rayuwarsa ta kasance babban gado, tana sassaƙa tambayoyi marasa iyaka a cikin zukatanmu game da menene ɗan adam, da kuma yadda ya kamata mu rayu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Pandita Ramabai (1858-1922) ta kasance mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa kuma majagaba a ilmantar da mata a Indiya, wacce ta sadaukar da kanta don haɓaka haƙƙin mata da dogaro da kai.
key_achievements: Samun lakabin 'Pandita' da 'Sarasvati'
Kafa Arya Mahila Samaj don ilmantar da mata
Kafa Sharada Sadan ga matan da suka mutu a lokacin ƙuruciyarsu da mata
Faɗaɗa Mukti Mission don dogaro da kai na mata
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙoƙarinta na farko ya zama ginshiƙi ga ilmantar da mata da kawo sauyi a zamantakewar Indiya, kuma yana ci gaba da yin tasiri har zuwa yau.

pandita-ramabai.epic:
Pandita Ramabai Sarasvati (1858-1922) ta kasance mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa kuma mai fafutukar ilmantar da mata, wacce ta yi aiki a lokacin sauye-sauye masu girma a cikin al'ummar Indiya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20. An haife ta a ranar 23 ga Afrilu, 1858, a lardin Bombay na Indiya a lokacin mulkin Birtaniya (yanzu jihar Maharashtra), ta fito daga dangin Brahmin, amma saboda mahaifinta, Anant Shastri Dongre, wanda bai bi al'adun gargajiya ba, ta sami damar koyon Sanskrit tun tana ƙarama kuma ta bunƙasa iliminta. A lokacin da damar ilimi ga mata ke da iyaka sosai, mahaifinta ya koyar da matarsa da 'ya'yansa mata littattafan Sanskrit, kuma wannan ya yi tasiri sosai a rayuwar Ramabai. Duk da haka, a ƙarshen shekarun 1870, saboda babban yunwa da ta addabi Indiya, Ramabai ta rasa iyayenta da ɗan'uwanta, kuma ta ci gaba da rayuwa tare da ƙanwarta, suna yawo a Indiya, suna karanta littattafai masu tsarki da raba ilimi. Abubuwan da ta fuskanta a wannan lokacin sun ba ta damar ganin halin da mata 'yan Indiya ke ciki kai tsaye.

Gwanintar Ramabai a harshen Sanskrit ta sa aka ba ta lakabin girmamawa na 'Pandita' (malamiya) da 'Sarasvati' (allaniyar hikima) a Jami'ar Calcutta a shekarar 1878. Wannan wani abu ne da ba a taɓa gani ba ga mata 'yan Indiya a lokacin, kuma ya sanya ta zama sananniya a duk faɗin ƙasar. Duk da haka, gwagwarmayar kanta ta ci gaba. A shekarar 1882, ta auri Bipin Behari Medhvi, lauyan Bengali, amma bayan shekaru biyu kacal, mijinta ya mutu sakamakon cutar kwalara, inda ta bar ta ita kaɗai tare da 'yarta ƙarama, Manorama. Wannan mummunan abin da ya faru ya zama wani juyi wanda ya ƙarfafa ƙudurinta na sadaukar da kai don kare haƙƙin mata 'yan Indiya, musamman matan da suka mutu a lokacin ƙuruciyarsu da kuma waɗanda ba su samu ilimi ba. A wannan shekarar, ta kafa Arya Mahila Samaj, wato 'Ƙungiyar Mata ta Arya', a Pune, inda ta fara ayyukanta na ilmantar da mata da kawo sauyi a zamantakewa. Manufar wannan ƙungiya ita ce taimaka wa mata su zama masu dogaro da kansu ta hanyar ilimi.

A shekarar 1883, Ramabai ta tafi Ingila don yin karatun likitanci, amma dole ne ta bar burinta na zama likita saboda matsalar ji. A wannan lokacin, ta koma addinin Kirista, wanda ya haifar da cece-kuce mai yawa a cikin al'ummar Indiya a lokacin. Daga baya, daga 1886 zuwa 1888, ta zauna a Amurka kuma ta halarci bikin kammala karatun Anandibai Joshi, ɗaya daga cikin mata likitoci na farko a Indiya. A lokacin zamanta a Amurka, ta wallafa littafinta mai suna 'The High-Caste Hindu Woman' a shekarar 1887, inda ta bayyana mummunan halin da mata 'yan Indiya ke ciki, musamman wahalar matan da suka mutu a lokacin ƙuruciyarsu, wanda ya haifar da babban martani a duniya. Bayan ta dawo Indiya a shekarar 1889, Ramabai ta kafa Sharada Sadan, wato 'Gidan Ilimi', a Mumbai. Wannan makaranta ce kuma mafaka ga matan da suka mutu a lokacin ƙuruciyarsu da kuma mata matalauta, kuma daga baya aka mayar da ita Khedgaon kusa da Pune don guje wa annoba da yunwa, inda aka faɗaɗa ta zuwa Mukti Mission, wato 'Ofishin Ceto'. Wannan ofishin ya taimaka wa dubban mata da yara su zama masu dogaro da kansu ta hanyar samar musu da ilimi, horon sana'a, da kuma wurin zama mai aminci.

Rayuwar Pandita Ramabai ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya don ilmantar da mata da haɓaka haƙƙinsu a Indiya. Sharada Sadan da Mukti Mission da ta kafa sun ci gaba da aiki na dogon lokaci bayan mutuwarta a shekarar 1922, suna ba da bege da dama ga mata marasa adadi. Ta kalubalanci al'adun gargajiya na uba da suka yi tushe sosai, tana mai jaddada cewa mata suna da haƙƙin samun ilimi, kiyaye mutuncinsu, da kuma rayuwa mai zaman kanta. Ƙoƙarin Ramabai na farko ya kafa muhimmin ginshiƙi ga motsin kawo sauyi a zamantakewar Indiya, kuma jajircewarta da sadaukarwarta sun zaburar da sauran masu kawo sauyi waɗanda suka yi gwagwarmaya don ilmantar da mata da adalci na zamantakewa a lokaci guda, kamar Savitribai Phule da Jyotirao Phule. Gadonta yana ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a motsin mata na Indiya har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata majagaba wacce ta buɗe kofa ga likitanci kuma ta kafa asibitin mata, ta ba da bege ga mata da yawa a cikin zaluncin mata na karni na 19.
key_achievements: Mace ta farko da aka shigar kuma ta kammala karatun likitanci.
Kafa asibitocin kyauta ga mata da yara.
Kafa asibitin mata ga likitocin mata.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta kasance wutar bege mai zafi, wadda ba za ta taɓa mutuwa ba, ga duk waɗanda ke haɗin kai da masu wahala kuma suke yaƙi da rashin daidaito.

elizabeth-blackwell.epic:
A cikin karni na 19, lokacin da hazo mai kauri na ƙasar Ingila ke watsewa, kuma inuwar zamani mai nauyi ke lulluɓe kowane lungu da sako na titunan London, a nan ne zuciyar wata yarinya mai tausayi da kuma ƙaunar adalci mai zafi ta fara bugawa. A zamanin da ake tsammanin hankalin mata ya kasance a rufe cikin shiru mai ladabi, a cikin zuciyarta mai zurfi, kukan adawa da duniya mai zalunci, tare da ƙaƙƙarfan niyyar karya ƙofofin da aka rufe, ya yi ta kaɗawa kamar igiyar ruwa. Sha'awar zurfin ilimi da ba a sani ba ba wai kawai sha'awa ce mai sauƙi ba ce; ta kasance wata fuska ce ta imani mai ƙarfi cewa mata, waɗanda aka haifa da damar da ba ta ragu ga kowa ba, suna da haƙƙin tsayawa da girma a gaban duniya.

Cikin tsananin yanke kauna na lokutan da aka hana ta ci gaba a gaban ƙofofi da yawa saboda sunanta na 'mace', kuma ta yi ta girgiza kamar za ta faɗi a gaban bangon ƙin yarda mai sanyi. Yaya tsawon dare ta yi tana fama da takaici, tana nutsewa cikin tarin littattafai masu tsufa a ƙarƙashin fitila mai haske? Amma niyyarta ba ta karye ba. Ta tsaya tsayin daka, tana ƙoƙarin shafa launin bege a kan zanen duniya mai taurin kai da goga na bincike mai dorewa. A ƙarshe, lokacin da ƙofar Geneva Medical College, wata cibiyar likitanci mai ƙarfi a ƙasar Philadelphia mai nisa, ta buɗe, ba wai kawai shiga ba ne. Ya kasance farkon nasara mai ban mamaki, inda girman ruhin ɗan adam ya rushe iyakokin da aka yi imani ba za a iya ketare su ba.

Duk da cewa ta riƙe alamar digiri mai haske a hannunta, nuna bambancin duniya har yanzu yana toshe mata hanya kamar kogi mai sanyi. A cikin kallon sanyi da watsi daga abokan aiki, da kuma tsananin kadaici da ta fuskanta saboda kasancewarta mace, ta ƙara ƙarfafa tushenta. Ta kusanci masu yunwa da marasa lafiya, ta shuka iri na bege a cikin asibitocin kyauta inda ta raba tausasawa da ilimi. Takaici da zafin da ta fuskanta sun zama ƙarfi marar karyewa; ta rayu rayuwa mai sadaukarwa, tana sauraron kukan mata da yara masu jini, tana warkar da raunukansu, da kuma dawo musu da haske mai haske na lafiya.

A kan titunan New York masu cike da cunkoso, kowane tubali ja na Asibitin Mata, wani sansani don warkar da wahalar mata, ya shafe gumi da hawayenta. Ya samar da mafaka inda likitocin mata za su iya rubuta sunayensu da girma, kuma inda likitocin mata na gaba za su iya cimma burinsu. Sadaukarwarta ba ta tsaya ba. Ta rage shingen ilimi, ta tabbatar da iyawar hankalin mata ga duniya, kuma ta ba wa mata da yawa makamin ƙarfin hali da bege. Sunan Elizabeth Blackwell yanzu ba wai kawai mutum ne na tarihi ba. Tana rayuwa a matsayin wutar bege mai zafi, wadda ba za ta taɓa mutuwa ba, a cikin zukatan duk waɗanda ke miƙa hannun haɗin kai ga masu wahala kuma suke yaƙi da rashin daidaito a duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Florence Nightingale ma'aikaciyar jinya ce kuma masanin kididdiga 'yar Biritaniya ta karni na 19, wacce ta kafa tushen jinya ta zamani ta hanyar gyare-gyare a lokacin Yaƙin Crimea.
key_achievements: Inganta tsaftar asibiti da rage adadin mace-mace a lokacin Yaƙin Crimea
Kafa ƙwarewar aikin jinya da inganta fahimtar jama'a game da shi
Kafa Makarantar Jinya ta Nightingale da tsara tsarin ilimi
Jagorantar gyaran lafiyar jama'a ta amfani da kididdiga
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukanta sun zama ginshiƙin ilimin jinya na zamani da tsarin kiwon lafiyar jama'a, suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ma'aikatan jinya a duk faɗin duniya.

florence-kelley.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, a lokacin da Daular Biritaniya ke faɗaɗa tasirinta a duniya, Florence Nightingale (1820-1910), a matsayinta na ma'aikaciyar jinya 'yar Biritaniya, marubuciya, kuma masanin kididdiga, ta bar gurbi mai zurfi a tarihin ɗan adam. An haife ta a ranar 12 ga Mayu, 1820, a Florence, Italiya, a cikin dangi masu arziki da daraja na Biritaniya. Ta yi mafarkin wata hanya dabam da rayuwar manyan mata da ake tsammani a lokacin. A lokacin, aikin jinya aiki ne da ake raina shi a cikin al'umma, amma Nightingale ta ji kiran hidima mai ƙarfi tun tana yarinya. Baya ga ilimin yau da kullun, ta yi nazarin fannoni daban-daban kamar kididdiga da harsuna, ta kafa tushen ilimi da ake buƙata don gyaran jinya a nan gaba. Duk da adawar iyalinta, ƙudurinta na bin hanyar jinya ya kasance alamar ruhu mai ƙarfi da ke neman buɗe sabuwar hanya fiye da al'adun zamanin. Haihuwarta da girma ba kawai rayuwar mutum ɗaya ba ce, amma wani muhimmin juyi ne da ya sanar da farkon jinya ta zamani.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Nightingale shine Yaƙin Crimea (1853-1856). Wannan yaƙi babban rikici ne tsakanin Daular Rasha da Daular Ottoman, Faransa, da sojojin haɗin gwiwa na Biritaniya, inda sojojin Biritaniya suka fuskanci mummunan yanayin sojoji da suka ji rauni a fagen fama. Labarin mummunan yanayin da ake yi wa sojoji da kuma yanayin asibitocin da ba su da tsafta daga gaba ya girgiza al'ummar Biritaniya, kuma Sidney Herbert, Sakataren Yaƙi a lokacin, ya nemi Nightingale ta tura ma'aikatan jinya. A watan Oktoba na 1854, Nightingale ta jagoranci ma'aikatan jinya 38 zuwa asibitin sojojin Biritaniya da ke Scutari a Daular Ottoman. Wannan wani ƙalubale ne da ba a taɓa gani ba ga mace ta shiga cikin gudanar da asibitin soja a lokacin, kuma ƙudurinta mai jaruntaka a cikin yanayin nuna bambancin zamantakewa da ra'ayin mazan jiya na sojoji ya zama matakin farko na sake fasalta rawar da matsayin jinya. Zuwan ta ba kawai ƙarin ma'aikata ba ne, amma alama ce ta sabbin abubuwa a cikin tsarin kiwon lafiya gaba ɗaya.

Bayan isowar Nightingale a asibitin Scutari, ta fuskanci mummunan gaskiya. Asibitin ya kasance mai matuƙar rashin tsafta, kayan aikin likita sun yi ƙaranci sosai, kuma sojoji sun fi mutuwa daga cututtuka masu yaɗuwa kamar kwalara da zazzabin cizon sauro fiye da raunuka. Duk da adawar ma'aikatan lafiya na soja da jami'ai, Nightingale ta ci gaba da gyare-gyare da ƙarfi. Ta gabatar da ƙa'idodin tsafta masu tsauri, ta kiyaye yanayin asibitin da tsabta, ta inganta tsarin samar da kayan aikin likita, kuma ta samar da wuraren wanki da abinci mai gina jiki. Musamman ma, ta rubuta yanayin marasa lafiya da abubuwan da ke haifar da mutuwa a hankali kuma ta yi nazarin su ta hanyar kididdiga, ta tabbatar da tasirin inganta tsafta a kan rage adadin mace-mace a kimiyance. 'Taswirar yankin polar' da ta haɓaka ana ɗaukarta a matsayin misali na farko na amfani da kididdiga don magance matsalolin lafiyar jama'a. Sadaukarwarta na kula da marasa lafiya, tana zagayawa dakunan asibiti da fitila a kowane dare, ya sa ta sami laƙabin 'Mace mai fitila', kuma ta hanyar ƙoƙarinta, adadin mace-mace a asibitin ya ragu sosai.

Ayyukan nasara a Yaƙin Crimea sun canza ra'ayin jama'a game da aikin jinya gaba ɗaya. Bayan yaƙin, Nightingale ta koma Biritaniya kuma ta sadaukar da rayuwarta ga gyaran jinya da lafiyar jama'a. A cikin 1859, ta buga 'Notes on Nursing', wanda ake kira littafin koyarwa na jinya ta zamani, ta tsara ka'idodin jinya da ayyukanta. A cikin 1860, ta kafa Makarantar Jinya ta Nightingale a Asibitin St. Thomas da ke London, ta kafa tushen ilimin horar da ma'aikatan jinya na ƙwararru. Hanyarta ta kididdiga ta yi tasiri sosai a kan manufofin lafiyar jama'a da fannin kididdigar likitanci. Gadonta, wanda ta mutu a ranar 13 ga Agusta, 1910, ya ci gaba har zuwa yau, kuma ana bikin ranar haihuwarta, 12 ga Mayu, a matsayin 'Ranar Ma'aikatan Jinya ta Duniya' kowace shekara. Ayyukan Nightingale na farko a matsayin uwar jinya ta zamani suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ma'aikatan jinya a duk faɗin duniya, kuma ana ɗaukarsu a matsayin babban misali na ayyukan jin kai, tare da sadaukarwar Clara Barton wajen taimakon sojoji da suka ji rauni da kuma jagorancin ƙungiyar Red Cross a lokacin Yaƙin Basasa na Amurka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: David Livingstone ya kasance mai wa'azi kuma mai bincike ɗan Scotland na ƙarni na 19 wanda ya binciki Afirka kuma ya yaƙi cinikin bayi.
key_achievements: Nasarar tsallaka nahiyar Afirka daga gabas zuwa yamma
Gano da kuma sanya wa Victoria Falls suna
Fallasa mummunan halin cinikin bayi da kuma ba da gudummawa ga yunkurin kawo ƙarshensa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya faɗaɗa ilimin yanki na Afirka kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga kawo ƙarshen bauta, yana barin manufofin jin kai.

david-livingstone.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, lokacin da Juyin Juya Halin Masana'antu na Daular Burtaniya ya kai kololuwa kuma nahiyar Afirka ta kasance yanki da ba a sani ba, David Livingstone (1813-1873), wani mai wa'azi, mai bincike, kuma likita ɗan asalin Scotland, ya bar babban tarihi a tarihin ɗan adam. An haife shi a Blantyre, Scotland, a shekara ta 1813 a gidan maƙerin masaku matalauci, kuma tun yana ɗan shekara 10 ya yi aiki sa'o'i 14 a rana a masana'antar auduga don samun abin rayuwa. Duk da haka, ya nuna sha'awar ilimi mai ban mamaki, yana aiki a masana'anta da rana, yana zuwa makarantar dare da dare don koyon Latin, Girkanci, lissafi, da tauhidi da kansa. Ya himmatu wajen karatun likitanci, ya sami digiri na likitanci daga Jami'ar Glasgow, kuma ya shiga London Missionary Society don cika kiran sa na mai wa'azi. Da farko ya shirya zuwa China, amma yakin Opium ya toshe masa hanya, sai ya mai da hankalinsa ga nahiyar Afirka, yana samun tasiri daga Robert Moffat, mai wa'azi a Afirka ta Kudu. Binciken ilimi marar gajiyawa da imani mai ƙarfi tun daga yarintarsa daga baya ya zama ƙarfin da ya sa ya binciki manyan yankunan Afirka da ba a taɓa shiga ba da kuma yaƙi da cinikin bayi.

A shekara ta 1841, Livingstone ya isa Afirka ta Kudu kuma ya fara ayyukan wa'azi. Ya kauce daga tsarin wa'azi na gargajiya, yana neman sabuwar hanya ta shiga cikin Afirka don yada bishara da binciken yanki. Hangen nesansa shine buɗe Afirka ta hanyar 'Kiristanci, Kasuwanci, da Wayewa' da kawo ƙarshen cinikin bayi mai zafi. Ya kulla dangantaka mai zurfi da 'yan Afirka, ya koyi harsunansu da al'adunsu, kuma ya gudanar da bincike da yawa tare da jagororin 'yan asali. A shekara ta 1849, ya tsallaka hamadar Kalahari kuma ya gano tafkin Ngami. A shekara ta 1855, yayin da yake binciken kogin Zambezi, ya gano wani babban ruwa mai faɗi kuma ya sa masa suna 'Victoria Falls' don girmama Sarauniya Victoria ta Burtaniya a lokacin. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na sanar da Turawa game da kyawawan halittun Afirka. A shekara ta 1856, ya cimma babban aiki na zama Turai na farko da ya tsallaka nahiyar Afirka daga gabas zuwa yamma, kuma sunansa ya shahara a duk faɗin duniya.

Binciken Livingstone ya kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje masu tsanani kamar yadda yake da daukaka. Binciken kogin Zambezi da gwamnatin Burtaniya ta tallafa masa daga 1858 zuwa 1864 ya bayyana cewa kogin ba za a iya tafiya a cikinsa ba, kuma yayin da 'yan binciken ke fama da cututtukan wurare masu zafi kamar zazzabin cizon sauro da gudawa, ya fuskanci bala'in mutuwar matarsa, Mary Moffat Livingstone. Duk da wannan gwaji, ya shaida mummunan halin cinikin bayi da kansa kuma ya ƙara himmatu wajen fallasa shi. Ya rubuta ayyukan zalunci na 'yan kasuwar bayi kuma ya sanar da Turai, ta haka ya kunna wutar yunkurin kawo ƙarshen cinikin bayi. Daga baya ya fara bincikensa na ƙarshe don gano tushen kogin Nilu, amma ya sha wahala daga tsananin kadaici da rashin lafiya. A shekara ta 1871, lokacin da ba a san ko yana raye ko ya mutu ba, Henry Morton Stanley, wani ɗan jarida ɗan Amurka, ya gano shi kuma ya bar shahararren maganar nan, "Dr. Livingstone, ko ba haka ba?" Livingstone ya ƙi taimakon Stanley kuma ya ci gaba da bincikensa, amma tuni rashin lafiyarsa ya yi tsanani.

A ranar 1 ga Mayu, 1873, Livingstone ya mutu a Chitambo, wanda yanzu yake Zambia, yana durƙusa cikin addu'a. Abokansa 'yan Afirka masu aminci sun adana gawarsa kuma suka ɗauke ta sama da kilomita 1,600 zuwa bakin teku. An mayar da gawarsa zuwa Burtaniya kuma an binne shi a Westminster Abbey. Bayan mutuwarsa, rubuce-rubucen bincikensa da fallasa cinikin bayi sun haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Turai, sun faɗaɗa ilimin yanki game da cikin Afirka sosai, kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu bincike na gaba. Bugu da ƙari, ayyukansa na yaƙi da cinikin bayi sun yi tasiri sosai wajen kawo ƙarshen bauta a Afirka. Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin mutumin da ya nemi cimma manufofin jin kai, fiye da mai bincike kawai. Gadonsa har yau yana tunatar da mu game da fahimtar Afirka da ƙimar jin kai, kuma ana kimanta shi da hangen nesa daban-daban, ba kamar sauran Turawa masu bincike na zamaninsa ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ya sami dukiya da suna ta hanyar ƙirƙirar dynamite, amma saboda laifin da ya ji game da halaka, ya kafa kyautar Nobel don ɗaukaka hankalin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar dynamite wanda ya daidaita nitroglycerin
Gudummawa ga ci gaban masana'antu kamar hakar ma'adinai da gini ta hanyar dynamite
Kafa kyautar Nobel don ɗaukaka hankalin ɗan adam da inganta zaman lafiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya ɗaukaka gadon halaka zuwa hasken ɗaukaka hankalin ɗan adam da inganta zaman lafiya, kuma ya kasance mafi girman kyauta har zuwa yau.

alfred-nobel.epic:
A cikin daren Scandinavia mai sanyi, a cikin tsohon rumbun ajiyar kaya na Stockholm, ƙarƙashin hasken fitilar gas mai rauni da ke rawa, wani matashi mai tunani, kamar wani jarumi mai fuskantar kaddara, yana gwagwarmaya da wani ruwa mai ɗauke da ƙaddarar halaka a nan gaba. Kamshin ƙarfe da mai da ke fitowa daga tsohon ɗakin aikin mahaifinsa, da kuma tsakanin hayaniyar fashe-fashe marasa tabbas da ke ratsa kunnuwansa, Alfred ya bi wani haske mai rauni, kamar tauraro mai nuni a cikin duhu. Santsin nitroglycerin a yatsunsa masu ƙanana ya yi sanyi kamar iyakar da ke raba bege da yanke kauna. Duniya ta nuna shi a matsayin iri na mutuwa kawai, amma a idanunsa, ya ga wani babban ƙarfi da zai farfado da masana'antu, wani tanderu da zai rushe duwatsu masu tsayi kuma ya buɗe sabbin hanyoyi. Yana kwana ba barci shi kaɗai a cikin duhunsa, yana gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don mallake wannan ƙarfi mai ban tsoro da daji kafin ya faɗa hannun wasu.

A ƙarshe, ya ratsa ta cikin tokar rashin kulawar duniya da gazawa akai-akai, kamar wani jarumi mai fuskantar ƙaddara, ruwan ja da ke kwance a cikin diatomaceous earth ya bayyana ainihinsa a hankali, amma tabbas. Dynamite. Wani abu da ya taɓa zama abin tsoro, yanzu ya kasance a hannunsa a matsayin ƙarfi mai daidaituwa, wanda ba ya fashewa ba. Ma'adanai na zinariya sun buɗe, nahiyoyi sun haɗu, kuma sunansa ya bazu a duniya, yana ɗauke da yabo da zargi a lokaci guda, kamar yadda iska ke ɗauke da labarin jarumi mai rikitarwa, a matsayin 'Sarkin Abubuwan Fashewa'. Amma a bayan zaƙin wadata, wani inuwa mai jini ta bayyana, kamar alamar bala'i. Domin kamar yadda abin da ya ƙirƙira ya inganta rayuwar masu hakar ma'adinai, haka kuma ya zubar da mummunar halaka da mutuwa a hannun sojoji. Dare marasa adadi, tunaninsa ya kasance cikin guguwa mai tsanani na farin ciki da laifi, kamar teku mai hazo.

Lokacin da karar halakar da abin da ya ƙirƙira ya haifar ta yi ta ratsa kunnuwansa, kamar kukan fatalwa, Alfred ya nutse cikin zurfin kaɗaici. A saman nasara, ya fi jin kaɗaici, kamar sarki a kan kursiyinsa na zinariya. Dukiyar da ke hannunsa ta zama nauyi, kuma yabon duniya ya zama amo mara amfani. Ya ci gaba da tambayar kansa, yaya zai tsarkake gadonsa, shin zai iya mayar da wannan jajayen mafarki mai ban tsoro zuwa haske da zai zama ceto ga bil'adama, kamar yadda alchemist ke mayar da ƙarfe zuwa zinariya? Fatan da ya riƙe ƙarƙashin hasken fitilar gas a rumbun ajiyar kaya, yana jin kamshin ƙarfe da mai, yanzu ya dushe, amma a maimakon haka, burin kunna wani babban wuta mai girma, wuta mai tsarki, ya mamaye ransa, kamar wuta mai tsarki da ke cinye komai. Ya yanke shawarar siffanta mafarkinsa na ƙarshe, ba a matsayin ƙarfin da ke rushe duwatsu ba, amma a matsayin ɗaukaka da ke ɗaukaka hankali da ƙarfin hali na ɗan adam.

Don haka, iri na halaka da aka haifa a ƙarƙashin sararin sama mai launin toka, kamar tsaba na bala'i, bayan wani lokaci, ya fure zuwa wani fure mai haske mai suna Nobel Prize, kamar furen da ke buɗe bayan dogon lokaci na duhu. Gaskiyar zurfin ilimin kimiyyar lissafi, binciken daidai na ilimin kimiyyar sinadarai, abin al'ajabi na likitanci da ke tona asirin rayuwa, zuciyar adabi da ke motsa ruhi ta hanyar harshe, da kuma burin ɗan adam na neman zaman lafiya bayan zamanin rikice-rikice, dukkaninsu suna haskakawa da haske mafi haske kowace shekara bisa ga wasiyyarsa, kamar taurari masu jagoranci a cikin duhu. Alfred Nobel, ba sarkin abubuwan fashewa ba ne kuma, amma ya zama tauraro mai ɗaukaka ruhin ɗan adam, mai haskaka hanyar ilimi da zaman lafiya, kuma mafarkin da ya fara da sunansa har yanzu yana haskaka sararin samaniyar arewa mai sanyi, yana haskaka mana hasken bege har zuwa yau, kamar fitilar da ba ta taɓa mutuwa ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Pierre de Coubertin malami ne ɗan Faransa a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 wanda ya kafa Wasannin Olympics na zamani, yana haɓaka zaman lafiya na duniya da ruhun wasanni.
key_achievements: Kafa Wasannin Olympics na Zamani
Kafa Kwamitin Olympics na Duniya (IOC)
Bayar da shawarar falsafar Olympism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Hangen nesansa yana ci gaba har zuwa yau a matsayin ƙimar ɗan adam ta duniya na haɓaka fahimtar juna da zaman lafiya ta hanyar wasanni.

pierre-de-coubertin.epic:
Charles Pierre de Frédy, Baron de Coubertin, malami ne ɗan ƙasar Faransa wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1863, kuma shi ne ya kafa Wasannin Olympics na zamani. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, Faransa tana fuskantar baƙin ciki mai zurfi da kuma matsalar girman kai na ƙasa sakamakon shan kashi a Yaƙin Faransa da Prussia na 1870-1871. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Coubertin, wanda aka haifa a cikin gidan sarauta, ya shaida raguwar ƙasarsa kuma ya shiga cikin zurfin tunani. Ya fahimci buƙatar dawo da kuzari ga al'ummar Faransa da kuma haɓaka ƙarfin tunani da na jiki na matasa. Musamman ma, ya sami kwarin gwiwa daga tsarin ilimin makarantun gwamnati na Biritaniya da kuma manufofin tsohuwar Girka, inda ya yi mafarkin sake gina ƙasa ta hanyar gyaran ilimi. Ya mai da hankali kan tasirin wasanni da ayyukan motsa jiki ga samuwar hali da haɗin kai na al'umma, fiye da kawai isar da ilimin ilimi, kuma ya nemi hanyoyin da za su kawo sabon kuzari ga matasan Faransa. Waɗannan ra'ayoyinsa na farko sun zama ginshiƙin haihuwar babban bikin wasanni a tarihin ɗan adam.

Coubertin ya yi tafiye-tafiye masu yawa a Turai da Amurka, yana nazarin tsarin ilimi daban-daban. Ya fahimci musamman cewa ilimin da ke mai da hankali kan wasanni a makarantun gwamnati na Biritaniya yana da tasiri wajen haɓaka ɗabi'un ɗalibai, jagoranci, da haɗin gwiwa. Wannan gogewa ta sanya masa ra'ayin juyin juya hali na farfaɗo da Wasannin Olympics na da. Wasannin Olympics na da wani biki ne na Panhellenic inda biranen Girka na da suka haɓaka haɗin kai ta hanyar gasa mai lumana da musayar al'adu tun kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa. Coubertin ya yi imani cewa ta hanyar farfaɗo da wannan tsohuwar manufa a zamanin yau, za a iya mayar da gasa da rikice-rikice tsakanin ƙasashe zuwa abota da fahimta ta hanyar wasanni. Ya tabbata cewa wasanni, fiye da kawai motsa jiki, na iya zama kayan aiki mai ƙarfi don haɓaka zaman lafiya na duniya da girmama juna. A lokacin, mutane da yawa sun ɗauki wannan hangen nesansa a matsayin mafarki mara gaskiya, kuma shawarwarinsa sau da yawa suna fuskantar shakku da rashin kulawa. Duk da haka, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba a cikin imaninsa, kuma ya fara neman hanyoyin da za su tabbatar da wannan babban mafarki.

Coubertin ya yi aiki tuƙuru don mayar da manufofinsa zuwa gaskiya. A shekara ta 1892, ya gabatar da shawarar tarihi ta “Farfaɗo da Wasannin Olympics” a hukumance a taron Ƙungiyar Wasanni ta Faransa da aka gudanar a Jami'ar Sorbonne da ke Paris. Ko da yake da farko bai sami babban martani ba, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba. Shekaru biyu bayan haka, a watan Yuni na 1894, ya sake shirya “Taron Ƙasa da Ƙasa don Sake Kafa Wasannin Olympics” a Jami'ar Sorbonne. Wannan taron ya samu halartar wakilai 79 daga ƙasashe 13, inda aka yanke shawarar kafa Wasannin Olympics na zamani da kuma kafa Kwamitin Olympics na Duniya (IOC). Bugu da ƙari, an amince da gudanar da Wasannin Olympics na zamani na farko a Athens, Girka, wurin haihuwar Olympics na da, a shekara ta 1896. Coubertin ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban Kwamitin Olympics na Duniya na biyu daga 1896 zuwa 1925, yana sadaukar da rayuwarsa da kuma dukiya mai yawa don kafa tushe da yaɗa motsin Olympics. A cikin wannan tsari, ya fuskanci gwaji da yawa, ciki har da matsalolin kuɗi da cikas na gudanarwa, amma ya shawo kansu da jajircewa, wanda ya kai ga nasarar kafa Olympics.
