Wasannin Olympics na zamani, waɗanda suka fara da hangen nesa na Coubertin, daga baya sun zama mafi girman daraja kuma mafi tasiri a duniya. Falsafarsa tana taƙaita ta hanyar taken Olympics “Citius, Altius, Fortius” (Da sauri, Da tsayi, Da ƙarfi), wanda ke jaddada ba kawai neman nasara ba, amma mahimmancin ƙoƙari, gwagwarmaya, da kuma ruhun wasa mai kyau. Ya ba da shawarar falsafar rayuwa da ake kira ‘Olympism,’ wanda ke da nufin kiyaye mutuncin ɗan adam da gina al'umma mai zaman lafiya ta hanyar haɗa wasanni, al'adu, da ilimi. Bayan mutuwarsa, gadonsa yana ci gaba da yaɗa babban burin haɓaka zaman lafiya na duniya da fahimta ta hanyar wasanni a duk faɗin duniya. Olympics sun zama kayan aiki mai ƙarfi wanda ke haɗa ɗan adam ba tare da la'akari da iyakoki da akidu ba, kuma ruhunsa yana ci gaba da zaburar da mutane marasa adadi a yau. Ana ɗaukar ƙoƙarinsa a matsayin nasara mai kwatankwacin aikin Henry Dunant na aiwatar da jin kai ta hanyar motsin Red Cross, a cikin cewa sun gabatar da ƙimar da ɗan adam ya kamata ya bi tare, fiye da kawai gasar wasanni.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Fridtjof Nansen, mai bincike kuma mai agaji daga Norway a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, ya ba da gudummawa ga bil'adama ta hanyar binciken Arctic da kuma gabatar da Fasfo na Nansen.
key_achievements: Nasarar ketare Greenland a karo na farko (1888)
Jagorancin binciken Arctic na Fram (1893-1896)
Gabatar da Fasfo na Nansen da ayyukan jin kai
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhunsa na bincike da gadonsa na jin kai sun zama tushen kare 'yan gudun hijira na zamani da haɗin gwiwar duniya.

fridtjof-nansen.epic:
Fridtjof Nansen (an haife shi a shekara ta 1861) wani babban mutum ne daga Norway wanda ya bar babban tarihi a tarihin bil'adama a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, a matsayin mai bincike, masanin kimiyya, jami'in diflomasiyya, da kuma mai agaji. A shekara ta 1861, lokacin da aka haife shi, Norway tana ƙarƙashin haɗin gwiwar masarautu da Sweden, kuma lokaci ne da motsin kafa asalin ƙasa ke tasowa a hankali. An haife shi a kusa da Oslo, Nansen ya haɓaka ƙauna mai zurfi ga yanayi da kuma sha'awar bincike tun yana yaro. Ya karanci ilimin dabbobi a Jami'ar Christiania (yanzu Jami'ar Oslo), inda ya fahimci mahimmancin hanyoyin kimiyya da lura, wanda ya zama tushen duk ayyukansa na gaba. Musamman, sha'awarsa mai ƙarfi ga duniyar Arctic da ba a sani ba ta jagorance shi ya zama mai binciken kimiyya fiye da mai kasada kawai, kuma a cikin zazzafar sha'awar gano sabbin wurare da ta mamaye Turai a lokacin, ya kasance yana da burin buɗe sabbin hanyoyin ilimi. Bincikensa na farko ya mai da hankali kan ilimin halittun ruwa da ilimin kankara, wanda ya zama muhimmin tushe na fahimtarsa cewa binciken Arctic ba kalubale ne kawai ba, sai dai filin binciken kimiyya mai tsari.

Shaharar Nansen a matsayin mai bincike ta tabbata ta hanyar nasarar da ba a taɓa gani ba na **ketare Greenland** a shekara ta 1888. Wannan shi ne karo na farko da aka ketare babban yankin kankara na cikin Greenland ta amfani da ski, kalubale ne da ya shawo kan iyakokin jiki da tunani waɗanda ba za a iya tunanin su ba a lokacin. Wannan nasara ba kawai ta kawo masa shahara a duniya ba, har ma ta zama damar sanar da duniya game da hanyarsa ta musamman ta binciken Arctic. Daga baya, ya tsara wani sabon shiri na isa Pole ta Arewa ta amfani da igiyoyin ruwa na Tekun Arctic, kuma don wannan dalili, ya gina jirgin ruwa mai karya kankara wanda aka tsara musamman, **Fram**. Binciken Fram, wanda ya gudana daga 1893 zuwa 1896, wani yunƙuri ne mai ƙarfin hali na binciken yanayin ƙasa da halayen ruwa na Tekun Arctic ta hanyar barin jirgin ya makale a cikin kankara kuma ya yi shawagi tare da igiyoyin ruwa. Nansen ya bar Fram kuma ya yi yunƙurin isa Pole ta Arewa tare da Hjalmar Johansen ta amfani da ski da sled ɗin kare, inda suka kai digiri 86 da minti 14 na arewa, wanda shi ne mafi nisa da ɗan adam ya taɓa kaiwa a lokacin. Ko da yake sun kasa isa Pole ta Arewa, wannan binciken ya tattara bayanai masu yawa na kimiyya game da igiyoyin ruwa, yanayi, da halittun ruwa na Tekun Arctic, wanda ya zama muhimmin juyi wajen canza tsarin binciken Arctic.

Bayan ya bar rayuwar mai bincike, Nansen ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya a lokacin samun 'yancin kai na Norway a farkon ƙarni na 20, kuma daga baya ya zama mai agaji, yana mai da hankali ga wahalar ɗan adam. Bayan Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, Turai ta fuskanci matsalar jin kai da ba a taɓa gani ba saboda miliyoyin 'yan gudun hijira da marasa ƙasa. A cikin wannan yanayi, an naɗa Nansen Babban Kwamishinan 'Yan Gudun Hijira na Ƙungiyar Ƙasashe a 1921, inda ya sadaukar da kansa ga sabon aiki. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorinsa shi ne gabatar da **Fasfo na Nansen**. Wannan takardar shaidar ce ta duniya da kuma takardar tafiye-tafiye ga 'yan gudun hijira marasa ƙasa, wanda ya taimaka wa miliyoyin 'yan gudun hijira su ketare iyakoki don neman sabuwar rayuwa da sake haɗuwa da iyalansu. Fiye da ƙasashe 50 sun amince da wannan fasfo, kuma ya zama tushen dokokin 'yan gudun hijira na zamani. Bugu da ƙari, ya shirya ayyukan agaji a lokacin babban yunwa na Rasha a 1921-1922, kuma ya shiga cikin warware matsalolin duniya masu rikitarwa da wahala, kamar sasantawa tsakanin Girka da Turkiyya game da musayar yawan jama'a. Don gane waɗannan ƙoƙari da sadaukarwa marasa gajiya, Nansen ya sami lambar yabo ta Nobel ta zaman lafiya a 1922, yana sanar da duniya game da ayyukansa na jin kai.

Gadon Fridtjof Nansen ya wuce ƙasar Arctic mai daskarewa kuma ya zurfafa cikin ƙimar ɗan adam ta duniya. Ya kasance fiye da mai bincike kawai; ya kasance majagaba wanda ya buɗe sabbin duniyoyi tare da ruhun binciken kimiyya da kuma jajircewa, kuma a lokaci guda, babban mai agaji wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga waɗanda ke fama da yaƙe-yaƙe da bala'o'i. Ayyukansa na kimiyya sun yi tasiri sosai a fannin ilimin ruwa, ilimin yanayi, da ilimin kankara, kuma musamman, bayanan da aka samu ta hanyar binciken Fram har yanzu ana amfani da su a matsayin muhimman bayanai don binciken Arctic a yau. Fasfo na Nansen ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka wayar da kan jama'a game da matsalar marasa ƙasa da kuma kafa tushen tsarin kare 'yan gudun hijira na zamani. Ruhunsa na jin kai ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ayyukan ƙungiyoyin duniya kamar UNHCR a yau, kuma yana tunatar da mu mahimmancin jin kai na duniya. Rayuwarsa tana ɗaya daga cikin muhimman misalai na manyan mutane waɗanda suka sadaukar da basirarsu ga jin daɗin ɗan adam gaba ɗaya, kamar Albert Schweitzer wanda ya yi aiki a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: George Eastman ya kasance mai kirkire-kirkire kuma dan kasuwa Ba'amurke daga karshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, wanda ya kafa Eastman Kodak kuma ya yada daukar hoto ta fim mai jujjuyawa.
key_achievements: Kafa Kamfanin Eastman Kodak
Kirkirar da mallakar kyamarar fim mai jujjuyawa
Gudummawa ga yada daukar hoto
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kirkire-kirkirensa ya kawo hoto daga yankin kwararru zuwa rayuwar yau da kullum ta jama'a, yana kafa tushen al'adun gani na zamani.

george-eastman.epic:
George Eastman (1854-1932) ya kasance wani mai kirkire-kirkire kuma dan kasuwa Ba'amurke wanda ya yi aiki daga karshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, wanda ya fadada hoto daga wani yanki na kwararru zuwa wani bangare na rayuwar yau da kullum ga jama'a. Shekarar 1854, lokacin da aka haife shi, lokaci ne da juyin juya halin masana'antu ke canza al'ummar Amurka, kuma hoto yana fitowa ne daga matakan farko bayan an kirkiro shi. A wancan lokacin, daukar hoto yana bukatar kayan aiki masu nauyi da rikitarwa, tsarin sinadarai mai wahala ta amfani da faranti na gilashi masu jika, da kuma babban ilimin kwararru. Ga talakawa, shiga cikin wannan aiki yana da matukar wahala saboda lokaci, kudi, da kuma shingayen fasaha. Eastman, wanda ya rasa mahaifinsa tun yana karami kuma ya shiga aikin yi da wuri saboda yanayin rayuwa mai wahala, ya yi rayuwa mai kyau a matsayin ma'aikacin banki, amma a tsakiyar shekarunsa na 20, ya kamu da sha'awar daukar hoto ba zato ba tsammani. Ya fara tunanin babban hangen nesa na saukaka wannan tsari mai rikitarwa don kowa ya iya daukar hoto cikin sauki, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin canji a rayuwarsa. Ya sadaukar da kansa ga bincike dare da rana, yana daukar matakin farko don yada daukar hoto ga jama'a.

Tafiyar kirkire-kirkire ta Eastman ta kai ga nasara bayan shekaru goma na gwaje-gwaje da bincike marasa yankewa. Ya yi nasarar kirkirar fim mai jujjuyawa wanda aka rufe da abu mai haske maimakon faranti na gilashi masu nauyi da saurin karyewa. Wannan fim mai jujjuyawa ya kasance babban kirkire-kirkire wanda ya canza tsarin daukar hoto gaba daya. A shekarar 1888, ya ba da izinin mallaka kuma ya gabatar da kyamarar hannu mai amfani da wannan fim mai jujjuyawa, wato 'Kyamarar Kodak', a kasuwa. Wannan kyamara ta samu karbuwa sosai a tsakanin jama'a tare da shahararren taken "Kai kawai ka danna maballin, mu za mu yi sauran (You push the button, we do the rest)." Kyamarar Kodak ta gabatar da wani sabon tsarin kasuwanci inda kamfanin ke kula da tsarin sarrafawa da bugawa, yana bawa talakawa damar daukar hoto cikin sauki da kuma samun sakamakon ba tare da taimakon kwararru ba. Wannan ya bude kofa ga zamanin daukar hoto na masu son kai, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na canza hoto daga wata fasaha ta musamman zuwa wani abin sha'awa na yau da kullum. Eastman ya kafa Kamfanin Eastman Kodak don tabbatar da hangen nesansa.

Eastman ya jagoranci Kamfanin Eastman Kodak, inda ya fara a matsayin mai kula da kudi sannan ya zama shugaban kamfanin, yana jagorantar ci gabansa mai ban mamaki. Karkashin jagorancinsa, Kodak ya wuce zama mai kera kyamarori kawai, ya zama babban kamfani wanda ya kafa ka'idojin masana'antar fim a duniya kuma ya jagoranci kasuwa. Ya mai da hankali kan ci gaba da kirkire-kirkire na fasaha da kuma gina tsarin samar da kayayyaki da yawa don inganta ingancin samfurori da rage farashi. Bugu da kari, ya gina hanyoyin rarraba kayayyaki a duniya kuma ya yi tallace-tallace mai karfi don sanya kayayyakin Kodak a hannun mutane a duk duniya. A cikin wannan tsari, Eastman ya fuskanci gasa da matsalolin fasaha da yawa, amma ya shawo kansu da hangen nesansa mai karfi da kuma kwarewarsa ta kasuwanci. Godiya ga kokarinsa, hoto ya wuce zama rikodin kawai, ya zama wata muhimmiyar hanya don adana tunanin iyali, tunawa da lokutan tafiye-tafiye, da kuma wadatar da rayuwar mutum. Kodak ya taka rawar gani wajen kirkirar fim mai launi, yana fadada fagen al'adun gani. Eastman ya kuma nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga alhakin zamantakewa fiye da ci gaban kamfani, yana ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga ilimi, kiwon lafiya, da fasaha, yana barin babban tarihi a matsayin mai ba da agaji.

Gadon George Eastman har yanzu yana cikin rayuwarmu a yau. Ra'ayin fim mai jujjuyawa da kyamarar hannu da ya fara su ne kakannin kai tsaye na kyamarorin dijital na zamani da kyamarorin wayoyin hannu. Yanzu kowa zai iya daukar hoto da bidiyo cikin sauki da raba su da na'urori a aljihunsa, kuma wannan shine yadda "yada daukar hoto ga jama'a" da Eastman ya yi mafarki ya cika a mafi girman matsayinsa. Kirkire-kirkirensa ya jawo hankali ga muhimmancin rikodin gani, kuma ya canza yadda muke adana rayuwar mutum da tarihi. Ko da yake Kamfanin Eastman Kodak ya fuskanci matsaloli wajen daidaitawa da canje-canjen zamanin dijital, al'adun kamfanin da tushen fasaha da ya kafa har yanzu suna zaburar da kamfanoni da yawa. Rayuwarsa tana nuna yadda kirkire-kirkire na fasaha zai iya canza al'adu da salon rayuwa na daukacin al'umma. Ana daukar kirkire-kirkirensa a matsayin misali mai kyau na babban tasirin da yada fasaha ga jama'a ke da shi a kan al'umma, kamar yadda Henry Ford ya yi a farkon karni na 20 wajen yada masana'antar motoci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Elisha Graves Otis, wani ɗan masana'antu ne na Amurka a tsakiyar karni na 19, ya ƙirƙira lif ɗin tsaro wanda ya buɗe zamanin manyan gine-gine.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar na'urar lif ɗin tsaro (1853)
Shigar da lif ɗin tsaro na farko a duniya don fasinjoji (1857)
Kafa kamfanin Otis Elevator Company
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙirƙirarsa ta tsara sararin samaniyar birane na zamani kuma ta sa zamanin manyan gine-gine ya yiwu.

elisha-otis.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, lokacin da birane ke fadada cikin sauri saboda juyin juya halin masana'antu, kuma gine-ginen masana'antu da na kasuwanci ke hawa sama, wanda hakan ya haifar da buƙatar hanyoyin sufuri na tsaye, Elisha Graves Otis (an haife shi a shekara ta 1811), wani ɗan masana'antu ne na Amurka kuma wanda ya kafa kamfanin Otis Elevator Company, ya yi wani muhimmin bincike wanda zai canza rayuwar ɗan adam. An haife shi a Halifax, Vermont, ya nuna sha'awar injuna tun yana yaro, kuma ya haɓaka ƙwarewar aiki da warware matsaloli ta hanyar ayyuka daban-daban. Duk da cewa ya gwada kasuwanci da yawa kamar su masana'antar katako da masana'antar keken dawakai, kuma ya fuskanci gazawa akai-akai da matsalolin tattalin arziki, bai taɓa daina neman sabbin hanyoyin fasaha ba. A wancan lokacin, lif ɗin galibi ana amfani da su ne don ɗaukar kaya, kuma haɗarin faɗuwa saboda igiyoyi sun yanke ya zama ruwan dare, wanda ya sa mutane ke da babban tsoro game da motsi a cikin manyan gine-gine. A cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, Otis ya fara mafarkin yiwuwar motsi mai aminci a tsaye.

Wani muhimmin canji a rayuwar Otis ya zo a shekara ta 1852, lokacin da yake aiki a matsayin injiniya a wata masana'antar firam ɗin gado a Yonkers, New York. Ya fahimci haɗarin lif ɗin da ake da su yayin da yake ɗaukar manyan injuna da kayan aiki zuwa manyan benaye na masana'antar. Lif ɗin da ake amfani da su a wancan lokacin suna da lahani mai haɗari na faɗuwa ba tare da an hana su ba idan igiya ta yanke, kuma wannan ya zama babban cikas ga ginin da amfani da manyan gine-gine. Da yake fuskantar wannan matsala, Otis ya ƙirƙira wata na'urar tsaro mai ban mamaki a shekara ta 1853. Wannan na'urar tsari ce da ke aiki ta atomatik don riƙe ɗakin lif ɗin a kan dogo don hana faɗuwa idan igiyar da ke ɗaga lif ɗin ta yanke. Wannan ba kawai ya gyara lahani na inji ba ne, amma ya zama mabuɗin buɗe zamanin manyan gine-gine ta hanyar kawar da ainihin tsoron ɗan adam game da motsi a tsaye. Ƙirƙirarsa ta kafa sabon ma'auni na tsaro kuma ta sake fasalta ma'anar lif ɗin kanta.

Don shawo kan rashin amincewar jama'a da shakku game da ƙirƙirarsa, Otis ya shirya wani babban nuni. A shekara ta 1854, a baje kolin duniya da aka gudanar a Crystal Palace a New York, ya hau kan dandalin lif ɗin da kansa a gaban ɗimbin jama'a. Sannan ya umarci mataimakinsa ya yanke igiyar da ke riƙe lif ɗin da gatari. A lokacin da igiyar ta yanke, masu kallo sun riƙe numfashinsu, amma na'urar tsaro ta Otis ta yi aiki nan take, kuma lif ɗin ya zame 'yan inci kaɗan kafin ya tsaya lafiya. Ya yi ihu ga taron, "Ya ku maza da mata, yana da lafiya!" kuma wannan nuni mai ban mamaki ya sanya sabon tsaro na ƙirƙirarsa a cikin zukatan duniya. Bayan wannan nasarar nuni, ya kafa E. G. Otis & Co. (daga baya Otis Elevator Company) a shekara ta 1853, wanda aka sanya masa suna, kuma ya fara kasuwancin lif ɗin tsaro. A ƙarshe, a ranar 23 ga Maris, 1857, ya buɗe sabon babi a cikin hanyar motsi na tsaye na ɗan adam ta hanyar shigar da lif ɗin tsaro na farko a duniya don fasinjoji a cikin shagon E.V. Haughwout & Co. a birnin New York.

Ƙirƙirar lif ɗin tsaro na Elisha Otis ya kasance wani juyin juya hali wanda ya wuce ci gaban inji kawai, ya tsara sararin samaniyar birane na zamani kuma ya canza rayuwar ɗan adam gaba ɗaya. Godiya ga ƙirƙirarsa, masu gine-gine ba su da iyakancewa ta tsayin gine-gine, wanda ya buɗe zamanin manyan gine-gine da manyan hasumiya. Kamfaninsa, Otis Elevator Company, ya ci gaba da bunƙasa bayan mutuwarsa ta hannun 'ya'yansa, ya zama kamfani na duniya, kuma har yau, ana amfani da lif ɗin da ke amfani da fasahar tsaro a cikin gine-gine da yawa. Otis ya mutu a ranar 8 ga Afrilu, 1861, saboda diphtheria, amma hangen nesansa da fasaharsa sun ba da gudummawa sosai ga ci gaban wayewar ɗan adam ta hanyar haɓaka amfani da sararin birane da kuma ba da damar miliyoyin mutane su hau sama da ƙasa cikin aminci da inganci. Nasarorinsa sun yi daidai da ƙoƙarin wasu masu ƙirƙira waɗanda suka bincika yiwuwar gine-gine masu tsayi, kuma sun zama wani muhimmin abu ga ci gaban birane na zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jang Yeong Sil masanin kimiyya ne kuma injiniya na Koriya a zamanin Joseon, wanda ya bunkasa fasahar ilmin taurari tare da goyon bayan Sarki Sejong.
key_achievements: An zabe shi da cikakken goyon bayan Sarki Sejong
Ya ba da gudunmawa sosai ga ci gaban fasahar ilmin taurari na Joseon
Ya kera kayan kimiyya kamar Jagyeongnu da Angbuilgu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhin kimiyya da ya wuce iyakokin matsayi har yau tushen zaburarwa ne na kirkire-kirkire.

jang-yeong-sil.epic:
A farkon Daular Joseon, lokacin da sabuwar daular ke kafa tushenta kuma take neman ci gaban al'adu masu zaman kansu da fasahar kimiyya, Jang Yeong Sil (蔣英實, lokacin aiki ba a sani ba) ya rubuta sunansa a tarihi a matsayin masanin kimiyya da fasaha na musamman kuma mai kirkire-kirkire na Joseon. Ba a san ainihin ranar haihuwa da mutuwarsa ba, amma ya bar gagarumar gudunmawa a lokacin mulkin Sarki Sejong. A cewar "Sejong Sillok," mahaifin Jang Yeong Sil ya kasance dan gudun hijira daga Daular Yuan, daga Suzhou da Hangzhou, kuma mahaifiyarsa ta kasance gisaeng (mai nishadantarwa) daga Dongnae-hyeon a Joseon. Wannan tarihin ya nuna wahalhalun da ya fuskanta a cikin tsarin zamantakewa mai tsauri na wancan lokacin. Duk da haka, ya bunkasa zurfin fahimtar kimiyya da fasaha da kuma kwarewar fasaha ta hanyar baiwarsa ta halitta da kokari marar yankewa. Bayanan yarintarsa kadan ne, amma mai yiwuwa, duk da matsayinsa na kasa, ya nuna sha'awa ta musamman da ruhin bincike game da ka'idodin sama da injina, yana bunkasa damarsa a hankali a matsayin babban mai kirkire-kirkire na gaba. Kasancewarsa, wanda ya haskaka duk da iyakokin zamani, alama ce mai muhimmanci da ta sanar da farkon ci gaban fasahar kimiyya ta Joseon.

Wani muhimmin lokaci a rayuwar Jang Yeong Sil ya zo ne lokacin da Sarki Sejong ya lura da kwarewarsa ta musamman. A wancan lokacin, Sarki Sejong ya fahimci muhimmancin fasahar kimiyya mai amfani ga jama'a sosai, kuma yana da karfin niyyar nada mutane masu hazaka ba tare da la'akari da matsayinsu ba. Jang Yeong Sil ya kasance babban misali na wannan manufar Sarki Sejong na zabar hazaka. Sarki Sejong ya yaba da baiwarsa ta musamman, ya kira shi zuwa fada kuma ya nada shi a mukamin Sanguiwon Byeoljwa. Sanguiwon Byeoljwa mukami ne a cikin ma'aikatar da ke kera da kuma kula da tufafi da kayan fada, kuma a nan ne Jang Yeong Sil ya sami damar nuna kwarewarsa ta fasaha yadda ya kamata. Karkashin cikakken amincewa da goyon bayan sarki, ya fara taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen bunkasa fasahar ilmin taurari ta Joseon. Wannan ba kawai nasarar mutum daya ba ce, amma wani lamari ne mai alama da ke nuna cewa al'ummar Joseon tana ci gaba zuwa sabon zamani inda ake fifita iyawa fiye da matsayi. Haɗuwar zurfin hangen nesa na Sejong da hazakar Jang Yeong Sil ya kasance farkon wata babbar haɗin gwiwa da ta buɗe zamanin zinariya na fasahar kimiyya ta Joseon.

Da cikakken goyon bayan sarki, Jang Yeong Sil ya ba da gudunmawa sosai ga ci gaban fasahar kimiyya ta Joseon. Ya kera kayan kimiyya da yawa kamar agogon rana (Angbuilgu), agogon ruwa (Jagyeongnu), da kayan lura da taurari (Honcheonsi), wanda ya inganta rayuwar jama'a kuma ya taimaka wajen kafa tushen kasa. Musamman Jagyeongnu wata na'ura ce mai inganci da ke fada lokaci kai tsaye, kuma ta kasance babban kirkire-kirkire da ya sanar da duniya fasahar Joseon a wancan lokacin. Amma rayuwarsa ba ta kasance mai sauki ba. A shekara ta 1442, wata matsala ta faru yayin kera An-yeo, karusar Sarki Sejong, inda An-yeo ta lalace, kuma saboda haka, an daure Jang Yeong Sil a Ofishin Uigeumbu saboda laifin rashin girmamawa kuma an kore shi daga mukaminsa. Ko da yake bayan wannan lamarin ba a sake samun bayanan ayyukansa a tarihin ba, wannan kuma wani bangare ne mai ban tausayi da ke nuna cewa matsayinsa na kasa har yanzu yana aiki a matsayin takura ta zamantakewa. Duk da haka, ya daga matsayin fasahar kimiyya ta Joseon zuwa wani mataki mafi girma tare da gagarumar nasarorin da ya samu a cikin kankanin lokaci, kuma kirkire-kirkirensa sun zaburar da masana kimiyya na gaba.

Ko da yake karshen rayuwar Jang Yeong Sil ba a bayyane yake ba, gadonsa a ci gaban fasahar kimiyya ta Joseon yana ci gaba da haskawa har yau. Kirkire-kirkirensa sun kunshi ruhin kaunar jama'a na Sarki Sejong da kuma niyyarsa ta bunkasa fasahar kimiyya, da nufin inganta rayuwar jama'a da kafa 'yancin kai na kasa. Nasarorin Jang Yeong Sil, wanda ya wuce iyakokin matsayi ta hanyar baiwa da kokari kawai don kawo sauyi a zamaninsa, suna nuna zamanin zinariya na fasahar kimiyya ta Joseon kuma suna da muhimmiyar matsayi a tarihin kimiyya na Koriya. Har yau, ana kiran sunansa a matsayin alama ta kirkire-kirkire masu ban mamaki da ruhin bincike marar yankewa, yana tunatar da mu muhimmancin bunkasa hazaka a fannin kimiyya da fasaha. Labarinsa ya nuna girman mutum daya da ya shawo kan takurawar tsarin zamantakewa, tare da kokarin Joseon na neman wadata ta kasa ta hanyar kimiyya da fasaha. Ta haka, rayuwar Jang Yeong Sil da nasarorinsa, tare da kokarin sauran masana da suka yi bincike kan ilimin amfani ga jama'a a zamaninsa, sun ba da gudunmawa wajen samar da al'ada mai haske ta Joseon.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Yun Tongju ya kasance mai fafutukar neman 'yanci kuma mawaki a Koriya a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan, wanda ya bar waƙoƙi masu ɗauke da zafin al'umma da tunani na kai.
key_achievements: Ya sami tasirin ilimin ƙasa a Myongdongchon, Bukgando.
Ya bunƙasa basirarsa ta adabi a Kwalejin Fasaha ta Yonhi.
Ya mutu a kurkuku a Gidan Yari na Fukuoka, yana kiyaye ruhin juriya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa sun kasance jagora na ruhaniya ga Koriya da alamar adabin juriya, wanda ya wuce lokaci.

yun-dong-ju.epic:
Yun Tongju (尹東柱, 1917-1945) ya kasance mai fafutukar neman 'yanci, mawaki, kuma marubuci a Koriya a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan. An haife shi a ranar 30 ga Disamba, 1917, a Myongdongchon, Bukgando. Myongdongchon wuri ne da aka kafa bayan Kim Yak-yeon, Kim Ha-gyu, da Mun Byeong-gyu, waɗanda suka fito daga Hamgyeong-do, suka jagoranci fiye da mutane 140 na iyalansu zuwa Donggando a 1899, sannan kakan Yun Tongju, Yun Ha-hyeon, da sauran su suka shiga. Duk da cewa ƙasa ce mai wuya, wannan ƙauyen, wanda ke nufin 'wurin da ke haskaka gabas', ya bunƙasa ya zama babban ƙauyen Koriya a Donggando, kuma ya zama gidan reno da ke kiyaye ruhin al'umma da ilimi. Yun Tongju na yaro ya girma a cikin irin wannan yanayi mai ƙarfi na sanin kai na ƙasa, kuma a zahiri ya haɓaka soyayya ga ƙasarsa da ruhin 'yanci. Wurin haihuwarsa na asali shi ne Lamba 76, Pohang-dong, Chongjin-si, Hamgyeongbuk-do, amma ya shafe mafi yawan rayuwarsa a Bukgando, inda yanayin wuri da rayuwar al'umma suka yi tasiri sosai a kansa. A wannan lokacin, Koriya tana ƙarƙashin mulkin kama-karya na Japan, kuma Myongdongchon wuri ne da ke nuna nufin al'ummar Koriya na rashin rasa bege duk da zalunci.

Yun Tongju ya bunƙasa basirarsa ta adabi yayin da yake ci gaba da karatunsa a Myongdong Elementary School da Eunjin Middle School, sannan Pyongyang Soongsil Middle School, da Sashen Adabi na Kwalejin Fasaha ta Yonhi a Seoul. Musamman, lokacin da yake Kwalejin Fasaha ta Yonhi ya kasance lokaci mai mahimmanci inda duniyar waƙarsa ta fara samuwa sosai. Ya fara bayyana zurfin wahala da tunani na kai da ya fuskanta a matsayin mai ilimi a lokacin mulkin mallaka ta hanyar waƙa. Duk da baƙin ciki na rasa ƙasarsa da baƙin ciki na al'ummarsa, ya ci gaba da kalli cikin zuciyarsa, yana jin laifi game da rauninsa da rashin ƙarfinsa. Manyan ayyukansa kamar 'Star-Counting Night' da 'Prologue' an rubuta su a wannan lokacin, kuma zurfin tunani da ruhin juriya da ke cikin harshe mai tsabta da waƙa sun yi tasiri sosai ga matasa a lokacin. Duk da haka, ƙoƙarinsa na buga tarin waƙoƙi ya fuskanci cikas saboda takunkumi da zalunci na Japan, kuma ayyukansa na adabi sun shiga hanyar gwagwarmaya ta sirri da kaɗaici. Bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba a cikin duhun gaskiyar zamaninsa, kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin cika aikinsa na mawaki ta hanyar mai da zafin al'ummarsa zuwa nasa zafin.

Bayan kammala karatunsa a Kwalejin Fasaha ta Yonhi, Yun Tongju ya tafi Japan don karatu a 1942, inda ya shiga Sashen Turanci na Jami'ar Rikkyo a Tokyo, sannan ya koma Sashen Turanci na Jami'ar Doshisha a shekara mai zuwa. Karatunsa a Japan ya ba shi sabbin damammaki na ilimi, amma a lokaci guda, ya fuskanci jerin gwaje-gwaje na manufofin Japan na kawar da al'umma. Duk da yanayi mai wuya don kiyaye asalin ƙasarsa, kamar tilasta masa canza sunansa zuwa na Japan da hana amfani da harshen Koriya, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba ya ci gaba da rubuta waƙoƙi. Duk da haka, a watan Yuli 1943, 'yan sandan Japan suka kama shi bisa zargin shiga cikin gwagwarmayar 'yanci. Ya shiga cikin babban kamawa da aka yi wa ɗaliban Koriya a Japan a lokacin. An tsare shi a Gidan Yari na Fukuoka kuma an azabtar da shi sosai, kuma a ranar 16 ga Fabrairu, 1945, ya mutu a kurkuku yana da shekaru 27, 'yan watanni kafin 'yancin kai na ƙasarsa. Mutuwarsa tana nuna mummunan kaddara da masu ilimi a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan suka fuskanta, kuma tana nuna cewa wahala da ruhin juriya da ke cikin waƙoƙinsa gwagwarmayar rayuwa ce ta gaske fiye da bayyanar adabi kawai.

Waƙoƙin Yun Tongju sun fara fitowa fili bayan mutuwarsa. A 1948, bayan an buga tarin waƙoƙinsa na bayan mutuwa mai suna 『Sky, Wind, Stars, and Poem』, ya fara samun sake kimantawa a matsayin mawakin ƙasa. Wannan tarin waƙoƙi yana ɗauke da rai mai tsabta na wani matashi mai ilimi wanda ya yi wahala kuma ya yi juriya a cikin duhun gaskiyar zamanin mulkin mallaka na Japan, kuma ya haifar da ji na gama gari da zurfin tausayi na Koriya. Waƙoƙinsa sun mai da zafin zamaninsa ta hanyar tunani na kai, kuma sun nuna ruhu mai ƙarfi wanda bai rasa bege ba ko da a cikin duhu. A yau, ana tunawa da Yun Tongju a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mawakan da Koriya ke so, kuma ana karanta waƙoƙinsa a cikin littattafan karatu tsawon tsararraki. Rayuwarsa da adabinsa sun kasance alamar ruhu mai daraja wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye mutuncin ɗan adam da girman kai na ƙasa a cikin mummunan zamanin mulkin mallaka na Japan. Waƙoƙinsa, tare da na sauran mawakan juriya na zamaninsa kamar Yi Yuk-sa da Han Yong-un, ana tunawa da su har abada a matsayin gadon adabi da ke wakiltar zafin al'ummar Koriya a lokacin mulkin mallaka na Japan.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marcus Tullius Cicero ya kasance babban mai jawabi kuma ɗan siyasa a ƙarshen Jamhuriyar Roma ta da, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga kare jamhuriyar kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin Yamma.
key_achievements: Fallasa da murkushe makircin Catilina
Sadaukar da kai ga kare Jamhuriyar Roma
Ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban adabin Latin da falsafa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Jawabin sa da falsafar sa sun zama ma'auni ga tunanin siyasar Yamma da adabin Latin, kuma suna ci gaba da yin tasiri har zuwa yau.

cicero.epic:
Marcus Tullius Cicero (an haife shi a shekara ta 106 K.Z.) ya kasance wani katon mai jawabi, ɗan siyasa mai hikima, masanin shari'a, masanin falsafa mai zurfi, kuma marubuci mai basira a ƙarshen Jamhuriyar Roma ta da. A cikin ƙarni na farko K.Z., Roma ta kasance cikin wani guguwar hargitsi, inda ginshiƙan jamhuriyar ke girgiza, kuma manyan mutane masu iko ke fitowa kamar taurari masu haske. A ranar 3 ga Janairu, 106 K.Z., an haife shi a Arpinum, Italiya, a matsayin ɗan fari na wata dangi mai arziki na masu doki. Duk da cewa ba shi da asali daga dangi mai daraja, Cicero ya zurfafa bincike a cikin dokokin Roma, fasahar magana, da falsafa, yana mai nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki da sha'awar ilimi mai ƙonewa. Tun yana saurayi, ya fara gina suna a matsayin lauya a kotu, kuma fasahar jawabinsa mai ban mamaki ta haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Roma, kamar yadda ruwa ke haifar da raƙuman ruwa. Musamman ma, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gabatar da falsafar Girka ga Roma da fassara ta zuwa Latin, wanda daga baya ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban tunanin Yamma, kamar yadda hasken rana ke haskaka duniya. Farkon aikinsa ya kasance ƙoƙari ne marar yankewa na shiga cikin siyasar Roma mai rinjaye ta masu daraja a matsayin 'sabon mutum' (novus homo), yana fafutuka kamar jarumi.

Babban juyin juya hali a cikin aikin siyasar Cicero ya zo ne a shekara ta 63 K.Z., lokacin da aka zaɓe shi a matsayin Consul, wani matsayi mai girma da ke haskaka sama da kowane matsayi a Jamhuriyar Roma. Ga shi, 'sabon mutum' da ba shi da asali mai daraja, wannan ya kasance wani babban daraja da ba a taɓa gani ba, kamar yadda tauraro ke haskawa a sararin samaniya. A wannan lokacin, Roma ta fuskanci wata makirci mai haɗari wanda Lucius Sergius Catilina ke jagoranta, wanda ke barazana ga tushen jamhuriyar. Catilina ya shirya wani shiri na hambarar da Jamhuriyar Roma da kuma karɓar iko, wanda ya kasance barazana ga dukkan al'ummar Roma, kamar yadda guguwa ke barazana ga jirgin ruwa. Cicero, ta amfani da basirarsa ta tattara bayanai da fasahar jawabinsa mai ban mamaki, ya gabatar da shahararren 'Jawabin Zargi ga Catilina' a Majalisar Dattawa, inda ya fallasa makircin Catilina gaba ɗaya, kamar yadda hasken rana ke fallasa duhu. Ta hanyar wannan jawabi, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kama da kashe Catilina da mabiyansa, kuma saboda wannan nasara, an ba shi taken girmamawa na 'Uban Ƙasa' (Pater Patriae), wanda ya zama alamar jaruntakarsa. Amma a cikin wannan tsari, ya fuskanci suka saboda yanke hukuncin kisa ga ƴan ƙasa ba tare da shari'a ba, wanda daga baya ya zama sanadin faɗuwar siyasar sa, kamar yadda ƙaramin rami ke iya nutse da babban jirgi.

Bayan murkushe makircin Catilina, ɗaukakar Cicero ba ta daɗe ba, kamar yadda hasken wuta ke ɓacewa bayan iska mai ƙarfi. A shekara ta 58 K.Z., ya fuskanci gwaji mai zafi na gudun hijira saboda kashe ƴan ƙasa ba tare da shari'a ba, amma a shekara mai zuwa, ya sami damar komawa tare da goyon bayan jama'ar Roma, kamar yadda ruwa ke komawa bayan ambaliya. Amma siyasar Roma ta fara nisanta daga manufofin jamhuriyar saboda fitowar Triumvirate na Farko, wanda Caesar, Pompey, da Crassus suka kafa, wanda ya zama alamar sabon zamani. Cicero ya yi ƙoƙari ya kare ka'idodin jamhuriyar, amma a hankali ya rasa tasirin siyasa a cikin gwagwarmayar iko tsakanin manyan mutane masu ƙarfi, kamar yadda ƙaramin jirgin ruwa ke ɓacewa a cikin teku mai girma. Musamman ma, lokacin da yaƙin basasa ya barke tsakanin Caesar da Pompey, ya goyi bayan Pompey, amma nasarar Caesar ta sake jefa shi cikin wani rikicin siyasa mai zurfi. Lokacin da mulkin kama-karya na Caesar ya fara, Cicero ya janye daga siyasa kuma ya mai da hankali kan binciken falsafa da rubuce-rubuce, yana neman mafaka a cikin ilimi. A wannan lokacin, ya bar manyan ayyukan falsafa da yawa, kamar su De Republica, De Legibus, da Tusculanae Disputationes, waɗanda suka ba da gudummawa sosai wajen yaɗa falsafar Girka a Roma da kuma kafa kalmomin falsafa na Latin, kamar yadda mai shuka ke shuka iri mai kyau.

Bayan kisan Caesar a shekara ta 44 K.Z., Cicero, yana mafarkin farfaɗo da jamhuriyar, ya gabatar da jawabai masu zafi na 'Philippicae' a kan Marcus Antonius, yana yaƙi da kalmomi kamar jarumi. Amma tare da zuwan Triumvirate na Biyu, wanda Antonius, Octavianus, da Lepidus suka kafa, ya zama wanda abokan hamayyarsa suka yi niyyar kawar da shi, kamar yadda zaki ke farautar ganima. A ƙarshe, a ranar 7 ga Disamba, 43 K.Z., an kashe Cicero a Formiae, inda ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da hargitsi da gwagwarmaya. Mutuwarsa ta kasance wani abin bakin ciki da aka rubuta a matsayin alamar ƙarshen Jamhuriyar Roma, kamar yadda faɗuwar rana ke nuna ƙarshen yini. Gadon Cicero ya kasance a cikin manyan ayyukansa, waɗanda suka zama ginshiƙi mai ƙarfi. Fasahar jawabinsa ta zama ma'aunin rubutun Latin, kuma tunaninsa na falsafa ya zama muhimmin tushe ga tunanin siyasar Yamma da ɗabi'a, kamar yadda tushe ke riƙe da gini. Musamman ma, jaddadawarsa kan dokar halitta da kyawawan halaye na ƴan ƙasa ya ba da kwarin gwiwa sosai ga masu ra'ayin ɗan adam na Renaissance da masu tunani na Haskakawa, kamar yadda ruwan sama ke ba da rai ga ƙasa. Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri ba kawai ga masana falsafa na Roma kamar Seneca ba, har ma ga masana falsafa na zamani kamar Machiavelli da John Locke, yana ci gaba da haskaka hanyar tunani har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sophocles babban marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ne na baƙin ciki na tsohuwar Athens a ƙarni na 5 K.Z., wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga wasan kwaikwayo na Yamma ta hanyar gabatar da ɗan wasa na uku da binciken makomar ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Gabatar da ɗan wasa na uku don ƙara rikitarwa na wasan kwaikwayo
Ayyukan wasan kwaikwayo na baƙin ciki guda 7 da suka rage, ciki har da 'Oedipus Rex'
Nasara da yawa a gasar wasan kwaikwayo ta bikin Dionysia
fact_box.legacy_statement: Baƙin cikinsa sun wuce lokaci, suna bincika wahalar ɗan adam da makoma, kuma suna ba da zurfin kwarin gwiwa ga wasan kwaikwayo na zamani da tunani.

sophocles.epic:
Sophocles an haife shi a kimanin shekara ta 496/497 K.Z. a Colonus, tsohuwar Athens, kuma ya zama babban marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na baƙin ciki wanda ya wakilci zamanin zinariya na Athens a ƙarni na 5 K.Z. A zamanin Pericles, Athens ta kasance cibiyar al'adu inda dimokuradiyya, falsafa, da fasaha suka bunƙasa, kuma wasan kwaikwayo ya kasance wani muhimmin sashi na rayuwar 'yan ƙasa. An haife shi a cikin dangi masu arziki, Sophocles ya sami mafi kyawun ilimi na zamaninsa, ciki har da kiɗa, rawa, da motsa jiki, kuma ya nuna hazaka ta musamman tun yana yaro. Musamman ma, ya kasance mai hazaka a fannin kiɗa har ya jagoranci ƙungiyar mawaƙa ta yara maza don tunawa da nasarar yaƙin Salamis a shekara ta 480 K.Z. Wannan tushe ya zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci a gare shi don ya zama babban mai fasahar wasan kwaikwayo a nan gaba. Ya wuce matsayin marubucin wasan kwaikwayo kawai, ya zama mai ilimi kuma ɗan ƙasa mai daraja a cikin al'ummar Athens, kuma ayyukansa sun nuna zurfin tunanin ruhaniya da matsalolin ɗabi'a na 'yan Athens na zamaninsa. Ayyukansa na farko sun kawo sabon iska ga duniyar wasan kwaikwayo ta Athens, suna nuna alamar zuwan sabon zamani.

Shaharar Sophocles a matsayin marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ta tabbata a shekara ta 468 K.Z. lokacin da ya ci nasara a gasar wasan kwaikwayo ta bikin Dionysia, inda ya doke Aeschylus, babban marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na baƙin ciki na zamaninsa. Wannan nasara ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a cikin aikinsa na marubucin wasan kwaikwayo, kuma daga baya ya ci nasara fiye da sau 30, yana kafa matsayi na musamman. Ya kawo sauye-sauye masu juyin juya hali a fagen wasan kwaikwayo, inda ya gabatar da ɗan wasa na uku a cikin tsarin 'yan wasa biyu da ake da shi, yana zurfafa rikitarwa na wasan kwaikwayo da rikice-rikice tsakanin haruffa. Wannan wata babbar nasara ce da ta faɗaɗa ƙarfin bayyanawa na wasan kwaikwayo sosai ta hanyar bincika zurfin tunanin haruffa da haskaka abubuwan da suka faru daga ra'ayoyi daban-daban. Bugu da ƙari, ya rage mahimmancin ƙungiyar mawaƙa kuma ya mai da hankali kan halin mutum ɗaya da makomarsa, yana canza cibiyar wasan kwaikwayo. Waɗannan canje-canje sun ba da gudummawa sosai ga ci gaban wasan kwaikwayo na baƙin ciki na tsohuwar Girka daga wani wasan kwaikwayo na al'ada zuwa wani nau'i na fasaha wanda ke magance wahalar ɗan adam da zaɓuɓɓuka. Ba wai kawai a matsayin marubucin wasan kwaikwayo ba, har ma ya shiga cikin ofisoshin gwamnati na Athens, yana aiki a matsayin janar (strategos) da firist, yana cika nauyin ɗan ƙasa ta hanyar ayyukan zamantakewa masu aiki.

Ayyukan Sophocles sun bincika zurfin jigogi na duniya: makomar ɗan adam, ikon Allah, 'yancin zaɓi, da matsalolin ɗabi'a. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, 'Oedipus Rex,' wani babban aiki ne wanda ke nuna baƙin ciki na ban mamaki inda wahalar ɗan adam a kan makoma da ba za a iya gujewa ba da kuma neman gaskiya makaho a ƙarshe ke kaiwa ga halaka mai ban tausayi. Baƙin ciki na ban mamaki shine wani yanayi na ban mamaki wanda ke faruwa lokacin da masu kallo suka san wani abu da haruffa a cikin wasan kwaikwayo ba su sani ba, yana ƙara tashin hankali da baƙin ciki na wasan kwaikwayo. Wani babban aiki, 'Antigone,' yana magance rikici tsakanin lamirin mutum da ikon jiha, yana karo tsakanin dokar Allah da dokar ɗan adam, yana jefa tambayoyi masu zurfi game da adalci da ƙarfin hali na ɗabi'a. Ko da a cikin yanayin rikice-rikice na Yaƙin Peloponnesian, Sophocles ya ci gaba da ayyukansa na fasaha ba tare da rasa kwarin gwiwa ba. An ce ya rubuta wasan kwaikwayo sama da 120 a lokacin rayuwarsa, amma ayyuka guda 7 ne kawai suka rage a cikin cikakken tsari har zuwa yau: 'Ajax,' 'Antigone,' 'Women of Trachis,' 'Oedipus Rex,' 'Electra,' 'Philoctetes,' da 'Oedipus at Colonus.' Waɗannan ayyuka sun nuna sarai ƙwarewarsa ta ban mamaki a rubuce-rubucen wasan kwaikwayo da zurfin fahimtarsa game da ilimin halin ɗan adam.

Sophocles ya rasu a kimanin shekara ta 406/405 K.Z., jim kaɗan kafin Athens ta sha kashi a Yaƙin Peloponnesian. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, ayyukansa sun kasance kololuwar wasan kwaikwayo na tsohuwar Girka kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga adabin Yamma da tarihin wasan kwaikwayo. Ya gabatar da cikakken tsarin wasan kwaikwayo da kwatancin haruffa, har ma an ambace shi a matsayin misali na baƙin ciki a cikin 'Poetics' na Aristotle. Baƙin cikinsa sun wuce lokaci, suna bincika wahalar ɗan adam, juriya ga makoma, da mahimmancin zaɓuɓɓukan ɗabi'a, kuma ana ci gaba da fassara su da kuma yin su a kan matakai a duk faɗin duniya a yau. Ra'ayoyin da aka samo daga ayyukansa, kamar 'Oedipus complex' na Freud, sun yi tasiri ga ilimin halin ɗan adam na zamani da falsafa. Sophocles ya wuce matsayin mai ba da labari kawai; ya kasance babban mai tunani wanda ya jefa tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da wanzuwar ɗan adam kuma ya ɗaukaka amsoshinsu zuwa wani nau'i na fasaha. Zurfin fahimtarsa na baƙin ciki, tare da na zamansa Aeschylus da Euripides, sun kafa zamanin zinariya na adabin tsohuwar Girka, kuma har yau suna jefa tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da yanayin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Euclid masanin lissafi ne na Girka ta dā a ƙarni na 3 K.Z., wanda ya tsara geometry ta hanyar "Elements."
key_achievements: Ya rubuta "Elements," yana tattara geometry
Ya kafa tsarin deductive na axiomatic
Ya gabatar da misali don tunani mai ma'ana a lissafi
fact_box.legacy_statement: "Elements" nasa ya zama tushen ilimin Yamma da ci gaban kimiyya har tsawon dubban shekaru.

euclid.epic:
Euclid, wani masanin lissafi ne na Girka ta dā, wanda ya yi aiki a farkon ƙarni na 3 K.Z., kuma aka kira shi 'Uban Geometry', ya yi tasiri mai girma da ba za a manta ba a tarihin lissafin Yamma. A Iskandariya ta Masar, wadda ta zama cibiyar ilimi da al'adu mai haske a zamanin Hellenistic bayan mutuwar Alexander Mai Girma, ya yi aiki a ƙarƙashin tallafin Ptolemy I. A wancan lokacin, Iskandariya, tare da Babban Laburare nata, wanda ke cike da ilimin dā mai daraja, ta kasance wuri ne da masana da yawa ke taruwa don musayar ra'ayoyi masu zurfi. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi mai cike da haske, Euclid ya fara wani aiki mai girma da tarihi na tattarawa da tsara ilimin lissafi na Girka ta dā wanda ya warwatse kamar taurari. Babban aikinsa, "Elements," littafi ne da ya tattara ilimin geometry da ka'idar lambobi da aka tara har zuwa wancan lokacin, ya sake tsara su cikin tsarin dabaru mai tsauri kamar dutse, ya zama babban gado wanda zai dawwama a tarihin tunanin ɗan adam har abada. Wannan littafi ya wuce tattara ilimi kawai, ya buɗe sabbin hanyoyi masu faɗi a tunanin lissafi.

"Elements" ba tattara ilimi kawai ba ne, amma ya gabatar da wata sabuwar hanya mai juyin juya hali ta farawa daga ƴan ma'anoni, axioms, da postulates, sannan a tabbatar da ka'idoji masu yawa ta hanyar tsattsauran tunani na dabaru. Wannan ya nuna ainihin hanyar deductive wajen binciken gaskiyar lissafi, kuma daga baya ya zama abin koyi mai haske ga duk binciken kimiyya. Euclid ya tabbatar da cewa za a iya gina gaskiya ta hanyar ikon hankalin ɗan adam, ta hanyar farawa daga tushe bayyananne da kuma kai ga ƙarshe ta hanyar haɗin kai na dabaru ba tare da kuskure ko ɗaya ba, kamar yadda aka gina babban gini. Wannan hanyarsa ta yi tasiri sosai a yanayin tunani na zamaninsa, inda ta haifar da tambayoyi masu mahimmanci game da ainihin ilimi da yadda ake samunsa. Labarin da Ptolemy I ya tambaya ko akwai wata hanya mai sauƙi don koyon geometry, kuma Euclid ya amsa, "Babu hanyar sarauta zuwa geometry," yana mai jaddada ƙoƙari da tsauri na asali wajen samun ilimi, ya nuna halinsa na ilimi mai girma sosai.

Aikin Euclid ya kasance gwagwarmaya ce ta hankali mai girma don haɗa ilimin lissafi da ya warwatse zuwa tsari guda ɗaya mai ƙarfi. Ya bincika kuma ya sake tsara ra'ayoyi da hujjoji da yawa a hankali, yana ci gaba da ƙoƙari don kawar da duk wani gibi na dabaru ko saɓani da ka iya tasowa a cikin aikin, kamar mai sassaƙa dutse. Musamman ma, postulate na biyar, wato postulate na layi ɗaya, an karɓe shi a matsayin gaskiya bayyananne, amma ya zama abin bincike na dindindin ga masana lissafi na baya-baya game da ko za a iya tabbatar da shi daga wasu axioms. Euclid da kansa ya kammala tsarin nasa ta hanyar sanya wannan postulate a matsayi ɗaya da sauran axioms, amma wannan zaɓi ya zama muhimmin mataki wanda ya kai ga haihuwar geometry mara-Euclidean daga baya. Ko da a cikin waɗannan ƙalubale masu zurfi, ya ci gaba da bin tsattsauran dabaru ba tare da girgiza ba, yana ba da misali na binciken gaskiya ta hanyar ikon hankalin ɗan adam. Ƙoƙarinsa na dindindin da jajircewarsa ga kamala sun zama tushen haihuwar babban aikin da ba zai taɓa mutuwa ba, "Elements."

"Elements" na Euclid ya kasance tushen ilimin Yamma har tsawon dubban shekaru bayan mutuwarsa, yana zaburar da masana da masu tunani marasa adadi har zuwa zamanin Renaissance da Juyin Juya Halin Kimiyya. An rubuta wannan littafi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin littattafai mafi yawa da aka buga kuma aka yi nazari a kansu bayan Littafi Mai Tsarki, yana kafa ma'auni don tunani mai ma'ana da hanyoyin tunani a cikin wayewar Yamma gaba ɗaya. Geometry na Euclidean yana ba da tsarin asali don fahimtar sararin samaniya mai girma uku da muke rayuwa a ciki, ya zama tushen fannoni da yawa kamar gine-gine, injiniyanci, kimiyyar lissafi, da ilimin taurari. Har ma a zamanin yau, hanyarsa ta axiomatic tana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai mahimmanci a fannoni daban-daban kamar kimiyyar kwamfuta da haɓaka algorithms na hankali na wucin gadi. Nasarorinsa sun haskaka sosai a kan tushen ilimin da wasu manyan masana lissafi na Girka ta dā kamar Archimedes da Pythagoras suka gina, suna taka muhimmiyar rawa a tarihin tunanin ɗan adam, kamar ginshiƙi mai ƙarfi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Bayan gwagwarmayar iko da 'yan uwansa, ya zama sarki na Daular Gaza, ya yi yaƙi da manyan ƙasashen Turai amma aka ci shi kuma aka kai shi gudun hijira, ya zama alamar ruhin juriya.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan Daular Gaza da ƙarfafa mulki
Ƙoƙarin kare 'yancin kai daga manyan ƙasashen Turai
Alamar ruhin juriya ga mulkin mallaka
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi har abada a matsayin ginshiƙin girman kai na ƙasa da ruhin 'yancin kai na Mozambique.

gungunhana.epic:
Bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa, Sarki Mzila, a shekarar 1884, Gungunhana ya hau gadon sarautar Daular Gaza bayan gwagwarmayar iko mai tsanani da 'yan uwansa. Ya canza sunansa zuwa Gungunhana, ma'ana 'zaki marar cin nasara', ya haɗa kan daular kuma ya ƙarfafa mulkinsa. Burinsa ɗaya ne kawai: kare ƙasar kakanninsu da 'yancin kai na mutanensa daga barazanar waje. Don cimma wannan, ya mayar da babban birninsa zuwa Manjacaze a kudu don lura da motsin Portugal, yayin da yake kulla dangantakar diflomasiyya da Birtaniya, abokan hamayyarsu, don tabbatar da rayuwar daular.

A lokacin mulkinsa, Daular Gaza ta bunƙasa, amma inuwar manyan ƙasashen Turai masu haɗama ta ci gaba da zurfafa. Ya yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye 'yancin kai ta hanyar tafiya mai haɗari tsakanin Portugal da Birtaniya. Ya kulla yarjejeniya da kamfanin Cecil Rhodes na Birtaniya don ya hana Portugal, amma alkawurransu ba komai bane illa magana. Portugal ta ci gaba da matsa masa lamba a fili, tana mai nuna 'taswirar ruwan hoda' wadda ta ayyana yankinsa a matsayin yankin mulkinta, kuma dole ne ya shirya sojojinsa don yaƙin da ba za a iya kauce masa ba.

A shekarar 1895, Portugal a ƙarshe ta ayyana yaƙi. Sojojinsu da ke ƙarƙashin jagorancin Joaquim Mousinho de Albuquerque suna sanye da makamai na zamani. Sun yi yaƙi da jaruntaka a Yaƙin Coolela da sauran wurare, amma da mashi da garkuwa kawai ba za su iya jure wa bindigogin inji da manyan bindigoginsu ba. Ya ci gaba da ja da baya har a ƙarshe aka kama shi a cikin kwanton bauna a Chaimite, wuri mai tsarki na mutanensa. Kama shi ya nuna ƙarshen Daular Gaza.

Bayan ya fuskanci wulakanci na nuna shi a titunan Lisbon, an kai shi gudun hijira tare da iyalinsa zuwa tsibirin Azores, wani tsibiri mai nisa a Tekun Atlantika. A can, har zuwa lokacin da ya rasu a shekarar 1906, bai sake taka ƙasar mahaifarsa ba. Amma ko da jikinsa ya mutu, ruhin juriya nasa bai mutu ba. Daga sarki da aka ci nasara, ya sake zama alamar juriya marar yankewa ga mulkin mallaka. A yau, labarinsa ana tunawa da shi har abada a matsayin ginshiƙin girman kai na ƙasa da ruhin 'yancin kai na Mozambique.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nana Asma'u malama ce, mawaƙiya, kuma mai kawo sauyi a fannin ilimi a Khalifancin Sokoto na Yammacin Afirka a karni na 19, wacce ta kafa tsarin ilimin mata kuma ta yaɗa ilimin Musulunci.
key_achievements: Kafa ƙungiyar malamai mata masu yawo, 'Yar Taru', don ilimin mata.
Rubuta fiye da waƙoƙi 60 da ke rubuta tarihin Khalifancin Sokoto da ilimin tauhidi.
Ba da gudummawa ga shawarwarin Khalifa da sadarwa tsakanin kabilu ta hanyar iya magana da harsuna da yawa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin iliminta ya ba da ilimi da 'yancin kai ga mata da yawa, kuma har yau ana tunawa da ita a matsayin alamar ilimin mata a Musulunci.

nana-asmau.epic:
Nana Asma'u an haife ta a shekarar 1793, 'yar Usman dan Fodio, wani malami daga kabilar Fulani a Yammacin Afirka kuma babban shugaba wanda daga baya ya kafa Khalifancin Sokoto. Yarintar ta cike take da ilimi da zurfin addini. Duk da cewa ilimin mata yana da iyaka a yawancin al'ummomi a lokacin, mahaifinta ya buɗe kofofin ilimi ga 'ya'yansa mata da maza. Nana Asma'u ta zurfafa bincike a cikin Alkur'ani, harshen Larabci, da adabin gargajiya, inda ta fahimci farin cikin ilimi, wanda ya zama tushen sha'awarta ta ilimi har tsawon rayuwarta. Amma, girman ta bai kasance cikin kwanciyar hankali ba. A cikin tashin hankalin Yaƙin Fulani, ta shaida ta'asar yaƙi da hargitsi kai tsaye. Ta hanyar wannan gogewa, Nana Asma'u ta fahimci cewa ainihin ƙarfi yana fitowa ne daga ilimi da imani, ba daga ƙarfin soja ba, kuma wannan ya zama babban dalili na sadaukar da kanta ga ilimi da yaɗa ilimi a nan gaba. A wannan lokacin, ta riga ta nuna hazaka da basira mai ban mamaki, inda ta jawo hankalin kowa.

Bayan kawo karshen Yaƙin Fulani da kafa Khalifancin Sokoto a shekarar 1809, Nana Asma'u ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tabbatar da zaman lafiya da ci gaban sabuwar ƙasar. Khalifancin Sokoto, daular Musulunci ce da aka kafa a Yammacin Afirka a farkon karni na 19, wanda ke alfahari da babban yanki da kuma ƙaƙƙarfan al'adar ilimin Musulunci. Ta yi aiki a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mashawarta na kusa da ɗan'uwanta, Muhammad Bello, Khalifa na biyu, kuma ta shiga cikin tsarin yanke shawara na Khalifancin. Hazakar harshenta, kasancewarta mai iya magana da harsuna da yawa kamar Larabci, Fulfulde, Hausa, da Tamasheq, ta ba da gudummawa sosai wajen inganta sadarwa da haɗin kai tsakanin kabilu daban-daban. Nana Asma'u ba kawai mai ba da shawara ba ce, ta kuma taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen rubuta tarihin Khalifancin, ilimin tauhidi na Musulunci, da dokoki a cikin waƙoƙi. Waƙoƙinta ba kawai ayyukan adabi ba ne, sun kasance tarihin yaƙe-yaƙe, kayan koyarwa waɗanda ke bayyana dokokin Musulunci masu rikitarwa da ra'ayoyin tauhidi ta hanyar da jama'a za su iya fahimta, kuma muhimmiyar hanya ce ta isar da koyarwar ɗabi'a ga mutane. Ko da yake tana zaune a fada, ba ta taɓa yin sakaci da rawar da take takawa a matsayin malama ba, kuma ta ci gaba da ƙoƙarin ba da gudummawa ga al'umma ta hanyar ilimi.

Babban sha'awar Nana Asma'u ta bayyana ne a cikin sadaukarwarta ga ilimin mata. Ta yi ƙoƙarin samar da damar ilimi ga mata a birane, har ma da mata a ƙauyuka masu nisa inda damar ilimi ta fi iyakancewa. Don cimma wannan hangen nesa, ta kafa wata ƙungiya ta musamman ta mata malamai masu yawo da ake kira 'Yar Taru' ko 'Jajis'. 'Yar Taru' na nufin 'Taron 'Yan'uwa Mata', kuma Nana Asma'u ce ta horar da malamai na wannan ƙungiya kai tsaye. Waɗannan malamai sun zagaya ƙauyuka da waƙoƙi da kayan koyarwa da Nana Asma'u ta rubuta da kanta, suna koyar da mata karatu da rubutu, dokokin Musulunci, tsafta, da kula da yara, da sauran ilimi mai amfani. Waɗannan malamai masu yawo suna sanya kwarya mai alama a kawunansu, wanda ya sa su zama masu sauƙin ganewa daga nesa, kuma wannan ya nuna cewa su alamomi ne na yaɗa ilimi da bege. Waɗannan ƙoƙarin na Nana Asma'u sun kawo sauyi mai girma wajen inganta matsayin mata da faɗaɗa damar samun ilimi a cikin al'ummar Yammacin Afirka a lokacin.

Rayuwar Nana Asma'u ta ƙare a shekarar 1864, amma gadonta yana ci gaba da yin tasiri mai ƙarfi har zuwa yau. Tsarin ilimin mata da ta kafa, 'Yar Taru', ya ci gaba da aiki har tsawon shekaru da dama bayan mutuwarta, kuma ya zama muhimmiyar hanya ta ba da ilimi da 'yancin kai ga mata da yawa a Yammacin Afirka. Fiye da waƙoƙi da rubuce-rubuce 60 da ta bari ana ɗaukar su a matsayin muhimman tushen farko don nazarin tarihi, al'adu, da ilimin tauhidi na Khalifancin Sokoto. Nana Asma'u ta yi ƙoƙarin nuna cewa ilimi ba mallakin wani jinsi ko aji ba ne, amma haƙƙi ne mai tsarki da kowane ɗan adam ya kamata ya bi. Rayuwarta da nasarorinta har yau ana girmama su a matsayin alamar ilimin mata a duniyar Musulunci da Afirka, kuma suna ba da kwarin gwiwa ga duk waɗanda ke neman ilimi. Gyare-gyaren iliminta sun yi daidai da ƙoƙarin wasu masu fafutukar mata kamar Huda Sha'arawi na Masar, waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin sake fasalta rawar mata a duniyar Musulunci a karni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nefertiti Sarauniya Mai Girma ce a Masar ta Tsohuwar Mulkin Masar ta 18, wacce ta jagoranci Addinin Aten kuma ta taka rawar abokiyar mulki.
key_achievements: Jagorantar Addinin Aten tare da Akhenaten
Shiga cikin gina sabon babban birni, Akhetaten
Taka rawar abokiyar mulki daidai da Fir'auna
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bust ɗinta ya kasance alamar kyau marar lokaci da kuma shugabar mata mai ƙarfi.

nefertiti.epic:
Nefertiti, Sarauniya Mai Girma kuma abokiyar mulki a Masar ta Tsohuwar Mulkin Masar ta 18, ta yi rayuwa a kusan ƙarni na 14 kafin haihuwar Annabi Isa. Sunanta, wanda ke nufin 'Mai Kyau Ta Zo,' ya dace da ita, domin an tuna da ita a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mata mafi ban sha'awa da iko a tarihin Masar. Lokacin da ta rayu ya kasance lokacin da Masar ke nuna ƙarfin daular ta, amma kuma al'umma ce mai zurfin tushen imani na addinai daban-daban. Nefertiti ta auri Amenhotep IV, wanda daga baya aka fi sani da Akhenaten, kuma ta zama Sarauniyarsa Mai Girma. Wannan aure ba kawai haɗin gwiwar sarauta ba ne, amma farkon juyin juya hali ne wanda zai canza yanayin addini da al'adu na Masar gaba ɗaya. Akhenaten ya yi watsi da alloli da yawa na gargajiya kuma ya yi shelar sabon addini, 'Addinin Aten,' wanda ke bauta wa diski na rana, Aten, a matsayin Allah guda ɗaya. Nefertiti ta jagoranci Masar tare da mijinta a sahun gaba na wannan canji mai tsauri.

Akhenaten da Nefertiti sun aiwatar da gyare-gyare marasa misali don kafa Addinin Aten a matsayin addinin ƙasa na Masar. Babban rikicin su ya kasance karo da tsarin addinai daban-daban na gargajiya, gami da Allah Amun, wanda ya kasance ginshikin al'ummar Masar tsawon dubban shekaru. Sun bar Thebes, cibiyar addinin gargajiya, kuma suka gina sabon babban birni, Akhetaten, a tsakiyar hamadar Masar ta tsakiya, wanda ke nufin 'Sararin Aten.' Akhetaten birni ne da aka tsara don aiwatar da manufofin Addinin Aten, kuma a nan Nefertiti, tare da mijinta, ta jagoranci al'adun addini a matsayin Babban Firist na Aten kuma ta jagoranci mutane. An nuna ta ba kawai a matsayin sarauniya ba, amma a matsayi daidai da Fir'auna, tana miƙa hadayu ga Aten da albarkar mutane. Wannan ya nuna iko da matsayi na addini marasa misali wanda babu wata sarauniya da ta taɓa samu a baya, yana nuna cewa ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a cikin gyaran addini na Akhenaten. Hotonta a bangon haikali da sassaka ya nuna ta sanye da kambin Fir'auna biyu ko kuma a matsayin allahn yaƙi tana murkushe maƙiya, yana nuna karara cewa ita ce abokiyar mulki.

Rayuwa a Akhetaten ta kawo sabbin abubuwa a cikin fasaha da al'adu gaba ɗaya, fiye da canjin addini kawai. Salon fasaha na wannan lokacin, wanda aka sani da 'Salon Amarna,' ya nemi 'rayuwa cikin gaskiya,' yana barin siffofin Fir'auna masu tsauri da aka tsara a baya. Nefertiti da Akhenaten sun sa a nuna su da 'ya'yansu mata shida a cikin siffa mai gaskiya da ɗan adam fiye da kowane lokaci. An sassaka hotunan iyalin sarauta suna cin abinci tare a ƙarƙashin rana ko kuma suna riƙe da 'ya'yansu cikin ƙauna a bangon haikali, wanda ya kasance wani yunƙuri mai ban mamaki a cikin fasahar Masar ta lokacin. Sau da yawa ana nuna Nefertiti sanye da kambin shuɗi na Fir'auna, ko ma a cikin matsayi na gargajiya na Fir'auna tana murkushe maƙiya, wanda ke nuna cewa ba kawai matar sarki ba ce, amma ta yi amfani da iko mai ƙarfi a matsayin abokiyar mulki ta Masar. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 12 na mulkin Akhenaten, Nefertiti ta ɓace ba zato ba tsammani daga tarihin, kuma makomarta ta kasance sirri. Har yanzu masana suna jayayya ko ta mutu ba zato ba tsammani, ko ta rasa tagomashi kuma an kore ta, ko kuma ta zama Fir'auna da wani suna, kamar 'Neferneferuaten' ko 'Smenkhkare,' kuma ta ci gaba da mulki bayan mijinta. Har yanzu ba a gano kabarinta ba.

Ko da yake rayuwar Nefertiti ta ƙare cikin sirri, gadonta ya bar alamar da ba za a iya gogewa ba a tarihin Masar ta Tsohuwar Mulkin Masar. Bayan mutuwar Akhenaten, Addinin Aten ya ragu cikin sauri kuma Masar ta koma tsarin addinai daban-daban na gargajiya. An lalata ko kuma an ɓoye wuraren tarihi na zamanin Amarna, kuma an yi ƙoƙarin share sunayen Akhenaten da Nefertiti daga tarihi. Duk da haka, a shekarar 1912, masanin ilimin kimiyyar kayan tarihi na Jamus, Ludwig Borchardt, ya gano bust ɗinta na farar ƙasa mai launi a Amarna, wanda ya sake sanar da duniya game da wanzuwarta bayan fiye da shekaru 3,000. Wannan bust, tare da cikakken daidaito da kyau, ya sanya Nefertiti alamar kyau marar lokaci, kuma ana tuna da ita har abada a cikin al'adun gargajiya a matsayin shugabar mata mai ƙarfi. Rayuwarta ta zama mahada mai mahimmanci don fahimtar tasirin dogon lokaci na zamanin Akhenaten a kan tarihin Masar na gaba, kamar maido da addini a zamanin Tutankhamun.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Sunana yana nufin 'kyakkyawa ta zo,' kuma da zuwana, sabuwar alfijir ta fara a Masar. Mun yi ƙarfin hali mu yi tunanin duniya da aka sake haihuwa a ƙarƙashin hasken Aten guda ɗaya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Ka rungumi keɓantaccen halinka a matsayin mai haifar da canji. Ka gane cewa kasancewarka na iya kawo sabbin farawa, yana ƙarfafa wasu su yi tunani da gina makoma fiye da iyakokin al'ada.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Tare da mijina, mun yi ƙarfin hali mu bar tsoffin hanyoyi, muka gina sabon birni da sabon imani daga yashi na hamada. Gaskiyar hangen nesa tana buƙatar ƙarfin hali don ƙirƙirar hanyarka, ko da hakan yana nufin barin abin da aka sani a baya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Jagoranci mai ƙarfin hali sau da yawa yana buƙatar son zuciya don kawo canji ga yanayin da ake ciki da kuma ƙirƙirar sabbin tsarin gaba ɗaya. Kada ka ji tsoron barin tsoffin tsarin da gina hangen nesanka daga tushe, ko da hakan yana nufin shiga yankin da ba a sani ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ban tsaya a matsayin mata ba kawai, amma a matsayin babbar firist, ina haɗa tsarki da mutuwa. Jagoranci shine haɗawa, ƙarfafawa, da jagorantar mutanenku zuwa ga gaskiya mafi girma.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Jagoranci mai inganci ya wuce iko kawai; yana game da zama gada tsakanin buri da gaskiya. Ka haɓaka ikon haɗawa da jagorantar tawagarka zuwa ga manufa mai girma, mai haɗaka, kana aiki a matsayin mai ƙarfafawa da mai shiga tsakani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Gimbiya Elissa ta Taya ta gudu daga ɗan'uwanta, ta kafa Carthage, amma ta gamu da mummunan ƙarshe saboda cin amanar Aeneas, wanda ya nuna ƙiyayya da Roma.
key_achievements: Guduwa daga Taya daga ɗan'uwanta da kuma samun dukiya.
Kafa Carthage a Arewacin Afirka da hikimar fatar saniya.
Sanya Carthage ta bunƙasa a matsayin cibiyar kasuwanci ta Bahar Rum.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta kafa da bunƙasar Carthage, kuma wata mummunar hali wacce ta nuna ƙiyayya da Roma da ba za a iya guje mata ba.

dido.epic:
Sunanta na asali Elissa, gimbiya ce ta Taya, wani birni mai arziki na Finikiya. Ta yi rayuwa mai farin ciki tare da mijinta Sikaeus da take so, amma ɗan'uwanta, Pigmalion, sarkin Taya, ya yi sha'awar dukiyar mijinta kuma ya kashe shi da mugunta. Ba ta san wannan mummunar gaskiya ba har sai da fatalwar mijinta ta bayyana a mafarki, ta bayyana mata gaskiya kuma ta raɗa mata ta gudu. Cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi, ta tattara dukiya a asirce tare da mabiyanta kuma ta gudu daga Taya don guje wa zaluncin ɗan'uwanta.

Bayan dogon tafiya a teku, sun isa gabar tekun Arewacin Afirka. Sarki Iarbas, mai mulkin wurin, ya yi taka-tsantsan da ita kuma ya yi mata ba'a ta hanyar ba da shawarar sayar mata da ƙasa gwargwadon abin da fatar saniya ɗaya za ta iya rufewa. Duk da haka, ta yanke fatar saniyar zuwa siraran zaren kamar gashi kuma ta kewaye dukan wani tudu a gabar teku. Sarkin, wanda hikimarta ta burge shi, ba shi da zaɓi sai dai ya cika alkawarinsa, kuma wannan tudu ya zama Carthage, ma'ana 'Sabon Birni', sabon gida ga mutanenta.

A ƙarƙashin jagorancinta, Carthage ta bunƙasa cikin sauri kuma ta zama cibiyar kasuwanci mai ƙarfi a Tekun Bahar Rum. Ta yi rantsuwar tsarki ga mijinta Sikaeus da ya rasu, ta ƙi masu neman aurenta da yawa, kuma ta sadaukar da kanta ga mulkin birnin kawai. Sai wata rana, Aeneas, jarumin Troy wanda guguwa ta lalata jirginsa, ya isa gabar tekunta tare da mutanensa. Ta yi musu maraba, kuma watakila ta hanyar shisshigin alloli, nan da nan suka faɗa cikin soyayya mai zurfi.

Amma farin cikinsu bai daɗe ba. Aeneas ba zai iya ƙin umarnin alloli na gina sabuwar Troy a Italiya ba, kuma a ƙarshe ya yanke shawarar barinta. Saboda cin amanar da aka yi mata, duniyarta ta ruguje. Ta la'ance shi da zuriyarsa da ƙiyayya ta har abada kuma ta kashe kanta a kan wutar gawa. Wannan bala'in nata ya nuna haihuwar birni, halakar mace, da kuma tarihin jini da zai kasance tsakanin manyan wayewa biyu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ranavalona I sarauniya ce ta Madagascar a ƙarni na 19, wacce ta kare 'yancin kai daga waje ta hanyar manufofin keɓewa.
key_achievements: Ta yi nasara a gwagwarmayar gadon sarauta bayan mutuwar Radama I.
Katse dangantaka da manyan ƙasashen Turai da kuma tsananta wa Kiristanci.
Gina tattalin arzikin dogaro da kai da kuma ƙarfin tsaro mai ƙarfi.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinta ya tsawaita 'yancin kai na Madagascar, amma ana jayayya game da shi saboda hanyoyin mulkinta masu tsanani.

ranavalona-i.epic:
Ranavalona I (ta yi mulki daga 1828 zuwa 1861) sarauniya ce mai ƙarfi ta Masarautar Madagascar, wacce ta yi ƙoƙarin kare 'yancin kai da al'adun ƙasarta a cikin matsin lamba daga manyan ƙasashen Turai a farkon ƙarni na 19. Ko da yake ba ta fito daga gidan sarauta ba, ta kasance talaka, amma Sarki Andrianampoinimerina mai girma na Masarautar Merina ya lura da ita, kuma ta zama matar ɗansa, Radama I. A lokacin, Madagascar tana kan hanyar zamani da karɓar Kiristanci, tana ƙarfafa dangantaka da Birtaniya a ƙarƙashin mulkin Radama I. Duk da haka, wannan manufar buɗe ido ta kawo canje-canje ga tsarin zamantakewa da al'adu na gargajiya, kuma wasu sun fara nuna damuwa game da ƙaruwar tasirin waje. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Ranavalona I, a matsayinta na memba na gidan sarauta, tana tunani sosai game da makomar Madagascar kuma tana neman rawar da za ta taka. Rayuwarta ta kasance a kan hanyar canzawa ba zato ba tsammani tare da mutuwar mijinta kwatsam.

A shekara ta 1828, lokacin da mijinta Radama I ya rasu ba zato ba tsammani, Ranavalona I ta tsinci kanta a tsakiyar gwagwarmayar neman mulki mai tsanani game da gadon sarauta. Akwai masu fafatawa da yawa a jerin gadon sarauta a lokacin, amma ta yi nasarar shawo kansu da sauri da kuma yanke hukunci, ta hau gadon sarauta na Madagascar. Wannan shi ne farkon juyin juya hali wanda ya nuna falsafar mulkinta a fili. Da ta zama sarauniya, Ranavalona I ta juya manufofin goyon bayan Turai da sarki Radama I ya bi gaba ɗaya, kuma ta sanar da sabbin manufofin ƙasa na **keɓewa (Isolationism)** da **dogaro da kai (Self-sufficiency)**. Keɓewa manufa ce ta rage dangantakar tattalin arziki da siyasa da duniya ta waje don kawar da tsoma bakin waje, kuma dogaro da kai yana nufin tsarin tattalin arziki wanda ke kula da ƙasa ta hanyar samar da kayayyaki na cikin gida kawai ba tare da dogaro da albarkatun waje ba. Ta ɗauki yarjejeniyoyin da aka yi da manyan ƙasashen Turai a matsayin sarƙoƙi da ke keta ikon mallakar Madagascar, kuma ta yi imani da cewa dole ne a katse tasirin waje gaba ɗaya don kare 'yancin kai na ƙasarta. Waɗannan canje-canjen manufofi sun haifar da babban tasiri a duk faɗin al'ummar Madagascar.

A lokacin mulkin Ranavalona I, ta aiwatar da manufofinta na keɓewa da ƙarfi. A shekara ta 1835, ta kori masu wa'azin Birtaniya kuma ta hana addinin Kiristanci, kuma ta tsananta wa 'yan ƙasarta da suka musulunta zuwa Kiristanci. Wannan mataki ne na kawar da motsin Kiristanci na Madagascar wanda London Missionary Society ta fara a zamanin Radama I. Bugu da ƙari, ta kula da babban sojoji kuma ta gina ababen more rayuwa na ƙasa kamar hanyoyi da sansanoni ta hanyar tsarin aikin tilas da ake kira **Fanompoana**. Wannan tsarin ya kasance wajibi ne ga dukkan 'yan ƙasa su yi hidima ga ƙasa ba tare da biya ba na wani lokaci, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tallafawa tattalin arzikin dogaro da kai da kuma ƙarfafa ikon tsaro. An yi amfani da ilimin wasu injiniyoyin Turai kamar Jean Laborde na Faransa a zaɓe don rage dogaro da waje ta hanyar samar da makamai kamar bindigogi da foda da kansu. Don kiyaye tsarin zamantakewa, ta yi amfani da gwajin guba na gargajiya da ake kira **Tangena ordeal** don tsarkake masu laifi da masu adawa da siyasa. Wannan gwaji hanya ce mai tsanani inda ake yanke hukunci cewa wanda ake tuhuma ba shi da laifi idan ya sha guba kuma ya rayu, kuma yana da laifi idan ya mutu.

Mulkin Ranavalona I na tsawon shekaru 33 an rubuta shi a matsayin mulkin kama-karya na 'Sarauniya Mahaukaciya' ga manyan ƙasashen Turai, amma niyyarta ta kare 'yancin kai na Madagascar ta kasance mai ƙarfi. A shekara ta 1845, rundunar sojojin ruwa ta Faransa da Birtaniya sun kai hari Tamatave, amma sojojinta sun yi nasarar fatattakar su, suna nuna ƙarfin juriya na Madagascar ga duniya. Ko da yake mulkinta ya haifar da asarar rayuka da wahala mai yawa, saboda manufofinta na keɓewa, Madagascar ta iya guje wa mulkin mallaka kai tsaye na manyan ƙasashen Turai har tsawon shekaru da yawa bayan mutuwarta a 1861. Gadonta ya kasance a tarihi tare da kimantawa daban-daban na mulkin kama-karya da kuma kare ikon mallakar ƙasa. Hanyar mulkin Ranavalona I ta cancanci a yi nazari da kwatanta ta da misalan sauran shugabannin da suka yi ƙoƙarin kare 'yancin kai daga mulkin mallaka na Yamma a nahiyar Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Gebre Mesqel Lalibela sarki ne na Habasha a ƙarni na 13, wanda ya gina majami'u 11 da aka sassaƙa a dutse don ƙirƙirar 'sabuwar Urushalima'.
key_achievements: Jagorancin gina majami'u 11 da aka sassaƙa a dutse
Gane 'sabuwar Urushalima' a Habasha
Kafa gadon ruhaniya na daular Zagwe
fact_box.legacy_statement: Majami'unsa da aka sassaƙa a dutse sun kasance zuciyar addinin Kiristanci na Habasha kuma wurin tarihi na duniya na UNESCO.

gebre-mesqel-lalibela.epic:
Gebre Mesqel Lalibela, babban sarki kuma waliyi na daular Zagwe ta Habasha, wanda ya rayu a ƙarshen ƙarni na 12 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 13, rayuwarsa cike take da annabce-annabce masu ban mamaki da kira na kaddara. A wancan lokacin, Habasha masarauta ce ta dā mai zurfin tushen addinin Kiristanci, kuma lokaci ne da sha'awar sabon cibiyar ruhaniya ke ƙaruwa yayin da hanyar aikin hajji zuwa Urushalima ke ƙara zama mai wahala. A cewar labari, lokacin da aka haife shi, ƙudan zuma sun kewaye shi amma ba su cutar da shi ba, kuma mahaifiyarsa ta fassara wannan a matsayin alamar cewa zai zama mai mulkin Habasha a nan gaba, don haka ta ba shi suna 'Lalibela', ma'ana 'ƙudan zuma sun amince da mulkinsa'. Wannan annabcin haihuwa mai tsarki ya jawo kishi mai zurfi daga Harba, ɗan'uwansa kuma sarki a lokacin. Harba ya ɗauki Lalibela a matsayin barazana ga kursiyin, don haka ya kore shi zuwa wani wuri mai nisa daga babban birnin, wanda ya sa Lalibela ya sha wahala a lokacin kuruciyarsa cikin rashin tabbas da haɗari. Wannan ya zama wata dama ta ƙarfafa ruhinsa da zurfafa imaninsa.

Babban gwaji da kuma juyin juya hali a rayuwar Lalibela ya fito ne daga danginsa, musamman daga hannun 'yar'uwarsa ta uba. A cikin wani shiri na hana shi haƙƙinsa na kursiyin har abada, an yi ƙoƙarin kashe shi da guba. Wannan guba ta jefa shi cikin wani yanayi na suma mai zurfi kamar mutuwa na tsawon dare uku da rana uku. Amma wannan lokaci na yanke kauna ya zama hanyar wahayi mai tsarki a gare shi. A cikin sumarsa, ruhinsa ya bar jikinsa kuma mala'iku suka jagorance shi zuwa sama, inda ya ga wani abu mai ban mamaki wanda bai taɓa gani ba a duniya. Wannan birni ne na majami'u masu girma da kyau, waɗanda aka sassaƙa su cikin zurfin ƙasa. A cikin wannan hangen nesa, ya ga ba kawai gine-gine ba, amma wurare masu tsarki waɗanda ke ɗauke da ainihin imani, kuma muryar Allah ta ba shi kira mai bayyane kuma mai ƙarfi cewa ya koma duniya ya sake gina abin da ya gani. Wannan ya wuce umarnin gini kawai, ya zama aikin Allahntaka da aka sassaƙa a cikin zuciyarsa don ɗaukar alhakin makomar ruhaniya ta Habasha.

Lalibela, wanda ya farka daga sumarsa ta mu'ujiza, ya gafarta wa waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin cutar da shi, abin mamaki. Sarki Harba, ɗan'uwansa ta uba, wanda ya ji daɗi sosai da wannan gafara mai girma da kuma abubuwan da ya fuskanta na Allahntaka, ya sauka daga kursiyin da kansa kuma ya miƙa wa Lalibela rawani. Bayan hawansa kursiyin, Lalibela nan da nan ya fara wani babban aiki don mayar da hangen nesansa na Allahntaka zuwa gaskiya. Ya tattara mafi kyawun masu sana'a da masu sassaƙa dutse daga ko'ina cikin Habasha, kuma a yankin dutsen mai aman wuta na babban birnin Roha, maimakon gina gine-gine da guduma da chisel, ya fara sassaƙa majami'u ta hanyar haƙa ƙasa. Wannan aiki ya wuce gini kawai, ya zama babban gwaji na imani da haƙurin ɗan adam. A cewar labari, ana cewa mutane suna aiki tuƙuru da rana, kuma da daddare mala'iku suna saukowa su ninka aikin. Wannan ya nuna imani mai ƙarfi da burin Lalibela na ƙirƙirar 'sabuwar Urushalima' a ƙasar Habasha bayan Saladin ya mamaye Urushalima kuma hanyar aikin hajji ga Kiristoci ta toshe.

Majami'u 11 da aka sassaƙa a dutse waɗanda aka kammala a lokacin mulkin Lalibela sun zama kololuwar mulkinsa na duniya da kuma shaidar har abada na zurfin imaninsa. Waɗannan gine-gine masu ban mamaki ba kawai wuraren addini ba ne, amma sun zama zuciyar addinin Kiristanci na Habasha da kuma alamar girman kai na ƙasa. Ya miƙa kursiyin ga ɗan'uwansa kuma ya rayu sauran rayuwarsa a matsayin mai kaɗaici, yana fatan cewa gadonsa zai dawwama kamar addu'ar da aka sassaƙa a dutse. Bayan mutuwarsa, waɗannan majami'u sun ci gaba da zama muhimman wuraren aikin hajji da wuraren ibada ga Cocin Orthodox na Habasha, suna ba da ilhami ga masu bi da yawa. A shekarar 1978, an amince da waɗannan majami'u na Lalibela da aka sassaƙa a dutse saboda keɓantarsu da darajar tarihi, an kuma sanya su cikin jerin abubuwan tarihi na duniya na UNESCO, wanda ya tabbatar da darajarsu a matsayin gadon ɗan adam. Har zuwa yau, waɗannan majami'u sun kasance zuciyar imani na Habasha, kuma ayyukansa, kamar pyramids na tsohuwar Masar ko birnin dutse na Petra, misali ne mai girma na yadda imani na ɗan adam da fasaha suka haɗu don canza yanayi, suna ba da ilhami ga mutane da yawa har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Leo Africanus ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya kuma marubuci na Larabawa na karni na 16, wanda ya rubuta littafin ƙasa na Afirka, "Descrittione dell’Africa".
key_achievements: Ya yi tafiye-tafiye masu yawa a duk faɗin nahiyar Afirka a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya na Sultan na Maroko.
'Yan fashin teku Kiristoci suka kama shi kuma aka gabatar da shi ga Paparoma Leo X.
Ya rubuta littafin ƙasa "Descrittione dell’Africa" wanda ya gabatar da Afirka ga Turai.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa sun yi tasiri sosai ga fahimtar Turawa game da Afirka tsawon ƙarnuka.

leo-africanus.epic:
Leo Africanus (kimanin 1494–kimanin 1554) ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya, marubuci, kuma mai bincike na Larabawa wanda ya yi aiki tsakanin ƙarshen karni na 15 zuwa tsakiyar karni na 16, yana tafiya tsakanin Turai da Arewacin Afirka. Ainihin sunansa shine al-Hasan ibn Muhammad al-Wazzan al-Fasi. Rayuwarsa ta fara ne da faduwar Granada, sansanin ƙarshe na wayewar Musulunci. A shekara ta 1492, lokacin da Granada ta faɗa hannun masarautun Castile da Aragon, iyalinsa, kamar yawancin Musulmai da Yahudawa, sun gudu daga tsanantawa ta addini kuma suka nemi mafaka a Fes, Maroko. Wannan kwarewar yarinta ta sanya masa zafin rasa ƙasarsa, tare da sha'awar sabuwar duniya. A Fes, ya yi nazarin Alkur'ani, rubuce-rubucen Larabci na gargajiya, da harsuna daban-daban, yana neman ilimi mai zurfi. Wannan tushen ilimi ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a tafiye-tafiyensa na gaba a cikin duniyar Musulunci mai faɗi a matsayin jami'in diflomasiyya mai hidima ga Sultan. Tun yana ƙarami, ya fara yin tafiye-tafiye masu yawa a duk faɗin Arewacin Afirka da Gabas ta Tsakiya a matsayin jakadan diflomasiyya na Sultan na Maroko, bisa ga ƙwarewarsa ta harshe da ilimin ƙasa.

A matsayinsa na jami'in diflomasiyya, tafiye-tafiyensa sun kai har zuwa bayan Hamadar Sahara zuwa birnin Timbuktu mai tarihi. Ya shaida da kansa arzikin da cibiyoyin ilimi na Daular Songhai mai ƙarfi a Yammacin Afirka a lokacin, kuma ya burge shi sosai da ci gabanta. Ya kuma yi tafiya tare da Kogin Nilu zuwa Alkahira da Iskandariya a Masar, kuma ya fuskanci girma da bambancin al'adu na Konstantinoful, cibiyar Daular Usmaniyya. A cikin waɗannan tafiye-tafiye masu yawa, ya haɗu da mutane da al'adu daban-daban kai tsaye, yana tara ilimi mai yawa game da al'adunsu, tsarin siyasa, da ayyukan kasuwanci. Ba kawai mai yawon shakatawa ba ne, amma shaida mai rai wanda ya fuskanci kuma ya rubuta faɗin da bambancin duniyar Musulunci da kansa. Duk abin da ya gani, kowane labari da ya ji, ya taru a cikin zuciyarsa kamar babban ɗakin karatu, wanda ya zama tushen yanke shawara don rubuta littafin ƙasa mafi muhimmanci game da nahiyar Afirka. Wannan lokaci ya kasance wani muhimmin lokaci na canji inda zai zama gada, yana isar da ilimi da al'adun duniyar Musulunci zuwa Turai.

Duk da haka, makomarsa ta ɗauki juyawa ba zato ba tsammani. Kimanin shekara ta 1518, yayin da yake dawowa daga Masar zuwa Maroko, 'yan fashin teku Kiristoci suka kama shi a Mashigin Sicily. 'Yan fashin teku sun ɗauke shi ba kawai a matsayin fursuna ba, amma a matsayin 'kyauta' mai daraja da za a gabatar wa Paparoma Leo X, suna yaba da iliminsa da zurfin saninsa game da duniyar Musulunci. An kai shi Roma, an daure shi a Gidan Sant'Angelo na wani lokaci, amma Paparoma, wanda ya burge shi sosai da basirar iliminsa ta musamman da kwarewar harshe, ya ba shi kulawa ta musamman. A ƙarshe, a ranar 6 ga Janairu, 1520, an yi masa baftisma a Basilica na St. Peter kuma ya sami sabon suna, Joannes Leo de Medici, wanda aka sanya masa sunan Paparoma. Don haka, al-Hasan ibn Muhammad al-Wazzan, wanda a da ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya na Sultan na Musulunci, ya zama malamin Kirista Leo Africanus a ƙarƙashin kariyar Paparoma. Wannan canjin addini mai ban mamaki ya kasance babban gwaji na rayuwarsa kuma a lokaci guda wani muhimmin lokaci na canji wanda ya buɗe damammaki na sabbin binciken ilimi.

Rayuwa a Roma ta ba Leo Africanus damammaki na binciken ilimi. A ƙarƙashin tallafin Paparoma Leo X, ya fara tattara ilimi mai yawa da ya tara a lokacin tafiye-tafiyensa a duk faɗin Afirka. Sakamakon shine littafin ƙasa da aka rubuta da harshen Italiyanci, **"Descrittione dell’Africa" (Bayanin Afirka)**. Wannan littafin ya ba da cikakken bayani mai ban sha'awa game da yanayin ƙasa na Afirka, birane, masarautu, koguna, da mutane da al'adu daban-daban, wanda a lokacin nahiyar ce da ba a sani ba ga Turawa. Bayan an buga shi a shekara ta 1550, an fassara shi zuwa harsunan Turai da yawa kuma ya yi aiki tsawon ƙarnuka a matsayin tushe mafi iko game da Afirka. Ayyukansa sun ba da gudummawa sosai wajen fadada fahimtar Turai game da yanayin ƙasa da zurfafa fahimtarsu game da Afirka. Rayuwar Leo Africanus ta cika da rudani—gudun hijira, kamawa, da canjin addini—amma a ƙarshe, ya zama gada ta ilimi da ke haɗa duniyoyi biyu, Musulunci da Kiristanci, Afirka da Turai, yana barin alama marar gogewa a kan gadon ilimi na ɗan adam. Labarinsa, tare da rubuce-rubucen waɗanda suka bincika nahiyar Amurka a lokaci guda, ya kasance muhimmin gado na masana na karni na 16 waɗanda suka bincika kuma suka rubuta duniyoyin da ba a sani ba.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Gudun hijira ya ɗauke mini ƙasata, amma ta buɗe duniya a matsayin ajina. Ilimin da na tattara ya zama mafakata ta gaskiya.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Kalubale sau da yawa suna tilasta mana neman sabbin hanyoyi da sake fasalta tushen tsaronmu. Ku rungumi ilimi a matsayin tafiya ta rayuwa, domin yana gina katanga ta ciki wadda babu wata ƙarfin waje da zai iya rushewa. Son sanin ku na ilimi zai iya mayar da cikas zuwa dama.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Don fahimtar ƙasa da gaske, dole ne mutum ya bi hanyoyinta kuma ya saurari mutanenta. Kwarewa malami ce mafi girma fiye da kowane littafi.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Fahimtar gaskiya tana fitowa ne daga shiga kai tsaye, ba kawai nazarin ka'idar ba. Fita daga yankin jin daɗin ku, shiga cikin muhallin daban-daban, kuma ku yi hulɗa da ra'ayoyi daban-daban. Wannan hanyar aiki tana ba da mahimman bayanai waɗanda babu wani karatu da zai iya maimaitawa.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Hankalina, wanda da ya kasance yana daure da al'ada ɗaya, yanzu yana riƙe da hikimar al'ummai da yawa. Sanin wasu shine sanin faɗin ɗan adam da gaske.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Iyakance kanka ga ra'ayi ɗaya yana iyakance damar ku. Ku nemi kuma ku yaba da hikimar da ke cikin al'adu da asali daban-daban. Wannan yana faɗaɗa hangen nesa, yana ha��aka tausayi, kuma yana ba ku damar fahimtar duniyar da muke ciki da kyau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Lobengula shi ne sarki na ƙarshe na Masarautar Ndebele a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya yi ƙoƙari ya kare ikon mallakar al'ummarsa daga mulkin mallaka na Turai.
key_achievements: Nasara a yaƙin basasa na sarauta na Masarautar Ndebele
Ƙoƙarin kiyaye daidaiton diflomasiyya da ƙasashen Turai
Juriya ga mamayar mulkin mallaka
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kasance alama ce ta juriya ga mulkin mallaka, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga ƙungiyoyin kishin ƙasa na Afirka.

lobengula.epic:
Lobengula (kimanin 1836-1894) shi ne sarki mai cin gashin kansa na ƙarshe na Masarautar Ndebele a Kudancin Afirka, wani mutum da ya yi gwagwarmaya sosai don kare ikon mallakar al'ummarsa a fuskar babban raƙuman mulkin mallaka na Turai a Afirka a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a matsayin ɗan Mzilikazi, babban jarumi kuma wanda ya kafa Masarautar Ndebele, kuma ya girma a ƙarƙashin mulkin mahaifinsa mai ƙarfi. Lokacin da Sarki Mzilikazi ya rasu a shekara ta 1868, masarautar ta faɗa cikin babban gibin iko da hargitsi. Rikicin sarauta ya zama gaskiya mara makawa, kuma wannan ya zama babban ƙalubale ga Lobengula tun farkon mulkinsa. Rarrabuwar kawuna a cikin masarautar ta zurfafa, inda wasu sarakuna suka goyi bayansa suna iƙirarin cewa ɗan'uwansa Nkulumane, wanda aka yi imani ya daɗe da ɓacewa, ya dawo. A cikin wannan rikici, Lobengula ya fuskanci babban aiki na kafa sarautarsa ta gaskiya don haɗin kai da kwanciyar hankali na masarautar. Wannan lokaci ne da makomar al'ummar Ndebele ke cikin rashin tabbas.

Yaƙin basasa kan sarauta ya kasance babban juyi da ƙalubale a farkon mulkin Lobengula. Ya yi yaƙi mai tsanani da waɗanda ke goyon bayan Nkulumane don tabbatar da sarautarsa. Wannan yaƙin basasa ya gwada haɗin kan Masarautar Ndebele kuma ya zama fage ga Lobengula don tabbatar da iyawarsa a matsayin shugaba mai ƙarfi. Bayan shekaru na gwagwarmaya mai tsanani, Lobengula a ƙarshe ya yi nasara, ya sake haɗa kabilun da suka rarrabu kuma ya yi nasarar kafa ikonsa a duk faɗin Matabeleland. Ya ci gaba da gadon mahaifinsa Mzilikazi, yana neman kwanciyar hankali da wadata ga masarautar, amma a lokacin mulkinsa, Turawa sun fara zuwa ƙasar Ndebele da yawa. Da farko, mafarauta da masu wa'azi ne, amma ba da daɗewa ba masu neman zinariya da ma'adanai suka mamaye yankin. Lobengula ya fahimci ƙarfi da burinsu, don haka ya yi ƙoƙari ya kiyaye daidaito mai haɗari tsakanin buƙatar yaƙi da jarumawansa ke buƙata da kuma buƙatar kiyaye ikon mallakar masarautar.

Lokaci mafi baƙin ciki a mulkin Lobengula shi ne sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Rudd (Rudd Concession) a shekara ta 1888. Wannan yarjejeniya ce ta rashin daidaito inda wakilan Kamfanin Burtaniya na Kudancin Afirka (BSAC) suka yaudari Lobengula don samun ikon mallakar ma'adanai na Masarautar Ndebele. Wakilan Cecil Rhodes sun yi kamar suna neman izinin hakar ma'adanai ne kawai a wani yanki mai iyaka na masarautarsa, suna alkawarin bindigogi da jirgin ruwa mai tururi ga Lobengula. Lobengula, wanda bai iya karatu ba, bai san cewa takardar da suka gabatar a zahiri tana ba su ikon mallakar duk ma'adanai na masarautarsa ba, kuma tana ba su damar ɗaukar duk matakan da suka dace don manufofinsu. Lokacin da ya gane an yaudare shi, ya aika da wakilai ga Sarauniya Victoria don roƙon a soke yarjejeniyar, amma lokaci ya riga ya kure. Gwamnatin Burtaniya ta amince da Yarjejeniyar Rudd, wanda ya ba Kamfanin Burtaniya na Kudancin Afirka damar shari'a don mamaye Masarautar Ndebele. Yaudararsu ta yanke makomar masarautar Lobengula, kuma ƙoƙarinsa na diflomasiyya don zaman lafiya ya ƙare da takaici.

Tashin hankalin da Yarjejeniyar Rudd ta haifar a ƙarshe ya kai ga rikicin makamai. Kamfanin Burtaniya na Kudancin Afirka ya mamaye ƙasar Ndebele a shekara ta 1893, yana amfani da wata ƙaramar takaddama a matsayin hujja, kuma an san wannan da Yaƙin Matabele na Farko. Jarumawan Lobengula sun yi yaƙi da jaruntaka da mashi da garkuwa, amma ba su da wani zaɓi a gaban manyan makamai na Turawa kamar bindigar Maxim. Lokacin da shan kashi ya kusa, Lobengula ya yanke shawarar baƙin ciki na ƙona babban birnin Bulawayo don hana shi faɗawa hannun abokan gaba. Ya rasu sakamakon rashin lafiya yayin da yake gudun hijira zuwa arewa, kuma tare da mutuwarsa, Masarautar Ndebele mai cin gashin kanta ta zo ƙarshe. Amma Lobengula ba kawai wanda aka ci nasara ba ne. Ana tuna shi a matsayin wani mutum mai alama wanda ya yi tsayin daka har zuwa ƙarshe don kare ikon mallakar al'ummarsa a cikin babban raƙuman mulkin mallaka. Labarinsa, tare da gwagwarmayar sauran shugabanni da yawa waɗanda suka yi yaƙi da mulkin mallaka a nahiyar Afirka, ya kasance babban gado wanda har yau yake tunatar da mu muhimmancin 'yanci da cin gashin kai.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Menelik II, Sarkin Habasha a ƙarshen karni na 19, ya kare 'yancin kai na Afirka ta hanyar cin nasara a Yaƙin Adwa.
key_achievements: Haɗa kai da faɗaɗa Daular Habasha
Kore Italiya a Yaƙin Adwa
Zamantar da ƙasa da kiyaye 'yancin kai
