fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin alama ta 'yancin kai na Afirka kuma wanda ya kafa harsashin Habasha ta zamani.

menelik-ii.epic:
Menelik II (1844-1913) shine sarki na ƙarshe na Masarautar Shewa kuma Sarkin Habasha, wanda ya jagoranci Habasha a lokacin da Afirka ke fuskantar babban raƙuman ruwa na mulkin mallaka na Turai, a ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20. Sunansa na asali shine Sahle Maryam, an haife shi a ranar 17 ga Agusta, 1844, a matsayin yarima na Masarautar Shewa. Amma yarintarsa ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba. Sarki Tewodros II, wanda ke mulkin Habasha a lokacin, ya kama shi a matsayin fursuna a cikin kagara mai tsaunuka na Magdala, inda ya shafe kimanin shekaru 10 na duhu. Wannan lokaci ya kasance gwaji a gare shi, amma a lokaci guda ya ƙarfafa masa ƙuduri da buri mai ƙarfi na dawo da tsohuwar sarautar Habasha da haɗa kan daular da ta watse. A shekarar 1865, ya tsere daga kagarar cikin ban mamaki ya koma garinsu na Shewa, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya dawo da kursiyin Shewa, inda ya fara doguwar tafiya don haɗa kan Habasha. Haihuwarsa da girma sun yi kama da sanarwar farkon zamanin mulkin mallaka da zai yi yaƙi da shi daga baya.

Bayan ya zama Sarkin Shewa, Menelik II ya mai da hankali kan haɗa kan yankunan Habasha da suka rabu da kuma gina ƙarfin ƙasar. Ta hanyar diflomasiyya da nasarorin soja, ya tattara sarakunan Habasha daban-daban a ƙarƙashin tutarsa, ya kuma zamantar da sojojinsa, yana kafa tsarin mulki mai tsakiya. A shekarar 1889, bayan rasuwar Sarki Yohannes IV, Menelik ya hau gadon sarautar Habasha a matsayin halastaccen magajin daular Solomon, inda ya sami taken 'Sarkin Sarakuna'. Mulkinsa ya wuce kawai mallakar iko; alkawari ne na jagorantar Habasha zuwa ga zamani da kuma ba da damar al'ummar su yanke makomarsu da kansu. Amma babban barazanar daularsa ba ta fito daga ciki ba, sai dai daga waje. Italiya ta yi ƙoƙarin mayar da Habasha ƙarƙashin kariyar su ta hanyar amfani da sharuɗɗa marasa tabbas na Yarjejeniyar Wuchale, wadda aka sanya hannu tsakanin Habasha da Italiya a shekarar 1889. Yarjejeniyar Wuchale tana da bambance-bambance tsakanin sigar Italiyanci da Amharic, inda Italiya ta saka wani sashi da ke nuna cewa Habasha za ta iya gudanar da harkokin waje ta hanyar Italiya kawai, don haka tana ƙoƙarin keta ikon mallakar ta.

Menelik II ya ƙi amincewa da wannan yaudara mai wulakanci daga Italiya. Ya yanke hukuncin cewa fassarar yarjejeniyar Italiyanci ta keta ikon mallakar Habasha sosai, kuma ya ayyana soke yarjejeniyar. Wannan nan da nan ya nuna cikakkiyar faɗa da Italiya. Ya yi kira ga dukkan 'ya'ya maza da mata na Habasha da su tashi don kare ikon mallakar ƙasarsu, kuma don amsa kiransa, sarakuna da mutane daga ko'ina cikin ƙasar sun taru a Adwa, suna kafa babbar runduna. Yaƙin Adwa, wanda ya faru a ranar 1 ga Maris, 1896, tsakanin Habasha da Daular Italiya, ya kasance wani muhimmin yaƙi, kuma nasara ce da ba a taɓa gani ba ga wata ƙasa ta Afirka a kan sojojin mulkin mallaka na Turai. Italiya ta raina haɗin kai da jaruntakar sojojin Habasha, amma a ƙarƙashin jagorancin Menelik II, jaruman Habasha sun sami nasara mai girma. Nasarar Adwa ta wuce nasarar soja kawai; ta ba da bege ga dukkan nahiyar Afirka cewa za su iya tsayawa tsayin daka a kan mulkin mallaka na Turai, kuma ta zama wani muhimmin mataki na tabbatar da 'yancin kai na Habasha.

Bayan nasarar Yaƙin Adwa, Menelik II ya ƙarfafa 'yancin kai na Habasha a matakin duniya kuma ya hanzarta zamantar da ƙasar. Ya gabatar da ababen more rayuwa na zamani kamar layin dogo, wayar tarho, da tsarin gidan waya, ya kafa tsarin ilimi na zamani, kuma ya gina babban birnin Addis Ababa, don haka ya kafa harsashin ci gaban ƙasar. A lokacin mulkinsa, Habasha ta zama ƙasa mai cin gashin kanta, ita kaɗai a Afirka da ba a taɓa mulkin mallaka ba kuma ta ci gaba da riƙe ikon mallakarta. Gadonsa ya wuce kawai faɗaɗa yanki da nasarorin soja; ya ta'allaka ne a cikin gaskiyar cewa ya ƙarfafa girman kai na Afirka kuma ya zama alama ta juriya ga mulkin mallaka. Ruhunsa na kare 'yancin kai da ƙoƙarinsa na zamantarwa sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga sauran masu fafutukar 'yancin kai a nahiyar Afirka daga baya, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin tushen tunani ga motsin kawar da mulkin mallaka da ya faru a duk faɗin Afirka a tsakiyar karni na 20.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaban da ya haɗa kan al'ummar Basotho a lokacin rikici, ya sami kariya ta Birtaniya ta hanyar diflomasiyya da haƙuri, kuma ya kafa Lesotho.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan al'ummar Basotho a cikin rikici da gina sansanin Thaba Bosiu
Daidaita da faɗaɗa masarauta ta hanyar haƙuri da diflomasiyya
Kare 'yancin kai na al'umma ta hanyar samun kariya ta Birtaniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Uban Masarautar Lesotho da aka gina ta hanyar diflomasiyya da haƙuri, ana tunawa da shi a yau a matsayin alamar ƙasa mai zaman kanta.

moshoeshoe-i.epic:
Sunansa Lepoqo, daga baya aka san shi da Moshoeshoe I, an haife shi a lokacin rikici. A farkon karni na 19, kudancin Afirka ya kasance cikin tashin hankali mai tsanani da aka sani da 'Difaquane' ko 'Rushewa'. Yaƙe-yaƙe da Shaka na Masarautar Zulu ya fara sun tarwatsa kabilu da yawa, kuma igiyar ruwa ta 'yan gudun hijira da jarumai ta mamaye ƙasar. A cikin wannan hargitsi, ya tattara ragowar kabilu daban-daban kuma ya zama shugaba. Da farko, ya zauna a Dutsen Butha-Buthe, amma ba da daɗewa ba ya gane cewa yana buƙatar mafaka mafi aminci. A shekara ta 1824, ya jagoranci mutanensa zuwa Thaba Bosiu, wato 'Dutsen Dare', wani tudu mai kusan ba za a iya shiga ba. Wannan shi ne zai zama sansanin soja da kuma gidan haihuwa ga al'ummar Basotho.

Thaba Bosiu ya fi sansanin soja. Ya kasance alamar falsafar mulkinsa. Ya yi imani cewa ba koyaushe ya kamata a fuskanci ƙarfi da ƙarfi mafi girma ba. Ya nuna alheri ga abokan gaba da aka ci, kuma maimakon ya bautar da su ko ya kashe su, ya ba su fili da shanu, ya haɗa su cikin mutanensa. Ko da lokacin da gungun masu cin naman mutane suka cinye kakansa, maimakon ya farauto su, ya aiko musu da abinci, yana cewa, "Ba zan iya dawo da matattu ba." Wannan aikin ya mai da su mabiyan sa masu aminci. Ya fahimci cewa diflomasiyya ita ce makami mafi ƙarfi, kuma zaman lafiya ita ce nasara ta ƙarshe. Ya mai da masarautarsa 'mafaka ga kowa'.

Amma zaman lafiya bai daɗe ba. Mazauna Boer daga arewa sun fara kallon ƙasarsu da sha'awa. Suna da bindigogi da dawakai, kuma yunwarsu ga ƙasa ba ta da iyaka. Sun yi yaƙe-yaƙe masu tsanani da yawa da aka sani da Yaƙe-yaƙen Free State-Basotho. Ya yi yaƙi da jaruntaka don kare mutanensa, amma a lokaci guda ya nemi wasu hanyoyi. A shekara ta 1833, ya tarbi masu wa'azin bishara na Paris, yana amfani da iliminsu da haɗin gwiwarsu da duniya ta Turai. Sun zama masu ba shi shawara da kuma taga zuwa ga duniya ta waje, suna taimaka masa a ƙoƙarinsa na diflomasiyya.

Bayan shekaru da yawa na gwagwarmaya, ya gane cewa mutanensa suna cikin haɗarin halaka gaba ɗaya a hannun Orange Free State. Aikin diflomasiyya na ƙarshe kuma mafi mahimmanci shi ne ya nemi kariya kai tsaye daga Sarauniya Victoria. Bayan tattaunawa mai tsanani, a ranar 12 ga Maris, 1868, ƙasarsu ta zama yankin kariya na Birtaniya a ƙarƙashin sunan Basutoland. Wannan ya cece su daga makomar shiga cikin jamhuriyar Boer mai zaman kanta. Ya rasu bayan shekaru biyu, amma ƙasar da ya gina ta rayu. A yau, wannan ƙasa da aka sani da Masarautar Lesotho, ta tsaya a matsayin shaida ga ƙasar da aka gina ta hanyar diflomasiyya, haƙuri, da kuma ƙarfin tsaunuka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Muhammad Ahmad shugaban addini ne a Sudan a ƙarni na 19 wanda ya jagoranci motsin Muhammad Ahmad don 'yantar da Sudan.
key_achievements: Ya bayyana gyaran Musulunci a matsayin Mahdi
Nasara a Yaƙin El Obeid
Faɗuwar Khartoum da 'yantar da Sudan
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadonsa ya kasance wani muhimmin sashi na kishin ƙasa na Sudan da kuma asalin Musulunci.

muhammad-ahmad.epic:
Muhammad Ahmad (an haife shi a kusan 1844) ya kasance shugaban addini a Sudan a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 kuma wanda ya kafa ƙungiyar Muhammad Ahmad, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a duniyar Musulunci. An haife shi a matsayin Nubian a tsibirin Labab na Kogin Nilu, ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga zurfafa karatun Alkur'ani da Sufanci duk da cewa ya fito daga yanayi mai tawali'u. A lokacin, Sudan tana ƙarƙashin mulkin Turkawa-Masar, kuma 'yan uwansa suna shan wahala daga haraji mai nauyi, watsi da al'adu, da kuma abin da ya gani a matsayin cin hanci da rashawa da kuma al'adun Musulunci na duniya. Wannan rashin adalci mai zurfi da lalacewar ruhaniya sun kunna masa wata babbar sha'awar gyara a cikin zuciyarsa. Ya haɓaka burin komawa ga tsarkakakken Musulunci na zamanin Annabi Muhammad da kuma 'yantar da ƙasarsa daga mulkin baƙi. Wannan ya kasance farkon wani babban motsi da ke da nufin sauye-sauyen ruhaniya da zamantakewa, fiye da kawai adawa ta siyasa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kafa tushen ruhaniya ga babban tawayen da zai jagoranta daga baya.

A shekara ta 1880, Muhammad Ahmad ya koma tsibirin Aba don dogon lokaci na addu'a da tunani. A can, ya yi iƙirarin cewa ya sadu da Annabi Muhammad a cikin jerin wahayi, kuma Annabin ya naɗa shi 'Mahdi'. Mahdi a al'adar Musulunci yana nufin "wanda aka shiryar", kuma yana nufin mai ceton da aka ƙaddara ya dawo da Musulunci na gaskiya kuma ya kafa adalci a duniya. A watan Yuni na 1881, ya bayyana manufarsa a fili, yana kira ga mutane su bar gwamnatin da ta lalace kuma su shiga cikin yaƙi mai tsarki, wato Jihad. Mabiyansa da suka amsa kiransa an san su da 'Ansar' (masu taimako), kuma sun taru a ƙarƙashin tutarsa, suna jan hankalinsu da alkawarin sabunta ruhaniya da 'yancin siyasa. Wannan sanarwa ta sami goyon baya mai yawa a duk faɗin Sudan, ta zama ƙalubale ga tsarin da ake da shi kuma mataki na farko zuwa ga kafa sabuwar ƙasar Musulunci.

Hanyar Ansar ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya mai girma a kan abokan gaba masu fasaha. Gwamnatin Turkawa-Masar ta Khartoum ta ɗauke su a matsayin masu tsattsauran ra'ayi kawai, amma imaninsu mai ƙarfi ya kasance garkuwarsu da takobinsu. A shekara ta 1883, Ansar sun sami nasara mai ban mamaki a Yaƙin El Obeid. Wannan nasara ba kawai ta samar da makamai masu mahimmanci ga motsin Muhammad Ahmad ba, har ma ta ƙarfafa gwiwa sosai ta hanyar tabbatar da cewa sojojin Masar ba su da ƙarfi. Yayin da kabilu da yawa suka shiga cikin tafiyarsu, sojojin Muhammad Ahmad sun ƙaru cikin sauri, kuma sun ci gaba a duk faɗin Sudan kamar igiyar ruwa ta imani, suna girgiza tushen tsohuwar gwamnati. Yaƙinsu ya kai kololuwa a cikin kewaye Khartoum, cibiyar ikon Masar a Sudan. Wannan kewaye ya kasance wani muhimmin al'amari da ke nuna ƙudurin motsin Muhammad Ahmad da iyawarsa ta dabara.

A ranar 26 ga Janairu, 1885, Ansar na Muhammad Ahmad sun kai hari Khartoum, suka 'yantar da birnin kuma suka kawo ƙarshen mulkin masu mamaya. Charles Gordon, jami'in Birtaniya kuma gwamna a lokacin, ya mutu a lokacin yaƙin, kuma wannan al'amari ya girgiza duniya baki ɗaya. Bayan faɗuwar Khartoum, Muhammad Ahmad ya fara aikin kafa sabuwar babban birni a Omdurman a hayin kogin kuma ya gina sabuwar ƙasar Musulunci, wato Khalifanci, wanda za a yi mulki bisa ka'idodin Shari'a. Amma lokacinsa ya yi gajere. Watanni shida kacal bayan wannan babban nasara, a ranar 22 ga Yuni, 1885, ya mutu daga zazzabin typhoid. Ƙasar da ya kafa an bar ta a hannun Khalifansa, Abdallahi ibn Muhammad. Manufar Muhammad Ahmad ta cika, kuma an shuka iri na Sudan mai 'yanci. Gadonsa ya kasance wani muhimmin sashi na kishin ƙasa na Sudan da kuma asalin Musulunci har zuwa yau, kuma yana da daraja a tattauna shi tare da sauran motsin adawa da mulkin mallaka da gyare-gyare na addini da suka faru a Afirka a ƙarni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Behanzin shi ne sarki na ƙarshe na Masarautar Dahomey a ƙarshen karni na 19, wanda ya yi tsayin daka sosai ga mulkin mallaka na Faransa.
key_achievements: Hauhawar gadon sarauta a matsayin sarki na ƙarshe na Masarautar Dahomey
Juriya ta makamai ga mulkin mallaka na Faransa
Jagorancin sojojin mata na Amazon a yaƙi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhun juriyarsa ya kasance alama ce ta gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai ta Afirka kuma yana ba da kwarin gwiwa har zuwa yau.

behanzin.epic:
Behanzin (wanda ya hau mulki a 1889) shi ne sarki mai cin gashin kansa na ƙarshe na Masarautar Dahomey a Yammacin Afirka a ƙarshen karni na 19, kuma mutum ne da ya yi tsayin daka sosai ga mulkin mallaka na Faransa. A wancan lokacin, Yammacin Afirka na fuskantar ƙaruwar mamayar da manyan ƙasashen Turai masu mulkin mallaka ke yi, kuma Faransa ta nuna a fili burinta na mallakar yankin. An san shi da suna Kondo lokacin yana yarima, ya hau gadon sarauta a 1889 bayan mahaifinsa Glélé, kuma ya ɗauki sunan Behanzin. Sunansa yana nufin 'duniya tana riƙe da kwai', yana nuna ƙaddarar Masarautar Dahomey mai laushi amma mai daraja. Da zaran Behanzin ya hau gadon sarauta, ya fuskanci halin da Faransa ta mamaye birnin Cotonou na bakin teku na Dahomey kuma ta yi barazana ga ikon mallakar masarautar. Ya so zaman lafiya, amma ya zaɓi ya yi yaƙi a matsayin jarumi maimakon ya zama bawa don kare ƙasar kakanninsa da 'yancin mutanensa. Wannan ya nuna ƙudurinsa mai ƙarfi na kare 'yancin Dahomey.

Wannan ƙudurin na Behanzin ya kai ga Yaƙin Faransa da Dahomey na Farko a 1890. Sojojin Faransa sun yi imani za su iya cin galaba a kan Dahomey cikin sauƙi da manyan bindigoginsu da manyan bindigogin yaƙi, amma jarumtakar sojojin Behanzin, musamman ma Mino, ko kuma 'Amazon' mata jarumai waɗanda suka shahara a duniya, sun nuna juriya mai ƙarfi fiye da yadda aka zata. Mino sojojin mata ne na musamman na Masarautar Dahomey, kuma horonsu da ƙarfin yaƙinsu ba su da kamarsu a Afirka a wancan lokacin. Sun yi yaƙi da ƙarfi, suna haifar da babban asara ga sojojin Faransa, kuma yaƙin ya shiga cikin wani yanayi na tsaka mai wuya wanda ba a zata ba. A ƙarshe, bangarorin biyu sun sanya hannu kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya mai rauni kuma sun shiga tsagaita wuta na ɗan lokaci. Behanzin bai ɓata wannan lokacin ba. Ya mai da hankali kan siyan ƙarin makamai na zamani daga Turai, sake tsara sojojinsa, da ƙarfafa ƙarfinsa don shirya wa rikicin da ba za a iya kauce masa ba da Faransa. Wannan ba tsagaita wuta ce kawai ba, amma lokaci ne na shirye-shiryen dabaru don babban yaƙin da ke tafe.

Kamar yadda Behanzin ya zata, a 1892 Faransa ta dawo da sojoji masu yawa da kuma ƙarfin wuta mai yawa, kuma Yaƙin Faransa da Dahomey na Biyu ya barke. Wannan yaƙin shi ne gwagwarmaya ta ƙarshe don rayuwar Masarautar Dahomey. Sojojin Dahomey sun yi yaƙi da jarumtaka, suna yin tsayin daka sosai, ciki har da amfani da dabarun ƙona ƙasa don yanke layin samar da kayayyaki na abokan gaba da kuma jinkirta ci gabansu. Amma ba su iya jurewa da ƙarfin wuta mai yawa na sojojin Faransa da ke ɗauke da bindigogin inji da manyan bindigogin yaƙi ba. Babban birnin Abomey a ƙarshe sojojin Faransa sun mamaye shi kuma sun ƙone shi, kuma Behanzin ya shaida bala'in lalacewar zuciyar masarautarsa. Ya bar babban birnin kuma ya ja da baya zuwa daji don ci gaba da yaƙin ɓoye, yana ƙoƙarin kiyaye wutar juriya. Behanzin ya ƙi zama ɗan tsana na Faransa, yana mai bayyana ƙudurinsa mai ƙarfi na ba zai taɓa miƙa wuya ba a matsayin sarki mai 'yanci na Dahomey. Gwagwarmayarsa ta nuna sha'awar 'yancin kai da ba ta taɓa mutuwa ba ko da a cikin yanayi na yanke kauna.

Behanzin ya ci gaba da juriya ta ɓoye a cikin daji kusan shekaru biyu, amma wahalar da mutanensa ke sha ta ƙaru kowace rana. Don hana ƙarin asara marar ma'ana, a ƙarshe ya miƙa kansa ga sojojin Faransa a ranar 15 ga Janairu, 1894. Sojojin Faransa sun yi alƙawarin za su bi da shi a matsayin sarki, amma sun karya alƙawarinsu kuma suka kai shi gudun hijira zuwa Martinique a Yammacin Indies, sannan daga baya suka mayar da shi Algiers. Behanzin bai taɓa taka ƙasar mahaifarsa ba kuma ya mutu shi kaɗai a Algiers a 1906. Bayan mutuwarsa, Masarautar Dahomey ta zama wani yanki na mulkin mallaka na Faransa, amma juriya mai ɗorewa ta Behanzin ga mulkin mallaka na Faransa ta zama muhimmiyar alama ta kishin ƙasa na Afirka da kuma gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai. Jarumtakarsa da sadaukarwarsa sun kasance abin koyi ga 'yan Afirka har zuwa yau, suna tunatar da su ruhun 'yanci da kare ikon mallaka, kuma wannan yana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar adawa da mulkin mallaka na sauran shugabannin Afirka kamar Menelik II na Habasha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaban ƙasa wanda aka haife shi a matsayin ɗan manomi, ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai na Masar, ya haifar da juyin juya halin 1919, kuma ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Masar wanda ya sami 'yancin kai na sunan kawai.
key_achievements: Kafa Wafd, neman 'yancin kai a Taron Zaman Lafiya na Paris
Korar shi ta haifar da juyin juya halin Masar na 1919
Samun 'yancin kai na sunan kawai ga Masar a 1922 da kuma zama Firayim Minista na farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya ƙarfafa ruhun 'yancin kai na al'ummar Masar kuma ya kafa babban mataki na farko a gwagwarmayar neman cikakken 'yanci.

saad-zaghloul.epic:
Ko da yake an haife ni a matsayin ɗan manomi a wani ƙaramin ƙauye a yankin Kogin Nilu, a cikin zuciyata akwai soyayya mai zafi ga Masar. Bayan na yi karatu a Jami'ar Al-Azhar inda na koyi shari'ar Musulunci, sannan kuma na yi karatun shari'a a Faransa, na fahimci ƙarfin ilimi, kuma na yanke shawarar amfani da wannan ilimin don amfanin al'ummata. A lokacin da nake aiki a matsayin alƙali da minista, na shaida matsalolin tsarin al'ummar Masar da kuma rashin adalcin mulkin Birtaniya, kuma na fahimci buƙatar canji na asali fiye da gyare-gyare na hankali.

Bayan ƙarshen Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, na yi imani cewa lokaci ya yi da za a nemi cikakken 'yancin kai ga Masar. Tare da abokan aikina, na kafa 'Wafd' (wakilai) don isar da muryar al'ummar Masar ga Taron Zaman Lafiya na Paris. Amma Birtaniya ta yi watsi da buƙatunsu na halal kuma ta kori ni da abokan aikina zuwa tsibirin Malta. Sun yi ƙoƙarin kashe muryarsu, amma girman kai nasu ya kunna wutar 'yancin kai mai girma a duk faɗin Masar.

Labarin korar ni ya zama dalilin juyin juya halin 1919. Masarawa daga kowane fanni na rayuwa, ciki har da ɗalibai, ma'aikata, mata, da manoma, sun fito kan tituna don nuna adawa da mulkin Birtaniya. Birtaniya, da ta firgita da zanga-zangar da yajin aikin da suka mamaye Masar, a ƙarshe ta tilasta mata ta sake ni kuma ta zo teburin tattaunawa. Tattaunawar ba ta taɓa zama mai sauƙi ba. Sun yi ƙoƙarin haifar da rarrabuwar kawuna a tsakaninmu da kuma kauce wa ainihin 'yancin kai, amma na yi imani da haɗin kan al'ummar Masar kuma na nace kan cikakken 'yancin kai ba tare da wata sassauci ba.

Bayan gwagwarmaya mai ɗorewa, a shekarar 1922, Birtaniya ta tilasta mata ta ayyana 'yancin kai na Masar. Ko da yake 'yancin kai ne na 'sunan kawai' tare da iyakoki da yawa kamar haƙƙin kiyaye sojoji, wannan ya kasance babban mataki na farko da al'ummarsu suka cimma da ƙarfin kansu. Na zama Firayim Minista na farko da aka zaɓa a Masar kuma na yi ƙoƙari na kafa harsashin sabuwar ƙasa. Ko da yake rayuwata ta ƙare kafin in ga cikakken 'yancin kai na ƙasata, ba ni da wani shakku cewa gwagwarmayata ta dasa ruhun 'yancin kai wanda zai rayu har abada a cikin zukatan Masarawa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Almami na Yammacin Afirka wanda ya rantse zai ceto mahaifiyarsa, ya gina Daular Wassoulou, kuma ya yi tsayin daka na shekaru 20 ga mulkin mallaka na Faransa.
key_achievements: Gina Daular Wassoulou da ayyana kansa Almami (1878)
Kafa rundunar sojoji ta dindindin sanye da bindigogi da kuma gudanar da nasu wuraren kera makamai
Juriya ta yaƙin ɓoye na shekaru 20 ga Faransa da kuma yin ƙaura ta hanyar ƙona ƙasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar ikon mallakar Afirka da juriya ga mulkin mallaka, kuma zuriyarsa ta zama shugaban farko na Guinea mai cin gashin kanta.

samori-toure.epic:
An haife shi a kusan shekara ta 1830 a yankin Guinea na yau, cikin gidan 'yan kasuwa na Dyula. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance cikin kwanciyar hankali, cike da kasuwanci da ilimin Musulunci, amma komai ya canza lokacin da masu farautar bayi na Masarautar Sise suka kama mahaifiyarsa. Wannan lamari ya hura masa wuta, kuma ya rantse zai zama soja don ceto mahaifiyarsa. Ya yi aiki a ƙarƙashin sarakuna daban-daban, inda ya goge fasaharsa ta yaƙi, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya mallaki kwarjini da basirar dabaru don jagorantar rundunarsa. Abubuwan da ya fuskanta a farko sun koya masa raunin da ke tattare da rarrabuwar kai da kuma buƙatar jagoranci guda ɗaya.

Bayan shekaru na hidima da cin nasara, a shekara ta 1878, Samori Toure ya ayyana kansa 'Almami' na Daular Wassoulou, wato shugaban ruhaniya da siyasa. An gina daularsa ne bisa ƙarfin soja. Ya kafa rundunar sojoji ta dindindin, sanye da bindigogi kuma an horar da su sosai. Har ma suna da nasu wuraren gyaran bindigogi da kera harsasai. Wannan abu ne da ba a taɓa gani ba a Yammacin Afirka. Kodayake mulkinsa ya dogara ne akan shari'ar Musulunci, amma kuma ya kasance mai mulki mai amfani wanda ke neman haɗa kan kabilu daban-daban a ƙarƙashin tuta ɗaya. Manufarsa ita ce gina ƙasa mai ƙarfi da kwanciyar hankali wacce za ta iya tunkarar barazanar waje, kamar Faransawa.

Duk da haka, ginin daularsa ya yi karo da burin mulkin mallaka na Faransa. Tun daga farkon shekarun 1880, ya yi yaƙi mai tsanani don tunkarar ci gaban su. Ya guje wa faɗa kai tsaye, yana amfani da dabarun yaƙin ɓoye da motsi don damun su. Lokacin da sojojin Faransa suka matsa kusa da shi, ya yanke ɗaya daga cikin shawarwari mafi jaruntaka a tarihi. Wato, ya yi amfani da dabarun ƙona ƙasa, ya kuma mayar da dukan daularsa zuwa gabas. A cikin shekaru da yawa, sun yi tafiyar ɗaruruwan kilomita, suna ƙona birane da gonaki don kada abokan gaba su sami komai. Wannan ya buƙaci babban sadaukarwa daga mutanensa, amma shi ne farashin 'yancinsu.

Bayan kusan shekaru 20 na juriya, sa'arsa ta ƙare. Yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa da yunwa da suka biyo baya sun raunana sojojinsa. Sojojin Faransa suna da sabbin makamai da ƙarin sojoji, kuma matsin lambarsu bai taɓa tsayawa ba. A shekara ta 1898, an kama shi a wani hari na bazata. An kai shi gudun hijira zuwa Gabon a Afirka ta Tsakiya, inda ya rasu a shekara ta 1900 sakamakon ciwon huhu. Kodayake ya mutu a matsayin fursuna, ruhinsa ya rayu. A yau, ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar ikon mallakar Afirka da juriya ga mulkin mallaka, kuma jikansa, Ahmed Sékou Touré, ya zama shugaban farko na Guinea mai cin gashin kanta. Yaƙinsa bai tafi a banza ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Tarihin Samuel Ajayi Crowther, wanda aka 'yanta daga bauta, ya sami ilimi, ya sadaukar da kansa ga tsara harshen Yarbanci da fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki, kuma ya zama Bishop na Anglican na Afirka na farko.
key_achievements: Tsara nahawun Yarbanci da fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki
Naɗa shi Bishop na Anglican na Afirka na farko
Nuna hazaka a harshe da samun ilimi bayan 'yanci daga bauta
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar gadon jagoranci na asali da ilimin harshe, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga aikin mishan a Afirka.

samuel-ajayi-crowther.epic:
Sunana Ajayi, an haife ni a Osogun, ƙasar Yarbawa, wadda yanzu take Najeriya. Rayuwar ƙauyenmu mai zaman lafiya ta ruguje lokacin da masu farautar bayi na Fulani suka kama ni ina ɗan kimanin shekara 13. An sayar da ni sau da yawa, kuma a ƙarshe aka ɗora ni a jirgin bayi na Fotigal da ke kan hanyar zuwa Amurka. Tsoro da yanke ƙauna a kan wannan jirgin sun yi zurfi a cikin ƙwaƙwalwata.

Amma ikon Allah ya shiga tsakani. Rundunar sojojin ruwa ta Birtaniya masu yaƙi da bauta sun kama jirginmu. An kai mu Freetown, Saliyo, wadda take mulkin mallaka ga bayi da aka 'yanta. A can, na koyi Turanci a ƙarƙashin kulawar Church Missionary Society (CMS) kuma aka yi mini baftisma a 1825, inda na sami sunan Samuel Ajayi Crowther. Na nuna hazaka sosai a harsuna, kuma wannan ya zama kira na rayuwata.

An gane hazakata ta harshe, kuma na tafi Ingila don ƙarin ilimi. Na dawo don shiga cikin balaguron kogin Neja a 1841. Ya bayyana a fili cewa ainihin manufata ita ce in isar da saƙon Kiristanci ga mutanena a cikin yarensu na asali. Na fara aikin tarihi na tsara harshen Yarbanci, ƙirƙirar nahawu, da fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki. Wannan aikin zai ayyana gadona kuma ya ƙarfafa mutanena.

A 1864, an naɗa ni 'Bishop na Ƙasashen Afirka ta Yamma fiye da Yankunan Sarauniya' a Cathedral na Canterbury, inda na zama Bishop na Anglican na Afirka na farko. Duk da wannan girmamawa, shekarun baya na rayuwata sun cika da ƙalubale. Musamman ma matasa masu wa'azi na Turai sun nuna nuna bambancin launin fata, suna ƙoƙarin lalata ikona da kuma ƙungiyoyin mishan na Afirka da na kafa. Duk da haka, ban yi sanyin gwiwa ba, kuma na bar gadon jagoranci na asali da ilimin harshe wanda ya ci gaba da wanzuwa har bayan rasuwata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mohammed Abdullah Hassan malami ne kuma shugaban soja na Somaliya a ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci yunkurin Dervish don adawa da mulkin mallaka.
key_achievements: Kafa da jagorantar yunkurin Dervish na Somaliya
Adawa da mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya, Italiya, da Habasha
Girmamawa a matsayin uban kishin ƙasa na Somaliya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gwagwarmayarsa ta adawa da mulkin mallaka ta kafa tushen kishin ƙasa na Somaliya kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga yunkurin 'yancin kai na gaba.

sayyid-mohammed-abdullah-hassan.epic:
Mohammed Abdullah Hassan (kimanin 1856–1920) ya kasance wani malami, mawaki, shugaban soja, kuma mutum mai tasiri a fannin addini, al'adu, da siyasa a Somaliya a ƙarshen karni na 19 zuwa farkon karni na 20, wanda ake girmamawa a matsayin uban kishin ƙasa na Somaliya. Lokacin da aka haife shi ya kasance lokaci mai cike da ruɗani, lokacin da yankin Kahon Afirka ke fuskantar mamayar manyan ƙasashen Turai masu mulkin mallaka. A lokacin da Daular Birtaniya, Italiya, da Habasha ke nuna burinsu na mulkin mallaka a yankin Somaliya, suna raba ƙasa da faɗaɗa tasirinsu, an haife shi a yankin Somaliland kuma ya zurfafa cikin ilimin addinin Musulunci tun yana yaro. Ya haddace Alƙur'ani gaba ɗaya, inda ya samu laƙabin 'Hafiz', kuma kishirwarsa ta ilimi ta kai shi ga birane masu tsarki kamar Makka da Madina a Larabawa, har ma fiye da Somaliya. A can ne ya zurfafa cikin koyarwar darikar Sufi ta Salihiyya, yana ƙara zurfin iliminsa na addini da na bincike. Lokacin da ya dawo gida a kusan shekara ta 1895, ya yi matuƙar kaɗuwa da ganin ƙasarsa ta rabu a hannun ƙasashen waje, kuma tushen addinin Musulunci ma yana fuskantar barazana daga ayyukan mishaneri na Kirista. Da ya fahimci cewa ruhin al'ummarsa da asalin su na cikin haɗari, bai iya yin shiru ba.

Cike da fushi mai zurfi game da rikicin ƙasarsa da kuma jin wajibi na addini, Mohammed Abdullah Hassan ya fara haɗa kan kabilun Somaliya don shirya yunkurin adawa da mamayar ƙasashen waje. Yunkurin Dervish na Somaliya, wanda ya kafa kuma ya jagoranta, wani yunkuri ne na kishin ƙasa wanda ya yi jihadi don adawa da mamayar mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya, Italiya, da Habasha a yankin Somaliya. Ya yi amfani da gwanintarsa a fannin waka (gabay) don kunna wuta a zukatan mutane, yana tada musu kishin kansu da kuma kira ga adawa da masu mamaya na arna. Mabiyansa sun zama sanannu a matsayin 'Dervishes', jarumai ne masu jajircewa waɗanda suka yi rantsuwa za su sadaukar da rayukansu don imaninsu da ƙasarsu. Ba wai kawai sun yi yaƙi da masu zalunci na waje ba, har ma sun fuskanci maƙiya na ciki waɗanda suka ci amanar al'ummarsu ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa da masu mulkin mallaka. Yaƙin nasa ya wuce kare ƙasa kawai; yaƙi ne na imani don dawo da ruhin da asalin al'ummar Somaliya. A shekara ta 1917, ya sami karɓuwa a duniya lokacin da Daular Usmaniyya ta ba shi laƙabin "Amir na Jama'ar Somaliya".

Mohammed Abdullah Hassan da jaruman Dervish sun yi yaƙi mai tsanani a duk faɗin Kahon Afirka tsawon kimanin shekaru 20. Duk da cewa sun fi ƙarfin su a yawan sojoji da fasaha, sun zama wata ƙarfi mai ƙarfi na adawa, saboda jajircewarsu da kuma zurfin fahimtar su game da yanayin Somaliya. Ya gina jerin kagarorin dutse masu ƙarfi, ciki har da sansanin Tale a cikin kwarin Nugaal, a matsayin sansanonin ayyukansu, wanda ya ba su damar yin tsaro da kai hari yadda ya kamata. Yunkurin Dervish ya fuskanci dauloli uku a lokaci guda – Birtaniya, Italiya, da Habasha – kuma sun ci nasara a yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa, har ma sun yi nasarar kafa wata ƙasa mai cin gashin kanta ta Dervish a wani lokaci. Turawan Birtaniya sun kira shi "Mullah Mahaukaci" don su wulaƙanta shi, amma ga al'ummarsa, shi mai 'yanci ne kuma jarumi. Ya kammala aikin hajjinsa zuwa Makka cikin nasara, inda ya sami laƙabin 'Haji', kuma ya yi iƙirarin cewa shi zuriyar Annabi Muhammad ne (SAW). Saboda ya haddace Alƙur'ani gaba ɗaya a matsayin 'Hafiz', an kira shi da sunaye masu daraja daban-daban kamar 'Sheikh', 'Mullah', da 'Sayyid'. Wannan ikon addini ya zama tushe mai ƙarfafa jagorancinsa na soja da na siyasa.

Amma, tafarkin yaƙin ya juya baya ga yunkurin Dervish. A shekara ta 1920, Birtaniya ta gabatar da sabon makami na harin sama a Afirka, inda ta lalata kagarorin Dervish masu ƙarfi cikin 'yan makonni. A gaban hare-haren jiragen sama na Birtaniya marasa tausayi, sojojinsa sun watse, kuma Mohammed Abdullah Hassan ya tilasta masa ja da baya zuwa cikin ƙasa tare da 'yan mabiyansa masu aminci. A wannan shekarar, ya rasu ba ta hanyar harsashin abokan gaba ba, sai dai ta hanyar mura, amma ruhinsa da gwagwarmayarsa sun kasance a cikin zukatan al'ummar Somaliya. Bayan mutuwarsa, yunkurin Dervish ya kawo ƙarshe, amma irin kishin ƙasa da 'yancin kai da ya shuka sun zama muhimmin tushe na ruhaniya ga yunkurin 'yancin kai na Somaliya a nan gaba. Ana kiransa "Uban Kishin Ƙasa na Somaliya", kuma har yau ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar jaruntaka ta adawa ga mutanen Somaliya. Gwagwarmayarsa, tare da sauran yunkurin adawa da mulkin mallaka da suka faru a sassa daban-daban na Afirka a farkon karni na 20, ana ɗaukarta a matsayin muhimmin misali da ya nuna ƙarshen zamanin mulkin mallaka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai mulki mai karfi wanda ya fadada Masarautar Songhai zuwa babbar daula, ya ci Timbuktu da Djenné, kuma ya mallaki cinikin Trans-Sahara.
key_achievements: Fadada Masarautar Songhai zuwa babbar daula
Cin nasara kan Timbuktu da Djenné da kuma mallakar ciniki
Gina sojojin kasa da ruwa da kuma jirgin ruwa mai jirage 400
fact_box.legacy_statement: Cin nasararsa da hadin kansa sun zama tushen zamanin zinariya na Daular Songhai, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Yammacin Afirka.

sonni-ali.epic:
Ya hau gadon sarauta a Gao, wata karamar masarautar Songhai, a shekara ta 1464, a lokacin da take karkashin tasirin daular Mali mai rauni. Sarakunan da suka gabace shi na daular Sonni sun yi mafarkin samun 'yancin kai da fadada, amma shi ne mai nufin da hangen nesa don mayar da shi gaskiya. Ya shaida raunin masu mulkinsu da kuma hargitsin da 'yan fashin Tuareg na arewa suka haifar, kuma ya fara shirya sabon nau'in sojoji da za su iya yaki a kasa da kuma a ruwa. Burinsa bai takaita ga 'yantar da Gao ba, amma ya wuce haka, don gina wata babbar daula da za ta zarce duk daulolin da suka gabata, tana mai da hankali kan babban kogin Neja, wanda shine jigon rayuwar yankinsu.

Dabarunsa sun kasance marasa tausayi, kuma ga wasu, sun bayyana a matsayin zalunci. Ya gina wani babban jirgin ruwa mai karfi sama da 400 don mamaye kogin Neja, yana mai ba shi damar motsa sojoji da sauri ba tare da an taba gani ba. A shekara ta 1468, ya kai hari birnin Timbuktu mai arziki kuma ya kwace shi daga hannun Tuareg. Malaman Musulunci na birnin, wadanda suka yi tsammanin mai 'yanci, sun fuskanci mai cin nasara wanda bai nuna hakuri ga siyasar su ba. Bayan shekaru biyar, bayan shekaru bakwai na kewaye mai tsanani, Djenné, wani muhimmin cibiya, shi ma ya fada hannunsa. Ta hanyar mamaye wadannan birane biyu, ya mallaki zuciyar cinikin Trans-Sahara da kuma yankin Neja mai albarka.

Don mulkin irin wannan fadi da bambancin yanki, an buƙaci daidaito mai kyau. Ko da yake shi Musulmi ne, tushen ikonsa ya kasance mutanen Songhai na karkara, wadanda suka rike al'adun kakanni da ruhohi da karfi. Bai tilasta musu tsattsauran ra'ayin addini ba, kuma shi da kansa ya shiga cikin al'adun gargajiya, yana mai ganin cewa suna da mahimmanci ga lafiyar ruhaniya ta masarautar. Duk da haka, wannan hadin gwiwar addini ya jawo masa kiyayya ta har abada daga malaman birnin Timbuktu. Sun gan shi a matsayin azzalumi marar tsoron Allah, maye, da kuma kafiri, kuma tarihin su ya kwatanta shi a matsayin dodo wanda ya ki mika wuya ga fassarar su ta addini.

Mulkinsa na tsawon shekaru 28 ya kasance lokacin balaguro marasa yankewa, yana tabbatar da kuma fadada iyakokin sabuwar daular. A shekara ta 1492, yayin da yake dawowa daga balaguro kan Fulani, ya rasa ransa a kogin Koni. Ko da yake ya mutu ta hanyar nutsewa, daular da ya gina ba ta mutu tare da shi ba. Daya daga cikin janar-janar dinsa, Askia Muhammad, ya yi amfani da irin wannan tashin hankali na addini da ya fuskanta don tabbatar da juyin mulki da kuma karbe daular. Ko da yake ya kafa sabuwar daula kuma ya bude zamanin zinariya, hakan ya yiwu ne kawai a kan tushen cin nasara da hadin kai da ni, Son Ali, na kafa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Solomon Tshekisho Plaatje ya kasance masanin ilimi kuma ɗan siyasa a Afirka ta Kudu a farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci kafa Ƙungiyar Ƙasa ta Afirka ta Kudu (SANNC).
key_achievements: Ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa kuma Sakatare Janar na farko na Ƙungiyar Ƙasa ta Afirka ta Kudu (SANNC).
Ya ba da gudummawa ga al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu a matsayinsa na ɗan jarida, masanin harshe, kuma marubuci.
Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a cikin ƙungiyar da ta gabaci African National Congress (ANC).
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sunansa yana nan a gundumar Sol Plaatje da Jami'ar Sol Plaatje, yana girmama gudummawarsa ga tarihi da ilimi a Afirka ta Kudu.

sol-plaatje.epic:
Solomon Tshekisho Plaatje (an haife shi a shekara ta 1876) ya kasance masanin ilimi, ɗan jarida, masanin harshe, ɗan siyasa, mai fassara, kuma marubuci a Afirka ta Kudu. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, Afirka ta Kudu ta kasance cikin wani lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali, inda inuwar mulkin mallaka ta yi zurfi, kuma rikice-rikice da nuna bambanci tsakanin kabilu suka ƙaru. A cikin wannan yanayi, Sol Plaatje an haife shi a Afirka ta Kudu, kuma tun da wuri ya nuna hazaka mai ban mamaki da basirar harshe, yana kafa harsashin ayyukansa a fannoni daban-daban. Bai iyakance kansa ga sana'a ɗaya ba, amma ya nuna iyawarsa a fannoni daban-daban. A matsayinsa na masanin harshe, tabbas ya ƙware a harsuna da yawa, wanda ke nuna cewa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen taimakawa sadarwa tsakanin al'adu da al'ummomi daban-daban. Wannan basirarsa ta zama wata kadara mai mahimmanci wajen fahimta da warware matsalolin da suka shafi al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu a lokacin. A matsayinsa na masanin ilimi, ya zurfafa bincike kan matsalolin zamantakewa da siyasa na zamaninsa, kuma ya zama majagaba wajen neman canji ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa da ayyukansa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta zama harsashin babban tasirin da zai yi a kan al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu daga baya.

A farkon ƙarni na 20, Afirka ta Kudu ta kasance lokacin da manufofin raba launin fata ke ƙara zama tsarin mulki, kuma an hana 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe haƙƙokinsu a tsari. A cikin wannan yanayi mai duhu, Solomon Tshekisho Plaatje ya ɗauki muhimmin mataki don kare haƙƙoƙin 'yan asalin Afirka ta Kudu da kuma wakiltar muryoyinsu na siyasa. A shekara ta 1912, ya shiga cikin waɗanda suka kafa Ƙungiyar Ƙasa ta Afirka ta Kudu (SANNC), wata ƙungiya da aka kafa don kare haƙƙoƙin siyasa da adalci na zamantakewa na 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe, wadda daga baya ta zama African National Congress (ANC). Sol Plaatje ya ɗauki babban nauyin zama Sakatare Janar na farko na SANNC, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɗa kan kabilu masu rarrabuwa da jagorantar su zuwa ga manufa ɗaya. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinsa, SANNC ta farkar da wayewar siyasa ta 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe, kuma ta kafa harsashin gwagwarmaya mai tsari don haƙƙokinsu. Wannan ya wuce kafa wata ƙungiya kawai; ya zama farkon ɗaya daga cikin muhimman gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai a tarihin Afirka ta Kudu, kuma Sol Plaatje ya kasance a tsakiyar wannan sauyi na tarihi. Ayyukansa na siyasa sun nuna ƙarfin niyyarsa na neman canji mai zurfi a cikin al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu, fiye da shiga kawai.

A matsayinsa na Sakatare Janar na farko na SANNC, Solomon Tshekisho Plaatje ya gudanar da gwagwarmaya ta fuskoki daban-daban don kare haƙƙoƙin 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe. A matsayinsa na ɗan jarida, ya yi amfani da rubuce-rubucensa don fallasa rashin adalci a cikin al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu a lokacin, kuma ya mai da hankali kan sanar da duniya wahalhalu da burin 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe. Labaransa da sharhinsa sun zama muryar waɗanda ake zalunta, kuma sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen canza ra'ayin jama'a da samar da matsin lamba na siyasa. Bugu da ƙari, a matsayinsa na masanin harshe kuma mai fassara, ya ba da gudummawa wajen rushe shingayen al'adu da yada ilimi. Ko da yake ba a bayyana takamaiman ayyukan fassara ba, ana kyautata zaton basirarsa ta harshe ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen inganta fahimtar juna tsakanin al'ummomi daban-daban da kuma adana al'adun Afirka ta Kudu masu yawa. A matsayinsa na marubuci, ya rubuta rayuwa da tarihin 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe, yana barin gadon adabi wanda ya kafa asalin su kuma ya zaburar da tsararraki masu zuwa. Waɗannan ayyukansa daban-daban sun wuce rawar sana'a kawai; sun kasance ƙoƙarinsa na sadaukarwa don yaƙar wariyar launin fata a cikin al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu, da kuma hanyarsa ta gwagwarmaya don kawo canjin zamantakewa ta hanyar ilimi da al'adu.

Gadon Solomon Tshekisho Plaatje ya zurfafa cikin tarihi da asalin Afirka ta Kudu. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa da ci gaban farko na Ƙungiyar Ƙasa ta Afirka ta Kudu (SANNC), wadda daga baya ta zama African National Congress (ANC) wadda ta jagoranci dimokuraɗiyya a Afirka ta Kudu. Ƙoƙarinsa na majagaba ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen farkar da wayewar siyasa ta 'yan Afirka baƙaƙe da kuma kafa harsashin tsarin juriya. Halayensa na masanin ilimi mai basira sun zama misali mai ƙarfi na neman canjin zamantakewa ta hanyar jarida, harshe, da adabi. Don girmama gudummawarsa, Afirka ta Kudu ta sanya sunan gundumar Sol Plaatje, wadda ta haɗa da birnin Kimberley, kuma a shekara ta 2014, an buɗe Jami'ar Sol Plaatje don tunawa da sunansa har abada. Rayuwarsa da nasarorinsa ana tunawa da su tare da sawun sauran majagaba waɗanda suka sadaukar da kansu don dimokuraɗiyya da haɓaka haƙƙin ɗan adam a Afirka ta Kudu, kuma gadon ruhinsu yana ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a cikin al'ummar Afirka ta Kudu har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mutum mai ban tausayi wanda ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Sarkin Habasha amma ya fuskanci yakin basasa saboda yunkurinsa na sanya Katolika a matsayin addinin kasa kuma ya sauka daga mulki.
key_achievements: Hauhawar sarauta bayan fadace-fadace masu zafi da yunkurin hada kan kasa
Neman kawance da Portugal da yunkurin gabatar da al'adun Yamma
Maido da addinin gargajiya da sauka daga mulki don kawo karshen yakin basasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gado mai ban tausayi na wanda ya gane cewa ba za a iya tilasta nufin mai mulki ga zukatan mutane ba.

susenyos-i.epic:
Hanyarsa ta zuwa sarauta an gina ta ne da wuta da asara. An haife shi a matsayin zuriyar daular Solomon, amma 'yan fashin Oromo sun kashe mahaifinsa kuma suka kama shi, inda suka sace masa yarintarsa. Duk da ya yi nasarar tserewa, rayuwarsa ta kasance gwagwarmaya ce ta ci gaba don rayuwa da kuma tabbatar da halaccinsa. Ya yi shekaru da yawa a matsayin janar, yana tattara mabiyansa, yana yakar abokan gaba na waje da na ciki, kuma ya tabbatar da karfinsa a fagen fama. A shekara ta 1607, bayan jerin fadace-fadace masu zafi, a karshe ya kayar da 'yan uwansa kuma ya sanya kambin sarki a matsayin Malak Sagad III, yana mai alkawarin kawo tsari da karfi ga kasar Habasha da ta rabu.

Daularsa tana fuskantar barazana daga kowane bangare. Don magance hijirar Oromo da tasirin Daular Ottoman, ya juya zuwa yamma don neman kawance. Ya sake farfado da hulda da Portugal, yana fatan samun bindigogi na zamani da goyon bayan soja. Tare da sojojinsu, firistoci, wato mishaneri na Jesuit, sun shigo. Ya kasance mai matukar sha'awar basira da halayen Uba Pedro Páez, wanda ya koyi harshensu da al'adunsu. Ta hanyar dogon tattaunawa da koyarwarsa mai juriya, ya tabbata cewa Katolika ita ce addini guda daya tilo kuma na gaskiya, kuma ta hanyarsa zai iya hada masarautarsa da manyan kasashen Kirista na Turai, a ruhaniya da kuma siyasa.

A shekara ta 1622, ya bayyana imaninsa kuma ya ayyana Roman Katolika a matsayin addinin kasa. Ya yi imani cewa wannan shawarar ce don jin dadin mutanensa, kuma mataki ne zuwa ga zamani da gaskiya mai tsarki. Amma ya yi watsi da zurfin tushen Cocin Orthodox na Habasha, wanda ya ayyana asalin su tsawon karnoni. Sabuwar shugaban Latin, Afonso Mendes, ya kasance mai taurin kai kuma ba ya son sasantawa, kuma ya tilasta canje-canje da mutanensa suka dauka a matsayin hari ga rayukansu. Tawaye da manyan mutane, firistoci, da talakawa suka jagoranta sun barke a duk fadin kasar. Dan uwa ya juya wa dan uwa baya, kuma filayen da ya yi kokarin karewa sun jike da jinin Habashawa.

Tsawon shekaru goma, ya yi yaki don tilasta dokokinsa, amma farashin ya kasance mai ban tsoro. Bayan wani yaki mai zubar da jini musamman inda aka kashe dubban manoma, dansa Fasilides ya fuskantar da shi ga duk wannan ta'addancin. Ya gane cewa hanyarsa ta neman addini guda daya ta kawo rarrabuwa da mutuwa kawai. A shekara ta 1632, gajiye kuma mai karyayyen zuciya, ya ba da sanarwar maido da addinin gargajiya. Nan da nan bayan haka, ya zabi zaman lafiyar masarautarsa fiye da ikon kambi, kuma ya mika mulki ga Fasilides. Ba da jimawa ba ya rasu, ya bar baya a matsayin wani mutum mai ban tausayi wanda ya gane da latti cewa ba za a iya tilasta nufin mai mulki ga zuciyar al'umma ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Amanirenas ta kasance sarauniya ta tsohuwar Masarautar Kush a kusan ƙarni na 1 K.Z., wadda ta yi yaƙi da Daular Roma don kare 'yancin kai da ikon mallakar masarautarta.
key_achievements: Fara yaƙi don mayar da martani ga buƙatun haraji na Daular Roma
Nuna ƙudurin juriya ta hanyar lalata mutum-mutumin Sarkin Roma
Samun 'yancin kai da ikon mallaka ta hanyar tattaunawar zaman lafiya da Roma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin sarauniya mai jaruntaka da hikima wadda ta kare 'yanci daga Daular Roma, kuma ta zama alamar shugabar mata mai ƙarfi.

amanirenas.epic:
Amanirenas ta kasance Kandake, wato Sarauniya, ta tsohuwar Masarautar Kush, wadda ta yi mulki a kusan ƙarni na 1 K.Z. Lokacin mulkinta ya kasance lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali, inda faɗaɗaular Daular Roma ta yi inuwa a kan dukkan yankin Kogin Nilu. A shekara ta 30 K.Z., Augustus, Sarkin Roma na farko, ya ci Masar, inda ya zama barazana kai tsaye ga iyakar arewacin Masarautar Kush. Masarautar Kush ta kasance tsohuwar wayewa da ke saman Kogin Nilu, mai zurfin alaƙa da tsohuwar wayewar Masar, amma kuma tana riƙe da al'adunta na musamman da kuma ƙarfin soji. Amanirenas ta gaji sarauta bayan mutuwar mijinta, Sarki Teriteqas, inda ta ɗauki nauyin makomar Kush a fuskantar matsin lamba daga Roma. Bayan cin Masar, Roma ta buƙaci haraji mai yawa daga Kush, tana ƙoƙarin keta ikon mallakar su, wanda aka ɗauka a matsayin taka haƙƙin mutanen Kush. Amanirenas ba ta miƙa wuya ga wannan girman kai na Roma ba, ta kuma ƙuduri aniyar kare 'yancinta. Ta aika da saƙo mai ƙarfi cewa ba za ta yi jinkirin amfani da ƙarfin soji don kare zaman lafiya da wadata na masarautarta ba.

Don mayar da martani ga buƙatun haraji na Roma, Amanirenas, tare da ɗanta Akinidad, ta zaɓi dabarar jagorantar sojoji zuwa arewa. A kusan shekara ta 25 K.Z., sojojin Kush sun kai hari kan manyan sansanonin Roma da ke kudancin Masar. Sun yi nasarar mamaye Syene (Aswan), Philae, da Elephantine, inda suka yi wa sojojin Roma babban rauni. Wannan nasara ba kawai nasarar soji ba ce, har ma ta zama alamar ƙarfin juriya ta Kush ga zaluncin Roma. Musamman ma, Amanirenas ta lalata mutum-mutumin Sarkin Roma Augustus da yawa, kuma ta ɗauki kan tagulla na ɗaya daga cikinsu, ta binne shi a ƙarƙashin matakan hawa na haikalin nasara a Meroe, babban birnin Masarautar Kush. Wannan an yi shi ne don kowane mutumin Kush ya taka fuskar Sarkin Roma a duk lokacin da ya shiga haikalin, don nuna cikakken raini ga ikon Roma da kuma ruhin Kush marar karyawa. Wannan aiki mai jaruntaka ya kasance ƙalubale kai tsaye ga Daular Roma, kuma an rubuta shi a tarihi a matsayin sanarwa mai ƙarfi na 'yancin Kush.

Martanin Roma ga harin Amanirenas mai jaruntaka ya kasance mai sauri da zalunci, wanda Gaius Petronius ya jagoranta. Sojojin Roma sun shiga cikin yankin Kush sosai, inda suka yi ramuwar gayya marar tausayi, har da lalata Napata, tsohon babban birnin Kush kuma cibiyar addini. A cikin yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi da suka biyo baya, Amanirenas ta sami mummunan rauni, inda ta rasa ido ɗaya. Duk da ciwon jiki da kuma halakar manyan birane, ƙudurinta bai girgiza ba. Maimakon haka, ta ƙara ƙarfi ta hanyar waɗannan matsaloli, ta sake shirya sojojinta da jikinta mai rauni don hana sojojin Roma ci gaba zuwa kudu. Rauninta bai zama alamar rauni ba, sai dai shaida ce ta sadaukarwarta da kuma ruhin yaƙi marar karyawa don kare mutanenta da masarautarta. Yaƙin shekaru da yawa ya jawo asara mai yawa ga sojojin Roma, waɗanda a ƙarshe suka gane cewa cikakken cin nasara kan Kush ba zai yiwu ba.

Bayan shekaru na yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi, Roma da Kush sun gane buƙatar tattaunawar zaman lafiya. A shekara ta 22 K.Z., Amanirenas ta aika da wakilai zuwa tsibirin Samos a Tekun Aegean don tattaunawar zaman lafiya kai tsaye da Sarkin Roma Augustus. Ta yi tattaunawar ba a matsayin shugabar sojojin da aka ci ba, sai dai a matsayin sarki na ƙasa mai cin gashin kanta. Sakamakon wannan tattaunawa ya kasance babban nasarar diflomasiyya ga Masarautar Kush. Roma ta janye buƙatunta na haraji, ta janye sojojinta daga yankunan da ta mamaye, kuma ta amince da iyakokin Kush da ikon mallakarta a hukumance. Amanirenas ba kawai ta yi yaƙi da Daular Roma mai ƙarfi ba har ta ci nasara, har ma ta yi amfani da basirar diflomasiyya don tabbatar da zaman lafiya da 'yancin masarautarta. Za a tuna da sunanta a tarihi a matsayin sarauniya mai jaruntaka da hikima wadda ta rasa ido ɗaya amma ba ta taɓa rasa hangen nesanta ba, ta sadaukar da kanta ga mutanenta. Labarinta, tare da sauran shugabannin mata masu ƙarfi waɗanda suka kare 'yanci daga mulkin mallaka a tsohuwar duniya, yana ci gaba da zaburar da mutane da yawa a yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An haifi Ahmadu Bamba a Senegal a shekara ta 1853, malamin Musulunci wanda ya kafa Ƙungiyar Muridiyya. An kai shi gudun hijira daga hukumomin mulkin mallaka, amma ya bunƙasa al'ummarsa ta hanyar juriya ta rashin tashin hankali da aiki tuƙuru.
key_achievements: Kafa Ƙungiyar Muridiyya a Touba a shekara ta 1883
Kafa wani nau'i na Sufanci na musamman wanda ke jaddada imani da aiki tuƙuru
Bunƙasa al'umma ta hanyar juriya ta rashin tashin hankali ga hukumomin mulkin mallaka
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar gado a cikin birnin Touba da kuma miliyoyin mabiyansa waɗanda suka shawo kan matsaloli ta hanyar ƙarfin imani, zaman lafiya, da aiki.

ahmadu-bamba.epic:
An haife ni a shekara ta 1853 a kauyen Mbacké na Senegal, a cikin gidan malamai. Tun ina yaro, na zurfafa cikin ilimin Musulunci da koyarwar Sufanci mai ban mamaki. Bayan rasuwar mahaifina, na yanke shawarar sadaukar da rayuwata ga koyarwa da tunani. A shekara ta 1883, na kafa Ƙungiyar Muridiyya a Touba. Wannan al'umma ta dogara ne kan soyayyar Allah, sadaukarwa ga Annabi, da kuma imani cewa ceto yana samuwa ne kawai ta hanyar imani da aiki tuƙuru.

Yayin da koyarwata ta bazu ko'ina cikin Senegal, tasirina ya jawo hankalin hukumomin mulkin mallaka na Faransa. Sun yi kuskuren fahimtar al'ummata mai zaman lafiya a matsayin wata cibiyar tawaye mai yiwuwa kuma sun ji tsoro. Sun ɗauki ikona na ruhaniya a matsayin barazana ta siyasa kuma sun yi ƙoƙarin rufe bakina. A shekara ta 1895, an kama ni kuma aka kai ni gudun hijira zuwa Gabon a Afirka ta Tsakiya ba tare da shari'a ba. A cikin dazuzzukan can, na shafe fiye da shekaru bakwai cikin kaɗaici da addu'a.

Gudun hijira a Gabon ya kasance gwaji mai tsanani ga imanina. Na fuskanci kaɗaici, cututtuka, da barazanar waɗanda ke son cutar da ni. Amma duk da waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, imanina ga Allah bai girgiza ba. Na sami ta'aziyya a rubuta waƙoƙi, kuma na mai da wahalata zuwa wani abu mai tsarki. Lokacin da na dawo Senegal a shekara ta 1902, mabiyana sun tarbe ni a matsayin shahidi kuma waliyi mai rai. Amma gwajina bai ƙare ba, kuma nan da nan aka sake kai ni gudun hijira zuwa Mauritania.

Bayan shekaru na gudun hijira da zaman gida, a ƙarshe na sami damar komawa ga mutanena. Juriya ta rashin tashin hankali da kuma jaddada ƙa'idodin aiki sun canza al'ummar Muridiyya zuwa wata ƙungiya mai ƙarfi ta zamantakewa da tattalin arziki. Sun gina makarantu, sun noma ƙasa, kuma sun ƙirƙiri al'umma mai dogaro da kai. Gadona yana ci gaba da rayuwa a cikin birnin Touba da na kafa, da kuma rayuwar miliyoyin mabiyana waɗanda suka shawo kan matsaloli ta hanyar imani, zaman lafiya, da ƙarfin aiki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An canza masa suna daga Amenhotep IV zuwa Akhenaten, ya ayyana allahn rana Aten a matsayin Allah guda daya, ya jagoranci sake fasalin addinin Masar, amma an share shi bayan mutuwarsa.
key_achievements: Ya ayyana allahn rana Aten a matsayin Allah guda daya
Ya sake fasalin tsarin addini da siyasa na Masar
Ya gina sabon babban birni, Akhetaten
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sake fasalin addini mai tsattsauran ra'ayi ya gaza, amma ana daukarsa a matsayin majagaba na ra'ayin Allah guda daya.

akhenaten.epic:
An haife shi Amenhotep IV, ya hau gadon sarautar Masar a zamanin wadata da iko mai yawa, gadon mahaifinsa Amenhotep III. Thebes ita ce zuciyar daularsu, amma bugun zuciyar yana karkashin ikon firistocin Amun-Ra masu karfi da arziki. Tun yana yaro, ya ji wata kira ta daban. Ba daga gumaka marasa adadi a cikin haikali masu duhu ba ne, amma daga wata murya mai rada daga haske guda daya mai ba da rai wanda ya haskaka kasarsu da daukakarsa. Hanyarsa ba wai kawai ci gaba ne na abin da ya gabata ba ne, amma sake fasalin tushen allahntaka da kanta.

A shekara ta biyar ta mulkinsa, ya jefar da inuwar tsoffin al'adu. Ba Amenhotep ba ne kuma, ma'ana 'Amun yana farin ciki', amma Akhenaten, ma'ana 'Mai tasiri ga Aten'. Ya ayyana Aten, diski na rana mai jiki, a matsayin Allah guda daya na gaskiya, Mahaliccin duniya na dukkan rayuwa, ba kawai a Masar ba har ma a dukkan kasashe. Ya rufe haikalai na Amun-Ra da tsoffin gumaka, kuma ya yi amfani da dimbin kudadensu don hidimar sabon imaninsa. Wannan ba kawai canjin addini ba ne. Juyin juya hali ne wanda ya yi niyya ga zuciyar tsarin siyasa da tattalin arzikin Masar, yana kalubalantar ikon firistocin da suka rike mulki tsawon karnoni.

Don kafa gida mai dacewa ga wannan sabon zamani, ya bar Thebes kuma ya gina sabon babban birni a kan yashi na hamada. Wannan shi ne Akhetaten, 'Horizon na Aten', birnin da aka kebe ga allahn rana, wanda kuka sani da Amarna. A nan, tare da masoyiyarsa Sarauniya Nefertiti, sun rayu a matsayin masu shiga tsakani guda daya tsakanin Aten da bil'adama. An tsara birninsu da haikalai na waje don maraba da haskoki na rana, kuma fasaharsu ta kauce daga tsauraran tsarin da suka gabata, tana nuna iyalinsu da yanayi da kusanci da ba a taba gani ba. Duk wannan sadaukarwa ce ga Allah mai rai wanda ya albarkace su da haske.

Hangensa ya kasance cikakke, amma lokacinsa yana da iyaka. Mayar da hankalinsa kan al'amuran ruhaniya ya haifar da sakaci ga iyakokin daular, kuma canje-canjensa masu tsattsauran ra'ayi sun haifar da fushi a tsakanin firistocin da aka kora da kuma talakawa masu riko da addinin kakanninsu. Bayan mutuwarsa, tsohon tsarin ya dawo da ramuwar gayya. Dansa Tutankhamun ya tilasta masa maido da tsoffin gumaka, an watsar da birninsa, kuma an goge sunansa daga abubuwan tarihi a cikin yunƙurin share shi daga tarihi a matsayin 'sarkin kafiri'. Amma gaskiyar Aten, haske guda daya, ba za a iya kashe shi har abada ba. Ya jira kawai a sake gano shi a cikin yashi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ahmad Baba al-Massufi malamin Musulunci ne a Yammacin Afirka a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16, wanda ya kare gadon ilimi na Daular Songhai.
key_achievements: Babban malamin Musulunci na Daular Songhai
Turjiya ta ilimi a kan mamayar Morocco
Ya rubuta littattafai sama da 40, ya gina babban tarin littattafai
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gado ne da ke nuna darajar ilimi da kuma jarumtar masanin ilimi a kan zalunci.

ahmad-baba-al-massufi.epic:
Ahmad Baba al-Massufi (kimanin 1556-1627) ya kasance babban malamin Musulunci, masanin shari'a, kuma masanin tarihi wanda ya rayu a zamanin zinariya na Daular Songhai a Yammacin Afirka a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 17. An haife shi a Timbuktu, birnin ilimi, musamman a ƙarƙashin inuwar Madrasar Sankore, wadda ta kasance ɗaya daga cikin manyan cibiyoyin ilimi a duniyar Musulunci. Iyalinsa, Akīt, sun fito ne daga kabilar Sanhağa Berber, kuma an girmama su saboda girmama ilimi tsawon tsararraki, kuma Ahmad Baba ya bi wannan al'ada da aminci. Ya yi zurfin bincike a fannoni daban-daban kamar shari'a, nahawu, tauhidi, da ilimin taurari a ƙarƙashin manyan masana na Daular Songhai, kuma ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana na zamaninsa. Timbuktu ta kasance fitilar ilimi, tana da manyan dakunan karatu cike da littattafan rubuce-rubuce masu daraja daga ko'ina cikin duniyar Musulunci. A cikin wannan yanayi na ilimi, ya rubuta littattafai sama da 40 kuma ya gina tarin littattafai na kansa sama da 1,600, yana mai zama cibiyar rayuwar ilimi mai cike da kuzari wadda ta bunƙasa tare da Kogin Neja. Gudunmawarsa ta ilimi ta nuna ainihin ilimin Musulunci a Yammacin Afirka.

Amma wannan zamanin zinariya ya ruguje a shekara ta 1591, lokacin da sojojin Sarkin Morocco suka mamaye daga arewa. Sojojin Morocco, waɗanda ke ɗauke da sabbin makamai kamar bindigogi da manyan bindigogi waɗanda jaruman Yammacin Afirka ba su taɓa gani ba a lokacin, sun fatattaki sojojin Daular Songhai masu ƙarfi a Yaƙin Tondibi, kuma babban birnin Gao da cibiyar ilimi Timbuktu sun kasance ba tare da kariya ba. Masu mamayewa ba kawai sun wawure dukiyar birnin ba, har ma, mafi muni, sun mai da hankali kan lalata gadon ilimi na Timbuktu da kuma zaluntar malamai. Ahmad Baba, a matsayinsa na babban malami kuma mai tasiri a Timbuktu, ya ƙi ba da halacci ga mulkin baƙi wanda ya kawo babban lalacewa ga mutanensa, ko kuma ya rantse da biyayya. Wannan turjiyarsa ba da daɗewa ba ta jawo masa sakamako. A shekara ta 1593, an kama shi bisa zargin tayar da zaune tsaye, kuma masu mamayewa sun kwace masa tarin littattafai na kansa guda 1,600, wanda shine mafi darajar dukiyarsa. Waɗannan littattafai ba kawai tarin takardu ba ne, amma wani ɓangare ne na ransa kuma hanyar haɗin ilimi tsawon tsararraki.

An kama Ahmad Baba kuma an ɗaure shi da sarƙoƙi, an tilasta masa tafiya ta cikin hamadar Sahara zuwa Marrakesh a Morocco, inda ya shafe shekaru 12 a gudun hijira. Ko da yake fursuna ne, kasancewarsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga malamai a Morocco, saboda tuni sunansa na ilimi ya bazu ko'ina cikin duniyar Musulunci. Daga ƙarshe an sake shi daga kurkuku kuma an sanya shi a tsare a gida, amma malamai da yawa daga ko'ina cikin Morocco sun zo don koyo daga gare shi da kuma tattauna matsalolin shari'a masu rikitarwa. Ko da a gudun hijira, bai daina neman da yaɗa ilimi ba, kuma tasirinsa na ilimi ya ƙara faɗaɗa. A shekara ta 1607, a ƙarshe an ba shi izinin komawa garinsu Timbuktu. Amma Timbuktu da ya samu ta kasance kamar fatalwar birnin mai haske da ya bari. An karya ruhin birnin, dukiyarsa ta ɓace, kuma babbar al'ummar malamai sun watse. Komawarsa nasara ce ta kansa, amma kuma lokaci ne mai zafi na fuskantar mummunan gaskiyar garinsu.

Ahmad Baba ya sadaukar da sauran rayuwarsa wajen koyarwa da rubuce-rubuce a Timbuktu da ta lalace, yana ƙoƙarin adana abin da ya rage daga babban gadon ilimi. Ya ji baƙin ciki mai zurfi game da abin da aka rasa, amma bai taɓa daina hidimar ilimi ba, wanda shine kadai, na gaskiya, kuma taska ta har abada. Ƙoƙarinsa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ci gaba da al'adar ilimi ta Timbuktu da kuma isar da ilimi mai daraja ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Ya rasu a shekara ta 1627, a matsayin shaida ga ƙarshen wani zamani da kuma hargitsin sabon zamani, amma rubuce-rubucensa da koyarwarsa sun kasance ginshiƙai masu muhimmanci na ilimin Musulunci a Yammacin Afirka kuma ana ci gaba da nazarin su har zuwa yau. Ahmad Baba al-Massufi ana tunawa da shi ba kawai a matsayin malami ba, amma a matsayin alamar masanin ilimi wanda ya kare darajar ilimi a kan zalunci. Rayuwarsa tana da alaƙa da labaran malamai waɗanda suka yi gwagwarmaya don kare ilimi da imani a wasu sassan duniyar Musulunci, kuma tana tunatar da mu game da nauyin masanin ilimi wanda ya wuce lokaci.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Tawadana ba ta gudana don mulkin wucin gadi ba, sai dai don hasken ilimi na har abada wanda ke haskaka tsararraki.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Wannan yana jaddada cewa gado na gaskiya ba a gina shi a kan ribar wucin gadi ko matsayi ba, amma a kan tasirin dorewar hikima da aka raba. Zuba jari a cikin koyo da bayar da gudummawa ga fahimtar gamayya wanda ke amfanar tsararraki masu zuwa, maimakon bin nasarorin wucin gadi.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Ko da dauloli sun faɗi kuma ɗakunan karatu sun ƙone, ainihin arzikin mutane yana cikin hikimar da suke ɗauke da ita a cikin zukatansu da tunaninsu.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Wannan yana tunatar da mu cewa dukiya ta zahiri har ma da cibiyoyin zahiri za a iya lalata su, amma ilimi da ƙima, da zarar an shigar da su, ba za a iya lalata su ba. Nurture hikima ta ciki da juriya, domin waɗannan su ne manyan albarkatu waɗanda babu wata ƙarfin waje da zai iya ɗauka.

wisdom_lessons.quote: Takobi na iya cin ƙasashe, amma ba zai iya cin gaskiya ba. Domin gaskiya, da zarar an faɗa ko an rubuta, tana samun hanyarta ta kanta cikin lokaci.
wisdom_lessons.meaning: Wannan yana nuna ƙarfin dorewar ra'ayoyi da gaskiya akan ƙarfin tsiya. Yayin da ƙarfin zahiri zai iya cimma rinjaye na ɗan lokaci, fahimtar gaskiya da ƙa'idodin ɗabi'a a ƙarshe suna nasara. Ka tsaya tsayin daka a kan imaninka kuma ka ba da gudummawa ga yaɗuwar gaskiya, sanin cewa tasirinta ya wuce yanayin nan take.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ezana sarkin Masarautar Axum ne a karni na 4, wanda ya ayyana Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa kuma ya jagoranci masarautar zuwa zamanin zinariya.
key_achievements: Ayyanar Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa na Masarautar Axum
Cin nasarar Masarautar Meroë da faɗaɗa yankin
Kafa Dutsen Ezana don rubuta nasarorinsa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyanar Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa nasa ya kafa tushen Cocin Orthodox na Habasha a yau kuma ya yi tasiri mai zurfi ga asalin ƙasar.

ezana-of-axum.epic:
Ezana na Axum sarkin Axum ne mai iko a karni na 4, kuma muhimmin sarki wanda ya ayyana Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa. A wancan lokacin, Masarautar Axum babbar kasa ce a Gabashin Afirka, tana bunƙasa ta hanyar sarrafa kasuwanci tsakanin Afirka, Larabawa, da Indiya, a matsayin cibiyar hanyoyin kasuwanci da ke ratsa Tekun Bahar Maliya. An haife shi a matsayin basarake, amma ya gaji sarauta tun yana ƙarami bayan mahaifinsa, Sarki Ella Amida, ya rasu da wuri. Mahaifiyarsa, Sophia, ta jagoranci masarautar cikin kwanciyar hankali a madadin ƙaramin sarki a matsayin mai mulki, kuma a wannan lokacin, Ezana ya sami koyarwa daga Frumentius, wani malami mai hikima daga Siriya. Frumentius ya gabatar masa da ilimin Girka da Roma, da kuma Kiristanci, addinin tauhidi wanda ke yaɗuwa a Daular Roma a lokacin, yana da tasiri mai mahimmanci wajen samar da tushen tunanin Ezana. A cikin wannan yanayi, Ezana ya shirya don ɗaukar nauyin makomar Masarautar Axum.

Bayan ya zama baligi kuma ya fara mulkinsa, Ezana ya fuskanci ƙungiyoyi da yawa waɗanda ke barazana ga zaman lafiyar masarautar da kuma hana ci gabanta. Ya mai da hankali kan faɗaɗa yankin masarautar da kuma mamaye al'ummomin da ke kewaye da shi ta hanyar amfani da ƙarfin sojojinsa. Musamman, ya tabbatar da zaman lafiya a kan iyakoki ta hanyar cin nasara a kan mutanen Beja, waɗanda ke ci gaba da kai hare-hare a yankin iyakar arewa, kuma a yamma, ya kai hari ga Masarautar Meroë, tsohuwar abokiyar hamayya a yankin Kogin Nilu, inda ya lalata ta gaba ɗaya a kusan shekara ta 350 AZ. Cin nasarar Masarautar Meroë wani muhimmin al'amari ne wanda ke nuna cewa Masarautar Axum ta faɗaɗa tasirinta har zuwa yankin Kogin Nilu na sama, kuma ta mamaye yankin da ya gaji gadon wayewar tsohuwar Masar. Don sanar da zuriyarsa game da nasarorin sojojinsa da tarihin mulkinsa, Ezana ya kafa manyan duwatsu da aka rubuta a cikin harsuna uku: Ge'ez, Sabaean, da Girkanci, kuma mafi shaharar su shine 'Dutsen Ezana'. Waɗannan duwatsun sun kasance muhimman takardun tarihi da ke nuna matsayin Masarautar Axum da bambancin al'adunta a lokacin mulkinsa.

Mafi mahimmancin juyin juya hali da kuma babban gwaji a mulkin Ezana shine zaɓin imani. Ezana, wanda ya san Kiristanci daga malaminsa Frumentius, ya sami babban kwarin gwiwa ta hanyar shaida yadda Daular Roma, cibiyar duniya a lokacin, ta karɓi Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa a ƙarƙashin Sarkin sarakuna Constantine Mai Girma. Wannan ya wuce wani gwagwarmayar imani na mutum ɗaya, ya kasance wani muhimmin shawarar siyasa da zamantakewa don kawar da addinin gargajiya na Axum na bautar gumaka da yawa, wanda ya ci gaba tsawon dubban shekaru, musamman tsarin addini da ke tsakiya a kan Mahrem, allahn yaki. Bayan dogon tunani, Ezana ya yanke shawarar barin gumakan da kakanninsa suka bauta wa, kuma ya karɓi Allah ɗaya, Mahaliccin sama da ƙasa, a matsayin sabon Allah na Masarautar Axum. Wannan shawarar babbar gwagwarmaya ce don sake fasalta asalin masarautar da makomarta, kuma ta haɗa da rikice-rikice da ƙungiyoyin addini na gargajiya, da kuma ƙalubale mai rikitarwa na samun fahimta da karɓuwa daga mutane. Ezana ya shawo kan waɗannan gwaje-gwaje kuma ya buɗe sabon zamani ga Axum ta hanyar kafa Kiristanci a matsayin addinin hukuma na masarautar.

Sakamakon shawarar Ezana, Masarautar Axum ta zama ɗaya daga cikin ƙasashe na farko a duniya da suka ayyana Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa, tare da Armeniya da Daular Roma. Ya sanya giciye a kan tsabar kuɗi waɗanda a baya ke ɗauke da alamomin arna, yana sanar da zuwan sabon zamani a hukumance, kuma malaminsa Frumentius ya dawo bayan an naɗa shi bishop na farko na Axum ta Bishop Athanasius na Alexandria, inda ya kafa tushen coci a ƙasar Axum. A ƙarƙashin mulkin Ezana, Axum ba kawai ta kai kololuwar soji da tattalin arziki ba, har ma ta ƙarfafa haɗin kai na al'adu da ruhaniya ta hanyar imani na Kiristanci. Wannan zaɓin addini nasa ya kafa tushen imani mai zurfi wanda ya kai ga Cocin Orthodox Tewahedo na Habasha a yau, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin ɓangare na asalin ƙasar Habasha da gadon al'adunta. Ezana ya kasance mai mulkin zamani ɗaya, amma zaɓinsa ya tsara asalin mutanensa tsawon fiye da shekaru dubu kuma ya buɗe wani muhimmin babi a tarihin Kiristanci na Afirka. Wannan shawarar addini nasa za a iya kwatanta ta da misalan wasu tsoffin sarakuna waɗanda suka canza makomar ƙasashe, kamar Sarkin sarakuna Constantine Mai Girma na Daular Roma ko Tiridates III na Armeniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Anton Wilhelm Amo masanin falsafa ne na Afirka daga zamanin Haskakawa na karni na 18, wanda ya fara samun digirin digirgir a jami'ar Turai kuma ya yada ra'ayoyin haƙƙin ɗan adam.
key_achievements: Afirka na farko da ya sami digirin digirgir na falsafa a jami'ar Turai
Ya yi aiki a matsayin malamin falsafa a Jami'ar Halle da Jena
Ya rubuta rubutun game da rashin jin daɗi na hankalin ɗan adam
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin majagaba na falsafar Afirka kuma alamar gwagwarmayar hankali da ta yi adawa da nuna bambancin launin fata.

anton-wilhelm-amo.epic:
Anton Wilhelm Amo (an haife shi a kusan 1703) ya kasance masanin falsafa kuma lauya na Afirka mai jagoranci wanda ya yi aiki a lokacin Haskakawa na Turai a karni na 18. An haife shi a Axim, a yankin Gold Coast na Holland (yanzu Ghana), a matsayin memba na kabilar Nzema. Tun yana yaro, an tura shi zuwa kotun Duchy na Brunswick-Wolfenbüttel a Jamus, ta hanyar Amsterdam, Netherlands, ta hanyar hanyoyin cinikin bayi masu rikitarwa na lokacin. Duke Anton Ulrich ya gane shi ba kawai a matsayin bawa ba, amma a matsayin wanda ke da basirar hankali mai ban mamaki, kuma ya ba shi baftisma, yana ba shi suna Anton Wilhelm. A karkashin cikakken tallafin Duke, Amo ya sami damar zurfafa cikin duniyar ilimin Turai, yana koyon harsuna daban-daban da fannoni kamar Latin, Girkanci, Faransanci, da Jamusanci. Yarantakarsa ta kasance cike da abubuwan ban mamaki, inda tunanin gida mai nisa da mamakin sabuwar wayewa suka haɗu, wanda daga baya ya zama muhimmin tushe ga tunaninsa na falsafa.

Godiya ga ci gaba da tallafin Duke, Amo ya shiga Jami'ar Halle a 1727, inda ya fara tafarkinsa na ilimi ta hanyar nazarin shari'a da falsafa. Daga baya ya koma Jami'ar Wittenberg don ci gaba da karatunsa, kuma a 1729, ta hanyar rubutunsa mai taken "De Jure Maurorum in Europa" (Game da Haƙƙoƙin Moors a Turai), ya gabatar da muhawara mai zurfi game da matsayin shari'a da haƙƙoƙin Afirka a cikin al'ummar Turai. Wannan ya wuce bincike na ilimi kawai; ya kasance sanarwa mai ƙarfi na hankali wanda ke kare asalin kansa da mutuncin 'yan uwansa. A ƙarshe, a 1734, ya sami digirin digirgir na falsafa daga Jami'ar Wittenberg tare da rubutunsa mai taken "De Humanae Mentis Apatheia" (Game da Rashin Jin Daɗi na Hankalin Dan Adam). Wannan nasara ta tarihi an rubuta ta a matsayin digirin digirgir na falsafa na farko da wani Afirka ya samu a jami'ar Turai, kuma ya kasance mafi haske a tafarkinsa na hankali da kuma wani lamari da ya haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar ilimi ta Turai.

Bayan samun digirin digirgir, Anton Wilhelm Amo ya yi aiki a matsayin malamin falsafa a Jami'ar Halle da Jami'ar Jena, yana yada tunaninsa na asali. Babban falsafarsa ta dogara ne akan tsattsauran ra'ayi na dualism tsakanin ruhi da jiki, yana mai cewa ruhi wani abu ne mara abu kuma mai aiki wanda ke 'ji', yayin da jiki kawai wani abu ne mai wucewa wanda ke isar da abubuwan motsa jiki daga waje. Wannan ya kasance kalubale mai mahimmanci ga ra'ayin injiniya na René Descartes game da mutum wanda ya mamaye lokacin, kuma ya ci gaba da haɓaka ka'idodinsa ta hanyar mu'amala mai aiki tare da masana daban-daban na zamaninsa. Na wani lokaci, an gane shi a matsayin mai hankali mai daraja a cikin al'ummar ilimi ta Turai, amma halin da ake ciki ya canza da sauri lokacin da babban mai tallafa masa, Duke Anton Ulrich, ya rasu. Yayin da nuna bambancin launin fata da kiyayya suka fara yaduwa a cikin al'ummar Jamus, matsayinsa na ilimi ya ragu, kuma ya fuskanci zagi na sirri da nuna bambanci fiye da muhawarar ilimi, wanda ya haifar masa da babban takaici.

A ƙarshe, Anton Wilhelm Amo ya yanke shawarar barin rayuwarsa ta Turai na kimanin shekaru 40 kuma ya koma Gold Coast na Afirka, inda tushensa yake, a kusan 1747. An ce ya rayu sauran rayuwarsa a can a matsayin mai sana'ar zinariya kuma mai hikima. Rayuwarsa ta kasance rikodin wani masanin falsafa wanda ya kirkiro makomarsa da ikon hankali, amma ya koma gida saboda iyakokin zamaninsa da nuna bambancin launin fata. Nasarorinsa, waɗanda aka manta da su na wani lokaci bayan mutuwarsa, sun fara sake fitowa fili tun tsakiyar karni na 20 yayin da bincike kan falsafar Afirka ya zama mai aiki, kuma a yau ana tuna shi a matsayin majagaba na falsafar Afirka da kuma alamar nasarar hankali da ta wuce shinge na launin fata. Tunaninsa ya ba da muhimmiyar kwarin gwiwa ga kafa asalin falsafar Afirka ta zamani, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga wayar da kan jama'a game da dabi'un duniya na haƙƙin ɗan adam da mutunci. Rayuwarsa kuma tana da alaƙa da labaran wasu masana daga wajen Turai waɗanda suka nemi 'yancin kai na hankali a Turai a karni na 18, kuma tana sa mu tuna da kalubalensu da nasarorinsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Athanasius Babban Bishop ne na Alexandria a Masar a karni na 4 kuma masanin tauhidi, wanda ya kare Allahntakar Kiristi kuma ya kare Aikin Imani na Nicea a kan Ariyananci.
key_achievements: Musanta Ariyananci a Majalisar Nicea
Kare imani na gaskiya a matsayin Babban Bishop na Alexandria
Rubuce-rubuce duk da gudun hijira sau biyar
Gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga tabbatar da koyarwar Triniti
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gwagwarmayarsa ta tauhidi ta yi tasiri sosai a kan tsarin koyarwar Triniti na Kirista, kuma har yau tana kasancewa muhimmin ginshiƙi na imani na gaskiya.

athanasius-of-alexandria.epic:
Athanasius na Alexandria (kimanin 295–373) ya kasance Babban Bishop na Alexandria a Masar a karni na 4 kuma masanin tauhidin Kirista, yana daya daga cikin muhimman mutane a tarihin Kiristanci na farko. An haife shi a Alexandria, cibiyar ilimi mafi girma a yankin Bahar Rum wadda ke bunƙasa a ƙarƙashin mulkin Daular Roma, ya gina tushen iliminsa ta hanyar zurfafa bincike a falsafa da tauhidi tun yana saurayi. Ya sami damar shiga cikin gudanarwar coci da muhawarar tauhidi a matsayin sakataren Babban Bishop Alexander, kuma a shekara ta 325, ya raka Babban Bishop zuwa Majalisar Nicea ta Farko. An kira wannan Majalisa don warware muhawarar Ariyananci (Arianism) wadda ke girgiza cocin a lokacin. Ariyananci ra'ayi ne na tauhidi da firist Arius ya gabatar, wanda ya nuna cewa Yesu Kiristi halitta ne da Allah ya halitta kuma ya bambanta da Uba a asali. Athanasius ya yi adawa da wannan ra'ayi sosai, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara Aikin Imani na Nicea (Nicene Creed) wanda ya bayyana cewa Kiristi 'mai tushe daya ne da Uba (homoousios)'. Aikin Imani na Nicea, wanda aka tsara a Majalisar Nicea ta Farko a shekara ta 325, sanarwa ce ta imani na Kirista wadda ta musanta Ariyananci ta hanyar bayyana cewa Kiristi 'mai tushe daya ne da Uba'. Wannan shi ne farkon kare imaninsa na tsawon rayuwarsa.

Bayan rasuwar Babban Bishop Alexander a shekara ta 328, an zaɓi Athanasius a matsayin magajinsa a matsayin Babban Bishop na Alexandria. Amma shugabancinsa bai kasance mai sauƙi ba ko kaɗan. Ko bayan Majalisar Nicea, Ariyananci ya ci gaba da faɗaɗa tasirinsa tare da goyon bayan sarakunan daular da wasu bishop-bishop, kuma Athanasius, a matsayinsa na mai kare imani na gaskiya, ya zama babban abin da suke hari. Ya sha fama da zarge-zarge na ƙarya da makirci da yawa daga Ariyanawa da abokan kawancensu na siyasa. Musamman, Sarki Constantine Mai Girma ya kore shi zuwa Trier a Jamus a shekara ta 335 bisa zarge-zargen da aka yi masa a Majalisar Tyre. Wannan ya nuna farkon doguwar rayuwarsa ta gudun hijira mai cike da wahala. Daga baya, a ƙarƙashin sarakuna kamar Constantius II, Julian, da Valens, ya rayu rayuwa mai cike da tashin hankali, yana maimaita gudun hijira da dawowa sau biyar zuwa wurare kamar Roma da hamadar Masar, saboda canje-canjen manufofin sarakuna da matsin lamba daga ƙungiyar Ariyananci.

Rayuwar Athanasius ta kasance ci gaba da gwagwarmaya ta kadaici, kamar yadda laƙabinsa 'Athanasius contra mundum' (Athanasius gaba da duniya) ke nunawa. Bai taɓa yin rauni a imaninsa ba ko da a lokacin gudun hijira. Lokacin da yake Roma, ya yi ƙoƙari ya sami goyon bayan shugabannin cocin Yamma, kuma lokacin da ya gudu zuwa hamadar Masar, ya yi hulɗa da masu zaman kansu, yana samun ta'aziyya ta ruhaniya da hikima. Musamman, haɗuwarsa da Ubannin Hamada kamar Saint Anthony ya ba shi ƙarfi sosai kuma ya yi tasiri a rubuce-rubucensa. Ko da a gudun hijira, ya ci gaba da kula da garkensa ta hanyar wasiƙu, kuma ta hanyar muhimman rubuce-rubucen tauhidi kamar 'Game da Jiki' (On the Incarnation), ya ci gaba da kare gaskiyar Allahntakar Kiristi da koyarwar Triniti. Wannan rubutun ya jaddada cewa Yesu Kiristi Allah ne na gaskiya kuma mutum na gaskiya wanda ya zama jiki don ceton bil'adama, yana ƙunshe da muhimman abubuwan da ke musanta da'awar Ariyananci. Ƙarfin halinsa da zurfin iliminsa sun kasance tushen da ya sa ya ci gaba da kare imanin Nicea a cikin gwaje-gwaje masu yawa.

Bayan shekaru da yawa na wahala da gwagwarmaya, Athanasius a ƙarshe ya dawo Alexandria har abada a kusan shekara ta 366, kuma ya shafe shekaru bakwai na ƙarshen rayuwarsa cikin kwanciyar hankali kafin ya rasu a shekara ta 373. Amma ƙoƙarinsa na tauhidi da gwagwarmayarsa marar yankewa sun haskaka fiye da kima bayan mutuwarsa. A Majalisar Constantinople ta Farko da aka gudanar a shekara ta 381, an yanke hukuncin cewa Ariyananci bidi'a ne, kuma Aikin Imani na Nicea da koyarwar Triniti (Trinity doctrine) waɗanda Athanasius ya kare tsawon rayuwarsa sun tabbata a matsayin muhimman koyarwar imani na Kirista na gaskiya. Koyarwar Triniti koyarwa ce ta Kirista mai mahimmanci wadda ke koyar da cewa mutane uku (Uba, Ɗa, Ruhu Mai Tsarki) Allah ɗaya ne a asali. Athanasius ana girmama shi a matsayin waliyi a cikin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas da Cocin Katolika na Roma a matsayin mai kare imani na gaskiya da Uban Coci, kuma tauhidinsa yana da tasiri mai girma a kan tsarin koyarwar Kirista har zuwa yau. Ruhinsa marar yankewa ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga Ubannin Kappadokiya kamar Basil Mai Girma, Gregory na Nazianzus, da Gregory na Nyssa, waɗanda suka yi yaƙi da Ariyananci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Cyril na Alexandria ya kasance Babban Bishop na Alexandria a karni na 5 a tsohuwar Roma, kuma ya kare imanin Kiristanci na gaskiya a Majalisar Ephesus.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Babban Bishop na 24 na Alexandria
Ya jagoranci kuma ya ci nasara a Majalisar Ephesus a 431
Ya kafa koyarwar Kiristanci a kan bidi'ar Nestorius
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa na tauhidi da kuma kafa koyarwar Kiristanci suna da tasiri mai zurfi a kan koyarwar Kirista har zuwa yau.

cyril-of-alexandria.epic:
Cyril na Alexandria (c. 376 – 444) ya kasance Babban Bishop na 24 na Alexandria kuma Uban Coci na Kirista mai tasiri a farkon karni na 5, a Alexandria, cibiyar ilimi da addini ta Daular Roma ta dā. Alexandria, birnin da aka haife shi, ya kasance wuri mai bunƙasa da ilimi da al'adu a duniyar dā, amma a lokaci guda kuma, ya kasance filin gwagwarmaya inda falsafanci daban-daban da ra'ayoyin addini ke karo, suna haifar da muhawara mai zafi game da tauhidi ba tare da tsayawa ba. Cyril ya girma a ƙarƙashin tsauraran ilimi a gidan kawunsa, Patriarch Theophilus, kuma a cikin wannan tsari, ya zurfafa cikin Littafi Mai Tsarki, rubuce-rubucen Ubannin Coci, da fasahar magana, yana kafa tushen tauhidinsa na gaba. A shekara ta 412, bayan ya gaji kawunsa a matsayin Babban Bishop na Alexandria, ya fuskanci gaskiyar cewa birnin yana cike da rarrabuwar addini da rikicin siyasa. Aikinsa a bayyane yake: kare imanin Kirista na gaskiya da kuma kafa ikon Coci da ƙarfi. Ya fara nuna jagoranci mai ƙarfi don cimma wannan buri.

Farkon lokacin mulkin Cyril a matsayin Babban Bishop ya kasance cike da jayayya da rikici. Ya rufe majami'un Novatian waɗanda ke faɗaɗa tasirinsu a Alexandria, yana ƙarfafa ikon Coci da sunan kare imanin gaskiya. Bugu da ƙari, a cikin rikici da al'ummar Yahudawa a cikin birnin, ya shiga cikin korarsu daga Alexandria, wanda ya haifar da babban tashin hankali a cikin al'ummar lokacin. Gwagwarmayar iko da gwamnan Roma Orestes ta kasance wani lamari da ya nuna tasirin Cyril na duniya. A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da rudani, wani lamari mai ban tausayi ya faru inda Kiristoci masu tayar da zaune tsaye suka kashe fitacciyar masaniyar falsafa mace Hypatia. Ko da yake babu wata shaida kai tsaye cewa Cyril ya ba da umarnin kisan, ba zai iya kubuta gaba ɗaya daga sukar cewa kalamansa masu tsauri da zafin addini da aka haifar a lokacin sun haifar da wannan yanayi mai ban tausayi ba, kuma wannan ya kasance inuwa mai duhu a kan gadonsa. Waɗannan abubuwan da suka faru a farkon lokacin mulkinsa sun nuna cewa ya bi burinsa da imani mai ƙarfi kuma wani lokaci da matakai masu tsauri.

Babban gwajinsa ya samo asali ne daga adawa ta tauhidi da Patriarch Nestorius na Constantinople. Nestorius ya yi iƙirarin cewa Allahntaka da ɗan Adam sun rabu a cikin Yesu Kiristi, kuma ya kira Budurwa Maryamu 'Christotokos' (Mai ɗaukar Kiristi). Cyril ya ayyana wannan a matsayin bidi'a, yana musanta mutum ɗaya na Kiristi. Ya yi imani da 'Haɗin Kai na Hypostatic' da ƙarfi, cewa Allahntaka da ɗan Adam sun haɗu ba tare da rabuwa ba a cikin mutum ɗaya, kuma ya jaddada cewa Maryamu ya kamata a kira ta 'Theotokos' (Mai ɗaukar Allah). Wannan muhawara ta faɗaɗa zuwa rikicin siyasa da addini wanda ya girgiza dukan daular. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 431, an kira Majalisar Ephesus, kuma Cyril ya jagoranci ta, yana kare matsayinsa na tauhidi da ƙarfi. Bayan muhawara mai zafi da dabaru na siyasa, Majalisar ta amince da tauhidin Cyril a matsayin na gaskiya kuma ta kori Nestorius. Wannan nasara ta taka rawa mai mahimmanci wajen kafa koyarwar Kiristanci ta Coci. Ko da yake ya fuskanci rarrabuwar kai na ɗan lokaci da bishop-bishop na makarantar Antioch, sun cimma sulhu ta hanyar 'Tsarin Haɗin Kai' a shekara ta 433, inda suka sake tabbatar da haɗin kan Coci.

A ranar 27 ga Yuni, 444, Cyril ya mutu a Alexandria. Bayan mutuwarsa, an ɗauke shi ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana tauhidi a tarihin Kiristanci. Rubuce-rubucensa na tauhidi sun yi tasiri mai zurfi a kan ci gaban Kiristanci, kuma musamman koyarwar 'Haɗin Kai na Hypostatic' wanda ya jaddada cikakken haɗin kai na Allahntaka da ɗan Adam, ya zama tushe mai mahimmanci don kafawa a matsayin koyarwar gaskiya a Majalisar Chalcedon a shekara ta 451. An ɗaukaka shi zuwa Doctor na Coci, kuma rubuce-rubucensa masu yawa sun rufe fannoni daban-daban kamar sharhin Littafi Mai Tsarki, bayanin koyarwa, da ayyukan jayayya, suna ba da babban wahayi ga masana tauhidi na gaba. A yau, ana girmama shi a matsayin waliyi a cikin Cocin Roman Katolika da Cocin Orthodox na Gabas, kuma ranar idinsa ita ce 27 ga Yuni da 9 ga Yuni bi da bi. Rayuwar Cyril da gwagwarmayar tauhidi sun taka rawa mai mahimmanci wajen tsara asalin Cocin karni na 5, kuma wannan, tare da gadon sauran Ubannin Alexandria kamar Athanasius, ya zama muhimmin ginshiƙi na tauhidin Kirista a yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Amda Seyon I sarkin Habasha ne na ƙarni na 14 wanda ya faɗaɗa kuma ya ƙarfafa daularsa a kan ƙasashen Musulunci.
key_achievements: Ya ci galaba a kan ƙasashen Musulunci, ciki har da Masarautar Ifat.
Ya faɗaɗa yankin Daular Habasha kuma ya ƙarfafa ikon gwamnatin tsakiya.
Ya goyi bayan kammala waƙar almara ta ƙasa, 'Kebra Negast'.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya canza masarautar da ke keɓe zuwa babbar ƙasa a yankin Kahon Afirka, inda ya kafa harsashin Habasha.

amda-seyon-i.epic:
Amda Seyon I (ya hau mulki a shekara ta 1314) ya kasance sarki mai ƙarfi kuma mai gina daula daga Daular Solomon ta Habasha. A farkon ƙarni na 14, lokacin da ya gaji mahaifinsa, Wedem Arad, kuma ya hau gadon sarauta, Habasha ba kawai masarautar tsaunuka ba ce. Duk da cewa hawansa mulki ya haifar da cece-kuce a lokacin, ya ɗauki nauyin makomar masarautar ba tare da girgiza ba. A wannan lokacin, masarautar Kirista ta Habasha tana fuskantar barazana ta dindindin daga masarautun Musulunci masu ƙarfi a kudu da gabas. Waɗannan masarautun sun mallaki hanyoyin kasuwanci na Bahar Maliya, suna gallazawa mutanen Habasha, kuma suna mamaye iyakokin ƙasar, suna haifar da rashin zaman lafiya. Amda Seyon I ya yanke shawarar cewa ba zai ƙara jure irin wannan cin zarafi ba. Ya shirya don mayar da martani na soja mai ƙarfi, yana mai rantsuwa da sunan Allah cewa zai dawo da ɗaukakar Daular Habasha kuma ya tabbatar da halaccin mulkin Daular Solomon a duk faɗin yankin Kahon Afirka. Wannan ƙudurinsa ya wuce faɗaɗa yanki kawai, yana ɗauke da manufar zama mai kare wayewar Kirista.

Mulkin Amda Seyon I ya kasance ci gaba da yaƙe-yaƙe. Musamman, lokacin da Masarautar Ifat ta kalubalanci ikonsa a fili, bai yi jinkiri ba, ya jagoranci sojojinsa da kansa zuwa fagen yaƙi. Ba sarki ba ne da ke ba da umarni daga baya kawai. Ya yi yaƙi tare da sojojinsa a cikin ƙura da jinin yaƙi, yana ƙarfafa musu gwiwa da aminci.
