Ta hanyar manyan ayyukan soja da yawa, ciki har da yaƙin da ya kawo ƙarshe a shekara ta 1332, ya ci galaba a kan Masarautar Ifat da sauran ƙasashen Musulunci masu tawaye ɗaya bayan ɗaya. Sojojinsa sun mamaye manyan biranen waɗannan ƙasashe, sun fatattaki sojojin abokan gaba, kuma a ƙarshe sun sanya yankunansu a ƙarƙashin tutar Habasha. Waɗannan nasarorin ba kawai nasarorin soja ba ne, amma cikar wata manufa mai tsarki don tabbatar da rayuwar addinin Kirista da wayewar Habasha a yankin Kahon Afirka. Ƙwarewarsa ta soja da jaruntakarsa sun ɗaukaka matsayin Daular Habasha kuma sun aika da gargaɗi mai ƙarfi ga ƙasashen Musulunci da ke kewaye.

Baya ga nasarorin soja, Amda Seyon I ya sadaukar da kansa wajen ƙarfafa daularsa a ciki. Ya naɗa gwamnoni masu aminci a yankunan da ya ci, kuma ya gina birane masu katanga a wuraren da ke da muhimmancin dabaru, don haka ya ƙarfafa ikon gwamnatin tsakiya. Waɗannan gyare-gyaren gudanarwa da na soja sun ba da damar daular ta kasance mai zaman lafiya da ingantaccen mulki. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, adabi da fasaha sun bunƙasa sosai, kuma a wannan lokacin ne aka kammala 'Kebra Negast', waƙar almara ta ƙasa ta Habasha wacce ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tabbatar da halaccin Daular Solomon. Duk da haka, rayuwarsa ta sirri ta haifar da rikici da coci. Ya fuskanci gwajin da aka yi masa na fitar da shi daga coci saboda dangantakarsa da 'yar uwarsa ta uba ɗaya, amma ikon siyasa da na sojansa ba su taɓa girgiza ba. Amda Seyon I ya yi imani cewa aikinsa ga Allah da ƙasa ya fi hukuncin coci na duniya, kuma wannan imani ya zama ƙarfin tuƙi mai ƙarfi a mulkinsa na daular.

A shekara ta 1344, lokacin da Amda Seyon I ya rasu, ya bar wa zuriyarsa daula mai ƙarfi da faɗaɗa. Habasha, wacce ta kasance masarautar tsaunuka da ke keɓe lokacin da ya gaji gadon sarauta, ta canza a ƙarƙashin mulkinsa zuwa babbar ƙasa da ke da tasiri mai girma a kan kasuwancin Bahar Maliya kuma tana mulkin yankin Kahon Afirka. Sunansa 'Amda Seyon' yana nufin 'Ginshiƙin Sihiyona', kuma ya tabbatar da cewa rayuwarsa ta dace da sunan, inda ya zama ginshiƙin da ke riƙe wayewar Kirista ta Habasha. Gadonsa yana raye a cikin dawwamar daular da aka gina da jini da gumi, kuma ana tuna shi a matsayin mafi girman jarumi, sarki, kuma mai gina daula a tarihin Habasha. Salon mulkinsa da manufofinsa na faɗaɗa daula sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga sauran manyan sarakunan Habasha na gaba, kuma ya aza harsashin da ya dace wajen tabbatar da rawar da Habasha ke takawa a matsayin mai kare wayewar Kirista a yankin Kahon Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti malami ne kuma marubucin tarihi na Masar a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18, wanda ya rubuta game da mamayar Faransa da tashin hankali na zamanin Muhammad Ali.
key_achievements: Ya yi karatu mai zurfi a Jami'ar Al-Azhar
Ya rubuta game da mamayar Napoleon a Masar
Ya soki canje-canje da mulkin kama-karya na zamanin Muhammad Ali
Ya rubuta babban tarihin 'Aja'ib al-Athar'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tarihin sa ya kasance tushe mai mahimmanci don nazarin tarihin Masar na zamani kuma gado mai daraja wanda ke ba da shaida game da lokacin canji.

abd-al-rahman-al-jabarti.epic:
Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti (an haife shi a kusan 1753) ya kasance fitaccen malamin Masar kuma marubucin tarihi wanda ya rubuta lokacin tashin hankali a Masar a ƙarshen ƙarni na 18 da farkon ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a kusan 1753 a Alkahira, Masar, kuma danginsa sun kasance sanannun malamai masu ilimi daga yankin Tell al-Jabart, waɗanda suka samar da malamai tsawon tsararraki. Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti ya sami ilimi mai zurfi a Jami'ar Al-Azhar, cibiyar ilimi a Masar, inda ya karanci fannoni daban-daban ciki har da shari'ar Musulunci, tauhidi, tarihi, har ma da lissafi da ilimin taurari. Lokacin kuruciyarsa ya kasance lokaci mai cike da rudani, inda Mamluk Beys ke ci gaba da gwagwarmayar neman iko a ƙarƙashin mulkin daular Usmaniyya, kuma al'umma na shan wahala a ƙarƙashin mulkinsu marar tausayi. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, ya fara rubuta duk abin da ke faruwa a kusa da shi, ba kawai don lissafin abubuwan da suka faru ba, amma don nuna ruhin zamanin da rayuwar mutane a fili. Wannan ruhin rubuce-rubuce nasa ya zama ginshiƙin rubuta tarihin da zai zama muhimmin tushe ga tarihin Masar na zamani.

Duniya ta Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti ta girgiza gaba ɗaya lokacin da sojojin Faransa karkashin jagorancin Napoleon Bonaparte suka mamaye Masar a shekara ta 1798. Ƙarfin sojan Faransa da fasahar su ta zamani sun ba shi mamaki, amma al'adunsu na duniya da rashin tsoron Allah sun haifar masa da rudani mai zurfi da kuma ra'ayi mai mahimmanci. Sojojin Faransa masu mamaya sun naɗa Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti a matsayin memba na 'Diwan', kwamitin gudanarwa da suka kafa don gudanar da Masar, amma ya ci gaba da kallon mulkin Faransa da idon basira. Yayin da yake sha'awar nasarorin kimiyya kamar na'urar buga littattafai da Faransawa suka kawo da kuma sha'awar su ta ilimi, ya kuma rubuta da kaifi game da tashin hankali, rudani, da rikicin al'adu da mamayar su ta haifar wa al'ummar Masar. Rubuce-rubucen wannan lokacin sun zama tushe mai mahimmanci wanda ke ba da shaida a fili game da girgiza da canje-canjen da al'ummar Masar ta fuskanta a karon farko da wayewar Yammacin zamani. Ya yi nazari mai zurfi game da ainihin mamayar da tasirinta daga ra'ayin Masarawa, ba na baƙo ba.

Bayan da sojojin Faransa suka janye daga Masar a shekara ta 1801, Masar ta faɗa cikin wani babban gibi na iko da rudani, kuma a cikin wannan yanayi, Muhammad Ali Pasha, wani jami'in Albaniya daga Daular Usmaniyya, ya fito a matsayin sabon mai mulki. Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti da farko ya yi fatan zai daidaita rudanin kuma ya maido da tsari, amma mulkin Muhammad Ali ya zama mulkin kama-karya mai tsanani da kuma tsakiya fiye da zamanin Mamluk. A ƙarƙashin dalilin zamantar da ƙasa da gina sojoji masu ƙarfi, Muhammad Ali ya sanya haraji mai nauyi kuma ya aiwatar da manufofin da suka ba gwamnati damar mallakar duk manyan masana'antu. A cikin tarihin sa, Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti ya rubuta da kakkausar murya game da mummunan tasirin waɗannan manufofin Muhammad Ali a kan rayuwar al'ummar Masar, kuma saboda haka, ya fuskanci sa ido da matsin lamba daga sabon mai mulkin. Ra'ayinsa mai mahimmanci ya nuna tsayin daka na lamiri na wani mai ilimi ga iko a lokacin, kuma wannan ya haifar masa da matsaloli na kansa.

Kashi na biyu na rayuwar Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti ya cika da bala'i. A shekara ta 1822, ɗansa, Hassan, ya mutu a cikin yanayi mai ban mamaki, kuma mutane da yawa sun yi imani cewa wannan ramuwar gayya ce daga Muhammad Ali saboda rubuce-rubucen Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti masu sukar lamiri. Duk da baƙin ciki mai zurfi, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba kuma ya ci gaba da rubuce-rubuce. A shekara ta 1825, Abd al-Rahman al-Jabarti shi ma ya rasu a cikin yanayi mai ban mamaki, amma babban tarihin sa, 'Aja'ib al-Athar fi al-Tarajim wal-Akhbar' (wato, 'Abubuwan Al'ajabi na Tsoffin Abubuwa a cikin Tarihin Rayuwa da Labarai'), ya rayu kuma an watsa shi ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Wannan rubutun ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin muryar wani malamin Masar wanda ya rayu a lokacin tashin hankali lokacin da wata daula ta rushe kuma sabuwar Masar ta zamani ta fara fitowa, kuma tushe ne mai mahimmanci don fahimtar canje-canjen siyasa, tattalin arziki, zamantakewa, da al'adu na al'ummar Masar a lokacin. Tarihin sa ya zama ginshiƙin nazarin tarihin Masar na zamani, kuma tare da sauran marubutan tarihi a duniyar Larabawa waɗanda suka rubuta game da lokutan canji, ya bar gado mai mahimmanci a matsayin shaida na tarihi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Abd al-Mu'min ya kasance mai cin nasara kuma mai mulki daga kabilar Berber wanda ya kafa daular Almohad a Arewacin Afirka a karni na 12, ya haɗa dukkan Maghreb, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a duniyar Musulunci.
key_achievements: Rushe daular Almoravid da kafa daular Almohad.
Haɗa dukkan Maghreb daga Tekun Atlantika zuwa iyakar Masar.
Kafa tsarin gudanarwa na tsakiya da tallafa wa al'adu.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa ya kawo haɗin kai na siyasa da addini a yankin Maghreb, kuma ya samar da wani muhimmin canji a tarihin duniyar Musulunci.

abd-al-mumin.epic:
Abd al-Mu'min (kimanin 1094 – 1163) ya kasance babban mai cin nasara kuma mai mulki daga kabilar Berber wanda ya kafa kuma ya haɗa daular Almohad a Arewacin Afirka a karni na 12. An haife shi a wani ƙaramin ƙauye a Arewacin Aljeriya a matsayin memba na kabilar Berber, kuma makomarsa ta canza lokacin da ya sadu da malamin sa kuma annabi, Ibn Tumart. Ibn Tumart ya kasance mutum mai yaɗa saƙon tsarkakakken tauhidi, wato 'Tawhid', wanda ke nuna kadaita Allah, yana yaƙi da cin hanci da rashawa na daular Almoravid da kuma lalacewar tsarkin addinin Musulunci a Arewacin Afirka a lokacin. Abd al-Mu'min ya zama almajiri mafi sadaukarwa ga Ibn Tumart, inda ya shiga cikin kafa al'ummar addini a cikin tsaunukan Atlas masu cike da ƙalubale. A nan, ya horar da kansa, ba kawai ta hanyar koyarwar addini ba, har ma ta hanyar koyon dabarun soja don babban gwagwarmayar da ke tafe da kuma jagoranci don haɗa kabilun Berber daban-daban. Wannan lokaci ya kasance muhimmin matakin shiri don kafa harsashin daularsa ta gaba.

A shekara ta 1130, bayan rasuwar malamin sa Ibn Tumart, Abd al-Mu'min ya yanke shawarar boye mutuwar sa na tsawon shekaru uku. Wannan ba lokaci ne na baƙin ciki ba, sai dai wani zaɓi ne na dabara don ƙarfafa tushen ƙungiyar Almohad da kuma kafa ikonsa a tsakanin kabilun da ke da sauƙin rarrabuwa. A wannan lokacin, ya mai da hankali kan ci gaba da koyarwar malamin sa, sake tsara ƙungiyar, da kuma ƙarfafa haɗin kai na ciki. Daga ƙarshe, bayan shekaru uku, lokacin da aka ayyana shi a hukumance a matsayin 'Amir al-Mu'minin' (Kwamandan Muminai), ya kasance a shirye don mayar da hangen nesa na malamin sa gaskiya. Wannan sanarwa ba kawai canja wurin iko ba ne, sai dai ya nuna ɗaukar nauyin aikin tsarkakewa da haɗa kan al'ummar Musulunci, kuma Abd al-Mu'min ya karɓi wannan babban nauyi da jajircewa marar girgiza da jagoranci mai ƙarfi. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinsa, ƙungiyar Almohad ta fara haɓaka daga sauƙin gyaran addini zuwa wata ƙungiya ta siyasa da soja.

Shekaru da dama bayan haka, sojojin Abd al-Mu'min sun ci gaba da yaƙi da daular Almoravid, suna faɗaɗa yankunansu. Sojojinsa sun ci gaba daga sansanoninsu na tsaunukan Atlas zuwa filaye, suna cinye manyan biranen daular Almoravid a tsari. A shekara ta 1147, sojojin Almohad sun ci Marrakesh, babban birnin daular Almoravid, inda suka kawo ƙarshen mulkinsu gaba ɗaya. Amma burin Abd al-Mu'min bai tsaya ga mulkin yammacin Maghreb ba. Ya ci gaba da tafiya gabas, inda ya ci yankuna masu faɗi da suka haɗa da Aljeriya ta yanzu, Tunisiya, da yammacin Libya har zuwa shekara ta 1160. Ta haka, ya cimma babban aikin haɗa dukkan Maghreb, daga gabar Tekun Atlantika zuwa iyakar Masar, a ƙarƙashin ikon asali guda ɗaya a karon farko a tarihi. An gina daularsa ba kawai ta hanyar ƙarfin soja ba, sai dai a kan tushen ƙaƙƙarfan asalin addini da akida guda ɗaya da ya gada daga Ibn Tumart.

Abd al-Mu'min ya kasance fiye da mai cin nasara kawai; ya kasance fitaccen mai mulki wanda ya gina kuma ya daidaita daula. Ya kafa tsarin gudanarwa na tsakiya a duk faɗin daularsa mai faɗi, wanda ya ba da damar mulki mai inganci, kuma ya inganta noma da aiwatar da adalci don tabbatar da zaman lafiyar al'umma. Bugu da ƙari, ya ba da umarnin gina Masallacin Koutoubia a Marrakesh, yana ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban al'adu ta hanyar tallafa wa gine-gine da ilimi. Mulkinsa ya faɗaɗa har zuwa Spain ta Musulunci, wato Al-Andalus, kuma ya rasu a shekara ta 1163 yayin da yake shirin babban yaƙin neman zaɓe a kan masarautun Kirista. Bayan rasuwarsa, Abd al-Mu'min ya bar gadon daular Almohad mai ƙarfi. An gina wannan daula a kan tushen tsarkin imani, mulki mai tsari, da haɗin kan yankin Maghreb, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Arewacin Afirka da Iberian Peninsula na ƙarnuka da yawa. Ayyukansa ana kwatanta su kuma ana nazarin su tare da na sauran manyan shugabannin da suka gina ƙasashe masu ƙarfi a duniyar Musulunci, kamar Saladin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jagora wanda ya yi yaki da mamayar Faransa, ya kafa ginshikin kasa ta zamani, kuma daga baya ya nuna jin kai ga bil'adama fiye da addini.
key_achievements: Ya yi juriya ga mamayar Faransa tsawon shekaru 15
Ya hada kabilu kuma ya kafa ginshikin kasa ta zamani
Ya kare dubban Kiristoci a lokacin rikicin addini
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rayuwa da ta fara da yaki kuma ta kare da jin kai ga bil'adama, ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar rahama da tausayi da suka wuce addini.

abdelkader-el-djezairi.epic:
An haife shi a cikin gidan malamai masu daraja, zuriyar Annabi Muhammad (SAW). Tun yana yaro, ya koyi Alkur'ani da ilimin addini, da kuma fasahar hawan doki da amfani da takobi. A shekarar 1830, lokacin da Faransa ta mamaye kasarsa, kabilunsu sun rabu. A shekarar 1832, yana da shekaru 24, an nada shi 'Amir' kuma ya daga tutar juriya. Manufarsa ba wai kawai korar mahara ba ce, a'a, gina kasa mai hadin kai a karkashin imani da adalci.

Sarkin sarakuna Abdelkader ya yi yaki da Faransa tsawon shekaru 15. Ya hada kabilu, ya kafa sojoji, ya gyara tsarin haraji, kuma ya kafa ginshikin kasa ta zamani inda kowa yake daidai a gaban doka. A fagen yaki, ya yi kokarin kiyaye ka'idojin jarumtaka. Ya yi wa fursunoni adalci, har ma makiyansa sun girmama ka'idojinsa. Ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Tafna ta 1837, Faransa ta amince da ikon mallakarsa, amma zaman lafiyar bai dore ba.

Faransa ta karya yarjejeniyar kuma ta dawo da mummunar dabarar 'yaki gaba daya'. Sun kona kauyuka, sun lalata amfanin gona, kuma sun kashe mutanensa. Don hana ci gaba da lalacewa, ya mika wuya a shekarar 1847, bisa sharadin gudun hijira zuwa gabas. Amma Faransa ta karya alkawarinta kuma ta daure shi a wani gidan yari na Faransa tsawon shekaru biyar. A can, ya yi amfani da lokacinsa wajen addu'a da karatu, cikin bakin ciki na rasa iyalinsa da kasarsa.

Bayan an sake shi a karshe a shekarar 1852 ta hannun Napoleon III, ya zauna a Damascus, a Daular Usmaniyya. A can, ya bar rayuwar jarumi kuma ya rayu a matsayin malami da jagoran ruhaniya. A shekarar 1860, lokacin da rikici ya barke tsakanin Musulmai da Kiristoci, ya jagoranci 'ya'yansa da mabiyansa suka ba da mafaka ga dubban Kiristoci a gidansa da kuma sansaninsa. Rayuwarsa ta fara da yaki, amma ta kare da rahama da tausayi ga dukkan bil'adama. Wannan ita ce babbar darasi da Allah ya ba shi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Albert Luthuli ya kasance ɗan siyasa kuma sarki a Afirka ta Kudu a ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali a kan Apartheid.
key_achievements: Ya riƙe muƙamin shugaban African National Congress (ANC)
Ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali a kan Apartheid
Ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta zaman lafiya a shekara ta 1960
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ruhinsa na gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali ya yi tasiri sosai ga dimokuraɗiyyar Afirka ta Kudu da kuma gwagwarmayar kare haƙƙin ɗan adam a duniya.

albert-luthuli.epic:
Albert Luthuli (an haife shi a shekara ta 1898) ya kasance sarki kuma ɗan siyasa a Afirka ta Kudu a ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali a kan manufofin wariyar launin fata na Apartheid. An haife shi a shekara ta 1898 a Rhodesia (yanzu Zimbabwe) a matsayin ɗan wani mai wa'azin Zulu, rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance mai zurfi a cikin imani na Kirista da darajar ilimi. Ya yi karatu a Kwalejin Adams kuma ya zama malami, daga baya kuma aka zaɓe shi sarki a garinsu na Groutville a shekara ta 1936. Da farko bai nuna sha'awar siyasa ba, amma ganin rashin adalci da kwace filaye da 'yan uwansa ke fuskanta ya sa lamirinsa ya kasa yin shiru. Ya fahimci cewa hidimar mutanensa ita ce kiransa, kuma wannan ya zama dalilin da ya sa ya fara shiga harkokin siyasa a hankali. A wancan lokacin, Afirka ta Kudu tana fuskantar tsauraran manufofin raba launin fata na gwamnatin 'yan tsiraru farare, inda yawancin baƙar fata ke fuskantar mummunan hali na rashin samun ko da haƙƙoƙin ɗan adam na asali. Luthuli ya fara fahimtar rawar da zai taka a cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi.

Tafiyar siyasar Albert Luthuli ta fara ne da gaske lokacin da ya shiga African National Congress (ANC) a shekara ta 1946. ANC babbar kungiya ce ta siyasa da ke da burin inganta haƙƙoƙin baƙar fata da kawar da wariyar launin fata a Afirka ta Kudu. Ya yi imani da cewa wajibi ne ya yi yaƙi da manufofin wariyar launin fata na Apartheid na gwamnatin Afirka ta Kudu. Apartheid manufa ce ta raba launin fata da nuna bambanci mai tsanani da aka aiwatar a Afirka ta Kudu daga 1948 zuwa 1994, wanda ya hana baƙar fata da sauran launin fata haƙƙoƙin siyasa, tattalin arziki, da zamantakewa bisa ga fifikon fararen fata. A shekara ta 1952, gwamnati ta tilasta wa Luthuli ya zaɓi tsakanin ayyukan ANC da sarautar gargajiya. Ya amsa da ƙarfi cewa sarautar gargajiya ta fito ne daga mutanensa, ba daga gwamnati ba, kuma ba zai iya cin amanar lamirinsa ba. A ƙarshe an cire shi daga sarautar gargajiya, amma a ƙarshen wannan shekarar an zaɓe shi shugaban ANC, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin juyi da zai jagoranci babban gwagwarmaya a kan Apartheid. Wannan lamari ya zama dalilin da ya sa ya zama wani jigo na gwagwarmayar ƙasa baki ɗaya, fiye da shugaban yanki kawai.

A matsayinsa na shugaban ANC, Albert Luthuli ya jagoranci gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali da dama, ciki har da 'Defiance Campaign'. Defiance Campaign wani babban kamfen ne na adawa da manufofin gwamnati ta hanyar rashin biyayya ga dokokin wariyar launin fata marasa adalci. Ya samu kwarin gwiwa sosai daga tunanin Mahatma Gandhi, kuma ya riƙe ƙa'idar rashin tashin hankali da ƙarfi, yana mai imani cewa tashin hankali yana haifar da ƙarin tashin hankali ne kawai. Amma gwamnati ta amsa buƙatunsu na lumana da zalunci marar tausayi. Luthuli ya fuskanci kama shi sau da yawa, an hana shi yin ayyuka, kuma a shekara ta 1956 an tuhume shi da laifin cin amanar ƙasa kuma an gurfanar da shi a gaban shari'ar 'Treason Trial' mai muni. Wannan shari'a babbar shari'a ce da gwamnatin Afirka ta Kudu ta yi don murkushe shugabannin gwagwarmayar adawa da Apartheid. Duk da waɗannan gwagwarmaya, ya riƙe ƙa'idar rashin tashin hankali da ƙarfi, kuma ya yi ƙoƙari kada gwagwarmayarsu ta rasa halaccinta na ɗabi'a. Wannan sadaukarwarsa ta ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa a ciki da wajen Afirka ta Kudu, kuma ta ba da gudummawa sosai wajen kafa ikon ɗabi'a na gwagwarmayar adawa.

Bayan kisan kiyashin Sharpeville a shekara ta 1960, an haramta ANC kuma Albert Luthuli ma ya fuskanci manyan takunkumi a kan ayyukansa, amma al'ummar duniya sun fara lura da gwagwarmayarsa. Kisan kiyashin Sharpeville wani lamari ne mai ban tausayi inda 'yan sanda suka harbe masu zanga-zangar lumana ba tare da tausayi ba, wanda ya yi sanadiyar mutuwar mutane da yawa. A shekara ta 1961, an zaɓi Luthuli a matsayin wanda ya lashe kyautar Nobel ta zaman lafiya ta 1960 don girmama gudummawarsa ga gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali a kan Apartheid. An ba shi izinin fita na ɗan lokaci don halartar bikin bayar da kyautar, amma ya shafe sauran rayuwarsa a ƙarƙashin tsare-tsare na gida. Duk da cewa ya rasu a wani hatsari mai ban tausayi a shekara ta 1967, imaninsa da burinsa na 'yanci sun ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa a Afirka ta Kudu da ma duniya baki ɗaya. Ana tuna Luthuli a matsayin alamar gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali a kan Apartheid, kuma ruhinsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga shugabanni na gaba kamar Nelson Mandela. Rayuwarsa misali ne mai muhimmanci na ikon gwagwarmayar rashin tashin hankali a kan wariyar launin fata, kuma tana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar sauran masu fafutukar kare haƙƙin ɗan adam kamar Martin Luther King Jr.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jaruma wadda ta jagoranci Yaƙin Kujerar Zinariya a matsayin Sarauniya Uwa ta Ashanti, tana adawa da mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya.
key_achievements: Kare mutane a matsayin Sarauniya Uwa ta Ashanti, 'Ohemaa'
Jagorantar Yaƙin Kujerar Zinariya a kan Birtaniya
Tsawata wa shugabannin da ke jinkiri da kuma ƙarfafa su su yi yaƙi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin alamar ƙarfin mata na Afirka da alfaharin Ghana wanda ya yi adawa da mulkin mallaka.

yaa-asantewaa.epic:
An haife Yaa Asantewaa a kusan shekarar 1840 a tsakiyar Daular Ashanti. Lokacin da ɗan'uwanta ya zama shugaban Ejisu-Ashanti, ta zama Sarauniya Uwa, wato 'Ohemaa'. Wannan matsayi ba kawai na girmamawa ba ne. Ita ce mai kula da rayuwar ruhaniya da siyasa ta mutanensu, kuma tana da alhakin ba da shawara ga shugaban da kuma naɗa magajinta. Ko da yake daularsu tana da ƙarfi, inuwar Birtaniya tana faɗaɗa daga bakin teku. Suna kwadayin ƙasarsu, zinariyarsu, da kuma 'yancinsu.

Zaman lafiya bai daɗe ba. A shekarar 1896, Birtaniya sun kama sarkinsu, Prempeh I, suka kore shi zuwa wani tsibiri mai nisa. Kuma a watan Maris na 1900, Gwamnan Birtaniya, Frederick Hodgson, ya zo Kumasi ya tara shugabanninsu, ya kuma yi musu wulakanci da ba za a taɓa mantawa da shi ba. Ya nemi ya zauna a kan kujerar zinariya mai tsarki, 'Sika Dwa Kofi', wadda ita ce ruhin al'ummar Ashanti. Zauren taron ya yi shiru, kuma shugabanninsu sun shiga tsoro da yanke kauna.

A wannan lokacin, Yaa Asantewaa ba za ta iya yin shiru ba. Ta tashi tsaye ta tsawata wa mazajen da ke jinkiri. Ta ce, "Idan ku, mazajen Ashanti, ba za ku je yaki ba, to za su tafi! Matansu za su tafi!" Kalaman ta sun zama tartsatsi da ya sake kunna wuta a cikin zukatan su. An naɗa ta babban kwamandan sojojin Ashanti, kuma yaƙin kare mutuncin al'ummarsu, 'Yaƙin Kujerar Zinariya', ya fara.

Tsawon watanni da yawa, sun yi yaƙi da jaruntaka. Sun kewaye sansanin Birtaniya a Kumasi, kuma sun nuna musu azamarsu. Ko da yake mashi da tsoffin bindigoginsu ba za su iya daidaita da makamansu na zamani ba, sun yi yaƙi da sha'awar 'yanci. Daga karshe, an kama ta aka kai ta gudun hijira zuwa Seychelles, inda sarauniyarsu take. Ta mutu a can a shekarar 1921, amma ruhinta ya rayu. Ana tuna ta a matsayin alamar juriya, ƙarfin mata na Afirka, da kuma alfaharin Ghana wanda bai taɓa miƙa wuya ga mulkin mallaka ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masanin tauhidin Kiristanci na farko daga Iskandariya. Ya sadaukar da kansa ga nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki da rubutu, ya yi shahada a lokacin tsanantawa, duk da haka ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan tauhidin Kiristanci.
key_achievements: Shugaban Makarantar Koyar da Addini ta Iskandariya
Haɗa 'Hexapla' na Tsohon Alkawari
Rubuta 'De Principiis', littafin tauhidin tsari na farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa da tunaninsa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan tauhidin Kiristanci tsawon ƙarnuka, suna barin gado mai cike da jayayya.

origen-of-alexandria.epic:
An haifi Origen a kusan shekara ta 185 Miladiyya a Iskandariya, a cikin iyali mai zurfin imani da Kiristanci. Mahaifinsa, Leonides, ya yi shahada a lokacin tsanantawar Sarkin Roma Septimius Severus, wanda ya bar wata alama mai zurfi a kan imaninsa. Ya yi marmarin bin shahadar mahaifinsa da himma, amma mahaifiyarsa ta hana shi ta hanyar ɓoye masa tufafinsa. Duk da ƙuruciyarsa, ya sami suna saboda zurfin iliminsa na Littafi Mai Tsarki da kuma sha'awar ilimi, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya fara koyarwa a Makarantar Koyar da Addini ta Iskandariya.

Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta kai kololuwa lokacin da ya zama shugaban Makarantar Koyar da Addini ta Iskandariya. Ya rayu rayuwa ta tsantseni, yana sadaukar da ranaku don koyarwa da kuma dare don nazari da rubutu game da Littafi Mai Tsarki. Babban aikinsa mafi girma shi ne 'Hexapla', wanda ya tsara fassarori shida na Tsohon Alkawari gefe da gefe. Wannan aiki mai girma ya kasance shaida ce ga sha'awarsa ta tabbatar da daidaiton rubutun Littafi Mai Tsarki, kuma ya buƙaci shekaru da yawa na ƙoƙari.

Ya kuma rubuta 'De Principiis', wanda ake ɗauka a matsayin littafin farko na tsarin tauhidin Kiristanci. A cikin wannan littafi, ya bincika zurfafan ra'ayoyin tauhidi masu rikitarwa, kamar wanzuwar rayuka kafin haihuwa da kuma ceto na dukkan halittu (apocatastasis). Koyarwarsa ta zaburar da mutane da yawa, amma kuma ta haifar da rikici da wasu shugabannin coci. Musamman ma bayan naɗa shi a matsayin dattijo a Kaisariya, dangantakarsa da Demetrius, Bishop na Iskandariya, ta lalace sosai.

Rayuwarsa ta ɗauki mummunar juyawa a lokacin tsanantawar Sarkin Decius. An kama Origen saboda imaninsa kuma an yi masa azabtarwa mai zafi. An ɗaure shi da sarƙoƙi, an miƙa shi a kan giciye, kuma an ƙone shi da wuta, amma bai taɓa musanta imaninsa ba. An sake shi daga kurkuku, amma saboda illolin azabtarwar, daga ƙarshe ya rasu a kusan shekara ta 253 Miladiyya a Taya. Ko da yake rayuwarsa ta ƙare cikin wahala kuma an la'anci wasu koyarwarsa a matsayin bidi'a bayan mutuwarsa, rubuce-rubucensa da tunaninsa sun yi tasiri sosai a kan tauhidin Kiristanci tsawon ƙarnuka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Asantehene na farko wanda ya haɗa kan kabilun Akan da suka rabu, ya 'yantar da su daga zaluncin Denkyira, kuma ya kafa Daular Ashanti.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan kabilun Akan da suka rabu da kafa ƙawance
Kafa Daular Ashanti a kusa da Kujerar Zinariya
Samun 'yancin kai daga Denkyira da zama sarki na farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Daular Ashanti da ya kafa da kuma ruhin haɗin kai na Kujerar Zinariya sun zama babban gado ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

osei-tutu-i.epic:
Tafiyarsa ta fara ne a cikin ƙasa mai rarrabuwa. Kabilun Akan daban-daban suna shan wahala a ƙarƙashin mulkin Masarautar Denkyira mai ƙarfi. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Osei Kofi Tutu I ya nemi mafaka a Masarautar Akwamu, inda ya koyi dabarun yaƙi da gudanar da mulki. Wannan gogewar ta zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci wajen haɗa kan al'ummarsa a nan gaba. Lokacin da ya dawo Kumasi, ya ɗauki ƙuduri mai ƙarfi na haɗa kan al'ummarsa da suka rabu tare da 'yantar da su daga zalunci.

Manufarsa ba tasa kaɗai ba ce. Okomfo Anokye, babban firist kuma mai ba shi shawara mai aminci, yana tare da shi. Tare, sun shawo kan shugabannin Akan daban-daban don kafa ƙawance don fuskantar Denkyira. Amma haɗin gwiwar soja kawai bai isa ba. Suna buƙatar alama ta har abada wacce za ta iya ɗaukar ruhin al'ummarsu, wacce ta wuce dukkan kabilu. Wannan ita ce mabuɗin canza makomar al'ummarsu.

A wata Juma'a, Okomfo Anokye ya saukar da Kujerar Zinariya, 'Sika Dwa Kofi', daga sama. Wannan kujera ba kursiyin sarauta ba ce kawai. Ita ce ruhin al'ummar Ashanti da kanta, kuma alamar haɗin kai da ikon mallaka da sama ta ba su. Osei Kofi Tutu I ya kafa sabon kundin tsarin mulki a kusa da wannan Kujerar Zinariya, yana tsara haƙƙoƙi da ayyukan jihohin tarayya, kuma ya mai da Kumasi babban birnin ƙawancen. Ta haka ne aka kafa harsashin Ƙawancen Ashanti, wato Daular Ashanti.

Da sabon asali da ƙarfin soja mai haɗin kai, a ƙarshe sun tashi don fuskantar Denkyira. Ta hanyar nasara mai mahimmanci a Yaƙin Feyiase, sun sami 'yancin kai daga zalunci na dogon lokaci. Osei Kofi Tutu I ya zama Asantehene na farko, wato Sarkin Ashanti, kuma ya mulki daularsu. Mulkinsa ya kawo arziki da iko, kuma mafi mahimmanci, girman kai ga al'ummarsa. Ko da yake ya rasa ransa a yaƙi da Akyem, daular da ya kafa da kuma ruhin haɗin kai da ke cikin Kujerar Zinariya za su rayu har abada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Olaudah Equiano marubuci ne kuma mai fafutukar kawar da bauta daga Afirka wanda ya ba da shaida game da bala'in cinikin bayi na Tekun Atlantika a karni na 18 kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga yunkurin kawar da bauta.
key_achievements: Ya sami 'yancinsa da kansa daga bauta
Ya buga littafinsa mai suna 'The Interesting Narrative'
Ya shiga cikin yunkurin kawar da bauta a Birtaniya sosai
fact_box.legacy_statement: Littafinsa ya kasance wani muhimmin rubutun tarihi wanda ya fallasa muguntar bauta kuma ya kunna wutar yunkurin kawar da ita.

olaudah-equiano.epic:
Olaudah Equiano (kimanin 1745 – 1797) marubuci ne kuma mai fafutukar kawar da bauta daga Afirka, wanda ya ba da shaida game da bala'in cinikin bayi na Tekun Atlantika a karni na 18 kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga yunkurin kawar da bauta. Tsakiyar karni na 18, lokacin da aka haife shi, shine lokacin da fadada mulkin mallaka na manyan kasashen Turai ya kai kololuwa, kuma cinikin bayi na Tekun Atlantika, wanda ya tilasta wa Afirkawa kaura, ya kasance a matsayinsa mafi girma. An haifi Equiano a kimanin shekara ta 1745 a wani kauye mai suna Essaka, a kasar Igbo, wanda a yanzu yake kudu maso gabashin Najeriya. A matsayinsa na dan sarki, ya yi kuruciyarsa cikin al'adun al'umma da dumi-dumi, kuma ya koyi al'adu da dabi'un kabilar Igbo sosai. Amma rayuwarsa mai cike da lumana ta ruguje lokacin da aka sace shi tare da kanwarsa suna wasa kusa da gidansu, yana dan shekara goma sha daya kacal. Ya fuskanci tafiya mai ban tsoro inda aka sayar da shi ga kabilu daban-daban, kuma a karshe ya isa bakin teku inda ya fuskanci jirgin bayi wanda zai canza rayuwarsa har abada. Wannan lokaci ne mai mahimmanci kuma mai ban tausayi inda ya rasa rayuwarsa ta 'yanci kuma ya fada cikin kaddarar bauta.

Abin da ake kira 'Tafiya ta Tsakiya' (Middle Passage) ta ketare Tekun Atlantika, lokaci ne na tsoro da azaba marar misaltuwa ga Equiano. Cikin jirgin bayi mai cunkoso da datti ya cika da warin mutuwa, cututtuka, da yanke kauna, kuma yawancin Afirkawa sun rasa rayukansu a lokacin wannan tafiya. Ya tsira a mu'ujiza kuma ya isa Barbados, amma ba a sayar da shi a can ba, sai aka sake tura shi Virginia. A Virginia, an sayar da shi ga wani jami'in sojan ruwa na Birtaniya, Michael Henry Pascal, wanda ya ba shi sabon suna 'Gustavus Vassa'. A lokacin Yakin Shekaru Bakwai, Equiano ya yi aiki a matsayin bawa ga Pascal a kan jirgin ruwa, inda ya koyi fasahar jirgin ruwa, karatu da rubutu, da sauran ilimi da fasahohi masu daraja. Pascal ya yi masa alkawarin ba shi 'yanci bayan yakin, amma bayan yakin, an ci amanar wannan alkawari, kuma Equiano ya sake fuskantar bala'in sake sayar da shi ga wani dan kasuwa a Montserrat. Wannan ya nuna mummunar gaskiyar yadda tsarin bauta zai iya watsi da kokari da gudummawar mutum cikin sauki.

A Montserrat, an sayar da Equiano ga Robert King, wani dan kasuwa mai bin addinin Quaker. Ko da yake King ya fi sauran masu bayi kirki, Equiano har yanzu dukiyarsa ce. Amma King ya gane basirar Equiano da kuma kwarewarsa a kasuwanci, don haka ya ba shi damar yin ciniki a kan jirginsa. Equiano bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba wajen amfani da wannan dama, ya sayi kuma ya sayar da 'ya'yan itatuwa, barasa, kaji, da sauransu, yana tara kudi da himma tsawon shekaru. A karshe, a shekara ta 1766, ya biya King fam 40 kuma ya sayi 'yancinsa. Wannan lokaci ne daya daga cikin abubuwan tunawa mafi daraja a rayuwarsa, wani lamari ne mai ma'ana wanda ya nuna yadda ya fita daga bauta ya kuma sami 'yanci ta hanyar kokarinsa. Bayan ya zama mutum mai 'yanci, Equiano ya yi aiki a matsayin ma'aikacin jirgin ruwa, dan kasuwa, da kuma mai bincike, yana tafiya a fadin duniya daga Tekun Bahar Rum zuwa Arctic. A wannan lokacin, ya fuskanci zurfin farkawa ta ruhaniya kuma ya musulunta zuwa Kiristanci, kuma bayan ya zauna a London, ya shiga cikin yunkurin kawar da bauta sosai.

A London, Equiano ya shiga kungiyoyin kawar da bauta kamar 'Sons of Africa', yana yada muguntar cinikin bayi. A shekara ta 1789, ya buga littafinsa mai suna 'The Interesting Narrative of the Life of Olaudah Equiano, or Gustavus Vassa the African', wanda ya ba da labarin rayuwarsa. Wannan littafi ya zama mai sayarwa sosai, yana bayyana rashin mutuntaka na bauta ga jama'a a fili, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gabatar da koke ga Majalisar Dokokin Birtaniya don kawar da cinikin bayi. Equiano ya rasu a shekara ta 1797, amma an buga littafinsa kafin a zartar da Dokar Kawar da Cinikin Bayi a shekara ta 1807, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai wajen samar da ra'ayin jama'a. Labarinsa nasara ce ta mutum daya da ya fita daga bauta ya kuma sami 'yanci, kuma wani muhimmin rubutu ne don fahimtar tarihin bauta da kuma yadda aka kawar da ita. Littafinsa, tare da labaran wasu masu fafutukar kawar da bauta kamar Frederick Douglass, sun ba da gudummawa wajen farkar da lamirin bil'adama.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarki da ya haɗa kan Habasha da ta rabu, ya kare 'yancinta daga Masar, Italiya, da Mahdist, kuma ya mutu a yaƙi.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan Habasha da ta rabu kuma ya zama sarki.
Kayar da sojojin Masar masu mamayewa don kare 'yancin kai.
Mutuwa a yaƙi da Mahdist, alamar kare 'yancin kai.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Jarumi wanda ya haɗa kan Habasha kuma ya kare 'yancinta daga baƙi, ya mutu a filin yaƙi, ya zama alamar 'yancin kai na har abada.

yohannes-iv.epic:
Sunansa na asali Kassa Mercha ne na Tigray. Ya girma a cikin rudanin zamanin sarakuna masu rarrabuwa, wato 'Zemene Mesafint'. Da burin sake haɗa kan Habasha a ƙarƙashin imani ɗaya da rawani ɗaya, ya kayar da abokan hamayyarsa kuma aka naɗa Yohannes IV a matsayin 'Sarki na Sarakuna' a shekara ta 1872. Babban aikinsa na farko shi ne kawo ƙarshen rabuwar kai da ta cinye ƙasar tsawon shekaru da dama, da kuma dawo da ɗaukakar daular Solomon ta da.

Mulkinsa nan da nan ya fuskanci ƙalubale na waje. Isma'il Pasha na Masar ya fara leƙen asiri a yankin Tekun Bahar Maliya, yana neman mallakar ƙasarsu. A Gundet a shekara ta 1875 da Gura a shekara ta 1876, jarumansa sun samu nasarori masu ban mamaki a kan sojojin Masar waɗanda suka fi su yawa kuma suna da makamai na zamani. Waɗannan nasarorin ba kawai sun kare 'yancin kai na Habasha ba, har ma sun tabbatar wa duniya cewa Afirka na iya kayar da sojojin zamani, wanda hakan ya yaɗa sunansa a duk faɗin Afirka.

Amma zaman lafiya bai daɗe ba. Barazanar Masar ta ci gaba a kudu, kuma sabon abokin gaba, Italiya, ya bayyana a arewa. Sun mamaye tashar jiragen ruwa ta Massawa a shekara ta 1885, suna nuna burinsu na mulkin mallaka. A lokaci guda, a kan iyakar yamma, sojojin Mahdist na Sudan sun shelanta Jihad na Musulunci, suna barazana ga mulkinsu na Kirista. Yana kewaye da abokan gaba a kowane bangare, dole ne ya yi gwagwarmaya mai yawa don kare ikon mallakar Habasha da imaninta.

Daga ƙarshe, ya yanke shawarar fara kayar da Mahdist, babban barazana a kan iyakar yamma. A shekara ta 1889, ya jagoranci sojojinsa kai tsaye zuwa Gallabat (Metemma). Yaƙin yana gab da zama nasara mai girma a gare su, amma a daidai lokacin da yake ƙarfafa sojojinsa don samun nasara, harsashin mai harbi na abokan gaba ya ratsa jikinsa. Ya faɗi ƙasa da rauni mai tsanani, kuma mutuwarsa ta karya gwiwar sojojin da ke gab da samun nasara. Ya zama sarki na ƙarshe da ya sadaukar da ransa a filin yaƙi don ƙasarsa, kuma jininsa zai kasance alamar 'yancin kai na Habasha har abada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Usman Dan Fodiyo ya kasance malamin addinin Musulunci kuma shugaba a Yammacin Afirka a ƙarshen karni na 18 zuwa farkon karni na 19, wanda ya kafa Khalifancin Sokoto kuma ya jagoranci motsin kawo sauyi na Musulunci.
key_achievements: Ya ayyana Jihadi a kan mulkin Hausa mai cin hanci da rashawa
Ya kafa Khalifancin Sokoto, babbar daular Musulunci a Yammacin Afirka
Ya jagoranci kawo sauyi bisa shari'ar Musulunci da adalci na zamantakewa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya kafa ka'idodin ilimin Musulunci da mulkin adalci a Yammacin Afirka, kuma har yanzu yana da tasiri a yau.

usman-dan-fodio.epic:
Usman Dan Fodiyo ya kasance malamin addinin Musulunci kuma mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa a yankin Yammacin Afirka a lokacin da biranen Hausa ke daularsu, kimanin shekara ta 1754, inda ya gabatar da sabon tsari ga al'ummar da cin hanci da rashawa da kuma hada-hadar addini suka yi katutu. An haife shi a Maratta, Gobir, daya daga cikin biranen Hausa, a cikin gidan malamai na Fulani, kuma tun yana yaro ya zurfafa cikin ilimin Musulunci. Ya yi karatu a karkashin manyan malamai, inda ya sami ilimi mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban na Musulunci kamar Alkur'ani, fikihu, da tauhidi. Bayan ya girma, ya rungumi kiran zama mai wa'azi mai yawon shakatawa, inda ya zagaya ko'ina cikin kasar Hausa yana yada koyarwar Musulunci mai tsarki ga jama'a. Ya yi kakkausar suka ga cin hanci da rashawa da suka yadu a tsakanin manyan masu mulki na lokacin, da haraji marasa adalci da ke dora wa jama'a nauyi mai yawa, da kuma hada-hadar addini da ke cakuda koyarwar Musulunci mai tsarki da al'adun arna. Saƙonsa na adalci da kawo sauyi ya sami karɓuwa sosai a tsakanin manoma da Fulani makiyaya da ake zalunta, kuma al'ummar da ke bin sa sun ci gaba da girma, har suka zama wata babbar ƙungiya ta zamantakewa da addini.

Yayin da tasirin Usman Dan Fodiyo ya karu, hakan ya zama babban barazana ga sarakunan Hausa na lokacin. Musamman Sarkin Gobir, Yunfa, ya ɗauki al'ummarsa a matsayin kalubale kai tsaye ga ikonsa, kuma ya nuna kiyayya a fili. Tashin hankali ya kai kololuwa a shekara ta 1804. Lokacin da Yunfa ya yi yunkurin kai hari kan al'ummar Usman Dan Fodiyo, sai ya yi 'Hijira' (kaura) daga Degel, yana kwaikwayon hijirar Annabi Muhammad daga Makka zuwa Madina. Wannan lamari ya zama wani muhimmin juyi, ba kawai motsi ba, amma sanarwar aniyar kare imani daga mulkin duniya mai cin hanci da rashawa. Mabiyansa sun ayyana shi 'Amirul Muminina' (Kwamandan Muminai) a kan wannan hijira, kuma sun sanar da fara 'Jihadi' (yakin tsarki) don dawo da tsarkin Musulunci da kuma tabbatar da adalci a zamantakewa. Wannan ya wuce motsi na addini kawai; ya kasance cikakken kalubale ga tsarin siyasa da zamantakewa na lokacin, kuma farkon gina sabuwar daular Musulunci.

Nan da nan bayan Hijira, Usman Dan Fodiyo ya ayyana cikakken Jihadi a kan daulolin Hausa masu cin hanci da rashawa, wanda aka fi sani da 'Yakin Fulani'. Sojojinsa, da suke da kishin addini da dabaru na soja masu kyau, sun fara samun nasarori masu ban mamaki duk da cewa ba su da yawa. Sun ci gaba da mamaye manyan biranen Hausa kamar Kano da Katsina, suna faɗaɗa ikonsu. A shekara ta 1808, sojojinsa sun sami nasara mai mahimmanci, inda suka ci babban birnin Gobir, wanda Yunfa, babban abokin gaba na Usman Dan Fodiyo ke mulki. Wadannan nasarorin soja sun wuce fadada yanki kawai. Sun kasance wani tsari na kafa sabon tsarin zamantakewa bisa ka'idodin shari'ar Musulunci da adalci na zamantakewa, da kuma tabbatar da hangen nesansa na kifar da tsarin mulki marar adalci da hada-hadar addini na lokacin, da kuma gina al'ummar Musulunci ta gaskiya. Sakamakon wannan yaki shine haihuwar 'Khalifancin Sokoto', daya daga cikin manyan daulolin Musulunci masu tasiri a tarihin Yammacin Afirka.

Bayan yakin ya kare kuma Khalifancin Sokoto ya tabbata, Usman Dan Fodiyo ya ba da babban aikin gudanar da mulkin daular ga ɗan'uwansa Abdullahi da ɗansa Muhammadu Bello. Shi kuma ya koma ga karatu da rubuce-rubuce, inda ya rubuta littattafai sama da 100 kan mulki, shari'a, da tauhidi, yana bayyana hangen nesansa na kawo sauyi da ka'idodin mulkin Musulunci. Lokacin da ya rasu a shekara ta 1817, ya bar gadon ba kawai a matsayin mai cin nasara a fannin soja ba, amma a matsayin babban mai kawo sauyi kuma mai gina kasa wanda ya kawo farfaɗowa ta ilimi da ruhi a duk faɗin Yammacin Afirka. Koyarwarsa ta jaddada muhimmancin ilimi, musamman ilimin mata, kuma ta kafa ka'idodin mulkin adalci da na Musulunci. Khalifancin Sokoto ya ci gaba da zama cibiyar siyasa, addini, da al'adu a Yammacin Afirka na dogon lokaci bayan rasuwarsa. Ruhinsa na kawo sauyi ya kuma zaburar da sauran masu farfaɗo da Musulunci a Yammacin Afirka, kamar Al-Hajj Umar Tall, yana barin babban tasiri a tarihin yankin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nzinga Ndongo sarauniya ce ta masarautun Ndongo da Matamba a kudancin Afirka ta Yamma a karni na 17, wadda ta kare 'yancin kai daga mulkin mallaka na Fotigal.
key_achievements: Nuna jajircewa ta diflomasiyya a shawarwari da Fotigal
Mulkin kai na masarautun Ndongo da Matamba
Kulla kawance da Netherlands don adawa da Fotigal
Alamar ruhin juriya marar yankewa ga mulkin mallaka
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta kasance alamar juriya ga mulkin mallaka da kuma jagorancin mata mai karfi, tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga Angola da Afirka har zuwa yau.

nzinga-of-ndongo-and-matamba.epic:
Nzinga Ana de Sousa Mbande, sarauniya ce mai hazaka kuma babbar mai mulki wadda ta yi mulkin masarautun Ndongo da Matamba a kudancin Afirka ta Yamma, wanda a yau yake arewacin Angola, a farkon karni na 17. Kimanin shekarar 1583, lokacin da aka haife ta, lokaci ne na tashin hankali inda Daular Fotigal ke fadada cinikin bayi tare da karfafa mulkin mallaka a yankin. An haifi Nzinga a cikin gidan sarauta na Masarautar Ndongo, kuma ta girma cikin rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa da matsin lamba daga waje tun tana karama. Kakanta, Ngola Kilombo Kia Kasenda, shi ne sarkin Ndongo, kuma mahaifinta ya gaje shi a kan karagar mulki. A cikin wannan yanayi, Nzinga ta fara tunani mai zurfi game da makomar masarautar da kuma jin dadin jama'arta tun da wuri, wanda ya zama tushen rawar da ta taka wajen kare 'yancin masarautar daga mamayar Fotigal. Ba wai kawai yar gidan sarauta ba ce, amma jaruma ce da aka haifa don yakar rayuwar jama'arta da 'yancin kai.

Wani muhimmin lokaci a rayuwar Nzinga ya zo lokacin da dan uwanta, Ngola Mbandi, ya hau karagar mulki. Fotigal ta kara matsin lamba kan Masarautar Ndongo, tana neman haraji da samar da bayi, kuma masarautar ta fuskanci barazanar rugujewa. A shekarar 1622, an aika Nzinga a matsayin jakadiyar dan uwanta don yin shawarwari da gwamnan Fotigal a Luanda. A wurin, gwamnan ya shimfida mata matashin kai a kasa da nufin wulakanta ta, amma Nzinga ta zauna a kan bayan bawan ta a matsayin kujera, kuma ta yi shawarwari a matsayin daidai, tana nuna jajircewarta da martabar masarautarta a fili. Wannan aiki mai jaruntaka ya kasance labari mai nuna basirarta ta diflomasiyya da kuma ruhinta mai karfi. A lokacin shawarwarin, ta musulunta zuwa Kiristanci kuma aka ba ta sunan baftisma 'Ana de Sousa', amma wannan zabi ne na dabara kawai kuma bai karya burinta na 'yancin kai ba. Bayan mutuwar dan uwanta a shekarar 1624, Nzinga ta hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarauniyar Ndongo, amma ta fuskanci kalubalen barin masarautar saboda hare-hare marasa yankewa daga Fotigal da kuma abokan gaba na cikin gida.

Bayan barin Ndongo, Nzinga ba ta yanke kauna ba, kuma ta yanke shawarar jajirtacce ta koma gabas don cinye Masarautar Matamba, wadda jarumai ke mulki. Kimanin shekarar 1631, ta zama Sarauniyar Matamba kuma ta kafa sabon tushe, kuma ta tattara dakarun adawa, tana mai da wurin mafaka ga wadanda Fotigal ta bautar. Bayan zama sarauniya kawai, ta karfafa ikonta ta hanyar amfani da taken 'Ngola', wanda ke nufin sarki, kuma ta gina karfin soja mai karfi. Mulkin Nzinga ya kasance ci gaba da yaki da Fotigal, kuma ta yi amfani da yanayin kasa da kasa, tana nuna basirarta ta diflomasiyya ta hanyar kulla kawance da Netherlands, abokiyar gaba ta Fotigal. Ta jagoranci sojojinta zuwa fagen yaki da kanta, kuma ta yi amfani da dabarun yaki na 'yan daba don damun sojojin Fotigal, tana ci gaba da juriya tsawon shekaru da dama. Sunanta ya zama alamar juriya ga mulkin mallaka, kuma ta nuna kanta ba kawai mai karewa ba ce, amma mai cin nasara ce mai himma kuma mai 'yanci da ke neman dawo da 'yancin kai na kasarta.

A lokacin tsufanta, Nzinga ta yanke wata shawarar dabara. Ta sake musulunta zuwa Kiristanci, kuma a shekarar 1657, ta kulla yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya da Fotigal don kawo zaman lafiya ga masarautar da kuma kare jama'arta daga ci gaba da yaki. Wannan ya kasance karshen hikima ga dogon gwagwarmayarta, kuma nasara ce ta diflomasiyya. A shekarar 1663, Nzinga ta rasu tana da shekaru 80, amma gadonta ya ci gaba da rayuwa. Ta bar masarauta mai cin gashin kanta wadda Fotigal ba ta iya cinye ta gaba daya ba, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin mataki a tarihin Angola. Har zuwa yau, ana tuna Nzinga a Angola da kuma duk fadin Afirka a matsayin alamar ruhin juriya marar yankewa ga mulkin mallaka da kuma jagorancin mata mai karfi. Labarinta ya yi daidai da gwagwarmayar wasu manyan shugabannin mata na Afirka, kamar Muranganana na Maasai ko Nqai na Zulu, kuma yana wadatar da tarihin juriya na al'ummar Afirka ga mulkin mallaka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Idris Alooma shi ne Mai na Daular Kanem-Bornu a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16, wanda ya buɗe zamanin zinariya ga daular ta hanyar gyare-gyaren soja da na gudanarwa.
key_achievements: Kafa dangantaka da Daular Usmaniyya, gabatar da bindigogi
Faɗaɗa yankin daular ta hanyar yaƙe-yaƙe sama da 330
Gabatar da Shari'a da ƙarfafa ilimin Musulunci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gyare-gyarensa sun mai da Kanem-Bornu babbar ƙasa a yankin Sahel, kuma sun ba da gudummawa ga yaɗuwar al'adun Musulunci.

idris-alooma.epic:
Idris Alooma (ya yi mulki daga 1571 zuwa 1603) shi ne 'Mai' (Sultan) na Kanem-Bornu, wata daular Musulunci mai ƙarfi a yankin Sahel a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16 da farkon ƙarni na 17, wanda ya sake gina tare da haɗa kan daular da ke fuskantar rarrabuwa da barazanar waje. Lokacin da ya hau gadon sarauta, daular tana fuskantar lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali saboda rikicin cikin gida da mamayar waje. Gadon da mahaifinsa, Dunama Dibbalemi, ya bari yana da rauni, kuma kabilar Bulala daga gabas da biranen Hausa daga yamma suna ci gaba da keta iyakokin daular. Sojojin daular sun tsufa, kuma sarakunan yankin suna ƙalubalantar ikon tsakiya, wanda hakan ya ƙara rura wutar rikici. A cikin wannan rikici, Idris Alooma ya ji wani babban kira na sake gina daular da kuma kafa ƙasa mai ƙarfi, haɗaɗɗiya a ƙarƙashin ɗaukakar Allah. Mulkinsa ya wuce gadon sarauta kawai; ya zama wani juyi da zai buɗe sabon zamanin zinariya ga Kanem-Bornu. Ya riƙe babban hangen nesa na shawo kan rarrabuwar kawuna na cikin gida da kuma fuskantar barazanar waje don dawo da ɗaukakar daular.

Idris Alooma ya fahimci cewa sabunta sojoji yana da mahimmanci don haɗin kai da kwanciyar hankali na daular. A lokacin da yake aikin hajjinsa zuwa Makka, ya sami damar kafa dangantakar diflomasiyya da Daular Usmaniyya a Arewacin Afirka. Wannan nasarar diflomasiyya ta ba shi damar ɗaukar sojojin haya na Turkiyya masu horo kan amfani da bindigogi, wanda ya kasance sabon salo a fasahar soja a yankin Sahel a wancan lokacin. Ya kuma kafa ingantaccen tsarin tallafin kayan aiki ta amfani da raƙuma, kuma ya haɓaka sabbin dabarun yaƙi ta hanyar haɗa mahaya dawakai masu sulke da sojojin bindiga, wanda ya mayar da sojojin Kanem-Bornu zuwa mafi ƙarfi a yankin Sahel. Bisa ga wannan fifikon soja, ya jagoranci yaƙe-yaƙe sama da 330. Ta hanyar waɗannan yaƙe-yaƙe, ya fatattaki Bulala, abokan gaba na dogon lokaci a gabas, ya kafa ikonsa a yankin Hausa a yamma, kuma ya ci nasara a kan dukkanin ƙabilun da ke fafatawa a kusa da tafkin Chadi. Nasarorin sojojinsa sun zama wani muhimmin mataki na faɗaɗa yankin daular da kuma ƙarfafa ikon tsakiya.

Nasarorin soja sun ƙara ƙarfafa ta hanyar manyan gyare-gyaren gudanarwa da na addini na Idris Alooma. Ya gabatar da Shari'ar Musulunci a duk faɗin daular, ya maye gurbin dokokin al'ada daban-daban da kuma haɗa kan tsarin shari'a. Shari'a, wacce ke nufin dukkanin ka'idojin addini, ɗabi'a, da shari'a na Musulunci, ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ƙarfafa ikon gwamnatin tsakiya da kuma kafa tsarin zamantakewa. Ya kuma ƙarfafa gina masallatai ta amfani da tubali mai gasa maimakon tubalin laka, wanda ya kafa sabon ma'auni a gine-ginen Musulunci. Ta hanyar tallafa wa malamai da ƙarfafa aikin hajji zuwa Makka, ya yi ƙoƙari ya mai da Kanem-Bornu cibiyar ilimin Musulunci da imani. Waɗannan gyare-gyaren addini da na gudanarwa sun ba da gudummawa sosai wajen ƙarfafa asalin daular da kuma haɗa kan mutane daga kabilu da yankuna daban-daban a ƙarƙashin Musulunci a matsayin wata babbar cibiyar haɗin kai. Gyare-gyarensa sun wuce sauye-sauye a tsarin mulki kawai; sun kasance wani tsari na sake kafa tushen al'adu da ruhaniya na daular.

A ƙarshen mulkin Idris Alooma, Kanem-Bornu ba ta kasance ƙasa mai rarrabuwa da ke fuskantar barazana ba kamar yadda ya gada. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinsa, daular ta rikide zuwa wata daula mai ƙarfi, mai tsakiya wacce ke mulkin tafkin Chadi da kuma sarrafa muhimman hanyoyin kasuwanci da ke ratsa hamadar Sahara. Sabbin dabarunsa na soja, gyare-gyaren shari'a da na gudanarwa, da kuma tsananin imaninsa sun bar tasiri mai zurfi ga 'Mai' na gaba, kuma ana tuna su a matsayin nasarorin da suka nuna zamanin zinariya na Kanem-Bornu. Ko da yake an ce ya mutu a filin yaƙi, gadonsa ya ci gaba da rayuwa a cikin daular mai wadata da haɗin kai. Ya wuce mai cin nasara kawai; ya kasance mai gine-gine wanda ya kafa tushen daular kuma ya buɗe sabon zamani ta hanyar imani, adalci, da kuma ƙarfi mai girma. Hanyar mulkinsa da ƙoƙarinsa na yaɗa Musulunci sun cancanci a yi nazari a kansu idan aka kwatanta da jagorancin sauran shugabannin daular Musulunci a yankin Sahel na Yammacin Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Maheru Imhotep, wanda ba sarauta ba ne, a matsayin wazirin Djoser, ya tsara Pyramid mai matakai kuma ya ci gaba da ilimin likitanci, har aka girmama shi a matsayin allahn hikima da magani.
key_achievements: Ya tsara Pyramid mai matakai, babban gini na dutse na farko a tarihin ɗan adam.
Ya kafa tushen ci gaban ilimin likitanci ta hanyar lura da tunani mai ma'ana.
Ya gudanar da harkokin mulki a matsayin wazirin Fir'auna Djoser.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya zama allah ta hanyar ilimi da kirkire-kirkire, ya kasance alamar daraja fiye da asali, yana zaburar da bil'adama har zuwa yau.

imhotep.epic:
An haife shi a ƙasar da Kogin Nilu ya albarkace ta, amma bai gaji jinin sarauta ba. Sunansa Maheru Imhotep, an haife shi ɗan talaka, yana da ƙishirwar ilimi kawai da kuma burin sanya duniya ta zama wuri mafi kyau. Bai daɗe ba sai basirarsa ta ja hankalin Fir'auna Djoser, wanda ya naɗa shi waziri, ya sanya shi a matsayi na biyu mafi girma a masarautar. Ya aiwatar da dokoki, ya gudanar da baitulmalin ƙasa, kuma ya ba Fir'auna shawara mai hikima, amma ainihin makomarsa ba ta fara ba tukuna.

Fir'auna ya yi fatan cewa wurin hutawarsa na har abada zai zama wanda ba a taɓa ganin irinsa ba. Ya wuce mastabas na gargajiya da aka yi da tubalin laka, ya tsara matakan dutse da za su kai sama. Wannan shi ne farkon Pyramid mai matakai da aka gina a Saqqara. Ya jagoranci masu ginin dutse, yana ba da umarni ga aikin da ba a taɓa gani ba na haƙa, jigilar, da kuma tara manyan duwatsun farar ƙasa. Sun sake rubuta tarihin gine-gine, inda suka gina babban gini na dutse na farko a tarihin ɗan adam, suna buɗe hanya ga ran Fir'auna don hawa tsakanin taurari.

Sha'awarsa ba ta tsaya ga duwatsu kawai ba. Ya kasance mai sha'awar asirin jikin ɗan adam, kuma yana jin zafi ga waɗanda ke fama da cututtuka da raunuka. Ya nemi magunguna ba ta hanyar sihiri ko camfi ba, amma ta hanyar lura da hankali da tunani mai ma'ana. Ya gyara ƙasusuwan da suka karye, ya dinka raunuka, kuma ya rubuta alamun cututtuka marasa adadi. Takardar likitanci da aka fi sani da 'Edwin Smith Papyrus' daga baya ta dogara ne akan iliminsa da gogewarsa, kuma wannan shi ne mataki na farko wajen jagorantar ilimin likitanci daga camfi zuwa kimiyya.

Rayuwarsa ta kasance mai iyaka, amma gadonsa ya kasance har abada. Ƙarnuka bayan mutuwarsa, Masarawa sun fara bauta masa ba kawai a matsayin ɗan adam ba, amma a matsayin allahn hikima da magani. Haikalinsa ya zama wurin ziyara ga marasa lafiya da waɗanda ke neman ilimi. Daga haihuwar ɗan talaka zuwa ga girmama shi a matsayin allah, labarinsa ya kasance hujja cewa ayyuka da kirkire-kirkire, ba asali ba, ne ke tantance ainihin darajar mutum, kuma ana ba da labarin har zuwa yau. Ya gina har abada da dutse da ilimi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ibn Tumart ya kasance mai kawo sauyi a addini a Maghreb a ƙarshen ƙarni na 11, kuma ya kafa tushen akidar Khalifancin Almohad.
key_achievements: Kafa da yaɗa tunanin Tawhid
Suka ga daular Almoravid da jagorantar motsin gyara
Kafa motsin Almohad da ayyana kansa Mahdi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya zama tushen Khalifancin Almohad, wanda ya canza yanayin addini da al'adu na duniyar Musulunci ta Yamma.

ibn-tumart.epic:
Ibn Tumart (an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 1080) ya kasance mai kawo sauyi a addini a yankin Maghreb na Arewacin Afirka kuma wanda ya kafa tushen akidar Khalifancin Almohad. An haife shi a ƙarshen ƙarni na 11 a wani ƙauyen kabilar Masmuda Berber a tsaunin Atlas, ya fahimci cewa tsarkakar addini tana raguwa duk da wadata a duniyar Musulunci a lokacin. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna ibada ta musamman da kuma sha'awar ilimi mai zurfi, wanda ya sa ya nufi gabas don neman ilimi. Ya yi karatu tsawon shekaru a manyan cibiyoyin ilimi na lokacin kamar Cordoba, Baghdad, da Damascus, inda ya zurfafa bincike a ilimin tauhidi na Musulunci, fikihu, da Hadisi. Musamman ma, ya kasance mai tasiri daga tunanin malamai irin su Al-Ghazali, wanda ya ƙarfafa imaninsa ga cikakkiyar kadaitar Allah, wato 'Tawhid'. A wannan lokacin, ya tabbata cewa tauhidin daular Almoravid, wadda ke mulkin Maghreb, ta kauce daga ka'idar Tawhid ta hanyar kwatanta Allah da mutum, kuma ta faɗa cikin kuskure. Wannan ya zama babban dalilin motsinsa na gyara a nan gaba.

A kan hanyarsa ta komawa Maghreb, Ibn Tumart ya ga lalacewar ɗabi'a da addini a cikin al'umma, kuma ya fara sukar su sosai, bisa ga tsarkakakken koyarwar Musulunci da ya koya. A garuruwa da ƙauyukan da ya ratsa, ya ɗauki kiɗa a matsayin zunubi, ya fasa kayan kiɗa, ya tsawata wa matan da ba su sanya lulluɓi ba a fili kamar yadda shari'ar Musulunci ta tanada, kuma ya yi kakkausar suka ga ayyukan fasikanci da ke faruwa a kasuwanni. Wannan halinsa mai tsauri da kai tsaye ya bayyana a matsayin ƙalubale kai tsaye ga tsarin daular Almoravid da kuma al'adun addini na lokacin. Sakamakon haka, an kore shi daga garuruwa da yawa kuma an tsananta masa. Amma waɗannan gwagwarmaya sun ƙarfafa imaninsa, kuma saƙonsa na gyara ya fara jawo hankalin mutane da yawa waɗanda ba su gamsu da mulkin Almoravid ba kuma suna fatan samun canjin addini da zamantakewa na gaskiya. Sunansa ya yaɗu a hankali, kuma ya zama cibiyar motsi na gyara addini, fiye da malami kawai.

Duk da tsanantawa, mabiyan Ibn Tumart sun ƙaru a hankali, kuma kusa da Marrakech, ya sadu da Abd al-Mu'min, wanda daga baya zai zama Khalifan farko na Khalifancin Almohad. Bayan samun goyon baya mai ƙarfi daga Abd al-Mu'min, Ibn Tumart ya koma sansaninsa daga cibiyar mulkin Almoravid zuwa yankin Tinmel a tsaunin Atlas, garinsu. Tsaunukan Tinmel masu tsauri sun kasance wuri mai kyau don shirya da horar da mabiyansa. A kusan shekara ta 1121, ya ayyana kansa a matsayin 'Mahdi' a gaban mabiyansa. Mahdi yana nufin shugaba marar kuskure kuma mai ceto da aka yi alkawari, wanda aka ambata a cikin ilimin ƙarshen zamani na Musulunci. Ya shirya mabiyansa a ƙarƙashin sunan 'Al-Muwaḥḥidun', wato 'Masu tabbatar da kadaitar Allah'. Sun kafa al'umma mai tsaurin tsari da horo, kuma sun fara shirya jihadi a kan daular Almoravid da ta lalace, bisa ga tsarkakakken tunanin Tawhid na Ibn Tumart. Gwagwarmayar su daga Tinmel ba ta da sauƙi, amma imaninsu bai girgiza ba.

Ibn Tumart ya jagoranci motsin Almohad a matsayin shugaban ruhaniya da kuma mai tsara dabarun yaƙi, amma ya rasu a kusan shekara ta 1130 ba tare da ya ga nasarar ƙarshe ba. Duk da haka, mutuwarsa ta zama wani juyi wanda ya nuna sabon farawa, ba ƙarshen motsin Almohad ba. Abd al-Mu'min, almajirinsa mafi aminci kuma magajinsa, ya ci gaba da aikinsa, ya hambarar da daular Almoravid, kuma ya kafa Khalifancin Almohad wanda ya mamaye yankuna masu faɗi daga Iberian Peninsula zuwa Libya. Tunanin Ibn Tumart ya zama akidar mulki da tushen al'adu da zamantakewa na Khalifancin Almohad, kuma tsaurin ka'idarsa ta Tawhid ya canza yanayin addini na duniyar Musulunci ta Yamma gaba ɗaya. Gadonsa ya wuce kafa daula kawai, ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin tauhidin Musulunci, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga sauran masu kawo sauyi waɗanda suka yi kira ga dawo da tsarkakar duniyar Musulunci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jaruma mai karfi kuma mai mulki wacce aka haifa a cikin duniya mai cike da iko da yaki, ta fadada masarautar Zazzau kuma ta gina katangu.
key_achievements: Fadada iyakokin masarautar Zazzau sosai.
Cin nasara a kan masarautu masu karfi da kuma tabbatar da haraji.
Gina katangu masu karfi da aka sani da Ganuwar Amina.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta tabbatar da cewa mata ma za su iya zama masu mulki masu karfi, kuma ganuwarta sun kasance alama ce ta dawwamammen iko.

amina-of-zazzau.epic:
An haife ta a cikin duniya mai cike da iko da rikice-rikice. Kimanin shekara ta 1533, an haife ta a matsayin jikanyar Sarkin Nohir mai girma na Zazzau. Mahaifiyarta, Bakwa ta Turunku, ita ce sarauniyar da ke mulki a lokacin, kuma tun tana karama ta shiga cikin siyasa da yaki na birnin Hausa. Yayin da sauran 'yan mata ke koyon ayyukan gida, ita kuma tana goge fasahar amfani da mashi da takobi a filin horo. Kakanta ya gane wutar da ke cikinta kuma ya nada ta Magajiya, wato magajiyarta. Wannan shawarar ta kai ta ga tafarkin kaddara, tana shirye don jagoranci, yaki, da mulki.

Tsawon shekaru, ta yi yaki tare da dan uwanta Karam a lokacin mulkinsa, tana aiki a matsayin shugabar dawakansu. Ta koyi kididdigar yaki, zukatan sojoji, da dabarun da ke canza yanayin yaki. Lokacin da Karam ya rasu bayan shekaru goma na mulki, zabin ya bayyana. Jaruman Zazzau ba za su bi wani ba. Kimanin shekara ta 1576, ta hau karagar mulki ba a matsayin mai mulki ba ko kuma wata alama, amma a matsayin cikakkiyar kwamandan sojojinsu. Mulkinta ya fara ne a filin yaki, ba a fada ba, tare da alkawarin ga mutanenta cewa Zazzau ba za ta rayu kawai ba, amma za ta yi mulki.

Mulkinta ya kasance zamanin fadada mara yankewa. Tsawon shekaru 34, ta jagoranci sojojinta masu karfi, Gashiyan Amina, a cikin balaguro marasa adadi. Sun fadada iyakokin Zazzau fiye da kowane lokaci, daga Kano a gabas zuwa babban kogin Niger a kudu da yamma. Ta ci nasara a kan masarautu masu karfi kamar Nupe da Kano, ta sanya su biya haraji, kuma ta tabbatar da ikonsu a kan muhimman hanyoyin kasuwanci na Trans-Sahara. Don kare nasarorinsu da biranensu, ta ba da umarnin gina manyan ganuwar kasa, wato 'Ganuwar Amina'—katangar kariya mai karfi da aka sani da ganuwar Amina. Waɗannan ganuwar ba don kariya kawai ba ne; su ne alama ce ta karfinsu da dawwamarsu.

Rayuwarta ta kare kamar yadda ta rayu, a lokacin balaguro a garin Atagara. Ko da yake ba ta yi aure ba kuma ba ta haifi 'ya'ya ba, gadonta shi ne babban masarautar da ta gina. Ta tabbatar da cewa mace za ta iya zama jaruma mai karfi kuma mai mulki mai hazaka. Kamar yadda tarihin Kano ya bayyana ta daga baya, 'mace mai iyawa kamar namiji.' Ganuwar da ta gina har yanzu suna tsaye a wurare daban-daban, shaida mai shiru ga zamanin cin nasara da iko. Labarinta mawaka suna rera shi kuma mutanenta suna tunawa da shi, yana tunatar da mu cewa jagoranci ba batun jinsi ba ne, amma batun nufi ne, jaruntaka, da burin da ba ya karyewa na samar da gado mai dorewa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Zera Yacob masanin falsafa ne na Habasha a karni na 17, wanda ya rubuta 'Hatata', yana binciken haƙuri na addini da ɗabi'a ta hanyar tunaninsa na musamman mai tushe a kan hankali.
key_achievements: Ya ɓoye a cikin kogo don guje wa zaluncin addini
Ya kafa tsarin falsafa na musamman mai tushe a kan hankali
Ya rubuta littafin falsafa 'Hatata' kuma ya yada tunaninsa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin tunani na Habasha, kuma ya tunatar da mahimmancin bincike na hankali.

zera-yacob.epic:
Zera Yacob (an haife shi a shekara ta 1599) wani masanin falsafa ne wanda ya gina nasa tunani na musamman a lokacin rikicin addini a Habasha a karni na 17. An haife shi a wani gida aikin gona kusa da Aksum a shekara ta 1599, ya sami ilimi mai zurfi, yana nazarin ilimin magana, waka, da tauhidi a cikin al'adar Cocin Orthodox na Habasha. Zamaninsa ya kasance lokacin da rikicin addini ya yi kamari, yayin da Sarkin sarakawa Susenyos ya koma Katolika kuma ya zalunci Cocin Orthodox na Habasha. A cikin wannan yanayi, Yacob bai takaita kansa da koyarwar gargajiya ba, amma ya fara jin sha'awar binciken gaskiya ta hakika, yana shakkar gibin da ke tsakanin dokokin mutane da nufin Allah. Ya kwatanta koyarwar addinai daban-daban, ya gano sabani a cikinsu, kuma ya haɓaka ra'ayi mai mahimmanci game da tsarin imani na yanzu. Wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe ga falsafarsa mai tushe a kan hankali wanda zai gabatar daga baya. Tsattsauran ra'ayin addini da zalunci na wancan lokacin sun yi tasiri sosai a rayuwarsa da tunaninsa, kuma sun zama dalili mai mahimmanci da ya sa ya bi hanyar tunani mai zurfi shi kaɗai.

A shekara ta 1626, Zera Yacob ya tilasta masa barin garinsu ya gudu zuwa kudu don guje wa zaluncin addini na Sarkin sarakawa Susenyos. Ya ɓoye a cikin wani kogo mai nisa daga mutane, inda ya shafe shekaru biyu cikin cikakkiyar kadaici. Wannan lokaci ya zama mafi mahimmancin juyawa a tafiyarsa ta falsafa. Cikin rabuwa da duniya ta waje, ya fara sake tunani game da komai daga farko, yana dogaro ga hankalin ɗan adam da Allah ya ba shi, wato 'hasken zuciya'. A wannan lokacin, ya fara sake tunani game da komai daga farko, yana dogaro ga hankali, wanda shine ginshiƙin bincikensa na falsafa da aka sani da 'Hatata'. Ya yi nazari mai zurfi game da yanayin ɗan adam, dokokin al'umma, da kuma imani na addinai daban-daban, yana gudanar da bincike na hankali mai tsabta wanda bai takaita kansa da koyarwar gargajiya ko al'adu ba. Ta hanyar wannan lokaci na tunani mai zurfi shi kaɗai, ya kai ga ƙarshe cewa dukkan mutane daidai suke, suna da hankali, kuma ta hanyar hankali za su iya bambance tsakanin nagarta da mugunta kuma su kai ga gaskiya. Kwarewarsa a cikin kogon ta ƙara zurfin tunaninsa, kuma ta zama dalili mai mahimmanci na gina tsarin falsafarsa na musamman.

A shekara ta 1632, yanayin siyasa a Habasha ya canza sosai. Sarkin sarakawa Fasilides ya hau karagar mulki, ya soke manufofin Sarkin sarakawa Susenyos na sanya Katolika a matsayin addinin kasa, kuma ya maido da imani na Cocin Orthodox na Habasha. Sakamakon haka, Zera Yacob ya sami damar kawo karshen rayuwarsa ta ɓoye a cikin kogo kuma ya fito duniya. Ya zauna a wani kauye mai suna Enfraz, ya auri wata mata mai suna Hirut, kuma ya gina iyali. Hirut ba kawai matarsa ba ce, amma kuma abokiyar tunaninsa ce wacce ta yi tasiri sosai a tafiyarsa ta falsafa. Yayin da yake neman damar tsara fahimtar da ya samu ta hanyar tunani a cikin kogo, bisa roƙon almajirinsa kuma abokinsa, Walda Heywat, ya fara rubuta tunaninsa na falsafa a tsari. Ta haka ne littafinsa guda ɗaya tilo, kuma wani aiki mai tarihi a tarihin falsafar Habasha, 'Hatata', wato 'Bincike', ya samu. Wannan littafi shine tarihin tunaninsa mai zurfi shi kaɗai, kuma yana ɗauke da ainihin binciken gaskiya mai tushe a kan hankali.

'Hatata' shine kololuwar tafiyar falsafa ta Zera Yacob, kuma shine mafi mahimmancin gadonsa da aka bar wa tsararraki masu zuwa. A cikin wannan littafi, ya soki tsattsauran ra'ayin addini da imani makaho, kuma ya yi iƙirarin cewa dukkan mutane za su iya gano dokokin ɗabi'a na duniya kuma su kai ga gaskiya ta hanyar hankali. Ya jaddada cewa hankalin ɗan adam kyauta ce daga Allah, kuma ta hanyarsa za mu iya bambance tsakanin nagarta da mugunta kuma mu rayu rayuwa mai adalci. Tunaninsa yana da kamanceceniya mai ban mamaki da falsafar Haskakawa wacce ta fara bunƙasa a Turai a wancan lokacin, amma ya kai ga waɗannan ƙarshe ta hanyar yanayin Habasha mai keɓe kansa da kuma tunaninsa mai zurfi shi kaɗai, ba tare da tasiri daga waje ba. 'Hatata' nasa ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin tunani na Habasha, kuma ya kasance muhimmin rubutu wanda ke tunatar da mahimmancin bincike na hankali. Tunaninsa, ta haka, ana kwatanta shi da na masana falsafa na wasu lokuta waɗanda suka binciki gaskiya ta duniya ko da a cikin irin wannan yanayi mai keɓe kansa, misali, masana falsafar Haskakawa na Turai, yana nuna ikon tunani wanda ya wuce lokaci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: John Chilembwe ya kasance mai fafutukar samun 'yanci kuma fasto a Nyasaland a farkon karni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci tawaye a kan mulkin mallaka.
key_achievements: Kafa Providence Industrial Mission (PIM).
Jagorantar tawaye a kan cin zarafi na gwamnatin mulkin mallaka.
Ana girmama shi a matsayin alamar gwagwarmayar samun 'yancin kai na Malawi.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sadaukarwarsa ta zama ginshikin 'yancin kai na Malawi kuma ta ba da kwarin gwiwa ga yunkurin 'yantar da Afirka.

john-chilembwe.epic:
John Chilembwe (an haife shi kusan 1871) ya kasance mai fafutukar samun 'yanci kuma fasto na Baptist a Nyasaland (yanzu Malawi) a farkon karni na 20, an haife shi a lokacin tashin hankali, lokacin da inuwar mulkin mallaka na Turai ta lulluɓe nahiyar Afirka. Ya yi yarintarsa a Nyasaland, wadda ke karkashin ikon gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Birtaniya, kuma wannan ya zama wani ginshiki mai zurfi na fahimtar kansa a matsayin dan kasa. Rayuwar Chilembwe ta dauki wani sabon salo mai ban mamaki a kusan 1892 lokacin da ya sadu da Joseph Booth, wani mai wa'azin Baptist mai tsattsauran ra'ayi kuma mai imani da daidaiton launin fata. Booth ya gane hazakar Chilembwe kuma a 1897 ya kai shi Amurka don samun ilimin Yamma. Kwarewarsa a Amurka ta ba Chilembwe damar samun hangen nesa game da duniya da kuma ikon kallon gaskiyar al'ummarsa da ke karkashin mulkin mallaka ba tare da son zuciya ba. A wannan lokacin ne ya karfafa imaninsa da ka'idodinsa, bisa zurfin fahimtar wayewar Yamma da koyarwar Kirista.

A Amurka, John Chilembwe ya ci gaba da karatunsa a Virginia Theological Seminary and College, inda ya ga kuma ya fuskanci gaskiyar wariyar launin fata da ta yadu a cikin al'ummar Amurka a lokacin. Wannan kwarewa ta haifar da tausayi mai zurfi ga wahala da gwagwarmayar Baƙar fata Amurkawa, kuma ya kara karfafa azamarsa na 'yantar da mutanensa daga zalunci. Ya gane cewa kiransa shine ya taimaka wa Afirkawa su dawo da mutuncinsu da kuma dogaro da kai ta hanyar ilimi da addini. Bayan an nada shi fasto na Baptist a 1900, Chilembwe ya dawo kasarsa ta Nyasaland da sabon manufa a zuciyarsa. Manufarsa ita ce kafa al'ummar Kirista da Afirka ke jagoranta, ba tare da ikon Turai ba, kuma ta hanyar wannan, ya ilmantar da 'yan uwansa da kuma kare haƙƙoƙinsu. Ya fara tafiya a matsayin shugaba wanda zai jagoranci 'yancin ruhaniya da zamantakewa na al'ummarsa, fiye da shugaban addini kawai.

Bayan ya dawo Nyasaland a 1901, John Chilembwe ya kafa Providence Industrial Mission (PIM). PIM ba coci kawai ba ne; ta kasance al'ummar rayuwa mai cikakken bayani da cibiyar ilimi, wadda ta haɗa da makarantu da gonaki, tana koyar da Afirkawa dogaro da kai da mutunci. Chilembwe ya yi imani da gaske cewa ilimi shine kayan aiki mafi karfi don kubuta daga zalunci, kuma ta hanyar PIM, ya taimaka wa dubban Afirkawa su koyi karatu da rubutu, su sami fasaha, da kuma dawo da mutuncinsu. Duk da haka, cin zarafi na gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Birtaniya ya ci gaba da tsananta yayin da lokaci ke wucewa. Harajin bukkoki marasa adalci, aiki tilas, da kuma tilasta wa matasan Afirka shiga yaƙi a Turai bayan barkewar Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, duk sun kai haƙurin Chilembwe iyaka. Ya nuna adawa a fili ga manufofin zalunci na gwamnatin mulkin mallaka kuma ya daga muryar adawa, kuma wannan ya zama dalili mai mahimmanci wanda a karshe ya kai ga tashin hankali na makamai.

A Janairu 1915, John Chilembwe a karshe ya yanke shawarar daukar mataki kuma ya jagoranci tawaye tare da mabiyansa a kan alamomin mulkin mallaka. Babban manufar wannan tawaye ba wai kafa kasa mai cin gashin kanta nan da nan ba ne, a'a, nuna adawa mai karfi ga zalunci mai tsanani da mutanensa ke fuskanta. Gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Birtaniya ta murkushe tawayen cikin 'yan makonni, kuma an kashe Chilembwe yayin da yake gudu. Ko da yake a lokacin an dauke shi a matsayin tawaye da ya gaza, sadaukarwarsa ba ta tafi a banza ba. Sunan John Chilembwe ya zama alama ce ta gwagwarmayar samun 'yancin kai na Malawi, kuma ruhinsa yana ci gaba da rayuwa a Malawi, wadda a karshe ta sami 'yanci bayan shekaru da yawa. Ana girmama shi a matsayin jarumin kasa na Malawi, kuma jaruntakarsa da ruhin adawa suna ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa har zuwa yau. Ruhinsa yana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar sauran shugabannin Afirka da suka yi yaki da mulkin mallaka da wariyar launin fata, kamar Nelson Mandela na Afirka ta Kudu da Martin Luther King Jr. na Amurka, yana cika wani shafi mai mahimmanci a cikin yunkurin 'yantar da Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarkin Zulu na ƙarshe wanda ya yi yaƙi don kare 'yancin Masarautar Zulu a kan ɗan'uwansa uba ɗaya da Birtaniya, amma daga ƙarshe ya rasa masarautar kuma ya mutu cikin baƙin ciki.
key_achievements: Ya ci ɗan'uwansa uba ɗaya Mbuyazi kuma ya hau gadon sarauta
Ya zamantar da kuma ƙarfafa sojojin Zulu, Amabutho
Ya sami gagarumar nasara a kan sojojin Birtaniya a Yaƙin Isandlwana
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin sarki na ƙarshe na Masarautar Zulu mai cin gashin kanta, alamar juriya da alfaharin al'umma.

cetshwayo-kampande.epic:
An haife shi ɗan babban Sarki Mpande, amma hanyarsa ba ta taɓa zama mai sauƙi ba. Hanyar zuwa gadon sarautar mahaifinsa ta kasance cike da gwagwarmayar jini da ɗan'uwansa uba ɗaya, Mbuyazi. A shekara ta 1856, a Yaƙin Ndondakusuka da aka yi a gabar Kogin Tugela, Cetshwayo kaMpande ya yi nasara, kuma jarumansa suka ci Mbuyazi. Wannan nasara ta sanya shi zama magajin Masarautar Zulu ba tare da jayayya ba, amma farashin ya yi yawa, inda ya bar raunuka masu zurfi a cikin al'ummarsu.

Bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa a shekara ta 1873, Cetshwayo kaMpande ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Sarkin Zulu. Ya yi ƙoƙari sosai don ƙarfafawa da zamantar da sojojinsu, wato Amabutho. Ya gabatar da bindigogi tare da mashi na gargajiya (assegai) da garkuwar fatar saniya, wanda ya sanya sojojinsu zama runduna mai ƙarfi. Amma mulkinsa ya kasance a ƙarƙashin inuwar burin Birtaniya da ke ƙaruwa a Natal. Sun ɗauki ƙarfin sojojinsa a matsayin barazana, kuma a ƙarshen shekara ta 1878, sun aika masa da saƙon ƙarshe wanda ba zai yiwu ba, suna buƙatar rusa masarautarsa. Ya so zaman lafiya, amma ba zai iya barin mutuncin al'ummarsa da 'yancinsu ba.

Yaƙi ya zama dole. A ranar 22 ga Janairu, 1879, jarumansa sun sami gagarumar nasara a kan sojojin Birtaniya a gangaren Dutsen Isandlwana. Wannan lokaci ne da ya nuna jarumtaka da dabaru na al'ummarsu, amma farin cikin nasarar bai daɗe ba. Birtaniya sun dawo da runduna mafi girma, kuma a watan Yuli, a Yaƙin Ulundi, an ci su da yaƙi. Cetshwayo kaMpande ya zama ɗan gudun hijira, kuma daga ƙarshe aka kama shi a Dajin Ngome aka kore shi zuwa Cape Town.

Amma labarinsa bai ƙare a nan ba. Bai daina yaƙi don al'ummarsa ba. A shekara ta 1882, ya tafi Landan ya gana da Sarauniya Victoria da kansa. Ya nemi a maido masa da sarautarsa, kuma abin mamaki, ya yi nasara. Amma masarautar da ya dawo mata ta kasance a rabe, kuma ikonsa ya ragu sosai. Yaƙin basasa ya ɓarke, kuma dole ne ya sake gudu. A shekara ta 1884, ya rasu, yana gajiye kuma yana cikin baƙin ciki. Ana tuna shi a matsayin sarki na ƙarshe na Masarautar Zulu mai cin gashin kanta, amma ruhinsa yana raye har abada a cikin juriya da alfaharin al'ummarsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Khufu Fir'auna ne wanda ya jagoranci Masar zuwa wadata kuma ya gina Babban Pyramid na Giza, ya bar ikon Allah da manyan nasarori.
key_achievements: Jagorantar ginin Babban Pyramid na Giza
Kafa zamanin wadata da kwanciyar hankali a Masar
Haɓaka ma'adinan Sinai da haɓaka kasuwanci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sunansa da Babban Pyramid za a tuna da su har abada a matsayin alamar babban fasahar gine-gine da ƙarfin tsari na ɗan adam.

khufu.epic:
Ya hau gadon sarautar Masar bayan mahaifinsa, Sneferu. Mahaifinsa ya riga ya buɗe zamanin manyan gine-gine ta hanyar Pyramids masu lanƙwasa da Red Pyramid, kuma shi, Khufu, ya gaji wannan gado, ya jagoranci Masar zuwa zamanin wadata da kwanciyar hankali. Sarautarsa, a matsayinsa na Fir'auna mai ikon Allah, ta kasance wajibi mai tsarki a gare shi don haɗa ƙasashe biyu da kiyaye Ma'at, wato tsarin duniya da adalci. Bai kasance mai mulki kawai ba, amma Allah mai rai wanda ke aiki a matsayin gada tsakanin alloli da mutane.

Babban nasararsa, ba tare da shakka ba, shine Babban Pyramid na Giza. Wannan ba kabari ne kawai ba; abin tunawa ne na har abada wanda ke nuna ikonsa na Allah da ƙarfin tsari na Masarautar Masar. Dubban ma'aikata masu fasaha, ba bayi ba, sun shiga cikin wannan babban aiki, suna karɓar albashi mai kyau. Sun yi masa hidima kamar yadda suke yi wa alloli, kuma tare suka mai da abin da ba zai yiwu ba ya zama mai yiwuwa. Pyramid ɗin ya kasance aikin ƙasa wanda ya haɗa mutanensa a ƙarƙashin manufa ɗaya, kuma gida ne na har abada da ruhinsa ke buƙata don tafiya zuwa lahira.

A lokacin mulkinsa, Masar ta kasance mai wadata. Ya aika balaguro zuwa ma'adinan Sinai don hako turquoise da jan karfe, kuma ya ƙara arzikin ƙasar ta hanyar kasuwanci. Ikon sa ya kasance cikakke, kuma tsarin gudanarwarsa ya kasance mai inganci. Amma bayan dubban shekaru, masanin tarihi na Girka, Herodotus, ya bayyana shi a matsayin azzalumi wanda ya ci zarafin mutanensa kuma ya rufe haikalai. Wannan ya yi nisa da ainihin halinsa. Mulkinsa ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin zamanin zinariya na Masar, kuma Babban Pyramid shine shaidar wannan wadata.

Yanzu jikinsa yana barci a cikin zurfin pyramid, amma sunansa da gadonsa suna rayuwa har abada. Babban Pyramid ba tarin duwatsu ne kawai ba, amma alama ce ta babban ci gaban fasaha da gudanarwa wanda nufin ɗan adam da imani suka haifar. Sunansa, Khufu, za a tuna da shi har abada tare da mafi girman gine-gine da ɗan adam ya taɓa ginawa. Wannan shine rayuwar madawwami da ya yi niyya, kuma shine nasararsa ta gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Cleopatra VII ita ce Fir'auna ta ƙarshe ta Masar a zamanin Hellenistic, wacce ta yi ƙoƙarin kare masarautarta a cikin dangantaka mai sarkakiya da Roma.
key_achievements: Ta dawo da kursiyinta ta hanyar kawance da Julius Caesar.
Ta haɗa kai da Marcus Antonius don adawa da Roma.
Ita ce shugabar Ptolemaic guda ɗaya da ta iya yaren Masar.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mutuwarta ta nuna ƙarshen zamanin Hellenistic da kuma zama lardin Roma na Masar, kuma har yau tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ta al'adu.

cleopatra-vii.epic:
Cleopatra VII (an haife ta kusan 69 K.Z., ta mutu 30 K.Z.) ita ce Fir'auna ta ƙarshe ta Masarautar Ptolemaic ta tsohuwar Masar, kuma wata alama ce mai girma ta zamanin Hellenistic. Ta kasance zuriyar Ptolemy I Soter, wani janar ɗin Girka na Macedonia na Alexander Mai Girma, kuma ta yi mulkin Masar daga 51 K.Z. zuwa 30 K.Z. Daular Ptolemaic, wata masarauta ce ta Hellenistic da aka kafa a Masar bayan mutuwar Alexander Mai Girma da raba daularsa, ta yi mulkin Masar kusan ƙarni uku. Bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, Ptolemy XII, Cleopatra ta zama mai mulki tare da ƙanenta, Ptolemy XIII, amma wannan shine farkon siyasar fada mai cike da rudani. Ta yi amfani da Koine Greek a matsayin yaren ta na asali, kuma ba wai kawai ta iya harsuna da yawa ba, har ma tana da hazaka mai ban mamaki da fahimtar al'adu, har ta zama shugabar daular Ptolemaic guda ɗaya da aka rubuta cewa ta koyi yaren Masar. Wannan tushe ya zama ginshiƙin ƙoƙarinta na kiyaye 'yancin Masar a cikin yanayin siyasar duniya mai sarkakiya.

Amma mulkin Cleopatra bai kasance mai sauƙi ba. Saboda gwagwarmayar iko a cikin fada da rikici da ɗan'uwanta, an kore ta daga Alexandria kuma ta yi gudun hijira zuwa Siriya. A cikin wannan gwaji, ta nemi damar dawo da kursiyinta, kuma a daidai lokacin, babban janar ɗin Roma, Julius Caesar, ya isa Alexandria don shiga cikin yakin basasa na Masar. Cleopatra ta yi wani shiri mai ban mamaki don kusantar Caesar, inda ta nade kanta a cikin kafet kuma aka shigar da ita cikin ɓoye zuwa gidansa. Wannan haɗuwa mai ban mamaki ta kama zuciyar Caesar, kuma ta sanya hankalinta da burinta a matsayin Sarauniyar Masar mai halacci, ba kawai mai gudun hijira ba. Tare da goyon bayan soja na Caesar, ta kawo ƙarshen yakin basasa kuma ta kayar da Ptolemy XIII, ta kafa kanta a matsayin shugabar Masar guda ɗaya. Dangantakarsu ta wuce kawancen siyasa zuwa dangantaka ta sirri, inda ta haifi ɗan Caesar, Caesarion, wanda ya ba da damar sabuwar daular da za ta haɗa Masar da Roma.

Kawancen da ta yi da Caesar ya kawo zaman lafiya da wadata ga Masar, amma lokacin da aka kashe Caesar a Roma a 44 K.Z., manyan shirye-shiryenta sun fuskanci babban gwaji. Dole ne ta gaggauta komawa Masar tare da ɗanta Caesarion, kuma Roma ta sake shiga cikin yakin basasa. Cleopatra ta yi amfani da albarkatun Masar masu yawa da matsayinta na dabara don ƙarfafa matsayinta, tana neman sabbin dangantaka da masu iko na Roma. A lokacin Triumvirate na Biyu na Roma, ta sadu da Marcus Antonius, ɗaya daga cikin magajin Caesar. Ta bayyana a gabansa a matsayin allahiya Isis, ta burge Antonius, kuma dangantakarsu ta wuce kawancen siyasa zuwa haɗin kai na soyayya mai zurfi da iko. Alexandria ta zama cibiyar soyayyarsu da ikonsu, kuma sun haifi yara uku, suna mulkin yankunan gabas na Roma tare. Amma wannan haɗin kai mai ƙarfi ya haifar da kishi da ƙiyayya daga Octavian, wani mai iko na Roma kuma ɗan riƙon Caesar.

A ƙarshe, Octavian ya ayyana Cleopatra da Antonius a matsayin barazana ga Roma kuma ya shelanta yaki. A 31 K.Z., yakin Actium da aka yi a gabar tekun yammacin Girka ya haifar da mummunar shan kashi ga sojojin haɗin gwiwa na Cleopatra da Antonius. Wannan shan kashi ya karya dukkan fatansu, kuma Antonius ya kashe kansa bayan ya ji labarin ƙarya na mutuwar Cleopatra. Maimakon a ja ta a cikin jerin gwanon nasara na Octavian kuma a wulakanta ta, Cleopatra ta kare mutuncinta a matsayin Fir'auna ta ƙarshe ta daular Ptolemaic ta hanyar kawo ƙarshen rayuwarta da kanta ta amfani da maciji mai dafi. Da mutuwarta, Masar ta zama lardin Daular Roma, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci na tarihi da ya nuna ƙarshen zamanin Hellenistic, wanda ya ɗauki kimanin shekaru 300 a yankin Bahar Rum. Labarin Cleopatra har yanzu ana tunawa da shi a matsayin wani hali mai ban sha'awa ta hanyar ayyukan fasaha da yawa, adabi, da fina-finai har zuwa yau, kuma ya kasance misali na wasan kwaikwayo na ɗan adam inda iko, soyayya, da bala'i suka haɗu. Rayuwarta ta nuna ƙarshen zamanin Hellenistic bayan Alexander Mai Girma, kuma a lokaci guda, tana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar sauran sarakunan da suka yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye 'yancinsu a cikin faɗaɗawar Daular Roma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Annabi wadda, a cikin Kongo da ya lalace sakamakon yaƙin basasa, ta ga wahayi na Waliyi Anthony, ta yi wa'azin Kiristanci mai tushe a Kongo, kuma ta yi kira ga haɗin kai.
key_achievements: Kafa da yaɗa tunanin Kiristanci mai tushe a Kongo
Haɗa kan mutanen Kongo ta hanyar 'Ƙungiyar Antonine'
Jagorantar sake gina babban birnin da ya lalace, Mbanza Kongo
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tana ci gaba da yin tasiri a matsayin alamar gwagwarmayar haɗin kan Kongo da dogaro da kai na addini na Afirka.

kimpa-vita.epic:
An haife ta a kusan shekara ta 1684 a Masarautar Kongo, wadda ta lalace sakamakon yaƙe-yaƙe na cikin gida na tsawon shekaru da dama. An yi mata baftisma da sunan Dona Beatriz, amma duniyar da ke kewaye da ita cike take da rarrabuwar kai da yanke kauna. Babban birninsu na da, Mbanza Kongo, an yi watsi da shi, kuma masu da'awar sarauta sun ƙara raba ƙasar. Ta girma cikin wannan wahala, tana fatan samun wani abu da zai haɗa mutanenta.

A shekara ta 1704, ta yi rashin lafiya mai tsanani har ta kai ga bakin mutuwa. A lokacin ne ta ga wahayi. Waliyi Anthony ya bayyana gare ta, ya gaya mata cewa an zaɓe ta a matsayin tasarsa ta duniya. Ta warke ta hanyar mu'ujiza, kuma tun daga nan ne aikinta ya fara. Tana magana da muryar Waliyi Anthony, ta yi wa'azin Kiristanci mai tushe a Kongo. Ta koyar da cewa Yesu da mahaifiyarsa Maryam, da sauran waliyai, duk mutanen Kongo ne. Ta bayyana cewa aljanna ta gaskiya tana ga mutanen Kongo ne, kuma koyarwar mishaneri na Turai ƙarya ce.

Saƙonta ya ba da bege mai ƙarfi ga waɗanda ke fama da yaƙin basasa. Dubban mabiya sun bi ta, kuma tare suka yi tattaki zuwa babban birnin da ya lalace, Mbanza Kongo, suka fara sake ginawa. Ya zama sabon Urushalima a gare su. Tana jagorantar 'Ƙungiyar Antonine', ta yi kira ga haɗin kan Kongo, tana neman biyayya daga duka masu da'awar sarauta na masarautar da ta rarrabu, Pedro IV da João II. Ta zama fiye da annabiya kawai; ta zama cibiyar siyasa da addini ta masarautar.

Amma hawan ta ya zama barazana ga iko na yanzu. Mishaneri na Capuchin na Portugal sun kira ta 'yar bidi'a, kuma Sarki Pedro IV na Kongo, yana tsoron tasirinta, ya ba da umarnin kama ta.
