A shekara ta 1706, an kai ta gaban shari'ar bidi'a kuma an yanke mata hukuncin ƙonewa a kan gungume. Ta gamu da mutuwarta a cikin harshen wuta tare da ɗanta, amma ruhinta bai mutu ba. Ƙungiyarta ta ci gaba na ɗan lokaci, kuma ana tuna ta har abada a matsayin alamar gwagwarmayar haɗin kan Kongo da dogaro da kai na addini na Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Janar ne dan asalin Berberawa na Arewacin Afirka, wanda ya ci yankin Iberian a shekara ta 711, ya rusa Masarautar Visigothic kuma ya bude kofar tarihin Al-Andalus.
key_achievements: Jagorancin mamayar yankin Iberian a shekara ta 711
Sauka a Gibraltar da asalin sunansa
Nasara a yakin Guadalete, wanda ya kai ga rugujewar Masarautar Visigothic
fact_box.legacy_statement: An rubuta sunansa a Gibraltar, kuma tarihin Al-Andalus da ya fara ya ci gaba tsawon karnoni, yana bude zamanin zinare na wayewar Musulunci.

tariq-ibn-ziyad.epic:
Asalinsa ya samo asali ne daga kabilun Berberawa na Arewacin Afirka. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, ya zama mawali (mai dogaro) ga Musa ibn Nusayr, gwamnan Ifriqiya, inda ya bunkasa basirarsa ta soja a karkashinsa. Ko da yake ba a rubuta komai game da farkon rayuwarsa ba, ya sami amincewar Musa kuma aka nada shi gwamnan Tangier, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin mataki da ya bude kofar makomarsa. Ya lura da Masarautar Visigothic mai cike da rudani a fadin Bahar Rum, yana jiran lokacin da ya dace.

A shekara ta 711, a karshe damar ta samu. Ya jagoranci sojoji kimanin 7,000, galibinsu Berberawa, suka tsallaka mashigar ruwa. Babban dutsen da suka sauka a kai daga baya aka kira shi 'Jabal Tariq', ma'ana 'Dutsen Tariq', a sunansa, kuma wannan shine asalin kalmar 'Gibraltar'. Akwai tatsuniyar cewa ya kona jiragen ruwa don share tunanin ja da baya daga zukatan sojojinsa, amma wannan labari ne kawai da ke nuna azamarsa. Manufarsu daya ce: ci gaba da cin nasara.

Da jin labarin saukarsu, Sarki Roderic na Visigothic ya jagoranci babban runduna don dakatar da su. A yakin da aka yi a gabar Kogin Guadalete, duk da cewa sun fi yawa, sun sami nasara mai mahimmanci, suna dauke da imani da dabaru. Wannan nasara ita ce alamar rugujewar Masarautar Visigothic, kuma ya ci gaba da kai hari ba tare da tsayawa ba zuwa Cordoba, sannan kuma zuwa babban birnin, Toledo. Rundunarsa ta yi gaba da sauri zuwa tsakiyar yankin Iberian, suna rubuta sabon tarihi.

Duk da haka, nasararsa mai ban mamaki ta haifar da kishi a cikin shugabansa, Musa. Ya isa Iberia da babban runduna, yana kokarin kwace nasarorin Tariq. Ko da yake sun kammala cin nasara tare, Halifa Al-Walid I, wanda ke fargabar nasarar tasu, ya kira su zuwa Damascus. A can, a cikin rikice-rikicen siyasa, ya zama wanda aka manta da shi kuma ya kawo karshen rayuwarsa. Ko da yake karshensa ya kasance mai kadaici, an rubuta sunansa a Gibraltar, kuma tarihin Al-Andalus da ya fara ya ci gaba tsawon karnoni, yana tabbatar da gadonsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Taytu Betul Sarauniyar Habasha ce a ƙarshen karni na 19, wadda ta jagoranci juriya ga mulkin mallaka kuma ta gina Addis Ababa.
key_achievements: Jagoranci wajen gina babban birnin Addis Ababa
Gane sharuɗɗan rashin adalci na Yarjejeniyar Wuchale
Ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga nasarar Yaƙin Adwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana girmama ta har yau a matsayin alamar kare 'yancin Habasha da jagorancin mata.

taytu-betul.epic:
Taytu Betul (an haife ta a kusan 1851) ta kasance Sarauniyar Habasha kuma alamar juriya mai ƙarfi ga mulkin mallaka a lokacin tashin hankali na Raba Afirka a ƙarshen karni na 19. An haife ta a arewacin Habasha, a cikin gidan sarauta na zuriyar Solomon, kuma ta girma tana mu'amala da duniyar siyasa da mulki mai sarkakiya tun tana ƙarama. Bayan auren siyasa da yawa, ta sadu da Menelik II, wanda a lokacin shi ne Sarkin Shewa kuma daga baya zai zama Sarkin Daular Habasha. Haɗin kansu ba kawai aure ba ne, amma ya zama tushen kawance mai ƙarfi na siyasa don haɗa kan Habasha da ta rabu da kuma fuskantar barazanar waje. A matsayinta na mai ba da shawara mafi aminci kuma abokiyar zama ga Menelik II, ta fara taka rawar gani wajen zamantar da Habasha da kare 'yancinta, inda ta nuna tasirinta.

Bayan ta zama Sarauniya, Taytu Betul ta shiga cikin manyan shawarwari na fada sosai, inda ta faɗaɗa tasirinta. Musamman ma, hangen nesa da jajircewarta sun bayyana a lokacin tattaunawar Yarjejeniyar Wuchale da aka sanya hannu da Italiya a 1889. Wannan yarjejeniya tana da yiwuwar keta ikon mallaka, domin sigar Italiyanci ta bayyana Habasha a matsayin ƙasar da ke ƙarƙashin kariyar Italiya, yayin da sigar Amharic ta bar damar fassara cewa Habasha 'za ta iya zaɓar' shiga tsakani na Italiya. Sarauniya Taytu ta gane mugun nufi na sigar Italiyanci daidai kuma ta yi adawa da yunƙurin keta ikon mallaka na Habasha sosai. Ta nace kan soke yarjejeniyar, kuma ta taka rawar gani wajen shawo kan Menelik II ya ƙi buƙatun Italiya da kuma kare cikakken 'yancin Habasha. Matsayinta mai ƙarfi ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wajen kare matsayin Habasha a matsayin ƙasa mai cin gashin kanta ba tare da miƙa wuya ga matsin lamba na waje ba.

Soke Yarjejeniyar Wuchale a ƙarshe ya kai ga Yaƙin Italiya da Habasha na 1895, kuma Yaƙin Adwa na 1896 ya kasance kololuwar wannan yaƙi. A wannan yaƙi, Sarauniya Taytu ta nuna jagoranci na gaske fiye da kasancewa alama kawai. Ta jagoranci sojoji kusan 5,000 kai tsaye zuwa filin yaƙi, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ƙarfafa gwiwar sojoji da kula da layukan samar da kayayyaki. Musamman ma, an san ta da ba da shawara ga Menelik II kan dabarun jawo sojojin Italiya zuwa yankin tsaunukan Adwa masu wahala, yanke layukan samar da kayayyaki, da kewaye su. Wannan dabara ta yi nasara, kuma sojojin Habasha sun samu nasara mai ban mamaki akan sojojin Italiya da suka fi yawa kuma suna da makamai na zamani. Nasarar Yaƙin Adwa ita ce nasara ta farko kuma tilo mai mahimmanci da wata ƙasa ta Afirka ta samu akan ƙasashen Turai masu mulkin mallaka, kuma wani taron tarihi ne da ya tabbatar da 'yancin Habasha. Wannan nasara ta ba da bege da alfahari ga al'ummomin da ke ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka a duk duniya, kuma ta ba da babban kwarin gwiwa ga gwagwarmayar adawa da mulkin mallaka. Jajircewar Sarauniya Taytu da hikimarta sun kasance masu mahimmanci wajen kare 'yancin Habasha.

Taytu Betul ta taka rawar gani wajen gina babban birnin Habasha na zamani, Addis Ababa (ma'ana 'Fure Mai Sabo'), tare da mijinta Menelik II a 1886. Ta kula da zaɓin wurin babban birnin da ci gabansa na farko, kuma ta shiga cikin ci gaban birnin sosai. Bayan mutuwar Menelik II a 1913, Sarauniya Taytu ta rasa tasirinta na siyasa kuma ta nisanta daga cibiyar mulki, amma gadonta ya bar alama mai dorewa a tarihin Habasha. Ana tuna ta a matsayin wadda ta ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen tabbatar da cewa Habasha ita ce kaɗai ƙasar da ta guje wa mulkin mallaka kuma ta ci gaba da 'yancinta a cikin tashin hankali na Raba Afirka. Jagorancinta mai ƙarfi, basirarta ta diflomasiyya, da jajircewarta a filin yaƙi alama ce ta kishin ƙasa na Habasha kuma abin koyi ga jagorancin mata, ana girmama ta har yau. Labarin Taytu Betul yana da alaƙa da gwagwarmayar wasu manyan shugabannin mata da suka yi yaƙi da mulkin mallaka a nahiyar Afirka, kuma yana tunatar da mu jajircewarsu da hikimarsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Abubakar Tafawa Balewa shi ne Firayim Minista na farko da ya jagoranci Najeriya zuwa 'yancin kai a tsakiyar karni na 20, kuma ya yi kira ga haɗin kan ƙasa da Pan-Africanism.
key_achievements: Ya zama Firayim Minista na farko na Najeriya (1960)
Ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa Ƙungiyar Haɗin Kan Afirka (OAU)
Ƙoƙarin haɗa kan Najeriya a matsayin ƙasa mai kabilu daban-daban
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa Najeriya kuma alama ce ta tawali'u, kuma ruhin haɗin kansa yana ci gaba da tasiri har zuwa yau.

abubakar-tafawa-balewa.epic:
Abubakar Tafawa Balewa, wanda aka haifa a shekarar 1912, malami ne kuma ɗan siyasa wanda ya kafa ginshiƙin samun 'yancin kai na Najeriya. Yankin Bauchi, inda aka haife shi, a lokacin yana cikin yankin Arewacin Najeriya a ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya, kuma al'umma ce mai sarkakiya inda kabilu da al'adu daban-daban suka haɗu. Tun yana yaro, Balewa ya yi imani da ƙarfin ilimi sosai, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin abu da ya tsara tafarkin rayuwarsa. Ya gano kiran koyarwa, kuma ya faɗaɗa hangen nesansa ta hanyar yin karatu a Cibiyar Nazarin Ilimi ta Jami'ar London. Wannan gogewa ta ba shi zurfin fahimtar tsarin ilimi na Yamma, tare da ƙaƙƙarfan tunanin kishin ƙasa cewa Najeriya dole ne ta gina makomarta da kanta. Bayan ya dawo Najeriya, ya zama ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa Jam'iyyar Northern People's Congress (NPC). NPC ƙungiya ce ta siyasa da ke da manufar wakiltar muradun Arewacin Najeriya, da ƙarfafa mazauna yankin ta hanyar ilimi, da kuma shirya don samun 'yancin kai mai zuwa. Duk da farkon rayuwarsa mai tawali'u, Balewa ya fito a fagen siyasa a matsayin murya ga Arewacin Najeriya, kuma ya fara taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara makomar al'ummar.

Ayyukansa a majalisar dokoki sun kasance masu ban mamaki saboda ƙwarewarsa ta magana, wanda ya sa aka ba shi laƙabin 'Muryar Zinariya ta Afirka'. Ya yi amfani da wannan murya don cike gibin da ke tsakanin kabilu daban-daban a Najeriya, da kuma kare hangen nesa na Najeriya mai haɗin kai da tarayya. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinsa, Najeriya ta faɗaɗa ikon cin gashin kanta a hankali, kuma ta ɗauki muhimman matakai zuwa ga 'yancin kai. A shekarar 1957, an naɗa Balewa a matsayin Babban Ministan Najeriya na farko, inda ya riƙe babban nauyi a matsayin shugaban gudanarwa na ƙasar. Kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 1 ga Oktoba, 1960, a wani lokaci na tarihi inda aka sauke tutar Union Jack aka ɗaga tutar Najeriya mai launin kore da fari, ya sami damar jagorantar ƙasar a matsayin Firayim Minista na farko na Najeriya mai cin gashin kanta. Wannan lokaci ne na babban bege, kuma a lokaci guda, ya haifar da babban nauyi na haɗa kabilu sama da 250 zuwa cikin asalin ƙasa ɗaya. Hawansa mulki ya kasance wani muhimmin al'amari da ya sanar da duniya cewa Najeriya za ta iya 'yantar da kanta daga kangin mulkin mallaka kuma ta gina makoma mai cin gashin kanta.

A matsayinsa na Firayim Minista, lokacin mulkin Balewa ya cika da manyan ƙalubale. Ya kasance yana buƙatar nemo daidaito tsakanin tashin hankali na yanki, buƙatar ci gaban tattalin arziki mai sauri, da kuma rikitarwa na siyasar duniya a lokacin Yaƙin Cacar Baki. Musamman ma, haɗa kan kabilu masu yawa da suka haɗa Najeriya, da kuma jagorantar su don kafa asalin ƙasa ɗaya, babban aiki ne mai girma. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin cikin gida, Balewa ya yi imani da haɗin kan nahiyar Afirka sosai. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa Ƙungiyar Haɗin Kan Afirka (OAU) a shekarar 1963, kuma ya nace cewa Afirka dole ne ta tsara makomarta a fagen duniya. OAU ƙungiya ce ta duniya da aka kafa don kare ikon mallaka da mutuncin yankunan ƙasashen Afirka, da kawar da ragowar mulkin mallaka, da kuma inganta zaman lafiya da ci gaba a nahiyar. Tare da waɗannan ƙoƙarin na duniya, Balewa ya yi ƙoƙari a cikin gida don ƙarfafa tushen ƙasar ta hanyar faɗaɗa ilimi da ababen more rayuwa. Amma duk da ƙoƙarinsa, rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa a cikin Najeriya ya ƙaru a hankali, kuma zaɓen shekarar 1964 ya haifar da cece-kuce da yawa, yana nuna alamun rarrabuwar kawuna a ƙasar.

Amma haɗin kan Najeriya da ya sadaukar da kansa wajen ginawa, a ƙarshe ya fuskanci barazana. Abin takaici, tafiyar Balewa da Jamhuriyar Farko ta Najeriya sun zo ƙarshe ba zato ba tsammani tare da juyin mulkin soja da ya faru a watan Janairun 1966. An sace shi kuma an kashe shi ta hanyar masu juyin mulkin, kuma an rubuta wannan a matsayin babban rauni ga dimokuraɗiyyar Najeriya mai tasowa da kuma bala'i ga ƙasar. Bayan mutuwarsa, Najeriya ta shiga dogon lokaci na mulkin soja da yaƙin basasa, kuma manufar haɗin kan ƙasa da Balewa ya yi mafarki da ita ta fuskanci babban gwaji. A yau, Abubakar Tafawa Balewa ana tunawa da shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin waɗanda suka kafa Najeriya kuma alama ce ta tawali'u da haɗin kai. Jagorancinsa ya ba da jagoranci ga ƙasar a farkon lokacin samun 'yancin kai na Najeriya, kuma ƙoƙarinsa na kafa asalin ƙasa mai kabilu daban-daban ya kasance muhimmin gado ga al'ummar Najeriya har zuwa yau. Rayuwarsa tana nuna alamar gwagwarmaya tsakanin manufa da gaskiya da shugabannin sabbin ƙasashe masu cin gashin kai da yawa a nahiyar Afirka suka fuskanta a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Fir'auna ɗan asalin Nubia wanda ya mulki Masar da Nubia, ya kawo wadata, amma ya yi yaƙi da mamayar Assuriya kuma daga ƙarshe ya ja da baya zuwa Nubia.
key_achievements: Haɗa da mulkin Masar da Nubia
Gina manyan haikalai a Karnak da sauran wurare
Yin yaƙi da jaruntaka da mamayar Assuriya mai ƙarfi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi saboda abubuwan tunawa da ya gina da kuma a matsayin Fir'auna na ƙarshe mai girma na Nubia wanda ya mulki Masar.

taharqa.epic:
An haife shi a ƙasar Nubia mai albarka, bayan da mahaifinsa, Piye, ya yi nasarar cin Masar, ya haɗa ƙasashe biyu a ƙarƙashin mulkinsa. A lokacin da yake matashi, kamar zaki mai tasowa, ɗan'uwansa, Shebitku, ya kira shi, ya ba shi jagorancin rundunar sojoji masu ƙarfi, ya kuma nufi arewa, kamar yadda kaddara ta kira shi. Tafiyarsa mai girma tare da kogin Nilu mai tsarki zuwa ƙasar Masar, yana da shekaru ashirin, ta buɗe masa idanu ga sirrin duniya, ta kuma shirya shi don babban kaddarar da alloli suka sanya masa a hannu, wanda ya fi kowane sarki girma. Ya kasance a shirye, kamar yadda taurari suka nuna, don haɗa ƙasashe biyu masu girma – ƙasarsa ta haihuwa, Nubia, da tsohuwar Masar mai cike da tarihi – a ƙarƙashin rawani ɗaya mai haske, ya zama mai mulkin duniya.

A kusan shekara ta 690 K.Z., lokacin da ya hau gadon sarauta ya zama Fir'auna, mulkinsa ya kasance kamar wata sabuwar alfijir, wanda alloli suka albarkace shi da hannu biyu. Kogin Nilu mai girma ya cika da ruwa, ya mamaye ƙasa da yalwa, ya sa ta yi albarka kamar aljanna, kuma mulkin ya bunƙasa, ya zama mai arziki da wadata. Ya yi amfani da wannan lokaci na wadata don girmama alloli masu tsarki, waɗanda suka ba shi wannan ni'ima. Ya fara wani shiri mai girma na gine-gine, wanda ya mamaye duk faɗin Masar da Nubia, kamar yadda sarki mai hangen nesa zai yi. A Haikalin Karnak mai girma, ya ɗaga ginshiƙai masu tsayi, waɗanda suka kai sama, kuma ya faɗaɗa tare da ƙawata haikalai a Jebel Barkal, Kawa, da Sanam, ya bar shaidar ibadarsa mai zurfi da kuma ƙarfin daular Kush mai girma, wanda ba za a manta da shi ba.

Amma ba zaman lafiya kaɗai ba ne ya mamaye mulkinsa mai girma, domin duhu ya fara bayyana a sararin sama. Daga gabas mai nisa, daular Assuriya mai ƙarfi, kamar dodo mai yunwa, ta fara bayyana a matsayin barazana mai girma, tana neman cinye komai. Rundunarsu, waɗanda Sarki Esarhaddon mai tsoro ke jagoranta, sun yi sha'awar mulkinsa mai arziki, suna neman su mallake shi da ƙarfi. Ya fuskanci su da jaruntaka irin ta zaki, ya yi yaƙi da su da ƙarfin hali, kuma da farko ya kore su, ya sa su ja da baya, amma ƙarfinsu ya kasance mai girma, kamar igiyar ruwa mai ƙarfi. A shekara ta 671 K.Z., sun sake dawowa, kamar hadari mai tsanani, suka kai hari, kuma suka ci babban birninsa mai daraja, Memphis, suka mai da shi kango. An tilasta masa ja da baya zuwa kudu, kamar yadda kaddara ta tilasta masa, amma azamarsa ta dawo da ƙasarsa mai tsarki ba ta karye ba, tana ci gaba da ƙonewa a cikin zuciyarsa.

Ya sake kwato Memphis na ɗan lokaci, kamar yadda jarumi zai yi, amma wani hari mai tsanani da sabon Sarkin Assuriya, Ashurbanipal, ya jagoranta ya sa aka sace Thebes mai daraja ma, an wawashe ta. Daga ƙarshe, ya ja da baya gaba ɗaya zuwa Nubia, ƙasar kakanninsa mai tsarki, inda tushensa yake. Ko da yake ya rasa Masar mai girma, ya kare zuciyar mulkin Kush mai ƙarfi a Napata, ya kiyaye ruhin al'ummarsa. Ya mutu a tsakanin mutanensa masu aminci, bayan ya yi rayuwa mai cike da gwagwarmaya da daukaka, kuma an binne shi a cikin dala mai girma ta Nuri, inda ruhinsa zai huta har abada. Gadonsa mai girma yana raye har abada a cikin abubuwan tunawa masu tsayi da ya gina, da kuma tunawa da shi a matsayin Fir'auna na ƙarshe mai girma na Nubia wanda ya mulki ƙasashe biyu, ya bar tarihi mai ban mamaki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Tertullian ya kasance mai kare Kiristanci kuma masanin tauhidi a Daular Roma a ƙarshen ƙarni na 2, wanda ya kafa ginshiƙan tauhidin Latin.
key_achievements: Rubuta littafin kare Kiristanci, 'Apologeticus'
Kafa kalmomin tauhidi kamar Triniti
Jayayya da bidi'o'i da kare bangaskiyar Orthodox
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban tauhidin Yamma kuma sun kafa tushen patristics na Latin.

tertullian.epic:
Tertullian (an haife shi kusan shekara ta 155 AD) ya kasance fitaccen mai kare Kiristanci kuma masanin tauhidi a zamanin Daular Roma, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai wajen samar da tunanin Kiristanci na farko. A lokacin, Daular Roma tana mulkin yankuna masu fadi, inda al'adu da addinai daban-daban ke rayuwa tare, amma har yanzu ana daukar Kiristanci a matsayin addinin arna kuma ana tsananta masa. An haife shi a Carthage, wani birni mai wadata a Arewacin Afirka, kuma mahaifinsa ya kasance centurion mai hidima ga gwamnan Roma. Ya sami ilimi mafi kyau na zamaninsa, inda ya kware a fannin fasahar magana, falsafa, da shari'a. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Tertullian ya yi aiki a matsayin lauya a Roma kuma ya sami nasarar duniya, amma a cikin zuciyarsa akwai sha'awar gaskiya mai zurfi. Kusan shekara ta 195 AD, ya ga bangaskiyar shahidai maras girgiza a gaban mutuwa kuma ya yi matukar sha'awar hakan, har ya koma addinin Kirista. A cikin fanko na addinin arna da lalacewar ɗabi'a na al'ummar Roma, a ƙarshe ya gano gaskiya ɗaya tilo da zai sadaukar da rayuwarsa wajen karewa.

Bayan ya koma Kiristanci, Tertullian ya koma Carthage kuma ya sadaukar da dukkan iliminsa da basirarsa ga sabon aikinsa. A lokacin, Kiristoci suna fuskantar tsanani mai tsanani, ana zarginsu da abubuwan banza kamar zina da 'yan uwa, kisan jarirai, da rashin imani daga al'ummar Roma. Ya ɗauki alkalami ya fara yaƙi da waɗannan zarge-zargen ƙarya, kuma ya rubuta ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, "Apologeticus". "Apologeticus" littafi ne mai ƙarfi na kare Kiristanci da kuma sukar tsanantawar hukumomin Roma, kuma ta hanyarsa ya yi jayayya cewa Kiristoci ma ya kamata su sami daidaitattun haƙƙoƙin shari'a kamar sauran 'yan ƙasa, yana kare 'yancin addini da himma. Manufarsa ba wai kawai kare Kiristoci ba ce, a'a, har ma da karya ra'ayoyin al'ummar Roma ta hanyar tabbatar da fifikon hankali da ɗabi'a na bangaskiyar Kirista a hankali. Ayyukansa na rubuce-rubuce a wannan lokacin sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tabbatar da halaccin Kiristanci na farko da kuma kafa tushe a cikin Daular Roma.

Ayyukan rubuce-rubucen Tertullian sun wuce kare Kiristanci kuma sun zurfafa cikin tauhidi. Ya ji cewa Latin na gargajiya bai isa ba don bayyana zurfin gaskiyar Kiristanci, don haka ya ƙirƙiro sabbin kalmomin tauhidi. Misali, ra'ayoyi kamar 'Triniti (Trinitas)', 'mutum (persona)', da 'abu (substantia)' an kafa su ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa, kuma waɗannan kalmomi sun zama ginshiƙan tauhidin Yamma daga baya. Ya kuma jagoranci kare bangaskiyar Orthodox ta hanyar yin jayayya da ƙarfi da manyan bidi'o'i na lokacin, kamar Marcionism. Rubuce-rubucensa wani lokaci suna da tsauri kuma marasa sassauci, amma wannan ya samo asali ne daga tsananin sha'awarsa ga gaskiya da kuma ƙaƙƙarfan niyyarsa ta kare tsarkin bangaskiya. Ya yi ƙoƙari ya gina katangar bangaskiya mai ƙarfi ta amfani da hankali da dabaru, kuma rubuce-rubucensa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da ingantacciyar jagorancin tauhidi a cikin rudanin koyarwa na cocin farko.

Duk da haka, yayin da lokaci ya wuce, Tertullian ya ji matuƙar takaici da lalacewar duniya da kuma faɗuwar ɗabi'a na cocin da ke akwai. Ya yi sha'awar wani nau'i na bangaskiya mai tsauri da tsarki, kuma a ƙarshe ya jawo hankalinsa ga Montanism, wanda ke jaddada 'Sabon Annabci' kuma yana ba da shawarar tsattsauran ra'ayi na asceticism. Wannan ya sa ya rabu da babban coci, amma bincikensa na gaskiya da ayyukansa na rubuce-rubucen tauhidi ba su tsaya ba. Kusan shekara ta 240 AD, ya rasu a Carthage, amma rubuce-rubucensa sun rayu kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin cocin Yamma tsawon ƙarnuka. Ko da yake ba a ɗaukaka shi zuwa matsayin waliyi ba saboda karkatarsa zuwa Montanism, ana tuna shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya buɗe hanyar tauhidin Latin kuma uban patristics na Yamma. Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga muhawarar tauhidi na Ubannin Coci na baya kamar Augustine, don haka ya zama muhimmiyar hanyar haɗi don fahimtar zuriyar tunani na farkon masu tunanin Kiristanci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Tewodros II sarki ne na Habasha a karni na 19, wanda ya haɗa kan ƙasa mai rarrabuwar kai kuma ya inganta ci gaba.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan Habasha da hawansa gadon sarauta
Inganta gyare-gyare na tsakiya
Ƙoƙarin soke bauta da kuma zamantar da sojoji
fact_box.legacy_statement: Burinsa na haɗin kai da ci gaba ya ba da gudummawa ga kafa asalin ƙasar Habasha ta zamani.

tewodros-ii.epic:
Tewodros II (an haife shi a kusan 1818) wani sarki ne mai kawo sauyi wanda ya haɗa kan Habasha a tsakiyar karni na 19 kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin kawo mata ci gaba. A farkon karni na 19, lokacin da aka haife shi, Habasha tana cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani da ake kira 'Zemene Mesafint' (Zaman Sarakuna). Wannan lokaci ne da ikon gwamnatin tsakiya ya raunana, kuma sarakunan yankuna da yawa suna mulkin yankunansu da kansu, suna ci gaba da faɗa. An san shi da sunansa na asali Kassa Hailu, ya girma a cikin wannan yanayi na rarrabuwar kai, kuma a lokacin kuruciyarsa, ya fara tattara ƙarfi ta hanyar ayyukan 'shifta', wato 'yan fashi masu adalci. A cikin zuciyarsa, akwai wata sha'awa mai zafi ta sake gina daular Habasha mai ƙarfi ta hanyar haɗa kan yankunan da suka rarrabu, fiye da neman ikon kansa kawai. A wancan lokacin, akwai wata tsohuwar annabci a tsakanin Habashawa cewa wani babban mai mulki mai suna Tewodros zai bayyana kuma zai kawo zaman lafiya da wadata, kuma Kassa ya karɓi wannan annabci a matsayin kaddararsa, ya fara aikin haɗin kai. Yana da ƙarfin hali na kawo ƙarshen zamanin rudani da kafa sabon tsari.

Don mayar da burinsa gaskiya, Kassa Hailu ya yi yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa, yana cin nasara a kan abokan hamayyarsa ɗaya bayan ɗaya. Ya fatattaki sojojin sarakunan gargajiya a faɗin yankuna masu yawa, daga arewa zuwa kudu, ya rushe tsohon tsari, kuma ya buɗe sabon zamani. Hazakarsa ta soja da kuma kwarjininsa sun tattara magoya baya cikin sauri, kuma a ƙarshe, a ranar 11 ga Fabrairu, 1855, ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Sarkin Habasha, inda ya ɗauki sunan Tewodros II. Hawansa gadon sarauta ya zama wani muhimmin tarihi wanda ya kawo ƙarshen 'Zamanin Sarakuna' wanda ya ɗauki shekaru da yawa, kuma ya haɗa kan Habasha a matsayin ƙasa ɗaya. Manufar Tewodros II a matsayin sarki ta bayyana sarai. Ya so ya raunana ikon sarakunan gargajiya, ya kafa gwamnati mai ƙarfi ta tsakiya, kuma ya gabatar da fasahohi da tsare-tsare na Turai don mayar da Habasha ƙasa mai wadata da zamani. Yana da babban hangen nesa na sake gina Habasha a matsayin daula mai ƙarfi ta hanyar gyare-gyare masu yawa, kamar soke bauta, kafa ingantaccen tsarin haraji, da kuma kafa sojoji na dindindin.

Gyare-gyaren Tewodros II masu tsauri sun fuskanci gwagwarmaya da ƙalubale da yawa. Sarakunan gargajiya da Cocin Orthodox na Habasha, waɗanda suka daɗe suna jin daɗin iko, sun yi tsayin daka kan manufofinsa na tsakiya da kuma gyaran filaye. Musamman ma, lokacin da sarki ya yi ƙoƙarin kwace manyan filayen coci da rage yawan limamai, an ɗauki hakan a matsayin ƙalubale ga ikon addini, wanda ya haifar da mummunar rikici. Ya yi ƙoƙarin kawo ci gaba a duk faɗin al'umma, kamar gina hanyoyi, horar da sojoji na musamman, da kuma ƙoƙarin soke bauta. Bugu da ƙari, ya gayyaci masu sana'a daga Turai don su kera makamai na zamani kamar bindigogi da manyan bindigogi kuma su koyar da fasaha, amma waɗannan ƙoƙarin sun fuskanci adawa daga masu ra'ayin mazan jiya na cikin gida da kuma rashin kulawa daga manyan ƙasashe na waje. Salon mulkinsa na gaggawa kuma wani lokaci mai tsanani ya ƙara yawan abokan gaba na cikin gida, kuma tawaye marasa yankewa sun raunana ƙarfin gyare-gyarensa. Sarkin ya yi ƙoƙarin tilasta hangen nesansa, amma hakan ya sa ya rasa goyon bayan jama'a kuma ya ƙara rarrabuwar kai. A cikin waɗannan matsaloli na ciki da na waje, babban burinsa ya zama wani aiki mai wuyar cimmawa.

A ƙarshe, faɗuwar Tewodros II ta samo asali ne daga rikici da ƙasashen waje. A matsayinsa na ƙasar Kirista, ya ba da shawarar haɗin gwiwa ga Sarauniya Victoria ta Biritaniya, amma gwamnatin Biritaniya ta yi watsi da wasiƙarsa. Da yake jin an wulakanta shi, sarki ya kama Turawa a matsayin garkuwa a shekarar 1864, ciki har da jakadan Biritaniya, wanda hakan ya kai ga babban balaguron soji na Biritaniya a shekarar 1867. A shekarar 1868, a sansaninsa na ƙarshe, Magdala, Tewodros II ya yi yaƙi da sojojin Biritaniya masu ƙarfin wuta. Lokacin da ya ga cewa ba zai iya cin nasara ba, ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa da bindigarsa a ranar 13 ga Afrilu, 1868, don guje wa kunyar zama fursuna ga abokan gaba. Bayan mutuwarsa, Habasha ta sake faɗawa cikin rudani, amma burin Tewodros II na haɗin kai da ci gaba ya kasance muhimmin gado ga shugabannin gaba. Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin mai kawo sauyi na zamani na farko wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin haɗa kan ƙasa mai rarrabuwar kai da kafa tsarin gwamnati na tsakiya, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai wajen kafa asalin ƙasar Habasha a yau. Ruhun gyare-gyarensa za a iya kwatanta shi da ƙoƙarin wasu shugabannin Afirka a ƙarshen karni na 19 waɗanda suka nemi 'yancin kai da ci gaba a fuskantar mulkin mallaka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ya hau karagar mulki a cikin rikicin sauye-sauyen addini, ya maido da addinin gargajiya, ya mutu da wuri amma saboda gano kabarinsa cikakke, ya zama Sarkin Yaro, alamar tsohuwar Masar.
key_achievements: Maido da addinin Amun da sake bude haikalin da aka rufe
Maido da zaman lafiya ta hanyar mayar da babban birni zuwa Thebes
Maido da ruhin Masar da jituwa (Ma'at)
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin 'Sarkin Yaro' wanda ke nuna asiri da daukakar tsohuwar Masar saboda kabarinsa cikakke da abin rufe fuskarsa na zinariya.

tutankhamun.epic:
An haife shi da sunan Tutankhaten, a cikin guguwar rikicin addini. Mahaifinsa, Fir'auna Akhenaten, ya ba da umarnin a yi watsi da allolin da aka bauta wa tsawon ƙarnuka, kuma a bauta wa Aten kaɗai, wato faifan rana. Mulkinsa ya raba Masar gida biyu, kuma shi, yana ɗan shekara tara kacal, ya hau wannan gadon sarauta mai cike da hadari da tashin hankali. Sunansa yana nufin 'siffar Aten mai rai', amma kaddararsa za ta bi wata hanya daban da sunansa.

A lokacin mulkinsa na gajeren lokaci, ya yi ƙoƙari sosai wajen maido da zaman lafiya da tsari ga Masar, tare da taimakon manyan fadawa da masu ba da shawara. Ya canza sunansa zuwa Tutankhamun, 'siffar Amun mai rai', kuma ya sake buɗe haikalin da mahaifinsa ya rufe. Ya mayar da babban birni daga Amarna, wanda Akhenaten ya gina, zuwa Thebes, cibiyar gargajiya. Wannan ba kawai canjin suna ba ne ko sauya babban birni. Ya kasance nufinsa mai ƙarfi na dawo da ruhin Masar, da kuma maido da Ma'at, jituwa tsakanin alloli da mutanenta.

Rayuwarsa ta kasance mai daukaka, amma kuma cike da zafi da wahala. Ya dogara ga sanda a tsawon rayuwarsa saboda nakasar kafa ta haihuwa da kuma cututtuka daban-daban. Bai haifi 'ya'ya masu rai ba tare da matarsa mai kauna kuma 'yar uwarsa ta uba daya, Ankhesenamun. Kuma ya bar duniya yana ɗan shekara goma sha tara kacal. Mutuwarsa ta kasance kwatsam, kuma dalilinta har yanzu yana ci gaba da zama abin muhawara, har bayan dubban shekaru.

Idan aka kwatanta da yawancin manyan Fir'auna na tsohuwar Masar, mulkinsa na iya zama gajere kuma ba shi da muhimmanci. Amma alloli sun ba shi wani nau'in rayuwa ta har abada, wanda ya fi na kowa. A shekarar 1922, wani mutum mai suna Howard Carter ya farkar da shi daga barcinsa na dubban shekaru, kuma sunansa ya sake bayyana ga duniya. Kabarinsa ya kasance ba a taɓa shi ba, an adana shi kusan cikakke, kuma taskokin da ke cikinsa sun ba da shaida mai rai, mai ban mamaki game da zamaninsa. Yanzu ana tuna shi a matsayin 'Sarkin Yaro', kuma abin rufe fuskarsa na zinariya ya zama alamar asiri da daukakar tsohuwar Masar har abada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: A matsayinsa na Sarkin Ashanti, ya hada kan al'ummarsa amma an kai shi gudun hijira saboda adawa da Birtaniya. Bayan dawowarsa, ya hada kan al'ummar da suka rabu kuma ya farfado da alfaharinsu.
key_achievements: Sake gina Tarayyar Ashanti da ta rabu
Kare Kujerar Zinariya, alamar al'umma
Hada kan al'umma da kuma farfado da alfahari bayan dawowa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alama ce ta kare asalin al'umma da kuma alfaharin al'adu da ba su karye ba duk da mulkin mallaka.

prempeh-i.epic:
Prempeh I ya hau gadon sarauta na Tarayyar Ashanti da ta rabu saboda yakin basasa a shekarar 1888. A matsayinsa na wanda aka nada da sunan Kwaku Dua III, babban aikinsa na farko shi ne sake hada kan sarakunan da suka watse da kuma maido da karfin al'ummarsa. Bayan shekaru da yawa na kokari, ya sake gina tarayyar kuma ya kafa tushen mulkinsa, amma wata babbar guguwa, wato burin Daular Birtaniya, tana tahowa daga arewa.

Turawan Birtaniya sun yi kwadayin arzikin kasa mai yawa na yankinsu, kuma sun bukaci su zama 'masu karewa'. Wannan a zahiri wani gargadi ne na karshe don su mika mulkinsu. A tsakiyar bukatarsu akwai mika Kujerar Zinariya, Sika Dwa Kofi, wanda shine ruhin al'ummarsu. Prempeh I ya ki amincewa da shawararsu da kakkausar murya, domin ba zai iya sayar da gadon kakanninsu da kuma mutuncin al'ummarsa ba. Wannan ba kawai yanke shawara ce ta siyasa ba, amma wani aiki ne mai tsarki don kare asalin al'ummarsu.

A shekarar 1896, Birtaniya ta jagoranci sojoji masu karfi zuwa Kumasi, babban birninsu. Prempeh I ya yanke shawara mai zafi na mika wuya ba tare da yaki ba don hana zubar da jini mara amfani da kuma kare al'ummarsa. Sun kama shi, tare da sauran dangin sarauta da sarakuna, kuma suka kai su gudun hijira, da farko zuwa Saliyo, sannan daga baya zuwa tsibirin Seychelles mai nisa. A lokacin da babu shi, lokacin da Birtaniya ta yi kokarin kwace Kujerar Zinariya, jaruman al'ummarsa sun yi tawaye a cikin 'Yakin Kujerar Zinariya'.

Bayan dogon lokaci na shekaru 28, a shekarar 1924, Prempeh I ya sami damar komawa kasarsa ta haihuwa. Ko da yake ba a matsayin Asantehene ba amma a matsayin talaka, dubban mutane sun tarbe shi kamar jarumi. A shekarar 1926, an mayar da shi matsayin Kumasihene, babban sarki na Kumasi. Komawarsa ta zama cibiyar da ta sake hada kan al'ummar Ashanti da suka rabu, kuma ta zama alama ce ta farfado da ruhinsu da kuma alfaharin al'adunsu da ba su karye ba duk da mulkin mallaka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai mulki wanda, a matsayin basaraken Napata, ya gyara rikicin Masar, ya kafa Daular Ashirin da Biyar, ya hada Nubia da Masar, kuma ya jagoranci farfadowar al'adu.
key_achievements: Ya shiga tsakani a rikicin siyasar Masar don maido da zaman lafiya.
Ya hada kan Masar ta hanyar aikin soja tare da Kogin Nilu.
Kafa Daular Ashirin da Biyar da jagorantar farfadowar al'adu.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa Daular Ashirin da Biyar ta Masar, ya yi mulki kusan karni guda, kuma ya cimma farfadowar al'adun tsohuwar Masar da hadewar al'adu mai karfi.

piye.epic:
An haife Piye a cikin babban Masarautar Kush, a matsayin basaraken Napata. Ya gaji wata kasa mai karfi kuma mai al'adun Masar ta Nubia daga mahaifinsa, Kashta. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance cikin zurfin bautar Amun, babban cibiyar addini ta Nubia a Gebel Barkal. Ya kasance a koyaushe yana sane cewa alloli sun tsara masa babban kaddara.

Ya shaida rarrabuwar kawunan siyasa a Arewacin Masar. Musamman, sarakunan yankin kamar Tefnakht na Sais suna karbar iko kuma suna kalubalantar tsohuwar tsari. Ya dauki wannan a matsayin cin mutunci ga babban allahn Amun da kuma keta haddin al'adun tsarki. Da yake bin nufin alloli, ya ji wajibi ne na tsarki ya shiga tsakani don maido da tsarkin Kogin Nilu da kuma dawo da zaman lafiya ga kasashe biyu.

A shekara ta ashirin ta mulkinsa, ya fara wani gagarumin aikin soja mai sauri da yanke hukunci tare da Kogin Nilu. 'Tutar Nasararsa' ta rubuta dalla-dalla yadda ya kewaye birane kamar Hermopolis da kuma yakin karshe da ya yi da hadin gwiwar sarakunan Arewa a Memphis. Ba wai kawai ya nuna karfin sojansa ba, har ma ya nuna jin kai ta hanyar barin sarakunan da aka ci su ci gaba da matsayinsu na gwamnoni.

Bayan nasararsa, ya koma garinsu na Nubia, inda ya mulki wata babbar masarauta biyu daga Napata. Ko da yake bai koma Masar ba, ya kafa daular Ashirin da Biyar, wato 'Daular Nubia' ko 'Daular Kush', wadda za ta mulki Masar kusan karni guda. Mulkinsa ya haifar da wani muhimmin farfadowar al'adu, yana farfado da al'adun addini, fasaha, da gine-gine na tsohuwar Masar, kuma an binne shi a cikin wani kabari mai siffar dala ta Masar a El-Kurru. Wannan shaida ce ta hadewar al'adu mai karfi da ya aiwatar.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Herbert Macaulay ya kasance majagaba na kishin kasa a Najeriya a farkon karni na 20, kuma ya shimfida harsashin gwagwarmayar neman 'yanci.
key_achievements: Mai binciken kasa na farko da aka ba shi lasisi a Najeriya
Kafa da gudanar da 'Lagos Daily News'
Kafa jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko a Najeriya, NNDP
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa 'Uban Kishin Kasa na Najeriya', kuma ya share fagen 'yanci.

herbert-macaulay.epic:
Herbert Macaulay (an haife shi a shekara ta 1864) ya kasance majagaba na kishin kasa a Najeriya a farkon karni na 20 kuma mai fafutukar neman 'yanci, wani muhimmin mutum da ya kare 'yancin kai na kasarsa daga mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya. An haife shi a Legas a shekara ta 1864, zuriyar wata iyali ta Creole daga Saliyo. Kakansa, Samuel Ajayi Crowther, shi ne Bishop na Anglican na farko a Afirka, kuma Herbert Macaulay ya koyi muhimmancin ilimi da hidima a cikin wannan gida mai tarihi. Bayan ya kammala karatunsa na farko a Najeriya, ya tafi Ingila inda ya karanci injiniyan farar hula kuma ya goge kwarewarsa. A shekara ta 1893, ya kafa tarihi ta zama Bature na farko da aka ba shi lasisin mai binciken kasa a Najeriya, wanda ya kasance daya daga cikin manyan nasarorin da wani dan Afirka zai iya cimma a cikin al'ummar mulkin mallaka a lokacin. A wannan lokacin, Najeriya tana karkashin mulkin mallaka kai tsaye na Birtaniya, kuma Herbert Macaulay ya so ya ba da gudummawar iliminsa da kwarewarsa ga kasarsa a cikin wannan yanayi. Farkon aikinsa ya fara ne a gwamnatin mulkin mallaka, amma ba da jimawa ba ya fuskanci ainihin sabanin mulkin mallaka.

Yayin da yake aiki a matsayin mai binciken kasa a gwamnatin mulkin mallaka, Herbert Macaulay ya shaida rashin adalci da nuna bambanci na mulkin Birtaniya kai tsaye, wanda ya haifar masa da zurfin shakku. Musamman ma batutuwan mallakar filaye da manufofin kudin ruwa a yankin Legas sun kasance misalai na yadda gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ke take hakkin 'yan Najeriya da cin zarafinsu, wanda ya girgiza lamirinsa sosai. Ba tare da iya yin shiru ga wannan rashin adalci ba, ya yi murabus daga mukaminsa na gwamnati a shekara ta 1908, kuma ya fara tafarkin adawa kai tsaye ga mulkin mallaka. Murabus dinsa daga aikin gwamnati ya zama wani muhimmin sauyi a rayuwarsa, kuma daga baya ya sadaukar da kansa wajen wayar da kan jama'a da kuma fallasa munafuncin mulkin mallaka ta hanyar amfani da muryarsa da alkalaminsa a matsayin makamai. A shekara ta 1927, ya kafa 'Lagos Daily News' kuma ya yi amfani da shi a matsayin wata kafar yada labarai mai karfi don sukar manufofin gwamnatin mulkin mallaka da kuma kare hakkin 'yan Najeriya. Wannan jarida ta haifar da babban tasiri a cikin al'ummar Najeriya a lokacin, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen inganta wayewar kai ta kishin kasa.

Sukar Herbert Macaulay ba ta tsaya ga ayyukan jarida kawai ba, amma ta kai ga ayyukan siyasa na gaske. A shekara ta 1923, ya kafa jam'iyyar siyasa ta farko a Najeriya, Nigerian National Democratic Party (NNDP). NNDP ta mamaye siyasar Legas fiye da shekaru goma, kuma ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen wakiltar muryar siyasa ta 'yan Najeriya a kan gwamnatin mulkin mallaka. Ya ci gaba da kalubalantar manufofin gwamnatin mulkin mallaka marasa adalci ta hanyar jawabin jama'a, rubuce-rubuce masu sukar lamiri, da kuma gwagwarmayar shari'a. Saboda wadannan ayyuka, ya fuskanci gwaji na daure shi a kurkuku sau da yawa, amma kurkukun ya mayar da shi shahidi na kishin kasa kuma ya karfafa goyon bayan jama'a a gare shi. Gwagwarmayarsa marar yankewa ta ba 'yan Najeriya kwarin gwiwa sosai, kuma ta kara rura wutar sha'awar neman 'yanci. Ya sanya 'yanci da adalci na kasarsa a gaban jin dadinsa na kansa, kuma ya zama alamar adawa ga mulkin mallaka.

Yayin da yake shiga karshen rayuwarsa, Herbert Macaulay ya fahimci bukatar hadin kai mafi girma da ya wuce kabilu da yankuna a Najeriya. A karkashin wannan hangen nesa, a shekara ta 1944, ya kafa National Council of Nigeria and the Cameroons (NCNC) tare da matashi kuma mai hazaka mai kishin kasa, Nnamdi Azikiwe. NCNC ta kasance wata kungiya mai muhimmanci da ta nuna farkon motsin kishin kasa na dukkan Najeriya, kuma ta zama cibiyar gwagwarmayar neman 'yancin Najeriya. A shekara ta 1946, yayin da yake yawon shakatawa na kasa don tattara goyon bayan jama'a a kan sabon kundin tsarin mulkin mulkin mallaka, ya fadi a Kano kuma ya rasu. Ko da yake bai ga 'yancin kasarsa kai tsaye ba, Herbert Macaulay ana kiransa 'Uban Kishin Kasa na Najeriya', kuma ya shimfida harsashin hanyar 'yanci ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Gwagwarmayarsa da hangen nesansa sun zama babban karfi na 'yancin Najeriya, kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu fafutukar neman 'yanci a wasu sassan Yammacin Afirka, wanda ya taimaka wajen yaduwar motsin Pan-Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaban Nama wanda ya yi yaƙi da mulkin mallaka na Jamus kuma ya jagoranci yaƙin ɓoye-ɓoye har ya rasu a yaƙi, gwarzon 'yancin kai na Namibia.
key_achievements: Ya gargadi sauran kabilu game da haɗarin mulkin mallaka.
Ya jagoranci yaƙin ɓoye-ɓoye a kan sojojin Jamus.
Ya haɗa kai da Herero, ya jagoranci juriya ta ƙasa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon 'yancin kai na Namibia, an zana shi a kan takardun kuɗi, kuma ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar juriya.

hendrik-witbooi.epic:
An haife shi a kusan shekara ta 1830 a Cape Colony, ya girma ya zama shugaba bayan mahaifinsa, Moses Witbooi, da kakansa, Captain Witbooi. Kabilarsu ta Witbooi, wani reshe na mutanen Nama, tana kan doguwar tafiya ta ƙaura zuwa arewa don neman ingantattun wuraren kiwo. Ya sami ilimin Kirista, kuma iyawar sa ta karatu da rubutu ta zama wata kadara mai mahimmanci ga jagorancinsa a nan gaba. A shekara ta 1888, ya gaji mahaifinsa a matsayin sarki, kuma dole ne ya jagoranci kabilarsa ta cikin yanayin siyasa mai sarkakiya na ƙasar da a lokacin ake kira Jamus ta Kudu maso Yamma. A wancan lokacin, sun fuskanci rikice-rikice akai-akai da sauran kabilu, kamar Herero, kan yankuna da albarkatu.

Lokacin da Daular Jamus ta taka ƙafarta a ƙasarsu, ya yi shakku game da niyyarsu tun farko. Ya rubuta wasiƙu ga sauran sarakunan kabilu, musamman Maharero na Herero, yana gargadin su game da haɗarin mulkin mallaka da ke ɓoye a ƙarƙashin sunan 'yarjejeniyar kariya'. Ya annabta cewa wannan zaman lafiya a ƙarshe zai halaka su duka. Duk da haka, yayin da kabilu ɗaya bayan ɗaya suka haɗa kai da Jamus, shi ma, bayan shekaru na juriya, ya fuskanci matsin lamba na soja kuma a shekara ta 1894 ya sanya hannu kan 'yarjejeniyar kariya' da Jamus ba tare da so ba. Wannan zaɓi ne da ba za a iya gujewa ba don rayuwar kabilarsu, amma wutar jaruntakarsa a cikin zuciyarsa ba ta taɓa mutuwa ba.

Zaman lafiya bayan yarjejeniyar ya kasance mai rauni kuma mai yaudara. Jamusawa sun ci gaba da keta 'yancin kansu, suna kwace musu ƙasarsu, kuma suna zaluntar mutanensu. Ya gane cewa alkawuransu karya ne, kuma ba zai iya jure mulkinsu ba. A shekara ta 1904, bayan ya ji labarin babban tawaye da Herero suka yi a arewa a kan Jamus, ya ɗauka cewa wannan dama ce ta dawo da 'yancin dukan al'ummarsu. Ya soke yarjejeniyar da Jamus, ya haɗa kai da Herero, waɗanda a da abokan gaba ne, kuma ya ayyana yaƙi a kan mulkin mallaka na Jamus. Wannan juriya ce ta ƙasa, wacce ta wuce iyakokin kabilu.

Ya addabi sojojin Jamus a matsayin ƙwararren mai yaƙin ɓoye-ɓoye a yankin kudu. Duk da tsufansa, ya jagoranci yaƙe-yaƙe da kansa, yana ba da jaruntaka da kwarin gwiwa ga jarumawansa. Gwagwarmayarsu ta kasance mai wahala kuma ta haifar da sadaukarwa mai yawa. A ranar 29 ga Oktoba, 1905, an harbe shi kuma ya ji rauni a wani yaƙi kusa da Fahlgras, kuma a ƙarshe ya rasu daga raunukan. Mutuwarsa ta kasance babban rauni ga motsin juriya, amma ruhinsa bai mutu ba. Ya yi yaƙi don 'yancin ƙasarsa da mutanensa har ya mutu, kuma a yau an zana shi a kan takardun kuɗi na Namibia mai cin gashin kanta, ana tunawa da shi a matsayin gwarzon ƙasa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata majagaba ce a harkar mata ta Masar, ta yi gwagwarmaya don haƙƙin mata da 'yancin kai na kasa ta hanyar cire mayafi da kafa kungiyar mata ta Masar.
key_achievements: A bayyane ta cire mayafin fuskarta a tashar jirgin kasa ta Alkahira a shekarar 1923.
Kafa kungiyar mata ta Masar (EFU) da jagorantar harkar haƙƙin mata.
Shirya mata don shiga gwagwarmayar kishin kasa da buga mujallar mata.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta shimfida harsashin harkar mata a kasashen Larabawa, kuma ta kasance alama ce ta gwagwarmayar neman haƙƙin mata da mutuncin kasa.

huda-shaarawi.epic:
An haife ni a cikin wani dangi mai arziki a Masar, amma na yi yarinta a cikin gata da kuma tsananin killacewa a cikin 'harem'. Wannan kwarewar killacewa ta zurfafa lokacin da aka tilasta ni in auri dan uwana Ali Sha'arawi, wanda ya girme ni sosai, tun ina 'yar shekara goma sha uku. Wannan kwarewar ta dasa iri na juriya ta gaba ga tsarin mulkin maza a cikin al'ummata. Na ji kadaici a cikin dangantakar da aka kulla ba tare da son raina ba, kuma a karon farko na fara tambayar duniyar da aka takaita wa mata.

Lokacin da na yi nesa da mijina, na nutsu cikin ilimi, waka, da kuma wuraren tattaunawa na ilimi a Alkahira, hakan ya canza ni. Na shiga cikin gwagwarmayar kishin kasa ta Masar da ke adawa da mulkin Birtaniya, kuma na shirya mata don shiga zanga-zanga. Wannan farkawa ta siyasa ta hada kishin kasa na da kuma wayewar kai ta mata da ke bunkasa. Na gane cewa 'yancin Masar ba zai iya rabuwa da 'yancin matan Masar ba. Ba zan iya yin kira ga 'yancin kai na kasata ba, yayin da a lokaci guda kuma na yi watsi da haƙƙin mata ba.

Mafi muhimmancin lokaci a rayuwata ya zo ne a shekarar 1923, lokacin da na dawo daga taron kungiyar mata ta duniya kan 'yancin kada kuri'a a Roma. Lokacin da muka isa tashar jirgin kasa ta Alkahira, ni da abokiyar wakiliyata, Saiza Nabarawi, mun yi wani gagarumin aikin juriya ta hanyar cire mayafin fuskokinmu a gaban jama'a. Wannan aikin ya nuna haihuwar sabon zamani. A wannan shekarar, na kafa kungiyar mata ta Masar (EFU), wata kungiya da ke gwagwarmaya don 'yancin kada kuri'a na mata, gyaran dokokin matsayi na mutum, da kuma fadada damar ilimi ga 'yan mata.

Sauran rayuwata, na jagoranci kungiyar mata ta Masar kuma na buga mujallar mata mai suna 'L'Égyptienne', tare da wakiltar Masar a tarurrukan mata na duniya. Duk da cewa wasu daga cikin ra'ayoyina sun samo asali ne daga hangen nesa na manyan mutane, jajircewata da sadaukarwata marar yankewa sun sa ni zama wata fitacciyar mutum. Na shimfida harsashin ga tsararraki na mata masu fafutuka a duk fadin kasashen Larabawa, kuma sunana ya kasance daidai da gwagwarmayar neman haƙƙin mata da mutuncin kasa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Augustine na Hippo ya kasance masanin tauhidin Kirista kuma masanin falsafa a Daular Roma daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 4 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 5, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin Yamma da koyarwar Kirista.
key_achievements: Rubuta 'Confessions' da kuma rubuta labarin tubarsa
Kafa ra'ayin Kiristanci game da duniya ta hanyar rubuta 'City of God'
Kare koyarwar Orthodox a matsayin Bishop na Hippo, yana fuskantar bidi'o'i
Kafa tushen falsafar Yamma da tauhidin Kiristanci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa yana ci gaba da yin tasiri a kan wayewar Yamma gaba ɗaya, daga falsafar Scholastic na Tsakiyar Zamani, Gyaran Addini, har zuwa tauhidin zamani.

augustine-of-hippo.epic:
Augustine na Hippo (354-430) ya kasance wani muhimmin masanin tauhidin Kirista kuma masanin falsafa a lardin Afirka na Daular Roma, daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 4 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 5, wanda ya kafa tushen tunanin Yamma da koyarwar Kirista. A wancan lokacin, Daular Roma tana kan hanyar faɗuwa a hankali, kuma Kiristanci yana zama addinin hukuma na daular, yana zama cibiyar sabon tsarin zamantakewa a cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani da juyin juya hali. An haife shi a shekara ta 354 a wani ƙaramin gari mai suna Thagaste a Numidia Cirtensis, Arewacin Afirka. Mahaifiyarsa, Monica, Kirista ce mai ibada, amma mahaifinsa, Patricius, arne ne. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Augustine na Hippo ya tafi Carthage don yin karatu a fannin ilimin magana, kuma a can, tare da basirarsa ta hankali, ya faɗa cikin rayuwar banza da sha'awa. Ya haifi ɗa, Adeodatus, ba tare da aure ba, kuma a cikin ƙishirwarsa mai tsanani ga gaskiya, ya shiga cikin Manichaeism, wani motsi na addini da ya shahara a lokacin. Manichaeism ya yi iƙirarin cewa akwai gwagwarmaya tsakanin nagarta da mugunta don bayyana wahalar duniya, amma bayan kimanin shekaru 10 a cikin Manichaeism, ya gane cewa koyarwarsu ba ta gamsar da ƙishirwarsa ta hankali ba, kuma ya faɗa cikin zurfin shakku.

Rashin jin daɗinsa game da Manichaeism ya kai Augustine na Hippo ga sabon bincike na hankali. Ya koma Roma don neman suna a matsayin malamin ilimin magana, amma saboda rashin jin daɗi game da halin rashin kulawa na ɗaliban Roma, nan da nan ya koma Milan. A Milan, ya sadu da Bishop Ambrose, wanda ake girmamawa a lokacin. Wa'azin Ambrose ya buɗe masa sabon hangen nesa game da Kiristanci, kuma musamman hanyar fassarar Littafi Mai Tsarki ta hanyar alama ta zama abin da ya rushe ra'ayoyin da ya daɗe yana da su game da Littafi Mai Tsarki. A wannan lokacin, ya shiga cikin falsafar Neoplatonism, wanda shine tunani da aka gina akan falsafar Plato tare da abubuwan asiri, kuma ta hanyar wannan, Augustine na Hippo ya fara samun muhimmiyar fahimta cewa mugunta ba wani abu ne mai zaman kansa ba, amma rashin nagarta ne. Duk da haka, duk da cewa hankalinsa yana karkata zuwa ga gaskiya, nufinsa yana daure da sarƙoƙin tsoffin halaye da jin daɗin jiki. Wannan zurfin rikici na ciki tsakanin tabbacin hankali da nufin ɗabi'a ya kasance babban gwaji mai zafi da kuma juyawa mai girma wanda ya ci gaba da damun ransa ba tare da tsayawa ba. Ya yi yawo cikin wahala mai tsanani, yana marmarin gaskiya amma ba zai iya rabuwa da rayuwarsa ta baya ba.

Gwagwarmayar ciki ta Augustine na Hippo ta kai ga wani gagarumin juyawa a lokacin rani na shekara ta 386, a wani lambu a Milan. Yana cikin zurfin damuwa, ya ji waƙar yaro daga gidan maƙwabta, "Tolle lege, tolle lege (Ɗauka ka karanta)," kuma ya ɗauka wannan a matsayin wahayi daga Allah, ya buɗe Littafi Mai Tsarki da ke kusa da shi ya karanta Romawa 13:13-14. "Kada ku yi rayuwar banza da maye, kada ku yi lalata da fasikanci, kada ku yi jayayya da kishi, amma ku sa Ubangiji Yesu Kiristi, kuma kada ku yi shiri don sha'awar jiki." Wannan kalma ta shiga cikin zuciyarsa sosai, kuma ya tuna cewa a wannan lokacin, duhun yawo da shakku na dogon lokaci ya ɓace, kuma hasken tabbaci ya cika shi. Wannan lamari ya canza rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya, kuma ya yanke shawarar tuba zuwa Kiristanci. A ranar Ista ta shekara ta 387, ya fara sabuwar rayuwa ta hanyar yin baftisma daga Bishop Ambrose, tare da mahaifiyarsa Monica da ɗansa Adeodatus. Bayan haka, ya koma ƙasarsa ta Afirka, ya yi rayuwar zuhudu, kuma a shekara ta 391, ya zama firist a Hippo Regius, kuma a kusan shekara ta 395, an naɗa shi Bishop na Hippo, inda ya jagoranci cocin sama da shekaru 30. A matsayinsa na Bishop, ya sadaukar da kansa don kare koyarwar Orthodox ta hanyar yin jayayya da manyan bidi'o'i kamar Donatism (wanda ke iƙirarin cewa ɗabi'ar firistoci tana shafar ingancin sacrament) da Pelagianism (wanda ke jaddada 'yancin zaɓi na ɗan adam da kuma rage buƙatar zunubi na asali da alheri).

A lokacin hidimarsa a matsayin Bishop, Augustine na Hippo ya bar wa'azi da wasiƙu masu yawa, kuma ya rubuta manyan ayyuka guda biyu waɗanda suka yi tasiri sosai a tarihin tunanin Yamma. Na farko shine 'Confessions', wani littafi mai ba da labarin rayuwarsa wanda ke ɗauke da labarin yawo da tubarsa a lokacin kuruciyarsa. Na biyu shine 'City of God', wanda aka rubuta don kare ra'ayin Kiristanci game da duniya bayan fashin Roma a shekara ta 410, don mayar da martani ga zargin cewa Kiristanci shine sanadin faɗuwar Roma. A cikin wannan littafi, ya bambanta tsakanin mulkin duniya da mulkin sama, yana mai jaddada cewa za a iya samun zaman lafiya da adalci na gaskiya a cikin birnin Allah kawai. A shekara ta 430, a lokacin da Vandals suka kewaye Hippo, ya mutu yana da shekaru 75. Tunaninsa ya zama tushen tauhidin Kiristanci na Yamma har ma bayan mutuwarsa, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a kan tattaunawar koyarwa daban-daban kamar zunubi na asali, alheri, da kuma ƙaddara. Ana girmama shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin muhimman Ubannin Coci na Latin, kuma ya zama babban tushen wahayi ga masana falsafar Scholastic na Tsakiyar Zamani da kuma mutane kamar Martin Luther da John Calvin a lokacin Gyaran Addini.

fact_box.one_line_summary: J. E. Casely Hayford lauya ne kuma marubuci daga Gold Coast a farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci motsin Pan-Afirka da kishin ƙasa na Yammacin Afirka.
key_achievements: Ya wallafa littafin *Ethiopia Unbound*
Ya jagoranci kafa National Congress of British West Africa (NCBWA)
Ya kare 'yancin cin gashin kai na Afirka da girman kai na al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa na Pan-Afirka sun ba da kwarjini ga motsin 'yancin Afirka kuma har yau suna tunatar da muhimmancin haɗin kan Afirka.

j-e-casely-hayford.epic:
J. E. Casely Hayford lauya ne, marubuci, ɗan siyasa, kuma mai fafutukar Pan-Afirka wanda aka haifa a Gold Coast a shekarar 1866. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, Gold Coast a Yammacin Afirka, wanda ke ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya, ya fuskanci lokacin canji mai girma inda aka samu mummunan karo tsakanin tsarin al'ummar Afirka na gargajiya da wayewar Yamma. A cikin wannan yanayi, an haife shi a wata babbar iyali ta Fanti, kuma ya girma yana fuskantar duniyoyi biyu a lokaci guda: gadon al'adun Afirka na musamman da ilimin Turawa. Bayan ya sami ilimi a Fourah Bay College a Saliyo, ya karanta shari'a a Inner Temple a London, inda ya gina tushen ilimi don fahimtar rashin adalci na shari'a da siyasa na mulkin mallaka. Wannan tsarin girma da ilimi na musamman ya ba shi damar samun ra'ayi mai mahimmanci game da mulkin mallaka, tare da kayan aiki mai ƙarfi don sake fasalta asalin Afirka da kare 'yancin cin gashin kai. A matsayinsa na lauya, bai tsaya ga kare haƙƙoƙin mutanensa kawai ba, amma ya fara tunanin sabuwar makoma inda tsarin Yamma da al'adun Afirka za su iya wanzuwa tare cikin jituwa. 

Casely Hayford ya yi amfani da rubutu da shari'a a matsayin mafi ƙarfin kayan aiki don yaƙar rashin adalci na mulkin mallaka. Musamman ma, littafinsa na labari *Ethiopia Unbound: Studies in Race Emancipation*, wanda aka buga a 1911, ya wuce zama aikin adabi kawai; ya kasance sanarwa mai jaddada 'yancin cin gashin kai na Afirka da girman kai na al'adu. Ta hanyar wannan littafi, ya yi kira da babbar murya cewa 'yan Afirka kada su kwaikwayi ka'idodin Turai makaho, amma su gina makomarsu kuma su sami ceto bisa ga tarihin su na musamman da al'adunsu. Wannan ya zama muhimmin ginshiƙi ga ra'ayin Pan-Afirka, wanda ke neman 'yanci da haɗin kai ga dukkan nahiyar Afirka. Bugu da ƙari, ya yi amfani da aikin jarida a matsayin muhimmiyar hanya don ilmantar da jama'a ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce a jaridu, yana sukar manufofin gwamnatin mulkin mallaka da kuma kira ga wayewar siyasa ta 'yan Afirka. Rubuce-rubucensa sun yi tasiri sosai ga manyan 'yan Afirka masu ilimi a Yammacin Afirka a lokacin, inda suka hura wutar motsin kishin ƙasa. 

Bayan ayyukansa na adabi da shari'a, Casely Hayford ya fahimci buƙatar aikin siyasa kai tsaye. Bisa ga wannan imani, a shekarar 1920, ya taka rawar gani wajen kafa National Congress of British West Africa (NCBWA) a Accra. Wannan ƙungiya an kafa ta ne don haɗa manyan 'yan Afirka masu ilimi daga duk faɗin yankunan mulkin mallaka na Birtaniya a Yammacin Afirka, don fitar da murya ɗaya game da mulkin mallaka. NCBWA ta yi kira da babbar murya don faɗaɗa wakilcin 'yan Afirka a majalisar dokoki, gyaran shari'a, kuma mafi mahimmanci, kare ƙasashe da tsarin gargajiya na 'yan Afirka. Ya jagoranci tawagar wakilai ta NCBWA zuwa London don kai tsaye isar da bukatunsu ga gwamnatin Birtaniya, wanda ya kasance mataki mai ƙarfin hali. Wannan an ɗauke shi a matsayin wani taron tarihi inda 'yan Afirka suka fara mataki na farko mai muhimmanci wajen kare haƙƙoƙinsu na siyasa da neman 'yancin cin gashin kai. Daga baya, ya yi aiki a matsayin memba na Majalisar Dokoki ta Gold Coast, yana ci gaba da gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don wakiltar bukatun 'yan Afirka a cikin mulkin mallaka da kuma tabbatar da cin gashin kai na al'umma. 

Ko da yake Casely Hayford bai ga cikakken 'yancin Gold Coast ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, iri na kishin ƙasa da Pan-Afirka da ya shuka sun ba da kwarjini mai zurfi ga shugabannin Afirka na gaba. Ra'ayoyinsa da ayyukansa sun taka rawar gani wajen taimakawa mutane irin su Kwame Nkrumah su jagoranci 'yancin Ghana, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga motsin 'yanci a duk faɗin nahiyar Afirka. Ya dasa imani marar mutuwa cewa 'yan Afirka za su iya alfahari da gadon al'adunsu kuma su gina makomarsu da ƙarfin kansu. Gadonsa yana rayuwa kuma yana numfashi a cikin muhimman ƙa'idodi na haɗin kan Afirka, darajar kai, da 'yancin cin gashin kai, kuma har yau yana tunatar da muhimmancin kafa asalin Afirka da haɗin kan nahiyar. Ra'ayoyinsa sun kuma yi tasiri ga ayyukan sauran shugabannin kishin ƙasa a Yammacin Afirka, kamar Herbert Macaulay, inda suka kafa muhimmin ginshiƙi ga motsin cin gashin kai a duk faɗin nahiyar Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Frantz Fanon likitan tabin hankali ne kuma masanin falsafar siyasa daga Martinique a tsakiyar karni na 20, wanda ya kafa tushen tunanin bayan mulkin mallaka.
key_achievements: Rubuta “Black Skin, White Masks”
Shiga cikin yakin 'yancin kai na Aljeriya da ayyukan FLN
Rubuta “The Wretched of the Earth”
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga nazarin bayan mulkin mallaka da ka'idar zargi, kuma har yau yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga waɗanda ake zalunta.

frantz-fanon.epic:
Frantz Fanon (an haife shi a 1925) wani likitan tabin hankali ne kuma masanin falsafar siyasa daga Yammacin Indiya na Faransa wanda ya zurfafa bincike kan tasirin tunani da zamantakewa na mulkin mallaka da wariyar launin fata a tsakiyar karni na 20. An haife shi a Martinique, wata mulkin mallaka ta Faransa, kuma tun yana yaro ya fuskanci rikitarwa tsakanin launin fata da asali. A lokacin yakin duniya na biyu, ya shiga cikin sojojin Faransa masu 'yanci don yaki da Nazism, amma bayan yakin, ya fuskanci gaskiyar wariyar launin fata da ke yaduwa a cikin al'ummar Faransa, wanda ya haifar masa da bacin rai mai zurfi. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fuskanta sun zama wani muhimmin dalili da ya sa ya mai da hankali kan mummunan tasirin mulkin mallaka ba kawai a matsayin zalunci na siyasa da tattalin arziki ba, har ma a kan ruhin ɗan adam da kai. Tunaninsa na farko ya samo asali ne daga ƙoƙarin fahimtar rikice-rikicen ciki da keɓewar da mutanen da ke ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka ke fuskanta, kuma wannan ya zama babban abin motsa jiki na tafiyarsa ta ilimi. Abubuwan da ya fuskanta a wannan lokacin sun zama tushe mai mahimmanci don ya zama majagaba a fannin nazarin bayan mulkin mallaka da ka'idar zargi.

Yayin da yake nazarin likitanci da ilimin tabin hankali a Faransa, Frantz Fanon ya fara nazarin tasirin cututtukan mulkin mallaka a kan lafiyar kwakwalwar mutum. Ya lura da kyau yadda mutanen da ke ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka ke musanta asalinsu kuma su faɗa cikin ƙin kai yayin da suke shigar da al'adu da dabi'un masu mulkin farar fata. Wannan fahimtar ta haifar da littafinsa na farko mai mahimmanci, “Black Skin, White Masks” (1952). Littafin ya yi nazari mai zurfi kan keɓewar tunani da rikice-rikicen asali da baƙar fata ke fuskanta a ƙarƙashin mulkin mallaka daga mahangar ilimin halin ɗan adam, kuma ya fallasa tashin hankalin da mulkin mallaka ke yi wa ruhin ɗan adam. Wannan aikin ba wai kawai nazari ne na ilimi ba, har ma wani tsari ne na bincika rarrabuwar asalin Frantz Fanon da kuma wahalarsa. Daga baya littafin ya zama muhimmin tushe ga nazarin bayan mulkin mallaka, wanda ke nufin fannin ilimi da ke nazarin tarihi, al'adu, da siyasar mulkin mallaka da tasirinsa.

A shekarar 1953, Frantz Fanon ya fara aiki a matsayin likitan tabin hankali a Asibitin Blida-Joinville a Aljeriya, inda ya fara amfani da ka'idodinsa a cikin mummunan gaskiya. Ya yi jinyar sojojin Faransa da kuma al'ummar Aljeriya waɗanda suka sami rauni a hankali saboda tashin hankalin yakin 'yancin kai na Aljeriya. A cikin yanayi mai cike da sabani inda masu azabtarwa da waɗanda aka azabtar ke cikin ɗakin jinya ɗaya, Frantz Fanon ya tabbata cewa tsarin mulkin mallaka da kansa yanayi ne na cututtukan tabin hankali. Ya yanke shawarar cewa ba zai iya zama likita mai tsaka-tsaki ba, kuma bayan ya yi murabus daga mukaminsa na darektan asibiti a 1956, ya shiga cikin National Liberation Front (FLN) na Aljeriya kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga juyin juya halin 'yancin kai na Aljeriya. A wannan lokacin, ya yi aiki a sahun gaba na gwagwarmayar juyin juya hali, yana yaki da tashin hankalin mulkin mallaka, kuma wannan ya ba da tushe mai zurfi ga tunaninsa. Waɗannan ayyukansa sun nuna ba kawai shigar da wani masanin ilimi ba, har ma da fuskar wani ɗan juyin juya hali wanda ya haɗa ka'ida da aiki.

Shekarun ƙarshe na rayuwar Frantz Fanon an sadaukar da su gaba ɗaya ga gwagwarmaya da rubuce-rubuce don juyin juya halin Aljeriya. Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai magana da yawun FLN kuma jami'in diflomasiyya, yana tafiya ko'ina cikin Afirka, yana ba da gudummawa ga motsin Pan-Africanism, wato, motsi na siyasa da al'adu wanda ke jaddada haɗin kai da haɗin kan al'ummomin Afirka da suka warwatse a nahiyar Afirka da kuma cikin kasashen waje. Bayan an gano shi da cutar sankarar bargo, ya yi yaƙi da mutuwa yayin da yake rubuta littafinsa mafi girma, “The Wretched of the Earth” (1961). A cikin wannan littafin, ya jaddada buƙatar tashin hankali na 'yanci don fuskantar tashin hankalin mulkin mallaka, kuma ya gabatar da hangen nesa na sabon ɗan adam da al'umma bayan mulkin mallaka. A ranar 6 ga Disamba, 1961, ya rasu yana da shekaru 36, amma tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga motsin 'yanci na duniya, nazarin bayan mulkin mallaka, da ka'idar zargi. Ayyukansa har yau suna ba da zurfin tunani game da 'yancin mutanen da aka zalunta da kuma gina kai, kuma tare da sauran masana bayan mulkin mallaka kamar Edward Said, ya kasance muhimmin gado na ilimi don fahimtar duniya ta zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: W. E. B. Du Bois ya kasance masanin zamantakewa kuma mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin bil'adama na Amurka daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa tsakiyar ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci 'yancin Baƙaƙe da Pan-Afirka.
key_achievements: Ya zama Baƙar fata na farko da ya sami digirin digirgir daga Jami'ar Harvard
Ya gabatar da ra'ayin 'hankali biyu' a cikin littafinsa mai suna 'The Souls of Black Folk'
Ya kafa NAACP tare da wasu kuma ya yi kira ga Pan-Afirka
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa da rubuce-rubucensa sun ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa ga gwagwarmayar daidaiton launin fata da 'yancin cin gashin kai, kuma suna da tasiri mai ƙarfi har zuwa yau.

w-e-b-du-bois.epic:
W. E. B. Du Bois, wanda aka haifa a shekara ta 1868, ya kasance wani babban masanin zamantakewa, marubuci, masanin tarihi, kuma mai fafutukar kare haƙƙin bil'adama na Pan-Afirka daga Amurka. An haife shi a Great Barrington, Massachusetts, cikin guguwar zamanin sake ginawa bayan yaƙin basasa. Ko da yake ya girma a cikin yanayi mai ɗan sassaucin ra'ayi game da launin fata, ba da daɗewa ba ya fahimci zurfin rashin daidaito na launin fata da 'katangar launi' da ke raba al'ummar Amurka. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta fara ne a Jami'ar Fisk, sannan ya sami digirin digirgir daga Jami'ar Harvard, inda ya kafa wani tarihi mai girma a matsayin Baƙar fata na farko da ya sami digirin digirgir. Rubutunsa na digirin digirgir mai suna 'The Suppression of the African Slave-Trade to the United States of America, 1638–1870' da kuma bincikensa na zamantakewa mai ban mamaki 'The Philadelphia Negro' sun nuna sadaukarwarsa ta rayuwa baki ɗaya don kalubalantar ra'ayoyin da aka saba da su game da batun launin fata ta hanyar nazari mai zurfi da inganci game da al'ummar Baƙaƙe. Waɗannan rubuce-rubucen farko sun nuna cewa ba kawai masanin ilimi ba ne, amma ya yi zurfin tunani game da rawar da masanin ilimi zai taka wajen kawo sauyi a cikin al'umma.

A shekara ta 1903, W. E. B. Du Bois ya zurfafa bincike cikin duniyar ciki ta Baƙaƙen Amurka ta hanyar buga littafinsa mafi shahara, 'The Souls of Black Folk'. A cikin wannan littafi, ya gabatar da ra'ayoyin 'hankali biyu' (double consciousness) da 'mayafi' (the veil) don bayyana rikicin tunani na musamman da Baƙaƙen Amurka ke fuskanta. Hankali biyu yana nufin gwagwarmayar tunani na kallon kai ta idon al'ummar farar fata yayin da ake ƙoƙarin kiyaye ainihin kai, yayin da mayafi ke nuna alamar katangar launin fata da ke tsakanin Baƙaƙe da Farar fata. A wannan lokacin, ya yi adawa a fili da 'Yarjejeniyar Atlanta' ta Booker T. Washington, wadda ta ba da shawarar cewa Baƙaƙe su nemi ci gaba a hankali ta hanyar ilimin sana'a da dogaro da kai na tattalin arziki. W. E. B. Du Bois ya nace cewa Baƙaƙe su nemi cikakken haƙƙin ɗan ƙasa da haƙƙoƙin siyasa nan take, kuma ya yi imani cewa 'Talented Tenth', wato ƙwararrun Baƙaƙe masu ilimi, su ne za su jagoranci ci gaban launin fata. Waɗannan ra'ayoyinsa sun gabatar da wani muhimmin juyi a cikin tafarkin gwagwarmayar 'yancin Baƙaƙe.

Fafutukar W. E. B. Du Bois ta kai ga kafa Ƙungiyar Niagara a shekara ta 1905, wadda kuma ta bunƙasa zuwa ga kafa Ƙungiyar Ƙasa ta Ci Gaban Mutane Masu Launi (NAACP) a shekara ta 1909. A matsayinsa na editan mujallar hukuma ta NAACP, 'The Crisis', ya yi yaƙi da kisan gilla, rarrabuwar launin fata, da nuna bambanci sama da shekaru 20, kuma ya zama murya ga Baƙaƙe. A lokaci guda, ya zama mai goyon baya mai zafi na 'Pan-Afirka' (Pan-Africanism), yana mai neman haɗin kai tsakanin mutanen Afirka a duk faɗin duniya da kuma fafutukar neman 'yancin cin gashin kansu daga mulkin mallaka. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gina haɗin kai na duniya don 'yantar da nahiyar Afirka da kuma mutanen Afirka da suka warwatse ta hanyar shirya tarurrukan Pan-Afirka da yawa. Rayuwarsa ta baya ta kasance an siffanta ta da ra'ayoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi. Ya ɗauki jari-hujja da mulkin mallaka a matsayin tushen zaluncin launin fata, kuma ya rungumi ra'ayin gurguzu da kuma, a ƙarshe, ra'ayin kwaminisanci a matsayin mafita. Saboda waɗannan imani, ya fuskanci babban gwaji na sa ido da tsanantawa daga gwamnatin Amurka a lokacin zamanin McCarthyism.

Cikin takaici da al'ummar Amurka, W. E. B. Du Bois ya ƙaura zuwa Afirka a shekara ta 1961 bisa gayyatar shugaban Ghana, Kwame Nkrumah. A Ghana, ya ƙone wutar sha'awarsa ta ƙarshe a rayuwa ta hanyar fara aikin 'Encyclopedia Africana', wani babban aiki da ke tattara tarihin nahiyar Afirka. Ya rasu a ranar 27 ga Agusta, 1963, a Accra, babban birnin Ghana, a matsayin ɗan ƙasar Ghana. Mutuwarsa ta zo daidai da lokacin da gwagwarmayarsa ta rayuwa baki ɗaya ta kai kololuwa, wato a jajibirin Maris na Washington na 1963, wanda hakan ya ba ta ma'ana mai zurfi da alama. Rayuwar W. E. B. Du Bois ta kasance shaida ga gwagwarmaya marar yankewa don daidaiton launin fata da mutuncin ɗan adam, kuma ra'ayoyinsa da rubuce-rubucensa suna ci gaba da yin tasiri mai zurfi a kan tattaunawa game da batutuwan launin fata, ainihi, da adalci na zamantakewa har zuwa yau. Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri mai zurfi ga masu fafutukar kare haƙƙin bil'adama na baya kamar Martin Luther King Jr., kuma ya yi daidai da na majagaba na gwagwarmayar 'yancin Afirka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Gemistus Pletho, masanin falsafa ne na Daular Byzantine a ƙarshen karni na 14, wanda ya sake gabatar da falsafar Plato ga Yamma, yana mai tasiri ga Renaissance.
key_achievements: Gabatar da falsafar Plato a Majalisar Florence
Tasiri ga kafa Kwalejin Plato ta Florence
Rubuta 'Nomoi' (Dokoki), littafi kan ƙasa mai kyau
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sake gabatar da falsafar Plato da ya yi ya yi tasiri mai girma ga ilimin ɗan adam na Renaissance da ci gaban tunani a Yammacin Turai.

george-gemistos-plethon.epic:
A ƙarshen karni na 14, Daular Rum ta Gabas ta fara shiga cikin inuwar faɗuwa ƙarƙashin matsin lamba daga Daular Usmaniyya. A wannan zamani mai cike da rudani, **Gemistus Pletho (kimanin 1355–1452)** ya taka rawa a matsayin wani fitaccen masanin falsafa, malami, kuma mai kawo sauyi na Byzantine. An haife shi a Constantinople, amma yayin da babban birnin daular ke fara rasa haskensa, ya koma Mystras a yankin Peloponnese, inda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin malami, alkali, da kuma mai ba sarki shawara. Sunansa na asali Georgios Gemistos ne, amma ya zaɓi sunan 'Plethon' da kansa, yana mai nuna zurfin girmamawarsa ga babban masanin falsafa na tsohuwar Girka, Plato. Fiye da lauya kawai, shi ne mai tunani na gaba wanda ya yi imani da cewa za a iya sake gina daular mai faɗuwa ta hanyar hikima da falsafar tsohuwar Girka. Yana mafarkin farfaɗo da wayewar tsohuwar Girka, Pletho ya yi ƙoƙari ya kawar da raunin tunani da ya mamaye al'ummar Byzantine kuma ya kawo sabon kuzari. Tunaninsa ya ba da sabon girgiza ga duniyar ilimi ta Byzantine a lokacin, kuma hangen nesansa na neman makoma bisa zurfin fahimtar falsafar gargajiya ya fara shafar mutane da yawa a hankali.

Mafi mahimmancin juyawa a rayuwar Pletho shi ne lokacin da ya halarci Majalisar Florence da aka gudanar a Italiya daga 1438 zuwa 1439, a matsayin wani ɓangare na tawagar Byzantine. Wannan majalisa ta kasance wuri ne na tattaunawa kan haɗin kan majami'un Gabas da Yamma don samun goyon bayan soji daga Yamma don fuskantar barazanar Daular Usmaniyya. Amma babban abin da Pletho ya fi mai da hankali a kai shi ne falsafa, ba muhawarar tauhidi ba. Ya yi amfani da wannan damar diflomasiyya mai mahimmanci don sake gabatar da tunanin Plato, wanda kusan an manta da shi a Yamma. A lokacin, falsafar Aristotle ta Scholastic ce ta mamaye duniyar ilimi ta Yamma, kuma Pletho ya so ya nuna musu gaskiya mafi girma da duniyar ra'ayoyi marasa iyaka da falsafar Plato ke bayarwa. Ya fara jerin laccoci a Florence, yana kwatanta bambance-bambancen falsafa tsakanin Plato da Aristotle, kuma yana jaddada fifikon Plato. Laccocinsa sun burge masana ilimin ɗan adam na Italiya a lokacin, musamman ma sun motsa sha'awar ilimi na manyan mutane irin su Cosimo de' Medici. Ta haka, Pletho ya taka rawar gani a matsayin gada mai muhimmanci wajen isar da hikimar Gabas zuwa Yamma.

Laccocin Pletho a Florence sun yi tasiri mai girma a duniyar ilimi ta Yamma. Ya yi iƙirarin cewa yayin da Plato ya bincika duniyar ra'ayoyi masu tsarki da marasa iyaka, Aristotle ya tsaya a kan abubuwan da ke faruwa na ɗan lokaci a duniya, yana mai jaddada zurfin falsafar Plato. Laccocinsa masu zafi da gamsarwa sun kama zukatan masana ilimin ɗan adam na Italiya da yawa, ciki har da Cosimo de' Medici, kuma wannan ya zama dalili kai tsaye na kafa Kwalejin Plato a Florence. Wannan kwalejin ta zama cibiya mai mahimmanci wajen jagorantar farfaɗo da ilimi a lokacin Renaissance, kuma Pletho ya taka rawar gani a matsayin gada ta tarihi wajen canja fitilar hikimar tsohuwar Girka daga Daular Byzantine mai mutuwa zuwa Italiya mai bunƙasa ta Renaissance. Bayan Majalisar ta ƙare, ya koma Mystras kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga rubuta babban aikinsa, 'Nomoi' (Dokoki). A cikin wannan littafi, ya tsara wata ƙasa mai kyau ta utopia bisa ga addinin arna na tsohuwar Girka da Neoplatonism, wannan wani tunani ne mai tsattsauran ra'ayi wanda ya kalubalanci koyarwar Kiristanci kai tsaye a lokacin. Tunaninsa ya haifar da babban cece-kuce a cikin yanayin addini mai ra'ayin mazan jiya na al'ummar Byzantine.

Littafin 'Nomoi', wanda ke ɗauke da mafi girman hangen nesa na Pletho, bayan mutuwarsa, an ayyana shi a matsayin bidi'a kuma Babban Bishop na Constantinople ya ƙone shi, wanda ya zama bala'i. Ƙoƙarinsa na kai tsaye na kawo sauyi a siyasa da zamantakewa ya ci tura, kuma ra'ayoyinsa na addini masu tsattsauran ra'ayi ba a karɓe su ba a cikin Daular Byzantine. Duk da haka, wutar falsafar Plato da ya sake kunna a Yamma ta jagoranci juyin juya halin ilimi na Renaissance, kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a tarihin tunani na Yammacin Turai. Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin mutumin da ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ceto tunanin tsohuwar Girka daga duhun Tsakiyar Zamani da buɗe sabon zamani na Renaissance. Duk da cewa an yi masa lakabi da bidi'a a ƙasarsa, sunansa yana rayuwa har abada a tarihi saboda gudunmawarsa ga ilimin ɗan adam da ci gaban falsafa a Yammacin Turai. Tunanin Pletho, a lokacin da fitilar ƙarshe ta Daular Byzantine ke mutuwa, ta hanyar shuka iri na sabuwar wayewa ta hanyar hikimar gargajiya, ya bar gadon ilimi mara lokaci tare da sauran masana ilimin ɗan adam na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nikolai Gogol babban marubuci ne na Rasha a karni na 19, wanda ya yi amfani da “The Inspector General” da “Dead Souls” don sukar al'ummar Rasha da kuma kafa tushen adabin gaskiya.
key_achievements: Ya jawo hankalin jama'ar adabi da “Evenings on a Farm Near Dikanka.”
Ya yi sukar al'ummar Rasha da wasan kwaikwayonsa “The Inspector General.”
Ya rubuta kashi na farko na littafin almara “Dead Souls.”
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kasance majagaba na adabin gaskiya na Rasha kuma babban mai sukar lamiri, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga marubutan Rasha na gaba.

nikolai-gogol.epic:
Nikolai Gogol (1809-1852) ya kasance wani babban tauraro mai haske a sararin adabin Rasha na karni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci zamanin zinare na rubuce-rubuce, ya kuma gina wata duniya ta adabi ta musamman da ke ratsa tsakanin gaskiya mai zurfi (realism) da kuma ban mamaki mai cike da al'ajabi (grotesque). An haife shi a shekara ta 1809 a Sorochyntsi, wani karamin kauye a kasar Ukraine ta yanzu, cikin dangi masu karamin karfi na masu mallakar filaye masu asalin Cossack. Ya shafe yarintarsa cikin arzikin tatsuniyoyin gargajiya da almara na Ukraine, da kuma cikin wutar sha'awar mahaifinsa ga wasan kwaikwayo. Wannan yanayi mai albarka ya zama tushen kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi a cikin ayyukansa na gaba, yana haskaka su da hasken al'adunsa. Da burin zama babban marubuci a zuciyarsa, ya nufi St. Petersburg, babban birnin daular Rasha, amma kokarinsa na farko ya gamu da bangon gaskiya mai zafi da rashin tausayi. Duk da haka, ta hanyar tarin gajerun labarai mai suna “Evenings on a Farm Near Dikanka,” wanda ke dauke da labarai masu rai da ban sha'awa daga garinsu, ya fara jawo hankalin manyan mutane a duniyar adabi. Wannan aiki mai ban mamaki ya hada abubuwan gargajiya na Ukraine da yanayi mai ban al'ajabi, wanda ya buɗe masa kofofin hulɗa da manyan marubuta na zamaninsa kamar Alexander Pushkin, kuma ya kawo sabon salo mai girgiza ga duniyar adabin Rasha. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi, wani ginshiki mai karfi a tafiyarsa ta adabi.

Rayuwarsa a St. Petersburg ta ba Nikolai Gogol damar lura da zurfi, kamar yadda idon gaggafa ke lura, game da tsarin mulki mai sanyi da rashin tausayi na daular Rasha, girman kai na mutane, da kuma mutanen da aka ware a cikin birni, waɗanda rayuwarsu ke gudana a gefe. Bisa ga waɗannan fahimtar da ya samu, ya wallafa gajerun labarai masu daraja da ba za a manta da su ba kamar “The Nose,” “Diary of a Madman,” kuma musamman “The Overcoat,” inda ya nuna halayen ɗan adam na birni masu ban tausayi da ban dariya da kaifi mai tsanani. Wasan kwaikwayonsa “The Inspector General” ya kasance wani aiki mai tsanani da ke sukar al'ummar jami'an gwamnati masu cin hanci da rashawa da kuma wautar daular Rasha, wanda ya haifar da babban tasiri mai girgiza a lokacin farkon wasansa, kamar yadda tsawa ke girgiza sama. Wannan aiki ya bayyana a fili sabanin da ke cikin al'ummar Rasha a lokacin, yana ba masu kallo dariya mai zafi tare da tunani mai zurfi da zafi. A wannan lokacin, Nikolai Gogol ya gina nasa salon adabi na musamman, wanda ya kira 'grotesque realism,' wanda ke hada gaskiya da mafarki, kamar yadda ruwa da iska ke haɗuwa. Grotesque realism wata dabara ce ta adabi da ke nuna gaskiya a cikin wata hanya mai ban mamaki da ban al'ajabi don bayyana rashin ma'ana na wanzuwar ɗan adam da kuma duhun gefen al'umma, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin ginshiki da ke nuna duniyar ayyukansa.

Bayan nasarar “The Inspector General,” Nikolai Gogol ya fara tunanin cewa rawar da yake takawa a fannin adabi ba kawai ta marubuci ba ce, amma wata manufa ce mai tsarki, wata kira daga sama. Ya sha wahala daga damuwa mai tsanani cewa dole ne ya ceci ruhin Rasha, kuma wannan rikici na ciki ya sa ya bar Rasha, kamar yadda tsuntsu ke barin gida. Ya shafe fiye da shekaru goma yana rayuwa kamar gudun hijira, galibi a Rome, yana cikin zurfin tunani da nazari, kamar yadda mai hikima ke nazarin littattafai. A wannan lokacin, ya rubuta kashi na farko na littafinsa mai suna “Dead Souls,” wanda ake ganin shi ne babban aikinsa na rayuwa kuma wani babban aiki na adabin Rasha, wanda ya zama abin alfahari. “Dead Souls” wani aiki ne mai ban mamaki da ke nuna lalacewar ɗabi'a da rashin komai na ruhaniya na dukan al'ummar Rasha a lokacin, ta hanyar tafiyar wani ɗan damfara da ke neman tara dukiya ta hanyar siyan sunayen bayi da suka mutu, yana bayyana duhun zamanin. Wannan littafi ya zurfafa zurfin adabin Nikolai Gogol ta hanyar fuskantar gaskiyar Rasha da sanyi, kamar yadda ruwa ke ratsa kasa, tare da bincika zurfin wautar ɗan adam da bala'i. Ta hanyar wannan aiki, ya yi niyyar fallasa matsalolin al'ummar Rasha da kuma kira ga farkawa ta ruhaniya, kamar yadda mai wa'azi ke kira ga tuba.

Amma nasarar kashi na farko na “Dead Souls” ya kawo wa Nikolai Gogol babban nauyi na tunani, wanda ya fi karfinsa. Ya sha wahala daga matsin lamba na cewa dole ne ya gabatar da hanyar ceto ga Rasha a kashi na biyu na aikinsa, kuma a cikin zurfafa addini da rikice-rikice na tunani, ya fara yarda cewa basirarsa ta adabi ba nufin Allah ba ce, amma jarabawar shaidan ce, wata tarko mai haɗari. A karshe, a shekara ta 1852, a karkashin tasirin wani firist mai tsattsauran ra'ayi, ya yi wani zaɓi mai ban tausayi na kona rubutun kashi na biyu na “Dead Souls,” yana mai lalata wani babban aiki. Kuma bayan 'yan kwanaki, ya kawo karshen rayuwarsa, yana kai kansa ga halaka ta hanyar azumi mai tsanani da kuma azabtar da kai, kamar yadda fitila ke kashewa bayan ta cinye mai. Mutuwarsa ta girgiza duniyar adabin Rasha sosai, ta bar gibin da ba za a iya cikawa ba. Nikolai Gogol, a matsayinsa na majagaba na adabin gaskiya na Rasha kuma babban mai sukar lamiri da ban mamaki, ya yi tasiri sosai ga marubutan Rasha na gaba kamar Dostoevsky da Tolstoy, yana zama jagora ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Ayyukansa har yau suna ci gaba da zama muhimman littattafai na gargajiya wajen binciken halayen ɗan adam da rashin ma'ana na al'umma, kuma ana nazarin su sosai tare da ayyukan marubuta na zamaninsa kamar Alexander Pushkin da Ivan Turgenev, waɗanda suka wakilci zamanin zinare na adabin Rasha, suna haskaka hanyar fahimtar rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nikolay Muravyov-Amursky ya kasance wani jami'in soja kuma ɗan siyasa na Rasha a karni na 19, wanda ya faɗaɗa yankunan Gabas Mai Nisa ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Aigun.
key_achievements: An naɗa shi Gwamna Janar na Gabashin Siberia (1847)
Sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Aigun (1858)
Jagoranci gina Khabarovsk da Vladivostok
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin mutumin da ya kafa tushen shigar Rasha cikin Tekun Pasifik da kuma ci gaban yankin Gabas Mai Nisa.

nikolay-muravyov-amursky.epic:
Nikolay Muravyov-Amursky (1809-1881) ya kasance wani jami'in soja kuma ɗan siyasa na Daular Rasha a tsakiyar karni na 19, wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai girma ga faɗaɗa yankunan Rasha a Gabas Mai Nisa. An haife shi a cikin gidan sarauta na Rasha a shekara ta 1809, ya bi tafarkin soja, kuma tun yana saurayi, ya kasance mai tasiri ga ra'ayoyin 'yanci, yana mai matuƙar imani da damar da Siberia mai faɗi take da ita. Bisa ga wannan imani, an naɗa shi Gwamna Janar na Gabashin Siberia a shekara ta 1847, yana da shekaru 38. Aikin sa shi ne ya gudanar da wannan ƙasa mai yawan jama'a kaɗan, da kuma faɗaɗa iyakokin Rasha a Gabas Mai Nisa har zuwa Tekun Pasifik don amfanin ƙasar. A lokacin, mutane da yawa a St. Petersburg sun ɗauki burinsa a matsayin rashin hankali, amma Muravyov ya tabbata cewa Siberia ce mabuɗin makomar Rasha. Ya ga cewa shiga Gabas Mai Nisa yana da mahimmanci ga Rasha don samun tasiri mai ƙarfi a yankin Asiya-Pasifik.

Babban burin Muravyov shi ne sanya yankin Kogin Amur a ƙarƙashin ikon Rasha. Yankin Kogin Amur ya kasance muhimmin hanyar ruwa kuma wuri mai mahimmancin dabaru a Gabas Mai Nisa ta Rasha, kuma tun daga Yarjejeniyar Nerchinsk ta 1689, ya kasance a ƙarƙashin tasirin Daular Qing, inda aka haramta wa jiragen ruwan Rasha yin tafiya a cikinsa. Ya yi niyyar shawo kan wannan yarjejeniya da kuma haɗa Kogin Amur cikin yankin Rasha. Ba tare da izini na musamman daga gwamnatin tsakiya ba, Muravyov ya shirya balaguro da yawa don fahimtar yanayin yankin Kogin Amur da kuma kafa sansanonin soja. Wannan ya haifar da rikici marar yankewa da jami'an St. Petersburg, amma ya yi imani cewa hukunci a filin da kuma aiki cikin gaggawa sun fi komai muhimmanci. Ya yi tunanin cewa maimakon jira a ba shi dama, ya kamata ya ƙirƙiri damar da kansa, kuma ya aiwatar da matakan farko don shigar Rasha cikin Gabas Mai Nisa. Wannan matakin nasa na kansa ya haifar da cece-kuce da yawa a cikin daular.

Dama mai mahimmanci ta zo a lokacin Yaƙin Crimea, wanda ya gudana daga 1853 zuwa 1856. Lokacin da rundunar sojojin ruwa ta haɗin gwiwa ta Birtaniya da Faransa suka yi barazana ga yankunan Rasha a gabar Tekun Pasifik, Muravyov ya yi amfani da wannan a matsayin dalili don cewa dole ne a jigilar sojoji da kayayyaki zuwa yankin Kamchatka ta Kogin Amur. Wannan a zahiri ya kasance watsi da yarjejeniyar da ke akwai da kuma mamaye Kogin Amur ta Rasha, amma a cikin rudanin yaƙin, gwamnatin tsakiya ta amince da ayyukansa a kaikaice. Bai bari wannan damar ta wuce ba, ya motsa manyan sojoji da kayayyaki, yana ƙarfafa ikon Rasha na gaske a kan yankin Kogin Amur. Bayan yaƙin, Muravyov ya fara tattaunawa da Daular Qing bisa ga wannan gaskiyar da aka riga aka kafa. Bayan ƙoƙarin diflomasiyya mai ɗorewa, ya yi nasarar sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Aigun a shekara ta 1858. Wannan yarjejeniya ta kasance babban nasara, inda ta ba Rasha babban yanki a arewacin Kogin Amur, kuma ta sanya yankin gabashin Kogin Ussuri a matsayin yankin haɗin gwiwa tsakanin ƙasashen biyu.

Don gudummawarsa wajen sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Aigun, Tsar ya ba Muravyov taken 'Amursky' (na Amur), kuma sunansa ya kasance tare da Kogin Amur har abada. Bayan haka, ya kafa tushen manyan birane a Gabas Mai Nisa kamar Khabarovsk da Vladivostok, kuma ya ƙarfafa ƙaura na Rasha zuwa wannan yankin, yana ƙarfafa tasirin Rasha. Ko da yake daga baya ya yi murabus daga muƙamin Gwamna Janar saboda bambancin ra'ayi na manufofi da gwamnatin tsakiya, ƙoƙarinsa ya canza taswirar Rasha har abada. Za a tuna da shi a tarihi a matsayin majagaba kuma mai dabaru wanda ya mai da Rasha babbar ƙasa a Tekun Pasifik.
