Jajircewarsa ta majagaba da kuma basirarsa ta diflomasiyya sun yi tasiri sosai ga manufofin Rasha na Gabas a ƙarshen karni na 19, kuma wannan ya kasance muhimmiyar gado da ke haɗuwa da nasarorin wasu mutanen da suka ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban Siberia.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nikolai Vavilov masanin kiwon shuke-shuke ne kuma masanin kwayoyin halitta na Soviet a farkon karni na 20, wanda ya gano cibiyoyin asalin tsire-tsire masu noma kuma ya kafa bankin iri na farko a duniya.
key_achievements: Kafa ka'idar cibiyoyin asalin tsire-tsire masu noma
Kafa babbar bankin iri na shuke-shuke a duniya
Bincike da tattara albarkatun kwayoyin halitta a kasashe sama da 60 a duniya
Kare kwayoyin halittar Mendel da adawa da Lysenkoism
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya zama ginshiƙin tsaron abinci na zamani da adana albarkatun kwayoyin halittar shuke-shuke, kuma yana tunatar da mu mahimmancin gaskiyar kimiyya.

nikolai-vavilov.epic:
Nikolai Vavilov (an haife shi a 1887) ya kasance fitaccen masanin kiwon shuke-shuke, masanin kwayoyin halitta, kuma mai bincike wanda ya rayu a lokacin daular Rasha mai cike da rudani da kuma farkon Tarayyar Soviet a farkon karni na 20. An haife shi a ranar 25 ga Nuwamba, 1887, a cikin dangin 'yan kasuwa a Moscow, ya ji sha'awar yanayi da kimiyya tun yana yaro. Bayan kammala karatunsa daga Cibiyar Aikin Noma ta Moscow, sha'awar sa ta ja shi zuwa ga ban mamaki iri-iri na tsire-tsire, musamman amfanin gona masu mahimmanci ga rayuwar ɗan adam, da kuma asalin su. Bincikensa na farko da balaguron balaguro sun kunna sha'awar gano tsarin kwayoyin halittar shuke-shuke da kuma fahimtar yadda wasu yankuna suka zama cibiyoyin bambancin amfanin gona. Wannan shine farkon tafiyarsa don gano 'cibiyoyin asalin tsire-tsire masu noma', aikin rayuwarsa. Cibiyoyin asalin tsire-tsire masu noma suna nufin yankunan yanki inda aka fara noman wasu amfanin gona kuma inda bambancin kwayoyin halitta ya fi yawa, kuma Vavilov ya yi niyyar sake gina tarihin aikin gona na ɗan adam ta hanyar wannan ra'ayi. Ya yi imani cewa wannan binciken shine mabuɗin tsaron abinci ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

A cikin shekaru da yawa, Vavilov ya jagoranci manyan balaguro a duk faɗin duniya. Ya ratsa kasashe sama da 60 a nahiyoyi biyar, yana tattara gado na aikin gona na ɗan adam guda ɗaya bayan ɗaya, daga kwaruruka masu nisa na Afghanistan zuwa tsaunukan Habasha, da kuma gangaren tsaunukan Andes. Shi da abokan aikinsa sun tattara dubban daruruwan iri, tushen, da tubers, suka kafa babbar tarin albarkatun kwayoyin halittar shuke-shuke a duniya a Leningrad. Wannan ba kawai tarin iri ba ne, amma taskar kwayoyin halitta ce da za ta iya kare tsararraki masu zuwa daga yunwa da cututtuka, wato, bankin iri na farko a duniya. Wannan bankin iri ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen shirya don rikicin abinci da kuma adana bambancin kwayoyin halitta masu mahimmanci don haɓaka sabbin nau'ikan. Waɗannan ƙoƙarinsa sun kasance kololuwar binciken kimiyya, suna nuna zurfin fahimta da sadaukarwa ga warware matsalolin abinci na ɗan adam. Duk da haka, waɗannan imani na kimiyya da nasarori sun kasance an ƙaddara su yi karo da akidar siyasa ta gwamnatin Stalin.

Imani na kimiyya na Vavilov ya yi karo kai tsaye da ka'idar kimiyya ta Trofim Lysenko, wanda gwamnati ke goyon bayansa a Tarayyar Soviet a lokacin. Lysenko ya soki kwayoyin halittar Mendel a matsayin kimiyyar bourgeois kuma ya gabatar da da'awar Lamarckian na gado na halaye da aka samu. Gado na halaye da aka samu shine ka'idar cewa halaye da kwayoyin halitta suka samu ta hanyar muhalli ana gadar su ga zuriyarsu, wanda kwayoyin halittar zamani suka musanta. Vavilov ya yi jarumtaka ya fuskanci da'awar Lysenko don kare gaskiyar kimiyya, wanda ya sa ya zama abokin gaba na jihar, 'abokin gaba na mutane'. Darajarsa da aikinsa sun fuskanci barazana cikin sauri, kuma a ƙarshe, a watan Agusta 1940, an kama shi bisa zargin ƙarya na leƙen asiri da zagon ƙasa. Bayan tsananin tambayoyi, an yanke masa hukuncin kisa, amma daga baya an rage shi zuwa shekaru 20 a kurkuku. Vavilov, wanda ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa don kawo ƙarshen yunwa, ya mutu a ranar 26 ga Janairu, 1943, a kurkukun Saratov daga rashin abinci mai gina jiki, abin ban mamaki. Mutuwarsa ta nuna a fili mummunan sakamakon da zai iya faruwa lokacin da akidar siyasa ta danne gaskiyar kimiyya.

Jikin Vavilov ya ɓace, amma gadonsa ya rayu. Abokan aikinsa sun kare bankin iri da ya kafa da ƙarfi, ba tare da cin ko ɗaya daga cikin irin ba, a lokacin yunwa mai tsanani a lokacin mummunan kewaye na Leningrad. Godiya ga ƙoƙarinsu na sadaukarwa, an adana albarkatun kwayoyin halitta masu mahimmanci na ɗan adam. An wanke Vavilov bayan mutuwarsa a 1955, kuma an sake kimanta nasarorin kimiyya. Bincikensa, kamar ka'idar cibiyoyin asalin tsire-tsire masu noma da dokar jerin homologous, sun zama muhimmin tushe na ilimin shuke-shuke na zamani, kwayoyin halitta, da kimiyyar aikin gona. A yau, bincikensa ya zama ginshiƙin tsaron abinci na duniya kuma ya kasance shaida mai ƙarfi na mahimmancin adana bambancin kwayoyin halitta. Rayuwarsa da nasarorinsa ana tunawa da su tare da gwagwarmayar wasu waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin kare gaskiyar kimiyya a lokaci guda, kuma suna sa mu yi tunani game da rikitarwa tsakanin kimiyya da siyasa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban mai binciken Rasha wanda ya bincika ƙasashe marasa iyaka na Tsakiyar Asiya, ya tabbatar da Tafkin Lop Nur, ya bincika manyan kogunan Kogin Yellow, kuma ya gano dokin Nikolai Przhevalsky.
key_achievements: Bature na farko da ya tabbatar da wurin Tafkin Lop Nur
Binciken manyan kogunan Kogin Yellow da tattara bayanai na yanayin ƙasa
Gano sabbin nau'ikan tsirrai da dabbobi, ciki har da dokin Nikolai Przhevalsky
fact_box.legacy_statement: Balaguron balaguronsa sun ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ilimi game da Tsakiyar Asiya kuma suna nuna ƙalubalen ɗan adam ga duniyar da ba a sani ba.

nikolai-przhevalsky.epic:
An haife shi a cikin gidan sarauta matalauci a Smolensk, amma zuciyarsa koyaushe tana kallon manyan ƙasashe marasa iyaka na Gabas. Farkon aikinsa a matsayin jami'in soja ya koya masa horo, amma babban kiran rayuwarsa shine bincike. A shekara ta 1867, a ƙarshe ya fara balaguron farko zuwa yankin Ussuri, tare da goyon bayan Ƙungiyar Yanayin Ƙasa ta Rasha. A can, ya fuskanci yanayin sanyi mai tsanani na Siberia, inda ya sami darussa masu mahimmanci don manyan ƙalubalen da ke gaba. Wannan tafiya ta farkar da sha'awar mai bincike da ke ɓoye a cikinsa gaba ɗaya, kuma ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da sauran rayuwarsa don gano asirin Tsakiyar Asiya.

Balaguron balaguro huɗu da ya yi zuwa Tsakiyar Asiya sune ginshiƙin rayuwarsa. Tafiya ta farko, wadda ta fara a shekara ta 1870, ta kai shi cikin zuciyar Mongoliya da Hamadar Gobi. Shi ne Bature na farko da ya tabbatar da ainihin wurin Tafkin Lop Nur, ya bincika manyan kogunan Kogin Yellow, kuma ya tattara bayanai masu yawa na yanayin ƙasa da dabbobi. Kowane balaguro ya ƙunshi tafiye-tafiye masu wahala na dubban kilomita, yana yaƙi da guguwar yashi na Hamadar Taklamakan da sanyin kisa na Dutsen Tibet. Amma farin cikin cike gibin da ke kan taswira da sawunsa ya fi kowace wahala girma.

Ɗaya daga cikin manyan burinsa shine shiga Lhasa, birnin Tibet da aka haramta wa Turawa. Ya yi ƙoƙarin isa Lhasa sau biyu, amma a kowane lokaci jami'an Tibet da yanayin yanayi mai tsanani sun hana shi ci gaba. Ko da yake ya kasa shiga Lhasa, a cikin wannan tsari ya gano tsirrai da dabbobi da yawa waɗanda ba a san su ga masana kimiyyar Turai ba. Daga cikinsu, mafi shahara shine dokin daji, wanda a yau aka sani da 'dokin Nikolai Przhevalsky'. Wannan gano shine ɗaya daga cikin manyan abubuwan alfaharinsa. Balaguron balaguronsa sun wuce gano yanayin ƙasa kawai, har ma sun ɗauki nauyin faɗaɗa tasirin Rasha a cikin gasar siyasar zamanin mulkin mallaka.

Yayin da yake shirin balaguro na biyar, ya kamu da zazzabin typhoid a Karakol a shekara ta 1888, wanda ya kawo ƙarshen tafiyarsa. Ko da yake bai taɓa taka ƙasar Lhasa ba, burinsa, bai yi nadama ba. Ta hanyar balaguron balaguro na rayuwarsa, ilimin Turai game da Tsakiyar Asiya ya ci gaba sosai, kuma an ba da rahoton tsirrai da dabbobi da yawa ga al'ummar kimiyya. Ya kasance mai bincike, soja, kuma masanin kimiyya. Za a tuna da sunansa har abada tare da duwatsu da koguna na Tsakiyar Asiya da ya so, da kuma dawakai na daji da suka yi gudu a can. Rayuwarsa ita ce ci gaba da ƙalubale ga duniyar da ba a sani ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Daniel of Galicia sarkin Rus' ta Yamma ne a ƙarni na 13, wanda ya sake gina Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia a lokacin mamayar Mongol kuma ya nemi kawance da Yamma.
key_achievements: Sake haɗewar Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia
Rantsuwar biyayya ga Batu Khan na Mongol
Rawani a matsayin Sarkin Ruthenia daga Paparoma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kiyaye asalin Rus' ta Yamma a lokacin mamayar Mongol kuma ya kafa tushen samuwar al'ummar Ukraine.

danylo-halytskyi.epic:
Daniel of Galicia (an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 1201), wani muhimmin sarki na Rus' ta zamanin da kuma Sarkin Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia, an haife shi a cikin wani zamani mai cike da tashin hankali kuma ya fuskanci gwaje-gwaje masu tsanani tun yana yaro. Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Babban Yariman Roman Mstislavich, wani mai mulki mai ƙarfi, a shekara ta 1205, Daniel mai shekaru huɗu ya tafi gudun hijira tare da mahaifiyarsa da ƙanensa, an kore su daga ƙasarsu. A lokacin, Galicia-Volhynia wata babbar masarauta ce a Yammacin Rus', kuma saboda ƙasarta mai albarka da kuma wurinta mai mahimmanci a dabarun yaki, ta kasance abin sha'awa ga manyan ƙasashe maƙwabta. Gurbin da aka samu a mulki sakamakon mutuwar mahaifinsa ya haifar da hargitsi inda boyars (masu daraja) masu haɗama da masarautun Poland da Hungary maƙwabta suka yi faɗa don raba yankin masarautar da kuma iko. Daniel, tun yana yaro, ya ci gaba da rayuwarsa a gudun hijira a kotunan Poland da Hungary, yana riƙe da buri ɗaya a zuciyarsa: sake dawo da gadon mahaifinsa da sake gina masarautar da aka rasa. Lokacin samartakarsa ya kasance lokacin samun ilimi da gogewa don cimma wannan buri.

Bayan shekaru da yawa na ƙoƙari mai ɗorewa da kawance na dabaru, Daniel a ƙarshe ya fara tafiyarsa don dawo da haƙƙinsa na gado. Da farko, ya tabbatar da ikonsa a yankin Volhynia, sannan ya mai da hankalinsa ga Galicia, wadda tsoffin abokan gaba da kuma boyars masu ƙarfi ke iko da ita. Galicia ita ce babbar birni kuma cibiyar al'adu ta Yammacin Rus', kuma mallakarta ita ce maɓallin sake haɗewar masarautarsa. Tun daga farkon shekarun 1230s, ya yi gwagwarmaya mai tsanani, yana amfani da nasarorin soja da diflomasiyya mai wayo a kan tawayen boyars da kuma ci gaba da tsoma bakin Hungary da Poland. A shekara ta 1238, a ƙarshe ya ci Galicia, inda ya yi nasarar sake haɗa masarautar mahaifinsa. Wannan nasara ba kawai ta ƙarfafa tushen mulkinsa ba, har ma ta sanya shi zama sarkin da ya fi ƙarfi a Yammacin Rus'. Bugu da ƙari, har ma ya mamaye Kyiv na ɗan lokaci, yana ɗaukaka matsayinsa a matsayin Babban Yariman dukkan ƙasashen Rus', amma wata babbar barazana da ke fitowa daga Gabas ta girgiza dukkan shirye-shiryensa.

Yayin da Daniel ke mai da hankali kan sake gina masarautarsa, a farkon shekarun 1240s, wani gwaji mara misali ya zo daga Gabas: mamayar Daular Mongol. Sojojin Mongol sun mai da biranen Rus', ciki har da Kyiv, toka kuma suka ci gaba zuwa Yammacin Turai, inda masarautar Daniel ma ta faɗa cikin haɗarin halaka. Don ceton mutanensa da masarautarsa daga cikakken halaka, Daniel ya haƙura da wulakanci kuma ya tafi kai tsaye zuwa Sarai a shekara ta 1245, inda Batu Khan na Mongol yake. Ya yi rantsuwar biyayya ga Khan kuma, a musayar zama bawan Mongol, ya sami yarlyk (izinin mulki da Khan na Mongol ke bayarwa) don ci gaba da mulkin ƙasarsa. Wannan sulhu ne mai ɗaci, amma a lokacin, ita ce hanya ɗaya tilo don rayuwar al'ummarsa da ƙasarsa. Ko da yake ya faɗa ƙarƙashin mulkin Mongol, wutar 'yanci ba ta mutu a zuciyar Daniel ba, kuma ya fara neman dabarun dogon lokaci don kawar da mulkin Mongol.

Don kawar da mulkin Mongol, Daniel ya nemi kawance da ƙasashen Yamma. Ya tuntubi Paparoma Innocent IV kuma an yi masa alƙawarin goyon bayan yaƙin Salibiyya a kan Mongols, kuma a musayar, an yi masa rawani na hukuma a matsayin 'Sarkin Ruthenia (Rex Rusiae)' daga wakilin Paparoma a shekara ta 1253. Wannan rawani ya nuna ikon mallakarsa kuma ya sanya Masarautar Galicia-Volhynia a matsayin wani ɓangare na Yammacin Turai. Ko da yake yaƙin Salibiyya da aka yi alƙawari bai tabbata ba, Daniel ya ci gaba da adawa da Mongols kuma ya fuskanci faɗace-faɗace na soja da yawa. Ya gina sababbin birane kamar Lviv, kuma ya haɓaka kasuwanci da al'adu don ci gaban masarautarsa. A lokacin mulkinsa, Galicia-Volhynia ta kafa asali na musamman tsakanin Gabas da Yamma, inda ta bar babban tarihi a tarihin Rus' ta zamanin da. Gadon Daniel a yau ana ɗaukarsa ɗaya daga cikin muhimman tushe na asalin ƙasar Ukraine, kuma ƙoƙarinsa na kiyaye wanzuwar ƙasarsa a cikin babban gwajin mamayar Mongol ana iya kwatanta shi da gwagwarmayar sauran sarakunan Gabashin Turai na wannan zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: David IV sarkin Georgia ne a ƙarshen ƙarni na 11, wanda ya 'yantar da ƙasarsa daga Seljuk Turks kuma ya buɗe zamanin zinariya.
key_achievements: 'Yantar da Georgia ta hanyar babban nasara a Yaƙin Didgori
Ƙarfafa ikon sarauta da aiwatar da gyare-gyaren coci
Kafa Kwalejin Gelati, farfaɗo da al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa 'Mai Ginawa' kuma ya kafa asalin Georgia kuma ya shimfiɗa tushen wadata a nan gaba.

david-iv-of-georgia.epic:
David IV (an haife shi a shekara ta 1089) yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan sarakunan Masarautar Georgia ta tsakiya, wanda ake kira 'Mai Ginawa' wanda ya buɗe zamanin zinariya na Georgia. Ƙarshen ƙarni na 11, lokacin da ya hau gadon sarauta, yana ɗaya daga cikin lokutan duhu a tarihin Georgia. A wancan lokacin, Georgia tana fuskantar lokacin 'Babban Mamayar Turkawa', inda ƙasarta ta lalace kuma mutanenta suka sha wahala saboda mamayar Seljuk Turks marar yankewa. Masarautar ta rabu, manyan sarakuna suna neman bukatunsu kawai, kuma ikon sarauta ya raunana. Georgia ta tilasta biyan haraji mai wulakanci, kuma wanzuwarta a matsayin ƙasa mai cin gashin kanta tana cikin haɗari. David IV, wanda ya hau gadon sarauta a shekara ta 1106 yana ɗan shekara goma sha shida, ya yi azama mai ƙarfi don ceton ƙasarsa daga wannan mummunan hali. Nan da nan bayan hawansa, ya ɗauki matakin jajircewa na shelanta niyyarsa ta yaƙar daular Seljuk mai girma kuma ya daina biyan haraji. Wannan ya fi sanarwa kawai; ya kasance bayyanar da ƙarfin hali na Georgia don samun 'yancin kai da kuma alƙawarin buɗe sabon zamani.

David IV ya gane cewa ba za a iya sake gina ƙasa da ta ruguje da ƙarfin soja kaɗai ba. Da farko ya mai da hankali kan ƙarfafa ikon sarauta da kuma warware rikicin cikin gida. A hankali ya murƙushe manyan sarakuna masu iko kuma, a kusan shekara ta 1103, ya kira Majalisar Ruisi-Urbnisi don gyara ƙungiyoyin coci masu cin hanci. Wannan Majalisa ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ƙarfafa ikon sarauta, kamar canja kadarorin coci zuwa ga gwamnati da kuma ba sarki ikon naɗa limamai. Bugu da ƙari, ya tsakiya ikon soja ta hanyar kafa 'Monaspa', sojojin dindindin masu biyayya ga sarki. Haka kuma, ya ƙaura da iyalai 40,000 na Kipchak daga arewa zuwa Georgia, inda ya sake tsara su zuwa dakarun dawakai masu ƙarfi. Wannan babban shirin ƙaura ya fi ƙarfafa sojoji kawai; ya kasance babban aikin sake gina ƙasa da nufin canza tsarin yawan jama'ar Georgia da kuma ƙarfafa ikon ƙasa gaba ɗaya. Waɗannan gyare-gyare sun zama ginshiƙi don canza Georgia zuwa ƙasa mai ƙarfi da za ta iya fuskantar barazanar waje.

Duk gyare-gyarensa da ƙoƙarinsa sun kai kololuwa a ranar 12 ga Agusta, 1121, a filin Didgori. A wancan lokacin, wata babbar rundunar haɗin gwiwar Seljuk, wadda aka kiyasta ta kai dubban ɗaruruwa, ta mamaye don lalata Georgia gaba ɗaya. Rundunar David IV, wadda ke fuskantar su, tana da sojoji 56,000 kawai, wanda ya sa su kasance cikin ƙarancin adadi. Duk da haka, David IV ya tsaya a gaban sojojinsa kuma ya ƙarfafa su, yana rantsuwa, "Za mu mutu da sunan Allah, amma ba za mu gudu ba." Dabaru na musamman da jajircewar sojojinsa sun haɗu, wanda ya kai ga rundunar Georgia ta samu nasara mai ban mamaki a 'Yaƙin Didgori'. Wannan nasara mai ban mamaki ta zama alamar 'yancin kai da 'yantar da Georgia, kuma wani muhimmin mataki na 'yantar da kai daga mulkin Seljuk Turkawa. A shekara mai zuwa, a shekara ta 1122, a ƙarshe ya sake kwato babban birnin Tbilisi, wanda ya kasance ƙarƙashin mulkin Musulunci na tsawon shekaru 400, inda ya mai da shi babban birnin Georgia na har abada. Wannan ya cusa zurfin alfahari a cikin mutanen Georgia kuma ya kasance wani muhimmin tarihi da ke nuna sake gina masarautar.

Mutane suna kiran David IV 'Mai Ginawa (Agmashenebeli)' kuma suna tunawa da manyan nasarorinsa. Wannan ba wai kawai saboda ya dawo da yankunan da aka rasa ba ne. Ya gina sabuwar Georgia daga tokar yaƙi kuma ya kafa ginshiƙan ƙasar da ƙarfi. Ya kafa Kwalejin Gelati don haɓaka ci gaban ilimi da fasaha, wanda ya kai ga zamanin zinariya na al'adun Georgia. Bugu da ƙari, ya kafa doka da oda kuma ya haɓaka haɗin kai na zamantakewa ta hanyar nuna haƙuri ga mutane masu addinai daban-daban. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Georgia ta fuskanci zamanin zinariya a fannin siyasa, soja, da al'adu, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban masarautar Georgia ta gaba. Bisa ga wasiyyarsa, an binne gawarsa a ƙarƙashin babban ƙofar Gidan Sujadar Gelati, wanda ya kafa. An yi hakan ne don nuna tawali'unsa a gaban Allah da kuma sadaukarwarsa ta har abada ga ƙasarsa, ta hanyar sa kowa a cikin masarautar ya taka kabarinsa. Jagorancin David IV da hangen nesansa sun kasance gado mai kama da na sauran manyan sarakunan zamaninsa, kamar Gwangjong na Goryeo ko Munmu na Silla, waɗanda suka kafa asalin ƙasa kuma suka jagoranci al'ummominsu zuwa wadata.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani malamin Nestorian daga Daular Mongol wanda, bayan ya fara aikin hajji zuwa Ƙasa Mai Tsarki, ya zama wakilin Ilkhanate, ya ziyarci Turai, kuma ya zama gada don musayar Gabas da Yamma.
key_achievements: Ya gudanar da tafiyar diflomasiyya mara misali daga Gabas zuwa Yamma
Ya sadu da shugabannin manyan ƙasashen Turai kuma ya ba da shawarar kawance
Ya rubuta duniyar Yamma daga hangen nesa na Gabas
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya zama majagaba na musayar wayewar Gabas da Yamma kuma muhimmin shaida na tarihi da ya haɗa Kiristancin Gabas da duniyar Yamma a lokacin Mongol.

rabban-bar-sauma.epic:
An haife shi a kusan shekara ta 1220 a Khanbaliq, babban birnin daular Yuan ta Daular Mongol, wanda shine Beijing a yau. Ya kasance Kirista Nestorian, wani reshe na Kiristanci na Gabas, kuma tun yana saurayi, ya rayu rayuwar zuhudu, ya bar duniya. Babban burinsa shine ya yi aikin hajji zuwa Urushalima, cibiyar bangaskiyar Kirista. Don haka, tare da almajirinsa Markos, ya fara tafiya mai tsawo da wahala zuwa yamma, yana dogara da bangaskiya.

Tafiyarsu ta ratsa babban nahiyar Asiya tsawon shekaru. Sun ratsa ta masarautun Mongol daban-daban, suna fuskantar haɗari da wahalhalu masu yawa. A ƙarshe, bayan sun isa Ilkhanate na Farisa, Babban Bishop na Nestorian na wurin ya tarbe su da kyau. Amma abin takaici, a wancan lokacin, hanyar zuwa Urushalima ta toshe saboda yaƙi da Masarautar Mamluk a yankin. Babban burinsa na aikin hajji zuwa Ƙasa Mai Tsarki ya zama kamar ya ci tura a gabansa.

Duk da haka, shirin Allah ya fi zurfi kuma ya fi ban mamaki fiye da tunanin mutum. Yayin da suke zaune a Ilkhanate, wani abin mamaki ya faru: almajirinsa Markos an zaɓe shi a matsayin sabon Babban Bishop na Cocin Gabas, wato Mar Yahballaha III. Ba da daɗewa ba, Arghun Khan, mai mulkin Ilkhanate, ya yanke shawarar aika wakili zuwa Turai don neman kawance da Mamluk. Saboda ya fito daga China kuma yana da masaniya game da al'amuran duniya, an ba shi wannan muhimmiyar manufa. Shi, wanda kawai malami ne, yanzu ya zama jami'in diflomasiyya na Khan.

Don haka, ya tsallaka Tekun Baƙi, ya ratsa ta Daular Byzantine, kuma ya isa Roma, Paris, da Ingila. Ya sadu, bi da bi, da Sarkin Byzantine, da Cardinal a Roma (inda kujerar Paparoma take babu kowa saboda mutuwar Paparoma), da Philip IV na Faransa, da Edward I na Ingila. Ya bayyana musu Kiristancin Gabas kuma ya ba da shawarar kawancen Franco-Mongol don fuskantar abokin gaba na gama gari, Mamluk. Ko da yake kawancen bai tabbata ba a ƙarshe, tafiyarsa ta zama gada mara misali da ta haɗa Gabas da Yamma. Ya koma Ilkhanate kuma ya rubuta tafiyarsa, wanda ya zama shaida ta musamman game da duniyar Yamma kamar yadda wani mutum daga Gabas ya gani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Marubuciya mai juriya wacce, duk da wahalar tarin kashi, ta ƙirƙiri adabi don 'yantar da mutanen Ukraine da mata.
key_achievements: Ta buga waƙoƙi masu ɗauke da asalin Ukraine
Ta fara adabin zamani mai sukar zamantakewa
Ta ƙirƙiri wasannin kwaikwayo waɗanda suka ci gaba da wasan kwaikwayo na Ukraine
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta ba da kwarin gwiwa na har abada ga mutanen Ukraine da ruhun da ba ya mutuwa wanda bai taɓa rasa bege ba ko da a cikin wahala.

lesya-ukrainka.epic:
An haife ni a shekara ta 1871 da sunan Larysa Petrivna Kosach a cikin iyali mai ilimi. Mahaifiyata marubuciya ce, mahaifina kuma lauya ne. Tun ina karama, na nuna hazaka a harsuna da adabi, amma rayuwata ta canza har abada lokacin da aka gano ni da cutar tarin kashi (bone tuberculosis) tun ina da shekaru goma. Wannan cuta ta bi ni a duk rayuwata, tana kawo min ciwo mara yankewa kuma ta hana ni samun ilimi na yau da kullum. Duk da haka, na ci gaba da karatu a gida a karkashin jagorancin mahaifiyata da malamai masu zaman kansu, inda na koya harsuna da yawa ciki har da Girkanci, Latin, Jamusanci, da Faransanci. Waɗannan lokutan ciwo da keɓewa, a maimakon haka, sun sa ni zurfafa cikin duniyar ciki ta, kuma sun zama abincin da ya haɓaka hankalina na adabi.

Na fara aikin adabi na tun ina da shekaru goma sha uku, inda na buga waƙata ta farko mai taken 'Lily of the Valley'. A cikin takunkumi da zalunci na Daular Rasha, na fara amfani da sunan alkalami 'Lesya Ukrainka', wanda ke nufin 'mace 'yar Ukraine', don bayyana asalin Ukraine. Ayyukana sun ci gaba a hankali daga waƙoƙin soyayya masu daɗi zuwa zamani (modernism), suna haɗa zurfin tunani da ra'ayoyin sukar zamantakewa. Na sami tasiri daga kawuna, fitaccen mai tunani Mykhailo Drahomanov, kuma na fahimci ra'ayoyin gurguzu da mata (feminism), inda na nuna su a cikin ayyukana da ayyukana. Rubuce-rubucena sun wuce fasaha kawai; sun kasance kira ne don 'yantar da al'ummai masu zalunci da mata.

Kololuwar aikin adabi na ta samu ne a rubuce-rubucen wasan kwaikwayo. Ta hanyar ayyuka kamar 'Cassandra', 'The Stone Host', da kuma babban aikina 'The Forest Song', na sake fassara tatsuniyoyi da tarihi, ina bincika damuwar wanzuwar ɗan adam da sha'awar 'yanci. Musamman 'The Forest Song' babban aiki ne wanda ke nuna rikicin tsakanin yanayi da wayewa, manufa da gaskiya, ta hanyar soyayya mai ban tausayi tsakanin ruhun daji Mavka da matashin ɗan adam Lukash. Duk da ciwo na jiki mara yankewa, ban taɓa daina ƙirƙira ba, kuma ana yaba wa wasannin kwaikwayo na da cewa sun ɗaga wasan kwaikwayo na Ukraine zuwa sabon matsayi.

A cikin shekarun baya na rayuwata, lafiyata ta tabarbare cikin sauri, kuma dole ne in yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa wurare kamar Masar da Caucasus don neman magani. Ko a cikin waɗannan tafiye-tafiye masu wahala, ban daina rubutu ba. A shekara ta 1907, na auri masanin al'adun gargajiya Klyment Kvitka, wanda ya kula da ni da sadaukarwa, amma farin cikinmu bai daɗe ba. A shekara ta 1913, na rufe idanuna a Surami, Georgia, ina da shekaru 42. Ko da yake jikina ya mutu, ruhun da ba ya mutuwa da sha'awar 'yanci da ke cikin ayyukana suna rayuwa har abada a cikin zukatan mutanen Ukraine. Ta hanyar rayuwata da adabi, na nemi in nuna yadda ake 'fata ba tare da fata ba'.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Rudaki wani mawaƙi ne na Farisa wanda ya rayu daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 9 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 10, kuma ya kafa harsashin waƙar Farisa ta zamani.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mawaƙi a fadar Daular Samanid
Ana kiransa 'Uban Waƙar Farisa ta Zamani'
Ya ƙirƙiri manyan ayyuka kamar 'Ƙamshin Kogin Mulian'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa sun zama ginshiƙin adabin Farisa kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mawaƙa na gaba.

rudaki.epic:
Abu Abdallah Ja'far ibn Muhammad al-Rudaki wani babban mawaƙi ne na Farisa wanda ya rayu daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 9 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 10, kuma ana kiransa 'Uban Waƙar Farisa ta Zamani'. Lokacin da ya rayu lokaci ne da Daular Samanid ke bunƙasa a Tsakiyar Asiya, inda wayewar Musulunci da al'adun Farisa suka haɗu, kuma fasaha da ilimi masu ban mamaki suka bunƙasa. Musamman ma, yaren Farisa ya fara 'yantuwa daga tasirin Larabci kuma ya fara zama yaren adabi mai zaman kansa, wanda hakan ya kasance wani muhimmin lokaci na sauyi. Rudaki an haife shi a ƙauyen Rudak, a yankin Panjrud na Tajikistan a yau. Ba a san yawa game da yarintarsa ba, amma ya nuna baiwa ta musamman tun yana ƙarami. Ya rera waƙa da murya mai daɗi, ya ƙware a kaɗa chang (wani nau'in garaya), kuma mafi mahimmanci, yana da baiwar waƙa ta musamman wajen bayyana zurfin ji da tunani ta hanyar harshe. Bayyanar da ke cike da rai da kuma hotuna masu yawa a cikin waƙoƙinsa suna nuna cewa ya lura da kuma ji duniya sosai. Akwai ra'ayoyi daban-daban game da ko an haife shi da nakasar gani ko kuma ya rasa ganinsa a wani lokaci na rayuwarsa, amma waƙoƙinsa cike suke da fahimta da ta wuce gani.

Baiwar Rudaki ta musamman ba da daɗewa ba ta kai har zuwa Bukhara, babban birnin Daular Samanid, kuma aka kira shi zuwa fadar Sarki Nasr II. Tun daga kusan shekara ta 914, Rudaki ya yi aiki a matsayin babban mawaƙi a fadar Bukhara, kuma ya shiga zamanin zinare mafi girma a rayuwarsa. Ya sami tagomashin sarki kuma ya yi tasiri sosai. Waƙoƙinsa sun wuce nishaɗi kawai, har ma sun taɓa zuciyar sarki kuma sun yi tasiri a kan harkokin mulki. Musamman ma, akwai wani sanannen labari cewa, lokacin da Sarki Nasr II ke zama a Herat kuma ya yi jinkirin komawa garinsu Bukhara, Rudaki ya rera waƙar 'Booye Juy-e Mulian' (Ƙamshin Kogin Mulian) ba zato ba tsammani, wanda hakan ya motsa sha'awar sarki ga garinsu kuma ya sa shi komawa Bukhara. Wannan waƙar ta nuna ƙwarewarsa ta harshe da kuma yadda yake bayyana ji da tausayi, wanda hakan ya ƙara ɗaukaka sunansa. Wannan lokaci ne na bunƙasar adabi inda Rudaki ya tsara tsari da abubuwan da ke cikin waƙar Farisa, kuma ya ƙirƙiri manyan ayyuka da yawa waɗanda suka ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mawaƙa na gaba.

Amma iska ta iko tana canzawa. Lokacin da mai goyon bayansa, Sarki Nasr II, ya karkata zuwa ga imani na Isma'iliyya, malamai da sojojin Sunna suka shirya makirci don hambarar da shi. A ƙarshe, a kusan shekara ta 940, an yi juyin mulki, kuma aka hambarar da sarki, kuma Rudaki, wanda ya yi masa hidima a kusa, bai iya guje wa wannan bala'i ba. Ya rasa komai kuma aka kore shi daga fada. Mawaƙin da sarki ya taɓa so ya rasa dukiyarsa gaba ɗaya cikin dare ɗaya kuma ya rasa kariyar fada. Nakasar ganinsa zai zama babban ciwo a cikin wannan gwaji. Kyawun fadar Bukhara yanzu ya zama kamar mafarki mai nisa, kuma dole ne ya koma garinsu Panjrud cikin talauci da kaɗaici. Wannan gwaji ya kawo zurfin yanke kauna ga Rudaki, amma a lokaci guda, ya zama wata dama ta haɗa zurfin tunani da baƙin ciki na ɗan adam a cikin duniyar waƙoƙinsa. Maimakon kyawun fada, ya haɗa tunani game da ainihin rayuwa da kuma makomar ɗan adam a cikin waƙoƙinsa.

Ya shafe kwanakin ƙarshe na rayuwarsa a garinsu Panjrud cikin talauci da kaɗaici. A shekara ta 941, Rudaki ya rufe idanunsa cikin kaɗaici. Ko da yake ƙarshen rayuwarsa ya kasance bala'i, waƙoƙinsa ba su ɓace ba, sun rayu. Bayan mutuwarsa, mawaƙa na gaba sun ɗauki ayyukansa a matsayin farkon waƙar Farisa, kuma suka kira shi 'Adamu na Mawaƙa'. Rudaki ya kafa harsashin adabin Farisa na zamani, ya tsara nau'ikan waƙa daban-daban kuma ya gabatar da sabbin kalmomi. Ko da yake yawancin ayyukansa sun ɓace, ragowar guntayen kawai sun isa su nuna girman nasarorin adabinsa. Harshensa ya yi tasiri sosai a kan adabin Farisa har zuwa yau, sama da shekaru dubu, kuma a Tajikistan ana girmama shi a matsayin mawaƙin ƙasa. Waƙoƙin Rudaki sun share hanya ga manyan mawaƙa kamar Ferdowsi da Hafez, waɗanda suka buɗe zamanin zinare na adabin Farisa, kuma a nan ne darajar gadonsa take.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin kimiyya daga zuriyar sarauta ta daular Karakhanid wanda, bayan gudun hijira, ya tattara 'Dīwān Lughāt al-Turk', yana tsara harshe da al'adun Turkawa.
key_achievements: Rubuta harsuna/al'adun kabilun Turkawa na Asiya ta Tsakiya
Tattarawa da tsara 'Dīwān Lughāt al-Turk'
Tabbatar da kyawun harshen Turkawa ga duniyar Larabawa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun ba da gudummawa sosai wajen adana harshe da al'adun al'ummar Turkawa da kuma kafa asalin su.

mahmud-al-kashgari.epic:
An haife shi a farkon karni na 11, kusa da Kashgar, cibiyar daular Karakhanid, inda ya gaji sarauta. Mahaifinsa shi ne Sarkin Barsgan, kuma ya girma yana samun ilimi mai wadata daga duniyoyi biyu: ilimin Musulunci da al'adun Turkawa. Kuruciyarsa cike take da ƙishirwar ilimi da alfahari da babban al'adun mutanensa. Ya yi alƙawarin cewa wata rana zai yi amfani da wannan ilimin don sanar da duniya girman al'ummar Turkawa.

Amma kaddara ta kawo masa gwaji. Yayin da mahaifinsa ya shiga cikin gwagwarmayar neman mulki, danginsu suka faɗi, kuma dole ne ya bar garinsu na Kashgar don ceton ransa. Wannan gudun hijira ba zato ba tsammani ya kawo masa babban rashi da zafi, amma a lokaci guda, ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwarsa. Ya yanke shawarar mayar da wannan bala'i na kansa zuwa wata babbar manufa ta rubutawa da adana harshe da al'adun dukan al'ummarsa.

Bayan haka, kimanin shekaru 15, ya yi yawo a cikin manyan filaye da biranen Asiya ta Tsakiya. Ba kawai matafiyi ba ne. A matsayinsa na masanin harshe da kuma masanin al'adu, ya sadu da kabilun Turkawa daban-daban kamar Oghuz, Kipchak, da Uyghur, yana rubuta yarensu, karin maganarsu, waƙoƙinsu, da salon rayuwarsu a hankali. Shekarun da ya yi a kan doki sun kasance masu wahala, amma zuciyarsa ta cika da farin ciki da tunanin adana gadon mutanensa da ke ɓacewa da hannunsa.

A ƙarshe, ya zauna a Baghdad, cibiyar duniyar Musulunci, kuma ya fara tsara tarin kayan da ya tattara. Bayan shekaru da yawa na aiki tuƙuru, ya kammala babban aikinsa na rayuwa, 'Dīwān Lughāt al-Turk' (Kamusun Yarukan Turkawa). Wannan littafi ba kawai kamus ba ne. Tarihi ne mai rai da taskar al'adun Turkawa, wani abin tunawa da ke tabbatar da kyawun harshensu, wanda ba shi da ƙasa da Larabci, wanda shi ne harshen duniya a lokacin. Daga ƙarshe ya koma garinsu kuma ya rufe idanunsa, amma littafinsa yana ci gaba da haskakawa, yana ɗauke da ruhin Turkawa, har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Michael Psellos masanin ilimi ne mai fannoni daban-daban kuma ɗan siyasa na daular Byzantine a ƙarni na 11, wanda ya bar babban tarihi a tarihin daular ta hanyar farfaɗo da ilimin gargajiya da rubuta 'Chronographia'.
key_achievements: Ya riƙe muƙamin Shugaban Falsafa a Jami'ar Konstantinoful
Ya yi aiki a matsayin babban minista ga sarakunan Byzantine
Ya rubuta 'Chronographia' don rubuta tarihin ƙarni na 11
Ya yi bincike kuma ya yaɗa falsafar Girka ta da
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa da tunaninsa sun yi tasiri sosai a tarihin ilimi na Byzantine, kuma a yau ana amfani da su a matsayin tushe mai mahimmanci don binciken Byzantine na ƙarni na 11.

michael-psellos.epic:
Michael Psellos (an haife shi a kusan 1017/1018) ya kasance babban masanin ilimi kuma ɗan siyasa a lokacin daular Byzantine a ƙarni na 11, wanda aka yi fama da rikice-rikice. Sunansa na asali shine Konstantinos Psellos, kuma an haife shi a Konstantinoful, cibiyar daular, inda ya nuna hazaka ta ilimi tun yana yaro. A wancan lokacin, daular Byzantine tana fuskantar ƙalubale masu sarkakiya kamar ƙarshen zamanin zinare na daular Macedoniya, rashin zaman lafiya a siyasa, sauye-sauyen sarakuna akai-akai, da kuma rabuwar coci tsakanin Gabas da Yamma. Duk da wannan rudani, Psellos ya himmatu ga ilimi, yana mai sha'awar doka, fasahar magana, da falsafar Girka ta da, musamman tunanin Plato da Aristotle. Hazakarsa ta ilimi ta jawo hankalin fadar sarki nan da nan, kuma ya fara aikinsa a matsayin jami'in gudanarwa na daular tun yana saurayi. Fiye da zama jami'i kawai, yana da burin zama mai ba da shawara ga 'sarkin falsafa' kamar yadda Plato na da ya yi mafarki, don shiga cikin rayuwar ilimi da siyasa ta daular. Rayuwarsa za ta kasance tana juyawa ne a kan ginshiƙai biyu: binciken ilimi da shiga cikin siyasar gaskiya.

Rayuwar Psellos a fadar sarki ta kasance mai ban sha'awa amma kuma mai haɗari, kamar tafiya a kan igiya. Ya shaida ainihin iko da sha'awar ɗan adam a matsayin mafi girma a daular, a lokacin mulkin sarakuna da sarauniya da yawa, daga Michael V zuwa Michael VII. Musamman ma, an naɗa shi 'Hypatos ton Philosophon' (Shugaban Masana Falsafa) a Jami'ar Konstantinoful, inda ya jagoranci farfaɗo da ilimin Girka na da. Wannan matsayi shine mafi girman iko a cikin daular Byzantine wanda ke kula da ilimin falsafa da bincike, kuma ya nuna darajarsa ta ilimi da tasirinsa. A matsayinsa na babban minista, ya shiga cikin manyan yanke shawara na daular kuma ya yi amfani da tasiri mai ƙarfi, amma wannan kuma ya sa ya zama abin kishi da makirci da yawa. A kusan shekara ta 1054, a cikin rikice-rikicen siyasa, ya ja da baya zuwa gidan sufi na ɗan lokaci kuma ya karɓi sunan sufi Michael. Wannan ya kasance wani muhimmin canji a rayuwarsa, lokacin da ya bar ikon duniya don mai da hankali ga ilimi da addini, amma daular ba za ta iya barin iliminsa da gogewarsa cikin sauƙi ba.

Rayuwar sufi ta ba Psellos ɗan gajeren lokaci na hutu da tunani, amma an sake kiran shi zuwa fadar sarki saboda buƙatun daular. Ya sake taka muhimmiyar rawa a ƙarƙashin sarakuna Romanos IV Diogenes da Michael VII Doukas, yana ƙoƙarin tabbatar da zaman lafiya a daular a lokacin rikici. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorinsa shine rubuce-rubucensa masu yawa. Musamman ma, babban aikinsa, 'Chronographia', littafi ne na tarihi wanda ya rubuta rayuwa da mulkin sarakunan Byzantine 14 daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 10 zuwa ƙarshen ƙarni na 11. Wannan littafi ya wuce kawai jerin abubuwan tarihi, yana bayyana halayen kowane mutum, dalilansu, da kuma tasirin mulkinsu a kan daular tare da zurfin fahimtar tunani da salon rubutu na musamman na Psellos, wanda ya sa ya zama ɗaya daga cikin mahimman tushen fahimtar tarihin Byzantine na ƙarni na 11. Bugu da ƙari, ya bar sharhi kan falsafar Plato, jawabai na fasahar magana, wasiƙu da yawa, da kuma rubuce-rubuce kan tauhidi da kimiyya, wanda ya wadatar da al'adun ilimi na Byzantine kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga kiyayewa da yaɗuwar ilimin Girka na da. Rayuwarsa ta kasance gwagwarmaya ce ta dindindin kuma tsari ne na daidaitawa tsakanin manufofin ilimi da siyasar gaskiya.

Michael Psellos ana tuna shi a matsayin mutum wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin ilimi na daular Byzantine. Ya sake gano kuma ya sake fassara gadon falsafar Girka ta da, yana taka rawar majagaba a farfaɗo da ilimin Byzantine. Musamman ma, zurfin fahimtarsa da sharhinsa kan falsafar Plato sun yi tasiri sosai ga masana falsafa na Byzantine na gaba, kuma sun samar da tushe kai tsaye don sake nazarin Platonism a lokacin Renaissance na Yammacin Turai. Littafinsa 'Chronographia' ya wuce kawai rubutun tarihi, yana ba da zurfin fahimta game da ainihin iko da tunanin ɗan adam, kuma ana amfani da shi a matsayin tushe mai mahimmanci ga masana tarihi na zamani don fahimtar sarkakiya ta al'umma da siyasar Byzantine na ƙarni na 11. Psellos ya nuna hazaka iri-iri a matsayinsa na masanin ilimi, ɗan siyasa, masanin falsafa, da kuma masanin tarihi, kuma rayuwarsa tana wakiltar lokacin da zamanin zinare na ƙarshe da raguwar daular Byzantine suka haɗu. Rayuwarsa tana nuna sarkakiya ta yanayin ilimi da siyasa na daular Byzantine, kuma ana iya kwatanta ta da sawun wasu manyan masana ilimi da 'yan siyasa na zamaninsa kamar Photios.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mikhail Lomonosov ya kasance mawaki, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin kimiyya na Rasha a karni na 18, wanda ya kafa tushen kimiyya da ilimi a Rasha.
key_achievements: Kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na farko na ilmin sunadarai a Rasha
Kafa dokar kiyaye yawan abu
Gano wanzuwar yanayi a Venus
Jagorantar kafa Jami'ar Moscow
Gyara harshen adabin Rasha
fact_box.legacy_statement: Nasarorinsa na fannoni daban-daban da kuma sadaukarwarsa ga ilimi sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyya da ilimin ɗan adam na Rasha.

mikhail-lomonosov.epic:
Mikhail Vasilyevich Lomonosov (1711-1765) ya kasance babban mawaki, masanin falsafa, kuma masanin kimiyya mai fannoni daban-daban a lokacin Haskakawa na Rasha a karni na 18. An haife shi a shekara ta 1711 a wani ƙauyen kamun kifi mai nisa mai suna Denisovka, a lardin Arkhangelsk na arewacin Rasha, ɗan wani masunci, kuma tun yana yaro, duk da iyakantaccen yanayin ilimi, ya ji ƙishirwar ilimi mara yankewa. A lokacin, Rasha tana fuskantar sauye-sauyen zamani saboda gyare-gyaren Peter Mai Girma, amma har yanzu tana da raunin tushen ilimi idan aka kwatanta da Yammacin Turai. Lomonosov bai gamsu da ilimin da ya samu daga ƙaramin ɗakin karatu na coci a ƙauyensu ba, kuma a shekara ta 1730, lokacin da ya cika shekaru 19, ya yanke shawarar da ta canza rayuwarsa, inda ya yi tafiyar ɗaruruwan kilomita zuwa Moscow, yana ɗauke da burin ganin duniya mai faɗi. Ya yi karya game da matsayinsa na ɗan babban mutum don shiga Kwalejin Slav-Greek-Latin, kuma duk da tsananin wahalar yunwa da sanyi, sha'awarsa ta ilimi ba ta taɓa raguwa ba. Wannan farkon rayuwarsa ya kasance alama ce ta ƙarfin hali na mutum don shawo kan iyakokin zamantakewa da buɗe hanyar ilimi a cikin al'ummar Rasha a lokacin.

Kyakkyawan sakamakon karatunsa a Moscow ya kai Mikhail Lomonosov zuwa Jami'ar Kwalejin St. Petersburg, kuma daga ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1736, zuwa Jami'ar Marburg a Jamus. A can, ya yi karatu a ƙarƙashin Christian Wolff, ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana falsafa na zamaninsa, inda ya bincika zurfin ka'idodin kimiyyar halitta kamar ilmin sunadarai, ilmin ƙarfe, da hakar ma'adinai, fiye da ilmin tauhidi kawai. Ya kasance mutum mai ilimi mai yawa wanda bai gamsu da fanni ɗaya na ilimi ba. Ya nuna basira a fannoni daban-daban, kamar rubuta waƙoƙi, koyon fasahar mosaic, da kuma zurfafa tunani game da ainihin wutar lantarki. Mikhail Lomonosov ya yi imani cewa duk ilimi yana da alaƙa da juna, kuma wannan tsarin fannoni daban-daban ya zama tushen binciken kimiyya da nasarorin ilimin ɗan adam na gaba. Duk da haka, lokacin da ya dawo Rasha a shekara ta 1741, ya gano cewa Kwalejin Kimiyya ta St. Petersburg tana ƙarƙashin ikon masana kimiyya na waje waɗanda ke shakkar basirarsa. Wannan ya zama farkon babban rikicin da dole ne ya yi yaƙi don 'yancin kai da ci gaban kimiyyar Rasha.

A Kwalejin Kimiyya ta St. Petersburg, Mikhail Lomonosov ya fuskanci ƙalubalen yaƙi da nuna bambanci da kishi na masana kimiyya na waje. Amma bincikensa ya zama hujja mai ƙarfi da ke tabbatar da iyawarsa. A shekara ta 1748, ya kafa dakin gwaje-gwaje na farko na ilmin sunadarai a Rasha, inda ya kafa tushen kimiyyar gwaji, kuma ta hanyar wannan, ya kafa dokar kiyaye yawan abu da kansa. Wannan yana ɗaya daga cikin muhimman ka'idodin da suka kafa tushen ilmin sunadarai na zamani. Bugu da ƙari, ya sami nasarori masu ban mamaki a fannin ilmin taurari, kamar gano cewa Venus tana da yanayi ta hanyar lura da wucewar Venus a gaban rana a shekara ta 1761. Mikhail Lomonosov ya gudanar da bincike mai sabbin abubuwa a fannoni daban-daban na kimiyyar halitta kamar ilmin lissafi, ilmin haske, ilmin ƙasa, da ilmin yanayi, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen haɓaka ƙarfin bayyana kimiyya na harshen Rasha ta hanyar rubuta da fassara littattafan kimiyya zuwa harshen Rasha. Wannan gwagwarmayarsa mara yankewa da nasarorin ilimi sun zama wata dama ta tabbatar wa duniya cewa babban kimiyya na iya bunƙasa a ƙasar Rasha.

Babban abin alfaharin Mikhail Lomonosov bai iyakance ga binciken kimiyya kawai ba. Ya gyara harshen adabin Rasha, ya haɓaka shi zuwa wani tsari na zamani, kuma mafi mahimmanci, ya taka rawar gani wajen kafa Jami'ar Moscow a shekara ta 1755 tare da goyon bayan Ivan Shuvalov. Jami'ar Moscow ta kasance cibiya da ke ɗauke da hangen nesansa na samar da damar ilimi ga duk matasa masu basira, ba tare da la'akari da matsayinsu ko asali ba. Ya yi imani da ƙarfin hali ga damar al'ummar Rasha, kuma ya tabbata cewa ilimi ne mabuɗin da zai kai ƙasarsa zuwa ga makomar haskakawa da ci gaba. Rayuwarsa ta kasance shaida ce ga ƙarfin ilimi da kuma jajircewar ruhin ɗan adam, kuma tsarin fannoni daban-daban da kuma sadaukarwarsa ga ilimi sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyya da ilimin ɗan adam na Rasha. Gadonsa ya zurfafa cikin al'adun ilimi na Rasha har zuwa yau, kuma ana ɗaukar rayuwarsa a matsayin misali na yadda aka cimma burin zamani da sarakunan gyara kamar Peter Mai Girma na Rasha suka yi mafarki a fannin ilimi, yana tsaye kafada da kafada da masana falsafa na Haskakawa na Turai na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mykhailo Drahomanov ya kasance masanin kimiyya kuma mai tunani wanda ya kare asalin ƙasa da cin gashin kai na Yukren a ƙarƙashin zaluncin Daular Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19.
key_achievements: Ayyuka a 'Hromada' a Jami'ar Kyiv
Adawa da Ems Ukaz da gudun hijira
Kare cin gashin kai na ƙasa da tsarin tarayya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya zama tushen ilimi na ƙungiyar 'yancin kai ta Yukren kuma ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar rarraba iko da dimokuraɗiyya.

mykhailo-drahomanov.epic:
Mykhailo Drahomanov (1841-1895) ya kasance fitaccen masanin kimiyya kuma mai tunani a fannin siyasa wanda ya kare asalin ƙasa da cin gashin kai na Yukren a ƙarƙashin zaluncin Daular Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a shekara ta 1841 a Hadyach, Lardin Poltava, a cikin wani gida mai daraja mai zurfin al'adun adabi, ya haɓaka sha'awar bincike na ilimi da adalci na zamantakewa tun yana ƙarami a ƙarƙashin tasirin mahaifinsa mai tunani mai 'yanci. A wancan lokacin, Yukren tana ƙarƙashin mulkin Daular Rasha, wadda ke bin manufar haɗa kai, tana murƙushe amfani da harshen Yukren da ayyukan al'adu. Wannan yanayin tarihi ya zama muhimmin abin da ya sa Drahomanov ya yi zurfin tunani game da asalin ƙasarsa. Ya ci gaba da karatunsa a Jami'ar Kyiv kuma ya shiga cikin 'Hromada', wata ƙungiyar ɓoye ta ɗalibai da ke da nufin haɓaka al'adun Yukren da ilimi. 'Hromada' ta kasance muhimmiyar ƙungiya inda masana Yukren suka taru don bincike da adana tarihi da al'adun al'ummarsu. Wannan lokacin ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci inda ya yi zurfin tunani game da makomar al'ummar Yukren kuma ya ji wajibi ya kare asalin ƙasarsu daga zaluncin daular. Tunaninsa na farko ya haɗa da kishin ƙasa da manufofin wayewa.

Bayan kammala karatunsa na jami'a, an naɗa Drahomanov a matsayin malami a Jami'ar Kyiv, yana koyar da tarihi na da, kuma ya fara aikinsa na ilimi. Tare da zurfin bincikensa a matsayin masanin kimiyya, ya kuma shiga cikin ayyukan zamantakewa da ke kare haƙƙin mutanen Yukren. Duk da haka, sha'awarsa ta ilimi da shigarsa cikin zamantakewa ba su yi sauƙi ba. Daular Rasha ta fitar da 'Ems Ukaz' a shekara ta 1876, wanda ya haramta duk wani nau'i na amfani da harshen Yukren, ciki har da bugawa, wasan kwaikwayo, da ilimi. 'Ems Ukaz' ta kasance ɗaya daga cikin matakan zalunci mafi tsanani da Daular Rasha ta ɗauka kan ƙungiyar ƙasa ta Yukren, da nufin hallaka al'adun Yukren da harshensu. Drahomanov ya soki rashin adalcin wannan doka a fili kuma ya nuna goyon bayansa ga ƙungiyar ƙasa ta Yukren. Wannan matsayinsa na sukar da kuma adawarsa ga zaluncin daular a ƙarshe ya jawo hankalin hukumomi, kuma an kore shi daga muƙaminsa na farfesa a shekara ta 1876. A ƙarshe, dole ne ya fara tafiya mai zafi na gudun hijira, ya bar ƙasarsa mai ƙauna. Wannan ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin manyan gwaje-gwaje a rayuwarsa, amma bai karya imaninsa da sadaukarwarsa ga mutanen Yukren ba.

Bayan gudun hijira daga ƙasarsa zuwa Geneva, Switzerland, Mykhailo Drahomanov bai daina gwagwarmayarsa ta tunani a can ba. A shekara ta 1878, ya kafa mujallar siyasa mai suna 'Hromada' don yaɗa ra'ayoyinsa game da matsalolin siyasa da zamantakewa na Yukren a duk faɗin Turai. Wannan mujallar ta samar da muhimmiyar hanyar sadarwa da tushen tunani ga masana Yukren da ke gudun hijira. Ya yi jayayya cewa ya kamata a sake tsara Rasha da Daular Austro-Hungary zuwa jihohin tarayya na dimokuraɗiyya inda dukkan al'ummomi za su ji daɗin cin gashin kai. Tunaninsa ya wuce kishin ƙasa kawai, yana ɗaukar wani nau'i na musamman wanda ya haɗa manufofin gurguzu da haƙƙin cin gashin kai na ƙasa. Ya soki mulkin mallaka na tsakiya, yana mai jaddada cewa kowace al'umma ya kamata ta kasance tare da daidaitattun haƙƙoƙi a cikin al'umma mai rarraba iko. Waɗannan ra'ayoyinsa masu ci gaba sun yi tasiri sosai ga yawancin matasa masana Yukren a wancan lokacin, musamman fitaccen marubuci kuma mai tunani Ivan Franko da 'yar uwarsa Lesya Ukrainka, waɗanda suka zama muhimman mutane a cikin ƙungiyar ƙasa ta Yukren a matsayin magada tunanin Drahomanov. Ko da a gudun hijira, ya ci gaba da rubutu da lacca, yana kafa tushen ilimi don makomar Yukren.

Drahomanov ya shafe shekarunsa na ƙarshe a Sofia, Bulgaria. Ya yi aiki a matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar Sofia daga shekara ta 1889, yana ci gaba da bincikensa da ayyukan rubutu. Har zuwa mutuwarsa a shekara ta 1895, ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa wajen zana taswirar makomar Yukren. Ko da yake bai ga cikakken 'yancin kai na ƙasarsa ba a lokacin rayuwarsa, an gaji ra'ayoyinsa daga tsararraki na gaba kuma sun zama muhimmin tushen ilimi ga ƙungiyar 'yancin kai ta Yukren. Musamman, shawararsa game da rarraba iko, dimokuraɗiyya, da cin gashin kai na ƙasa sun ba da babban kwarin gwiwa ga masu fafutukar 'yancin kai na Yukren a farkon ƙarni na 20 kuma ana ɗaukarsa ɗaya daga cikin tushen tunani na gina jihar Yukren ta zamani. Ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar gwagwarmaya don mutuncin al'ummomin da aka zalunta kuma majagaba wanda ya nuna hanyar da jihohin Turai masu yawan kabilu ya kamata su bi. Tunaninsa kuma ya yi daidai da manufofin sauran ƙungiyoyin 'yancin kai na ƙasa a Gabashin Turai, yana farkar da darajar duniya ta cin gashin kai ga al'ummomin da aka zalunta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masanin ilimi kuma ɗan siyasa wanda ya sadaukar da kansa don kafa tarihin 'yancin kai na Ukraine kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin shugabanta na farko, amma ya gamu da ƙarshe mai ban tausayi.
key_achievements: Ya rubuta 'Tarihin Ukraine-Rus' kuma ya kafa ra'ayin tarihi mai zaman kansa
Ya haɓaka Ƙungiyar Kimiyya ta Shevchenko kuma ya haɓaka wayewar ƙasa
Ya yi aiki a matsayin shugaban farko na Jamhuriyar Jama'ar Ukraine
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙoƙarinsa na ilimi da na siyasa sun zama ginshiƙi don kafa asalin ƙasa ta Ukraine da gina ƙasa mai zaman kanta.

mykhailo-hrushevsky.epic:
An haifi Mykhailo Hrushevsky a shekara ta 1866 a Chełm, Poland, wanda a lokacin yana cikin Daular Rasha. Tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta fara ne a Jami'ar Kyiv, inda ya zurfafa cikin tarihin Ukraine da aka manta. A wancan lokacin, harshen Ukraine da al'adunta suna fuskantar danniya a ƙarƙashin sunan 'Ƙaramar Rasha'. Ya nemi tabbatar da cewa labarin al'ummarsu ba wani ƙari ba ne da ke ƙarƙashin tarihin Rasha ko Poland, amma yana da nasa labarin na musamman kuma mai zaman kansa. A shekara ta 1894, lokacin da aka naɗa shi farfesa a Jami'ar Lviv a Daular Austro-Hungary, a ƙarshe ya sami damar ba da fikafikai ga bincikensa, kuma a can ya buɗe babi na farko na babban aikinsa na rayuwa, 'Tarihin Ukraine-Rus'.

Bincikensa na ilimi ba da daɗewa ba ya kai ga ayyukan siyasa. Wannan ya faru ne saboda ya yi imani cewa tarihi ba kawai rubuce-rubucen abubuwan da suka gabata ba ne, amma yana da ikon tsara makomar gaba. A cikin raƙuman juyin juya halin Rasha na 1905, ya fara ɗaga muryarsa don cin gashin kai na Ukraine da haƙƙoƙin al'adu. Ya jagoranci Ƙungiyar Kimiyya ta Shevchenko a Lviv, ya haɓaka ta zuwa Kwalejin Kimiyya ta Ukraine, kuma ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce da yawa da rubuce-rubuce na jama'a, ya yi ƙoƙari ya haɓaka wayewar ƙasa ta Ukraine. Ya so ya nuna da kansa cewa alkalami na masanin tarihi wani lokaci zai iya zama makami mafi ƙarfi.

A shekara ta 1917, a cikin hargitsin daular da ke rugujewa, a ƙarshe dama ta zo. Ya koma Kyiv kuma aka zaɓe shi shugaban sabuwar Majalisar Tsakiya ta Ukraine (Rada). Ya matsa daga ɗakin karatu na masanin ilimi zuwa tsakiyar matakin tarihi. Sun ayyana Jamhuriyar Jama'ar Ukraine mai zaman kanta, kuma ya ɗauki daraja da alhakin zama shugabanta na farko. Amma mafarkinsu ya yi gajarta sosai. A cikin sojojin Bolshevik Red Army, shigar Jamus, da rarrabuwar kawuna na ciki, sabuwar jamhuriyar ta ruguje. Ya bar ƙasarsa kuma ya tafi gudun hijira.

Bayan shekaru da yawa a gudun hijira, ya koma Soviet Ukraine a 1924, yana fatan ci gaba da ayyukan ilimi a ƙarƙashin manufar 'Ukrainization'. Amma wannan kuskure ne mai ban tausayi. Yayin da mulkin ƙarfe na Stalin ya ƙarfafa, an sa ido kan ayyukansa, kuma an zargi iliminsa da 'ƙasa ta bourgeois'. A shekara ta 1931, har ma ya sha wahalar kama shi da kai shi Moscow. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1934, ya rufe idanunsa, yana ganin yadda aka hana burinsa na siyasa kuma aka yi barazana ga gadonsa na ilimi. Amma ya yi imani cewa tarihin da ya rubuta ba zai taɓa gogewa ba, kuma za a tuna da sunansa lokacin da al'ummarsu za su sami 'yancin kai na gaskiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babur ya kasance mai cin nasara kuma mai ilimi wanda ya kafa Daular Mughal a farkon karni na 16, daga Tsakiyar Asiya zuwa Indiya.
key_achievements: Hauhawar mulkin Fergana
Cin Kabul da kafa sansani
Kafa Daular Mughal bayan nasarar yakin Panipat
fact_box.legacy_statement: Daular Mughal, wadda zuriyarsa suka jagoranta, ta yi tasiri sosai a kan al'adu, fasaha, da gine-gine na Nahiyar Indiya.

babur.epic:
Zahir al-Din Muhammad Babur (1483-1530) ya kasance wani babban jarumi mai cin nasara kuma mai ilimi, wanda ya kafa harsashin Daular Mughal mai girma, wadda ta mamaye daga Tsakiyar Asiya zuwa Nahiyar Indiya. A karshen karni na 15, tare da durkushewar Daular Timurid, Tsakiyar Asiya ta shiga wani lokacin hargitsi da rudani, inda ta rabu zuwa kananan masarautu da kabilu daban-daban. A cikin wannan lokacin tashin hankali, a shekara ta 1483, Babur ya zo duniya a Kwarin Fergana, mahaifar kakansa Timur. Sunansa 'Babur' yana nufin 'damisa', kamar yana nuna jaruntakarsa da jajircewarsa marar yankewa. A shekara ta 1494, yana dan shekara goma sha biyu kacal, ya rasa mahaifinsa ba zato ba tsammani, kuma ya hau gadon mulkin Fergana tun yana karami, inda ya fara daukar nauyin kaddara tun da wuri. Tun daga lokacin kuruciyarsa, burinsa na ciki shi ne ya dawo da birnin Samarqand mai tarihi, wanda kakansa mai girma Timur ya gina. Wannan ba wai kawai fadada yankuna ba ne, a'a, kaddararsa ce kuma burinsa na rayuwa don dawo da daukakar kakanninsa.

Lokacin samartakar Babur cike take da gwagwarmaya marar yankewa da takaici a kan hanyarsa ta zuwa Samarqand. Ya yi nasarar mamaye Samarqand sau da yawa, amma a kowane lokaci ya rasa birnin saboda karfin abokan hamayyarsa da kuma kawance marar tabbas. Musamman, fafatawarsa da Shaybani Khan, shugaban Uzbekawa mai karfi, ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya tsara kaddararsa. Bayan mummunar shan kashi a yakin Sar-i Pul a shekara ta 1501, Babur ya sami kansa a karshe an kore shi gaba daya daga Tsakiyar Asiya, kasar kakanninsa. Ya zama sarki mara masarauta, mai mulki mara kasa, yana rayuwar gudun hijira, yana yawo a cikin tsaunuka masu tsauri tare da 'yan mabiyansa masu aminci. Wannan lokacin yanke kauna da wulakanci ya shiga har cikin kasusuwansa, amma bai taba karya burinsa ba. Maimakon haka, lokacin da burinsa na Tsakiyar Asiya ya rushe, ya juya idanunsa zuwa kudu, yana neman sabuwar hanya. Wannan ya zama mafi muhimmancin canjin dabara a rayuwarsa, kuma harsashin gina wata babbar daula a nan gaba.

Bayan burinsa na Tsakiyar Asiya ya rushe, Babur ya mamaye Kabul a Afghanistan a shekara ta 1504 kuma ya mai da shi sabon sansaninsa. A cikin lambunan Kabul masu albarka, ya sami dan hutawa na dan lokaci, amma zuciyarsa tana sha'awar wata babbar masarauta. Ya ji labarin arzikin Indiya mai yawa da kuma halin siyasa mai rarrabuwa a lokacin, kuma a karshe ya fahimci cewa kaddararsa tana cikin kasar Hindustan mai albarka, bayan kogin Indus. Bayan shekaru da yawa na shiri, a shekara ta 1526, Babur ya jagoranci karamin sojojinsa don fuskantar babban sojojin Delhi Sultanate a filin Panipat. A wannan yakin, ya aikata mu'ujiza ta hanyar kayar da abokan gaba masu yawa da yawa, ta hanyar amfani da sabbin dabarun soja kamar manyan bindigogi da bindigogi, wadanda ba a saba gani ba a Indiya a lokacin. Nasarar Panipat ta ba shi Delhi da Agra, kuma ya zama lokaci mai mahimmanci wanda ya kafa harsashin Daular Mughal a Indiya. Amma cin nasararsa bai tsaya a nan ba. A yakin Khanwa a shekara ta 1527, ya kayar da hadin gwiwar Rajput mai karfi, ya kara karfafa mulkinsa kuma ya kafa tushen mulki mai karfi a kan Nahiyar Indiya.

Babur ya kasance fiye da mai cin nasara kawai; ya kasance mai ilimi mai zurfi. Ya kasance jarumi amma a lokaci guda mai son lambuna kuma mawaki, kuma ya rubuta dukkan abubuwan da ya fuskanta – nasara da shan kashi, farin ciki da bakin ciki – a cikin littafin tarihin rayuwarsa 'Baburnama' a fili kuma a sarari. 'Baburnama' wani littafin tarihin rayuwa ne da aka rubuta a harshen Chagatai, wanda ke dauke da bayanai masu daraja game da al'umma, al'adu, yanayin kasa, dabbobi da tsirrai na Tsakiyar Asiya da Indiya a lokacin, kuma ana yaba masa sosai a fannin adabi. Lokacin da ya rufe idanunsa a Agra a shekara ta 1530, ko da yake bai iya komawa kasar kakanninsa ta Tsakiyar Asiya ba, zai sami babban ta'aziyya a cikin gaskiyar cewa ya bar harsashin wata babbar Daular Mughal wadda zuriyarsa za su jagoranta. Bayan mutuwarsa, Daular Mughal ta ci gaba da bunkasa a karkashin magada kamar Akbar Mai Girma, kuma ta bar kyakykyawan gadon al'adu a Nahiyar Indiya. Wannan, tare da sauran daulolin Musulunci kamar Delhi Sultanate wadanda suka yada al'adun Farisa a Indiya, ya bar babban tasiri a tarihin Indiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Basil II ya kasance Sarkin Sarakuna na Daular Byzantine a ƙarshen karni na 10 zuwa farkon karni na 11, wanda ya jagoranci cin nasara kan Bulgaria da farfaɗowar daular.
key_achievements: Murkushe tawayen Bardas da kafa iko
Haɗin gwiwa da Kievan Rus', samun Varangian Guard
Cin nasara kan Daular Bulgaria da faɗaɗa yankin daular
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa mai ƙarfi ya jagoranci lokacin farfaɗowar Daular Byzantine, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin daular.

basil-ii.epic:
Basil II (an haife shi a shekara ta 958, ya yi mulki daga 976 zuwa 1025) ya kasance Sarkin Sarakuna na Daular Byzantine, wanda ya jagoranci lokacin tashin hankali a ƙarshen karni na 10 zuwa farkon karni na 11, lokacin da daular ke fama da matsaloli na ciki da na waje. An haife shi a cikin ɗakin da aka lulluɓe da siliki mai launin shunayya, alamar sarauta, amma yarintarsa ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba ko kaɗan. Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa, Romanos II, yana ɗan shekara biyar, ya zama sarki a suna, amma ainihin ikon yana hannun mahaifiyarsa Theophano, da janar-janar masu ƙarfi, da kuma eunuchs. Musamman ma, sarakunan soja kamar Nikephoros II Phokas da John I Tzimiskes sun mulki daular, kuma ya yi yarintarsa a cikin inuwar iko. Wannan lokaci ne da barazanar sojojin Musulunci a kan iyakokin gabashin daular, da kuma farfaɗowar Daular Bulgaria a yankin Balkan, ke ci gaba da matsa lamba ga daular. Basil II ya girma da kaddarar kafa kansa a matsayin sarki a cikin wannan yanayi mara tabbas.

Yarintar Basil II ta cika da gwagwarmaya da ƙungiyoyin 'yan tawaye masu ƙarfi waɗanda ke barazana ga zuciyar daular. Musamman ma, manyan tawaye da janar-janar masu buri kamar Bardas Skleros da Bardas Phokas suka jagoranta sun girgiza wanzuwar daular. Sun mallaki sojojin daular kuma sun kalubalanci sarki, suna neman amfani da rashin iko. A cikin wannan yakin basasa, Basil ya bar jin daɗin fada kuma ya jagoranci sojojinsa kai tsaye zuwa fagen fama. Muhimmin juyin juya hali a farkon mulkinsa shine haɗin gwiwa da Grand Prince Vladimir na Kievan Rus'. Basil ya yanke shawara mai ban mamaki na aurar da 'yar uwarsa, Anna Porphyrogenita, ga Grand Prince Vladimir, kuma a madadin haka, ya sami sojoji 6,000 masu horo daga Vladimir. Waɗannan su ne Varangian Guard, waɗanda daga baya suka zama takobin sarki mai aminci, kuma shigarsu ta zama babban ƙarfafawa ga sojojin daular. Da jaruntakar Varangian Guard da kuma kyakkyawar dabararsa, Basil ya murkushe tawayen, kuma a ƙarshe ya kafa iko mai ƙarfi a matsayin mai mulkin daular guda ɗaya.

Bayan da ya daidaita rikicin yakin basasa, Basil II ya mai da hankali kan barazanar waje ga daular, musamman dogon yaƙi da Daular Bulgaria da ta farfaɗo a yankin Balkan. Bulgaria, karkashin jagorancin Tsar Samuel, ta ci gaba da mamaye iyakokin daular Byzantine a yankin Balkan tsawon shekaru da dama. Basil ya jagoranci sojojinsa kai tsaye a kowace shekara don yaƙar Bulgaria, yana matsa lamba ga sojojin Bulgaria ta hanyar tsaunuka masu wuya da kwaruruka. Gwagwarmayarsa mai dorewa ta kai ga nasara mai mahimmanci a cikin kwarin Kleidion a shekara ta 1014. A wannan yaƙin, sojojin Byzantine sun murkushe sojojin Bulgaria, kuma Basil ya ba da umarni mai tsanani na makantar da fursunonin Bulgaria 15,000 kafin ya sake su. Wannan lamari ya sa aka ba shi laƙabin 'Bulgaroktonos' (Βουλγαροκτόνος), wato 'Mai Kashe Bulgariyawa'. Wannan ya kasance gargadi mara tausayi wanda ya sanya tsoro a zukatan abokan gaba, kuma ya sake tabbatar da ikon daular. Ko da bayan wannan nasara, bai tsaya ba, ya murkushe ragowar sojojin Bulgaria gaba ɗaya, kuma a shekara ta 1018 ya haɗa Bulgaria a matsayin lardi na daular. Ta haka, Daular Byzantine ta sami yankin da ya fi girma tun zamanin Sarkin Sarakuna Justinian Mai Girma.

Basil II bai taɓa yin aure ba a rayuwarsa, ya guje wa alatu da jin daɗi, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga ci gaba da zaman lafiya na daular. A lokacin mulkinsa, Daular Byzantine ta kai kololuwar ƙarfinta na soja da tattalin arziki. Ya kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi, ya cika baitulmalin daular, ya daidaita iyakokin daular, kuma ya gudanar da dangantaka da Daular Fatimid a gabas yadda ya kamata. Bayan mutuwarsa, daular ta kasance mai ƙarfi da wadata fiye da kowane lokaci. Ko da yake salon mulkinsa mai tsanani, musamman yadda ya bi da fursunonin Bulgaria, ya haifar da muhawara mai yawa a baya, ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin sarki wanda ya yi duk abin da ya dace don rayuwa da ɗaukakar daular. Mulkin Basil II yana nuna lokacin farfaɗowar Daular Byzantine, kuma nasarorinsa sun yi tasiri sosai a tarihin daular daga baya. Jagorancinsa mai ƙarfi da basirarsa ta soja ana kwatanta su kuma ana nazarin su tare da salon mulkin sauran sarakunan Byzantine waɗanda suka yi yaƙi da Daular Ottoman daga baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Faxian wani malamin addinin Buddha ne na kasar Sin a karshen karni na 4 zuwa farkon karni na 5, wanda ya yi tafiya zuwa Indiya don neman littattafan addinin Buddha kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban addinin Buddha a kasar Sin.
key_achievements: Tattara littattafan addinin Buddha ta hanyar tafiya zuwa Indiya don neman dokokin Buddha
Fassara Vinaya Pitaka, ciki har da Mahasamghika Vinaya
Rubuta Foguoji don rubuta tarihi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucen tafiyarsa da fassarorinsa sun zama muhimmin gado ga ci gaban addinin Buddha a kasar Sin da kuma musayar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yamma.

faxian.epic:
Faxian (法顯, kusan 337-kusan 422) wani fitaccen malamin addinin Buddha ne, mai neman dokokin Buddha, kuma mai fassara littattafai a lokacin daular Jin ta Gabas a kasar Sin, daga ƙarshen karni na 4 zuwa farkon karni na 5. An haife shi a Pingyang, lardin Shanxi, kuma ya shiga addinin Buddha tun yana karami. A lokacin, addinin Buddha yana bunkasa sosai a kasar Sin, amma littattafan addinin Buddha da ke dauke da dokokin da sufaye ke bi, wato Vinaya Pitaka, ba su cika ba ko kuma an gurbata su, hakan ya sa ka'idojin aiki na gaskiya ba su da tabbas. An dauki wannan a matsayin babbar matsala da za ta iya girgiza tsarin sufaye da kuma gurbata ainihin addinin Buddha. Faxian ya fahimci wannan gaskiya sosai, kuma ya kuduri aniyar nemo ainihin Vinaya Pitaka wanda ke dauke da koyarwar Buddha gaba daya, don gyara addinin Buddha a kasar Sin. Duk da cewa ya riga ya wuce shekaru sittin, ya yanke shawarar yin tafiya mai wahala zuwa Indiya, wata kasa da ba a sani ba, yana shirya don babban balaguro na rayuwarsa. Wannan shawararsa ba wai kawai neman ilimi na kansa ba ce, amma ta samo asali ne daga wata manufa mai tsarki don makomar addinin Buddha a kasar Sin.

A shekarar 399 Miladiyya, Faxian ya fara tafiya mai nisa zuwa yamma don neman dokokin Buddha, tare da wasu abokansa sufaye, daga Chang'an, babban birnin kasar a lokacin. Tafiyarsu ta kasance jerin wahalhalu da ba za a iya misalta su ba. Sun fuskanci hamadar Taklamakan mai iska mai zafi da yashi, da kuma tsaununan Pamir masu tsauri inda dusar kankara ba ta narke duk shekara. Yunwa, sanyi, da barazanar 'yan fashi a kan hanya ba su karewa. A cikin wannan tafiya mai wahala, wasu daga cikin abokan tafiyarsa sun rasa rayukansu abin takaici, amma Faxian bai taba tsayawa ba, yana dauke da alkawurransu. Bayan shawo kan matsaloli masu yawa, isowarsa arewa maso yammacin Indiya ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a cikin neman dokokin Buddha. A Indiya, mahaifar addinin Buddha, ya ziyarci wurare masu tsarki da yawa, yana bin sawun Buddha, kuma ya so ya gani da kansa kuma ya koyi ainihin koyarwar Buddha da ya dade yana nema. A cikin wannan tsari, ya koyi harshen Sanskrit, ya yi hulɗa da sufaye na gida, kuma ya himmatu wajen binciken ainihin littattafan addinin Buddha.

A cikin shekaru goma sha biyu da ya yi a Indiya, Faxian ya himmatu wajen tattara da kwafin littattafai, yana ziyartar manyan wurare masu tsarki na addinin Buddha. Musamman a Pataliputra, ya zauna tsawon shekaru uku, inda ya tattara kuma ya fassara da himma Vinaya Pitaka daban-daban da sauran littattafai, ciki har da Mahasamghika Vinaya, waɗanda ba a san su a kasar Sin ba a lokacin. Ya ziyarci masarautu daban-daban a Indiya, kuma ya ga da kansa yadda addinin Buddha ke bunkasa da kuma yadda sufaye ke bin dokoki masu tsauri da kuma yin aiki tuƙuru, wannan ya ba shi babban motsin rai da fahimta. Bayan ya sami littattafai masu yawa, Faxian ya fara tafiyarsa ta komawa gida a kusan shekarar 412 Miladiyya. A wannan karon, ya hau jirgin ruwa daga Tamralipti a Indiya, ya bi ta Sri Lanka da tsibirin Java, ya zaɓi hanyar teku. Amma hanyar teku ma ta kasance mai wahala kamar ta kasa. Jirginsu ya kusan nutsewa saboda babban hadari, kuma sun fuskanci barazanar mutuwa sau da yawa, ciki har da lokacin da abinci da ruwa suka kare. Amma da jajircewa da imani mai ƙarfi, ya shawo kan dukkan matsaloli, kuma a karshe ya isa Dutsen Lao a yankin Shandong, ya sake taka ƙasar mahaifarsa.

Bayan ya dawo gida, Faxian ya sadaukar da sauran rayuwarsa wajen fassara littattafan addinin Buddha masu yawa da ya kawo daga Indiya. Musamman ya fassara Vinaya Pitaka, ciki har da Mahasamghika Vinaya, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen kafa tsarin sufaye na addinin Buddha a kasar Sin. Bugu da kari, ya rubuta “Foguoji” (Records of Buddhist Kingdoms), wanda ya rubuta cikakken bayani game da tafiyarsa ta shekaru 15 zuwa Indiya da Yammacin Duniya. Wannan littafi an dauke shi a matsayin wani muhimmin tarihin tarihi da yanki, wanda ya ba da cikakken bayani game da yanayin kasa, zamantakewa, al'adu, da addinin Buddha a Indiya da Asiya ta Tsakiya a farkon karni na 5, kuma ya zama muhimmin tushen bincike ga masana na gaba. Tafiyar Faxian don neman dokokin Buddha da fassarar littattafai sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban addinin Buddha a kasar Sin, kuma jajircewarsa da sadaukarwarsa sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga mabiya addinin Buddha da yawa. Tafiyarsa ta zama jagora ga manyan sufaye masu neman dokokin Buddha kamar Xuanzang a nan gaba, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga tarihin addinin Buddha a Gabashin Asiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Belisarius babban kwamandan soji ne na Daular Rum ta Gabas a karni na 6, wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen maido da Daular Rum ta Yamma a karkashin Justinian Mai Girma.
key_achievements: Ya fatattaki Sasanian Persia a yakin Dara
Ya ci kuma ya hallaka Masarautar Vandal a Arewacin Afirka
Ya kare Rome kuma ya ci Ravenna a yakin Gothic na Italiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Basirarsa ta soja da biyayyarsa ana tunawa da su a matsayin alamar sake ginawa ta Daular Byzantine kuma a matsayin babban janar a tarihi.

belisarius.epic:
Flavius Belisarius (kimanin 505-565) wani babban kwamandan soji ne na Daular Rum ta Gabas a karni na 6, wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen maido da martabar daular a lokacin mulkin Sarki Justinian I. Farkon karni na 6, lokacin da aka haife shi, lokaci ne da ba a kai karni guda ba tun bayan faduwar Daular Rum ta Yamma, kuma sha'awar dawo da tsohuwar martabar Rum ta bazu ko'ina cikin Daular Rum ta Gabas. An san Belisarius a matsayin wanda ya fito daga talakawa manoma a Thrace, ya fara aikin soja tun yana saurayi ta hanyar shiga cikin masu gadin sarki. Basirarsa ba da jimawa ba ta ja hankalin Sarki Justinian, kuma an nada shi babban kwamanda a gabashin gaba don fuskantar Sasanian Persia. A shekara ta 530, ya tabbatar da iyawarsa ta soja ta hanyar samun gagarumar nasara a yakin Dara a kan sojojin Farisa da suka fi yawa. Wannan nasara ita ce babbar nasararsa ta farko, kuma daga baya ya nuna cikakken biyayyarsa ga sarki da kuma hikimarsa ta hanyar murkushe tawayen Nika da aka yi a Constantinople a shekara ta 532. Wannan lamari ya kuma zama abin tunatarwa a gare shi game da rashin tabbas na iko da kuma yadda alherin sarki zai iya canzawa.

Babban burin Sarki Justinian, wato 'Renovatio Imperii' ko kuma maido da Daular Rum, mataki na farko shi ne cinye Masarautar Vandal a Arewacin Afirka. Masarautar Vandal masarauta ce ta Jamusawa wacce ta yi wa Daular Rum ta Yamma fashi a karni na 5 kuma ta kafa daular teku mai karfi a Arewacin Afirka, tana sarrafa cinikin Bahar Rum. A shekara ta 533, Belisarius ya jagoranci karamin rundunar sojoji 15,000 kacal a wannan balaguron da kowa ya dauka ba zai yiwu ba. Ya yi amfani da saurin motsi da dabaru masu ban mamaki don kai hari ga abokan gaba, inda ya ci sojojin Vandal a jere. Musamman ma nasarorin da aka samu a yakin Ad Decimum da Tricamarum sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen cinye Carthage, babban birnin Masarautar Vandal. Abin mamaki, ya hallaka Masarautar Vandal gaba daya kuma ya dawo da Arewacin Afirka cikin daular a cikin shekara guda kacal. Wannan gagarumar nasara ta kai ga babban bikin nasara a Constantinople, amma a lokaci guda, yayin da sunansa da ikonsa suka karu, ya haifar da shakku a cikin sarki da kuma kishi daga abokan gaba a kotu.

Bayan nasarar da aka samu a Arewacin Afirka, aikin Belisarius na gaba shi ne cinye Masarautar Ostrogothic wacce ke sarrafa yankin Italiya. Wannan yakin Gothic, wanda ya fara a shekara ta 535, bai kare da sauri kamar balaguron Afirka ba. Yakin da ya dauki shekaru da yawa ya lalata yankin Italiya, kuma Belisarius ya yi gwagwarmaya a cikin rashin isasshen kayan aiki da kuma takunkumin siyasa daga Constantinople. Ya yi nasarar kare Rome daga shekara ta 537 zuwa 538, inda ya dakatar da hare-haren Gothic, kuma ya samu nasarori da yawa, ciki har da cinye Ravenna, babban birnin Masarautar Ostrogothic, a shekara ta 540. Duk da haka, an ci gaba da gwada biyayyarsa. Ko da lokacin da Goths suka ba shi kambin sarki na Yamma kuma suka nemi ya zama sarkinsu, ya ki amincewa da karfi don kiyaye biyayyarsa ga Sarki Justinian. Daga baya, an kira shi gida sannan aka sake tura shi Italiya, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga bukatun daular duk da yanayin siyasa mai rikitarwa.

Belisarius, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga daular a fagen fama da yawa, ya dawo Constantinople a lokacin tsufansa kuma ya yi kamar ya sami zaman lafiya na ɗan lokaci. Duk da haka, a shekara ta 559, lokacin da Kutrigurs suka yi barazana ga babban birnin daular, ya sake shiga fagen fama da tsohon jikinsa kuma ya yi nasarar fatattakar su. Amma duk da gagarumar nasararsa a yakin, a shekara ta 562, an zarge shi da hannu a cikin makircin kashe sarki, kuma ya fuskanci gwaji na rasa dukkan darajarsa da kuma daure shi a gida. Ko da yake daga baya an wanke shi kuma an maido masa da darajarsa, shekarun karshe na jarumin da ya taba ceton daular sun kasance masu daci. Labarin da aka ruwaito daga baya cewa ya yi bara da idanunsa makafi labari ne kawai, ba gaskiya ba ne, kuma ya mutu cikin lumana a shekara ta 565. Gaskiyar gadon Belisarius yana cikin biyayyarsa marar yankewa ga Daular Rum ta Gabas, da iyawarsa ta jagorancin soja, da kuma manyan nasarorin da ya samu wajen maido da yawancin yankunan Daular Rum ta Yamma. Ayyukansa, tare da nasarorin soja na wani babban janar na Daular Byzantine, Narses, wanda ya yi aiki a lokaci guda, ana daukar su a matsayin alamar kokarin sake ginawa na Justinian Mai Girma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Bohdan Khmelnytsky ya kasance Hetman na Cossack a Ukraine a tsakiyar karni na 17, wanda ya jagoranci Tawayen Khmelnytsky kuma ya kafa Hetmanate na Cossack.
key_achievements: Jagorancin Tawayen Khmelnytsky
Kafa Hetmanate na Cossack
Sanya hannu kan Yarjejeniyar Pereyaslav
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin alamar 'yancin kai na Ukraine kuma mutum ne wanda ya bar gadon tarihi mai rikitarwa.

bohdan-khmelnytsky.epic:
Bohdan Khmelnytsky (kimanin 1595–1657) ya kasance wani mutum mai tarihi wanda ya jagoranci yunkurin 'yantar da kasa a matsayin Hetman na Cossack a Ukraine, wanda ke ƙarƙashin mulkin Tarayyar Poland-Lithuania a tsakiyar karni na 17. A wancan lokacin, rashin gamsuwa a cikin al'umma ya yi yawa a Ukraine saboda mallakar filaye na manyan sarakunan Poland (szlachta) da tsananin bautar kasa. Cossacks da manoma masu bin addinin Orthodox sun sha wahala daga zaluncin hukumomin Poland da ke tilasta Katolika. An haifi Khmelnytsky a cikin iyali mai daraja amma ba su da wadata, ya sami ilimi kuma ya sami kwarewar soja a matsayin mai biyayya ga Tarayyar Poland-Lithuania. A matsayinsa na jami'in Cossack mai rijista, ya yi yaƙi don Tarayyar da Daular Ottoman, kuma an kama shi a yakin Cecora a 1620, inda ya yi shekaru biyu a bauta. Waɗannan abubuwan sun ba shi zurfin fahimtar yanayin siyasar duniya mai sarkakiya na lokacin da iyakokin Cossacks.

Amincin Khmelnytsky ya fara rawa a hankali saboda haɗama da girman kai na manyan sarakunan Poland. Musamman ma, a shekarar 1647, wani jami'in yankin, Daniel Czapliński, ya kwace masa gonarsa ta Subotiv ba bisa ka'ida ba, ya kai hari ga ɗansa ƙarami har ya mutu, kuma ya sace matarsa. Khmelnytsky ya roƙi adalci ga hukumomin Poland sau da yawa, amma an yi watsi da buƙatunsa ko kuma an ƙi su. Tare da ramuwar gayya ta kansa da fushin da aka yi game da zaluncin da Cossacks da mutanen Ukraine suka sha, ya yanke shawarar tashi don wata babbar manufa fiye da korafe-korafe na kansa. Farkon 1648, ya gudu zuwa Zaporizhian Sich, ya tattara Cossacks da aka zalunta, kuma ya ayyana 'Tawayen Khmelnytsky,' babban tawaye ga zaluncin Poland. Wannan shi ne farkon yaƙin 'yantar da kasa da ke da nufin tabbatar da 'yancin Cossack da kare addinin Orthodox. Ya haɗa kai da Tatars na Crimea kuma ya ci nasara mai ban mamaki, inda ya ci sojojin Poland a yaƙe-yaƙe na Zhovti Vody, Korsun, da Pyliavtsi.

Tawayen Khmelnytsky ya bazu kamar wutar daji, tare da manoma da mazauna birane a duk faɗin Ukraine suna shiga, ya samo asali daga tawayen Cossack kawai zuwa cikakken yaƙin 'yantar da kasa. Ta hanyar waɗannan nasarorin, ya kafa 'Hetmanate na Cossack,' wata kasa mai cin gashin kanta. Hetmanate na Cossack wata kasa ce mai cin gashin kanta ta Cossack wacce ta wanzu musamman a yankin Ukraine na Bankin Hagu daga tsakiyar karni na 17 zuwa ƙarshen karni na 18. A matsayinsa na Hetman, Khmelnytsky ya yi ƙoƙari ya gina tsarin gudanarwa, soja, da diflomasiyya na jihar, ya kafa harsashin sabuwar al'umma. Duk da haka, wani duhu ya faɗa kan gwagwarmayarsa. A cikin rudanin yaƙin, an yi kisan kiyashi mai ban tsoro ga al'ummomin Yahudawa da aka yi imani suna haɗin gwiwa da manyan sarakunan Poland, wanda ya bar tabo mara gogewa a kan gadonsa. Sakamakon fushin jama'a ne wanda shugaba ke da wuya ya sarrafa. Yayin da yaƙin ya daɗe kuma hare-haren Poland suka ƙaru, ya fahimci buƙatar mai karewa mai ƙarfi daga waje.

Bayan dogon tunani, Khmelnytsky ya sanya hannu kan 'Yarjejeniyar Pereyaslav' a 1654 a Pereyaslav, inda ya karɓi kariya daga Tsardom na Moscow. Yarjejeniyar Pereyaslav ta tanadi cewa Hetmanate na Cossack zai amince da ikon mallakar Tsardom na Moscow kuma ya sami kariya ta soja, yayin da yake riƙe da cikakken cin gashin kai. Wannan zaɓi ne da ba za a iya gujewa ba don tserewa barazanar Poland, amma a ƙarshe ya zama wani abu mai mahimmanci wanda ya sanya Ukraine a ƙarƙashin tasirin Rasha. Ya yi mafarkin samun kasa mai cin gashin kanta ga mutanensa, amma masana tarihi suna ci gaba da tantance rikitarwa na gadon da shawararsa ta bari ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Khmelnytsky ya rasu a 1657, yana damuwa game da makomar kasarsa da ba a kammala ba. A yau, ana girmama shi a matsayin uban al'ummar Ukraine da alamar 'yancin kai, amma a lokaci guda, yana tsakiyar muhawara game da tashin hankalin da ya faru a lokacin mulkinsa da kuma kafa dangantaka da Rasha. Zaɓinsa da gadonsa sun kuma nuna rikitarwa tsakanin 'yancin kai da dogaro ga ƙasashen waje wanda sauran shugabannin Ukraine, kamar Ivan Mazepa, za su fuskanta daga baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mutumin da ya haɗa kan kabilun Turkawa bayan cin mutuncin Rouran, ya halaka Rouran kuma ya kafa Khaganate na Turkawa na Farko.
key_achievements: Halaka Khaganate na Rouran da kuma mallakar ikon ciyayi.
Haɗa kan kabilun Turkawa don samar da ƙarfi mai girma.
Kafa Khaganate na Turkawa na Farko a Dutsen Ötüken.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Duk da gajeren mulkinsa, ya buɗe sabon zamani ga Turkawa kuma ya kafa harsashin babbar daula.

bumin-qaghan.epic:
Bumin Qaghan, a matsayinsa na shugaban kabilar Asena, ya rayu a matsayin bawa ga Khaganate na Rouran, wanda a wancan lokacin ya mallaki manyan ciyayi. Turkawansu maƙera ne nagari, kuma ƙarfen da suka ƙera da hannayensu ya yi wa sojojin Rouran makamai. A hankali suka gina ƙarfi a ƙarƙashin mulkinsu, suna jiran ranar da za su gina makomarsu. Iskar ciyayi tana raɗaɗa canji, kuma shi a shirye yake ya hau kan wannan iska ya tashi sama.

Lokacin da ya dace ya zo a shekara ta 551. Ya murƙushe tawaye don Rouran, kuma a matsayin lada, ya nemi auren gimbiya Rouran. Amma Anagui Khagan na Rouran ya zage shi da kiran shi 'bawan maƙeri' kuma ya ƙi. Wannan cin mutunci ya kunna wuta a zuciyarsa, kuma ya tayar da fushin dukan kabilar. Ba zai iya rayuwa cikin bauta ba. Ba wai kawai kin amincewa da aure ba ne, amma wani aiki ne na tattake mutuncin dukan al'ummar Turkawa.

Nan da nan ya haɗa kan kabilun Turkawa kuma ya ɗaga tutar tawaye. Ya haɗa kai da daular Western Wei a yamma, kuma ya ƙarfafa kawancen ta hanyar auren gimbiya tasu. A shekara ta 552, sojojinsa sun ci sojojin Anagui, kuma Anagui, cikin yanke kauna, ya kashe kansa. Karkiyar Rouran, wadda ta danne su tsawon shekaru da dama, a ƙarshe ta karye, kuma mai ciyayi ya canza. Wannan ba wai kawai nasara ba ce, amma farkon sabon zamani ne.

Ya kira kansa 'Ilig Qaghan' a Dutsen Ötüken kuma ya kafa Khaganate na Turkawa na Farko. Duk da cewa mulkinsa ya ƙare ba zato ba tsammani a wannan shekarar, nasarorinsa ba su tafi a banza ba. Ɗan'uwansa Istemi ya mulki yamma, kuma 'ya'yansa suka mulki gabas, suna faɗaɗa daularsu zuwa manyan yankuna. Ya haskaka na ɗan lokaci kaɗan, amma wutar da ya kunna ta zama fitila mai haskaka ciyayi tsawon ƙarnuka ga zamanin Turkawa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mai Girma Vladimir babban yarima ne na Kyiv Rus a karni na 10, wanda ya jagoranci Kiristancin Rus kuma ya kafa tushen wayewar Slavic ta Gabas.
key_achievements: Hauhawar karagar mulki a matsayin Babban Yarima na Kyiv Rus (kusan 978)
Sanya Cocin Orthodox na Byzantine a matsayin addinin ƙasa da Kiristancin Rus (988)
Kafa asalin al'adu na al'ummar Slavic ta Gabas
fact_box.legacy_statement: Juyawarsa ta yi tasiri mai muhimmanci wajen samar da asalin addini, al'adu, da siyasa na al'ummar Slavic ta Gabas.

vladimir-the-great.epic:
An haife shi a kusan shekara ta 970, ya rasu a shekara ta 1015, Mai Girma Vladimir babban yarima ne na Kyiv Rus wanda ya mulki daga ƙarshen karni na 10 zuwa farkon karni na 11, kuma mutum ne mai muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da asalin al'ummar Slavic ta Gabas. Zamaninsa lokaci ne na rudani inda Gabashin Turai ke canzawa daga arna zuwa Kiristanci, kuma Kyiv Rus kuma al'umma ce mai sarkakiya, inda tasirin kabilun Slavic daban-daban da na Vikings na Arewacin Turai suka haɗu. An haife shi a matsayin ɗan shege na Babban Yariman Sviatoslav, Mai Girma Vladimir ya fara aikin siyasa a matsayin Yariman Novgorod, nesa da cibiyar iko. Tun yana saurayi, yana da babban buri, kuma ya kafa tushen mulkinsa a matsayin Yariman Novgorod tun daga shekara ta 970. A kusan shekara ta 978, ya dawo daga gudun hijira tare da goyon bayan sojojin haya na Varangian, ya kashe ɗan'uwansa Yaropolk, ya kuma hau kan karagar mulkin Kyiv a matsayin Babban Yarima, inda ya zama mai mulki mafi girma a Rus. Mulkinsa na farko ya kasance mai zurfi a cikin addinin arna, inda ya bauta wa tsoffin alloli ciki har da Perun, kuma ya mai da hankali kan faɗaɗa yankinsa ta hanyar yaƙe-yaƙe na cin nasara.

Amma yayin da yake mulkin yankuna masu faɗi, Mai Girma Vladimir ya fahimci cewa yana buƙatar wani ra'ayi mai ƙarfi da kuma na duniya don haɗa kabilu daban-daban. Addinin arna na gargajiya bai isa ba don magance rarrabuwar kawunan kabilu da kuma kafa asalin ƙasa. Saboda haka, Mai Girma Vladimir ya yanke shawara mai muhimmanci na aika jakadu don bincika manyan addinai na duniya. Jakadunsa sun ziyarci Musulunci na Volga Bulgars, Roman Katolika na Jamus, da kuma Yahudanci na Khazars a jere. An yanke hukuncin cewa Musulunci bai dace da salon rayuwar mutanen Rus ba saboda dokar hana giya, kuma Cocin Katolika na Jamus bai burge jakadun ba sosai. Yahudanci na Khazars kuma an ɗauke shi bai dace ba a matsayin ra'ayin haɗin kai na ƙasa saboda makomarsu ta tarwatse. Wannan tsarin bincike ya nuna yadda Mai Girma Vladimir ya yi tunani mai zurfi game da wane addini zai zaɓa don makomar Rus.

Wani muhimmin canji ya faru lokacin da jakadun suka isa Constantinople, babban birnin Daular Byzantine. Sun ba da rahoto cewa sun dimauce da girman babban cocin Hagia Sophia da kuma tsarkakar ibadar Orthodox, har suka ce “ba mu san ko muna sama ko a ƙasa ba.” Wannan rahoto ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen motsa zuciyar Mai Girma Vladimir. Bugu da ƙari, damar samun haɗin gwiwar soja da siyasa ta hanyar auren Anna Porphyrogenita, 'yar uwar Sarkin Byzantine Basil II, ya kasance wani muhimmin abu wajen ƙarfafa shawararsa. A shekara ta 988, Mai Girma Vladimir ya yi baftisma a Chersonesus a yankin Crimea kuma ya zama mabiyin Cocin Orthodox. Juyawarsa ba kawai canjin imani na mutum ba ne, amma wani taron tarihi ne wanda ya canza makomar dukkan Kyiv Rus. Ya koma Kyiv, ya rusa gunkin arna na Perun wanda aka kafa a bakin kogin Dnieper, ya kuma jagoranci mazaunan Kyiv zuwa kogin don yin baftisma na jama'a, yana sanar da farkon sabon zamani. An rusa haikalin arna kuma an gina coci-coci a wurinsu, an kuma gayyaci firistoci don koyar da sabon imani ga mutane.

Juyawar Mai Girma Vladimir da kuma Kiristancin Rus sun yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban wayewar Slavic ta Gabas. Cocin Orthodox ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen samar da al'adu, fasaha, gine-gine, dokoki, da kuma tsarin siyasa na Kyiv Rus. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Rus ta karɓi gadon al'adu da addini na Daular Byzantine, ta kafa nata asalin, kuma wannan ya zama tushen ruhaniya na al'ummar Rasha, Ukraine, da Belarus a yau. Bayan mutuwarsa, Cocin Katolika da Cocin Orthodox na Gabas duk sun mai da shi Saint Vladimir, kuma ana tuna ayyukansa a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu mulki a duniyar Slavic ta Gabas.
