Zaɓin addininsa ya sanya Kyiv Rus cikin wayewar Orthodox ta Gabas, daban da duniyar Katolika ta Yammacin Turai, kuma wannan ya ƙayyade hanyar siyasa da al'adu na yankin tsawon ƙarnuka masu zuwa. Kodayake kakarsa, Babban Gimbiya Olga, ta karɓi Kiristanci a matsayin mutum, Mai Girma Vladimir ya aiwatar da Kiristanci a matakin ƙasa, ya bar gado mara misaltuwa a fannin tasiri.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Vladimir Vernadsky, majagaba na kimiyyar tsarin Duniya, ya tsara ra'ayoyin biosphere da noosphere don bayyana mu'amalar Duniya da rayuwa gabaɗaya.
key_achievements: Tsara da kuma tsara ra'ayin biosphere.
Jagorantar bincike mai haɗaka na ilimin ƙasa, kimiyyar sinadarai, da ilimin halittu.
Haɓaka ra'ayin noosphere, yanki na tunanin ɗan adam.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa harsashin ilimin halittu na zamani da kimiyyar tsarin Duniya, yana gabatar da hangen nesa na Duniya a matsayin tsarin haɗaka.

vladimir-vernadsky.epic:
An haife ni a cikin iyali masu ilimi a Saint Petersburg, inda na yi kuruciyata a cikin yanayi mai cike da al'adun Rasha da Ukraine. Tafiyata ta ilimi ta fara ne a Jami'ar Jihar Saint Petersburg, inda na sami koyarwa daga babban masanin kimiyyar sinadarai Dmitri Mendeleev da fitaccen masanin ilimin ƙasa Vasily Dokuchaev. Musamman, ra'ayin Dokuchaev na gabaɗaya, wanda ya ɗauki ƙasa a matsayin wata halitta mai rikitarwa kuma mai rai, ya yi tasiri sosai a tunanina. Wannan ya sa na bar ilimin ma'adanai mai tsabta, na rungumi wani babban hangen nesa mai haɗaka wanda ke kallon Duniya a matsayin tsarin da ke da alaƙa da juna. Wannan tushe ya zama matattarar bincikena na tsawon rayuwa don fahimtar rikitarwar mu'amala tsakanin halittu masu rai da tsarin ilimin ƙasa na Duniya.

Ayyukana sun kasance suna da alaƙa da bincike mara yankewa na wannan kimiyya mai haɗaka. Na yi tafiye-tafiye masu yawa, na yi nazarin ilimin lu'ulu'u a Munich kuma na yi aiki tare da Pierre da Marie Curie a Paris. A can, na kamu da sha'awar sabon al'amari na radioactivity. Wannan ya kai ga bincikena na farko a fannin ilimin ƙasa na rediyo, amma ainihin sha'awata ta ta'allaka ne a haɗa ilimin ƙasa, kimiyyar sinadarai, da ilimin halittu. Na tsara ra'ayin biosphere ba kawai a matsayin sararin samaniya inda rayuwa ke wanzuwa ba, amma a matsayin wani yanki na duniya wanda rayuwa da kanta ta canza. Na yi iƙirarin cewa jimlar halittu masu rai, waɗanda na kira 'kwayoyin halitta masu rai,' wata ƙarfi ce mai ƙarfi ta ilimin ƙasa wacce ke siffanta fuskar Duniya tsawon miliyoyin shekaru.

Rikicin farkon karni na 20, gami da juyin juya halin Rasha da yakin basasa da ya biyo baya, sun gabatar da manyan ƙalubale. Na yi aiki a matsayin shugaban farko na Kwalejin Kimiyya ta Ukraine a Kyiv, inda dole ne in yi tafiya a cikin yanayi mai haɗari na siyasa don kare binciken kimiyya. Duk da hargitsin, na ci gaba da jajircewa ga bincikena, na gudu zuwa Crimea sannan daga baya na koma Petrograd (tsohon Saint Petersburg). A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali ne na inganta ra'ayoyina, wanda ya kai ga buga babban aikina, 'The Biosphere,' a cikin 1926. Wannan littafi ya kafa harsashin ilimin halittu na zamani da kimiyyar tsarin Duniya, yana gabatar da sabon hangen nesa mai tsattsauran ra'ayi game da duniyarsu.

A cikin shekarun baya na rayuwata, na faɗaɗa ra'ayin biosphere, na haɓaka ra'ayin noosphere, wanda ke nufin 'yanki na tunanin ɗan adam.' Na yi hasashen cewa wayewar ɗan adam da tunanin kimiyya suna zama sabon ƙarfi na ilimin ƙasa wanda zai iya sake fasalin Duniya a ma'auni mai kama da rayuwa da kanta. Wannan ba kawai tunani ne na falsafa ba, amma hasashen kimiyya ne game da juyin halittar Duniya a nan gaba, inda hankalin ɗan adam zai jagoranci ci gaban biosphere. Na rasu a Moscow a 1945, amma na bar gadon da ke ci gaba da zaburar da masana kimiyya su kalli Duniya a matsayin tsarin guda ɗaya inda rayuwa, duwatsu, da tunani ke haɓaka tare.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani majagaba marar suna wanda ya jagoranci shirin sararin samaniya na Tarayyar Soviet, ya jagoranci tauraron ɗan adam na farko da jirgin sama mai ɗauke da mutane na farko, duk da wahalar da ya sha a lokacin tsarkakewa ta Stalin.
key_achievements: Gudunmawa ga haɓaka roka mai amfani da ruwa ta farko a Tarayyar Soviet
Jagorancin haɓaka ICBM R-7 na farko a Tarayyar Soviet
Jagorancin harba Sputnik 1 da Gagarin
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin babban majagaba wanda ya buɗe hanyar binciken sararin samaniya na ɗan adam, duk da cewa ya kasance marar suna.

sergei-korolev.epic:
Tun ina yaro, sararin samaniya ya burge ni. Na tsara kuma na tuka jiragen sama marasa inji (gliders), wanda hakan ya haɓaka sha'awata ga tashi sama, kuma nan da nan ya kai ga babban buri na injiniyan roka. A Moscow, tare da majagaba irin su Friedrich Zander, na kafa 'Ƙungiyar Bincike ta Motsi Mai Amsa' (GIRD), inda na ba da gudummawa wajen haɓakawa da harba roka mai amfani da ruwa ta farko a Tarayyar Soviet. Farkon aikina ya cika da tsantsar binciken kimiyya da kuma sha'awar ci gaban fasaha don ƙasata.

Amma a shekarar 1938, guguwar tsarkakewa ta Stalin ta girgiza rayuwata gaba ɗaya. An kama ni da zargin banza na 'maƙiyin jama'a' kuma an tilasta mini in yi ikirari na ƙarya bayan azabtarwa. Daga ƙarshe, an tura ni Gulag na Kolyma a Siberia, inda na yi aikin tilas a ma'adinan zinariya, ina fuskantar mutuwa a kowane lokaci. A cikin tsananin sanyi, yunwa, da kuma yanke kauna, burina ya zama kamar ya farfashe. Muƙamuƙina da ya karye ya kasance alamar zaluncin wannan lokacin har abada.

A mu'ujiza, saboda shiga tsakani na Andrey Tupolev, mai tsara jirgin sama wanda ya yaba da basirata, an mayar da ni daga Gulag zuwa wani ofishin zane na sansanin da ake kira 'Sharashka'. A can, tare da sauran masana kimiyya da injiniyoyi, na shiga cikin haɓaka jiragen sama don yaƙi, inda na sake samun damar nuna basirata. Bayan ƙarshen Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu, an ba ni aikin nazarin fasahar roka ta V-2 ta Jamus, kuma a kan wannan tushe, na taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka makamin roka mai cin dogon zango (ICBM) na farko na Tarayyar Soviet, R-7 Semyorka.

Daga baya, na zama wani mutum marar suna, 'Babban Mai Zane', wanda ya jagoranci dukkan shirin sararin samaniya na Tarayyar Soviet. An ɓoye sunana da fuskata sosai, amma a ƙarƙashin jagorancina, tauraron ɗan adam na farko na ɗan adam, Sputnik 1, ya tashi zuwa sararin samaniya, kuma ɗan sama jannati na farko, Yuri Gagarin, ya kewaya duniya a cikin Vostok 1. A bayan duk waɗannan lokutan ɗaukaka, akwai matsin lamba da sadaukarwa marasa iyaka. Na buɗe hanyar ɗan adam zuwa sararin samaniya har zuwa ranar mutuwata, kuma sai bayan mutuwata ne duniya ta gane ainihin wanene ni.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Semyon Dezhnev ya kasance mai bincike na Rasha a karni na 17, wanda shi ne na farko da ya ratsa mashigar ruwa tsakanin Asiya da Amurka.
key_achievements: Ratsa mashigar ruwa tsakanin Asiya da Amurka a karon farko
Gano da kuma sanya suna ga Cape Dezhnev
Binciken yankin Kogin Anadyr da gina sansani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya cike wani muhimmin gibi a taswirar duniya kuma ya faɗaɗa hangen nesa na ɗan adam.

semyon-dezhnev.epic:
Semyon Dezhnev (kimanin 1605-1673) ya kasance mai bincike na Rasha kuma shugaban Cossack a karni na 17, mutum na farko a tarihin ɗan adam da ya ratsa mashigar ruwa tsakanin nahiyoyin Asiya da Amurka, ta haka ya bayyana wani yanki da ba a bincika ba a taswirar duniya. An haife shi a Veliky Ustyug a arewacin Rasha, amma makomarsa tana cikin faɗaɗɗen ƙasashe marasa galihu na Siberia a gabas. A wancan lokacin, Daular Rasha tana mai da hankali kan faɗaɗa yankinta zuwa gabas don samun albarkatun gashin dabbobi masu daraja, kuma an shigar da Dezhnev a matsayin Cossack a kusan 1630 don biyan wannan buƙata ta tarihi. Babban aikinsa shi ne tattara harajin gashin dabbobi da ake kira 'yasak' daga kabilun asali da kuma faɗaɗa mulkin Tsar zuwa iyakar gabas ta Siberia. Ya yi tafiya daga Yeniseysk zuwa Yakutsk, yana binciken koguna masu daskarewa tsawon shekaru da yawa, yana jurewa lokacin sanyi mai tsanani, kuma yana hulɗa, wani lokacin ma yana faɗa, da kabilun asali daban-daban. Wannan ya wuce hidima kawai; tsari ne na koyon yadda za a rayu da kuma jurewa a gaban duniyar da ba a sani ba, kuma ƙwarewarsa ta kewayawa da haƙurinsa sun bunƙasa a wannan lokacin. Ko da a cikin mawuyacin yanayi, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a faɗaɗa Rasha zuwa gabas, yana ƙarfafa matsayinsa a hankali.

A shekara ta 1648, tafiya mafi muhimmanci a rayuwar Semyon Dezhnev ta fara. Tare da ɗan kasuwa Fedot Popov, ya jagoranci jiragen ruwa na Cossacks da 'yan kasuwa, suka tashi daga Kogin Kolyma. Babban burinsu shi ne neman haƙoran walrus masu daraja da gashin sable baƙi, waɗanda ke da daraja sosai a Turai a wancan lokacin, amma a cikin zuciyar Dezhnev akwai wata tambaya ta asali game da yanayin ƙasa: menene ke gabas, kuma shin nahiyar Asiya tana haɗe da Amurka? Wannan balaguron ya shiga cikin ruwan kankara na Tekun Arctic a cikin ƙananan jiragen ruwa guda bakwai masu ƙarfi da ake kira 'kochs'. Kochs jiragen ruwa ne na gargajiya na Rasha waɗanda aka tsara musamman don jurewa kankara da raƙuman ruwa na Tekun Arctic, wata hanya ce mai mahimmanci ga tafiyarsu mai wahala. Tafiyar ta kasance mai haɗari tun daga farko. Yanayin da ba a iya faɗi ba da raƙuman ruwa masu ƙarfi na Tekun Arctic sun ci gaba da yi musu barazana, kuma binciken ruwan da ba a sani ba ya buƙaci ƙarfin hali da shiri fiye da yadda ake zato. Duk da waɗannan matsalolin, Dezhnev ya jagoranci jiragen ruwa, yana fuskantar ƙalubale da ba a taɓa gani ba a tarihin ɗan adam.

Kamar yadda aka zata, tafiyar ta kasance jerin gwaje-gwaje masu ban tsoro. Manyan guguwa sun mamaye jiragen ruwa, suka tarwatsa su, kuma abokan aiki da yawa sun nutse a cikin ruwan sanyi na Tekun Arctic. Dezhnev da sauran waɗanda suka tsira sun ci gaba da tafiya zuwa gabas, daga ƙarshe suka zagaya wani babban yankin ƙasa da aka sani da 'Babban Hancin Dutse'. A nan ne, a wurin da yanzu ake kira 'Cape Dezhnev' bayan shi, ya tabbatar da idanunsa cewa akwai teku tsakanin Asiya da Amurka. Wannan wani lokaci ne na tarihi da ya tabbatar da rabuwar nahiyoyin biyu, kuma ya zama Turawa na farko da ya ratsa Mashigar Bering. Amma farin cikinsu bai daɗe ba; jiragensu sun lalace, kuma dole ne su sauka a bakin tekun kudu, suna jin yunwa da gajiya. A cikin matsanancin yanayi, Dezhnev da sauran ma'aikatan sun yi tafiya ta cikin mawuyacin yanayi na tsawon makonni 10, daga ƙarshe suka isa Kogin Anadyr. A can, sun gina sabon sansani kuma suka yi hunturu, suna ci gaba da gwagwarmayar rayuwa. A cikin wannan tsari, ya nuna jagoranci mai ban mamaki da kuma jajircewa, yana jagorantar abokan aikinsa.

Babban binciken Semyon Dezhnev na yanayin ƙasa bai kawo masa ɗaukaka nan da nan ba. Rahotanninsa sun binne a cikin taskar Yakutsk kuma an manta da su kusan tsawon ƙarni. Ya yi hidima a yankin Anadyr fiye da shekaru 10, yana tattara haraji da ci gaba da bincike, yana tattara bayanai masu daraja game da yanayin ƙasa da al'adun asali na yankin. A cikin shekarunsa na baya, har ma ya yi tafiya mai wahala ta ƙasa zuwa Moscow tare da dimbin harajin da ya tattara. Ya mutu a Moscow a 1673 yayin da yake bakin aiki. Sunansa ya kasance a ƙarƙashin inuwar Vitus Bering na ɗan lokaci, amma gaskiya ta bayyana a tsakiyar karni na 18 lokacin da masanin tarihi Gerhard Friedrich Müller ya gano rahotanninsa. Tafiyar Dezhnev ita ce ta farko da ta tabbatar da cewa nahiyoyin Asiya da Amurka sun rabu, ta cike wani muhimmin gibi a taswirar duniya. A yau, Cape Dezhnev ya kasance wuri mai alama da ke tunawa da nasarorinsa, kuma ana ɗaukar ƙarfin hali da ruhin bincikensa a matsayin babban gado da ya faɗaɗa hangen nesa na ɗan adam. Nasarorinsa, tare da ƙoƙarin sauran masu bincike waɗanda suka buɗe hanyar Arctic, suna haskawa har abada a tarihin binciken ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shota Rustaveli (kimanin 1172-1216) mawaƙi ne kuma ma'ajin masarautar Georgia ta ƙarni na 12, wanda ya rubuta babban littafin almara na Georgia, 『The Knight in the Panther's Skin』.
key_achievements: Rubuta babban littafin almara na Georgia, 『The Knight in the Panther's Skin』
Mawaƙi mai wakiltar Zaman Zinariya na adabin Georgia
Ya yi aiki a matsayin ma'ajin kotu a zamanin Sarauniya Tamar
fact_box.legacy_statement: Babban littafinsa na almara ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa asalin al'ummar Georgia, harshe, da al'adun adabi, kuma har yau yana ci gaba da zama muhimmin gado na al'adun Georgia.

shota-rustaveli.epic:
Shota Rustaveli (kimanin 1172-kimanin 1216) mawaƙi ne kuma marubuci kuma ma'ajin masarautar Georgia ta ƙarni na 12, ana ɗaukarsa ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu ba da gudummawa ga adabin duniya na Georgia. Rayuwarsa ta yi daidai da 'Zaman Zinariya' na Sarauniya Tamar, lokacin da masarautar Georgia ke kan kololuwar siyasa, tattalin arziki, da al'adu. Wannan lokaci ne da Georgia ta kafa nata asalin al'adu na musamman kuma ta bunƙasa a mahadar wayewar Gabas da Yamma, duk da tasirin Yaƙin Salibiyya. Rustaveli ba kawai mawaƙin kotu ba ne; ya kuma riƙe muƙamin 'Mechurchletukhutsesi' (ma'aji), yana taka muhimmiyar rawa a harkokin kuɗin masarautar. Wannan yana nuna cewa ya kasance babban jigo a cikin al'ummar Georgia fiye da marubuci kawai, yana da matsayi na musamman don fuskantar da fahimtar wadata da kuzarin al'adu na masarautar kai tsaye. Wannan yanayin tarihi da rawar da ya taka a cikin al'umma sun zama muhimmin tushe wanda ya ƙara zurfi da fahimta ga ayyukansa na gaba.

Babban juyin juya halin rayuwarsa kuma nasarar da ta dore a tarihin adabin Georgia ita ce rubuta babban littafin almara na Georgia, 『The Knight in the Panther's Skin (ვეფხისტყაოსანი, Vepkhistkaosani)』. Wannan aiki ba kawai waƙa ba ne; babban littafin almara ne wanda ya tattara ruhu da ƙimar al'ummar Georgia. Yana ba da labarin abota, soyayya, da kasada don adalci na Yarima Avtandil na Larabawa da Yarima Tariel na Indiya. Shota Rustaveli ya nuna da fasaha ƙimar jaruntaka, wato, ƙarfin hali, aminci, karimci, da kuma soyayya mai girma don taimakon marasa ƙarfi. Musamman, ya jaddada soyayya daidai tsakanin maza da mata da kuma muhimmancin abota mai zurfi, yana ɗauke da ra'ayoyi masu ci gaba waɗanda ba kasafai ake samun su a cikin adabin Turai na wancan lokacin ba. Wannan aiki ya haɓaka kyawun harshen Georgia zuwa matsayi mafi girma kuma ya ɗaga matakin adabi, kuma ya zama littafin gargajiya marar mutuwa wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga duk abubuwan da suka biyo baya a cikin adabin Georgia.

Abin mamaki, an san kaɗan game da rayuwar Shota Rustaveli, wanda ya bar irin wannan babban aiki. Rayuwarsa tana cikin inuwar babban aikin 『The Knight in the Panther's Skin』, wanda a zahiri ya fi nuna ƙimar duniya ta aikinsa. Babu takamaiman bayanai game da inda aka haife shi ko inda ya mutu; ana tsammanin an haife shi ne a kusan 1172 kuma ya mutu a kusan 1216. Wasu tatsuniyoyi sun ce ya yi soyayya da Sarauniya Tamar a ɓoye kuma ya sadaukar da wannan littafin almara gare ta, kuma a cikin shekarunsa na baya, ya yi ritaya zuwa Gidan Sufi na Cross a Urushalima, inda ya mutu. Lallai, an gano wani zane-zane na bango wanda ake tsammanin nasa ne a Gidan Sufi na Cross a Urushalima. Duk da cewa rayuwarsa ta kasance asiri, aikinsa yana rayuwa a cikin zukatan mutanen Georgia a tsawon lokaci, yana sa kasancewarsa ta zama mai ban mamaki da dawwama.

『The Knight in the Panther's Skin』 na Shota Rustaveli wani gado ne na adabi wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tsara asalin al'ummar Georgia. Wannan littafin almara ya yi tasiri sosai ga harshe, tunani, da fasahar mutanen Georgia tsawon ƙarnuka, kuma har yau yana da muhimmin sashi a cikin ilimin makarantun Georgia. Aikinsa ya ba da gudummawa wajen kafa daidaitaccen harshen Georgia da al'adun adabi, kuma ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin alama mai wakiltar burin Georgia na samun 'yancin kai da 'yanci. An rubuta sunan Rustaveli a wurare marasa adadi, ciki har da gidan wasan kwaikwayo na ƙasar Georgia, tituna, da cibiyoyin ilimi, kuma ruhunsa yana rayuwa a cikin al'adun Georgia gaba ɗaya. Waƙarsa ba kawai aikin adabi ba ce; ana ɗaukarta a matsayin madubi mai nuna ruhin al'ummar Georgia, babban aikin fasaha wanda ke isar da ƙimar ɗan adam ta duniya a tsawon lokaci. Wannan nasara tana daidai da na mutane irin su Dante Alighieri ko Geoffrey Chaucer, waɗanda suka kafa harsashin adabin yare a Yamma a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Leo the Mathematician masanin falsafa ne kuma masanin dabaru na Daular Byzantine a karni na 9, wanda ya kafa Makarantar Magnaura kuma ya shimfida tushen Renaissance na Macedonia.
key_achievements: Ya rike mukamin Babban Bishop na Thessaloniki
Kafa Makarantar Magnaura da koyar da ilimin gargajiya
Shimfida tushen Renaissance na Macedonia na Byzantine
fact_box.legacy_statement: Koyarwarsa da ayyukansa na ilimi sun jagoranci farfadowar ilimi a Daular Byzantine, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai wajen kiyayewa da yada ilimin dā.

leo-the-mathematician.epic:
Leo the Mathematician (wanda ya yi aiki a karni na 9) wani fitaccen masanin falsafa kuma masanin dabaru a Daular Byzantine, ya rayu a lokacin da aka kawo karshen Iconoclasm na Biyu kuma aka fara Renaissance na Macedonia. A farkon karni na 9, Daular Byzantine ta shiga cikin rudani mai zurfi saboda Iconoclasm na Biyu, wani rikici mai tsanani na addini da siyasa game da bautar gumaka. Duk da wannan lokaci na tashin hankali, kishin hikimar Girka ta dā bai taɓa gushewa ba, kuma Leo ya kasance alama ce ta wannan sha'awar ilimi. An haife shi a Thessaly, kuma tun yana yaro ya nuna basirar ilimi ta musamman, yana mai sha'awar lissafi da falsafa musamman. A lokacin, nazarin ilimin gargajiya ya ragu a cikin daular, amma Leo bai karaya ba, ya koyi rubuce-rubucen manyan masana na dā kamar Euclid da Archimedes da kansa, yana binciken ilimi mai zurfi. Binciken iliminsa bai takaita ga tara ilimi kawai ba, amma ya kasance wani yunkuri na sake shigar da tunanin hankali na Girka ta dā cikin al'ummar Byzantine. Ya himmatu wajen neman tsoffin rubuce-rubuce da tattara guntun ilimin da aka manta, wanda ya zama muhimmin ginshiki ga farfadowar ilimin Byzantine a nan gaba.

Babban ilimin Leo ba da daɗewa ba ya fara yaduwa har zuwa Constantinople, babban birnin daular, kuma Sarkin sarakuna Theophilos ya lura da shi. Sha'awar sarkin sarakuna ga ilimi ta ba Leo sabuwar dama, amma a lokaci guda ta ja shi zuwa tsakiyar rikice-rikicen siyasa da addini. Sarkin sarakuna Theophilos ya yaba da basirar ilimi ta Leo sosai, kuma ya nada shi Babban Bishop na Thessaloniki. Wannan matsayi ne mai ban mamaki ga Leo a matsayinsa na masanin ilimi, amma a lokaci guda kuma ya zama farkon sabbin gwaje-gwaje a gare shi. A matsayinsa na Babban Bishop, ya yi ƙoƙarin jagorantar coci da kuma inganta ilimi, amma hanyarsa ta hankali da tunani ta haifar da rikice-rikice akai-akai da waɗanda ke goyon bayan bautar gumaka sosai. Musamman ma, bayan an kawo karshen Iconoclasm kuma aka sake ba da izinin bautar gumaka a shekara ta 843, ya rasa matsayinsa a cikin wannan canjin addini. A karshe, dole ne ya sauka daga mukamin Babban Bishop, kuma wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwarsa. Ko da yake sauka daga mukaman siyasa da addini na iya zama abin takaici a gare shi, hakan ya ba shi damar sadaukar da kansa ga binciken ilimi mai tsabta da koyarwa.

Bayan ya sauka daga mukamin Babban Bishop, Leo ya koma Constantinople kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga ilimi, yana koyar da dalibai a hankali. Shahararsa ta kai ga wani abin mamaki inda aka san shi har zuwa wajen Daular Byzantine. Lokacin da daya daga cikin dalibansa ya fada hannun Khalifan Abbasid, Al-Ma'mun, dalibin ya yi alfahari da kwarewar malaminsa Leo a fannin lissafi. Khalifa Al-Ma'mun ya burge shi sosai da basirar Leo, kuma ya gayyace shi zuwa Baghdad, yana masa alkawarin dukiya mai yawa da daraja. Da jin wannan labari, Sarkin sarakuna Theophilos ya yanke shawarar cewa ba za a iya barin wani ya kwace wani muhimmin dukiyar ilimi na daular ba, don haka ya shawo kan Leo ya zauna a daular, yana masa alkawarin daraja da goyon baya fiye da na Khalifan. Leo ya karbi tayin sarkin sarakuna saboda biyayyarsa ga daular, kuma wannan ya bude sabon babi a ayyukansa na ilimi. Wannan lamari ya zama wata dama ga daular ta amince da darajar ilimi ta Leo a hukumance, kuma ya zama tushen fitowar Bardas, ɗan'uwan sarkin sarakuna kuma mai mulki, a matsayin mai goyon bayansa.

A karkashin cikakken goyon bayan Bardas, Leo ya kafa sabuwar cibiyar ilimi, Makarantar Magnaura, a Fadar Magnaura a Constantinople, kuma ya zama shugabanta. Makarantar Magnaura ta zama cibiyar ilimi mafi girma a Daular Byzantine cikin sauri, kuma a nan Leo ya koyar da ilimin gargajiya daban-daban, ciki har da dabaru na Aristotle, kuma ya horar da dalibai da yawa. A karkashin jagorancinsa, falsafar Girka ta dā da kimiyya sun sake fitowa fili, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin karfi ga farfadowar ilimin Byzantine, wato Renaissance na Macedonia. An kira shi 'mutumin Renaissance na gaskiya' kuma 'mafi hazaka a Byzantine na karni na 9', kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai yawa ga kiyayewa da yada ilimin dā. Rubuce-rubucensa guda ɗaya da suka rage sune wasu sharhi da aka haɗa a cikin rubutun Plato's Dialogues, amma ayyukansa na koyarwa da tasirinsa na ilimi sun karfafa tushen ilimi na Daular Byzantine kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana na gaba. Rayuwar Leo the Mathematician ta fi muhimmanci idan aka kwatanta da sauran masana Byzantine na zamaninsa, kamar Babban Bishop Photius, da yadda suka yi ƙoƙari don farfado da ilimin gargajiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Abai Qunanbaiuly, ginshiƙin ruhaniya na al'ummar Kazakh, ya kasance mai tunani mai wayewa wanda ya jagoranci gyaran zamantakewa ta hanyar waƙa da falsafa.
key_achievements: Ya gyara tsarin waƙoƙin gargajiya na Kazakh kuma ya gabatar da sabbin jigogi.
Ya gabatar da hanyar gaba ga al'umma ta hanyar 'Littafin Kalmomi'.
Ya ƙirƙiri waƙoƙin da mutane ke so ta hanyar sa waƙoƙi zuwa kiɗa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa, a matsayin ginshiƙin ruhaniya na Kazakhstan, suna ci gaba da zaburar da al'umma sosai har zuwa yau.

abai-qunanbaiuly.epic:
An haife shi a shekara ta 1845 a tsaunukan Chingiz na yankin Kazakh Steppe, da sunan Ibrahim Qunanbaiuly. Ko da yake ya fito daga dangi mai arziki da tasiri, zuciyarsa cike take da ƙishirwar ilimi. Ya yi karatun ilimin addinin Musulunci a makarantar madrasa ta Semipalatinsk, kuma a lokaci guda ya halarci makarantar Rasha, inda ya fuskanci ayyukan manyan masu tunani irin su Pushkin da Lermontov. Haɗuwar waɗannan duniyoyi biyu ta kunna sabuwar wuta a cikin zuciyarsa, ta zama fitila mai haskaka hanyar makomar al'ummarsa.

Lokacin da ya koma yankin Steppe, ya ji takaici sosai game da rikice-rikicen kabilanci da cin hanci da rashawa na gwamnatin mulkin mallaka ta Rasha. Ya ga tsoffin al'adu da jahilci suna riƙe al'ummarsa. Ya bar hanyar zama mai gudanarwa kuma ya yanke shawarar ɗaukar alƙalami a maimakon haka. Wannan saboda ya yi imani cewa waƙa da falsafa su ne mafi ƙarfin makamai don farkar da rayuka masu barci, canza zukatan mutane, da kuma gyara al'umma. A ƙarƙashin sunan rubutu 'Abai', ya yi alƙawarin zama muryar al'ummarsa.

Rayuwarsa ta kasance ci gaba da ƙirƙira. Ya gyara tsarin waƙoƙin gargajiya na Kazakh kuma ya gabatar da sabbin jigogi na soyayya, yanayi, da adalci na zamantakewa. Ya kuma sa waƙoƙinsa zuwa kiɗa, yana ƙirƙirar waƙoƙin da har yau mutanen Kazakh ke so. Babban aikinsa na rayuwa shine 'Littafin Kalmomi (Kara Sozder)'. Ta hanyar waɗannan tunani 45, ya jaddada mahimmancin ilimi, ɗabi'a, da doka, yana neman nuna wa al'ummarsa hanyar gaba.

Hanyarsa ba ta taɓa zama mai sauƙi ba. Sha'awarsa ta gyara sau da yawa ta fuskanci turjiya daga masu riƙe da madafun iko, kuma mutuwar 'ya'yansa ƙaunatattunsa, Abdirakhman da Magauiya, a jere ta kawo masa baƙin ciki mai zurfi. Amma bai taɓa rasa bege ba. Wannan saboda ya yi imani cewa ayyukansa za su zaburar da tsararraki masu zuwa don gina al'umma mai adalci da wayewa. Ana kiransa ginshiƙin ruhaniya na Kazakhstan a yau babban girmamawa ne a gare shi, kuma hujja ce cewa kalmominsa har yanzu suna raye a cikin zukatan mutane.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Firist wanda ya yi shahada saboda adawa da gyaran Cocin Orthodox na Rasha a karni na 17, alama ce ta motsin Tsoffin Masu Imani kuma majagaba na adabin jama'a.
key_achievements: Adawa da gyaran coci na Nikon, kare Tsoffin Masu Imani.
Rubuta tarihin rayuwa na farko a Rasha, 'Rayuwar Firist Avvakum'.
Kare imani a cikin tsanantawa mai tsanani da shahada.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana girmama shi a matsayin alama ta Babban Rabewar Cocin Orthodox na Rasha kuma uban adabin jama'a, yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga miliyoyin Tsoffin Masu Imani har zuwa yau.

avvakum.epic:
A karni na 17, Rasha ta kasance cikin wani babban guguwar sauyi. Kasar ta fito ne daga inuwar mulkin Mongol kuma tana fadada, yayin da Cocin Orthodox ya kasance ginshikin ruhaniya ga mutane tsawon daruruwan shekaru. Amma a cikin wannan coci, wani layin kuskure tsakanin al'ada da gyara yana budewa a hankali. A tsakiyar wannan zamani mai cike da tashin hankali, a shekara ta 1620, an haifi Avvakum Petrov a Grigorovo, wani karamin kauye kusa da Nizhny Novgorod. Mahaifinsa firist ne matalauci, kuma tun yana yaro ya girma yana shakar iskar imani kawai. Duniya da aka gina da tsantseni, addu'a, da littattafan liturgy na Tsohon Cocin Slavonic masu kauri ita ce dukkan sararin samaniyar Avvakum. Avvakum, wanda ya zama firist yana da shekaru ashirin, ba firist ne kawai ba. Ya tsawata wa mutanen cocinsa saboda lalacewar ɗabi'a, ya yi adawa da cin hanci da rashawa na masu iko ba tare da tsoro ba, kuma ya kunna wutar imani a cikin zukatan mutane da wa'azinsa masu zafi. Ko da an kore shi sau biyu saboda tashin hankalin jama'a, bai yi kasa a gwiwa ba, kuma ko da ya sami ɗan suna a Moscow, zuciyarsa ta kasance a kan wutar imani ta gaskiya.

Komai ya canza a shekara ta 1652, lokacin da Nikon mai buri ya hau kujerar Patriarch na Moscow. Nikon ya fitar da takobin gyara, yana mai cewa zai daidaita bambance-bambancen al'adu tsakanin Cocin Orthodox na Girka da Cocin Orthodox na Rasha a lokacin. Matakan da suka hada da canza adadin yatsun da ake amfani da su wajen yin alamar giciye daga biyu zuwa uku, gyara rubutun sunan Yesu, da sake tsara dukkan tsarin ibada sun zubo kamar ruwan ambaliya. Ga Avvakum, wannan ba kawai daidaita al'ada ba ne. Wannan aiki ne na bidi'a wanda ke lalata tsarin imani da mutanen Rasha suka kare da rayukansu tsawon daruruwan shekaru, wato imani da kansa. Tare da Tsar Alexei I yana goyon bayan Nikon, ikon jihar ya goyi bayan gyaran, kuma dukkan daular ta kasance karkashin umarnin bin sabbin al'adu. Amma Avvakum bai taɓa durƙusa ba. Bai rage muryarsa ba a gaban Tsar ko a gaban Patriarch. Ya bayyana gaskiyar tsohon imani a fili, ya la'anci gyaran Nikon a matsayin ridda, kuma ya tsaya tsayin daka a matsayin mai kare Tsoffin Masu Imani. Avvakum ya riga ya san cewa wannan zaɓi zai zama iri wanda zai jawo dukkan wahalhalu na gaba.

Farashin adawar da Avvakum ya zaɓa ya wuce tunani. Tsanantawar da ta fara da ɗaurin kurkuku a shekara ta 1653 ta ci gaba har tsawon shekaru 30. An kore shi tare da iyalinsa zuwa daji mai tsanani na Siberia, inda dole ne su yi yaƙi da yunwa a cikin sanyi mai tsanani na digiri da yawa a ƙasa da sifili. Ya ga 'ya'yansa suna mutuwa saboda yunwa, kuma matarsa, Anastasia, ta kasance a gefensa duk da wahalar da ba za a iya jurewa ba. An sake shi daga gudun hijira sannan aka sake kama shi akai-akai, kuma a ƙarshe an ɗaure shi a cikin kurkukun rami na laka a Pustozersk, kusa da Arctic Circle. Amma ko da jikinsa yana ɗaure, ruhunsa bai ɗaure ba. A cikin duhu mai zurfi, ya ɗauki alkalami ya rubuta tarihin rayuwarsa na farko a tarihin Rasha, 'Rayuwar Firist Avvakum'. Wannan littafi, wanda aka rubuta a cikin harshen Rasha na mutane masu rai maimakon Cocin Slavonic, ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin babban aiki na adabin Rasha na karni na 17. Avvakum, wanda ya shafe shekaru 15 na ƙarshe a cikin wannan kurkukun rami, an ƙone shi da rai a ranar 14 ga Afrilu, 1682, saboda laifin cin zarafin Tsar. A lokacin da wutar ta cinye jikinsa, Avvakum ya ɗaga alamar giciye da yatsunsa biyu zuwa sama. Wannan ba mutuwa ba ce, sai dai sanarwa ce – cewa imani ya fi wuta ƙarfi.

Mutuwar Avvakum ba ƙarshe ba ce, sai dai farko ce. Cocin Orthodox na Rasha ya rabu har abada gida biyu tare da ƙonewarsa. Cocin hukuma da ya karɓi gyaran Nikon, da 'Raskolniki', wato Tsoffin Masu Imani masu rarrabuwa waɗanda suka bi Avvakum, sun fuskanci juna a kan wani kogi da ba za a iya komawa baya ba. Wannan shine abin da ake kira 'Raskol' (Babban Rabewa) a tarihin Rasha. Tsawon daruruwan shekaru bayan haka, Tsoffin Masu Imani ba su taɓa barin imaninsu ba duk da tsanantawar gwamnatin Tsar. Abin mamaki, wannan rarrabuwar har yanzu tana da miliyoyin mabiya a Rasha da kuma duniya baki ɗaya a yau. Avvakum ana girmama shi ba kawai a matsayin mutum mai addini ba, har ma a matsayin uban adabin jama'ar Rasha. Firist wanda bai taɓa durƙusa ga iko ba, kuma ya yi yaƙi da zamaninsa da alkalami ɗaya ko da ba shi da komai. Kalmomin da Avvakum ya rubuta a cikin ramin ƙasa har yanzu suna nan a matsayin wuta mara mutuwa shekaru 350 bayan haka.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Attila the Hun ya kasance shugaban Huns a lokacin ƙaura mai girma na al'ummar Jamus a ƙarni na 5, wanda ya gina babbar daula da ta jefa Gabas da Yammacin Turai cikin tsoro.
key_achievements: Haɗa kabilun Huns don gina babbar daular soja
Matsa lamba ga Daular Roma ta Gabas don karɓar haraji mai yawa
Yin yaƙe-yaƙe masu tsanani da Daular Roma ta Yamma a Gaul da Italiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Sunansa ya kasance alamar cin nasara mai ƙarfi da halaka, kuma ya yi tasiri mai zurfi a tarihin Turai.

attila-the-hun.epic:
Attila the Hun, an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 406, ya kasance sarki mafi ƙarfi kuma shugaban Huns wanda ya yi tasiri a tsakiyar ƙarni na 5. A ƙarni na 5, Turai tana fuskantar lokacin hargitsi da canji mai tsanani, tare da ƙaura mai girma na al'ummar Jamus da kuma faɗuwar Daular Roma ta Yamma. A cikin wannan zamani mai cike da rudani, Huns sun fito a matsayin babbar ƙarfi daga yankin steppe na Gabashin Turai, suna jefa tsoro a ko'ina cikin Turai. Attila ya girma ya zama mai mulkin Huns, kuma sunansa ya zama alamar halaka da cin nasara. Da farko, ya yi mulkin Huns tare da ɗan'uwansa Bleda, yana mai da hankali kan haɗa kabilun da suka warwatse zuwa cikin runduna mai ƙarfi guda ɗaya. A wannan lokacin, Huns sun riga sun nuna ikonsu ta hanyar matsa lamba ga Daular Roma ta Gabas da karɓar haraji. Attila, a matsayin jarumi na halitta kuma mai dabarun yaƙi, ya haɓaka ƙarfin sojojin Huns zuwa matsayi mafi girma, wanda ya zama barazana da ba a taɓa gani ba ga wayewar Turai. Saboda ayyukansa na cin nasara marasa tausayi da zalunci, an ba shi laƙabin 'Flagellum Dei' (Bulalar Allah), ma'ana bala'i da Allah ya aiko don hukunta zunubai, wanda ke nuna tsoron da Turawa suka ji a lokacin.

A shekara ta 445, Attila ya kawar da ɗan'uwansa Bleda kuma ya zama shugaban Huns guda ɗaya, inda ikonsa ya kai kololuwa. Ta haka, ya sami damar haɗa dukkan ƙarfin soja da siyasa na Huns a ƙarƙashin nufinsa. Idanunsa yanzu sun karkata zuwa ga yankunan Daular Roma masu arziki. Da farko, ya yi niyya ga Daular Roma ta Gabas, yana share yankin Balkan, yana kwashewa da lalata birane da yawa. Sojojinsa sun ci gaba har zuwa ganuwar Constantinople, suna barazana ga zuciyar daular. Sarkin sarakuna Theodosius II ya tilasta masa ya miƙa wuya ga ƙarfin halaka na Huns, yana roƙon zaman lafiya mai wulakanci ta hanyar biyan haraji mai yawa na zinariya. Wannan haraji ya zama tushen albarkatun da ake buƙata don kula da sojojin Huns, amma bai isa ya gamsar da sha'awar Attila na cin nasara ba. Ya raina Romawa a matsayin masu rauni da rarrabuwa, kuma ya ji daɗin kwace musu dukiya da murkushe girman kansu. Wannan rikici da Daular Roma ta Gabas ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya tabbatar wa Turai cewa Attila ba kawai mai fashi ba ne, amma mai mulki mai ƙarfi wanda zai iya girgiza dukkan daular.

Burin Attila, bayan ya durƙusa Daular Roma ta Gabas, ya faɗaɗa zuwa yamma, kuma a shekara ta 451, ya mamaye Gaul (yankin Faransa na yau). A nan, ya fuskanci abokan gaba masu ƙarfi a cikin haɗin gwiwar sojoji da Janar Aetius mai basira na Daular Roma ta Yamma da Sarki Theodoric I na Visigoths suka jagoranta. Sun kafa haɗin gwiwa don dakatar da ci gaban Huns marasa tausayi. Yaƙin da aka yi a Filin Catalaunian an rubuta shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin yaƙe-yaƙe mafi girma da zubar da jini a tsohuwar duniya, yana da tsanani har koguna suka yi ja da jini. A cikin wannan yaƙi, haɗin gwiwar sojoji sun sha wahala mai yawa, ciki har da mutuwar Theodoric I, amma sun yi nasarar dakatar da ci gaban Huns. Attila ya ja da baya daga wannan yaƙi ba tare da samun nasara mai mahimmanci ba, amma wannan ya fi kama da sake tsara dabarun kai hari na gaba fiye da shan kashi. A shekara mai zuwa, 452, Attila ya juya zuwa yankin Italiya, ya haye Alps, kuma ya kwashe manyan biranen Arewacin Italiya kamar Aquileia, Padua, da Milan ba tare da tausayi ba. Dukkan Roma ta girgiza da tsoro, amma a wajen birnin Roma, ya sadu da Paparoma Leo I. Saboda haɗin gwiwar abubuwa kamar roƙon Paparoma, annobar da ta bazu a cikin sojojin Huns, da kuma barazanar daga Daular Roma ta Gabas, Attila ya yanke shawarar da ba a saba gani ba na janyewa ba tare da kwashe Roma ba.

Ba da daɗewa ba bayan dawowarsa daga yakin Italiya, Attila ya mutu ba zato ba tsammani a daren aurensa a shekara ta 453. Mutuwarsa ta yi mummunar tasiri ga babbar Daular Hun da ya gina da jini da wuta. Da zarar karfinsa da jagorancinsa suka ɓace, Huns sun rarrabu tsakanin 'ya'yansa, kuma daular ta rushe nan da nan saboda tawayen al'ummomin da aka ci nasara. Ko da yake mulkin Attila ya yi gajere, sunansa ya bar alama mai dorewa a wayewar Yammacin Turai. Ana tuna shi a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin masu cin nasara mafi tsoro a tarihin Turai, kuma mamayewarsa ya hanzarta faɗuwar Daular Roma ta Yamma kuma ya yi tasiri kai tsaye ga samuwar sabon tsari a Turai ta Tsakiya. Har yau, Attila ya kasance alamar jagoranci mai ƙarfi da cin nasara marar tausayi, kuma labarinsa ana ci gaba da ambatonsa, ana kwatanta shi da labaran sauran masu gina dauloli makiyaya kamar Genghis Khan.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban malamin ruhaniya na Asiya ta Tsakiya wanda ya yaɗa Sufanci ga mutanen Turkawa kuma wanda ya kafa darikar Yasawi.
key_achievements: Ya zurfafa cikin Sufanci da tauhidi a Bukhara
Ya yaɗa Sufanci ga mutanen Turkawa ta hanyar waƙoƙin 'Hikmet'
Ya kafa darikar Yasawi kuma ya yi tasiri a Asiya ta Tsakiya
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Hikmet' ɗinsa ya isar da soyayyar Allah ga mutanen Turkawa, kuma ya kasance gado na ruhaniya na har abada.

ahmad-yasawi.epic:
An haife shi a Sayram, wanda ke Kazakhstan a yau, amma gidan ruhinsa shine duk inda akwai sha'awar Allah. Ya rasa mahaifinsa tun yana yaro, kuma ya girma a karkashin kulawar malamin ruhaniya, Arslan Baba. Arslan Baba ya ba shi tsaba dabino, alamar amana mai tsarki da gado daga Annabi Muhammad, wanda ya buɗe masa hanyar makomarsa. Tun yana ƙarami, ya tafi Bukhara, cibiyar ilimi a lokacin, don kashe ƙishirwar iliminsa.

A Bukhara, ya zama almajirin babban malamin Sufanci, Yusuf Hamadani. A karkashin jagorancinsa, ya zurfafa cikin shari'a, tauhidi, kuma mafi mahimmanci, Sufanci, wanda shine ilimin zuciya. Ya yi ƙoƙari ya daidaita tsakanin ilimin littattafai da gogewar ruhaniya, kuma ya gane cewa ilimi yana zama hikima ta gaskiya ne kawai ta hanyar soyayyar Allah. Bayan rasuwar malaminsa, ya gaji matsayinsa na ɗan lokaci, amma zuciyarsa tana kan garinsu na Yasi. Domin ya ji cewa aikinsa ne ya isar da saƙon Allah ga mutanen Turkawa na wurin.

Bayan ya koma Yasi, ya fara magana da harshen mutanensa, waɗanda ba su saba da Larabci da Farisanci ba. Ta hanyar waƙoƙi masu sauƙi da daɗi da ake kira 'Hikmet', ya koyar da hanyar Sufanci game da soyayya, tawali'u, barin kai, da haɗuwa da Allah. An tattara waɗannan waƙoƙin a cikin 'Diwan-i Hikmet' (Littafin Hikima) kuma sun yaɗu sosai ta hanyar baka tsakanin makiyaya da mazauna a duk faɗin Asiya ta Tsakiya. Koyarwarsa ta zama tushen darikar Yasawi, kuma almajirai da yawa sun bi tafarkinsa.

Lokacin da ya kai shekaru sittin da uku, ya ɗauka cewa bai dace ba ya wuce shekarun da Annabi Muhammad ya rasu. A matsayin alamar zurfin soyayya da girmamawa gare shi, ya shiga wani ɗan ƙaramin ɗaki a ƙarƙashin ƙasa don ciyar da sauran rayuwarsa cikin addu'a da tunani. Ko da yake rayuwarsa a duniya ta ƙare, 'Hikmet' ɗinsa ya ci gaba da rayuwa a cikin zukatan mutane, ya zama fitilar ruhi ga tsararraki. Gadonsa ba gini ba ne, sai dai waƙar soyayyar Allah da ke ratsa cikin harshen Turkanci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Anna Komnene ta kasance masaniyar tarihi a Daular Rumawa ta Gabas daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 11 zuwa tsakiyar ƙarni na 12, wadda ta rubuta 『Alexiad』, littafin da ke rubuta mulkin mahaifinta.
key_achievements: An haife ta a matsayin babbar 'yar Sarkin Daular Rumawa ta Gabas
Ta rubuta mulkin mahaifinta, Alexios I
Ana ɗauke ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin masana tarihi mata na farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucenta sun kasance muhimmiyar tushe don fahimtar tarihin Daular Rumawa ta Gabas a lokacin Yaƙin Salibiyya.

anna-komnene.epic:
Anna Komnene (1 ga Disamba, 1083 – kusan 1153) ta kasance masaniyar tarihi kuma marubuciya a Daular Rumawa ta Gabas, wadda ta girma a tsakiyar cibiyar ilimi da siyasa ta daular a ƙarshen ƙarni na 11 da farkon ƙarni na 12 mai cike da rudani. Shekarar 1083, lokacin da aka haife ta, lokaci ne da Daular Rumawa ta Gabas ke kafa harsashin sake ginawa a ƙarƙashin Sarki Alexios I na Daular Komnenos. Daular tana fuskantar barazanar Normans daga yamma, mamayar Pechenegs daga arewa, da matsin lamba daga Turkawa Seljuk daga gabas, kuma nan ba da jimawa ba za ta fuskanci sabon raƙuman canji da ake kira Yaƙin Salibiyya na Farko. A cikin wannan zamani mai cike da rashin tabbas, Alexios I ya yi gwagwarmaya don tabbatar da zaman lafiya a daular, kuma Anna, babbar 'yarsa, ta ji daɗin matsayi na musamman a matsayin 'Porphyrogenneta', wato 'yar sarki ta halal, wadda aka haifa a cikin ɗakin haihuwa mai launin shunayya a fadar sarki a Constantinople. Ta sami ilimi mai tsauri na sarauta, inda ta koyi manyan ilimomi na zamaninta kamar falsafa, tarihi, likitanci, ilimin taurari, da fasahar magana, kuma ta girma a tsakiyar cibiyar ilimi da iko ta daular tun tana ƙarama. A wani lokaci, an yi mata alkawarin aure da wani babban basarake, Constantine Doukas, kuma an ɗauke ta a matsayin sarauniya ta gaba kuma mai mulki tare.

Duk da haka, makomar Anna Komnene ta fara girgiza sosai lokacin da ƙanenta, John (daga baya John II Komnenos), aka haife shi. Haihuwar ɗa ta sa zuciyar mahaifinta, Alexios I, ta karkata ga ɗan, kuma an cire ta daga jerin magajin sarauta. Mutuwar farkon wanda aka yi mata alkawarin aure tun tana ƙarama, Constantine Doukas, ya ƙara raunana matsayinta na siyasa. Daga baya ta auri Nikephoros Bryennios, wani ƙwararren soja kuma masanin ilimi, amma burinta na samun babban iko a daular bai taɓa gushewa ba. Ta yi imani da gaske cewa mijinta ya cancanci zama sarki, kuma tare da mahaifiyarta, Empress Irene Doukaina, ta yi ƙoƙarin shawo kan mahaifinta, Alexios I, a kan gadon mutuwarsa, ya naɗa mijinta Nikephoros a matsayin magaji maimakon ƙanenta John. Wannan shine kololuwar gwagwarmayar iko mai tsanani a cikin fadar, kuma lokaci ne da aka gwada basirar Anna da burinta akai-akai a cikin rikitarwa na siyasar daular. Waɗannan ƙoƙarce-ƙoƙarcen nata sun zurfafa rikice-rikice a cikin gidan sarauta, kuma a ƙarshe sun kawo wani babban canji a rayuwarta.

Bayan mutuwar mahaifinta, Alexios I, a shekara ta 1118, Anna Komnene ta shirya juyin mulki a kan ƙanenta, John II. Ta yi imani da gaske cewa iliminta da jinin sarautarta sun isa su jagoranci daular, kuma ta yi ƙoƙarin naɗa mijinta, Nikephoros Bryennios, a matsayin sarki. Duk da haka, saboda rashin yanke hukunci da halin ko-in-kula na mijinta, shirin nasu ya ci tura. Wannan yunƙurin juyin mulki ya jawo wa Anna babban rashi. An kwace mata dukkan dukiyarta, kuma an tsare ta tare da mahaifiyarta, Irene Doukaina, a gidan sufi na Kecharitomene wanda mahaifiyarta ta kafa. Rayuwarta mai cike da alatu a fadar sarki ta ƙare, kuma a zahiri duniya ta manta da ita. Ba za a iya bayyana baƙin cikinta da kunyarta na faɗuwa daga kololuwar iko ba. Duk da haka, wannan gwaji ya jagoranci rayuwarta zuwa wata hanya daban. A cikin yanayin shiru da keɓewa na gidan sufi, Anna ta sami lokaci don zurfafa tunani, kuma ta sami damar canza takaici da fushinta zuwa sha'awar ilimi.

An tsare Anna Komnene a gidan sufi, ta fara amfani da basirarta ta ilimi ta hanyar ɗaukar alƙalami. Ta yanke shawarar rubuta game da babban mulkin mahaifinta, Alexios I, da ɗaukakar daular, kuma sakamakon haka, an haifi littafin tarihi marar mutuwa mai suna 『Alexiad』. 『Alexiad』 littafi ne mai girma na tarihi mai juzu'i 15 wanda ke rubuta lokacin mulkin mahaifinta, Alexios I Komnenos (1081-1118), kuma yana da muhimmiyar tushen farko game da zuwan Yaƙin Salibiyya na Farko da yanayin siyasa da soja na Daular Rumawa ta Gabas. A cikin wannan aikin, Anna ta nuna kanta a matsayin fitacciyar masaniyar tarihi, fiye da mai rubuta tarihi kawai, tana nazarin abubuwan da suka faru masu rikitarwa da kuma bayyana tunanin mutane. Ko da yake ba ta taɓa sanya kambin sarki ba, ta rayu har abada a matsayin mai rubuta tarihi, kuma ana ɗauke ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin muhimman masana tarihi mata a tarihin Yamma. Rubuce-rubucenta suna ba da hangen nesa na ciki game da Daular Rumawa ta Gabas a lokacin Yaƙin Salibiyya, kuma suna ba da muhimmiyar fahimta don fahimtar bambance-bambancen ra'ayi tsakanin Gabas da Yamma a lokacin, idan aka kwatanta da rubuce-rubucen masana tarihi na Yammacin Turai na lokacin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Andrei Rublev ya kasance mai zanen gumaka kuma sufi a tsakiyar zamanai na Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 14, wanda ya kai kololuwar fasahar Orthodox ta Rasha ta hanyar gumakan 'Triniti'.
key_achievements: Ya fara rayuwar sufi a gidan sufi na Andronikov
Ya haɓaka fasaharsa ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa da Theophanes the Greek
Ya buɗe sabon salon zane tare da Daniil Chyorny
Ya zana gumakan 'Triniti' don Trinity Lavra na St. Sergius
An tsarkake shi a matsayin waliyi ta Cocin Orthodox na Rasha
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa ana kiransu 'tagogi zuwa sama' kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga fasahar Orthodox ta Rasha da ruhin ƙasa.

andrei-rublev.epic:
Andrei Rublev (an haife shi a shekarun 1360) yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan masu zanen gumaka kuma sufaye na Babban Duchy na Moscow a tsakiyar zamanai. Ƙarshen ƙarni na 14, lokacin da aka haife shi, lokaci ne na hargitsi da canji, a ƙarƙashin mulkin Mongol-Tatar, wanda aka fi sani da 'Karkiyar Tatar'. Hare-hare marasa yankewa da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa sun lalata rayuwar mutane, kuma zurfin yanke kauna ya mamaye al'umma gaba ɗaya. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Rublev ya bar rayuwar duniya ya zaɓi hanyar imani. Ya zama sufi a gidan sufi na Andronikov a Moscow, kuma ya ɗauki nuna ɗaukakar Allah da neman kwanciyar hankali na ruhi ta hanyar zanensa a matsayin kiransa. Fasaharsa ta wuce zane mai sauƙi, ta zama hanyar ruhaniya da ke isar da ta'aziyya da bege ga mutanen da ke shan wahala. Don haka, farkon rayuwar Rublev shine farkon tafiya don neman haske mai tsarki a cikin duhun zamaninsa.

Tafiyar fasaha ta Rublev ta zurfafa ta hanyar haɗuwa da manyan malamai na zamaninsa. Ya sami damar yin aiki tare da Theophanes the Greek, babban mai zanen gumaka daga Byzantium, a Cathedral na Annunciation a Moscow Kremlin. Theophanes the Greek ya nuna ainihin salon Byzantine tare da ƙarfin hali da ban mamaki, kuma Rublev ya sami wahayi mai yawa daga salon zanensa mai ƙarfi. Amma abokin tarayya mafi kusa kuma ɗan'uwa na ruhaniya ga Rublev shine Daniil Chyorny. Su biyun sun shafe kwanaki masu yawa tare suna yin ado da Cathedral na Dormition a Vladimir. Sun nemi sabon salon zane wanda ya fi laushi da ɗan adam, suna barin tsaurin kai da tsarin salon Byzantine. Wannan yunkuri ne na nuna imani da ji na musamman na ƙasar Rasha, kuma ya zama muhimmin juyi a fasahar Rublev. Haɗin gwiwarsu ya buɗe sabon babi a fasahar gumaka ta Rasha.

Mafi mahimmancin nasara a cikin aikin rayuwar Rublev shine gumakan 'Triniti' da ya zana don Trinity Lavra na St. Sergius. Wannan aikin yana ɗauke da zurfin burinsa na isar da saƙon haɗin kai da jituwa ga al'ummar Rasha da ke fama da rarrabuwa da rikici a lokacin. Gumakan 'Triniti' yana amfani da labarin mala'iku uku da suka ziyarci Ibrahim a cikin Tsohon Alkawari a matsayin tushe, yana nuna alamar cikakkiyar jituwa da soyayya ta sadaukarwa ta Uba, Ɗa, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki. Mala'iku uku da aka zana a cikin tsarin madauwari tare da launuka masu laushi da kwanciyar hankali, fuskoki masu tunani suna ba da zurfin salama da ta'aziyya ta ruhaniya ga mai kallo. Wannan zane ya wuce hoton addini mai sauƙi, ya zama tunani na tauhidi da alamar nasara ta fasaha ga kowane rai da ke marmarin salama a cikin hargitsi. Ta hanyar zanensa, Rublev ya gabatar da manufar jituwa ta allahntaka a fuskantar gwaje-gwajen zamaninsa, kuma ya kai kololuwar fasahar Orthodox ta Rasha.

Andrei Rublev ya mutu cikin lumana a Moscow a kusan ranar 17 ga Oktoba, 1428. Bayan mutuwarsa, gadon fasaharsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga Cocin Orthodox na Rasha da duniyar fasaha tsawon ƙarnuka. Rublev an tsarkake shi a matsayin waliyi ta Cocin Orthodox na Rasha, kuma ana ɗaukar zanensa fiye da ayyukan fasaha kawai, a matsayin 'tagogi zuwa sama' kuma abubuwan girmamawa na allahntaka. A cikin zamanin da tashin hankali da yanke kauna suka mamaye, ya nemi ya shaida cewa soyayya da bege na Allah har yanzu suna wanzu ta hanyar launi da siffa. Ayyukansa sun zama ginshiƙin ruhaniya ga al'ummar Rasha, kuma sun ba da wahayi marar yankewa ga masu fasaha na Rasha na gaba. Ayyukansa ana kwatanta su da ƙarfin hali na sauran manyan masu zanen gumaka na zamaninsa, misali Theophanes the Greek, kuma suna zama muhimmin ma'auni don fahimtar wadataccen nau'in fasahar Rasha ta tsakiyar zamanai.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shugaba wanda, a cikin zamanin hargitsi, ya kare mamayar yamma kuma ya yi mu'amala da Mongols cikin hikima don kiyaye asalin Rus.
key_achievements: Dakatar da mamayar yamma ta hanyar cin nasara a Yaƙin Neva
Kore Jaruman Teutonic a Yaƙin kan Kankara
Kiyaye Rus ta hanyar diflomasiyya mai hikima tare da Mongols
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kare Cocin Orthodox da al'adun Rus, kuma ya shimfiɗa harsashin wata ƙasa ta Rasha mai haɗin kai a ƙarƙashin mulkin Mongol.

alexander-nevsky.epic:
An haife ni, Alexander Yaroslavich, a cikin zamanin hargitsi, an ƙaddara ni zama shugaba. A matsayina na Yarima na Novgorod, nauyin tsaron mutanena ya hau kan matashin kafadata. Rus tana fuskantar hari daga kowane bangare. Daga yamma, sojojin Salibiyya na Sweden da Jamus sun nemi su ci ƙasarsu kuma su mai da mutanensu zuwa imaninsu. Daga gabas, daular Mongol mai ƙarfi, wato Golden Horde, ta riga ta ci yawancin masarautunsu kuma tana buƙatar haraji da biyayya. Rayuwata ta kasance gwagwarmaya ce ta ci gaba da daidaitawa, gwagwarmaya mai tsanani don kiyaye ruhin al'ummata ta hanyar tafiyar da waɗannan raƙuman ruwa na siyasa masu haɗari.

Babban gwajina na farko ya zo a bakin kogin Neva a shekara ta 1240. Sojojin Sweden sun sauka, suna da tabbacin ƙarfinsu da manufarsu ta Allah. Na jagoranci ƴan rakiya kaɗan a wani hari na bazata, na buge su da fushin mutanen da ke kare ƙasarsu. Nasara ta kasance mai sauri da yanke hukunci, kuma ta ba ni taken 'Nevsky'. Bayan shekaru biyu, wata babbar barazana ta bayyana. Jaruman Teutonic masu sulke sun ci gaba da tafiya a kan tafkin Peipus mai daskarewa. A cikin abin da za a sani da 'Yaƙin kan Kankara', na yi amfani da yanayin ƙasa don jawo dakarun dawakai masu nauyi zuwa kan kankara mai rauni, wanda ya fashe ya haɗiye su. Waɗannan nasarorin sun tabbatar da iyakokinmu na yamma kuma sun zama alamar ruhin juriya na Rasha.

Yayin da na fuskanci maharan yamma da ƙarfe, na zaɓi wata hanya dabam game da Mongols. Na fahimci cewa fuskantar ƙarfin Golden Horde a fili zai nufin halaka gaba ɗaya ga mutanena da biranena. Na ga sojojin Salibiyya na Katolika a matsayin babban barazana ga wanzuwa, saboda sun nemi su lalata imaninsu na Orthodox da al'adunsu. Mongols, a gefe guda, sun fi sha'awar haraji da biyayya ta siyasa. Don haka, na tafi kotun Babban Khan, na ƙasƙantar da kaina kuma na karɓi ikonsu. Wannan zaɓi mai zafi amma mai amfani ya ceci Rus daga ƙarin halaka kuma ya ba su damar kiyaye asalin su.

Rayuwata ta kasance shaida ce ga zaɓuɓɓuka masu wuya da shugaba dole ne ya yi. Na kasance jarumi a filin yaƙi, kuma jami'in diflomasiyya a cikin tanti na Khan. Gadona ba wai kawai a cikin yaƙe-yaƙe da na ci ba ne, har ma a cikin ƙasar da na kiyaye. Na kare Cocin Orthodox, wanda shine tushen al'adunmu, kuma a ƙarshe na shimfiɗa harsashin fitowar wata ƙasa ta Rasha mai haɗin kai a ƙarƙashin mulkin Mongol. Na mutu a kan hanyata ta dawowa bayan na sami izini ga mutanena daga aikin soja na Mongol. Hanyata ta kasance hanya ce ta sadaukarwa don rayuwar Rus.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani babban marubuci na adabin Rashanci wanda ya sha wahalar gudun hijira saboda ra'ayoyinsa na 'yanci, ya bar manyan ayyuka, kuma ya mutu a fada.
key_achievements: Ya sami shahara da buga wakarsa 'Ruslan da Ludmila'
Ya kammala manyan ayyuka kamar 'Eugene Onegin'
Ya bude sabbin hanyoyi a cikin adabin Rashanci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Harshensa da labaransa suna rayuwa a cikin ruhin Rasha kuma ana kiransa 'Uban Adabin Rashanci'.

alexander-pushkin.epic:
An haifi Alexander Pushkin a shekara ta 1799 a Moscow, cikin wani gidan sarauta mai tarihi, amma kuma jinin Afirka mai daraja yana gudana a cikin jijiyoyinsa. Kakan mahaifiyarsa, Abram Gannibal, wani janar ne mai hazaka daga Afirka wanda Sarki Peter Mai Girma ya yi masa alfarma. Ya yi kuruciyarsa a Makarantar Imperial Lyceum mai daraja a Tsarskoye Selo, inda tun da wuri ya fara nuna hasken baiwarsa ta adabi. A can ne ya fara tafiya kan hanyar kaddararsa, yana binciken kida mai ban sha'awa da kuma damar harshen Rashanci mai girma.

Lokacin da aka buga wakarsa mai ban mamaki 'Ruslan da Ludmila', nan da nan ya sami shahara mai daukaka, amma ra'ayoyinsa na 'yanci da wakokinsa na sukar siyasa sun jawo fushin Tsar mai tsanani. A karshe, an kore shi zuwa kudancin daular, zuwa yankunan Caucasus da Crimea masu nisa. Amma wannan lokacin kadaici da gudun hijira bai zama banza a gare shi ba. Kyawawan wurare masu ban mamaki da rayuwar al'ummomi masu 'yanci sun ba shi sabon wahayi mai zurfi, suna kara zurfi da ma'ana ga ayyukansa na soyayya.

Bayan 'yan shekaru, an sake shi daga gudun hijira kuma ya koma St. Petersburg, amma rayuwarsa ba ta taba zama mai kwanciyar hankali ba. Ya auri kyakkyawar Natalya Goncharova, amma jita-jitar jama'a da ke kewaye da ita, matsalolinsa na kudi masu yawa, da kuma ci gaba da sa ido daga 'yan sandan sirri na Tsar sun shake shi kamar igiya. Duk da wadannan matsaloli masu nauyi, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba, ya kammala manyan ayyukansa 'Eugene Onegin' da 'Boris Godunov', don haka ya bude sabbin hanyoyi masu haske a cikin adabin Rashanci.

Karshensa ya kasance mai ban tausayi da kuma abin takaici. Lokacin da jita-jitar da ke bata sunan matarsa ta kai kololuwa, ya kalubalanci jami'in Faransa Georges d'Anthès zuwa fada mai mutunci. Zabi ne don kare mutuncinsa mai daraja, amma a wannan fadan, ya ji rauni mai tsanani kuma ya rasu yana da shekaru 37. Rayuwarsa ta kasance gajere kamar walƙiya, amma harshensa da labaransa suna rayuwa har abada a cikin ruhin Rasha, suna barin sunan 'Uban Adabin Rashanci' mai girma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alexios I Komnenos ya kasance Sarkin Sarakuna na Daular Rum ta Gabas a karshen karni na 11, wanda ya jagoranci farfadowar soja da kudi na daular da kuma daidaita daular Komnenos.
key_achievements: Jagorancin farfadowar soja da kudi na Daular Rum ta Gabas
Hallaka Pechenegs da daidaita yankunan daular
Maido da wasu sassan Anatolia ta hanyar amfani da Crusades
Kafa harsashin daular Komnenos da karfi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa ya bude wani zamani na farfadowa ga Daular Rum ta Gabas, kuma an watsa shi ga zuriyarsa ta hanyar rubuce-rubucen 'yarsa Anna Komnene.

alexios-i-komnenos.epic:
Alexios I Komnenos (an haife shi kusan 1048) ya kasance Sarkin Sarakuna na Daular Rum ta Gabas (ya yi mulki: 1081 – 1118), mutum ne da ya mulki a lokacin rikici lokacin da daular ke gab da rugujewa, kuma ya kafa harsashin farfadowarta. Kafin hawansa karagar mulki, Daular Rum ta Gabas tana kan gaba da faduwa saboda barazanar da ke fitowa daga kowane bangare. A yamma, Normans suna mamaye yankunan Balkan, kuma a arewa, Pechenegs, wata kabila mai yawan kaura, sun ketare kogin Danube har zuwa babban birnin Constantinople. A gabas, bayan yakin Manzikert na 1071, Seljuk Turks sun mamaye manyan yankuna na Anatolia, suna cinye muhimman albarkatu da ma'aikata na daular. A cikin wannan yanayi na yanke kauna, Alexios ya hau karagar mulki ta hanyar juyin mulkin soja a shekara ta 1081, kuma abin da ya gada ba daukakar Roma mai haske ba ce, sai dai nauyin daular da ke gab da fatara ta kudi da kuma cikin rudanin soja. Matashin sa da kwarewarsa ta soja an dauke su a matsayin bege guda daya don shawo kan wannan matsala.

Nan da nan bayan hawansa karagar mulki, gwajin farko da Alexios ya fuskanta shine barazanar Normans daga yamma. Sojojin Norman karkashin jagorancin Robert Guiscard sun mamaye yankin Balkan, suna karya layin tsaron daular. Wannan yakin ya kara cinye kudaden daular, kuma a matsayin mafita ta karshe, Alexios ya tilasta masa ya ba Jamhuriyar Venice manyan gata na kasuwanci don musayar karfin sojojinsu na ruwa don katse hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki na Normans ta teku. Wannan mataki ne mai wulakanci wanda ya lalata girman kai na daular, amma zabin da ba makawa ba ne don dakatar da barazanar nan take. Da yakin da Normans ya ragu, Pechenegs daga arewa sun fara ketare kogin Danube, suna barazana kai tsaye ga Constantinople. Don fuskantar Pechenegs masu yawa, Alexios ya yi amfani da basirarsa ta diflomasiyya don kulla kawance da wata kabila mai yawan kaura, Cumans. A yakin Lebounion na 1091, ya sami nasara mai mahimmanci, inda ya hallaka Pechenegs tare da sojojin haya na Cuman, kuma wannan nasarar ta kawo hasken bege da kwanciyar hankali da daular ke matukar bukata.

Amma babban barazanar daular tana fitowa daga gabas, wato Anatolia, wanda Seljuk Turks suka mamaye. Maido da wannan kasa, wacce a da take cibiyar samar da abinci da tushen karfin soja na daular, shine babban aikin Alexios. Ganin gaskiyar cewa zai yi wuya a maido da wannan babban yanki da karfin daular kadai, ya yanke shawara mai karfin hali. A shekara ta 1095, ya aika jakadu zuwa Paparoma Urban II, yana neman kwararrun sojojin haya daga yamma don fuskantar Seljuk Turks da ke barazana ga Kiristoci a gabas. Ya yi tsammanin cewa jarumai na yamma za su yi yaki a karkashin umurnin daular, amma bukatarsa ta haifar da babbar tasiri da ba a zata ba a duniya ta yamma. Rokonsa, tare da wa'azin Paparoma, ya rikide zuwa wani babban balaguron soja mai suna 'Crusades' wanda ya mamaye kofarsa. Crusades balaguron soja ne da Kiristoci na Yammacin Turai suka shirya don kwato birnin Urushalima mai tsarki, kuma Alexios ya fuskanci sabbin kalubale na diflomasiyya da soja saboda zuwansu.

Mu'amala da shugabannin Crusades shine gwajin diflomasiyya mafi rikitarwa da wahala a lokacin mulkin Alexios. Yayin da yake taka tsantsan da buri da kwadayi na shugabannin Crusades, ya yi nasarar amfani da karfin sojojinsu da dabara don kwato tsoffin biranen Byzantine kamar Nicaea. Ya sami rantsuwar biyayya ga daular da alkawarin mayar da tsoffin yankunan da aka kwato daga shugabannin Crusades, amma sau da yawa ba a cika wannan alkawarin ba. Duk da haka, Alexios ya tabbatar da mafi girman bukatun daular a cikin rudanin Crusades, ya daidaita daular, kuma ya kafa harsashin wani zamani da ake kira 'Farfadowar Daular Komnenos'. 'Alexiad', wanda 'yarsa kuma masanin tarihi Anna Komnene ta rubuta, ya kasance muhimmin tushe na tarihi wanda ya rubuta rayuwarsa da mulkinsa dalla-dalla. Lokacin da ya mutu a ranar 15 ga Agusta, 1118, Daular Rum ta Gabas ta zama mai karfi sosai a fannin soja da kudi, kuma ya bar daular mai kwanciyar hankali ga dansa John II. Mulkinsa yana nuna lokacin da Daular Rum ta Gabas ta fara shiga cikin rikitarwa tare da duniya ta yamma, kuma wannan ya bayyana a cikin manufofin Sarkin Sarakuna Manuel I Komnenos daga baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alisher Navoi ya kasance mawaki kuma masani na Daular Timurid a ƙarni na 15, wanda ya buɗe zamanin zinariya na adabin Chagatai.
key_achievements: Rubuta ayyuka da yawa a cikin Chagatai, ciki har da 'Khamsa'
Tabbatar da fifikon Turkanci ta hanyar 'Kwatanta Harsuna Biyu'
Tallafawa al'adu da fasaha a Herat da faɗaɗa ababen more rayuwa na zamantakewa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana girmama shi a matsayin uban adabin Uzbekistan, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban adabin Turkanci.

alisher-navoi.epic:
Alisher Navoi (1441-1501) ya kasance babban mawaki, masani, kuma ɗan siyasa a Daular Timurid ta ƙarni na 15 a Tsakiyar Asiya. Herat, garinsu, shi ne cibiyar Daular Timurid kuma cibiyar ilimi da fasaha mai haske, kamar tukunyar narke al'adu daban-daban a mahadar Hanyar Siliki. A shekara ta 1441, Navoi ya zo duniya a cikin wannan yanayi mai wadata, kuma tun yana yaro ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga adabi da fasaha. Ya kulla abota mai zurfi da Hussein Bayqara, wanda daga baya zai zama Sultan, inda suka bincika duniyar ilimi da fasaha tare. A wancan lokacin, Farisa ce harshen adabi na hukuma a kotun Timurid, yayin da ake ɗaukar Turkanci a matsayin harshen yau da kullun. Navoi ya girma a cikin kyawun harsunan biyu, Farisa da yarensa na asali, Turkanci, amma ya fahimci cewa ba a yi amfani da damar adabi na Turkanci gaba ɗaya ba, don haka ya haɓaka sha'awar ɗaukaka matsayinsa. Wannan ya zama aikinsa na rayuwa da kuma farkon gwagwarmayarsa ta adabi.

Rikicin siyasa a cikin Daular Timurid ya shafi rayuwar Navoi. Ya bar garinsu Herat na ɗan lokaci don ci gaba da karatunsa a wurare kamar Samarkand da Mashhad. Wannan lokaci ya kawo masa kaɗaici na zahiri amma kuma ya zama dama mai mahimmanci don ci gabansa na ilimi. Ya yi nazari mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban kamar shari'a, lissafi, ilimin taurari, adabi, da kiɗa, yana gina ilimi na ciki da kuma kafa ra'ayoyinsa. A shekara ta 1469, lokacin da abokinsa na dindindin kuma abokin karatunsa, Hussein Bayqara, ya zama mai mulkin Herat, Navoi ya dawo bisa kiran sa. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga Sultan kuma babban jami'in gudanarwa, yana shiga cikin harkokin gwamnati. Bugu da ƙari, Navoi ya tallafa wa mawaka, masu fasaha, da masana a kotun Sultan, yana ba da gudummawa mai yawa wajen mai da Herat cibiyar farfaɗowar Tsakiyar Asiya a wancan lokacin. A ƙarƙashin jagorancinsa, Herat ta fuskanci zamanin zinariya inda adabi da fasaha suka bunƙasa.

Babban aikin Navoi a rayuwa shi ne tabbatar da darajar adabi na Turkanci, musamman Chagatai, da kuma ɗaukaka matsayinsa don ya zama daidai da Farisa. Ya girmama al'adar Farisa mai girma da kyawunta, amma yana so ya nuna wa duniya cewa Turkanci ma yana da wadata da faɗin magana mai kama da haka. Bisa ga wannan imani, ya rubuta manyan ayyuka da yawa a cikin Chagatai. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, 'Khamsa,' babban aiki ne da ya ƙunshi waƙoƙin almara guda biyar, yana faɗaɗa iyakokin adabin Turkanci ta hanyar gadon al'adar waƙar almara ta Farisa a cikin Chagatai. Bugu da ƙari, a cikin muhimmin littafinsa na harshe, 'Muhakamat al-Lughatayn' (Kwatanta Harsuna Biyu), ya kwatanta da kuma nazarin kalmomi, nahawu, da faɗin magana na Farisa da Turkanci a tsari, yana jayayya game da fifiko da wadata na Turkanci. Wannan aiki ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tallafawa damar adabi na Turkanci a ka'ida, kuma gwagwarmayarsa ta adabi ta zama ginshiƙi don buɗe sabon zamani na adabin Turkanci.

Rayuwar Navoi ba ta iyakance ga ƙirƙirar adabi kawai ba. A matsayinsa na ɗan siyasa, ya kula da rayuwar mutanensa, kuma a matsayinsa na mai ba da agaji, ya ba da gudummawa wajen faɗaɗa ababen more rayuwa na zamantakewa ta hanyar gina makarantu, asibiti, da gadoji da yawa. Ya yi imani da gaske cewa fasaha da ilimi sune tushen ƙarfin da ke ɗaukaka ruhin mutum kuma ke wadatar da al'umma. A shekara ta 1501, ya rasu a Herat, birnin da ya ƙauna kuma ya yi hidima a duk rayuwarsa, amma ayyukansa da ruhinsa suna rayuwa a duk faɗin Tsakiyar Asiya har zuwa yau. Musamman ma, ana girmama shi a matsayin uban adabin Uzbekistan, kuma an rubuta sunansa a kan cibiyoyin al'adu da yawa kamar jami'o'in ƙasa, gidajen wasan kwaikwayo, da gidajen tarihi. Gadonsa na adabi bai buɗe zamanin zinariya na adabin Turkanci kawai ba amma kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga marubutan adabin Turkanci na baya kamar Babur, don haka ana tuna shi ba kawai a matsayin mawaki ba amma a matsayin fitilar al'adu na wani zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Muhammad Al-Bukhari, malamin Musulunci, ya tattara Hadisai 600,000 a cikin tafiyar shekaru 16, kuma ya tattara 'Sahih Muhammad Al-Bukhari' bayan ingantaccen bincike.
key_achievements: Ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duk faɗin duniyar Musulunci, inda ya tattara Hadisai fiye da 600,000
Ya tabbatar da sahihancin sarkar masu ruwaya ta Hadisi da tsauraran ka'idoji
Ya zaɓi Hadisai 7,500 kuma ya tattara 'Sahih Muhammad Al-Bukhari'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Babban aikinsa, 'Sahih Muhammad Al-Bukhari', ya kasance littafi mafi inganci bayan Alkur'ani, yana jagorantar rayuwar Musulmai tsawon tsararraki.

muhammad-al-bukhari.epic:
An haife ni a shekara ta 810, a Bukhara, cibiyar hanyar siliki. Tun ina yaro, na fuskanci mu'ujizar rasa gani sannan na dawo da shi, wanda na ɗauka a matsayin kira mai tsarki don sadaukar da rayuwata ga neman ilimi. An albarkace ni da ƙwaƙwalwa mai ban mamaki, kuma tun ina ƙarami, na haddace dubban Hadisai (maganganu da ayyukan Annabi). Bayan na yi aikin Hajji zuwa Makka tare da mahaifiyata da ɗan'uwana tun ina ɗan shekara 16, na yanke shawarar fara wata babbar tafiya da za ta ratsa dukkanin duniyar Musulunci don tattarawa da tabbatar da koyarwar Annabi Muhammad da kaina.

Fiye da shekaru 16 bayan haka, na yi tafiye-tafiye ba tare da tsayawa ba don neman ilimi. Na ziyarci cibiyoyin ilimi na Baghdad, Damascus, Alkahira, da Hijaz, inda na sadu da malamai fiye da 1,000 kuma na tattara Hadisai fiye da 600,000. Tafiyata ba wai kawai tattara ruwayoyi ba ce. Ta kasance wata gwagwarmaya mai tsanani don tabbatar da sahihancin kowace ruwaya. Na shafe shekaru ina bin diddigin sarkar masu ruwaya (isnadi) na kowane Hadisi, ina tantance amincin da gaskiyar kowane mutum. Wannan tsari ya buƙaci haƙuri mai yawa, sadaukarwa, da kuma sha'awar da ba ta misaltuwa don kiyaye maganar Annabi tsarkakakkiya.

Daga wannan tarin bayanai masu yawa, na tattara babban aikina na rayuwa, wanda aka fi sani da 'Sahih Muhammad Al-Bukhari', wanda cikakken sunansa shine 'Al-Jami' Al-Musnad As-Sahih Al-Mukhtasar min Umuri Rasulullah wa Sunanihi wa Ayyamihi'. Ka'idodina sun kasance masu tsauri fiye da kowane lokaci. Na haɗa Hadisai ne kawai waɗanda sarkar masu ruwaya ba ta yanke ba, kuma duk masu ruwayar suna da tsoron Allah, amintattu, kuma akwai shaidar cewa sun haɗu da juna. Kafin na haɗa Hadisi guda ɗaya a cikin littafin, na yi wanka da gangan kuma na yi raka'a biyu na sallah. A cikin shekaru 16, na zaɓi kusan Hadisai 7,500 mafi inganci daga cikin Hadisai 600,000.

Duk da shaharata a fannin ilimi, shekarun baya na rayuwata sun cika da gwaji. A Nishapur, na shiga cikin muhawara ta tauhidi, wanda abokan hamayya masu kishi suka ƙara girma. Wannan muhawara a ƙarshe ta kai ga korata. Ko da na dawo garinmu na Bukhara, lokacin da gwamnan wurin ya nemi darussa na musamman ga 'ya'yansa, na ƙi saboda na yi imani cewa ilimi ya kamata a raba shi daidai ga kowa. Wannan ya sa aka sake korata, kuma na ƙare rayuwata a Khartank, wani ƙaramin gari kusa da Samarkand. Ko da yake na mutu a gudun hijira daga garinmu, gadona, 'Sahih Muhammad Al-Bukhari', ya kasance littafi mafi inganci bayan Alkur'ani, yana jagorantar rayuwar Musulmai tsawon tsararraki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Farghani masanin taurari ne kuma injiniya a Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na ƙarni na 9, wanda ya rubuta 'Elements of Astronomy' kuma ya kula da ginin Nilometer.
key_achievements: Rubutawa da yaɗa 'Elements of Astronomy'
Taƙaita 'Almagest' na Ptolemy
Kula da ginin Nilometer a Alkahira
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun zama gada don musayar ilimi tsakanin Gabas da Yamma, kuma sun yi tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban kimiyya a Turai.

al-farghani.epic:
Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Kathir Al-Farghani fitaccen masanin taurari ne kuma injiniya daga Fergana, Asiya ta Tsakiya, wanda ya yi aiki a karni na 9. Rayuwarsa ta kasance a kololuwar Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci, lokacin da ilimi da al'adu suka bunkasa. A wannan lokacin, Khalifofin Abbasid sun zuba jari mai yawa wajen bincike da adana ilimi, suna fassara hikimar tsohuwar Girka, Indiya, da Farisa zuwa Larabci, tare da inganta sabbin bincike. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Al-Farghani ya kasance mai matuƙar sha'awar ilimi, don haka ya nufi Baghdad, babban birnin daular Abbasid, wanda a lokacin shi ne cibiyar ilimi ta duniya. A can, ya zama wani muhimmin memba na Gidan Hikima (Bayt al-Hikma), wata cibiyar ilimi ta almara da aka kafa a ƙarƙashin goyon bayan Khalif Al-Ma'mun. Gidan Hikima wuri ne da manyan masana na zamanin suka taru don bincike da fassara ilimi a fannoni daban-daban kamar ilimin taurari, lissafi, da likitanci, inda suka ba da gudummawa mai girma ga tarihin hankalin ɗan adam. A nan ne Al-Farghani ya samu damar mu'amala da manyan masana na zamaninsa, kuma ya bunkasa basirarsa ta ilimi. 

Babban nasarar ilimi ta Al-Farghani ta haskaka a fannin ilimin taurari. Ya gane cewa babban littafin masanin taurari na tsohuwar Girka, Claudius Ptolemy, mai suna 'Almagest', yana da sarkakiya da kuma cike da hujjoji na lissafi masu yawa, wanda ya sa yake da wuyar fahimta ga masana na zamaninsa. Don haka, Al-Farghani ya fara aikin taƙaitawa da tsara wannan ilimi mai wuyar fahimta a tsari mai sauƙi domin masana su fahimta cikin sauƙi. Sakamakon wannan aikin shi ne babban littafinsa, 'Jawāmiʿ ʿIlm al-Nujūm' (Elements of Astronomy). Wannan littafi ya kawar da hujjoji na lissafi masu sarkakiya, kuma ya bayyana muhimman ra'ayoyin ilimin taurari kamar tsarin sararin samaniya, motsin taurari, da matsayin taurari a fili da kuma a taƙaice, don haka ya yi aiki mai kyau a matsayin littafin gabatarwa ga ilimin taurari. Littafinsa bai takaita ga maimaita ilimin Ptolemy kawai ba, a'a, ya haɗa da sabbin bincike da ci gaban ka'idoji da aka samu a duniyar Musulunci a lokacin, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wajen ba da fassarar zamani ga tsohon ilimi. 

Littafin Al-Farghani mai suna 'Elements of Astronomy' ya yi tasiri mai girma ba kawai a duniyar Larabawa ba har ma a fannin ilimi na Yamma. A karni na 12, an fassara wannan littafi zuwa Latin kuma ya fara zama sananne sosai a Turai da sunan 'Alfraganus'. An yi amfani da littafinsa a matsayin littafin karatu na ilimin taurari na yau da kullun a jami'o'in Turai tsawon daruruwan shekaru, kuma ya yi tasiri mai mahimmanci wajen samar da ra'ayin sararin samaniya da aka bayyana a cikin 'Divine Comedy' na babban mawaki Dante Alighieri na zamanin Renaissance. Bugu da ƙari, ya ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi ga masana na baya kamar Regiomontanus, fitaccen masanin taurari na zamanin Renaissance, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin gada wajen yaɗa ilimin taurari na Gabas zuwa Yamma. Gudummawar Al-Farghani ba ta takaita ga ilimin taurari na ka'idoji kawai ba. A kusan shekara ta 861, an tura shi Alkahira, Masar, bisa umarnin Khalif Al-Mutawakkil, inda ya kula da ginin 'Nilometer', wani gini mai inganci da aka yi amfani da shi don auna matakin ruwan kogin Nilu daidai. Wannan aikin injiniya mai amfani ya ba da muhimman bayanai don hasashen yawan amfanin gona da kuma tattara haraji a Masar tsawon daruruwan shekaru, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga ci gaban zamantakewa da tattalin arziki. 

Al-Farghani ya haɗa ilimin nazarin tsarin sama mai tsarki da fasahar injiniya mai amfani don magance matsalolin duniya, kuma ya zama alamar wadata ta ilimi a Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na ƙarni na 9. Littafinsa 'Elements of Astronomy' ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen yaɗa ilimi mai sarkakiya da kuma isar da shi ga tsararraki masu zuwa, yayin da ginin Nilometer ya nuna basirarsa ta injiniya da kuma hangen nesansa na aiki. Ayyukansa sun zama wata muhimmiyar hanya don musayar ilimi tsakanin Gabas da Yamma, kuma sun ba da gudummawa sosai wajen sanar da Turai nasarorin wayewar Musulunci wajen adanawa da haɓaka gadon tsohuwar Girka. Har yau, an rubuta sunansa a kan ramin wata mai suna 'Alfraganus', kuma gadonsa na ilimi yana da muhimmiyar matsayi a tarihin kimiyya. Rayuwar Al-Farghani, tare da nasarorin wasu masana Musulunci kamar Ibn Sina da Al-Khwarizmi, waɗanda suka yi fice a fannoni daban-daban kamar lissafi da likitanci a zamaninsa, ya nuna a fili gudummawar wayewar Musulunci ga ci gaban tarihin hankalin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Yaroslav mai hikima, Babban Yariman Kyiv Rus' na ƙarni na 11, ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya ta hanyar tattara dokoki da haɓaka al'adu.
key_achievements: Hauhawar gadon sarauta a matsayin Babban Yariman Kyiv Rus' da haɗin kai
Tattara 'Russkaya Pravda', kundin dokoki na farko na Rus'
Gina Cocin Saint Sophia a Kyiv da haɓaka al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Dokokinsa da gadon al'adunsa sun samar da tushe mai mahimmanci ga samar da asalin al'ummar Rus' a tsararraki masu zuwa.

yaroslav-the-wise.epic:
Yaroslav mai hikima (kimanin 978 – 1054) Babban Yariman Kyiv Rus' na ƙarni na 11 kuma fitaccen ɗan siyasa, wanda ya kawo zaman lafiya a lokacin rikice-rikice kuma ya jagoranci Rus' zuwa zamanin zinariya. An haife shi a matsayin ɗan Babban Yariman Kyiv Rus' mai girma, Vladimir, kuma sunansa na baftisma shine Georgiy (Yuriy). Ƙarshen ƙarni na 10 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 11 lokaci ne na hargitsi a Gabashin Turai, inda Kiristanci ke yaɗuwa kuma sabbin jihohi ke tasowa. Duk da cewa Babban Yarima Vladimir ya kafa tushen jihar ta hanyar gabatar da Kiristanci ga Rus', bayan mutuwarsa, gadon mulki an ƙaddara shi ya zama mai cike da gwagwarmayar jini tsakanin 'yan'uwa. Kafin ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Babban Yarima, Yaroslav ya sami gogewar mulki a matsayin Yariman Rostov sannan kuma Yariman Novgorod daga 1010 zuwa 1019, wanda ya zama muhimmin tushe a gare shi don mulkin babban yankin Rus' daga baya. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance lokacin girma a ƙarƙashin mulkin mahaifinsa, yana haɓaka halayen shugabanci na gaba.

Lokacin da Babban Yarima Vladimir ya rasu a kimanin 1015, rayuwar Yaroslav ta fuskanci wani babban sauyi. Ɗan'uwansa na uwa ɗaya, Sviatopolk, ya aikata ayyukan zalunci ta hanyar kashe 'yan'uwa da yawa, ciki har da Boris da Gleb, don kwace mulki, kuma hakan ya jefa Rus' cikin mummunan yaƙin basasa. Yaroslav ya shiga doguwar gwagwarmaya don dawo da adalci a kan zaluncin Sviatopolk da kuma kwace gadon sarautar Kyiv. Ya yi yaƙi da Sviatopolk tare da goyon bayan Novgorod da sojojin haya na Scandinavia, kuma a ƙarshe ya ci Sviatopolk a 1019 kuma ya hau gadon sarauta a matsayin Babban Yariman Kyiv Rus'. Amma gwagwarmayarsa ba ta ƙare ba. Wani ɗan'uwansa, Mstislav, ya kafa wata babbar runduna a gabas kuma ya kalubalance shi, kuma a ƙarshe 'yan'uwan biyu sun amince su raba Rus' don mulki, tare da Kogin Dnieper a matsayin iyaka. Wannan mulkin raba gardama ya ci gaba tsawon shekaru, yana gwada tushen mulkin Yaroslav.

Bayan shekaru da yawa na mulkin raba gardama, lokacin da Mstislav ya rasu a kimanin 1036, Yaroslav a ƙarshe ya zama mai mulkin duka babban yankin Kyiv Rus' shi kaɗai. Da zarar mulkinsa ya tabbata, ya fara aiwatar da gyare-gyare don tabbatar da zaman lafiya da wadata ga ƙasar. Ya yi yaƙi na ƙarshe da Pechenegs, makiyaya waɗanda ke ci gaba da barazana ga iyakokin kudu, kuma ya ci su da gaske a ƙarƙashin ganuwar Kyiv a 1036, yana kawo ƙarshen barazanar da ta daɗe shekaru da yawa. Bisa ga zaman lafiyar soja, Yaroslav ya mai da hankali kan ci gaban ƙasa ta hanyar dokoki da al'adu. Ya tattara 'Russkaya Pravda' (Русская правда), kundin dokoki na farko na Rus', yana kafa tsari ta hanyar doka maimakon ramuwar gayya kuma ya daidaita al'umma. Russkaya Pravda ta zama muhimmin tushe ga dokokin Gabashin Slavic. Bugu da ƙari, ya ƙarfafa ilimi da fasaha, ya fassara littattafai da yawa kuma ya kafa ɗakunan karatu, kuma ya gina babban Cocin Saint Sophia a Kyiv, wanda aka yi kama da Hagia Sophia na Constantinople, don tunawa da nasarar da ya samu a kan Pechenegs. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Kyiv ta shiga zamanin zinariya a matsayin cibiyar siyasa da al'adu ta Rus'.

Yaroslav mai hikima ya ɗaukaka matsayin Kyiv Rus' na duniya kuma ya ƙarfafa zaman lafiya ta hanyar aurar da 'ya'yansa ga gidajen sarauta a duk faɗin Turai. Wannan ya sa aka ba shi laƙabin 'Surukin Turai'. A ranar 20 ga Fabrairu, 1054, kafin mutuwarsa, ya tara 'ya'yansa kuma ya roƙe su da kada su yi faɗa da juna, amma su haɗa kai don kare ƙasar. Duk da cewa abin takaici ne cewa 'ya'yansa ba su bi wasiyyarsa ba bayan mutuwarsa, kuma Rus' ta sake shiga hanyar rarrabuwa, tushen dokoki da al'adu da ya kafa sun ci gaba da wanzuwa na dogon lokaci a tsararraki masu zuwa kuma sun zama tushen samar da asalin al'ummar Rus'. Salon mulkinsa da nasarorin al'adunsa ana kwatanta su da na sarakunan Daular Byzantine ko kuma sarakunan wayewa na Yammacin Turai, kuma suna da irin wannan muhimmancin tarihi a cikin tasirin da suka yi ga ci gaban wayewar Gabashin Turai.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Yermak Timofeyevich ya kasance shugaban Cossack na Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16, wanda ya buɗe kofa ga mamayar Siberia.
key_achievements: Balaguron Siberia tare da goyon bayan dangin Stroganov
Amfani da arquebus, babban nasara a yaƙin Cape Chuvash
Mamaye da miƙa Kashlyk, babban birnin Sibir Khanate
fact_box.legacy_statement: Nasarorinsa sun zama ginshiƙi ga faɗaɗa Rasha zuwa gabas da gina babban daula.

yermak-timofeyevich.epic:
Yermak Timofeyevich (kimanin 1532-1585) ya kasance shugaban Cossack (ataman) na Rasha mai tarihi a ƙarshen ƙarni na 16 kuma majagaba a mamayar Siberia. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 16, Daular Rasha tana fatan faɗaɗa zuwa gabas, amma babban yankin Siberia da ke bayan tsaunin Ural ya kasance yanki da ba a sani ba kuma ƙasar da Sibir Khanate na Tatars ke mulki. A wannan lokacin, Cossacks masu 'yanci suna aiki a cikin al'ummomi masu zaman kansu a yankunan kogin Volga da Don. Rayuwar farko ta Yermak ba a rubuta ta a fili ba, amma ya sami suna a matsayin ataman na waɗannan ƙungiyoyin Cossack, kuma jaruntakarsa da ƙwarewarsa ta jagoranci sun riga sun shahara. Musamman, dangin Stroganov, waɗanda suka tara dukiya mai yawa daga hakar gishiri da cinikin gashin dabbobi a gabashin tsaunin Ural, sun sha wahala daga hare-hare marasa yankewa daga Tatars karkashin jagorancin Kuchum Khan na Sibir Khanate. Suna buƙatar ƙarfin soja mai ƙarfi don kare yankunansu da bukatun kasuwancinsu, kuma a ƙarshe sun nemi taimako daga Yermak da jarumansa na Cossack. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya buɗe kofa ga balaguron Siberia, ɗaya daga cikin mahimman balaguro a tarihin Rasha.

A shekara ta 1581, Yermak, tare da goyon bayan dangin Stroganov, ya jagoranci sojojin Cossack kimanin 840 suka haye tsaunin Ural don balaguron Siberia. Wannan balaguron ba wai kawai fashi ba ne, amma babban ƙalubale ne ga nahiyar da ba a sani ba kuma wani muhimmin lokaci ne na faɗaɗa Rasha zuwa gabas. Tafiyarsu ta cika da tsananin sanyi, yunwa, da kuma yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa da mayaƙan Tatar da Kuchum Khan na Sibir Khanate ya aiko. Duk da cewa sojojin Cossack sun fi Tatars kaɗan, sun yi amfani da sabon makami mai suna arquebus, wanda Tatars ba su saba da shi ba a lokacin, don juya yanayin yaƙin. Arquebus ya kasance barazana mai kisa ga Tatars masu ɗauke da kibau da mashi, kuma wannan shine babban dalilin da ya sa Cossacks suka ci nasara a yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa. Musamman, yaƙin da aka yi a Cape Chuvash a bakin kogin Irtysh ya kasance wani muhimmin lokaci da ya yanke shawarar makomar balaguron. A watan Oktoba na 1582, sojojin Yermak na Cossack sun yi yaƙi da babban sojan Kuchum Khan kuma suka ci nasara mai girma, kuma wannan nasarar ta buɗe hanyar zuwa Kashlyk, babban birnin Sibir Khanate.

Bayan nasarar da aka samu a Cape Chuvash, Yermak ya mamaye Kashlyk, babban birnin Sibir Khanate, ba tare da wata adawa ba, inda ya cimma nasarar farko ta mamayar Siberia. Don ɗaukaka wannan mamaya ta sirri zuwa nasarar jihar Rasha, ya aika da jakadu zuwa Moscow don miƙa ƙasar Siberia ga Ivan IV (mai ban tsoro). Tsar ya yi farin ciki sosai da nasarorin Yermak, ya gafarta masa kuma ya ba shi kyauta mai ban mamaki, ciki har da sulke mai tsada. Duk da haka, kare babban yankin Siberia da ƴan sojojin Cossack kaɗai ya kusan zama ba zai yiwu ba. Ragowar sojojin Kuchum Khan sun ci gaba da kai hare-hare na ɓoye, suna damun Yermak da sojojinsa, layin samar da kayayyaki ya kasance marar tabbas, kuma sojojin sun ragu a hankali. Yermak ya yi tsayin daka a cikin waɗannan gwagwarmaya, yana ƙoƙarin kiyaye sansanin Rasha a Siberia, amma ƙarfinsa bai isa ba. A ƙarshe, a wani daren ruwan sama a watan Agusta na 1585, Tatars sun kai wa Yermak hari ba zato ba tsammani. A cikin rudani, ya yi ƙoƙarin tserewa ta hanyar tsalle cikin kogi, amma sulke mai nauyi da Ivan IV ya ba shi ya ja shi ƙasa, kuma ya ɓace a cikin ruwan kogi mai sanyi, inda ya fuskanci ƙarshensa mai ban tausayi.

Mutuwar Yermak Timofeyevich ta nuna koma baya na ɗan lokaci ga balaguron Siberia, amma nasarorinsa ba za a taɓa mantawa da su ba. A kan hanyar da ya buɗe, Rasha ta ci gaba da faɗaɗa zuwa gabas tsawon shekaru da yawa, kuma a ƙarshe ta sami babban yanki har zuwa Tekun Pacific, ta kafa tushe don zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan dauloli a duniya. Ana tuna shi a tarihin Rasha a matsayin majagaba wanda ya buɗe kofa ga Siberia, kuma jaruntakarsa da ruhin bincike sun kasance muhimmin alama ce ta ruhin majagaba na al'ummar Rasha har zuwa yau. Balaguron Yermak na Siberia an ɗauke shi a matsayin wani muhimmin al'amari wanda ya faɗaɗa iyakokin ƙasa da al'adu na Rasha, fiye da mamayar soja kawai. Labarinsa za a iya kwatanta shi da labaran masu bincike na Yamma waɗanda suka bincika kuma suka buɗe nahiyar Amurka daga baya, kamar balaguron Lewis da Clark, a matsayin labari mai nuna ci gaba da ƙalubalen ɗan adam ga duniyar da ba a sani ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: John Chrysostom, Babban Bishop na Cocin Gabas a Daular Roma a ƙarshen karni na 4, an kira shi 'Bakin Zinariya' kuma ya yi kira ga adalci na zamantakewa da sake fasalin coci.
key_achievements: Sake fasalin coci a matsayin Babban Bishop na Constantinople
Sukar rashin adalci na zamantakewa da jaddada taimakon talakawa
Samar da tunanin Kirista ta hanyar wa'azi da rubuce-rubuce masu yawa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Wa'azinsa da ruhin sake fasalinsa suna ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai ga ɗabi'ar Kirista da tabbatar da adalci na zamantakewa har zuwa yau.

john-chrysostom.epic:
John Chrysostom (an haife shi kusan 347) babban masanin tauhidi ne kuma mai wa'azi na Cocin Gabas wanda ya yi aiki a lokacin tashin hankali na Daular Roma a ƙarshen karni na 4 zuwa farkon karni na 5. A lokacin, Daular Roma ta ga haɓakar tasirin coci bayan an amince da Kiristanci a matsayin addinin jihar, yayin da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa da rashin daidaito na zamantakewa a cikin daular ke ƙaruwa. An haife shi a cikin dangi mai arziki a Antakiya ta Siriya, ɗaya daga cikin manyan biranen daular, kuma ya sami mafi kyawun ilimin magana na lokacinsa. Amma ya fi sha'awar rayuwar ruhaniya fiye da nasarar duniya, kuma bayan mutuwar mahaifiyarsa, ya bar wayewa ya shiga hamadar Siriya, inda ya yi rayuwar mai zaman kansa na tsawon shekaru. A wannan lokacin, ya sadaukar da kansa ga addu'a da nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki, yana horar da ruhinsa, amma tsananin azabar da ya sha ya sa lafiyarsa ta tabarbare sosai, kuma dole ne ya koma birni. Sunan 'Chrysostom' da aka haɗa da sunansa yana nufin 'Bakin Zinariya' a cikin Girkanci, laƙabi ne da aka ba shi bayan mutuwarsa saboda iyawar sa ta wa'azi.
