Bayan ya koma Antakiya, an naɗa John firist a kusan shekara ta 386, kuma ba da daɗewa ba wa'azinsa ya fara samun suna a duk faɗin birnin. Ya jawo hankalin masu sauraro da yawa da iyawarsa ta fassara Littafi Mai Tsarki a fili da kuma da himma, kuma kalmominsa suna da ƙarfin motsa zukatan mutane. John bai yi jinkirin sukar alatu na masu arziki da rashin adalci na zamantakewa ba, kuma ya ci gaba da jaddada cewa kula da talakawa da bayar da sadaka shine ainihin aikin Kirista. Waɗannan koyarwarsa sun kasance gargaɗi mai ƙarfi game da cin hanci da rashawa da lalacewar ɗabi'a da suka yadu a lokacin, kuma sunansa ya bazu cikin sauri a duk faɗin Daular Roma. Ba tare da son ransa ba, a shekara ta 397, ya fuskanci wani babban canji lokacin da aka naɗa shi Babban Bishop na Constantinople, babban birnin daular kuma cibiyar Cocin Gabas. Wannan ya ba shi damar yin tasiri mafi girma, amma a lokaci guda ya nuna makomar da ba makawa ta rikici kai tsaye da cibiyar iko ta daular.

A matsayinsa na Babban Bishop na Constantinople, John Chrysostom ya sadaukar da kansa ga sake fasalin coci da kuma kafa horo ga limamai. Ya sayar da kayan alatu na gidan Babban Bishop don gina asibitoci da taimakon talakawa, kuma ya buƙaci limamai su yi rayuwa mai sauƙi. Amma waɗannan ƙoƙarin sake fasalinsa da wa'azinsa na kai tsaye da ke sukar alatu na gidan sarauta, ciki har da Empress Aelia Eudoxia, matar Emperor Arcadius, ba da daɗewa ba suka haifar masa da maƙiya masu ƙarfi. Musamman, Empress Eudoxia ta ɗauki sukar sa a matsayin hari na sirri kuma ta haɗa kai da sauran limamai don cire shi daga mulki. A ƙarshe, an yanke wa John hukunci a wani taron coci ba bisa ka'ida ba da ake kira 'Synod of the Oak' a shekara ta 403, kuma dole ne ya tafi gudun hijira a karon farko. Ko da yake ya dawo ba da daɗewa ba saboda tsananin zanga-zangar jama'a, rikicin da Empress ya ci gaba, kuma a shekara ta 404, an sake kama shi kuma dole ne ya tafi gudun hijira na biyu zuwa wani ƙauye mai nisa a Armenia. Ko da a can, ya ƙarfafa masu bi kuma ya jagoranci coci ta hanyar wasiƙu, amma abokan adawarsa, waɗanda ke tsoron tasirinsa, sun yi ƙoƙarin tura shi zuwa wani wuri mai tsanani. A lokacin wannan tafiya mai wahala, ya sami hutawa a cikin Ubangiji a shekara ta 407.

Rayuwar John Chrysostom ta cika da wahala da gwagwarmaya, amma muryarsa ta annabci, wadda ba ta yarda da sulhu ba don gaskiya, tana ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi har zuwa yau. Rubuce-rubucensa masu yawa, ciki har da wa'azinsa da yawa, sharhi, da wasiƙu, sun zama wani muhimmin ɓangare na gadon tauhidi da ruhaniya na Cocin Gabas, kuma musamman fassararsa ta Littafi Mai Tsarki da koyarwarsa ta ɗabi'a sun yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin Kirista na baya. An girmama shi a matsayin waliyi a cikin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas da Cocin Roman Katolika, kuma muhimmancinsa na liturgical yana da girma sosai har 'Liturgical na St. John Chrysostom' da aka sanya masa suna ana amfani da shi a matsayin babban ibada a cikin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas. Ana tuna shi a matsayin mai hidima mai jaruntaka wanda ya yi yaƙi da rashin adalci na zamantakewa kuma ya kare talakawa, kuma babban mai wa'azi wanda ya motsa jama'a da iyawarsa ta magana. Rayuwarsa, kamar ta Augustine wanda ya yi aiki a lokaci guda, tana nuna gwagwarmayar iyayen coci da yawa waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye ainihin imani a cikin tashin hankali tsakanin ikon coci da ikon duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ulugh Beg sarki ne na Daular Timurid a karni na 15, masanin taurari, kuma masanin lissafi, wanda ya jagoranci gina gidan lura da taurari na Samarkand da kuma tattara kundin taurari na 'Zij-i Sultani'.
key_achievements: Gina da gudanar da gidan lura da taurari na Samarkand
Tattara kundin taurari mai daidaito 'Zij-i Sultani'
Gagarumin gudunmawa ga fannin trigonometry
fact_box.legacy_statement: Nasarorinsa na taurari da lissafi sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyya na gaba, kuma suna nuna darajar bincike mai hankali.

ulugh-beg.epic:
Mirza Muhammad Taraghay ibn Shahrukh (1384-1449) ya kasance mai mulkin Daular Timurid kuma shahararren masanin taurari da lissafi. Jikan babban mai nasara Timur ne, an haife shi a lokacin da daular ke cikin zamanin zinariya na al'adu da kimiyya. Tun yana yaro, ya fi sha'awar ilimi, musamman taurari da daidaiton lissafi, fiye da ayyukan cin nasara na kakansa. Mahaifinsa Shahrukh ya fahimci kuma ya goyi bayan wannan sha'awar ilimi ta dansa, kuma a kusan shekara ta 1409, yana da shekaru 16, aka nada shi gwamnan Samarkand, cibiyar al'adu kuma muhimmin wuri a kan hanyar siliki. Wanda aka fi sani da Ulugh Beg, ya cika ayyukansa na mai mulki, kuma ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa wajen sanya Samarkand ta zama fitilar ilimi da koyo. A nan, ya gayyaci manyan malamai na zamaninsa kuma ya karfafa bincike sosai, yana fara nuna kansa a matsayin babban sarki mai ilimi, fiye da mai gudanarwa kawai.

Babban burin Ulugh Beg shine ya bayyana ainihin yanayin sararin samaniya ta hanyar lura da hankali, yana kawar da camfi. Don cimma wannan, a kusan shekara ta 1420, ya gina gidan lura da taurari na Samarkand, wanda ya kasance mafi inganci a duniya a lokacin. Wannan gidan lura da taurari ba kawai wuri ne na lura ba, amma kuma cibiyar ilimi ce inda manyan masana suka taru don bincike. Babban abin da ke cikinsa shine babban Fakhri Sextant, wanda aka sanya a karkashin kasa, kuma girman sa da daidaiton sa ba su da kamarsa a baya. Ya gayyaci mafi kyawun masana taurari da lissafi daga ko'ina cikin daular don su sanya wannan wuri ya zama cibiyar bincike inda ilimi ke gudana. Tare suka lura da sararin samaniya da daddare, motsin taurari, matsayin taurari, da tsarin lissafi da ke cikin halittar Allah. Ulugh Beg da kansa ya shiga cikin lura da jagorantar bincike, yana neman bude sabbin hanyoyi a binciken kimiyya.

Bayan shekaru masu yawa na lura da lissafi mai daidaito, Ulugh Beg da masanansa sun kammala kundin taurari na 'Zij-i Sultani' a shekara ta 1437, wanda shine babban nasararsa. Wannan kundin taurari ya rubuta matsayin taurari 1,018 da daidaito mai ban mamaki, kuma an dauke shi a matsayin mafi daidaiton jerin taurari tun bayan Almagest na Ptolemy. Bugu da kari, ya yi gagarumin ci gaba a fannin trigonometry, inda ya lissafta darajar sine da tangent da daidaito wanda ba a taba gani ba a baya. Duk da haka, sha'awarsa ga kimiyya da bincike mai hankali ya jawo shakku da adawa daga bangarorin addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya, kuma matsayinsa na mai mulki ya fara raunana. Bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa Shahrukh a shekara ta 1447, ya hau gadon sarauta, amma mulkinsa ya kasance gajere kuma mai wahala. A cikin gwagwarmayar iko na cikin gida da rikice-rikicen addini, dansa Abd al-Latif ya yi tawaye, kuma a karshe, Ulugh Beg ya sha kashi a wannan tawaye a shekara ta 1449. Ya mutu a cikin bala'i, dansa ya kashe shi.

Rayuwar Ulugh Beg a duniya ta kare cikin bala'i, amma rubuce-rubucensa da gadon kimiyya da ya bari a sararin samaniya sun kasance har abada, suna da tasiri mai girma a tarihin ilimin dan Adam. Kundin taurarinsa na 'Zij-i Sultani' ya isa Turai, inda ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana taurari na zamanin Renaissance, musamman Tycho Brahe, kuma ya zama muhimmin tushen bayanai ga binciken masana na gaba. An lalata gidan lura da taurari na Samarkand bayan mutuwarsa, amma an tono ragowar sa a farkon karni na 20, wanda ya sake haskaka manyan nasarorinsa. Ana tuna Ulugh Beg a matsayin majagaba wanda ya aiwatar da binciken kimiyya da tunani mai hankali, fiye da mai mulki kawai. Rayuwarsa tana nuna alamar rikici tsakanin iko da ilimi, da kuma neman gaskiya mara iyaka na dan Adam. Nasarorinsa sun kuma yi tasiri ga masana kimiyya na Turai a lokacin Renaissance, suna nuna muhimmancin musayar ilimi tsakanin Gabas da Yamma. Wannan kuma ya yi daidai da gadon sauran manyan malamai a cikin wayewar Musulunci na zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Justinian I ya kasance Sarkin Daular Rum ta Gabas a karni na 6, wanda ya tattara Corpus Juris Civilis kuma ya yi kokarin sake gina daular.
key_achievements: Tattara Corpus Juris Civilis
Dawo da yankunan Arewacin Afirka da Italiya
Sake gina Hagia Sophia da ayyukan gine-gine
fact_box.legacy_statement: Kundin dokokinsa ya zama tushen tsarin shari'ar Yammacin Turai, kuma burinsa na sake gina daular ya yi tasiri sosai ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

justinian-i.epic:
A farkon karni na 6, Daular Rum ta Gabas ta ci gaba da rike iko a Gabas, tana kiyaye wayewarta da al'adunta masu karfi duk da faduwar Daular Rum ta Yamma. A cikin wannan zamani mai cike da rudani, Justinian I (ya yi mulki daga 527 zuwa 565) ya kasance Sarkin Daular Rum ta Gabas, wani babban mai mulki wanda ya yi burin sake gina daukakar Daular Rum. An haife shi a kusan shekara ta 482 AD a Tauresium (yanzu Arewacin Macedonia) a yankin Illyricum, a matsayin dan wani manomi mai tawali'u. Lokacin da kawunsa, Justin I, ya yi nasara a matsayin soja kuma ya hau karagar mulki, an gayyaci Justinian zuwa Constantinople, inda ya sami ilimi mai kyau kuma ya girma cikin sauri ya zama wani muhimmin mutum a cikin daular. Ya sami amincewar kawunsa kuma aka nada shi a matsayin mai mulki tare da shi, kuma bayan mutuwar Justin I a shekara ta 527, ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarkin Daular Rum ta Gabas, yana rike da babban burin dawo da tsohuwar daukakar Rum. Mulkinsa ya yi alkawarin sauye-sauye masu juyin juya hali a kowane fanni na daular, ciki har da dokoki, addini, soja, da gine-gine.

A farkon mulkin Justinian I, daular ta fuskanci babban kalubale. A watan Janairu na shekara ta 532, 'Tawayen Nika', wanda ya fara a matsayin rikici tsakanin magoya bayan tseren keken dawakai a babban birnin Constantinople, ya bazu cikin sauri ya zama babban tawaye ga sarki. Wannan ya wuce wani tawaye kawai; ya kasance kalubale ga ikon sarki, kuma ya kai ga wani yanayi mai ban tsoro inda fiye da rabin birnin ya kone kuma rayuka da yawa suka salwanta. Sarki ya fada cikin yanke kauna kuma ya yi tunanin guduwa, amma ya dawo da karfinsa saboda jajircewar Sarauniya Theodora, matarsa kuma mai mulki tare da shi. Theodora ta bar wata magana mai ban mamaki, 'Sarauta ita ce kabari mafi daukaka,' tana karfafa sarki, kuma Justinian ya tattara Janar Belisarius da Narses don murkushe tawayen da karfi. Wannan lamari ya zama babban darasi ga Justinian, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci wanda ya karfafa tushen mulkinsa, yana samar da dandamali don ci gaba da cimma babban burin sake gina daular.

Bayan shawo kan Tawayen Nika, Justinian I ya ci gaba da cimma babban burin 'Sake Gina Daular' (Restauratio Imperii). Ya aika da Janar Belisarius mai hazaka zuwa Yamma don fara yaki don dawo da yankunan tsohuwar Daular Rum ta Yamma. Daga 533 zuwa 534, ya yi nasarar cinye Masarautar Vandal a Arewacin Afirka, sannan daga 535 zuwa 554, ya yi dogon yaki mai tsanani da Ostrogoths a Italiya, inda ya dawo da yankin Italiya cikin daular. Wadannan yakin cin nasara sun haifar da babban asarar kudi da rayuka, amma sun nuna azamarsa ta dawo da daukakar Rum da aka taba rasa. A lokaci guda, ya fara wani aiki na tarihi na tsara dokokin Rum. Sakamakon wannan shine 'Dokokin Justinian' ko 'Corpus Juris Civilis', wanda ya tattara dokokin Rum masu yawa na tsawon karnoni, kuma ya zama tushen tsarin shari'ar Yammacin Turai na gaba. Bugu da kari, ya sake gina Hagia Sophia, wanda Tawayen Nika ya lalata, ya zama mafi girma da kyau fiye da da, yana nuna girman daular da kuma ibadarta. Duk da haka, 'Annobar Justinian', wacce ta fara a kusan shekara ta 541 a lokacin mulkinsa, ta mamaye dukkan daular, tana kashe rayuka da yawa kuma tana lalata tattalin arziki, wanda ya haifar da babban kalubale.

Mulkin Justinian I ya bar alama mai dorewa a tarihin Daular Rum ta Gabas. Mafi girman gadonsa shine, ba shakka, 'Corpus Juris Civilis'. Wannan kundin dokoki ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban dokoki a nahiyar Turai, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen dokokin farar hula na zamani. Hagia Sophia ta kasance mafi girman misali na gine-ginen Byzantine, tana alfahari da girman ta har zuwa yau. Ko da yake dawo da yankunan da ya yi ta hanyar yakin cin nasara bai dore ba bayan mutuwarsa, kuma daular ta fuskanci babban nauyi na kudi saboda tsadar yakin da annobar, ana tuna shi a matsayin babban sarki na karshe wanda ya yi kokarin sake gina daukakar Daular Rum. Rikicin da kokarin sake ginawa da Daular Rum ta Gabas ta fuskanta a zamaninsa sun nuna kamanceceniya da farfadowar Daular Rum da Charlemagne, Sarkin Yammacin Turai, ya yi mafarki a baya. An dauki Justinian I ba kawai a matsayin mai mulki ba, amma a matsayin mutum wanda ya bar gado mai dorewa ta hanyar dokoki, gine-gine, da burin soja.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ivan III na Rasha, Babban Yariman Moscow a ƙarshen ƙarni na 15, ya haɗa masarautun Rus' kuma ya kawo ƙarshen mulkin Tatar, inda ya kafa tushen ƙasa mai ƙarfi ta Rasha.
key_achievements: Haɗewar masarautun Rus' da faɗaɗa yanki
Haɗewar Jamhuriyar Novgorod (1478)
Kawo ƙarshen mulkin Tatar ta hanyar Babban Tsayawa a Kogin Ugra (1480)
Sake gina Kremlin na Moscow da tattara Sudebnik
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana ɗauke shi a matsayin babban mai mulki wanda ya mayar da Rus' mai rarrabuwa zuwa Rasha mai haɗin kai, yana kafa tushen Daular Rasha ta gaba.

ivan-iii-the-great.epic:
A tsakiyar ƙarni na 15, a ƙasar Rus' wadda ke fama da rarrabuwa da mulkin baƙi, **Ivan III na Rasha**, wanda aka fi sani da **Ivan Mai Girma**, an haife shi a shekara ta 1440 kuma ya yi mulki a matsayin Babban Yariman Moscow da mai mulkin dukkanin Rus' daga 1462 har zuwa rasuwarsa a 1505. A lokacin haihuwarsa, masarautun Rus' suna ƙarƙashin dogon mulkin Golden Horde, kuma kowace masarauta tana riƙe da ikon kanta, tana fafatawa da juna a cikin yanayi mai cike da rudani. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Ivan Mai Girma ya fuskanci gaskiya mai tsanani tun yana yaro. A matsayinsa na mai mulki tare da mai riƙon kwarya ga mahaifinsa, Vasily II, wanda ya rasa idanunsa, ya fahimci rikitarwa na gudanar da mulki da muhimmancin diflomasiyya tun da wuri. Wannan ya zama muhimmin tushe wanda ya sa ya ɗauki babban hangen nesa na haɗa masarautun Rus' da suka warwatse zuwa ƙasa mai ƙarfi guda ɗaya lokacin da ya zama Babban Yariman Moscow. Manufar mulkinsa ba kawai faɗaɗa yanki ba ce, har ma da dawo da asalin al'ummar Rus' da kuma kafa ikon kai daga karkashin mulkin baƙi.

Mulkin Ivan Mai Girma ya kasance tsari ne na ci gaba da faɗaɗawa da haɗewa a ƙarƙashin manufa bayyananna ta 'Tattara Ƙasashen Rus''. Ya yi amfani da ƙwarewar diflomasiyya, da'awar gado, da kuma ƙarfin soja mai ƙarfi lokacin da ake buƙata, don haɗa masarautun maƙwabta a ƙarƙashin ikon Moscow. Musamman, haɗewar Novgorod, wata jamhuriya mai ƙarfi ta kasuwanci, ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin muhimman sauye-sauye a mulkinsa. Novgorod ta yi tsayin daka sosai ga tsarin mulki na tsakiya na Moscow, kuma ko da bayan shan kashi a yaƙin Kogin Shelon a 1471, ta yi ƙoƙarin riƙe ikon kanta. Amma a 1478, Ivan Mai Girma ya hana Novgorod cikakken ikon kai, kuma ya kawo ƙararrawar veche, alamar su, zuwa Moscow, yana nuna cikakken ikonsa a alamance. Bayan haka, an haɗa masarautu da yawa kamar Yaroslavl da Rostov a jere, kuma a 1485, har ma Tver, babban abokin hamayya na ƙarshe na Moscow, ta shiga ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, yana ƙarfafa tushen haɗewar Rus'.

Kamar yadda faɗaɗa yanki ya kasance mai mahimmanci, haka kuma cire karkashin mulkin Golden Horde, wanda ya danne Rus' sama da ƙarni biyu, ya kasance mai mahimmanci a mulkin Ivan Mai Girma. A 1480, lokacin da Akhmat Khan na Golden Horde ya jagoranci babban sojoji don mamaye Rus' yana neman haraji, Ivan Mai Girma ya fuskanci sojojin Khan a Kogin Ugra. Wannan 'Babban Tsayawa a Kogin Ugra' ya ɗauki tsawon watanni da yawa, amma bangarorin biyu ba su yi wani yaƙi mai mahimmanci ba, kuma a ƙarshe sojojin Khan suka ja da baya. Wannan lamari ya kasance nasara ba tare da zubar da jini ba, kuma ya zama alamar tarihi da ta sanar da duniya cewa mulkin Tatar a kan Rus' ya ƙare. Ta haka ne Rus' ta sami damar dawo da cikakken ikon kanta kuma ta kafa matsayinta a matsayin ƙasa mai cin gashin kanta. Ivan Mai Girma kuma ya ƙarfafa tsarin mulki na tsakiya a cikin gida, ya iƙe ikon sarakuna, kuma ya gudanar da gyare-gyaren gudanarwa don gudanar da sabbin yankuna da aka haɗa yadda ya kamata, yana gina tushen ƙasa ta fuskoki daban-daban.

Gadon Ivan Mai Girma yana rayuwa a cikin ƙasa mai ƙarfi da asalin al'adu da ya gina. Ya auri Sophia Palaiologina, 'yar'uwar Constantine XI, sarkin ƙarshe na Daular Byzantine, don kafa Moscow a matsayin 'Roma ta Uku', kuma ya karɓi gaggafa mai kai biyu, alamar Byzantine, a matsayin alamar ƙasa ta Rasha, yana kafa matsayinsa a matsayin mai kare Cocin Orthodox. Ya gayyaci masu gine-gine na Italiya don sake gina Kremlin na Moscow zuwa babban sansanin soja da fada da muke gani a yau, yana ɗaukaka darajar Moscow. Bugu da ƙari, a 1497, ya tattara 'Sudebnik', tsarin dokoki guda ɗaya, don ƙarfafa tushen shari'a na ƙasa. Ivan Mai Girma ya gaji masarautu masu rarrabuwa, amma ya bar wa ɗansa, Vasily III, tushen ƙasa mai haɗin kai da ikon kai ta Rasha. Nasarorinsa sun zama muhimmin misali ga manyan masu mulkin Rasha na gaba kamar Peter Mai Girma da Catherine Mai Girma don ci gaba da haɓaka ƙasar.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ivan mai ban tsoro, Babban Sarkin Moscow kuma Tsar na farko na Rasha a karni na 16, ya gina daula amma ya azabtar da mutanensa da mulkinsa na zalunci.
key_achievements: Hawan gadon sarauta a matsayin 'Tsar na Dukan Rasha' na farko
Cin Khanate na Kazan da Astrakhan
Aiƙatar da mulkin ta'addanci na Oprichnina
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa tushen Daular Rasha, amma raunukan da mulkinsa na tashin hankali ya haifar sun kasance wani zurfin gado na tarihi.

ivan-iv-the-terrible.epic:
Ivan IV Vasilyevich (an haife shi a shekara ta 1530), wanda aka fi sani da Ivan mai ban tsoro, ya kasance Babban Sarkin Moscow kuma Tsar na farko na Rasha a tsakiyar karni na 16, wanda ya sassaƙa ƙasar zamanin da ya mai da ita daula mai tasowa, mai girma da ƙarfi. A shekara ta 1533, bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa Vasily III, ya hau gadon sarautar Moscow yana da shekaru uku kacal. Ya shafe yarintarsa a cikin makirce-makirce marasa adadi da gwagwarmayar iko na iyalai masu daraja na Boyar, waɗanda ke da yunwar mulki marar iyaka. Wannan yanayi ya dasa zurfin rashin amincewa da rashin hankali a cikin zuciyarsa, wanda ya zama tushen duhu na halinsa, kuma daga baya ya yi tasiri sosai ga salon mulkinsa. A shekara ta 1547, yana da shekaru goma sha shida, ya nada kansa 'Tsar na Dukan Rasha', yana shelanta sabon zamani. Wannan shi ne karo na farko a tarihin Rasha da aka yi amfani da taken 'Tsar' a hukumance, yana nuna cewa Babban Duchy na Moscow ya zama Tsar na Rasha. Da farko, ta hanyar aurensa da ƙaunatacciyar Anastasia Romanovna, ya sami kwanciyar hankali na tunani kuma ya kafa tushen mulkin gyara. 

 A farkon mulkinsa, Ivan mai ban tsoro ya fara jerin gyare-gyare don sabunta Rasha da kuma karfafa ikon tsakiya. Ya kira 'Zemsky Sobor', majalisar wakilai ta farko a Rasha, don tattara ra'ayoyin kabilu daban-daban. A shekara ta 1550, ya tattara sabon kundin dokoki, 'Sudebnik', don sake tsara tsarin shari'a da kuma gyara gudanarwar yankuna. Bugu da kari, ya karfafa karfin soji ta hanyar kafa 'Streltsy', wani karfi na sojoji masu dorewa. Bisa ga waɗannan gyare-gyare da karfin soji, ya fara fadada yankuna a waje. Musamman ma, ya ci Khanate na Kazan a 1552 da Khanate na Astrakhan a 1556, yana haɗa dukan yankin kogin Volga cikin yankin Rasha. Wannan ya buɗe hanya ga Rasha don shiga Siberiya kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mataki na zama daular kabilu da addinai daban-daban. Duk da haka, yakin Livonian, wanda ya fara a 1558 don samun damar shiga Tekun Baltic, ya daɗe kuma ya cinye karfin kasar. Kuma mutuwar bazata ta ƙaunatacciyar matarsa Anastasia a 1560 ta zama babban canji a rayuwarsa da mulkinsa. Ya yi imani da gaske cewa mutuwar matarsa ta faru ne saboda makircin Boyar na guba, kuma ya faɗa cikin baƙin ciki mai zurfi tare da fushi da rashin hankali marasa iyaka. 

 Bayan mutuwar Anastasia, mulkin Ivan mai ban tsoro ya zama mulkin ta'addanci da zalunci. A shekara ta 1565, ya ɗauki mataki na ban mamaki na raba ƙasar zuwa yankinsa na kai tsaye, 'Oprichnina', da kuma yankin gama gari, 'Zemshchina'. An kafa 'Oprichnina' da nufin karfafa cikakken ikon Tsar da kuma kawar da masu adawa. Kuma 'Oprichniki', masu gadin Tsar da ke sanye da baƙaƙen tufafi kuma suna amfani da kan kare da tsintsiya a matsayin alamarsu, sun yi wannan aikin. Oprichniki sun murkushe kuma sun kawar da dukan Boyar masu daraja da duk wanda ake zargi da cin amana a madadin Tsar. A shekara ta 1570, sun yi kisan kiyashi a dukan birnin Novgorod, inda suka kashe dubban mazauna, suna zarginsu da zama cibiyar tawaye. Wannan wani lamari ne mai ban tsoro wanda ya nuna cewa mulkinsa na ta'addanci ya kai kololuwa. Oprichnina ta haifar da babbar illa ga al'ummar Rasha da tattalin arzikinta, kuma an lalata yankuna da yawa. Lokacin da Tatars na Crimea suka mamaye kuma suka ƙone Moscow a 1571, Oprichniki sun kasa yin kariya mai inganci. A ƙarshe, a 1572, Ivan mai ban tsoro ya soke Oprichnina. Amma tuni an riga an bar raunuka masu zurfi ga ƙasa da mutanenta. 

 Shekarun ƙarshe na Ivan mai ban tsoro sun kasance cike da gazawar yaƙe-yaƙe da bala'o'i na kansa. Yaƙin Livonian, wanda ya daɗe shekaru da yawa, ya ƙare da shan kashi ga Rasha, yana kawo ƙarshen burin samun damar shiga Tekun Baltic, kuma an cinye ƙarfin ƙasar sosai. Mafi bala'i shine lamarin da ake zargi a 1581, inda ya kashe ɗansa kuma magajinsa, Ivan Ivanovich, a cikin tsananin fushi. Wannan lamarin ya nuna rashin kwanciyar hankalinsa a fili kuma ya jefa babban inuwa a kan makomar Rasha. Lokacin da ya rasu a 1584, Rasha ta faɗaɗa yankunanta, amma ta fuskanci lalacewar tattalin arziki saboda Oprichnina da yaƙe-yaƙe, rikice-rikicen zamantakewa, da kuma barazanar yaƙin basasa saboda matsalar maye gurbin (Zamanin Rikici). Ivan mai ban tsoro ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin mai mulki mai ƙarfi wanda ya canza Rasha daga ƙasa ta zamanin da zuwa daula kuma mai gyara wanda ya cimma ikon tsakiya. Amma a lokaci guda, ya bar gadon biyu na zalunci mai zubar da jini da kuma mai kisan kai mai rashin hankali. Salon mulkinsa da ƙoƙarinsa na ikon tsakiya sun yi tasiri ga sarakuna masu ƙarfi na Rasha na gaba kamar Peter Mai Girma. Kuma yana ba da muhimmiyar kwatance don bincika dangantakar iko da tashin hankali a tarihin Rasha.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mutum wanda ya yi mafarkin samun 'yancin kai a matsayin Hetman na Ukraine, ya yi adawa da Rasha, amma ya mutu a gudun hijira bayan shan kashi a yakin Poltava.
key_achievements: An zabe shi a matsayin Hetman na Zaporizhian Cossacks
Ya kafa zamanin zinare na al'adun Ukraine, 'Mazepa Baroque'
Ya yi yunkurin samun 'yancin kai na Ukraine daga Rasha
fact_box.legacy_statement: An yi masa lakabi da 'maciyi' a Rasha, amma ana tunawa da shi a matsayin wutar 'yancin kai na Ukraine.

ivan-mazepa.epic:
An haife shi a cikin gidan sarauta na Commonwealth ta Poland-Lithuania, kuma ya yi kuruciyarsa a fadar sarki a Warsaw. A can ya koyi siyasar Turai da diflomasiyya, amma zuciyarsa koyaushe tana kan mahaifarsa, Ukraine, a yankin kogin Dnieper. Bayan matsaloli da dama, ya koma kasar Cossack Hetmanate, kuma a shekara ta 1687, an zabe shi a matsayin Hetman na Zaporizhian Host. Wannan shine mafi girman daukaka a rayuwarsa kuma farkon mafi nauyin nauyi.

Fiye da shekaru 20, ya yi rantsuwar biyayya ga Tsar Peter Mai Girma na Rasha, kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin daya daga cikin amintattun mashawartansa. Ya taimaka masa wajen fadada daularsa, kuma a madadin haka, ya nemi a tabbatar da ikon cin gashin kai na Ukraine. A wannan lokacin, ya gina coci-coci da makarantu, ya tallafa wa fasaha, kuma ya bude zamanin zinare na al'adun Ukraine, wato zamanin 'Mazepa Baroque'. Amma a cikin zuciyarsa, wani babban buri, wato mafarkin cikakken kasa mai cin gashin kai, yana girma.

Lokacin sauyawar sa ya zo ne a lokacin Babban Yakin Arewa. Ya gane cewa manufofin Peter Mai Girma na tsakiya za su hana Ukraine cikakken ikon cin gashin kai. Ganin sojojin Rasha suna mamaye kasarsu da kuma tattara mutanensu, ya yanke shawarar cewa ba zai iya zama 'yar tsana ta Moscow ba kuma. Don haka ya yi wani caca mai hatsari. Ya yi kawance a asirce da Charles XII na Sweden, abokin gaba na Peter, kuma ya yanke shawarar jagorantar sojojinsa zuwa Ukraine don fara yakin 'yanci daga Rasha.

Amma kaddara ba ta tare da shi ba. Yakin da aka yi a Poltava a shekara ta 1709 ya kare da bala'i, kuma sojojin hadin gwiwa na Sweden-Cossack sun sha mummunar kashi. Ya gudu zuwa Daular Ottoman tare da sarkin da aka ci, kuma ba da dadewa ba ya mutu a kasar waje. Rasha ta kira shi 'maciyi' kuma ta la'anta shi, amma shi kawai ya sadaukar da komai don 'yancin kasarsa. Kodayake mafarkinsa ya rushe, amma gwagwarmayarsa ta kasance wutar 'yancin kai a cikin zukatan 'yan Ukraine a nan gaba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ivan Franko ya kasance marubucin Ukraine a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 a Daular Austriya, wanda ya fara adabin ƙasa kuma ya jagoranci gyaran zamantakewa.
key_achievements: Ya fara rubuta littafin binciken laifuka na farko da waƙoƙin zamani a Ukraine
Ayyukan siyasa bisa ra'ayoyin gurguzu da kuma ɗaurin kurkuku
Ya rubuta ayyuka fiye da 6,000, ciki har da waƙar almara 'Moses'
Ya kafa jam'iyyar Ukrainian Radical Party
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa da ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai wajen kafa asalin al'ummar Ukraine da kuma haɓaka ruhin 'yanci.

ivan-franko.epic:
Ivan Franko (1856-1916) ya kasance fitaccen mawaƙi, marubuci, mai sukar zamantakewa da adabi, ɗan jarida, mai fassara, masanin tattalin arziki, ɗan gwagwarmayar siyasa, kuma masanin al'adu na Ukraine a zamanin Daular Austriya. An ɗauke shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya fara rubuta littafin binciken laifuka na farko da waƙoƙin zamani a cikin adabin Ukraine. An haife shi a ranar 27 ga Agusta, 1856, a Nahuievychi, wani ƙaramin ƙauye a yankin Galicia, ɗan wani maƙeri. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna ƙishirwa ta musamman ga ilimi. Duk da talauci, mahaifinsa ya koya masa muhimmancin ilimi, kuma Franko ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a makarantar ƙauye. Da taimakon wasu, ya shiga makarantar sakandare (gymnasium) a Drohobych, inda ya zurfafa iliminsa a harsuna daban-daban kamar Ukrainian, Polish, Jamusanci, Latin, da Girkanci, tare da adabin gargajiya, ta hanyar karatu mai zurfi wanda ya kafa tushen adabi da tunaninsa. Tun daga wannan lokacin, hazakarsa ta fara bayyana a cikin waƙoƙi da gajerun labarai, kuma alkalaminsa ya zama kayan aiki don wakiltar muryar al'ummar da ake zalunta.

Da shigarsa Jami'ar Lviv, hangen nesa na Ivan Franko ya faɗaɗa sosai. A can, ya kamu da sha'awar ra'ayoyin gurguzu waɗanda suka mamaye duniyar masu ilimi ta Turai a lokacin, kuma ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da rayuwarsa don kare haƙƙin ma'aikata da manoma da ake zalunta. Waɗannan ayyukansa na zamantakewa masu tsauri sun jawo hankalin hukumomin Austro-Hungary, kuma an fara ɗaure shi a shekarar 1877 bisa zargin shiga cikin 'ƙungiyar gurguzu ta sirri'. Bayan haka, an ci gaba da kama shi da ɗaure shi sau da yawa. Amma bangon kurkuku mai sanyi da zalunci ba su karya imaninsa ko sha'awar kirkirarsa ba. Maimakon haka, a cikin waɗannan gwagwarmaya, ya haɓaka ruhin sukar zamantakewa mai kaifi, kuma ya yi amfani da abubuwan da ya fuskanta masu zafi don wayar da kan jama'a da kuma inganta ruhin juriya. Rubuce-rubucensa sun zama fiye da ayyakan adabi kawai; sun zama makami mai ƙarfi don gyaran zamantakewa da 'yantar da ƙasa.

Rayuwar Ivan Franko ta kasance gwagwarmaya ce ta ci gaba da rubutu. Ya bar ayyuka masu yawa fiye da 6,000 a tsawon rayuwarsa, waɗanda suka haɗa da waƙoƙi, littattafai, wasannin kwaikwayo, fassarori, da takardun ilimi. Ɗaya daga cikin fitattun ayyukansa, littafin tarihi mai suna 'Zakhar Berkut', ya tunatar da mutanen Ukraine game da ɗaukakar al'ummarsu ta baya da ruhin haɗin kai. Waƙar almara mai suna 'Moses' ta nuna zurfin wahalar shugaba da sadaukarwarsa wajen jagorantar al'ummarsa zuwa ƙasar alkawari. Baya ga ayyukansa na adabi, ya shiga cikin ayyukan siyasa, inda ya kafa 'Ukrainian Radical Party' a shekarar 1890, jam'iyyar siyasa ta zamani ta farko a Ukraine, wanda ya jagoranci wayar da kan siyasa ta ƙasa. Har ila yau, ya buga kuma ya gyara mujallu daban-daban don wakiltar muryar al'umma. A fannin ilimi, ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a matsayin masanin kimiyya, inda ya sami digirin digirgir (Ph.D.) daga Jami'ar Vienna a shekarar 1893, amma saboda ra'ayoyinsa na siyasa masu tsauri, an hana shi matsayin farfesa a Jami'ar Lviv, wanda ya nuna yadda ya yi gwagwarmaya da nuna bambancin zamantakewa.

A shekarunsa na ƙarshe, Ivan Franko ya sha wahala daga matsanancin talauci da cutar rheumatism. Hannayensa sun murɗe har ya kasa riƙe alkalami da kansa, amma bai daina kirkira ba har zuwa lokacin mutuwarsa, yana ba da umarni ga sakatarensa. A shekarar 1916, an ba shi lambar yabo ta Nobel a fannin adabi, amma ya rasu a ranar 28 ga Mayu na wannan shekarar, kafin ya sami damar karɓar lambar yabon. Ko da yake jikinsa ya mutu, ruhinsa da ayyukansa sun kasance a cikin zukatan mutanen Ukraine a matsayin 'ɗan juyin juya hali na har abada' kuma 'Kamenyar' (mai sassaƙa dutse). Adabinsa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa asalin al'ummar Ukraine da kuma inganta ruhin 'yanci, kuma har yau yana ci gaba da zama tushen kwarin gwiwa da alfahari ga 'yan Ukraine. Rayuwarsa da gwagwarmayarsa sun yi kama da wahalhalu da manufofin sauran masu gwagwarmayar 'yantar da ƙasa na zamaninsa, inda ya zama ginshiƙin ruhaniya ga al'ummomin da ake zalunta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ismail Gasprinsky ya kasance fitaccen masanin ilimi ɗan Tatar na Crimea a Daular Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci Jadidism da sauye-sauyen ilimi da jarida.
key_achievements: Jagorancin Jadidism da kawo sauyi a fannin ilimi
Kafa da buga jaridar 'Terjuman'
Ba da shawarar harshe ɗaya don haɗin kan al'ummomin Turkawa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai wajen kafa asalin zamani na al'ummomin Turkawa da kuma motsin 'yantar da ƙasa.

ismail-gasprinsky.epic:
Ismail Gasprinsky (1851-1914) ya kasance fitaccen masanin ilimi, mai kawo sauyi a fannin ilimi, kuma ɗan jarida ɗan Tatar na Crimea, wanda ya yi aiki a yankin Crimea na Daular Rasha a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19. Shekarar 1851, lokacin da aka haife shi, lokaci ne da Daular Rasha ke faɗaɗa yankunanta, tana samar da al'umma mai kabilu da addinai daban-daban, musamman ma yankin Crimea, tun bayan haɗewarsa da Rasha a 1783, al'adun Tatar da asalin su na fuskantar sauye-sauye masu girma. An haifi Gasprinsky a matsayin ɗan gidan sarauta a ƙauyen Avci, kusa da Bakhchysarai, kuma ya sami ilimin Musulunci na gargajiya tun yana yaro, inda ya koyi Larabci da Farisa. Daga baya, ya sami ilimin zamani na Yamma a Simferopol Gymnasium da kuma makarantar sojoji a Moscow, inda ya gina tushen ilimi mai faɗi. Wannan tushen ilimi biyu ya ba shi zurfin fahimta game da hanyar da al'ummarsa ya kamata ta bi a mahadar wayewar Gabas da Yamma, kuma ta hanyar karatunsa a Paris, ya fuskanci tunani da al'adun Yamma kai tsaye, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci da ya fahimci buƙatar zamantar da duniyar Turkawa-Musulunci.

A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Gasprinsky ya yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa Daular Usmaniyya da Masar, inda ya ga yadda wayewar Turkawa-Musulunci, wadda ta taɓa yin fice, ta yi nisa a baya idan aka kwatanta da wayewar Yamma, kuma hakan ya ba shi mamaki sosai. Ya gano cewa babban dalilin wannan koma baya shine rashin ci gaban ilimi da rarrabuwar kawuna a cikin al'umma, kuma ya fahimci buƙatar kawo sauye-sauye masu tsauri don shawo kan hakan. Wannan fahimta ta kai shi ga 'Jadidism' (Jadidi Movement). Jadidism wani motsi ne na kawo sauyi a fannin ilimi, al'adu, da siyasa wanda ya faru tsakanin al'ummomin Turkawa-Musulunci a cikin Daular Rasha daga ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, kuma yana nufin 'sabon hanya'. Gasprinsky ya soki tsohon tsarin ilimin madrasa (makarantar Musulunci) wanda ya dogara ga haddacewa kuma ba shi da inganci, kuma ya ba da shawarar sabon tsarin makaranta wanda zai koyar da ilimin duniya kamar kimiyya da labarin ƙasa, tare da ƙwarewar asali kamar karatu, rubutu, da lissafi. Duk da haka, shawarwarinsa na kawo sauyi sun jawo shakku daga gwamnatin Tsar, wadda ke fargabar yaɗuwar Pan-Turkism, kuma a lokaci guda, ya fuskanci tsayin daka daga malaman Musulunci masu ra'ayin mazan jiya waɗanda ke ɗaukar canjin al'ada a matsayin bidi'a. Duk da suka daga bangarorin biyu, ya yi imani da gaske cewa rayuwa da ci gaban al'umma sun dogara ne kawai ga wayewa ta hanyar ilimin zamani.

Bayan dogon gwagwarmaya, Ismail Gasprinsky ya cimma burinsa na kafa jarida, wata hanya mai ƙarfi don yaɗa ra'ayoyinsa. A shekarar 1883, ya kafa jaridar mako-mako mai suna 'Terjuman' (Mai Fassara), wadda ake bugawa da harshen Turkawa a Bakhchysarai, Crimea. Wannan jarida ta zama cibiyar haɗin kai ga al'ummomin Turkawa daban-daban da ke zaune a cikin yankuna masu faɗi na Daular Rasha. Gasprinsky ya ci gaba da yaɗa taken sa "Dilde, Fikirde, İşde Birlik – Haɗin Kai a Harshe, Tunani, da Aiki" ta hanyar amfani da harshe mai sauƙi da kowa zai iya fahimta. 'Terjuman' an rarraba ta a duk faɗin yankunan da Turkawa ke zaune, daga Balkans zuwa Kashgar a Tsakiyar Asiya, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai wajen haɓaka sabbin ra'ayoyin ilimi, buƙatar zamantakewa, da wayar da kan jama'a game da asalin ƙasa. Ya kuma jaddada muhimmancin ilimin mata, inda ya kafa mujallar mata mai suna 'Alem-i Nisvan' a shekarar 1905, da sauran ƙoƙarin kawo sauyi a cikin al'umma gaba ɗaya. Waɗannan ayyukansa sun ba da kwarin gwiwa sosai ga masana ilimi na Turkawa, kuma sun ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen haɓaka wayewar ƙasa ta zamani.

Ismail Gasprinsky ya rasu a shekarar 1914, yana da shekaru 63, jim kaɗan kafin barkewar Yaƙin Duniya na Farko da rugujewar manyan dauloli. Bayan mutuwarsa, irin sauye-sauyen da ya shuka a tsawon rayuwarsa sun yi girma sosai a lokacin juyin juya halin Rasha da kuma lokacin rikice-rikice da suka biyo baya. Masana ilimi na Turkawa waɗanda suka girma ta hanyar Jadidism da 'Terjuman' sun taka muhimmiyar rawa a cikin motsin 'yantar da ƙasa da kuma gina ƙasashe masu cin gashin kai a farkon ƙarni na 20. Ra'ayoyinsa na kawo sauyi a fannin ilimi sun yi tasiri sosai wajen kafa asalin zamani da haɓaka wayewar ƙasa ga al'ummomin Turkawa na Tsakiyar Asiya da Volga-Ural, kuma wannan ya kasance muhimmin gado har zuwa yau. Ana tuna shi a matsayin majagaba wanda ya buɗe hanyar gaba ga al'ummarsa ta hanyar ikon alkalami da ilimi. Ra'ayoyinsa sun yi daidai da na sauran masu kawo sauyi na Musulunci na zamani kamar masu kawo sauyi na Tanzimat na Daular Usmaniyya ko Muhammad Abduh na Masar, kuma ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin wani muhimmin mutum da ke wakiltar wayewar hankali a duniyar Musulunci ta zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin kimiyya a zamanin Daular Timur wanda ya koyi ilmin taurari da lissafi da kansa kuma ya bar manyan nasarori a gidan lura da taurari na Samarkand.
key_achievements: Ya lissafta pi zuwa lambobi 16 bayan digo
Ya rubuta 'Miftah al-Hisab' (Maɓallin Lissafi) kuma ya tsara juzu'i na goma
Ya kula da ginin gidan lura da taurari na Samarkand kuma ya tsara kayan aiki
fact_box.legacy_statement: Iliminsa na lissafi da ilmin taurari mai sabbin abubuwa ya zama ginshiƙin kimiyyar zamani kuma yana haskakawa har abada.

jamshid-al-kashi.epic:
An haife ni a birnin Kashan na Farisa, wanda ya fuskanci yaƙe-yaƙe masu ɓarna na Timur. Ko da yake lokaci ne na hargitsi, zuciyata koyaushe tana sha'awar tsarin sararin samaniya da kuma bayyanar lambobi. Ba tare da mai ɗaukar nauyi ko malami ba, na koyi ilmin taurari da lissafi da kaina, ina lura da taurari da daddare kuma ina lissafi da rana. A wannan lokacin, na rubuta littafin 'Matattakalar Sama' (Stairway to Heaven), wanda ke ɗauke da sha'awata ga asirin sararin samaniya, don gina tushen ilimi na.

Amma baiwa kaɗai ba ta iya magance yunwa. Dole ne in yi yawo a birane da yawa don neman masu ɗaukar nauyi waɗanda za su fahimci ilimi na kuma su tallafa wa bincike na. Ka'idojina da lissafina sun yi nisa da zamani, don haka mutane da yawa ba su fahimci darajarsu ba. Ci gaba da bincike a cikin talauci da rashin fahimta ya kasance gwagwarmaya mai kaɗaici, amma ban taɓa daina neman gaskiyar sararin samaniya ba. Takarda da tawada, da kuma taurarin sararin samaniya, su ne abokai na kaɗai.

Sai wata rana, wani canji mai girma ya faru a rayuwata. Yarima Ulugh Beg na Daular Timur, wanda ke son ilimi, ya ji labarin shahara ta kuma ya gayyace ni zuwa Samarkand. A can, ana gina wani gidan lura da taurari mafi girma a duniya. A ƙarshe, na sami wani wuri inda zan iya nuna baiwata gaba ɗaya. Tare da manyan masana na zamanin, kamar Qadi Zada al-Rumi, na kula da ginin gidan lura da taurari kuma na tsara sabbin kayan aikin lura, ina mai da hankali kan bincike dare da rana.

A Samarkand, na bar baya manyan nasarori na rayuwata. A cikin wani rubutu game da da'irar, na lissafta pi zuwa lambobi 16 bayan digo, wanda ya kafa tarihi da ba a karya ba tsawon shekaru 180. Bugu da ƙari, ta hanyar littafin 'Miftah al-Hisab' (Maɓallin Lissafi), na tsara juzu'i na goma, wanda ya kafa tushen lissafin zamani. Amma yayin da shahara ta ke ƙaruwa, haka ma kishi da makirci a fadar suka zurfafa, kuma na mutu a cikin yanayi mai ban mamaki. Ko da yake rayuwata ta ƙare ba zato ba tsammani, na yi imani cewa ilimin da na bari zai haskaka har abada kamar hasken taurari.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shoqan Walikhanov masanin Kazakh ne na karni na 19 a Daular Rasha wanda ya kafa tushen tarihin Kazakh na zamani da ilimin al'adu.
key_achievements: Na farko da ya rubuta wani ɓangare na almara na Kirgiz 'Manas'
Balaguron sirri zuwa Kashgar da rubuta rahotanni dalla-dalla
Ana girmama shi a matsayin uban tarihin Kazakh na zamani da ilimin al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Bincikensa ya ba da gudummawa ga kafa asalin ƙasar Kazakh, kuma an sanya sunansa ga Kwalejin Kimiyya ta Kazakh.

shoqan-walikhanov.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, yankin Asiya ta Tsakiya ya kasance cikin rudani na **Babban Wasan (Great Game)**, wata gasa ta siyasa tsakanin Daular Rasha da Daular Birtaniya. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, an haifi **Shoqan Walikhanov (1835-1865)** a matsayin masanin Kazakh, masanin al'adu, masanin tarihi, kuma soja. An haife shi a ranar 1 ga Nuwamba, 1835, a matsayin zuriyar wani Khan na Kazakh, sunansa na ainihi Muhammad Qanafiya ne, amma ya fi shahara da sunan laƙabi na mahaifiyarsa, 'Choqan'. Tun yana yaro ya nuna basira ta musamman, inda ya shiga makarantar sojoji ta Omsk a Rasha yana da shekaru 12, inda ya koyi ilimin Yamma kamar harshen Rasha, adabi, ilimin kasa, da ilimin soja. A nan, ya yi hulɗa da manyan masana Rasha irin su Fyodor Dostoevsky, inda ya faɗaɗa hangen nesansa na ilimi, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a kan sha'awarsa ta gaba don bincika tarihin al'ummarsa da al'adunsu ta hanyar kimiyya. A matsayinsa na memba na Daular Rasha, ya tsaya a mahadar wayewar Yamma da wayewar makiyaya ta Asiya ta Tsakiya, inda ya fara tafarkin ilimi na musamman wanda ya haɗa duniyoyi biyu. Wannan tushe nasa ya zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci don ya zama masani kuma mai bincike fiye da soja kawai.

Bayan kammala karatunsa a makarantar sojoji da kuma hidima a matsayin jami'in sojan Daular Rasha, Walikhanov ya sami damar bincika sassa daban-daban na Asiya ta Tsakiya. Ya wuce gona da iri na ayyukan soja kawai, inda ya riƙe hangen nesa na masani, yana rubuta da kuma nazarin duk abin da ya ci karo da shi. Wani muhimmin juyi a cikin aikinsa shi ne rubuta wani ɓangare na babban almara na baka na mutanen Kirgiz, wato **Manas**, a karon farko a shekarar 1856. Wannan ya ba da gudummawa mai zurfi ga kiyayewa da gabatar da al'adun makiyaya na Asiya ta Tsakiya ga masana. Daga baya, balaguron sirri zuwa Kashgar daga 1858 zuwa 1859 ya zama wani muhimmin al'amari wanda ya yada sunansa har zuwa da'irar masana Turai. Ya yi kama da ɗan kasuwa, ya rubuta dalla-dalla game da yanayin ƙasa, siyasa, al'adu, da tattalin arzikin Kashgar, wanda aka rufe sosai ga baƙi. Wannan rahoto ya zama wata muhimmiyar tushe wanda ya haskaka yankunan da ba a sani ba na Asiya ta Tsakiya ga duniyar Yamma a lokacin. Ta hanyar waɗannan bincike da ayyukan nazari, ya nuna ƙuduri mai ƙarfi don haskaka tarihin da al'adun mutanen Asiya ta Tsakiya ta hanyar da ta dace da kimiyya.

Bayan dawowarsa daga balaguron Kashgar, Walikhanov ya tafi St. Petersburg kuma ya shiga cikin Ƙungiyar Kasa ta Rasha (Russian Geographical Society), inda ya gabatar da sakamakon bincikensa. Ya nemi tabbatar da cewa Kazakhs da sauran mutanen Asiya ta Tsakiya ba kawai 'mutanen daji marasa wayewa' ba ne, amma halittu ne masu tarihi mai arziki da al'adu na musamman. Ya rubuta takardu masu zurfi game da tarihin Musulunci, alamun shamanism, da tsarin dokokin makiyaya, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ƙirƙirar taswirori masu inganci na Asiya ta Tsakiya. Ƙoƙarinsa na ilimi ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen haɓaka musayar ilimi tsakanin Gabas da Yamma da kuma isar da muryoyin mutanen Asiya ta Tsakiya ga duniyar ilimi. Duk da haka, rayuwarsa ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba. Rashin jin daɗi game da manufofin mulkin mallaka na Daular Rasha da kuma gazawar yunƙurinsa na gyara ga mutanen Kazakh sun haifar masa da baƙin ciki mai zurfi. Lafiyarsa ta tabarbare saboda dogon bincike da nazari, kuma a ƙarshe, cutarsa ta dindindin, tarin fuka, ta kama shi. Ya rasu a ranar 10 ga Afrilu, 1865, yana da shekaru 29 kacal.

Duk da gajeren rayuwarsa, Shoqan Walikhanov ya bar gado mai zurfi ga mutanen Kazakh. Ana kiransa **Uban Tarihin Kazakh na Zamani da Ilimin Al'adu**, inda ya taka rawa ta farko wajen kafa asalin mutanen Kazakh ta hanyar ilimi. Bincikensa ya zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci don kiyayewa da fahimtar tarihin da al'adun mutanen Kazakh, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana na gaba. A shekarar 1960, bayan mutuwarsa, Kwalejin Kimiyya ta Kazakh ta canza sunanta zuwa 'Ch.Ch. Valikhanov Kazakh Academy of Sciences' don girmama nasarorinsa. Wannan yana nuna a fili tasirinsa da matsayinsa na ilimi a tsakanin mutanen Kazakh. Rayuwar Walikhanov da nasarorinsa, tare da ƙoƙarin wasu masana da suka nemi bincika da kiyaye asalin ƙasa a lokacin rudani na Asiya ta Tsakiya, kamar Abai Qunanbaiuly, suna ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai har zuwa yau.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Kassia wata waliyya ce, mawaƙiya, kuma marubuciyar waƙoƙi ta Daular Byzantine a ƙarni na 9, wadda ta kare imani da fasaha a lokacin rikicin Iconoclasm.
key_achievements: Kafa gidan sufi a Constantinople
Rubuta waƙoƙin yabo kusan 50
Kare imani a lokacin rikicin Iconoclasm
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ɗaya daga cikin mata marubuta waƙoƙi na farko da aka rubuta, kuma ana girmama ta a matsayin waliyya a Cocin Orthodox na Gabas.

kassia.epic:
Kassia (an haife ta kusan shekara ta 810) wata waliyya ce ta Cocin Orthodox na Gabas, fitacciyar mawaƙiya kuma marubuciyar waƙoƙi, kuma shugabar mata masu ibada, wadda aka haifa a farkon ƙarni na 9 a Constantinople, babban birnin Daular Byzantine. A wancan lokacin, Daular Byzantine tana bunƙasa a mahadar wayewar Gabas da Yamma, tana gadon al'adun tsohuwar Roma, amma kuma tana girgiza saboda tsananin muhawarar tauhidi da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa. Musamman ma, rikicin Iconoclasm ya shafi dukkan sassan al'ummar daular sosai. An haifi Kassia a cikin dangi mai arziki da daraja, kuma ta girma tana samun ilimi mafi kyau na zamaninta. Ta fito fili tun da wuri a matsayin mutum mai ilimi mai faɗi da basirar fasaha, wanda ya haɗa da adabin gargajiya, falsafa, tauhidi, da kuma kiɗa da waƙa. Wannan tushe ya zama muhimmin ginshiƙi ga gudummawar da ta bayar daga baya ga al'adun Byzantine da ci gaban tauhidi. Hankalinta da basirar fasaharta sun ƙara zurfafa a cikin yanayin ilimi mai cike da kuzari na Constantinople, wanda ya samar da ainihin asalin da ya gudana a duk rayuwarta da ayyukanta.

Wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwar Kassia ya zo a shekara ta 821 ko farkon shekarun 830, lokacin da aka gayyace ta zuwa zaɓin amarya ga Sarki Theophilos. A wancan lokacin, sarki ya tattara mata mafi kyau da hankali a cikin daular don zaɓar sarauniyarsa ta gaba, kuma Kassia tana ɗaya daga cikin manyan 'yan takara. Lokacin da sarki ya kusanci Kassia ya ce, "Ta hanyar mace ne abubuwa marasa kyau suka fito," yana nufin Hauwa'u, Kassia ba tare da jinkiri ba ta amsa, "Amma kuma ta hanyar mace ne abubuwa mafi girma suka fito," tana nufin Budurwa Maryamu. Wannan amsa mai ƙarfin hali da wayo ta ba sarki mamaki, kuma wasu rubuce-rubuce sun nuna cewa yayin da yake sha'awar hankalinta da mutuncinta, ya kuma ji nauyin halinta mai ƙarfi. A ƙarshe, sarki ya zaɓi wata mace, Theodora, a matsayin sarauniya, kuma wannan lamari ya zama wani muhimmin dalili ga Kassia ta zaɓi hanyar ruhaniya maimakon ikon duniya da ɗaukakar sarauta. Wannan gogewa ta ƙara ƙarfafa imaninta mai zurfi da 'yancin kai na hankali.

Kassia, wadda ta zaɓi hanyar bautar Ubangiji maimakon hanyar sarauta, ta kafa gidan sufi mai suna da sunanta a Constantinople kusan shekara ta 843 kuma ta zama shugabar mata masu ibada ta farko. Wannan gidan sufi bai kasance mafaka kawai a gare ta ba. Ya kasance wuri mai tsarki na imani da ilimi inda za ta iya bayyana cikakken hankalinta da basirar fasaharta. A nan, Kassia ta rubuta waƙoƙi masu yawa, ta tsara kiɗa don hidimar Cocin Orthodox na Gabas, kuma ta bayyana zurfin tunanin tauhidi a rubuce. Rayuwarta ta zo daidai da lokacin rikicin Iconoclasm wanda ya mamaye Daular Byzantine. Rikicin Iconoclasm ya kasance rikici na tauhidi da siyasa game da ko girmama gumaka bautar gumaka ne, wanda ya raba al'ummar daular kuma ya haifar da wahala mai yawa. Kassia ta goyi bayan girmama gumaka sosai kuma an tsananta mata saboda hakan. Duk da haka, ba ta yi sulhu da imaninta ba; maimakon haka, ta mayar da waɗannan gwagwarmayar addini da yaƙe-yaƙe na ruhaniya zuwa fasaha. Waƙoƙinta kusan 50 da kuma rubuce-rubuce masu yawa sun nuna imaninta marar girgiza da hikimarta da ta nemi ta kiyaye a cikin zamanin rikici. Musamman ma, 'Waƙar Kassiani,' wadda ake rera a lokacin Makon Mai Tsarki, tana motsa mutane da yawa har zuwa yau ta hanyar rera game da rahamar Allah marar iyaka ta hanyar tuba ta mace mai zunubi.

Kassia ta rasu kafin shekara ta 865, amma kiɗanta da waƙoƙinta sun rayu fiye da lokaci, sun zama muhimmin sashi na al'adun Byzantine. Ana tuna ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mata marubuta waƙoƙi na farko da aka rubuta a tarihi, kuma Cocin Orthodox na Gabas tana girmama ta a matsayin waliyya, tana kiyaye ranar 7 ga Satumba a kowace shekara a matsayin ranar tunawa da ita. Rayuwar Kassia shaida ce mai ƙarfi cewa ko da a cikin iyakokin kasancewar mace da zaluncin zamaninta, mutum zai iya bayyana kansa kuma ya bar gado na har abada ta hanyar imani, fasaha, da hankali. Ayyukanta ba wai kawai sun yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kiɗan hidimar Byzantine ba, har ma ana ɗaukar su a matsayin muhimmin misali da ke nuna iyawar hankali da ruhaniya na mata. Labarin Kassia, kamar na Anna Komnene, wata babbar mace mai ilimi da falsafa ta zamanin Byzantine, yana sa mu yi tunani a kan rayuwar mutanen da suka bunƙasa imaninsu da basirarsu ko da a cikin lokuta masu rikici.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Constantine XI Palaiologos shi ne Sarkin sarakuna na ƙarshe na Daular Byzantine a ƙarni na 15, wanda ya mutu jarumtaka a lokacin faɗuwar Constantinople.
key_achievements: Faɗaɗa yankin mulki a matsayin Despot na Morea
Jagorantar kare Constantinople na ƙarshe
Mutuwa a yaƙi da Daular Ottoman
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mutuwarsa ta nuna ƙarshen Daular Byzantine mai shekaru dubu da kuma ƙarshen Zamanin Tsakiya.

constantine-xi-palaiologos.epic:
Constantine XI Palaiologos (ya yi mulki 1449-1453) shi ne Sarkin sarakuna na ƙarshe na Daular Byzantine, wani mutum mai ban tausayi wanda ya kunna wutar ƙarshe ta daular mai shekaru dubu. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 15, Daular Byzantine ta rasa ɗaukakarta ta baya kuma Daular Ottoman ta kewaye ta, tana riƙe da babban birninta, Constantinople, da wasu yankuna kaɗan da aka ware. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, ya girma a Despotate na Morea, wanda ke kan yankin Peloponnese, ba a babban birnin daular ba. A matsayinsa na Despot na Morea, ya nuna kansa a matsayin shugaba mai kuzari da ƙwarewa, yana faɗaɗa yankin mulkin Byzantine kuma ya sake gina tsohuwar katangar Hexamilion. Katangar Hexamilion wata katanga ce ta tsaro da ta ratsa Isthmus na Korint a arewacin Peloponnese, tana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kare yankin daga mamayewar waje. Wannan ya kasance wani haske na nasara da ba kasafai ake gani ba a lokacin raguwar daular, kuma ya nuna tun da wuri ƙwarewar sojansa da jajircewarsa da za su ayyana kwanakinsa na ƙarshe. An haife shi a lokacin da makomar daular ke rataye a kan igiya, kuma an ƙaddara masa ya ɗauki nauyin wannan makoma a kan kafadunsa.

Bayan rasuwar ɗan'uwansa, Sarkin sarakuna John VIII Palaiologos, wanda ba shi da magada, a shekara ta 1448, Constantine XI ya hau gadon sarauta a Mistras a ranar 6 ga Janairu, 1449. Abin da ya gada birni ne mai cike da yanke kauna da daula da ke cikin haɗari. Babban ƙalubalensa shi ne Sultan Mehmed II na Ottoman, wani matashi mai buri wanda ya damu da cinye Constantinople. Mehmed II ya riga ya gina katangar Rumeli Hisarı a kan Bosphorus, yana toshe babban birnin. Constantine XI ya yi ƙoƙari sosai don samun goyon bayan soja daga Yammacin Turai. Wannan ya zo da farashin haɗin kai da Cocin Katolika, wani mataki da ba a so sosai a tsakanin mabiya Orthodox da limamai. Sakamakon haka, yayin da maƙiya ke taruwa a ƙofar birnin, rarrabuwar kawuna ta addini da siyasa ta ƙaru a cikin daular, wanda ya zama ƙalubale mai wuyar warwarewa a duk lokacin mulkinsa.

Yaƙin ƙarshe na ƙaddara ya fara a ranar 6 ga Afrilu, 1453. Constantine XI ya fuskanci babbar rundunar Ottoman mai kimanin sojoji 80,000 da manyan bindigogi, tare da ƙaramin rundunar sojoji kusan 7,000, ciki har da ƙananan rukunoni daga Genoa da Venice. Tsawon kwanaki 53, ya jagoranci kare birnin da jajircewa mara gajiya da jagoranci na musamman. Da kansa ya duba tsohuwar katangar Theodosian, ya ƙarfafa sojoji, kuma ya shiga yaƙi a sahun gaba. A cikin harin bindigogi na Ottoman marar yankewa, ya kula da gyaran katangar da gaggawa, kuma ya shirya mutanen da suka haɗu a cikin rikicin, duk da bambancin imaninsu, don yin gwagwarmaya ta ƙarshe mai jaruntaka don birnin mai shekaru dubu. Duk da wannan sadaukarwar da ya yi, bambancin ƙarfin sojoji da na bindigogi ya yi yawa don shawo kansa, kuma birnin yana rugujewa a hankali.

A safiyar ranar 29 ga Mayu, 1453, a lokacin harin ƙarshe na Ottoman, an karya layin tsaron birnin. An ce Constantine XI, da ya fahimci cewa komai ya ƙare, ya cire alamun sarautarsa kuma ya jagoranci sauran sojojinsa zuwa wani hari na ƙarshe mai tsanani a kan rundunar maƙiya mai zuwa. Ba a taɓa gano gawarsa ba, kuma wannan gaskiyar ta kai shi ga tatsuniyar 'Sarkin Marmara' wanda zai dawo wata rana don dawo da birnin. Mutuwarsa ta kasance wani muhimmin al'amari da ya nuna ƙarshen Daular Roma gaba ɗaya, kuma wani muhimmin lokaci na tarihi da ya nuna ƙarshen Zamanin Tsakiya. Ana tuna Constantine XI a matsayin jarumi wanda ya yi yaƙi har zuwa ƙarshe don daularsa da mutanensa, duk da yanayin da ke cike da yanke kauna. Ƙarshensa mai ban tausayi za a iya kwatanta shi da makomar sauran shugabannin ƙarshe na dauloli da ke fuskantar halaka, kamar Romulus Augustulus, Sarkin sarakuna na ƙarshe na Yammacin Daular Roma, ko King Bojang na Goguryeo.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Kublai Khan ya kasance Babban Khan na Daular Mongol a ƙarni na 13 kuma Sarki na farko na Daular Yuan, wanda ya haɗa China kuma ya gina daula mai al'adu daban-daban.
key_achievements: Haɗa babban yankin China ta hanyar cin nasara a kan Daular Song ta Kudu
Kafa Daular Yuan da kuma komawa babban birni zuwa Dadu (Beijing)
Haɓaka tattalin arziki ta hanyar inganta tsarin gidan waya da faɗaɗa Babban Kogi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya haɓaka musayar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yamma kuma ya gabatar da tsarin mulkin kabilu daban-daban, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga dauloli na gaba.

kublai-khan.epic:
Kublai Khan (1215-1294), Babban Khan na Daular Mongol kuma Sarki na farko na Daular Yuan ta China, ya gina daula mai girma wacce ta haɗa Gabas da Yamma, ya bar tasiri mai zurfi a tarihin duniya. An haife shi a matsayin jikan Genghis Khan kuma ɗa na huɗu ga Tolui, ya girma a cikin al'adun makiyaya na tsaunukan Mongol. Amma, tare da hikimar mahaifiyarsa, Sorgaqtani Beki, da kuma zurfin fahimtar al'adun China, ya mallaki halayen mai mulki wanda ya wuce na mai cin nasara kawai tun yana ƙarami. Yarintarsa ta kasance lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali yayin da Daular Mongol ke faɗaɗa yankunanta, kuma a cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, ya haɓaka iyawarsa a hankali. Ya sami gogewar mulki mai amfani ta hanyar gudanar da yankin Arewacin China a ƙarƙashin mulkin ɗan'uwansa, Möngke Khan, kuma wannan ya zama ginshiƙi mai mahimmanci a gare shi don haɗa babban yankin China da kafa sabuwar daula daga baya. Ya fara ɗaukar hangen nesa na haɗa ƙarfin sojan Mongol da hikimar wayewar China.

A shekara ta 1259, lokacin da Möngke Khan ya mutu ba zato ba tsammani yayin yaƙin neman zaɓe na Daular Song ta Kudu, Daular Mongol ta fuskanci wani babban canji. Kublai Khan dole ne ya shiga cikin yaƙin basasa mai zafi da ɗan'uwansa Ariq Böke don neman matsayin Babban Khan. Wannan yaƙin, wanda aka fi sani da 'Yakin Kublai-Ariq Böke', ya ɗauki tsawon shekaru huɗu, kuma ya kasance gwagwarmayar iko a cikin Daular Mongol da kuma rikici tsakanin al'adun makiyaya da na zama. Kublai Khan ya yi nasara ta hanyar amfani da albarkatu da ma'aikata daga Arewacin China, kuma a ƙarshe ya tabbatar da matsayinsa na Babban Khan a shekara ta 1264. Wannan nasara ta kasance farkon wani sabon zamani, yana nuna cewa Daular Mongol ba za ta ƙara tsaya ga ayyukan cin nasara kawai ba, amma dole ne ta ci gaba zuwa wani zamani na mulkin yankunan da aka ci nasara cikin kwanciyar hankali. Bayan ya zama Babban Khan, babban burinsa shine haɗa China da ta rabu. Daular Song ta Kudu, wacce ta yi nasarar kare kai daga hare-haren Mongol tsawon shekaru da dama, har yanzu tana da ƙarfi, kuma cin nasara a kanta ya zama wajibi don tabbatar da halaccin mulkinsa.

Kublai Khan, da yake amfani da ikonsa na Babban Khan, ya mai da hankali sosai kan cin nasara a kan Daular Song ta Kudu. Ya matsa wa Daular Song ta Kudu lamba ta hanyar ci gaba da ayyukan soja tare da ƙoƙarin diflomasiyya, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1279, ya ci nasara a kan Daular Song ta Kudu gaba ɗaya, ya cimma babban nasara na haɗa babban yankin China bayan shekaru 300. Ta haka, ya tabbatar da matsayinsa a matsayin sarki wanda sama ta ba shi izini, ba kawai Babban Khan na Mongol ba. Ya koma babban birninsa daga Karakorum a tsaunukan Mongol zuwa Dadu (Beijing na yau), kuma a shekara ta 1271, ya bayyana sunan daularsa a matsayin 'Da Yuan', yana mai bayyana aniyarsa ta gina sabuwar daula wacce ta haɗa al'adun makiyaya da al'adun noma na China. A matsayinsa na sarki, ya yi ƙoƙari iri-iri don tabbatar da zaman lafiya da wadata a cikin daular. Ya karɓi tsarin mulkin China da gaske, ya ɗauki ma'aikata masu basira daga kabilu daban-daban, kuma don haɗa daular mai faɗi yadda ya kamata, ya inganta tsarin gidan waya (驛站制度) kuma ya faɗaɗa Babban Kogi don haɓaka jigilar kaya da kasuwanci. Bugu da ƙari, ya yi ƙoƙari don daidaita tattalin arziki ta hanyar yaɗa kuɗin takarda, 'Jiaochao' (交鈔), kuma fadar mulkinsa ta zama wani wuri na duniya inda addinai da al'adu daban-daban suka haɗu, har ma matafiyi ɗan Italiya Marco Polo ya ziyarta kuma ya sanar da Yamma game da arzikinta da haƙurinta.

Amma, ƙarshen mulkin Kublai Khan ya cika da gwaji. Hare-hare biyu da ya kai Japan sun gaza gaba ɗaya saboda guguwa da ake kira 'Kamikaze', kuma hare-hare da ya kai Vietnam (Dai Viet) da Java ma ba su kawo wata babbar nasara ba, wanda ya haifar da asarar ƙarfin ƙasa mai yawa. A matsayinsa na mutum, mutuwar matarsa ƙaunatacciya Chabi da ɗansa Zhenjin, wanda ya zaɓa a matsayin magajinsa, ya jefa shi cikin baƙin ciki da rashin bege mai zurfi. Ya rufe idanunsa a shekara ta 1294, ya bar baya wata daula mai faɗi da kuma hadaddiyar daula mai kabilu daban-daban. Ko da yake Daular Yuan da ya kafa ba ta daɗe ba fiye da shekaru 100 kafin ta rushe, za a tuna da Kublai Khan a tarihi a matsayin mai mulkin da ya haɗa Gabas da Yamma, kuma ya gina babban daula wacce ta haɗa al'adu daban-daban. Hanyar mulkinsa da manufofinsa na haɗa al'adu sun ba da darasi mai mahimmanci ga masu mulkin Daular Ming da Qing daga baya, kuma yana ba mu damar ganin manufofinsa na musamman idan aka kwatanta da masu gina sauran manyan dauloli na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata gimbiya ta Rus' ta Kiev wacce ta zama Sarauniyar Faransa, ta haɗa al'adun Gabas da Yamma, kuma ta yi mulkin masarautar a matsayin mai mulkin rikon kwarya.
key_achievements: Yaɗa al'adun Gabas a matsayin Sarauniyar Faransa
Haihuwar yarima Philip na Farko da sauran yarima
Mulkin rikon kwarya ga ɗanta ƙarami Philip na Farko
fact_box.legacy_statement: An tuna da ita saboda rawar da ta taka a matsayin gada ta al'adu mai haɗa duniyar Gabas da Yamma da kuma gudummawar da ta bayar ga masarautar Faransa.

anne-of-kyiv.epic:
An haife ta a matsayin 'yar Yaroslav Mai Hikima, Babban Yarima na Rus' ta Kiev mai girma. Garinsu na Kiev wuri ne da ilimi da fasaha suka bunƙasa, kuma a can ta koyi harsuna da yawa, ta karanta kuma ta rubuta, ta kuma gina iliminta. Kamar yadda 'yan uwanta mata suka auri sarakunan Scandinavia da Hungary, haka ma ƙaddararta ita ce ta ɗaukaka matsayin Rus' ta hanyar auren diflomasiyya. Labari ya zo cewa Sarki Henry na Farko na Franks, wanda ke nesa a yamma, yana neman sabuwar sarauniya bayan rasuwar sarauniyarsa ta farko, kuma jakadunsa sun yi tafiya mai nisa zuwa garinsu.

Tafiyarta ta kasance mai tsawo da wahala. Bayan ta yi tafiyar dubban kilomita, a shekara ta 1051, ta auri Henry na Farko a Babban Coci na Reims kuma ta zama Sarauniyar Faransa. Amma fadar Faransa da ta fuskanta ta bambanta sosai da abin da take tsammani. Idan aka kwatanta da al'adun Kiev masu kyau da nagarta, wannan wuri ya zama mai sauƙi da rashin daɗi. Har ma ta yi mamakin ganin cewa yawancin manyan mutane, ciki har da sarki, ba su iya karatu ba. Ta kawo littafin addu'a da aka rubuta da rubutun Cyrillic, kuma sa hannunta 'Anna Regina' ya kasance abin da ba kasafai ake samu ba a lokacin, an rubuta shi tare da takardun sarki, yana nuna iliminta da tasirinta.

A matsayinta na sarauniya, babban aikinta shi ne haihuwar magaji. Ta haifi 'ya'ya maza Philip, Robert, da Hugh, kuma musamman sunan Philip, shi ne sunan da ta fara gabatarwa ga masarautun Yammacin Turai. Ta yi amfani da iliminta a fadar don ba da shawara ga sarki, kuma kasancewarta ta zama alama mai haɗa duniyar Cocin Orthodox na Gabas da duniyar Cocin Katolika na Yamma. Amma farin ciki bai daɗe ba, kuma lokacin da mijinta Henry na Farko ya rasu a shekara ta 1060, ɗanta Philip na Farko mai shekaru takwas ya hau gadon sarauta. A matsayinta na sarauniya 'yar ƙasar waje, ta ɗauki nauyin zama mai mulkin rikon kwarya ga ɗanta.

A matsayinta na mai mulkin rikon kwarya, ta yi mulkin masarautar tare da Baldwin na Biyar na Flanders. Ta yi amfani da hikimar siyasa don ƙoƙarin kiyaye zaman lafiyar masarautar. Amma sake aurenta da Raoul na Hudu na Valois ya haifar da babban abin kunya. Tun da shi yana da mata, aurensu ya haifar da korar coci daga Paparoma. Saboda wannan lamari, dole ne ta janye daga fadar na ɗan lokaci, amma bayan rasuwar Count Raoul, ta sami gafara daga ɗanta Philip na Farko kuma ta koma fadar. An girmama ta a matsayin Sarauniya Uwa ta Faransa har zuwa lokacin ƙarshe na rayuwarta, ta kawo ƙarshen rayuwarta a matsayin gada mai haɗa duniya biyu, daga gimbiya ta Gabas zuwa sarauniya ta Yamma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Olga of Kyiv ta kasance mai mulkin rikon kwarya na Kyivan Rus' a karni na 10, kuma majagaba ce a ramuwar gayya ga Drevlians da kuma karɓar Kiristanci.
key_achievements: Ramuwar gayya ga Drevlians saboda kisan mijinta
Mulki a matsayin mai mulkin rikon kwarya na Kyivan Rus'
Ita ce mai mulkin Rus' ta farko da ta karɓi Kiristanci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin waliyya wadda ta kafa tushen Kyivan Rus' kuma ta shimfiɗa harsashin yaɗuwar Kiristanci.

olga-of-kyiv.epic:
Olga of Kyiv ta kasance mai mulkin rikon kwarya na Kyivan Rus' a tsakiyar karni na 10, kuma ta taka rawar gani wajen haɗa kan ƙabilun Slavic na Gabas masu rikici da kuma kafa tushen kasa. Ba a san ainihin shekarar haihuwarta ba, amma an yi imanin an haife ta a yankin Pskov a ƙarshen karni na 9 ko farkon karni na 10. A lokacin, Kyivan Rus' wata sabuwar kasa ce da mutanen Rus' na Viking suka kafa ta hanyar haɗa kan ƙabilun Slavic na Gabas, kuma ƙabilu daban-daban suna da alaƙa da juna ta hanyar biyan haraji. A cikin wannan yanayi, Olga ta auri Grand Prince Igor I na Kyiv kuma ta zama Grand Princess, inda ta taka muhimmiyar rawa a cibiyar siyasar Rus'. Rayuwarta ba ta tsaya ga matsayin gimbiya kawai ba, amma ta fara nuna halayen shugaba mai ƙarfi a cikin raƙuman ruwa na zamanin da ke cike da tashin hankali. Wannan lokaci ne na canji inda ake neman sabon tsarin kasa, kuma Olga ta gina makomarta a tsakiyar wannan canji.

Wani babban canji a rayuwarta ya faru a shekara ta 945. Mijinta, Igor I, ya fuskanci turjiya kuma an kashe shi da mugunta lokacin da ya yi ƙoƙarin karɓar haraji mai yawa daga ƙabilar Drevlians. Tun da ɗanta ƙarami, Sviatoslav, bai kai shekarun da zai gaji sarauta ba, Olga ta karɓi mulkin Kyivan Rus' a matsayin mai mulkin rikon kwarya. Amma aikin ta na farko ba mulki ba ne, sai dai ramuwar gayya ga mutuwar mijinta. Bayan mutuwar Grand Prince Igor, Drevlians sun aika da jakadu suna ba Olga shawarar ta auri yarimansu, amma Olga ta yi amfani da dabara don aiwatar da ramuwar gayya mai zafi. An binne jakadu na farko da rai, kuma an ƙone na biyu har lahira a cikin gidan wanka. Daga baya, ta tafi Iskorosten, babban birnin Drevlians, a kan dalilin jana'izar mijinta, kuma a can ta kashe mutane dubu biyar bayan ta bugu da shugabannin Drevlians. A ƙarshe, ta kewaye birnin, ta nemi kowane gida ya ba da tattabaru da tsuntsaye a matsayin haraji, sannan ta ɗaure sulfur a ƙafafun tsuntsayen kuma ta kunna wuta, ta mai da birnin toka. Wannan jerin ramuwar gayya ya nuna ƙarfinta da dabara.

Bayan ta tabbatar da ikonta ta hanyar ramuwar gayya, Olga ta mai da hankali kan mulki mai dorewa da kafa tsarin kasa a Kyivan Rus'. Ta zagaya ko'ina cikin Rus', ta gyara tsarin haraji, kuma ta kafa cibiyoyin gudanarwa da kasuwanci da ake kira 'Pogost'. Pogost sun kasance cibiyoyin karɓar haraji da gudanar da shari'a, kuma wannan wani muhimmin gyara ne wanda ya zama tushen rabe-raben gudanarwa na jihar Kyivan Rus' a nan gaba. Waɗannan gyare-gyare sun nuna ƙoƙarinta na haɗa kan ƙabilun da suka warwatse zuwa tsarin mulki na tsakiya. Ɗaya daga cikin muhimman abubuwan da suka faru a lokacin mulkinta shi ne ziyarar da ta kai Constantinople, babban birnin Daular Byzantine, a kusan shekara ta 957, inda ta yi baftisma a matsayin Kirista. Ta karɓi sunan baftisma 'Helena (Elena)', kuma wannan wani tarihi ne na farko da wani mai mulkin Rus' ya karɓi Kiristanci a hukumance. Ko da yake a lokacin al'ummar Kyivan Rus' har yanzu addinin arna ne ke mamaye, har ma ɗanta Sviatoslav ya yi adawa da karɓar Kiristanci, Olga ta fahimci dabi'un Kiristanci kuma ta yanke wani shawarar majagaba mai hangen nesa. Ta tsaya tsayin daka kan imaninta duk da rikicin al'adu tsakanin al'adun arna da dabi'un Kiristanci.

Mulkin Olga of Kyiv ya bar sawun da ba za a taɓa gogewa ba a tarihin Kyivan Rus'. Daga wata bazawara mai cike da ramuwar gayya, ta zama mai mulki mai hikima wadda ta gyara tsarin gudanarwa na kasa kuma ta kafa tushen tsarin mulki na tsakiya. Musamman ma, ta hanyar zama mai mulkin Rus' ta farko da ta karɓi Kiristanci, ta kafa tushen ruhaniya da al'adu mai mahimmanci ga jikanta, Vladimir Mai Girma, don ya ayyana Kiristanci a matsayin addinin kasa na Kyivan Rus' a nan gaba. Imaninta na majagaba ya sa aka mai da ita 'Saint Olga' a cikin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas kuma ana girmama ta har yau. Rayuwarta ta wuce gwagwarmayar neman iko kawai, ta nuna misali na shugabar mata mai ƙarfi wadda ta ba da gudummawa wajen samar da asalin da makomar kasa. Ana ɗaukar Olga a matsayin mutumin da ya ƙirƙiri tsari daga cikin hargitsi, kuma ya buɗe hanyar wayewa ta hanyar karɓar sabon addini. Labarinta yana kwatanta da rayuwar sauran sarauniyoyi masu ƙarfi ko masu mulkin rikon kwarya a Turai ta Tsakiya, kuma ya kasance muhimmin misali wajen binciken rawar da mata masu mulki ke takawa da tasirinsu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Taras Shevchenko mawaki ne kuma mai zane na Ukraine a karni na 19 a karkashin mulkin Daular Rasha, wanda ya farkar da ruhin al'umma ta hanyar "Kobzar."
key_achievements: An 'yantar da shi daga bauta kuma ya yi aiki a matsayin mai fasaha mai 'yanci.
Ya buga tarin waƙoƙin ƙasar Ukraine "Kobzar," wanda ya tada hankalin ƙasa.
Ya ci gaba da ƙirƙira da adawa duk da zaluncin Daular Rasha.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa da fasaharsa sun kasance alama ce ta asalin ƙasar Ukraine da gwagwarmayar 'yancin kai, kuma suna da tasiri mai ƙarfi har zuwa yau.

taras-shevchenko.epic:
Taras Shevchenko (1814-1861) babban mawaki ne kuma mai zane wanda ya farkar da ruhin al'ummar Ukraine a lokacin duhu na karni na 19, a karkashin mulkin Daular Rasha. An haife shi a ranar 9 ga Maris, 1814, a kauyen Moryntsi kusa da Kyiv, a matsayin ɗan bawa, rayuwarsa ta kasance cike da wahalhalu tun farko. Ya rasa iyayensa tun yana yaro, ya zama maraya, kuma ya rayu cikin tsananin wahala a matsayin mallakar ubangidansa. Amma baiwarsa ta fasaha da sha'awar ilimi sun sa ya haskaka ko da a cikin yanayin zalunci. Ya koyi karatu da rubutu da kansa, kuma ya nuna baiwa ta musamman a fannin zane. Ba da daɗewa ba, ubangidansa ya lura da baiwarsa, kuma a shekara ta 1829, ya bi ubangidansa zuwa Saint Petersburg, inda ya sami damar shiga cikin duniyar fasaha mai faɗi a matsayin mataimakin mai zane. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda zai canza makomarsa daga baya.

A Saint Petersburg, Shevchenko ya fara samun karbuwa saboda baiwarsa ta hanyar hulɗa da manyan masu fasaha na Rasha na lokacin. Musamman ma, shahararren mai zane Karl Bryullov da mawaki Vasily Zhukovsky sun yaba da baiwarsa ta fasaha sosai, kuma sun yi aiki tuƙuru don 'yantar da shi daga bauta. Bryullov ya zana hoton Zhukovsky kuma ya sayar da shi a gwanjo, kuma da kuɗin da aka samu, a ranar 22 ga Afrilu, 1838, Shevchenko ya sami 'yanci yana da shekaru 24. Wannan 'yanci mai ban mamaki ya buɗe masa hanya don samun ilimin fasaha na yau da kullun a Kwalejin Fasaha ta Imperial, kuma ya yi azamar sanar da duniya wahalhalu da burin al'ummarsa ta hanyar goga da alkalami. A shekara ta 1840, ya buga tarin waƙoƙinsa na farko, "Kobzar," wanda ya ƙunshi rayuwar mutanen Ukraine, tarihi, da kuma ruhin ƙasa, wanda aka yaba a matsayin wani babban aiki a cikin adabin ƙasar Ukraine, kuma ya sanya shi a matsayin mawakin ƙasa.

Duk da cewa nasarar "Kobzar" ta sanya Shevchenko ya zama gwarzon al'ummar Ukraine, burinsa na 'yanci da 'yancin kai da ke cikin ayyukansa ya sa gwamnatin Daular Rasha ta ji ba dadi. A shekara ta 1847, an kama shi saboda zargin shiga cikin ƙungiyar asiri ta 'Brotherhood of Saints Cyril and Methodius,' wadda ta yi kira ga farfaɗo da al'ummar Ukraine da haɗin kai tsakanin al'ummar Slavic. Hukuncinsa ya kasance mai tsanani. Tsar Nicholas I da kansa ya ƙara wani sashe a cikin hukuncinsa yana cewa "an hana shi rubutu ko zane," yana ƙoƙarin karya ruhinsa na fasaha. Ya shafe shekaru goma yana hidima a matsayin soja a sansanonin Orenburg da kuma waɗanda ke bakin tekun Caspian, yana jurewa tsananin gudun hijira. Amma babu wani zalunci da zai iya karya azamarsa ta ƙirƙira. A asirce, ya rubuta waƙoƙi kuma ya zana hotuna a cikin ƙaramin littafin rubutu, yana rubuta wahalhalu da fatan al'ummarsa, wanda ya zama shaida ga ruhinsa marar karyawa. A ƙarshe an sake shi a shekara ta 1857, amma lafiyarsa ta riga ta lalace ba tare da gyara ba.

A ranar 10 ga Maris, 1861, Taras Shevchenko ya rufe idanunsa a Saint Petersburg yana da shekaru 47. Mutuwarsa ta kasance babban baƙin ciki ga al'ummar Ukraine, amma waƙoƙinsa da fasaharsa sun sami ƙarfi mai girma bayan mutuwarsa. "Kobzar" ya zama alama ce ta asalin ƙasar Ukraine, kuma ayyukansa sun zama ginshiƙin ruhaniya wanda ya sa 'yan Ukraine su kiyaye girman kai na ƙasa da kuma burin 'yancin kai duk da zaluncin Daular Rasha. Ana tuna shi ba kawai a matsayin mawaki ko mai zane ba, amma a matsayin alama da annabi na gwagwarmayar 'yanci da 'yancin kai na al'ummar Ukraine. A yau, ana samun mutum-mutuminsa a duk faɗin Ukraine, kuma an sanya sunansa a kan tituna, jami'o'i, da gidajen wasan kwaikwayo don girmama babban gadonsa. Rayuwarsa da gwagwarmayarsa sun yi daidai da wahalhalun sauran masana na Gabashin Turai waɗanda suka yi ƙoƙarin kiyaye asalin ƙasarsu a ƙarƙashin zaluncin Daular Rasha a tsakiyar karni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Tamar ita ce mace ta farko da ta yi mulki a Georgia, wadda ta shawo kan kalubalen manyan mutane, ta jagoranci Zamanin Zinariya, kuma ta bunƙasa masarautar da mulki mai adalci da jinƙai.
key_achievements: Ta zama mace ta farko da ta yi mulki a cikin al'ummar da maza ke jagoranta
Faɗaɗa yanki da sojoji masu ƙarfi da kuma buɗe Zamanin Zinariya
Soke hukuncin kisa da kuma tallafa wa al'adu da fasaha gabaɗaya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tunawa da ita a matsayin sarauniya waliyya wadda ta jagoranci Zamanin Zinariya na Georgia, alama ta har abada na 'yancin kai, wadata, da jagoranci mai hikima.

tamar-of-georgia.epic:
Tamar ta zama mace ta farko da ta yi mulki a Masarautar Georgia, inda maza ne kawai ke hawa karagar mulki. Mahaifinta, George III, ya share mata hanya ta hanyar ayyana ta a matsayin mai mulki tare da shi, amma dole ne ta tabbatar da cancantar ta ta gaskiya da kanta. Lokacin da ta zama mai mulki ita kaɗai, manyan mutane sun kalubalanci ikonta kuma suka tilasta mata aure. An sami gwaji na auren dole da Yarima Yuri Bogolyubsky na Rasha, amma ta nuna azama ta hanyar korar mijinta da ƙarfi saboda munanan halayensa da tawayensa, ba tare da ta taɓa amincewa da su ba.

Aurenta na biyu ya kasance da David Soslan, wani yarima na Alania, wanda ta zaɓa da kanta. Wannan ya zama mabuɗin mahimmanci don buɗe Zamanin Zinariya na Georgia. Ta gina sojoji masu ƙarfi kuma ta kori barazanar da ba ta yankewa daga ƙasashen Musulunci maƙwabta kamar Masarautar Rum da Azerbaijan. Nasarorin da aka samu a Yaƙin Shamkor da Yaƙin Basian sun tabbatar da hazakar ta ta soja da jagoranci, kuma Masarautar Georgia ta faɗaɗa yankinta daga Tekun Baƙi zuwa Tekun Caspian, tana jin daɗin wadata da ba a taɓa gani ba.

Ba ta mulki masarautar da ƙarfi kaɗai ba, har ma ta yi mulki mai adalci da jinƙai. Ta soke hukuncin kisa da kuma yanke gaɓoɓi, kuma ta tallafa wa al'adu da fasaha gabaɗaya. Kamar yadda babban mawaki Shota Rustaveli ya yabe ta kuma ya sadaukar da 'Jarumi a cikin Fatar Damisa' gare ta, adabin Georgia, gine-gine, da falsafa sun bunƙasa sosai. Jama'arta sun yabe ta da gaske, suna kiranta 'Sarkin Sarakuna, Sarauniyar Sarauniyoyi'.

A shekara ta 1213, rayuwar babbar sarauniya ta ƙare, amma mulkinta ana tunawa da shi har abada a matsayin Zamanin Zinariya mafi haske a tarihin Georgia. An ɗaukaka ta a matsayin waliyya ta Cocin Orthodox na Georgia, kuma har zuwa yau, tana rayuwa a cikin zukatan 'yan Georgia a matsayin alama ta har abada na 'yancin kai, wadata, da jagoranci mai hikima.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wata babbar sarauniya wacce ta tashi daga ƙasƙanci ta zama sarauniyar Daular Byzantine, ta ceci daular kuma ta ba da gudummawa ga haɓaka haƙƙin mata.
key_achievements: Duk da ƙasƙancinta, ta zama sarauniya kuma ta yi mulki tare da sarki.
Ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen murƙushe tawayen Nika.
Ta jagoranci gyare-gyare don kare haƙƙin mata da waɗanda aka ware.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin sarauniya mai tarihi wacce ta jagoranci zamanin zinariya na Daular Byzantine kuma ta yi tasiri sosai wajen haɓaka haƙƙin mata.

theodora.epic:
Labarin Theodora ya fara ne daga rayuwar wata yarinya mai tawali'u, wacce aka haifa a matsayin 'yar mai horar da beyar a filin wasa na Hippodrome a Constantinople. Mutane sun nuna ta da yatsa, suna kiranta 'yar wasan kwaikwayo, har ma da karuwa, amma ta koyi yadda za ta rayu a cikin raini da kuma yadda za ta karanta zukatan mutane. Rayuwa a kan mataki ta kasance mai wahala, amma waɗannan gwaje-gwaje sun zama horo ga ƙaddarar da za ta girgiza daular a nan gaba.

Mafarkin rayuwarta ya zo ne lokacin da ta sadu da Justinian, magajin daular. Yariman ya kamu da soyayyarta ba kawai saboda kyawunta ba, har ma saboda hazakanta da kuma ruhinta mai ƙarfi, kuma ya yi aure da ita, ko da kuwa dole ne ya canza dokokin daular masu tsauri. Lokacin da ta hau gadon sarauta a matsayin sarauniya a shekara ta 527, ta fara amfani da iko ba kawai a matsayin matar sarki ba, amma a matsayin mai mulki tare da shi, tana jagorantar daular tare da shi.

Darajarta ta gaskiya ta haskaka sosai lokacin da tawayen Nika ya barke a shekara ta 532. Yayin da taron jama'a masu fushi suka kewaye fadar sarki kuma har Justinian ya yi tunanin guduwa, ta zaɓi tsayawa tsayin daka, a shirye take ta fuskanci mutuwa, maimakon guduwa cikin tsoro. Da jawabin ta na tarihi, "Alkyabbar sarauta ita ce mafi kyawun likkafani," ta daidaita zukatan sarki da janar-janar da ke rawar jiki, ta murƙushe tawayen, kuma ta ceci daular daga halaka.

Ta kasance ginshiƙi mai ƙarfi wanda ya jagoranci Daular Byzantine zuwa zamanin zinariya. Ta yi tasiri wajen tattara Corpus Juris Civilis, ta ƙarfafa haƙƙin mata na saki da mallakar dukiya, kuma ta jagoranci gyare-gyare ga waɗanda aka ware, kamar kafa matsuguni ga karuwai. Ko da yake ta rasu sakamakon cutar kansa a shekara ta 548, gadon wannan babbar sarauniya, wacce aka haifa a filin wasa mai ƙura kuma ta hau kan gaba a daular, ya kasance tatsuniya mafi haske a tarihin Byzantine.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Theophanes the Greek ya kasance mai zane daga Daular Rum ta Gabas a karni na 14, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a fasahar Orthodox ta Rasha.
key_achievements: Ya ƙirƙiri zane-zanen bango na Cocin Canji a Novgorod.
Ya shiga cikin ado na Cocin Kremlin na Moscow.
Ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban salon gumaka na Rasha.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Salon zanensa na musamman da bayyanawa ya zama tushe don buɗe zamanin zinariya na fasahar Rasha.

theophanes-the-greek.epic:
Theophanes the Greek (an haife shi kusan 1340) ya kasance fitaccen mai zane kuma mai yin gumaka daga Daular Rum ta Gabas a ƙarshen karni na 14. A lokacin, duk da rashin zaman lafiya na siyasa, Daular Rum ta Gabas tana jin daɗin zamanin zinariya na ƙarshe na fasahar Byzantine, tana bunƙasa gadon al'adu na musamman wanda ya dogara ga bangaskiyar Orthodox. An haife shi kuma ya girma a Constantinople, an horar da shi a cikin zurfin al'adun fasahar Byzantine, kuma an riga an san shi da basirarsa ta musamman ta hanyar yin ado da majami'u a yankunan Chalcedon da Galata. Duk da haka, burinsa na fasaha ya wuce iyakokin daular don neman sabbin sararin samaniya, kuma a ƙarshen karni na 14, ya fara tafiya zuwa Rus', ƙasar arewa mai faɗi wacce ke fitowa a matsayin sabon cibiyar bangaskiyar Orthodox. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci a cikin yaɗuwar fasahar Byzantine zuwa yankin Rus' da haɗuwarta da al'adun gida. Makomarsa ta farko ita ce Novgorod, jamhuriyar kasuwanci mai bunƙasa, inda fasaharsa ta buɗe sabon zamani.

Bayan isowarsa Novgorod, Theophanes the Greek ya nuna duniyarsa ta fasaha ta musamman ta hanyar ƙirƙirar zane-zanen bango (frescoes) na Cocin Canji a kan Titin Ilyina. Ya wuce kyawun gargajiya na Byzantine mai natsuwa da tsayayye, yana gwada wata hanya mai ƙarfi da bayyanawa. Goga nasa ya kama damuwar ciki da tsananin ruhaniya na tsarkaka ta amfani da palette mai ƙarfin hali kusan monochrome da saurin goge-goge masu ƙarfi. Mutanen da ke cikin zane-zanensa sun wuce alamomi kawai, suna nuna kasancewar rayuwa mai ban mamaki kamar suna raye a cikin hasken Allah. Wannan sabuwar fasaha ta bayyanawa ta ba da mamaki ga mutane da yawa a lokacin, kuma a lokaci guda, ta zama wani muhimmin lokaci don tabbatar da sunansa na fasaha a duk faɗin Rus'. Ya fara nuna kansa ba kawai a matsayin mai sana'a ba, amma a matsayin 'falsafa' wanda ke bincika zurfin rai.

Shaharar Theophanes the Greek ta bazu cikin sauri fiye da Novgorod zuwa tsakiyar Grand Duchy na Moscow. An ba shi babban aikin yin ado da Cocin Annunciation da ke cikin Kremlin na Moscow, inda ya yi aiki tare da wasu manyan masu fasaha, ciki har da matashi kuma mai basira Andrei Rublev. Salon Theophanes mai tsanani, mai ban mamaki, kuma wani lokacin mai cike da baƙin ciki na ruhaniya ya bambanta sosai da salon Rublev mai natsuwa da waƙa, amma sun ba juna zurfin wahayi na fasaha. Theophanes ya koya wa Rublev muhimmancin hangen nesa na ciki da fahimtar ruhaniya na mai fasaha, kuma haɗin gwiwarsu ya zama muhimmin tushe don buɗe zamanin zinariya na Makarantar Moscow na zane-zane. Wannan lokacin ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa fasahar Orthodox ta Rasha ta kanta, ta rabu da tasirin Byzantine.

Theophanes the Greek ya mutu a kusan 1410 a ƙasar Rus', wanda ya ɗauka a matsayin gidansa na biyu. Duk da haka, gadonsa na fasaha yana rayuwa har abada a cikin zane-zanen bango da gumaka da yawa da ya bari. An kira shi 'falsafa' fiye da mai zane kawai, saboda fasaharsa ta bincika ainihin ruhin ɗan adam da gaskiyar Allah, fiye da sake haifar da siffofi kawai. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin gada mai haɗa al'adun fasahar Byzantine mai ladabi da ruhaniya mai tasowa ta Rus', kuma ya yi tasiri sosai wajen tsara makomar fasahar Rasha ta hanyar magadansa kamar Andrei Rublev. Ayyukansa har yau ana ɗaukarsu a matsayin kololuwar fasahar Orthodox ta Rasha, kuma ana nazarin su a matsayin kayan aiki masu mahimmanci don fahimtar duniyar ruhaniya ta Rasha ta tsakiya. Tasirinsa ya bayyana a fili idan aka kwatanta shi da sauran masu fasaha na zamani waɗanda suka kafa salon gumaka na Rasha na musamman yayin da suke ci gaba da al'adun fasahar Byzantine.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mai tsara dabaru mai hikima wanda ya sake haɗa kan mutanen Turkawa da suka watse, ya ba da gudummawa ga kafa Daular Turkawa ta Biyu, kuma ya yi hidima ga Kagans uku, yana kafa tushen daular.
key_achievements: Shawo kan Kutlug Kagan, jagorantar kafa Daular Turkawa ta Biyu
Fatattakar sojojin Tang da mamaye kabilun da ke kewaye don kafa tushen daular
Ƙirƙirar rubutun dutse mai ɗauke da hikimarsa da kuma watsa shi ga tsararraki masu zuwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya sake haɗa kan mutanen Turkawa da suka watse kuma ya sake gina babbar daula, kuma hikimarsa da sadaukarwarsa za a tuna su a matsayin gado na har abada ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

tonyukuk.epic:
Duk da cewa an yi masa ilimi a Chang'an, babban birnin daular Tang, idanunsa sun kasance a kan mutanensa da suka watse, Tonyukuk. Mutanensa, waɗanda a da suke mulkin manyan ciyayi, sun rasa ƙarfi kuma sun watse a ƙarƙashin dabaru na raba kawunan Tang. Ya ji kukan su, kuma a cikin zuciyarsa, fushi da kuma jin nauyi sun tashi. Ya yi rantsuwa cewa wata rana zai sake haɗa kan mutanensa a ƙarƙashin tutar shuɗi, kuma ya dawo da ɗaukakar Turkawa, 'ya'yan sama.

Wannan rantsuwa ta kai shi ga aiki. Ya koma cikin ciyayi, yana guje wa sa ido na Tang, kuma ya tattara abokan gaba ɗaya a tsakanin kabilun da suka watse. Daga ƙarshe, ya sami Kutlug, shugaban dangin Ashina, kuma ya shawo kansa. 'Ya Kagan, ka zama kerkeci da zai jagoranci garken tumaki da suka watse. Idan ka tashi, zai zama hikimarka da takobinka don gyara duniya.' Saboda lallashinsa, ya yanke shawara, kuma a shekara ta 682, a ƙarshe sun yi tawaye ga Tang. Wannan shine farkon Daular Turkawa ta Biyu.

Ya jagoranci sojoji a matsayin Apa Tarkan (babban mai tsara dabaru) na Kutlug, wanda ya zama Ilterish Kagan. Dabarunsa sun kasance masu sauƙi: idan abokan gaba suna da ƙarfi, ka guje su; idan suna da rauni, ka murƙushe su. Ya jawo manyan sojojin Tang zuwa yankunan tsaunuka masu wuya kuma ya fatattake su, sannan ya mamaye Kirgiz a arewa da Turgish a yamma, yana kafa tushen daular. Bayan mutuwar Ilterish Kagan, ya ci gaba da bauta wa ɗan'uwansa Kapagan Kagan da ɗan'uwansa Bilge Kagan a jere, yana zama ginshiƙi mafi ƙarfi na daular.
