Hikimarsa ta haskaka har ma a fagen diflomasiyya, inda ya raba kawunan abokan gaba kuma ya tabbatar da zaman lafiyar daular.

A lokacin faɗuwar rana ta rayuwarsa, ya yanke shawarar rubuta dukkan gogewarsa da hikimarsa a kan dutse don tsararraki masu zuwa. Wannan shine rubutunsa na dutse. Ya bauta wa manyan Kagans guda uku, kuma ya sake gina mutanen da suka watse zuwa wata babbar daula. Ya sadaukar da kansa ga mutanensa, ba tare da barci da daddare ba kuma ba tare da hutu da rana ba. Sunansa Tonyukuk. Shi ne Tonyukuk mai hikima. Muna fatan labarinsa zai kasance a tuna har abada a ƙarƙashin shuɗin sama.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An san shi da Timur Gurgu, ya girma cikin rudani, ya gina babbar daula, kuma ya mai da Samarkand cibiyar al'adu, amma kuma ana tunawa da shi saboda yaƙe-yaƙensa na zalunci.
key_achievements: Haɗewar Transoxiana da kafa mulki
Cin Farisa, Indiya, da Daular Usmaniyya
Ci gaban Samarkand zuwa cibiyar al'adu da fasaha
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar gado mai rikitarwa, inda ya jagoranci 'Farfaɗowar Timurid' a Samarkand tare da yaƙe-yaƙe na zalunci.

timur-tamerlane.epic:
Sunansa Timur, an haife shi a shekara ta 1336 a kusa da Kesh, a Uzbekistan ta yau, cikin kabilun Barlas na Turkawa-Mongol. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta shude cikin rudani na Daular Chagatai da ta rabu gida-gida. Ya kasance jarumi matashi mai buri, ya gina suna ta hanyar ƙananan hare-hare da aikin sojan haya. Amma a tsakiyar shekarunsa na ashirin, a wani yaƙi a Sistan, ya sami munanan raunuka a ƙafarsa ta dama da hannunsa, wanda ya sa ya yi gurgu har abada. Maƙiyansa sun yi masa ba'a da 'Timur-e Lang', wato 'Timur Gurgu', amma bai bari wannan rauni na jiki ya karya ƙarfin zuciyarsa ba. Maimakon haka, ya ƙara rura wutar da ke cikinsa.

Ya hau matattakalar mulki ta hanyar dabaru na diflomasiyya, dabarun yaƙi marasa tausayi, da kuma auratayya ta dabaru. A shekara ta 1370, a ƙarshe ya kawar da dukkan abokan hamayyarsa kuma ya zama shugaba guda ɗaya na Transoxiana. Ba tare da kasancewa zuriyar Genghis Khan kai tsaye ba, bai iya amfani da taken 'Khan' ba, amma ya auri gimbiya daga gidan Genghis, inda ya sami taken 'Guregen', wato 'surukin sarki', wanda ya ba da halacci ga mulkinsa. Ya sanya aikin maido da ɗaukakar kakansa Genghis Khan da sake gina Daular Mongol a matsayin manufarsa, kuma ya ƙuduri aniyar mai da babban birninsa cibiyar duniya. Wannan wuri shine Samarkand.

Sojojinsa sun mamaye duk faɗin Asiya. Ya mamaye Farisa sau uku, ya ci garuruwanta, kuma a shekara ta 1398, ya mamaye Indiya kuma ya kwashe Delhi. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan abokan hamayyarsa shine Tokhtamysh, Khan na Daular Kipchak, wanda ya taɓa zama abokinsa amma ya ci amanarsa. Ya bi shi har zuwa faɗin filayen steppe, ya fatattaki sojojinsa kuma ya lalata babban birninsa, Sarai. A shekara ta 1402, ya fatattaki kuma ya kama Sultan Bayezid na Farko na Daular Usmaniyya mai ƙarfi a Yaƙin Ankara, wanda ya girgiza duniya ta Yamma. Daularsa ta miƙe daga Indiya a gabas zuwa Anatoliya a yamma, kuma daga kudancin Rasha a arewa zuwa Tekun Fasha a kudu.

Yaƙe-yaƙensa sau da yawa suna tare da tsananin zalunci da kisan kiyashi. Har ma ya gina hasumiyoyi na kwanyar kai daga mazaunan garuruwan da suka yi tawaye. Duk da haka, ya kasance mai lalata kuma mai ginawa. Ya kawo mafi kyawun masu sana'a, gine-gine, da masana daga yankunan da ya ci zuwa babban birninsa, Samarkand. Ta hannunsu, Samarkand ta zama birni mai ban sha'awa wanda aka ƙawata da masallatai masu fale-falen shuɗi, madrasa, da manyan kaburbura. Wannan shine farkon 'Farfaɗowar Timurid'. A shekara ta 1405, yayin da yake shirin fara yaƙinsa na ƙarshe don cinye Daular Ming, ya rasu saboda rashin lafiya a Otrar. Burinsa ba shi da iyaka, amma lokacinsa yana da iyaka. Gadonsa ya cika da jini, amma zai rayu har abada a ƙarƙashin shuɗin dome na Samarkand.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Petro Mohyla wani malamin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas ne a Tarayyar Poland-Lithuania a karni na 17, wanda ya kafa Kyiv-Mohyla Academy kuma ya kawo sauyi a coci.
key_achievements: Kafa da haɓaka Kyiv-Mohyla Academy
Jagorantar gyaran coci a matsayin Metropolitan na Kyiv
Tattara 'Ikrarin Bangaskiyar Orthodox'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gyaran iliminsa da nasarorin tauhidinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga Ukraine da kuma duniyar Cocin Orthodox na Gabas.

petro-mohyla.epic:
A farkon karni na 17, Gabashin Turai na cikin wani lokaci mai cike da rudani saboda tasirin Gyaran Addini da kuma gwagwarmayar iko tsakanin manyan kasashe. Ko da yake Tarayyar Poland-Lithuania al'umma ce mai al'adu da addinai daban-daban, Cocin Orthodox na Gabas ta fuskanci matsalar asali a tsakanin fadada tasirin Katolika da kuma hauhawar Furotesta. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Petro Mohyla (1596-1647) ya bar tarihi a matsayin fitaccen malamin addini kuma mai kawo sauyi a fannin ilimi wanda ya jagoranci farfado da ilimin tauhidi da ilimi na Cocin Orthodox na Gabas. An haife shi a cikin gidan boyar mai daraja na Moldavia, ya sami ilimi mai zurfi a cikin Latin, tauhidi, da falsafa a Tarayyar Poland-Lithuania, inda al'adun ilimi na Yammacin Turai suka yi karfi, yana gina tushen iliminsa. Da farko, ya bi hanyar soja kuma ya sami kwarewar duniya, amma a cikin zuciyarsa akwai wata sha'awa mai zurfi ga bangaskiya da ilimi. Wannan ya zama muhimmin dalili da ya sa daga baya ya ga durkushewar coci kuma ya nemi sabuwar hanya. Rayuwarsa ta farko ba kawai rayuwar wani mai daraja ba ce, amma tsarin gwagwarmaya da bincike na wani masanin ilimi da ke neman kiran sa a cikin wani lokaci mai cike da canje-canje.

Wani muhimmin canji a rayuwar Petro Mohyla shi ne ya bar daukakar duniya ya zaɓi hanyar bangaskiya. Ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da kansa ga Cocin Orthodox na Gabas wanda ke fama da rarrabuwar kawuna da matsin lamba daga waje, kuma a kusan 1627, ya zama sufurin Kyiv Pechersk Lavra. Lavra cibiya ce mai muhimmanci ta ruhaniya da al'adu ga Cocin Orthodox na Gabas, amma a lokacin tana kan hanyar durkushewa. Ba da dadewa ba bayan shigarsa gidan sufi, an zaɓe shi a matsayin Archimandrite (Abbot) na Lavra, inda ya zama jagoran gyare-gyare. Ya maido da gidan buga littattafai na gidan sufi da ke durkushewa kuma ya fara buga muhimman littattafan tauhidi, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga yada bangaskiyar Orthodox da kuma kafa tushen ilimi. Musamman ma, Mohyla ya tabbata cewa ilimi ne babban karfi da zai kare asalin Orthodox kuma ya jagoranci tsararraki masu zuwa. A karkashin wannan imani, a cikin 1631, ya kafa wata karamar makaranta a cikin Lavra. Wannan makaranta ta zama iri na Kyiv-Mohyla Academy, wata babbar cibiyar ilimi da alamar ilimi a Gabashin Turai, wadda daga baya za a kira ta da sunansa. Wannan shi ne mataki na farko da ya nuna hangen nesansa na hada ilimin bil'adama na Yamma da tauhidin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas.

A cikin 1632, an zaɓi Petro Mohyla a matsayin Metropolitan na Kyiv, Galicia, da dukan Rus', yana ɗaukar nauyi mai girma. A gabansa akwai manyan kalubale na daidaita tsarin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas, wanda ya rasa hanyarsa a tsakanin fadada tasirin Katolika da sabbin kalubale daga Furotesta. Ya sadaukar da kansa ga hada kan ayyukan ibada na coci-coci da suka watse, inganta matakin ilimi na limamai, da kuma sake tsara tsarin gudanarwa na coci. Babban abin da ya cimma a cikin waɗannan ƙoƙarin shi ne tattara 'Ikrarin Bangaskiyar Orthodox'. Wannan takarda, ta hanyar amfani da tsarin ilimin tauhidin Latin, ta bayyana a fili manyan koyarwar Cocin Orthodox na Gabas, ta zama garkuwa mai karfi ga bangaskiyar Orthodox a kan sukar Katolika da Furotesta. Bugu da kari, ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu yawa, ciki har da dawo da dukiyar coci da kuma karfafa horo a rayuwar gidan sufi. A cikin waɗannan gwagwarmaya da kalubale, Mohyla ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen sake gina coci da kuma daukaka matsayin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas tare da bangaskiya marar girgiza da kuma kwarewar gudanarwa.

Babban gadon Petro Mohyla shine Kyiv-Mohyla Academy. Ya haɗa karamar makarantar da ya kafa da Kyiv Brotherhood School, ya haɓaka ta zuwa wata babbar cibiyar ilimi wadda ke koyar da ilimin bil'adama da kimiyya na Yammacin Turai yayin da take tushen bangaskiyar Orthodox. Wannan Academy ta samar da limamai, masana, da shugabanni marasa adadi, tana haskaka hasken ilimi ba kawai a Ukraine ba har ma a duk faɗin duniyar Orthodox ta Gabas. Gyaran iliminsa ya karfafa tushen tauhidin Cocin Orthodox na Gabas kuma ya zama wata dama ta kawo sabon kuzari na ilimi ta hanyar musayar ra'ayi da ilimin Yamma. Ko bayan mutuwar Mohyla, Academy ta ci gaba da aiki a matsayin babbar cibiyar ilimi a Gabashin Turai, tana da tasiri sosai ga kafa asalin al'ummar Ukraine da ci gaban al'adu. Ruhinsa ya ci gaba da zama muhimmin tushe ga ilimin Ukraine da Cocin Orthodox har zuwa yau, kuma idan aka kwatanta shi da sauran masu kawo sauyi na addini a Gabashin Turai a karni na 17, yana nuna cewa sun yi niyyar cimma burin gama gari na kare bangaskiya ta hanyar ilimi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky ya kasance mawaki kuma jagoran makaɗa na Rasha a zamanin soyayya, wanda ya bar manyan ayyuka da yawa kamar ballet, opera, da kuma symphonies.
key_achievements: Rubuta ballet 'Swan Lake' da 'The Nutcracker'
Kafa suna tare da opera 'Eugene Onegin'
Ƙirƙirar manyan ayyukan makaɗa da yawa, ciki har da '1812 Overture'
Samun tallafi daga Madame Nadezhda von Meck
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun kasance mafi yawan waƙoƙin gargajiya da ake so kuma ake yi a duniya har yau.

pyotr-ilyich-tchaikovsky.epic:
Pyotr Ilyich Tchaikovsky (1840-1893) ya kasance maɗaukakin mawaki kuma jagoran makaɗa na Daular Rasha, wanda ya yi aiki a zamanin soyayya kuma ya bayyana wa duniya ainihin ruhin kiɗan Rasha. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 19, Rasha tana cikin wani lokaci mai cike da kuzari inda take ƙoƙarin kafa asalin fasaha na musamman, duk da cewa tana ƙarƙashin tasirin al'adun Yammacin Turai. Cikin wannan yanayin tarihi, an haifi Tchaikovsky a ranar 7 ga Mayu, 1840, a Votkinsk, wani ƙaramin gari kusa da tsaunin Ural. Mahaifinsa ya kasance mai kula da ma'adinai, kuma mahaifiyarsa, wacce ke da asalin Faransa, tana da zurfin fahimtar fasaha. Ko da yake ya nuna baiwar kiɗa tun yana yaro, an horar da shi don zama lauya, kamar yadda ya saba ga 'ya'yan manyan mutane a lokacin. Bayan ya kammala karatunsa daga Makarantar Shari'a ta Imperial a Saint Petersburg, ya yi aiki a Ma'aikatar Shari'a a matsayin ma'aikacin gwamnati, yana rayuwa mai kwanciyar hankali. Amma a cikin zuciyarsa, wata sha'awa mai tsanani ga kiɗa tana ci gaba da ruruwa, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekarar 1861, yana da shekaru ashirin da ɗaya, ya yanke shawarar barin aikinsa mai kwanciyar hankali kuma ya shiga Conservatory na Saint Petersburg, inda ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga kiɗa. Wannan shawarar ta zama wani muhimmin juyi da ya canza tafarkin rayuwarsa gaba ɗaya.

Bayan ya shiga tafarkin kiɗa, Tchaikovsky ya sami tsarin ilimin kiɗa a ƙarƙashin Farfesa Anton Rubinstein da Nikolai Zaremba, inda ya kafa harsashin aikinsa a matsayin mawaki. A shekarar 1866, an naɗa shi Farfesa na Harmony a Moscow Conservatory, amma tafarkin mawaki bai kasance mai sauƙi ba. Ayyukansa na farko sun fuskanci zargi mai tsanani, kuma symphony ɗinsa na farko, 'Winter Daydreams', ya sami martani mai sanyi. Tare da waɗannan zarge-zargen na waje, rikicin cikin gida tsakanin al'adun zamantakewa da asalin kansa ya ci gaba da damunsa. A shekarar 1877, cikin matsin lamba na zamantakewa da rudani na kansa, ya yi aure cikin gaggawa da ɗalibarsa Antonina Milyukova, amma wannan auren ya ƙare da bala'i cikin 'yan makonni kaɗan, kuma Tchaikovsky ya sha wahala daga matsanancin rauni na tunani da kuma rugujewar jijiyoyi. Ballet ɗin 'Swan Lake', wanda aka fara yi a wannan shekarar, shi ma bai sami babban nasara ba a farko, wanda ya zurfafa masa yanke kauna. Wannan lokaci ne mafi zafi da rashin kwanciyar hankali a rayuwarsa, amma kuma ya zama wani muhimmin gogewa da ya ƙara zurfi da kyawun baƙin ciki ga kiɗansa.

Wahalar tunani da ta samo asali daga gazawar aure kusan ta kai Tchaikovsky ga halaka, amma a daidai wannan lokacin, wani haske ya bayyana a rayuwarsa. Madame Nadezhda von Meck, gwauruwa ce ta wani attajirin layin dogo, ta aiko masa da wasiƙa. Ta amince da baiwar kiɗa ta Tchaikovsky sosai, kuma ta ba shi tallafin kuɗi mai yawa na tsawon shekaru 13, wanda ya ba shi damar mai da hankali kawai ga rubuta kiɗa. Wannan tallafin ya ba Tchaikovsky 'yancin tattalin arziki don ya yi murabus daga matsayinsa na Farfesa a Moscow Conservatory kuma ya mai da hankali ga ƙirƙira kawai. Kuma dangantakarsu ta kasance a cikin wani tsari na musamman, inda suke sadarwa ta hanyar wasiƙu kawai ba tare da sun taɓa haɗuwa ba. Musayar wasiƙu da Madame von Meck ba kawai tallafin kuɗi ba ne, har ma ya ba Tchaikovsky zurfin haɗin kai na ruhaniya da kwanciyar hankali. A wannan lokacin, ya haifi manyan ayyuka a jere kamar Symphony No. 4, Violin Concerto, da kuma opera 'Eugene Onegin', inda ƙwarewarsa a matsayin mawaki ta bunƙasa. Amma a shekarar 1890, lokacin da aka dakatar da tallafin Madame von Meck ba zato ba tsammani, Tchaikovsky ya sake fuskantar matsalolin tattalin arziki da rashin kwanciyar hankali na tunani, amma sunansa da ƙarfin ƙirƙirarsa da suka riga sun tabbata ba su girgiza ba.

Ko da bayan ƙarshen tallafin Madame von Meck, Tchaikovsky ya ci gaba da ayyukansa na kiɗa, kuma sunansa ya bazu fiye da Rasha zuwa Turai da Amurka. Ya jagoranci yawon shakatawa na kide-kide a matsayin jagoran makaɗa cikin nasara. A wannan lokacin, ya rubuta 'Sleeping Beauty' da 'The Nutcracker', waɗanda ake ɗauka a matsayin kololuwar kiɗan ballet, kuma sun sami soyayya ta duniya baki ɗaya. 'The Nutcracker' ya zama babban abin da ake yi a lokacin Kirsimeti. A shekarar 1893, ya kammala kuma ya fara gabatar da babban aikinsa na rayuwa, Symphony No. 6 'Pathétique', wanda ya ƙunshi wahalarsa da sha'awarsa. Amma kwanaki tara bayan fara gabatarwar, a ranar 6 ga Nuwamba, 1893, Tchaikovsky ya rasu sakamakon cutar kwalara. Bayan mutuwarsa, 'Pathétique' ya ba da zurfin motsin rai saboda kyawunsa na baƙin ciki, wanda kamar ya annabta ƙarshensa. Kiɗan Tchaikovsky ya haɗa kyawun tsarin gargajiya na Yammacin Turai da kuma launukan Rasha na musamman, masu daɗi da na ƙasa, don gina wata duniya ta fasaha ta musamman. Ayyukansa sun kasance mafi yawan waƙoƙin gargajiya da ake yi kuma ake so a duniya a gidajen opera, matakan ballet, da kuma dakunan kide-kide har yau. Kiɗansa ya ba da gudummawa wajen bayyana asalin kiɗan Rasha ga duniya ta wata hanya daban da sauran manyan mawakan Rasha na zamaninsa, kamar Rimsky-Korsakov ko Mussorgsky.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Procopius masanin tarihi ne kuma lauya na Daular Rumawa ta Gabas a ƙarni na 6, wanda ya rubuta yaƙe-yaƙe da gine-gine na Sarki Justinian Mai Girma kuma ya soki gidan sarauta.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai ba da shawara kan shari'a ga Janar Belisarius.
Ya rubuta tarihin yaƙe-yaƙe na Sarki Justinian Mai Girma.
Ya soki gidan sarauta ta hanyar `Tarihin Sirri`.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rubuce-rubucensa sune mafi muhimmanci tushen bayanai na zamanin Justinian, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin masana tarihi na ƙarshe na tsohuwar duniya.

procopius.epic:
Procopius, wani fitaccen masanin tarihi kuma lauya na Daular Rumawa ta Gabas, an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 500 miladiyya a Kaisariya, birnin bakin teku na Palaestina Prima, wata lardi ta Rumawa. Lokacin haihuwarsa ya zo ne daidai kafin Daular Rumawa ta Gabas ta shiga wani zamani mai cike da buri a ƙarƙashin Sarki Justinian Mai Girma, wanda ke neman dawo da ɗaukakar tsohuwar Daular Rumawa. Tun yana yaro, Procopius ya sami ilimin gargajiya, inda ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin fasahar magana ta Girka da kuma shari'a. Wannan tushe na ilimi ya zama matattarar da ya hau zuwa Konstantinoful, babban birnin daular, inda ya sadu da wani muhimmin mutum wanda zai canza rayuwarsa, wato babban janar Belisarius. A shekara ta 527, an naɗa Procopius a matsayin 'adsessor' (mai ba da shawara kan shari'a) ga Belisarius, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin canji, inda ya tsaya a tsakiyar abubuwan tarihi a matsayin babban jami'in yaƙi, ba kawai mai ba da shawara kan shari'a ba. Daga baya, ya shaida kuma ya rubuta manyan ayyukan soja na daular, inda ya zama shaida mai rai ga tarihi, ba kawai masanin ilimi ba.

A matsayinsa na adsessor na Belisarius, Procopius ya raka shi a yawancin balaguron soja da suka ratsa faɗin daular. Ya shiga cikin balaguron zuwa Arewacin Afirka a shekara ta 533, inda ya rubuta yadda aka ci Masarautar Vandal da yaƙi a fili, sannan daga shekara ta 535, ya shiga cikin dogon yaƙi mai wahala da Ostrogoths a yankin Italiya. Waɗannan yaƙe-yaƙe sun nuna burin Sarki Justinian Mai Girma na dawo da tsoffin yankunan Daular Rumawa, kuma Procopius ya fuskanci kukan yaƙi, yanke kauna na kewaye, da kuma farin cikin nasara kai tsaye, inda ya shaida zaluncin yaƙi da kuma ɗaukakarsa a lokaci guda. Bugu da ƙari, ya rubuta yadda daular ke yaƙi da barazanar Daular Sasanian ta Farisa a Gabas. A shekara ta 541, yayin da yake kallon bala'in annobar Justinian mai ban tsoro da ta mamaye Konstantinoful, wadda ta kashe yawancin al'ummar birnin, ya fahimci zurfin wahalar ɗan adam da raunin daular da ke ɓoye a bayan ɗaukakar yaƙi. Waɗannan abubuwan sun yi tasiri sosai a kan ra'ayinsa na tarihi.

Bayan ya dawo Konstantinoful, Procopius ya tattara abubuwan da ya gani da kuma abubuwan da ya shaida a cikin manyan littattafai guda uku. Na farko, `Tarihin Yaƙe-yaƙe` (History of the Wars), littafi ne na tarihi na hukuma wanda ya rubuta manyan yaƙe-yaƙe na Sarki Justinian Mai Girma dalla-dalla, yana magana kan yaƙe-yaƙe na Vandal, Gothic, da Farisa, tare da bayyana nasarorin soja na daular. Na biyu, `Game da Gini` (On the Buildings), ya yabi manyan ayyukan gini da Sarki Justinian ya gudanar a faɗin daular, yana nuna girman sarki da nasarorinsa a hanya mai kyau. A cikin waɗannan littattafai biyu, Procopius ya nuna sarki da mulkinsa gabaɗaya a matsayin masu kyau da jaruntaka. Amma a asirce, ya rubuta littafi na uku, `Tarihin Sirri` (Secret History), ko `Anecdota`. Wannan littafi ya cika da bayyanar da ɓoyayyen gefen iko, kamar kwaɗayi, zalunci, da rashin ɗa'a na Sarki Justinian da Sarauniya Theodora, abubuwan da ba za a iya magana a kansu a cikin littattafan tarihi na hukuma ba. Wannan wani yunƙuri ne mai haɗari kuma mai jaruntaka don barin wa zuriyarsu hadaddiyar kuma munanan gaskiyar da ya shaida.

An yi imanin cewa shekarun ƙarshe na Procopius sun kasance masu natsuwa idan aka kwatanta da ayyukansa na rubuce-rubuce masu cike da tashin hankali. Wataƙila ya riƙe muƙamai masu girma a Konstantinoful, kuma an ce ya rasu a kusan shekara ta 565 miladiyya. Gadonsa yana raye a cikin rubuce-rubucensa masu yawa. Procopius ana ɗaukarsa a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan masana tarihi na ƙarshe na tsohuwar duniya, wanda ya bi al'adar masana tarihi na gargajiya kamar Thucydides. Rubuce-rubucensa sune mafi muhimmanci kuma na musamman tushen bayanai game da siyasa, soja, al'umma, da al'adu na zamanin Justinian, kuma sun kasance shaida mai rikitarwa wadda ke nuna fuskar jama'a da kuma ɓoyayyun gaskiyar da ke bayan wani zamani a lokaci guda. Ya yi imani cewa rubuta gaskiya shine aikin masanin tarihi, kuma wani lokaci ya yi ƙoƙari ya cika wannan aikin duk da haɗari. Ra'ayinsa mai mahimmanci ya tunatar da masana tarihi na gaba muhimmancin nazarin iko mai mahimmanci, kuma wannan ya zama abin ƙarfafawa ga masu tunani na siyasa na zamanin Renaissance kamar Machiavelli wajen binciken yanayin iko.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarkin Byzantine wanda ya ceci daular daga Farisa bayan hambarar da azzalumi kuma ya yi gyare-gyare, amma ya rasa yankuna saboda mamayar Larabawa.
key_achievements: Hawansa kan kursiyin Sarkin Byzantine bayan hambarar da azzalumi Phocas
Nasara kan Farisa da dawo da Holy Cross
Yin amfani da harshen Girka a matsayin harshen hukuma da gyaran tsarin Thema
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya nuna ƙarshen tsohuwar Roma da farkon Byzantine na tsakiya, kuma ya kafa tushen ci gaban daular.

heraclius.epic:
An haife shi ɗan gwamnan Afirka, Heraclius ya amsa kiran daular lokacin da azzalumi Phocas ke gurɓata kursiyin Constantinople. A shekara ta 610, ya jagoranci rundunar jiragen ruwa zuwa babban birnin, ya hambarar da shi, kuma ya hau kan kursiyin sarki. Amma abin da ya gada ba daukakar Roma ba ce; daula ce da ke gab da rugujewa, inda Daular Sasanian Persia ke lalata gabas kuma kabilun Avar suna barazana ga yankin Balkan. Taskar gwamnati ta zama fanko, sojoji sun yi sanyin gwiwa, kuma jama'a sun shiga cikin yanke kauna. Da kyar aka ga bege, amma a karkashin kariyar Allah, ya yi rantsuwa zai sake gina daular.

Babban barazanar da ke gaba shine Khosrow II, Sarkin Farisa. Ya ci Syria, Palestine, da Egypt, kuma a shekara ta 614, ya kwashe Holy Cross, mafi tsarki a cikin Kiristanci, daga Urushalima. Tsawon shekaru goma, Heraclius ya mai da hankali kan tsaro, yana sake tsara sojoji da tara kuɗi. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 622, ya yi caca mai haɗari: ya bar babban birnin, ya jagoranci sojojinsa kai tsaye zuwa tsakiyar yankin abokan gaba. Bayan shekaru na yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi, sun ci sojojin Farisa da gagarumar nasara a yakin Nineveh, kuma ya dawo da Holy Cross a matsayin mai nasara. Wannan shine kololuwar rayuwarsa, kuma daular ta zama kamar an cece ta.

Bayan yaƙin, Heraclius ya fara gyare-gyare na cikin gida a cikin daular. Ya karɓi taken Girkanci 'Basileus' a hukumance, maimakon taken Latin 'Augustus', matakin da ke nuna gaskiyar daular, domin zuciyar daularsu yanzu tana cikin al'adun Girka, ba Latin ba. Ya kuma sake tsara daular zuwa yankunan gudanarwa na soja da ake kira 'Thema'. Kowane Thema yana kula da sojojinsa don kare iyakokin, don haka ya kafa tsarin tsaro mai inganci da sassauci. Waɗannan gyare-gyare sun zama tushen daular Byzantine don ci gaba da wanzuwa tsawon ƙarnuka masu zuwa.

Amma kaddara ta kasance mai tsanani. Yayin da ya kashe ƙarfin daular a yaƙin da Farisa, wani sabon ƙarfi yana fitowa daga hamadar Arabiya. Larabawa, waɗanda suka haɗa kai a ƙarƙashin tutar Musulunci, sun fi kowane abokin gaba na baya sauri da ƙarfi. Sojojinsa da suka tsufa ba su iya jure wa kuzarinsu da motsinsu ba. Babban shan kashi a yakin Yarmouk a shekara ta 636 shine farkon komai. Ya kalli Syria, Palestine, da Egypt, waɗanda ya dawo da su da rayuwarsa, suna faɗuwa ɗaya bayan ɗaya ba tare da iya yin komai ba. Ya ceci daular, amma a ƙarshe ya mutu yana kallon yadda daular ke rabuwa a gabansa. Mulkinsa shine babi na ƙarshe na tsohuwar Roma, kuma babi na farko na Byzantine na tsakiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani sufanci wanda ya tafi Indiya don warware sabanin littattafan addinin Buddha, ya yi shekaru 17 yana neman dokar Buddha, sannan ya dawo gida, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban addinin Buddha a Gabashin Asiya ta hanyar fassara littattafai masu yawa.
key_achievements: Tafiya zuwa Indiya don neman dokar Buddha ba tare da izinin sarki ba
Nazarin Yogacara a gidan ibada na Nalanda da tattara littattafai
Fassarar littattafan Buddha masu yawa bayan dawowa gida da rubuta 'Tafiyar zuwa Yamma a Lokacin Daular Tang'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Littattafan da aka fassara sun buɗe sabon zamani ga addinin Buddha a Gabashin Asiya, kuma 'Tafiyar zuwa Yamma a Lokacin Daular Tang' ya zama wani gado mai daraja don nazarin Hanyar Siliki.

xuanzang.epic:
Tun ina yaro, na kamu da sha'awar littattafan addinin Buddha sosai, amma littattafan da aka kawo kasar Sin a lokacin suna da fassarori daban-daban kuma suna da sabani da yawa, wanda hakan ya haifar da rudani mai girma. Masana da yawa sun gabatar da fassarori daban-daban, kuma kishirwar sanin ainihin koyarwar Buddha ta kara zurfafa kowace rana. Na yanke shawarar cewa don warware duk waɗannan tambayoyin, dole ne in je Indiya, asalin addinin Buddha, don kawo rubutun asali. Wannan ya zama kaddarar aikina na rayuwa, wata tafiya mai tsarki da ba za a iya kauce mata ba.

Amma a lokacin, gwamnatin daular Tang ta hana 'yan kasa tafiya kasashen waje sosai. Sha'awata ta neman dokar Buddha ta saba wa dokar kasa. Amma ban iya barin hanyar gaskiya ba, domin ta fi dokokin duniya daraja. A shekara ta 629, a karshe na bar babban birnin Chang'an ba tare da izinin sarki ba, na nufi yamma. Dole ne in shawo kan matsaloli masu yawa na mutuwa, kamar guguwar yashi na hamadar Taklamakan, tsananin sanyi na tsaunukan dusar kankara, 'yan fashi da ke toshe hanya, da yunwa. Na jure duk waɗannan wahalhalu da imani mai ƙarfi ga Buddha da kuma niyyar neman gaskiya.

Bayan na isa Indiya, na zauna a gidan ibada na Nalanda, cibiyar ilimi ta dā, na yi shekaru da yawa ina nazarin harshen Sanskrit da falsafar Buddha sosai. A can, na sadu da babban malami, Jiexian (戒賢), kuma na karɓi ainihin koyarwar Yogacara (唯識學), wanda ya haskaka tunanina. Na yi tafiya a duk faɗin Indiya, na yi muhawara da masana da yawa, kuma na tattara littattafai masu yawa har 657, tare da goyon bayan sarakuna daban-daban. Shaharar ilimina ta bazu a duk faɗin Indiya, kuma Sarki Harsha ya shirya babban taron ilimi don girmama ni.

A shekara ta 645, bayan shekaru 17, a karshe na dawo gida da littattafai masu yawa, gumakan Buddha, da kuma abubuwan tarihi. Sarkin da ya ɗauke ni a matsayin mai karya doka, yanzu ya marhabin da ni sosai, yana ɗauke ni a matsayin Babban Malami na Kasa (國師), wanda hakan ya nuna canjin kaddara. Bayan haka, na sadaukar da sauran rayuwata ga fassarar littattafai a Haikalin Hongfu da Haikalin Da Ci'en a Chang'an, tare da cikakken goyon bayan kasa. Littattafan da na fassara sun buɗe sabon zamani ga addinin Buddha a Gabashin Asiya, kuma 'Tafiyar zuwa Yamma a Lokacin Daular Tang' (大唐西域記), wanda ya rubuta tafiyata, ya zama wani gado mai daraja wanda ba za a iya raba shi ba don nazarin Hanyar Siliki da tsohuwar Indiya a tsararraki masu zuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin falsafa mai yawo na ƙarni na 18 a Ukraine, wanda ya nemi rayuwa mai 'yanci da zaman lafiya na ciki, kuma ya kafa falsafarsa ta musamman.
key_achievements: Kafa tushen ilimi a Kwalejin Kyiv-Mohyla
Koyar da yadda ake tunani ta hanyar hanyoyin koyarwa na zamani
Rubuta tattaunawar falsafa ta musamman da waƙoƙi yayin yawo
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar tasiri mai zurfi a falsafar Ukraine, yana mai da hankali kan rayuwa mai 'yanci da zaman lafiya na ciki.

hryhorii-skovoroda.epic:
An haife shi a shekara ta 1722 a cikin gidan talakawa na Cossack a Hetmanate na Cossack. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna sha'awar ilimi mai ban mamaki, inda ya gina tushen iliminsa ta hanyar nazarin tsoffin harsuna, waka, falsafa, da kiɗa a Kwalejin Kyiv-Mohyla. Hazakarsa ta ba shi damar yin waka a cocin sarki a Saint Petersburg, amma ruhinsa ya yi marmarin ganin duniya mai faɗi. Ya koma Kwalejin don kammala karatunsa, amma zuciyarsa ta riga ta wuce iyakokin tsarin ilimi.

Bayan ya yi tafiye-tafiye a Turai, ya ziyarci cibiyoyin ilimi a Hungary, Austria, da Jamus, ya koma Ukraine ya zama malami. Ya koyar da ɗalibai a jami'o'in Pereiaslav da Kharkiv, amma hanyoyin koyarwarsa na zamani da tambayoyin falsafa waɗanda ba su daure da koyarwar gargajiya sun ci gaba da cin karo da hukumomin da suka rigaya. Ya yi ƙoƙarin koya wa ɗalibansa yadda za su yi tunani da kansu maimakon haddacewa, amma wannan ya jawo adawa daga coci da kuma masana ilimi, kuma a ƙarshe an kore shi sau da yawa.

Kusan shekara ta 1769, ya yanke shawarar barin duk ayyukan duniya kuma ya tafi neman 'yanci na gaskiya. Ya yi tafiya a duk faɗin Ukraine, yana dogara ga sanda ɗaya da jaka ɗaya. Ya zauna a gidajen abokai kuma ya raba falsafarsa ga duk waɗanda suka maraba da shi. A wannan lokacin ne ya rubuta muhimman tattaunawar falsafa, tatsuniyoyi, da waƙoƙinsa. Wannan rayuwar yawo ita ce 'aiki mai jituwa' a gare shi, kuma ita ce hanya mafi dacewa da yanayinsa.

Falsafarsa ta mai da hankali kan fahimtar jituwa ta duniya uku: macrocosm (sararin samaniya), microcosm (ɗan adam), da kuma duniya ta alama (Littafi Mai Tsarki). Ya koyar da cewa farin ciki na gaskiya ba a cikin dukiya ko daraja yake ba, amma a cikin fahimtar yanayin mutum da kuma samun zaman lafiya na ciki ta hanyar 'aiki mai jituwa' wanda ya dace da shi. A shekara ta 1794, ya tono kabarinsa da hannunsa, kuma ya rasu cikin kwanciyar hankali washegari. Rubutun kabarinsa, 'Duniya ta yi ƙoƙarin kama shi, amma ba ta iya ba,' ya taƙaita rayuwarsa mai 'yanci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Gertrude Bell matafiyiya ce 'yar Biritaniya, masaniyar kayan tarihi, kuma jami'ar siyasa a farkon karni na 20, wacce ta taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa ƙasar Iraki.
key_achievements: Jagorantar kafa Iraki da tsara iyakokinta
Tallafawa tawayen Larabawa da tattara bayanan sirri a Gabas ta Tsakiya
Ba da gudummawa ga kafa Gidan Tarihi na Ƙasa na Iraki
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta bar gado mai rikitarwa a matsayin mace a zamanin mulkin mallaka wacce ta yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Gabas ta Tsakiya.

gertrude-bell.epic:
Gertrude Bell (1868-1926) marubuciya ce 'yar Biritaniya, matafiyiya, masaniyar kayan tarihi, jami'ar siyasa, kuma 'yar leken asiri wacce ta yi aiki a farkon karni na 20 mai cike da rudani, lokacin da tasirin Daular Biritaniya ke faɗaɗa zuwa yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya. Ta fice daga tsauraran ka'idojin zamantakewa na zamanin Victoria da kuma rawar da ake tsammani daga mata, ta buɗe rayuwa mai cike da hankali da ruhin kasada. Gatan haihuwarta a cikin dangi masu masana'antu masu arziki ya ba ta ilimi mai zurfi da damar bincike kyauta. A matsayinta na ɗaya daga cikin mata na farko da suka kammala karatun tarihi na zamani da daraja ta farko daga Lady Margaret Hall na Jami'ar Oxford, ta nuna basirar iliminta tun da wuri. Amma maimakon fara rayuwar zamantakewa ta al'ada ko aure na manyan mata, ta jawo hankalinta ga duniya da ba a sani ba, tana hawan tsaunukan Alps masu tsauri da koyon harshen Farisa. Waɗannan abubuwan da ta fara fuskanta sun kafa harsashin rayuwarta, yantar da kai daga takunkumin al'ummar Biritaniya, tana mai zurfafa cikin al'adu da tarihi na Gabas. Rayuwarta za ta zama fiye da tafiya kawai; za ta zama gada ta musamman da ta haɗa Yamma da Gabas. 

Sha'awar Bell ga Gabas ta Tsakiya ta haɓaka zuwa kauna mai zurfi fiye da sha'awar ilimi kawai. Ta zama kwararriya a harshen Larabci da Farisa, ta rushe shingayen harshe, wanda ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ratsa manyan hamada, binciken tsoffin kango, da kulla dangantaka ta gaskiya da kabilun yankin. Tun daga farkon shekarun 1900, ta yi tafiye-tafiye da yawa a Siriya, Mesopotamiya, da yankin Larabawa, tana rubuta wuraren tarihi da kuma zana taswira dalla-dalla. Musamman ma, ta zauna tare da sarakunan Bedouin a cikin tantunansu, ta fahimci al'adunsu da dabi'unsu sosai kuma ta nuna musu girmamawa, wanda ya zama tushen samun amincewa da girmamawa mai zurfi daga mazauna yankin wanda babu wani jami'in diflomasiyya na Biritaniya namiji da zai iya samu cikin sauki a lokacin. Tafiye-tafiyenta ba kawai bincike ba ne, amma tsari ne na zurfafa cikin fahimta da rubuta tsarin zamantakewa mai rikitarwa da kuma yanayin siyasa na yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya. Bayanan da ta tattara, wato abubuwan da aka gano na tarihi da kuma cikakkun bayanai game da dangantakar kabilu, sun yi saurin samun daraja a matsayin muhimmin bayanan dabaru ga Daular Biritaniya yayin da inuwar Yaƙin Duniya na Farko ke gabatowa, sun wuce matsayin kayan ilimi kawai. 

Lokacin da Yaƙin Duniya na Farko ya barke, ƙwarewar Gertrude Bell a yankin Gabas ta Tsakiya da dangantakarta da mazauna yankin nan da nan hukumar leken asiri ta Biritaniya ta yi amfani da su. Ta shiga Ofishin Larabawa (Arab Bureau) da aka kafa a Alkahira a 1915, tana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tallafawa tawayen Larabawa a kan Daular Usmaniyya. Tare da T.E. Lawrence, ta ba da shawara mai mahimmanci kan haɗa kabilun Larabawa da cimma burin sojojin Biritaniya. Bayan yaƙin, rawar da ta taka ta zama mafi mahimmanci. A lokacin sake tsara tsarin Gabas ta Tsakiya bayan rugujewar Daular Usmaniyya, a taron Alkahira na 1921, ta yi amfani da tasirinta wajen shiga cikin yanke shawara kan makomar Mesopotamiya. Bell ta yi adawa da manufofin mulkin mallaka na Biritaniya a lokacin, tana mai nuna burin kishin ƙasa na Larabawa, ta yi kira da babbar murya ga kafa ƙasar Iraki mai cin gashin kanta tare da Faisal ibn Hussein a matsayin sarki. Iyakokin Iraki da ta gabatar har yau suna tsara yanayin siyasar yankin, kuma hakan ya sa ta sami laƙabin 'Sarauniyar Hamada'. Wannan ƙoƙari ne mai cike da ƙalubale na gina sabuwar ƙasa a yankin da ke da rikitarwa ta fuskar kabilanci da addini. 

Gertrude Bell, wacce ta yi shekarunta na ƙarshe a Baghdad, ta sadaukar da kanta ga sabuwar ƙasar Iraki da aka kafa, a matsayin mai ba da shawara ga Sarki Faisal I, ta ba da gudummawa wajen kafa tsarin gudanarwa da daidaita gwamnati. Musamman ma, ta yi ƙoƙari sosai wajen kiyaye tsoffin al'adun Iraki, ta sadaukar da kanta ga kafa Ma'aikatar Kayan Tarihi ta Iraki a 1922 da buɗe Gidan Tarihi na Iraki (Iraq Museum) a 1926. Wannan shine hangen nesanta na isar da gadon wayewar Mesopotamiya. Amma a bayan nasarorin jama'a akwai kaɗaici mai zurfi da bala'i na kashin kai. Ta mutu a Baghdad a ranar 12 ga Yuli, 1926, sakamakon yawan shan maganin barci, kuma an san cewa kashe kanta ne. Gadonta yana da rikitarwa: ana kallonta a matsayin wakiliyar Daular Biritaniya kuma mai kare al'adun Larabawa da 'yancin kai na ƙasa. Mutum ce mai ban mamaki wacce ta wuce iyakokin da aka sanya wa mata a zamanin mulkin mallaka, ta canza tafarkin tarihi, kuma, tare da Freya Stark, wacce ta yi aiki a Gabas ta Tsakiya a lokaci guda, ta yi tasiri a nazarin Gabas ta Tsakiya na zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nader Shah wani sarki ne wanda ya kafa daular Afsharid a ƙarni na 18 a Iran, wanda ya gina daula mai faɗi.
key_achievements: Kafa daular Afsharid (1736)
Fatattakar Afghan da sojojin Usmaniyya
Mamayar daular Mughal da wawushe Delhi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin babban mai tsara dabarun yaƙi, amma bayan mutuwarsa, daular ta ruguje cikin sauri.

nader-shah.epic:
Nader Shah (an haife shi kusan 1688, ya mutu 1747) wani sarki ne wanda ya kafa daular Afsharid a ƙarni na 18 a Iran, kuma ɗaya daga cikin sarakuna mafi ƙarfi a tarihin Farisa. A farkon ƙarni na 18, Farisa, wadda ke ƙarƙashin mulkin daular Safavid, ta shiga cikin matsanancin hargitsi da rarrabuwa saboda mamayar Afghan da kuma burin daular Usmaniyya da Rasha na faɗaɗa yankunansu. A cikin wannan lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali, Nader Shah ya bayyana a duniya da sunan Nader Qoli Beg, daga ƙabilar Turkmen Afshar a yankin Khorasan. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance mai tawali'u kuma cike da wahalhalu, har ma an taɓa sayar da shi a matsayin bawa. Amma da basirar soji ta halitta da kuma jagoranci na musamman, ya fara tattara ƙarfi a yankin, kuma a hankali ya fita daga zama shugaban 'yan fashi zuwa mai ɗaukar burin canza makomar Farisa mai cike da rudani. Ayyukansa na farko sun fi mayar da hankali kan haɗa kan ƙungiyoyin soji na yankin da kuma dawo da zaman lafiya, wanda ya zama tushen gina daularsa mai faɗi.

Basirar soji ta Nader Shah ba da daɗewa ba ta ja hankalin Tahmasp II, magajin ƙarshe na daular Safavid. An naɗa shi kwamandan sojojin Tahmasp II, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen korar Afghan da suka mamaye Farisa. Bayan nasarori a yaƙe-yaƙen Mihmandust da Murche-Khort, inda ya fatattaki sojojin Afghan, ya ci gaba da dawo da yankunan da aka rasa ta hanyar kayar da sojojin daular Usmaniyya da Rasha waɗanda suka mamaye yankin Farisa. Waɗannan nasarori sun ƙarfafa ikon Nader Shah cikin sauri, kuma a hankali ya daina gamsuwa da bautar sarki na suna. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1732, ya tsige Tahmasp II kuma ya naɗa ɗansa ƙarami Abbas III a matsayin sarki na suna. Sannan a shekara ta 1736, a filin Mughan, bayan shugabannin ƙabilu sun zaɓe shi, ya naɗa kansa Shah (sarki) na Farisa, inda ya kafa **daular Afsharid**. Daular Afsharid, wadda Nader Shah ya kafa a shekara ta 1736, ta sake haɗa kan Iran bayan hargitsin daular Safavid, kuma ta gina daula mai faɗi bisa ga ƙarfin sojinsa.

Bayan ya zama Shah, yaƙe-yaƙen Nader Shah sun kai kololuwarsu. Yaƙin neman zaɓensa mafi shahara shi ne mamayar daular Mughal a shekara ta 1739. Ya samu nasara mai girma a yaƙin Karnal kuma ya shiga Delhi, babban birnin Indiya, inda ya wawushe dukiya mai yawa. Ta hanyar wannan wawushewa, taskokin Mughal, ciki har da kursiyin Peacock da lu'ulu'u na Koh-i-Noor, sun zama muhimman albarkatun kuɗi ga daularsa. Sojojinsa sun gina daular Iran mafi faɗi tun bayan daular Sasanian, daga gabas zuwa kogin Indus, yamma zuwa Baghdad, da arewa zuwa tsakiyar Asiya. Amma yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa sun gajiya da jama'a, kuma mulkinsa ya zama mai tsanani. Bayan yunƙurin kisan kai, ya shiga cikin matsanancin shakka, har ma ya fara zargin waɗanda ya fi amincewa da su, kuma ya aikata mummunan aikin makantar da ɗansa Reza Qoli Mirza. Manufofinsa na haraji masu tsanani da mulkin zalunci sun haifar da tawaye a ko'ina cikin daular.

Ɗaukakar Nader Shah ba ta dawwama ba. A shekara ta 1747, a lokacin da tawaye ga mulkinsa na zalunci ke ƙaruwa, an kashe shi da hannun jami'ansa. Tare da mutuwarsa, daular Afsharid mai girma da ya gina da jini ta fara rarrabuwa da wargajewa cikin sauri. Ko da yake ya yi mulki na ɗan gajeren lokaci, Nader Shah ana tuna shi a matsayin babban mai tsara dabarun yaƙi da kuma mai cin nasara, kuma sau da yawa ana kiransa 'Napoleon na Farisa'. Ya dawo da cikakken yanki da ƙarfin soji na Iran na ɗan lokaci, amma salon mulkinsa na zalunci da yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa sun bar gadon rashin zaman lafiya mai zurfi a Iran bayan mutuwarsa. Gyare-gyarensa na soja da sabbin dabarun yaƙi sun yi tasiri ga sojojin Iran na gaba, amma hargitsin da Iran ta shiga bayan mutuwarsa, idan aka kwatanta da fitowar Karim Khan Zand, wani sarki mai ƙarfi na Iran a tsakiyar ƙarni na 18, ya nuna tasiri mai zurfi na mutuwar mutum ɗaya a kan makomar al'umma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Namık Kemal marubuci ne kuma mai tunani na Daular Usmaniyya a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya yaɗa ra'ayoyin 'ƙasa' da 'yanci' kuma ya jagoranci motsin zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa Young Ottomans da kuma ba da shawarar tsarin mulkin sarauta
Yaɗa ra'ayoyi ta hanyar buga jaridar 『Hürriyet』
Nuna wasan kwaikwayo 『Vatan Yahut Silistre』
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa na 'ƙasa' da 'yanci' sun ci gaba zuwa Young Turks da Atatürk, suna kafa tushen Turkiyya ta zamani.

namik-kemal.epic:
Namık Kemal (1840-1888) marubuci ne shahararre, ɗan jarida, kuma mai tunanin siyasa wanda ya yi aiki a lokacin tashin hankali na Daular Usmaniyya a ƙarni na 19. An haife shi a Tekirda, Daular Usmaniyya a shekara ta 1840, ya girma yana shaida lokacin da daular ke raguwa a hankali saboda matsin lamba daga ƙasashen Yamma da cin hanci da rashawa na ciki. Tun yana yaro, ya koyi Farisa, Larabci, da Faransanci, kuma ya zurfafa cikin adabin gargajiya na Gabas da Yamma. Aiki a Ofishin Fassara a Istanbul ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a tafiyarsa ta ilimi, inda ya fuskanci ayyukan masu tunanin wayewa na Yamma. Ya damu matuƙa game da raguwar ruhaniya na daular, fiye da asarar yanki kawai, kuma wannan damuwa ta zamani ta sa shi ɗaukar alƙalami don fara gwagwarmayar tunani don makomar ƙasarsa. Ya ɗauki yaɗa ra'ayoyin 'ƙasa' (vatan) da 'yanci' (hürriyet) a duk faɗin daular a matsayin manufarsa ta rayuwa; a nan, 'ƙasa' tana nufin ra'ayin raba asali da makomar al'umma fiye da yanki kawai, kuma 'yanci' ya ƙunshi ma'anar zamani na haƙƙoƙin mutum da shiga siyasa.

Waɗannan ra'ayoyin Namık Kemal masu ci gaba sun zama barazana kai tsaye ga tsarin mulkin kama-karya na Sultan a lokacin. Tare da abokan aiki masu ra'ayi ɗaya kamar İbrahim Şinasi da Ziya Pasha, ya kafa ƙungiyar asiri ta 'Young Ottomans'. Sun yi kira da babbar murya don gabatar da tsarin mulkin sarauta da kafa majalisa don sabunta Daular Usmaniyya, suna jagorantar motsin masu ilimi don sake fasalin daular. Yayin da muryoyinsu ke ƙaruwa, matsin lamba daga Sultan Abdülaziz ya ƙaru, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1867, Namık Kemal da abokan aikin sa sun tilasta musu yin gudun hijira zuwa Paris da London. A gudun hijira, sun buga jaridar da ake kira 『Hürriyet』, suna jaddada buƙatar sake fasalin Daular Usmaniyya, ƙasarsu, da kuma yaɗa imaninsu ga 'yanci da adalci. 'Hürriyet' kalma ce ta Turkanci da ke nufin 'yanci', kuma wannan jarida ta samar da muhimman bayanai da tushen tunani ga masu kawo sauyi a ciki da wajen daular, tana wakiltar jajircewarsu na ci gaba da gwagwarmaya don makomar ƙasarsu, ko da daga nesa.

A shekara ta 1871, Namık Kemal ya koma Daular Usmaniyya kuma ya zaɓi sabon tsarin wasan kwaikwayo don yaɗa ra'ayoyinsa ga jama'a yadda ya kamata. A shekara ta 1873, lokacin da aka fara nuna ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, wasan kwaikwayo 『Vatan Yahut Silistre』, a Istanbul, ya jawo martani mai zafi daga masu kallo masu kishin ƙasa. Wasan kwaikwayon ya ba da labarin jaruntakar sojojin da ke kare sansanin Silistre a lokacin Yaƙin Usmaniyya-Rasha, yana jaddada sadaukarwa ga ƙasa da darajar 'yanci. Manyan zanga-zangar da kishin ƙasa da wasan kwaikwayon ya haifar sun zama babban nauyi ga gwamnatin lokacin, kuma a ƙarshe, an sake kama Namık Kemal kuma ya fuskanci gwaji na tsare shi na tsawon watanni 38 a sansanin Famagusta a tsibirin Cyprus. Amma bangon kurkuku bai hana shi daga sha'awar kirkirarsa ba. A can, ya rubuta littafin 『İntibah』, wanda ke da muhimmiyar matsayi a tarihin adabin Usmaniyya, yana nuna ruhin jajircewa na rashin barin alƙalami ko da a cikin mawuyacin hali.

Namık Kemal ya shiga cikin tsara Kundin Tsarin Mulki na Usmaniyya na Farko a shekara ta 1876, kuma ya ga burin tsarin mulkin sarauta ya cika na ɗan lokaci. Amma lokacin da sabon Sultan Abdülhamid II ya dakatar da kundin tsarin mulki kuma ya rusa majalisa bayan hawansa mulki, fatansa na sake fasalin ya sake rushewa. Bayan haka, ya fuskanci tsanantawa ta siyasa marar yankewa, ciki har da gudun hijira zuwa tsibiran Aegean daban-daban, kuma a ƙarshe ya mutu a tsibirin Chios a shekara ta 1888, yana kawo ƙarshen rayuwa mai cike da tashin hankali. Ko da yake bai ga cikakken 'yanci da ƙasa ta zamani a lokacin rayuwarsa ba, irin 'ƙasa' da 'yanci' da ya shuka sun ci gaba zuwa juyin juya halin 'Young Turks' na gaba da Mustafa Kemal Atatürk, uban Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, kuma a ƙarshe sun zama tushen sabuwar Turkiyya. Ra'ayoyinsa da adabinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga motsin sake fasalin Daular Usmaniyya, kuma sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu ilimi a wasu motsin zamani, kamar motsin Nahda a duniyar Larabawa a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Nasir al-Din al-Tusi wani babban masanin kimiyya ne na Farisa a Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci a karni na 13, wanda ya bar gagarumar gudunmawa a fannin ilimin taurari, lissafi, da falsafa.
key_achievements: Jagoranci gina da gudanar da gidan binciken taurari na Maragheh
Kirkiro sabon samfurin geometric, 'Tusi couple'
Tattara teburin taurari masu daidaito, 'Zij-i Ilkhani'
Bunkasa trigonometry a matsayin fanni mai zaman kansa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gudunmawarsa a fannin ilimin taurari da lissafi ta yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban kimiyya a Turai, fiye da duniyar Musulunci.

nasir-al-din-al-tusi.epic:
Nasir al-Din al-Tusi (1201-1274) ya kasance wani babban masanin kimiyya na Farisa daga Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci a karni na 13, wanda ya bar gagarumar gudunmawa a fannoni daban-daban kamar lissafi, ilimin taurari, falsafa, da likitanci. Cikakken sunansa shine Muhammad ibn Muhammad ibn al-Hasan al-Tusi, kuma an haife shi a shekara ta 1201 a birnin Tus mai tarihi a arewa maso gabashin Farisa. Zamaninsa ya kasance cike da rudani na siyasa da hargitsi na zamantakewa saboda mamayar Daular Mongol, amma kuma lokaci ne da ake gudanar da bincike na ilimi sosai. Tun yana yaro, ya sami ilimi mai zurfi a duk fannonin ilimi na lokacin, kamar tauhidi, falsafa, lissafi, ilimin taurari, da likitanci, yana nuna sha'awar ilimi marar yankewa. Musamman ma, an kai shi zuwa gidan sarauta na Alamut, cibiyar ilimi ta Isma'ili, inda tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta shiga sabon mataki. Wannan lokacin ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gabansa na ilimi, kuma ya zama tushen manyan nasarorinsa na gaba.

Rayuwa a gidan sarauta na Alamut ta zama wani muhimmin canji ga Tusi. Da farko an dauke shi a matsayin bako, amma a hankali ya zama kamar fursuna, kuma dole ne ya zauna a can tsawon shekaru da yawa. Duk da wannan kamewa ta jiki, ruhinsa ya ci gaba da bincika zurfin ilimi da 'yanci. Ya yi amfani da wannan lokacin na keɓewa wajen rubuta muhimman ayyuka da yawa. Ya yi nazari mai zurfi kan falsafar Aristotle da Ibn Sina, ya sake fassara ilimin lissafi na Euclid, kuma musamman ya bincika kurakuran samfurin Ptolemy na geocentric. A cikin wannan tsari, ya kirkiro ra'ayin 'Tusi couple', wani sabon tsarin geometric don bayyana motsin taurari. Tusi couple wani samfurin lissafi ne wanda ke bayyana yadda wani karamin da'ira ke birgima a cikin wani babban da'ira, yana sa wani batu ya motsa a mike, kuma ana kyautata zaton ya yi tasiri kai tsaye ga binciken Copernicus na heliocentrism a nan gaba.

A shekara ta 1256, lokacin da sojojin Mongol karkashin jagorancin Hulagu Khan, jikan Genghis Khan, suka kewaye gidan sarauta na Alamut, rayuwar Tusi ta sake fuskantar wani gagarumin canji. Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen tattaunawar mika wuya na gidan sarauta, ta hanyar amfani da hikimarsa da basirarsa ta diflomasiyya. Wannan ya hana zubar da jini mara amfani kuma ya ceci ransa. Hulagu Khan ya burge shi da zurfin ilimin Tusi na ilimin taurari da kuma zurfin iliminsa, kuma ya nada shi a matsayin mai ba shi shawara kan kimiyya. Abin mamaki, kwarewarsa a Alamut, inda aka taɓa tsare shi, ta 'yantar da shi kuma ta ba shi sabbin damammaki. A karkashin goyon bayan Hulagu Khan mai karfi, Tusi ya fara aikin gina gidan binciken taurari na Maragheh, wanda shine daya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa na rayuwa. Ta hanyar wannan gidan binciken taurari, ya kafa tushe don gudanar da bincike na ilimin taurari mafi ci gaba a lokacin, ba kawai a cikin duniyar Musulunci ba har ma a duniya baki daya.

Gidan binciken taurari na Maragheh ya kasance mafi haske a cikin gadon ilimi na Tusi. Ya gayyaci manyan masana na lokacin daga yankuna masu fadi, daga China zuwa Spain, don gudanar da gidan binciken taurari, kuma tare suka lura da motsin taurari daidai kuma suka kirkiro sabbin teburin taurari. Littafin 'Zij-i Ilkhani' da suka tattara ya zama muhimmin tushen ilimin taurari a duniyar Musulunci da Turai tsawon karnoni. Bincikensa na ilimin taurari, ciki har da Tusi couple, ya kasance yunkuri na shawo kan iyakokin samfurin Ptolemy, kuma wannan ya ba da muhimmiyar kwarin gwiwa ga masana ilimin taurari na zamanin Renaissance na Turai a nan gaba. Bugu da kari, ya bunkasa trigonometry a matsayin wani fanni mai zaman kansa a fannin lissafi, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga falsafar Musulunci ta hanyar littafinsa na da'a, 'Akhlaq-i Nasiri'. Nasarorinsa sun wuce tarin ilimi kawai, sun ba da gudunmawa wajen yada hanyoyin kimiyya da ruhin bincike ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Tasirinsa ya ci gaba daga hikimar masana na baya kamar Ibn Sina, har zuwa masana na Yamma na gaba kamar Copernicus, yana tabbatar da duniya baki daya na ilimi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban sarki wanda ya kafa Sabuwar Daular Babila, ya ci Gabas ta Tsakiya, kuma ya gina Babila ta zama birni na duniya.
key_achievements: Samun ikon Gabas ta Tsakiya ta hanyar cin nasara a Yaƙin Karkemish.
Lalata Urushalima da kuma rugujewar Masarautar Yahuda.
Ginin Ƙofar Ishtar ta Babila, Lambunan Rataye, da sauransu.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna da shi a matsayin babban mai gini kuma mai cin nasara mara tausayi, a matsayin mai halakarwa ga Yahudawa, kuma a matsayin sarki wanda ya buɗe zamanin ɗaukaka ga mazaunan Babila.

nebuchadnezzar-ii.epic:
Shi ne Nebuchadnezzar II, ɗan Nabopolassar, wanda ya kafa Sabuwar Daular Babila. Kaddararsa ta fara ne a filin yaƙi tun kafin ya hau gadon sarauta. A shekara ta 605 K.Z., ya murkushe haɗin gwiwar sojojin Masar da Assuriya a Yaƙin Karkemish, inda ya sanya ikon Gabas ta Tsakiya a hannun Babila. Lokacin da ya gaji mahaifinsa ya zama sarki, burinsa ɗaya ne kawai: ya mai da Babila ta zama daula mafi girma kuma madawwamiya a duniya.

Sarautarsa ta kasance ci gaba da cin nasara da iko. Musamman ma tawayen yankin Levant ya gwada haƙurinsa. Masarautar Yahuda ta ci gaba da ƙalubalantar ikonsa, kuma a shekara ta 597 K.Z., ya fara kewaye Urushalima, daga ƙarshe kuma a shekara ta 586 K.Z., ya lalata birninsu da Haikalin Sulemanu mai tsarki gaba ɗaya. Ya jawo mutanensu zuwa Babila, ya nuna wa duniya duka abin da ke faruwa ga waɗanda suka yi tawaye ga daularsa. Ko da yake akwai yaƙe-yaƙe masu wuya kamar dogon kewaye na Taya, ba a taɓa karya nufinsa ba.

Shi mai halakarwa ne kuma a lokaci guda babban mai gini. Ya zuba dukiya mai yawa da ya samu daga yaƙe-yaƙe, ya mai da babban birninsa, Babila, birni wanda har gumaka za su yi sha'awa. Daga babbar Ƙofar Ishtar da aka yi wa ado da bulo mai shuɗi, zuwa Ziggurat na Etemenanki wanda ya kai sama, har zuwa shahararrun Lambunan Rataye waɗanda aka ce ya gina don matarsa ta Mediya. Gine-ginensa sun kasance shaidar ikon Babila da ɗaukakarta, da kuma tsoronsa ga gumaka.

Sarautarsa ta shekaru 43 ta kawo kwanciyar hankali da wadata ga daular. Wasu rubuce-rubuce sun ce ya sha wahalar hauka na shekaru bakwai a matsayin hukunci ga girman kai, amma daga ƙarshe ya dawo da mulkinsa da hankalinsa. Ya mutu ya tafi wurin gumaka, amma gadonsa yana da bangarori biyu. Za a tuna da shi a matsayin babban mai gini kuma mai cin nasara mara tausayi, a matsayin mai halakarwa ga Yahudawa, kuma a matsayin sarki wanda ya buɗe zamanin ɗaukaka ga mazaunan Babila. Sunansa, Nebuchadnezzar, zai ci gaba da yin amo a cikin tarihi har abada.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani mutum wanda ya jagoranci daular Seljuk zuwa zamanin zinare a matsayin waziri kuma ya kafa tushen daular ta hanyar kafa makarantun Nizamiyya.
key_achievements: Jagorancin Zamanin Zinare na Daular Seljuk
Kafa da gudanar da makarantun Nizamiyya
Rubuta 'Siyasatnama', jagora ga mulkin kasa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadon cibiyoyinsa ya yi tasiri mai zurfi fiye da daular Seljuk, yana shafar tsararraki masu zuwa.

nizam-al-mulk.epic:
Sunansa Abu Ali Hasan ibn Ali Tusi, an haife shi a Tus, Farisa, amma duniya ta tuna shi da Nizam al-Mulk, ma'ana 'Tsarin Mulki'. Ya fara aikin gwamnati a daular Ghaznavid kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya ja hankalin babban Sarkin Seljuk, Alp Arslan. Ganin iyawarsa ta gudanarwa, ya zama waziri, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa wajen kafa tushen daula mai faɗi. Manufarsa ba kawai cin nasara ba ce, amma don cimma adalci da kwanciyar hankali a mulki.

Bayan an kashe Sultan Alp Arslan, ya taimaki ɗansa Malik-Shah I ya gaji sarauta a cikin rudani. Tsawon shekaru 20 masu zuwa, ya yi mulki a matsayin mai mulkin daular, yana jagorantar zamanin zinare na Seljuk. Ya gyara tsarin haraji, ya sake tsara sojoji, kuma ya kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi na tsakiya wanda ya haɗa da al'ummomi da al'adu daban-daban a cikin daular. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, daular ta ji daɗin wadata da kwanciyar hankali da ba a taɓa gani ba.

Babban abin alfaharinsa shi ne kafa makarantun da ake kira 'Nizamiyya'. Waɗannan makarantu, waɗanda aka gina a manyan birane kamar Baghdad, Isfahan, da Nishapur, ba kawai cibiyoyin ilimi ba ne. Sun kasance cibiyoyin ilimin tauhidin Musulunci na Sunni kuma wuraren horar da jami'ai da malamai masu ƙwarewa don jagorantar daular. Ya yi imani cewa ilimi ne ginshiƙi mafi ƙarfi da ke tallafawa daular. Ya kuma ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban kimiyya da fasaha ta hanyar tallafa wa malamai kamar Omar Khayyam.

Duk da haka, babban ikonsa ya haifar da makiya da yawa a cikin fada. Ya ci gaba da faɗa da ƙungiyoyi daban-daban, musamman Terken Khatun, matar Malik-Shah. A cikin waɗannan rikice-rikice, ya rubuta 'Siyasatnama' (Littafin Gwamnati), wanda ya tattara falsafar mulkinsa. A ƙarshe, a cikin 1092, ya faɗi ga wuƙar wani ɗan kisan kai da Hashashin suka aiko. Mutuwarsa ta buɗe farkon raguwar daular Seljuk, amma gadon cibiyoyin da ya kafa ya dawwama har tsawon tsararraki.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Darius I ya kasance sarki wanda ya jagoranci Daular Achaemenid ta Farisa zuwa zamanin ta na zinariya, ya faɗaɗa yankuna masu yawa kuma ya kafa ingantaccen tsarin gudanarwa.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar Rubutun Behistun da tabbatar da halaccin sarauta
Faɗaɗa yankunan daular mai girma da murƙushe tawaye
Kafa Satrapies, Hanyar Sarauta, da gyaran kuɗi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ingantaccen tsarin gudanarwarsa da hanyar mulkinsa sun zama abin koyi ga dauloli na gaba, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a tsohuwar duniya.

darius-i.epic:
Darius I (an haife shi kusan 550 BC, ya yi mulki daga 522 BC zuwa 486 BC) ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin manyan sarakunan Daular Achaemenid ta Farisa, wanda ya jagoranci daular zuwa zamanin ta na zinariya. Shi ɗan gidan sarauta ne na Achaemenid, amma ba zuriyar Cyrus Mai Girma kai tsaye ba, don haka ya kasance mai nisa daga gadon sarauta. Kaddararsa ta canza sosai a shekara ta 522 BC, lokacin da Cambyses II ya mutu a lokacin balaguron Masar, kuma wani Magus mai suna Gaumata ya kwace sarauta, yana mai da kansa Yarima Bardiya. Darius ya gane cewa wannan mai kwace sarauta ɗan damfara ne, kuma tare da wasu manyan Farisa shida, sun shirya makirci kuma suka yi nasarar hambarar da Gaumata. Bayan wannan juyin mulki, ya hau gadon sarauta a ranar 29 ga Satumba, 522 BC. Don tabbatar da halaccin mulkinsa, Darius ya bar wani babban rubutu a kan dutsen Behistun, wanda aka rubuta a cikin harsuna uku – Tsohon Farisa, Elamite, da Akkadian – yana bayyana nasarorinsa da ikon sarauta da Ahura Mazda ya ba shi. Wannan rubutun ya zama wata muhimmiyar gadon tarihi, yana ba da mahimman bayanai don fassarar tsoffin harsunan Farisa, Elamite, da Akkadian. Wannan rubutun ya kasance sanarwa mai ƙarfi ga duniya cewa mulkinsa nufin Allah ne.

Da zaran ya hau gadon sarauta, Darius ya fuskanci manyan tawaye da suka bazu ko'ina cikin daular kamar wutar daji. Kusan dukkan larduna, ciki har da Babila, Elam, Media, Parthia, Assuriya, da Masar, sun ƙi amincewa da halaccinsa kuma suka yi tawaye. A cikin kimanin shekara guda bayan hawansa mulki, ya jagoranci yaƙe-yaƙe 19 da kansa, kuma dole ne ya murƙushe duk waɗannan tawaye da juriya. A cikin wannan tsari, ya nuna bajintar soji da jagoranci mai ƙarfi, yana mai dawo da tsari ga daular da ke cikin rudani. Bayan ya yi nasarar murƙushe tawaye da dawo da zaman lafiya ga daular, Darius ya mai da hankali kan faɗaɗa yankuna. Ya faɗaɗa tasirin daular zuwa kwarin Indus a gabas, da Thrace da Macedonia a Turai a yamma, yana gina daular mafi girma a tarihin Achaemenid. Ko da yake balaguron Scythian ya gaza ba tare da wani babban nasara ba saboda dabarun yaƙi na makiyaya na Scythians a arewacin Tekun Black, kuma tawayen Ionian na 499 BC ya buɗe kofa ga dogon rikici da biranen Girka, wato Yaƙe-yaƙe na Farisa, daularsa ta sami ƙarfi mai girma wanda babu wanda zai iya kalubalanta.

Darius ya yi imani cewa ainihin ƙarfin daula ba ya fitowa daga cin nasarar yankuna kawai, amma daga ingantaccen mulki da tsarin gudanarwa mai dorewa. Don gudanar da babban daularsa yadda ya kamata, ya raba ta zuwa kusan larduna 20 (Satrapies), kuma ya kafa tsarin mulki na tsakiya ta hanyar tura gwamnoni zuwa kowane lardi. Don hana tattara iko, ya aiwatar da ka'idar bincike da daidaito ta hanyar buƙatar masu karɓar haraji da kwamandojin sojoji su ba da rahoto kai tsaye ga sarki, daban da gwamnoni. Bugu da ƙari, don saurin isar da bayanai da motsin kayayyaki a cikin daular, ya gina "Hanyar Sarauta" (Royal Road) mai tsawon kimanin kilomita 2,700 daga Susa zuwa Sardis, kuma ya gabatar da tsarin tashoshin sakonni, yana ƙarfafa haɗin kai na daular. Wannan ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin hanyoyin sadarwa da sufuri mafi ci gaba a tsohuwar duniya. Don haɗin kan tattalin arziki, ya gabatar da tsarin kuɗi na daidaitawa wanda ke amfani da zinariya Daric da azurfa Siglos a duk faɗin daular, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga haɓaka kasuwanci da haɓaka arzikin daular. Waɗannan gyare-gyarensa sun kafa harsashin daular mai yawan kabilu don bunƙasa cikin kwanciyar hankali.

Darius ya fara gina sabon babban birni, Persepolis, a matsayin aikin alama don nuna ikonsa da arzikinsa, da kuma haɗa kan al'ummomi daban-daban na daular. Wannan wuri ya faɗaɗa sosai ta hanyar magadansa, kuma ya zama alamar girman daular Achaemenid da ƙwarewar fasaharta. Ya so a tuna da shi ba kawai a matsayin mai cin nasara wanda ya faɗaɗa yankuna ba, amma a matsayin mai mulki wanda ya kawo zaman lafiya da wadata ga daular mai yawan kabilu ta hanyar doka da oda, da kuma ingantaccen tsarin gudanarwa. Darius I ya mutu a shekara ta 486 BC, kuma gadonsa ya wuce ga ɗansa, Xerxes I. Daular mai ƙarfi da ya gina ta ci gaba da wanzuwa na dogon lokaci, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Gabas ta Tsakiya ta dā. Hanyar mulkinsa ta yi tasiri kai tsaye ga tsarin gudanarwa na manyan dauloli na gaba kamar Daular Roma, kuma ya zama abin koyi ga sauran sarakunan dā waɗanda suka yi mafarkin ingantaccen mulki na tsakiya. Don haka, ya cancanci a yi nazari a kai ta hanyar kwatanta shi da hanyoyin mulki na masu cin nasara na gaba kamar Alexander Mai Girma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Rashid Rida masanin tunani ne mai kawo sauyi a Musulunci a Masar a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci zamantar da Musulunci ta hanyar 'Al-Manar'.
key_achievements: Kafa mujallar gyara ta Musulunci 'Al-Manar'
Sukar Taqlid da jaddada Ijtihad
Gabatar da samfurin ƙasar Musulunci ta zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya haɗa Salafism da zamantar Musulunci kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga motsin farfaɗo da Musulunci na ƙarni na 20.

rashid-rida.epic:
Rashid Rida (an haife shi a shekara ta 1865) wani masanin tunani mai kawo sauyi a Musulunci kuma ɗan jarida wanda ya yi aiki a Daular Usmaniyya da Masar a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 zuwa farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya yi mafarkin farfaɗo da ilimi a duniyar Musulunci. An haife shi a shekara ta 1865 a wani ƙaramin gari mai suna Al-Qalamoun kusa da Tripoli a Siriya ta Daular Usmaniyya, kuma ya girma yana samun ilimin Musulunci na gargajiya. Lokacin kuruciyarsa ya zo daidai da babban canjin zamani na faɗuwar Daular Usmaniyya da haɓakar tasirin ƙasashen Yamma. Rida ya shiga cikin damuwa mai zurfi game da dalilin da ya sa duniyar Musulunci ta tsaya cak a fannin ilimi kuma ta raunana a fannin siyasa. A cikin wannan yanayi na zamani, ya nemi samun amsa mai tushe don farfaɗo da wayewar Musulunci, fiye da samun ilimi kawai. Bincikensa ya fara ne bisa ga zurfin girmamawa ga al'adun Musulunci da kuma fahimtar ƙalubalen zamani da ake fuskanta, wanda ya zama ginshiƙin motsin gyara da zai jagoranta daga baya. Ya yi imani cewa don dawo da ɗaukakar Musulunci, dole ne a sake fassara hikimar da ta gabata don dacewa da buƙatun zamani.

Wani muhimmin canji a tafiyar ilimi ta Rida ya zo ne lokacin da ya koma Alkahira, Masar a shekara ta 1897. A nan ne ya sadu da Muhammad Abduh, babban masanin tunani na zamani na Musulunci a lokacin. Tunanin Abduh na kawo sauyi ya ba Rida kwarin gwiwa sosai, kuma su biyun sun haɗa kai don cimma burin farfaɗo da ilimi da gyara a duniyar Musulunci. A shekara ta 1898, sun kafa wata mujalla mai suna 'Al-Manar' (ma'ana 'fitila' a Larabci) a matsayin hanyar yaɗa tunaninsu. 'Al-Manar' ba mujalla ce kawai ba, ta kasance zuciyar motsinsu na kawo sauyi da kuma babban dandamali don komawa ga tushen Musulunci da kuma tattaunawa da ƙalubalen duniya ta zamani. Ta hanyar wannan mujalla, Rida da Abduh sun yi nazarin matsaloli daban-daban na al'ummar Musulunci a hankali, sun ba da shawarwari don gyara, kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga masana Musulunci. Bayan rasuwar Muhammad Abduh a shekara ta 1905, Rida ya ci gaba da gadon malaminsa, yana jagorantar 'Al-Manar' shi kaɗai fiye da shekaru 30, yana ci gaba da zama fitilar tunanin gyara na Musulunci.

Ta hanyar 'Al-Manar', Rida ya soki 'Taqlid' (bin al'ada makaho) sosai, wanda aka nuna a matsayin dalilin tsayawar Musulunci da cin hanci da rashawa, kuma ya jaddada muhimmancin 'Ijtihad' (ƙoƙarin masana shari'ar Musulunci na yin hukunci na shari'a da kansu bisa ga Alkur'ani da Sunnah). Ya yi imani da gaske cewa Musulunci ba wai kawai yana iya dacewa da kimiyya da falsafar zamani ba ne, amma kuma Musulunci na gaskiya shi ne tushen ilimi da wayewa. Tunanin Rida ya faɗaɗa zuwa sake fassarar shari'ar Musulunci, gyaran ilimi, da kuma tattaunawa mai zurfi game da tsarin siyasa. Musamman ma, a cikin yanayin tashin hankali na haɓakar kishin ƙasa na Larabawa da faɗuwar Khalifancin Usmaniyya, ya tsara wani samfurin ƙasar Musulunci ta zamani wanda ya dogara ga Shari'a (dokar Musulunci) amma yana aiki bisa ga ƙa'idar 'Shura' (shawara ko tattaunawa). Wannan ya nuna zurfin tunaninsa na haɗa ƙa'idodin mulki na zamani yayin da yake kiyaye ainihin Musulunci. Ya yi iƙirarin cewa al'ummar Musulunci dole ne su fuskanci ƙalubalen zamani da ƙarfinsu.

A cikin shekarunsa na ƙarshe, tunanin Rida ya ɗan karkata zuwa ga ra'ayin mazan jiya a ƙarƙashin tasirin Wahhabism da kuma girgizar faɗuwar Khalifancin Usmaniyya a shekara ta 1924. Duk da haka, tafiyarsa ta ilimi ta bar wata alama mai zurfi da ba za a iya gogewa ba a duniyar Musulunci. Ya gina gada tsakanin tunanin gyara na zamani na malaminsa Muhammad Abduh da kuma ƙa'idodin Salafi (motsi na komawa ga tsarkakakken tsarin Musulunci na farko), kuma ta hanyar ƙoƙarin haɗa su biyun, ya buɗe sabon fage a tunanin Musulunci. Rubuce-rubucensa da tunaninsa ta hanyar 'Al-Manar' sun yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin Musulunci na ƙarni na 20 gaba ɗaya, daga Ƙungiyar 'Yan Uwa Musulmi da Hasan al-Banna ya kafa zuwa motsin Salafi daban-daban na baya. Rayuwar Rida ta kasance rikodin gwagwarmayar ilimi mai tsanani don kiyaye ainihin Musulunci yayin da yake amsa canje-canjen zamani da ƙwazo. Tunaninsa ya yi daidai da ƙoƙarin sauran masu kawo sauyi na zamani waɗanda suka damu da zamantar da duniyar Musulunci da kafa asali, kuma ya samar da wani muhimmin rafi na motsin farfaɗo da Musulunci na ƙarni na 20.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shah na Iran wanda ya kawo ƙarshen daular Qajar, ya kafa daular Pahlavi, ya zamantar da Iran, amma ya sauka daga mulki a lokacin Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu.
key_achievements: Kafa daular Pahlavi da kuma zama Shah.
Gina layin dogo na Trans-Iran da kafa Jami'ar Tehran.
Gudanar da gyare-gyare a tsarin shari'a da na kuɗi, da kuma ci gaba da zamantar da ƙasa.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana ɗaukar shi a matsayin wanda ya kafa tushen Iran ta zamani kuma ya gina ƙasa mai ƙarfi da tsakiya.

reza-shah.epic:
Tafiyarsa ta fara ne a wani ƙaramin ƙauye a Mazandaran, amma burinsa ya wuce iyakokin Farisa. Ya ga yadda ƙasarsa ke rabuwa saboda faɗuwar daular Qajar da kuma tsoma bakin ƙasashen waje. A matsayinsa na soja a rundunar Cossack ta Farisa, ya yi imani cewa horo da ƙarfi ne kawai za su iya ceton al'ummarsu. Ya hau matsayi a hankali, kuma idanunsa koyaushe suna kan Tehran, cibiyar iko.

A shekarar 1921, ya yanke shawarar riƙe igiyar tarihi a hannunsa. Ta hanyar juyin mulki, ya zama Ministan Yaƙi, kuma ba da daɗewa ba ya zama Firayim Minista. Daular Qajar mai cin hanci da rashawa da rashin iya aiki ba za ta iya jagorantar Farisa ba. A shekarar 1925, Majalisar Dokoki ta zaɓe shi a matsayin sabon Shah, kuma ta haka ne daular Pahlavi ta fara. Bai ƙara zama Reza Khan ba. Shi ne Shah na Iran, Reza Shah Pahlavi.

Mulkinsa nan da nan ya zama daidai da zamantar da Iran. Ya gina layin dogo na Trans-Iran, ya kafa Jami'ar Tehran, kuma ya gyara tsarin shari'a da na kuɗi. Ya yi ƙoƙarin gina ƙasa mai ƙarfi da tsakiya. Wasu daga cikin manufofinsa sun haifar da cece-kuce. Musamman, dokar 'Kashf-e hijab' da ta tilasta wa mata cire mayafinsu ta fuskanci turjiya mai yawa. Amma ya yi imani da gaske cewa Iran dole ne ta watsar da tsoffin al'adu don ci gaba. Mulkinsa ya kasance mai iko, amma duk abin da ya yi yana da manufa ɗaya tak: Iran mai ƙarfi da cin gashin kai.

Amma ƙaddarar duniya ta wuce ikonsa. Lokacin da Yaƙin Duniya na Biyu ya barke, matsayin Iran na dabaru ya zama abin sha'awa ga ƙasashen Allied da Axis. Ya ayyana tsaka-tsaki, amma Birtaniya da Tarayyar Soviet sun yi zargin cewa yana goyon bayan Jamus. A shekarar 1941, sun mamaye Iran, kuma dole ne ya sauka daga gadon sarauta don ɗansa Mohammad Reza. Ya mutu a gudun hijira a Afirka ta Kudu, amma gadonsa, Iran ta zamani, ya ci gaba da rayuwa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mani annabi ne kuma shugaban addini na Farisa a ƙarni na 3, wanda ya kafa Manichaeism, wanda ya haɗa Zoroastrianism, Kiristanci, da Buddha.
key_achievements: Kafa Manichaeism da tsara koyarwarsa
Faɗaɗa addini a ƙarƙashin tallafin Sarkin Daular Sasanian
Rubuta littattafai da yada su ta amfani da zane-zane
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ko da yake Manichaeism ya ɓace, tunanin Mani ya yi tasiri kai tsaye ga addinai da falsafanci na baya.

mani.epic:
Mani, annabin Farisa kuma wanda ya kafa addinin Manichaeism, an haife shi a ranar 14 ga Afrilu, 216. An haife shi a wani ƙauye a Babylonia, tsakiyar Daular Parthian a ƙarshen zamanin da, kuma an ce yana da alaƙa da gidan sarauta na Arsacids. Tun yana yaro, Mani ya girma a cikin al'ummar baftisma da ake kira Elkasaites, wanda ke da tushen Yahudawa-Kirista, inda ya kafa tushen bincikensa na ruhaniya mai zurfi. Lokacin da ya kai shekara goma sha biyu, ya fara samun wahayi na sama. Tagwayensa na ruhaniya, wato 'Syzygos', ya bayyana gare shi, yana sanar da wata babbar manufa ga bil'adama. Ta hanyar wannan haɗuwa mai ban mamaki, Mani ya fara fahimtar cewa addinan da ke wanzu a duniya a lokacin ba su cika ba, kuma shi kaɗai ne aka ƙaddara ya kawo sabon wahayi wanda zai haɗa dukkan gaskiya kuma ya ba da hanyar ceto ta duniya. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya tsara alkiblar rayuwarsa da tunaninsa.

Lokacin da ya kai shekara ashirin da huɗu, Mani ya sake samun wahayi daga tagwayensa na ruhaniya, inda aka umarce shi ya fara aikinsa na jama'a. Ya bar al'ummar Elkasaites da suka rene shi kuma ya fara doguwar tafiya zuwa Indiya. A wannan tafiya, ya faɗaɗa hangen nesansa na addini ta hanyar saduwa da zurfin hikimar Buddha da ra'ayoyi daban-daban na Hindu. Mani ya yi nazari sosai kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin haɗa ra'ayoyin Zoroastrian na dualism na haske da duhu, ra'ayin Mai Ceto na Kiristanci, da kuma ra'ayoyin Buddha na sake haifuwa da 'yanci. Ya tsara wani addini na duniya, wato Manichaeism, wanda ke da nufin ceton rayukan dukkan bil'adama, ba tare da iyakancewa ga wata kabila ko al'ada ba. Manichaeism addini ne na Gnostic wanda ya bunƙasa sosai a ƙarshen zamanin da (ƙarni na 2 zuwa na 8), tsarin imani ne wanda ke ganin wanzuwar abubuwa na duniya a matsayin mugunta kuma yana neman ceto ta hanyar wayewar ruhaniya. Koyarwarsa ta sami babban tasiri a tsakanin mutane daga al'adu daban-daban kuma ta nuna yuwuwar yaduwa cikin sauri.

Bayan ya dawo Farisa, Mani ya sami damar ganawa da Shapur I, babban sarki na Daular Sasanian. Sarkin ya burge shi sosai da hikimar Mani da hangen nesansa, kuma ya ba shi izini a hukumance don yada koyarwarsa a duk faɗin daular. A ƙarƙashin tallafin Shapur I, almajiran Mani, wato 'Zaɓaɓɓu' da 'Masu Sauraro', sun yada bishara har zuwa Asiya ta Tsakiya da China a gabas, da kuma Daular Roma a yamma, inda suka haɓaka Manichaeism zuwa addini na duniya. Mani ya tsara koyarwarsa a tsari kuma ya rubuta littattafai da yawa da kansa, ciki har da 'Shabuhragan'. Ya kuma haɗa da kyawawan zane-zane don taimakawa waɗanda ba su iya karatu ba su fahimci gaskiya cikin sauƙi, wanda ya kasance wani sabon abu a cikin hanyoyin yada addini a lokacin. Ikilisiyarsa ta bunƙasa a tsari kuma ta sami mabiya a yankuna masu faɗi, wanda ya zama tushen Manichaeism don zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan addinai masu tasiri a duniyar da.

Amma lokacin ɗaukaka bai dawwama ga Mani ba. Lokacin da Shapur I ya rasu a shekara ta 272 kuma ɗansa Bahram I ya hau gadon sarauta a shekara ta 273, kaddarar Mani ta canza cikin sauri. Kartir, babban firist na Zoroastrian mai iko, ya ayyana koyarwar Mani a matsayin bidi'a kuma ya rinjayi sarki. A ƙarshe, an kama Mani a ranar 2 ga Maris, 274, an ɗaure shi da sarƙoƙi kuma an jefa shi a kurkuku, inda ya mutu a matsayin shahidi. Mutuwarsa ta ba almajiransa ƙarin kwarin gwiwa, kuma 'wahalarsa' ta zama tartsatsin da ya sa bisharar haske ta yadu zuwa ƙarshen duniya. Manichaeism ya bunƙasa tsawon ƙarnuka bayan mutuwarsa, yana tasiri sosai ga wayewar Gabas da Yamma, amma ya kusan ɓacewa a farkon ƙarni na 13, kuma a yanzu babu cikakkun bayanai game da shi. Duk da haka, tunanin Mani ya yi tasiri kai tsaye ga motsin Gnostic na baya da wasu ra'ayoyin addini, yana ba da muhimman bayanai don fahimtar bambancin addini na duniyar da. Kamar rayuwar Mani, annabawa irin su Mazdak ko Yesu sun gabatar da sabbin hangen nesa na addini kuma sun kalubalanci ikon da ke akwai.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mahmud II, Sultan na Daular Usmaniyya a karni na 19, ya kawar da Janissary kuma ya shimfida harsashin sauye-sauyen zamani.
key_achievements: Kawar da Rundunar Janissary (Lamarin Alheri)
Kafa da Gyara Rundunar Soja ta Zamani
Zamantar da Tsarin Gudanarwa da na Al'umma
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gyare-gyarensa sun zama muhimmin harsashi ga gyaran Tanzimat don zamantar da Daular Usmaniyya.

mahmud-ii.epic:
Mahmud II (an haife shi a 1785) wani Sultan ne mai kawo sauyi wanda ya yi kokarin zamantar da Daular Usmaniyya a farkon karni na 19, lokacin da take kan hanyar durkushewa. Lokacin da aka haife shi kuma ya girma, Daular Usmaniyya tana cikin wani mawuyacin hali saboda cin hanci da rashin iya aiki a cikin gida, da kuma matsin lamba daga manyan kasashen Turai a waje. Musamman ma, rundunar Janissary, sojojin kasa na musamman na gargajiya na daular, sun riga sun rasa ingancin soja kuma sun zama kungiyar masu neman moriya ta siyasa, wanda shine babban dalilin da ya hana duk wani yunkurin kawo sauyi. Mahmud II ya girma yana shaida mummunan kaddara ta dan uwansa, Selim III, wanda Janissary suka tsige kuma suka kashe saboda yunkurinsa na kawo sauyi. Shi ma kansa ya kusa mutuwa a hannun Janissary, amma ya tsira da taimakon masu goyon bayansa masu aminci kuma ya hau karagar mulki a 1808. Ya yi rantsuwa mai tsanani cewa zai ci gaba da burin Selim III na ceto daular daga durkushewa da kuma jagorantar ta zuwa sabon zamani, amma Janissary sun kasance wata katanga mai girma a gabansa.

Shekaru goma na farkon mulkin Mahmud II sun kasance lokacin hakuri, yana gina karfi da jiran lokacin yanke shawara. Janissary ba kawai soja ba ne; sun kasance wata babbar kungiyar masu moriya da ke da tushe mai zurfi a cikin tattalin arziki da siyasar kasa, kuma sun yi tsayin daka da tashin hankali ga duk wani yunkurin kawo sauyi da ke barazana ga gata nasu. Sun yi watsi da ikon Sultan kuma sun kasance babban cikas ga ci gaban daular. Mahmud II ya san cewa idan ya yi gaggawar kawo sauyi, zai iya fuskantar irin kaddara mai ban tausayi ta Selim III. A hankali ya raya sabon rukunin sojojin bindiga masu aminci ga Sultan, wato 'Seban-i Cedid', ya jawo jami'ai zuwa gefensa, kuma ya nemi dama don a hankali ya raunana karfin Janissary. Ya gane cewa dole ne ya jawo Janissary su tona kaburburinsu da kansu, kuma ya jira har sai girman kai da cin hanci nasu sun kai kololuwa, yana tsara shiri sosai. A wannan lokacin, ya kuma sake tsara tsarin gudanarwa na daular kuma ya karfafa tsakiyar mulki, yana shimfida harsashin sauyi.

A karshe, a shekarar 1826, Mahmud II ya fuskanci lokacin yanke shawara wanda zai canza tarihin Daular Usmaniyya. Lokacin da ya sanar a hukumance game da kafa sabuwar rundunar soja ta zamani, kamar yadda aka zata, Janissary sun yi babban tawaye saboda damuwa game da gata nasu. Amma wannan karon ya bambanta. Mahmud II ya shirya sosai. A bisa umarninsa, sojojin bindiga masu aminci sun yi ruwan bama-bamai a barikin Janissary a Constantinople, inda suka mayar da su toka. A cikin wannan murkushewa mai zafi, dubban Janissary sun rasa rayukansu a yakin da kuma tsarkakewa mai girma da aka yi bayan haka. An rubuta wannan lamari a tarihin Daular Usmaniyya a matsayin 'Lamarin Alheri' (Vaka-i Hayriye), wanda ya kasance wani lamari mai ma'ana da ya yanke sarkar Janissary wanda ya daure daular kuma ya hana sauye-sauye tsawon daruruwan shekaru. Kawar da Janissary ya bude hanya ga Mahmud II don fara cikakkun sauye-sauyen zamantarwa.

Bayan Janissary sun bace, Mahmud II ya hanzarta sauye-sauyen zamantarwa. Ya kafa sabuwar rundunar soja irin ta Turai mai suna 'Rundunar Nasara ta Muhammad' don karfafa karfin soja, kuma ya maye gurbin tsohon Divan (majalisar ministoci) da ma'aikatun majalisar ministoci na zamani don kara ingancin gudanarwa. Bugu da kari, ya gabatar da tsarin gidan waya, kuma ya buga jaridar hukuma ta farko, 'Takvim-i Vekayi', don inganta yada bayanai. Ya kuma yi yunkurin kawo canje-canje na zamani a cikin al'umma gaba daya, kamar gyaran tufafi wanda ya bukaci jami'an gwamnati su sanya fez irin na Yamma maimakon rawani na gargajiya. Mulkinsa ya kasance gasa da lokaci don ceto daular da ke durkushewa, kuma duk da cewa bai ga dukkan 'ya'yan itatuwa na gyare-gyarensa kai tsaye ba, kokarinsa ya zama tushe mai karfi ga gyaran Tanzimat wanda za a sanar da shi bayan mutuwarsa. Gyare-gyaren Mahmud II sun zama muhimmin juyi ga Daular Usmaniyya don matsawa zuwa ga kasa ta zamani, kuma ana daraja shi a matsayin nasara mai kwatankwacin na sauran shugabannin zamanin da suka nemi zamantarwa ta hanyar karya tsarin al'umma na gargajiya, kamar Maido da Meiji na Japan.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarki 'Mai Cin Nasara' wanda ya fuskanci gwaji tun yana yaro, amma ya zama sarki yana da shekaru 19, ya ci Constantinople kuma ya bunƙasa Daular Usmaniyya zuwa daula ta duniya.
key_achievements: Ya ci Constantinople kuma ya sake mata suna Istanbul
Ya gina katangar Rumeli Hisarı kuma ya ba da umarnin ƙera manyan bindigogi
Ya kafa tsarin gudanarwa na daular ta hanyar tattara 'Kanunname'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin 'Mai Cin Nasara' wanda ya mai da Daular Usmaniyya babbar ƙasa ta duniya ta hanyar cin Constantinople, kuma ya kafa harsashin haɗewar al'adun Gabas da Yamma.

mehmed-the-conqueror.epic:
Ya girma da manyan buri tun yana yaro. Yana da shekaru 12 ya fara zama sarki, amma saboda rashin kwarewa da adawa daga ciki, an sauke shi. Duk da haka, wannan gwaji ya ƙara masa ƙarfi. Ya yi nazarin ilimi da dabarun yaƙi, yana jiran lokaci, kuma bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa, Murad II, yana da shekaru 19, ya sake ɗaukar nauyin daular. Burinsa guda ɗaya ne: ya ci Constantinople, zuciyar daular Byzantium mai shekaru dubu.

Ya zuba dukkan basirarsa da albarkatunsa wajen mamaye Constantinople. Ya gina katangar Rumeli Hisarı a mashigar Bosphorus don yanke hanyoyin samar da kayayyaki daga Bahar Maliya, kuma ya sa injiniyan Hungary, Orban, ya ƙera manyan bindigogi waɗanda ba a taɓa gani ba. Ya tattara dubban daruruwan sojoji kuma ya gina rundunar ruwa mai ƙarfi, ya ɗaga yaƙi daga rikicin makamai kawai zuwa matsayin kimiyya da fasaha mai zurfi. Kowa ya ce ba zai yiwu ba, amma nufinsa bai taɓa karyewa ba.

A watan Afrilu na 1453, a ƙarshe, babban yaƙin kewaye na kwanaki 53 ya fara. Ganuwar Theodosian mai kariya uku ta kasance mai ƙarfi, kuma juriya ta Byzantium ta yi tsanani. A wani lokaci mai mahimmanci, ya aiwatar da wata dabara mai ban mamaki: ya motsa rundunar ruwansa ta ƙasa zuwa cikin Golden Horn. Wannan ya juya yanayin yaƙin gaba ɗaya, kuma a ranar 29 ga Mayu, bayan wani hari na ƙarshe, sojojinsa sun haye ganuwar. Ya shiga birnin a kan farin doki, ya nufi Hagia Sophia, kuma ya ayyana wannan babban gini a matsayin masallacin Musulunci, yana sanar da buɗewar sabon zamani.

Bayan ya sake suna Constantinople zuwa Istanbul kuma ya mai da ita sabuwar babban birnin daular, bai tsaya ga cin nasara kawai ba. Ya tattara kundin dokoki mai suna 'Kanunname' don kafa tsarin gudanarwa na daular, kuma ya gayyaci masu fasaha da masana kimiyya zuwa Istanbul, ya mai da ita cibiyar ilimi inda al'adun Gabas da Yamma suka haɗu. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Daular Usmaniyya ta faɗaɗa yankunanta zuwa dukkan yankin Balkan da Anatolia, ta zama daula ta duniya. Don haka, an rubuta sunansa a tarihi a matsayin 'Fatih', wato 'Mai Cin Nasara'.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Labarin Mustafa Kamal Atatürk, wani soja na Daular Usmaniyya wanda ya jagoranci Yaƙin Neman 'Yancin Kai na Turkiyya, ya kafa Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, kuma a matsayinsa na shugaban ƙasa na farko, ya aiwatar da gyare-gyare na zamani, wanda aka fi sani da 'Uban Turkawa'.
key_achievements: Kare ƙasa ta hanyar cin nasara a Yaƙin Gallipoli
Cin nasara a Yaƙin Neman 'Yancin Kai na Turkiyya da kafa Jamhuriyar
Jagorantar gyare-gyare don gina ƙasa mai zaman kanta ta zamani
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa Uban Turkiyya ta zamani, kuma ya kafa tushen asalin ƙasa da zamantar da ita.

mustafa-kemal-ataturk.epic:
A shekara ta 1881, a birnin Salonika na Daular Usmaniyya mai girma, aka haifi wani jarumi mai suna Mustafa. Sunansa na asali Mustafa ne, kuma malamin lissafinsa ne ya ba shi sunan 'Kamal' saboda yadda ya ke da hazaka da cikakken ilimi. Ya zaɓi hanyar soja, kuma yayin da yake karatu a makarantun soja, ya shaida yadda daular ke durƙushewa a hankali. A matsayinsa na matashin jami'i, ya ji daɗin ra'ayoyin 'Young Turks', amma ya soki shigar sojoji cikin harkokin siyasa. Ya ga yadda ƙasarsa ke rugujewa saboda barazanar waje da cin hanci da rashawa na ciki, kuma ya fahimci cewa ana buƙatar canji mai zurfi da gaggawa.

Yaƙin Duniya na Farko ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a tarihin aikinsa na soja. Musamman a Yaƙin Gallipoli na 1915, ya jagoranci Sojojin Usmaniyya na Biyar, inda ya hana sojojin ƙawance sauka. Wannan nasara ta sa ya shahara a duk faɗin daular, kuma aka kira shi 'Mai Ceton Istanbul'. Amma a ƙarshe, yaƙin ya ƙare da shan kashi ga daular, kuma ƙasashen da suka ci nasara sun yi ƙoƙarin raba ƙasarsu ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Sèvres. Bai taɓa yarda da wannan yarjejeniya mai wulakanci ba, kuma ya yanke shawarar yin gwagwarmaya don dawo da 'yancin kai na ƙasarsa.

Ya koma Anatoliya, ya shirya ƙungiyar 'yan ƙasa ta Turkiyya, kuma a shekara ta 1920, ya kafa Babban Majalisar Ƙasa ta Turkiyya a Ankara, wanda ya zama cibiyar juriya. Sun yi yaƙin neman 'yancin kai da sojojin mamaya, ciki har da Girka, Armeniya, Faransa, da Birtaniya. Bayan shekaru da yawa na yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi, sun sami nasara mai mahimmanci a shekara ta 1922, kuma ta hanyar Yarjejeniyar Lausanne, an amince da cikakken 'yancin kai da ikon mallakar Turkiyya a duniya. Wannan nasara ta buɗe hanya don soke tsarin sarauta da gina sabuwar ƙasa.

A ranar 29 ga Oktoba, 1923, ya ayyana kafa Jamhuriyar Turkiyya kuma ya zama shugaban ƙasa na farko. Manufarsa ita ce ta mayar da Turkiyya zuwa ƙasa mai zaman kanta, ta zamani, kuma mai bin ƙa'idodin Yamma. Don cimma wannan, ya aiwatar da sauye-sauye masu tsattsauran ra'ayi, kamar soke Khalifanci, gabatar da haruffan Latin, ba wa mata 'yancin zaɓe, da kuma kafa dokoki game da sunaye da sunayen iyali. A shekara ta 1934, majalisar ta ba shi sunan 'Atatürk', wanda ke nufin 'Uban Turkawa'. Ya sadaukar da dukkan rayuwarsa don farfaɗo da ƙasarsa ta Turkiyya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: An haife shi a Girka a karkashin Daular Usmaniyya, ya zama gwamnan Masar, ya jagoranci zamantakewa, ya kafa daula, kuma ana kiransa 'Wanda ya kafa Masar ta zamani'.
key_achievements: Ya zama gwamnan Masar bayan ya kawar da Mamluk.
Ya jagoranci zamantakewar sojoji da masana'antu irin na Turai.
Ya tabbatar da mulkin gado na Masar da Sudan.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana kiransa 'Wanda ya kafa Masar ta zamani', ya bar gadon zamantakewa da mulkin kama-karya mai rikitarwa.

muhammad-ali-of-egypt.epic:
An haife shi a Kavala, Girka, a karkashin Daular Usmaniyya, cikin gidan Albaniya. Ya yi kuruciyarsa yana kasuwancin taba da jigilar ruwa, amma kaddara ta ja shi zuwa tafarkin soja. A shekara ta 1801, ya fara taka kafarsa a kasar Masar a matsayin mataimakin kwamandan rundunar Albaniya ta Daular Usmaniyya, wadda aka tura don korar sojojin Faransa na Napoleon. Cikin rudani da hargitsi, ya hango wata dama mai girma. Masar ta kasu kashi-kashi saboda gwagwarmayar iko tsakanin Mamluk, jami'an Usmaniyya, da Ulama (masana addini). Ya sami goyon bayan al'ummar Masar, kuma ya yi amfani da basirarsa ta soja don ratsa wannan guguwar hargitsi.

Burinsa bai tsaya ga zama bawa mai biyayya ga Daular Usmaniyya ba. Ya yi amfani da dabaru na siyasa masu wayo da karfin soja don kawar da abokan hamayyarsa daya bayan daya.
