A shekara ta 1805, da goyon bayan al'ummar Alkahira da Ulama, ya bukaci Sultan ya nada shi gwamnan Masar, wato 'Wali'. Sultan ya amince da hakan ba tare da son ransa ba. Amma har yanzu mulkinsa yana fuskantar barazana daga Mamluk. A shekara ta 1811, ya shirya wani biki a gidan sarautar Alkahira, ya gayyaci shugabannin Mamluk, sannan ya kashe su duka. Wannan mummunan aiki ya karfafa mulkinsa, amma kuma ya bayyana zaluncinsa ga duniya.

Bayan ya karbi ragamar mulki, ya fara aiwatar da gyare-gyare masu cike da buri don mayar da Masar daga lardin Usmaniyya na gargajiya zuwa kasa mai karfi ta zamani. Ya gabatar da tsarin daukar sojoji irin na Turai don gina runduna mai karfi, kuma ya gayyaci jami'an Faransa don horar da su. Ya kafa masana'antu mallakar gwamnati don bunkasa masana'antu, kuma ya karfafa noman auduga mai dogon zare don kafa tushen tattalin arzikin Masar. Bugu da kari, ya tura matasa zuwa Turai don koyon fasaha da ilimin Yamma, kuma ya kafa sabbin makarantu a duk fadin Masar. Duk wadannan gyare-gyare an yi su ne don mayar da Masar ta zama kasa mai tsarin mulki guda daya kuma a karkashin cikakken ikonsa.

Sabuwar rundunarsa ba da dadewa ba ta fuskanci gwaji. Ya murkushe Wahabiyawa a Arabiya a madadin Sultan na Usmaniyya, ya ci Sudan, kuma ya shiga cikin yakin 'yancin kai na Girka. Amma yayin da karfinsa ke karuwa, rikicinsa da Sultan ya zurfafa. Ya yi yaki da Daular Usmaniyya sau biyu, ya ci Siriya, kuma ya ci gaba har zuwa Anatoliya. Sai dai, shigar da manyan kasashen Turai kamar Birtaniya da Faransa suka yi ya kawo cikas ga burinsa na gina daula. Duk da haka, ya yi nasarar tabbatar da mulkin gado na iyalinsa a kan Masar da Sudan. Daular da ya kafa ta yi mulkin Masar har zuwa shekara ta 1952, kuma a yau ana tuna shi a matsayin 'Wanda ya kafa Masar ta zamani'. Gadonsa yana da rikitarwa. Ya kasance majagaba na zamantakewa, amma kuma mai mulkin kama-karya marar tausayi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban Mufti na Masar, majagaba na Musulunci na Zamani, wanda ya yi ƙoƙari ya daidaita Musulunci da al'ummar zamani ta hanyar ilimi da gyara a hankali.
key_achievements: Haɓaka tunanin Musulunci na Zamani tare da mai kawo sauyi Al-Afghani
Haɗin gwiwar kafa jaridar adawa da mulkin mallaka 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa'
Fassarar shari'ar Musulunci mai ci gaba a matsayin Babban Mufti na Masar
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa harsashin Musulunci na Zamani, ya yi tasiri sosai ga masu kawo sauyi na gaba, kuma ya nuna cewa Musulunci zai iya wanzuwa tare da al'ummar zamani.

muhammad-abduh.epic:
An haife ni a shekara ta 1849 a wani ƙaramin ƙauye a Delta na Kogin Nilu a Masar. Tun ina yaro, na yi adawa da ilimin makarantar Alkur'ani na gargajiya, amma da ƙarfafawar kawuna, na koma kan tafarkin ilimi. A shekara ta 1866, na shiga Jami'ar Al-Azhar a Alkahira, inda na yi nazarin ilimin addinin Musulunci na gargajiya, amma na ji shakku sosai game da tsarin koyarwa mai tsauri da kuma koyo ta hanyar haddacewa. Juyin juya halin rayuwata ya zo ne a shekara ta 1871, lokacin da na haɗu da mai kawo sauyi mai ban sha'awa, Jamal al-Din al-Afghani. Ya sake tunatar da ni al'adar hankali ta Musulunci, ya ƙarfafa ni in bincika falsafar Yamma da kimiyya, kuma tare muka yi tunani a kan dalilan koma bayan wayewar Musulunci.

A ƙarƙashin tasirin Al-Afghani, na fara shiga harkokin siyasa a hankali. Sun yi suka game da cin hanci da rashawa a cikin al'ummar Masar da kuma shisshigin baƙi. Daga ƙarshe, an kore ni daga Masar a shekara ta 1882 saboda goyon bayan da na bai wa juyin juya halin Urabi na 1881. A lokacin gudun hijira, na koyar a Beirut, Lebanon, kuma daga baya na sake haɗuwa da Al-Afghani a Paris. A shekara ta 1884, tare suka kafa jaridar 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa' (Haɗin Kai Mai Ƙarfi) mai tasiri, wadda ta yi kira ga adawa da mulkin mallaka da kuma haɗin kai da gyara a duniyar Musulunci. Ko da yake an buga wannan jarida na ɗan gajeren lokaci, ta ba da kwarin gwiwa sosai ga masana Musulunci a duk faɗin duniya.

Bayan na dawo Masar a shekara ta 1888, na yanke shawarar mai da hankali kan gyaran zamantakewa na dogon lokaci maimakon juyin juya halin siyasa kai tsaye. Na yi imani cewa ilimi shine tushen canjin zamantakewa, kuma na nemi canje-canje a hankali a cikin tsarin shari'a da gudanarwa. Darajata ta ƙaru a hankali, kuma a ƙarshe an naɗa ni Babban Mufti na Masar a shekara ta 1899, wanda shine mafi girman ikon shari'ar Musulunci. Ta hanyar wannan matsayi, na iya ba da hukunce-hukuncen ci gaba (fatwa) waɗanda suka sake fassara shari'ar Musulunci a cikin mahallin zamani. Na yi ƙoƙari in ba da mafita mai ma'ana da amfani ga batutuwa masu mahimmanci kamar riba ta banki, matsayin mata, da dangantaka da mutanen sauran addinai.

Ƙoƙarin gyara nawa ya fuskanci adawa mai tsanani daga malaman addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya da kuma masu riƙe da madafun iko. Sun zarge ni da cewa ni mai ridda ne da ke lalata al'ada. Duk da haka, ban taɓa yin watsi da imanina cewa manyan ƙa'idodin Musulunci za su iya daidaita da hankali, kimiyya, da rayuwar zamani ba. Ko da yake na rasu a shekara ta 1905, ra'ayoyina sun samar da wani motsi da ake kira 'Musulunci na Zamani' kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga masu kawo sauyi na gaba. Na sadaukar da rayuwata don tabbatar da cewa Musulunci addini ne mai rai wanda ke ci gaba zuwa gaba, ba wai an kulle shi a cikin ɗaukakar da ta gabata ba.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mimar Sinan ya kasance masanin gine-gine na Daular Usmaniyya a karni na 16, wanda ya tsara gine-gine sama da 300 kuma ya jagoranci zamanin zinare na gine-ginen Usmaniyya.
key_achievements: Ya rike mukamin 'Mimarbaşı', babban masanin gine-gine na Daular Usmaniyya
Ya tsara gine-gine sama da 300, ciki har da Masallacin Süleymaniye
Ya cimma kololuwar gine-ginen Usmaniyya da Masallacin Selimiye
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gine-ginensa sun tsara al'adun Daular Usmaniyya kuma ana kiyaye su a matsayin gadon duniya har zuwa yau.

mimar-sinan.epic:
Mimar Sinan (kimanin 1489 – 1588) ya kasance babban masanin gine-gine kuma injiniyan farar hula wanda ya jagoranci zamanin zinare na Daular Usmaniyya. Karshen karni na 15, lokacin da aka haife shi, wani lokaci ne da Daular Usmaniyya ke bunkasa zuwa daula mai karfi a mahadar wayewar Gabas da Yamma, tana ci gaba da fadada al'adu da soja. An haife shi Kirista a Ağırnas, wani karamin kauye kusa da Kayseri a Anatoliya, an tattara Sinan tun yana yaro ta hanyar tsarin Devshirme kuma aka kai shi Istanbul. Devshirme wani tsari ne na musamman inda Daular Usmaniyya ke tattara yaran Kirista daga Balkans da Anatoliya, su musuluntar da su, kuma su horar da su a matsayin sojoji ko jami'ai. An shigar da shi cikin Janissaries, ya musulunta, ya sami sunan 'Sinan', kuma ya sami damar shiga cikin ayyukan gine-gine da injiniyanci daban-daban na daular yayin da yake samun horon soja. A wannan lokacin, ya goge kwarewarsa ta injiniyanci da basirar gine-gine a fagen, yana aiki a kan gina gadoji, gyaran kagara, da ayyukan magudanan ruwa, yana fara gano basirarsa fiye da kasancewa soja kawai.

Rayuwar Mimar Sinan ta dauki wani gagarumin sauyi lokacin da Sultan Suleiman Mai Girma ya lura da shi. Kimanin shekara ta 1538, an nada shi 'Mimarbaşı', babban masanin gine-gine na daular. Wannan shi ne matsayi mafi girma da ke kula da duk ayyukan gine-gine da injiniyancin farar hula a cikin Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya mayar da Sinan daga injiniyan soja kawai zuwa mai fasaha kuma babban mai kula da aiwatar da daukakar daular ta hanyar gine-gine. Ya samo wahayi daga gadon gine-gine na Daular Rumawa ta Gabas, musamman girman Masallacin Hagia Sophia, yayin da yake hada abubuwan gargajiya na gine-ginen Musulunci da salon musamman na Daular Usmaniyya don kirkirar sabon salo na gine-gine. Daya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa na farko, Masallacin Süleymaniye a Istanbul, wani babban aiki ne da ke nuna girman da kuma tsoron Allah na Sultan Suleiman Mai Girma, yana kafa sabon ma'auni ga gine-ginen Usmaniyya tare da hadin kai na babban dome da minarets hudu. Wannan masallacin ba kawai wurin ibada ba ne, amma kuma ya nuna misalin Külliye (hadaddiyar cibiya) wanda ya hada da asibitoci, makarantu, da dakunan karatu, yana nuna hangen nesa na Sinan da kwarewarsa ta fasaha a cikin wani aiki mai tarihi.

Mimar Sinan ya yi hidima ga sarakuna uku—Sultan Suleiman Mai Girma, Selim na Biyu, da Murad na Uku—a matsayin babban masanin gine-gine na daular tsawon kimanin shekaru 50. A wannan lokacin, ya tsara kuma ya kula da gine-gine masu ban mamaki sama da 300 a fadin daular. Wadannan sun hada da masallatai sama da 80, dakunan sallah sama da 50, madrasas (makarantun Musulunci) sama da 60, makarantun Alkur'ani 7, imarets (wuraren cin abinci na jama'a) 17, asibitoci 3, magudanan ruwa 6, gadoji 10, caravanserais (masaukin matafiya) 20, dakunan wanka 48, da kuma fadoji da kaburbura masu yawa. Manufarsa ba kawai gina gine-gine ba ce, amma kuma ya sanya ingancin aiki, kyawun tsarki, da daidaiton sarari a cikin kowane tsari. Musamman ma, ya kasance kwararre a cikin kwanciyar hankali na tsarin da ke tallafawa manyan domes da kuma yadda ake shigar da haske cikin sararin ciki yadda ya kamata, wanda ya wuce iyakokin gine-ginen Rumawa ta Gabas. Sinan ya kuma horar da almajirai da yawa, yana isar da salon gine-ginensa da fasaharsa, wanda ya kafa harsashin ci gaba da zamanin zinare na gine-ginen Usmaniyya. Gine-ginensa ba kawai sun tsara yanayin jiki na daular ba, amma kuma sun zama muhimman hanyoyin sanar da al'adun Daular Usmaniyya da kwarewarta ta fasaha ga duniya.

Mimar Sinan ya rayu kusan karni guda, yana barin manyan ayyuka da suka tattara iliminsa da kwarewarsa ta gine-gine. Masallacin Selimiye a Edirne ana daukarsa a matsayin aikinsa na 'maharbi' (usta), inda aka cika manufofinsa na gine-gine gaba daya. Wannan masallacin yana wakiltar kololuwar gine-ginen Usmaniyya tare da fadi, sararin ciki mara cikas a karkashin dome guda, daidaito cikakke, da sabbin fasahohin tsari. Gine-ginensa ba kawai tsare-tsare ba ne, amma ayyukan fasaha ne da ke nuna karfin da kuma zurfin imani na Daular Usmaniyya. Bayan mutuwarsa, an girmama Sinan a matsayin 'Koca Mimar Sinan Ağa' (Babban Masanin Gine-gine Sinan Ağa) kuma uban gine-ginen Usmaniyya, kuma salon gine-ginensa ya zaburar da masana gine-gine na Usmaniyya da yawa daga baya. A yau, an rubuta ayyukansa a matsayin Shafukan Tarihin Duniya na UNESCO, ana kiyaye su a matsayin gadon al'adu masu daraja na bil'adama, kuma ana tuna sunansa a matsayin alama da ke wakiltar zamanin zinare na gine-ginen Usmaniyya. Gadon gine-ginensa yana da asali da girma da za a iya kwatanta shi da manyan masu fasaha na zamani kamar Michelangelo a Yamma.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Badi' al-Zaman al-Hamadhani, babban masanin harshen Larabci daga Farisa, ya sami laƙabin 'Badi' al-Zaman' kuma ya kafa 'Maqamat', wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a adabin Larabci.
key_achievements: Ƙware harshen Larabci da kafa shaharar ilimi
Nasara a muhawara ta jama'a, ya sami laƙabin 'Badi' al-Zaman'
Kafa sabon salo na adabi, 'Maqamat'
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Maqamat' ya zaburar da marubuta na baya sosai, inda ya bar alama mai ɗorewa a tarihin adabin Larabci.

badi-al-zaman-al-hamadani.epic:
An haife shi a Hamadan, Farisa, amma ruhinsa da alƙalaminsa sun bunƙasa a cikin faffadar duniyar harshen Larabci. Tun yana yaro, an albarkace shi da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiya mai ban mamaki, wanda ya taimaka masa wajen ƙware harshen Larabci, harshen ilimi da waƙa a duniyar Musulunci. Ya bar gidansu don neman ilimi da dama, inda ya yi tafiye-tafiye zuwa birane daban-daban na daular Buyid. Tafiyarsa ba kawai motsi ne na yanki ba, sai dai aikin hajji ne na ilimi don neman matsayinsa a tsakanin manyan masana harshe.

Shahararsa ta kai kololuwa a Nishapur, cibiyar ilimi. A can, ya shiga muhawara ta jama'a da Abu Bakr al-Khwarizmi, wani fitaccen malami na zamaninsa. Ta hanyar waƙoƙi da rubuce-rubuce na ba-zata, ya nuna ƙwarewarsa ta harshe kuma ya burge masu sauraro. Wannan nasara ta sa ya sami laƙabin 'Badi' al-Zaman', ma'ana 'Abin Al'ajabi na Zamani'. Wannan laƙabi ba kawai girmamawa ba ne, sai dai nauyin tsammanin da zai ɗauka a duk tsawon rayuwarsa.

Bisa ga waɗannan tsammanin, ya ƙirƙiri babban gadonsa, wato 'Maqamat'. Wannan tarin gajerun labarai ne da aka rubuta a cikin zube mai daidaitaccen sauti (saj'). Kowane labari yana nuna abokin tafiyarsa, mai wayo kuma mai dabara mai suna Abu al-Fath al-Iskandari, da kuma mai ba da labari mai sauƙi Isa ibn Hisham, wanda ke rubuta ayyukansa. Ta hanyar waɗannan labaran, ba kawai ya nuna fasaharsa ta harshe ba, har ma ya yi izgili da munafunci da wauta na al'ummar zamaninsa, yana ba da zurfin fahimta game da yanayin ɗan adam.

Rayuwarsa tafiya ce ta yawo a cikin kotuna daban-daban, yana neman masu tallafawa. An girmama basirarsa, amma rayuwa mai ɗorewa ta yi nisa. A ƙarshe, ya zauna a Herat, ya yi aure kuma ya kafa iyali, amma lokacinsa ya yi gajere. Ya rasu yana ɗan shekara 38, amma 'Maqamat' ɗinsa ya rayu. Wannan sabon salo ya zaburar da marubuta na baya sosai, musamman al-Hariri na Basra, inda ya bar alama mai ɗorewa a tarihin adabin Larabci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Said Nursi, wani malamin addinin Musulunci ne daga ƙarshen Daular Usmaniyya zuwa farkon Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, wanda ya jagoranci sake fassara imani na Musulunci na zamani ta hanyar 'Risale-i Nur'.
key_achievements: Bincike kan haɗin gwiwar ilimin tauhidi na Musulunci da kimiyyar zamani
Rubutawa da yaɗa 'Risale-i Nur'
Gabatar da ra'ayin 'Manevi Cihad' marar tashin hankali
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Risale-i Nur' ta yi tasiri sosai a kan tunanin Musulunci na zamani kuma ana karanta ta a duk faɗin duniya.

bediuzzaman-said-nursi.epic:
Said Nursi, wani malamin addinin Musulunci kuma mai tunani, an haife shi a shekara ta 1877 a Nurs, wani ƙaramin kauye a Gabashin Anatoliya, cikin Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga farfaɗo da imani na Musulunci a cikin tarihin Turkiyya na zamani mai cike da rudani. Tun yana yaro, ya ba da mamaki ga mutanen da ke kewaye da shi da ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyarsa ta musamman da kuma sha'awar ilimi, kuma ya kammala karatun madrasa na gargajiya cikin sauri. Said Nursi bai gamsu da ilimin addini kawai ba, amma ya bincika ilimi a fannoni daban-daban kamar ilimin tauhidi na Musulunci, kimiyyar zamani, falsafa, da ilimin zamantakewa, yana gina tushe mai faɗi na ilimi. Ya yi burin haɗa waɗannan tsarin ilimi guda biyu don gyara tsarin ilimi na Daular Usmaniyya da kuma gabatar da sabon tsarin tunani wanda zai iya magance ƙalubalen wayewar Yamma da duniyar Musulunci ke fuskanta. Sakamakon wannan iliminsa na musamman da ƙwarewarsa a muhawara, ya sami laƙabin 'Bediüzzaman' wanda ke nufin 'Abin Mamaki na Zamani' tun yana saurayi, kuma ya fara jawo hankalin masana da jama'a. Ya yi aiki tuƙuru a Istanbul, babban birnin daular, yana mu'amala da masana kuma yana bayyana hangen nesansa game da gyaran zamantakewa.

Lokacin rudani na rushewar Daular Usmaniyya da kuma kafa Jamhuriyar Turkiyya ta duniya ta Mustafa Kemal Atatürk ya zama wani muhimmin sauyi a rayuwar Said Nursi. Ya taɓa goyon bayan kafa jamhuriyar da tsarin mulki kuma ya shiga cikin gyaran zamantakewa, amma ya yanke shawarar cewa manufofin gwamnatin sabuwar gwamnati na tsattsauran ra'ayi na duniya, wato ware Musulunci daga harkokin jama'a da kuma hana ilimin addini, suna barazana ga tushen imani na Musulunci. A cikin wannan yanayi, ya ji takaici sosai game da harkokin siyasa kuma ya sake fasalta rawar da yake takawa. Ya ayyana rayuwarsa ta siyasa ta baya a matsayin 'Tsohon Said' kuma ya zaɓi rayuwa a matsayin 'Sabuwar Said' wanda ya sadaukar da kansa ga kare gaskiyar Alkur'ani da kuma ceton imanin mutanen zamani. Said Nursi ya janye daga hayaniyar duniya da muhawarar siyasa, ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da dukkan kuzarinsa ga bincike da sake fassara ainihin imani na Musulunci, yana mai da hankali gaba ɗaya ga Alkur'ani, tushen gaskiya. Wannan wani canji ne mai mahimmanci wanda ya ayyana sauran rayuwarsa.

Yanke shawarar zama 'Sabuwar Said' ya kai Said Nursi ga doguwar tafiya ta fiye da shekaru 25 na gudun hijira, sa ido, da wahala. Hukumomin Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, suna fargabar tasirinsa, sun kore shi zuwa Barla, wani kauye mai nisa a Yammacin Anatoliya, a shekara ta 1926. A can, ya fara rubuta babban aikinsa na rayuwa, 'Risale-i Nur', wato 'Saƙonnin Haske', a cikin keɓewa da tsananin sa ido, ba tare da haɗi da duniyar waje ba. 'Risale-i Nur' wani babban tafsirin Alkur'ani ne wanda ke tabbatarwa da bayyana ainihin gaskiyar imani na Musulunci a cikin hanyar hankali da ma'ana, yana fuskantar ƙalubalen kimiyyar zamani da falsafa. Duk da yanayin da ba shi da kyau inda ko takarda da tawada ke da wuya a samu, almajiransa masu biyayya sun rubuta abin da yake faɗa a asirce kuma suka kwafa da hannu, kuma waɗannan 'Saƙonnin Haske' sun bazu a asirce a duk faɗin Turkiyya, suna ba da ta'aziyya ta ruhaniya da wayewar kai ga mutane da yawa. Ta hanyar waɗannan rubuce-rubucen, ya jaddada cewa imani na Musulunci yana da inganci a duniyar zamani kuma kimiyya da hankali za su iya daidaita da imani.

Rayuwar Said Nursi ta kasance ci gaba da shari'o'i, ɗauri, da kuma sakin da hukumomi ke yi masa. Hukumomin sun ɗauka cewa koyarwarsa da tasirinsa barazana ce ga gwamnatin duniya, amma Said Nursi ya kawar da tashin hankali gaba ɗaya kuma ya jaddada 'Manevi Cihad' kawai, wato gwagwarmaya ta ruhaniya da ta hankali. Ya yi imani cewa canza zukatan mutane ta hanyar gaskiyar Alkur'ani, ba ta hanyar ƙarfin jiki ba, shine nasara ta gaskiya. Duk da tsanantawa da wahalhalu da yawa, al'ummar 'Nur' da 'Risale-i Nur' ta zaburar sun ci gaba da girma kuma sun yi tasiri sosai a cikin al'ummar Turkiyya. A ranar 23 ga Maris, 1960, ya rasu a Urfa. Ko bayan mutuwarsa, 'Risale-i Nur' tana ci gaba da haskaka zukatan miliyoyin mutane a duk faɗin duniya da hasken imani har zuwa yau, kuma tunaninsa ya kasance muhimmiyar gado ga zamantar da duniyar Musulunci da kuma kafa asalin imani. Gwagwarmayarsa ta hankali marar tashin hankali tana nuna kamanceceniya da ruhin mutane irin su Mahatma Gandhi, wanda ya yi gwagwarmaya marar tashin hankali a kan mulkin mallaka a lokaci guda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Baybars ya kasance Sultan na daular Mamluk ta Masar a karni na 13, wanda ya fatattaki Mongols da Crusaders kuma ya kafa tushen daular.
key_achievements: Fatattakar Crusaders a yakin Al Mansurah
Babban kashi ga sojojin Mongol a yakin Ain Jalut
Cikakken korar sauran sojojin Crusaders
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mulkinsa ya sanya daular Mamluk ta zama babbar karfi a Gabas ta Tsakiya, kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga kiyaye wayewar Musulunci.

baybars.epic:
Baybars (an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 1223) ya zama Sultan na daular Mamluk ta Masar a lokacin rikice-rikice na karni na 13 a Gabas ta Tsakiya, inda ya kasance hazikin soja kuma mai mulki mai karfi wanda ya kare duniyar Musulunci daga barazanar Mongols da Crusaders. Rayuwarsa ta fara ne a cikin ciyayi na Kipchak a arewacin Tekun Bahar Maliya, amma tun yana yaro ya fuskanci bala'in kama shi da sayar da shi a matsayin bawa ga sojojin Mongol. Bayan ya isa Alkahira ta Masar ta hanyar Siriya, Sultan As-Salih Ayyub na daular Ayyubid ya saye shi, kuma ya zama memba na rukunin sojojin bayi na musamman, 'Bahri Mamluk'. Bahri Mamluk wata runduna ce ta musamman da ta kunshi sojojin bayi na Turkawa da daular Ayyubid ta Masar ta ajiye a tsibirin Roda a kan kogin Nilu, kuma sun zama jarumai masu karfi ta hanyar horo mai tsanani. A nan, Baybars ya nuna hazakar soja ta musamman da kuma jajircewa mara yankewa, inda ya yi fice cikin sauri. Idanunsa masu launin shudi da jikinsa mai karfi sun kasance alamomin da ke nuna karfinsa.

Sunansa ya fara zama sananne a tarihi a shekara ta 1250, lokacin da yakin Salibiyya na Bakwai, wanda Sarki Louis IX na Faransa ya jagoranta, ya mamaye Masar. A yakin Al Mansurah, a matsayinsa na kwamandan sojojin Mamluk, ya ba da gudummawa ga samun nasara mai mahimmanci ta hanyar amfani da dabaru masu wayo a kan Crusaders. Wannan nasara ta tabbatar da karfinsa na soja, amma burinsa bai tsaya a nan ba. A wannan shekarar, ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen maye gurbin daular Ayyubid da karfin Mamluk da kuma karbar iko a Masar, ta hanyar shiga cikin kisan Sultan Turanshah. Bayan haka, a karkashin Sultan Qutuz, ya shirya don fuskantar babban abokin gaba wanda ke barazana ga duniyar Musulunci: daular Mongol karkashin jagorancin Hulagu Khan. Sojojin Mongol sun riga sun mamaye Baghdad kuma sun mamaye Siriya, suna ci gaba zuwa Masar, kuma dukkanin wayewar Musulunci tana cikin hadarin halaka. A wannan lokaci mai tsanani, Baybars ya fuskanci makomar zama garkuwar duniyar Musulunci.

A ranar 3 ga Satumba, 1260, yakin Ain Jalut, daya daga cikin muhimman yakin tarihi na bil'adama, ya faru a Falasdinu. Sojojin Mongol na Hulagu Khan sun lalata Baghdad kuma sun mamaye Siriya, suna ci gaba zuwa Masar, kuma tatsuniyarsu ta rashin cin nasara ta sanya tsoro a zukatan duniya. Baybars ya jagoranci rundunar gaba ta sojojin Mamluk, inda ya yi amfani da dabarar ja da baya ta karya don jawo babban rundunar Mongol zuwa wurin kwanton bauna. Bayan wani mummunan yaki a cikin wani kwarin kunkuntar, sojojin Mamluk sun yi wa Mongols babban kashi na farko a tarihi. Wannan nasara ba kawai ta ceci wayewar Musulunci daga halaka ba, har ma ta zama wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya kawo karshen fadada daular Mongol zuwa yamma. Duk da haka, a kan hanyarsa ta dawowa, Baybars ya kashe Sultan Qutuz kuma ya hau kan karagar mulkin Masar da kansa. Hanyarsa ta hawa kan mulki a matsayin tsohon bawa ta kasance mai tsanani, amma wannan ya zama farkon kafa tushe mai karfi ga mulkin daular Mamluk. Ya yi kokari don karfafa iko a cikin gida da kuma kafa halaccin daular Mamluk.

Bayan ya zama Sultan, Baybars ya kafa tushen daular Mamluk sosai a lokacin mulkinsa na kimanin shekaru 17. Ya kai hari ga sauran sansanonin Crusaders a yankin Levant, inda ya mamaye kagara masu karfi kamar Antioch da Krak des Chevaliers daya bayan daya, tare da korar sojojin Crusaders gaba daya. A cikin gida, ya gyara sojoji masu karfi, kuma ya gina magudanan ruwa da gadoji a duk fadin Masar da Siriya don inganta ci gaban tattalin arziki. Bugu da kari, ya kafa tsarin sadarwa mai sauri don karfafa hanyoyin sadarwa a duk fadin daular. Ya sake gina kasa a kowane fanni, daga gudanarwa, soja, zuwa addini, ciki har da farfado da Khalifan Abbasid a Alkahira, wanda ya bace bayan faduwar Baghdad, don ba da halaccin addini ga mulkinsa. Mulkin Baybars ya sanya daular Mamluk ta zama babbar karfi a Gabas ta Tsakiya, kuma ana daraja nasarorinsa a matsayin ci gaba na jerin jarumawan Musulunci kamar Saladin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Saadi Shirazi mawaki ne kuma marubuci na Farisa na zamanin da na karni na 13, wanda ya yada hikimar ɗan adam ta hanyar littattafansa na koyarwar ɗabi'a 'Bustan' da 'Gulistan'.
key_achievements: Tafiye-tafiye da gogewa masu faɗi na kimanin shekaru 30
Rubuta littafin koyarwar ɗabi'a na waƙa 'Bustan'
Rubuta babban aiki na rubutu da waƙa 'Gulistan'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa suna ci gaba da yin tasiri sosai a adabin duniya tare da fahimtarsa game da ɗabi'a ta duniya da ainihin ɗan adam.

saadi-shirazi.epic:
Saadi Shirazi, wani babban mawaki kuma marubuci na zamanin da na Farisa wanda aka haifa a kusan 1210 kuma ya mutu a kusan 1291, ya kasance rai mai hikima wanda ya rayu a cikin zamanin hargitsi. Cikakken sunansa shine Abu-Muhammad Muslih al-Din bin Abdallah Shirazi, kuma an haife shi a cikin kyakkyawan birnin Shiraz. Karni na 13 ya kasance lokacin da dukkanin Yammacin Asiya ke cikin tashin hankali saboda mamayar da Daular Mongol ta yi karkashin jagorancin Genghis Khan. Farisa ma ba a bar ta ba, kuma wannan yanayi na rashin tabbas ya yi tasiri sosai a rayuwar Saadi Shirazi tun yana yaro. Ya bar garinsu don neman ilimi da kuma rayuwa, ya nufi Jami'ar Nizamiyya da ke Baghdad, wadda a lokacin ita ce cibiyar ilimi ta duniya Musulunci. A can, Saadi Shirazi ya zurfafa bincike a fannoni daban-daban kamar kimiyyar Musulunci, shari'a, tarihi, da adabin Larabci, yana gina tushe mai ƙarfi na ilimi wanda zai tallafa wa duniyar ayyukansa a nan gaba. Lokacin karatunsa ya wuce samun ilimi kawai, ya zama wani muhimmin lokaci na tunani game da ainihin ɗan adam da ƙimar ɗabi'a a cikin duniya mai canzawa.

Bayan kammala karatunsa a Baghdad, Saadi Shirazi ya fara doguwar tafiya ta shekaru kusan 30. Yanayin siyasa mara tabbas da kuma tasirin mamayar Mongol a lokacin ba su bar shi ya zauna a wuri ɗaya ba. Ya ratsa tsaunukan Anatoliya, ya yi yawo a kasuwannin Damascus da Aleppo na Siriya, ya koyi tsohuwar hikimar Masar, kuma ya yi addu'a a matsayin mahajjaci a Urushalima, yana tafiya a yankuna masu faɗi. Wannan tafiya ba kawai motsi ba ce, amma aji ne mai rai inda ya fuskanci fuskoki daban-daban na duniya kuma ya lura da nau'ikan mutane. A kan tafiyarsa, ya sadu da mutane marasa adadi, daga malamai, 'yan kasuwa, sojoji, manoma, har zuwa waliyyai da masu zunubi, kuma ya saurari labaran rayuwarsu da wahalhalunsu. Musamman ma, ya fuskanci wahalar zama fursuna a hannun 'yan Salibiyya kuma aka tilasta masa yin aiki, kuma wannan tsananin gwaji ya zama wani babban juyi a rayuwarsa, yana ba shi zurfin fahimta game da wahalar ɗan adam, haƙuri, da kuma ikon murmurewa. Duk waɗannan abubuwan sun shiga cikin waƙoƙinsa da rubuce-rubucensa, suna zama tushen ƙarfin da ya ba shi damar bayyana gaskiyar rayuwa fiye da bayyanar adabi kawai.

Waƙoƙin Saadi Shirazi da rubuce-rubucensa sun samo asali ne daga abubuwan da ya fuskanta kai tsaye da kuma fahimtar da ya samu a kan wannan tafiya. Ya shaida wautar duniya, kwaɗayi, da cin hanci da rashawa, amma a lokaci guda, ya gano alheri, haƙuri, da gamsuwa ta gaskiya da ke haskawa a cikinsu. Ya ga cin hanci da rashawa na iko a fadar sarki, kuma ya sami zuciya mai tsabta da farin ciki na gaskiya a cikin bukkokin talakawa. Duk gwaje-gwajen da ya fuskanta, duk mutanen da ya sadu da su, duk labaran da ya ji sun zama iri da aka shuka a gonar ransa, kuma daga baya suka zama abinci mai gina jiki ga manyan ayyukansa. A ƙarshe, lokacin da ya dawo garinsu na Shiraz a lokacin tsufansa, ya fara rubuta hikimar da ya tattara da kuma fahimtar da ya samu a tsawon rayuwarsa. Don haka, a cikin 1257, ya kammala **Bustan (Lambun 'Ya'yan Itace)**, wani littafi na koyarwar ɗabi'a a cikin waƙa. Bustan wani aiki ne da ke rera waƙar ƙimar ɗabi'a ta duniya kamar wajibcin ɗabi'a na ɗan adam, adalci, tawali'u, da gamsuwa a cikin kyawawan kalmomin waƙa. A shekara mai zuwa, 1258, ya buga **Gulistan (Lambun Fure)**, wani babban aiki wanda ya haɗa rubutu da waƙa cikin fasaha. Gulistan wani babban aiki ne da ke ɗauke da sukar zamantakewa da zurfin tunani game da ainihin ɗan adam ta hanyar labarai, karin magana, da waƙoƙi, kuma ya zama jagorar rayuwa ga duk waɗanda ke rayuwa a cikin zamanin hargitsi.

Ayyukan Saadi Shirazi, musamman 'Bustan' da 'Gulistan', ana ɗaukar su a matsayin kololuwar adabin Farisa, kuma sun ba da ilhami ga masu karatu a duk faɗin duniya tsawon ƙarnuka. Rubuce-rubucensa sun wuce kyawun adabi kawai, suna ɗauke da ƙimar ɗabi'a ta duniya da zurfin fahimta game da ainihin ɗan adam, suna ba da tasiri wanda ya wuce lokaci. Ayyukansa an fassara su sosai ba kawai a yankunan masu magana da Farisa ba har ma a Yammacin duniya, suna tasiri ga masu tunani da marubuta da yawa kamar Goethe da Ralph Waldo Emerson. Saadi Shirazi yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan mutane da ke wakiltar zamanin zinariya na adabin Farisa, kuma sunansa har yau ana tunawa da shi a matsayin alamar hikima da koyarwar ɗabi'a. Kabarinsa yana Shiraz, kuma ya zama wurin ziyara ga mutane da yawa da ke zuwa don girmama hikimarsa. Gadon Saadi Shirazi yana ci gaba da jefa tambayoyi marasa iyaka game da rayuwar ɗan adam da alhakin ɗabi'a, kuma ayyukansa, ta hanyar da ta bambanta da waƙoƙin soyayya na Sufi na wani babban mawaki na Farisa na zamaninsa, Rumi, suna bincika hikimar ɗan adam da ƙimar ɗabi'a, suna zama wani muhimmin gado wanda ya zama ɗaya daga cikin manyan ginshiƙai biyu na adabin Farisa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sargon shine sarki na farko da ya kafa kuma ya haɗa daular Akkad a tsohuwar Mesopotamiya.
key_achievements: Kafa daular Akkad da haɗa kan Mesopotamiya
Kafa sojoji na dindindin na farko a tarihi
Daidaita ma'auni da harshen Akkad
fact_box.legacy_statement: Daular da ya kafa ta ba da kwarin gwiwa ga sarakuna na gaba kuma ta zama samfurin dauloli na tsohuwar duniya.

sargon-of-akkad.epic:
Sargon of Akkad (lokacin mulkinsa: kusan 2334 KZ – kusan 2279 KZ) babban sarki ne kuma mai cin nasara wanda ya kafa kuma ya haɗa daular Akkad a tsohuwar Mesopotamiya. Labarinsa ya fara ne a cikin tatsuniyoyi da almara, wanda hakan ya sa rayuwarsa ta musamman ta zama mai ban mamaki. A wancan lokacin, Mesopotamiya tana cikin rudani, inda biranen Sumerian masu cin gashin kai da yawa ke gwagwarmaya don samun iko. A cikin wannan yanayi, an haife shi a matsayin ɗan sirri na babban firist, kuma yana da labarin haihuwa mai ban mamaki cewa an sanya shi a cikin kwandon ciyawa aka jefa shi cikin kogin Euphrates. Kaddara ta kai shi ga wani mai lambu mai suna Akki, wanda ya ɗauke shi a matsayin ɗansa ya rene shi. Yayin da yake rayuwa a matsayin mai lambu mai tawali'u, ya sami tagomashin Ishtar, allahn soyayya da yaƙi na Mesopotamiya, wanda hakan ya buɗe masa hanya don yin aiki a matsayin mai ba da ruwa a fadar Sarki Ur-Zababa na Kish. Farkonsa mai tawali'u ya kasance farkon wata babbar kaddara don gina ɗaya daga cikin dauloli mafi ƙarfi a tarihin Gabas ta Tsakiya. Wannan lokaci ne mai cike da tashin hankali inda wayewar Sumerian ta kai kololuwa, amma babu haɗin kai na siyasa.

Rayuwa a fadar Kish cike take da shakku da makirci maimakon amana. Bayan Sarki Ur-Zababa ya yi mafarki mara kyau, ya ɗauki Sargon a matsayin barazana kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin kawar da shi. Ya shirya kashe shi sau da yawa, kamar yadda ya aika Sargon ga Sarki Lugal-Zagesi na Lagash don a kashe shi, ko kuma ya yi ƙoƙarin guba shi. Amma Sargon ya tsira daga waɗannan barazanar ta mu'ujiza a ƙarƙashin kariyar alloli. A cikin waɗannan gwaje-gwaje, ya yanke shawarar kalubalantar ikon sarki kuma ya buɗe sabuwar hanyarsa. Ya bar Kish ya nufi kudu, ya gina sabon birni mai suna Akkad, kuma ya mai da shi tushen ikonsa. An gina Akkad a wani wuri mai mahimmanci, wanda ya kasance kalubale ga tsohuwar tsarin biranen Sumerian kuma sanarwar farkon sabuwar daular da ke da iko na tsakiya. Ginin Akkad ya wuce haihuwar birni kawai; ya kasance wani muhimmin juyi wanda ya nuna farkon zamanin daular farko a tarihin Mesopotamiya. A nan, ya shirya sojoji masu ƙarfi kuma ya tattara mabiyansa masu aminci, yana haɓaka burinsa na haɗa kan Mesopotamiya.

Da Akkad a matsayin tushensa, Sargon ya fara babban aikin soja don haɗa kan dukkan Mesopotamiya. Da farko, ya fara cin nasara a kan biranen Sumerian masu ƙarfi ɗaya bayan ɗaya. Musamman, kayar da sojojin haɗin gwiwa da Lugal-Zagesi, sarkin Uruk kuma mai riƙe da ikon Sumerian, ya jagoranta, ya kasance ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorin sojansa. Ta hanyar wannan nasara, ya sanya manyan biranen Sumerian kamar Ur, Lagash, da Umma a ƙarƙashin ikonsa. Sojojinsa sun ci nasara a kan yankuna masu faɗi daga 'Tekun Sama' (Tekun Bahar Rum) zuwa 'Tekun Kasa' (Tekun Fasha), suna gina wata babbar daula da ba a taɓa gani ba a tarihi. Ya nuna ƙarfin daularsa ta hanyar kiyaye sojoji na dindindin har 5,400, na farko a tarihi, kuma ya kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi na tsakiya ta hanyar naɗa sarakunan yankunan da ya ci nasara a matsayin bayinsa. Waɗannan sabbin abubuwa na soja da na gudanarwa sun gabatar da sabon tsarin gudanar da daula a tsohuwar duniya, kuma a ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Mesopotamiya ta sami kwanciyar hankali na siyasa da wadata ta tattalin arziki da ba a taɓa gani ba.

Mulkin Sargon na shekaru 56 ya kawo sabon tsari da ci gaban wayewa ga Mesopotamiya. Don inganta aikin daular, ya daidaita ma'auni da kalanda, kuma ya mai da harshen Akkad harshen hukuma don sauƙaƙe gudanarwa da kasuwanci. Waɗannan gyare-gyare sun haɓaka haɗin kai da musayar al'adu a cikin daular. Ya kira kansa 'Sarkin Sasannin Duniya Huɗu' kuma ya ji daɗin ikon allahntaka. Ko da yake bayan mutuwarsa daular Akkad ta girgiza kuma ta faɗi saboda tawaye na ciki da mamayewa na waje, daular Akkad da ya kafa ta zama samfurin babban daular da kowane sarki ke mafarkin kafa ta dubban shekaru masu zuwa. Sunansa 'Sargon' yana nufin 'Sarki Adalci', kuma rayuwarsa ta zama shaida ga wannan suna. Nasarorinsa sun ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masu gina daulolin Assuriya da Babila na gaba, kuma ana kwatanta shi da sauran shugabannin wayewar tsohuwar duniya waɗanda suka haɗa kan ƙasashe, kamar Sarki Narmer na tsohuwar Masar.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Sarkin Sarakuna na Daular Sasaniya wanda ya samu nasarori a yaƙe-yaƙe da Roma, ya kama Sarkin sarakuna Valerian, kuma ya ɗaukaka martabar daular.
key_achievements: Kama Sarkin sarakuna Valerian na Roma
Nasarar manyan yaƙe-yaƙe uku da Roma
Ginin sabbin birane da jagorancin ci gaban fasaha
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya mai da Daular Sasaniya babbar ƙarfin soja da cibiyar al'adu mai wadata, kuma ya kafa martabar Farisa a kan Roma.

shapur-i.epic:
Ya gaji mahaifinsa, Ardashir I mai girma, ya zama Sarkin Sarakuna na biyu na Daular Sasaniya. Mahaifinsa ya kafa harsashin maido da martabar Farisa ta hanyar hambarar da Parthia. Aikinsa shi ne ya gaji wannan gado, ya kare daularsu daga barazanar Roma marar yankewa, kuma ya dawo da tsohuwar darajar daular Achaemenid. Da zaran ya hau gadon sarauta, ya sake tsara sojojinsa kuma ya rantse zai nuna wa Romawa masu girman kai a yamma cewa ikon Farisa yana nan daram.

Mulkinsa an bayyana shi da manyan yaƙe-yaƙe uku da Roma. A yaƙin farko, ya ci ƙaramin Sarkin sarakuna Gordian III a Mesopotamiya. A yaƙi na biyu, ya yi yaƙi da Sarkin sarakuna Philip Balarabe, inda ya tilasta masa sanya hannu kan wata yarjejeniya mai wulakanci wadda ta tilasta masa biyan diyya mai yawa. Waɗannan nasarorin sun wuce faɗaɗa yanki kawai; sun yi rauni mai zurfi ga girman kan Romawa kuma sun zama wata dama ta sanya martabar Daular Sasaniya a zukatan duniya.

Babban nasararsa, babu shakka, ta faru a shekara ta 260 AD a Edessa. Wani babban sojoji da Sarkin sarakuna Valerian da kansa ya jagoranta sun mamaye iyakokinsu. Amma Shapur I ya kewaye su da dabara mai wayo, kuma a ƙarshe ya kama Sarkin sarakuna Valerian da dukan sojojinsa. Sarkin sarakuna na Roma ya durƙusa a gaban Sarkin Farisa. Ya sassaƙa wannan lokaci marar misali a kan duwatsun Naqsh-e Rustam don a isar da shi har abada ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

Kamar yadda nasarorinsa a yaƙi suke, haka kuma ya yi ƙoƙari wajen ƙarfafa tushen daular a ciki. Ya gina sabbin birane kamar Bishapur da Gundeshapur, kuma ya gina madatsun ruwa da gadoji ta amfani da fasahar zamani na fursunonin Roma. Bugu da ƙari, duk da cewa ya bauta wa Zoroastrianism, ya bi manufar haƙuri na addini, yana kare annabi Mani kuma yana ba Kiristoci da Yahudawa damar kiyaye imaninsu. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Daular Sasaniya ta zama babbar ƙarfin soja da kuma cibiyar wadata inda al'adu daban-daban suka haɗu.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani Sultan mai baƙin ciki wanda ya yi ƙoƙarin zamantar da Daular Usmaniyya amma turjiya ta masu ra'ayin mazan jiya ta hana shi.
key_achievements: Kafa sabuwar rundunar soji irin ta Turai 'Nizam-ı Cedid'
Gyaran tsarin haraji da haɓaka zamantar da gudanarwa
Kafa ofisoshin jakadanci na dindindin a manyan biranen Turai
fact_box.legacy_statement: An hana gyare-gyaren sa, amma ya kasance majagaba wanda ya shimfiɗa harsashin zamanin Tanzimat na gaba.

selim-iii.epic:
Ya hau gadon sarautar Daular Usmaniyya a shekara ta 1789, a tsakiyar yaƙe-yaƙe masu zafi da Rasha da Ostiriya. Lokacin da ya gaji kawunsa Abdülhamid na Farko, daular ta riga ta fara durƙushewa. Tun yana yaro, ko da yake yana rayuwa a cikin keɓantaccen gidan sarauta, ya nuna sha'awa mai zurfi ga tunanin Yamma da al'adunsu, yana gina burin gyara ta hanyar musayar wasiƙu da Sarki Louis na Sha Shida na Faransa. Ya yi imani da gaske cewa don dawo da ɗaukakar daular, dole ne a yi watsi da tsoffin tsare-tsare da ƙarfin hali kuma a karɓi fasahohi da tsare-tsare na Turai masu ci gaba.

Jigon mulkinsa shi ne gyara da ake kira 'Nizam-ı Cedid', wato 'Sabon Tsari'. Ya nemi maye gurbin rundunar Janisarai da ta tsufa kuma ta lalace ta hanyar kafa sabuwar runduna da aka horar da ita irin ta Turai kuma aka ba ta makamai. Bugu da ƙari, ya gyara tsarin haraji kuma ya ƙarfafa diflomasiyya da ƙasashen Yamma ta hanyar kafa ofisoshin jakadanci na dindindin a London, Paris, Berlin, da Vienna. Wannan wani ɓangare ne na babban shirin sa na zamantar da gudanarwa, kuɗi, da diflomasiyya gaba ɗaya na daular, fiye da gyaran soja kawai.

Duk da haka, gyare-gyaren nasa sun gamu da turjiya mai zurfi. Janisarai, waɗanda suka more gata tsawon ƙarnuka, sun ɗauki sabuwar rundunar a matsayin barazana ga matsayinsu da tasirinsu. Malamai masu ra'ayin mazan jiya, wato Ulama, da kuma manyan mutane na gida, Ayan, su ma sun juya masa baya, suna la'antar gyare-gyaren irin na Yamma a matsayin 'hanyoyin kafirai'. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1807, wata tawaye ta Janisarai karkashin jagorancin Kabakçı Mustafa ta tuge shi daga sarauta, kuma duk gyare-gyaren sa sun zama banza.

An tuge shi kuma aka tsare shi a Fadar Topkapı. Bayan shekara guda, lokacin da magoya bayansa suka yi ƙoƙarin dawo da shi kan mulki, an kashe shi bisa umarnin ɗan uwansa kuma magajinsa, Mustafa na Hudu, inda ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa mai cike da baƙin ciki. Burinsa ya rushe, kuma zamaninsa ya zama kamar ya ƙare da gazawa. Amma ƙoƙarinsa bai tafi a banza ba. Iri na gyara da ya shuka daga baya ya buɗe zamanin Tanzimat, ya zama matakin farko a cikin doguwar tafiya mai wahala ta Daular Usmaniyya zuwa ga zama ƙasa ta zamani. Ya kasance sarki mai baƙin ciki, amma a lokaci guda, majagaba wanda ya buɗe kofa ga sabon zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Abbas Mai Girma ya kasance Shah na daular Safawiyya ta Farisa a ƙarshen karni na 16, wanda ya jagoranci ƙarfafa mulkin tsakiya, dawo da yankuna, da kuma zamanin zinariya na al'adu.
key_achievements: Kafa sojojin Ghulam don ƙarfafa ikon sarauta
Dawo da yankuna daga daular Usmaniyya
Sanya Isfahan babban birni da kuma bunƙasa al'adu
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin mulkinsa na tsakiya da gadon al'adunsa sun zama muhimmin tushe ga asalin ƙasar Iran a yau.

abbas-i-of-persia.epic:
Abbas Mai Girma (1571-1629) ya kasance babban Shah (sarki) wanda ya sake gina martabar daular Safawiyya ta Farisa daga ƙarshen karni na 16 zuwa farkon karni na 17. Kafin hawansa karagar mulki, Farisa tana fama da matsanancin hargitsi da barazana. A gabas, Uzbeks sun lalata yankin Khorasan, kuma a yamma, daular Usmaniyya, abokiyar gaba ta dade, tana mamaye kuma ta mallaki tsakiyar yankin Farisa. A cikin gida, Qizilbash, haɗin gwiwar kabilun Turkmen, suna da tasiri na soja da siyasa fiye da ikon sarauta, kuma suna haifar da rikice-rikice na cikin gida akai-akai. Abbas, wanda ya yi yarintarsa a Herat a matsayin fursuna, ya tsira daga makirci da barazanar rayuwa da yawa kafin ya hau karagar mulki. A lokacin, martabar Farisa ta zama kamar tsohuwar labari mai nisa, kuma daular tana gab da rugujewa. A cikin wannan yanayi, a shekara ta 1588, yana da shekaru 16 kacal, ya hau kan karagar Shah, inda ya ɗauki nauyin makomar daular.

Da zarar ya karɓi mulki, Abbas Mai Girma ya fara mai da hankali kan raunana ikon Qizilbash, wanda ya kasance matsala mai tsanani ga daular. Ya kafa sabuwar rundunar soji don maye gurbin sojojin kabilun Qizilbash, waɗanda aka kira 'Ghulam', sojojin bayi masu horo. Ghulam sojoji ne da aka horar da su sosai, waɗanda aka kawo su daga yankin Caucasus, aka musuluntar da su, kuma aka horar da su don su yi biyayya ga Shah kaɗai. Ta hanyar su, Abbas ya raunana tushen sojan Qizilbash, ya kafa tsarin mulki mai ƙarfi, kuma ya ƙarfafa ikon sarauta sosai. Bugu da ƙari, don nuna sabon farawa ga daular, a shekara ta 1598 ya mayar da babban birnin daga Qazvin zuwa Isfahan, wanda yake a tsakiyar Farisa. A ƙarƙashin mulkinsa, Isfahan ta zama cibiyar al'adun Farisa da tattalin arziki, kuma ta zama alamar sabon wadata na daular. Waɗannan gyare-gyare sun zama wani muhimmin juyi wajen daidaita Farisa da ke cikin hargitsi da kuma kafa tushen sake ginawa.

Da yake da ƙarfin soja da gwamnati mai tsayayye, Abbas Mai Girma ya fara manyan ayyukan soja don dawo da yankunan da aka rasa. Da farko, ya ci gaba zuwa gabas, ya fatattaki Uzbeks, kuma ya sake kwato Herat, wani muhimmin birni na Farisa, cikin nasara. Bayan haka, duk ƙarfinsa ya mai da hankali kan fuskantar daular Usmaniyya, abokiyar gaba ta yamma. A ƙarshen dogon yaƙin da ya fara a shekara ta 1603, Abbas Mai Girma ya cimma nasarar dawo da duk yankunan da daular Usmaniyya ta kwace, ciki har da Azerbaijan, Georgia, da Armenia. Wannan ya nuna ƙarfin sojan daular Safawiyya kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mataki wajen daidaita iyakokin Farisa. Bugu da ƙari, ya haɗa kai da Kamfanin British East India don korar sojojin Portugal daga tsibirin Hormuz, wani cibiyar kasuwanci a Tekun Farisa ta kudu. A shekara ta 1622, ta hanyar haɗin gwiwa, ya sake kwato Hormuz, ya tabbatar da ikon kasuwancin teku a Tekun Farisa, kuma ya yi ƙoƙari daban-daban, kamar neman haɗin gwiwa da ƙasashen Turai don takaita daular Usmaniyya ta hanyar dangantakar diflomasiyya mai ƙarfi.

A ƙarƙashin mulkin Abbas Mai Girma, Isfahan ta sami wadata mai ban mamaki a fannin al'adu da tattalin arziki, har aka kira ta 'Rabin Duniya' (Nesf-e Jahan). Ya gina manyan gine-gine kamar Dandalin Naqsh-e Jahan, kuma ya tallafa wa masu fasaha da masana, inda ya buɗe zamanin zinariya na al'adun Farisa. Ya ƙarfafa kasuwancin Hanyar Siliki, ya gina hanyoyi da caravanserais don tabbatar da tsaron 'yan kasuwa, kuma ya tara dukiya ga daular. Ko da yake an yabe shi a matsayin 'Mai Girma' saboda nasarorinsa, akwai kuma ra'ayin cewa shi sarki ne mai tsauri wanda ya sadaukar da 'ya'yansa maza don martabar daular. Bayan mutuwarsa, daular Safawiyya ta fara raguwa a hankali, amma tsarin mulkin da ya kafa da kuma gadon al'adu sun kasance muhimmin tushe ga asalin ƙasar Iran a yau. Hanyar mulkinsa ta cancanci a yi nazari da kwatanta ta da shugabancin sauran sarakunan manyan dauloli na zamani, kamar Suleiman Mai Girma na daular Usmaniyya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ashurbanipal shine babban sarki na ƙarshe na Daular Neo-Assyria, wanda ya mulki babbar daula kuma ya gina ɗakin karatu na Nineveh don kiyaye ilimi.
key_achievements: Murƙushe tawayen Masar da wawasar Thebes
Cin nasara kan Elam da lalata babban birninta Susa
Ginin ɗakin karatu na Nineveh da kiyaye tsoffin ilimi
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ƙoƙarinsa na kiyaye ilimi ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen isar da gadon wayewar tsohuwar Mesopotamia ga tsararraki masu zuwa.

ashurbanipal.epic:
Ashurbanipal (sarkin Daular Neo-Assyria wanda ya yi mulki daga 669 zuwa 631 K.Z.) ana tuna shi a matsayin babban sarki na ƙarshe na Daular Neo-Assyria, ɗaya daga cikin dauloli mafi ƙarfi a tarihin Gabas ta Tsakiya ta dā. Haihuwarsa ta zo daidai da lokacin da daular ke kan gaba a fannin soja da al'adu, tana mulkin yankuna masu faɗi. Duk da cewa ba shi ne ɗan fari ba da zai gaji sarauta, ya sami tagomashin mahaifinsa, Sarki Esarhaddon, kuma an naɗa shi sarkin Assyria bisa wani shiri na gado mai sarkakiya. Esarhaddon ya sanya ɗan'uwansa Shamash-shum-ukin a matsayin sarkin Babylonia, yayin da ya yi niyyar ba Ashurbanipal sarautar Assyria mai ƙarfi. Tun yana yaro, Ashurbanipal ya sami umarni na musamman don ya koyi fasahar rubutu, fiye da horon soja kawai. Ya koyi karatu da rubutu na tsoffin rubuce-rubucen Sumerian da Akkadian, wanda ya zama wani ilimi na musamman ga sarakuna a wancan lokacin. Wannan ilimi ya zama ginshiƙin falsafar mulkinsa da nasarorinsa a nan gaba.

A shekara ta 669 K.Z., bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa Esarhaddon, Ashurbanipal ya hau gadon sarautar Daular Neo-Assyria. Tun daga farkon mulkinsa, ya fuskanci ƙungiyoyi da yawa da ke barazana ga zaman lafiya da ikon daular. Da farko, ya mai da hankali kan murƙushe tawayen da ya barke a Masar. Ashurbanipal da kansa ya jagoranci sojojinsa zuwa kudu, ya mamaye kuma ya wawashe Thebes, babban birnin Masar, ta haka ya sake tabbatar da ƙarfin sojan Assyria a yankin Kogin Nilu. Bugu da ƙari, ya sami nasarori da yawa a yaƙe-yaƙe da Masarautar Elam, abokiyar gaba ta gabas. Ya mai da Susa, babban birnin Elam, kango kuma ya lalata wayewarsu, ta haka ya tabbatar da ikon Assyria a yankin gabashin Mesopotamia. Mulkinsa ya kasance jerin yaƙe-yaƙe marasa yankewa, amma ta hanyar waɗannan yaƙe-yaƙe, Ashurbanipal ya tabbatar da fifikon sojan Assyria kuma ya kiyaye yankin daular fiye da kowane lokaci. Wannan ya kasance shaida ce ta jagorancinsa mai ƙarfi da iyawarsa ta dabaru.

Amma babban gwajin Ashurbanipal bai fito daga abokan gaba na waje ba, sai dai daga cikin daular, kuma daga danginsa mafi kusa. Ɗan'uwansa Shamash-shum-ukin, wanda aka naɗa sarkin Babylonia, ya haɗa kai da ƙungiyoyi masu adawa da yawa don ya 'yantar da kansa daga mulkin Assyria, kuma ya yi tawaye ga Ashurbanipal. Cin amanar ɗan'uwan ya haifar da rauni mai zurfi ga Ashurbanipal da kuma babbar barazana ta rarrabuwar kawunan daular. Dole ne ya ɗauki mataki mai tsauri don kiyaye haɗin kai da zaman lafiyar daular, wanda ya kai ga mummunan yaƙin basasa da ya ɗauki shekaru da yawa. Ashurbanipal ya kewaye Babylonia kuma ya mamaye ta bayan wani yaƙi mai tsanani. Rubuce-rubuce sun nuna cewa Shamash-shum-ukin ya mutu a cikin fadar da ke cin wuta, kuma Ashurbanipal ya sami nasara mai cike da jini. Wannan mummunan lamari ya sa ya fahimci rashin tabbas na iko da kuma bala'in dangantakar ɗan adam, tare da tunatar da shi buƙatar yanke shawara mai tsauri don kiyaye daular.

Ashurbanipal ya kasance mai cin nasara mara tausayi kuma mai mulki mai ƙarfi, amma ainihin gadonsa ba a cikin takobi yake ba, sai dai a cikin kiyaye ilimi. Ya yi imani da gaske cewa kiyaye ilimin ɗan adam shine babban aikin sarki, ko da a cikin guguwar yaƙi. Saboda haka, ya tura marubuta a duk faɗin daular don su tattara kuma su kwafi allunan yumbu marasa adadi da ke ɗauke da dukkan ilimin wayewar Mesopotamia, wato adabi, tarihi, magani, ilimin taurari, da al'adun addini. Dubban allunan yumbu da aka tattara an adana su a tsari a cikin babban ɗakin karatu da aka gina a babban birninsa, Nineveh. Ana ɗaukar wannan ɗakin karatu a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin ɗakunan karatu na farko da aka tsara a tarihin ɗan adam, kuma godiya ga wannan ƙoƙarin Ashurbanipal ne muka sami damar samun manyan ayyukan adabi na tsohuwar Mesopotamia kamar Epic of Gilgamesh a yau. Bayan rasuwarsa, Daular Neo-Assyria ta faɗi cikin sauri, amma taskar ilimin da ya bari ta yi tasiri sosai ga tarihin wayewar ɗan adam. Ƙoƙarinsa na kiyaye ilimi yana da kwatankwacin ruhun waɗanda suka kafa ɗakin karatu na Alexandria a tsohuwar Masar.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ahmad Shawqi ya kasance mawaki kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo na Masar a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci zamantar da adabin Larabci da kuma gabatar da nau'in wasan kwaikwayo na waƙa.
key_achievements: Ya yi aiki a matsayin mawakin fada na Masar
Ya bayyana burin 'yancin kai ta hanyar waƙoƙin kishin ƙasa
Ya gabatar da nau'in wasan kwaikwayo na waƙa a adabin Larabci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai ga zamantar da adabin Larabci, kuma har yau ana ɗaukar su a matsayin muhimmin gado na adabi a duniyar Larabawa.

ahmed-shawqi.epic:
Ahmad Shawqi (1868-1932) ya kasance fitaccen mawaki kuma marubucin wasan kwaikwayo wanda ya jagoranci farfaɗowar adabin Masar a ƙarshen ƙarni na 19 da farkon ƙarni na 20. An haife shi a shekara ta 1868 a Alkahira, cikin wani dangi mai tarihi da wadata, ya gaji jini mai launuka daban-daban na Circassian, Turkawa, Kurdawa, Girkawa, da Larabawa. Tun yana yaro, Shawqi ya nuna hazaka ta musamman a fannin waƙa. Bayan ya kammala karatun shari'a a Masar, ya tafi Paris, Faransa, don yin karatu a fannin shari'a da fassara, a ƙarƙashin tallafin Khedive Abbas II. A Paris, ya zurfafa cikin ayyukan manyan marubutan wasan kwaikwayo na Faransa kamar Molière da Racine, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a gare shi wajen gabatar da sabon nau'in wasan kwaikwayo na waƙa (poetic drama) a cikin adabin Larabci daga baya. Ta hanyar hulɗa da al'adun Turai, ya fahimci cewa adabin Larabci yana buƙatar neman canje-canje na zamani fiye da tsarin gargajiya. Wannan gogewa ta faɗaɗa hangen nesansa na adabi kuma ta zama muhimmin tushe a gare shi don neman hanyarsa tsakanin al'ada da sabbin abubuwa.

A shekara ta 1891, bayan ya dawo ƙasarsa ta Masar, an naɗa Shawqi a matsayin mawakin fada na Khedive Abbas II, kuma ya fara aikinsa. A farkon aikinsa, waƙoƙinsa sun fi mayar da hankali kan yabon Khedive da Sultan na Daular Usmaniyya, suna bin tsarin gargajiya da jigogin waƙoƙin Larabci na gargajiya da aminci. Ya gina suna a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin manyan mawaƙa na zamaninsa, yana biyan bukatun fada, amma a cikin zuciyarsa, yana ɗauke da zurfin tunani game da gaskiyar Masar da makomar adabin Larabci. Musamman, sabbin abubuwan adabi da ya gani a Turai sun ba shi sabon hangen nesa game da hanyar da adabin Larabci ya kamata ya bi. Wannan rikici na ciki ya kai ga wani muhimmin canji a shekara ta 1914, lokacin da aka ayyana Masar a matsayin ƙasar da Birtaniya ke kariya a lokacin barkewar Yaƙin Duniya na Farko. A gaban gaskiyar da ke lalata 'yancin kai na ƙasarsa da mutuncin al'ummarsa, waƙoƙinsa sun fara ɗaukar launi na kishin ƙasa da na kishin al'umma, wanda ya zama wani dalili na sake fasalta asalin adabinsa.

Bayan ayyana Masar a matsayin ƙasar da Birtaniya ke kariya, waƙoƙin Shawqi sun canza zuwa goyon bayan 'yancin kai na Masar a fili da kuma kira ga wayewar kai ta ƙasa. Wannan ya sa hukumomin Birtaniya ba su ji daɗi ba, kuma a ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1915, ya fuskanci gwaji na korar shi zuwa Andalusia a Spain. Rayuwar gudun hijira a Andalusia, inda wayewar Musulunci ta taɓa bunƙasa da haske, ta ba shi zurfin zafi tare da lokacin tunani. Ya yi kewar ƙasarsa da ta ɓace da ɗaukakar al'ummarsa, kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga canza gaskiyar da ke da zafi zuwa waƙa. A lokacin gudun hijirarsa, waƙoƙinsa sun haɓaka daga yabon fada kawai zuwa manyan waƙoƙin almara masu zurfin tarihi da kishin ƙasa, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai a duniyar adabinsa. A shekara ta 1920, bayan ya dawo ƙasarsa ta Masar, Shawqi ya sami tarba mai zafi daga jama'a, kuma ya sake tabbatar da matsayinsa a matsayin jarumin ƙasa kuma mawaki.

Bayan dawowarsa, Ahmad Shawqi ya ƙara himma wajen ayyukan kirkire-kirkire don buɗe sabon babi a adabin Larabci. Ya gabatar da wasannin kwaikwayo na waƙa da ke magana kan jigogi na tarihi kamar 'Mutuwar Cleopatra', 'Cambyses', da 'Majnun Layla', inda ya kafa sabon nau'in wasan kwaikwayo na waƙa a cikin adabin Larabci. Wannan ya zama wani muhimmin mataki ga adabin Larabci don faɗaɗa daga tsarin waƙoƙin gargajiya zuwa nau'ikan wasan kwaikwayo na zamani. A shekara ta 1927, al'ummar adabin Larabci sun amince da gagarumar gudunmawarsa da tasirinsa a fannin adabi, kuma suka ba shi taken girmamawa na 'Amir al-Shu'ara', wato 'Sarkin Mawaƙa'. Wannan take ya zama alamar girmama ayyukansa na rayuwa, kuma ya tabbatar da matsayinsa a matsayin majagaba na farfaɗowar adabin Larabci. Ayyukan Shawqi har yau ana koyar da su a makarantu a faɗin duniyar Larabawa, kuma gadonsa na adabi yana da tasiri sosai ga ci gaban adabin zamani ba kawai a Masar ba har ma a duk faɗin Larabawa. Wasannin kwaikwayo na waƙa sun kuma ba da kwarin gwiwa ga marubutan wasan kwaikwayo na baya kamar Tawfiq al-Hakim na Masar, kuma tare da mawaƙa na zamaninsa kamar Mahmoud Sami al-Baroudi, ya jagoranci zamantar da adabin Larabci a cikin raƙuman adabin kishin ƙasa na Larabawa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Masanin ilimi kuma ɗan siyasa na Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya jagoranci tattara 'Mejelle', ya zamantar da doka da ilimi yayin da yake kiyaye al'adun Musulunci.
key_achievements: Jagorantar tattara 'Mejelle', dokar farar hula ta Musulunci
Zamantar da daular yayin da yake rike da mukamin Ministan Shari'a/Ilimi
Rubuta littafin tarihi na Ottoman, 'Tarihin Cevdet'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya bar babban tasiri a kan nazarin shari'a da tarihi a Turkiyya ta zamani da kuma kasashe da dama na Gabas ta Tsakiya.

ahmed-cevdet-pasha.epic:
An haife shi a Lofça, Bulgaria, a shekara ta 1822. Tun yana yaro, ya nuna sha'awar ilimi ta musamman, wanda hakan ya kai shi babban birnin daular, Constantinople, a shekara ta 1839. A can, ya zurfafa cikin ilimin tauhidi da shari'ar Musulunci, da kuma harsunan gargajiya kamar Farisa, tare da nazarin ilimin Yamma kamar lissafi da ilimin kasa. Sha'awarsa ta ilimi ba ta tsaya ga koyarwar madrasa ta gargajiya ba, kuma wannan ya zama tushen ra'ayoyinsa na gyara a nan gaba.

Nasarorinsa na ilimi ba da jimawa ba suka jawo hankalin Sultan, kuma aka kira shi don hidimar kasa a lokacin tashin hankali na zamanin Tanzimat. Ya yi imani da gaske cewa daular tana buƙatar canji don fuskantar ƙalubalen manyan ƙasashe na Yamma, amma ya yi adawa da kwaikwayon Yamma ba tare da tunani ba. Manufarsa ita ce gina sabon tsari wanda zai iya biyan bukatun zamani na kasa yayin da yake kiyaye ainihin shari'ar Musulunci da al'adun gargajiya. Wannan hanya ce mai kadaici, wacce masu ra'ayin mazan jiya da masu kawo sauyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi suka fahimci kuskure.

Babban nasararsa, ba shakka, ita ce jagorantar tattara 'Mejelle'. Tun daga shekara ta 1868, ya jagoranci kwamiti don fara babban aikin tsara dokokin farar hula bisa ga fikihun Hanafi na Musulunci. Wannan shi ne yunkuri na farko na sanya shari'ar Musulunci cikin tsarin dokokin zamani, kuma ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen samar da daidaito a fannin shari'a a duk faɗin daular da kuma haɓaka hasashen hukunce-hukunce. Yayin da yake rike da mukamai daban-daban kamar Ministan Shari'a da Ministan Ilimi, ya ci gaba da kokarin zamantar da daular ta hanyar doka da ilimi.

Baya ga rayuwarsa ta siyasa, bai manta da kiran da yake da shi na zama masanin tarihi ba. Littafinsa, 'Tarihin Cevdet', babban aiki ne mai juzu'i 12 wanda ya rubuta tarihin Ottoman daga 1774 zuwa 1826, kuma ya bar bayanai masu mahimmanci ga masana tarihi na gaba. Ya yi ƙoƙari ya kafa tushen daular ta hanyar doka da tarihi. Ko da yake bai iya hana rugujewar daular da ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa gare ta ba, ana kyautata zaton kokarinsa ya bar babban tasiri a kan nazarin shari'a da tarihi a Turkiyya ta zamani da kuma kasashe da dama na Gabas ta Tsakiya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Razi babban likita ne kuma masanin falsafa na Farisa a zamanin zinare na Musulunci a ƙarshen karni na 9, kuma majagaba ne na likitancin gwaji.
key_achievements: Bambance-bambance na farko na asibiti tsakanin ciwon suya da kyanda
Gudunmawa ga tattara "Kitāb al-Ḥāwī fī al-ṭibb" (Encyclopedia na Likitanci)
Kafa hanyar likitanci ta gwaji
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tsarin da ya dogara ga gwaje-gwaje da lura ya zama ginshiƙin hanyoyin kimiyya na zamani.

rhazes-al-razi.epic:
Abu Bakr Muhammad ibn Zakariya al-Razi, wanda aka fi sani da Rhazes a Yamma, babban likita ne, masanin falsafa, kuma mai ilimin kimiyyar sinadarai (alchemist) wanda aka haifa a Ray, Farisa, a ƙarshen karni na 9, lokacin da wayewar Musulunci ke bunƙasa a fannin ilimi da fasaha. A wancan lokacin, duniyar Musulunci tana cikin wani lokaci na farfaɗowar ilimi, inda ake adanawa da haɓaka ilimin tsohuwar Girka da Roma, tare da gudanar da bincike na kimiyya mai zaman kansa. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, Al-Razi yana da sha'awa mai zurfi ga kiɗa, musamman kaɗa garaya (lute), kuma a lokaci guda yana sha'awar ilimin kimiyyar sinadarai (alchemy), wani tsohon ilimi mai ban mamaki wanda ke neman canza ƙarfe zuwa zinariya. Ya shiga cikin gwaje-gwaje da yawa na ilimin kimiyyar sinadarai, yana binciken ainihin abubuwa, kuma wannan ya zama tushen tunanin gwaji da ake buƙata don bincikensa na likitanci a nan gaba. Waɗannan abubuwan da ya fara fuskanta sun yi tasiri sosai wajen haɓaka shi a matsayin masanin kimiyya wanda ke ba da fifiko ga lura da gwaje-gwaje na zahiri, fiye da samun ilimin ka'idoji kawai. Sha'awarsa ta ilimi ba ta iyakance ga wani fanni ɗaya ba, amma ta zama tushen samun ilimi mai faɗi a fannoni daban-daban.

Wani babban canji a rayuwar Al-Razi ya faru ne lokacin da ya sami mummunar lalacewar ido saboda fallasa ga sinadarai yayin gwaje-gwaje na ilimin kimiyyar sinadarai. Wannan lamari ya haifar masa da ciwo na jiki, amma a lokaci guda ya zama wani muhimmin dalili na juya hankalinsa zuwa duniyar likitanci. Yayin da yake fuskantar tsarin jinya, ya zurfafa cikin asirin jikin ɗan adam da ka'idojin cututtuka, kuma ya yanke shawarar sadaukar da duk ƙarfinsa na ilimi ga binciken likitanci. Ya tafi Baghdad, cibiyar ilimi a duniyar Musulunci a wancan lokacin, inda ya koyi likitanci daga manyan masana na zamaninsa, kuma ba da daɗewa ba aka gane hazakarsa ta musamman. Sunansa a fannin likitanci ya bazu cikin sauri, kuma an naɗa shi shugaban manyan asibitoci a garinsu na Ray da kuma Baghdad, cibiyar duniyar Musulunci. Musamman ma, lokacin da ake gina sabon asibiti a Baghdad, ya yi amfani da wata hanya mai sabbin abubuwa: ya rataye guntun nama sabo a wurare daban-daban na birnin kuma ya zaɓi wurin da nama ya fi jinkirin ruɓewa a matsayin wurin asibitin. Wannan ya nuna a fili tunaninsa na kimiyya, wanda ke nuna zurfin fahimtarsa game da tasirin tsafta da muhalli ga lafiya, da kuma fifikonsa ga shaidar gwaji bisa ga hankali.

A matsayinsa na shugaban asibiti, Al-Razi ya lura da kowane majiyyaci a hankali kuma ya rubuta alamunsu dalla-dalla, yana ƙoƙarin fahimtar cututtuka ta hanyar shaidar gwaji da lura da asibiti, maimakon dogaro da makanta ga ikon da aka riga aka kafa. Ɗaya daga cikin shahararrun nasarorinsa na likitanci shine littafinsa, *Kitāb fī al-jadārī wa-al-ḥaṣbah* (Littafin Ciwon Suya da Kyanda). A cikin wannan littafi, ya bayyana alamun cututtuka biyu, ciwon suya da kyanda, a fili, yana mai bambanta su a asibiti a karon farko a tarihi. Wannan nasara ce ta tsarin tsari ga cututtuka fiye da lura kawai, kuma ya kawo ci gaba mai mahimmanci a binciken cututtuka masu yaɗuwa. Al-Razi ya rubuta littattafai da yawa na likitanci a tsawon rayuwarsa, kuma bayan mutuwarsa, almajiransa sun tattara manyan bayanan nasa don haɗa wata babbar encyclopedia ta likitanci mai suna *Kitāb al-Ḥāwī fī al-ṭibb* (wanda aka fi sani da *Liber continens* a Latin). Wannan littafi ya tattara duk ilimin likitanci daga tsohuwar Girka har zuwa duniyar Musulunci ta zamaninsa, kuma an yi amfani da shi a matsayin littafin koyarwa na likitanci na tsawon ƙarnuka. Bincikensa na ilimi bai iyakance ga likitanci ba; ya rubuta littattafai sama da 200 game da falsafa, ɗabi'a, da addini, yana mai imani cewa za a iya kaiwa ga gaskiya ta hanyar hankali a matsayinsa na mai ra'ayin hankali wanda Plato ya yi tasiri a kansa. Waɗannan ra'ayoyinsa masu ci gaba wani lokaci sun haifar da rikici da masu tunani na addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya.

Duk da cewa Al-Razi ya rasa ganinsa saboda cutar ido (cataract) a lokacin tsufansa, bincikensa na ilimi da ayyukansa na rubuce-rubuce ba su tsaya ba. An fassara ayyukansa zuwa Latin, wanda ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban likitanci a Turai ta Tsakiya, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen musayar ilimin likitanci tsakanin Gabas da Yamma. Musamman ma, tsarin gwaji da ya yi amfani da shi, wanda ke ba da fifiko ga gwaje-gwaje da lura, ya zama tushen hanyoyin kimiyya na zamani kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi ga ci gaban likitancin zamani. Ya wayar da kan mutane game da mahimmancin tsarin da ya dogara ga hankali da shaida, maimakon camfi ko ikon da ba a tantance ba, wajen binciken musabbabin cututtuka da haɓaka hanyoyin magani. Gadon Al-Razi ya fi girma fiye da tarin ilimin likitanci kawai; yana haskakawa musamman saboda ya yaɗa tunanin kimiyya da ruhun bincike mai mahimmanci ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Waɗannan nasarorinsa, tare da neman ilimi mai zurfi na sauran masana Musulunci na zamaninsa kamar Ibn Sina, sun bar babban tasiri a tarihin ilimin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ɗan Harun al-Rashid, Halifa wanda bayan cin nasara a yaƙin basasa, ya kafa Gidan Hikima kuma ya buɗe Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.
key_achievements: Ya zama Halifa guda ɗaya bayan cin nasara a yaƙin basasa.
Kafa 'Gidan Hikima' da jagorantar farfaɗo da ilimi.
Haɓaka fassarar littattafan Girka na gargajiya da ci gaban kimiyya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: An tuna da shi a matsayin mai kare ilimi wanda ya buɗe ƙofofin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci, yana da tasiri sosai ga ci gaban ilimi.

al-mamun.epic:
An haife Al-Ma'mun ɗan babban Halifa Harun al-Rashid, amma tafarkinsa bai kasance mai sauƙi ba. Mahaifiyarsa Bafarsa ce, kuma ya girma yana aiki a matsayin gwamna a Khurasan, gabashin daular. A can ne ya haɗu da al'adu da ilimai daban-daban, wanda ya ƙara masa ƙishirwar ilimi. Ɗan uwansa na uba, Al-Amin, wanda mahaifiyarsa Larabawa ce, an ɗauke shi magajin Baghdad, amma shi yana bin wata hanya ce daban, yana mai fifita ilimi da hankali.

Bayan rasuwar mahaifinsa, daular ta rabu biyu tsakaninsa da ɗan uwansa Al-Amin. Wannan mummunar yaƙin basasa, wanda aka fi sani da 'Fitna ta Huɗu', ya ɗauki tsawon shekaru biyu, kuma a ƙarshe sojojinsa suka ci Baghdad, ya zama Halifa guda ɗaya. Amma farashin nasarar ya yi tsanani. Baghdad, cibiyar daular, ta zama kufai, kuma mutane sun ji rauni sosai. Ya fuskanci babban aiki na sake haɗa daular da ta rabu.

Ya yanke shawarar gina sabuwar daula a kan kango. A cibiyarta akwai ilimi, ba ƙarfin soja ba. Ya kafa 'Gidan Hikima (Bayt al-Hikma)' a Baghdad, kuma ya gayyaci masana daga ko'ina cikin duniya. Sun fassara ayyukan Aristotle, Ptolemy, da Galen zuwa Larabci, kuma masana irin su Al-Khwarizmi sun buɗe sabbin hanyoyi a fannin lissafi da ilimin taurari. Ya ba masana daraja kamar zinariya, yana mai da neman ilimi babban aikin daular.

Mulkinsa bai iyakance ga farfaɗo da ilimi kawai ba. Ya kuma fuskanci adawa mai yawa ta hanyar tilasta wa wani bincike na addini da ake kira 'Mihna' don kafa akidar tauhidi ta Mu'tazila a matsayin koyarwar hukuma ta daular. Bugu da ƙari, ya jagoranci yaƙe-yaƙe na soja a kan Daular Byzantine, yana kare iyakokin daular. Rayuwarsa cike take da yaƙe-yaƙe, mulki, da kuma sha'awar ilimi marar iyaka. Ya yi fatan zuriyarsa za su tuna da shi ba kawai a matsayin mai cin nasara ba, amma a matsayin mai kare ilimi wanda ya buɗe ƙofofin Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Masudi ya kasance fitaccen matafiyi, masanin tarihi, kuma masanin kasa Balarabe a zamanin daular Abbasiyya daga karshen karni na 9 zuwa tsakiyar karni na 10, wanda ya rubuta duniya gaba daya ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce masu yawa da binciken fili.
key_achievements: Gudanar da tafiye-tafiye masu yawa na duniya da binciken fili
Rubuta littafin Muruj al-Dhahab wa Ma'adin al-Jawahir
Bude sabon salo na hada tarihi, yanki, da ilimin dan Adam a rubuce-rubuce
fact_box.legacy_statement: An kira shi 'Herodotus na Larabawa', kuma ya zaburar da masana na gaba game da muhimmancin hada ilimi da kwarewa kai tsaye.

al-masudi.epic:
Abul Hasan Ali ibn al-Husayn Al-Masudi (kimanin 896 – kimanin 956) ya kasance fitaccen masanin tarihi, masanin kasa, kuma matafiyi Balarabe a zamanin daular Abbasiyya, wato daga karshen karni na 9 zuwa tsakiyar karni na 10, lokacin da wayewar Musulunci ke cin gajiyar zamanin zinariya na ilimi da bincike. An haife shi a Baghdad, cibiyar duniyar Musulunci, kuma ya girma a cikin yanayin ilimi mai bunkasa a lokacin. Al-Masudi bai takaita kansa ga ilimin littattafai kawai ba, amma ya dauki hakan a matsayin aikinsa na ganin duniya da idanunsa, ya kuma rubuta abin da ya gani. Tun yana saurayi, ya fara tafiye-tafiye masu nisa, yana mai da hankali ga sha'awar bincike marar iyaka da ruhin neman ilimi. Tafiyarsa ta kai shi ta tsoffin biranen Farisa zuwa kasashen Indiya masu ban mamaki da kuma gabar tekun Ceylon (yanzu Sri Lanka), wanda ya zama matakin farko na gina duniyar iliminsa ta musamman. Ya fi ba da muhimmanci ga bayanan da ya samu kai tsaye ta hanyar binciken fili fiye da dogaro ga tsoffin rubuce-rubuce, ta haka ya bude sabbin hanyoyi ga masana na lokacin.

Tafiye-tafiyen Al-Masudi sun wuce motsi na yanki kawai, sun kasance wani tsari ne na zurfafa bincike na al'adu da kimiyya. Ya yi tafiya a kan iskar damina ta Tekun Indiya, ya gangara gabar tekun Gabashin Afirka, ya ji labaran Madagascar, kuma ya ci gaba da tafiya gabas don yin hulda da 'yan kasuwa na Tekun China, inda ya hadu da wayewar kai daban-daban. A cikin wadannan tafiye-tafiye, ya yi magana kai tsaye da mutanen gida, ya saurari tarihin bakinsu, kuma ya lura da kyau game da yanayin kasa da muhallin dabbobi da tsirrai na kowane yanki. Wannan ya nuna tsarin sa na musamman na fahimtar batutuwa daban-daban kamar yanki, al'adu, addini, da tsarin zamantakewa, wanda ya bambanta da tsarin rubuta tarihi na lokacin wanda ke jera abubuwan da suka faru bisa tsarin lokaci. Al-Masudi yana kallon duniya a matsayin wani babban zane mai ban sha'awa, kuma ya nemi fahimtar yadda kowane bangare ke da alaka da juna ta hanyar kwarewarsa kai tsaye. Wannan tsarin bincike mai tushe a fili ya zama wani muhimmin mataki da ya kara wa rubuce-rubucensa rayuwa da zurfi.

Tattara wannan dimbin ilimi da gogewa da aka samu ta hanyar shekaru da dama na tafiye-tafiye masu yawa da binciken fili ya kasance babban kalubale ga Al-Masudi. Don tsara da kuma rubuta duk wannan a tsari, ya zauna a Fustat (yanzu Alkahira) a Masar a karshen rayuwarsa kuma ya sadaukar da kansa ga rubuce-rubuce. Littafinsa mafi muhimmanci, Muruj al-Dhahab wa Ma'adin al-Jawahir (Makiyayan Zinariya da Ma'adanai Masu Daraja), shine sakamakon wannan kokari. Wannan littafi ba wai kawai ya rubuta tarihi ba ne, amma ya kunshi wani sabon salo mai ban mamaki na bayyana yanayin duniya, kabilu, al'adu, addinai, da tsarin zamantakewa ta hanyar hada su bisa ga batutuwa. Wannan yana gabatar da cikakken ra'ayi game da duniya wanda ya hada tarihi, yanki, da ilimin dan Adam, kuma yana nuna zurfin fahimtarsa game da yadda abubuwan da suka gabata da na yanzu ke shafar juna. Baya ga wannan, Al-Masudi ya rubuta littattafai da yawa, ciki har da wani babban littafin tarihi mai juzu'i 30, amma abin takaici, yawancin rubuce-rubucensa sun bace a cikin tafiyar lokaci, kuma kadan ne kawai suka rage a yau. Duk da haka, ayyukansa da suka rage sun tabbatar da kwazonsa na ilimi da hakurinsa.

Gadon Al-Masudi yana ci gaba har zuwa yau ta hanyar fitaccen littafinsa, Muruj al-Dhahab wa Ma'adin al-Jawahir. Wannan littafi wata muhimmiyar tushe ce da ke nuna yadda masana na duniyar Musulunci ta tsakiya suka fahimci da kuma binciki duniya, kuma tsarin rubutunsa na musamman ya yi tasiri sosai ga masana na gaba. Ya kasance majagaba wanda bai takaita kansa ga jera abubuwa kawai ba, amma ya nemi kallon duniya daga cikakkiyar mahanga ta hanyar hada fannoni daban-daban na ilimi. Saboda wannan gudummawa, an kira shi 'Herodotus na Larabawa', wanda ke girmama aikinsa na tafiye-tafiye a yankuna masu yawa, yana lura da kuma rubuta abubuwan da ya gani kai tsaye kamar Herodotus, masanin tarihi na tsohuwar Girka. Rayuwa da rubuce-rubucen Al-Masudi sun kasance shaida ga kishin ilimi marar iyaka da sha'awar fahimtar duniya gaba daya. Ruhin bincikensa ya kuma zaburar da manyan matafiya na duniyar Musulunci na gaba kamar Ibn Battuta.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Battani masanin taurari ne na Larabawa Musulmi daga ƙarshen karni na 9 zuwa farkon karni na 10, wanda ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ilimin taurari ta hanyar ingantaccen lura da gabatar da ayyukan trigonometry.
key_achievements: Ingantaccen lissafin tsawon shekarar rana
Gabatar da ayyukan trigonometry a ilimin taurari
Gyara ka'idar Ptolemy
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun yi tasiri sosai ga ilimin taurari na Renaissance a Turai, kuma sun ba Copernicus kwarin gwiwa.

al-battani.epic:
Al-Battani (Abū ʿAbd Allāh Muḥammad ibn Jābir ibn Sinān al-Raqqī al-Ḥarrānī al-Ṣābiʾ al-Battānī, an haife shi a kusan shekara ta 858) ya kasance fitaccen masanin taurari, masanin lissafi, masanin kasa, kuma mai duba taurari a zamanin Zinare na Musulunci. Ƙarshen karni na 9, lokacin da aka haife shi, wani lokaci ne da wayewar Musulunci ke kan kololuwar kimiyya da ilimi, inda aka fassara kuma aka yi nazari a kan ilimin tsohuwar Girka, Indiya, da Farisa sosai, musamman a Baghdad. An haife shi a Harran, wani tsohon birni a arewacin Mesopotamiya, Al-Battani zuriyar addinin Sabiyawa ne masu bautar taurari, kuma hakan ya rinjaye shi ya ɗauki sararin samaniya a matsayin abin bincike mai tsarki, ba kawai wani wuri mai kyau ba. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, ya koma Raqqa, birni a bakin kogin Furat wanda ya kasance cibiyar ilimi da dama, inda ya kafa gidan lura da taurari don iliminsa da lura da su, kuma ya fara rubuta motsin taurari. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta samo asali ne daga yanayin ilimi mai buɗaɗɗe da bincike na duniyar Musulunci a lokacin, wanda ya zama tushen gagarumin nasarorin da zai samu a nan gaba.

Hanyar binciken Al-Battani ta kasance wani misali na haƙuri da daidaito, wanda ya bambanta da manyan hanyoyin ilimi na lokacin. Ya girmama sosai babban aikin Claudius Ptolemy, Almagest na tsohuwar Girka, amma bai karɓi abubuwan da ya kammala ba tare da bincike ba. Maimakon haka, ya kafa wata manufa bayyananniya don tabbatar da gyara ka'idodin Ptolemy ta hanyar lura da gaske. Al-Battani ya tattara bayanai masu yawa na kansa ta hanyar lura da sararin samaniya kowace rana tsawon fiye da shekaru 40. Sakamakon wannan ƙoƙari mai ɗorewa da ingantaccen lura shine babban aikinsa na rayuwa, Kitāb az-Zīj aṣ-Ṣābiʾ (Littafin Teburan Sabiyawa). Wannan littafi ba kawai ya rubuta abubuwan da suka shafi taurari ba, har ma ya haɗa da matsayin taurari, hasashen kusufi da gerhana, da kuma teburori don lissafin taurari daban-daban, wanda aka ɗauka a matsayin wata babbar fasaha da ta tattara ilimin taurari na duniyar Musulunci a lokacin. Hanyarsa ta nemi daidaito tsakanin ka'ida da lura da gaske, kuma ta gabatar da wani muhimmin juyi a hanyar kimiyya.

A cikin Kitāb az-Zīj aṣ-Ṣābiʾ, Al-Battani ya gabatar da gagarumin bincike na taurari da sabbin abubuwa a fannin lissafi, inda ya wuce ilimin da ake da shi. Ya lissafta tsawon shekarar rana a matsayin kwanaki 365, awanni 5, mintuna 46, da daƙiƙa 24, wanda ya nuna daidaito mai ban mamaki, tare da bambancin mintuna 2 da daƙiƙa 22 kawai daga ma'aunin zamani. Bugu da ƙari, ya gano cewa juyawar ma'aunin rana da dare, wato jinkirin girgizar axis na duniya, ya fi sauri fiye da yadda Ptolemy ya lissafta, don haka ya shawo kan iyakokin ilimin taurari na tsohuwar Girka. Mafi mahimmanci, ɗaya daga cikin gagarumin nasarorin Al-Battani shine gabatar da ayyukan trigonometry kamar sine, cosine, da tangent a tsari cikin lissafin taurari. Wannan ya maye gurbin hadaddiyar hanyar lissafin igiya da Ptolemy ya yi amfani da ita, wanda ya inganta daidaito da ingancin lissafin taurari sosai. Wannan sabon abu a fannin lissafi bai kawai ci gaba da ilimin taurari ba, har ma ya bazu zuwa Turai daga baya, inda ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban lissafi. Waɗannan ƙoƙarinsa sun kasance sakamakon zurfin bincike da fahimtar lissafi fiye da lura kawai.

Binciken Al-Battani ya yi tasiri sosai a Turai, fiye da duniyar Musulunci. Babban aikinsa na rayuwa, Kitāb az-Zīj aṣ-Ṣābiʾ, an fassara shi zuwa Latin a karni na 12 a ƙarƙashin taken De Scientia Stellarum, kuma ya zama littafin karatu mai mahimmanci ga masana taurari na Turai a zamanin Renaissance. Musamman ma, Nicolaus Copernicus, wanda ya goyi bayan ka'idar heliocentrism, ya ambaci Al-Battani sau 23 a cikin babban aikinsa De revolutionibus orbium coelestium, inda ya yaba da daidaiton lura da muhimmancin ka'idarsa sosai. Al-Battani ya rasu a kusan shekara ta 930 AD, yayin da yake komawa gida daga Baghdad, amma ingantattun bayanan lura da sabbin hanyoyin lissafi da ya bari sun zama jagora ga masu binciken sararin samaniya tsawon ƙarnuka. Nasarorinsa, tare da binciken wasu masana Musulunci na zamani kamar Ibn al-Haytham a fannin ilimin gani da hanyoyin kimiyya, sun nuna a fili gudummawar wayewar Musulunci ta tsakiya ga ci gaban ilimin ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Jahiz marubuci ne kuma masanin kimiyya daga Iraki a zamanin daular Abbasiyya a ƙarshen ƙarni na 8 zuwa tsakiyar ƙarni na 9, wanda ya bar babban tasiri a kimiyyar halitta da adabi ta hanyar 'Kitab al-Hayawan'.
key_achievements: Rubuta 'Kitab al-Hayawan' wanda ya yi magana kan dabbobi sama da 350.
Gabatar da ra'ayoyin gwagwarmayar rayuwa da ƙaddarar muhalli.
Babban tasiri ga ci gaban adabin rubutun Larabci.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Iliminsa mai zurfi da salon rubutunsa na musamman suna ci gaba da ba da kwarin gwiwa na har abada ga ilimin Musulunci da adabi na gaba.

al-jahiz.epic:
Al-Jahiz marubuci ne kuma masanin kimiyya mashahuri daga Iraki, wanda ya rayu a farkon zamanin daular Abbasiyya, kimanin shekara ta 775. Cikakken sunansa shine Abu Uthman Amr ibn Bahr al-Kinani al-Fuqaimi al-Basri, amma an fi saninsa da lakabin 'Al-Jahiz', wanda ke nufin 'mai idanu masu fitowa'. An haife shi a Basra, wani birni a kudancin Iraki wanda ya kasance cibiyar ilimi da kasuwanci. Ko da yake ya fito daga gida mai talauci, tun yana yaro, sha'awarsa ta ilimi ba ta hana shi komai ba. Ya saurari tattaunawar malamai da ke taruwa a bakin koguna, kuma ya karanta littattafai har dare a shagunan littattafai na kasuwa, yana samun ilimi ta hanyar koyar da kansa. Kamanninsa na musamman sau da yawa ya zama abin izgili, amma sha'awar ilimi da kuma kaifin basirarsa da ke cikin zuciyarsa sun kasance mafi girman dukiyarsa da babu wanda zai iya kwace masa. Wannan tushe ya zama muhimmin ginshiki wajen cimma nasarori na musamman a fannoni daban-daban a nan gaba.

Lokacin da Al-Jahiz ya girma, ya nufi Baghdad, wadda a lokacin ita ce cibiyar ilimi da al'adu a duniyar Musulunci kuma babban birnin daular Abbasiyya. Baghdad ta kasance wurin da 'Gidan Hikima' (Bayt al-Hikma) ke bunƙasa, inda littattafai da malamai daga ko'ina cikin duniya ke taruwa don neman ilimi, wanda ya samar masa da yanayi mai kyau don nuna basirarsa ta ilimi. Kaifin basirarsa da iliminsa mai zurfi ba da daɗewa ba suka jawo hankalin Khalif Al-Ma'mun da magadansa, kuma ya zama masanin kimiyya kuma marubuci da kotu ke so. Al-Jahiz ya rubuta game da batutuwa masu yawa kamar ilimin tauhidi, siyasa, fasahar magana, da ɗabi'a, kuma rubuce-rubucensa sun burge masana na zamaninsa da hujjoji masu bayyanawa da gamsarwa. Amma babban sha'awarsa ba ta kasance a cikin rikice-rikicen siyasa ko makirce-makircen kotu ba, sai dai a cikin lura da rubuta abubuwan halittar Allah, wato dukkan halittu masu rai. Ya nemi gano gaskiya da hikima mafi girma a cikin abubuwan al'ajabi na yanayi.

Wannan zurfin sha'awa da bincike na Al-Jahiz game da yanayi ya haifar da 'Kitab al-Hayawan' (Littafin Dabbobi), wanda ake ɗauka a matsayin babban nasararsa. Wannan littafi ba kawai kundin dabbobi da tsirrai ba ne, amma wani aiki ne na encyclopedia wanda ya yi nazari mai zurfi kan halayen dabbobi sama da 350, wuraren zama, da kuma hanyoyin rayuwarsu. Ya lura da kyau yadda dabbobi ke samun abinci, guje wa masu farauta, da kuma yadda suke gasa da gwagwarmaya don haihuwa, yana gabatar da farkon sigar ra'ayin da ake kira 'gwagwarmayar rayuwa' a yau. Bugu da ƙari, ya nuna hangen nesa game da yadda muhalli ke shafar halaye da ɗabi'un dabbobi, wato, ya gabatar da farkon ra'ayin 'ƙaddarar muhalli', yana nuna shi a matsayin majagaba a ilimin halittu da tunanin muhalli. Wasu masana sun gano a cikin rubuce-rubucensa irin tunanin juyin halitta, wanda ya gabaci ka'idar juyin halitta ta Charles Darwin da shekaru dubu. An ce ya rubuta littattafai sama da 250 ban da wannan, amma abin takaici, yawancinsu sun ɓace, kuma kaɗan ne kawai suka rage har zuwa yau.

Al-Jahiz ya rasu a Basra kimanin shekara ta 868. Ko da bayan mutuwarsa, salon rubutunsa, wato rubutunsa mai bayyanawa, mai basira, mai cike da labarai da barkwanci, ya yi tasiri sosai ga adabin Larabci na baya. Ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na rubutun Larabci, kuma ayyukansa sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen faɗaɗa ƙarfin bayyanawa da damar adabi na harshen Larabci. Ƙaunarsa ta ilimi marar iyaka har ma an nuna ta da tatsuniyar cewa ya mutu a ƙarƙashin tarin littattafan da yake so. Al-Jahiz ya kasance fiye da marubuci kawai; ya kasance masanin ilimi na gaskiya (polymath) wanda ya haɗa fannoni da yawa kamar ilimin halittu, falsafa, tauhidi, da ilimin zamantakewa. Gadonsa na ilimi har yau yana riƙe da muhimmiyar matsayi a cikin nazarin wayewar Musulunci da tarihin kimiyyar halitta. Ruhinsa na binciken ilimi ya yi daidai da neman ilimi mai faɗi na sauran manyan masana kamar Ibn Sina da Ibn al-Haytham a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa mai zurfi ga wayewar zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Al-Kindi masanin falsafa ne na Larabawa a zamanin zinare na Musulunci na karni na 9, wanda ya gabatar da falsafar Girka ga duniyar Musulunci kuma ya yi sabbin abubuwa a fannoni daban-daban na ilimi.
key_achievements: An kira shi Uban Falsafar Larabawa
Fassara da sharhi kan falsafar Girka
Gabatar da binciken mita (frequency analysis) a ilimin ɓoye-ɓoye
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun kafa tushen falsafar Musulunci kuma sun yi tasiri ga ilimin Turai ta Tsakiya, suna ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban tarihin ilimi na Yamma.

al-kindi.epic:
Al-Kindi (kimanin 801 – kimanin 873) masanin falsafa ne kuma masanin ilimi daban-daban na Larabawa a zamanin zinare na Musulunci na karni na 9, wanda ya gabatar da falsafar Girka ga duniyar Musulunci kuma ya yi sabbin abubuwa a fannoni daban-daban. An haife shi a farkon karni na 9 a Kufa, wani muhimmin cibiyar ilimi a lokacin, daga kabilar Kinda mai daraja. Mahaifinsa ya kasance gwamnan Kufa, kuma saboda wannan tushe, Al-Kindi ya sami damar samun ilimi mafi kyau na zamaninsa. A lokacin kuruciyarsa, ya tafi Baghdad don gamsar da sha'awarsa ta ilimi. Baghdad a lokacin ita ce babban birnin ilimi na duniya kuma inda cibiyar ilimi ta 'Bayt al-Hikma' (Gidan Hikima) ke bunƙasa. A nan, ya fara samun suna a matsayin masanin ilimi a ƙarƙashin goyon bayan Khalifofi Al-Ma'mun da Al-Mu'tasim. Babban aikinsa shi ne fassara da kuma yin sharhi mai zurfi kan manyan ayyukan masana falsafa na Girka na da, kamar Aristotle da Plato, wanda ya zama muhimmin ginshiƙi wajen yada ilimin gargajiya na Yamma a duniyar Musulunci.

Binciken falsafar Al-Kindi ya mai da hankali kan neman daidaito tsakanin hankali da imani. Ya tabbata cewa hanyar tunani ta falsafar Girka ba ta taɓa cin karo da imani na Musulunci ba, a maimakon haka, tana iya zama kayan aiki mai ƙarfi don fahimtar halittar Allah da tsarin sararin samaniya. A cikin ɗaya daga cikin manyan ayyukansa, 'Akan Falsafa ta Farko' (On First Philosophy), ya tattauna batutuwa masu zurfi kamar ilimin halitta, wanzuwar Allah, da rashin mutuwa na rai, yana ba da tushe mai ƙarfi na falsafa ga ilimin tauhidi na Musulunci. Wannan yunƙuri na farko ya ba shi taken girmamawa na 'Uban Falsafar Larabawa', amma a lokaci guda, ya fuskanci tsananin suka da shakku daga masana tauhidi na Musulunci masu ra'ayin mazan jiya. An ga ra'ayoyinsa a matsayin ƙalubale ga fassarorin addini na gargajiya, kuma wannan ya zama muhimmin juyi wajen sanya shi a tsakiyar muhawarar ilimi a cikin al'ummar Musulunci a lokacin. Ya nemi ƙarfafa imani ta hanyar bincike mai ma'ana, amma an ɗauki wannan a matsayin ƙalubale ga tsarin da aka riga aka kafa, wanda ya haifar da babban rikici a tafiyarsa ta ilimi.

Sha'awar ilimi ta Al-Kindi ba ta tsaya ga falsafa kawai ba. Ya kasance masanin ilimi na gaskiya wanda ya kware a fannoni daban-daban kamar lissafi, likitanci, kiɗa, ilimin gani, ilimin taurari, da ilimin ɓoye-ɓoye (cryptography). Musamman ma, ya gabatar da wata hanya mai ban mamaki mai suna 'Binciken Mita (Frequency Analysis)' a cikin ilimin ɓoye-ɓoye, wanda ya kafa tushen ilimin ɓoye-ɓoye na zamani. Wannan fasaha tana nazarin yawan fitowar kowace harafi a cikin wani harshe ta hanyar kididdiga. Har ila yau, ya yi nazarin tasirin kiɗa a kan ran ɗan adam kuma ya haɓaka tsarin ma'auni wanda ya zama tushen ka'idar kiɗa ta Yamma. Rubuce-rubucensa sun wuce 260, wanda ke nuna zurfin iliminsa mai faɗi. Amma rayuwarsa ba ta kasance mai sauƙi ba koyaushe. A lokacin mulkin Khalif Al-Mutawakkil, an tsananta wa ra'ayoyinsa na hankali. Ya fuskanci gwaji na kwace masa ɗakin karatu mai daraja saboda makircin abokan hamayyarsa, amma bai rasa imaninsa ga ilimi ba.
