Tare da taimakon abokai masu tasiri, a ƙarshe ya sami damar dawo da mutuncinsa da ɗakin karatunsa.

Bayan rasuwar Al-Kindi, manyan ayyukansa da sabbin ra'ayoyinsa sun yi tasiri sosai ga masana Musulunci na baya. Manyan masana falsafa kamar Ibn Sina (Avicenna) da Ibn Rushd (Averroes) sun haɓaka ra'ayoyinsu a kan tushen falsafar Al-Kindi. An fassara rubuce-rubucensa zuwa Latin kuma an yada su zuwa Turai ta Tsakiya, wanda ya zama muhimmin gada don ci gaban falsafar Scholastic ta Yamma. Baya ga gabatar da ilimin Girka na da ga duniyar Musulunci, ya sake fassara shi daga hangen nesa na Musulunci, yana buɗe sabbin fannoni na ilimi. Ya nemi daidaito tsakanin hankali da wahayi, yana ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga ci gaban ilimi na wayewar Musulunci. Ayyukansa masu yawa suna da muhimmiyar matsayi a tarihin kimiyya da falsafa har zuwa yau. Gadonsa na tunani ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban falsafar Yamma fiye da duniyar Musulunci, yana barin babban alama a tarihin ilimi na tsakiya tare da nasarorin masana Musulunci na baya kamar Ibn Sina da Ibn Rushd.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari malami ne dan Farisa na karni na 9 a zamanin Daular Abbasiyawa, wanda ya rubuta manyan littattafan tarihi da tafsirin Alkur'ani, ya kafa harsashin ilimin Musulunci.
key_achievements: Rubuta littafin 'Tarihin Annabawa da Sarakuna'
Rubuta tafsirin 'Tafsir al-Tabari'
Kokarin kafa makarantar fikihu ta 'Jariri' mai zaman kanta
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa sun kafa mizani ga ilimin tarihi na Musulunci da tafsirin Alkur'ani, kuma har yau sun kasance muhimmin gado na ilimi.

al-tabari.epic:
A ƙarshen karni na 9, a lokacin da wayewar Musulunci ke kan ganiyarta a zamanin Daular Abbasiyawa, Abū Jaʿfar Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari, wanda aka haifa a kusan shekara ta 838/9 a Amol, Tabaristan, Farisa, babban malami ne, masanin tarihi, mai tafsirin Alkur'ani, kuma masanin fikihu. A lokacin, ilimi da fasaha sun bunƙasa a Baghdad, kuma masana sun tara ilimi mai yawa ta hanyar binciken koyarwar Annabi Muhammad da tarihin Daular Musulunci. Tun yana yaro, al-Tabari ya nuna hazaka ta musamman. Ya haddace Alkur'ani gaba daya yana dan shekara bakwai, ya jagoranci sallah yana dan shekara takwas, kuma ya fara rubuta Hadisi (maganganu da ayyukan Annabi Muhammad) yana dan shekara tara. Mahaifinsa ya gane kiran ilimi na dansa tun da wuri kuma ya goyi bayan karatunsa gaba daya a tsawon rayuwarsa. Yana dan shekara goma sha biyu, ya bar garinsu don neman ilimi mai zurfi, ya nufi Rayy, cibiyar ilimi a lokacin, wanda hakan ya zama farkon tafiyarsa ta neman ilimi har tsawon rayuwarsa.

Neman ilimi na Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari ya kai shi Baghdad, cibiyar duniyar Musulunci. A can, ya yi karatu mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban kamar fikihu, tauhidi, da tarihi a karkashin manyan malamai na zamaninsa. Amma sha'awarsa ta ilimi ba ta tsaya a wani yanki ba. Ya yi doguwar tafiya na shekaru da yawa zuwa yankuna masu fadi kamar Siriya, Falasdinu, da Masar don tattara Hadisi da rubuce-rubucen tarihi da kansa. A lokacin wannan tafiya, ya sadu da malamai da yawa don tattaunawa, ya karanta littattafai masu wuya a dakunan karatu daban-daban, yana tattara muryoyin da rubuce-rubucen da suka gabata daya bayan daya. Wannan tattara bayanai mai fadi da bincike mai zurfi sun zama tushe mai daraja ga manyan ayyukansa na gaba, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mataki a tafiyarsa ta ilimi da kuma tabbatar da burinsa na hada kan guntayen ilimin Musulunci zuwa wani babban labari.

Bayan ya zauna a Baghdad, Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari ya sadaukar da shekaru da yawa ga koyarwa da rubuce-rubuce. Gidansa ya kasance cike da ɗalibai masu neman ilimi, kuma tattaunawar ilimi da su ta kara masa kaifin basira. A wannan lokacin ne ya fara rubuta manyan ayyukansa guda biyu: “Tarihin Annabawa da Sarakuna” (Tarikh al-Rusul wa al-Muluk) da kuma tafsirin Alkur'ani “Tafsir al-Tabari” (Jami' al-Bayan 'an Ta'wil Ay al-Qur'an). “Tarihin Annabawa da Sarakuna” babban littafin tarihi ne na duniya wanda ya shafi tarihin Musulunci gaba daya tun daga halittar dan Adam har zuwa zamaninsa. “Tafsir al-Tabari” kuma babban tafsiri ne wanda ya fassara kowace aya ta Alkur'ani dalla-dalla daga mahangar harshe, fikihu, da tauhidi. An ce yana rubuta shafuka 40 a kowace rana, wanda hakan ya nuna sha'awarsa ta adana ilimi da isar da shi ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Amma tafiyarsa ta ilimi ba ta kasance mai sauki ba. Ya gabatar da ra'ayoyi na kansa daban da na makarantun fikihu na gargajiya, yana kokarin kafa makarantar 'Jariri', kuma saboda haka ya fuskanci tsananin adawa da tsanantawa daga makarantar Hanbali mai karfi a Baghdad. An kira ra'ayoyinsa bidi'a, kuma a karshen rayuwarsa an sanya shi a tsare a gida. Duk da haka, bai ajiye alkalaminsa ba. A cikin rashin fahimta da adawa na duniya, ya cika aikinsa na rubuta tarihi da fassara maganar Allah har zuwa karshe, kuma ya rasu cikin nutsuwa a shekara ta 923.

Manyan ayyukan Muhammad ibn Jarir al-Tabari sun yi tasiri sosai a tarihin ilimin Musulunci, musamman “Tarihin Annabawa da Sarakuna” da “Tafsir al-Tabari” sun zama littattafan tunani masu mahimmanci ga malamai na gaba. Littafinsa na tarihi ya wuce rubutun tarihi na yau da kullun, ya gabatar da wata hanya ta musamman ta kwatanta da nazarin tushe daban-daban, wanda ya kafa harsashin ilimin tarihi na Musulunci. Bugu da kari, tafsirinsa na Alkur'ani ya hada mahangar harshe, fikihu, da tauhidi don kara zurfin fahimtar Alkur'ani. Ko da yake makarantar 'Jariri' ba ta ci gaba ba bayan rasuwarsa, gadonsa na ilimi ya yi zurfi a duk faɗin duniyar Musulunci. Ana kallonsa a matsayin mutumin da ya tattara nasarorin ilimi na zamanin zinare na Musulunci kuma ya kafa al'adun ilimi da za a gada ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Ayyukansa sun zaburar da masana tarihi na Musulunci na gaba kamar Ibn Khaldun, kuma har yau ya kasance muhimmin tushe don nazarin wayewar Musulunci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Alp Arslan shi ne Sultan kuma shugaban soja na Daular Seljuk a ƙarni na 11, wanda nasarar Yaƙin Manzikert ta buɗe hanya ga Turkawa su zauna a Anatoliya.
key_achievements: Ya zama Sultan na Daular Seljuk kuma ya haɗa ta.
Ya aiwatar da gyaran gudanarwa tare da Waziri Nizam al-Mulk.
Ya ci Daular Rumawa a Yaƙin Manzikert a shekara ta 1071.
Ya shimfiɗa harsashin Turkawa su zauna a Anatoliya.
fact_box.legacy_statement: Nasararsa ta ba da damar Turkawa su zauna a Anatoliya, wanda ya shimfiɗa harsashin haihuwar Daular Usmaniyya ta gaba.

alp-arslan.epic:
Alp Arslan (an haife shi a shekara ta 1029) shi ne Sultan na biyu na Daular Seljuk a tsakiyar ƙarni na 11 kuma babban shugaban soja. A tsakiyar ƙarni na 11, duniyar Musulunci tana cikin rikicin siyasa da hargitsi, kuma Turkawan Seljuk suna fitowa a matsayin sabon iko, suna gina daula mai faɗi. Jikan jikan Seljuk, wanda ya kafa daular Seljuk, an haife shi a ranar 20 ga Janairu, 1029. Sunansa na asali Muhammad bin Daud Chagri ne, amma ya sami laƙabin 'Alp Arslan' (ma'ana 'zaki jarumi' a yaren Turkanci) saboda ƙwarewarsa ta soja, jaruntakarsa ta kansa, da kuma ƙwarewarsa ta yaƙi. Ya gaji kawunsa Tughril Beg a matsayin Sultan na Daular Seljuk, inda ya ɗauki nauyin kaddarar daula mai faɗi. Wannan lokaci ne da tashin hankali tsakanin Daular Rumawa ke ƙaruwa, kuma a cikin Musulunci ma akwai ƙungiyoyi daban-daban masu gwagwarmaya, wanda ya haifar da yanayin siyasa na duniya mai sarkakiya; Alp Arslan ya saita burinsa na tabbatar da zaman lafiya da faɗaɗa daular a cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi.

Da zaran Alp Arslan ya zama Sultan, ya fuskanci kalubale masu yawa. Daular Seljuk mai faɗi tana da ƙarfi, amma a cikin gida, dangogi daban-daban da ƙungiyoyin yanki sun yi jayayya da gadon sarautarsa, suna tayar da tawaye. Ya yi nasarar shawo kan waɗannan yanayi na siyasa masu haɗari, yana nuna ba kawai ƙwarewar soja ba har ma da hikimar diflomasiyya mai ban mamaki. Ta hanyar jerin ayyukan soja masu muhimmanci da haɗin gwiwar dabaru, ya murkushe ƙungiyoyin tawaye a tsanake kuma ya tabbatar da ikonsa a duk faɗin daular. Wannan lokaci na daidaita cikin gida ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ƙarfafa mulkinsa da kuma gina haɗin kai a kan ƙungiyoyin waje. Tare da wannan, ya naɗa waziri mai basira, Nizam al-Mulk, don aiwatar da gyaran gudanarwa. Nizam al-Mulk ya ba da gudummawa sosai wajen ƙarfafa tushen daular ta hanyar sake tsara tsarin gudanarwa na Seljuk da kuma kafa makarantun Nizamiya, cibiyoyin ilimi don ci gaban ilimi da shari'a. Haɗin gwiwarsu ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen shimfiɗa harsashin wadata mai dorewa ga daular.

Mulkin Alp Arslan lokaci ne na faɗaɗa yankin daular da kuma neman haɗin kan Musulunci na Sunna a duniyar Musulunci. A gabas, ya daidaita yankin Asiya ta Tsakiya bayan kogin Amu Darya, kuma a yamma, ya nuna ƙarfin soja ta hanyar matsa lamba a kan iyakokin Daular Rumawa. Musamman ma, a shekara ta 1064, ya ci Georgia da Armenia, yana faɗaɗa tasirin Seljuk a kan iyakar duniya ta Kirista. Babban nasararsa ta faru a ranar 26 ga Agusta, 1071, a Yaƙin Manzikert. Wannan yaƙin ya faru ne lokacin da Sarkin Rumawa Romanos IV Diogenes ya jagoranci babban sojoji don korar Turkawa gaba ɗaya daga Anatoliya. Duk da cewa sojojinsa sun fi na abokan gaba kaɗan, Alp Arslan ya ci sojojin Rumawa da dabarun yaƙi da jagoranci na musamman. Wani lamari da ba a taɓa gani ba ya faru a wannan yaƙin: an kama Sarkin Romanos IV, wanda ya girgiza Daular Rumawa sosai. Alp Arslan ya nuna jinƙai ga sarkin da aka kama kuma ya sake shi, amma wannan nasara ta zama juyin tarihi, wanda ya buɗe hanya ga Turkawa su yi hijira su zauna a Anatoliya.

Nasarar Yaƙin Manzikert ta kasance babban gadon Alp Arslan. Wannan nasara ta raunana ikon Rumawa a kan Anatoliya kuma ta shimfiɗa harsashin Turkawa su zauna a Anatoliya su kafa jihohin Turkawa daban-daban, ciki har da Sultanate na Rum. Wannan ya zama muhimmin farkon tarihin Turkawa, wanda ya kai ga Daular Usmaniyya ta gaba. Mulkinsa lokaci ne da Daular Seljuk ta ƙarfafa ikonta a duniyar Musulunci kuma ta yi tasiri sosai a kan musayar al'adu tsakanin Gabas da Yamma. Baya ga nasarorin soja, shi, tare da Waziri Nizam al-Mulk, sun gyara tsarin gudanarwa da ilimi don neman zaman lafiya da wadata ga daular. Mutuwarsa ta faru ba zato ba tsammani a ranar 15 ga Disamba, 1072, ta hanyar takobin Yusuf al-Khwarezmi, wani kwamandan gidan sarauta da aka kama a lokacin yaƙin gabas. Amma nasarorin da ya bari sun buɗe zamanin zinariya na Daular Seljuk, kuma sun canza yanayin siyasar ƙasa na Gabas ta Tsakiya da Anatoliya har abada. Jagorancinsa ya kuma ƙarfafa sauran manyan shugabannin duniyar Musulunci, kamar Saladin.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban matafiyi wanda ya yi tafiye-tafiye a faɗin yankin Daular Usmaniyya na ƙarni na 17 tsawon shekaru 40, ya bar babban rubutu mai suna 'Seyahatname'.
key_achievements: Ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duk faɗin Daular Usmaniyya tsawon shekaru 40
Ya rubuta 'Seyahatname' mai girma wanda ya kai juzu'i 10
Ya rubuta al'adu da yanayin ƙasa na duniya a ƙarni na 17
fact_box.legacy_statement: Littafinsa 'Seyahatname' encyclopedia ce da ke ɗauke da duniyar Usmaniyya ta ƙarni na 17, kuma wani gado ne mai daraja wanda ya wuce lokaci.

evliya-celebi.epic:
An haife shi a shekara ta 1611 a Constantinople, cibiyar duniya. Mahaifinsa ya kasance mai sayar da kayan ado kuma malami a fadar Sultan, don haka ya sami ilimi mafi kyau tun yana yaro. Ya koyi haddar Alkur'ani, rubutun hannu, kiɗa, da harsuna da yawa. Basirarsa ta ja hankalin Sultan Murad IV, kuma ya zama bawan da aka fi so a fadar. Amma a cikin zuciyarsa, koyaushe akwai sha'awar ganin duniya mai faɗi. Wata rana da daddare, ya sami babban gata na ganin Annabi Muhammad (SAW) a mafarki. Ya kamata ya nemi 'ceto (şefaat)' daga gare shi, amma saboda farin ciki, kalmar 'tafiya (seyahat)' ta fito daga bakinsa. Annabi ya yi murmushi ya ba shi izinin tafiya, kuma ya ɗauki wannan a matsayin wahayi daga Allah.

Bayan wannan mafarki, rayuwarsa ta canza gaba ɗaya. Da farko, ya fara rubuta kowane lungu da sako na Istanbul, birnin da aka haife shi. Ya bayyana dalla-dalla duk abin da ya gani, daga masallatai, kasuwanni, wuraren wanka, har ma da magudanan ruwa. Wannan shine farkon babban tafiyarsa, 'Seyahatname'. Ba da daɗewa ba, ya wuce Istanbul ya shiga cikin faɗin yankin Daular Usmaniyya. Ya yi aiki a matsayin mai rakiyar Pasha (gwamna) a wasu lokuta, a matsayin manzo a wasu lokuta, kuma a matsayin mai karɓar haraji a wasu lokuta, yana tafiya a Anatoliya, Balkans, Caucasus, da ƙasashen Larabawa. Ayyukansa na hukuma sun kasance kawai dalilin tafiya, kuma ainihin manufarsa ita ce rubuta duk abin da ya gani, ya ji, kuma ya fuskanta.

Tafiyarsa ta ci gaba fiye da shekaru 40. Ya kai har zuwa ganuwar Vienna da ciyayi na Rasha a arewa, zuwa Sudan, tushen kogin Nilu a kudu, zuwa tsakiyar Farisa a gabas, da kuma bakin tekun Morocco a yamma. Ya koyi harsuna da yawa kuma ya rubuta al'adu, imani, kiɗa, da abinci na al'ummai daban-daban. Ya kuma rubuta game da gine-gine da tarihi na birane, tsayin tsaunuka da kwararar koguna, da dabbobi da tsire-tsire da ke zaune a wurin. Littafinsa 'Seyahatname' ba kawai littafin tafiye-tafiye ba ne, amma encyclopedia ce da ke ɗauke da komai game da duniyar Usmaniyya ta ƙarni na 17. Tabbas, wani lokaci ya haɗa da ƙari da labarai masu ban mamaki, amma shin wannan ba shine farin cikin tafiya ba?

Ana iya cewa rayuwarsa ta fara a kan hanya kuma ta ƙare a kan hanya. Ya bar 'Seyahatname' mai girma wanda ya kai juzu'i 10, kuma wannan littafi shine komai a gare shi. Ta hanyar wannan rubutu, ya yi fatan zai iya yin magana da tsararraki masu zuwa, ya wuce lokaci. Ya so su ga duniyar ƙarni na 17 mai cike da rayuwa ta idanunsa, kuma su ji sautin wannan zamanin ta kunnuwansa. Ko da yake shi mutum ne kawai, Evliya Çelebi, sawunsa da rubuce-rubucensa za a tuna da su har abada tare da ɗaukakar Daular Usmaniyya. Ya kasance matafiyi, mai ba da labari, kuma sama da duka, mai lura da ya ƙaunaci duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ibrahim Muteferrika ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya kuma mawallafi a Daular Usmaniyya ta karni na 18, wanda ya kafa gidan buga littattafai na farko na Turkanci kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga yaɗuwar ilimi.
key_achievements: Kafa gidan buga littattafai na farko na Turkanci a Daular Usmaniyya
Rubuta 'Game da Amfanin Buga Littattafai'
Samun izinin buga littattafan da ba na addini ba
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya kafa muhimmin ginshiƙi ga zamantar da Daular Usmaniyya da kuma yaɗuwar ilimi, yana da tasiri mai girma ga ci gaban ilimi na daular.

ibrahim-muteferrika.epic:
Ibrahim Muteferrika (c. 1674 – 1745) ya kasance jami'in diflomasiyya mai kishin kasa, mawallafi, masanin tattalin arziki, kuma mai ilimi mai yawa a Daular Usmaniyya ta karni na 18. Lokacin da yake aiki ya kasance lokacin da Daular Usmaniyya ke fuskantar ci gaba da karuwar tasirin wayewar Yamma, kuma tana jin matukar buƙatar gyara a cikin gida. An haife shi a Kolozsvár, Transylvania, ya fuskanci wani juyi mai mahimmanci a rayuwarsa lokacin da aka kama shi a matsayin fursuna a lokacin rikicin soja tun yana saurayi, kuma aka kawo shi Istanbul, babban birnin Daular Usmaniyya. A nan ya musulunta, ya sami sunan Ibrahim, kuma saboda gwanintarsa a harsuna da kuma basirarsa, an ba shi damar yin hidima a fadar Sultan. Ba da daɗewa ba ya riƙe muƙamin 'Muteferrika', wanda ke nufin babban mai hidima ko jami'in diflomasiyya na Sultan, wanda ya ba shi damar shiga cikin muhimman ayyukan daular da kuma samun ilimi da gogewa mai yawa. Wannan lokaci ya zama ginshiƙi a gare shi don ya zama wani muhimmin mutum wanda zai iya shafar makomar daular, fiye da matsayinsa na fursuna kawai.

A matsayinsa na jami'in diflomasiyya, Muteferrika ya ziyarci ƙasashe da yawa a Turai kuma ya shaida ci gaban duniya ta Yamma da kansa. Musamman ma, ya burge shi matuƙa da ƙarfin juyin juya hali na buga littattafai, wanda ya kasance babban abin da ya haifar da saurin yaɗuwar ilimi da ra'ayoyi a duk faɗin Turai. A lokacin, Daular Usmaniyya har yanzu tana dogara ga rubuce-rubucen hannu, wanda ya kasance babban dalilin da ya sa yaɗuwar ilimi da ci gaban ilimi ke tafiyar hawainiya. Ya fahimci cewa buga littattafai ba kawai fasaha ce ta buga littattafai ba, amma wata muhimmiyar kayan aiki ce da za ta iya ƙarfafa tushen ilimi na daular, inganta ingancin gudanarwa, kuma a ƙarshe ta haɓaka gasa ta ƙasa. Ganin yadda wayewar Turai ke bunƙasa ta hanyar na'urar buga littattafai, Muteferrika ya sami hangen nesa mai ƙarfi cewa Daular Usmaniyya ma ya kamata ta gabatar da wannan fasaha don cimma farfaɗowar ilimi. Wannan ya zama a gare shi wani aiki mai mahimmanci ga makomar daular, fiye da kawai gabatar da fasaha.

Amma hanyar Muteferrika ba ta da sauƙi. Gabatar da buga littattafai ya yi barazana ga ayyukan rubuce-rubuce da yawa, kuma malaman addini masu ra'ayin mazan jiya sun yi adawa da shi sosai, suna ɗaukar buga haruffan Larabci masu tsarki da inji a matsayin rashin girmamawa. Maimakon fuskantar wannan adawa kai tsaye, ya nemi hanyar fita ta hanyar lallashi da dabaru. Muteferrika ya rubuta wata kasida mai taken 'Vesiletü't-Tıbâa' (Game da Amfanin Buga Littattafai), inda ya bayyana a tsari fa'idodin da ba za a iya misalta su ba da buga littattafan da ba na addini ba, kamar tarihi, kimiyya, da labarin ƙasa, zai kawo wa daular. Ya jaddada buƙatar buga littattafai ta fuskar kiyaye ilimi, farfaɗo da ilimi, da kuma inganta ingancin gudanarwar ƙasa. Ƙoƙarinsa marar gajiyawa da lallasinsa sun sami goyon bayan Babban Vizier Nevşehirli Damat Ibrahim Pasha da Sultan Ahmed III. A shekara ta 1727, ya sami fatwa (dokar addini) daga Sheikh al-Islam Abdullah Efendi wanda ya ba da izinin buga littattafan da ba na addini ba, sannan ya sami dokar Sultan, ta haka ya kafa tushen shari'a da addini don kafa gidan buga littattafai na farko na Turkanci a Daular Usmaniyya.

Bayan samun izini na hukuma, Ibrahim Muteferrika ya kafa gidan buga littattafansa a Istanbul, kuma a shekara ta 1729, ya fitar da 'Van Kulu Dictionary', wani kamus na Larabci-Turkanci, a matsayin littafinsa na farko. Wannan ya kasance wani lokaci mai tarihi wanda ya buɗe sabon babi a cikin yaɗuwar ilimi a Daular Usmaniyya. Daga baya, har zuwa rasuwarsa a shekara ta 1743, gidan buga littattafai na Muteferrika ya buga jimillar littattafai 17 masu muhimmanci a fannoni daban-daban, ciki har da taswira, tarihi, kimiyya, da labarin ƙasa. Waɗannan littattafai sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gabatar da ilimin kimiyya na Yamma da ra'ayoyin tarihi ga masana Usmaniyya. Ko da yake gidan buga littattafai ya rufe na ɗan lokaci bayan rasuwarsa, ƙoƙarin Muteferrika na farko ya kafa muhimmin ginshiƙi ga zamantar da Daular Usmaniyya da kuma yaɗuwar ilimi, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin juyi ga daular don rage gibin ilimi da wayewar Yamma da kuma karɓar sabbin ra'ayoyi. Gadonsa ya wuce kawai gabatar da fasaha, yana nuna gwagwarmaya da burin masana Usmaniyya waɗanda suka nemi daidaito tsakanin al'ada da kirkire-kirkire, kuma yana da daraja a kwatanta shi da sauran masu gyara na zamaninsa waɗanda suka nemi makomar daular.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ibrahim Pasha wani kwamandan soja ne kuma mai mulki a Masar a ƙarni na 19, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga fadada daular mahaifinsa Muhammad Ali.
key_achievements: Ya riƙe matsayin kwamandan sojojin Masar tun yana matashi
Ya sami ikon mulkin Siriya ta Usmaniyya, Hejaz, da sauransu
Ya gaji matsayin Khedive da Gwamnan Masar da Sudan
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen zamantar Masar da fadada yankunanta, amma mulkinsa na ɗan gajeren lokaci ya bar gado da bai kammala ba.

ibrahim-pasha-of-egypt.epic:
Ibrahim Pasha (1789-1848) wani mutum ne da aka haifa a farkon ƙarni na 19 a wani yanki mai nisa na Daular Usmaniyya, wanda ya yi aiki a matsayin Khedive da Gwamnan lardin Masar da Sudan. Kavala, garin haihuwarsa, a lokacin wani yanki ne na Daular Usmaniyya, kuma mahaifinsa, Muhammad Ali, yana kafa sabuwar daula ta hanyar karɓar mulki a Masar mai cike da rudani. Ibrahim ya girma a matsayin wani jigo mai mahimmanci don cimma burin mahaifinsa a wannan zamanin cike da tashin hankali. Ya nuna hazaka a fannin soja tun yana ƙarami, kuma ya yi fice cikin sauri a cikin sojojin Masar. Kusan tun yana matashi, ya riga ya riƙe babban matsayi na kwamandan sojojin Masar, wanda hakan ya tabbatar da ƙwarewarsa ta soja ta musamman da kuma amincewar mahaifinsa a gare shi. A wannan lokacin, Ibrahim ya fara taka rawar gani a matsayin kwamandan soja wanda ba za a iya raba shi da shi ba a cikin babban shirin mahaifinsa na ƙarfafa mulkin Masar da fadada yankunanta. Farkon aikinsa ya kafa tushe mai mahimmanci ga Masar don samun cin gashin kai a cikin Daular Usmaniyya da kuma zama babbar rundunar soja ta zamani.

Ƙwarewar Ibrahim Pasha ta soja ta taka rawa sosai wajen fadada yankin Masar zuwa wasu sassan Daular Usmaniyya. Ya jagoranci balaguro da yawa bisa umarnin mahaifinsa Muhammad Ali, wanda hakan ya sa tasirin Masar ya kai ga gabashin Bahar Rum da kuma yankin Larabawa. Yankunan da ya mulka sun haɗa da Siriya ta Usmaniyya, Hejaz, Morea, tsibirin Thasos, da tsibirin Crete, wanda hakan ya nuna cewa ba kawai kwamandan soja ba ne, har ma mai mulki ne da ke gudanar da manyan yankuna. Musamman ma Hejaz, inda birane masu tsarki na Makka da Madina suke, ta hanyar samun wannan yanki, Masar ta sami muhimmiyar ikon addini a duniyar Musulunci. Ayyukansa na soja a Morea sun ja hankalin manyan ƙasashen Turai. Don haka, Ibrahim ba kawai ya nuna jagoranci na musamman a fagen yaƙi ba, har ma ya ba da gudummawa wajen gudanar da yankunan da aka ci nasara yadda ya kamata da kuma ƙarfafa tasirin Masar, yana taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen ganin burin mahaifinsa na Masar ta zama babbar ƙasa mai cin gashin kai, fiye da lardin Usmaniyya kawai, ya zama gaskiya.

Rayuwar Ibrahim Pasha ta kasance cike da nasarorin soja marasa yankewa, amma kuma ta kasance jerin gwagwarmaya da ƙalubale a cikin rikitarwa ta siyasar duniya. Ci gaban Masar mai sauri ya haifar da taka tsantsan daga Sultan na Daular Usmaniyya da manyan ƙasashen Turai. Ya fuskanci ƙalubale da yawa wajen cin nasara da mulkin manyan yankuna, kuma dole ne ya yi gwagwarmaya a fannin diflomasiyya da soja don kare muradun ƙasar Masar. Musamman ma dangantaka da Daular Usmaniyya ta kasance cike da tashin hankali yayin da burin Muhammad Ali na cin gashin kan Masar ya yi karo da burin Sultan na mulkin tsakiya. Ibrahim ya ɗauki babban nauyi a matsayin babban kwamandan sojojin Masar a gaba-gaba na waɗannan rikice-rikice. Nasarorinsa na soja sun ɗaukaka matsayin Masar, amma kuma sun haifar da shigar manyan ƙasashen Turai, wanda hakan ya sa Masar ta kasa ci gaba da fadada. A ƙarshen rayuwarsa, ya gaji mulkin Masar da Sudan a matsayin Khedive da Gwamna daga mahaifinsa Muhammad Ali wanda ke raye. Wannan ya kasance amincewa da sadaukarwarsa da nasarorinsa na rayuwa, amma mulkinsa ya ƙare bayan watanni huɗu kacal.

Ibrahim Pasha ya rasu a ranar 10 ga Nuwamba, 1848, kafin mahaifinsa Muhammad Ali. Mutuwarsa ta jefa inuwa mai tsawo a kan makomar Masar, kuma kammala babban daular Masar da ya yi mafarki da ita ya kasance aiki da bai kammala ba. Ko da yake mulkinsa kai tsaye ya ɗauki watanni huɗu kacal, Ibrahim Pasha ya bar babban tarihi a matsayin alamar zamantar Masar da kuma wakilin ƙarfin soja mai girma. Ya jagoranci sojojin Masar zuwa nasarori a yankuna masu faɗi kamar Larabawa, Girka, da Siriya, yana nuna ƙarfin ƙasar Masar a waje, wanda hakan ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga Masar ta kafa kanta a matsayin ƙarfi mai cin gashin kai a cikin Daular Usmaniyya. Ƙwarewarsa ta soja da ta gudanarwa ta zama muhimmiyar kadara wajen gina tsarin zamani na Masar. Bayan mutuwar Ibrahim Pasha, lokacin da Muhammad Ali ya rasu a 1849, sarautar Masar ta koma ga ɗan'uwan Ibrahim, Abbas I. Gadonsa yana wakiltar burin Masar na samun 'yancin kai da zamantarwa, kuma ana iya kwatanta shi da ayyukan sauran shugabannin da suka nemi gyara da fadada a Gabas ta Tsakiya a ƙarni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani Sufi mai ilimin sirri kuma masanin falsafa daga Al-Andalus, wanda ya yi tafiye-tafiye a duniyar Musulunci, yana bayyana Hadin Kai na Wanzuwa kuma ya bar rubuce-rubuce masu yawa.
key_achievements: Ya rubuta daruruwan littattafai, ciki har da 'Futuhat al-Makkiyya'
Ya kafa ra'ayin Hadin Kai na Wanzuwa (Wahdat al-Wujud)
Ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga hadewar Tasawwuf da falsafar Musulunci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ra'ayoyinsa sun wuce lokaci da sarari, suna zaburar da masu neman gaskiya kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga tunanin Musulunci.

ibn-arabi.epic:
An haife shi a Murcia, Al-Andalus a shekara ta 1165, amma gidan ruhinsa ilimi mai tsarki ne da kansa. Ya yi kuruciyarsa a Seville, inda ya yi karatun ilimin Musulunci na gargajiya. Amma ruhinsa ya yi marmarin gaskiya mai zurfi fiye da fassarar haruffa ta Alkur'ani da Hadisi. A lokacin samartakarsa, ta hanyar wani gogewa mai karfi na ruhaniya, ya bar hanyoyin duniya ya shiga hanyar sufanci, wato Tasawwuf. Wannan hanya ta jagorance shi neman hakikanin gaskiya da ke boye a bayan labulen abubuwan da ke bayyane.

Rayuwarsa ba da dadewa ba ta zama doguwar tafiyar hajji. Ya bar Al-Andalus, ya bi ta Arewacin Afirka, ya nufi tsakiyar duniyar Musulunci. Lokacin da ya isa Makka a shekara ta 1201, ta Fez da Tunis, bincikensa na ruhaniya ya kai kololuwa. A cikin birni mai tsarki na Makka, ya sami wahayi mai zurfi kuma ya fara rubuta babban littafinsa, 'Futuhat al-Makkiyya' (Wahayin Makka). Wannan tafiya ba kawai motsi ne na yanki ba. Tafiya ce ta binciken duniyar ciki, haduwa da malamai daban-daban, da kuma shaida alamomin Allah marasa iyaka da ke bayyana a cikin halittunsa.

Bayan shekaru na tafiye-tafiye, ya zauna a Damascus a shekara ta 1223. Wannan shi ne karshen tafiyarsa kuma inda koyarwarsa ta bunkasa. A Damascus, ya koyar da almajirai da yawa kuma ya rubuta daruruwan littattafai, ciki har da 'Fusus al-Hikam' (Zobban Hikima), wanda ya kunshi ainihin tunaninsa. Gidansa a koyaushe a bude yake ga masu neman ilimi, kuma tare suka tattauna gaskiya mai zurfi ta Hadin Kai na Wanzuwa (Wahdat al-Wujud), wato cewa dukkan wanzuwa a karshe bayyanar kai ne na Hakikanin Allah. Ta hanyar waka da zube, ya nemi bayyana fahimtarsa game da Allah da halitta, soyayya da ilimi, da kuma hadin kai da ke boye a cikin bambancin duniyar abubuwan da ke bayyane.

Koyarwarsa ta ba shi lakabin 'Babban Malami' (Al-Shaykh al-Akbar), amma a lokaci guda, ta kuma haifar da cece-kuce mai yawa. Wasu sun zargi ra'ayoyinsa da karkata daga koyarwar gargajiya, amma niyyarsa ba ta taba kasancewa ta musanta koyarwar Musulunci ba. Maimakon haka, ya nemi hada bangaren waje na Shari'a (doka) da bangaren ciki na Hakika (gaskiya), don haka ya bayyana ainihin zurfin imani. Jikinsa ya koma kasa a Damascus a shekara ta 1240, amma rubuce-rubucensa sun wuce lokaci da sarari, suna ci gaba da zaburar da rayuka masu neman gaskiya. Ka tuna cewa teku na wanzuwa daya ne, kuma dukansu kamar raƙuman ruwa ne na wannan teku.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ismail I wani Shah ne na Farisa daga ƙarshen karni na 15 zuwa farkon karni na 16, wanda ya kafa Daular Safawiyya kuma ya ayyana Shi'ar Imamai Goma Sha Biyu a matsayin addinin kasa, yana kafa tushen Iran ta zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa Daular Safawiyya da kuma zama Shah na farko (1501)
Ayyanar Shi'ar Imamai Goma Sha Biyu a matsayin addinin hukuma na daular
Haɗa kan Farisa ta hanyar jagorantar sojojin Qizilbash
Rubuta waƙoƙi a ƙarƙashin sunan alkalami 'Khata'i'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Daular Safawiyya da ya kafa da kuma sanya Shi'ar a matsayin addinin kasa sun zama muhimmin gado wajen samar da asalin addini, al'adu, da siyasa na Iran ta zamani.

ismail-i.epic:
A ƙarshen karni na 15, a cikin wani lokaci na hargitsi da sauye-sauyen siyasa a Farisa, **Ismail I (1487-1524) ya bayyana a tarihi a matsayin wanda ya kafa kuma Shah na farko na Daular Safawiyya**. An haife shi a cikin gidan shugabannin ƙungiyar Sufanci ta Safawiyya, amma yarintarsa ta cika da bala'i da gwagwarmaya. A shekara ta 1488, lokacin da yake ɗan shekara ɗaya kacal, mahaifinsa Sheikh Haydar ya mutu a yaƙi da abokan gaba na Aq Qoyunlu. Bayan haka, Ismail da iyalinsa sun yi gudun hijira a duk faɗin Iran fiye da shekaru goma, suna gudu daga wuri zuwa wuri. A wannan lokacin, sun yi rayuwa a ɓoye a ƙarƙashin kariya mai tsanani na Qizilbash, wata ƙungiya mai biyayya da sunanta ke nufin 'Masu Ja-kai'. A cikin waɗannan lokutan wahala, Ismail ya haɓaka zurfin sha'awar ɗaukar fansa kan mutuwar mahaifinsa, tare da wata manufa ta Ubangiji cewa danginsa ne ya kamata su mulki Farisa. Wannan ya zama babban dalili a gare shi daga baya ya gina daula kuma ya kafa sabon asalin addini. Yarintarsa ba kawai game da rayuwa ba ce, amma wani muhimmin lokaci ne na gina halaye da imani na shugaba na gaba.

Kusan shekara ta 1500, lokacin da ya kai shekara goma sha biyu, Ismail ya fito daga ɓoyayyen wurinsa a Gilan kuma ya fito fili a fagen tarihi, yana jagorantar sojojinsa na Qizilbash. Mabiyansa sun yi imani da shi sosai ba kawai a matsayin shugaban soja ba, amma a matsayin jiki na wata halitta ta Ubangiji, kuma wannan imani marar girgiza ya zama makami mafi ƙarfi ga Qizilbash waɗanda ba su da yawa a adadi. Ismail, bisa ga wannan ikon Ubangiji, ya ci gaba da kayar da sojojin Aq Qoyunlu a jere, yana faɗaɗa ikonsa. A ƙarshe, a shekara ta 1501, ya mamaye Tabriz kuma, yana da shekaru 14 kacal, ya ayyana kansa Shah na Farisa, yana sanar da kafa Daular Safawiyya ga duniya. Wannan wani lokaci ne na tarihi, wanda ya nuna sake kafa daula mai haɗin kai ta Iranawa bayan ƙarnuka da yawa, kuma wani babban juyin juya hali wanda ya canza yanayin siyasa da al'adu na Iran gaba ɗaya. Fitowarsa ba kawai canjin daula ba ne, amma ya sanar da farkon sabon asali ga al'ummar Iran.

Babban yanke shawara a lokacin mulkin Ismail I shine ayyana Shi'ar Imamai Goma Sha Biyu (Twelver Shia Islam) a matsayin addinin hukuma na daular. Shi'ar Imamai Goma Sha Biyu wani babban reshe ne na Musulunci, koyarwa ce da ke gane Imamai goma sha biyu a matsayin halattattun magada ga Annabi Muhammad. Duk da cewa yawancin al'ummar Iran a lokacin Sunni ne, Ismail ya zaɓi wannan hanyar don bai wa daular asalin addini mai haɗin kai da kuma raba ta a fili daga Daular Usmaniyya mai ƙarfi ta Sunni. An aiwatar da wannan manufar da ƙarfi, wanda ya haifar da juriya da zubar da jini mai yawa, amma a ƙarshe ya canza yanayin addini da al'adu na Iran gaba ɗaya, wanda ya ci gaba har zuwa yau. Ya kuma rubuta waƙoƙi a ƙarƙashin sunan alkalami 'Khata'i', yana rera game da tsarkakarsa da halaccin mulkinsa, wanda ya zama muhimmiyar hanya don yaɗa akidarsa ta mulki ga jama'a. Waɗannan manufofin addini da al'adu sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa asalin Daular Safawiyya.

Amintaccen Ismail I da sunansa na soja sun sha babban rauni a Yaƙin Chaldiran a shekara ta 1514. Sojojinsa na Qizilbash masu jaruntaka sun sha kashi ba tare da taimako ba a gaban manyan bindigogi da manyan makamai na sojojin Usmaniyya da Sultan Selim I ke jagoranta. Wannan shan kashi ya girgiza imani da ikon Ubangiji na Ismail I, kuma ya faɗa cikin zurfin yanke kauna. Bayan haka, bai sake jagorantar sojoji da kansa ba, ya janye daga harkokin mulki kuma an ruwaito ya dogara ga barasa. Ya rasu yana da shekaru 36, amma gadon Daular Safawiyya da ya kafa da kuma Iran tare da Shi'ar Imamai Goma Sha Biyu a matsayin addinin kasa sun ci gaba tsawon ƙarnuka, suna tasiri sosai wajen samar da asalin Iran ta zamani. Mulkinsa da manufofinsa na addini sun zama muhimman abubuwa da suka bambanta Iran daga sauran ƙasashen Gabas ta Tsakiya, kuma wannan yana da alaƙa mai zurfi da tsarin zamantar da Iran na gaba. Rayuwarsa za a iya kwatanta ta kuma a kimanta ta tare da nasarorin sauran manyan sarakunan Farisa, kamar Abbas I, wanda ya kawo ƙarshen rarrabuwar Iran bayan Daular Mongol kuma ya buɗe sabon zamani.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jamal al-Din al-Afghani masanin tunani ne na Musulunci na karni na 19, wanda ya jagoranci gyaran Musulunci da yaki da mulkin mallaka, yana mai ba da shawarar Pan-Islamism.
key_achievements: Yada tunanin Pan-Islamism
Bugawa 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa'
Jagorancin harkokin zamantar da Musulunci
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga harkokin 'yancin kai na kasa da gyaran Musulunci a duniyar Musulunci a karni na 20.

jamal-al-din-al-afghani.epic:
Jamal al-Din al-Afghani ya kasance wani masanin tunani na Musulunci kuma mai fafutukar siyasa wanda ya yi aiki a lokacin daular Musulunci ke neman asali da alkibla a karkashin matsin lamba na mulkin mallaka na Yamma a karshen karni na 19. Akwai ra'ayoyi daban-daban game da inda aka haife shi, wasu na cewa a Asadabad a Iran, wasu kuma a Asadabad a Afghanistan, amma shi da kansa ya kira kansa 'Afghani', wato mutumin Afghanistan, a tsawon rayuwarsa. Ana fassara wannan a matsayin tsoron cewa kasancewarsa daga Iran, inda Shi'a ke da rinjaye, zai iya zama cikas ga manufarsa ta hada kan dukkanin duniyar Musulunci, inda Sunna ke da rinjaye. Tun yana yaro, ya sami ilimi mai zurfi wanda ya hada da ilimin Musulunci na gargajiya da falsafa, har ma da kimiyyar zamani, wanda ya zama ginshikin zurfin tunaninsa da hangen nesansa a nan gaba. Ya yi imani da cewa don daular Musulunci ta dawo da martabarta da ta rasa kuma ta fuskanci mamayar Yamma, dole ne a samu farkawa ta ciki da hadin kai. Wannan imani ne ya zama karfin da ya sa ya sadaukar da rayuwarsa ga farfado da duniyar Musulunci.

Don yada imaninsa, Jamal al-Din al-Afghani ya ci gaba da tafiye-tafiye, yana farawa daga Afghanistan zuwa Indiya, Masar, Daular Usmaniyya, da kuma sassan Turai, yana wayar da kan masana da jama'a. Musamman ma, lokacin da yake koyarwa a Jami'ar Al-Azhar da ke Alkahira, ya burge matasa masana da yawa, ciki har da manyan mutane a cikin harkokin gyaran Musulunci kamar Muhammad Abduh, wanda ya kasance abokin aikinsa kuma almajirinsa. Tunaninsa na adawa da mulkin mallaka da kuma bukatarsa ta gyara duniyar Musulunci sun zama barazana ga masu mulki a lokacin, kuma an kore shi daga kasashe da yawa, amma bai taba tsayawa ba. A shekara ta 1884 a birnin Paris, tare da Muhammad Abduh, ya buga wata mujalla mai suna 'Al-Urwah al-Wuthqa', inda ya yi kira ga hadin kan duniyar Musulunci da kuma adawa da mulkin mallaka na Yamma. Wannan mujalla ta haifar da babban martani a duk fadin duniyar Musulunci, kuma ta zama wani muhimmin mataki wajen yada tunaninsa.

Babban ginshikin tunanin Jamal al-Din al-Afghani shine 'Pan-Islamism'. Wannan imani ne cewa dukkanin Musulmai a duniya dole ne su hada kai a matsayin al'umma daya ta siyasa, ba tare da la'akari da mazhaba ko kabila ba, don fuskantar mamayar mulkin mallaka na Turai. Ya yi jayayya cewa Musulunci ba ya sabawa kimiyya ko hankali, kuma ya jaddada cewa ta hanyar komawa ga ruhin Musulunci na farko, da dawo da tunani mai ma'ana, da kuma karbar kimiyya da fasaha ta zamani ne kawai za a iya samun karfin fuskantar manyan kasashen Yamma. Manufarsa ba wai kawai ta kasance a makale ga al'ada ko kuma bin Yamma a makance ba, a'a, ta kasance don sake gina wayewar Musulunci mai cin gashin kanta da ta zamani. Wannan tunani ya kunshi burin shawo kan rikicin da duniyar Musulunci ke fuskanta a lokacin da kuma bude sabon zamani, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga masana da jama'a da yawa. Ya ci gaba da fafutuka a cikin matsaloli biyu na cin hanci da rashawa na ciki da kuma mamayar kasashen waje a duniyar Musulunci, yana kokarin cimma burinsa.

Jamal al-Din al-Afghani ya kwashe shekarunsa na karshe a Istanbul bisa gayyatar Sultan Abdul Hamid II na Daular Usmaniyya. Sultan ya yi kokarin amfani da tunaninsa na Pan-Islamism don manufofinsa na siyasa, amma a lokaci guda ya yi taka-tsantsan da tasirinsa, kuma ya sanya shi a karkashin tsare-tsare na gida. Ya rasu a Istanbul a shekara ta 1897, amma tunaninsa bai taba mutuwa ba. Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai ga yawancin harkokin 'yancin kai na kasa da kuma harkokin gyaran Musulunci da suka faru a Masar, Iran, Indiya, da sauran wurare a duk tsawon karni na 20, kuma har yau yana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga wadanda ke tunani game da asali da makomar duniyar Musulunci. Tunaninsa, tare da nasarorin mutane kamar Muhammad Abduh da Rifa'a al-Tahtawi, wadanda suka jagoranci harkokin gyaran Musulunci a lokaci guda, sun samar da wani muhimmin rafi na zamantar da Musulunci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Jabir bin Hayyan wani masanin kimiyyar alchemy na Farisa ne kuma masanin kimiyya a Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci na karni na 8, wanda ya kafa hanyoyin gwaji kuma ya shimfida harsashin kimiyyar zamani.
key_achievements: Kafa hanyar gwaji 'Tajrib'
Rubuta hanyoyin hada nitric acid, sulfuric acid, da aqua regia
Gabatar da rarraba abubuwa da ka'idar sulfur-mercury
fact_box.legacy_statement: Hanyoyinsa na gwaji da bincikensa sun yi tasiri sosai ga kimiyyar Yamma, kuma ana kiransa 'Uban Kimiyya'.

jabir-ibn-hayyan.epic:
Jabir bin Hayyan wani shahararren masanin kimiyyar alchemy na Farisa, masanin kimiyya, mai harhada magunguna, kuma masanin falsafa wanda ya rayu a kusan karni na 8, kuma ya bayar da gagarumar gudunmawa ga ci gaban kimiyya a Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci. Ba a san ainihin shekarar haihuwarsa ba, amma ana kyautata zaton an haife shi a Tus, Farisa, a tsakiyar karni na 8. A wancan lokacin, daular Abbasiyya tana tasowa a matsayin cibiyar siyasa da al'adu ta duniyar Musulunci, lokaci ne mai cike da rudani inda ilimin tsohuwar Girka, Indiya, da Farisa ke musayar ra'ayi sosai, kuma sabbin binciken ilimi ke bunkasa. Mahaifinsa, Hayyan, mai harhada magunguna ne kuma mai goyon bayan juyin juya halin Abbasiyya, kuma wannan yanayin ya yi tasiri ga matashin Jabir wajen samun zurfin fahimtar binciken kimiyya da canjin zamantakewa. Ya bi sawun mahaifinsa wajen neman ilimi, kuma ba da jimawa ba aka jawo shi zuwa Baghdad, cibiyar ilimi a wancan lokacin. A can, ya sami goyon bayan gidan Barmak mai karfi kuma ya sami damar gudanar da bincike cikin 'yanci a fadar Halifa Harun al-Rashid, wanda ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a ci gaban iliminsa.

Babban ginshikin falsafar Jabir bin Hayyan shine imani mai karfi ga 'tajrib', wato gwaji. Sabanin masana kimiyyar alchemy na baya waɗanda suka dogara ga tunani da zato na asiri, ya jaddada cewa gaskiyar duniyar abu za a iya bayyana ta ne kawai ta hanyar lura da kyau da gwaje-gwaje masu maimaitawa. Wannan sabuwar hanyar ta kasance wani muhimmin juyi wajen kafa harsashin hanyoyin kimiyya na zamani. Ya gina dakin gwaje-gwajensa, kuma ya kirkiro ko inganta kayan aikin gwaji da yawa, kamar alembic don distillation, water bath don narkar da abubuwa, da turmi da tabarya don nika abubuwa zuwa foda mai laushi. A gare shi, dakin gwaje-gwaje ba kawai wurin aiki bane, amma wuri mai tsarki don fassara boyayyen harshen yanayi da bincika ainihin abubuwa, kuma ruhunsa na gwaji mai tsari ya ba masana kimiyya na gaba kwarin gwiwa sosai.

Ta hanyar wannan tsarin gwaji mai tsari, Jabir bin Hayyan ya yi bincike masu muhimmanci da yawa. Ya gabatar da tsarin farko na rarraba abubuwa zuwa 'ruhohi (abubuwa masu tururi)', 'karfe', da 'marasa karfe (abubuwa masu iya zama foda)'. Bugu da kari, ya fara rubuta hanyoyin hada nitric acid da sulfuric acid, ciki har da aqua regia, wanda shine kawai abu da zai iya narkar da zinariya. Wannan nasara ce ta kimiyya mai juyin juya hali a wancan lokacin. Bayan haka, ya bunkasa ka'idar sulfur-mercury, wanda ke cewa duk karfe an yi su ne daga ka'idoji biyu na asali: sulfur da mercury, kuma wannan ka'idar ta yi tasiri sosai ga kimiyyar alchemy ta Yamma da tunanin kimiyya na farko tsawon karnoni da yawa. Manufarsa ba wai kawai canza abubuwa bane, amma don zurfafa fahimtar abubuwan da suka hada su da ka'idojinsu da kuma bayyana dokokin yanayi. Duk da haka, lokacin da gidan Barmak, masu goyon bayansa, suka fadi a farkon karni na 9, makomarsa ma ta canza, an sanya shi a gidan yari a Kufa, kuma an yada manyan ayyukansa a asirce.

Bayan mutuwar Jabir bin Hayyan, an fassara ayyukansa zuwa Latin kuma an yada su a Turai a karkashin sunan 'Geber', kuma sun yi tasiri sosai ga kimiyyar alchemy ta Turai ta Tsakiya da ci gaban kimiyya na farko. Hanyoyinsa na gwaji da binciken kimiyya sun taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa harsashin kimiyyar Yamma, kuma ana kiransa sau da yawa 'Uban Kimiyya'. 'Matsalar Jabir', wanda ke da wuya a rarrabe tsakanin manyan ayyukansa waɗanda ainihin nasa ne da waɗanda almajiransa ko masana na gaba suka rubuta, har yanzu batun muhawara ne a cikin ilimi, amma muhimmancin ilimi da hanyoyin da aka danganta masa ba su canza ba. Ya sake fasalta ainihin binciken kimiyya, yana tabbatar da cewa mabuɗin warware asirin abubuwa yana cikin gwaji mai tsari, ba tunani ba, kuma ya ba da kwarin gwiwa ga sauran manyan masana na Zamanin Zinare na Musulunci kamar Ibn Sina.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Ziya Gökalp babban mai tunani ne a Daular Usmaniyya da Jamhuriyar Turkiyya a farkon ƙarni na 20, wanda ya kafa asalin Turkiyya ta zamani ta hanyar daidaita Turkism da Musulunci.
key_achievements: Shiga cikin juyin juya halin Young Turks da gudummawar tunani
Haɓaka ra'ayin haɗin kai na Turkism da Musulunci
Tasiri ga Yaƙin Neman 'Yancin Turkiyya da gyare-gyaren Atatürk
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tunaninsa ya yi tasiri sosai wajen kafa asalin ƙasa mai kishin ƙasa da zaman kanta na Jamhuriyar Turkiyya ta zamani.

ziya-gokalp.epic:
Ziya Gökalp (Mehmed Ziya Gökalp, 1876-1924) babban mai tunani ne na zamani a Turkiyya, masanin ilimin zamantakewa, kuma ɗan siyasa wanda ya yi aiki a lokacin daular Usmaniyya ke faɗuwa da kuma farkon Jamhuriyar Turkiyya. An haife shi a ranar 23 ga Maris, 1876, a Diyarbakır, Daular Usmaniyya, ya girma a cikin muhalli mai al'adu daban-daban, inda ya fuskanci matsalolin asali na daular tun yana ƙarami. A lokacin, Daular Usmaniyya tana cikin haɗarin rugujewa saboda matsin lamba daga ƙasashen Yamma da rikice-rikice na cikin gida, kuma wannan yanayin tarihi ya sa matashin Gökalp ya yi zurfin tunani game da makomar al'umma da ƙasa. Ya buɗe idanunsa ga sabon ilimi ta hanyar nazarin tunanin Yamma, musamman ayyukan masana ilimin zamantakewa na Faransa, amma a lokaci guda ya yi ƙoƙarin gina tushen tunaninsa a cikin tashin hankali tsakanin al'adun Musulunci da zamani na Yamma. Wannan binciken ilimi ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tushen ka'idar kishin ƙasa na Turkiyya a nan gaba. Ya fara neman sabon asalin ƙasa wanda ya dogara da al'adunsa na musamman da tarihin Turkawa, maimakon asalin ƙasashe daban-daban na Daular Usmaniyya.

Bayan ya koma Istanbul, Ziya Gökalp ya fara ayyukan siyasa da tunani na gaske ta hanyar shiga cikin juyin juya halin Kwamitin Haɗin Kai da Ci Gaba, wanda aka fi sani da 'Young Turks', tsakanin 1908 zuwa 1909. Ya tabbata cewa 'Turkism' ita ce hanya ɗaya tilo don dakatar da faɗuwar Daular Usmaniyya, ba Ottomanism ko Islamism ba. Turkism akida ce ta kishin ƙasa wacce ke neman kafa asalin ƙasa bisa harshe, al'adu, da gadon tarihi na Turkawa, kuma ta hanyar haka, haɗa kai da farfaɗo da ƙasa. Ya yi aiki a wurare kamar Thessaloniki, yana jaddada halaye na musamman na Turkawa ta hanyar rubuce-rubuce da laccoci, kuma ya yi kira ga buƙatar gina ƙasa ta zamani mai al'adu ɗaya, maimakon daular ƙasashe daban-daban. Kusan 1911, ya fara fahimtar aiki na zurfafa juyin juya halin siyasa na Young Turks zuwa 'juyin juya halin zamantakewa', kuma kusan 1913, ya fahimci zamanin a matsayin lokacin rikici kuma a lokaci guda farkon makoma mai kyau. A wannan lokacin, ya haɓaka falsafar Musulunci ta Turkiyya, ya sake gano ƙungiyoyin zamantakewa kamar ƙungiyoyin 'yan uwantaka na jama'a a matsayin tushen kuzari ga samuwar al'ummar Turkawa, kuma ya jagoranci daidaiton halayen ƙasa bisa tarihi da al'ada.

Yayin da Daular Usmaniyya ta fara faɗuwa bayan Yaƙin Duniya na Farko, Ziya Gökalp ya ƙara nutsa sosai wajen kafa tushen tunani ga makomar al'ummar Turkawa. A wannan lokacin, muhimmin aiki a cikin tunaninsa shi ne ƙoƙarin haɗa kai da kansa 'Turkism' da Islamization. Ya nemi hanyar da za a daidaita ƙa'idodin duniya na Musulunci yayin da yake kiyaye asalin Turkawa na musamman. A matsayin hanyar warware wannan, ya ɗaukaka 'örf' (dokar al'ada) ta Turkawa zuwa matsayi ɗaya da rubutun 'wahayi' na Musulunci, kuma ta hanyar ba da matsayi kamar 'Sunnah' ta Allah, ya nemi warware matsalolin Turkism da Musulunci ta hanyar haɗa al'umma da Allah na ciki. Wannan ƙoƙarin tunani ya samar da tushen ruhaniya da ake buƙata don al'ummar Turkawa su ci gaba zuwa ƙasa ta zamani. Lokacin da Yaƙin Kare Ƙasa, wato Yaƙin Neman 'Yancin Turkiyya, wanda Mustafa Kemal Atatürk ya jagoranta daga 1919 zuwa 1922, ya barke, Gökalp ya yi tasiri mai girma ga tattara sojoji na wannan yaƙin da gyare-gyaren da suka biyo baya, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga gina sabuwar Jamhuriyar Turkiyya.

Ziya Gökalp ya rasu a ranar 25 ga Oktoba, 1924, jim kaɗan bayan an kafa sabuwar Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, amma an aiwatar da tunaninsa sosai ta hanyar gyare-gyaren Mustafa Kemal Atatürk. Ya sake gano ƙungiyoyin zamantakewa na jama'a a matsayin tushen kuzari ga samuwar al'ummar Turkiyya, kuma ta hanyar jagorantar daidaiton halayen ƙasa bisa tarihi da al'ada, ya kafa tushen asalin ƙasa mai zaman kanta da kishin ƙasa na Turkiyya ta zamani. Falsafarsa ta yi tasiri sosai ga manufofin Jamhuriyar Turkiyya na neman karɓar wayewar zamani ta Yamma yayin da yake daidaita al'adun Turkawa na musamman da ƙa'idodin Musulunci. Gökalp ba kawai masanin ka'ida ba ne, amma masanin ilimi mai amfani wanda ya haɗa ra'ayoyinsa da siyasar gaske don tsara makomar ƙasa. Idan aka kwatanta da sauran masu tunani a yankunan Asiya da Gabas ta Tsakiya waɗanda suka nemi sake fasalta asalin ƙasa da gina ƙasashe na zamani a cikin duniya mai canzawa a farkon ƙarni na 20, muhimman abubuwan da suka yi sun ƙara fitowa fili.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Karim Khan Zand ya kafa daular Zand a Farisa a tsakiyar karni na 18 kuma ya jagoranci zaman lafiya da wadata a matsayin 'Wakilin Jama'a'.
key_achievements: Kafa daular Zand da hada kan Farisa
Mulki da take 'Vakil-e Ra'aya'
Fara manyan ayyukan gine-gine a Shiraz
fact_box.legacy_statement: An tuna da mulkinsa a matsayin zamanin zaman lafiya a cikin rudani, kuma ya yi tasiri ga shugabannin Farisa na gaba.

karim-khan-zand.epic:
Karim Khan Zand (ya yi mulki daga kusan 1751 zuwa 1779) mutum ne da ya kafa daular Zand a cikin rudanin Farisa a tsakiyar karni na 18, ya mulki yawancin Iran kuma ya kawo zaman lafiya da wadata. Bayan kashe Nadir Shah, babban mai cin nasara, a shekara ta 1747, Farisa ta fada cikin wani babban rikicin cikin gida. A wannan lokacin da rudani ya kai kololuwa, inda shugabannin yaki masu buri ke fafatawa don mallakar gutsuttsarin daular, Karim Khan Zand, wanda ya fito daga kabilar Zand mai tawali'u, ya yi kuruciyarsa a cikin sojojin Nadir Shah, inda ya gina karfin sojinsa. Ya dauki wannan lokaci mai cike da tashin hankali a matsayin dama don maido da tsari da kuma bude sabon zamani, wanda ya zama ginshikin kafa daular Zand, wadda daga baya zai mulki a matsayin 'Wakilin Jama'a'. Ya dauki hangen nesa na sake hada kan Farisa da ta rabu kuma ya fara matakin farko don cike gibin mulki.

Hanyar Karim Khan Zand ta zuwa mulki ba ta kasance mai sauki ba ko kadan. Da farko, ya kafa kawance da Ali Mardan Khan Bakhtiari da Abul Fath Khan Haft Lang, inda ya sanya wani yarima Safawiyya a matsayin sarki na 'yar tsana, don kafa tushen siyasa. Amma kawancen bai dade ba, kuma lokacin da Ali Mardan Khan ya karya alkawarinsa, Karim Khan Zand ya shiga wani dogon gwagwarmaya don hada kan Farisa da karfinsa. Ya nuna hazakar soja ta musamman da kuma hangen nesa na dabaru, inda ya kayar da abokan hamayya da yawa daya bayan daya, ciki har da Mohammad Hasan Khan, shugaban kabilar Qajar mai karfi. Kusan shekara ta 1765, ya mallaki yawancin Iran kuma ya mai da Shiraz, cibiyar al'adu ta dā, sabon babban birninsa. Amma maimakon ya kira kansa 'Shah' (sarki), ya yi amfani da wani take na musamman, 'Vakil-e Ra'aya', wato 'Wakilin Jama'a', yana mai bayyana imaninsa cewa ikonsa ya fito ne daga jama'a. Wannan ya kasance wani muhimmin juyi da ke nuna falsafar mulkinsa.

Zamanin mulkin Karim Khan Zand a matsayin 'Vakil-e Ra'aya' ya kasance lokaci mai zaman lafiya da wadata, wanda ya bambanta sosai da lokacin rudani na baya. Ya sanya jin dadin jama'a a gaba, ya tabbatar da adalci, ya rage haraji mai yawa, kuma ya karfafa kasuwanci da ciniki sosai. Musamman ma, ya inganta ciniki da Birtaniya a Tekun Fasha, wanda ya kawo farfadowar tattalin arziki. Ya fara manyan ayyukan gine-gine a babban birnin Shiraz, inda ya mai da birnin cibiyar al'adu da kasuwanci. Har yau, Bakil Bazaar, Bakil Mosque, da kuma babban gidan sarauta na Karim Khan Citadel da ke Shiraz, sune manyan abubuwan tarihi da ke nuna nasarorin gine-gine na zamanin mulkinsa. Fadarsa ta tallafa wa mawaka, masu fasaha, da malamai, wanda ya haifar da zamanin zinariya na al'adu, kuma wannan ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga ci gaban fasahar Farisa da ilimi. Manufofin diflomasiyyarsa sun kasance masu taka tsantsan, suna mai da hankali kan tabbatar da iyakokin kasar.

Karim Khan Zand ya yi mulki kusan shekaru 30 a matsayin shugaba mai tausayi da amfani, wanda ya damu sosai da jin dadin jama'a. A lokacin mulkinsa, Farisa ta sami damar warkar da raunukan dogon rikicin cikin gida kuma ta ji dadin zaman lafiya da wadata. Amma zaman lafiyar da ya samu ya dogara ne sosai ga jagorancinsa na kansa da hangen nesansa, maimakon tushen cibiyoyi masu karfi. Lokacin da ya rasu a shekara ta 1779, 'ya'yansa da danginsa sun fada cikin rikicin cikin gida mai zafi don neman mulki, kuma hadin kan da ya samu da wahala ya ruguje cikin sauri. Wannan rauni na ciki ya haifar da hawan Agha Mohammad Khan Qajar mai tsanani, wanda ya lalata daular Zand kuma ya bude sabon zamani mai tsanani na daular Qajar a Farisa. Rayuwar Karim Khan Zand ta kasance shaida ce da ke nuna cewa hangen nesa na shugaba zai iya kawo zaman lafiya, amma yaya wannan zaman lafiya zai iya zama na wucin gadi idan babu cibiyoyi masu karfi da ke goyon bayansa. Salon mulkinsa da tallafinsa ga al'adu sun yi tasiri ga fasaha da gine-gine na Farisa na gaba, kuma yana da daraja a kwatanta shi da mulkin sauran shugabannin daulolin Musulunci na zamaninsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Wani masanin littattafai kuma masanin kasa na Daular Usmaniyya wanda ya canza daga jami'in kudi na soja zuwa masanin ilimi, ya tattara ilimi mai yawa.
key_achievements: Rubuta babban aikin ilimin littattafai, 'Kashf al-Zunun'
Hada ilimin kasa na Gabas da Yamma a cikin 'Jihannuma'
Rubuta tarihin Daular Usmaniyya a cikin 'Fezleke'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ya tattara ilimi da ya warwatse kuma ya mika shi ga tsararraki masu zuwa, yana fadada fagen ilimin Usmaniyya.

katip-celebi.epic:
An haife ni a shekara ta 1609, a cikin babban birnin Constantinople. Sunana Mustafa ibn Abdullah, amma mutane sun tuna ni da Kâtip Çelebi, wanda ke nufin 'Malamin Rubutu'. Mahaifina ya kasance kwararre a fannin makamai, yana aiki a cikin sojojin Sultan, kuma ni ma, tun ina karami, na zama jami'in kudi na soja, kuma na shaida girman daular da kaina. Ina da sha'awar ilimi, amma yawancin kuruciyata na yi ta a cikin littattafan lissafi da kuma jerin gwanon sojoji. Wannan ita ce kaddarata, kuma aikina ne.

Rayuwata ta sami babban canji tare da yakin Farisa wanda ya gudana daga 1629 zuwa 1635. Na yi tattaki a cikin kasar Bagadaza da Farisa mai cike da tsaunuka, inda na ga mummunan yakin da kuma iyakokin daular. A wannan lokacin, na rasa dangi da yawa da kuma malamai masu daraja. A cikin inuwar mutuwa, na fahimci darajar ilimi na har abada fiye da daukakar soja mai wucewa. Kura ta filin yaki, maimakon ta rufe idanuna, ta bude idanun zuciyata.

A shekara ta 1638, na gaji dukiya mai yawa, kuma na dauka wannan dama ce da Allah ya bani. A karshe, na yanke shawarar barin aikin soja da na gwamnati don rayuwa kawai don ilimi. Na kashe dukiyata gaba daya wajen sayen littattafai, kuma gidana a Istanbul ya zama babban dakin karatu inda ilimin Gabas da Yamma suka hadu. Da rana ina rubutu, da dare kuma ina karatu, na yi kokarin hada guntun ilimi da suka warwatse zuwa wani babban hoto guda.

Babban aikina na rayuwa shine 'Kashf al-Zunun'. Wannan wani abin tarihi ne na ilimin littattafai, wanda ya tattara littattafai sama da 14,500 da aka rubuta cikin Larabci, Farisa, da Turkanci. Bugu da kari, ta hanyar 'Jihannuma', na hada ilimin kasa na Gabas da Yamma. Kuma da 'Fezleke', na rubuta tarihin daular Usmaniyya. Wasu sun zarge ni da sabawa al'ada, amma ni kawai ina so in tattara dukkan rafi-rafin ilimi in mika su ga tsararraki masu zuwa. Rayuwata tafiya ce ta kanta, tafiya a cikin tekun ilimi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Xerxes I ya kasance sarki na Daular Achaemenid ta tsohuwar Farisa, wanda ya jagoranci babban yaƙin Girka amma ya sha kashi a Yaƙin Salamis.
key_achievements: Murkushe tashe-tashen hankula a Masar da Babila
Babban yaƙin Girka a tarihi
Ayyukan gine-gine na fadar Persepolis
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna shi a matsayin alamar rikicin Gabas da Yamma kuma wanda ya nuna ɗaukakar Daular Farisa.

xerxes-i.epic:
Xerxes I (an haife shi kusan 519 K.Z., ya yi mulki daga 486-465 K.Z.) ya kasance babban sarki na Daular Achaemenid ta tsohuwar Farisa, wanda ya gaji sarauta a matsayin ɗan Darius I kuma jikan Atossa. Mahaifinsa, Darius I, ya yi niyyar share kunyar shan kashi a hannun Athens a Yaƙin Marathon, amma ya rasu kafin ya cimma burinsa. Xerxes ya gaji burin mahaifinsa, inda ya sanya maido da martabar daular a matsayin babban fifikonsa. A farkon mulkinsa, ya murkushe tashe-tashen hankula a Masar da Babila cikin sauri da azama, yana tabbatar da zaman lafiyar daular da kuma ikonsa na mulki. Ta haka, Daular Achaemenid ta sake mulkin yankuna masu faɗi daga Kogin Indus zuwa Kogin Nil da ƙarfi, kuma idon Xerxes yanzu ya koma yamma, zuwa ga biranen Girka masu girman kai. Ya rantse zai ɗauki fansa ga mahaifinsa kuma ya nuna wa Girka ainihin ƙarfin Farisa.

Don yaƙin Girka, Xerxes I ya tattara dukkan albarkatun daularsa daga Kogin Indus zuwa Kogin Nil, ya kafa wata babbar runduna da ba a taɓa ganin irinta ba a tarihi. Daruruwan dubban sojoji da dubban jiragen ruwa sun taru a ƙarƙashin tutarsa, wanda ke nuna ƙarfin soji na Daular Farisa. Don ketare mashigin Hellespont, wanda ke raba Asiya da Turai, ya umarci injiniyoyi su haɗa jiragen ruwa don gina wata babbar gada mai iyo. Wannan gada mai iyo ta kasance wani babban ci gaba a fannin injiniyanci, wanda ya bai wa babban sojojin Farisa damar shiga nahiyar Turai ta ƙasa. Lokacin da guguwa ta lalata gada ta farko, ya fusata, ya yi wa teku bulala kuma ya jefa mata sarƙoƙi don nuna ikonsa. A ƙarshe, babban sojojinsa sun ketare Hellespont cikin nasara kuma suka taka ƙasar Turai, kuma birane da yawa na arewacin Girka sun durƙusa a gaban ikonsa ko kuma an lalata su. Ci gabansa ya zama kamar ba za a iya dakatar da shi ba.

Amma babban ci gaban Xerxes I ya fuskanci gwaji ba zato ba tsammani a wani kunkuntar kwarin da ake kira Thermopylae. Ƙananan sojojin haɗin gwiwa na Girka, waɗanda Sarki Leonidas na Sparta ke jagoranta, sun dakatar da babban sojojin Farisa na kwanaki da yawa, kuma jaruntakarsu ta haifar da babban asara ga sojojin Farisa. Ko da yake sun sami damar fatattakar sojojin Girka ta hanyar wata hanya ta gefe kuma suka ci gaba zuwa Athens, wannan yaƙin ya fara fashewa a cikin tatsuniyar rashin cin nasara ta sojojin Farisa. Ya ƙone Athens da babu kowa, yana kammala fansar mahaifinsa a alamance, amma ainihin nasara har yanzu tana da nisa. Babban juyin juya halin ya zo a Yaƙin Salamis. A cikin kunkuntar mashigin Salamis, rundunar jiragen ruwa ta Girka, ƙarƙashin jagorancin Themistocles, ta jawo manyan jiragen ruwa na Farisa kuma ta fatattake su da wata dabara mai wayo. Manyan jiragen ruwa na Farisa sun yi karo da juna a cikin kunkuntar sarari kuma ƙananan jiragen ruwa na Girka masu saurin motsi sun lalata su ba tare da wani taimako ba, kuma Xerxes ya kasa yin komai sai kallon wannan mummunan al'amari daga kursiyinsa.

Babban shan kashi a Salamis ya zama babban rauni ga yaƙin Xerxes I na Girka. Ya bar Mardonius ya jagoranci sojojin ƙasa kuma ya koma Farisa. A shekara mai zuwa, sojojin ƙasa na Farisa, ƙarƙashin jagorancin Mardonius, sun sake shan babban kashi a Yaƙin Plataea, wanda ya kawo ƙarshen burinsa na cin nasara a Girka. Bayan haka, Xerxes ya juya hankalinsa daga faɗaɗa soji, ya mai da hankali kan gina manyan fadoji da abubuwan tarihi a manyan biranensa, Susa da Persepolis. Waɗannan gine-gine sun nuna burinsa na barin alamar ikonsa da ɗaukakar Daular Achaemenid har abada. Amma mulkinsa ya ƙare a cikin makirci na fada, kuma an kashe shi a kusan 465 K.Z. a hannun Artabanus, babban kwamandan masu gadinsa da ya fi amincewa da shi. Xerxes I ana tuna shi a matsayin wani muhimmin hali na Yaƙe-yaƙe na Girka da Farisa, kuma babban yaƙinsa ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kafa tsarin rikici tsakanin babbar daular Gabas da biranen Yamma masu 'yanci a tarihin Yamma. Yaƙinsa na Girka da bai yi nasara ba ya kuma zama abin ƙarfafawa ga yaƙe-yaƙe na Gabas na ƙasashen Yamma, kamar cin nasarar Farisa da Alexander Mai Girma ya yi daga baya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Thābit ibn Qurra ya kasance masanin ilimi mai hazaka a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci na karni na 9, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga fassarar littattafan gargajiya na Girka da ci gaban lissafi da ilimin taurari.
key_achievements: Jagoranci fassarar littattafan gargajiya na Girka zuwa Larabci
Ci gaban ka'idodin lissafi da statics
Gabatar da ka'idar precession na equinoxes
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ayyukansa na ilimi sun kafa muhimmin tushe ga ci gaban kimiyya a Musulunci da Yamma.

thabit-ibn-qurra.epic:
Thābit ibn Qurra (kimanin 836-901) ya kasance babban masanin lissafi, masanin taurari, likita, kuma mai fassara daga arewacin Mesopotamiya, wanda ya yi aiki a zamanin zinariya na Musulunci na karni na 9. An haife shi a tsohon birnin Harran, wanda ya kasance sansanin karshe na al'ummar Sabian, wanda ke da al'adun ilimin Girka da bautar taurari wanda ya samo asali tun zamanin Alexander Mai Girma. Al'ummar Sabian wata al'umma ce da ke rike da al'adun addini da na ilimi na musamman, suna bautar taurari da duniyoyi, kuma al'adun Mesopotamiya na da da na Hellenanci suka yi tasiri a kai. A cikin wannan yanayi na musamman, Thābit ya zama gwani a harshen Syriac, Girkanci, da Larabci, kuma ya zurfafa bincike a cikin ayyukan gargajiya na Euclid da Ptolemy, inda ya kafa tushe mai zurfi a fannin lissafi da ilimin taurari. Imaninsa na Sabian ya sa ya ga taurarin sama ba kawai a matsayin haske ba, amma a matsayin abubuwa masu tasiri na allahntaka, kuma wannan ya ba shi kwarin gwiwa sosai ga bincikensa na ilimi na tsawon rayuwarsa da kuma zurfin fahimtarsa game da sararin samaniya.

Amma duk da haka, imaninsa na Sabian na musamman ya haifar da rikici da koyarwar Musulunci na gargajiya da ke mamaye a lokacin. A karshe, an gurfanar da Thābit a gaban kotun addini, kuma ya fuskanci gwaji na barin garinsu na Harran. A wannan lokaci na tsanantawa da yawo, ya yi wata haduwa mai muhimmanci wacce ta canza rayuwarsa gaba daya, wato Muhammad ibn Musa ibn Shakir, wanda ya kasance babban masanin ilimi kuma mai karimci a zamaninsa. Ibn Shakir ya gane hazakar Thābit da zurfin iliminsa nan take, kuma ya roke shi da ya zo Baghdad, cibiyar ilimi ta daular Abbasid kuma cibiyar ilimi ta duniya. Wannan gayyata ba kawai canjin wuri ba ce ga Thābit, amma ta zama wani juyi zuwa sabuwar duniya inda 'yancin ilimi da damammaki marasa iyaka suka buɗe. Ya bar inuwar tsanantawa a baya, ya nufi 'Gidan Hikima' (Bayt al-Hikma) a Baghdad, inda hikimar tsohuwar duniya da sabbin ilimin Musulunci suka bunƙasa, kuma ya buɗe sabon babi a cikin tafiyarsa ta ilimi mai girma.

Bayan ya zauna a 'Gidan Hikima' a Baghdad, Thābit ya bunƙasa iliminsa kuma ya kai kololuwar nasarorinsa. Ya sadaukar da kansa ga fassara manyan ayyukan manyan masana falsafa na tsohuwar Girka kamar Archimedes, Apollonius, da Ptolemy zuwa harshen Larabci. Ayyukansa na fassara ba kawai canjin harshe ba ne, amma wani tsari ne mai zurfi na ilimi wanda ya haɗa da fahimtar ainihin ma'anar rubutun asali, nazarin su da zurfi, da kuma ƙara sabbin sharhi a wasu lokuta. Musamman a fannin lissafi, ya faɗaɗa ka'idar Pythagoras ta hanyar gabaɗaya ta don amfani da ita ga kowane nau'in alwatika, kuma ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban ka'idar lambobi ta hanyar gano sabon tsari don nemo nau'i-nau'i na 'lambobi masu abota' (amicable numbers). Lambobin masu abota sune lambobi biyu inda jimlar ainihin masu raba kowace lamba (ban da lambar kanta) daidai take da ɗayan lambar. Bugu da kari, a fannin kimiyyar lissafi, ya rubuta 'Kitāb al-Qarastūn' (Littafin Ma'auni) inda ya tsara ka'idodin statics a tsari mai kyau. Wannan littafi ya yi nazari mai zurfi kan yanayin daidaito na lever da kuma ra'ayin cibiyar nauyi, kuma ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen faɗaɗa iyakokin lissafi da kimiyyar lissafi ta hanyar gado da haɓaka ilimin tsohuwar Girka.

A fannin ilimin taurari ma, Thābit ibn Qurra ya gabatar da ka'idoji na musamman. Ya gabatar da 'ka'idar precession na equinoxes' don bayyana bambancin wurin equinox na bazara da aka samu tsakanin bayanan lura na lokacin da tsoffin rubuce-rubuce. Precession na equinoxes wani lamari ne inda wurin equinox na bazara ke motsawa a hankali zuwa yamma tare da ecliptic saboda canjin hankali a cikin shugabancin axis na juyawar duniya. Ko da yake an maye gurbin ka'idarsa da wani samfuri mafi inganci daga baya, wannan misali ne mai muhimmanci da ke nuna ruhinsa na ilimi mai ci gaba wanda ke neman kalubalantar ka'idojin da ake da su bisa ga shaidar gaskiya. Thābit, a matsayinsa na mai fassara, masanin lissafi mai kirkire-kirkire, masanin kimiyyar lissafi, masanin taurari, da kuma malami, ya taka rawar gada mai ƙarfi wajen haɗa hikimar tsohuwar Girka mai haske da duniyar ilimi mai kuzari ta zamanin zinariya na Musulunci. Gadonsa na ilimi ya ci gaba ta hanyar iyalinsa, ciki har da ɗansa Sinan da jikansa Ibrahim, kuma ya haskaka fitilar ilimi tsawon tsararraki, wanda ya bar babban tasiri a tarihin ilimin ɗan adam tare da nasarorin sauran manyan masana na zamanin zinariya na Musulunci.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Táhirih malamar Musulunci ce kuma mawaƙiya a Farisa ta karni na 19, majagaba mace manzo na addinin Bábí kuma alamar 'yantar da mata.
key_achievements: An naɗa ta a matsayin 'Haruffan Rayuwa' na Báb
Ta bayyana ba tare da mayafi ba a taron Badasht
Ta yi kira ga haƙƙin mata da sauye-sauyen addini
fact_box.legacy_statement: Alama ce ta gwagwarmayar neman haƙƙin mata da 'yancin addini, kuma ta yi tasiri sosai ga Addinin Baháʼí.

tahirih.epic:
A tsakiyar karni na 19, Farisa tana fuskantar wani lokaci mai cike da rudani inda tsoffin al'adu da sabbin ra'ayoyi ke karo da juna. A cikin wannan yanayi na tarihi, Táhirih (an haife ta a kusan 1814) ta bar tarihi a matsayin malamar Musulunci, mawaƙiya, kuma majagaba mace manzo na addinin Bábí. Sunanta na asali Fatimah Baraghani, an haife ta a cikin wani fitaccen gidan malamai a Qazvin, Farisa. Mahaifinta yana ɗaya daga cikin manyan malaman shari'a na zamaninsa, kuma mahaifiyarta ma mace ce mai ilimi sosai. Sakamakon wannan yanayi, Táhirih ta sami ilimi mai zurfi a fannoni daban-daban kamar Alkur'ani, Hadisi, Fiqhu na Musulunci, nahawun Larabci, da fasahar magana, wanda ba kasafai ake samu ga mata ba. Tun tana ƙarama, ta nuna basira ta musamman da kuma ƙishirwa mai zurfi ga ilimi, wanda nan da nan ya zama tushen gina mata suna a matsayin fitacciyar malama da aka gane har a cikin duniyar ilimi da maza suka mamaye. Amma ruhinta yana marmarin sabuwar gaskiya da za ta wuce tsarin addini da zamantakewa na gargajiya.

Ƙishirwar Táhirih ta ruhaniya ta kai ta ga koyarwar Bábísm, wani sabon motsi na addini wanda ya fara a 1844 lokacin da Mirza Ali Muhammad ya ayyana kansa a matsayin 'Báb', ma'ana 'Ƙofa', a Shiraz. Ko da yake ba ta taɓa saduwa da Báb a zahiri ba, ta kamu da sha'awar ra'ayoyinsa na juyin juya hali ta hanyar musayar wasiƙu, kuma nan da nan ta zama ɗaya daga cikin mabiyansa mafi sadaukarwa. Báb ya gane basirarta ta musamman da fahimtarta ta ruhaniya, ya naɗa ta a matsayin ta goma sha bakwai daga cikin almajiransa na farko, 'Haruffan Rayuwa', kuma ya ba ta laƙabin 'Táhirih', ma'ana 'Mai Tsarki'. Wannan sabon suna ya zama wani muhimmin juyi a rayuwarta. Ba ta ƙara zama 'yar malami ko matar aure ta gargajiya ba, ta kafa kanta a matsayin jagorar ruhaniya mai zaman kanta kuma mai kawo sauyi a zamantakewa, tana sanar da zuwan sabon zamani. Ta fara yaɗa saƙon Bábísm da himma, musamman tana gabatar da ra'ayoyi masu tsattsauran ra'ayi game da haƙƙin mata da haɓaka matsayinsu a cikin al'umma.

Mafi ban mamaki kuma mai ma'ana a rayuwar Táhirih ya faru a watan Yuni 1848, a taron shugabannin Bábí a Badasht. Wannan taro wuri ne mai mahimmanci don ayyana Bábísm a matsayin addini mai zaman kansa, wanda ya rabu gaba ɗaya daga shari'ar Musulunci, da kuma kafa sabon tsari. A lokacin taron, Táhirih ta yi wani aiki mai ban mamaki na cire mayafin gargajiya da ake tilasta wa mata a cikin al'ummar Farisa a lokacin, ta bayyana a gaban jama'a. Wannan ya wuce kawai adawa ta mutum ɗaya; ya kasance sanarwa mai ƙarfi da ke nuna rabuwa da tsohuwar shari'ar Musulunci, da kuma farkon sabon tsarin ruhaniya da zamantakewa inda maza da mata ke da haƙƙoƙi daidai. Wannan aikinta ya haifar da girgiza da cece-kuce mai yawa, har ma wasu Bábí sun yi mamaki, amma a lokaci guda ya tabbatar da ita a matsayin jagorar majagaba na sabon zamani. Waɗannan koyarwa da ayyuka masu tsattsauran ra'ayi sun jawo hankalin hukumomin Farisa nan da nan, kuma ta fuskanci tsanani mai tsanani, inda aka kama ta sau da yawa kuma aka tsare ta a gida.

Ra'ayoyin Táhirih masu tsattsauran ra'ayi da ruhinta marar karyawa sun kai ta ga makoma mai ban tausayi. A watan Agusta 1852, bayan yunƙurin wasu Bábí na kashe Shah, an fara tsananta wa Bábí a duk faɗin Farisa. Ko da yake Táhirih ba ta da hannu a cikin wannan lamari, masu mulki da ke tsoron tasirinta sun yanke mata hukuncin kisa. A ranar 16 ko 17 ga Agusta na wannan shekara, an shake ta a asirce a wani lambu a Tehran, ta yi shahada tana tsakiyar shekarunta na talatin. Labari ya nuna cewa ba ta rasa nutsuwarta ba har zuwa mutuwarta, kuma ta bar kalmomin cewa, 'Kuna iya kashe ni yadda kuke so, amma ba za ku iya hana 'yantar da mata ba'. Shahadarta ta ba Bábí kwarin gwiwa sosai, kuma tun daga lokacin ana girmama ta a matsayin muhimmiyar alama a cikin Addinin Baháʼí. Táhirih, a matsayin alamar gwagwarmayar neman haƙƙin mata da 'yancin addini, har yau tana ba da ƙarfin hali da kwarin gwiwa ga mutane da yawa a duk faɗin duniya. Rayuwarta ta cancanci a tuna da ita tare da sawun sauran majagaba waɗanda suka yi kira ga sauye-sauyen addini da zamantakewa a Gabas ta Tsakiya a karni na 19.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Fuzûlî mawaki ne na Oghuz Turkic na ƙarshen karni na 15 zuwa tsakiyar karni na 16, wanda ya ba da gudummawa sosai ga adabin Diwan mai harsuna uku.
key_achievements: Ƙirƙirar Diwan a cikin Azerbaijani, Farisa, da Larabci
Rubuta waƙar soyayya ta almara 'Leyli and Majnun'
Rubuta zargi na 'Şikâyetnâme'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Waƙoƙinsa sun haɗa Sufanci da motsin zuciyar ɗan adam, suna yin tasiri mai zurfi ga adabin Turkic da Farisa har zuwa yau.

fuzuli.epic:
Fuzûlî (1494-1556) ya kasance fitaccen mawaki, marubuci, kuma mai tunani daga kabilar Oghuz Turkic Bayat, sunansa na ainihi Muhammad bin Suleyman. An haife shi a yankin Iraki na yanzu, wataƙila a Karbala ko Hilla, ya rayu a lokacin rikice-rikicen siyasa mai tsanani inda daular Safawiyya da daular Usmaniyya ke gwabza faɗa don mamaye Gabas ta Tsakiya. Sunansa na rubutu 'Fuzûlî' yana nufin 'mai girman kai' ko 'mara amfani', wanda ke nuna burinsa na samun suna na musamman wanda wasu ba za su yi sha'awar sa ba. Tun yana yaro, ya himmatu wajen karatu, ya kuma ƙware a harsuna uku: Azerbaijani, Farisa, da Larabci, waɗanda suka zama tushen wahayinsa na waƙa. Ya kuma nuna zurfin ilimi a fannin lissafi da ilmin taurari, wanda ya nuna cewa shi masanin ilimi ne mai hazaka fiye da marubuci kawai. Fuzûlî ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga **al'adar Diwan** a cikin adabin Azerbaijani, inda Diwan ke nufin tarin waƙoƙin mawaki da aka tsara a cikin wani tsari da salon waƙa. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance lokacin gina wannan tushe na ilimi da kuma kafa kansa a matsayin mai fasaha a cikin lokaci mai cike da rudani.

Rayuwar Fuzûlî ta kasance tana da alaƙa da yanayin siyasa mara tabbas inda daular Safawiyya da daular Usmaniyya ke gwabza faɗa don mamaye Baghdad. Da farko, ya sadaukar da ayyukansa ga jami'an Safawiyya don neman tallafi, amma lamarin ya canza cikin sauri lokacin da Suleyman Mai Girma na daular Usmaniyya ya ci Baghdad a shekara ta 1534. Wannan sauyi ya kawo wa Fuzûlî ƙalubalen neman sabbin masu tallafawa. Ya dogara ga jami'an Usmaniyya, amma sau da yawa ba a biya shi albashin da aka yi masa alƙawari ba, wanda ya sa ya fuskanci matsalolin kuɗi. Wannan takaicin da ya ji game da rashin adalci na tsarin mulki da rashin tabbas na tsarin tallafi an bayyana shi a fili a cikin aikinsa na zargi, **'Şikâyetnâme'**. 'Şikâyetnâme' wani aiki ne da ya soki matsalolin da Fuzûlî ya fuskanta saboda rashin samun fansho da aka yi masa alƙawari, ta hanyar ban dariya amma mai kaifi, yana fallasa gazawar al'ummar jami'ai a lokacin tare da bayyana wahalar mai fasaha. Don haka, ko da a cikin canjin iko da rudanin zamaninsa, bai taɓa ajiye alkalaminsa ba, yana ci gaba da gwagwarmaya don kare imaninsa na fasaha.

Duk da waɗannan matsalolin siyasa da na kuɗi, ayyukan kirkire-kirkire na Fuzûlî sun ci gaba da bunƙasa sosai. Ya bar tarin waƙoƙi (Diwan) da yawa a cikin harsuna uku da ya ƙware: Azerbaijani, Farisa, da Larabci. Daga cikinsu, waƙar soyayya ta almara **'Leyli and Majnun'** da aka rubuta a cikin Azerbaijani ana ɗaukarta a matsayin babban aikinsa na rayuwa. Wannan aiki ya nuna kyawawan yadda soyayya mai ban tausayi a duniya ke canzawa zuwa soyayya ta Ubangiji, kuma ya yi tasiri sosai ga adabin Turkic na gaba. Har ila yau, ta hanyar misalai na falsafa kamar 'Beng ü Bâde (Hashish da Wine)', ya yi ƙoƙarin zargi al'umma da kuma bayyana zurfin tunani game da ainihin wanzuwar ɗan adam. Waƙoƙinsa sun wuce waƙoƙin soyayya kawai, sun haɗa da tunanin Sufanci na asiri da zurfin ji na ɗan adam, suna ɗauke da kukan rai don tsarkakewa ta hanyar wahala da kusantar Allah. Fuzûlî ya yi imani cewa wahalar soyayya ita ce wutar da ke tsarkake ɗan adam, kuma waƙa ita ce akwatin da ke ɗauke da wannan wuta, kuma ya bayyana wannan bincike na ruhaniya sosai a cikin dukkan ayyukansa.

An ce Fuzûlî ya rasu a Karbala a kusan shekara ta 1556 saboda annoba. Ya yi rayuwa mai ibada, yana hidima a matsayin mai kula da wurin ibada na Imam Hussein a duk rayuwarsa. Bayan mutuwarsa, Fuzûlî ya bar gado mara mutuwa a matsayin mawaki mai harsuna uku kuma mai tunani wanda ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci ga al'adar Diwan a cikin adabin Azerbaijani, Ottoman, da Farisa. Ikon sa na bayyana batutuwan falsafa da na ruhaniya masu rikitarwa a cikin waƙoƙi masu motsa rai har yanzu yana ba da sha'awa mai zurfi a yau. Ayyukansa suna ci gaba da nazari da tunawa a duk faɗin yankunan Turkic da Farisa, kuma suna ba da wahayi ga mawaka da masana da yawa. Bincikensa game da wahalar soyayya da soyayya ta Ubangiji yana da alaƙa da tafiye-tafiyen ruhaniya da aka samu a cikin ayyukan manyan mawakan Sufanci na zamaninsa kamar Rumi da Hafez, yana nuna binciken ruhaniya na duniya na ɗan adam.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Mawallafin da ya rubuta babban almara na Farisa, 'Shahnameh,' tsawon fiye da shekaru 30, ya kuma kare harshe da asalin al'ummar Farisa.
key_achievements: Ya sadaukar da kansa ga kiyaye harshe da al'adun Farisa
Ya rubuta babban almara na 'Shahnameh' tsawon shekaru 30
Ya kammala babban aiki mai baitoci 60,000
fact_box.legacy_statement: 'Shahnameh' ɗinsa ya kasance ginshiƙin adabin Farisa kuma alama ce ta asalin al'umma marar mutuwa.

ferdowsi.epic:
Ya kasance an haife shi a Tus, Khorasan, a cikin iyalin masu mallakar filaye, wato 'Dehqan'. Waɗannan 'Dehqan' sun kasance masu kiyaye labarai da al'adun Farisa na da, ko da bayan mamayar Larabawa. Ya girma yana ganin yadda harshe da al'adun al'ummarsu ke gushewa a karkashin inuwar harshen Larabci. Wata sha'awa mai zafi ta kama zuciyarsa cewa ba zai bari wannan babban gado ya ɓace ba, kuma ya ji wajibi mai girma ya rubuta tatsuniyoyin Farisa, almara, da tarihin sarakuna masu daraja don tsararraki masu zuwa.

Don haka, a kusan shekara ta 977 Miladiyya, yana da kimanin shekaru talatin da biyar, ya fara rubuta 'Shahnameh,' wato 'Littafin Sarakuna'. Wannan ba tarin waƙoƙi kawai ba ne, amma wani akwati ne mai ɗauke da babban almara na al'ummarsu, wanda ya fara daga halittar duniya har zuwa mamayar Larabawa ta ƙarni na 7. Ya tsara wani babban aiki mai baitoci kusan dubu sittin (60,000), bisa ga kayan da manyan mawallafa irin su Daqiqi suka bari. Ya shafe dare da yawa yana farfaɗo da jarumtakar jarumai irin su Rustam da hikimar sarakuna irin su Kay Khosrow a cikin harshen waƙa.

Lokacin da ya kammala wannan almara bayan ya ba da fiye da shekaru talatin, ya ba shi kyauta ga Sultan Mahmud, babban mai mulkin daular Ghaznavid. Sultan ya yi alkawarin ba shi ladan zinariya, amma bayan ya karɓi aikin, ya karya alkawarin, ya ba shi azurfa. Wannan ya haifar masa da cin mutunci mai zurfi da cin amana, fiye da matsalar kuɗi kawai. Cike da fushi, ya rubuta waƙar zargi da ke sukar Sultan, kuma dole ne ya bar yankinsa ya tafi gudun hijira.

A ƙarshe, ya koma garinsu na Tus cikin talauci, inda ya kawo ƙarshen rayuwarsa. Ko da yake bai sami dukiya da daraja ba a rayuwarsa, ya san cewa 'Shahnameh' zai zama abin tunawa marar mutuwa mai kiyaye harshen Farisa da asalin su. A yau, ganin yadda aikinsa ya zama ginshiƙin adabin Farisa kuma wani littafi mai daraja da duniya ke so, ya sa ya ji cewa rayuwarsa mai wahala ba ta tafi a banza ba. Ruhin Farisa zai rayu har abada a cikin waƙoƙinsa.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Admiral na sojan ruwa na Daular Usmaniyya kuma mai zana taswira. Ya bar taswirar duniya da ke nuna Nahiyar Amurka da littafin fasahar tafiyar jirgin ruwa.
key_achievements: Kammala taswirar duniya ta farko a shekarar 1513
Nuna bakin tekun Nahiyar Amurka daidai gwargwado
Rubuta 'Littafin Teku' da tattara fasahar tafiyar jirgin ruwa
fact_box.legacy_statement: Taswirorinsa da littattafansa sun kasance abin gado mai daraja da ke nuna hanyar teku ga masu bincike har zuwa yau.

piri-reis.epic:
Sunansa Ahmed Muhiddin Piri. Duniya ta san shi da Piri Reis, wato Kyaftin Piri. An haife shi a Gallipoli na Daular Usmaniyya, ya girma yana tafiya a Tekun Bahar Rum a cikin jirgin kawunsa Kemal Reis, wanda ya kasance shahararren ɗan fashin teku kuma Admiral. Tun yana yaro, ya koyi canjin yanayin teku, tsananin yaƙi, da kuma yadda ake gano hanya da taurari. Rayuwarsa ta matasa ta gudana tare da jiragen ruwa, takuba, da manyan bindigogi a cikin yaƙe-yaƙe marasa adadi da rundunonin sojan ruwa na Venice, Genoa, da Spain.

Ya yi nasarori a yaƙe-yaƙe na ruwa da yawa a ƙarƙashin tutar Sarki, kuma ya sami darajar Admiral na sojan ruwa na daular. Amma ainihin sha'awarsa ta fi dacewa da riƙe alƙalami da zana taswira fiye da amfani da takobi. Ya tattara labarai daga dukkan ma'aikatan jirgin ruwa, 'yan kasuwa, da masu bincike da ya haɗu da su a lokacin tafiye-tafiyensa, kuma ya tattara tsofaffin taswira. Haɗuwar iliminsu da gogewarsa ya sa fahimtarsa game da teku ta ƙara zurfafa kowace rana. Ba kawai soja ba ne, har ma masanin kimiyya ne mai binciken asirin teku.

A shekarar 1513, ya kammala taswirar duniya ta farko, bayan ya haɗa taswira fiye da ashirin da ya tattara. Wannan ya haɗa da bayanai daga taswirar almara da aka ce Columbus ya zana. Wannan taswira ta haifar da babban tasiri ta hanyar nuna bakin tekun Nahiyar Amurka, wanda ba a san shi ba a lokacin, daidai gwargwado. Daga baya, ya rubuta 'Kitab-ı Bahriye' (Littafin Teku), wanda ya tattara dukkan iliminsa, yana ɗauke da cikakkun bayanai game da dukkan tashoshin jiragen ruwa da bakin tekun Bahar Rum, da kuma fasahar tafiyar jirgin ruwa.

Amma shekarunsa na ƙarshe ba su kasance masu sauƙi ba. An naɗa shi Kwamandan Rundunar Sojan Ruwa ta Tekun Indiya, amma an zarge shi da gazawa wajen mamaye sansanin sojojin Portugal na Hormuz. A cikin makirci da rashin fahimta daga abokan gaba na siyasa, daga ƙarshe ya gamu da ƙarshe mai ban tausayi na kisa a Alkahira, yana kusan shekaru 90. Ko da yake jikinsa ya ɓace, taswirori da littattafan da ya bari sun kasance har yau, suna nuna hanyar teku ga masu bincike na duniya. Rayuwarsa, a ƙarshe, an zana ta har abada a kan tawada da takarda.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Harun al-Rashid, Khalifa na biyar na Daular Abbasid, ya jagoranci Zamanin Zinariya na Musulunci, inda ya cimma ci gaban ilimi da al'adu.
key_achievements: Kafa Gidan Hikima da ƙarfafa ilimi
Yaƙe-yaƙe na soja da Daular Byzantine
Kawarda iyalan Barmakid don ƙarfafa iko
fact_box.legacy_statement: Gadonsa na ilimi ya ba da gudummawa ga ci gaban wayewar Musulunci, kuma ana tuna shi a matsayin hali a cikin 'Littafin Dare Dubu da Daya'.

harun-al-rashid.epic:
Harun al-Rashid (an haife shi kusan 763 CE, ya hau karagar mulki a 786 CE) shi ne Khalifa na biyar na Daular Abbasid, wani mai mulki wanda ya jagoranci zamanin zinariya na Musulunci zuwa kololuwarsa. A ƙarshen ƙarni na 8, Khalifancin Abbasid ya kasance yana jin daɗin ci gaban siyasa, tattalin arziki, da al'adu, yana rungumar yankuna masu faɗi da al'adu daban-daban. Fara mulkinsa ya biyo bayan mutuwar ɗan'uwansa Al-Hadi ba zato ba tsammani, wanda ke nuna rikitarwa na tsarin iko a fadar Abbasid a lokacin. Ya kafa ikonsa a kan daular tare da goyon bayan mahaifiyarsa Al-Khayzuran da kuma iyalan Barmakid, wani dangi mai tasiri na Waziri. A wannan lokacin, Baghdad ta zama cibiyar ilimi da kasuwanci ta duniya, tana jin daɗin wadata mara misaltuwa, kuma fadarsa ta zama wurin taruwar ilimi, fasaha, dukiya, da iko. Ko da yake ana tuna zamaninsa a matsayin zamanin zinariya na wayewar Musulunci, a bayan fage akwai gwagwarmayar iko mai tsanani da tashin hankali na siyasa.

Ɗaya daga cikin fitattun halaye na mulkin Harun al-Rashid shine zurfin sha'awarsa ga ci gaban ilimi da koyo. Ya kafa 'Gidan Hikima' (Bayt al-Hikma) a Baghdad, wanda ya kasance babban cibiyar ilimi ta Daular Abbasid, inda ake tattarawa da fassara tsoffin rubuce-rubuce da kuma ƙarfafa binciken ilimi. Wannan cibiya ta jawo hankalin masana da yawa daga ko'ina cikin daular, da kuma daga Byzantium da Indiya, waɗanda suka sadaukar da albarkatu masu yawa da ƙoƙari don fassara littattafan falsafa, kimiyya, da magani na tsoffin Girkawa, Farisa, da Indiya zuwa harshen Larabci. Ayyukan tsoffin masu tunani kamar Aristotle, Plato, Euclid, da Galen an fassara su zuwa Larabci kuma an gabatar da su ga duniyar Musulunci, wanda ya haifar da farfaɗo da ilimi a cikin daular. Khalifa ya ji daɗin tattaunawa da masana har zuwa dare, yana nutsewa cikin binciken ilimi, wanda ya zama ainihin farin cikinsa kuma mafari na sabon zamani, fiye da mulki kawai. Waɗannan ayyukan ilimi sun yi tasiri sosai ga Farfaɗo na Turai a baya.

Amma rayuwar Khalifa ba za ta iya cika da binciken ilimi kaɗai ba. Dole ne ya ci gaba da ƙoƙari don kare iyakokin daularsa mai faɗi da kuma kiyaye kwanciyar hankali na ciki. Musamman ma, dangantaka da Daular Byzantine ta kasance muhimmiyar ƙalubale ta diflomasiyya da soja a duk tsawon mulkinsa. Harun al-Rashid ya jagoranci yaƙe-yaƙe na soja da yawa a kan Daular Byzantine, kuma sojojinsa sun shiga cikin Anatoliya, inda suka sami nasarori masu yawa. Waɗannan nasarorin soja sun ɗaukaka matsayin Khalifancin Abbasid, amma a lokaci guda sun kawo nauyin yaƙe-yaƙe na dindindin. A gefe guda, ya kafa alaƙar diflomasiyya tare da Charlemagne Mai Girma na Masarautar Frankish, wani mai mulki mai ƙarfi a Yamma, ta hanyar musayar jakadu. A matsayin alamar wannan musayar, giwa Abul Abbas, wanda Harun al-Rashid ya ba Charlemagne kyauta, ta zama wata alaƙa ta musamman tsakanin wayewar Gabas da Yamma. Duk da haka, a cikin daular, dole ne ya ƙarfafa cikakken ikonsa ta hanyar kawarda iyalan Barmakid a shekara ta 803, waɗanda ke da iko mai yawa kuma suna iya ƙalubalantar ikon Khalifa.

Shekarun ƙarshe na mulkin Harun al-Rashid sun kasance cike da rashin kwanciyar hankali saboda matsalolin maye gurbi. Don tabbatar da kwanciyar hankali na daular, ya shirya raba daular tsakanin 'ya'yansa biyu, Al-Amin da Al-Ma'mun, don su yi mulki.
