Wannan ya zama kamar yanke shawara mai ma'ana a lokacin, amma ya zama iri na bala'i wanda ya haifar da mummunan yaƙin basasa tsakanin 'ya'yan biyu bayan mutuwarsa. Ya rasu a shekara ta 809 CE a Tus saboda rashin lafiya, yayin da yake kan yaƙin neman zaɓe don murkushe tawaye a yankin Gabas. Bayan mutuwarsa, Khalifancin Abbasid ya fuskanci ɗan gajeren lokaci na hargitsi, amma gadonsa na ilimi da al'adu ya yi tasiri sosai ga ci gaban wayewar Musulunci. A yau, ana tuna shi a matsayin sarkin soyayya da hikima a cikin ayyukan adabi kamar 'Littafin Dare Dubu da Daya', amma ainihin rayuwarsa ta kasance wani babban tarihin almara wanda ya haɗa da ɗaukaka da baƙin ciki, hikima da bala'i. Salon mulkinsa da sha'awarsa ga ilimi sun zama abin koyi ga masu mulkin Musulunci na gaba, kuma ana samun irin wannan falsafar mulki a cikin wasu manyan sarakuna kamar Suleiman Mai Girma na Daular Ottoman.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Shams-ud-Din Mohammad Hafez-e Shirazi (karni na 14) babban mawakin soyayya ne na Farisa wanda ya rera waka game da soyayya da falsafa ta hanyar nau'in ghazal.
key_achievements: Babban malami na wakar soyayya ta Farisa, 'ghazal'
Ya yi aiki a matsayin mawakin fada a lokacin tashin hankali
Sukan munafuncin addini da bincike na ruhaniya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Tarin wakokinsa, 'Diwan', ya shiga cikin rayuwar mutanen Iran sosai, yana ba da hikima da ta'aziyya har zuwa yau.

hafez.epic:
Shams-ud-Din Mohammad Hafez-e Shirazi (wanda ya yi rayuwa a farkon karni na 14) ana tunawa da shi a matsayin daya daga cikin manyan mawakan soyayya da suka taba bayyana a tarihin adabin Farisa. An haife shi a Shiraz, Farisa, wata cibiya mai haske ta al'adu da ilimi a farkon karni na 14. Ko da yake mahaifinsa dan kasuwan gawayi ne, tun yana karami ya shiga cikin zurfin duniyar waka da ilimin addini. Ya koyi Alkur'ani mai tsarki daga mahaifinsa kuma ya sanya koyarwarsa a cikin zuciyarsa, har ya sami lakabin 'Hafez', wanda ke nufin 'mai haddacewa'. Rayuwarsa ta farko cike take da zazzafar sha'awar ilimi da waka, inda ya karanta ayyukan manyan mawakan zamaninsa kamar Rumi da Saadi, yana kafa harsashin gina duniyar wakokinsa ta musamman. Wannan tushe ya zama muhimmin abinci mai gina jiki a gare shi don kiyaye ruhinsa na fasaha mara girgiza ko da a cikin lokutan tashin hankali na gaba. Ya bunkasa zurfin tunani da kwarewa ta musamman ga harshe a cikin yanayin ilimi mai bunƙasa na Shiraz.

Hazakarsa ta musamman ta jawo hankalin sarakunan Shiraz ba da dadewa ba, kuma ya fara rayuwa mai ban sha'awa amma mara tabbas a matsayin mawakin fada. Amma zamaninsa lokaci ne na tashin hankali na siyasa mara yankewa. Daga daular Inju, zuwa daular Muzaffarid, har zuwa ga mai cin nasara mai zubar da jini Timur, ikon Shiraz ya canza ba tare da tsayawa ba, kuma Hafez ya fuskanci duka daukaka da gudun hijira tare da hawan da faduwar masu goyon bayansa. A wani lokaci, ya fuskanci gwaji na korar shi daga fada kuma dole ne ya bar Shiraz, birnin da yake so. Amma ko da a cikin wannan rudani na siyasa da wahalhalu na kashin kai, alkalaminsa bai taba tsayawa ba. Ta hanyar 'ghazal', wani nau'i na wakar soyayya da aka fi sani a adabin Farisa, ya rera waka game da soyayya, wahala, rashin dawwama na wanzuwar dan adam, da gaskiyar rayuwa a cikin zurfin harshe, yana nuna zafin da kyawun zamaninsa a lokaci guda. Wakokinsa sun kasance shaida ga zamaninsa kuma babban abin tunani na falsafa, fiye da nishadi kawai.

A tsakiyar wakokin Hafez akwai ra'ayin 'soyayya' mai matakai da yawa. Wannan na iya zama soyayya mai zafi ta duniya ga masoyi, ko kuma, fiye da haka, soyayya mai tsarki da asiri ga Allah. Ta hanyar wakokinsa, ya kwatanta ruwan inabi a matsayin alamar farin ciki na ruhaniya da gaskiya, kuma mashaya a matsayin wuri mafi gaskiya da gaskiya na wayewa fiye da cibiyoyin addini masu munafunci, yana sukar tsattsauran ra'ayi da munafuncin shugabannin addini na lokacin. Duk da cewa masana da yawa sun yi kokarin danganta wakokinsa da tunanin Sufanci na asiri, Hafez ya ki a daure shi a cikin wani tsari na tunani na musamman. Ya nemi gaskiya ta duniya a kowane lokaci na rayuwa: a cikin kyawun fure, farin ciki na ruwan inabi, da zafin soyayya. Wannan halinsa ya haifar da gina duniyar waka mai zurfi wacce ke bincika motsin zuciyar dan adam da tambayoyin wanzuwa, wanda ya wuce lokaci. Wakokinsa sun ba da gudummawar sautin rai fiye da wasan kalmomi kawai.

Hafez ya rufe idanunsa a kusan shekara ta 1390, a Shiraz, birnin da ya so a duk rayuwarsa. Amma ko da yake jikinsa ya bace, wakokinsa sun rayu har abada, suna zama gadon adabin Farisa mara mutuwa. Kabarinsa ya zama wuri mai tsarki da mahajjata da yawa ke ziyarta har zuwa yau, kuma tarin wakokinsa, 'Diwan', yana cikin kowane gida a Iran kuma ana daukarsa daya daga cikin littattafai mafi daraja. Mutanen Iran har yanzu suna ci gaba da al'adar 'Fal-e Hafez', inda suke bude Diwan dinsa don neman jagora a rayuwa da kuma hango makomar gaba. Wakokinsa sun wuce lokaci, suna bincika farin ciki da bakin ciki na dan adam da ma'anar wanzuwa, suna ba da zurfin ta'aziyya da wahayi. Kamar yadda ake cewa wakokinsa kamar ruwan inabi ne, wanda kamshinsa ke zurfafa yayin da yake tsufa, har yau ana son su a duk duniya. Wakokinsa, tare da ayyukan sauran mawakan Farisa na zamaninsa, kamar Saadi da Rumi, suna wakiltar zamanin zinariya na adabin Farisa, suna rera waka game da motsin zuciyar dan adam na duniya.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Halide Edib Adıvar marubuciya ce, mai kishin ƙasa, kuma mai ilimin mata daga Daular Usmaniyya da Turkiyya, wacce ta ba da gudummawa ga sukar matsayin mata da 'yancin ƙasa.
key_achievements: Bugawa littattafai masu sukar ƙarancin matsayin mata a Turkiyya
Shiga da aiki a matsayin soja a lokacin Yaƙin 'Yancin Turkiyya
Gooyon baya ga Pan-Turkism da motsin Turanism
Yin aiki a matsayin 'yar majalisa bayan kafa Jamhuriyar Turkiyya
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ta kasance majagaba a cikin adabin zamani na Turkiyya da motsin mata, tana ba da kwarin gwiwa ga kafa asalin ƙasa da shigar mata cikin al'umma.

halide-edib-adivar.epic:
Halide Edib Adıvar marubuciya ce, malama, mai kishin kasa, kuma mai ilimin mata wacce ta rayu a lokacin tashin hankali na Daular Usmaniyya da Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, an haife ta a ranar 11 ga Yuni, 1884, kuma ta rasu a ranar 9 ga Janairu, 1964. An haife ta a Constantinople (yanzu Istanbul), babban birnin Daular Usmaniyya, kuma yarinta bai kasance mai sauƙi ba ko kaɗan. Mutuwar mahaifiyarta da wuri da kuma canje-canjen iyali da suka faru lokacin da mahaifinta ya karɓi auren mata fiye da ɗaya sun bar rauni mai zurfi a cikin ƙaramar Halide. Amma ta sami sabon hangen nesa na duniya ta hanyar samun ilimin Yamma a makarantar mata ta Amurka, wanda ya zama muhimmin tushe ga ci gabanta na hankali. Aurenta na farko ya ƙare lokacin da ta zaɓi saki bayan mijinta ya so ya auri mace ta biyu. Wannan shi ne farkon turjiyarta kai tsaye ga al'adun mazan jiya na lokacin, kuma an rubuta shi a matsayin lokacin farkawar mata wanda zai zama imaninta na rayuwa. Ta shahara da littattafanta da ke sukar matsayin mata na ƙasa a cikin al'ummar Turkiyya da kuma rashin sha'awar mata game da canji.

Bayan kawo karshen aurenta, Halide Edib Adıvar ta fara bayyana ra'ayoyinta a matsayin marubuciya kuma 'yar jarida. Littattafanta sun jawo hankalin masu karatu ta hanyar gabatar da tambayoyi masu zurfi game da asalin Turkiyya da kuma rawar mata a cikin al'umma mai saurin canzawa. Musamman, ta'asar Yaƙin Balkan ta zama wani muhimmin abu da ya canza ta daga mai ilimi kawai zuwa mai kishin ƙasar Turkiyya mai zafi. Ta yi imani da Pan-Turkism (akidar da ke goyon bayan haɗin kan al'ummar Turkawa) kuma ta goyi bayan motsin Turanism (ra'ayin da ke jaddada haɗin kan al'ummar Turkawa) a cikin littattafai da yawa. Ta yi amfani da alkalami don motsa zukatan mutane da kuma tada sabon ruhun Turkiyya a cikin daular da ke rugujewa. A cikin al'ummar masu ilimi na Istanbul, sunanta nan da nan ya zama alamar canji da farkawa, kuma rubuce-rubucenta sun zama kayan aiki mai ƙarfi don haɓaka wayewar ƙasa.

Bayan shan kashi a Yaƙin Duniya na Farko da kuma mamayar Istanbul da sojojin haɗin gwiwa suka yi, Halide Edib Adıvar ba za ta iya ɓoyewa a bayan alkalami ba. A shekarar 1919, ta yi jawabi a gaban taron jama'a a dandalin Sultanahmet, inda ta kunna wutar juriya, kuma nan da nan ta zama alama ce ta motsin juriya na ƙasa. Ta gudu zuwa Anatolia tare da mijinta na biyu, Dr. Adnan Adıvar, kuma ta shiga motsin ƙasa wanda Mustafa Kemal Atatürk ke jagoranta. Ba wai kawai marubuciya ba ce, ta zama soja mai ɗauke da bindiga don ƙasarta, kuma ta yi aiki a matsayin jami'a mai ƙaramin matsayi, tana gudanar da asibitocin filin, da sauransu, tana aiki tuƙuru a gaba. Bayan ta fuskanci ta'asar yaƙin da kanta, ta rubuta littafin 'The Shirt of Flame' bisa ga abubuwan da ta gani, wanda aka yaba masa a matsayin aikin da ke nuna zafin rai da jaruntaka na Yaƙin 'Yancin Turkiyya. Gudunmawarta mai sadaukarwa an rubuta ta a matsayin muhimmin ɓangare na Yaƙin 'Yancin Turkiyya.

Yaƙin ya ƙare da nasara kuma an kafa Jamhuriyar Turkiyya, amma gwagwarmayar Halide Edib Adıvar ba ta ƙare ba. Bayan kafa jamhuriyar, ba ta yarda da salon mulkin kama-karya na Mustafa Kemal Atatürk ba. Ta ji takaici sosai game da gaskiyar da ke nisantar da ita daga Turkiyya ta dimokuradiyya da ta yi mafarki, kuma a ƙarshe ta bar ƙasarta da ta taimaka wajen kafawa don fara dogon lokaci na gudun hijira. Duk da cewa ta yi lacca a Turai, Amurka, da Indiya, tana yada al'adun Turkiyya da ruhun 'yanci, sha'awar ƙasarta koyaushe tana tare da ita. Sai bayan mutuwar Atatürk ta iya komawa Turkiyya, kuma a shekarar 1950, an zaɓe ta a matsayin 'yar majalisa, inda ta sake yi wa ƙasarta hidima tare da yin tasiri a siyasance. Rayuwarta ta kasance tafiya mai rikitarwa da yawa a matsayin mai kishin ƙasa, mai ilimin mata, soja, mai ilimi, kuma mai kafa kuma mai sukar jamhuriyar. Rayuwarta ta yi daidai da gwagwarmayar sauran mata masu ilimi waɗanda suka rayu a lokacin tashin hankali, kuma musamman tana ba da zurfin tunani game da rawar mata a cikin rushewar Daular Usmaniyya da kuma kafa jamhuriyar.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Babban sarki wanda ya mai da Babylon babbar ƙasa a Mesopotamia kuma ya kafa tushen wayewa ta hanyar dokoki guda ɗaya.
key_achievements: Haɗa kan Mesopotamia da kafa Daular Babylon
Kafa Dokokin Hammurabi masu adalci
Ƙarfafawa da faɗaɗa kayan aikin birni
fact_box.legacy_statement: Mai kafa dokoki wanda ya gina tushen wayewa ta hanyar doka da tsari, kuma ana tuna da dokokinsa a matsayin alamar adalci har yau.

hammurabi.epic:
Lokacin da Hammurabi ya hau gadon sarautar Babylon, birninsu ɗaya ne kawai daga cikin biranen-jihohi masu yawa na Mesopotamia. Mahaifinsa, Sin-Muballit, ya bar masa mulki, amma akwai manyan abokan gaba kamar Larsa, Eshnunna, da Mari a kusa. Farko-farkon mulkinsa ya mai da hankali kan gina tushe. Ya ƙarfafa ganuwar birni, ya gyara haikali, kuma mafi mahimmanci, ya yi aiki tuƙuru wajen haƙa da faɗaɗa magudanan ruwa na ban ruwa waɗanda ke da mahimmanci ga rayuwar mutane. Wannan lokaci ne mai shiru amma mai muhimmanci na kafa tushen daular.

Tsawon shekaru da dama, ya tara ƙarfi kuma ya jira lokaci. Ta hanyar diflomasiyya da kawance, ya sa abokan gaba su yi yaƙi da juna, kuma lokacin da suka raunana, ya kai musu mummunan hari. Ta hanyar cin Larsa, babban abokin gaba a kudu, da kuma mamaye Mari a arewa, ya zama mai mulkin Mesopotamia gaba ɗaya. Sojojinsa sun ci nasara a yaƙe-yaƙe da yawa ƙarƙashin albarkar alloli, kuma Babylon ta koma daga ƙaramin birni-jiha zuwa zuciyar daula mai faɗi. Wannan ba wai cin nasara kawai ba ne, a'a, aiki ne mai tsarki don kawo tsari ga ƙasashe masu tarwatsewa.

Amma mulkin gaskiya ba ya dogara ga ƙarfi kaɗai. Ya so ya kafa adalci guda ɗaya a duk faɗin daular. Don haka, bisa ga hikimar da ya samu daga Shamash, allahn rana kuma allahn adalci, ya ƙirƙiri dokokinsa. Waɗannan dokoki sun ƙunshi sassa 282, kuma sun shafi kowane fanni na rayuwar mutane, daga kasuwanci, aure, gado, har zuwa laifuka. Ƙa'idar 'ido a madadin ido, haƙori a madadin haƙori' tana nufin ramuwar gayya mai adalci, amma babban manufarta ita ce hana masu ƙarfi zaluntar masu rauni. Ya sassaƙa waɗannan dokoki a kan dutse don kowa ya gani.

Bayan mutuwarsa, daular ta fuskanci matsaloli, amma ruhun dokokin da ya kafa ana tunawa da shi har yau, bayan dubban shekaru. Ba wai mai cin nasara kawai ba ne, a'a, ya so a tuna da shi a tarihi a matsayin mai kafa dokoki wanda ya gina tushen wayewa ta hanyar doka da tsari. Sunansa Hammurabi za a tuna da shi a matsayin 'Babban Sarki', 'Sarkin Adalci'. Wannan shine shaidar cewa ya cika kiran da alloli da mutane suka ba shi.

fact_box.one_line_summary: Hurrem Sultan, matar Sultan Suleiman Mai Girma na Daular Usmaniyya a karni na 16, ta karya al'adu kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a fannin siyasa da agaji.
key_achievements: Zama matar Sultan Suleiman Mai Girma a hukumance
Ƙirƙirar matsayin Haseki Sultan da ƙarfafa iko
Jagorantar diflomasiyyar Daular Usmaniyya da ayyukan agaji
fact_box.legacy_statement: Ana tuna ta a matsayin majagaba wacce ta buɗe kofa ga zamanin ikon mata a Daular Usmaniyya, kuma ta yi tasiri mai girma a dukan al'umma.

hurrem-sultan-roxelana.epic:
Hurrem Sultan (kimanin 1502 – 1558) ita ce Haseki Sultan da aka fi so kuma matar Sultan Suleiman Mai Girma na Daular Usmaniyya, kuma ana tuna ta a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mata mafi tasiri a tarihin Usmaniyya. An yi imanin cewa ainihin sunanta Aleksandra Lisowska ko Anastasiya Lisovska, kuma an haife ta a Rohantyn, Ruthenia, wani yanki na Ukraine a yau, a matsayin 'yar wani firist na Orthodox. A farkon karni na 16, lokacin da Daular Usmaniyya ke kan kololuwar mulkinta, tana mulkin manyan yankuna a Turai, Asiya, da Afirka, rayuwarta ta yau da kullun ta canza gaba ɗaya a farkon shekarun 1520s lokacin da Tatars na Crimea suka kai hari. An kama ta a matsayin baiwa, an kai ta Istanbul, babban birnin Daular Usmaniyya, ta hanyar kasuwar bayi, kuma aka ba da ita ga harem na Sultan Suleiman. Da farko, an kira ta 'Roxelana,' ma'ana 'wadda ta fito daga Ruthenia,' kasancewar ɗaya daga cikin mata da yawa, kuma ta shiga cikin zuciyar daular a matsayin baiwa mai tawali'u. Duk da wannan farkon mai ban tausayi, Roxelana tana da ƙarfin hali da basira na musamman don tsara makomarta. 

A cikin yanayin harem mai rufewa da gasa, Roxelana ba da daɗewa ba ta nuna halayenta na musamman. Baya ga kyawunta, tana da basira mai ban mamaki, hazaka mai ban dariya, da kuma ikon koyon harsuna da yawa cikin sauri. Sultan Suleiman ya burge shi sosai da basirarta da kuma halinta mai fara'a, kuma ya ba ta sabon suna 'Hürrem,' ma'ana 'mai dariya' ko 'mai fara'a.' Hürrem ta zama ita kaɗai ce za ta iya karanta wa Sultan waƙoƙi, ta tattauna batutuwan siyasa, kuma ta sa zuciyar sarkin da ke kaɗaici ta yi dariya da gaske. Ta haifi 'ya'ya da yawa tare da Suleiman, ciki har da Mehmed, Mihrimah, Abdullah, Selim, Bayezid, da Cihangir, ta kafa matsayinta mai ƙarfi a cikin harem. Musamman ma, duk da gasa mai tsanani da Mahidevran, mahaifiyar Mustafa, ɗan fari na Sultan, Hürrem ta ci gaba da samun tagomashin Sultan, ta zama ba kawai mai masauki ba, amma abokiyar zama mafi kusa da mai ba shi shawara. Wannan wani abu ne da ba a taɓa gani ba wanda ya karya tsoffin al'adun harem na Daular Usmaniyya. 

Tasirin Hürrem ya faɗaɗa fiye da manyan ganuwar harem zuwa ga dukan Daular Usmaniyya. Suleiman Mai Girma ya karya al'adun daular Usmaniyya na ƙarni da yawa, ya 'yantar da Hürrem daga bauta a kusan 1533, sannan ya aure ta a hukumance a kusan 1534, wanda hakan ya zama wani abu mai ban mamaki. Ta haka, an ba ta sabon matsayi na 'Haseki Sultan,' wanda ke nufin sarauniyar da Sultan ke so, kuma yana nuna matsayi mafi girma ga mace a cikin daular. A matsayinta na sarauniya, Hürrem ta shiga cikin manufofin waje na daular, tana musayar wasiƙun diflomasiyya kai tsaye da sarakunan ƙasashe maƙwabta a madadin Sultan. An kuma soki ta da cewa ba ta yi jinkiri ba wajen kawar da abokan gaba don tabbatar da cewa 'ya'yanta sun sami damar gadon sarauta. Jita-jitar cewa ta yi tasiri a kan kisan Babban Vizier Pargalı Ibrahim Pasha a 1536 da kuma kisan Yarima Mustafa, ɗan fari na Suleiman, a 1553, sun nuna wani gefe mai zafi na wannan gwagwarmayar iko. Hürrem mutum ce da za ta iya yanke shawara mai tsanani don iyalinta da makomar daular. 

Duk da gwagwarmayar iko, Hurrem Sultan ta gudanar da ayyukan agaji masu yawa. Ta gina 'Hurrem Sultan Külliye' a Istanbul, kuma ta kafa cibiyoyin agaji a Urushalima da Makka don kula da rayuwar mutane. Wannan ya nuna cewa ba kawai mai iko ba ce, amma mutum ce mai alhakin zamantakewa. Bayan mutuwarta a 1558, ana tuna Hurrem Sultan a matsayin ɗaya daga cikin mata mafi ƙarfi a tarihin Daular Usmaniyya, kuma a matsayin majagaba wacce ta buɗe kofa ga 'Zamanin Mata na Sultan.' Rayuwarta, wacce ta fara a matsayin yarinya baiwa daga ƙasa mai nisa kuma ta rubuta tarihin daular da kanta, shaida ce mai ban sha'awa ta yadda ƙarfin hali da basirar mutum za su iya canza babban keken kaddara. Rayuwarta, tare da ta wata mai mulki mace mai ƙarfi a Daular Usmaniyya, Kösem Sultan, ana ɗaukar ta a matsayin muhimmin misali na kololuwar ikon mata a cikin daular.

fact_box.one_line_summary: T. E. Lawrence wani mai kasada ne kuma soja ɗan Biritaniya a farkon karni na 20, wanda ya jagoranci tawayen Larabawa kuma ya yi tasiri sosai a tarihin Gabas ta Tsakiya.
key_achievements: Jagorancin dabarun yaƙin gwauron zabo a tawayen Larabawa
Nasarar aikin mamaye Aqaba
Rubuta littafin tarihin kansa 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom'
fact_box.legacy_statement: Rayuwarsa mai rikitarwa da kuma rawar da ya taka a Gabas ta Tsakiya ana ci gaba da tunawa da su ta hanyar adabi da fina-finai har zuwa yau, suna ba da babban ilhami.

t-e-lawrence.epic:
T. E. Lawrence (1888-1935) wani Bature ne wanda ya bar babban tarihi a Gabas ta Tsakiya a farkon karni na 20 mai cike da rudani, a matsayin mai kasada, masanin ilimin kimiya na kayan tarihi, soja, jami'in diflomasiyya, da sauran su, tare da halaye daban-daban. An haife shi a ranar 16 ga Agusta, 1888, a Wales, ya karanci tarihi a Jami'ar Oxford kuma ya bunkasa sha'awa mai zurfi ga kagara na Crusades na zamanin da. Sha'awar iliminsa ta kai shi yankunan Siriya da Falasdinu, inda ya bincika tsoffin wurare kuma ya sami kyakkyawar fahimtar al'adun Larabawa da harshensu. Musamman, daga 1910 zuwa 1914, ya shiga cikin aikin tono Carchemish na Gidan Tarihi na Biritaniya, inda ya sami kwarewar aiki a matsayin masanin ilimin kimiya na kayan tarihi, kuma a cikin wannan tsari, ta hanyar hulɗa da mazauna yankin, ya fahimci rikitarwa na siyasa da zamantakewa a Gabas ta Tsakiya. Wannan tarihin ya zama wani muhimmin kadara wanda daga baya ya ba shi damar taka muhimmiyar rawa a babban canjin tarihi na Yaƙin Duniya na Farko. Rayuwarsa ta farko ta kasance ci gaba da bincike, haɗe da sha'awar ilimi da ruhun kasada.

Lokacin da Yaƙin Duniya na Farko ya barke, zurfin ilimin T. E. Lawrence game da Gabas ta Tsakiya da kuma iyawar harshensa an ɗauke su a matsayin wani muhimmin kadara ga Hukumar Leken Asiri ta Sojojin Biritaniya. An tura shi Alkahira a 1914, inda ya yi aikin nazarin bayanan sirri, kuma nan da nan ya fahimci yuwuwar kabilun Larabawa da ke fatan samun 'yanci daga mulkin Daular Usmaniyya. A 1916, ya yi wata ganawa mai muhimmanci da Yarima Faisal, ɗaya daga cikin shugabannin tawayen Larabawa. Wannan ganawar ta zama wani babban canji a rayuwar T. E. Lawrence, inda ya wuce matsayin jami'in haɗin gwiwa kawai, ya sami amincewar Larabawa, ya sanya tufafinsu, ya yi tunani kamar su, kuma ya zama wani muhimmin mutum wanda ya goyi bayan tawayen Larabawa a kan Daular Usmaniyya. Tawayen Larabawa ya kasance babban tawaye da al'ummar Larabawa da ke ƙarƙashin mulkin Daular Usmaniyya suka yi don samun 'yanci, kuma T. E. Lawrence ya jagoranci sojojin Larabawa a matsayin mai tsara dabarun soja da kuma mai dabarun yaƙi na wannan tawaye. Ya taka rawar gani a matsayin gada tsakanin Biritaniya da Larabawa don cimma burin 'yancin Larabawa, kuma ya ba da gudummawa mai mahimmanci wajen canza yanayin yaƙin.

T. E. Lawrence ya jagoranci sojojin Larabawa kuma ya yi amfani da sabbin dabarun yaƙin gwauron zabo a kan sojojin Daular Usmaniyya. Musamman, aikin lalata layin dogo na Hejaz ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen gurgunta layin samar da kayayyaki na Daular Usmaniyya da kuma hana motsin sojoji, wanda ya canza yanayin yaƙin. Ɗaya daga cikin manyan nasarorinsa mafi ban mamaki shine aikin mamaye tashar jiragen ruwa ta Aqaba a 1917, ta hanyar tsallaka hamada ba tare da wani ya yi tsammani ba. Wannan nasara mai ban mamaki ta zama wani muhimmin juyi a tawayen Larabawa, kuma ta ba shi shahararren suna na 'Lawrence na Arabiya'. Amma yaƙin ya bar masa raunuka masu zurfi. Azabar da ya sha a matsayin fursuna a Deraa da kuma mummunan yanayin yaƙin sun bar masa tabo maras gogewa a ransa, kuma wannan ya zama tushen rikice-rikice da rashin jin daɗi da ke cikin zuciyarsa. An girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon yaƙi, amma a lokaci guda, ya sha wahala yayin da yake shaida bala'in yaƙi da kuma sabanin mulkin mallaka a kusa.

Bayan yaƙin, T. E. Lawrence ya yi ƙoƙari ya kare muradun Larabawa a taron zaman lafiya na Paris a 1919 kuma ya yi aiki don kafa ƙasashe masu cin gashin kai, amma ya fuskanci takaici a gaban rikitarwa na bukatun manyan ƙasashe masu mulkin mallaka da kuma yarjejeniyoyin sirri. Ya ji takaici sosai game da gaskiyar cewa Biritaniya ba ta cika alkawarin 'yanci ga Larabawa ba. Shahararren gwarzon yaƙi ya zama babban nauyi a gare shi, kuma ya so ya rayu rayuwa ta yau da kullun, nesa da idon jama'a. Ya yi aiki a Rundunar Sojan Sama ta Biritaniya da kuma sashin tankokin yaƙi a ƙarƙashin sunayen karya 'John Hume Ross' da 'Thomas Edward Shaw', yana neman ta'aziyya a cikin injuna da gudun gudu. Littafinsa mai suna 'Seven Pillars of Wisdom', wanda ke ɗauke da abubuwan da ya fuskanta a yaƙi da kuma rikice-rikicen cikin gida, an buga shi a 1922, kuma daga baya aka fitar da shi ga jama'a a 1926, inda aka ɗauke shi a matsayin babban aikin adabi. A ranar 19 ga Mayu, 1935, ya mutu ba zato ba tsammani a wani hatsarin babur, kuma ya kasance wani asiri har abada. Rayuwarsa mai rikitarwa da kuma rawar da ya taka a Gabas ta Tsakiya ana ci gaba da tunawa da su ta hanyar adabi da fina-finai har zuwa yau, suna ba da babban ilhami, kuma akwai wani abu da ya dace da wahalar masu fafutukar 'yanci na sauran ƙasashen Asiya da Afirka waɗanda suka yi mafarkin cin gashin kai a lokacin mulkin mallaka.
